comments: I cannot wait to book this space again. This is one of the best places to stay in the Downtown Crossing area. Host was super responsive and very helpful. Room was beautiful and quiet and had everything I needed.

Great location, cute place, overall pretty clean and tidy except for the floors. Only complaint is the floor was dirty. After walking around the studio for a short time I caught a glimpse of my foot and both ended up being super noticeably dirty. I put some socks on after washing my feet and they also ended up dirty after walking around. I would stay here again but would have to bring a swiffer!

I stayed for a week to attend a conference and I can say it was much better than the surrounding hotels and better priced. Located in the middle of Downtown Boston, you are within walking distance of everything.
The kitchen was huge, and clean, and included all the basics to cook your own meals.
Care should be taken however for the noise levels on the weekend (associated with the club nearby mentioned on the listing). While there were no issues within the week, on Saturday night I woke up several times due to drunk people causing a commotion outside of said club.
All in all however an easy pick for anyone looking to stay in Boston.

The place was in a very convenient location for one looking to take some form of public transportation or just walk around.   Noise is part of the city and is to be expected. Just prepare for it.  Convenience shops and a subway station just a couple blocks away. More than one person, I would go with a larger room.  Thank you.
Beautiful place!
Great location to stay for the weekend in Boston! Everything was very clean and tidy!
Enjoyed our stay, would come again!
Amazing location next to House of Blues, MGM Music Hall, and Fenway Park. Very good music theme, convenient nitro coffee, breakfast, and vinyl collection. Will definitely be my go-to hotel in Boston!
Lovely place, would definitely consider staying again
Tom is so friendly , he gave me all the informations i needed. Staying in his place was just like at home. Also he has a awesome dog Belle, they welcome me so much.

This place is in the perfect location. It is in an older building. We did have an issue with the bathtub not being cleaned but the host refunded our cleaning fee. The rest of the place was clean. But it doesn’t give a clean vibe because the building is old. The air conditioner did not get that cold either so it was a bit warm. Also just fyi the bathroom does not have any outlets.

fue frustrarte desde el principio por la cancelación herronia de mi reverba luego quise alargar mi alojamiento y por la supuesta infracción no podía y tardo tres días para dar una solución luego bloqueo los días para poder hacer la reserva nuevamente en el mismo lugar y para rematar quería que saliera el sábado 15  cuando yo tenia que salir hasta el domingo 16 y fue a tocarme la puerta para que saliera solamente porque confundió el día todo un desastre desde el principio la peor experiencia que yo e pasado con este tipo de renta

Location was great! About a 3 minute walk from a T stop (metro) and right next to a doughnut shop. Parking was sometimes challenging and the heat sometimes was unable to warm up the apartment to the temperature we set it to, but it was a very cold night. Overall, the pictures were accurate and it was a wonderful experience.

The apartment was spacious with plenty of space to set up a computer and a couple of sofas. The kitchen was very well equiped, which made cooking in an option. It has more windows than a typical basement apartment which is nice.

A lovely stay in a quiet area of Jamaica Plain with some lovely hills and streets to walk around. Centre street is nearby with some restaurants or places for breakfast. The room was beautiful was awesome light getting in through the windows. Penny is friendly and helpful as a host. Had a great stay here and would book it again.

We really enjoyed our stay! The place is clean and cozy and you can't beat the location (really close to many historical sites, restaurants and shops). The host was professional and responsive. We would stay here again!
Perfect place I stayed in and lay back in the middle of everything. Don't drive everything is walking distance....I love it you will to
Cynthia was so helpful and it was a well worth visit

I had a lovely stay at Jonathan's house! He was very proactive in providing clear instructions, the kitchen and bathroom were pristine and the loft room was cozy and peaceful. I appreciated how everything was neatly labeled, and he was very responsive in providing information. Thanks for hosting me!
Excellent stay.  5 Star in every respect.
Rosy was an amazing host. The place was stunning ! Thank you for hosting us !

This place was beautiful , quite and very clean! One of the best places I’ve stayed in to date! Walking distance to metro and bus, and into the heart of Jp! Highly recommend this to anyone travelling to Boston! Thank you Ann and Esther!
Rebecca went over & beyond to make sure everything went according to plan. Her place is conducive, she’s very welcoming and I will surely stay again in the future.
Wir waren sehr zufrieden, haben tolle Tipps erhalten. Krisztian war immer hilfsbereit. Vielen Dank!

Es war großartig bei Booker! Das Zimmer ist sehr geräumig und das Bett ist riesig.
In wenigen Minuten ist man zu Fuß bei der U-Bahn Station und von dort in 15 Minuten in Downtown Boston.
Das Haus von Booker liegt hervorragend, um mit dem Zug nach Foxboro zu fahren, wenn man ein Spiel der Patriots besuchen möchte.
Booker ist ein sehr freundlicher Gastgeber und nimmt sich auch gern die Zeit für ein Gespräch.
Great location, great value, great hosts!

Our stay here was wonderful!  The location is absolutely perfect, walking distance to so many amazing things.  The place itself was very comfortable.  We would stay here again and highly recommend you do so as well!
Great apartment and location with very accommodating team. No hidden fees and a stress free exit.

I stayed for the 2nd time at Polly's place and just like the first time, I could not have asked for a better place/host. It is exactly as advertised and Polly is going to great lengths to make you feel welcome. I arrived late, but communication and everything was perfect. Things like the fridge always filled with beverages and snacks for the guests are just the icing on the cake. Strongly recommended!!
Execellent location, very close to Harvard Business School. Thank you for everything.
Robin has a beautiful house in a great suburb of Boston and this is  a terrific room - very peaceful and relaxing.

The apartment was very clean when we arrived.  The host provided excellent instructions for entering the building & the apartment.  There is street & subway noise but we didn’t need a white noise machine & it didn’t affect sleeping.  Would definitely recommend!!
This Airbnb was the perfect spot for our little trip in Boston! Very clean and close to SO MANY restaurants and hot spots.
As advertised this is a lovely accommodation in Jamaica Plain. Walkable to transit and pleasant commercial district.
We stayed at Bill and Maureen’s while visiting town for a wedding. The location was perfect and we loved exploring the neighborhood. We would recommend their home to any visiting the area!

Fab location.
We did have some WiFi issue but didn’t take to long to get resolved.
If we were in Boston again, I wouldn’t hesitate in booking this flat.
Good location in Financial District.  Clean home.  Convenient walk to most tourist activities.
spacious especially given the neighborhood
Love Back Bay. Great location close to the Prudential Center and parking. T nearby. Most responsive host I’ve had on AirBnB.

The place is a perfect location to explore Boston. It’s walking distance to most things, parking is easily available. If you are light sensitive in the morning, I’d recommend you bring sleep masks as the blinds don’t cover the curved area of the windows (top).
Parking: there is a public garage a couple blocks away with $9/night parking. We parked on state street in a very well lit safe garage.
Check in: team emailed everything in advance. No issues.
Beds: memory foam king beds. Very comfortable.
Supplies: there were clean towels in each room, the kitchen was well equipped.
Noise: It’s a city apartment but was quiet when considering the location. There’s some city noise given the location
We had a good stay! The location was everything

I stayed there for one month. John is a considerate host, with everything needed in the house.The location is great as well, several minutes walk distance to the orange line.  The neighborhood is safe! All in all, I had wonderful one month in there!
Great stay! Clean place and quiet neighborhood!
Charles was a great host and everything was exactly as pictured/described! He was very helpful and just a phone call or text away. Highly recommend!
logement très agréable, très bien situé et très calme
Excellent place for 3 guys to stay the weekend to catch some baseball games!

Where to begin!? Kelly and Chris’s place is the PERFECT place to stay in Boston. You can’t beat the location, it’s literally right in the middle of everything! The space was very clean and cozy and they have it stocked with pretty much anything you might need. Including laundry soap in the laundry room, cooking essentials, cleaning supplies, bathroom toiletries, etc. They even have maps of Boston and a little black book that gives you ideas of what is around you, where to go, what to eat. If that’s not enough.. Kelly will happily give you tips! She was so great with her communication with me and gave me so many lovely ideas for our stay that I referenced throughout our trip. I loved every second of our stay. It was a great place to come back to after a day out exploring the beautiful city. Which reminds me of the phenomenal shower and comfortable bed. You don’t want to miss out! Trust me! I could go on and on about this stay, but bottom line is, Kelly and Chris know what they’re doing and you won’t be disappointed. I will definitely be coming back in the future! Thank you so much for everything! It was perfect!

The apartment was great - exactly as described and had everything I needed for a work trip to Boston. Albert shared detailed instructions for check-in, making the process quick and easy, and was responsive to questions. Location is a short walk to plenty of shops, restaurants, and transportation. Highly recommend!

I just needed a place to sleep between flight and bus travel, so I booked a room here. They gave me a free upgrade to a bigger apartment, which was so clean and stocked with great essentials. Check in and check out were so easy. I'd definitely stay here again.
Great Location. Extremely clean.
Had the perfect stay while on tour hosting dinners. Would definitely stay again. Beautiful home

Great location! Everything you need is in walking distance. It was clean, provided basic necessities, and had a pretty view. The hosts responded quickly and were helpful. I would recommend staying here.

We booked this place to stay as 2 couples. The location was perfect with the T being right across the street. It was so easy to access other parts of the city, and even a day trip to Salem. The place was clean and just what we needed to get ready and sleep as we were out and about most of the day/night. The pull out couch wasn’t fully what we expected, as it was more of a trundle and maybe closer to a full-size bed rather than a queen, but still worked for our purposes.

Our stay was fantastic.  Our location was in an awesome neighborhood with plenty to do nearby.  Just a 5 minute walk to the beach and several parks...Bill was a friendly host with plenty of knowledge of the area and the history of the city...We plan to return in the fall....

This place was great for our family of 5. Nothing super fancy but it met our needs and expectations. It was a close drive to downtown (orange line station super close but we didn’t use it). Loved the keurig coffee bar! Sandy was super responsive and we enjoyed our stay!
Great place for 1-2 people traveling in Boston.
Great service! Clean place and awesome location.
It was great!

Tuvimos un poco de frío en las estancias al margen de las habitaciones. Estas estancias se calentaban al margen del termostato y, aunque se lo dijimos a Evonify MA, no vinieron a solucionarlo.
Por lo demás todo genial.

The apartment very much met expectations. Clean and centrally located. Great water pressure in the shower. Great sunlight. Steven was very responsive on two small matters. Would very much recommend the apartment.

We stayed at Paul's place with 4 adults. In my opinion, this space is better suited for 2 people and maybe 1-2 smaller kids. The apartment is just too small & uncomfortable for 4 adults. Both the master bedroom and living room have very comfortable beds. The master bedroom was pretty warm with the hot temperatures in Boston when we went in late August. There is an AC unit in the living room that keeps the living room comfortable but we had to sleep in the master with the door opened & no covers because it was very warm. Paul's place is convenient to the MBTA Blue & Red line. It's not too far from Boston Common if you can make it up the steep hill! There is very little room for storage in the apartment, particularly if you'd like to unpack your belongings. The bathtub was really slippery, not sure if the cleaning solution used made it so but a tub mat/grip is needed.
Great time!
We had a great stay. Thank you!

This place was comfortable and convenient for my family when visiting Boston. The hosts were very responsive and helpful. We found that several outlets weren’t working in the kitchen and bathroom, but we were out and about so we made do without them. Otherwise the place was great! The area is a bit sketchy at night, with drunk and/or homeless folks around at all hours. But we had no issues otherwise.

Wonderful apartment in the heart of downtown Boston right near the Boston Common. The apartment was clean and perfect for 7 people. The host was responsive and helpful as well. Something to consider is that the apartment has very thin walls and you could hear everything from the unit above and The Park Street Church bells also ring every 15 minutes all day and night. Otherwise, it was an amazing Airbnb for our stay in Boston!
The apartment is just as described and full of great little touches like a coffee station and all the toiletries you could need!
The house was perfect! In a great location - walking distance from downtown southie. We had the best time and we’re equipped with everything we needed. Highly recommend.
Very clean rooms - great location. The host was wonderful! Great historic building with lots of charm. Would definitely stay again!

I had a fantastic stay at this Airbnb! The place was spotlessly clean and incredibly quiet. The location was perfect, and the host was highly responsive. The bed was comfortable, and I appreciated the thoughtful touch of providing towels. A great overall experience!

Ewa's apartment was lovely. It was very clean. Soon as we checked in, it felt like a home away from home. We slept like a log each night we stayed there. It was quiet and peaceful. The bed and the pillows are extremely comfortable. It was great to have access to the washer and dryer as we just came off a week long Canadian cruise and we really need to wash our clothing. The apartment is really comfortable and warm. Everything about it is brilliant. Ewa was very responsive too. Thank you very much Ewa.

We loved our stay, and loved the location of the airbnb it was so close to the airport and was perfect for our stay. the house was beautiful and spacious. And I would highly recommend this place to anyone who is staying in the Boston area. We are hoping we can come back to this home soon .. Simply Amazing!

We had a wonderful stay in this cozy unit! It’s within walking distance to everything you’d want to see and do. The unit was clean, the bed was super comfortable, and it was perfect for a weekend getaway!

The location is great! We walked all over and it was easy to get around. The space was clean and as two females traveling together we never felt unsafe here.
Linens were provided for the bed but there were no extra blankets or throws to add the “coziness” that felt like it was missing - and would have been nice to have in the evenings on the couch. The management company was very responsive to messages, but when we asked about extra blankets they said they’d have some delivered the next day and we never ended up receiving them.
All in all, this was a wonderful trip and we would stay here again.
Great location. Easy to access. Just what I needed.

I thoroughly enjoyed my stay at Ehab’s place , he was so helpful and informative . I didn’t stay for long , just for few hours . I loved how it was peaceful, I did meet few girls and they were also lovely . I was able to take a shower , refresh myself and enjoy the night before my flight the next day . If you are looking for something easy and comfortable , I recommend

All in all, it was a great accomodation. Comfy, quiet, in a great spot. It had a washer and drier, as listed, which was very useful to us. Good value for money, as compared with other accommodations in Boston.
The only thing we had issue was with the cleanliness when we arrived. There was some hair in the bathroom and some of the things in the kitchen didn't inspire confidence that they were thoroughly washed. Of course, nothing aggregious or not easily solvable, but a bit more attention to detail would be welcome.
Awesome place !

I’m a frequent visitor to Boston for my work at night look for places where I can walk to the financial district but have access to the rest of the city. This place was perfect for me to rest and recharge. one of my favorite things is walking through Boston Common, which I got to do because it’s so close!
Room & bathroom were clean. Quiet. Had a bit of a hotel vibe 👍

This place is a great space with a good size kitchen and dining area. It’s very clean, charming and well put together. The details provided for the Boston area and getting to subway was very helpful.
However there was a disappointing encounter with the hosts about the pack and play we asked to be in the unit which I’ve also told them privately about. Still just giving a heads up to anyone else interested in this place in the future. Hopefully it was just a one time thing.

It was a lovely stay in a pretty walkable area. There were both subway and buses nearby for transit, and there were lots of wonderful restaurants nearby. My only issue was parking: We had a vehicle and we ended up having to find our own parking in a lot about 15 minutes away, which we paid for. So having to park in an unmonitored lot and drag our stuff 15 minutes to park the car was an issue for me. Not insurmountable, but difficult none the less.

It is a lovely place to stay in Boston, very spacious for up to 5 people, and has very quiet neighbourhood. The location for this house is also very convenient for public transport. The host is very nice and considerate person, and is willing to help any time. I will choose Jacklyn's house again if I can have the chance to visit Boston.
It was very comfy, the bed was extremely large, there was plenty of space in the room and the temperature was perfect.

We loved this rental property.  It was clean, had plenty of room, was located in a safe neighborhood, and worked well for our group of 5.  Don't get me started about the shower- it was AMAZING! The host was helpful, responsive, and made us feel right at home. 10 out of 10- I highly recommend!

pros: comfortable beds, reasonable price, good kitchen, good location next to station, very clean, easy self service check in, reasonable price.
cons: no problem for us but there is a few stairs to consider if you're less abled, and the locks on the room doors are quite noisy for the couple seconds it takes to close, other than that, a very good stay!
We had a great stay at Farah’s place.  House was exactly as described.  Great location, comfortable beds, everything we needed.  Definitely recommend!
Nice place and good location

Great location at the top of the hill. walking distance from many shops, restaurants, bars, and historical sites.
Glad we didn't have a car, looked like parking may have been difficult in the area.
Guests should be prepared to walk uphill to get home!
Very nice house, and friendly host, would recommend to my friends when they come to Boston.

Boris and Susan’s home was amazing. The room was beautiful and we especially loved the fact that they left us little snacks and beverages. The bathrooms were beautiful as well.
Staying with other guests was nice as well. We barely saw them and when we did they were all very friendly.
Great place! Very clean and close of all services. Bernard is great host. That's my new spot for all my trip in boston!
Great stay!

Ken's home was a beautiful Victorian home and very clean. He made us feel welcome right away and showed us all we needed to know to come and go. He helped us find how to get to the commuter rail to be able to get into Boston. He chatted with us on the porch and asked how our day was. All in all a lovely stay.
The house is not as clean as I expected. The room wasn’t ready when I checked in. But the room was comfortable to stay, and the host is nice and friendly.
Fantastic place. We enjoyed it tremendously!

The apartment has a great view on Beacon Hill's roofs and also on part of the best parts of Boston. During the night the Prudential and also the MIT dome care visible, making a magic atmosphere. This place is perfect to stay if the workplace is somewhere else. Indeed, the only minus I experienced is the small table available. For everything else, I strongly recommend this apartment and also Lyia's hosting because they have been always very helpful and friendly.
Beautiful home walking distance from the blue line.  Felt right at home.

Very cute place. Loved the terrace. It is very tiny so don’t expect much room to move around. It was very clean and the linens are nice. We were able to easily walk to many places nearby. Overall the place itself was great. The only downfall is the construction across the street. The construction was not an issue during the weekend but on Monday, they blocked off the street and the noise was really loud. It was a little inconvenient to drag all of our suitcases down to the corner to wait for an Uber to take us to the airport. If you are only in town for the weekend though, it’s no big deal.

Very nice house to stay at boston! It makes you feel like at home. Everything is clean and sufficient. Food, amenities, coffee, bathroom, all of these impress me a lot and I would love to go back here if I visit Boston again. Antonio is very nice and easy-going. ❤️Please dont miss this house if you guys come to Boston!

The apartment is quaint and comfortable. Everything was very clean and didn’t lack anything that I needed. It’s a short 5 min walk to the orange line subway, which made getting around really easy.
I left behind a pair of gold earrings, a sentimental gift, and he was kind enough to reach out to me about it and put them in the mail. I really appreciated that.
I would stay here again.
The place was neat and well maintained. I was grateful for the mini-fridge and microwave in our room.  Housemates were quiet.

Excellent location, easy to find
, good sleep quality and very clean.

Excellent location with cafes, pubs and different types of restaurants in walking distance. Rooms were clean and comfortable and the kitchen was equipped with everything needed if we wanted to prepare a small meal.  It was also a plus to have a place to park our car! I would definitely stay here again.

This was a great stay. We went to Boston for the game at Fenway park. It was easy walking distance. We visted other locations as well using Uber. Air bnb instructions were clear and customer service were very quick to answer questions I had. Highly recommend.

Chirstiane was a super friendly and helpful host who provided a lot of great tips and a few museum passes. The house was located in the lovely Charlestown which was 15 mins walk  from the metro, 2 mins walk from a bus stop. it was convenient to travel to many tourist spots.

Great for business travelers. Next to Boston convention and exhibition center.
Gary (host) was very responsive and helpful.
Love this cozy studio! The bed is very comfortable, and the house is close to Boston College and is convenient to everywhere. The host couple is very friendly, all is perfect!
the stay was amazing planty of room and the place was very clean and user friendly it is an excellent option if you are visiting boston!!

It is simply the best. She is a great person. Her place is great, it has everything one can need during a stay. She helps with almost with everything. You can enjoy a time during your stay at her place.
I’ve never had a host care for his guest as much as he does! He’s not just a host he’s also a friend now! 10/10!!!

We love this place! We have stayed at several hotels and Airbnb’s in Boston and the North End, and this is now our favorite! From hospitality to kindness, you truly made us feel like we were sharing your home, but with complete privacy at the same time. Your attention to detail and all of the little “extras” you provided made our stay even more spectacular. Many thanks.
Great location in a beautiful neighborhood. Close to most major attractions. A small but very cozy apartment. The host was very helpful and accommodating.
Loved my stay here. Clean, nice space. Especially as a musician, to have a place where I felt comfortable practicing was a great added bonus!!
phenomenal place to stay! wonderful location, close to so many great places. Only a short walk to the T

If you are traveling to Boston, this is the place to stay! Anne's home is in an incredible location, blocks from Boston Commons, surrounded by great restaurants, coffee shops and bakeries, and absolutely safe. We loved our time and will return anytime we are in the area.
Had a great stay! The place was stocked with all the kitchen necessities and was clean. I also love that a portion of the payment goes towards a non-profit. I would recommend!
Great House for a group of people visiting Boston! Many bedrooms, clean kitchen and bathrooms and well functioning WLAN!

Well loved apartment with sloping floors, but worth it for the good location to walk everywhere in downtown Boston.  Would be challenging if you had a car.  Clean and organized.  Billy was very responsive.
As long as you are ok with checkin in at 5pm and checking out at 10 am, it’s a nice spot.

I had a great stay at Jennifer's home. Beautiful neighborhood near the Harvard arboretum and has everything needed for a long term stay. Felt right at home in a very clean and comfortable house. Jennifer is a very friendly, accommodating host and a great communicator. Definitely would recommend staying here to anyone!

Amazing stay! Glenn and Oliver are great hosts: very responsive, easy to communicate with, and have the perfect setup for hosting! We were also treated to some truly delicious homemade breakfast pastries. Very convenient location too!
Location on Charles St was in close proximity to some of the best restaurants and cafes in Boston. We will definitely stay here again when we visit again in the spring.
Marie was great! Her place was just what we needed.
Nice place!
Beautiful and cozy place. Focused on details with a perfect touch of interior design. Host very accommodating with stuff.
Very nice location, Mike was a great host and the place was perfect for my wife and baby girls.  In love with Boston.
This place is incredible! The location is amazing! The rooms were really spacey, this was just an outstanding experience!
Bel endroit pour demeurer. Le café est fourni par l’hôte; c’est très apprécié. Situé dans une rue tranquille. Matelas très confortables. Très propre!

I loved staying at Jean-Luc’s place! I lived in Boston for 20 years and so I was familiar with the area and I love Dorchester. The space is exactly as pictured, easy to get to, and a super comfortable city stay. I go back often for appointments and I’m looking forward to staying again!

Todo fue increíble. La ubicacion, el check in, el equipamiento de la casa, todo limpio y ordenado. Super equipado. Hasta hay paraguas y ponchos de lluvia, cacerolas cafetera, microondas y cafe y te para el desayuno. Muy facil el ingreso con la clave. La distancia al subte es excelente, y la distancia al centro de Boston apenas 20 minutis. El barrio lindisimo. Todo fue increíble. Estoy muy agradecida y realmente volveria sin dudarlo. Gracias!!!!

Listing is very accurate and location is as central as you can get for downtown Boston.
Overall was a comfortable stay and Brian and Heather were very quick to reply to any questions we had.
The apartment is very clean and cute. In a really nice part of town and can’t beat how close it is to Fenway. Thanks again!

I had a fantastic stay at John's place in West Roxbury. The apartment was clean, spacious, and well-equipped with everything I needed for a comfortable stay. The location was perfect for exploring the neighbourhood and it was easy to get around other parts of Boston. John was a great host, very responsive and accommodating. I would definitely recommend staying at his place for anyone visiting the area. Thanks for a wonderful experience!
For the price I was skeptical but everything was amazing it was so cute I’d definitely suggest it to anyone. Places like this that make me feel stupid for ever paying 1000 a night at hotels.
Great location, clean and comfortable space! Perfect for exploring Boston. Walkable to so many great restaurants.
Très bel appartement, bien équipé, propre et spacieux. Arrivée voiture pratique. Belle rue quartier paisible.
Our stay was wonderful, the shower was the cleanest shower I have ever had in an Airbnb/hotel. Lots of little details that made everything amazing.

We stayed just 1 night but wish it was longer!  The property is beautiful and well kept.  It was walking distance to all parts of Boston!  The hosts were amazing and responsive,  they even offered us a late check out!  I would highly recommend this place to anyone staying in Boston!!
立地以外はほぼ満足だった。

What a great place, with the centre of Boston within walking distance.  The neighbourhood was picturesque in the historic Beacon Hill area and relatively quiet for the middle of a city.  The apartment was well-kept, and communication with Foster was easy and responsive.  Thanks for having us!
Great place for family.
Awesome stay
En general todo bien, solo deben trabajar en sus tiempos de respuesta es casi imposible comunicarse con ellos

Nice amenities and close to everything but quiet and easy to find parking space on-site.  We appreciated the cleanliness of the room.  The rooms may be difficult to find given the configuration of the hotel building but the instructions given were very clear and helpful.

It’s always a pleasure staying at Daryl’s location. He’s definitely a true super host and very responsive. The location is as beautiful and clean as the photos depict it. I will definitely be staying again.
I was overall satisfied with my stay. Susan & Boris have a beautiful place. Extremely clean and well decorated.
Way too small, especially for the price
A comfortable and homey space on a quiet block.
This is a very nice space- just right for a weekend in Jamaica Plain!

All house was dirty, lots of dust, slovenly stuff. In kitchen was dirty buckets of paint and old, dirty sponges for washing dishes, slovenly dishes and flatware. In bathroom was old, smelly mop and dump on ceiling. In rented bedroom windows and windowsills were dirty, parget falls of the wall , on the wall was dump, wardrobe was smelly and dirty. In all house were lots of ugly sticky notes.
Actual location is much worse than you see at Airbnb offer.
Definitely you can find sth much better for that amount of money.

Great location. Very clean apartment with the basics covered. Very responsive hosts. We requested a couple of fans to help keep things cool and they sent two units right over.  Thanks Jessy and Diego! Bonus items: Apartment 7 has a dedicated parking space with security lighting and coffee and tea available as part of the kitchen.

It was a pleasure staying with Bernie and I'm excited to stay again! We had a great time sightseeing in Boston and even making our way to Salem by the metro. Bernie's place was relaxing and a great place to unwind after being in tourist mode all day❤️

Beautiful place! Great location! Per friendly!
Everyone was extremely nice and helpful!
I loved this hotel and overall primarily contributed to a wonderful experience in Boston!

It’s perfect! Even better than in the pictures! The fridge had some basic supplies, which helped a lot. Loved the bed, linens, towels and shower. Our place had one flight of stairs up but it wasn’t a problem for us. It’s a quiet neighborhood but close to the T and other central places! Totally recommend! Thanks again for everything!

Ewa’s place was so close to the center of Boston’s Freedom Trail which was our main reason for visiting Boston. It was a little over 3 miles. Nearby her place there were a few places to eat and that was so convenient for us. Her place was clean & tidy.
Beautiful home, Robin is very kind, quite the green thumb!  And space for a nice breakfast, with granola that she made herself.  Will certainly be back.
Okayish place to stay.
Perfect location to walk Boston.
The place was super clean and comfy.  Julian was a friendly and responsive host.  The road leading up to the house was in really bad shape, but that wasn't a big deal - just a little surprising.
Nice, clean studio in one of Boston's most beautiful historic neighborhoods.

The apartment is extraordinarily clean and, while a bit spartan in terms of amenities, fairly well-appointed. There was a slight inconvenience with workmen who had to access the unit to test the sprinkler system but they were very cordial. A very good unit in a very good location.

Temple Place is good value for the money, given its central location. There are kinks to be ironed with early check-in policies, shower not very usable for a tall person and lack of basics such as tea, olive oil, etc. If you are using it as a base to explore Boston, it s quite well placed, right next to the park.
What a convenient, fairly spacious studio  - the perfect little nest to do a college tour of Boston!

We enjoyed our stay at Jay’s place. The location is perfect, near amazing restaurants in the North End. There was no microwave which was a little inconvenient. Also, it was hard to regulate the water temperature in the bathroom sink. Overall, it was a good experience.
This place was amazing and the location was even better. Would def stay here again.
Excellent walkable location in the back Bay Area. We were able to walk to Fenway as well as downtown. Once we parked our car we never had to leave it. Definitely would stay here again !
This home is beautiful and so clean! Plenty of space for our large family. We will definitely stay here again if I’m Boston.
Location cannot be beat. You can walk to Fenway!

Amazing location within walking distance of pretty much every different area in Boston. It's definitely small but had everything we needed.
My only complaint was the noise at night which is no knock on the place itself, though I do feel like the windows allowed more noise than a typical window - I could even hear a crosswalk timer chirping outside which shocked me. But most of the noise came from the nightly street cleaning and morning construction/workers.
It's also directly next to a 24-hour 7/11 so there is typically some homeless people outside even at night. This was a non-issue but if you’re someone who has a problem with that then it's worth knowing.

Jonatas was an excellent host and a pleasure to speak with. The place was accessible, and very well put together (which is not surprising since it used to be the family home). There were towels and even bottled water, which was such a thoughtful gesture. I would highly reccomend this apartment to anyone considering a stay :)

We spent a wonderful few days in your apartment. The accommodations exceeded my expectations. The furniture was so comfortable and I loved the bed sheets!  Your attention to even the small details made us feel so welcomed. We were a short walk to Ruggles station and felt safe walking to nearby groceries or restaurants at night. The elevator was definitely appreciated after so much walking during the days. Thank you for answering all my questions and providing a home away from home for a few days.
Nice two story house in a beautiful neighborhood with many things within walking distance. Loved it and if I come back to Boston this will definitely be my first choice for a place to stay

It’s different from most ABB stays, and they told us that. It worked out fine, even great, because of good communication. The entrance and parking is kind of in an alley, so, you have to follow instructions carefully, watch your step in the alley, and lock the door. The locks were a little balky, worked out fine. The mouse traps remained empty, the space was clean and had what we needed. We walked to Fenway and back 3 times, enjoyed the walks, and would not hesitate to stay again.

I came with my fiancé and friend for a concert. It was a great little place to spend the night. We walked to a restaurant for breakfast and overall had a great time. We found parking through an app called SpotHero and saved money!
Great communication, easy check in and check out. Quiet, walkable neighborhood. Definitely recommend!
Great location and very clean. Two good sized bedrooms. Very small bathroom. Noisy neighbours with quite an odd set up where you walk past another appartment's bathroom to access your appartment.
Excellent place to stay and rest. Extremely clean, tastefully decorated  and has everyone you need. Highly recommended

O apartamento é exatamente o que foi descrito (só é importante atentar que fica no 5º andar de um prédio sem elevador). É bastante confortável para um casal com até 1 filho (dormiu no berço na sala). O Wi-Fi é o suficiente para trabalhar (vídeo chamada). É bem silencioso. O aquecedor de ambiente funciona muito bem.
O apartamento estava bem limpo, com roupa de cama e toalhas limpas, banheiro limpo e demais cômodos também limpos.
A localização é muito boa! Perto de vários locais para visitar, na metade do caminho do Freedom Trail, caminhada de 10 minutos para a estação de metrô, perto dos restaurantes italianos, etc. Fica em um local muito seguro, podendo caminhar na rua a qualquer momento do dia sem se preocupar.
Very responsive host, thanks Jay.
We only needed to stay one night. Host was great. Communicated well and room was very comfortable. Would recommend to others.

The spot was very clean! It had easy parking as well as being right by the subway stop for people who prefer not to drive in boston. Also great walking distance for a ton of local spots and a peaceful quiet neighborhood for enjoying Boston nights!
Great location! So wonderful being surrounded by the history in Boston!
Great spot for a quick stay , close to Fenway and great hosts!

The place is amazing. I didn’t expect it to be so nice! Very nice and hospitable host, very close to NorthEastern University. Nice area for a day or night walk in Boston. Clean nice room and a sparkling clean bathroom. Beautiful garden outside, I have to admit that host is very talented in making the house cozy and nice. I would recommend the place!

Overall, the unit was as described, it was clean and in a good location, close to restaurants and places to visit. The main drawback, which was described to us, was the street noise especially at night, as the unit (and building it’s in) sits right up against the street. We don’t believe Foster tried to mislead us about the unit, as we were told about the noise, we just didn’t realize how pronounced it’d be at night.
Great location and spacious rooms.
Great location and place, recommend it.

I would overall recommend this stay to others. The building and unit were clean and comfortable. The area is also accessible to a lot of stores and restaurants. The check in and out process was easy. The only main thing I had trouble with was the lack of access to a garbage chute. I was informed cleaners do garbage pick ups on certain days however no on ever came. If your staying here for more than a few days this could become an inconvenience.
This spot was great and easy to access. The space was clean and had everything needed. I would definitely book again.

Such a great stay! Communication for check-in/out was seamless and the location was perfect for our groups weekend in Boston! Quick Uber ride to nearby attractions. The space was well kept and spacious with the perfect amount sleeping space as well! We will absolutely stay again!
Our stay was comfortable and the location was excellent. Everything was nearby and we enjoyed staying here!

Location, location, location! What else can I say?! Gina’s place is beautifully furnished, the perfect size, and located in one of the best areas in Boston! From the moment we arrived until the time we left, Gina was always available to answer any questions we had. She made our experience wonderful and I can’t wait to visit again next time I’m in Boston!

It's my first time stay at Airbnb, muching is a really nice host! The room is big enough and very clean, the neighborhood is safe to stay and come back late. The best part is her breakfast, so Chinese and delicious!
Had a lovely time. Attentive hosts, and a comfy, clean place to stay.

My family and I spent a very comfortable and enjoyable week at Adam’s home. The house has everything a family with young kids could need. Adam was extremely responsive throughout and especially accommodating in getting the high chair and travel crib set up for our baby. Our stay was far and away one of the best we’ve had. I’m very grateful to Adam and his family for sharing their home with us.

Claire was super friendly and accommodating. The room was comfortable and we were pleased that she allowed us to store our luggage in the common area until our flight. The location is perfect for both easy access to the city as well as the airport. Not to mention the spectacular view of Boston from the waterfront!
Had a great stay with our group of friends, very spacious apartment and practical. Quite far from the center but we took taxis here and there. Thanks Jenny for being so helpful and responsive.
Excelente ubicación, servicio, limpieza, Claire muy muy amable !!
nice location. awesome shower. it is a shared bathroom, but that wasn't a problem.

Myself my husband and our two adult sons spent a week in Meri's beautiful home for Christmas 2018.  It was everything we could have wished for. We wanted Christmas away from home to be special and thanks to Meri it was extra special. The accommodation was excellent. The highlights being the amazing shower, fantastic fully equipped kitchen enough utensils available to cook a full Christmas dinner !!!! the comfortable sofa was a big hit and just what was needed to relax after a day of exploring Boston. The bedrooms were perfect for our needs and the washing machine and dryer an added bonus. The whole space was immaculate and you could see why Meri expects her guests to be careful with the fabulous work top in the kitchen. The area is great. Plenty to do and see in this beautiful part of Boston and no shortage of information for us to peruse through.  The bus stop just outside the door was great as we didn't hire a car.  Proximity to the beach was such a bonus and we had plenty of walks along this beautiful area.  We are really looking forward to returning to this really fab accommodation.  Thank you Meri for everything. You are indeed a super host and we would highly recommend you and your beautiful home Kindest regards Steve and Jo Griffin Ireland
Great place, perfect location to walk to places or jump on the train. We would definitely stay here again and recommend to family and friends!
Great location to stay in if you're a tourist!

Enjoyed this location the only thing that threw me off was a used mattress on the staircase and building supplies this made it difficult to enter the apartment, but there is an alternative staircase available.
Perfect location to walk to local shops, restaurants, parks etc- would stay here again!
Ive stayed here multiple times, very great spot.

Excellent location in back bay, 1 block from the green line, enough space for a short stay for 4-5 people. Pictures were accurate to the unit. Easy contact-less check in and a parking space available for a fee behind the unit. If you plan to spend most of your time out and about, this is place to stay. Would recommend a larger unit if in a group staying longer than a week, but we had no issues for a weekend.
Perfect stay

Staying with Hilary and Hazel (and Aggie!) was great! Their home provides great acommodation, a friendly atmosphere and is very convenietly located within walking distance to the subway station just a couple of stops from downtown Bosyon.
Definitely recommend!

Very good host! Good location and organized arrival!
This unit definitely needs a little TLC, especially the bathroom.... Keep in mind, in this area you pay for the location! Which was really great!
Good location. Nice place.
I highly recommend this place.  We were a group of six adults and had plenty of room. It is beautifully renovated and very clean.

In der Unterkunft sind Mäuse, es ist dreckig und sehr heruntergekommen. Das Bad und die Dusche sind absolut eklig. Die Wände sind kein bisschen schalldicht. Die Lage ist an einer der größten Kreuzungen mit zusätzlichem Bahnverkehr, wo es auch nachts sehr laut ist und durch die schlechte Schallisolierung hat man das Gefühl mitten auf der Straße zu sein. Ich werde nie wieder hier hin kommen!
Nice place to stay at. Photos were exactly what we got when we arrived. The location was great. Close to basically everything we wanted to visit in Boston.
Okay value, small

Great place to stay to visit Boston.
Central location, clean and everything in the apartment is well maintained/seems almost like new.
We would definitely stay here again.
Lee was an exceptional host. Very responsive, professional, accommodating. Would definitely stay here again. Highly recommended!

We had a wonderful stay at Bernard's place. The apartment was very clean and we felt safe with the home situated up on a hill. Parking was very easy. I would recommend this place to visitors from around the Boston area who know their way around as well as those from our of town.
Great location. Self check in

can't beat this location for being close to so much, yet tucked away on a small lane.  there's some noise that goes with it, but that's expected when you're in the middle of a bustling city like Boston.  the unit is very new so everything in it was also.  well stocked kitchen, linens, towels, etc.  bedrooms/beds and bathrooms worked well for our family of 7 adults.  nice living/eating area for us to hang out. super responsive and attentive hosts. easy check-in and out, with options well documented. would definitely recommended, and stay here again!
We had a great stay in Boston.  The place is just like the photos...very up to date, clean and modern.  Great hosts too.  Highly recommend for a perfect stay in Boston!

The second floor apartment was fantastic. It had everything you could need in the kitchen, and a lovely large balcony with a table and chairs. The bedroom is large and the king size bed is incredibly comfortable. Clean and tastefully decorated.

Great, clean place to spend a couple days in Boston. The location is terrific, about 1.5 blocks from the Public Garden and Boston Common (start of Freedom Trail), so you have a center base to go just about anywhere on foot or using public transportation. The building and apartment are clean and it's a full 1 bedroom apartment with full kitchen setup that was similar price to other studios in the general area. There was plenty of climate control, it was quiet and comfortable bed. I'd definitely stay here again.
Use spot hero and park multiple days in the Charles St Parking garage, which is about a block away and really clean and easy to navigate. Pre-pay in the app and just scan the QR code when you arrive and leave and just go enjoy Boston.

I had a fabulous stay! I was in the Boston area for a long weekend to visit my son, who is a freshman at Berklee, for family weekend. Andrea's place was perfect for my visit. The photos dont do it justice! Very cozy but more spacious than I expected and very clean and well appointed (linens, toiletries and COFFEE). It's in a very cool neighborhood. The Orange Line T was a short walk away and Berklee (as well as Northeastern) is only a few stops (approx 20 min door to door). I got out for a run to Jamaica Pond which was a GREAT place to run; it is a part of Boston's Emerald Necklace (chain of parks and ponds)  Andrea was very cordial, greeted me upon check in and later made sure I was comfortable. While she is right next door, I still felt as though I had my privacy.  I would definitely stay here again.
Casa grande, quarto espaçoso, toalhas e roupas de cama muito limpos, local bem próximo a estação

Steven’s apartment was cozy and very clean.I loved the location as it was precise and near everything. There was a paid laundry room in the basement. The  day before our check-in, he gave us clear instructions and was responsive. The downsides were that there wasn’t an elevator and we had to carry our luggage for one floor. However, we enjoyed our stay and I would recommend it and book it again.
Very peaceful and comfortable place. So much so that I extended my stay. Very walkable to Harvard and the transportation is a block away.
worth it
Great Airbnb! Andrea was wonderful to work with. The house was clean and beautiful. Parking is challenging-we found a parking garage a few blocks away and Ubered during our stay.
Me gusto la casa, fácil de llegar limpio la zona muy tranquila familiar Tramportencion público me gusto mucho , me gustaría volver pronto

The disclaimer of Noisy Neighborhood and in-house DJ thumping music ALL DAY…
Should be part of the profile. When asked, host mentioned… (they should stop @ 11pm) just as the neighborhood clubs jumped off.. 4/5 nights there. Drywall in shower, rickety living room tables, stuck windows…. Too stressful to bring all this up during our tightly scheduled stay, IN A GREAT CITY…
O apartamento não foi limpo nenhum dos dias que ficamos hospedados e era um verdadeiro tumulto e muita confusão no café da manhã.

We were in town for a graduation and this apartment was well equipped. The kitchen had everything to prepare meals, we enjoyed the games. It was very cozy and well decorated. The host was also very accommodating when we needed to stay a little later.
We loved our stay here! Perfect location and a charmingly old building. Steven was very quick to respond. Would absolutely recommend!

Holly’s brownstone was the perfect home base for our first trip to Boston. The residential neighborhood was super quiet, and we loved being within a few minutes’ walk to bus and subway transit options. The house had everything we needed for our group of 5 adults—and was a great mix of historical charm with modern amenities. Holly was very responsive and all communication was clear and easy. We would stay here again in a heartbeat.

The highlight was our room had A/C! The King size bed was wonderful, except for the microfiber sheets...Please use cotton sheets! And our room was accurate to the pictures, however the pictures on the listing for the common spaces were extremely messy in person. We only slept there so did not mind too much, but we couldn't even have a cup of coffee in the morning because there were no empty seats to sit on. Also, someone was smoking weed during our stay (not sure if it was the host or another guest). We did book last minute so we didn't have much to choose from, but next time I would definitely not stay here.
This was our first time as a family to Boston. We loved it. We loved the loft and especially the location.
This was a great place to stay for a few days everything was clean and comfortable. No need for a car!  I would love to stay again if I need a place in the area.

Barbara’s place is so nice. Clean, spacious, very well equipped, quirky cool decor and nice little touches of a stocked kitchen and advice on local features. Can’t fault the house at all. Around $20-30 to get to the centre of Boston in an uber which was great.
The only issue we encountered, which is not a reflection on Barbara and her hospitality, was a super noisy family that live upstairs. Starting early and continuing until late they were extremely thoughtless in their noise levels despite being asked to keep it down. Hopefully this isn’t the norm and we were just unlucky!

This is a very roomy apartment on the South end of Boston. Comfy bed, lots of amenities including washer and dryer in a beautiful courtyard        Close to many restaurants and coffee shops. We would love to stay again.

We had two couples and the place had plenty of space for our group. It was clean, decorated beautifully and  very well thought out. There were fresh flowers, muffins, butter, jam, coffee, tea and more. After a long day of touring Boston, we were able to relax and unwind in Devora’s lovely apartment. It’s  important to note however, that both the walk to public transportation and the two sets of stairs to reach the apartment could be a problem for some renters. Our group was fine with both and would stay here again.

My star at Alla’s was perfect: very safe, clean, well equipped. I spent a month with my husband and we really enjoyed Allston. I highly recommend this place! Alla has been very responsive and present when we needed her support.
We had a great stay. The bed was very comfortable. There were tons of restaurants within a 5 min walk-I recommend the Mexican one nearby!

Everything during our stay was fine, the house was just as described in the listing. The only thing is that it is located kinda far from the T station, if you're visiting Boston in a flash trip that could be an issue for you. Nevertheless, I'd recommend booking with Swank Properties.

This was our second time staying here and would highly reccomend it to anyone looking to stay in the North End. The location could not be better and the unit itself is outstanding.
The only complaint I have is the bed frame. It was squeaky last year when we stayed and it was even worse this time around. It woke us up throughout the night with just minor movements in bed, which was frustrating. I hope this issue gets fixed soon!
Overall though, great spot.
Really good apartment and host.
Clean apartment, good location, no problems.
This worked out really well for us in Boston.  Hermina's house is very close to the T stop.  Our room was very comfortable and huge!

The Studio was absolutely perfect, really functional, and perfectly located. Jonathan was making sure that everything was going good for us. We had a wonderful time in Boston. I recommend Jonathan's studio 100%.
great value, responsive host.
Sami is a great host. We had a great conversation with him. The room is also fine in a descent area.
lovely apt in an authentic boston neighbourhood......away from the busy city downtown district, but only a few short stops on the T. a lovely clean spacious apt and caring hosts. highly recommended.
Alojamiento acogedor y tranquilo. Anderson responde muy rápido en caso de alguna duda. Muy cerca del Aeropuerto.
Great place and very communicative!

Me and my friends enjoyed our stay! It’s a basement rental, but despite that it looks very nice and is well kept. It was a little difficult to reach the host but thankfully we were able to resolve our issues on our own. It’s a pretty easy 10 minute walk to the train to get you into downtown and can easily go anywhere from there. We were confused on the parking situation when we booked and eventually realised it was only street parking but we didn’t have any difficulties finding a spot in the afternoon. Would stay here again!
Had a very nice stay place was clean and great location

Located near the subway. Cute and quiet neighborhood. The studio is very cozy, the bed is comfortable.
Would definitely recommand!
Great space for a quick stay near the airport, hosts were welcoming and accommodating. Highly recommend!

My wife and I stayed here for just over a month after relocating to Boston for work. Laura's property is within walking distance of the financial downtown district (25 minutes walk - or 15 minutes on the T from Back Bay), close to superb bars and restaurants, shopping markets and Wally's Jazz Bar on Massachusetts Avenue (an evening or two worth spending). I was also occasionally working at Northeastern University which again was walkable. The apartment was completely clean and tidy when we arrived. Communication with Laura is exceptionally easy. Great wifi and TV included. Great shower. Comfy bed and sofa. Lots of space to store your items in a large closet.
Only positive things to say.

I stayed at Melinda's place while on vacation with my family. The house was very nice, clean and spacious. It was simple to get to the T station and the local restaurants and store were convenient. Overall we had a lovely stay.
This Airbnb stay was very nice. The location was perfect not too far from everything. The only thing that was a little inconvenient was parking in the area but we just parked in a garage.

Quelle vue et quel environnement ! Atypique et étonnant, très sympa la vue sur Boston. La chambre est spartiate mais avec les équipements nécessaires (grande douche, chauffage, prise USB et USB c, frigo..)
Petit bémol sur la literie : il manque clairement une couette pour bien dormir, j’ai eu froid la première nuit mais Mélissa a été réactive le lendemain.
Nous n’avons pas eu besoin de la piscine car il faisait froid mais elle est en travaux, dommage que le prix ne s’adapte pas.
Grand bonus avec la terrasse devant le cabanon.
Et enfin notre grand grand bémol : le petit déjeuner … 10 dollars par personne et par jour c’est clairement insuffisant et en plus la bakery était pas terrible. Dommage. Possibilité : Livraison du petit déjeuner sur la terrasse ? Ça serait plus sympa !
Lori’s place ticked all the boxes and more. Loti was responsive and friendly. I felt comfort and very safe in her home. Will definitely stay again and recommend to everyone!

Notre séjour chez Hilary a été vraiment très agréable. Nous nous sommes sentis très a l'aise dans la maison ainsi que dans la chambre qui est très agréable. Hillary a été plein de bons conseils pour nos visites et pour notre futur installation. le quartier est bien desservi et tranquille. Nous recommandons très fortement cet hébergement et y retournerons avec plaisir.
Exactly as advertised.  Clean, comfortable,  great location. Really great place!

Great location and very nice apartment. Surprisingly quiet even though it was facing Newbury Street. Kind of expensive but it's downtown Boston. The only small problem I had was that there was no hand soap, and although they promised to bring some, it never happened.  That was minor and I would certainly go back.
Very clean and the owner is very nice
房子位置很好 房东人超好 学识渊博 还给我们做早餐 下次有机会还来入住
Great area and easy access to Downtown

Jonathan was very responsive and answered back to us in no time! His place was clean and exactly like the pictures shown on the listing. If I were to come back to Boston, I would definitely look for listings with AKBrownstone.

This Airbnb stay was very disappointing. The apartment looked like the photos and had a great location, but it was in poor condition. The bathroom was filthy—the toilet was USED and very visibly dirty – inside and outside, and the bathroom sink was unclean. The kitchen was also left very dirty, with leftover food, half-empty wine bottles, and a dirty microwave and sink. The rest of the place was clean, including the bedding, the bedding was very worn, but clean. George offered to have someone clean, but I was uncomfortable with someone entering while I was away, so I cleaned myself. He also offered a discount, but nearly two weeks later, I haven't received it or proof of the refund. I’ve contacted Airbnb for resolution and currently waiting on their resolution. Overall, I advise avoiding this rental due to cleanliness issues and poor communication.
Great Location,wonderful home
Great stay! Awesome location. Wonderful hists

This listing is great if you plan to stay for a day or 2 day trip! This place is great to come and rest from exploring Boston. I’m not sure so much for an extended stay but the location is really good for the price. Parking was a big plus since you can park on one side of the street, but I did book during a weekday so idk how weekends are like. Host was also responsive when an emergency with the bathroom came up during check out, and I was v thankful for that.
Only thing I wasn’t a fan of was the bathroom and the bed being a bit uncomfy. Also just letting you know the area is quiet but there are small dogs who live upstairs so you might here them when passing through the hallways…but like I said before, it’s good for a short stay in Boston!

Katarzyna was a great host. The place was clean and had everything we needed. The location is super convenient for what we had planned and the parking that Katarzyna offered was extremely helpful as well - it was a huge deciding factor for us. Reading the previous reviews, we did bring an extra pillow and paper towels. The pillow we brought was not needed as there were 4 availble to use. Bringing extra paper towels did help as we used them quite often. Overall, we are really happy with our stay and would definitely love to book again!
Simple spot close to HBS and close to Harvard and MIT as well for whenever you need to go to a short event or something... easy to get into and it's good there was shampoo in there to use.. thanks!
Elisangela’s Airbnb was very cute, clean, and in a really convenient location. Communication and check in were easy. Would definitely recommend staying here.

Lovely place to stay. Krisztian was a helpful and responsive host. Made everything so easy.
Super cute 2 bedroom apt. Street was super quiet and I loved East Boston. Easy travel on the subway and back to the airport.
Happy to stay here again.

emplacement vraiment parfait
douche et toilette en dehors de la chambre

This unit is pricey, but a superior alternative to staying at a hotel if you're at a conference or something in the city. Big, spacious, and (once I turned the heat up) warm. The water pressure in the shower is a little low, and the bed room could be a little drafty, but I'd stay here again, especially after finding out that this group hosts families/medical professionals in town for medical reasons.
Very thoughtful decoration, comfortable, clean, easy check-in. Couldn’t ask for more 👍
Great stay for our family to visit the city.  Easy T access, plenty of room.  Really everything we wanted.

Super enjoyed our stay. Your place was in a central location & its proximity to the T was a great bonus. We walked everywhere on the North end. Your instructions were on point. Would highly recommend to our friends. Thanks so much for your hospitality. Definitely a 5 star!!!

The place was new, very clean, and excellent. The neighborhood is diverse, with up-and-coming properties and quick access to other parts of the city.
Jean - Luc was a great host, very responsive and accommodating. I look forward to coming back with more family.
Our stay here was great. Easy to walk to the Boston Commons and different subway/transportation stops. It was nice and clean.
Amazing location near Newbury St, great layout! Loved having the washer/dryer and AC. Convenient outlets and power strips. Host had great communication.
Very good value

A very nice apartment on a charming South End Boston street. It was just as described and Michael was super responsive. Just be ready for the climb up the high front stoop and four floors of narrow old Boston staircases!

Listing was very accurate. Terry was very informative and he answered all my questions during my stay very quickly. The place was clean, cute and very homy. The kitchen was fully supplied. The place was however very cold at night.

Alex is a very courteous and helpful host, who was prompt in responding to questions even when the answers were in the online house manual. The location is within a few blocks of the T, and we used it to tour some colleges and universities with my high school aged kid. It's not super close to any food sources, but if you are willing to walk 7 or 8 blocks, there are good dining possibilities. The wifi was good and worked well from every room. If you want a bottle of wine, I suggest bringing it. The street parking was as described - we were there on a weekend, and there was lots of it only a half block away from the apartment. The apartment is recently remodelled, but the walk-up looks a little rough when you open the front door - the stairs haven't been finished yet. Don't worry - the apartment has been finished! I slept like a baby there, waking to a back bedroom view of the high rises of downtown Boston.

Clean bedroom and comfortable bed. You are in a neighborhood predominantly occupied by college students. I found keeping the windows shut and using the provided fan was enough to muffle the noise.
Be sure to stop by Mike's Donuts & Milkweed.

We stayed at this property with 6 adults and it was a great place for all of us with plenty of room. Everything was beautiful and accurately described in the listing. Sidney was very responsive with any questions we had before and throughout our stay. When we come back to Boston we will definitely stay here again.
Frank's place was simple, clean and more spacious than expected for Boston. It was conveniently located for sightseeing. Frank was quick to respond when we needed refills on amenities.
Great hospitality and nice place!

I had a wonderful stay at E Stays! 🌟 The place was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described. The hosts were warm, responsive, and made sure everything was perfect throughout my stay. The location was convenient, and I felt right at home.
I would highly recommend E Stays to anyone looking for a great experience, and I would definitely love to return in the future.

Sam is an outstanding host, and his apartment in East Boston was very comfortable, well provisioned, and clean.  Sam was very responsive, easy to communicate with, and helpful.  We would definitely stay there again in the future!
Very clean. Easy check in process. Convenient location. We stayed while attending a show at the colonial theater. Highly recommend.
Easy check-in, nice location, the apartment was clean and overall as described. Recommended.

My parents had a great time at Glenn’s place. They highlighted its location, the privacy and comfort of the space, the kindness of the hosts, and the amenities provided. A great spot that we will be considering for future family visits. Highly recommended. Thank you for hosting!

Great location and great hosts! The house was very clean and tidy upon arrival with most necessary utensils and dinnerware provided. Instructions for the stay were clearly laid out in the apartment as well, which made the process of check in and check out much easier.
The location was also amazing as we had access to a lot of the nearby locations such as Prudential, Newbury Street, and Northeastern University being a short walk away. The area was also really safe and overall we had a great experience.

Penny was a lovely host. Her home is beautiful in a very nice neighbourhood, also walking distance to the pond. The information on how to check-in was all very clear. She greeted us and provided great recommendations and information about the JP area. I would highly recommend Penny’s place for anyone visiting Boston! Thank you Penny for such a lovely stay, I wish we stayed here for longer!
房子比较方便找到，对面有个小篮球场可。设施齐全，房子安静。我们一家三口住得挺好。只是对携带大型行李的人员不太友好，房子在三楼，没有电梯，需要自己把行李提上去。
Great stay and a great deal. Easy checkin and clean place. Thanks!

The place was as advertised- clean and has most amenities but could use a dining table and chairs. It is small, however. The parking nearby was convenient. The building is old and the steps to and from the apartment are difficult to navigate especially with suitcases. That includes the steps into the building. It is a loud street. The fans and AC were good to have.
Small but centrally located space right on Newbury, close to everything. Good for a quick trip to Boston

This place is brilliant and Susie is a wonderful host. The apartment is very nice and clean. It does have a steep staircase (as described in the advert for the place), but we didn't mind at all. We stayed in the flat for a few days with 2 children who loved the place as well. I would certainly recommend it!
Great location. Jessy and Diego were always quick to respond to my messages. Parking spot included (which is really nice) . Everything was wonderful

We had a great stay here. Great location, plenty to see and do. The apartment is in a shopping district that does not allow vehicle traffic which helped cut down on noise. Catching an Uber is super easy, just 1/2 block away and there are a number of parking garages close by.
The apartment was clean, spacious and had everything we needed for our 3 day stay.
I would rent this apartment again on my next visit to Boston.

Rice Cooker. Need I say more? :)
For my family having a rice cooker made the apartment feel over the top like home. We loved the space, everyone could stretch out and watch their own TV, or chill on their phones without worrying about headphones. The best was that family night could happen per usual in the family room with a huge selection of movies available.
Dawn-Marie provides so many wonderful extras. We loved her note with a bottle of sparkling cider---we actually had more fun drinking tea from her beautiful tea cups though. My family loved the water, juices and snacks she made available. That first night when we arrived, we were so tired and hungry that all of those amenities helped us energize for a trip to the corner grocery store. It was great to have a neighborhood store within walking distance.
We are going to keep this rental in mind for future trips to visit family in Boston. Definitely, a good place to stay and rest after a day about Boston.
Amazing stay! Precisely what we were looking for and an incredible location.

If you are visiting the greater Boston area this apartment is a no brainer! Although we were only 2 people, a large group would fit and not feel cramped. The kitchen was large and had all the pots we needed to cook with, and although one of the coldest temps of the year fell on our first night, the entire unit remained toasty (the heater above the toilet and sink are especially nice). With the included parking and literal stones throw from the red line, we never had any problems getting around. We will definitely be back on future trips.
Nice small unit, great for 2, quiet, not far from subway, the host is very responsive.
Exactly what was expected and was a great stay for anyone needing a relaxing environment.
Casimiro's place was perfect! We loved our stay. Close to downtown, beautiful place in a delightful neighborhood! We would love to stay there again!
It was a very nice stay with everything we need at a nice the Appartement which was good located. Because there is at the neighbors house a club it is at the weekends very loud till midnight.

The perfect place for us.  Located in one of my favorite neighborhoods in Boston. Close to public transportation. A short walk to Rozzi Village. The Airbnb is designed and maintained with a lot of love and care. It is evident in all the details, the cleanliness, and the hospitality. Highly recommend.

Clean airbnb with a musician and his family as owners,
I recommend
We stayed here last minute and it worked out great. Perfect location clean and very responsive host.

Decent value--was cheaper than hotels in the city, and location at the bottom of Mission Hill is convenient. The apartment is very small, but enough to get by.
Had trouble getting message responses from the hosts before the stay. After I made the booking, I reached out twice to ask for the address for planning purposes, but did not receive any response either day. The information was sent about a day before the date of the booking instead.
Great place, awesome host.
Easy place to stay in Boston- walkable with plenty of metro access. Check-in instructions were clear and hassle-free. I would definitely stay again.
I found this great looking listing when looking at Boston since hotels in Boston are insanely expensive most times of the year. Wonderful room and kitchen.
great location, we had a comfortable stay! felt safe and sound, nearby to the subway so that was a huge plus :) everything was very clean too!

The apartment is as-pictured. BlueBikes located across the street and very quick/easy to get to more central areas of Boston. We would stay here again!
Note: Laundry in basement is coin-op and costs $3 each to wash/dry. Quarters were hard to come by in the neighborhood (closest laundromat issues a card system!) but the bank branch located in the nearby Stop & Shop was kind enough to exchange my cash for a roll.
Lovely place near the airport! Tube is just around the corner and brings you into central Boston within 15 minutes. Would definitely stay again!
We had a great time at Anne's place and would come back any time! The room is cozy, quiet, and conveniently located.
Ok

This small apartment was fine for our two night stay. Pretty small and dark place, not as bright and big as it looked in the listing. The location is way off what was advertised and we ended up needing to uber everywhere since nothing was really in walking distance. The apartment itself was clean and and tidy, but the shower was dirty and didn’t work at all. The walls are also very thin and you can hear everything outside and noise from the other apartments next door. Overall fine stay but don’t really recommend for a longer stay then a few days.
Clean & cute space! Would stay again!
Excelente experiencia, la casa estaba bien limpia y es un espacio perfecto.

This was our first time in Boston, and staying at this place truly made us feel like locals. The location is perfect, and Leslie was very communicative and accommodating. There was some construction work going on in the backyard, which was a bit noisy at times, but Leslie informed us about it in advance, so we were well prepared. It was also great that everything was quiet over the weekend.
What I also really appreciate about Airbnb is how it connects people. I’m a music lover, and it was such a joy to discover that our hosts share the same passion. It made us feel even more at home, despite being thousands of kilometers apart. We would definitely recommend this place!

I stayed in this apartment for 6 nights and it was perfect. The location is perfect, it's a short walk to the convention center or to the old city center, or you can easily walk a few minutes to South Station or the Chinatown metro station to use the T. The apartment itself has everything you will need, including stuff like shampoo/soap/conditioner. It took some effort to get my heavy suitcase all the way up, since the staircases are very narrow and our apartment was on the 3rd floor, but it is doable!

Perfect location and very good value for the money paid. Everything was clean and there were lots of facilities. The building is indeed a bit noisy and the light in the bathroom is bad. But overall very good stay! I would recommend.
Very clean. Friendly host.
Amazing stay!
One of the greatest place I even been since I use airbnb. Jonathan is an amazing desingner and that studio looks better then great is so cool right now!! Everybody has to come  and visit this place

Marie and Gerard are great hosts during our short stay in Boston.  We had a wonderful time.  They met us during check-in and provided suggestion to tour the area.  I would recommend this one to my friends.

We had a wonderful stay thanks to this well-placed and well-decorated) apartment in one of the Boston's most beautiful and exclusive neighborhoods. The apartment is only a one street away from Charles street which is filled with restaurants, bakeries, and shops of all sorts. VERY walkable and well-placed.

The drop-down bed is very novel and incredibly comfortable! When we first saw it, we thought it would be a rough night on a bad bed, but we both slept like babies during our entire stay. I give the bed four stars!

The ad for this location says no internet, A/C or cable TV, but it happily has all three. The A/C is ice cold, so no problems there. We didn't use the internet much, but it didn't seem slow.

It is also only a block away from the nearest Metro stop (Charles/MGH) which makes it very easy to get to just about any place in Boston. I highly recommend the seven-day metro pass (approx. $22) if you are here as a tourist. (Additionally, check out the Boston Go! Card. It saved us literally hundreds of dollars during our four-day stay and is worth every penny.)

The washer and dryer are in the (somewhat scary) community basement and are $1.75 each.

There are only two towels, so you might want to bring another towel or two with you.

Like all Beacon Hill buildings, the building is older with all of the personality of an old building, so don't expect the Hilton, but overall, the apartment was well-placed, quiet and worth it.
Incredible place and the most gracious host of an Airbnb that I have ever stayed in! As MacArthur said, "I came through and shall return!"
Amazing location and a nice place to crash for a short trip. Walking distance to most places we wanted to visit and the location felt safe to walk around even at night. Thanks.
Just need med a place to sleep. Was great.

We visited the Boston area for a long weekend with our young adult kids (all under 21) & it was just the right right size for all 5 of us. Plenty of bed linens & extra pillows, 2 queen size beds, a futon, and 2 futon chairs that we unfolded and put together for another bed to sleep. The bathroom had shampoos & conditioners, body wash & lotion in case anyone forgot their own. The kitchen was stocked with cups, glasses & utensils (& pots & pans that we didn't need to use), a single serve Keurig with some K cups. Bring your own coffee fixings & salt & pepper if you order in. Ella had a bottle of wine & cookies on the dining room table when we arrived, which was such a nice gesture since our arrival to Boston & to her place was a little rough (nothing to do with Ella's place, just some unfortunate traffic & accidents). The roadways close to Ella's place are VERY narrow, so I suggest NOT driving a big SUV type vehicle as parking was also tight. Would definitely stay there again!
Fantastic location and perfect for a weekend stay! Recommend highly!
