Perfect both in location and value, we adored staying at Lihua’s. She had stellar communication and kept the home perfectly. We couldn’t have picked a better location for our last stop on our road trip.
Sehr netter Kontakt und sehr saubere und große Unterkunft. Jederzeit wieder gerne. ❤️

Очень удобный, все чисто , рядом все доступно , рестораны и магазины. Район очень хороший и спокойный, очень много красивых магазинов.. И очень много вкусных ресторанов рядом , с удовольствием еще вернусь сюда . Все очень понравилось, хозяин внимательный, написал все спрашивал , легко заселила т , все очень понятно . Спасибо большое за такой уют , чувствуешь себя как дома
Great and clean place. Appreciated your fast communication and thank you again for accommodating our early check-in!
This place is in a wonderful spot to begin your sightseeing plans. There are also great places surrounding it for breakfast! It is a great room and I am very glad we stayed here for our trip!!
El alojamiento es tal cual se describe, muy limpio y completo. Además es espacioso y cómodo. Recomendable ademas por su buena ubicación.
Great Southie location and easy in & out
Great place and deal !
Jay was very helpful the entire time! Place was clean and bed was very comfortable great location for what our trip was planned for would definitely stay again!

We were 4 ladies traveling to Boston for a quick getaway to celebrate our birthdays.  Plenty of room for the 4 of us... stylish decor and great location for walking to restaurants, etc.  The fireplace in the living room made it extra cozy.  Appreciated the free parking space behind the house.  Will definitely book again the next time we come to Boston.  Thank you, Carol!

This home is actually perfect. It's modern, it's convenient and Kevin thought of everything. Forgot your shampoo? Well he's got you covered. And it's not the cheap stuff either! Need to charge your phones? Great he's got extra outlets for you and your guest. The place had a beautiful kitchen with everything we needed to cook dinner and the bathroom was breathtaking. The beds were like sleeping on clouds to the point where we were trying to figure out what kind it was to purchase for ourselves at home! Not one complaint. Thank you sir.
Amazing B&B!!! No complaints. Would love to go again :)
Great stay
Our stay was AMAZING & so was Alex!!
The house is very charming and the bedrooms are spacious.
Amazing, well-located studio. A real gem!
Great stay for our quick trip! Very close to where we needed to travel to throughout the area! Celia is so friendly as well!
great place!
Localização espetacular! Apenas alguns passos do parque Boston Common para lado e da estação Downton Crossing para o outro.

This place was great! We stayed after a late flight before moving to another destination and were pleasantly surprised with the size of the room. Bathroom and kitchen were great. Would deff recommend for a quick stay!
What a great place to stay.  Close to subway and bus lines, so we could be most places with 15-30 minute ride.  Felt safe walking after dark.  Enjoyed our stay.  Would stay again.

Very cute place, easy walk to T station. Jay was extremely responsive and accommodating, especially when a change in our plans caused us to have to check out a little later.  Despite the chilly weather, it was a great trip.
Such a great place to stay at with great location to many places to go! The host was attentive and was able to respond promptly. What a wonderful choice to have stayed here!
Great stay. Will be going back!

My stay was great. Sandra went above and beyond and reached out to me a few times to make sure everything was going well and if I needed anything. The accommodation actually seemed bigger in person than the photos. Plenty of room in the living area and bedroom.
Wonderful!
Very comfortable! Thanks for all!

Steven’s place was in an incredible location and the highlight of our entire Airbnb experience. We spent seven nights here, exploring different parts of the city, and found the downtown area to be our personal favorite. It was very walkable, safe, clean, and had everything we needed within a short distance. The unit itself was more spacious than the photos suggested, which was a pleasant surprise.
The WiFi connection was generally good for both of us working remotely, though there were brief moments when it was unstable on Zoom calls, typically recovering within a couple of minutes. The main drawback was the furniture—the couch and mattress could use an upgrade. However, the dining table, chairs, and TV setup were fine. I would have appreciated more cooking supplies and utensils, but we managed for the week without too much trouble.
Overall, considering the price, location, and space, I thought this Airbnb was a great choice.
Great place, comfortable in a great location. These guys communicate really well, so it makes it easy.

Alys has been an amazing host. Very communicative and always nice to connect with local people and know more about Boston. The place was easy to find. The room it’s ok considering Boston and generally Airbnb is getting much expensive every time. The area is ok also but not the best one to walk around during the day something to consider if you like to walk around. It’s very quiet around. I would always recommend this place. Thank you for hosting me!

Meri was phenomenal in communicating leading up to, during and after our stay.  This trip was for business and it was extremely helpful to be able to pass along to those staying her instructions.  The apartment was well furnished, clean, and very conveniently located.  It was a quick and easy jaunt to the financial district via the T, and definitely no complaints on that end.  We also were able to find a slew of options for dining in the evening, and it was not disappointing!  I highly recommend Meri's apartment for an enjoyable stay in Boston, business or otherwise.

Liesl's place is beautiful - she has thought of every detail for guest comfort and ease. The apartment is spacious, light and lovely, in a good location - easy to walk to bus line, get a taxi or uber, etc. It is a quiet neighborhood, off of a main street, with local foot traffic, but not a lot of street noise.
The restaurants in the neighborhood are really good, (Thai, Senegalese, a diner, and some great bakery/cafe's). "Foodies, " a nice food market is only a 7-minute walk away. We went out for meals, but also cooked in the lovely kitchen. Great for a couple or a family.

Great location in the financial district! Walkable distance to many major attractions and transit system. Check in was easy and and convenient and we felt safe in the building and unit. The apartment was clean and met every need we had during our stay, we especially loved the ability to do laundry in the unit. Would stay here again or recommend to a friend! There is some city noise and light in the apartment during the night, but that’s to be expected from the location. Overall a pleasant stay!

Excellent location! bedrooms are a good size and comfortable. Kitchen well supplied. Living room smaller than anticipated, big enough for 2-3 people at a time. Not overly comfortable. Be aware lobby is fully gutted and under construction although it did not impact us during our stay. Just initial surprise. Hosts are very responsive. Would recommend to others.
PS Recommend Cafe Bonjour for breakfast (delicious) and quick walk from bnb.
Paul’s flat was convenient, clean and exactly as advertised.  A great location with a definite Boston feel!
Great time in Boston

Not only was the location fantastic, but I highly recommend Celia as a host. She was kind, accommodating, and overall my stay was very nice. I would absolutely rebook from her again when I’m in Boston.

Incredible place very close to the convention center. Enjoyed being in a bustling neighborhood with tons to do/see. The place was really nice and gave a respite. There were towels and other “hotel”-like touches such as toiletries and kitchenware. It was all very nice. Glad I stayed, 100% would stay again.
Oh! And I have to add: my transportation to Boston got me there 1.5 hrs ahead of schedule. I thought I’d have to walk around with suitcases waiting for the check in time. I reached out to Maverick and they let me check in a couple hours ahead of time without issue or charge. Definition of customer service.
Charming B&B in South End! Great location and welcoming hosts with great tips for what to see in Boston.

Sparkling clean *****
Great location ****
Perfect spot for a short stay!
This Airbnb was clean and in a convenient corner of Boston, a great stay especially for red socks games :)
Clean place, has everything you need for a short stay.

In Boston like other cities it's tough to find good AirBnB at a reasonable price. One odd piece with this one is that before entering the apt in the tiny hallway, there's another apt with an exterior bathroom. We did have some noise but mentioned it and it was dealt with asap. Small practical apt with no views and small BRs and small bath. Solid kitchen.
Pros: location, location, location. 5 min walk from Old North Church and heart of the North End. Wonderful to wake up with this neighborhood with Parziale's Bakery/Pizza down the block next to Bova's. Great local diner, Theo's, Monica's Grocery and lots of touristy not-great Italian spots, but you won't starve. 7-8 min walk to two T stops.
Cons: Can't leave your bags for many hours. Bathroom in need of new shower curtains (they're dirty) and body soap and shampoo (H2O pressure good). Kitchen garbage can doesn't work and you have to lift the dirty top of the can with fingers. No outlet next to bed in bigger BR. Ungood. All fixable.

Our all in pricing had us paying just under $1,000 per night. That price point comes with expectations, so here you go:
Met Expectations:
-the apartment location and complex are great
-the apartment was very clean
-apartment was well stocked with toiletries, hand soaps and the little things you need like laundry detergent, etc
-check-in instructions were great as was communication around check-in and check-out
-the amount of space was great for our family of four
Did Not Meet Expectations:
-poor communication with respect to the request to modify the reservation, that is unacceptable for clients that have to book flights, etc
-apartment furnishings, while shooting for an elevated aesthetic, fall flat on execution with Target and IKEA quality (bed and linens were not comfortable), subpar furnishings relative to any 3+⭐️ hotel)
-apartments is poorly lit, lighting design heavily employs LED tape lights but execution is poor and it simply looks unfinished and cheap.
Nicely decorated place. Best feature was its location right on a hip Boston street with access to many stores, restaurants and beautiful scenery.
A comfy studio, easy to sleep in and laze around or get out and adventure around Boston!
Great spot! We enjoyed our stay in this North End apartment - close to great restaurants and makes seeing the city easy!
A good place for location and convenience which explains the price point but I digress

Great time staying for two nights at the property. It’s centrally located and within walking distance to downtown. Host is super responsive and friendly and is very flexible. The room is very clean. I would definitely recommend staying there if you are in Boston for work or leisure!
Beautiful home! Very comfortable and a haven for book lovers. The access to the park is unbeatable. Will return here again for our next trip. 10/10
Wonderful place and very conveniently located and with easy access to Boston and Cambridge. I had a really nice time and was very comfortable, would highly recommend this stay!
I would give it a 5star
Thank you !! My mom and sister personally asked to compliment the aesthetics of your home
Great location and really comfortable beds! Plenty of room and available amenities on hand.  Cathy was a very attentive host - even though she is some distance away!

A lovely apartment, exactly as depicted in the pictures and extremely clean! The location was brilliant and safe and most spots were walking distance from this house!
Finally the hosts were very kind, prompt and supportive through my time there.
A perfect stay overall. Thank you again!

From the booking of the room, my experience was great. Jonathan was extremely communicative and accommodating to my early arrival time. To add, the space was well kept, organized, clean, and looked like a lot of care was put into the AirBnB experience. The cherry on top was the handwritten note when I arrived to my room. My trip to Boston was special to me, so I got chills when I read it. The note shows the care and attention to detail Jonathan has not only towards the overall AirBnB experience, but to those who book a stay. Would absolutely recommend(and stay again) for its location to public transit, accommodations, and overall niceness.
Conveniently located, no-frills accommodation at a budget-friendly price. Great for travelers who prioritize location and value over extras

We had a great 3 day visit to Boston .  The place was beautiful and within walking distances to many attractions and restaurants.  It was nice to have a comfortable place to socialize with everyone after a full day out on the town,  We will definitely stay here on future visits.

We had a wonderful experience. The Airbnb was clean and spacious and it was located close to Boston College and an easy ride into Boston. Erin was an excellent host & we were extremely happy with our stay.
The place was great! Spacious enough for 8 guests, everything was clean and looked as expected. Jenny was super responsive and helpful.
Very good stay, the apartment was large spacious and clean. Information from the host was prompt and really clear, made our stay very easy and comfortable.
Great price for great location!

Was in town for a work trip and I had three good sleeps here! It's a lovely home with a pleasant vibe. I missed seeing Andre as I came and went at odd hours, but self check-in etc. went smoothly. House was clean and fairly quiet. Parked on the street out front no problem.
Worked really well for our group!
Decent place to stay for the night. Thin and slightly scratchy sheets but the AC was the best thing to have. Place was cute and accommodating.

Room had a ton of privacy, technically a separate entrance from the "main" house.  Bathroom exclusively for the Airbnb room, right off the bedroom, had a mini fridge & coffee maker.  Bed was a Full but my 6'6" boyfriend seemed to do ok, bed wasn't nearly as low quality as we've had at other Airbnb's.  Walking distance to the Harvard Arboretum AND Green T, a pretty great coffee shop with lots of food options.  We stayed Thursday - Sunday and each morning and night was super quiet and relaxing!

Came for the Red Sox vs Yankees series. Boston swept em’! Go Red Sox! This was an easy Uber ride to the park about $12-$15 bucks per trip. We enjoy walking so we walked around the area a lot. We always felt safe and enjoyed the architecture and foliage.
The house was perfect and we were able to drop off our luggage since we took a red eye and then walked to the gym and breakfast. Todd was so friendly in all of our communications and quick to respond. We loved Boston and will definitely stay again.
Oh, the shared bathroom was really not an issue we seemed to miss each other and the cleaners were there everyday keeping everything so so nice!

This place was perfect for my family of 5 in every way. It's destination-worthy in and of itself.
It's a 3 minute walk to the beach with hermit crabs, clams, regular crabs, minnows, tide pools (we were there for hours every day - go at low tide and flip rocks).
The huge, wide windows look out over the bay AND the airport runway so you can watch boats, waves, planes all at the same time. My 9 year old watched planes all morning our first day.
...and the space itself. I've never felt quite so cozy AND sophisticated - quiet rooms with high ceilings, great books placed thoughtfully throughout, delightful paintings, live plants EVERYWHERE, a GORGEOUS vegetable garden in the back, two decks, a spiral staircase outside.. just being IN the space gave the whole family very chill but fun vibes.
And of course it's 15 minutes from Boston and good food quickly delivered :)
We plan to make it a yearly visit :)

Minter es encantadora!!! El lugar es hermoso, limpio y a una breve distancia del tren linea roja que te llevará al centro en 16 minutos. La casa es hermosa y el vecindario tranquilo. Regresé tarde desde la estación de tren (11 PM) sin problemas.
Pequeños detalles como chocolates en la heladera, cupcakes recien hechos esperandote para desayunar y el buen humor de Minter, son pequeños detalles que hacen sentirse a uno como en casa. Definitivamente volvería!!!
Great place and location! I would stay here again.

Fantastic!  The unit is very nice and clean.  I appreciated the well-stocked kitchen with an actual freezer and pots and pans to cook with.  Super easy and convenient check-in / check-out.  Parking was also very easy despite it being street parking -- the spot on the street right in front of the unit was always available for me to park in.  The hosts were very kind, attentive, and responsive in our communication, and I'm very happy to have supported someone that cares about energy efficiency and sustainable building practices.

We had a fabulous stay. The property is very clean, extremely well equipped and very comfortable for six people. Great bathrooms and easy to use kitchen. We were a mix of over 65s, UK, USA and Australian and between us could find no fault!
Well located with parking or nearby transport. The host is very responsive should you have any enquiry. I would be totally happy to stay here again. Thank you.
Clean comfortable space. Convenient to the T.
Responsive host, place was clean and close to all. In town for one night and location was spot on for our needs, close to the T (train) and shopping on Newbury Street also close.
Great place for a quick trip to Boston. The host was great and very hospitable. Would recommend 12/10.

Everything’s just like in description. It was more than expected. Emma responded on all our messages very quickly and didn’t have any problems. At the beginning we didn’t feel safe in the neighborhood but it’s actually okay. We didn’t have any problems. You have everything you need in the house which we didn’t expect. If I would come to Boston ever again I would stay at this place

Thanks Reda.
Beautiful place. All amenities were available at hand. Gym near by super market near by.
Thanks again
Looking forward to book again soon.
Wonderful location!! Ashley was very helpful, and her place was clean and nicely decorated . Walking distance to restaurants and shops, parks and the subway. Highly recommend.

This is a lovely apartment. Well located, it is easy to get into town and to the airport.
An interesting, traditional neighbourhood, and a lovely porch to sit out on.
The apartment itself is very well furnished, extremely comfortable beds, and the best shower I have ever been in.
Great little apartment.  Cass and Mike were proactive about reaching out to make sure everything went smoothly

Nice home. Everything is accurate as seen in pictures. The best part is the location which is very near the T station that can take you to any place within boston. My friend and I felt uncomfortable with the neighborhood though. Not recommended for single girl traveler.
Great stay
Excellent stay and even better host! Would recommend to anyone who wants to visit the beautiful city of Boston!

Great location, bang in centre of Boston, walking distance to all restaurants and bars.
Apartment was exactly like the photos and spotless.
Brian the Host was always very responsive when msg, could not be more helpful.
Overall 5* Definitely recommended and would stay here again in Boston.

We had a great stay! This place was perfect for a long weekend in Boston. The bedroom furnishings are lovely and the mattress is very comfy. The bathroom and shared spaces were also very nice. Convenient location and pretty cheap Ubers to get to anywhere in town.

This house is exactly as outlined in the pictures and description.
We were longtime West Roxbury residents and used Sean’s place as a base to visit our old neighbourhood. The house is well equipped, very well renovated and Sean was amazingly responsive whenever we had a question.
We will definitely stay there again on our next visit.
10/10
Great place!Great Location!Very good stay.
Great place clean and bright.  Loved it!
Everything was fantastic, from the location and the surrounding area to the communication from the host :)
Beautiful place, very clean, conveniently located, great host!
非常温馨的房子 晚上入住也非常好找，地区安全方便

If you like really cool old houses, Lori's house is fantastic.  The updates fit the historical feel, and the location is walkable to the T.  Lori's recommendations for local eateries is spot-on.  All in all, a great Airbnb experience.

We really enjoyed our stay in Boston with our family! The space was mostly clean, comfortable, and in a great location near everything we needed. The layout is unique: the first floor has a living room, small kitchen, and one bedroom, while the second floor has two more bedrooms and the bathroom, accessed via a separate entrance but also connected to the downstairs bedroom. It worked well for us as a family.
A few notes: the parking pass was tied to a large serving spoon (something smaller would be easier), and guests are asked not to remove sheets or covers before checkout—understandable, though it left us wishing for a bit more reassurance that everything was fully refreshed. TVs required Wi-Fi setup, and since shoes are removed at the entrance, house shoes are helpful for your stay.
Overall, we loved the space and location and would recommend it to others visiting Boston!

Lucy is a wonderful host who thought of everything and made sure we were very comfortable and felt at home. The location was one of the best in Boston. Absolutely beautiful in beacon hill and walkable to everything. We loved our stay and 100% recommend!!!

Chip's place was a wonderful home for my one month stay in Boston. Excellent location in South End, very walkable everywhere and easy to access public transportation and get an Uber. The apt itself is exactly as described and pictured, full of character, tasteful touches throughout, and uniquely cozy. Chip was also super prompt in communication from booking to checkout. Thanks Chip for a great stay!
Loved staying at Richard's place. It was clean and the location was unbeatable!!

Really lovely place! The hosts were very responsive and helpful, and the Airbnb looks just as it does in the pictures. We especially loved that it was super close to the T station, which made traveling through the city very convenient. Thanks Jessy and Diego for a great stay!
Location was great, very close to the airport via Uber & within walking distance to the Wilbur, which is why we were in town for the night.
clean and hospitable! the free parking was so nice!

Jason was a great host, timely responses and courteous. The apartment is located in the North End, walking distance to great restaurants and two transit lines. I will definitely stay here on my next visit back to Boston.

This is a great place and is just as described, however, we are an older couple and climbing 50-60 steps to get upstairs to the 4th floor plus luggage was a bit much for us and then knowing you have to climb down that many steps each and every time you leave was dreaded. Felt very safe here, parking was very convenient. Highly recommend staying here.

Loved staying here. Very convenient by car, easy to find with parking! Over all a very comfortable experience. It was wonderful to wake up to fresh coffee and pineapple waiting for me in the morning. Polly responds quickly and is very friendly and helpful.

Wonderful apartment in one of the most desirable areas in Boston. Within short walking distance of countless restaurants, historical landmarks, public transportation, and shopping areas.

The building is very accessible with affable and helpful concierge staff. The apartment itself is very clean, roomy, well-organized and ideally set up for any single traveler or couple. The access to laundry machines on every floor and fully-stocked kitchen are a invaluable asset for any longer stays!
The place is very clean and a well laid out floor plan. Be prepared for no available parking nearby. Get to know the public transportation system before booking.
Blanca’s place was wonderful. I found it to be peaceful and the location was perfect for my needs. Blanca was very hospitable. I would definitely stay again!
Felt like home. The best part of the stay was definitely meeting Carbon. Would love to stay here again.
We enjoyed our stay. The place was immaculate and spacious
Good place and near to the subway

Daryl was a great host from the pre-booking questions through the checkout process. The place was spacious and clean, though the location wasn't as close as we would have thought, but that could be due to the traffic in the area that weekend. Great Job Daryl.
Great apartment in an excellent location for exploring Boston. The host is friendly and helpful.
This was the highlight of our trip to Boston! Our hosts were so incredibly gracious, welcoming and helpful; I’d absolutely stay again!
A very clean and beautiful place. Super nice and responsive host. Highly recommended!
Amazing stay!
Amazing hotel, best staff
Great quiet safe neighborhood that is close to public transportation, the airport and even a public beach. Islam always responded quickly to messages. The apartment was super clean and comfortable.
Amazing location close to the park. Lots of space and hosts were great.
The apartment and the amenities made us feel right at home.

Staying on a boat was a fun, unique experience! Chad & Holly were great hosts and made getting acclimated to boat loving easy. We loved the marina and really appreciated having easy access to the showers and changing rooms there (the bathrooms onboard were totally fine for toilet use, but our group is tall 😂 (5’10” ladies, and 6’4” guys). We will definitely stay here again the next time we’re in Boston!

Foster's place was a nice stay. The location is great (super walkable, close to restaurants, close to metro), instructions were clear, and Foster is very responsive. But a head's up: if you are a light sleeper, the traffic and noice of the city starts pretty early; if you are a sensitive to that it probably isn't for you.
They let us check in early free of charge, and was very accommodating to my service animal. Process was easy and we had a great experience! Will definitely stay there again soon.

Katherine was an amazing and very responsive host. The apartment was idyllic and clean in a stunning neighborhood and we especially appreciated her recommendations on the neighborhood. We had a wonderful trip and would happily stay here again!

The house is just as described. Perfect for a group getaway. Nice little neighborhood in East Boston. Close to the airport and subway. I could not ask for much better, especially considering how much more expensive everything else is in Boston! Would stay again!

Sandra’s place was very convenient as we were close to the airport for our trip home. In East Boston, there are numerous ethnic restaurants to choose from and all within walking distance. The outside areas seemed to be a little noisy at times due to street traffic and construction, but the place was cozy and super cute.

Jeana’s house was a beautiful place to stay for the week. The room was nicely prepared and she was very responsive to our needs. I appreciated that we were left alone to our own devices. All around a good place to decompress at the end of a long day walking around.

We had a wonderful stay in this Back Bay apartment, which looked just like the pictures. It's conveniently located in the Prudential Center, and the apartment was very clean! This is a corner apartment on the 15th floor — lots of windows and plenty of light. Adam was friendly and easy to communicate with. We hope to be able to stay in one of Adam's apartments in the future.

The location is super convenient with so many walkable places to explore! Traffic can be a little loud on weekends at night, and the living space doesn’t have blockout curtains, so bring a sleep mask if you want to sleep in. Could use some refurbishing. Other than that, it was a really nice and convenient spot. Sheets, towels and dishes were all clean. Would stay again.

Absolutely loved staying here! Got a lot more than we expected for a brilliant price. Boris and Susan were very responsive which helped a lot. The location was a perfect distance from the Airport and Airport train station. There was plenty food and refreshments offered too! The whole place was immaculate both bedroom/bathrooms/common areas. Will definitely stay again - thanks again Boris and Susan.
Thanks for the comfortable, convenient stay!

The stay was great, and the location was right near South Station. Everything is walkable and is proper downtown. The host was responsive, and the room was also good. It had almost everything you'd need and a pretty view. The only thing is the number lock was a little difficult to turn on to put in the numbers, but still it wasn't bad at all.

Just used Shelly and Lance's place for a quick stop before an early flight out of Logan. Can't beat the proximity to the airport and the price is great. We only needed a bed for a little shut eye but would have gladly used the space for more of an extended stay. Instructions were clear, no hassle, everything clean. Just what we needed.
Excelent place!
交通方便、乾淨的房源，房東回訊息很快
Excellent stay! Quiet area, quiet space, even though in a shared house. Very spacious. Andre was very good at communicating with me. 100% recommend.
Very comfortable and welcoming. It's a great place to stay!

We had a great stay at Mylinh’s place. We were there for the Boston Marathon weekend, and it was perfect for our group. Mylinh is an excellent and prompt communicator. The unit was stylish and cozy. We loved how close and accessible the public transportation was into Boston.
Fantastic location for people want to go BSO concert

The place was great and especially the rooftop patio was a bonus. Host was very responsive and accommodating. It wasn’t as close to the city center we had hoped but it was just an Uber away and plus less headache when dealing with traffic/driving. Loved the place and the city of course, wish we had more time to enjoy the city view at the rooftop patio.

Definitely a sweet heart ❤️ I would come back in a min
Beautiful place you definitely wanna stop 🛑 by and stay

Fantastic!!!!! This place was a marvel. I loved how private and stylish the place was. It was spotless and well decorated. I loved all the high tech touches. It was so large and spacious. It set the bar on a higher level in terms of my expectations for airbnb. I loved the double shower heads in the bathroom, ample natural light as well as overhead lighting, and the in-floor heating. The location was close to BC and the hosts were quick to reply by messaging.  It was a perfect place for my mom to stay while visiting me at BC.
Amazing and attentive hosts, who made sure there was no stone left unturned! Would recommend to anyone!
I had an absolutely wonderful stay at Jonathan’s place! Couldn’t recommend it more. Thanks so much for creating such a peaceful, homey, and thoughtful space.

Great place!
Lots of cheap shops nearby.

It was the very first vacation in the USA, Shelly is a wonderful host, with a wonderful heart we felt like we were visiting family, thank you very much for everything, the location was great to the city center and to the beach, we had a few stops with blue T, for sure one day we will stay at Shelly's again🥰

We arrived around 11 pm in South Station, Boston and easily took the T Red Line to Ashmont and walked five minutes to Hermina's house. We found an attractive apartment with the key waiting for us. We slept well and were off early the next morning. Great stay even though we didn't actually meet Hermina, whose schedule didn't coincide with ours.
This was an amazing stay. I was moving into an apartment in the area, Jean made everything stress free for me and as comfortable as possible. It was an amazing stay.
Excellent séjour, l’emplacement est génial tout ce fait à pied. Épicerie à 5 min de marche.
Very clean and good response time.

We really enjoyed our stay!!
Great location and we would definitely recommend.

We were mostly communicating to a friend of the host that then put us in contact with a neighbor that met us outside the door and showed us the room. This however worked out very well. Room was nice and clean! We stayed 4 persons here, so two of us had to use a fold-out sofa of medium standard. The location is quiet, it is primarily residential so if you are heading to restaurants/bars/shops you will have to walk for a little bit. We thought this was actually a bit pricey in relation to the location and standard of the beds, but then again this is maybe the average level of Boston.
Dawn is an excellent host. She put a lot of care and mindfulness into the apartment before we arrived. There were even extra masks, hand sanitizer, and snacks. She really thought of everything.

Really fun way to stay in Boston for about the same as a hotel room elsewhere for our family of 5.  Host was so helpful and friendly, place was clean and close walking distance to restaurants and visitor sights- would definitely stay here again if we ever go back!
Howard was a gracious host! Very homey room and super responsive. 10/10 location and he gave us great recommendations!

Anyone traveling to the Boston area should really consider staying at David's red door carriage house, if you are looking to stay in an extremely relaxing and comfortable place.  It is very close to the downtown Boston area for visiting it and David is especially helpful in recommending tips on the best way to see the city.  We rented a car and this allowed us to travel into the downtown area as well as around other parts of the city located away from downtown that are very much worth seeing when traveling to this area.  Once back home at the end of a day of touring around and sightseeing, David's place has a great outdoor patio sitting area that is perfect for sitting around and sharing a bottle or two of wine and discussing the day. Getting a good nights sleep is always nice and sometimes hard to do when traveling and not staying in your home bed, but David has made sure to have some of the most comfortable beds for sleeping and getting a great nights sleep.

We stayed at the property to explore Boston on a long weekend vacation. The property was in a perfect location, and everything we wanted to see was walkable. The hosts were extremely responsive and friendly! They allowed us to check in early and out late to store our baggage which we really appreciated! If we return to Boston, we would 100% stay here again!
Cute and homey in a great location. Ellana was generous and so accommodating. I highly recommend staying at her place.
The Airbnb was just what we needed. I would stay there again.

I cannot recommend this place. For $362, it is absolutely NOT worth this price. We booked this place for its proximity to the Downeaster train, which it was. However it has NO elevator, and has very steep unsafe stairs . We had only small rolly luggage and it was a real pain to walk up 3 three flights of steep stairs to get to this place, which is furnished like a frat house. For $362, NO’
There is no coffee or tea supplied. Airbnb is still categorized as hospitality, please supply some coffee or tea! Also we got a messsge there would be no body wash or shampoo.
Hello??!! For $362, please leave One coffee pod??!! Or one tea bag?!!!

Katarzyna is the perfect host.  I believe I was the first person to stay here.  Her place is a perfect oasis from the busy hustle and bustle of Boston.  It's a nice modern style apartment.  Behind the curtains you can walk into a garden oasis.  Everything was clean and well thought out.  There is a a private parking spot in right in front of the place.  I would stay at her place any time I come back to Boston.
Great location
Great home base for exploring Boston! Close to T station and amenities. Katarzyna is very gracious and helpful. Would definitely stay again!
easy ck in,  easy location to airport, clean & quiet
nice and cozy, good location. great bath and water pressure
Very nice place. Alex check in daily with us to see if we needed anything. He also check in several times before our arrival to make sure we would have everything we needed.

The good: beautiful bedrooms, living room, geographically nice location.
The bad: street felt unsafe (compounded by unlocked entryway doors despite code for entry), an active ceiling leak in one bathroom dripping on outlets, remnants of glass of previously shattered shower door in the other bathroom, among other issues.
Catherine was a great host!   Check in was easy.  The place is in a wonderful location.  The neighborhood is safe and peaceful.  I would definitely stay here again.
Jonathan quickly responded, when my family needed to find last minute accommodations. Great place, clean and felt like a home away from home.
Steven was a great host, very responsive! The Airbnb was great! It was spotless when we arrived and in a great location.
Very convenient and affordable. The unit was extremely clean and accessing the building was very easy. Close to several parking garages too.

Great house in quiet neighborhood. Clean with lots of extras that made you feel right at home ! Kelli and Ray made everything easy, communication was great and got back promptly with answers to any questions we had ! Short train ride into Boston. Highly recommend this Airbnb !!

This property was rented for a Colleague's first trip and stay in the USA from India. The hosts were friendly, accommodating, helpful and just all around pleasant people to work with. immeasurably grateful for them and the stay at their property. thank you thank you thank you!

Really nice apartment in a great location, very nice places to eat and drink within minutes and very easy to walk into central areas or to Back Bay Station (5-10 mins walk). We had a fantastic stay - thank you!

As other reviews have said, Tobias was a very pleasant and competent host. We enjoyed our week in his place immensely. The description and pictures are accurate and the bed was very comfortable. You can stash your gear in the closet and the dresser, making the room feel very spacious. We also enjoyed eating a few meals on the charming deck with chairs and table for two.
When we come back to Boston, we hope to stay with Tobias again. Highly reocmmended.
Enjoyed my stay at Kaitlin's place! She is a wonderful host and went out of her way to make sure I had a great experience. Would highly recommend staying here!

Kaitlin was very helpful during our entire stay.  She stayed in touch with us regularly  via email keeping in tune with our needs.  Initially, I did not read the instructions on getting the key from  the lock box.  This created a problem for me and my guest.  Kaitllin's cleaning person helped us get into the studio and called Kaitlin about my dilemma.  In the meantime I read the directions on the website and got the keys from the lock box. Kaitlin emailed me but by then all was ok.  Be sure to read the information and view the pictures on how to get the key from the lock box.  We had large suitcases so rather than bring the suitcases up the many stairs Kaitlin suggested that we enter/exit  the small door (named but me as the "Hobbit Door") The studio was very nice, clean, King bed is comfy.  The neighborhood is walkable and safe.  A lovely park is only a few hundred feet away. We loved East Boston!

I needed a place to stay last minute and Huggy was super quick and efficient. He was also very welcoming and helpful. The room was nothing fancy but overall solid, the place had everything you could need, it was clean and functional. Location wise, you've to walk a bit to get to the subway but it's really manageable. And the nearby Franklin Park is a nice spot to walk / run.
Really a good pick for people looking to have their own place without getting ruined.
This Airbnb is gorgeous inside and very clean! It is steps from Boston common and the hosts were quick to respond!
Place as described. Great for one night. The location is close and checkin was smooth.
It’s great place stay for vacation

Thank you for hosting us Linda! We had a wonderful time in your place and fell in love with your house and interior. For us, as Germans, it was like being in a movie :) all the best, Kristina and friends
Perfect Location
We had a great time at Maria Elena‘s place! The terrace is amazing to sit on and the area is very cute!
I had an excellent stay and the unit was very cute and tidy!
非常干净舒适
We had a great stay here. Great location, clean and quiet room, and the host was extremely kind and helpful. We would love to come back again in the future.

Located on a quaint street about a 4 minute walk from the T, this is a quiet and convenient home. You share a wall with the neighbors but they are pretty quiet. Safe and has everything you might need.
Place was exactly as pictured, super convenient location and a quick walk to the T!

I want to say many thanks to Liesl!
It was just amazing time spending in this apartment at Boston South end!
Highly recommended!!!
Good.
If you have an event you’re attending at TD Garden, this is the place to stay
Its really clean and the Wifi is fast. The location is just perfect
Great location in the heart of the city. Edmond was super helpful. Cheers.

Lovely apartment, beautifully appointed. Everything you should require. Lots of stairs a struggle for me personally, I would have liked to have known this in advance.
Overall a very very nice, quiet apartment with even a comfortable bed!
I give Sofia and Gal very high praise indeed.
I do suggest napkins!

The space was perfect for a weekend stay. It is a small space so I wouldnt recommend anymore then 2 people. Sam Adams is in walking distance but the neighborhood felt slightly diversified and potentially low middle class if I had to guess. But overall it was perfect— could catch an uber for under $15 if we felt uncomfortable walking anywhere. Perfect place to have the weekend getaway my husband and I needed. Thank you for having us!
I arrived very late but the check in was very painless. Beautiful space exactly as picture z
Great apartment.  Fantastic location.  Walking distance from everything needed.
My brother and I had a beautiful stay! 10/10 would highly recommend

Miriam's place is very well located in Jamaica Plains. This is a Latino neighbourhood and the restaurants reflect this. Jackson Sq subway station ( Orange Line) is a 15 min walk away and we were helped by staff to understand the ticketing system-buy 1ticket for two people and load multiple trips. The apartment is small but very clean. The bed is reasonably comfortable but is a double bed on a wooden base which creaks and groans. The shower is good. Laundry is coin operated ($2 for washer & $2 for dryer--have quarter coins handy). Full stove but vety little crockery-no bowls. Big fridge. TV worked well. Wifi kept dropping out. Nice porch outside to sit on but know that resident tenants use it also.
Good Stat, great service, recommend.

Charles is amazingly responsive and explains everything well, and very conscious. The room much better than I expected. Great queen size bed, clean, very comfortable kitchen. Staying with kids away from home could be so stressful for every parent. But thanks to Charles and his efforts to make our stay so enjoyable...
The apartment was great and very central. Although it said that the area can be pretty loud, we had time to relax and weren't disturbed by noise. Totally recommend it!

Great, homey stay. It's a small place, but has a real kitchen and a deck. Note that the shower is super tiny and there are lots of stairs (so keep these in mind if you have any sort of mobility issues). The neighborhood is very walkable and bike-friendly. The T and shared city bikes are less than a 5 minute walk away, which is super convenient. The hosts were friendly but not intrusive, and I felt safe as a young woman staying alone.

Everything about our stay was spectacular.
Communication prior to our visit was proactive, caring and thorough. Check-in instructions were top-notch with details and pictures. The apartment is terrific -- very comfortable, welcoming and cozy. The location within Beacon Hill is amazing. It's easy to see that on a map. But until you step out their door and realize where you are and how close you are to restaurants and Boston Common, only then do you soak in the amazement of the location.
Lucy gave really good restaurant and walking recommendations -- not just "go-here" but why and what you should expect along the way.
We will definitely return!!
Perfect place for our family to stay while dropping our daughter off at college.
Awesome
Nice place! Would stay here again
Nice place 5 min walking to a 24/7 IHOP and 20 min walk to Boston Landing train station.
Mimi was great!

Absolutely fantastic - if I could give Ewa's place more than 5 stars I would! The space is absolutely lovely, exactly like the pictures but maybe more charming. The street and neighborhood is so quintessentially Boston, but also so quiet. And the location is ideal; away from the gridlock of downtown but close enough to get almost anywhere in 20 minutes. But here is a suggestion you should very seriously consider, if you're going to a specific destination or event like View Boston or a game at The Garden, leave your rental car at Ewa's at take an Uber it will be So much cheaper and faster than parking downtown! Anyway, I would stay here again in a heartbeat and recommend it to my best friend!

While there was a short delay in getting our check-in instructions, check-in was smooth once we got them. Unit was clean & had all the necessary supplies (shampoo, conditioner, soap, towels, fridge, microwave). Conveniently located close to the Charles, the Green Line, & Back Bay. It is a tight space (just enough for 2 adults), but wasn’t a problem for us since we were only in the unit to sleep after being out all day.
Such a beautiful stay, i wasn’t ready to leave!

Small but convenient place that has all the things you need when visiting Boston for a couple of days. The location might not be the most beautiful in terms of view and surroundings, bit it is only a couple of minutes away from the city centre by Uber. All in all a good place for a great price for max. 4 people , when visiting Boston . PS: Also have a beer at the bar down the street, they sometimes have some nice live music .
Robin and her home were enchanting.  She's thought of everything to make us welcome and comfortable.  We would gladly stay again when we return to Boston.
Loved it!
The place is great, good size and close to train station. Check in and out was super easy.
Great Property for travelers to Boston. You are in a great community and a great area.
Thé location and accommodations are great. Thé host is an excellent communicator.

Pros-Great Location
Great restaurants near by
Mattresses was so comfortable
Cons- no full length mirror
Bathroom did not have good lighting.
Bathroom counter space was small
No tv in the bedroom
No condiments or spices, they have a coffee maker but no coffee filters or coffee grounds.

We had a lovely time at Robert's place in Jamaica Plain. The room and bathroom were immaculately clean, the rest of the house was nicely furnished and comfortable, and the pleasant backyard was a charming, quiet plus where I spent some downtime reading and relaxing. The neighborhood is great with a bunch of restaurant choices. I remember that years ago it was considered edgy but those days are gone, as far as I could see. The T station (subway) is literally 5 minutes away and is the best way to get around in my opinion. We got everywhere from Harvard to the Museum of Fine Arts to Dorchester with some easy transferring. I would recommend without reservation. Also, Rocco is a really sweet dog.

A great stay. Great host! Really appreciated Frank's flexibility with my schedule. We even caught a couple innings of the Red Sox game on tv with Frank that night. He was very generous and good company. Thanks Frank!
Fue agradable y decidimos renovar una segunda semana. 100% recomendable
Nice place to stay.
Wonderful place with lots plenty of bedspace - perfect for big groups! Elisangela was very responsive and even thoughtful to leave us  few snacks.
Big place, conveniently located.

We loved our stay here! Our first visit to Boston was helped made perfect by this beautiful place to stay. It’s easy to find and we felt right at home the moment we opened the door. We rented a car which became our only difficulty due to finding a decent parking spot. However, we quickly learned that Boston truly is a very walkable city with so many things to do, eat, and see right nearby. Thank you Joseph for being so kind and a great host!

Considering the price of hotels in Boston, this place was a huge bargin! It was clean and quiet, with all the major amenities of any hotel. Thanks for the toiletries! This location is also perfectly situated in a residential area, with easy access to public transit (less than 5 min walk to bus). Not realizing until I arrived, the private entrance is an added convenience. For the backpackers, students and casual tourists you cannot go wrong with this place. Thanks again, Todd

Some colleagues and I stayed at Veronica's place while we were in town for a conference. The condo was pristine and perfect with comfortable beds for sleeping and cozy couches for lounging. The location is great for picking up some groceries at Foodie's nearby, and also very close to lots of restaurants and shops on the main drag. We would not hesitate to book Veronica's condo again when we are in town for future trips!

We had a quick one-night stay and place was exactly as advertised. Note other reviewers comments on stairs. No issue for my daughter and me, but would be for any one with heavy luggage or mobility issues.  We didn't find the noise to be an issue, but there is a house being constructed in the back and you can hear hammering, etc. beginning around 7:30 am. Very responsive host!
really comfortable and clean space! street parking was very difficult to find, but likely just a characteristic of the area itself. conveniently located by public transit, really liked this place
Very responsive, unit matched description, fair price. Great host!

We loved this house. It was a great stay and the host was so kind to us. We got flexible check out and it was perfect. House has to bedrooms a functional kitchen and dining and living room. While kids were in daycamp it was possible for my partner and I to work from home. Internet connection was great. Restaurants in walking distance and cozy coffee places. We absolutely loved it.

Love staying in any Maverick property they are truly a great way to get away in comfort and style more suitable for a young home body who travels a lot.
I
Greatly enjoyed my stay at Healing Homes property.  Staff was very responsive and helpful.

Séjour très agréable et réconfortant dans une maison bien équipée, où l'on se sent comme chez soi, et où tout fonctionne. Les draps sentent bon et les chargeurs sont déjà prêts pour nos téléphones... Et en bonus de quoi prendre un bon petit-déjeuner ! Un grand merci à Susie pour cet accueil chaleureux.
Great location and all I needed to make my stay perfect.
Very easy check in and clean room. Loved the area!
Lovely and kind hosts. Attentive. Large room and living room area to relax in. Private. Will always choose to stay here.

Everything that Is described in the listing is exactly what you will find when you stay here. Others complained of noise (in past reviews), but I didn’t have this issue. The location is the best. I had a great week.

I was visiting some friends in Boston for a little less than a week and was looking for a home base. Jessy and Diego's place was it! The studio was easy to find and check-in was a breeze. I found the location to be very walkable: close to bus lines and fairly close to the train lines as well. There are also some really great Asian fusion restaurants within walking distance, which I loved! I also appreciated that the hair dryer came with a diffuser attachment for wavy/curly hair!
Couple things to note (which are part of the listing description!): conditioner isn't provided, so be sure to bring your own or grab a small bottle at the CVS down the street. It's also located on a pretty busy street if you are a light sleeper like me, so plan to bring ear plugs or some white noise. These are listed upfront in the description, so I came prepared. :)
I really enjoyed my stay here in Boston and would recommend!

Really great value and really appreciated that this apartment comes with a parking space.  We stayed here for 3 nights and it was a great launch pad for checking out Boston and the location was convenient.  The only cons about this place were the lack of a bedroom door (my partner and I are both working remotely, so having separate rooms during concurrent calls is helpful), and there was some upstairs noise (footsteps) that were noticeable during our stay.  But overall really great value and a great place to stay if you're checking out Boston.
Sabina and Frederick were great. They were very kind and hospitable. The room was also beautiful and clean. I enjoyed my stay.
The room is new and clean like a hotel. The instructions are very clear and the host is friendly.
The team was amazing and very helpful. If I had any questions they answered immediately. The apartment was exactly like the pictures. I would stay again!
Charles place is a small gem in Brighton. Close to bus stops and less than mile to 90. He was very flexible and welcoming to my brother. He is a great host
Great place and location! Would stay again.

The apt was very comfy and the roof balcony was awesome, the host replied quite fast.
the only minus is that the apt is at the 4th floor without any elevator, so if you're bringing heavy load it would not be easy.
Great find in the heart of Boston!

Really good place for a short stay in Boston. Hosts were friendly and we got clear instructions. The room was as described and there was no problem at all. We would recommend! :) Plus it's near the airport which was great for us, as we took the flight the next day.
Such a wonderful, central stay! Thanks, Chris and Kelly.

The apartment is very homely and comfortable. The location is great in terms of location to the T-line (8-10 minutes walk), proximity to downtown Boston, Logan Airport and some great eating places. East Boston is a diverse neighbourhood which adds to its character and charm. Anne is a lovely person who is very timely in responding to any questions or requests. It is our sincere intention to return to stay here on our next visit to Boston which is a fantastic city!!

My husband and I were just returning from our honeymoon and had a long layover in Boston. Sandra’s place was conveniently located close to the airport and was a great place to crash for the night and catch up on rest. The super comfy bed and black out curtains were just what we needed.

Frank’s place was the perfect place for us to meet up with our son & daughter in law for our first visit to Boston. 15 minutes from the airport, centrally located to Fenway Park & downtown Boston. Communication was excellent & the keyless entry couldn’t have been more convenient. The space is completely brand new & beautifully decorated. High end appliances. Although this apartment is in a building shared with other tenants, we never heard any noises coming from anyone else in the building. It felt like we were the only ones there. Kitchen, dining table & 3/4 bathroom are on the first floor, along with a stacked washer/dryer behind closet doors. The second floor is a bedroom with a king sized bed & walk-in closet. The 3rd floor was a bedroom with 2 double beds and full bathroom. Beds were so comfortable, with plenty of extra blankets & pillows. Thoughtful touches throughout. Just like home, minus the couches for comfortable tv viewing. Social gathering will only take place at the dining table, which was enough for us. this is a great gem near Copley and Symphony. I highly recommend it. the neighborhood and building is quiet and friendly.

This cozy spot is in a great location! Plenty of great food spots around and many delivery options as well. Located close to back bay and Copley plaza. New to Boston and I was able to get around pretty easiler from here. Would highly recommend!

Great place to stay in Boston. Highly recommend!

Though the location was great and the rooms were tidy, the way my stay was managed left much to be desired. After booking the room, I was informed that I'd need to switch rooms at some point throughout my stay because there would be other guests checking in. I complied, and through discussions with Edmund, it was mutually agreed that I'd be able to transfer my items from one room to another after 5pm, when I get off work. However, on the day of the transfer, I received a call from the building's management demanding I move earlier so that the cleaners could fix up the room before the other guests move in. They gave me the option of letting them transfer my unpacked luggage and other items to the new room, but obviously I wasn't going to let people I've never met touch my belongings. Because of this, I had no choice but to leave my very busy workday early just to comply with their schedule. 30 minutes after settling into the new room, I was called again by management telling me to move back upstairs because the cleaners had already gone home...I was absolutely furious. I spent upwards of 30 minutes to move my items up and down the stairs. I'm not sure whether Edmund was involved in this or was kept out of the loop, but what I can say about the building is that it is poorly managed and that they may have double booked your room so contact the host before you commit and pay for your stay.
Great location but some chilly in the winter.

Jeffery and Cynthia's place was a very comfortable and beautiful place to stay. My friends and I were in Boston catching a baseball game for the holiday weekend and we chose to stay at Jeffery and Cynthia's house. From the moment we walked through the doors Jeffery and Cynthia were welcoming, pleasant and attentive. From giving us a tour of the apartment to giving us restaurant suggestions, they both made sure we were at ease. The place itself was very home like in itself. The living room and bed rooms were clean, comfortable, and relaxing.  It's about a 20 minute drive from downtown Boston but located in a nice neighborhood with a park across the street. Street parking available. I would definitely recommend Jeffery and Cynthia's airbnb apartment for anyone looking for something relaxing, comfortable and affordable in the Boston area.
first time at a hostel and it was great, very clean. easy to communicate, they answer right back! only thing was the ac wasn't working inside the room, but the hallways and lounge area was cooler

The place was beyond perfect for our group! Not only was it clean and cute, but it was so cozy (the beds were really comfortable!) and truly felt like home. Geno was so sweet making sure we got in to the place just fine. Booked both floors for our group, and I would absolutely do it again!!
Great place to stay, and walking distance from the T stop! The place was very clean and the beds were comfortable! The host was very responsive and friendly(: would stay here again!

这是我使用Airbnb以来住过最好的房间。它位于一个安静的社区内，房东制定了夜间安静规则，因此无需与室友沟通即可获得完美的睡眠。公共区域的柜子和冰箱都按照房间贴上了标识，不会和室友弄混。房间非常干净，卫生间没有异味，退房那天我亲眼看见房东把所有的床上用品全部收集起来拿去清洗了。厨房用品一应俱全，炉灶、锅、热水壶、咖啡机应有尽有。卫生间有纸巾、吹风机、洗发水、沐浴露等，热水全天充足供应。我特别喜欢卧室里的大桌子，放东西或者办公都很方便。到市中心的交通方便，距离巴士站很近。房东夫妇非常友善，回复速度也很快，我会向每一个来波士顿的人推荐此民宿。衷心祝愿房东能在美国各地都买上房子，这样我就能在周游美国的时候一直住在管理完善的房子啦哈哈

This is a lovely home on a beautiful street. The location is brilliant with its proximity to Chestnut Hill Reservoir, Boston College and just 15 minutes to Boston University - and only minutes from the tram stop.
Very comfortable top floor apartment, well stocked kitchen, nice bed linens and towels. The outdoor deck is a bonus in fine weather.
The host is very nice. But the bathroom is a bit too small.

非常棒的住宿体验，房主热情好客，私人空间也很棒，家庭环境非常干净舒适，离地铁站也很近，家里还有一只非常好看的猫。
感谢Kit和Scott的招待！
I like this place, it is super clean and nice place to stay.  Highly recommend.
Paul is an excellent communicator and host.  We very much appreciated his flexibility in regard to check-in/check-out which made our stay so much easier and hassle free.

The apartment was beautiful as well as comfortable !
The hosts were very helpful and responsive to our questions. They even allowed a late checkout due to a later flight!
Place was perfect!
Excellent unit!

Matt and Eva's place is a really great place to stay. The building itself is fantastic - and the turret a perfect spot to relax watching over the area. There is plenty of park area just outside the door and Jamaica Plain is a nice neighborhood. And with public transport you're in no time in downtown.

Matt and Eva made us very welcome, even some nice flowers on the table so that we felt at home straight away. If back in Boston this place is for sure a first pick.
The place is excellent and Robin is a wonderful host. No complaints whatsoever.
This was a great place to get the feel for real Boston living. The place is immaculate and Terry was a responsive, helpful host. We enjoyed starting at this location.
Great location with a helpful host
Ashley’s place was super convenient. The space is simple, but everything you need for a weekend getaway. Ashley responded super quickly to messages when we had questions. I’d stay again!

Our stay was exactly what we needed! Located in a quiet neighborhood right outside of busy Boston provided us a perfect place to rest & recharge. It was extremely clean & Bonnie was easy to reach & very responsive. We were very pleased!
Great unit for a couple! Heart of the city with lots of places to walk to!
Great location. Nice home.

I couldn’t be happier with my stay. I recommend staying here if you’re in the Boston area and looking for a fantastic spot. 10/10. It’s also worth noting - this host is one of the best I’ve ever booked with. Just a wonderful person.
Amazing suite situated in a lovely part of Boston. This listing is comfortable and convienent and i would highly recommend it to travellers stopping by in Boston

I stayed with Lynda for six days. She was an incredible host. She answered all my questions quickly, helped me to find the places I had to go to and even had coffee, cereal and snacks for her guests. The room was incredibly clean. I would stay with her again.
Excellent place for a 4-6 person group to stay in Boston. Clean, comfortable, and the location is incredible for walking different parts of the city!

My boyfriend and I had a great stay in our room while visiting my daughter who lives nearby. This is a terrific, walkable neighborhood that's close to a T station so you can get everywhere you need to go. Booker responded quickly when I asked about coming in late (after a Red Sox game!), and was warm and friendly when we got to meet him. The bathroom was large and clean; sheets and towels were all quite nice; and the cookies were a welcome touch. I would definitely stay here again.

Confusing themostat- extremely warm in the middle of night even when heat was turned off
Old house, so squeaky floors and thin walls, loud bus stop
Toaster didn't really work
Great electric wheelchair up the stairs
Large enough for big family, lots of towels and well stocked kitchen
Cleanly
Nice furnishings
Some beds very comfortable
Good proximity to pond and restaurants
Friendly, responsive hosts; clean, calm space.
It was a nice option, near public transportation.
Cozy but comfy north end space. Great location. Much better and more affordable than local hotels

Great stay. Small but cozy! The market next door is very convenient.
Thank you!
Fantastic location for a peaceful stay. Bed was very comfortable as well and hosts were very responsive but not intrusive.

Huggy was a fantastic host ! The place is awesome, easy to reach by public transport and quiet if you need to study!
With its cozy backyard its also perfect for having barbecue or just hang out with the really nice roommates !
The kitchen is fully equipped so I also enjoyed cooking here !
The roommates are really nice and helpful ! Had a great time here !
Roxbury is a upcoming, cool and really save neighborhood. Supermarkets are close by and if you want to go for a run you will find also many parks in the area.
I highly recommend to stay here !
Excelente, simplemente siempre atento a todo lo que ocupábamos. De verdad un buen lugar, de fácil acceso. Recomendado

Glenn and Oliver are absolutely amazing hosts. Their home is beautiful and the lodging space was absolutely perfect. The location is nice and a very short walk away from the Red Line which was super convenient!

As advertised. Great place. I stayed #12 gets great light as it faces the front of the building and is in the top floor. I’ll book it again for sure.
I appreciated the fast response time on all messaging.

Had a great weekend in Boston! Location was great, close to the T so we could commute to the more touristy areas. Also loved how the neighborhood was quiet but not too sketchy at all, with a few local restaurants for some late night meals. Great stay with a great host!
This is a very quaint, cute, comfortable house with separate suites. The amenities were clean and multiple! And Jessica is a WONDERFUL person!!
All good.

We loved our stay with Esther - the room was comfy, provided enough space for luggage, and had air-conditioning. Bathroom was tidy and clean. Fully equipped kitchen, large fridge and freezer, lots of appliances. Cute house with tasteful decoration.
Esther was a great host - she checked on us when we hadn't checked in until the late evening, and even offered us a later check-out. We had interesting conversations, and felt totally at home!
Absolutely wonderful stay at Jessy and Diego’s! Great location, amazing check in instructions, and overall a very very easy experience. I would 100% stay again without a second thought.
Excelente anfitrión,  siempre muy amable y atento, responde rápido a las dudas.  El alojamiento impecable, limpio, bien ubicado.  Simplemente excelente,  recomiendo al 100%.
It was perfect!
This was perfect for my husband and I. Super cute and in a great location. You can easily walk to every part of Boston. It’s super quiet at night. We enjoyed. Thank you
La pasamos re lindo!! La casa de Glenn es hermosa y tal cual las fotos, el lugar muy limpio, bien equipado y en un barrio divino y seguro, de volver a Boston sin duda volveríamos ahi!
Great place, will definitely stay again!

Had a good stay at Selim’s. The place is walking distance from a bus station and a T, so it’s easy to get anywhere.
Selim’s was very nice and super helpful with everything I needed!
I always look forward to staying in the Executive Garden Apartment. It’s just the perfect AirBnB.
Good location
Esperienza perfetta!
The apartment is exactly how it's described. The room is small, reasonably quiet, functional and comfortable. The small kitchenette is just enough to avoid having to eat out.
Very accommodating and responsive host. Parking everywhere is very expensive, definitely would take their recommendation to use public transportation.

An absolutely perfect place to stay if you're visiting Boston. The unit is way bigger than we thought it would be; the photos don't do it justice. The kitchen is absolutely amazing. My wife wished she could cook Thanksgiving dinner there.
The unit is in the back off the street so it's very quiet and is well stocked with anything you could possibly need while staying there.
Checking in was also extremely easy.
All sightseeing and restaurants are very walkable. There couple of big hills, depending on which way you're heading, but nothing crazy.
Anne was an amazing host. extremely responsive to any messages and/or questions.
We cannot say enough about this place. We truly can't wait to come back to Boston ... we would stay here again without hesitation.
It was very clean,Tasha is great and always helpful! All reccomendations.

The room was as described. Very clean and neat. The check in was easy and simple.
My only little bothers were the shower was a bit untidy and the bed in Room D had a very big dip in the mattress which had my back sore in the morning.
Everything else was wonderful! Would definitely stay again.
Great place to stay. Spacious and close to restaurants and the T. Highly recommend this!

This lovely loft style apartment is really comfortable and well appointed. It is a block from Boston Commons and close to many historical and cultural sites. There is a grocery store in the mall next door and lots of restaurants in easy walking distance.  Great location and responsive hosts!
Place was great and had everything I needed. Prime location. Quick responses from the maverick team. Great place!
Great location! Beautiful home for a family stay. Kindly provided toys for the kids and great communication. Thank you!
loved the place! i was staying by myself and felt very safe there

The location of this condo is simply perfect. Good coffee shops, good restaurants, 5 minutes to a subway, but still on a quiet street. The place itself was very clean and well maintained. I will note though that you have to climb nearly 4 flights of stairs!
It was a great location and easy to get around the city by the subway so close. I started the day with coffee and/or a quick breakfast before getting to the subway in 5 minutes.

Great place, modern and quiet. King-size bed, tub with whirlpool jets--niiice! Ben communicated quickly and took care of some small details also quickly. Very cool neighborhood on Centre Street, a block away, with little restaurants and interesting shops. Note that this is a 3rd-floor unit, so for older travelers like us with suitcases (we stayed 9 nights), this may be a small issue. Overall, great experience. Thanks!
Very friendly atmosphere. easy walk to local establishments.
A beautiful Homestay; family environment centrally located. Could not recommend more.

Det er et rigtig fint sted, specielt hvis man har brug for at være tæt på lufthavnen. Jeg var kun i Boston i en dag, og jeg skulle fly sent om aftenen videre dagen efter. Jeg skulle åbenbart allerede hente min kuffert kl. 16 fra boligen, hvilket jeg ikke var blevet informeret om. Det skal man derfor være opmærksom på, hvis man skal lade ens ting blive i boligen, inden man skal flyve.
Great value
Muy buena ubicación en un barrio hermoso
Great place, fairly clean, a bit of upkeep would be good. Location was great. Definitely walking distance to anything you'd need and transportation, too.

We absolutely loved Peter's place! The house was gorgeous, super clean, and well-stocked with everything we needed for the week. The neighborhood is cute and quite with plenty of things to do nearby if you want to stay local. We opted not to rent a car, so being a 7 or 8 minute walk from the train station made it really easy to get around. To top it off, Peter was an amazing host. Despite arriving after midnight because of a delayed flight, he still came out to greet us when we got there. He gave us lots of great recommendations during the week and was a pleasure to chat with. We would definitely stay here again! Thanks for a great stay, Peter!

We enjoyed staying at Katherine’s place. It was a very workable second story apartment. We were glad there was a private driveway to park our car. Was nice to have a Dunkin’ just a five minute walk away.
Amazing place in an amazing location. would absolutely come back again and again!
The amenities were as described in the photos and listing, and the host was extremely quick to respond to all comments and requests.
Perfect place for our girls weekend in Boston. Very central location and easy to get everywhere!
Perfect location, super clean, very nice host. Although we stayed just a very short time there, it was faboulus!
房東回覆迅速，房源最大優點為離地鐵很近
Sehr unkompliziert Umgang mit Aaron und dessen Frau. Hilfreiche Tips für die Stadt. Sehr schönes altes Haus in einer ruhigen Straße.
Stayed for 5 months. Host did a great job, would do it again.

We stayed at Penny's delightful, comfortable and clean private bedroom and bath for 3 nights while helping out with daycare for our grandson in JP. Great location on a quiet street. Penny was friendly, thorough and helpful and responded to our questions before check in promptly. Instructions for check in were clear and all went smoothly for our stay. How nice to have breakfast items offered, also! Would highly recommend!

I'll start with the TL;DR - Just stay here. Book it now, don't look back.
Chandra's space is so beautiful and so quaint. We arrived for a weekend getaway to Boston, and while both my SO and I have lived in Boston, I felt like I was having a totally new experience with the city because of my stay at Chandra's apartment. It truly feels like an oasis in the city. The space is beautiful, curated, and Chandra as a host seemingly thought of everything we could need.
And as for the roof deck. Cozy, private, with a grill?? Yes please! Never before have I had an airbnb that felt as welcoming and as home-y as Chandra's. We had a small gathering with some friends for dinner, and it felt like I was hosting at my own home. Truly special and relaxing!
Access to the apartment is a breeze (as long as you don't mind a 4th floor walkup), and its super easy to get there via public transportation (right new Roxbury Crossing Orange Line).
Beyond the stairs up to the roof being slightly precarious (steep), I legitimately could not think of a single thing that I would improve about my stay. A Boston gem to be sure! Thank you Chandra!!
Really nice staff, price, and area. Great rooms as well.
Maverick was a great host. The location was perfect and I couldn’t have asked for a more perfect place to stay for my trip!

The location and size of the apartment were great. Getting inside was challenging given its location on a short, dead end street that’s undergoing major construction of a new building next door. The other entrance to the building is on a pedestrian-only street so the drop off with bags has to happen on the busy, dead end street. The building is also on top of subway and you can feel the vibrations in your bed - but it didn’t bother us. We knew we were in a busy city. I should have planned for car parking.  I mistakenly thought it was included. In summary, the apartment pros outweighed the negatives for our family of 4 (with 2 teens) but it would have helped to have more clarity on the challenges getting in for the first time.

Melissa's place is in a great area. The neighborhood is quiet and very walkable. Check-in and check-out were a breeze. Though the common space and couch were dirtier than they should've been, the space is cute overall. I wouldn't recommend this space for older guests: you have to climb up a ladder to access the bed in the loft.

This was our second holiday staying at Matt and Eva's apartment. We like it for its convenience to our family (they live in Roslindale, 1 mile away), the comfortable and quiet bedrooms, and the sun-filled living room with a view. It has some quirks -- mainly the sloped ceilings in the bedroom and a tight bathroom -- but it is a value and quite comfortable all told. We will stay again. Matt & Eva are incredibly responsive and helpful.

The suite is well located and comfortable. The heat is very efficient, hot water plentiful for showers, and bedding quite cozy. There's a table for eating and/or using a laptop which which is also well lit.  Instructions for checking in and checking out are easy to follow and not burdensome.

An incredible and unique Boston experience! The apartment was perfect for my Celtics Opening Night match v 76ers. The fact that it's in "The Last Tenement" added a really cool historical layer to my stay. The location is unbeatable—just a short walk to TD Garden. The host was communicative and check-in was a breeze. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a memorable place to stay!
Easy to access from the T. The bus stop is right on the corner. Anne was great to communicate with and helpful with any questions! Recommend this place for sure!
Excellent host!
Very clean.  Jurek was a great host
A very nice place, close from everything but quiet, easy and comfortable.

This a place nice. 👍🏾. The wonderful is tourist in Boston that good and P-town is beautiful friendly people this then I can’t believe walk a lot tourist wow are amazing. And good history around walk a lot thumb up!
Walking distance to the station. Room is clean and spacious.

Lita's place is lovely -- roomy, "5-star hotel" clean, with extras like high quality coffee, gas fire place, and lots of towels.  The location is excellent.  The Jamaica Plain community is one of Boston's best.

We had a great stay here! This apartment was really spacious and matched the photos. The location was perfect we were able to walk everywhere we wanted to go. Upon arrival we had some issues with outlets and the host was able to send someone to fix it within the hour. Overall great place!!
Thanks for being very responsive and patient to my questions! I had a great stay at the cozy studio.
Great hotel, close to the park and all tourist area.
Great and safe location!  The place was very clean.  There is a train station at 5-7 minutes walking distance.
good place. near Harford.
The house felt larger than it appeared in the pictures. Our kids enjoyed the cozy living room and the spacious family room. A great house at a great location!

Looks like the photos, great location and there’s free overnight parking nearby on the street. Hosts were responsive up until a certain point.. from the moment we walked in I noticed a very humid smell. There was visible bubbling in the walls indicating a water leak in the apt and visible mold in the bathroom and humidity stains in the ceiling by the TV. I have a family mold assessment business so I’m very familiar with this. I figured it was just one night and I’d be able to get through it and bring it up to them anyway. I’m 5m pregnant had a terrible night, super stuffy and the smell was so strong. After I told them how serious the problem was and that they can’t just paint over it and should not host until it’s fixed, they stopped answering. I hope they do the right thing.

I could not have asked for a warmer welcome or a more comfortable stay. The house is charming and beautiful, and the room was homey and perfect; but honestly, it was Caroline and Catherine and Aaron who made the stay absolutely delightful. They made sure I had everything I needed and were availble to answer any questions without being in the slightlest bit intrusive.
