I opted for full breakfast in the morning, and it felt like family to me. A fellow guest needed his space while he had his first coffee and was granted that privacy without comment. I may go out of my way to visit Boston just so I can stay here again. Security is also tight. Thank you!
Great host. Wonderful stay.
Howard was a great host and recommended some great local places!
Great Apartment!! It is spacious and super clean. Located in a great spot in North Boston. Jason provided so much information and recommendations that you cannot go wrong!

Quick trip to attend a Bruins game and visit spots in the city. Great location. Super close to the T. Restaurant recommends in the listing were helpful.  Location was incredibly clean and well kept. Would absolutely recommend if you’re looking for a quiet location close to the city.
Simply the best!!  Wonderful in every way!

The room did not provide the elements stated in the posting - no blackout blinds, noisy AC unit, numerous bugs were able to enter the room, during stated quiet times there was considerable noise, no body soap in the bathroom next to the room and lack of responsiveness from hosts about issues.

Das Zimmer war wie beschrieben und wir hatten durch das eigene Bad die gewünschte Privatsphäre, trotz weiterer Gäste in den Nebenzimmern. Wir fanden die Unterkunft etwas hellhörig. Ansonsten hat alles gepasst und wir können die Unterkunft definitiv empfehlen, vor allem wegen der guten Anbindung an die Subway.

We really loved this place.  Had a great view in the city.  Easy to get food and other things. Could not beat this location and view for the prices. We are doing some programming in Boston and will try to book as much as possible.
Great stay

Maude's place looks like the photos! South End is an awesome neighborhood, very walkable, and great restaurants/coffee nearby. The AirBnb is eclectic and unique, with lots of fun memorabilia to look at. The host is very responsive and easy to communicate with--they were flexible to allow us to check-in an hour early, which was so nice. The hand-written welcome note, bottle of wine, and plenty of snacks was a really nice touch! I would recommend Maude's place due to its location and the hospitality! Thank you for a great stay!
Très bien hôte sympathique!

Jurek’s place was good value and easily accommodated a stay to see a concert at TD Gardens with my wife, two of my boys and their girlfriends.  The location was super convenient with its close proximity to the Orange Line.  Place was clean and the information and directions were precise.  Location also close to a decent pub and coffee shop which was helpful.  Definitely would stay again.
Weihai and Anne were very responsive and took care of all my needs when I was there. They went above and beyond in accomodating my requests.
Excelente experiencia!
Back Bay in Boston is hard under normal circumstances, but especially when schools are moving in. We were very grateful for this space to relax in the AC at the end of long days.

My partner and I were very satisfied with our stay at Healing Homes. We always felt that all of our needs and more were satisfied completely during our stay. Everything was kept clean and well organized to our liking, which helped make our trip comfortable. The location was also very beneficial, as everywhere we wanted to go was a very simple drive or walk away and back that kept our schedules a lot more open than we could've expected.

My stay was in the basement room. There is a lot of privacy and the room is very clean, plus there is access to a fridge and washer/dryer. The house is around a 10 minute walk from the Savin Hill train station which was very convenient for my stay. It's an old fashioned house, but I grew up in an old fashioned house for almost my entire life, so it was just like home. Wifi quality was excellent.
Great location near the T and the beach. Samuel was friendly and very responsive!
Great place to stay. Very friendly family, place was amazing met all of our expectations. Would definitely recommend  this place.

The place was great. Plenty of space for our family of 4 to relax during our downtime in Boston. Convenient location, comfy beds and Meri was super helpful and full of tips/suggestions. Would definitely stay there again

Terry’s place was very clean and cozy. There were multiple books recommending things to do in the area. This location was within walking distance to the T. It is on an incline so be prepared to walk up a small hill when leaving the duplex. Terry was quick to respond and very welcoming.
Rohn was great and very responsive
Das Appartement war sehr schön und zweckmäßig eingerichtet. Heizung war perfekt, Küche auch. Jede Nachfrage per App wurde umgehend beantwortet. Wir würden gerne wiederkommen.

Great neighborhood, plenty of restaurants, walking distance to everything needed. Walked to Fenway for the Red Sox game. The apartment was nice and clean, easy to get in. Instructions were clear and concise. The rooftop is an added bonus!! Would stay again if I go to Boston.

Great room in a great location.
Only small issue is the WiFi was a little spotty but Maverick quickly gave us the alternative WiFi
Great spot! Riyo was a wonderful host.

Great place in an amazing location. This was a great place to explore Boston from.
The place was quiet and off the main road enough, yet close enough to walk to everything.

Nice stay great restaurants down stairs convenient location
Would love to stay there again

Great location, really close to downtown with the T-Subway. Safe and calm area. The room is big enough for 3-4 people and very clean. Sienna and her husband are really great hosts. We would recommend for sure !
Delightful host clean and we felt very safe and secure . We will go again!

Greg's place is awesome. The space is clean, spacious and has everything you need for a comfortable stay. It's just a short walk to the Andrew Square T Stop, so it's easy to get anywhere you want to go in Boston. We plan to stay there again.
Can’t beat the location!

I and my daughter (6 years old) stayed around 43 nights in Laura's apartment. It was wonderful place for us. It is orijinal Brownstone apartment, very clean,full kitchen equipment and also there are a dishwasher,hair drier,iron,oven,towels etc. The apartment location is also perfect and safe for us, my little daughter could go everywhere on foot. In addition we could walk to the T Station (Orange Line and Green Line) around 15-20 minutes. Laura is also very very friendly and well organized person. Her reply is quick and she thinks everything that you need to live in your apartment. We will miss Laura as a friend and our apartment too. I would recommend this lovely place to everyone, because if we have any opportunity to go to Boston, I do not hesitate to stay here again and again.

Fatima’s house offered our students a comfortable and enjoyable experience. The house is beyond spacious and comfortably accommodated our group of eleven. Fatima’s warm hospitality made us feel incredibly welcome in Boston. She is highly responsive, and provides all the instructions for check in/out promptly. One of our students left a piece of luggage in the house, and Fatima kindly took the time to ship it to us via UPS. Conveniently, the house is close to a Target, and minutes away from I-93. Additionally, you’ll find a bunch of cafes, restaurants, and stores on Dorchester Avenue, just a 5 minute drive or a 10-minute walk from the house. I would definitely return to this property as it offers easy access to vibrant Boston, and a wonderful accommodation for groups/families at a great value.

Philip and Jens place was the perfect stay. Easy to communicate with, very clean, stocked with all the necessities, and hardly any street noise. It was nice knowing they were close by in case we needed anything. Easy walk to the bus or train. They let us leave our bags past check out, which was very appreciated. Thanks again!
Very cute place & great location. Good for a larger group if you just need a place to sleep!

Very comfortable house in a great neighborhood. The location is extremely convenient- across the street from a CVS, a 7-Eleven, and many restaurants. A Whole Foods is a block away and the T-stop is an easy 10-minute walk. Lita, the owner, was very quick to reply to my questions, very accommodating, and made us feel very welcome. I definitely recommend this home to other large parties and would absolutely stay here again the next time I visit Boston.

A & L were warm hosts who made us feel very welcome. The room is spacious very clean and beautiful with a big bathroom. The neighborhood is peaceful and location is very convenient with a number of restaurants, stores with in 10 mins walk. A and L were interesting and knowledgable people, they are very helpful in recommending places to go. And they were so kind to shovel the snow in the drive way so that we could park and drive the car, if you were in Boston this winter you will know how hard is that. We'd be more than happy to stay again next time and would recommend to anyone who comes to Boston.
Great space for one or two people to stay in. Location was great and place was very clean with everything we needed. Check in was easy and overall no problems. Would stay there again.
Perfect base for my first trip to Boston - so walkable, and right next to public transportation if you want to go further afield.
The place was very easy to find both during the day and at night! The room was a comfortable temperature at night and we slept very well. Well worth every penny.
Super nice and kind host!
Good location right near TD Garden and an easy walk to much more. The building is pretty cool!
Great location.  Very clean.  Would highly recommend it.
Second time staying here and it was just as great as I remember!

Very modern a clean place with great amenities.
Love the back deck and the kitchen.

Stayed for one night while visiting the city. I had a studio room with a king size bed. It was very clean and comfortable and at a great value. The hotel staff were very nice and the gym did the job. I would definitely stay again.

You are right in the heart of Beacon Hill with this place -- close proximity to lots of great restaurants, parks, grocery stores, etc. The pre-trip and during trip communication with the host was outstanding and very timely.
Because you are right in the thick of things, you should expect some street/city noises (traffic, sirens from nearby hospital and fire department, etc).
It's a cozy place that has all the basics you'll need for your stay in Boston!
Lovely, well equipped apartment in a beautiful, quiet neighborhood with easy access to the rest of the city
The home had a few things that needed repair and updating. Otherwise it was good location in Boston, near public transport. Good spot for a few days for two people.

We really enjoyed our stay! The apartment was spacious, exactly as described, very quiet with beautiful views. Having the washer and dryer inside was super convenient. Would definitely recommend and stay again.

Great location and a great apartment.  Expensive but definitely worth it.  The facilities and service are great and the location cannot be beat.   Whenever we needed something the hosts response was quick and very helpful.   Thanks!

Most delightful stay, excellent host, and truly “a home away from home”.
Meticulously clean, beautiful unit offering a boutique hotel vibe.
Maverick was a great host and allowed for an earlier check in. Great location and very clean. Perfect for a week in Boston. Will be visiting again!

The main bedroom is comfortable and nice, the crow’s nest is so cute! But the futon in the living room is too hard to sleep on.
Otherwise, the place was beautiful and clean.

Amazing experience
Very professional/clean and accommodating of guest needs.
Highly recommend especially for travelers for work!
Muny was extremely communicative and helpful. Thank you again for hosting us!
Really lovely stay. Clean and good communication.

Great place. It is exactly what you see in the pictures. Amazingly clean. Anne answers very fast. Easy to get to the train station (15 min by walking or 5 min by bus) downtown its 20-30 min by public transportation or $8 by Uber pool (10-15 min) I go every year to Boston and this will always be my place to stay.
Really enjoyed this stay at this place
everything was good

a lovely place. very clean and has a cosy atmosphere. the neighbourhood is nice and calm and just a short ride away from downtown. the hosts were very helpful and we had no problem with checking in and out
Lovely bed and a neat place. A killer deal - totally worth the price.

Had a great experience at Norah’s place. We were only there for the overnight but the location is fantastic- great neighborhood to walk around in, right next to the Commons (huge park), and TD Garden. It was quiet and comfortable. As clearly stated it does not have a kitchen but it does have the basics needed including some toiletries like little toothbrush packs if you forget one. Would definitely stay there again.
We loved our stay here, it was very easy to explore the city and see all of the sights. Alex was very accommodating and great with communication, the place was clean and had everything we needed.

Riyo's place was clean, comfortable, thoughtfully designed and decorated and a great value. This part of Jamaica Plain is gorgeous, close to the T, and a really great base for exploring Boston. Excellent host, excellent location, excellent airbnb!
Great location, really close to a wide range of the best that Boston has to offer. Really clean house, with all the facilities you could need to enjoy your stay! Would recommend staying here.
The co hosts were responsive, informative, and friendly. I really enjoyed my stay.
Best location and adorable apartment.

We had a great stay here. The Airbnb was pristinely clean and new feeling, one of my best experiences so far. Location was a bit of a drawback because it feels a little unsafe in some surrounding areas. Other than that the place was perfect.
the house was very nice and clean. Dan answered fast when i had some questions.

Excellent location, clean apartment.  This apartment is ground-level, but you won't be spending too much time there...its centrally located to almost everything - Commons, the T (Metro), shopping, the North End, Freedom Trail, etc.
Great place and TREMENDOUS value for Boston. OMG saved the day!
It is really a good experience. Very easy to walk to the center of Boston, clean. It is no doubt I will book here again next time
Really comfortable bed!! Love the location. Walkable distance to everything.

The henchman apartment was clean and homey. It had a wonderful touch of historic Boston. Great area; walking distance to fun bars and a ton of restaurants. Our only concern was that the water was turned off briefly with no notice due to maitenance issues. This problem lasted an hour, but wasn’t a huge deal. Jason is quick to respond and extremely accommodating! Would highly recommend this Airbnb! Thanks for a great time Boston!
Excellent
Very small but very clean and did the job in a great area
Parfait!
Listing was exactly described, and it’s a fantastic location if you want to be close to everything going on in Back Bay

Sehr saubere Unterkunft.  Küche, Wohn- und Esszimmer zur Verfügung. In einem Vorort von Boston, auf einem kleinen Hügel gelegen. In der Umgebung hört man Vögel und Grillen. Um sich ohne Auto zu bewegen, braucht man einige Fertigkeiten, um mit den öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln zurechtzukommen. Charles ist sehr freundlich und war telefonisch immer zu erreichen. Gutes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis.

Jonathan's place was great for my week in Boston. I stayed in the loft, and found it very comfortable and spacious. The ceiling can be low if you're tall. The place was full the whole time I was there, but all the other guests were very respectful and it was quiet, clean, and easy. Great stay
The location is close to everything which makes it very convenient.
Great space and great location in Boston!

Amazing location!  We came for the Boston marathon and really enjoyed the apartment and the area.  Close to so many attractions.  We parked our car at a nearby garage and literally walked and took the T everywhere for  4 days.  So convenient.
Le logement etait propre et conforme aux photos. Les informations transmises par Dan etaient tres claires . Je recommande !

It’s a very convenient and clean place with easy access.  It’s has a private fridge and private microwave for personal use which means there is no kitchen . The only thing, there is no tv in the room which can make feel boring inside if you are alone !

I returned to this wonderful place for the third time, where Ehab's kindness and support shine brightly. The house exudes cleanliness and warmth. I am genuinely grateful for Ehab’s remarkable hospitality.
Fantastic place to explore Boston

Very clean and great area. Door is on first floor right next to building entrance though. The door slams and the code pad to enter building is incredibly loud which made it hard to sleep. Minor issue in the overall stay though
Great place for short term stay. Host replied my questions/requests quickly and had been very helpful. Thanks for the water/snack!

Absolutely one of the best Airbnb experiences we’ve had. Bill and Maureen have thought of everything with so many cute personal touches. The room
Was so private and we had everything we needed for our stay! Would recommend this place to anyone traveling to Boston😊
The room was very nice, clean, and well laid out. We had a great time here and would recommend to anyone looking to stay in this area.
Beautiful and safe location within walking distance to many great restaurants. Very clean apartment.
Very nice place to stay! Close to lots of shops and pretty central to everywhere you need to go! We cooked a few meals while we were there and the kitchen was equipped with everything we needed!
Great place! We really enjoyed our stay here.

This place was perfect for me and teenage son and our intro trip to Boston. Very quiet neighborhood, 5 min walk to red line subway station was perfect for our adventures into Fenway, TD Garden, everywhere really.
The condo was awesome, everything was well thought out. Nothing I could’ve needed that wasn’t already there. Comfy furniture, pool table was a plus.
Awesome spot.
In sum, a great stay.

Nice place, great location and responsive host
Everything as described
Really cute, well equipped space convenient to everything! We had a wonderful stay in Boston mostly because of this location. Can't wait to come back!

Free bikes and bottled water made up for the fact that we had no hot water our entire stay even though we called the front desk every day. So noisy outside until late and shutting windows doesn’t block it. Hotel staff smokes pot in the alley and the rooms stink.

The stay here was good. We had to drop our stuff earlier than check-in time and Anne let us know it would be fine, and we found the room already clean and ready when we arrived! The kitchen provided so many amenities which if I had stayed longer would have very much enjoyed, like a toaster oven, juicer, coffee, many teas, and some food for guests in the fridge.  Very considerate.  The bedroom was clean and didn't have noise at night. The bathroom was nice and large.
Great location near Boston Commons and near lots of public transportation.

Jim was a wonderful host! The home is beautiful and the neighborhood excellent. We enjoyed the deck off the kitchen as well as the roof garden. The decor is elegant. Jim went so far is to provide us umbrellas on a rainy day and was responsive by text throughout our stay. It’s an expensive property, and worth it.
房子所在街区天天举行派对，声音很大，还有是不是摩托车轰鸣的声音，晚上出门绝对不安全，报道附近最近发生过枪击案；房子住的没有问题，
Location is great!
Within walking distance of Boston Commons and lot of the sites Boston has to offer

Great neighborhood. Very clean space. Host was responsive. Close walk to most things and a cheap T or Lyft ride to anything you’d want to go to.
Probably the most hotel like Airbnb experience I’ve had.
The construction across the street is real but you should only be concerned if you plan on spending a bunch of time there in the day. It was loud at check in and as I was leaving in the morning. But quiet all night.
Place was very nice. You should have no concerns.

I had to stay at this listing while my local apartment was undergoing construction. This place was perfect for my short term residency and had all the amenities I needed. Also helped that there are so many great restaurants nearby. Very cozy apartment and perfect for anybody wanting a stay in the north end. Highly recommend!
A fantastic place, we highly recommend staying here!

The location is everything—love the street that it's on, situated near a few good restaurants, target, 7-eleven for those who are out of town. The room itself is cozy, updated, heated bathroom flooring, A/C, etc. It is right by the front door of the building so you will hear everything from door codes/people going in and out constantly. I didn't mind it so much because I had my AirPods on most of the time but I can see how many others might not.

Hilary’s place is precious. It was just enough for the two of us to have a nice home away from home feel at the end of long day’s exploring Boston. Beautifully decorated and immaculately clean. Would highly recommend.

This place is clean, gorgeous, comfortable, and we felt right at home when we got there.
It’s in a historic neighborhood and close to the subway. We are already planning a trip to go back and we will be staying here again!
This was easily the best Airbnb I've ever stayed in. It was clean, had everything we needed and is located in a great spot. Highly recommend.

A great place for 5 guests. Great location, close to nearby restaurants and subway stations. Clean and comfortable rooms, feel like home. Kind and considerate landlord. We were the first few guests. The landlord even provided complementary snacks and drinks in the rooms. Overall, this place is highly recommended!
Great place to stay. Very clean and safe. The area is awesome.

I was okay staying here except host called asking why I brought up balloons and not to make any types of noice and asked me Several times how many people were in the apartment when I repeatedly said 6.
A
Spacious place with a big bed. The communication was clear.
Terry's place exceeded our expectations. Perfect for a girls trip. Clean linens and bed sheets. Easy to catch an uber anytime. We loved it.

My stay was quick/one night but the experience was effortless and pleasant. Boris and Susan thought of everything before I even knew to ask. The room was exceptional; clean, bedding was so comfortable, everything was easily accessible and easy to find, instructions and insight about the host was a nice touch and the many snacks and drinks were a friendly and thoughtful gesture.
This place is perfect.  Lots of room & plenty of accommodations. Yanlin is super sweet from start to finish.  I highly recommended!

This location is perfect for so many great restaurants & shopping, plus all the local colleges and Fenway.  It is super clean & updated, and exactly as it looks in the photos… no surprises. Thank you for providing such an awesome space for us. (We also felt very safe - i would highly recommend the location!)

Jodie is a nice host. She gave very informative instruction before we check in. The apartment is in a good location, close to BU, easy to get to Cambridge. The parking permit is a big plus.
The apartment is in the third floor of a quite old building, so no elevator. parking is at the back of the building, so you need to walk back to the front door, if you have luggage or grocery, better drop them at the front door first. The kitchen and bath room is quite small as described. But it works for us, parents with two kids. Because it’s near BU, so you might hear some students chatting and make some noise during the night.
Overall, everything is manageable. Having a designated parking space is a big plus for the renting.
Great location and quiet place!🩵
It was a great stay. Comfortable, clean, great location. Definitely recommended 💯

Albert was friendly and responsive. The place wasn’t a fit for me. But, I really appreciated Albert hearing my feedback and being flexible. Location was great. Price was excellent for such an expensive area. Probably perfect fit for a no fuss budget traveler! If you’re fussy, find a pricier, fussier spot. Again, Albert was great and responsive host.
Place was lovely! Good amount of space, great cooking ware, efficient assistance from the managers too! The whole area was also very peaceful. Would recommend 100%

My only complaint has nothing to do with the space provided by Paige, the location is great but comes with lots of foot traffic. We were woken up several times, every night by bystanders and vehicles. Otherwise everything was great.

I do recommend this place. If I come to Boston again, I will definitely choose this place again. There are free street parking nearby. Some snack, coffee, tea, more than I expect. And the place is very clean and quiet.

This was a great place for my 1 month stay for a hospital rotation. Lots to do with Chinatown and the Boston Common nearby and close to many T stops for easy transportation and a laundromat a 10min walk away. The area is pretty quiet for technically being downtown. It was so nice to have a separate bedroom and living space and a TV with cable. I did not know/realize in advance that the kitchen is outside of the rest of the space and stands alone by itself in the basement and that there was not a freezer but it really wasn’t a big deal. The whole place was clean and nice and stocked with the necessities. I would totally stay here again.

The place is so comfortable for staying. The host, Carol, is very kind and friendly. The dogs are really friendly and cute, so this place is recommended for the dog lovers. You can cook in the kitchen. I recommend this place.
Wonderful place and great location. Host was very accommodating!

Suzanne was an absolutely amazing host! My Husband and I went to Boston to Celebrate our one year wedding anniversary. The apartment was a perfect size for the two of us, and in a perfect location - walk-able to everything.. I mean everything! - if you're up for the challenge :) ) if not, it is only steps away from the T. Suzanne made everything so easy on us, from accepting our AirBnB request, to obtaining the keys, to our stay, to departure. She provided us with Local hot spots, walking tips, and even made us a wonderful pie for our anniversary! I give her communication rating 100% - which made us feel overly comfrotable. I highly recommend and we already can not wait to come back and stay!
THANK YOU FOR EVERYTHING!
Really great host. I had my flight canceled at logan Airport. was looking for a place to stay at for the night. Taskin was the hero and the saver. Thank you so much.
Loved the location close to public transportation as well as the full-size kitchen appliances including plates cups dishes etc.  Alex is a wonderful host!
Great Locations, great space and great cause. Thanks for having us!
Quiet neighborhood and responsive host.
The space is so clean. The shower and bathroom were so nice! Kevin was very responsive & accommodating. I highly recommend!
Amazing spot. Looks exactly like the pictures, walking distance to great restaurants and shopping plus the park. I would definitely stay here again!

Great unit in a prime location. The unit was modern, clean and worked well for my 3 week stay. It is a very vibrant neighborhood with some late night noise from the street but part of the charm of being in a great location! I look forward to staying again next summer.
Great stay! Very clean and fresh! Beautiful studio with all the amenities required for the stay! Would book again!
Very nice place, super responsive and friendly hosts

Our family slept well as we gently rocked to sleep each night.  Being on the water was the highlight of our trip to Boston.  We highly recommend this house boat.  It’s close to the Aquarium, Quincy Market, Paul Revere’s home, and the restaurants in that area were great too.  It’s a great walkable part of Boston.

Great apartment in a very safe and trendy neighbourhood. Check in was really easy and Kathe and Lisa provided milk, juice, yogurts etc for when we arrived which was a really nice touch! The apartment was more spacious that I imagined and easily fit 3 people. I would definitely stay here again.

Everything about our stay at Robin's place went above and beyond our expectations. She was incredibly nice providing us with everything from advice about the local area to the food out of her refrigerator. It was truly the best Airbnb Experience I've ever had. We did have a hiccup with some furniture breaking, but before I could even mention what had went wrong, she dropped everything she was doing and immediately gave it her full attention. If I'm ever in town again, I'll be lucky if I can find an available room hosted by Robin
Thank you bill and Maureen for the wonderful stay! It was so comfortable for the two of us and we wish we could have stayed longer. Highly recommended bnb for a stay in Boston! 🌟
Great stay in a good location.
Great apartment - excellent location, just steps from Boston Common, clean, spacious, nicely appointed - and a very well-run operation.
great stay and great location. felt safe.
Great spot, close distance to Maverick Station into the city or relatively cheap Uber. The home had everything you and another couple/group need for a relaxing stay in East Boston,
This was a great AirBnB! It was very comfortable, had plenty of room, and included everything we needed (kitchen, linens, etc.)

Ewa’s place is amazing! The space is laid out beautifully with lots of natural light. Fast communication, lots of amenities, and comfortable furniture. I would definitely stay here again and highly recommend.
Nice host and nice experience.

Great condo located in a nice neighborhood of South Boston. Short walk to Broadway for errands and restaurants, close to bus access, and of the Bay Area.
Condo is well furnished with everything we could want. It is really clean and bright.
Kathleen was very responsive and helpful. She always responded very promptly and was very accommodating.
We will not hesitate to stay there again.

Pros: LOCATION! It is a short walk to the train station, and we can get nearly everywhere in Boston from there. It included a kitchenette with a mini fridge, sink, microwave, etc. We had our own AC unit that we controlled and they had an additional fan. Everything you could you need for a trip, they had (chargers, extra towels, fans, TV, etc.). Riyo was very helpful and generous, even though we didn’t need to interact with him in-person.
Cons: The shower is 3x3 so pretty small, so be prepared for that. It does have a movable head but not detachable. Additionally, the AC system “knocks” in the middle of the night. So every couple seconds, it makes a knocking noise. Also, just be prepared that other people live in the complex. Overall, they were quiet but it’s loud when someone goes up and down the stairs and not 100% private (as to be expected in a guest suite!), just something to consider.
This is a wonderful place and a great location!

Chris's place was great! Great WiFi and TV options, I had to work while on vacation here. Well-appointed, a great host, safe and comfortable. One block to a small grocery, two blocks to wine store, two and a half to public transportation. Super easy to get anywhere you want to go from here. A few blocks to Whole Foods and all the local shops and restaurants. For the value, there's just no reason to stay downtown when Chris's place is 15 minutes away. This was a great airB&B experience! I hope to stay here again.
This apartment is in a PERFECT location. The area is gorgeous and easy to navigate. Could not ask for a better place to stay while in Boston!

good location next to the turnpike if travel to other locations is planned. Not the best neighborhood to take a walk or be able to walk to dining and shops. Can be noisy at night adjacent to a main road.
.
You get what you pay for.
Clean, comfortable and well-situated. Recommend!

The location of the place is great, it’s quick to walk to the airport and to the subway station into the city. The room was clean and the bed was comfortable. But we couldn’t really darken the room for the night and we also couldn’t open the window to let some fresh air in. The bathroom was clean and so were the towels. Overall a good place to stay for one night if you want something near the airport

The host has been very accomodating and the house was very clean and tidy. They have got lot of beds which can sleep upto 10 people. We really loved the cozy corners in the house. Overall, we had a great stay!

Jonatas was very friendly and quick to respond to any questions. The location couldn’t be better, just a block from the train station. The apartment itself is spacious with three bedrooms, ideal for a group of 5-6. We also really appreciated being able to drop off our luggage early, which made our travel day much easier.

Let me say this... if we lived next door to Chris, I could be best friends. Right from the moment we met, we felt welcomed and at home. She showed us our room and bathroom, gave us a key and said to make ourselves at home. Mocha Joe is a sweet, mellow cat that purred his 'hello'. The house and our room were better as advertised. Had it been warmer we would have spent time on our little deck. Chris' flair for color and style is everywhere, as are her beautiful watercolors and pastels. We have stayed in many B&B's but were only offered breakfast in one...until Morning Glory. Even though we were leaving early on Sunday morning, Chris made a wonderful breakfast - coffee, fruit, cider and a delicious German pancake with real maple syrup. I would return just to visit! Thank you so much Chris.
Very small space- really just a single bedroom and bathroom. Very clean, good location, and the host was very receptive to our needs.

Location, location, location! I would stay again just for the location.
The noise machines were very helpful against the morning street noise of deliveries in the busy urban neighborhood. Unfortunately, they didn't cover up the noisy renters upstairs.
The heated toilet seat was an unexpected luxury.
Nice condo, centrally located, and a great value.
Very close to North Church and the Freedom Trail. Check out Bova's bakery at the end of the street while you're here!
Great location near Fenway. Many things within walking distance. Nice spacious space

The pictures look like it really is, and in general the apartment was clean except for the bed clothes which did not smell fresh. Also note that the mattress is very soft and not great quality. Besides that, everything was great.
Camille was an excellent host
Hermina is pleasant and helpful. The house is very convenient and comfortable.

Lisa was a great host and communicated timely and effectively. The space itself is large, and the home is historic and a very cool layout. There were some initial concerns about the area, but Lisa made us feel at home.
Cute place, good location!
Very beautiful place with great amenities !

The apartment was great, just as described! Super clean with a very nice bathroom. Estuardo was very accommodating with a variable check in time and gave us our space during our visit. Plenty of street parking in a nice neighborhood away from the noise of inner city Boston.

Couldn’t ask for a better location. Right in the middle of everything. Solid wifi connection for when I had to work remotely. Great furniture and had everything I needed. Wasn’t extremely dirty but could have been a bit cleaner.

Phyllis’ Airbnb is just as described! It is clean. It is spacious. We didn’t cook. But it was a well equipped kitchen. The location by Jamaica pond and across from the Harvard arboretum was superb!!
It is tucked away off the main road. So. Just get clear directions.

GREAT LOCATION! Very comfortable and roomy apartment. Perfect for five adults. And the food scene of the Little Italy neighborhood is absolutely fantastic. 5/5 would stay there again.
P. S. parking is easy at the garage at Commercial Street and Prince Street It is staffed 24/7 so is secure, prices are reasonable and it can accommodate over-height vehicles.

This is one of the greatest place in Boston to live. We want to extend our stay here but unfortunately it is fully booked. This place is very quiet and pretty clean. The views on the balcony is great. You will have everything in the kitchen such as very large fridge and various utensils. It is very convenient to purchase groceries downstairs at supermarket and 711 nearby. More importantly, the hosts are very very sweet and nice. They gave us a warm welcome and always gives us a hand when we need. We hope to get back here next time to Boston. We really have a great time this week!

Super bien situé! Près de tous les services et station de métro. Un peu bruyant la nuit mais sans plus. Nous avons vraiment bien dormi.
En plein coeur du centre-ville, à quelques minutes à pied du Chinatown, du parc, de Back Bay Village… Nous avons adoré notre séjour! Je recommande fortement!

Came in late, and left very early so I didn't get the opportunity to meet Lori. But that speaks to how great of a host she is. Everything I needed for the overnight stay was provided to me without me even having to ask (wifi info, extra blanket, towel, code to the front door, ect.) Very clean room in a cozy house. This is a top quality Airbnb, and I'd highly recommend this place to anyone looking for a place to stay in the area. Lori, I'm sorry we couldn't meet but if I'm ever in the area again and need to stay a night, I'll be sure to look for your Airbnb.

Alan was a phenomenal host. Incredibly attentive and great communication to make sure everything went smoothly during my stay. He sincerely cares about his guests and their experience. Awesome neighbors as well, very friendly. I will be keeping Alan’s contact info handy and reaching out to him again next time I am in Boston.

Everything was perfect! ❤️ My husband and I stayed there for two nights on our honeymoon and we absolutely loved the place. The apartment is so beautiful and had everything we needed. The hosts were super nice and sent us tons of useful information about the area around. We highly recommend this place and would definitely stay there again if we come back to Boston.
Thank you so much for everything Jovan and Sena ❤️
We enjoyed our stay. Perfect location for us near the university. Very clean and comfortable and easy in and out. I will stay again and happily recommend.

Evan's place was very clean, in a quiet neighborhood. We got in very late and had an early morning flight. We didn't get to take advantage of the neighborhood restaurants or get to explore. Everything was spotless and comfortable.
Le lit était très confortable, draps propres, chambre spacieuse. Booker était très symapthique, ouvert et à l'écoute. Je recommande fortement!
位置好，周围环境安静，安全，卫生干净整洁，交通便利！

A very easy, convenient stay (particularly for work travel), and a very communicative host.  I used to live in Boston, so I know how to get around, and this spot is incredibly convenient to all parts of the city.  Would certainly stay for business travel again.
Super clean! Easy check in
A great place to stay! His space was very clean and comfortable, would definitely recommend!
Staying here was a great experience. Very clean and comfortable. Lots of thoughtful touches throughout the room too!
Perfect location in proximity of the airport. Amazing communication and accommodations!
centrally located to everything worth seeing and doing.  super nice place with lots of charm. I would definitely recommend this unit.

Matt's AirBnB is conveniently located and ideal for larger groups that need space & privacy. It was clean, well stocked with the likes of coffee filters and so forth and the parking was ideal. Highly recommend!

This is a clean, simple little apartment with lots of space in a local community near Logan airport. The apartment is exactly as described and is located in a safe neighborhood. We walked to the T station everyday & explored all around Boston & had a wonderful time. The communication with Ella was great and she responds quickly. We would stay here again.
This apartment is small but extremely central. If you want to be close to the heart of shopping and restaurants, this is a great place!
Excellent!

It was wonderful stay in Boston. Location of the apartment was perfect. It was near the subway station, MGH and it was walking distance to the city hall and the Quincy market.
The room was clean with large bed enough for us 3 and there was well-equipped kitchen in the basement. it was good for making foods. My daughter have had fun with spiral shape stairs.
I hope to stay again if I visit Boston next time.

I stayed at Sophia's place for one night and it was great. Easy to get to, clear instructions for check-in and good communication with Sophia, and a nice comfy place to explore the Back bay neighborhood from.
Clean and well maintained. Met my needs
Great location, clean. Enjoyed the stay.
Great location

The location was phenomenal. There was no street parking available; however, there is a parking garage nearby. The street was quaint and I felt safe at all times. The photos led me to believe the room was slightly bigger, but it had all the expected amenities. Slightly expensive after accounting for the various fees, but worth it.
Great location. We had a wonderful stay!
Very friendly and welcoming!!! Very clean and relaxing place and Bina and Frederick were great hosts
It was as expected after reading the reviews. It is an old building with single-pane windows across the street from a train and bus station, so therefore a bit noisy. Otherwise, all good.
Just outstanding. We visit Boston all the time but our first time on a houseboat. We’ll definitely be back.
This immaculately clean and very well appointed property is not to be missed. The location is spectacular with close proximity to Whole Foods, CVS, wine shops and in a gorgeous neighborhood!

Pam is an exceptional host, her hospitality and attention to detail made our Boston trip memorable and was nothing short of fantastic!
The building truly lives up to its description! It's a hidden gem tucked away in a nice neighborhood. We felt like we discovered a secret oasis in Boston. Having a playground right on the property was a game-changer for our family. The kids had a blast, and we appreciated the convenience.
Waking up to views of Franklin Park across the street was a delightful way to start our days. Nature at our doorstep!
This house was amazing with a Chef-Worthy fully loaded kitchen made cooking a breeze. Whether it was breakfast or a family dinner, we had everything we needed.
The 4 bedrooms with individual TVs were a thoughtful touch. Everyone could unwind and enjoy their favorite shows.
We’ll definitely be back and will highly recommend her place!

Excellent séjour chez Peter, instruction très clair et très amical. La literie est de très bonne qualité avec de super petites attentions en chambre à l’arrivé. Mention spéciale pour la machine à café qui est un réel confort et les snacks mis à disposition. Je recommande !
We had a nice stay. Check in was a breeze. Bed was large and comfortable. No complaints.

We stayed at Ilan's during a long weekend in October. The apartment provided enough space for the 6 people in our group. It is located in a quiet neighborhood in the suburbs, around 20 mins (by car) to downtown Boston and walking distance to a metro station on the orange line.

Paige’s place was exactly what we were looking for. We were in town for the Boston Marathon, and the location was perfect. Everything is incredibly walkable - we were 5 minutes walk from Boston Common and the Public Garden, and had endless dining options on Charles St and Newbury St. Beacon Hill is such a peaceful and charming area, and we were genuinely sad to leave. We would be more than happy to stay again!

My husband and I were in town for an event at Boston medical school. The apartment was walking distance to the school, as well as great restaurants, bars, and shopping. We even walked to the Boston harbor. The Victorian townhome reflected the old character of the neighborhood with its red brick sidewalks, decorative wrought iron railings and abundant flower boxes.
Following our stay my review is as follows; easy to find spacious accommodation ideal with a room each for sleeping. Coffee bar a nice touch.

The apartment looked how it was listed. It was clean, in a great neighborhood, walkable to many restaurants/bars/coffee shops. This would have been 5 stars, but there was no shade covering the “kitchen” window. Kitchen is in quotes because this is a studio, so one areas window is the entire spaces window. I see a review from February of someone saying there was no shade or covering and I stayed at the end of April and it was still uncovered. It faces the street so not only did the streetlights illuminate the room, but the sun rising made it impossible to sleep past 7 am.

I had a terrific stay! Dana and Andrew are great hosts and even made sure I had dinner when I came in late my first night, and they were very nice even though I messed up check in by not going to the right entrance.
The location is great! Very close to two T stations and right off Commonwealth Ave., so it's very easy to get around from there. Highly recommend their place!
Conveniently located, no-frills accommodation at a budget-friendly price. Great for travelers who prioritize location and value over extras
Super beautiful place! Looks like the pictures. Awesome neighborhood - tons of places to walk. Easy to get in and felt safe. Great communication from host.

Wonderful location, especially for parents of BC Students!   Clean, inviting set up for entertaining and chilling.  Outdoor patio was an extra bonus for a peaceful spot for meditation.  Two person Shower is a unique touch and comfortable bed in private bedroom gave us plenty of space to go between rooms.  Has become our “Home Away from Home” when visiting our daughter at BC.
Great place AWESOME location.... other than the room getting pretty cold it was a great place to getaway and relax

The location of this place was in walkable distance to many places. The metro was right across the street. Although it was conveniently located, it was a noisy area. We did not get much sleep at night. The walls were also very thin. You could hear the bottom and upstart people.
Michael  and Cassandra's place  was great. The location was super convenient to get around Boston. Would definitely stay again.

Spectacular is an understatement!  This was our 2nd stay with Susan in this incredibly gorgeous unit.  Our repeat business is obviously the best indicator of what excellent accommodations and host this AirBnB property offers.  Specifically, the location is perfect with easy access to shopping, dining, and entertainment.  The unit itself is so stunning I would love to live there!  We celebrating Thanksgiving dinner and it was truly a home away from home.  The kitchen is state of the art appliances and no detail has been left out from basics to comfort items.  Susan is beyond gracious and not only leaves yummy snacks and items to get your day started but on this trip even invited us to be her guests at a broadway show!!!  I don't know how you could top this AirBNB in Boston and the only concern I have is that my sincere and rave review will keep her booked solid and I won't be able to reserve this unit!!  I plan to book far in advance for my sons college graduation.  These Floridians love Boston and love staying at this AirBNB.  Thank you Susan for another amazing stay and your kindness and professionalism!!!  Cant wait to come back again!!!
Marie was a good host, always trying to offer the best service for customers.
The loft was absolutely perfect for traveling alone. Very clean and safe area. Easy to walk to public transportation.

If you're heading to Boston, look no further - staying at Kelly and Chris's is a must! We absolutely loved the loft and felt comfortable immediately. The location is great as you'll be able to walk around easily, public transportation is right next door, and places like Boston Common and the Public Gardens are also nearby. The bed was comfortable, the entire loft was clean, and we had more than enough amenities to ensure our stay was perfect. Kelly and Chris were so responsive and proactive, too, which made everything easier. We would stay here again in a heartbeat!
Great value at the price point.
Cancelled stay due to weather but host was extremely accommodating.
GREAT STAY HERE! THE HOST WAS RESPONSIVE & CHECK IN WAS SIMPLE. THE APARTMENT ITSELF WAS SECURE, SPARKLING CLEAN, AND SPACIOUS. I WILL REBOOK ANYTIME I AM IN THE BOSTON AREA!!

Great place
Great location
great location and easy to communicate.

First time booking an Airbnb by myself and Lixia made everything so smooth and easy. Room was clean and spacious, bathrooms were spotless. Lixia was very responsive to questions and made my stay very easy
Great location, very comfortable!
The best guy I've ever seen. Very patient and friendly to me and give me a lot of food for me. I really enjoy this experience with him.

Anne and his husband William are such an amazing people. They help us with everything we ask for and even more. Always paying attention to us.
About the place is super clean, even better than it looks on photos. It's a walking distance from several T station, so you'll be between walking and train in only 20 minutes in town. Not a difficult access.
There's also food available for guests like cookies, bread, milk and even watermelon :) we couldn't ask for more.
Thank you Anne and William for everything.

Beautiful clean space, very quiet away from the downtown area but gave us a perfect opportunity to explore the different types of public transportation that we are not used to seeing in NYC. Even though it is a distance away it is very accessible to Downtown Crossing and Chinatown itself.
excelente casa.  muy bonito condado

Krisztian was very helpful in providing clear instructions prior to check in.  There was a problem in the bathroom the day after we arrived and he responded very promptly and fixed the problem within a couple of hours.  We would recommend staying with Krisztian again.

This apartment was the perfect place for our stay in Boston. Charles is an awesome host! He walked us through all of the great features of his apartment, and gave great suggestions for exploring the area too. The location is great, and we loved having parking at the place so that we could take public transit to explore Boston! Everything was clean and comfortable, and Charles was responsive and attentive to anything we needed during our stay. Would definitely recommend and we plan to stay again the next time we’re in Boston!
A fine place to stay in outer Boston near some green space.
Nicely located, close the historic center and walking (5-10min) distance from the Arlington green line stop. Host answered quickly to resquests.

Daniel’s place is exactly what he described in the listing. Daniel himself is a great host, very responsive. There is one time that the next door guest was very loud and I texted him, he responded immediately and took very firm action in moving that guest if they still make loud noise.
Please note that the place is on the basement floor and there could be sometime that the car parked on the premise could be closed to your window of the bedroom or kitchen.
The main road in front of the small street that the house is located could be a little loud sometimes but the small
Street is peaceful and quiet.
I think the place worth the money.

this place is lovely! the room was spacious and the common areas were so organized and clean. commuting to downtown Boston was a bit of a hassle but perfect if you’re coming from/going  to the airport! overall great stay! thank you Boris and Susan :)
Spotlessly clean, just the right size for two people, perfectly located, quiet neighborhood, with easy parking on the street (not a small thing in Boston).   We will stay there again!
在杨老师家这几天非常愉快！杨老师和万博士特别好相处，会带我们去附近的超市，很方便。房间很干净也很舒适，去市区也很方便！很推荐！

This listing suited my wife and l’s needs well for our two nights in Boston. Great location from which to explore Beacon Hill and the surrounding neighborhoods/downtown area. Fully equipped kitchen downstairs was awesome to have. Respsonsive, flexible, and accommodating host. Would definitely stay here again and recommend to others.

Decent apartment but listing said there was 2 beds but in reality there was only 1 bed and a tiny couch. Guests that followed us also tried to get into the room before our final checkout time. Not sure if there was a miscommunication with the host or they misread instructions. Other than that the location was great and Edmund was very communicative with me.
Location, location, location.  So easy to walk and train everywhere. Such good food close by.
Not a single issue.  Great place.
Very nice and got back to me in timely manner.

Host was responsive but the main reason we booked this place was because we know Boston is hard to find street parking. His listing states there is on-site parking. He has 0 on-site parking and also states street parking. Parking infront of the home is for resident permit only and across the street is only 2hr parking. when we arrived the apartment had an extremely strong smell of Marijuana. I did mention this to him and he stated there was nothing he could do for people smoking outside. understandable bit all windows were closed.  There was 2 inflatable mattresses and both did not work. I usually try to stay away from giving a negative review but I do believe the host needs to be transparent about the parking. The apartment is a duplex type and shares a wall, a thin wall. We were a group with older people and we got 0 sleep because the guest staying next door was being loud and having a party or something or some sort.

Matteo’s place was very clean and all of the bedrooms have large comfortable beds.  The location is in the heart of South Boston within walking distance to several bars, restaurants and the grocery store.  Boston has a lot to offer and everything in the city is easily accessible from their Southie location.

We had a great experience with this Airbnb stay! The building was incredibly beautiful and the room had what we needed. It was exactly as described and very clean. Maverick was responsive and helpful in locating parking as well.

So happy to find this great place in the South End. Location was close to everything and the house is very sweet with comfortable touches. Stayed here alone and check in/out was easy and safe. Would highly recommend for anyone staying in the area.
Will definitely visit again

The apartament has a great location, very close to restaurants and walking distance to the subway and train station, so you can do everything by walking. The space was very clean and look exactly like the pics. My only complain was the lack of blackout in the windows. But nothing that jeopardizes the great localizarion and space.
The place looks exactly as described. Cassandra And Michael responded fast to messages.

The apartment is cozy and well equipped with everything needed. Quite close to the Orange T station (Green St.) that brings downtown in less than half an hour. The Neighborhood is quiet and nice, with groceries at less than 10 minutes walking.
We didn't meet with the owners but Tim was communicative via message.
Recommended.

my husband and i stayed at Robert's place for 17 nights in dec2011-jan2012.  Robert was host par excellence....he not only offered a private room and bath but very open-heartedly offered us the use of his entire house ...from kitchen to additional bathroom , living room and even a fabulous study.  the house is on 4 floors so there was plenty of privacy. the kitchen was equipped for gourmet cooking....well lit with every possible utensil.  the living room had a nice fire for those cold evenings. our bedroom was immaculate and well furnished and full of light from 2 large windows.. there was a super high tech musical washer and dryer available for our use. the fourth floor with splendid windows and sunshine slanting in every morning is Robert's study which we used as a yoga and meditation room..  it was perfect. the house is decorated and furnished with restraint.... by which i mean no frilly curtains and doodads and kitsch on every surface.   the live plants in the rooms added a lot of vibrance and energy. an added bonus was Rocco the dog,  friendly but not slobbering.. a nice subdued canine who loved playing ball in silence.  altogether we had an A++ experience and even told Robert that the price could be upped.. for which all of you reading this will hate me.     signed   seasoned traveller.
Selim's place is spotless and beautiful. Very comfortable and easy
L appartement est très agréable, bien équipé et décoré avec beaucoup de goût. Il est également très propre et Chandra est un hote très prévenant. Je recommande ce logement .
I enjoyed the clean, well air conditioned room for a great price!
Excellent instructions and always rapid replies from host.  The apartment was as advertised and the beds were very comfortable.  Would stay there again.

Highly recommend this apartment for all guests! It is located right in the heart of the North End and there are plenty of restaurants everywhere. The apartment itself is very spacious with a well equipped kitchen. Jay was a great, friendly, and responsive host! I would gladly stay here again!

Really convenient stay for where we needed to be. Albert and the team were always quick to respond and very helpful. Great for amenities as well, with a washer, dryer and plenty of towels and toiletries. We had consistent issues with noise from neighbouring apartments above and beside us unfortunately which affected our sleep and enjoyment of the space. Also could have been better from cleanliness perspective - a very dusty floor and hair in the sheets. Overall a comfortable stay for our purpose working very close by and the team were always great, but wouldn’t stay again knowing the noise issues to be how they were.

Beautiful and private, I really enjoyed my stay here. I got so much more value for my money here than any decent hotel in Boston would offer.
I would definitely stay here again.
Great location! Dana was very easy to communicate with and made check-in very easy. Would stay again!

This is the perfect location- walking distance to most major sites, yet in a quite and safe neighborhood with a great to-go breakfast spot around the corner. Lot’s of space! AC worked perfectly as well as the heater and we appreciated the available washer/dryer. Decor is beautiful and contemporary while still maintaining the home’s historic charm. TV in the primary bedroom didn’t work and we had trouble accessing smart capabilities on the living room TV. Some cosmetic repairs and a bit more attention to cleanliness could benefit the space. Parking spot is conveniently located in the back of the home and best for compact to midsize vehicles.
This was a lovely stay and one we would return to.

Location! Location! Location!
This place is in walking distance to every thing you want to see and experience. I would recommend this place to anyone.
Thomas and Belle were amazing hosts.  We wouldn't  hesitate to stay with hine again!!
Great place. Parking was only issue
Quiet, clean, comfortable and Jone made an extra effort to help us add a day to our stay. We would stay there again. Thanks Jone.
Great location Airbnb was very clean . Host was very helpful we stayed here again five stars
This is a great apartment for a group doing a short or even a longer stay and are visiting or working in downtown boston. It’s clean and the hosts are very responsive to our requests.

We really enjoyed our time with Maria Elena and family. The house is a bit creaky, but cozy and friendly and full of character. The kitchen and deck were great amenities. The neighborhood is very quaint and picturesque with many more Victorian houses (I hope that's the right term). It's quiet and a bit far from the center but access to public transportation is very convenient.
Maria Elena was very helpful, even loaning my wife a warm coat.
Great hosts! The check-in process was a breeze. Communication both leading up to our stay and during our stay was great as well. Everything was clean and exactly as shown in the photos.

Jessy and Diego’s place was exactly what we were looking for for our short overnight stay in Boston. The location was perfect for us, on a very quaint and quiet street and was super walkable to everything we were hoping to do in Back Bay. The apartment was clean and comfortable.
It was a little cramped (very small bathroom with no counter space, small double bed, tiny loveseat in the living area) and lacked some basics like creamer or sugar for coffee. These details would have made the stay less ideal if it was a longer trip.
Thank you for having us. We felt right at home.

Disfrutamos mucho nuestra estancia
Hay una parada de camión. En la esquina y un súper a dos cuadras, gran ubicacion

Pros: A place to stay if you need a spot close to the airport at a reasonable price. Easy to find and check-in. Overnight street parking available after 6pm if you have a rental car.
Cons: Overwhelming air freshener and laundry fragrance with limited ventilation in a small space. Interior lights with motion detectors that cannot be switched off. Closing the door to the area with these lights cuts off what little ventilation there is.

Le logement est très propre et bien situé. L'hôte est sympa et réactif. La chambre n'est pas très grande mais c'est un bon rapport qualité prix pour Boston qui est une ville où le logement est très cher.

A small cozy room in a nice neighbourhood and warm building. Might not be everyone’s cup of tea, which is why the host will remind you the conditions before accepting you, but I liked everything about it!
Stairs are a killer but the place was perfect if you want to enjoy the city!

The apartment was very easy to find and instructions were clear and thorough. Lobby was undergoing renovations but this was clearly communicated before I booked. The apartment was large and spacious for 4 of us and would easily accommodate larger families. Has all the basics you would need. We didn't cook anything besides breakfast. Nicely decorated but very corporate in feel. Location was great! very close to the T and to so many sights that we were planning on visiting. We were able to walk to most places. There were a lot of homeless people and/ or drug use nearby which made the kids feel a little unsafe- but overall it was fine. We didn't go out late at night since we were all very tired and the kids are young-ish, so not sure what the area is like after 10p.

Overall pretty nice
Great location
Very clean, pretty small but has everything you need.
Unfortunately though there pretty much no sound isolation between this unit and next door. I was woke up at 2am one night by the neighbors. It sounds like they're in the same room as you, i had to put in ear plugs. Also be aware the staircase is also pretty tight for carrying up luggage.

This location was awesome!
Convenient to all (my) family and friends I needed to visit in the surrounding area.
The train to downtown Boston is...literally...at your backdoor.
The neighborhood is quiet.
Glenn and Oliver were responsive, attentive and very congenial hosts.
I would certainly stay with them again.
And would strongly recommend this lovely third floor accommodation.

We loved staying with Lihua! She was incredibly hospitable + the bed & breakfast was the perfect spot for our adventures in Boston! So close to Fenway park, close to public transit, + great walkable places like Newbury Street & cute local establishments. Lihua is accommodating, friendly, responsive, + exceeded our expectations! Will stay there in the future when I travel to the city again.

We had a wonderful stay at this townhouse! It was beautifully decorated and had a warm, welcoming feel as soon as we walked in. The kitchen was fully equipped with everything we needed to cook a family meal before my half marathon, which made our stay even more special. The beds were comfortable, and there was plenty of space for everyone to relax, rest, and get ready. We couldn’t have asked for a better place to stay—highly recommend!
Very great house and location. Close to public transportation. Street parking limited but you can find a spot relatively easy in nearby streets.
Very clean and comfortable.

We reached this place at night
Before going to bed we found that the wifi was not working
Then after we found that the stove and coffee maker also did not work
We complained them, after few minutes the owner of the room called us but we could not talk due to bad reception then through message we told them that the Wi-fi & electric things are not working and there is no sofa/table in the lobby as they mention, nothing was there just bed, but the owner told us to sleep now, and he will cancel our reservation, it was night and other place was also very difficult to get, it was a good thing that the owner was a gentleman and understood the whole problem, I want to tell to the owner that before you rent a room, you must check your property to see if it is in right condition, what you are telling others, Because people come from far away to book a room with you guys, we were already very worried and then had to worry about not being able to sleep comfortably as we had to find other place.

Loved this house in Charlestown. Easy access to the Orange Line and great local restaurants. We just loved this location.
House was perfect for our family of 4 and the kids loved the movie room and snacks. Thank you for opening your home to us.
Timothy’s place is the perfect spot for a visit in Boston!
Good place to stay. I will note that the owner has a dog that barks very loudly when it hears you waking up and down the stairs. Scared me and my girlfriend initially.

Great stay, mini mart was within walking distance, very secure, very clean and everything was in working order. Just a recommendation, a lamp inside my room would been great, no complaints overall though! Thank you for the quick communication.
We had a pleasant stay, the house fit our needs perfectly. The kids had more than enough space. Beautiful surroundings, and lots of fun. Easy access to attractions, wonderful time by all.

The location was great.  It was so easy to get to where we needed to go.  However, we did not really use all the amenities the unit had to offer.  We left the unit in the morning and did not return until after dinner.  I loved the natural light and the windows.
such a great location! hope to stay again soon
Excellent location and wonderful accommodations!
Great location, clean place and well furnished. Would recommend.
Great stay
Great
Great location and very beautiful street.  The place had a lot of charter. Would stay there again!!

Overall definitely ok/good. Price is good actually if booked early enough. Place is clean. Host replies super fast. House is equipped with good kitchen and laundry. The thing I didn’t love much was the bathroom, the water tap had 2 separate pipelines apparently, one for cold water and one for hot. So it was difficult to manage sometimes/less convenient. Usually the 2 should be connected somehow. Nearest groceries is 7-10 min walk if you need one (uphill/downhill walk)
Quiet and perfect for a short stay! Place was very clean and well-kept, and the host was readily available! Would definitely book again!

Love staying in the north end! Very walkable to restaurants and the station. Jay was very responsive. The shower is kind of liable for temperature and there wasn’t any coffee pods for keurig. However, you really can just walk out the door and go to one of the coffee shops down the street and treat yourself for some coffee and dessert.
The pictures did not lie, amazing place for the price

Healings Home is exactly what they stated, easily accessible and the space was fairly large. Check out was extremely easy. The only negative was the noise, the walls were paper thin from room to room and even from the ceiling and bottom floor. If noise doesn’t faze you this is the perfect Airbnb.
Jureks place was amazing sparkling clean. Booked last minute and he was very helpful and communicative every moment in need. Great host great place I highly recommend!

El lugar es bonito en general pero si hay varias cosas por reparar, por ejemplo. Se debe agregar cortinas por qué entra demasiado luz a las 5 am allá amanece más temprano. La luz del clóset apaga la luz de botan las pastillas del break y se tiene que abrir la caja de fusibles. La lavadora no servía el primer día que llegamos No hay suficientes sábanas y colchas. Solo una y no fue suficientes para el sofá cama. Se debe de contar con al menos dos llaves de acceso, no es práctico si renta. Dos o más personas y ellos tienen distintos horarios. Yo fui a un curso en Harvard y no podía acomodar los horarios con los demás. Debería haber una lámpara central esta obscuro a menos que se encienda las luces de los burós.

Great short stay at Chandra’s place. We had a seamless check in and enjoyed the vinyl player. The appartement is comfortable with lots of books. The kitchen is great though we had no time to cook. The bathroom is on the small side. Stairs to the apartment are steep and narrow so beware if you have to carry up heavy luggage.
Overall a good place. Chandra’s communication was great.
This place was great! As described and beautiful. Easy location and the parking spot was a plus. Would definitely stay here again!
I've been at Tasha's a few times and always enjoy my stay. I will continue to come.

Jodie's place was a great stay for two weeks of work in the Boston/Cambridge area, especially if you will be in multiple locations - conveniently located near the Green and Orange lines so that you can easily get around, and with great nearby food options throughout the North End at any time of day (or night). Would certainly stay there again!

Felt very at-home here; had all the kitchen utilities I needed (except for dish drying rack). Ended up extending my stay. Very comfortable. Quiet, diverse, friendly neighborhood. Lots of great restaurants and Whole Foods within walking distance. Easy parking. Good WiFi internet.

Had a great stay! Just like described it’s right in Beacon Hill a few blocks from Charles St. where you’ll find a bunch of great restaurants and shops. The walk to the T North station was just 10 min. and it was easy to get Lyfts/Ubers when needed. The apartment is your typical older Boston walk-up so be prepared to go up and down very narrow stairs that can be a little tricky to navigate, especially with big suitcases but once you make it to the apartment it feels great inside. They provide the basics of everything you need with regard to toiletries and kitchen supplies. Some standouts: window ac units and big screen tv in each room, comfortable couch, shower pressure and hot water was great, and bathroom was bigger than expected. Lastly, Foster and his team were very communicative and proactive in providing detailed information from beginning to end which made arriving and leaving super easy. Highly recommend, would definitely stay again in the future!
Absolutely gorgeous space for a weekend in Boston

One of the best Airbnbs we have been. Perfect for a family of 3. The sofa bed was more comfortable that we expected.
Location is also great, quiet neighborhood with a nice walk to the T blue line
We enjoyed our stay. Great location and easy for us to go to our work conference and go to dinners all right there. Instructions to get in and out were very clear. Thank you!
Very nice apartment in the center of Boston. 1 minute to Beacon Hill, 4 to Boston Commen and the Freedom Trail. Great opportunity.

Very convenient place to stay in the city, it’s in a safe neighborhood. It’s very clean and comfortable. If you are older and have trouble climbing a lot of flights of stairs I don’t think this is the place for you. We had a very nice stay.

Helder was super helpful with coordinating our group's arrival and always available to promptly answer any questions we had! The house was spacious, clean, and all 9 of us thoroughly enjoyed our stay here. We also had a few members with cat allergies but had absolutely no problems at all!

This apartment was everything I was looking for and more. Looks just like the pictures, everything was spotless, the bed is comfortable, the kitchen/bedroom have everything you could need, and people come by twice weekly to take out the trash and once weekly to change your sheets for you. I felt so spoiled. It's also super close to the orange line and bus stops for those who need public transit access.
Not only that, but Jonathan is just an incredibly kind and responsive host. Answered any question I had within an hour or so during the day and if it was late at night, answered by the next day. He made me feel so comfortable/at home in the place. I stayed there for about a month and a half and brought my bunny with me, and when I took a weekend trip to NY, Jonathan came by to check on him and feed him for me and I can't thank him enough for making my stay amazing! Highly highly recommend this location.
Great communication from the hosts to make check in/out seamless and easy. Super clean and has everything you would need. I will definitely be back in the future sometime!
This was a fabulous place to stay for a group.

The host was very responsive. Location was great, 2 min walk to Boston Common.
Very clean, skirting boards could do with a paint.
There is construction work going on in the building but that was mentioned in other reviews so we were prepared.
Would recommend & would stay again.

The location of this apartment was ideal; however, our stay was overshadowed by a few issues. The heating system was inadequate, leaving the space uncomfortably cold during November's chilly Boston weather. The host provided two small portable heaters, but unfortunately, they were not sufficient to warm the apartment. Additionally, there was an issue with the fridge that required maintenance to address during our stay.
When we requested a partial refund to account for these inconveniences, our request was ignored, and we had to escalate the matter to Airbnb for support. While the host was responsive initially, this lack of resolution was disappointing. We hope improvements are made for future guests.
Perfect location right near shopping and eating! Smaller room but peds f if you’re planning on being busy all day and just going back to sleep.
Greta stay! Super attentive

Siena é uma pessoa muito gentil, flexível, disposta a ajudar sempre. Atendeu a todas nossos pedidos. A casa é muito limpa, silenciosa e certamente voltaria a me hospedar na casa dela se eu voltar pra Boston.
The unit was clean and there’s many food options within walking distance. You’re also a 5 minute walk from Boston Common
The apartment was very clean, and I appreciated the easy check-in process!
Marlene is a gracious and friendly host and her place is comfortable, clean, and cozy. Hoping to come back and stay here again soon!
Very nice place and extremely convenient location near MGH and the red line. Hosts very responsive and everything exactly as described. Clean and comfortable, with a fantastic view of the city.

Aunque fue solo una noche que nos quedamos fue muy agradable hospedarnos, fueron muy comunicativos con nosotros y siempre estaban pendientes si necesitábamos ayuda, quede muy satisfecho tanto con el alojamiento como también la amabilidad que tuvieron con nosotros.
Definitivamente volvería a reservar con ellos la próxima vez que vuela a Boston con mis amigos, me llevo una grata experiencia de este viaje.

If I could give a 4.5 star rating, I would. Albert and the team are very responsive. We had an excellent check-in experience and the unit is located in such a great location. It was clean as well. The kitchen has basic essentials. The only downside is that by the 3rd night, our backs were hurting from the bed. The couch wasn’t very comfortable either (it’s like a low futon). There is an elevator, but you have to take a flight of stairs to get to the 2nd floor to access the elevator.
The place was perfectly pleasant. Would definitely return.
The apartment is centrally located to e everything, which is why we chose it.  That aside, the room was a bit smaller than expected, but worked fine.

If you’re reading this, just book this air bnb! Unless you don’t like a squeaky clean, aesthetically pleasing and comfortable air bnb in a fantastic, quiet, walkable, cute historic neighborhood within walking distance to so many restaurants and all the best parts of Boston with a friendly, helpful host. If you hate all of those things, this place is not for you.
Kidding aside, this air bnb is perfect. I loved the neighborhood so much, and the place itself. Deanna went above and beyond to make sure we were comfortable and had everything we needed- she even went out and got a pack n play for our daughter before our stay so we didn’t have to travel with one!
I absolutely would (and hope to!) stay here again.
Great place and great location.
Would definitely recommend this place for any Boston adventures—so close to everything you could want or need. The space was clean and the bed was very comfortable.
It’a very awesomeBNB i will revisitagain
The facilities are complete and the decoration is warm。
Great place to stay, amazing bathroom and close to transit.
Great area and easy access to public transit. Jessy and Diego were very communicative and helpful. Cozy and simplistic place.

Lovely place with a great location to get around Boston from. Check in and check out were hassle free and Elisangela had quick responses for any questions I had throughout the stay. Everyone loved the amazing pathos vines that ran throughout the apartment—very cute and nice place to stay!

This was our first experience with Airbnb. And it was a really good experience. Linda’s house was lovely very clean easy and easy out. She was very friendly and helpful while we were in the area. The neighborhood was very nice we enjoyed walking to the village nearby, not too far from downtown So it was convenient going in and out of Boston and not having to stay downtown. She supplied everything we needed and would stay at her house again I highly recommend her Airbnb

Everything was great. Clean and inviting. Loved that I could get in and out as I needed. Nice neighborhood. Only downside was other guest was a bit loud but that happens. Would stay here again. Close to public transit.

This was our first time with AirBnB and after a night at Bill and Maureens place it will not be our last.
Also we arrived late that night Bill helped us finding a park space. He gave us a very warm welcome.
The room and bath we had were clean over all and so lovely stilled that we immediately felled like being home.
