For us it was the perfect place to stay and when we will come back to Boston we know that we will come here again.

This place is perfect for a trip to Boston. It is right in the middle of all our favourite places to visit. The hosts are seasoned and prepared to answer any questions.
We love their mission statement and would 100% stay here again next time we’re in Boston.
This is the second studio apartment of Maverick’s that I have stayed in and it did not disappoint! The apartment has everything you need and at a great price! Thanks again

Staying at Chip's place exceeded my expectations (which were already high to begin with). 5 things that I loved about Chip and his place:
1. Chip: Prompt responses, extremely hospitable, and an all round great guy, Chip was the ultimate host.
2. Style: With the loft, track lighting, tricked out kitchen with any appliance you need, maple floors, tree and plant lights, skylights, window seats and loft that opened into the deck, Chip's place exuded style and comfort. I would stay there any time. And I plan to.
3. Deck: The private deck was unexpectedly large and scenic with a view of a neighborhood garden on one side and the cityscape behind.
4. Location: Located in the South End of Boston, close to cafes, restaurants, the T, bakeries and green space, it was easy to get to where I needed to go anytime I wanted. Loved that it was so close a branch of my favorite bakery in Boston, Flour.
5. Home office: I had a combination work vacation trip and the office in the loft with a great chair and equipped supplies made me extremely productive when I needed to.
Thank you Chip. A gem of a place.
Peter
We had a great time. The apartment is new, clean, and well equipped. The location is good, easy access to different areas of Boston. The hosts were always very friendly and responsive.
Great location and easy check in!

We had a great stay with Ben and Jane. They have a beautiful home in a lovely neighbourhood, within walking distance of restaurants, Boston Public Garden & Common and a subway station.
Ben and Jane were very friendly and helpful and made recommendations for our stay. Lovely couple.
The bed was comfortable and we were made to feel right at home here. We would definitely stay again.

A great apartment in a lovely area right by the start/end of the freedom trail. A great neighbourhood and an easy walk across the bridge to downtown Boston which has joined the list of my favourite cities for a city break.
Really enjoyed the Politically Incorrect Food Tour in the North End, and seeing the Bruins defeat their arch rivals, the Maple Leafs, in OT was an added bonus.
A great stay, lovely host and would highly recommend.

Much of what we found hard was not the fault of the owner and manager - we were there for the nor'easter. But it would have been nice, given the weather report, if someone had turned the heating on in the afternoon as we were VERY cold on arrival. The apartment is small and the kitchen super minimally equipped. But we appreciated the location and loved Boston. Alicia was very responsive to all queries even when she was not in a position to help.
Need to be responsive especially during checkin process. I got lost and stranded but didn't get a response to SOS until late

If you want to be close to ALL the action yet sleep on a peaceful street, this is the place for YOU.  We could EASILY walk to everything: shops, restaurants, parks, the water, the colleges, you name it.  The place was so sweet and comfortable.
Always a Excellent Stay I highly Recommend!.
Ehab is an excellent host, the house is very clean and very comfortable, I will definitely return
We were in Boston for Head of the Charles, Jessy and Diego’s place was very convenient and easy walk to the river.  It is a very walkable location with many restaurants and shopping nearby.

Fast response
Flexibility
Fabulous space

My stay with Irene was very pleasant.  The location is ideal, with a nice park sitting right beside it as well as the Orange Line and Prudential Center both only a 4 minute walk.  The room was very quiet at night (which can be rare in Boston) and the accommodations were as advertised. I was given a key to the apartment and one for my bedroom door upon arrival which made going in and out very easy.  I rarely saw anyone throughout the course of my stay and overall I would rate it as an extremely positive experience.
Ótima acomodação, mais bonita que nas fotos!

Beautiful home. It was nice to have a private parking space and although it wasn't in the middle of Boston, it was really a short drive to just about everything I wanted to do. Would love to stay again.

Awesome place for our friends, we cook and barbecued. The rooms are clean and beds are enough for all, we really enjoyed in Eder's place!
Eder is very kind, responsed quickly and gave us many support!
A must stay for anyone who is looking for a beautiful nice studio and nice neighbourhood.

Great place! Close to things and easy to get downtown. Beautiful and minimalist place in an old renovated home in a really cool neighborhood. We wish we had more time to explore the area but really enjoyed staying here!
Our stay was wonderful and the space was decorated so cute and it was very cozy

Our five-day stay here was great. Close to everything, within a few miles of nearly all of downtown Boston, lots of great restaurants and grocery stores nearby, but on a pretty quiet street for the heart of Boston. Maude provided lots of thoughtful essentials, and our stay here lacked for nothing. Like much of Boston, it's an older building, but in the good way - full of character, and filled with interesting art and objects. We would absolutely stay here again when we return to Boston.
The bushes outside the windows are full of delightful little birds, too!
This is a great place to stay for a family reunion. Some people can chill at the spacious apartment, and others can easily explore Boston by the nearby T. Super clean and beautifully decorated.

I’ve stayed here once before in a different unit and the beds are so comfortable. The location is great. For being right on the commons it’s quiet yet everything is so accessible.
I would say however, that I wish they had a stool or shelves in the shower. It was pretty difficult to have to put all your stuff on the floor and bend over to pick them up one by one, especially for someone who might have trouble bending down.
The other thing we struggled with, was the washing machine. Loved that they had it…but we didn’t try to use it till our last night, and we could get it to turn on. Not sure what was going on there. Hope that gets fixed for the next guest.
Super clean and easy to find! Nice little place. Parking is tough but that’s to be expected in the city.

I had an amazing stay at Riyo’s place. It was our first time exploring Boston and the location was perfect - a safe neighborhood within walking distance to public transit. The space was very clean and comfortable. I highly recommend.
Great older home in a nice neighborhood, close to the beach and JFK Library. Very responsive host.

Lance and Shelly's place was exactly what I needed and as described!  Very neat and clean, conveniently located, quiet and comfortable, with a great value and a seamless check-in.  Lance and I met only briefly, but he was friendly, good-humored, and made sure I had everything I needed.  I'm grateful for their hospitality and hope to return!
The room is very comfortable and clean, and the location is very convenient to walk to anywhere in downtown area.  We had a great time staying there!
Great place! unfortunately didn't get the chance to meet with Eduardo as we were busy during the days but great stay!
Great experience staying in this lovely Beacon Hill flat for the second time. My first choice when staying in Boston.
Great location, clean home, clear communication. Would stay again. Thanks!

Lance and Shelly’s place was extremely convenient as I had an early morning flight. I dropped off my rental car the night before, took the free shuttle bus, then walked a few blocks to their house. I felt safe and comfortable walking to the house at 8:30 pm and to the airport shuttle at 6:00 am. The room was comfortable and all the spaces were very clean. I got a well needed rest before heading back home to Alaska. Thank you!

This lovely apartment was perfect for our stay in the North End. The location is fantastic, an easy walk to all of the historic and gastronomic landmarks we wished to see. The hosts were gracious, communicative, and accommodating. The apartment is well stocked with everything you need for a comfortable stay. I highly recommend this listing!
We loved our stay at bill and Maureen’s! Great location, we even walked to the city. The tea room was a lovely touch, with orange juice, snacks and coffee!

Location is everything here! We were easily able to walk to Fenway for the game and walk into town to all the bars and restaurants. The apartment itself is exactly as described and perfect for 1-2 people. The kitchen is stocked very well. Having the air conditioner was very nice too! Overall would recommend this place to anyone coming to visit, especially if you want to be able to walk everywhere! William and Sophia communicate very quickly and well easy check in and they were extremely flexible when I needed an extra hour to stay and do an interview.
Very nice place - building is gorgeous.  Very good communication.  Really liked it a lot!
Great Airbnb! The apartment is super clean and private. Has all the amenities you could need and it’s near the T. Check-in was seamless. I was here on business, and would certainly stay again.
Neighborhood is fabulous. A block away from the Prudential and the front desk was super helpful.

Lihua was a wonderful host. We got stuck in traffic coming to the city she was very understanding and accomodated out half hour delay. Gave very detailed instructions and made sure we could exit and enter with ease. Made sure we were settled into our room, gave us detailed instructions on our parking spot.
Fantastic location and very comfortable place!
Great place. I'm a repeat customer.

This stay was amazing! It was a great location we were able to walk everywhere! The host was so quick to respond to any question I had and it was a quick check in and check out! Will gladly stay there next time I come to Boston.

You get what you pay for is the most straightforward review of the stay. Cons are it is an old house with a slightly odd smell. Pros are the price, it feels well kept and clean, and host was very responsive. I lost my room key during my trip and the host got me a new one very quickly. Would recommend IF price is top of your concern.
The house was great. Would definitely stay again.
The condo was almost too big for my party of 5! It's very clean, well located, and comfortable. Thank you Lita!
Great location near lots of restaurants, retail and sites. Easy access (3 min walk) to public transit. Well equipped apartment with lots of space. New furnishings and super clean.
Wonderful stay for the night in Boston and Natalia was a great host.

I stayed here for a weekend with my friend! We thought the location was fantastic, the check in smooth, and the beds comfortable.
However, the bathroom could definitely have been cleaner, so bring shower shoes!
There is no full length mirror so bring your own mirror if you plan to get ready in the room!
We were still happy with our stay because of the excellent location

beautiful place to stay with a wonderful host.
close to shows

Great experience at this wonderful 2 bedroom apartment.  The location is great, very close to public transportation and walking distance to many great neighborhoods.  There are also beautiful walking or jogging trails right across the street.  Christian was an excellent host and made sure we were enjoying our stay.

Anna was a fantastic host - friendly, accommodating, and thoughtful. The room and house were not just clean but also incredibly comfortable. Anna is a wonderful and helpful host to her guests. The shared bathroom was also clean.

Hidden and affordable place in the heart of Boston. The location is within walking distance of many landmarks and public transit stations. It was the perfect home base for exploring the city. The place was just the right size for an extended weekend. The heated floors in the bathroom were pleasant.

Maverick's place was great! We had a short stay in the city but wanted something close to everything. Most things were in walking distance, access to restaurants and shopping. The place was exactly as described and listed. Was freshly cleaned and super easy to access. Would definitely stay again!
Great location, perfect amenities!

Maria is a first class host - very responsive and helpful e.g. restaurant recommendations.
The accommodation was as described - a comfortable and clean 3 bedroom suite.
J Lucky was an amazing host will definitely be booking again with him !

Prior to arrival, we called at 10:00 am due to not having an email regarding check in instructions and was ensured they would be sent soon. By 3:45 pm, we still had not received an email. We called again and got no response and the voicemail mailbox was full. This happened several times and finally was able to get someone on the phone and they had to send the email at that time for check in directions and instructions. We enjoyed the location, however parking was not mentioned and it was hard to find parking. Once inside, we had several things not work. The hairdryer did not work, the light above the bed flickered and went out, the coffee pot was dirty and had burnt coffee in it and there was no filters. The A/C would not budge lower than 76 degree and there were no fans. The towels were very scratchy and of low quality. Overall the stay was just ok. I probably would NOT recommend in the future.
Location was great - in the heart of Little Italy. Walked to many great restaurants and historical sites. Parking was expensive.
Fantastic location with super communicative and helpful hosts! I would definitely recommend this place for anyone in need of a convenient and comfortable place to the stay.

Overall, incredible stay. I loved the location and would definitely stay here again! The hosts were very responsive and helpful and I enjoyed my stay immensely! The flat was clean and tidy and such a peaceful space with lots of fun cafes and restaurants nearby. Would definitely recommend!

This is a lovely space in a great part of Boston and accessible to everything you might need during a stay in town – closer to restaurants, TD Garden, subway station, and grocery stores.  It does get noisy at times and is next door to a fire station, which was only disruptive once or twice, but that comes with such a central location.  Thank you for a great stay.
Great place and lovely host!

Nice and clean appartment in a quite area. Public transportation to Boston center is in walking distance and so are supermarkets. We found enough (and free of charge) parking space on the street close to the house.
Best location! Eileen was also super friendly, and we loved the place.

We loved our stay at Eda’s place. It was clean, gorgeous, and had a lot of extra touches. Her sense of style was perfect. The whole place was cozy and adorable. Eda is amazing, we enjoyed talking to her and she was incredibly helpful in helping us decide what to do such as helping us find delicious restaurants. We would recommend staying at Eda’s and would love to return in the future.

交通方便，走路到SAVIN HILL站只要五分鐘
房間乾淨舒適
所有一切都很值得再去造訪

Big, beautiful, open & airy this apartment exceeds expectations on every level! Host has thought of every detail- (we appreciated the ibuprofen and breakfast items) Photos do not do justice re: amazing kitchen; washer/dryer & window views! Will return 100%

Great place to stay. What makes this place so cool is that it’s very conveniently located (VERY VERY CLOSE TO THE TRAIN!) There is also a lot of cool places around as well.
Its clean, and has mostly everything you need if you’re a tourist in the city and won’t be spending much time here. It can be noisy at night.
If you’re into working out, there is Barry’s Bootcamp within one minute and they have so many great first timers deals. Highly recommend trying it out.

Prime location but the apartment itself was soulless and sterile. It is built for airbnb and is vacant and cold. I long for the days when Airbnb was about hospitality in the space and being proud to open up your home to guests.

Jorge was extremely accommodating with such short notice. His place is highly recommended and immaculate.
I’m gratefully appreciative to Jorge and his team for doing such a commendable job with keeping the place pristine and dust-free.
It’s private and peaceful. I was able to conduct overseas business during the late evenings and enjoy some quiet time from the hustle and bustle of travel.

Izzy has a good place to stay.  It is perfect for the single traveler on a budget.  Don't expect much- a decent bathroom, comfortable bed and a kitchen where you can cook.  I think of his place as a hostel more than a hotel quality place.  Not super clean but definitely not gross or super dirty.  Room is extremely small with no room for a night stand (not a big deal.). Super easy to get to the airport it is 5 min away or 1.1 mile.   The neighborhood feels fine. There are restaurants and small corner grocery within 1-2 blocks.  Parking is a hassle.  I found that the street of the apartment had signs that said no parking on Wednesdays.  Neighboring streets had no parking Mon-Friday during the day hours.  Izzy is responsive to messages. I would consider staying again.

I really liked the apartment. It was clean, comfortable, and cozy. Lots of clean towels, extra linens, wifi, a/c, and Apple TV. When I had questions about the parking in the neighborhood, Kama responded immediately. There was also a coffee maker, coffee, and sugar, what more could you ask for? Highly recommended.

The basement apartment under the Post Office might be my very favorite Air B&B I’ve stayed in!
The location right in the heart of Beacon Hill is 10 stars. Red Line subway just a block away. Every quintessential coffee shop, restaurant, groceries and a Planet Fitness all walkable and easy!
Apartment was so quaint and cozy. Kitchen had all the essentials and was not cluttered with random items left over the years. Mattress was comfortable. Great walk-in closet.
Parking in the Boston Common Park was easy the one night I had a car with me. Charles Street and the whole neighborhood was very quiet and peaceful after dark and full of life every morning.
Jason was wonderful and so accommodating with me having a late flight out my check-out day.
This place is perfect Boston!

10/10 would recommend Caitlyn’s home for your next travel stay needs! Her house is amazing, beautiful, clean, and you feel right at home. Ryan responds quickly and also gave us recommendation regarding where to eat and how to get around (he even messaged to warn us that the train line near the house will be closed the weekend we were there). Amazing location and warm welcome!
Everything was great..super clean. Great location. Super helpful.

Loved this place! It is so so worth it. I was a little skeptical at night but we had no problems at all. All your restaurants are very close and Uber/Lyft are very familiar to the area.
I will definitely be back!
This place was great for an entire week ♥️

Great location in a very quiet neighborhood
Close to public transport and close enough to downtown to walk
Good information supplied by host
Communication was prompt when required

This worked well for us, my husband and I decided to take our 17yo and her friend to a show at the garden. We didn’t want to be driving in the city. This was close to shopping, easy to many restaurants, quiet and clean neighborhood. There was coffee in the kitchen and shampoo in the shower, I love that! I also liked the suggestions the hosts made, the little breakfast sandwiches at the corner are amazing!
There were four of us, and I didn’t realize the bathroom was in the bedroom. Otherwise all was expected. The balcony was a nice added space to relax. I would stay here again.
The parking space that’s available is very small, we got lucky no one parked next to us- I questioned if we’d be able to get out. So a smaller car would work better if you plan to park there.
Very clean and recently updated unit! We Enjoyed our stay.
Our stay was so special. You could find no better location to explore Boston  within walking distance to so many things. Host was super responsive.

Leila is one of the most welcoming hosts I've encountered! She was kind and offered advice on places to see in Boston. The space itself was just what I needed on this particular trip. The guest area in her basement includes a bedroom, small living area (microwave and small fridge included), AND a private bathroom. The neighborhood itself is overall peaceful and quiet, too. This stay suited all my needs for my weekend trip.

Shelly es encantadora y muy amable . El lugar es precioso. Las camas son cómodas y hay aire acondicionado en el cuarto. Las instrucciones son claras. Hay buena presión del agua en el baño. Definitivamente lo recomiendo para una quick stop en Boston.
Excelente apartamento, todo cerca , facil acceso a las atracciones

Very good communication with Jonathan; Roxbury is a little off the main touristic centers of Boston, which is positive, if you look for it.
Appartment‘s facilities are very modern and well maintained.

We stayed two nights in Hermina's appartment. The bedroom, with shared bathroom, was clean and comfortable enough. Unfortunately, we asked for a three person accomodation but we got one bed only!. We tryed to contact Hermina (that was not in Boston in that period) but we were unsuccessful. So one of us had to sleep on the floor for two nights! Very unseemly!!
Great place and host, had an amazing time. We loved the space!!! 10/10 would recommend
Great place and location

A great three week stay! Kaitlyn was responsive and helpful throughout my stay. The apartment itself was comfortable and had everything you could need for a long or short term stay. Well equipped kitchen and an in unit washer and dryer make everything super easy.
The stairs are mentioned in the listing - but do keep in mind there are two flights and they are spiral and quite narrow.
It was clean. It had all the amenities. It was a good location for us.

Perfect spot for 2 couples to stay and in a great location. There were many parking garages available nearby and lots of food spots. Very clean and great communication, We would definitely stay here again!

We stayed in Adam's place during a business trip. The building was conveniently located and within walking distance of the convention center and several restaurants. Check-in was easy, but did require meeting the host at the start of the reservation to obtain the key fobs. It is an average unit in a high end building, equipped with the basics. The unit shows signs of wear, and was not thoroughly cleaned before our arrival. We encountered a dishwasher full of dirty dishes, a broken coffee maker, and dirty towels left on the floor upon arrival. 1 of the bedrooms lacks a window, closet, and dresser and was smaller than expected. Beware of the unit's electronic lock. We were locked out of the unit after midnight, requiring building maintenance to force the door open after an hour wait. Adam was responsive, but issues during our stay which made for a less enjoyable experience.
super central and a great location, always felt very safe and the host was very friendly and responsive! Would definitely book again

Location was great! Spacious.
Host had quick responses when we had questions.
I would stay at this property again.
Richard was extremely accommodating and helpful with my husband and I's stay. His place is in a very neat part of Boston, and we highly recommend staying in this location!
Wonderful location and outstanding decor. Great owner who is on site and provides excellent amenities.  Top Airbnb experience!

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Maverick’s place in Boston. The studio is located in a fantastic location and the staff were absolutely excellent with communication. The apartment has everything you would need for a short-term stay. We will be back!
Best place I have stayed in boston.
Clean, easy location, safe neighborhood.
I didn’t meet John but he was responsive, helpful and the place was nice.
Great location and great host. Our family really enjoyed this comfy and welcoming home.

Loved the exposed brick and the extra space was nice.  It was very  loud and we could hear footsteps from neighbors above,  street noise and hallway noise.  Boston was great and Brian and Heather’s  place provided a central home base.
Great location and beautiful neighborhood. Jessy and Diego provided clear and easy instructions. We would definitely stay again.

Chip's South End loft is truly a gem.   So much personality comes through in the decor and the lovely houseplants.   You walk in and immediately feel at home in the loft.  We stayed in 3 different Air BnB's on our quick tour of New England, and Chip's loft was BY FAR the best.  I can't wait to come back to Boston, and I know exactly where I want to stay!
Great place to stay on a very cute street! Adler was a great host and is an excellent communicator that responded to all my questions very quickly!

Kristina made me feel most welcome and I loved the JP neighborhood- the studio was very cozy and I would definitely recommend this site- this was my first airbnb experience - I hope  they are all this good!

Jessy and Diego's apartment in Boston is AMAZING and the perfect spot to stay if you're visiting the area! Fenway Park is right down the street and very easy to uber/drive anywhere else outside the Fenway area. We will definitely stay again!

We found this apartment to be a comfortable and convenient option. The building itself is really nice, and check-in was extremely easy—maybe it used to be confusing in the past, but that definitely isn’t the case now. The larger complex is great, with plenty of comfortable spots for remote work and a nice, well-equipped gym.
The apartment was clean and matched expectations. The furniture is simple and functional—more on the IKEA side—but totally appropriate for the space. The beds were a bit small; we ended up using separate beds since it felt a little tight for two adults in one.
Overall, there was nothing wrong with the place—solid choice for a short stay, good amenities, and a smooth experience start to finish.

The photos do not do justice for the spaciousness; this stay was way roomier than we were expecting, especially the bathroom and kitchen. The kitchen amenities were everything you'll need and the house has lots of character. 5-7 minute walk to Roxbury Crossing. It was great value for our trip budget.

We went to Boston for a couple of days to attempt to a show at Fenway and we’re glad we picked up this Airbnb. It was easily accessible in public transportations, cosy and quiet in a calm street. It was affordable and exactly what we needed. Big plus for the comfy bed.
Oh and J. Lucky was friendly and reactive. I recommend 🙂

The apartment is about half an hour walk to MIT campus where we attended a graduation. It's also a short walk to downtown so we didn't need a car during our stay.
Besides the two bedrooms and a small kitchen, there isn't much space for sitting, which was fine for us as weather was splendid and we only came back for sleeping.
This unit is on the top floor with several flights of narrow stairs, not really suitable for disabled persons or those with babies. We were all adults so it wasn't an issue.
The neighborhood was quiet and beautiful!
Thanks you for everything

Kin and Jenny were great and communicative hosts! I especially appreciated the included slippers to not track dirt inside. The house was very clean and well furnished. The rooms were good sizes with a wonderful variety of layouts for different ages.
Super comfortable stay at Maria’s! Right down the road from forest hills station. Made it very easy to get around!

Exactly as described. Althea was a great host and more than welcoming.  The place is very nice and clean and I felt comfortable in my room. The area is nice and safe, although a little secluded but it had easy access to transit. Would stay again anytime
Great location

Susas is an attentive host and as well travelled and well educated as they come. Apart from issues with hauling a 50 pound bag up and down very narrow stairs, the house is exactly as described and has a very nice aura to it. Plenty of appliances, well stocked. A cozy home away from home in a safe and delightful area of Boston.
We had a wonderful stay. The whole family enjoyed the house and it’s amenities. Thanks for having us!
Amazing Place. Very easy to access and close to all the things you want to be close to.  Stylish and comfy

Overall, I had a great stay at this place. I didn’t realize there were a few different rooms all rented out on this same property. The walls are a bit thin, so you can hear people puttering around a bit. I thought it was a good value, and the Italian restaurant nearby was delicious. I was glad it was just a few minutes walk away, as it was super cold the day I arrived!
Nice and relaxing.  Met all our needs
Great location, very clean & comfortable. Good value also
Absolutely loved this apartment. Clean and spacious plus a great location. Would definitely stay here again!

Beautiful home plenty of space new technology for ac and heating so that I was little confused on but he did give us clear instructions would Deff stay here again only thing I would suggest is adding a spatula in the kitchen flipping pancakes with a fork or eggs was a bit tricky 😂
Had at great time, Frank was very quick to respond and easy to communicate with.

What a fantastic place! The host was great at staying in touch and making sure check-in was smooth. The pictures really don't do this place justice. It's an absolutely adorable space and I wish we could have stayed longer.
What a great place to stay, it’s that kind of room everyone wants as a kid. Jonathan is very nice and truly cares for his guests. I will stay here again if I have chance in the future.

My friend and I stayed in the attic room which was exactly as described. I wish I had paid better attention to the previous reviews about the bathroom because there were many people sharing one, which is not something that I like to do. Nevertheless, it worked out well enough. The attic room is spacious, no frills and inexpensive. The steps are steep but didn't pose a problem for us.

Hermina was entertaining friends from Armenia when we visited. Her attention was focused on them, understandably. We did not have much of an opportunity to speak with her because we didn't feel as though we should interrupt their visit. Hermina was friendly and we enjoyed the limited interaction that we had with her, but the situation didn't allow for what I have come to consider a 'typical' Airbnb experience. We felt intrusive whenever we came into the kitchen/dining room area while her friends were around. It would probably have been better to make the attic room unavailable during their stay.

We did find a wonderful new coffee shop that was located a couple of blocks away. It is called Home.stead Bakery and Cafe. I recommend it highly. The neighborhood is gentrifying and mixed. As two women, we felt safe enough while walking around the area.

In general, it was a very affordable, clean and reasonably comfortable space. I did not see a fire escape from the attic room which was a bit concerning. And we were not offered a key to lock our room but to be fair, we never asked for one. It was fine, our things were safe and so were we. If you are looking for an inexpensive stay in the area and not particular about any of the details I've mentioned, it is a fine place to stay.
Third time with Lance and Shelly. Always works perfectly for me. Very comfortable and accommodating with a common space (including fridge) for AirBnBers.

We absolutely loved our stay! Every little detail is thought out from the design to amenities to anticipating guest needs. The neighborhood is great with good food options and a walkable subway stop.  Such a luxurious and art filled gem in Boston! Can't recommend enough!
Close to downtown, bars, restaurant. Great place for travelers looking for a short stay. The host is very responsive and helpful.
Lance and Shelly are great hosts and a spot right outside of Boston! Highly recommend them for anyone else’s stay if you’re in town for a few nights.
Dan was very responsive. The location is very convenient for Boston activities. The room and bath were spotless. Thank you for a comfortable and convenient stay!

We spent 3 nights in The Clare suite at The Upton. The apartment was just as described in the listing and contains everything you need for a comfortable short-term stay.
The suite is located in Boston's South End, with many very good restaurants just steps away. There are many other attractions and public transit connections nearby.
Communication with Laura and Olivia was great, and they were very responsive to messages and questions.
We would definitely stay here again, and highly recommend it.
Michelle was the perfect host - even having freshly baked cookies. I will recommend her to friends when they come to stay in Boston.
Everything was exactly how described.
I love the location. It's super walkable and centrally located. I highly recommend it. It may be a little loud for people not used to the city, but for city people, you’re going to love it.

great spot to stay in.
great communication.
helpful tip booklet.
thank you for the stay!
Un apartamento perfecto
Great place, centric and well connected. Helpful host.

There was an issue with broken appliance in the first apartment, but Albert and his team were very quick and kind to place me in another apartment and take care of the problem! The building is quiet, in a convenient location downtown, and very stylish within the apartments. Finding the elevator was a little confusing, but their team is quick to respond if you ever need help! Thanks for the great stay

Quick walk from the airport after an unexpected flight cancellation. As a Texan I’ve never stayed in a basement but it was a memory I’ll cherish. Thank you Peter for having a great place to stay in the midst of unexpected problems! Thank you to Carl the co-host as well making sure we were all settled!

We had such a great trip to Boston and Kathy’s Air B&B added to this!
The apartment is so nice and clean-with a 6 minute walk to a lovely beach. Also very close to many forms of public transport too!
Kathy was always contactable and so accommodating with anything we asked her about.
I would highly recommend this apartment if you are visiting Boston!
Thanks again to Kathy for such a lovely stay.
Great location, very spacious, and Steven was very responsive. Great experience in Boston and in a great location.
Thanks

Great location near Boston Common. Active night life nearby so some noise at night but not disruptive for my family. Some people sleeping on street just a few feet from exterior door but we didn’t feel unsafe at any point.

Great place to stay, and we really enjoyed the neighborhood. Once we figured out the ferry and the T, it was easy to get around.
As others have said, parking is tricky. Next time we will probably so without a car.
There was a bit of noise transference from the third floor, but other than that everything was fabulous.
Really nice place to stay.
A nice house in Jamaica Plain. Easy walking to coffee shops and restaurants. The T Stop is so close! A lovely gem.

We were very pleased with our comfortable and very nice accomodations! The rooms were sparkling clean and the amenities were of good quality and complete throughout the house. The rooms were nicely decorated and the large bedrooms and full-sized kitchen gave us plenty of space to spread out and feel at home. The electric fireplace and dimmers throughout added to the ambiance. The stairs inside were fine, even for us "elders", and not as steep as they appear in the photos, though I was more careful at the curve in the top which I'm not used to. The location of the apartment was convenient and close to places in Boston we were visiting and restaurants found nearby, and it was easy to park in front of the house. We even made use of the cute little backyard! Our host Terry was very friendly and accommodating and we would look forward to staying there again!

We loved our stay at Jessy and Diego’s place in Boston! The apartment was super spacious, spotless, and really comfortable — perfect for our family. The beds were great, and the whole place was decorated with care. The kitchen had everything we needed, and having laundry in the unit was a huge bonus while traveling with kids.
The neighborhood was quiet and safe, with lots of great restaurants just a short walk away. Parking on site made things so much easier, too. Jessy and Diego were awesome hosts — friendly, responsive, and you can tell they really care about their guests.
We’d definitely stay here again next time we’re in Boston!

Lori's home is lovely and filled with historic charm.   The location is ideal, a few minutes walk from the "T" stop which takes you to Back Bay or Faneuil Hall Marketplace.  The bed is comfy and the bathroom down the hall has a large soaking tub and a shower with excellent, strong pressure and plenty of hot water.  Towels, shampoo, conditioner, soap, bodywash, and a hair dryer that Lori provides made packing a breeze.  Out back, there is a picturesque patio where you can enjoy your coffee or meals.  I definitely hope to visit again!
Perfect location to walk to anything and everything you need. If you’re looking for the Boston experience this is it
Beautiful home, close to shops and restaurants, within walking distance to everything you need. I definitely recommend this home.
Great place for a short stay!
Warm, comfortable, quiet space. Great communication.
All good!!
Nice location
Their place was a great spot and convenient. There was a small hiccup with parking situation but we were able to get it resolved quickly.

cute place in a nice neighborhood! very tiny but that's not always a bad thing. a bit noisy because of the busy street (with street cars, students partying and occasional sirens from the fire station).
cute cafes and bars galore!!!
Excellent room! Exactly as advertised and in a great location. Perfect for a long weekend in the city!
Great apartment and the location was close to everything.  Highly recommend
We had a lovely stay at Misha's apartment.  The location was fantastic and close to shops, bus, and T-lines.  Everything was as advertised and even more comfortable than expected.

Jill is a nice and easy going person. She loves to share good places in Boston and hope her guests have a good time in Boston. I learn a lot from Jill and also really appreciate her lifestyle. Her cat, Zuma, is a funny and cute cat. The location, Jamaica Plain, is a very nice place. Overall, my experience staying there was fantastic. I will miss Jill and Zuma.
We only stayed one night but the apartment was spotless and cozy and the beds were very comfortable!! Would definitely stay again!

Thank you Pamela for a lovely stay in Boston. Your easy communication and flexible arrangements post transatlantic flight were really appreciated.
We had plenty of space, both living and bedrooms, and your household amenities, linen etc were plentiful, so fresh and clean. Thank you for the extra thoughtful gestures- e.g. phone chargers in each room.
Great to have 2 parking spaces available and the childrens' play area at the back of the house. Check out was very easy.
While we had some noise on the street during our second night, we would all be very happy to stay again in Pamela's house.

We cannot say enough good things about our stay here. The location was amazing-walkable to everything-the aquarium, Children’s museum, Greenway, Boston Common and Public Garden, and the T to go to Harvard. But the apartment itself is just such a gem-clean, well appointed (the decor is simple but creates the calmest, coziest vibe), with the most comfortable beds and seriously anything you might need to make your stay and sleep more comfortable-fans, a privacy screen, blackout shades, rooms that are far apart from each other. And tons of storage space! We stayed with our two daughters, ages 2 and 3, and it was one of our favorite Airbnb stays- and we’ve traveled on Airbnb a lot and are hosts ourselves! You cannot go wrong with this place! The hosts are incredibly responsive and very accommodating too :)

Stayed here four nights and have to say it was a pretty solid place to stay. The room itself was very functional and served its purpose. The area around can be interesting at certain hours, but generally thought the locals were friendly.
everything was great. excellent location.
Just as advertised, a great stay and a great location. Would highly recommend!
Great Place. We had a warm welcome, and the place made us feel like home. One thing thats great. You are so high up, that you are surounded by Trees, but still get a view.

We absolutely loved our stay at this home. It was close to everything if you like to walk (we do). There was plenty of space and the open floor plan on the main floor made it easy for us to all be together while doing different activities. The beds were very comfortable, rooms were spacious, there were tvs in most of the rooms (which we didn’t use much because there was so much to do outside the house) but were nice to have anyway. Kitchen was also great for making dinner for the family on days we didn’t want to go out. Highly recommend. Host was also very lovely and helpful in advance and during our stay

This place is larger than it looks. We were moving our daughter for university. stored all her things, all the ikea furniture we bought + other supplies she needs and even with all that in the studio, we didn't feel cramped!.
Everything is nice and clean, organized and modern
Rosy is a great host.
Glad we chose to stay in Rosy's studio
All good except for 🔑 part. Hard to pick up and return.

Great two bedroom in South End Boston. Walking distance to Back Bay and very accessible to downtown. Liesl is a great host that replies quickly. My co-worker and I shared this airbnb for 4 days and would stay again if we were back in town.

Great location, easy to get around and walk everywhere. Felt very safe the place is very secure. The only thing is I thought there was a coffee pot and there was only two towels for the two of us. Also the walls needed to be cleaned up maybe some paint or magic eraser will do. We had a good time.

This apartment was perfect for our family of four (w/ two kids 6 & 3). It was absolutely spotless, well laid out, and very comfortable with everything we needed (including central air, phew!) Peter was very conscientious about COVID protocols and we felt very safe. Allston was a great choice, near everything and with fantastic food choices. Thanks, Peter and Silvia!
Great spot, perfect location!
Shannon and the place was great.  Thanks!
This apartment is really convenient to the North End!  We enjoyed Boston and airbnb is a nice opportunity to save money for a group staying together.
Clean and very quiet! Perfect Airbnb.
Great stay

This is a beautiful apartment with a lovely view towards the dome of the Christian Science church. Everything works well and the kitchen was provisioned for cooking. Separate nook for sleeping facing the windows and a separate desk for working. Great location for Newbury St and the Hynes Convention Center. Host was extremely helpful.
No issues
It was a perfect airbnb, not to far from downtown Boston, easy acces to the metro and bus. Very clean and new. Whould recommand for 2-3 days!

This place is spacious with 3 bedrooms and a big kitchen. However, the bathroom is very tight. Street parking wasn’t bad, but if you arrive later than 7-8pm, it would be a bit hard  to find a spot right in front of the building. The place is clean. There are  nice good sized TVs in most of rooms, but the place only offers wifi. It would’ve been better if a type of stream services was available. The place is about 20 minutes away from downtown by driving. In Boston downtown, it was easy to park at Boston Common garage ($28 all day in April).
Great place. Perfect location for medical. very comfortable

We came to Boston to go to a concert at Suffolk Downs. This air bnb was PERFECT!! It is within a 5 minute walk of the downs, and also the subway station. We could walk into Orient Heights for food, or head straight into town. Parking was free, so we just parked and walked all the time. It is close to the airport, so there was a good bit of plane noise, but it was a perfect lil hideaway for a busy trip.

The apartment is located on a great location near pretty much everything you’re going to be visiting in Boston. It is very big, very clean and modern looking. Everything was more than great. Communication with the host is super fast and pleasant.

I really loved staying at Fifile’s place, she is friendly and clean and I love her cat too. The location was perfect for me, close to the T, walking distance to local restaurants, parks and gym. It was just perfect for me. I’d love to stay there again on my next visit.

Great location! We parked our car and didn't need it for the duration of our stay as everything was within walking distance. The condo was nice and clean. We had a kid, who slept on the pull-out bed in the living room. He could not sleep well because of the heating fans and also the noise coming from the street through the windows. The rest of us slept in the bedrooms and the noise didn't bother us.

Had a great stay! Super close to public transit and several great restaurants within walking distance. The space has a very clean, creative, and inspiring aesthetic and the rooftop deck is awesome. Chandra was an excellent host, would love to stay again someday!

The location of the house is good and the layout is very thoughtful. The kitchen is also very clean.
However, we rented the first floor and there were children upstairs constantly running around, which was very noisy. One of the bedrooms is close to the stairs, and it was also very noisy whenever someone went up or down the stairs. The handle of the shower was broken and fell off during our first night's bath, hitting my 4-year-old daughter's foot.
Another safety issue is that many of the windows in the entire house cannot be locked, and the landlord needs to check this in detail.
A wonderful place to stay the night! I wish I had been able to stay longer to explore more of the surrounding area, but this airbnb blew me out of the water with how considerate it was.

Great location and really appreciated the clear instructions. The unit is in a building with a beautiful historic facade. Just to note many of the local universities use this as a dorm so expect many college students out and about.

Helen was an amazing host. Her apartment was cozy and charming, perfectly located in Fenway, and the coffee was delicious. My plane was first delayed, then cancelled - she was very accommodating and flexible about getting me the key whenever I was able to get there. I will definitely be back as it was two block away from my daughter. Oh, btw- great stream of restaurants right down the street.

Amazing location in the heart of the North End! Only a 5 min walk to The Old North Church and a 10 min walk to Faneuil Hall/Quincy Market. The North End offers a plethora of Italian restaurants with amazing New England seafood. Don't worry about getting an Uber or Lyft as you'll only be a 5 min walk to the Haymarket train station which can take you anywhere around Boston. Grab a Charlie card and go explore the city!
Everything was great, except for at night the air vents were a bit loud. The place was clean and nicely organized, it was also very easy to check in!
This place was so cute! Decor was great! Very spacious and cozy. Less than 2 minute walk from MULTIPLE stores and restaurants. Would definitely stay again if I’m in Boston
Good place - location is convenient to subway station. Room is small but serves the purpose it needs to serve. Would stay again.
Place was great, real clean, very easy to access everything, had no problems with this place at all. I definitely recommend this place to couples or anyone.

It was bigger than I thought, my partner and I were the only ones in the apartment. The place was clean. There was everything that you need in the kitchen. There are two TVs, one in the room and a big one in the living room. It was def worth the pay. Keep doing a good job Tasha

Very comfy place in a fairly tight neighborhood, was easy to feel relaxed and comfortable. Close to the Airport T stop made it convenient and many things within 5-10 minutes walk (like a CVS). Cheery and pleasant decor, the plants and flowers were a lovely touch, thank you.
An important observation - the bathroom works fine, the shower is great, just noting it is quite small with minimal countertop space. I actually appreciated this because it gave more space to the sitting area which we used a lot. So no issue whatsoever for us.
I totally recommend this apartment for a shorter Boston visit!
Great place, great neighborhood. Everyone is top notch and doesn’t hesitate to see if you need anything.

Awesome stay if you want to walk and explore Boston!
Close to the water, close to transit, extremely walkable. Great restaurants nearby.
One of my favorite stays in a while!
Friendly hosts!  Very clean home. Would stay again!
The Airbnb should include all added cost as it charged another $35 per day per person which increase the cost sustancially.

Charles place is by far the best deal in the area!
Any amenity you could need is in his spotless place and its very centrally located.
Its a great apartment...

Great place, super well located, everything is walkable and lots of places to see and restaurants around! The Maverick Team was super responsive and helpful. Only thing to note is that it got quite cold at night and even during the day, with no heating offered.

Good location, easy to access the property and photos are accurate. Some noise from the street at night. In front of the building is a hang out for some homeless people however we were not bothered by them during our stay. Overall, it was convenient, clean and we enjoyed our stay.
Beautiful place and impressive house plant decor!  Plenty of places to sleep! Would definitely stay here again :)
Sofia and Daniel were amazing hosts, exceptionally responsive.  The apartment was clean and comfortable.
Spacious house in a great location. Definitely made our trip to Boston memorable

Staying with Robin was the perfect getaway! Her house is absolutely beautiful and you can’t help but feel at home. Robin is incredibly kind and welcoming, I enjoyed every bit of my stay. I look forward to visiting Boston and staying here again.

It is perfect place! Especially, TV and audio system was amazing!
Owner will give a lot of information for you. It will help your trip.

Great stay at Jodie’s place. Very simple apartment but all we needed. We didn’t utilize the parking or kitchen but the sling TV was nice to have. The apartment also had an iron and ironing board which came in handy. The location is very close to Cambridge as well!

I really enjoyed my stay. As others have noted, the room is a little small but very clean and comfortable.
Centrally located to everything, I recommend the Charlesworth!

Kathe and Lisa’s place is amazing! It is located about 7-10 minutes walking from both Back Bay Station and Copley Square making it a great location within the city.
The space itself is a great place. It has a large king bed making it great for 1 or 2 people, and Kathe and Lisa went above and beyond at making the place great with some food in the refrigerator and toothbrushes and toothpaste in the bathroom.
Do note that there is only a small kitchenette, there is no stove in the apartment, but even then the apartment is fantastic! Would highly recommend!

We had a wonderful stay at this Boston apartment.
The place was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described in the listing. The location was perfect — close to public transportation, shops, and everything we needed during our visit.
We truly enjoyed our time here and would be happy to stay again on our next visit to Boston.
Highly recommended!

Nice views and space. I was a bit put off by staff mask adherence. I liked the bathroom products. If the room service was available, it was hard to tell because there wasn’t a page on the website and there weren’t clear guides stating so I grabbed coffee around the corner and brought it back.
Yusuf’s home was very comfortable although the exterior was not well represented.  He makes every effort to make you feel at home. He’s a great host.

Cute studio apartment in a great location! The apartment was clean and well maintained, and the hosts were quick to respond to our questions and provided helpful recommendations. The reason I gave four stars instead of five was because of the amount of street noise and noise from other apartments in the building that we could hear. Otherwise, I would highly recommend!
Loved our stay. Needs update with the picture of the place (one room bunk bed and the other room 2 queen beds). Close to the train, airport and good places of food. Excellent communication.
She spared no expense! The beds, the pillows, the towels everything was perfect! The location was great, the roof top was insane!

Beautiful apartment, convenient location, close to everything, and great views. Boston can be challenging to find your way around given the city design—I’m glad I was in the center of the great visitor destinations. And Brian was excellent in getting back to me promptly with answers to my questions
Everything was wonderful! It was in a perfect location, great for the price:)

Jonathan was a very gracious host. His responses were very timely, the place was very clean, and I had no issues during my stay. The bed was very comfortable and the house was very quiet and peaceful. It's close to the train station and about 2 miles from Boston Common so if you take a shared cab, it will cost you about $4 - $7. Overall a very good place to stay.

An awesome place to stay for a small group (3-6 people). The rooms are very nice and clean. The amenities included are also very adequate and there is certainly not much to complain about. Would definitely recommend this to anyone looking for a place to stay in Boston (both for a short or long term).

I really enjoy my time at Sophia's place. She was really nice and gave me a lot of advise on restaurant and cafe.
The room is pretty clean and cozy.
a good hostig and service by the owner

The pluses: it's a good location- the apartment was clean, the kitchen was actually somewhat useable. Ceilings are high, so there's a spacious feeling. Showers got hot and good water flow.
The so/so: I found the layout to be a little bit disconcerting, but it's an old apartment with brick walls. It's not swanky- linens are serviceable, but certainly not high end. Not enough hangars, closet space or drawers, so I lived out of my suitcase for the 5 days I was there. Bed was OK, but a firmer mattress would have been preferable.
The minuses: noise isolation is poor. If you're a light sleeper-you'll hear your neighbors coming and going. There are light leaks. Its an old building- cooling is opening a window which I had to do each night.
Parking is extra- I wound up renting a space from a neighboring building, but I couldn't figure out how to get there without walking for a couple of hundred yards carrying a suitcase.
Overall, I found it good value- would stay there again.
I've stayed here three times, and plan on returning in the fall.  Great location - easy to get anywhere in Boston/Cambridge.  Unit is spacious, spotless, up-to-date, and comfortable.
Great location! Everything is within walking distance.
Perfect location, beautiful apartment, super host with incredible alacrity in responding… thanks Amy!
Steven's Place was exactly as it looked in the photos and easy to check in and out. Great neighbourhood for getting anywhere in Boston.
This place was very cozy in a cute neighborhood. I would definitely stay again!
Bien , muy bonito lugar
Great hosts!
Everything exactly as described. A great place in a beautiful location close to many things to do and see.

Chambre avec salle de bain privés.
Je recommande pour l’emplacement, proche de quartiers animés, de la gare back bay station (5 minutes).
Le tarif est assez élevé je trouve.
La chambre paraît plus grande sur les photos mais ça fait amplement l’affaire pour quelques nuits.
Je me suis sentie en sécurité.
Very pleasant stay, thank you!
Great place, very spacious and great location. Hosts communicative.

This place did great for our small group. The location is perfect, the house instructions were easy, and checkout was a breeze.  The kitchen was well stocked with coffee and tea (nice touch!) and the bathroom was stocked with soap, shampoo, toilet paper, and other amenities. I would be happy to stay there again.

Nemrac is a fantastic host. She communicated stay details clearly and accommodated my early check-in request. She met me at the door and gave me a quick tour of the house. I felt right at home.
The room was cozy. Bigger than I’d expected. Will definitely look to stay here when I return to Boston.
5/5 Stars.
I would like to stay here again in the future if I visit Boston :)
I had a lovely stay at TuanAnh's place during my stay in Boston. The place isnt' too far from the station or the T but, I did take the bus or lyft to get to one.

This is a beautiful and I would say luxurious apartment. Felt just like home. Very nice kitchen and living space and beautiful back porch. The house itself is gorgeous and the location is great. Very peaceful and comfortable! Elena was very responsive and helpful. We liked it so much we added an extra day to our visit and Elena was helpful in making that change. Would highly recommend!
Easy, convenient stay! Clean, ready, perfect

We booked this space after a cancelled flight and couldn’t have been more pleased. The space is tiny and would be tight for many nights with more than one person. All of the appliances and bathroom setup is mini sized. However, this is in a great neighborhood and location is easily walkable to tons of restaurants and bars. We also used the washer/dryer and were pleased with how quickly our clothes dried considering we washed towels. Would recommend for a weekend trip!

This space is adorable and in the beautiful Beacon Hill neighborhood. We were within walking distance of just about everything in Boston and took advantage of the local tips left by the host. Lucy was a quick communicator and flexible with our travel schedule. She added nice touches like candy and breakfast and lots of lovely candles. Perfect stay and we hope to be back.

My family had a lovely stay here while visiting Boston over the Christmas holiday. Elena was very welcoming and checked in on us during the stay. Her kitchen is really well-stocked, and the whole AirBNB had great amenities and was cozy. Definitely recommend if you are visiting Boston.
Place was everything we needed for the weekend. The apartment is cold but I expected that since its a basement. The portable heaters helped a bit.
Great place to stay! Awesome location right in the center of a ton of great food places! Has an incredible rooftop area. Loved staying here.
Home was welcoming and comfortable. Great location, everything supplied and very clean.
We really enjoyed our stay here! The location was super accessible, and the apartment was very clean.
Amazing location, super cute and cozy. Exactly what you need for a little Boston getaway. Nice short walk from the train! Would definitely book again.

Teej was an amazing host! Quickly responded to all questions and went over and above to make us feel welcome and at home, with a few extra surprises thrown in! The home was beautifully furnished and very clean and comfortable. Parking was a bit challenging at times, but that seems to be the norm in and around Boston. This was not the fault of the host in any way, but definitely something to keep in mind when traveling to Boston!
房间干净，宽敞舒适。有机会还会来住

My stay at Lihua was absolutely wonderful!
My room and bathroom were super clean, the breakfast was great, good location, very cozy interior.
Lihua was very welcoming and friendly. I can definetely recommend!

Great location. Nice apartment. Only complaint is there’s only one key to use building door/elevators, so it’s hard to do separate outings if you are in a group. Laundry was on same floor and really easy to use.
Great place and great host!
Great apartment in the heart of Southie! Fantastic location if you are looking to be closer to restaurants, nightlife, and the beach.
So wonderful from start to finish - ability to store luggage on both arrival and departure day, perfect location to view the Boston skyline, and great attention to detail.

A wonderful place to stay, especially if you have a group of 5 or 6 and need more spaces to sleep and multiple bathrooms. Easy check in and check out instructions. Clean and comfortable with basic amenities to have breakfast in. It’s a beautiful drive into downtown and there are plenty of restaurants and cafes around the neighborhood if not going into downtown.
Great host, smooth check-in, perfect location.

A very comfortable, clean well placed home.  The beds and linens were so comfy and provided a great night's sleep. The T is easily accessible. However, the apartment is so centrally located,  it was actually cheaper to use Lyft ( there was 4 of us). Full sized kitchen and fridge and oven. Host was easily contacted and very responsive.  No matter where I'm going in Boston I would stay here again without hesitation.
Very nice residential area, we wish we could’ve stayed longer. The host was very responsive and friendly.  We loved the courtyard, too.

Excellent location available in a pinch for an extended layover. Roughly 10 minutes from Boston South Station and a couple blocks away from Boston Commons. Very walkable location with food options nearby. The unit itself is well-equipped and clean.
Steven's instructions were very clear and communication was not needed.

Overall, it was a decentish experience, not great but not terrible either. The best part was the responsiveness of the hosts when any issues arose. They were incredibly responsive, which deserves 5-stars. It’s a decent place to work remotely. The studio is larger, and the place looks exactly as described. However, there may be some issues & I experiences a few issues as soon as I arrived. It’s a nice walkable area, just steps away from two metro lines and restaurants and coffee shops. The location makes for excellent base to explore Boston by foot, public transit, etc.
The building is older, and although there’s one window AC, it can get a bit stuffy, especially at night when all the windows are closed. Don’t expect luxury, but the host and their team were extremely responsive which made things a bit better.
Alex was very helpful throughout our stay! Loved the location and apartment
Nice flat in north end near TD. clean and comfortable. Lots of great restaurants and nightlife nearby. Would definitely recommend.
Had a great stay at Angela’s place. Not far from city center and lots of unique personal touches. The amenities are great too. Highly recommended!
Good, convenient location. Easy walk to a lot of things.
Beautiful place and in a perfect location

Great place to stay for a weekend getaway!It is very close to public transportation and walkable to restaurants. Very friendly and  reachable hosts who provided all the necessary information for a successful stay. The parking lot was right up the street and easy to find.

Murat’s place was well appointed and kept at in great shape. It was one of the best place Airbnb’s at which I have stayed over the years. There was nothing I wanted and didn’t find. The location was great as well - just off Copley Square, it offered abundant dining, shopping, and great people watching. I highly recommend it.

Great location. The host responds quickly. As noted in the house rules and description, you may hear street noise at night. The lights by the bed and the bathroom sink vanity were a bit wobbly. The Wi-Fi connection was good.

Great place to stay. Was only in town for a few days to catch a few games at Fenway and this apartment was perfect. Everything was super accessible. Access code to get into the building wasn't working but the host was super responsive and after a few tries gave us a code that worked.
Will definitely stay here again.
wonderful beds! nice place!
Beautiful house & a great space to lay one’s head. Convenient & eclectic neighborhood. Wonderful suggestions given by host.
They were great hosts and gave really solid recommendations for local restaurants. Our time there was easy going and we had no issues.

This was my second stay at Cassandra and Michael's place and I'd definitely stay again.
The hosts were very responsive and polite and assisted when there was an issue, fo instance the wifi was not working properly but they were very swift to give us another option to use which worked seamlessly for the rest of our trip.
Thanks Cassandra and Michael!!
Tuvimos una estadía excelente, muy cómodo el departamento, y con todo lo necesario. Muchas gracias!
Alix was a great host and was very good at communicating!
We had a very nice time. Very friendly and welcoming hosts!
5* review. Thank you Bluety !! Wonderful host. Stay here , great price for the area too!
Decent place to stay , not as responsive as we needed, but it’s fine. Choose to not extend the stay. Place was very cold, but we managed.
Every time I go to Boston, I stay in that place. The only way I can't stay in this place is if there's no room. It's super nice and I feel at home.

This place was remarkable. From the moment I walked in my eyes lit up to the beautiful sights of victorian old school charm. Maude's apartment is HUGE, clean and set in the most perfect neighborhood. It is truly like staying in a museum with all of the artwork and artifacts everywhere. There were 2 levels , the bottom is where the bedrooms and backyard area is. The yard space was so beautiful with string lights and heat lamps. We spent most afternoons / nights out there. Maude and her husband left me a beautifully handwritten note and a bottle of wine as a welcome gift which I must say is something I've never received from and Airbnb host before. I was so beyond happy and comfortable with this stay and have recommended that my parents take a trip up to Boston just to stay here. The thing that got me most was the blue neon sign. My grandfather (Emilio) passed when I was much younger and there was so much comfort in staying at Maude's place with his name lit up above me. Thank you for hosting us, we will surely be back!

Be aware that cozy means a 9 foot by 9 foot room.  There is just a 3 foot by 6 foot aisle between the bed and the kitchen cabinets.  I am not a large person but I had to walk sideways to fit through the bathroom doorway.  When sitting on the toilet my knees almost touched the wall.  We occupied with 2 people and had to take turns walking and one person had to climb over the other to get from the bed to the bathroom.  We do not recommend this for 2 people.  The entrance halls and stairs carpet is dirty and the area is smelly.  We are physically fit, but the stairway is very steep and narrow.  When I took out the trash I was greeted by 2 very large rats at the dumpster who did not move when I arrived.  The AC unit is plugged into an extension cord which is a fire safety issue; large appliances should be plugged directly into the wall.  Even worse is that 2 other devices are plugged into an extension cord which is then plugged into the same extension cord as the AC unit.
The place was exactly what we needed during our weekend in Boston. Clean space, free parking and easy access to public transport. Tasha is very nice and helpful.
Great place, even better hosts! Would definitely stay here again
Great stay in a beautiful spot adjacent to Boston Commons. The host was easy to work with and things were exactly as described. Thanks so much!

The apartment was pleasant, clean, and comfortable.  The instructions to enter the room was kind enough to know everything beforehand. Our family was traveling several cities in US this time, and Jacklyn’  room gave us time to take enough rest before we embark on our next destination. I would recommend Jacklyn’s apartment to everyone who stays in Boston!
Great and smart place, cleaned room, easy check-in. Thanks Todd
We had a great stay. Norah was very responsive and helpful. The studio was clean and beds super comfortable. Easy to get anywhere from the studio which is set in the old, quaint part of Beacon Hill.
Really good place ! Train station is at very walkable distance. Good for stay for 1 person
房东非常亲切

This place was a gem - so clean & with a great location. It was also fully stocked which made it very easy to cook and the dishwasher was honestly one of the best we’ve ever used.
Would recommend and honestly will stay again if returning!
Not gonna lie if you want to find a comfort place in Boston with 3 minutes walk to orange line great neighborhood and a good host. This is the place you’re looking for.
Richard was a great host. My husband, my 6 month old, and myself had a wonderful stay. Great location in the North End and walking distance. Thanks for a wonderful trip. Would love to stay again.

The location was excellent, and the communication was very responsive. The accommodations are a bit sparse, but that is to be expected, given Healing Homes' mission. It is rare to feel good about contributing to an organization's soulful purpose while enjoying lodging in a great location.
Awesome location - Walkable to lots of restaurants and shopping. Apartment was exactly as described in the listing. Paige was tra fast in communication.

Peter is a wonderful host - friendly, quick to communicate and full of amazing recommendations.
The place itself is wonderful - amazing shower, comfy beds & nice, shaded outdoor spaces.
We loved Dorchester as well. There are many nice places to eat within walking distance of the place (American Provisions and Tavolo were two of our faves!) and it’s a quick walk to get to the train station for the red line, from which you can easily access most parts of the city.

Our stay at The Upton was perfect. The apartment is quintessential South End with access to all the best restaurants and activities! The apartment had everything we needed and was so light and airy, it felt like home!
Clean and true to the description. The building is noisy.
Amazing stay!
Very nice Appartement with a Great balcony. Try Angelas breakfast Next to it. We had a wonderful time and Would always recommend. :)
Phyllis was a great host! She was very helpful and was kind to answer our questions promptly.  We had a wonderful time!
This place is amazing! Very clean, stylish, and very close to restaurants and downtown boston.  Would definitely recommend this place!
Like how I felt right at home it was nice and clean and felt like I was welcomed there I had a blast staying there for the weekend
Clean, clear instructions and professional host. Make sure you get a deal on check out time as flexibility is zero even you come for 10 hours sleep.
Had a great long term stay, host was very responsive and answered all my questions almost immediately. Would definitely come back!
Ryan has been very flexible with our changing plans and always responsive to our needs. The apartment is perfectly located, stylish and super clean. Absolutely recommended!
The location is very close to the hospitals and surrounding schools. It made the daily commute quick and easy!
This was a great place and as good as advertised. Loved my stay
What a beautiful historic house! it was comfortable, convenient and clean. Exactly what we were looking for. We definitely will try to stay here again and we can recommend it very highly

We loved being in a neighborhood rather than a heavy tourist area. Ella’s place was great!
Beds were comfortable, the shower is huge, the kitchen is great and the patio is perfect for morning coffee.
The stairs are absolutely no joke. My 13 and 14 year olds played it off like their old mom was the only one to struggle but as we were arriving at our next destination, they both asked about the stairs at the next place.
Great place that is very walkable to restaurants, transit, etc.  Checkin was a breeze and Billy’s instructions were communicated very well.  Would definitely stay again on my next trip to Boston.

muito bem localizado no centro, com grande comércio variado e metrô. praças e parques lindos para caminhar. Silencioso e com todos os recursos de uma cozinha bem montada. Ótima experiência. Suporte da equipe de manutenção rápido e eficiente.

So at first things were great, hosts are responsive, check in was easy, parking was available and things looked ok
however, our trip was cut one night short because on our last night, my wife saw a large rat run out from under the kitchen sink. We had to obviously pack everything as fast as possible and we left immediately to book a last-minute hotel in Boston in summer; with parking it cost us $775 out of pocket. We then spent part of our vacation dealing with support (who were courteous and tried to help) instead of enjoying our trip.
The host was very responsive and empathetic, however, they later offered $425 on the condition that we not leave a review. saying that since we don't have a video of the rat, they don't have to do anything about it according to the policy, and the rest of the way I dealt with AirBnB support. I declined—future guests deserve to know what happened. I hope the entry point is fixed and that stronger pest prevention is put in place.

Stayed in the Master Bedroom at Jonathan's place for a week (conference). Very traditional Brownstone house which is well renovated and in a great area close to Roxbury Crossing T-station. Several good restaurents 15 mins walk away and enjoyed walking around the surrounding streets. There are 4 bedrooms in the property which meant a few other people around but all were friendly and polite.
I would not hesitate to recommend Jonathan's AK Brownstone property which is a great example of a classic Boston residence.

The room we stayed in was spotlessly clean and comfortable. The person who checked us in was really responsive to our needs and very helpful. It was just a block from a T station so it was very convenient.

We had a great stay with Siena. The room was clean, comfortable, and Siena and Martin were very accommodating, including helping us make sure that we had parking for our big truck.
They also allowed me play on their lovely piano which was a fantastic experience. Thanks Martin and Siena for such a wonderful stay!

Adequately appointed home with the essentials. Good sized dining table and new washer and dryer.
Easy access to parking

Great cozy quiet place with excellent access to the T.  Every morning the hosts provide a light breakfast basket with fruit, yogurt, coffee and baked goods.  All in all the best Air BNB experience we have had.
One of the most charming and comfortable places I’ve stayed in. Bill and Maureen are amazing and their place is lovely. Highly recommend.
Great place!
Great place to stay in Jamaica Plain
Great location, well stocked kitchen and plenty of linens. Jason was easy to communicate with, provided easy to follow instructions.
amazing stay. would recommend
Great stay at this place! I recommend it. It was very clean and thoughtful
I loved this place! They were very flexible considering we booked the Airbnb the same day and was very kind and communicative.
had a really nice stay here! really enjoyed how easy it was to get there and get settled. very communicative and was a really nice place overall

This jewel was a pleasant surprise. A stylish and well appointed apartment. Very inviting and comfortable. All of the little details taken care of. The location was great and in a very welcoming and positive neighborhood. Short walk to the Orange Line. This place is a great base location to explore Boston.
Also the service from the Host and the Co-Host prior to check in, at check in, during the stay, and even after check out was outstanding. We will look for this place or others managed by this team in future trips to Boston

Lynne & Erik’s place is lovely. I was there for two days and could’ve stayed longer. The space is large with a very comfortable bed - and sofa - in the sitting area.  With room to spread out and a nice sunny view, it was a relaxing place to wake up in and come back to at the end of the day.  As a room right off the front door, it was very private - although I very much welcomed the visits from Molly, their sweet dog, and their cat.  The bathroom is through and off the kitchen, but felt very much like my own space.  And the house overall is amazing due in large part to hosts Lynne and Erik - they’ve created a warm, artful sanctuary there in JP.  Both are friendly and welcoming and so enjoyable to talk with!  (And the communication leading up to my arrival was excellent as well.)  I look forward to staying at their place again.  Highly recommend :)
Great stay!
Wonderful stay! Afo is a great host! Would stay again 100%!
Great location, a little out-dated but room was good for a weekend trip
Perfect as usual
Wonderful, stylish and quiet space. Highly recommend!

This place was beautiful and in a very walkable location close to a lot of shops and restaurants. It had a real nice loft and kitchen.  And we appreciated the umbrellas that were provided in the room as we definitely needed them on our last day! Would absolutely stay here again.

Adorable, well-appointed unit in a great neighborhood! Even though I came during a heat wave, the ACs kept the apartment very comfortable. Hosts were exceptional communicators and when I reached out, I got a response almost immediately. I would definitely recommend staying here!
Great!

BEST HOST we’ve experienced so far!!! Marlene is amazing!!! We are definitely looking forward to staying with her again. Her home is lovely, peaceful, clean, there’s instructions everywhere, thoughtful amenities, she’s always there to respond and help if you need her and her home is central to everything Boston. My hubby and I enjoyed our walks through her neighborhood and through the parks to the bus stop. Everything is as described but better in person! Thank you so much Marlene, we’ll be seeing you soon :)

Tim's place was perfect for my husband & I. What a great host!  The location was incredible. We were right in the heart of the north end, little Italy. We walked everywhere! The home was cozy, had everything we needed and plenty of space! Restaurants were amazing, so much to do. We did a food and history tour, a duckboat tour, we walked to Charlestown. One of the best trips we've taken yet! we will be back for sure!
