The host was quick and responsive and we had an amazing stay. Perfect location slightly tucked away and with easy access to train system to get all around Boston. Definitely would stay again.

Our stay while for medical reasons, was less traumatic due in part to how comfortable we felt in the apt. Kai’s warm touches were all over the place, very accommodating, and quick to respond any issue. We absolutely recommend 13 Dudley ST, and Kai as a host.
great cozy place to stay in Allston.
I left the room  around 6pm when I come back to my bedroom somebody was inside and throw out my all staff
Excellent stay - Maria’s place was exactly as advertised.

The place has 5 beds and upon arrival each of the beds had hair and stains as well as the couch. Upon contacting the host, I was advised by the host the sheets are professionally laundered and I can safely sleep in them. When I pushed back, they suggested they can change the sheets the following day, meaning I have to sleep one night in the dirty beds. This was a shocker. I contacted Airbnb support with photo and got it resolved. The host came to change the sheets the following day and this time they were actually clean. It felt upsetting to have to navigable especially because the host did not advise of the time they will be coming by the suite so I was kind of stressed. I would stay on this place again, but only if the sheets are fresh and clean.
We loved Glenn's place. Very clean, stylish, silent, with a great surprise in the morning : a breakfast basket waiting for us down the stairs. I would definitely recommend that place to my friends.

This unit is located on third floor, more than 40 stairs to get to your unit. If you have luggage or anything heavy , you better hire someone to transfer your stuff to your room. The description doesn’t match the unit.

This was the second time I have stayed with Siena. The location was wonderful - near Northeastern University,  the Isabella Stuart Gardner Museum, & good places to eat. My room & bathroom were super clean, too.

As far as the location/price, this is an ok place. But I wouldn't stay here again. It didnt feel particularly clean, (dust everywhere, sticky kitchen counter, brown smudge on bathroom lightswitch.) It felt run down (kitchen cabinet had water damage and needs replacing, elevator was sketchy, common space kitchen needs updating.) The ac unit didn't have an output hose, just a towel in the hole to the outside, so everything just got pumped back into the room. I dont know why, but the listing has extra pictures for their other rooms, which is confusing. And lastly, I guess this isn't an AirBnb policy, but there was no way for me to lock the apartment door from the inside -- the keypad locks automatically, but there was nothing I could do to lock it myself, like a deadbolt, chain or sliding lock, etc. As a young woman, that made me feel unsafe. Someone somewhere, unknown to me, has a code to that room and there's nothing I could do to keep them out if they wanted in.

Jill has been a very dear friend of mine and a mentor as well. She is the kindest and nicest person I have ever met. And Jamaica Plain is one of the coolest places in Boston. I love Jamaica Plain and especially Jill’s house. I really want to stay at her house again! Even transportation is convenient so that you can go anywhere.
This house was amazing, would definitely stay here again if in the Boston area!

Yi's place is beautiful! The room was incredibly clean and she provided many thoughtful touches to make our stay comfortable and easy. If you don't mind walking, this apartment is in easy reach of downtown Boston, or close to a T station. The rooftop patio is a stunning place to enjoy a cup of coffee in the morning, or a glass of wine at night - the view is incredible. Yi is a kind and welcoming host who helped us feel right at home. I highly recommend staying here -this is easily one of the best Airbnb experiences we have had.
We loved the place. It was cozy and quaint. So many recommendations we will just have to come back again!

Perfect space for a weekend getaway. The location of the apartment is superb and central to almost anything you could want to get to in Boston. We were able to walk everywhere from the AirBnB. Would highly recommend this place for anyone looking to stay in the area.
It was a good neighborhood, parking always available, recommend to anybody who wants to go to Boston with or without family.

Nice spot in Allston, very competitive pricing, very clean and homely. It's a studio in a typical Boston home, reminded me of the kind of houses we lived in when I was a student in Boston. Bed is a little small and the road outside can be noisy if you are trying to sleep in, otherwise great spot, overall would recommend for value and cleanliness. Hosts are remote, interaction via chat only and check-in/out via lockbox. Good option for business in Cambridge and Back Bay without breaking the bank.

I did like it
The room center heating was very hot.
Other than that.
The room is good.
Good location.
I walked 5 mins for Portuguese consulate.
Met my expectations.
Great location! Awesome spot to stay if you are interested in staying downtown Boston with quick access to public transportation.
Foi perfeito

The listing was very confusing. I didn’t realize it was a room in shared house with 4 other rooms sharing one bathroom. I didn’t feel safe. There was mold in the bathroom and when I reached out with concerns they only offered to send the cleaning service again. I would not recommend.

Great location, very responsive, friendly and proactive hosts (original request for cot not there upon arrival, but rectified very quickly by host and team).
Living space was lovely, bright and very comfortable. Kitchen and bathroom small and could benefit with minor upgrades to make it wow.
Overall, a lovely spot in a really great location and would recommend.

Place was great, easy access with door codes. They thought of everything I would have needed. It’s an older place on the third floor, so need to be able to climb stairs. Linens and towels smelled clean and fresh, kitchen was clean with newer appliances. Place actually looks bigger than it appears with separate kitchen and sofa area. As he mentioned construction is currently going on across the street but had no noise or problems with traffic. 10-15 min Uber to downtown. I’d definitely stay here again, get safe traveling alone.
Beautiful and spacious house, very clean and well equipped. Highly recommended.

I would definitely stay here again- the location was wonderful for our plans, and the apartment was very comfortable.  I especially loved the pillows. We tried several of the hosts recommendations and enjoyed them
The host was so nice and easy to reach.  The rental was beautiful and perfect for our trip.  I am so glad we found this place!

The apartment was perfect for four 30-somethings  to visit a friend in Needham. The apartment is beautiful, well-equipped, and labeled! Everything was labeled and set up to be easy. Tomasz was an excellent communicator and reduced the stress of the weekend.
Een fijne accommodatie op een mooie locatie. Fijne kamers en een gedeelde keuken. Dichtbij bij het openbaar vervoer.  Vanaf hier kun je Boston makkelijk bereiken.

Veronica was a great host, always very responsive through the whole process. Her place was just as described in the listing, very clean and pleasant to stay in. Many restaurants and cafes within a short walk.
great stay! found it to be a little far from everything, about 20min from everything but not too bad. it was super cute, clean, spacious and had cool view of the city!!
Good central location to many Boston must see landmarks
Great location! Albert and team were very communicative and helpful.
The apartment is in the most perfect location for exploring Beacon Hill and Boston Common, plus walkable to other places in Boston. A great apartment for a family vacation.

Katarzyna’s place was a great get away for my first vacation to Boston. It was close enough to Uber or walk but far enough away from the hustle and bustle of Boston. The apartment was very clean and well stocked. I would recommend it to anyone wanting to Visit Boston.
Lovely flat in excellent location. We particularly enjoyed the Appleton cafe on Dartmouth Street. Kevin came to meet us reliably and Glenn responded to our queries.
Great location, easy to communicate - and perfect neighborhood.

Tim's place could not been more ideally located. As a host,  he responded quickly to any questions we had before and during our stay.  There were great places to eat closeby and we were able to walk to dinner in the North End and Cambridge each evening.  The AC rocked and both beds we're absolutely dreamy and although we didn't cook in, the kitchen was well outfitted. We would definately stay again. Thanks Tim!
Everything was perfect as the others feedback.

Maja and Paul were great hosts... warm, welcoming and very helpful.  Great location in a quiet neighborhood, close to parks, and very walkable to Copley Square / Back Bay.  The space is as shown in the pictures... newly renovated, well cared for and clean.  Great for my two night business stay.
The location and price are great! A very easy trek over to Logan Airport for an early morning flight. Very much recommend.

Great location. Easy three minute walk to subway. Hosts were very helpful and quick to respond to inquiries. Apartment matched description. Very small but just what we needed. There are multiple units in this row house and sound can travel—normal for an older building. We were happy with our experience!

Brooke was such an amazing host. She waited my arrival, and even accommodated my early check in time. She was gone the rest of my stay so I did not get to interact with her after that. I also never met the other occupant of the house.
The room: Very spacious room with queen sized bed. Refrigerator and personal room A/C, heat are bonuses. If you're looking for luxury, this is not the place for you. If you're looking for a basic place to sleep only --this is your place.
The bathroom: clean but very small. I never saw the other occupant of the house so it was a personal bathroom for me.
Location: About a 20 minute walk to seaport. If you're a walker, perfect location to see seaport and even walk to downtown.
Things I wish I would have known before booking:
Shampoo and conditioner/soap NOT included
There is no table/desk space in the house. So if you need to do any computer work, not many options at all.
I did not feel safe walking after dark around this part of town, but uber is about 7$ to/from seaport.

This place is in excellent location, close to T, close to  BU, close to all “cool of campus houses”. it is spacious, has a paid laundry/dryer facility aicondtitioned (it was so hot!), full kitchen. It was interesting to see student’s life as they were all getting ready to start a year.
I hope to stay here again!

Ehab is an amazing host! Fixable check in time was just amazing for fitting my schedule ( since I was taking the train)
The place is nice, more spacious than I expected, and he offered so many amenities which was amazing for Airbnb, had a really nice stay, and the location was great, around 5 minutes away from the JFK station on the red line, the area is nice, maybe not so walkable if you have big suitcases.
Highly recommended Ehab’s place!

The place was nice and comfy. The bed was comfortable and warm. Kitchen and bathroom were cold but very nice. Street parking was very difficult so the $20 to park in Anne’s driveway was wonderful. Well worth it. She was very easy to communicate with and sent her son to fix the TV for us. I would definitely recommend this place.

The location is very close to the airport and the subway station ( wood island) , and the whole families are very friendly and have given us many advice about our trip in Boston.
The house is clean and well maintained, with the necessary things once you need to prepare the food, and there are clean towers.
Interesting and great families!

We were so lucky to find Muny’s place while looking for a place to stay in Boston. Parking was easy to find and Muny’s instructions and descriptions of the place were clear and accurate. Perfect location to use as a “home base” as it was drivable to all other areas of Boston. We can’t thank Muny enough for her hospitality and quick responses during our stay!
Visited twice! Great place!
They are very friendly!

Great place to stay! Echoing what everyone else has said, the location is right next to a couple bars/clubs which makes it pretty loud late into the night, but otherwise a great place. A good location to public transportation, a good price and good size place. We will be back!
Great location,  clean.  Host was very responsive and easy to work with.  Overall great experience!!

Highly recommend. Impeccably clean room, private bathroom, and a super comfortable bed. Nice location in a quiet residential area, with a parking spot.
FYI, there is another separate Airbnb unit on the same floor, but they're separated by a hallway and locked doors and we never heard them.
Great stay in a lovely unique space!
Chris was very friendly and warm. Very accommoding and was a truly wonderful host. Her home was inviting and comfortable . A great place!

Delanda was a great host and easy to communicate! She addressed all of our concerns immediately. If you want to be close to downtown Boston, this place is great! Home was clean and comfortable. Every room had a separate AC unit, and had all the necessary items to have a comfortable stay!
This is a great place in a great neighborhood. Maude was a wonderful host and we'd definitely recommend this spot.
Very good
Lovely place, in a central location with great amenities! The pull out couch felt like a real bed. Paul replies extremely fast to any messages and is a great host. 10/10 would stay again.

I stayed the weekend for work and Rebecca's place was the perfect spot - it's about a 20 minute drive from the convention center, and about 35 minutes from the airport. Incredibly cozy and convenient!
This is lovely accommodation. We had everything we needed provided eg shampoo, creams, food, drinks. Excellent place to stay. Wonderful host.
It was a great location, very central and walkable to everything.
This is a very nice place to stay in Boston and well situated. Everything was perfect and we will come back next year.

Apartment was very clean, comfortable and stylish. The location on Newbury Street is ideal for shopping, eating and night life. Parking can be a bit difficult (it is Boston after all) but we managed to find spots pretty readily during our brief stay. The hosts were excellent with communication the entire time and made check-in and check-out as simple as could be. Some nice touches inside such as coffee, tea and bottled water were also much appreciated. All in all we would definitely recommend this studio for anyone looking to immerse themselves in the heart of Boston to explore the many sights the city has to offer!
Awesome stay. Super clean and organized. Felt right at home as soon as walking in.

Lori's home was beautiful and comfortable. From coffee in the morning on her beautiful porch to the thoughtful recommendations of nearby things to do to the homey and personal decor, I felt very at home during my stay. The house is easily walkable to restaurants and the T.
Lori herself is also welcoming and personable - I really enjoyed our conversation over coffee the first morning of my stay. I'll definitely be back!

Great access to public transportation.   we walked every where and felt safe doing so.  Good restaurants in walkable distances.  loved Melinda's home.  it worked great for the 5 of us. comfortable beds and great having laundry right there.   Would definitely stay here again.  Melinda was very communicative and helpful.

Perfect location! BEAUTIFUL architecture! Remus truly is sweet as can be and I’m gonna miss that snuggly cat, but as Larry makes clear, he takes a little work. We loved it though!!! Larry was fantastic with communicating, and even incredibly accommodating when our flight was cancelled and we didn't get in until much later than expected!
I'd recommend this place to families or a large group visiting Boston.
Me encanto, muy cómodo

We love Penny’s place! It’s super cozy and clean.
Penny was a delight to deal with.

I was initially uncertain about trying Airbnb, but Bill and Maureen's Boston Bailey Airbnb transformed my first perspective. Their home was not only inviting but exuded warmth and comfort. Every detail of my stay was impeccable, all thanks to their outstanding hospitality. My experience with them has inspired me to explore more Airbnb stays, and Boston Bailey has secured a top spot on my list for any future visits to Boston!

My husband and I really enjoyed our stay. The location was perfect - very walkable and close to everything including shops and restaurants. It was nice to be able to walk easily to Newbury Street. The apartment was nicely decorated and very comfortable with everything we needed. We'd definitely stay there again!

I really enjoyed my stay at Drew's place in South Side. The location is great. The apartment sits right next to a park and is only a few blocks away from very nice, cozy cafés (at least one of them serves genmaicha) and restaurants. Pharmacy is close by as well. It is a very walkable area, with a T stop about a 10 minute walk away.
As far as the apartment goes, all my expectations were met with flying colors. Drew keeps his place very clean and tidy. The bathroom has an amazing shower, and the bed was one of the most comfortable beds I have ever slept in. The stairs up to the loft area where the bed is were pretty steep, but it was not much of an issue for me.
Drew was a great host as well. He was very communicable, which made setting up check-in smooth. When I first arrived he offered me some water and he gave me a quick tour of the place. I did not see him much as I was working long hours, but the few conversations we had were friendly. He seems like a great guy.
I would definitely recommend Drew's place to anyone staying in Boston, and if I am up here again I would book again for sure.
The place is conveniently located in Beacon Hill. Quite, safe, and a lot of restaurants nearby. Easy to go everywhere in the city.
This is such an unexpected success. It made my business trip into a fun little vacation with views by the water, walkable amenities, and tons of history. if you're up for adventure please try this!
Great place to stay. Islam was an excellent host and very responsive. Would book again.
Everything perfect!

Estuvimos tres días en la casa de Paul y lo pasamos genial ! El lugar es hermoso, esta en una zona histórica de Boston muy linda ! Paul es súper buen anfitrión. Nos recibió con frutas, agua fresca, café y todo lo indispensable para cuando uno llega a un lugar nuevo. Había mil clases de te y si hubiéramos querido cocinar la cocina estaba súper equipada. Todo nuevo y limpio! La única contra es q la calle tiene inclinación y hay q hacer ejercicio para llegar, pero la casa es en planta baja...muy importante si llegas con dos niños en carrito. Hay a 100 metros un súper muy lindo, farmacia donde podes comprar las provisiones q necesites. De volver a Boston, no dudó en volver a la casa de Paul !!!
Roy and Susan are wonderful hosts.  Their place is a very convenient and walkable location.  The space has everything you need!
It was a lovely stay!!! Super great location and easy to navigate. A great little apartment, but slightly dingy due to it being an older unit.

Highly recommend this place next time you are visiting the Boston area. Emily was extremely communicative and a wonderful host (checked in on us and provided events that were happening near the area). Would come back again!
Not a bad spot at all. Liked it
The studio was comfortable and certainly cozy.
Elena’s place is the perfect oasis for visiting real Boston. She was a wonderful host from start to finish. Everything was excellent and

The Airbnb was great for my needs.  The hosts seemed to think of everything that one would need for an extended stay.  Find parking early or you could be walking a distance.  There are so many markets and restaurants within walking distance.  It was a very positive experience.
So awesome! Next time we come to Boston we’re gonna try and book this again. Location can’t be beat and the houseboat was a unique experience we will always remember.
Had a great stay with Lori. She was a great host and a very nice human in general. Will absolutely stay there again when I return!

Very nice host family with delicious Chinese food and the room is clean, tidy, makes me feel really comfortable. I am very appreciate Van picked me up from the Train Station. Staying at their home makes me feel comfortable.
Great location near the Prudential and Hynes.  And the market is just downstairs.  Very convenient and quiet.

Robin goes up and beyond with hospitality. She has thought of everything and had plenty of food, juice and coffee choices for breakfast. The nights I stayed were freezing and windy outside, yet the room was quiet, warm and comfortable. The neighborhood was just was I was looking for along the harbor.

Great apartment in Back Bay.
We very much enjoyed our stay here. The host was timely and responsive with clear instructions.
The apartment is charming and well-furnished, with plenty of space.
The location is great. We used the train a lot, so it was great to have a short walk to Hynes Convention Center station.
Also walkable to parks and restaurants and shopping.
Great place.
This little apartment was great for a stay in the city. Walking distance to everything we needed to get to, and a very comfortable space for two people. The bed was super comfy too!
Short stay for work. Great location!! Check-in was so easy, apt was very clean, and communication with host was easy. Would definitely stay here again.

Maria's place was a joy to live in, first steps 9n and I wanted to stay longer than the week I was staying. Great location, given I was using public transport, beautiful surroundings and in a very eclectic area. The place was well catered, clean and functional. Maria was very welcoming, and hearing that I wanted to visit a place, left some literature and maps for me by the door next day. Definitely will come here and stay once again. Thank you Maria and all the best with everything.
FANTASTIC location in a safe neighborhood. Near a Whole Foods / Dunkin and most importantly -- transportation! Code felt safe and the room was perfect.

Lihua is an excellent host.  She provides a continental breakfast every morning, there was daily room cleaning, and Lihua has a lot of advice to offer to those new to Boston.  Also, back and forth communication before the stay was fast and helpful.  Everything was just as expected with the room, and the house has a really nice old charm.  I would definitely stay here again.

Beautiful, spacious apartment in a great location in West Roxbury. The beds were super comfortable. The apartment was clean with all necessary amenities. Dedicated parking space, which is necessary in Boston. There are good restaurants and parks within walking distance. Check in/out was easy. It was perfect for us. Definitely recommend!

**Leaving this review on behalf of my parents**
I rely heavily on reviews when choosing an Airbnb, so I feel compelled to share my experience. I stayed at this property in 2022 and decided to stay again, but it was a mistake.
Concerns:
Numerous homeless people around the entrance.
Overpowering smell of urine outside and in the entryway.
A massive party on our floor disrupted our stay from 1:30 am to 5:00 am, with loud music, profanities, and banging on the walls.
Our host, Brian, was unhelpful. Despite reporting the disturbance, no promised security arrived, and Brian merely planned to remind the tenants of the noise policy. The property felt like a frat house, and the lack of support was unacceptable. We canceled our reservation and moved to a hotel. Brian refused to evict the offending tenants despite documented proof of their behavior.
This property has devolved into a urine-smelling frat house with poor host support. Consider this before choosing Healing Homes of Boston.

Penny's home is fantastic, it's a very comfortable space and amazing location. She was great to communicate with, very helpful with recommendations, and incredibly flexible with our changing plans. 100% recommend.
A lot of ubers it was easy to get them. I wouldn't recommend getting a car if you are not planning on leqving boston

I had a brilliant stay with Robin, what a find! I loved hearing about the history of the house and it felt an absolute privilege to be staying there.  Robin was exceedingly generous with her time and information which made our stay extraordinary.   Location is unbelievable, just a short and easy metro ride and walk from South Station, so close to Boston yet in a lovely peaceful, safe and historical neighbourhood. I thoroughly enjoyed the walk out through Robin’s garden to the JFK Museum along the harbour walk, watching the airplanes coming into Logan and then lovely Boston skyline views. Breakfast was delightful; we had great fun making eggs and toast and coffee and it was nice to mix with other guests staying in the house and to eat overlooking the water. The room is spacious beyond expectations and super clean and is great for close friends and family.  We made many fond memories in our short stay!
Brooke's place was as advertised. perfect for my needs and was as advertised a good value for the location.
We stayed here for almost a year and it was perfect! Easily accessible to all the greatest parts of Boston via the orange line. Great neighborhood. Tons to do! Great for kids! Would highly recommend.
Jeffery's place was in a quiet neighborhood in front of a park and with easy access to public transportation.  The hosts were always available to answer questions.

Best location in Boston, right where u want to be and with Park Station and the common steps away I are set. The food court in the theater walkway next door to Washington Street is a winner as well.  Rooms are well appointed, quiet and clean with the two bathroom/showers easy to keep everyone happy. Kitchen has all u need if u wanted to cook but suggest the food court, No9 or Emmets Irish pub to keep your taste buds happy.
Great place! Owners are very easy to communicate with.  Highly recommend

Nick is a super nice and generous host who went out of his way to make sure we had everything we needed. But the place is kind of funky and had an unfinished feel - not much light, stove/oven not hooked up, hard to get to the sleeping area, banister on the spiral staircase was PVC piping with one end taped up in a sharp point, and more... It also felt like he didn't clean the place before we came, with the floors and kitchen area especially not clean and his personal vitamins etc. and leftovers in the fridge - though there were nice clean sheets on the bed and brand new bath towels (store tags still on them). If you stay here, make sure you communicate with Nick in advance about everything because there were no written house rules or information. (Fortunately, he is super easy to communicate with.) Also, it's in a really pretty but kind of a remote area and there is a beautiful little park across the street.

We enjoyed our stay at Albena’s apartment. It was in a great location . Clean and tidy. Albena was always responsive to any questions etc.
check in was very easy.

The apartment is a wonderful, large and impeccably presented space. A real home from home with all the amenities you could desire and in a lovely neighbourhood. Super close to the T, which made accessing central Boston really easy! Much bigger in real life than it looked in the pictures. Helpful information provided to both navigate the house and city!

This house is in a very convenient location near T, in front of a park but facing the rear (no views). We went daily to the Longwood hospital area in 20 minutes. The place is very nice, warm and comfortable, the rooms are big and the furniture and kitchenware are nice and make it a real home. The house was spotlessly clean. Sleeping in the livingroom was not that comfortable: the sofa- bed is the only sitting place except for the chairs, and the heating system is somewhat noisy if you are a light sleeper. The bed upstairs is wonderful and big. The bathroom is roomy and has plenty of light. Downstairs the living-dining-kitchen are somewhat darker (we were there in March). There are all kind of shops in the neighbourhood, a little further than the T station, and it was fun that we could do our shoppings in Spanish! Adriana and Gianni are very welcoming and live next door, they are there to help you with anything, but they are discreet and quiet. We certainly would come back to this charming house, and we're happy to recommend it to any visitors to Boston, especially if they're going to the Children's Hospital area and they'll only use one bedroom.
Cute place and good location. Quick to respond if you need anything. Would recommend staying here especiallyfor the price.

This Airbnb was close and walking distance to many attractions in Boston. Even when o had to uber to certain attractions it was no less than 8-15 minutes. Apartment was clean and well furnished. I would recommend to a friend who is visiting Boston.

Wow, Elisangela has great taste, this apartment is cozy and comfortable, it is clean and has a vibe that makes you feel right at home! The location was perfect, great neighborhood, friendly locals, and walking distance to transit. We went all over Boston and came home to such a comfortable environment. Our host was so helpful in letting us know how to get around. We would come back again for sure! Highly recommend!

Great place for a big group! The tavern below is definitely loud at night but also very fun with karaoke and comedy and the back patio. Buddy’s down the street is excellent for breakfast too. William was very responsive throughout including quickly fixing an issue during our stay. Highly recommend.

Romo and Nayeli were excellent hosts! Romo helped ensure that the check in process was smooth and always made us feel welcomed! Anything we needed, they helped us with and they were always extremely easy to reach if we needed anything! The location was also great. The room was very spacious and super cute and clean! I would definitely recommend this place to anyone looking to stay in the Boston area!
Amazing stay! It was exactly as described, and perfect for me for the last two weeks of my internship in Boston. 10 minutes from the orange line
Overall great stay clean place just wish you mentioned one of the rooms was a kids room with kids beds
We had a fabulous stay.

Great place to stay for us! We had business in Framingham and Mansfield and this location was the same distance from both, while also being close to fun things to do in Boston. Great value - one colleague took the bedroom, the other slept on the sofa. Better than getting two hotel rooms. The location felt safe. The host was very responsive to anything we needed.  He supplied coffee and water, which was awesome. Easy check in. Be sure to use the link on the Airbnb listing to get directions. When we typed the exact address in we were taken to the north end.

We enjoyed our time at Norah’s! It was a great location. We walked a bunch around the Beacon Hill area and took short Uber rides when needed. The space is comfortable and clean. We felt safe the whole time. Would definitely return!
Place was great! Close to everything. Great neighborhood. Jessy and Diego communicated well. We will be staying again in the future.
The hotel was nice and in walking distance to Boston Commons. However, would have been nice to have a fridge in the room. Other than that, we would recommend.

This particular location was a bit pricey, but it was absolutely wonderful. Everything was clean and as expected. Check-in and check-out are very strict, but very simple to figure out. Our room was great and we truly enjoyed our stay!

We stayed at Brian's place for a month, and we could not have asked for a better experience. He was always immediately responsive to any requests or questions, and was very accommodating to our needs. Living a 6 minute walk from the orange line and having a peaceful deck to relax on made our stay really enjoyable. We would highly recommend Brian's place to anyone wanting a quiet, comfortable place to stay near Boston.
Best home in Boston, a few blocks from Fenway Park. Lihua is the best host. The home was very beautiful and extremely clean. The attention to details was impressive. Will return for our next stay.
Lovely spot and nice amenities. Walking distance to restaurants. Was handy for my brief work stay.
Good

This is a place to dream of--a house (built in 1872) with a 3-tier garden facing the beach! And Robin is such an adorable host who makes you feel welcome and loved! You will feel instantly at home. The basement unit is huge with a very comfortable bed. And, although there are people living above, you will hear almost nothing. I really didn't feel like going anywhere such is the sense of peace, contentment and well-being that the place exudes. I hope I'll be back some day. Thank you so much,
Robin!

Wow what a gorgeous place and was exactly as described. I can’t say enough about Kaitlyn as a host. She was super accommodating and was quick to respond to my questions. She gave a lot of great recommendations and all of the information you needed to get into the building and the apt.  The bed was the most comfortable I’ve ever slept in at an air b n b!  Everything was clean and perfect for my husband and I. What a beautiful area too! It was a safe and cute neighborhood. I would absolutely stay there again and recommend her place to anyone looking to stay in Boston.
Excellent location! Modern , clean, safe, with great beds and amenities! Can’t wait to stay again.
Basic space in a good location. Room was small but comfortable. Sophia is also easy to communicate with!

Six nights on Beacon Hill was great. Excellent location for walking for destinations ranging from North End to Fenway. The apartment is clean and well equipped with comfortable bedrooms. Stairway between the two levels requires some agility.

My friends & I really enjoyed our stay at George’s place. A few things stood out including location to the T and fun local pubs/restaurants, the shower (Amazing!) and the front porch. We loved to sit out there chilling and watching the world go by. After busy days walking around Boston, it felt lovely to come back to the apartment. Thanks George!
Apartment was exactly as described, check in was a breeze, and easy to transit to just about anything you could want to do in Boston can’t ask for more out of a stay.
Was very clean and neat.  Served me well while being in Boston
I love how clean and organized it was! Felt at home
great price, great experience.

Perfect for a summer internship/school.
Located 2 minutes from the Sullivan Square stop, the location is very convenient. The place has a crazy amount of amenities and stuff I didnt even know I would need but came in very handy (scissors, spices, shower stuff, extra hangers, etc..). The fact that there are 2 roomates with you is perfect to make friends in a similar situation as you are. This room is the largest from the three. Also, the house is pretty loud because of its location, but the room is extremely well insulated so you can't hear anything. An overall perfect stay!

Just got back from visiting Boston . We stayed at Lihua's place for 3 nights.Beautiful brownstone building in a very beautiful safe neighborhood next to Boston University.
Lihua is very ,very nice lady with full of information how to explore Boston.
Her place is very clean and she provides breakfast so you can start the day right.
2 min walk to the T which is very easy to figure it out and saves a lot of money instead of using Uber and take you to all the historical sights.
Thank you Lee for your warm welcome and we'll definitely be back .

Place looked just like the photos. I was a little confused on finding the place and Tim was very responsive, even late at night, in helping me get in We were only there overnight so it was a brief stay, but I appreciated its walkability to downtown Boston, the Public Garden, and Newbury street.
Great Stay !
Nous avons passé un excellent séjour. L'appartement est bien situé et très propre. Billy est un hôte excellent qui nous a toujours répondu rapidement et clairement.
Tianyu makes it great
Wonderful home. Very quiet and extremely clean.  We really enjoyed our time.
Nice, clean stay within walking distance to the Longwood medical area! Siena is super accommodating and very easy to communicate with.

Great location on the redline. Easy access to apartment. The bed is comfortable. The stairs are super steep and narrow (very narrow). The neighborhood is very quiet.
The African American Museum is right down the street and the African American Historic walking trail right in the neighborhoood. Time well spent.
Tatte is a good bet for breakfast and the Paramount is, too, but more traditional. Both on Charles Street -- close to the T.

The photos really don’t do this home justice!
I stayed in Boston over the weekend and this house is just perfect! I came to the city alone to visit friends and needed a place that was close to everything but safe and this house hits all of my key points!
Location: this house is located in an up and coming area in Boston easily accessible to the MBTA bus and train. The parking was not a problem. I parked on the Main Street, it did have parking restrictions but they were for weekdays.
Comfort: My concern was that the house was going to be dark because of the photos, and reading prior reviews about the bedroom being downstairs freaked me out, because I would be staying alone I worried that it may be creepy. When I arrived I was so relieved to see how bright and cozy this home felt. The kitchen is a dream I only got to cook eggs but the kitchen is equipped to handle anything.the bedroom is downstairs but it’s very warm and inviting. The shower was a lil tricky i had to re-read the you manual lol, and u have to wait a minute for the water to get hot but all and all it was fine.
Sleeping: the bedroom being downstairs cuts out all noise( the house being on a quite street also helps) The Bed was firm and the pillows were plush, I slept GREAT! Extra pillows in the closets if u sleep like me with 6 pillows in your regular home.
If your coming into Boston and actually want to stay IN Boston but want to avoid $costly$ hotels, If you don’t want share a house with strangers and need something spacious but cozy. This is your spot! I will definitely come back here and I highly recommended it!
Beautiful, clean condo.  So fun being a "Southie".  Great neighborhood, access to beach and the city!
Friendly and helpful host with friendly guests staying in the air b n b as well. Close to Newbury Street but just far enough to be super quiet for a good night’s sleep. Loved it!!

Location, location, LOCATION. Most of the areas we wanted to visit were within a mile or less of the Airbnb and for anywhere further than that, a public transportation stop was only two short blocks away. Neighborhood was also super quiet.

The main problem was how clean the sheets were. There were lots of stains. Some that looked like blood stains lots of hair in the sheets. Additionally, there were bedbugs crawling on the fabric lampshades. That said the staff were extremely attentive, although I ended up leaving because of the bedbugs.

My wife and I stayed here on our visit to Boston for our 3 year wedding anniversary, and we had such a peaceful and enjoyable time with this unit. The sights and sounds of the city let you feel the buzz of downtown energy but it’s not obnoxious like other major cities. The unit is quiet, spacious, has everything you need for a comfy stay and peaceful rest, and we hope we can stay here again in the future! Highly recommend booking with Steven as he is responsive and helpful and accommodating. Thank you Steven for a great stay!!

Lihua met us at the door right away even though we got there earlier than we anticipated and couldn't have been more welcoming.  The house is a handsome Back Bay brownstone that is in excellent condition. Our room was bright and comfortable and in the morning the stay included a generous continental breakfast. We highly recommend this location!
Clean in an excellent location of Boston.  Great restaurants and shopping along the street.  Close to many attractions.  Would definitely return.
The beds were very comfortable. The house was clean. This home is nicely remodeled but still retains many original details. We had a nice stay and would visit again.

Second time staying at David’s place. We love coming back to Eastie and visiting our old neighborhood! This spot is in a great location close to every. Quiet private entry and it’s always clean and cozy. Highly recommend.

Great apartment right off Charles Street in the Beacon Hill area.   Just walk 30 or so steps and you are on Charles Street accessible to shops, good restaurants and ambiance.   It was as advertised, very updated and clean.   It is on a quiet side street and very secure.    We were at a multi-day event at TD Garden, which was an easy 20-minute walk.  Very accessible to Mass General Hospital if you need to stay nearby, and a short walk to the Common and other nice areas.   Carolyn was very accessible and helpful throughout the process.    We would return in a heartbeat and highly recommend this lovely place!
Great location and a great place to stay. Very cozy with great amenities.

Lovely BnB.
Bernie and Tom were super nice. Their home is clean and very beautiful.
Our room was clean and bright. Bed was very comfortable. Private bath clean and modern, right next to our room in the hall.
Great location, next to Boston College. Easy transportation, bus or T, to Kenmore Square.

We had a great stay at Shelly’s Airbnb. The place was very close to the blue line which made getting around super easy, and Shelly was very responsive and gave great recommendations of things to do/places to eat

The apartment was centrally located just a bit off Back Bay.  It was easy walking to Beacon and Boyleston Streets, Boston Public Garden, Boston Commons, and many historic sites.  The 3 bedroom set up was great for the 4 of us.  It was a lovely apartment to base ourselves for touring Boston colleges.

Loved our stay at TJ's condo this weekend. The condo was great, my boyfriend and I loved the set up. The space itself is big and open. TJ was very helpful and accommodating. The area in South Boston was perfect for our stay, it was close to the areas we were aiming to see, super close to the water, and only a 5 minute drive from a really great bar scene. Overall, we really enjoyed our stay. Thank you TJ!

Our group generally enjoyed the property! It’s as described, although the room with the bunk beds is tiny! The rooms could use more storage space since there are no closets - more hooks or drawers. The overall place was mostly clean but there was definitely some dirt and dust. The host should check the amenities - we were running out of body wash and salt for cooking. The area was pretty nice - near a park and cute coffee shop. We never did find the assigned parking spot, which mostly wasn’t problematic as street parking was usually available. Angela was great to communicate with - super responsive and nice! Overall, I’d stay here again but I do think the price is a little on the higher side for the rental.
Enjoyed our stay, space was very clean and matched the description to a T.
Great place to stay, very clean and good location. Just a few minutes walk to transit stations.
Great stay, very clean and excellent location. Very good communication with Maverick
Cozy and clean and in a great location!
Lynel was an amazing host. I couldn't have asked for a better stay and host for our road trip. The space is accurate and stunning. I am happy I chose her space.

Mike has an amazing place. Convenient to everything Boston has to offer, this place is one of a kind. Although we had a minor misunderstanding towards check out, I enjoyed myself and my stay in boston

Maverick was an AMAZING host and made my stay in Boston a breeze! The studio is extremely comfortable and even with my girlfriend, we never once felt cramped in there! The room was extremely well kept, clean, and open. A pleasant surprise was when I walked into the bathroom to discover the heated floors! My girlfriend LOVED that feature!
Maverick also offered a ton of tips for Boston and great information of what to do in the city. Checking in and out was a breeze and the location was right next to a ton of major sights. I without a doubt will consider staying here again when I return to Boston.
A+ Host!
Great stay and wonderful neighborhood!

I absolutely loved this loft! The exposed brick & modern furniture gave it such a warm and comfortable setting. Heather & Brian are also very responsive which was greatly appreciated! This was the first airbnb that offered private parking passes, literally right outside the building. I was really relieved when I didn't have to haul my luggage for miles. This building has working elevators and a great security system to enter & exit the apartment. The room was incredibly clean and was in a great location as well! I'm used to the "city life" so one thing to note is it does get a bit noisy outside at night, but very rarely did it occur & the beds are so comfortable I was able to get a good night's sleep! Additionally, for the size of the room and location the price was a steal! I also really loved how a percentage of the amount paid goes towards a great organization; I think its a great cause & just another awesome reason to book with Brian & Heather! :) Hope to visit again in the future!
Such a great trip! Great apartment and such a perfect location!

Great hosts! Jessy and Diego were always communicative and kind. They had detailed instructions for checking in and parking. Even though we did not end up using the parking spots, it's great to know that they're clear about communication and considerate about their neighbors.
Great location — Amazing restaurants within walking distance, and TD Garden is only a 12-15 min walk
Clean and comfortable space in a great neighborhood. Close to public transportation and lots of great local restaurants and shops. Riyo was very responsive to all my questions. Definitely recommend!

Great location, super safe and beautiful area, close to good food, and a short walk to MIT! Would definitely stay again. David was super responsive before and during the trip for any questions we had!

This was a great place for our family to stay for a night!  We wanted to stay in Boston to enjoy the town for the first time!  Rob’s place was clean, quaint and check and check out were easy.  The backyard was perfect and the added touches of notes throughout were great!  If we are ever in Boston again we will be looking to stay here!

The localization is definitely there, pretty close everything

Finally, having no windows it seems very weird for a tiny place
I will probably look for some another different place for my stay in Boston
The communication with Edmund was ok, even I am thinking that we should have a phone number to talk no only txt msg

Marlene was an excellent host. The space was very clean, and matched the description. It was very close to public transport that made getting around Boston easy. We really liked the private entrance and free parking. Would definitely stay here again!
Great stay, check-in was easy and location’s walkable/train-able to all over the city
Perfect place to go stay while getting your custom rings made in Boston!
Clean and easy to rent
Norah’s place was lovely.  We loved the location. It was walkable to every location we wanted to go. It was clean and homey.  I would definitely recommend it to anyone visiting the area.

Hermoso apartamento, excelente ubicado. Muy limpio y la amabilidad de habernos dejado papel higiénico, jabon para el lavarropas, para la lavaplatos (aunque solo estuvimos para dormir) fue un gesto notable. Volveriamos a ir encantadas!

Couldn't have asked for a better location!! Walking distance from many restaurants & a 20-minute walk from a mall. Also, it has a T stop right around the corner as well! Would definitely stay here again!
Sabina's place was as described. I  enjoyed staying there
On the green line which made traveling through the city easy!
Great location accessible to T. Perfect for a weekend graduation visit.
Clean, well priced, comfy bed, easy to book!

The house was clean and cozy.
Large shared space and well equipped kitchen. The neighbourhood is great. A highly recommended place to stay at!
The host replies quickly.

Loved the location, ease of check-in, and all the small details (coffee/tea room, etc.) that made this place feel welcoming. Hosts were receptive and flexible and let us leave our luggage after checkout.
Great location, beautiful home in Boston.  Frank and Delilah were very accommodating as we arrived late our first night.  They kept in touch via email throughout our stay.
clean，beautiful house！
Love the place, It was very convenient and nice.

Billy 的公寓百分之百值得五顆星！公寓一切都跟照片中一模一樣，廚房設備齊全、浴室內的補品非常充足、臥室中的每個角落都精緻用心地佈置，非常溫馨，在這裡猶如家一樣！交通方面，從south station 只要徒步7-8分鐘，非常好找。地理位置到各景點都很方便。
Billy 對於我們的任何疑問都非常迅速地給予詳盡回答！下次再造訪波士頓一定首選Billy 的公寓！

The location is really ideal. It's right on a main road, with plenty of cute cafes, pubs, and shops scattered nearby. But it's also in a somewhat quiet, beautiful neighborhood that's not too busy or noisy. And at the same time, less than a 10 minute walk to the bustling neighborhood of Back Bay with hotels, malls, and restaurants, nightlife, the convention center, and the T line.
Great place to stay - everything I needed as someone attending a conference all day and really only requiring a clean, minimal place to sleep and shower at night.

The good and the bad:
Charming apartment inside and the pictures are perfectly accurate. The “liason” for communication - Jenny - was very prompt and very nice. Definitely confusion who the real management is though when certain problems had to be addressed.
The BAD: Major misrepresentation! I had a lengthy stay during covid19 and was told only *after* checking in that no deliveries were allowed because the apartment was in the back. This created tremendous inconvenience and unnecessary stress. Ultimately, a neighbor brought all my packages to me but I did not appreciate someone else having to handle my packages and wait for delivery. Very unfair. Also, I was not told the apartment was in the back parking lot of the building until after the reservation was made.
And worse: The heat did not work from day one. The response I got was “this wasn’t a problem before.” I used their space heater for the duration of my three-week stay.
And there’s more: this is NOT a private entry. Total misrepresentation!! The entry is shared with two other apartments.
The only thing private is the actual door into the apartment...which, of course, is the norm.
Because this unit is in the back in the basement and other residents walk by the windows I had to keep the shades down the entire time. There is zero privacy with them open. Zero.
The dishwasher is included yet they did not leave even one dishwasher pod or even a speck of dishwasher detergent, contrary to what they said. Also not even one drop of dish wash soap which would have cost them $1.29 for a small bottle.
Additionally, a guest should not have to message the host after checking in to see where to take out the trash and recycling. This information should be given out to make the process smoother.
While the actual apartment itself is very nice and well appointed, these other issues were huge and made this stay most difficult.
Riverside: you have way too many kinks to work out.
I am also a host of an apartment in Boston (mine was rented at the time) and would never ever let these issues slip through the cracks and misrepresent.
No, I would never return to this place.

It was a great stay! It was walking distance to a lot of great locations - Boston Commons and Freedom Trail with many more. The communication was amazing and definitely recommend this place to anyone looking for a peaceful and fun getaway in Boston.

Elana was a wonderful host and made us feel right at home. The local was wonderful - walkable to  parks, The T, restaurants and bars. The kitchen has everything you need, there is a small washer and dryer, and we were able to find parking. We will definitely stay will her again!
Easy and affordable. Would go back.
Good place, no major imperfection.
Shelly is amazing. Stay was excellent. only thing is beds are not the most comfortable

Amazing place.
Here you’ll find anything you need to enjoy your stay.
Bathroom and kitchen were super equipped.
We found ourself at home!
Very comfy bed with great facilities. Angela is very hospitable and accomodating

Huanan's beautiful apartment on Pinckney St in Beacon Hill exceeded our expectations! It was within easy walking distance of everything we wanted to do while we were in Boston and also very close to the Park St subway station. On our first day at Huanan's, we picked up some bacon, eggs, OJ, etc, at a nearby grocery store and cooked ourselves breakfast in the apartment, several days while we were there. Huanan's kitchen had plenty of pots, pans, plates, cups, forks, knives, spoons, as well as salt and pepper. There was a small range, with both stove and an oven, and there was also a microwave we used several times to heat up leftovers. There was a big flat-screen TV on the wall, and we saw a remote, but we never once even thought about turning it on, as we were too busy enjoying all that the city of Boston has to offer, which is literally right outside Huanan's front door. Right across the street from Huanan's place at 20 Pinckney St is a home Louisa May Alcott's family rented when she was young, and just a few blocks away at 10 Louisburg Square is another home Louisa May Alcott owned and lived in as an adult.
If you're staying at Huanan's apartment, be sure to sign up for a free tour of the Massachusetts State House, which is only a few blocks away. The building is stunning, and our tour guide was excellent. Highly recommend!
Emmet's Pub, just a few blocks from Huanan's apartment was excellent. We really enjoyed the fish and chips and delicious Guinness drafts.
We'll definitely be back to Boston and will be looking forward to staying at Huanan's apartment again.

The apartment is a few blocks from Boston Common; The T is in the basement of the adjoining building; and it's a half hour walk to Chinatown and/or the North End.  Great location!  The apartment is clean with all kitchen utensils.  Great stay!
Second time so efficient and convenient!

Perfect location in the South End for coffee shops and restaurants.  Very close to tourist attractions, shops and if traveling with Fido a very nice dog park down the street.  The accommodations were 10 stars.  It was super cozy, very clean, kitchen well equipped and back porch was great to let dogs go out and do their business but would be a great place to have coffee in nice weather.  Highly recommend Santo’s apartment and will definitely stay again when in the area.
Perfect place! Great location and exceptionally clean!
Wonderful spot and terrific hosts. Thoughtful touches and a great location.
Great place, great host. Thank you.

Handsdown THE best AirBnB stay experience we have ever had.
Superbly renovated with new appliances, amazing facilities and exceptional attention to detail in the amenities and small touches throughout the apartment.
I cannot recommend highly enough!
Had an amazing stay, clean and nice apartment with everything you need. 100% recommend.

Jim and Aida are very kind and welcoming hosts. The apparment has everything you need and is very conveniently located, especially when you need to be at MGH. Will certainly return when back in Boston.
Awesome stay with Chirs and Kirstina! Everthing was as expected! Will definitley stay again next time I am in Boston for work!
Perfect place to stay right outside the city. Close to train and very responsive host. The backyard is beautiful. It was perfect for our quick night.
This place was awesome to stay at. Beautiful place right in the heart of Boston. Walkable to lots of places to see and things to do

Would recommend.
They are very sweet and considerate. Answered all my questions no matter at what time.
They even gave me a graduation gift basket. Sweetest thing ever.

Great apartment in Boston! We were able to walk everywhere!!
Walls are a little thin. Bed is very comfortable!!

Nice place and walkable to many great restaurants!  Lucio was very helpful with recommendations for restaurants and tourist attractions. Also very responsive with questions . Parking is a challenge but we just took Ubers. Stairs up to property may be a challenge for some.  Overall very good  experience .

I truly felt like a guest at Celia and Jonathan's place. The space was very comfortable, spotlessly clean, and tastefully decorated. The location is conveniently located near the Roxbury Crossing T station, and is within walking distance of the Museum of Fine Arts and Back Bay Fens. For me, it was at a great distance from downtown so everything was accessible, while being far enough away to avoid the hubbub. My stay in Boston was the last part of a multi-city trip, and Celia and Jonathan's place felt like a home away from home. I felt very lucky to find it, and was happy to stay there.

The stay at this place overall was 10 out of 10 and I can see why he is a super host! The home was quite & spotless. I never heard the cleaners, I think I met one, She was very pleasant. Mom was a 10 out of 10, I wish I spoke more Spanish.
* my only suggestion would be a more comfortable mattress, but then I would just keep rebooking ha!
Thanks for a great stay!
Cozy little spot in beautiful Beacon Hill. Definitely recommend for that brief work trip or Boston getaway.
Great place to stay. Close to public transit and lots of great local places.

Steve is such a nice host. The property is spectacular just where I needed it. So peaceful and convenient at the same time. Good for business travelers but also for families. Very nice to experience a real American home.
Great experience and stay.  Wouldn't hesitate to visit again.
Very convenient and the host was proactive and helpful.

Very nice little apartment close to Logan Airport, helpful parking spot, we’ll set up with amenities. Host was responsive. Staying there night before an early flight out of Logan made trip a lot easier.
Brittany and Booker are very welcoming into their home. A very close, comfortable walk to the T - excellent location. A small but tasty selection of good eats nearby.

Met Howard just for five minutes, but he is a nice guy! The room was clean, a little dark but very central: Everything in the city you can reach by foot. Compared to hotels this accomodation is a very good deal on top!

Very cool, historic buildings with peaceful surrounding campus that gets a bit busy on holiday weekend.
