Comfortable bed and sofa. Lovely and accessible, unusual for airbnb rentals around Boston.
Happy to return!
Great space and the location is nice to explore Boston by hopping on the T or bus. Jamaica Plain is a warm neighborhood with good food and coffee. Highly recommend.

Peter’s Airbnb was useful for a one night stay for our group since there are a lot of beds and we needed to fly out the next morning. It could use some maintenance however, particularly in the one bathroom. There is mold, the ceiling is coming apart, and the shower doesn’t drain well. The amenities are the bare minimum and we did not have body wash or hand towels in the bathroom. All linens and other rooms felt clean though. I think this Airbnb works well as an affordable one night stay for a larger group if you are okay with the apartment and amenities being very minimal.

Large Room overlooking BayState Rd, clean bathroom, Lihua available, perfect location for a Fenway and Boston weekend. When she discovered that it was our wedding anniversary, she brought up a dozen roses!
Wonderful stay at Katherine and Dan’s place. Clean, stylish, comfortable accommodations. They were very nice and helpful. Thanks!
It was very clean and Lisa communicates well.

The apartment was really lovely place. The room was spacious and clean.
The owners, Jane and Ben were so nice and kind. When I visit Boston, I want to use their apartment again.

Perfect stay for our first trip to Boston. Offered everything we needed and plenty of room for my wife, daughter and I. Instructions were clear for Checkin and the suggested parking garage was only a few minutes away. Perfect spot for us to unwind after a long day of exploring the city. Conveniently located to many restaurants and stores. Boston Common is just a few blocks away and we took a short tram ride to Fenway to catch a game. Would definitely stay here again for any future visits.
Awesome Awesome Great Place will stay again Recommend This place
A great little space within walking distance to many great restaurants.

Really cool themed place! Bill was an incredible host and is a true Bostonian.  The fridge was stocked with goodies and he even made us some banana bread! Definitely a great, clean B&B if you're in the South Boston area.
Bedsheets and comforter had multiple stains, were not cleaned prior to arrival. When told to host, it was ignored.
Amazing stay with short notice.
Beautiful home and very cozy . A great place to quarantine!
Great place, amazing views from the rooftop.

Great experience. The apartment was everything Meri and Jeff promised. Very spacious, beds were king size and very comfortable. Transport just outside the door. Communication was great with lots of to do brochures left in the apartment for us.  Would recommend this apartment to anyone looking to stay in Boston.
Great host responsive and professional
Great location and great hosts!
房东是一个很温暖的人，她家里还有三角琴，我在那里度过了很好的几天，设备齐全！

Highly recommend. Very clean & excellent communication. It was a prefect location for touring downtown Boston. Very walkable. We parked our vehicle 2 blocks away in a garage and walked or took an Uber everywhere. Tons of shops and restaurants within a few blocks.

Very neat, private studio. Not in a central location but the MFA is nearby and lyft/uber rides to downtown are about $6-10 depending on the time of day. Alex is a wonderful host, super responsive and considerate! Would definitely come back.
This place is great if coming for a long weekend. Perfect location, clean, bed is very comfortable. Would definitely stay again.

I’m so pleased that we chose Aaron’s apartment for our stay in Boston, everything about it was ideal. Great location, stylish apartment, lovely touches with the welcome pack and drinks in the fridge. Kelly was so lovely, came to meet us and if we needed her she was just a message away. I would definitely stay here on our next visit, a real home from home. Thank you!
It was conveniently located to so many things. Parking can be tough to find in tall vehicle.
Don’t past this one up. Perfect in every way.
Very clean, modern room with everything I needed. Shower was hot and powerful and the bed was comfortable. Everything about the accommodations worked out great!

I had a wonderful stay at Marlene’s place!
The room was clean, comfortable, and spacious. Marlene was a very responsive host who provided clear instructions and made sure everything went smoothly.
I also met Denis—super friendly and welcoming!
The private entrance and bathroom were a huge plus, and the location was great—close to the park and public library, in a peaceful and safe neighborhood.
Tip for future guests:
Marlene offers three rooms, so it’s worth checking which one suits you best.
Room 1 has a private entrance, but it can get chilly at night since it’s separated from the outside by just a door.
Rooms 2 & 3 are upstairs (warmer), but you’ll need to go through the kitchen and up the stairs—something to keep in mind if you have heavy luggage.
Highly recommend overall! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Compared to the hotels in the area,  it’s a great deal and very comfortable space! Perfect place to call home while attending a conference, attend work meetings, etc.

Jay was a great host. Very response and nice. The unit ended up being 3 bedrooms instead of 2 which actually worked out much better for our group! The keypad was slightly different then what was described in the check out instructions but we figured it out. Very walkable to Paradise Rock Club and some great restaurants. We would highly recommend!

+good price for greater Boston area (bit far outside)
+parking outside on the street was possible Saturday night
+great bath, clean, all available, though shared
+digital anonymous check-in
+small shared living room with library and TV
-hostel feeling, more then just one room
-no furniture but great beds
-bit loud

Romo & Nayeli’s place truly is a labor of love! The interior design is spot on and I thoroughly enjoyed my stay. There were so many details that exceeded my expectations. They were extremely communicative and had so many suggestions for things to do and see in the greater Boston area! The walk to and from the T station isn’t bad from a distance perspective, but for a solo female traveler like myself at times I felt unsafe and I opted for Lyft/Uber when it was late at night! Just something to keep in mind when booking if you’re by yourself. I would definitely recommend this place if you’re looking for a cute place to stay!!

The apartment is located in a central and quiet area. Yet the partner is not that modern (you hear every time someone enters the building - the apartment is on the ground flour next to the main entrance). There are many windows and lights enter always inside so in the night is never so dark. Communication was very clear and check in and check out was easy. It felt overpriced for what it offers.
Great location, great place, great host. We were satisfied.

Had a great stay, everything was clean and felt clean. Checking in and out was a breeze!
Everything in the kitchen is very minimal so if you plan on needing more than 4 wine glasses or water glasses at any one time, you’ll need to bring your own. But this didn’t deter us from having fun!

The perfect place to stay for my trip! I loved staying here and would recommend it to anyone looking for a very comfortable and conveniently located spot without breaking the bank. Claire was very quick to respond to my messages, even when they were not urgent, and gave me great local tips! I wondered how it would be to share common spaces with other guests but I hardly even saw or heard the other guests and everyone staying there was super courteous. I loved being able to take the train just one stop from the airport because it allowed me to drop my bags quickly and get right to the exploring the city.
This was my second time staying at Jonathan’s place and I️t was just as amazing as the first time. You will not find a better deal in Boston.
Loved the shower and could smell how space was recently renovated. Good location, only about 15 minutes out of the city. Great for a weekend stay, but no longer.
Jonathan is a great host and extremely friendly and clear with all of his instructions. I had a great time visiting BOSTON
Great location and very charming space! Love the historic building. Communication was great. I would stay here again in a heartbeat.
Great, responsive host. A quick walk to the red line in a quiet neighborhood. Highly recommended!

Mary is an excellent host and was even accommodating of our requests here and there. The place is also at a nice neighborhood with plenty of options nearby. Would definitely recommend this place to a friend!
Amazing stay! I was in town for a concert at Fenway and was easily able to walk there and back. Felt very safe and clean. Very responsive and helpful as well.

Bill and Maureen’s place was exactly as described in the listing. The hosts were very accommodating and great about responding. Will come back! This place is a very short walk from the Galley Diner, as recommended by Anthony Bourdain. So good.
Great place and location
Very communicative!
Enjoyed our stay. Perfect place for family. Thanks for having us.
Very convenient place for going anywhere

If you are looking for a beautiful apartment that is close to shops,  restaurants and transportation, stop looking and book Kenneth’s apartment now! I have been to Boston several times and wish I would have found his apartment sooner. You will not be disappointed. Book and enjoy! :-)
L’hôte est très gentille et très à l’écoute ! Elle répond rapidement, essaie de toujours de trouver des solutions et est très accommodante.
Exelente

This place is great. Baljinder and Sandra are great hosts and took the time to make sure that we had everything we needed. Location is great. Quick to the airport and Ubers all around to make it easy to get anywhere in Boston, if you don’t want to take the blue line.
Great value for location.
good
Clean and comfortable room. Easy self-access with door codes. Nice neighborhood! Hot shower set off the smoke alarm - fan in the bathroom would be helpful, otherwise great.
Beautiful and cozy, close to many great restaurants.

Would absolutely stay here again! The house was spacious and well appointed and we felt right at home from the start. We had everything we needed during our week long stay and enjoyed taking advantage of the neighborhood and quick access to everything from groceries to restaurants. The host was also super friendly and responsive making the stay that much better. Highly recommended!
Great place. I recommend it
Definitely would stay here again!
Great location,  nice walkable area, with transportation near by and very clean overall. Ms. Lynda was very quick to respond and gave very clear instructions.

we were at Boston for a business meeting, and I liked the appartement very much.
I was clean, well organized and we got very prompt responses on any messages.
It is well located and to reach from Logan airport with a free bus shuttle

This is one of the most comfortable Air BnB's we've ever stayed in out of hundreds. Fatima's place has more space than even a large family needs, spread out over two floors (with a lower entry) and including a pleasant deck for waking up with the neighborhoods. Comfy beds, plenty of seating, warm blankets and cool A/C during a Boston heatwave--we loved coming back here and taking advantage of the local restaurants. Try the African-inflected Portuguese--delicious! Fatima is a terrific host who made sure we knew about parking, were welcomed with coffee, and were happy throughout our stay.
Great, clean, decorated nicely. Shared bathroom was not issue at all. Centerally located . Would definitely come again. Todd was great at responding so quickly. Would definitely recommend.

Lots and lots of rules but I get it. The location was very convenient to our daughter who lives nearby. The place was very spacious and comfortable. We loved the comfy couch and the kitchen was very nice. The bathroom is down a steep staircase so you do need to watch your step in the middle of the night. The beds were comfortable and it was nice having the tv in the bedroom also. Very nice place & good value especially compared to Boston hotel prices. Would stay here again.

Everything was perfect.
Had comfortable stay .
The host was very helpful.
This place is very nice, clean, upgraded bathroom, very comfortable!  The location is fantastic and perfect for families but great for anyone!  We felt like it exceeded our expectations!
Staying with Bo was great! He was always responsive and took care of the space. Highly recommend
Stayed at TJ's place for two nights with my husband. Great place, we had a great time. Thanks for everything!

Ben’s place was great! We had a great time in Boston and would definitely book here again. The place was very nice and clean. It’s a close walk to the T, with lots of good shops and restaurants close by.

Shelly es muy atenta y agradable, su hospedaje esta muy cerca del aeropuerto y si coordinas con tiempo te puede recoger o llevar al aeropuerto. Un poco ruidosa la habitación del centro, asi q lleven tapaoidos si les toca esa.

The Residence Inn Boston Downtown South End exceeded my expectations.  My corner room was palatial, giving me views and light in two directions.  The bathroom and living areas were modern, large, clean, and comfortable.  In the lobby the desk staff was friendly and helpful, and they had the most delicious citrus-infused water for me to fill my water bottle.  At breakfast they served these fabulous egg cups with cheese and jalapenos.  The bus stop right across the street took me up to Chinatown and South Station, and down to the zoo and rollerskating.  The best Ethiopian restaurant was a 7-minute walk away.  Some people leaving reviews have complained about the noise, but there was just regular city noise.  The hotel isn't near a hospital or fire station.  Without earplugs I actually slept like a baby.  I truly could not have been happier with my stay.

We loved the space at Joseph's place! it was so nice to be able to spread out and the extra cot was perfect. We drove to Cambridge, Newbury St, the Aquarium and nothing took more than 20 mins. Thank you!
The place was great and in an amazing location. Stone was super communicative and helpful in regards to check in/check out and setting up parking

Great location! excellent, neat and peaceful place. Super host! very kind, a lot of communication and trustworthy. Se really gives you confidence. after that all you have to worry about is to make your plans to enjoy Boston
very clean!

Enjoyed our stay. We were on the 5th floor and the elevator dod not work.This was mentioned when we reserved the space but it was unpleasant to climb the stairs. Hopefully they can't get this repaired soon. Very responsive and helpful.

The view of the Boston common  from this apartment was extremely beautiful in fall. Jean the co host was extremely responsive when needed. The location was great and we could walk everywhere.  Everything was true to their word.  Would definitely stay again. Thanks.
A great place to meet smart people from all over the world!
Absolutely perfect!
Wanted to be closer to the airport to bring my niece and her family early in the morning. Perfect resting area and in a quiet neighborhood. Will keep on my list for future stays!
Very good apartment to stay. Everything there was  new and clean.
Very clean, great location

We needed one night stay and this apartment did the trick. Very clean. Near Fenway (walking distance) and restaurants/bars. It was on the 4th floor which made it very difficult to lug large suitcases up the spiral staircase. No elevator. There were two small window air conditioners that managed the extreme heat outside. Bed was very hard. Overall, this worked out fine for one night.

Our fave air BNB to date. I wouldn’t stay anywhere else if I visited Boston again. Amazing value and such a unique experience. I can’t recommend this enough. Melissa was a fantastic host. Smiling, inviting, friendly and had lots of local knowledge. Parking was on site and super easy to get around to all forms of public transportation. Breakfast was included at the neighbourhood cafe. Boat had AC that was amazing.
Had everything we needed and more.
Clean and comfortable space close to the airport and the T.

We stayed at Gerald’s place for two nights. It was spacious, beautifully renovated and immaculately clean. The beds were comfortable and the bathroom was stocked with soaps and towels. Gerald was responsive and kind as well. We would stay again!

Ting-Ho was a friendly and responsive host. I appreciated that he bought a safety item I requested before we arrived. The house is large, comfortable, and spotlessly clean. The residential street was quiet and street parking was always easy. The house is a short drive from restaurants and a Whole Foods Market.
Our group consisted of four women in town to support our friend through a surgery, and the medical complex in Brookline was about 15 minutes from the rental. The house was a lovely place to return to after long days at the hospital.
Just a note, if it matters to you, there are no bedrooms on the first floor.
We would all recommend a stay if you need space in Boston!

This was an incredibly amazing property to stay in. Very spacious and accommodating!! Daryl was an incredibly helpful host. My group was in town for a concert at TD Garden and Daryl helped us with directions from the property. Property was very clean and provided everything we needed. My only complaint is the neighborhood was a bit much for a small town girl from Maine. Our neighbors across the street were incredibly loud all night and the cops showed multiple times. Obviously, this is not something that affects the brilliance of this property nor the wonderful property owner. Would 10/10 book this property again in the future!
This place was great!  Clean, perfect location, and just the right size if you're in town for a couple days.  Definitely recommend Alicia's place.
We had a pleasant stay in Antonio's place. The instructions were clear.
Excelentemente ubicado. Cerca del subte y trenes. Zona tranquila y residencial. A pocas cuadras del Shopping Prudential. Una ubicación ideal para recorrer la ciudad
Very nice and home like place. Great location and very clean. It was perfect for our sisters weekend!  Thanks so much!
Nice place, nice area and good price
房东非常友善，房型及内部配套周到，总体质量远超预期，非常推荐。

Jurek is a great host. The place is perfect for a quick stay, quiet, and hidden away from the street. Plenty of clean towels and bedding, well-stocked kitchen, well-lit outside, close to mass transit, and super clean. The area itself is more industrial than touristy, but the orange line and a few restaurants in walking distance made this not much of an issue. My family had a great dinner and service at the pub across the street, which I'd highly recommend. We didn't hear a sound from Jurek the entire time, but I appreciate that he is upfront about the living arrangements. I would recommend staying at Jurek's.
Stayed here for red sox and celtics game over the weekend, 100% recommend!!!

I was there for a quick visit to my son at Boston University. The place is a short walk from his dorm and from the T. Very quiet, pleasant stay. Room is small, per the pics, but had everything I needed, and the bed and armchair are very comfortable. Lovely window looks out on the street. Roomy closet with robe. Nice hot shower. Lihua was very responsive and welcoming.
Very nice for families with children.

Lovely and cozy studio as described! The apartment is located in a quiet neighbourhood with easy access to Centre St restaurants and within walking distance to the orange line T and Sam Adams brewery. Kristina and Chris were prompt in responding to our questions and check-in and check-out were smooth. Will recommend this place!
Timothy is a great host who is friendly, knowledgeable, responsive. I would highly recommend this location and his place - he knows how to do it right
Exactly what I was looking for

The apartment is nice, clean and exactly as in the photos. Excellent location. Jay is very responsive and dealt with a little matter quickly. Parking in the area is tricky, especially when there is an event at the TD Garden.

Lots of pluses, first and foremost the host. She is helpful in every way. The location is only one subway stop from Logan Airport. A very short walk gets you to the north side of the bay with a nice park and a great view. The ambience of the neighborhood is small scale and close knit. It feels safe and inviting.

We would absolutely stay in a Maverick Suite again—but especially this one! An amazing location that was charming and walkable to a wonderful variety of local eats as well as a “mall” situation with a couple big parking garages & reservable spots (via Spot Hero). We parked our car and left it the whole stay since we were easily able to walk and train everywhere. T ride downtown/harbor was about 15-20 minutes including walk time. The space was clean and, while small (I mean, it’s Boston/city apartment), never felt tight. Great water pressure, A/C that kept the space chill even in 90* heat, and a cute little breakfast table in the bay window that looks down over the street. Access was easy, though it took a moment to get the timing of the outside door keypad lock—as soon as you hit the checkmark, turn the handle, don’t wait for the beeps. Communication was prompt, proactive, helpful, and friendly. You want to stay here.
Only stayed a night but it was great! Clean and comfortable, great for a quick stay in Boston.

Small room and with a shared bathroom. People socialising in front of the bathroom this extremely noisy. The bedside lights were all malfunctioning. We asked for a ensuite room, that wasn’t available. The description of the hotel is not honest. “Private bathroom if locked”. Paying almost 300€ for that ! This is a disgrace!

Comfortable and clean. Close to Fenway. I had missed the posted check in and check out times when booking, currently is 5:00 p.m. and 10:00 a.m. which seemed a little bit of a bummer, but they were transparent about it. Having said that, they were also very flexible in allowing early entry if the unit was ready in time or pre-planned for an additional fee. Would definitely stay here again@

This place was an amazing and luxurious place to stay at. Fully equipped kitchen to cook a home cook meal and an awesome lay out. You can sleep 6 or 7, because they have a pull out bed in the closet. It’s in a quiet neighborhood and parking on the street is not an issue. The house comes fully loaded with music, tv and so much more. It was sparkling clean and a smooth and easy self check in! I would recommend this to anyone wanting to stay in a little luxury.

We loved the location and the homey, cozy feel of the house.
The only negative was the lack of a hair dryer, which I had forgotten to take, as hotels always provide them.
I enjoyed my time at Aaron & Catherine‘s place!
Delightfully quirky place. Recommended...

The studio is very comfortable. Maverick was communicative, and it has most of the amenities I’d expect in a hotel room, including soap, shampoo, and conditioner.
My two critiques are that (1) the wifi wasn’t great and (2) the window shades were very thin, so there would be light in the room starting early in the morning
很不错的房间！我在这里住了半年，一切设施都好，没有什么不方便的地方。房东沟通很愉快，遇到困难也会及时解决。我会推荐这个房间。
房屋位置很方便，房间在阁楼，干净整洁。
Great place to stay for a weekend.  Easy to get anywhere in the city.  Safe neighborhood.

nice spot.  I was in town on business for a couple of days. nice location building was a little dated but the apartment itself was nice. bed was comfortable and shower very nice. check in instructions were outstanding
Nice studio apartment
Vermieter kommuniziert über E-Mail was ein wenig mühsam ist. Wlan hat nicht funktioniert. Sonst eine super Unterkunft in einer ruhigen Gegend.
The place is great
Great host. Quick and helpful responses. The apt. is beautiful. The building is amazing with fantastic gathering ares in the 6th Floor. We had a very enjoyable stay.
Charles was so quick to respond to all my questions and concerns. The room was clean and perfect for the solo traveler.
Janice provided my family with a very good services.  We enjoyed staying in Boston much.

We had a great stay at this great apartment.  The spiral staircase down to the bedroom was fun.  Kitchen had everything we needed for making meals.  Terry was very quickly responsive to our request to adjust the heat in living room/kitchen level, which does not have it's own in-unit thermostat (the bedroom has a wall heater that worked great for adjusting the temperature there).  We really enjoy this location near the Roxbury Crossing T stop.  We like to walk, and it's a reasonable walk to many places (MFA, Gardiner Museum, Northeastern U, Boston U, even downtown).  We'd definitely stay here again.
Fantastic place to stay, and great location in Boston. Loved our 3 day stay here.
Great place to stay as a solo traveler. Small, clean, and comfortable.

I will absolutely stay here again in my next trip to Boston! So affordable and CLEAN as well as close to everything we wanted to do. Loved the Espresso machine (my son thanks you for my morning coffee 😉)  Thank you for keeping the buildings historical beauty!

Espaço bem semelhante ao das fotos. Cama confortável para uma pessoa ou duas não tão grandes. Banheiro privado limpo e ótima ducha. Barak é muito solicito e educado. A Nadia nao Comheci mas sempre responde às
Mensagens. Bem localizado perto do metrô. 10 min do Brigham Hospital. Mercado longe do apartamento. Ambiente limpo.
Great host. Responds fast and very accommodating.

My husband, son, and brothers-in-law stayed here for 2 nights and had a great experience! The location was great and we were able to walk pretty much everywhere we needed to go. We parked in a nearby garage and used spot hero for parking. The apartment was easy to access using the keyless entry/passcodes. The apartment was clean and we all felt comfortable there. We had enough room for our son’s pack and play in the bedroom my husband and I used which was great. Would recommend this place to others and would consider staying again!
The location was amazing and was a short walk to the Boston Commons. Also close to restaurants and of course, a Dunkin.
The apartment is in the best location in Boston, the recommendations from Kaitlyn were great and she responded almost immediately to all our questions. Thank you for the great holidays.
very nice place.  We walked to the train station in less than 5 minutes.  we would definitely come back
It's a beautiful old house, great location, very clean and gorgeous neighborhood.

My Husband and I and our 4 kids ages 2, 4, 6, & 11 stayed for a long weekend and had such an amazing experience!! Everything was so clean and the beds were comfortable. The host graciously provided some coffee, water, and even a few cans of soda. Even the candy dish was much enjoyed by the kids. Off street parking was a plus! On our second day we walked the short distance to the subway and that was super convenient as well! We will definitely be back!

We booked a two-person room at Ehab's house, situated in a tranquil neighborhood in the Dorchester district of Boston. The location is highly convenient, just a 10-minute walk from the JFK/UMass Red Line stop (20 min from Boston Downtown). Despite Boston's high cost of living, Ehab's accommodation offers exceptional affordability. We are also grateful to Ehab for his availability and assistance throughout our stay. His kindness and attentiveness greatly enhanced the quality of our experience.
I would go back so nice and clean and i loved how close it was to the train
Boris and Susan , Great host and the place is exactly the same as listed , nice and good area easy to find . Definitely recommend. Will be back .
Our stay was a great experience! Quiet and clean neighborhood. Perfect location for touring the city!

We booked Albert's place for a business trip and it was nearly perfect in every way. The location is in the financial district, so after a late night working, there weren't many late-night food options around, but we easily found things during normal business hours. Beyond that, everything concerning the property itself was fantastic. Thank you, Albert!

The room was perfect in all categories.
Located in a walking distance from town, the streer is peaceful, house was easy to fined and have everyting that i needed.
Prepared coffee and tea was also great.
i really want to stay again when i visit Boston.
We had a great stay! Deborah was very responsive with all communication.

Katy's home was perfect for our groups trip and stay in the Boston area. The perfect central location south of the city was a short drive from all inner city Boston sightseeing and activities we had planned (plus close to airport) and only 30 to Foxborough for the attended football game. Katy's home is such a lovely, peaceful and very private home (which was great and quite a most relaxing place to return to after long days exploring the surrounding area but surprising is located in a urban setting. Short drives or long walks to get to any store or food places you may need to visit.
Katy's home had 4 large bedrooms that fit our needs just right. All the rooms are extremely clean and comfy through the home. Slept GREAT! Really loved the outside private area. Driveway space for several vehicles if needed and the best was the outdoor patio with a large table/chairs along with a great grill which made an sweet evening cookout perfect for our group. I could keep going on. Don't pass up on!
Great place to stay! Siena was very welcoming and kind!

The apartment is located in a calm, nice neighbourhood close enough to Ashmont station. The kitchen is shared but the rest is private. Maria is very friendly and offered us a late checkout without us asking.
Great location.

We enjoyed our stay. Great location. Checkin was easy. Walkable to many Boston attractions like North End, harbor, freedom trail. Everything else can be reached by the T. Apartment has lots of light, beds were very comfortable and we did not experience any issues with noise as some other reviewers noted. The furnishings and amenities are sparse, but it has the basics. There are no “extras” in the kitchen - just salt, pepper and coffee filters. I would definitely visit again, but would bring my own soap and shampoo and perhaps a sleeping mask.
Excellent place, comfortable quiet clean and beautiful has all the comforts to make you feel at home. I would definitely stay here again
We stayed here while my husband was going through chemotherapy at Dana Farber. Very close, super clean and very comfortable. We would highly recommend!
We had a short stay while traveling through the area. The place was great and location couldn't be better to walk around downtown.

Eda’s place was exactly as described! This was our first time in Boston and if we did it again we would not stay in the south end. The area is really cute, it was just far from what we wanted to do - 30 minutes to an hour on public transportation to get anywhere. Not a complaint, just something we wouldn’t have known until we got here. We had a wonderful time in Boston and really enjoyed our stay here. If you don’t mind a bit of a commute into the center of Boston, I highly recommend Eda’s place.
Elisangela was a great host! She was very responsive and made sure we had everything we needed for a great stay.

Perfect place to stay if you want to be close to everything.  It’s a gorgeous space and very comfortable. Especially enjoyed all the big windows and light and also the well preserved historic details. The nearby restaurants are amazing and an easy walk. The kitchen is small but adorable and had everything we needed. The whole experience was positive and we hope to stay here again when we visit Boston. Highly recommend Laura and Olivia’s place!
Everything was great! Would definitely stay there again!
Fantastic room and locations. Unfortunately when we were there the bathroom was broken and was not fixed until we had already left.

short review: this unit is excellent and Tim is a fantastic host, if the size and location meet your needs then book it ASAP.
some more details: Tim was incredibly accommodating as our timing was less than ideal and weather had thrown a fairly large wrench into our plans. He was very easy to communicate with before and during the stay and made everything very easy. The space is certainly small, though nothing feels cramped and it is all very nice. The parking is very helpful though it does require a small walk from the alley around to the front of the building. As we stayed from Sunday night into Monday morning, there was quite the hustle and bustle in the morning, so if you're a light sleeper this may pose an issue though it's to be expected in this type of location. Absolutely none of these things should be deal breakers if you plan to book this space for a night out in Boston as the location simply cannot be beat. We are already planning a trip to come back to this spot in warmer weather.
Great place to stay for the price. Easy access. Will look at staying again next time in town

Beautiful accommodations. Exceeded our expectations. Well stock, comfortable, quiet and safe.  A great visit with my Son and Daughter. We were close to everything.. Absolutely Highly Recommend. Thank you Evonify.  We will be back to sure

I had a wonderful stay at this Airbnb. The place was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described in the listing. The host was very kind and responsive, making check-in and communication easy throughout my stay. The home had everything I needed and felt very welcoming. I truly appreciated the attention to detail and the warm atmosphere. I would definitely recommend this Airbnb to anyone visiting the area and would be happy to stay here again in the future.

Very lovely house, 5min from T-Station, then ca. 10min to downtown Boston. Communication with Hermina went well, we met her shortly and she was nice and always responsive to our dialogue. Room is nice and big, unfortunately not much place to store things. Kitchen was unfortunately a bit a mess- not sure if that was from other Airbnb People that stayed there.
In any case a good Option for a couple of days in Boston where you get all you Need.
We loved staying at Jay's place. Great location, among history and amazing restaurants... and the view of Boston was awesome! Jay was very responsive. We had a great time.
Perfect place to sleep for the night that’s close to the airport

We had a wonderful stay at Varouj's apartment as we were in Boston for a conference with my colleague. Varouj was the perfect host. He greeted us in front of the building and showed us the apartment. The apartment was located on the sixth floor with very nice views overlooking the church park and the city. The apartment itself was clean and supplied with all the necessary equipment. The location was perfect. Whole foods was located right across the street and CVS in the same building along with variety of restaurants. All in all, I would definitely recommend this place to anyone looking for a nice stay with good value for the money. Thank you Varouj!

The place had an incredible location, right in the center, in front of a beautiful parc, but in a dead end street without any traffic or noise.
It was clean, the check in was easy with a code, and everything was comfortable.
Great spot for our stay in Boston! Would highly recommend!

Penny is a great host! She was very helpful in guiding us around the city of Boston. The place was clean all the time and very safe and convenient location. Worth the first priority to stay here (if it is available) if you are travelling to Boston.
Great place to stay, would recommend

Apartment was not far from the airport, easy to get an Uber/taxi and depending the time of day, the traffic was as expected. Location was in walking distance of many restaurants and the local train called the, T, to get many places for sightseeing.
The only tricky part is the stairs to get to the apartment, very narrow and challenging to get large luggage up to the apartment.

This is the second time I have stayed at Ella's & Wills. I love this place. It is clean, quiet and comfortable and they are amazing hosts. Communication with them is easy and fast. They check in with you when you arrive and again when your leaving . They really do care and I feel the love they have in their care of the apt and the guests. On both my visits I have taken an overnight flight and they have made the apt available to me for early check-in. I come to Roslindale to visit family, but this location is walking distance to Roslindale Village with their great shops and restaurants and to the Commuter Rail. They are 5 STAR hosts and I hope to come back to their apt next year. P.S. I love that Ella has made a special folder for their guests, detailing the area, restaurant menus, maps , bus and train schedules- which you will find on the table when you arrive.
Susan
Decent space. Close to fun things to do in Boston

We had an excellent one-month stay in Laura’s beautiful studio! The location was absolutely perfect - in the heart of the walkable South End, safe, and steps away from restaurants, coffee shops and boutiques. The studio itself was clean, spacious and well-equipped with a nice outlook onto the tree-lined street below. Laura was the perfect host - very kind and helpful. Communication was always swift, check-in was easy and we were provided with a helpful local’s guide about the neighbourhood. Highly recommended and would stay again! Thanks Laura!
Bill and Maureen are gracious hosts! Their home is beautiful and they have the rooms decorated to really immerse yourself in the history that is Boston. 10/10!
Good location, also as described.

This apartment is in a great location. The building is very old and lots of stairs, they do have an elevator but it’s a little creepy.
Check in instructions were clear and easy however we had an issue at check in when we noticed the heat wasn’t working in the apartment. The company that manages this unit suggested we use the conveniently left space heaters. Which can’t be left on when we leave or overnight.
The responses halted when we tried to deal with getting in touch with anyone after the trip to deal with the issues of simply not having heat in the unit.
It’s a great location but overpriced for the apartment itself and the lack of communication that came up when an issue occurred.

Selim is a really great host. He’s so kind that he allowed me to leave my stuff in the unit when checking out. Something that not all host  ever did! The room is clean, bathroom is clean, and kitchen is complete. The price is also among the cheapest you find in Boston. Will definitely stay at his place again!

If I could give 10 stars instead of the maximum 5 stars for Location, I would. Norah's place in on an incredibly charming street in the middle of Beacon Hill, steps from Boston Common (where we ran every morning) and great shops and restaurants. But you'll just want to wander and take in the cobblestone streets, gorgeous brownstones and overflowing flower boxes. Norah's place was impeccably clean and well equipped. Very comfortable for us as a couple, with our teen daughter. Norah has made the most of a small space; it is well organized. Note that she does not have a kitchen, but the place has a little fridge, microwave and toaster oven, which was more than we needed. Also note that this place is in the basement (although it has a few windows and lets in good light), so if you have mobility issues navigating stairs, this might be an issue for you. Norah was really responsive. The washer/dryer were great to launder our running clothes. I'd definitely stay here again when we are back in Boston.

Cozy, simple, comfortable.  Incredible location. Walking distance to so many great places.  Couldn’t have been easier to get to and from the airport. Lots of great coffee shops and restaurants nearby. Felt like a local. Bed was comfortable. Room was clean. Bathroom was clean and had good water pressure.  If you’re just looking for a safe, clean, quiet place to rest between exploring a wonderful city.  This is it. Hosts were honest and quick to respond. Will definitely book again next time around.
I have stayed with Lori many times and it’s always a great stay!  Big room, convenient location near the Orange Line, quiet, I always sleep well.  Definitely won’t be my last.
Ewa was so nice, we enjoyed our time at her location. It was nice, clean, and had everything we needed for a family of 3.
Great location in a quiet part of town. The room was big, bed was comfortable and Robin provided everything you need - including delicious homemade granola! Highly recommend, Robin is awesome!

I had a wonderful stay at this Airbnb! The host was incredibly caring and attentive, always making sure I had everything I needed for a comfortable stay. Communication was top-notch – they responded quickly to any questions I had and were very helpful with local recommendations. It truly felt like they went above and beyond to ensure I had a great experience. I highly recommend this place and would definitely stay again!
Billy was quick to respond every time with any questions I had. The place was sparkling clean and has a comfortable bed. The location is fantastic!
The location near the train station is very convenient and Lance and Shelly are very friendly!

It was a very cozy home! So many beds, we were all very comfortable staying here. We really appreciated all of the sticky notes all over the apartment. They were helpful and easy to read. Also appreciated all of the snacks/water left for us! We felt very comfortable staying here!
Nice and clean.

Stayed here for a week while at a work conference and Absolutely loved the area. Most importantly the bed is extremely comfortable. Way better than an hotel bed in my opinion. Extremely easy to walk to anywhere you’re trying to go and always had Ubers close by if you need that option. Great food right below and amazing coffee shops within a 5 minute walk.

This is a lovely space on the third floor of a beautiful home in JP. The location is in quick walking distance to everything downtown. The space is thoughtfully decorated with a renovated bathroom. The kitchen is large enough to eat breakfast. Note that just as described, you are on the third floor of someone’s home and they are living in that house. Our hosts were pleasant, quiet, and unobtrusive. Also note that, as described, you are on the third floor of the house so you’ll need to climb two flights of stairs to get into the space. The air conditioning was very powerful when needed, which is great if it is 90° outside. If that fits your needs, we strongly recommend this as a lovely spot.

Jay's place was wonderful! We were right in the heart of the North End-just where we wanted to be. The apartment was adorable and in pristine, updated condition. Jay even had thoughtful amenities such as coffee, filtered water and an umbrella!!
It was so easy to get to-we landed, took the train and we able to walk just a few blocks to the apartment. We would definitely stay there again!
Lovely place. Great location. Hope to come again.
We loved the boat left wanting one of our own especially in Boston this was a perfect stay
good location

This place was great! The neighborhood was nice and quiet and you barely even noticed the upstairs neighbors. It’s a bit of a hike to the subway station, but it’s a simple enough route. I recommend staying here.
great location and easy to access

Rich was a great host! Made my stay in Boston one to remember.
He was super accommodating and the place was exactly as described. Would definitely recommended :)
Excelentes anfitriones, la casa está súper bien ubicada y tiene todo lo que puedas necesitar. Súper recomendada.

Howard has such a warm, inviting, and joyful presence, and the love and care that has been put into this space bears that out. During our visit, we constantly found ourselves referring to 17R Charter as "home" because that is the pervading atmosphere. From the comfortable room, to the gracious amenities, to the insightful recommendations, he made our stay in Boston the most memorable trip. The LOCATION IS AMAZING. In 10-20mins of walking, you can be at any and all big tourist attractions, and the North End is the most deliciously amazing neighborhood for food. We highly recommend this AirBnB and will do everything to rebook should we be back in Boston.
House was amazing would book again !!
Great place
So good to stay here!
Great experience. Public transport walking distance. It was clean and met our needs for a place to rest in between site seeing in Boston.

We really liked the location of the apartment it was an easy walk to lots of attractions. The apartment was clean and was great for a toddler. The only thing that was bothersome was the marijuana smell as soon as you enter the building. I guess that’s par for the course but we just aren’t used to it coming from Texas.
Great stay with our family!

Very economical clean efficiency, full stocked, in comparison to the prices at local hotels.  Plenty of dining choices with local coffee bars and groceries.  Within walking distance to Sub.  No elevator with multiple stairs is the only downside.  Don't pack a 50 lb. suitcase if you're staying in the upper level suites.
Comfy room in a great location! Small space, but works. Nice bathroom. Would stay again!
Close to the airport. Comfortable bed. Good shower. Lovely kitchen and lounge that we were able to use.

About two hours before our check in time we received a text message stating - that the previous tenants were refusing to leave the unit and that they did not know what to do at the time as they could not force them to leave. Leaving us with no other accommodations. The employee we exchanged text messages with (they never called or attempted any other form of contact to help us) offered us a different unit. The replacement unit was no where near the quality of the original booking so we discussed a discounted rate. The rate discount they offered was not even close to the difference in quality of the unit. They claimed this was due to the location, which honestly matters very little in a pandemic and I am from the area and the first unit is in a nicer location, I digress. The employee we had contact with did try to be very helpful. They sent us multiple units images and went across the city to take pictures of another one. This unit was also very subpar to our original booking. Unfortunately, the employee is about all I can say that was good about our experience with Evonify. The employee told us if we did not want either unit we would be given a full refund. We requested the refund and were told it would be provided. There was no refund, message, communication, or notification from Evonify or any indication they contacted AirBNB 3 days later. So we reached out to the employee again.... they said they would check. Five days later and there was still nothing. So we contacted them again and informed them we would be contacting AirBNB for the refund. To which they responded- Did they [Airbnb] respond? We then contacted AirBNB, whose customer service deserves an award, and they corrected the issue within 24 hours. Evonify then cancelled and refunded the reservation... 6 days after THEY cancelled our reservation and ONLY because we went through AirBNB.
Evonify is typically a corporate booking company. I think they honestly hoped that we would just never notice they didn't give us a refund. That it would slip through the cracks, as it might at a large corporation. I was exceptionally disappointed in Evonify in this situation- I would not recommend booking with them and if you do make sure to closely monitor any charges and, or supposed refunds.

Perhaps my favorite Airbnb of all time. My friend and I stayed a few days before our lease started and the house was alive with friendly boarders and family. Completely interesting and kind people with the best atmosphere on top of amazing hospitality. Thank you for having us!

This place is magical and truly takes you away from the stress of everyday. Also, it is very clean and location is great. Terry never sleeps and always answered at anytime of the day. Easy check in/check out. I checked it at 1AM and Terry still was awake and answered my messages. Amazing
Excelente lugar súper bien ubicado  y  servicios según lo que necesitábamos

A great apartment for exploring Boston and walking distance to the center of Back Bay. Comfortable beds. Very clean. Well supplied. Not a big sitting area for TV watching but worked just fine for our family of five.
This home was spacious and cozy, perfect for a couple days of exploring the city. Wanda was helpful and accessible.

Fabulous Airbnb. Location is perfect for exploring boston and feels safe despite being in the centre of the city. Noise minimal. Incredibly clean. Hosts are responsive and accommodating. Would recommend to anyone.
I had the pleasure of staying at this apartment and the inside was beautiful. Super well taken care of and it was lovely that there were snacks. Was so worth the price compared to hotels!

Cute place! Would definitely stay here again! Very close to a lot of places, we walked everywhere because that's how great of a location it was. Had everything you basically needed & was very clean. Only note is that our room smelt like Bacon the entire stay, but we love bacon so that wasn't a problem :)  oh & complete wifi with cable tv made it very very home feel!

Glenn's studio apartment was just as the description said.  It was very clean and a nice place to stay.  It was quiet and didn't hear others in the building.  The area around the apartment was nice.  Had restaurants within walking distance, a Starbucks a couple of blocks away, and a laid back atmosphere.  The T station to go many places was only 3 blocks away.  I really liked the location and was close to everything.  The apartment was nice and I would stay in it again!  Found a gem!
Great location if you have business in boston

Nick was a very welcoming host, but overall the air b n b apartment was not what my friend and I expected. The building itself is quite old, there were tenants living upstairs, and the walls were extremely thin. We could hear music playing and talking very early on in the morning. The apartment was also quite a bit of a walk from the subway, and if that is your main source of transportation in Boston to downtown, it takes at least 30 minutes. We felt that although Nick was very welcoming and friendly, the air b n b itself was not well kept.

Great access to many local cafes (cacao) being our favorite! This location is truly
In the heart of Boston, being close to tourist attractions & the mall!
It truly was such an amazing experience! I can’t wait to be back and rebook my future stay at this exact location!!
Overall good hotel, room is really small and coffee was subpar but overall nice place

One of the best Airbnb experiences I had in a long time.
In a world where it became quite rare to even meet your host in person, Thomas truly stood out. He gave clear instructions beforehand and made sure that I was comfortable with dogs (and even sent me a picture of which ones would be there!). When I arrived, he also shared some leftover food with me, which I would never expect. Furthermore, for me, having dogs around is something I really enjoy, but yeah, that's a very personal preference. In any case, they are super sweet and playful. :)
I had a very pleasant stay at his house and felt really welcome. Thanks so much!
Great place to stay

I came to Boston for a boys trip to see the Patriots game and have some fun in Boston.  The apartment is in a great location - walkable to bars and restaurants, right next to Boston Commons, and comfy beds for each guest.  The building is unfortunately next to a big construction site, so it can get loud, but otherwise, it’s a great spot for a trip to Boston!
perfect place for a stay, vert convenient for arrival and departurea and good spot in town
Great location with good nearby access to Transit into Boston. Perfect a a few days stop.
A great place to stay while we were in Boston! It was a great neighborhood with lots of shops and restaurants and close to everything we wanted to see.
Beautiful place with outstanding master area. 3 stories and very spacious.

Thanks for the fast response.  We were last minute jump on a flight and was standing at Boston airport and booked the place.  the response was within minutes.  i had a bucket list to see the Cheers Bar.

The place was beautifully furnished and comfortable with a fantastic kitchen and a big, cozy couch for  relaxing. The hosts were super responsive and caring. Someone even brushed off my car after a few inches of snow fell overnight! The location is super convenient - would definitely stay here again when in Boston!
Nice place. Great location.
loved it great spot
The place is very nice and clean but pricey.

Lori's place is a short walk from the T, and a comfortable (to me) walk to the main commercial strip in Jamaica Plain, Centre Street. Take time to experience the neighborhood shopping and dining during your stay; it's a wonderful district. If you prefer, it's easy to get a Lyft from the station.
Lori's beautiful old house is full of character. My room, the bathroom, and the common areas were clean and cozy. Lori goes out of her way to make guests feel welcome and was generous and flexible with my requests. Highly recommend!

We found parking easily and close to the house. There are quite a few steps to go up to the Airbnb and the room is quite small. But it was comfortable and the bathroom was nice. She had it fully stocked with anything you might need. It was close to the subway and several nice places to eat. We would stay there again if we are ever in the area!
Amazing location. Walking distance to many things and very close to the T for easy transport around the city.

Great location for the Boston Marathon weekend events. Located in a beautiful neighborhood, on a busy street, with a good variety of restaurants and shops. Within easy walking distance of many attractions and sights.

Andrea was an excellent host.
Her place is on a nice and quiet dead end with plenty of parking space.
She is very helpful and a great communicator. She even bakes fresh breads and leaves on the kitchen table! Cant beat that
Best value
Lovely apartment with even lovelier hosts. Great location and very easy to get around. Really felt like home!
This was my 2nd time staying here and won't be my last. The rooms are perfect for a short stay and the front desk staff so so incredibly nice and helpful. The location is also prime.
Nicholas communicated well, the place was lovely, and the location is perfect, cute street with access to everything in Boston!
Lance & Shelly are excellent host and share a lot of their local living experience, promot response ane house is very close to blue train and airport, would recomond next stay there

Such a great place for our family of five to meet up for a reunion! The property is as-described: clean, comfortable beds, hot water, washer and dryer, close to public transportation. We felt safe, we were comfortable, and Katia was great about communicating with us. As noted in the listing/previous reviews, there is no living room, but we were aware of that, and made the kitchen our home/living room, as well as the garden area with seating, a pop-up gazebo, and even a light for making the evenings last longer! We hope to stay at this location when we are back in the Brighton/Brookline area. Highly recommend!!
Very clean and convenient location. Host was very responsive.

Had a great one night stay at Jonathan’s place. For a small airbnb it is very thoughtfully furnished and decorated.  On street parking was plentiful and a great location for a quick uber around the city. I would definitely stay again.

Daryl’s house was lovely. The best airbnb I’ve ever stayed at! The location of the house was close to the commuter train station. We loved the space it was perfect for our group. The kitchen and washer/dryer were so helpful and we appreciated the snacks left for us. The house is brand new and was in pristine condition. Thanks Daryl for the stay and for being so responsive.

Family of 4, visiting Boston for the first time. Great location in financial district, close to everything and very walkable. Although on the 8th floor, tons of street noise in the middle of the night, every night. We didn’t discover fan until last day, which would have helped make some white noise. We had to call to get the heat turned on, but once we did, no problem there. Team was responsive, but we had to follow up with them to get feedback on fixing some kitchen issues. One of the burners on stove would not turn off and over did not work. Kitchen could use some more items, passed those along already. I thought check in time of 5pm was not very reasonable and had to pay $50 to check in at 2. Was able to extend check out time by 1 hour to 11am free of charge, but more flexibility would have been nice. Overall, the apartment was fine, I would try a different neighborhood b/c of noise. But if you want to be close to bars and plan to be out late, it would be ideal.
Great place to stay in downtown Boston

Absolutely perfect North End apartment. Very easy walk to any restaurant. Neighborhood filled with bakeries and parks and Italian food. North End is Old World and Old School. Streets too small for any serious traffic. A big plus for walkers. Apartment has true dining room and separate living room. Big kitchen and back yard (for the North End). Hosts are friendly and great communicators. Everything worked. Everything was easy. Everything was just the way I hoped it would be. Perfect home if you love the North End.

Polly is a great host. The house is very clean, quite and equipped with A/C and a big fan for hot summer days in Boston.  Delicious breakfast (I definetely recommend you to taste the home made muffins..!) and cofee.  Good place to stay in Boston, highly recommended.
The location is a plus, your in walking distance to most of the historic district sites.

Great location with immediate and easy access to buses and T lines. I was in town for a conference at the Boston Convention Center which was easily accessible by bus (10-15 mins) or on foot (about 25-30). The silver line to Logan is accessible from South Station which is only about an 8 min walk. The apartment was quiet and easy to access. There were some challenges with homeless people in and around the front entrance; I had to move one guy sleeping in front of the door. The vibe was not threatening at all because the area is so well trafficked but it did present a bit of a challenge coming and going from the apartment.

Exactly as described in the listing and better. Simple thoughtful touches like providing tide pods, sugar, toiletries really add so much value for short solo visits!
Great place to work from as well with a dedicated desk setup. My only minor hiccup was the hot water in the shower. Very slow to warm up and little pressure compared to cold water. But that's me being nit-picky.
The whole area was super safe and calm as well, and the Hosts are very proactive and helpful.
Great location, easy check in and clean!

The home is a classic brownstone.  Neighborhood is historic and a lot of fun to walk around.  Beautifully updated with modern appliances and comfort.  All the kitchen things you need, dishes, glasses, mugs, cooking ware and washer with disposal.  Granite counter tops with comfortable furniture for a meal, meeting or just kicking back.  The interior is Contempory and is beautiful.  I recommend that if you have trouble with stairs that you stay in the top level (street level) bedroom and have other guests stay in the lower level.  The stairs are completely safe and beautiful but slightly steep and narrow (really no big deal unless you would have a disability). The TV is a Roku TV and of course is limited to local and a few other stations  (I could be mistaken about that, so you should check with Phillip or Ann).   I used my Apple TV and I got everything I wanted to access.  Internet is fast and has it's own router in the upstairs street level.  Very close walking distance to some great restaurants (our favorite was Coppa's (a block away with the best Italian food I've ever had) and shopping, and with Uber you can get pretty much anywhere within 10-25 minutes.  Airport was only about 25 minutes away.  There are also two food delivery services that are excellent, Caviar and UberEats.  Also, there are reasonably priced grocery delivery services that we utilized.  You won't be disappointed in your stay with this classic home - Rick and Judy

The air bnb was a lot more spacious than the pictures. Very clean and the check-in was easy. We stayed over for my sister's bachelorette. It was very easy to get into Boston from there, either driving or via Uber. There was enough street parking for multiple cars and the neighborhood was nice and quiet. I would definitely stay here again. 10/10 in my opinion!

Anderson's place was quiet and close to the airport. After taking the shuttle from terminal B, the walk through the park was quick and quiet. The instructions on how to check in were clear and easy to follow.
very well organized, clean, and quaint.

The communication with Antonio is very nice. There is a special luggage locker outside the house. And it helped us a lot.
The only problem was that the private bathroom in the room was incomplete, just half-finished. Public space and public bathroom are good.

Lovely apartment, very cosy and well represented in pictures on website.
Location is good and apartment is well supplied with cooking utensils, towels etc.
Short walk to Roxbury crossing orange line T, also several buses that were easily accessible.

Misha's home was incredibly easy to find and access! not only did he communicate quickly via text, he also had notes throughout the home with useful info! I would definitely stay here again to experience Boston!

Very nice home with very nice beds..it was great for 5 of us that needed our own beds/room. Very nice quiet neighborhood . Downstairs basement was like a mini apartment...nice rug throughout  n big king bed with own bathroom and the entire second floor had nice rooms and a masterbed/bath as well..First floor had big kitchen  and living room as well as another water closet.
Plenty of extra foods and utensils. Great stay!
Elisangela was super accommodating and welcoming.  Location and community diversity were things we really valued in her place.

We couldn’t be happier with Daryl’s property. A group of us came to Boston for a weekend of concerts, sightseeing and restaurant/bar hopping. The location worked perfectly, a short drive or uber to downtown. Also, the building was pristine, modern and cozy at the same time. Huge TV’s, BEAUTIFUL kitchen, and plenty of useful space. We plan on using the same property in a couple months when we go back to Boston.
Also, I want to emphasize the level of attention and care Daryl had for me. I accidentally left my Tag Heuer watch in one of the bedrooms. I was an hour away on the Mass Pike before I noticed. I called him and explained my issue. He immediately dropped everything he was doing to go check if the watch was where I left it. He found the watch and offered to FedEx it to me right away in NY!! I was floored and I couldn’t believe how genuine and helpful Daryl was and I won’t ever be able to show my full gratitude for how he treated me. Thank you Daryl! You’ll always have my business!

Great place to stay! It's a very small studio room, no chair/desk, no tv service (you can sign into your own streaming services, but that's it). I wouldn't call it luxurious, but it's very clean and well-kept. If you just need a place to sleep and don't want to pay higher prices at a nearby hotel this is a great option.
Repeat customer here. I love the tower and I hope its available the next time I’m in town!
Great place! Really comfortable and quiet. No problem at all and very close to Harvard university. Easy to park.
Great value for the place.
I had a great stay at this studio. Everything was clean and the staff is very helpful. I definitely recommend this place and I would book it again!
Not a bad place, pretty small though. Also, not super close to things to do.

Adam's place is in a great neighborhood across from Fenway Park. There are a lot of restaurants and shops within walking distance, and even some cool spots in the same building. We enjoyed out time there and would stay again.

Stylish, clean rooms in a residence with multiple Airbnbs - a well-oiled operation - very close to the airport, but also not far from Boston proper.  Excellent communication.  My daughter really like the hammock in the common space :)
Had a great stay in Boston thanks to Reece and Karen
Awesome spot! Would stay again if in the area. Just steps to Quincy market, coffee shops, bars, etc. Clean and photos/ description match the listing. Great hosts too - made everything easy.
Super clean, stylish and safe home near Boston airport. Highly recommend!

Super Unterkunft, genau wie auf der Seite beschrieben.
Gut mit den öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln zu erreichen. Würden sofort wieder übernachten.
Nice stay. Pricey but well maintained

Me and my gf had a great time at this appartment. Katarzynas is very friendly and hospitable. The appartment is perfectly located (near the beach and public transport), cozy and clean.
Small thing: appartment is a bit noisy.
Great place near the airport. Has everything I needed for my stay

This place was just ok. Wasn’t the cleanest I’ve ever stayed. Also the planks on the floor were not glued down so it would move as I was walking. We had a leak from the bathroom ceiling and was told it was taken care of. We couldn’t have very many thing’s plugged in at once since it’s an old building Was close to restaurants. It’s ok if you don’t plan on staying long.

Great location, beautiful room, convenient shared bathroom. I didn’t see or use the kitchen or laundry, since I was just there for an overnight.  The check in was super easy, I just let myself in and found the room. I was there after a long day at work and came in late and left early, so I actually didn’t meet the hosts.

Mi lugar favorito cuando voy a Boston!
Súper limpio, cómodo, ambiente súper!
En fin todo lo que uno busca cuando está fuera de casa. Gracias Daryl !
Great place to stay for a week in Boston. Close to public transportation, free parking and kitchen set up was great.
Great location and very clean. The full Boston experience!
The room is beyond my expectation. Super clean and super nice view with all the things you need for your stay.
I loved the place it was so nice and peaceful I would definitely be coming back again this is my third time coming here

Great location, loved our stay at Lindsays Air BnB.
Everything you need in a 2 block walking distance; restaurants, bars, pharmacy, market, Starbucks.
Lindsays place is very clean, nice quite neighborhood, and short Uber ride in to all the attractions Boston has to offer

Kathe’s apartment was the perfect choice for our month stay in Boston.
It’s cozy and as it appears in the pictures, but more importantly you have Kathe, who was incredibly friendly and accommodating.
The location is ideal – in the quieter South End neighborhood a few minutes walk to the more bustling Back Bay. We walked to the Charles River, the Public Library, or up to the Common almost everyday. The train station is also a 5 min walk away if you want to go anywhere else in the city.
It’s mentioned in the description, but some things to consider – no in-unit laundry, so if you need to wash clothes it’ll be through a delivery service or taking it to a laundromat. Also it’s a small kitchen, but does have everything needed to cook meals.
I highly recommend this place.
We had a great time at this apartment! Everything was very clean and the hosts were great and responding to any and all questions. Would definitely recommend!

I was disappointed with the state of the room, tatty towels, poor quality linen on the bed, bad pillows, dirty carpet and floor.
Access was not easy up narrow steep stairs with a suitcase.

The Meditation Room is a beautiful oasis that is well cared for by the host and the cleaning staff. We were there to race in the Head of the Charles rowing regatta, the biggest rowing regatta in the world outside of the Olympics! Its close proximity to the river and finish line venue makes it an ideal location for future athletes. Everything about our stay went without a hitch *until* I lost our key.
I lost our key and I contacted the host same-day at 6pm both through the AirBnB communication system and directly by text message to notify him (I have saved transcripts and screenshots of both conversation portals). We were unable to lock our door and secure our belongings to safely leave the room located within a shared guest space. The host informed us of a hidden spare key for our door, however the key did not match this lock and it was not functional.
By 11:07pm, 5 hours after my first request for assistance, with the situation still not resolved and the host very slow to respond to all communications, the host insisted the hidden key was the correct key, and that "I can't get a new key to you at this hour." I sent him a video of the hidden key not working in our room door lock. I offered to come directly to him or to his house cleaners who live close by but did not receive any reply that evening, nor did I hear from him the next day by checkout. Complete communication blackout. What if we were actually locked out of the room?
By the time we were ready to check out the next day, we spoke with the cleaning crew who had dealt with a similar situation in the past and would have been happy to assist, however they were never notified. We were surprised about this entire poor communication experience, given the excellent reviews for Todd and the listing. Todd's cleaning crew is top notch, the location is both beautiful and walking distance to Harvard and the Charles River. Enjoy your stay, and we hope that communication is more efficient and helpful for you.... and don't lose your key.

The day before check-in the host let us know one of the beds was broken and offered an air mattress. We said we would take the air mattress but they did not provide it . Upon checking in we were VERY disappointed. First, the front door to the building did not shut at all and felt unsafe and the locks on the doors to the units did not seem secure. In addition, the condition of the units left much to be desired. The couches were ragged, the showers were grimy with rusty curtain rings, and some of the sheets were stained with many hairs on them (i.e., unwashed).
After the first night, we noticed that a second bed (the largest bed) was also broken and sloped downward, leading to an uncomfortable situation and there were no other beds at that point.
In all, everything felt cheap or appeared dirty. We asked for a refund and the host ignored our messages. Thanks to Airbnb for stepping in and providing a partial refund.

arrived to an unmade/uncleaned apartment from previous female "visitor" after male registered guest. discovered nasty filthy slept in /not fresh bedding left over from previous "stay" and gnarly bathroom situation with bath pubes and broken torn off toilet seat and black mold. scariest event was being trapped in bathroom after shower before building fire alarm going off because bathroom door knob would not release latch and trapped inside bathroom alone with no way out (in the event of a building fire) - terrifying to be trapped inside alone until spouce arrived & passed a credit card under doorway to shim latch within - if alone would have been trapped inside for .... days.
host (ess) refunded entire stay from the initial communication over arrival SO we will say she is excellent on that front and for that we thank her. word of advice to host would be: stretch your communication skills from NYC and pay a quarterly visit to your investment for conditions and FIX what's broken or dirty
Alles bestens

Nicely renovated apartment in the Fenway area, very clean, very responsive hosts. Some noise at night at times, heat is controlled centrally for the whole building so may need some adjustment to avoid overheating in winter months.

Our time with Sami was short but sweet. The accommodation was comfortable and in a great location and Sami was a very hospitable host. We arrived late but he was very understanding of the fact that we wanted to stay out for drinks in the local town. I would recommend  to anyone who wants to explore Boston.
Cozy place, Near subway and tourist spots! Worth to stay!

The room was great!
It was very clean.
They had an AC as well as all basic amenities like an ironing board, towels and kitchen cloths as well as basic coffee materials.
It is perfect if you're coming in for a conference or anything else in downtown Boston that requires an overnight stay.
Overall my stay was great.

Beautiful apartment! Perfect area to walk to most of the big attractions. Only giving it 4 stars because this apartment is on the 7th floor and we were notified shortly before the trip that the elevator was broken until May. Wish that would have been in the listing before booking the airbnb.

I can't say enough kind things about Shelly who is absolutely wonderful!  Thank you for being generous with your home. We definitely got the rest we needed and helped out a traveller in the mean time. Glad to help out! Take care, Kim and Keith
This apartment is a compact, upscale jumping-off point for enjoying the dining and historic offerings in Boston.
I find issue with lock door because it was turning on and off and the bathroom was not clean.

Lixia's place was clean, affordable, and had a convenient self check-in. The peaceful neighborhood felt safe, making it a great option for staying near Boston without the high prices. I’d definitely stay here again!
Nice clean place to stay and great location to the "T" [Massachusetts Bay Transportation Authority (MBTA)]. The host is very organized and responsive as well. Thumbs up recommendation.

Loved the location and the host was very responsive. The house keeper met me and was very nice and helpful. However, I wish I knew the bedroom was going to be cleaned in the middle of my two night stay. I didn’t know that and wasn’t aware someone will be in the room when I was gone. Nothing went missing of course and I was very glad to see it cleaned and the bed made but it was just unexpected, I wouldn’t have left my personal belongings there if I knew. Also I wish the bedding was comfier, more like a diver not a fuzzy blanket. Other than that it was good! Loved the communication. The only other thing, I checked out on time but asked if I can leave my car parked in the spot I paid for for a little longer while I’m just having breakfast. They said it was good to leave until 12:30 because other guest will need it. Check in is not until 3pm so I don’t know why anyone else would need it but I picked up the car at 12:50 cause it was a walk, and already got a message with the towing threat.
Great place. Certainly a 10/10. Would recommend! Close to everything and more.
The neighbourhood is very quiet and peace. The host is very warm, friendly and hospitable.
Great spot. Couldn't have a better location in Beacon Hill. Keypad entry and self check-in made everything smooth and easy. Place was super clean, quiet, and well equipped.

nice home and clean perfect thank you
I'm really recommended
Great location, responsive team, beautiful building, but there were long strands of hair  everywhere in the bed, on the floor, and in the bathroom.

Firlian is such a wonderful person. Very attentive and always available. Literally zero complaints. The neighborhood at first glance doesn’t seem to be the greatest. But I had no issues at all during my stay. Nor did I ever feel unsafe. The room mates I had there were incredible also. Made some friends for life. Such a nice environment.
William and Sophia’s apartment was super cute and clean and we felt really safe. The bed was also super comfortable.
Howard was great. Proactively reached out to ensure our stay was comfortable.

This location is a gem, especially if you need to go to Harvard business school. It’s in a beautiful quiet neighborhood, the house itself and living areas are well appointed and very comfortable. The host is extremely nice and easy to work with.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at your Boston loft. The location was perfect—convenient to explore the city either by subway or on foot. The loft was spacious, clean, and ideal for our family of four. We would absolutely love to stay again. Thank you!
とてもよかったです
Great room, as described, nice stay

We stayed here for three nights and it was wonderful -- clean and neat with a full kitchen and a great shower. The location was also ideal: on a quiet residential street but not too far from a commercial area; accessible by public transportation but also convenient with a car.

Overall, we highly recommend it and would definitely stay there again.

This Apartment is a lovely place to stay. The location is very central and not far from the train station or anything else you might need. I arranged for an early check in and it was certainly worth while. The space is larger than it appears in the photos and is certainly somewhere where I would consider staying again when I am in the city.

We had a wonderful stay while in Boston! The apartment was incredibly clean and they supplied us with everything we needed, from kitchen utensils, to toilet paper, to a pack and play for the baby! When you first walk in they are doing some remodeling on the first floor so it feels a bit…. liminal. But the apartment itself was very up to date, clean, and cozy. Thin walls though.

Perfect location. Love the place, pictures doesn't do justice.
I will recommend it to anyone.
Very nice
Sherwin’s place is clean and has all everything we need (toiletries, towel, hair dryer, washer and dryer etc) for the stay. And check in can’t be easier.

Great value. Super clean and everything was exactly as advertised! The biggest issue for me was that parking is extremely difficult in that area. At night several cars will just be driving in circles and fighting for spots. When I did find a spot it was usually far away. I’d recommend Ubering around or using public transportation because of how bad the parking is. But again, the BnB was very good and a great value!

This place was awesome, even better than the photos! It's an amazing location, just steps away from everything. The apartment was super clean and had everything we needed. Kaitlyn was very quick to respond via email and accessing the unit was super easy. Highly recommended.

Great stay in suburban Boston. We felt like we got the neighborhood vibe, but it was only a few minutes to the train station to head downtown.
Can you please let me know if you find ear buds in a black case? We think we left them there. Thanks!
