Overall, such a great experience! The location was perfect and Paul was extremely accommodating and helpful. He gave great advice on things to do and how to get around the city. The apartment itself was wonderful - just enough space, very clean, great amenities. Would definitely stay here again.
The living room is very nice. I found everything as in the description. I have no complaints.
Great experience in a great location!
Very nice stay. Excellent spot for a trip to Boston ! Jose is very welcoming and accommodating.
Amazing location, and great price for what you get!

To start with positives: The home is beautiful. It's very, very spacious and decorated in beautiful period pieces. It's in a good location, it has dedicated parking, and a spectacular view. It's a good price for the space.
The negatives: The condition of the home isn't *quite* as grand as presented. There are chunks of wall and ceiling that have fallen off. The fireplaces are barely attached to the wall. The showers are dingy and one was missing a large piece of tile. The kitchen was filthy, and that's not an exaggeration. It was so dirty we opted to not use it even after scrubbing the fridge, counters, and microwave. There were fruit flies throughout the house.
The thermostat is controlled remotely and we froze every night. We did contact the property management company, but the issue wasn't fully resolved. Part of our party had an infant and they ended up getting a hotel because the baby screamed all night from cold. We slept in coats and gloves. There were no extra blankets. We only had a sheet and a very thin duvet. We had to go out in the middle of the night on the first night and spend nearly $100 on blankets.
There was no shovel or salt provided, so when we received several inches of snow we had to knock on a neighbor's door to borrow a shovel. This is New England. Snow, ice, and cold temps are common, but the house was not at all equipped for it.
The management company was less responsive than we'd have liked when we contacted them.
All that said, it wasn't horrible. It truly is a beautiful home in a lovely neighborhood. The temperature in the living areas was fine and we were comfortable and able to hang out as a family and play games. I wouldn't say to NOT rent it, but I'd caution you to lower your expectations, and bring warm blankets if you stay in the winter. The view of the sunrise over the city every morning made up for a lot of the shortcomings.

Laura and Olivia were great hosts. This was my second time staying here. The apartment is spotless and equiped with everything you need. Check in was seamless. The apartment is in the perfect location!
Jurek’s place was pleasant, spacious and clean. He provided all the information needed to enter and navigate the house before my visit, and everything went smoothly. Thanks!
Great location,  mattress and linens were extremely comfortable.   Clean and  close to public transportation

Pauls huis is een uitstekende uitvalbasis voor een bezoek aan Boston. Je moet er geen probleem mee hebben dat een deel van de slaapkamers in de basement ligt. De woonkamer is prettiger dan op de foto's lijkt.
Great location as we were able to walk to most of our meetings.  Place was clean and had all the things we needed.
Alex's place is beautiful! The house was conveniently located with a lot of nice restaurants nearby.  Access to the house was easy.  Thanks!

Claire made booking and use of her place easy, especially for a first time AirBnB user like me. The location, right off a subway stop, and WALKING distance (we found walking back to the airport to be faster than the local transportation at the time of day we were departing) from the airport made this an ideal location. Claire was very responsive to communications, and offered local suggestions for places to eat. Having a code to the front door, and a key to our individual room, made coming and going convenient. The bed was very comfortable, with extra pillows which were nice to have. I appreciated having our own refrigerator in our room. Perhaps this is common for AirBnB use, but I would note that we were given a towel each at the beginning of our stay, and that was the only towel you will get. We stayed 4 nights, had a sticky beverage spill, and had to decide which of us would give up a towel to clean it up. I suggest requesting extra towels if you are staying multiple nights.
Great location, great communication.
Best Boston experience I could’ve asked for.

This place is amazing - would highly recommend. The neighborhood is quiet and peaceful, a short car ride to downtown (and I think public transport as well, although we didn’t use it). The accommodations were great, comfy bed, clean, everything you could have wanted! We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and would stay again in a heartbeat. True Boston charm.

Perfect location! Right next to train stop Sullivan Square. Friendly host quick to respond. Place was spacious 3 bedrooms super clean. Looks just like the pictures. I would definitely stay here again 👍

Terry's place was better than expected.  I have been in Airbnb's before that say there is enough amenities, only find things that are barely usable or broken.  Terry's place was filled with amenities with pretty much everything that you would have expected to need on a daily basis.   We spent six days in Boston.  We walked to T station near the apartment every day and walked  the whole  Boston downtown.  Uber drivers were available down near the T station but we didn't need to use them.  We also used the laundry which was convenient considering it was close to 90 degrees F each day of the week.  I would recommend Terry's place considering it is close to the Roxbury Crossing T station and how quiet it was at night.

Rachel and Richard were lovely hosts! They were communicative about any changes and really encouraged me to use their space like I would my home. House was clean and was kept clean throughout!  Everything was as described on the listing. Bonus: bed was super comfy!!
Todo muy bueno y muy limpio. El espacio era apropiado, la interacción con los otros huéspedes nunca fue molesta y todo acordé a lo prometido. 10/10
You wont regret staying at Jay's place. Clean, updated, and has a location for a good price. Jay was a pleasure to work with as well.
Loved the place. Easy to get to. Used spot hero for parking.
Our host was very gracious and welcoming, and the bed was extremely comfortable. it's a quiet neighborhood. Excellent location near Jamaica Plain.
El apartamento estaba perfecto. Buena ubicación, Timothy proporcionó todo tipo de facilidades para la estancia
I highly recommend this apartment. It’s very nice designed and equipped. We spent there a week and felt as in home. Thanks Katherine and Dan for your great hospitality.

The owners are very friendly. The room was spacious and very nice, much nicer than most hotel rooms and the area is beautiful. If you're looking for a place to stay in South Boston I highly recommend staying here.

We all had a great time at Kevin’s place! The space was very clean, with anything you would need out of town. It has been recently updated. The kitchen had everything to cook with as well!
The parking spot is definitely needed in that area.
It was about a 10 minute walk over to the Roadrunner, which wasn’t bad.
Great location in a lovely quiet Boston neighbourhood. Short walk to the T line and good access across the city.
Found it very clean and comfortable. 4 min walk to westley Copley.

Siamo in viaggio io e mio figlio di 10 anni che per la prima volta viene negli USA. Abbiamo trovato questo alloggio last minute e siamo stati molto fortunati perché era perfetto per noi! Molto carino ed accogliente, mi ha fatto sentire a casa. Il letto per me comodissimo!! Non ho mai dormito così bene
Great spot
everything is really good,  I wanna book it next time, but we didn't have enough time clean the mess when we were leaving.

Great location! Beautiful block, easy walking distance to so much of downtown Boston. Wonderful high ceilings, a very peaceful place to sleep, and the space feels very tranquil.  Great spot from which to begin exploring Boston!

I wish we could give this condo a better rating. It was extremely clean and comfortable. The location was convenient. It was well represented in the AirBnB listing. However, there was a couple of inches of standing brown water in the shower when we arrived. Unfortunately, we didn't realize it until later in the evening and understandably it was too late for our hosts to call a technician. Their suggestion was to try plunging it. We worked on it for a while and got the water to drain. But the minute you ran the shower again, dirtier brown water stopped back up. The frustrating part about it for us was that a guest had a similar experience the previous month. So this seems like a chronic condition that needed better attention. The hosts were fairly responsive and provided a partial credit, but we were really disappointed to have to take sponge baths before hopping on a ferry the next morning.
A couple of other notes...the unit doesn't seem overly well stocked (no complete set of glasses, etc). We ate dinner at a restaurant and grabbed breakfast on the road. So to be clear, it had everything we needed to stay the night. But I think we would be wanting more if we were planning to stay multiple nights and dine-in. And while the location is good, the building is located at the end of an alley. Coming home from dinner at dusk there were a couple of guys smoking pot just hanging out on the steps in front of the building that I had to kind of push my way through to get into the building. I noticed a previous guest also reported something similar.
I think overall, it is a nice unit. With a little extra attention (fixing the shower drain once and for all, replacing partial sets of glasses, etc) it would be a very nice place to stay.

Me and my partner absolutely loved our stay with Yan. We were in the area for a show at Roadrunner and it’s the most perfectly convenient location we could find, a nice walk from the venue with some good food options nearby (we recommend Article 24!). We would stay again.

Jessy and Diego were amazing hosts! They had very clear rules about how to treat their space and were very responsive and accommodating when it came to questions/requests. Would definitely recommend them as hosts!
Great location, wonderful stay
beautiful location, walkers paradise.
Perfectly clean, good location. I really liked my stay, I recommend you to experience it.

Es una muy buena ubicación, cercana a dos líneas de tren que facilitan la conexión en toda la ciudad.
El primer día sentimos un poco de frío y ofrecieron una estufa para complementar el aire acondicionado, con una rápida respuesta y siempre muy amables.
Definitivamente recomendable y me hospedaría nuevamente
Great Place! Enough space for our large group. Beautiful and great location. Fenway is right around the corner. Great coffee within a stones throw. Quiet neighborhood and friendly neighbors!
Excellent accomodation with a very helpful and friendly host!

Drew's place was in a great location for our time in Boston. The neighborhood was very walkable, felt safe, and very convenient to restaurants, coffee shops, and the airport shuttle bus stop was within walking distance.
I was so pleased with how clean the house was (and I am picky!), and how we felt right at home upon entering.
We really appreciated Drew's flexibility with our check-in.
If the weather had been a bit nicer we would have enjoyed the garden patio very much, even so, we appreciated the beauty of it and the shared outdoor space at the rear of the contiguous houses.
The beds and furniture were comfortable and we would love to stay here again! Highly recommend.
Lee’s place was excellent, making me feel right at home. I would recommend his place to anyone staying in Boston.
Clean and cosy

Fantastic location, everything is right outside the front door! Apartment was clean and check in was a breeze. Stayed there during a terrible rain storm and there are several leaks in the ceiling. It didn’t affect me but other reviewers have mentioned this so clearly management is aware and hasn’t addressed the issue. Could use some shelves in the bathroom as it’s a very small space and no place to put toiletries or makeup. But overall comfortable and very quiet stay.
Very warm and cozy. Quiet and peaceful.
Great location. Walking distance from public transit, restaurants, and shopping.
Nice room for the price paid! Clean & neat room 🙌
Its a decent spot where you can find many restaurants and shops with a short drive. Parking was also relatively easy to navigate through.
Very clean. Charming building. Jonathan is a very good at making you feel welcome and communicating well.

Marie was a wonderful host. She met us and showed us around the apartment and gave us some suggestions on what to see in the area. The space was clean and well equipped for our family of 3. The space is located in a beautiful safe neighborhood close to all the sights of Boston.
We had a wonderful night in this place, everything was clean and comfortable.

Enjoyed our stay! Easy check-in and host was very responsive. Looked exactly as described in the pictures. Comfortable beds. Right in the center of Boston and walked to everything. Took a whale tour next to the aquarium, worth it! Rented a car near by and had a day trip in Salem which was a quick and easy drive. Would definitely recommend!
We loved our stay with Boris and Susan!
perfect location to stay in Boston !

This is a great place to stay for a visit to JP and surrounding area. A short walk to the T and to cute cafes and markets. The apartment offered everything we needed during our visit. We will stay here again and recommend to others.
Great location! Very walkable surroundings. Bed is very comfortable also!

What a lovely relaxing stay. It’s nicer than the pictures. The bed is very comfy, shower/bath good, kitchen small but we were able to cook every evening, sofa lovely for lying on to read books … plus, very close to the 39 bus that takes you past museums and into Back Bay and the nearby orange route on the T Line (metro/tube) is great for getting everywhere easily. Arnold Arboretum is just down the road (go, it’s really quite wonderful)  and Jamaica Plain itself has lovely shops (including a very very good book shop), excellent icecream shop, good bakery, two good supermarkets, nice restaurants.  Thank you Roy and Susan for making our break in Boston such a comfortable, relaxing stay.

Great little spot near the heart of Boston. I had to book an AirBnB last minute and Sienna had it cleaned in prepared in just a few hours. Check in was super easy and I would definitely re-book again!

We enjoyed the location - it was quiet, and walkable to Fenway Park, several museums, and restaurants.   The beds were very comfortable, and we appreciated the welcome snacks and coffee.  Host was extremely helpful, always responding quickly to our questions and requests (even after business hours).  Thank you for a wonderful stay!
Exactly as promised! Within good driving distance for everything.

Maja’s place has become my home away from home when I am in Boston. I brought a colleague this year and we were both able to settle in, relax, get work done as needed, and enjoy the weeklong conference with ease having such a handy, well organized homebase at Maja’s. We are already looking forward to next year!
Great stay. Enjoyed our quick Boston trip and would definitely return
Everything you need for a visit to explore central Boston. Fantastic location with all the major attractions within walking distance from Fenway Park in the east to Beacon Hill in the west.
Super easy and accommodating. Walking distance to the ballpark and many different restaurants quiet neighborhood great for a solo traveler.
Crazy rad value. Right downtown by the park. Plenty of sleeping space for multiple people. Very clean!
David was super responsive. Location was perfect and walkable. Perfect for a couple day stay.
Such a well furnished and thoughtful space! Will definitely be booking here in the future

Fantastic location, beautifully presented, quiet but literally a 5 minute walk to Fenway and easy to get elsewhere in the city. Super friendly housekeeper who was a pleasure, helpful and kept the place beautifully. Great baseball memorabilia in the place too.

The apartment was a lovely, tidy space and the location was excellent. Trisha also provided helpful things for our 6 month old such as a travel cot and toys for her to play with. The apartment was walking distance to everything in the city center. Trisha was a fantastic host with great communication throughout our stay. Would strongly recommend her place to anyone considering a visit to Boston

Great hosts! Brian was always very responsive on the airbnb chat. Minor issue for the first few days with the WiFi - this was not the hosts fault and they were very apologetic and responsive. Only downside is thag there was no cleaning equipment (vacuum/mop) so can get a little dusty if you have a longer stay.

Great location
Not soundproof at all (can easily hear the others in the building)
Bathroom couldve been cleaner

We really enjoyed and appreciated Tan's hospitality. The home matched the description. There was a musty smell throughout the home upon arriving. The smell lessened once we opened some windows to air it out. There were many high tech features like the toilets & karaoke system, but they were run down or broken. Our group of 4 women planned to walk the area for dinners and use the nearby T station to travel outside of the neighborhood. The first night we saw families trick or treating, so tried walking to dinner but saw a few things on the street that prompted us to stop & order a Lyft. Next day, we walked to the T and got multiple catcalls and had 1 person intentionally bump into us on the sidewalk so we opted to order a Lyft everywhere for the rest of the trip. We don't live in a pristine area of town back home & are no strangers to a rougher city atmosphere but we didn't feel as safe walking the area as we had hoped. If you don't plan to walk/use the T, it's fine.

We wish we stayed longer! A short night in Boston led us to booking with Riyo. Her place was perfect and stocked with everything you may need. Comfy bed, easy access to the T and an easy drive to the airport. We will stay here when we come back to Boston!

Kristina and Chris's apartment is absolutely welcoming. Little details count, and Chris and Kristina seem to keep many in mind when it comes to providing for every comfort for their guests. The apartment is perfectly equipped for a short or medium-term stay and is pretty close to the train. The street is quiet, which is good for light sleepers, and the apartment kept very warm in the winter.
Very close to the underground into Boston. A clean apartment with a lovely little garden to sit in.

This is a wonderful place - clean, well appointed, close to good pubic transportation and in lovely Jamaica Plain. Lori is an excellent host, responsive, flexible and truly hospitable. I would recommend her place for both leisure and business travel. Just an excellent value for the money and one of the nicest Airbnb places I've visited. Brava, Lori, brava!

Very pretty and peaceful location, seemed upmarket and some good bars and breakfast places  nearby. Also a handy 7/11 a couple of minutes away. The locals seemed nice chilled people. We felt very at home here.

Giannoula for is an awesome host! She personally welcomed me and my family to her lovely home on our arrival. She answered our queries, gave tips on how to go around, and where to go for food and groceries.
We loved staying in her home. It was home away from home. The amenities were much more than what we expected. Complimentary soap, shampoo, lotion, etc. Being able to use the kitchen to go prepare breakfast was a blessing. Very clean! Great location! We were close to everywhere we needed to go and yet the place is quiet and private. It was a 4-5 minute walk to Boston Conservatory where my daughter had an audition. Would love to go back and book again. Highly recommended!
Great experience.  Kind and affable hosts. Wonderful location. I have only good things to say.  We left some cloths and they mailed them to us. Very helpful.
We had a wonderful stay. Leslie's place was as described and beautiful. The neighborhood was so quaint and walking distance to a lot. She was very responsive and helpful. We can't wait to go back.
Nice place, good location
Recomendado 100%
Wonderful home and responsive host.
Great location with free off street parking, can’t be beat! Very comfortable and the hosts are responsive and helpful.

The space is small, and I don’t recommend it for long stays (I was there 6 weeks) as they don’t have an included linen and cleaning service.
It’s in a great location and the maverick team is very responsive to anything.

Good stay as close to my daughter’s apt so it was convenient. Safe and peaceful. The apt was ready before 4pm for us to check in so great. A bit issue with the bathroom but it was sorted out. Wood Floor was squeaky but expected for an old building. In general it’s worth the value.

This was my second time staying at this unit and it was wonderful both times! The place was clean, comfortable, and in a super walkable and fun location. It was great as a solo female traveler as well. Thatch is easy to reach over text or phone call too and helped me with check in. Highly recommend!
Great stay, easy to get to all the attractions and a pleasant place to be at.

Such a lovely suite in the great area of Jamaica Plain.  I made this reservation at the very last minute, and unfortunately, Jil was out of town for most of my stay, but she did everything from afar to ensure that my visit was complete and comfortable.  The house is fantastic and the suite was spacious, clean and very accommodating. The location is fantastic and within walking distance to shops and restaurants.  A very cozy rental and I will be back each time I visit Boston.  Great value!!!
Great staybthanks
Great neighborhood, super hostess, comfy place.
It was nice and clean:) I felt comfortable
Quick overnight stay for us but had everything we needed and would definitely stay here again if visiting the area!
Great location!  It was a perfect spot to explore Boston from.

Centrally located. Just few minutes walk to public transportation and pubs. Visitor parking in the street. This property is quite spacious, clean and eclectic. I enjoyed my stay and TJ is a great host!

Our client had a wonderful stay at Ellie House. It was convenient to everything in Back Bay and to the T, and was also easy for ride-share pickups. Lots of great food choices and activities nearby. The accommodations were as described, instructions were very clear, and communication with the hosts was impressive.
We would definitely have other clients stay here in the future for extended visits.

Glenn and Oliver’s stay is sweet and cozy. Me and my partner miss everything from their place. The breakfast yogurts they provided, comforting location. Most importantly, they are kind and loving. Recommended us their favourite places to eat. Can’t wait to visit next time.

When I first read the reviews before my trip  I was not sure of what to expect. This is a good place to stay and comfortable for whatever purposes of the trip. The rooms are as exactly described and the host communication response is impressive, quick and positive. I really enjoyed my time there and will give this a 5-star rating. The shared bathroom is clean, unless you are really fusssy you'll barely notice you are sharing it. Definitely thumbs up and good value for money.

I stayed at Melinda’s place with my mom and my two teenage daughters. There was more than enough room for all of us. The home was exactly as pictured on the listing. We were able to easily walk to the subway and enjoyed the location on a quiet dead end street.
Great place. Host keeps you safe.
Nick is an excellent host. The neighborhood is very quiet, and walkable to a couple of transit options.
We loved the apartment! It was a great location! Communication was great! We would definitely stay with Loic again!!

Treetop Haven was perfect for our stay in Boston. It's about 15 minute trip from downtown / touristy / historical area to the house via subway, but it was perfect and a great price.

The neighborhood is super cool and authentic feeling, with a nice little market where the locals go in the morning to get coffee. And there are a few restaurants up the street. It's not where you'd go to party from another area in the city, but totally an awesome jumping off point for a Boston adventure.

Maria was great. Met us when we arrived, gave us lots of info, and then we were off to adventure. If we needed anything, here and her roomates were there to help. But otherwise, we had the entire studio apartment at the top of the house to ourselves.

HIGHLY RECOMMENDED

Brian and Heather have a wonderful place. Very clean and stylish and I would definitely recommend anyone to stay here. Right in the heart of downtown Boston so everything is at your fingertips.  Check in was easy and painless. Only recommendation I have for future guests is parking is pretty hard to find so research that beforehand. There are a few lots fairly close by.
Good, good again.
Thanks again for another great stay!

Best stay I have ever had!! The room is very beautiful and had lots of thoughtful touches. Lori is an amazing host, I wish there was a possibility to tip hosts for making stay comfortable. She was very helpful with providing useful suggestions, as I was new to Boston.

Came to Boston with friends for a concert in back Bay Area. The airbnb was exactly as pictured! Everything was clean and it was a quiet and safe neighborhood. There was free parking out front if you have a car. It is not far at all to downtown area. We had a car but also took an Uber to the concert and it was about a 13 minute ride. Communication with host was quick and responsive. Check in was with clear instructions. Walking into the airbnb, it smelled amazing and the bed was so comfy!! Would stay here again!
You probably won't find a place better than this for the price. It has all the necessities, and Alexa to play all the musics.
Très bel appartement à Boston. Près de tout, propre et confortable. Je recommande!

Everything about my experience was great.  The location is fantastic -- steps from great restaurants, coffee shops, grocery stores, pharmacies, and yoga studios (if that's your thing).  You can easily commute to anywhere via public transit --  Back Bay T stop (orange line) is only about 7 minutes away by walking and the Copley T stop (green line) is only a few minutes further and there is even a useful bus stop on this block.  The host, Laura, was fantastic.  She welcomed me into the place, helped with luggage and always made sure my stay was enjoyable (over a span of several months!).  The apartment itself has everything you need -- good heating and A/C, a good and efficient kitchen, a very nice bathroom, and the design and layout are great too.  There really isn't anything not to like about the place unless you need a lot of space.  I would HIGHLY recommend you stay here -- you will not regret it.

We cannot say enough about this beautiful loft. Squeaky clean and even nicer than the pictures, which is really saying something. Bright, clean and uncluttered as described in the listing. Really quite roomy with a living area and a 6 seat dining room set so plenty of room! Big windows bring in lots of light. The king sized bed is super comfy and the bathroom clean and roomy. Pause a washer and dryer! Absolutely great.
The location is ideal for anyone looking to do all sorts of things in Boston. Walkable to lots of main attractions and the Orange and Green lines are literally right there. So the use of the T is simple. Grocery store directly across the street.
The best thing of all is the communication with the hosts. Lightening fast responses. So helpful with luggage drop and check in. I cannot say enough. They always responded quickly and with complete answers.
Do not hesitate to stay here. The loft, location and hosts are top notch! Thanks for a great stay!

Very kid friendly place to stay! They had a full closet of toys, a playground, booster seats, kid dishes, etc. Separate from that, the place was just really nice.
it's not a very central location, so there's not much to do or eat right around the airbnb. So plan ahead accordingly. Otherwise the place exceeded expectations.

My friends and I stayed here for a girls weekend and we loved it!!! It was exactly what it looked like and Pamela was very responsive whenever we had any questions. It’s 20-25 minutes from almost everywhere in Boston. The house was very clean and the beds were all very comfy. We would all 100% recommend this place if you’re looking for a place to stay near Boston!!!

Ken's apartment is simply wonderful.  It's located on a great street in Jamaica Plain and is very accessible to downtown Boston.  The apartment was also extremely clean, stylish, and much larger than expected.  Ken was very friendly and easy to communicate with pre and post arrival.  We will definitely be back!

On a été bien accueilli par Nancy et son mari. Il nous a un peu aidé à parler en français! une grande maison propre et agréable pas trop loin du centre ville de Boston! on a pu garer notre voiture gratuitement en face de leur maison! Ils nous ont fait découvrir quelques petits plats chinois! Dans l'ensemble nous avons passé une bonne semaine!
It was well received by Nancy and her husband. He helped us a bit to speak French! a large house clean and nice not too far from downtown Boston! we could park our car for free in front of their house! They made us discover some small Chinese dishes! Overall we had a good week!

We enjoyed our stay for 4th of July! Downtown Boston is pretty walkable and this apartment is in the middle of the city. The home was larger and laid out better for our needs than I imagined. The street was noisy on the weekend and 4th of July holiday. You do have to walk up to the top but the codes are easy to use. I would recommend this home to others especially if you want to walk to see all of Downtown Boston.
Cozy, clean and comfortable - and in a nice setting in JP!
Great place to stay in Boston! It was small but cozy and clean. Great location and easy to get around. Would stay again!

we had a great time at Sandy's place, very clean. The Ugg towels were great.
Sandy was great and recommended lots of places to eat and places to visit.
Sandy fixed an issue we had with the smoke detector quickly.
Great place to stay.

Overall great place to stay, and Donald is a great man. Only a couple little things were left behind and the virtual lock system could be changed to a code system for easier access! But besides that it was great

I would highly recommend staying at Joseph’s place. A great host who made us feel right at home. Joseph was flexible with checkout times when we had a later flight home, and he checked in to make sure we had what we needed. Easy to get in and out of the city and very walkable to the Train station. A great stay! Thank you, Joseph!

Great location. Hosts were helpful with leaving bags before and after. Some street noise one night, but on the other nights we had the fan running and didn’t notice it. It was a good spot to be a home base for us as we visited friends who live near the orange line.

Our Boston stay was fabulous! The space was as advertised and very clean. Daryl was proactive in ensuring all was well. Our highlight was the bedding - pillows were amazing and beds were super comfy! Also, amenities were great. Will consider staying at again if back in Boston.

L'appartement est spacieux et confortable. Malheureusement il y a un immeuble en construction juste à côté et certaines opérations se déroulent la nuit et tôt le matin.
Donc notre sommeil a été perturbé.
Place was a great fit for what we were looking for and everything came together very well
Awesome spot with easy access to everything!
The host was very responsive and the home was cozy and cute.
Achei incrível, são super atenciosos e o check in pode ser feito tranquilamente sem sozinho. Super recomento e irei voltar com certeza :)
It's great place me and my girlfriend enjoyed. Close to Boston Chinatown and can get everything you need by walking. Nice place to stay in if you visiting Boston.
It was great! All the basics you could possibly need plus some munchies and drinks in the fridge ! Bed was very comfy. Very stylish and cute space.
well appointed
Super easy to get into and great location!
Great location and a comfortable apartment.
Very well located right off the green line. Might be a bit tight for a couple, but for just me it did the job for a few nights.
Great place to stay to walk to Fenway park! Lots of restaurants around and beautiful park! Highly recommend!

the location is perfect! short walk & great place. However the airbnb was not as clean as i would of liked. The floors were very dirty i wore white socks for a couple hours and they were black when i took them off. Made me question how clean the rest of the place was. Also the water in the shower was not draining properly and it was just backing up in the shower. Overall not a bad stay just questioning how clean it was
Good location and place
Un hotel muy agradable, tiene lugares para comer cerca

This place is cheap but that’s all it has going for it. It’s not tidy and I understand there are other guests but there should be weekly cleaning of bathroom and kitchen but there is none. I was there in august for a few months and the same shower curtain is in there in April. That’s disgusting. They are also inaccurate about the listing. When I came in the fall, I was told there was a 5 day gap between guests due to Covid. That was not true. They had guests in the next day. They also told me people come to clean the common areas biweekly. That never happened. I don’t the bathroom and kitchen should be my responsibility. Also the kitchen does not have the necessary equipment. There are only 1 or two forks. No baking pans. 1 spatula. So you can see once it’s dirty you’re stuck with nothing. They don’t restock toilet paper, paper towels, soap etc. Any normal Airbnb item. There’s no locks on the doors. Be comfortable with pets. Both of the times I’ve been here they have had pets. I don’t especially like pets but it was tolerable. The dogs barked quite a bit and woke me from my sleep several times. The heating/cooling system is haphazard. You can’t adjust it for your room and it’s not on consistently. You can’t feel it apparently unless the bathroom door and your room door is open. There’s pets and strangers walking through so you could understand why I wanted my door closed. They also stated they added a washer and dryer. When I came in only the washing machine was there and after the dryer came it wasn’t working for awhile. Don’t expect anything in a timely manner. Communication is very slow and after a light bulb went out in my room I was told it couldn’t get fixed until next week. Mind you I was leaving that week. No attempts to fix my concern in a timely manner. I waited to make my review after my second experience here and it was only marginally better. Unless you have no other options or zero expectations, I recommend you do not book. I had no option due to the dates I wanted to book.
Great place to stay. Clean, very nice home, and great hospitality.

This was an excellent home base during our 5-day stay in Boston. It’s convenient to 2 different T stops, in walking distance of Fenway and lots of great restaurants.
The apartment is charming, decently spacious and provided all the basics we needed including a small fridge, microwave and coffee maker. I really appreciated the large closet and plenty of hangers in the bedroom. We weren’t sure what to expect in a Boston summer but the 2 window AC units kept us comfortable in the July heat.
It’s an interesting location, set next to a park/walking path area, so while you do hear a little pedestrian activity, it’s great to relax in the breakfast nook while watching the world pass by. You will see countless adorable dogs being walked in the area!
The host was super responsive to our questions, and we found the list of recommendations to be very helpful.
Overall this was a great stay, and I’d definitely recommend it!
The location is great - walking distance to almost everything! Richard was so responsive and helpful!

Andre's place is fantastic. The space is clean, spacious, and is equipped with plenty of toiletries and amenities for you and your guests' use. The location is secluded enough to be quiet and close enough the town center so food and eateries are in abundance just a moderate walk away. The best thing is Andre, who is incredibly attentive, and responds to all your messages and inquiries quickly. If you have any questions, issues, or concerns while you're there, he's got your back!

le chauffage était en continu, impossible à  réduire. Quelqu'un est venu, mais a précisé ne pouvoir rien faire. On donc eu très chaud avec 10 degrés Celsius dehors. L'appartement est bien, la literie est bonne,  et hormis le bruit (boules quies obligatoires) c'est pas mal. si on règle le problème du chauffage, je mets 4
Perfect location. Nice & clean. Host responds quickly. Comfy beds. Kitchen could use some more cooking utensils/pots/pans etc though. Would definitely stay here again. Thank you!
Great stay!
Good place for a single short-term stay.
Great place and great hosts!

The place is cozy and Alan is very responsive. Cleanliness could’ve been improved. There were also no sheets or pillows for the “sofa bed” which is a very tiny mat that folds out of the couch. Unfortunately during my stay I had no hot water for the last two days which was a large inconveneince. Overall the place was fine for 2 people for a short trip, mostly because we were hardly there. I definitely wouldn’t try to fit more than 2 people or stay for a longer duration.
Beautiful place, very comfortable!

We loved our stay here! We wish we could’ve stayed longer. The location is central to everything, literally almost next to a subway station and one block from Boston Commons. The place was very clean, bright, with lots of open space, so much better than our cramped hotel room now. The washer and dryer were so helpful since we are traveling with kids. We will be back!

Perfect location for our Harvard activities. place was exactly as described. The other guests were barely seen and all shared the common spaces and kept them clean.
There was a small issue when we checked in. Todd responded to our messages quickly and went above and beyond to fix it. He is exactly the type of host you want to have.
Highly recommend to anyone.

We enjoyed this cute studio that had space to cook and sleep two. The location is superb very close to the Boston Symphony, New England Conservatory and Northeastern. It was easy to find and access. There are cafes, restaurants and groceries nearby. Nice, safe area to walk around.
Nice location and very clean. Everything went well!

Loved the place! Nice host. Third floor was a great apartment but harder for the older folk. Loved the feel of the space. We instantly felt at home.
Amenities were modern and spotless amid this charming house. Kitchen, bathroom, dishwasher, washer and dryer all in mint condition.
Thanks for having us!
The place was nice and clean. i loved the huge kitchen.
Great little studio in a nice location. Saw some other reviews mention kitchen stuff, it is well stocked with spices and there is also an electric stovetop that was very nice to have.
Was very nice and in a great location
Clean, quiet, and relaxing. Just what we were looking for!

The pros:
Good location, close to the T, restaurants, and other points of interest. Clean, very comfortable bed, amenities as described.
Cons:
No place to sit besides the bed. The high top chairs are extremely uncomfortable and that setup is really not good for a "designated work area."
We were also given the wrong code for the door and the host was not answering the phone for about 1/2 hour while we were trying to reach them.
Great place in a great location! Apartment was clean and the perfect place for a stay. Would definitely return!
Good Appartement have all what you need. Safe Neighborhood. Quiet Place.
The apartment was exactly as advertised. The parking just around the corner was very convenient. The Subway was not to far and got us around Boston easily.
Great location, very clean, easy check in, nice bed and bathroom. Expect some city noise.
Brunir was a great host and gave extremely quick responses! The house was clean and delivered everything it promised.
keen on everything overall
We had a great stay at this place. We appreciated having a separate bedroom and living room. The location is great, with easy public transit.
The place was really fun. I had fun staying at your place. Thank you for hosting us.

Fantastic place to stay in downtown Boston!
The unit is right in the heart of the city and is very close to great restaurants, bars, breweries, the harbour, and the subway to reach anywhere you want to see. Very clean, spacious, perfect for a long weekend or an extended stay. The kitchen has everything you need if you’d prefer to stay in and cook. Getting in and out was easy, two door codes and no need for keys or cards. We felt very safe and loved how we could walk anywhere we liked in 10 minutes like Little Italy or the Aquarium. The building also supports a great cause so you’ll be helping to give people coming to the city a place to stay while their family members are receiving medical care.
I highly recommend this spot!

With visiting Boston for only 5 days and for the first time, location was key for us. The apartment was superb in terms of location. Walking distance to Boston Common, TD Garden, North End, shops etc. We even didn’t mind what was only a couple of miles walk to Fenway Park. The apartment is also on a really nice little side street.
Communication from start to end was also excellent. Ensuring check in went ok, thorough instructions etc.
The apartment was clean and as described, albeit a little smaller than perhaps anticipated. But when using it solely as a base to explore Boston, it was perfect. The only observation would be that sometimes, neighbours could be a little loud & the walls didn’t seem too thick... This however, is no reflection on the host but must be noted.
Thanks for the great stay & we would not hesitate to stay with you again.

Nette und hilfreiche Menschen - freundliche Hausherren - saubere Zimmer
Lage zu den Verkehrsmitteln gut
Wir haben uns ausgesprochen wohl gefuehlt
Great location, easy to access, plenty of room. Would definitely recommend Adam’s apartment!
Location was easy to find and the room was pristine on arrival. Host was very accommodating, including snacks and water in the room. Awesome stay!
Lovely place, very clean and spacious and a great location. Host was very helpful, responsive and transparent. Thanks for the stay
Very good！
Beautiful place to stay for a nice weekend getaway. Highly recommended

The house is gorgeous and the amount of detail that you put into it made our stay over the top! The phone chargers throughout the house was genius!
Pam was an amazing host who was very flexible with our check in and check out times due to travel. Pam was very responsive and always made sure we felt welcome!

Private and quiet apartment in beautiful, historic Beacon Hill. Walkable to T, Boston Common, restaurants and the Esplanade. The space was amazing for the price. I loved the front room window seat, hidden by the trees. Bed was super cozy. The air conditioners worked great as it was very humid while we visited. This was one of our favorite airbnb's!!
Lihua's place is very comfortable. I plan to use her place anytime I visit Boston.
Loved the place!
Easy and clean Airbnb, hosts were very communicative. It is about a 15 walk to the nearest T station.
Great communication - very nice and clean and smooth check in process!
Everything was great!

Comfortable small apartment right in the heart of Back Bay. There were a few quirks (like the thermostat controls being so high on the wall you need to use a stool), but these didn't overshadow the lovely vibe of the place. The breakfast area had a perfect view of a Back Bay square filtered through trees, the exposed brick walls were great, and the bed was comfortable. Would definitely recommend if you're looking for a short stay in this part of Boston.

We had a wonderful stay! It was beautiful, cozy and clean. The entire area is beautiful with easy walking to restaurants and a very cute coffee shop. We used the ferry to get to the seaport area which only took us about 3 minutes to walk there. Francesco was so kind, easy to communicate with and responsive. He truly went above and beyond to help us out with early luggage drop off, and a couple other things that came up. This is by far one of my favourite airbnb’s, with an amazing host!

Quiet neighborhood, but within walking distance of the T (green line), coffee shops, restaurants and retail stores.
Apartment was very clean with new kitchen appliances and the sofa bed was comfortable.
Close to the museums and park.

I spent a whole month at this wonderful, private, garden apartment in Boston's vibrant South end. The very clean and well -appointed apartment was generously supplied with paper towels, toilet paper, soaps, cleaning supplies and even a lovely tray of snacks. And a nice bottle of wine in the fridge. All indicative of the welcoming and helpful hosts -- Stephanie and Alex -- who made my stay so comfortable and secure. Although I loved knowing that they were just upstairs, they respected my privacy at every point of my stay.
I especially liked the private entrance and the fact that it was secure with two locked gates. I am a single older woman and I felt very safe in this apartment. The space is perfect for one person but two people could manage quite nicely too. I highly recommend this apartment!

Such a nice place! Plenty of room for 8 people with a spacious kitchen, nice bedrooms and great sized family room. The whole place was clean, cozy, and well taken care of. The surrounding town was nice too - we took a few trips to the shopping center around the corner and even walked to the Blarney Stone for dinner. Very convenient! And going into center city was an easy Uber ride. Very happy with our decision to stay here! 10/10

房间很干净。地理位置对我们很合适，周围环境好（基本属于在BU校园里面）。学生假期期间非常安静，每天早晨出去散步很舒服，离查尔斯河畔很近。厨房用具非常齐全，各种器具都在良好的工作状态。业主的反应也很快，总的来说体验不错。
不太好的地方是下午5点才可以入住，如果要早2小时还要单独收费，另外房间是半地下室，感觉通风稍有不好，有通风的机器，但是比较吵，只能在外出时开。当然这些在网页介绍中仔细看都会发现，只是我们订房时没有注意到，因此入住时小有落差。。。
Norah’s place is very nice and was clean. Check in was smooth and she was very accommodating to us in dropping our bags early. Would stay again!

We had an enjoyable stay here in a clean, two-bedroom loft apartment in a peaceful, family-oriented neighborhood in the Chestnut Hill area of Boston.
Bedrooms included window air conditioning units, which really helped cool these rooms on the third floor level, during this very hot summer.
This apartment is very close to bus stops for a bus line to Harvard. And there was a short walk to two MBTA train stops. There also were several restaurants within a short walk from the apartment.
Shira's communications, for check in, requests during our stay, and check out, were instructive and helpful. We had no problems at all and would consider staying here again if we revisited Boston.
This is a great place in South End that you can easily walk to anywhere in Boston from. You are a 5 minute walk to tons of great restaurants in South end as well. Glenn is a great host.

I must mention that our hostess, Amy, was the most responsive person I've ever interacted with on AIRBNB. Whether it was check-in instructions, questions about luggage logistics, or other questions, she responded within minutes! I mean, it was like she never slept and was always available to answer or tend to anything!!
The place we stayed in was closely located to public transit and extremely walkable for our purposes. Being able to start the freedom trail within a 5 minute walk was crucial to us. Additionally, having a shared space and seperate rooms was important and this place provides exactly that.
We would happily recommend this place to anyone wanting to stay in Boston and do a day dedicated to the freedom trail and places easily accessible by transit!
Great place. A little noisy in the evening (busy/fun part of Boston). The noise wasn’t too bad though. I stayed for two nights on a business trip. I’d definitely rebook this.

I had a great stay here. The unit was beautiful and exactly like the photos. Great for longer stays. The included amenities were a plus. The neighborhood was quiet and felt very safe.
Hosts were great and very quick to respond to any questions or needs.
Only thing i had an issue with was the address listed was a little off/confusing but was easy to figure out.
Highly recommend and would stay again!
This place is So cool and heather and Brian were so helpful! 10/10 would stay again.

Lovely stay in Roxbury for a family gathering of my adult children home on holiday. Spacious and private as we occupied top two floors. Easy curbside loading and unloading with convenient parking right around the corner.
Warm welcome including optimal light, soft music and lively colors in a comfortably artistic and eclectic space.
The towels and linens were especially inviting, the kitchen was well-equipped with plenty of refrigerator/freezer space for groceries. Each bedroom offered a seating area, a TV and queen or king bed. This is a perfect unit for adults to enjoy time together for dining, games or movies and also to allow each guest a private evening retreat to his or her own space.
Terry is thoughtful, attentive and genuinely kind!

Sharde and Jen were dream hosts! Their spot is a hidden gem in Boston with super cozy decor and modern amenities. The house is also a walkable distance to tasty restaurants and cute cafes you'll love (try Evergreen for food and Ula for coffee!). I've also never had such attentive hosts that responded almost immediately and did personalized touches for our stay the whole way through. If you're in Boston and looking for a gorgeous spot for the right price, this is the one!

Perfect for our purpose, which was a visit to see our kid who lives in Allston. Clear instructions, clean and cheerful space, very comfortable bed, good a/c which mattered bc we were on the 3rd floor.
The apartment was clean, especially the floors which are lovely. The kitchen and bathroom have older fixtures and cabinets, but that’s just cosmetic. Well-stocked though not high end. I mention all of this only to say, the space is charming and comfortable, but not fancy, so you’re paying for location, the parking, and the option to bring a pet. If those things fit your needs, this is a perfect option.
A note on the location: also not fancy, but perfectly safe and very convenient to many things if you’re planning to be in Allston. About a 10 minute walk to the green line and closer to various bus stops.
This apartment is on a 3rd floor which we loved but it’s a lot of stairs so keep that in mind if it could be an issue for you.
We had a great trip!

Had a great stay in Boston at Marko's place. Great location, comfortable place, had everything we needed. Hosts were super responsive, easy to reach out to, and always willing to help us have a great stay.

Muy confortable el alojamiento para grupos grandes. Tiene: paradas del camion cercanas, tiendas de servicios a unas cuadras, y si te gustan las actividades al aire libre; un parque grande y una deportiva muy cerca.
Solo algo retirado del centro de la ciudad, aproximadamente 45 min en transporte público.

This was a great space, Riyo is a great host with lots of nice little touches in the room and great hospitality.  The location is great - very close to subway (3 minute walk) - so it was easy and inexpensive to get downtown.
good
What a great quirky place to stay.  Lovely neighbourhood close to our family who we were visiting.  Easily walkable and felt very safe.  If we visit again we’ll be booking to stay if possible
Great location!!  Didn’t expect the late night/early morning noise from neighbors and alley but there were earplugs left on the nightstand.
We enjoyed our stay.  The house is nice & clean!!!

Richard was incredibly accomodating and allowed us to check in VERY early which is so appreciated after a long journey!  The accommodation was clean and central, and perfectly sufficient for our short stay in Boston!
My second stay for a work trip was as lovely and easy as the first time! Great location, great setup. High recommend!
Well located, very nice hotel. The warm pool in the middle of the city was the best experience ever
We loved this place. Clean, convenient, comfortable.
Clean and convenient, great location, fast and precise communication.  Great Stay

Very nicely accommodated home and perfect long term option near Boston. We stayed here for over 2 months while looking for a permanent home. Jan is an excellent host and responded immediately to any questions. We felt very safe in the neighborhood, and it's walkable to many shops and restaurants.  Wifi was strong, kitchen was well-stocked, and it is a very quiet street.

Es war definitiv ausreichen. Das Zimmer war gross genug. Das externe Bad war auch sehr sauber und geräumig. Die Lage war sehr gut und dennoch war es sehr leise im Zimmer. Der Preis meiner Meinung nach zu hoch ansonsten würde ich gerne wieder kommen.
Ewa responded to messages quickly and kindly.We had a very comfortable stay.
Nothing too fancy but all the essentials we needed were there. Full kitchen, nice living room, and bedroom. Shower has no door which was a bit annoying.
Beautiful apartment, very comfortable and clean.
Great location, super clean.
very smooth, great hosts, would definitely book again.

Only negative was the host’s lack of response prior to the stay…numerous texts and calls went without response…on the day of the stay, they would respond within a few hours of a text.  Never heard from them during or after the stay.  Location was awesome and easy to get in and out of…
Todo muy bien !! Departamento muy cómodo y amplio.
Great little place to call home! Felt very secure and appreciated many of the thoughtful touches.

Perfect little place for 1-2 people! The best part of this place is the location, so many good spots near by and the park is right down the street. Host was very nice with clear instructions, also. We greatly enjoyed our stay.
Great place for our trip to Boston! It’s a shared space, but the other guests were great!
Great place and great location… I would recommend
Good basic needs for your stay!

Nice friendly people. Everything was as they said.
Fine neighborhood.
Great location in downtown Boston. can'tgo wrong with booking this location.
Great place. As described. Super cute decor. It has everything you need! There were plenty of room for two couples. Parking is tricky as everywhere in Boston.
Everything was great, clean and friendly, apt very close to orange metro line and very easy to get downtown. Lori, owner, very nice and environment that she creates very warm.
Cool place.

What an utterly fabulous experience! Cannot recommend this beautiful apartment enough.
Gerard and Marie are fantastic hosts and were extremely helpful and accommodating to our needs. They clearly take a real pride in being Airbnb hosts, there are lots of helpful things in the apartment for visitors , and all their suggestions were spot on.
The location is on a beautiful street within easy walking distance of the main bit of Boston. It's also right by the freedom trail, which is very handy.
Great amenities too - good wifi, great Whole Foods in easy walking distance.
Highly recommend.

Well, let’s start with the positives.  It is a beautiful studio, very unique.  The location is very centralized, a short walk to almost everything, and the street is safe and quiet (at night).  However, when we arrived the room REEKED of chemical cleaning supplies.  My husband had a cough attack,  I started feeling dizzy and we both got headaches.  We opened all the windows and left to let it air out a little.  When informed about this problem, maverick’s team offered us a different (MUCH less appealing) room and an “ozone machine” to help clean the air.  We felt we definitely would be getting the short end of the deal to stay in the other room considering how much we paid for the one we booked.  So we agreed to the ozone machine and let it air out as much as possible.  They told us we couldn’t be in the room when the ozone machine was there, so we gave them 2 opportunities when we’d be out for a while.  I never got any communication about anything being scheduled or the cleaning completed.  It still smelt of chemicals our entire stay despite having all the windows open for almost the entire time and possibly the ozone cleaning.  They also failed to mention to us there is construction going on directly across the (very small) street.  It was quiet at night, but don’t expect to sleep in past 7am.  To top it all off they were VERY strict on check in and out times.  Don’t expect any wiggle room or a place to just store your luggage if you have a later flight.  Considering that (with all the extra fees) we paid over $200 per night, I was disappointed with our stay here.  This place is beautiful and has so much potential, but the customer service is severely lacking.

Nick place was super clean, quiet, 5 mns from fabulous restaurants, and café. Nick is really welcoming, and will communicate with you if you need anything. Definitely a perfect basement for our few days visiting family.
Jason’s place is charming! It was the perfect size for our family of 4. Not only was it incredibly clean, the neighbors were welcoming and the location was amazing. We will be back!

Super bien placé dans un quartier hispanique de Boston. À 6 min du métro (station de l'aéroport) et à 15 min du stationnement de l'aéroport (30$/ jour, idéal pour laisser sa voiture et se déplacer en métro). Tout se fait à pied. Il y a un parc pour enfant à 5 min du logement. Le logement était propre et la terrasse sur le toit est vraiment agréable.

Best place ever!! I had such a great time! Not only was the place beautiful  but the host was extremely kind and accommodating and even showed us places to eat! (Highly recommend Lucy’s American Tavern btw) absolutely lives this place!!
Great location, easy check in, great communication. Will definitely stay again. Thanks Cassandra and Michael.
Great place to stay! Great location and nice and cozy!
The location is the best! And definitely a great price for having a bedroom separate from the living room, which really helps with bringing babies along. The host is very responsive and helpful.
Great place, close to train station. Large, clean room. Sherwin was very quick to respond to all my messages.
Great location for Fenway
Great location and a nice place with plenty of space. Would visit again.

We had a lovely family break in Boston. The apartment was very spacious and the location was perfect for getting around Boston. We could walk to most places (despite the cold weather!) but the subway stations were very close. Brian was very quick to respond to any messages. The apartment had everything we needed. We would definitely stay here again if we are ever back in Boston!

A unique experience living on a boat! Place was very clean and cosy. Appreciate the thoughtful little touches to make our stay more enjoyable. We were also able to easily walk to North Station in under 20 minutes to take the train to Salem. Would love to stay again!

The apartment was wonderful—perfectly described and presented in line with the listing. Liesl is a fantastic host with excellent communication. She accommodated us a bit before normal check-in time which was very much appreciated. Great location, too! Would stay again!
Great place in a perfect location! Spotless.
Whitney's apartment and Charleston as a neighborhood were both awesome!
Great place to stay

Excellent location. Very well equipped.
Esthetically decorated.
May be hard for people trying to go up and down stairs that have difficulty walking.

I had a lovely stay at Jessy and Diego’s place! Quiet, residential neighborhood within walking distance of shops, trains, and buses. I (a young female) walked alone to the house from the bus stop somewhat late at night and felt totally safe. Room was spotless and had everything I needed. Instructions were clear, and Jessy and Diego were extremely responsive hosts. Thanks again!
Very clean and cozy apartment with perfect location
We had an awesome time spending our 2nd honeymoon at Glenn and Oliver’s home. They were so pleasant and welcoming. The breakfast baskets were a wonderful way to start the day!

If you just need a quick place to stay that’s convenient to the airport and the blue line, this place is fine: anything beyond that, I’d suggest looking elsewhere. The bed is on the smaller side and the bathroom is almost unbearably small (which doesn’t come across in the pictures). The biggest problem is probably the noise, and it is pretty bad for a number of reasons. First, the bedroom is right next to the street, so there is a lot of noise from cars and the airport. Second, there is an apartment above the listing which has two larger dogs that run around and bark loudly and sometimes early: we were not told this would be a possibility. It’s not a bad place or anything, it served our purpose, but I would suggest trying to find a nicer place for a longer stay.
Michelle’s home is a great, comfortable stay for a large group of people or a family. I would highly recommend it to anyone. The value is great, the location is wonderful, and the space is great!

The apartment had everything we needed including laundry detergent, great appliances and a fully stocked kitchen. This is on the third floor with very steep stairs. I would not recommend for anyone with mobility issues. The location was convenient to all the tourist areas and walking distance to many restaurants.
Great stay
Great stay in the perfect location! Walkable to almost everything we needed. Will be back!
Beautiful and clean place. Great location !
Great hosts with a great place! Would recommend for anyone wanting a Boston vacation.
great place to stay
Elisangela was a great host and her home was nice and cozy!

Artist Haven in Boston!  Cozy place with awesome décor.  Close to Harvard Medical School, great neighborhood - lots of flowers to see on my walks.  The place was amazingly stocked:  tv, full kitchen (with everything), cozy couch - lots of pillows and throws.  Stereo with records was a bonus fun find.  in bedroom - comfy bed - amazing comforter and lots of pillows.  Great art on the walls, and even a space to create your own with pastels, colored pencils etc.  Rooftop patio was a gem in the city - so fun to sit there with a coffee in the morning or to watch the city lights at night.  Especially appreciated Chandra's extra touches, like leaving coffee and cream for me.  Will stay again, next time I'm in Boston, way better than a hotel.
Very convenient, and perfect for an overnight stay if you are traveling to and from the airport! Quiet and comfortable.

Very small space, but Jonathan's studio was spotless, comfortable, private, and allowed us to bring our dog for a weekend visit to Boston! The location was a little bit too far to walk to downtown/Back Bay, but it was an easy walk to Fenway Park and the T station. Having reliable, free overnight street parking for the weekend was a pleasant surprise, especially on the weekend before the Boston Marathon! I would definitely recommend Jonathan's place to 1-2 people looking to spend a weekend in Boston away from the hustle and bustle of downtown Boston.
Great place and would stay with Clara again. She responded right away and made it very easy to check in. 11/10!
Great place.
The room was very clean and neat. There were a few issues with check in but Jonathon was very accommodating and communicative. Overall, a very good stay.

My group and I had a fantastic time! This location was amazing and the space was not only immaculate/clean but also super cozy/spacious. We couldn’t have asked for a better place to stay for our first visit to Boston. Thank You again!

Overall this unit was perfect for my short stay in Boston.
**Be prepared for a shared bathroom with other units. Bathroom was very clean so no issues. I probably did not read the small print!
Super convenient location for Fenway or house of blues and close to Kenmore station
Great spot close to everything, the north end is beautiful! Walking distance to many places!

I felt safe here, Jillian was very sweet. She left us a bunch of snacks. Even gave us bubbly for my friends birthdays. Everything was super clean. Hospitality was top tier. And she was overall amazing

Excelente opción, la ubicación es muy conveniente y cerca de lugares interesantes. Bill y Maureen son los perfectos anfitriones y cuidan todos los detalles, te sientes como en casa. Incluyen café, te, bocadillos y hasta deliciosas galletas recién horneadas. Me ayudaron Mucho y disfruté mucho mi estadía de 7 noches. Totalmente recomendado!

The stairs are very steep. The area is great for taking public transportation. If you plan to stay it’s most cost effective to purchase a 7 week pass. Otherwise with more than 2 people it’s a better deal to take Uber.
The kitchen is well equipped and easy to use. The house is close to shopping, but due to busy roads is difficult to walk.
Clean place

My family of 3 had a great stay at Bill and Kristy’s place!  We had plenty of space for my wife, our toddler, and myself!  Parking was awesome to have and super convenient and their place was very close to all the restaurants, shops, and cafes of North End, waterfront, and the financial district.  Would definitely recommend!

Small but cozy and clean, well-appointed studio apartment. Perfect for 1 or 2 people. We were very comfortable for the week and were a close enough drive (for our taste) to downtown Boston attractions. We had a blast!
Jessicas place was great! It was a short walk to the train which allowed us to see so much while we were there. It was clean and quiet and we could park right on the street. We loved our trip!
This is a comfortable and cozzy space with all that you need to stay a few days. The neighborhood is nice and it is close to the City.
The shower leaks a bit of water onto the floor, but the neighborhood is great and the unit is very close to public transit. Great place for a short stay.
Thanks for the stay!
Close walk to TD Garden.

Shelly was a wonderful host and was extremely helpful with everything. She not only gave great food suggestions and sight seeing opportunities but she also went out of her way to ensure the best experience. For a quick trip in and out of Boston, I made incredible memories that will live in my mind for a long time all with the help of Shelly. Definitely ask if she has any suggestions on places to see. The icing on the cake is that the train station is close enough to take you almost anywhere without having to spend an arm and a leg on taxi/ride services. Definitely suggest this budget friendly overnight stay. Thank you for everything Shelly! 🙂
Always a pleasure.
very clean and comfortable
A great location on Boston harbor.  Steps from Bunker Hill, USS Constitution and short walk from North End.  Much more fun than a hotel room.
The landlord is helpful when I request early checking luggage. Location is nice, close to station and parks.
Beautiful space.  Good location.  10 minute walk from the Orange Line.  Glenn was very easy to work with.  Quick, responsive, and the place is as beautiful as the pictures.
房东非常热情。房间布置得非常温馨，有品质。楼顶的屋顶阳台，让我们领略了波士顿的晚霞和夏日微风，我和我的女儿们住得都很开心。希望以后有机会再来波士顿。
Great host and I recommend the place to everyone.

Clean, newly renovated apartment. Beds are soft, the central air was fabulous. The kitchen was well-stocked. We didn’t cook so I can’t say too much about the appliances. We used uber to get into and out of downtown Boston.

The apartment was exactly as listed. You’re a 5 minute walk to the subway which can take you anywhere you need to go in Boston. The hosts were very communicative and pleasant to deal with. I would recommend this place without a doubt if you’re in Boston.

We had a good time at the place
Be aware that you need your own transportation or book Uber every time you wanna go to the city
Consider they advertise Boston as city to walk this location is a bit out of range
Unless you don’t mind the exercise.

Such a great little place in the Back Bay area of Boston. Right within walking distance of the Prudential Center and Copley Mall. Super cozy and not in a noisy area, but close enough that you can walk to everything or access the train easily. Will definitely be back here in the future!

Absolutely a great space and location. Apartment was very spacious and clean with great mattresses and pillows. Location was perfect for walking to wharf, freedom trail, and North End.  Several good coffee shops, restaurants, and bars within a couple blocks.
Eda is a great host and very helpful with quick responses.  location is super, and beaches are a couple of blocks away.
Good

Hilary es una muy buena anfitriona! Siempre respondía de forma muy rápida y fue muy atenta durante nuestra estancia. Además, nos dio recomendaciones de lugares geniales de la zona para visitar! El apartamiento cumple con todo lo que se describe en el anuncio.

We were in Boston to watch and support our son running the Marathon. As other reviewers have mentioned, this apartment was in an amazing location 1/2 block off Boston Common and we were able to walk to everything related to the Marathon week and so many other neighborhoods in every direction.
We made a last minute request a couple hours before arriving to have some extra bedding for our daughter to sleep on the couch, which was responded to and taken care of immediately. We would definitely stay in this property again.
Amazing house!! Perfect for our group of 12 people, it fitted everyone and the house was perfect! Clean and friendly !
The house had a lovely home cooking smell. Beautiful flowers in front. Hosts were very friendly and welcoming.

Mary was a great host. She checked in a couple of times to make sure we had everything we needed. The place was clean and was accurately described and pictured. It’s about a 0.8 mile walk to the nearest train station, which is how we were getting around, so it wasn’t too bad to walk to/from.
The location was perfect - super walkable to a lot of popular neighborhoods and T stations. Would definitely stay again.

From the first time I messaged Jurek he was quick to respond and super friendly. He slowed me to check-in earlier to leave my bags so I could start my adventure around the city. And again the day I was leaving he allowed to me leave my bags. Then my flight was cancelled and he allowed me to stay and hang around for an hour or so to email and make necessary phone calls.
He was having some work done in the basement of his home which was the only draw back but, he was more than accommodating in making up any inconvenience it caused me.
He is a lovely man, with a comfy and cozy home. The bed was super comfortable and the place was clean.
3 min walk to the subway and you are downtown in less than 20 mins! 25 from the airport to his door!
I would definitely stay there again.
Thanks for everything Jurek!
Beautiful place, super responsive and easy instructions. Thank you
It's not very spacious but has everything you need for a comfortable night's stay after a busy day out in Boston.
You cannont beat this location! Host responds quickly and worked to make my stay go as smooth as possible. You will have to find your own parking, be warned!
Beautiful spot, can go in any direction on the t.  Safety is critical for me and is was very safe.
Definitely an awesome place to kick back for a weekend. The staff especially in the lobby are awesome as well! Thanks for a great stay we’ll be coming back.
Conveniently located to Logan. Easy to find and  check in and out. Parking wasn't as bad as I thought it'd be. Would stay again if we have another overnight Boston trip.

Great communication
Well equipped room.
Lived up to its description
Really nice room and landlords was friendly
So easy to check in and get in contact with Maverick! Loved my stay, exactly what I expected and loved the location.
Thank you so much for sharing your beautiful condo in Boston. Great location!
Very cute place with nice decor. Easy to get in and out. The lock to the unit was a bit finicky but worked after some trial and error. Very cute and charming place!

We were visiting family in Jamaica Plain and were so lucky to find this place. Leaps and bounds above the other listings, and met expectations when we arrived!
Well appointed and super clean.

Great space in a great location. Linda has thought of everything, and the little details really helped to make us feel at home. The neighborhood is quiet and safe, and offers easy access to downtown and other parts of the Boston area. We were surprised and happy to find some excellent restaurants within a quick walk from the house.

A lovely neighborhood within easy walking distance to public transportation, coffee shops, and restaurants.
The space was big enough for 4 adults and well stocked with everything you need to be comfortable. The bed was comfy and even though it was in the 90’s the space stayed very cool.
The rooftop deck was fabulous and our two six foot tall men had no issues accessing it. The fireworks from the rooftop were abundant!
For a first time trip to Boston it was the perfect base to explore the city. Karina was an excellent hostess ensuring all was well and extremely accommodating for our unique needs! Would definitely stay again!
Great host! Amazing home. Jonathan was easy to communicate with and his instruccions on how to access the unit were easy to follow. This home was in a nice area.
The attention to detail and accommodations at Ewa’s Airbnb were spot on. Location was great and very accessible to many nice attractions. Will be staying here on future visits to Boston!
Excellent location! Didn’t realize the bathroom was across the (public) hallway from the bedroom, but it didn’t end up being a big deal

Nick is one of the most accommodating hosts I have ever had the pleasure of staying with! Aside from the great hospitality, the apartment has a very open space and is as cozy as advertised. If you're into retro/antique places, this is the place for you. The downtown area is a short 10 minute uber ride away and it's a good location if you're looking to stay somewhere close to everything and don't want to pay the high Boston prices. Would definitely come back again!

Amazing location!  Wouldn’t stay anywhere else in Boston. The Freedom Trail is just steps away from your door, not to mention endless restaurants, bars, shops and cafes. The room and bathroom were great and even better than the pictures. Howard was an amazing host who waited up for us when we arrived.  He also checked in periodically to make sure we had all we needed. Overall a really great stay in Boston!!
Great for a quick stay
Cozy spot located in a great area, would stay here again!
Great location and awesome hosts!

Great accommodations in an excellent location!! Walking distance to many local attractions as well as transportation options. Definitely no need to rent a car to get around. Host responds quickly to all questions. I will definitely recommend this location to others as well as stay again.

This location is terrific! In the Fenway, within walking distance to the MFA, Berklee School of Music, Northeastern University, Christian Science Center, subway, bus, Whole Foods and countless other shops and restaurants, this little studio is on the third floor of a small apartment building tucked off the main streets.
The area seems to be mostly student housing, and it is a bit noisy, but the minisplit provides heating and cooling so you can keep the windows closed if you prefer.
It seems that Copley Houses runs AirBnB rentals in a number of different buildings in the area, and this apartment was not the one I had thought I was reserving. It is VERY small, so not ideal if you plan to spend much time in the room, but it is convenient to everything in Boston. There is a small kitchen, fitted with basic tools for making simple meals.
The shower is good and the bed is very comfortable: fine for a trip when you just need a place to sleep and make coffee in the morning.
Great experience! Definitely intend to book this space again!

We are a local family that stayed at Tomasz's place while we had some work done on our house.  His place was perfect - fully equipped and comfortable.  I worked remotely and wifi was strong and reliable (not always the case in home rentals or hotels).    It was also great for our dog, as there is a lovely park directly behind the house for walking and seeing other dogs. There is also a nice playground and rec space that my 11 yo loved.  Lovely residential neighborhood that is near some great restaurants in the center of town.  The hosts were very communicative and offered assistance multiple times.  Highly recommend!

The place is well located and very unique. The views are amazing, particularly at night. The access to the subway around the corner is ideal.
The primary challenge was areas with no lights, burned out bulbs, and no working electrical outlets. The half bath wasn’t really usable because it literally had no lights and no window.
We reported this upon arrival and each day after. The written responsiveness was excellent; however, we were told maintenance would come each day we contacted them. No one ever came, and it was never fixed while we were there.
We have never had an Airbnb experience before like this one. They have always been positive, so this was disappointing.
Great place to stay. Apartment is very homely and plenty of space. Extremely comfortable and would recommend.
best location

Atef was very welcoming and shared some of his favorite restaurants spots.  I wish the weather were warmer, because his garden is lovely.  Definitely check out the Navy Pier Bistro while you are staying here.

Mary’s Airbnb is an absolute gem! From the moment we walked in, we continuously gushed about how great this find was. The Airbnb is spacious, spotless, and feels like you’re right at home. The pictures don’t do it justice! You are also a 5 min walk from the nearest red line station, making travel into the city easy. Mary also was a wonderful host, and if we return to Boston we absolutely would try to return to this Airbnb.
Great stay in convenient location!

The loft room was the perfect size for me during a weekend work trip to Boston. I was mostly out of the house so never minded sharing a common room. The other guests were very respectful. The house is great and the location was also great — really close to Roxbury Park on the Orange Line of the T, which allows you to quickly get to the airport and downtown.
