Walking distance to Fenway Park, too. I did that trek several times without issue.
this place was great!
The stay was good. Christian was responded quickly and answered why questions we had prior to our trip. I would definitely recommend and stay here again. Thank you

Jader's place was perfect for our family of 5. The close proximity of the Orient Heights stop on the Blue Line made it very easy to get anywhere we wanted. It was also nice having some restaurants nearby.
I will definitely try to rebook next time we're coming to the area.
Great location with plenty to do in the area. Host was very accommodating and responsive.
Place was clean well located and great. Look forward to seeing you again!
Shelly was an awesome host. Excellent communication, extremely clean, easy to access, and a fun location. 10/10, would recommend.

Good:
- My mom loved her bed’s mattress
- The water pressure in the bathroom is amazing
- The airbed was greatly appreciated, since there were 3 of us!
- The rulebook said to message the owners if we see any flaws in the space within 24 hours of arrival. I msgd them a list of everything I could find - concerned I might get blamed/charged for stuff if I didn't report it right away. It was late when I sent the message – like 10:30pm, and even though none of it was an emergency, Meri called me back right away! She answered a couple of our questions.
Bad:
- STAIRS ARE NARROW, NO HANDRAIL
Stairs are usually no problem for my active family, but these stairs are TINY, narrow, turning stairs – and the second set has no handrails.
My 75 yo mom fell down them twice getting down to the bathroom in the middle of the night.
- $50 MORE PER NIGHT WITH A CAR
When we asked about parking, the options provided were always full. The closest parking I found each night of our stay was in a parking garage 1.4 miles away for $42 per night - I drove around looking for cheaper/closer options every night, but never found.
At the end of each day, I dropped off my mom and daughter and made the 1.4 mi walk back to the condo – in the fall, the evenings are pleasantly cool, but we got an Uber each morning to get to our car.
o So the garage and Uber added $50 per night to the cost of our stay and took away an extra 30-60 mins. from the beginning and end of our days.
LOTS OF RULES PUT US ON EDGE
- The amount of rules presented in a ‘Rulebook Binder’ is stressful to walk into after a long flight and felt unwelcoming. Especially since many of the rules would be unnecessary with a small investment from the investors/owners. For example:
o Telling us not to sit on the couch in dark clothes Vs recovering the couch’s white fabric cushions in leather or a darker color, add stain resistant treatment, etc.
o Asking us to hang rugs and keep the bathroom floor dry, instead of replacing the hardwood with tile or other water-resistant floor choice for this tiny space.
o Kitchen counters are porous!? vs sealing, so it felt daunting to cook or make coffee
o Telling us not to lose the keys vs updating the locks
o etc
Ugly
(minor annoyances that detracted from the overall experience)
- None of the doors actually closed all the way
- TV has only 3 local channels in one of the two bedrooms vs buying a $30 Roku stick
- Since bathroom is downstairs, a mirror in the master bedroom would have been helpful, and a chair for the dressing table in the smaller bedroom would have been nice.
- All of the walls were painted a flat white, but not kept clean - especially upstairs. (If it’s too much too clean, maybe a darker paint, or skuff-resistant semi-gloss would work better than a flat white that shows everything.)
- We were asked to be very quiet, but my daughter was woken up by young adults shouting, laughing outside her window in the wee morning hours.

Convenient location, clean, and cozy.  Love the brick building.  Host communicates promptly.  But I would not suggest this to any light sleepers.  If street noise doesn’t bother you then this is a great deal.
If I think of this space as an apartment, it's kinda small.  But if I think of it as a hotel suite, it's very rooms and located in a wonderful neighborhood .

Staying here was a pleasure! The location was perfect, the space was cozy and clean, and Kevin was always available to answer my questions. I also appreciated the assortment of amenities that were provided.
Great location, clean, comfy beds. Perfect for families! There are stairs, but we didn’t mind and are used to this in Europe!
Great host, couldn’t be more grateful for how accommodating they are !

The apartment is nice and clean with comfortable beds, however the staircase leading to the apartment is dirty, smelly and very run down, it looked like it had not been vacuumed for weeks. Also the toilet it self was not attached the the floor leaving it wobbling around when used. There was to much automated messaging from the host prior to our stay requesting the same info again and again even when info was supplied after first request. Over all I think this property is worth the money and I would stay again if these anomalies would be fixed.

We book this stay the day before we arrived but they made the whole process of booking, communication seamless.
We had a short stay but really enjoyed the house and the ease to get into Boston.
We would definitely stay again.
Thanks

This location was very close to a conference I was attending and the streets felt safe, students out and about at night and hospital employees walking to work in the AM. There were a couple of good restaturants I tried where I was anble to get gluten friendly and dairy free food. Served its purpose well. A convenient location that provided a place to sleep.

Jessy and Diego provided a very clean room and carefully prepared all the necessary daily necessities. The room is conveniently located with various facilities within a few minutes' walk. Jessy and Diego's response and help were always timely and useful. Overall, it was a pretty enjoyable renting experience.
Small space that has everything you need (work desk, armchair, closet space, kitchenette, little breakfast table), great price, easy check-in / check-out, clean.
Whenever I'm in the Boston area, I always book with Taskin. He's a great host that I highly recommend. Great value for the price!
Great place, great location. Perfect for an overnight trip.

I rented Chris and Kristina's place for my parents to stay in while visiting me so my experience is not first-hand, but my parents reported a great stay. The place was very clean and they had a very comfortable 8-day stay. Though there isn't a dedicated parking space, nearby street parking was easy to find throughout their stay. The apartment is also very close to public transportation into downtown Boston as well as many local restaurants and shops. All our communications with Chris and Kristina were very smooth and efficient. Check-in and check-out were also a breeze.
Cute apartment in Boston’s Beacon Hill area. Great places to walk to and host was very responsive.
Nice clean place. Would stay here again!

I booked this at very short notice for a one night stay as my previous plan got cancelled due to someone having covid.  The responses from the hosts were very quick and helpful.  Super location, very nice little apartment, all as advertised.  As one of the other reviewers has said the bed is soft but I found it to be very comfortable.   I would definitely recommend it.
New, clean apartment very close to the state capital building and subway. Everything in great order except for an electric kettle. Well worth the money.
Great location, comfy beds, helpful and responsive host - what more could you want? I definitely recommend this place for families traveling to Boston!
Emplacement pratique, logement spacieux et très pratique
Great location! Super cute accommodations. Would stay here again given the opportunity.
Really nice place in a great location. Thanks!

Simon’s house is very best - the best Airbnb anyone could find in the whole Boston-area. If my family ever revisit, we will come back to Simon’s place.
Very clean and modern, with fresh flowers!
Thank you:)
Great location, on a quiet street surrounded by restaurants, next to the subway station. Clean room and host is so nice!
Stayed 5 nights visiting my son at BU - perfect solution

The apartment was clean and bright! It’s location is perfect for walking to the Prudential Center, and is convenient for getting to other neighborhoods too because it’s so centrally located. The space was definitely on the smaller side, but its very functional and is basically like staying in a 4 star hotel, but with a much more affordable price. Would stay here again!

Excellent Airbnb. I travelled to Boston for work in the Back Bay and the location is fantastic - just a 10-15 minute Uber or in my case, a 25 minute bike ride on a blue bike. It’s very clean, comfortable and Marlene is a great host.

Excellent apto, very organized, in the most beautiful newbourhood.
Thank you for everything. Caroline

The listing was exactly as described and just what we needed for our trip. The bedroom/bathroom setup works well for multiple guests and the location was very walkable, we only took the train once! Overall I’m very satisfied with the place and would love to visit again.
Tim had an excellent place for our small group and we will look forward to renting it again!

Fabulous place to stay, lots to see within walking distance and also easy to access public transportation. Good coffee shops and restaurants. Our host was very responsive and provided clear instructions for both check in and out. Would definitely recommend and stay again.

The bedroom/living area was clean and as shown.  The bathroom has a heated floor which was amazing.  The AC unit was more than able to keep the place comfortable and when on low it was perfectly silent.  The building has about 12 units and overall and is quiet, the only noise we heard was when people were in the hall.  We did not hear anything from other apartments. The location is great on a historic street in quiet neighborhood, there are several food options, a Metro Station and green spaces a short walk away.
A perfect jumping off point to anywhere in Boston! Stylish place, LOVELY garden. Walkable to many coffee shops and restaurants.
Place was super clean and very spacious. My favorite part was the kitchen! Loved the layout Would book again!

The space is very clean and exactly as shown in the photos. The location is fantastic, less than a minute walk from the subway which takes you to all major attractions in Boston. Very convenient to the airport too. Bathrooms was very clean and well stocked. Only complaint would be that the wifi was a bit weak at times in my room (room #2). I had to be out in the common areas or right by the door to get a connection. I was out most of the day, so it was not a big issue for me for the most part. Other than that, a wonderful room and looking forward to using Claire’s apartment next time I’m in town!
This is a terrific place to stay. Super clean, well appointed and within walking distance to lots of great restaurants and pubs. We would definitely stay here again.
It’s close to the train n close to downtown crossing

Lisa was very helpfull before and during our stay in her appartment.
The room has everything you need and it's pretty well located.
We had a great time in Boston. Thank you Lisa!
整体入住体验还可以，虽然与房东除了入住是见了面，基本与房东没有太多交流。不太满意的地方是，房间靠近街道，隔音效果很差，早上经常有大批人聚集、噪音比较大，影响休息。

The Brownstone is a total gem--what a walk back in time to a beautiful era of elegance. Li has preserved a gorgeous and safe place for a solo traveler to land and rest. She was so helpful with my delayed arrival and truly friendly. This is why I love AirB&B. I hope to return many times in the future! Thank you for a home-away-from-home in Beantown!!

This spot is perfect! It's centrally located, making it easy to get anywhere in Boston you want to go! The space was unique, it was clean and comfortable. It is a city apartment, so you do deal with city noises, but that was to be expected. If you're bothered by that, bring ear plugs, but you'd need ear plugs if you're staying anywhere in the city. We loved our time in this Airbnb and would totally use it again if/when we return!

It was my first time to use Airbnb, but thanks to Bill and Maureen I had a good time there! The room is cozy and clean, and I was surprised at the variety of foods, drinks, and snacks for breakfast!
I really like this Airbnb and I'm sure I will stay there again if I have a chance to visit boston. Thank you so much😊
Unbelievable location. Extremely friendly host, and great apartment for a weekend getaway!
Great location
Very clean and quiet. In the perfect location. I would book again!

This is my third stay at Anna & Samuel!
The house is always very clean, warm and comfortable. The neighbor is quiet and inviting.
Anna is always very accommodating, helpful and friendly. She is a sweetheart and takes pleasure and pride in hosting.
Location is top notch. Clean. Comfortable. Way better than a characterless hotel.

Perfect location and within walking distance to many sites and restaurants. Apartment is super cute, cozy, and clean - even if the elevator is a little sketchy. Host was very responsive. Overall we didn't want to leave and would highly recommend to others!

Our stay at Treetop was really good, the studio is cozy and clean and is a great retreat each day when returning from Boston. Jamaica Plain is a wonderful and friendly neighbourhood. We enjoyed a meal at Wonder Spice which was very good but with portion sizes we are not too familiar with!! Great value though, we also had brunch at Robinwood Cafe which was really yummy. Thanks so much Maria Elena for sharing your home with us.

Pros:
Location (very easy to take the subway to town and close to neighborhood shopping)
Nicely decorated and updated
Shower was excellent
Compared to downtown hotel prices it was priced well
Wifi was good
Bathroom towels were very nice
Cons:
No stopper for the kitchen sink and no dish towel
Bathroom sink was motion activated and only stayed on for a few seconds and no temperature options
A/C was loud and didn’t cool very well as it’s only in the bedroom
Old building so noise from upstairs neighbours walking and people outside was very loud

Alex's space was clean and comfortable. His communication was amazing and he went above and accommodate us, even in a blizzard. We really appreciate his hospitality, especially since we booked only 24 hours in advance. Highly recommend!
Great stay!

Jessica and Jose were great hosts. The apartment was immaculate inside and really well decorated. Had 2 huge TVs and a ton of comfortable areas, too. It had more amenities than we needed, except we couldn't find a blow dryer. Really nice inside. However, the Uber driver told 2 of our girls that it was a really rough area and they got scared and didn't even stay the night with us. That was a bit of a bummer. The other 3 of us who stayed there had no issues getting back and didn't feel unsafe. I think it's just nestled in between a nice and a rough area so it can seem confusing. But that's city life. Host was super nice and even offered us to stay later. She was super sweet and chill.
Nice place in a great location!

This is our second time staying here.  So easy to walk to Boston College.  It was Parent's Weekend and there were parties all around the house.  We heard absolutely nothing in the bedroom.  Went to sleep at 10pm and nothing bothered us.  The apartment is one of the best we have stayed in and we stay in quite a few!

Hermina was wonderful. She went above abd beyond what an Airbnb hodt is supposed to do. She fed us breakfast and coffee every morning. Extremely friendly and gives good tips about Boston and the neighborhood

I’ve stayed at Jonathan’s place twice in two different rooms and both times it’s been a great experience. I’m a professor at Berklee College of Music who commutes from out of town so the location was perfect. It’s very close to the Back Bay - I walked to Berklee which is right by Symphony Hall and Newbury St in about 35 minutes - and it was a very pleasant walk through the Northeastern campus. I also took a Blue Bike to the Back Bay in about 10-15 minutes and by car it was about 5-10.
The space is very clean and tastefully decorated. Jonathan is a very caring host and great about communication.
I really enjoyed the neighborhood as well. I grew up in Boston, and it’s nice to see a neighborhood in Boston that still retains its local character.
I highly recommend.
This was a great airbnb. It was very walkable and near all of Boston.
Todd's place was ideal for a trip to Boston. Impeccably clean and comfortable, I would stay here again in a heartbeat.
Cute neighborhood and walkable. Allison was friendly and generous! She shared delicious coffee and Turkish ice cream. Beautiful home - cozy and well kept. I would definitely stay again!

Everything was great at Nick's place!! Very cozy, spacious, and well equipped with everything we needed. The backyard was perfect for the dogs, and the pond and parks nearby were great for them to run around!
My stay was easy and enjoyable for a weekend trip. I'm pretty tall so had to watch my head a bit but ultimately a great stay!
Great spot! Very easy check in and check out!
nice clean place in a good neighborhood. definitely would stay again!

Reda was so wonderful with us!! Extremely communicative and friendly, the apartment is exactly like the pictures and so much better in person. My family & I had a great time in Boston but the apartment was definitely a big highlight. I recommend this place 10/10🩵
Just as described

Le séjour c’est très bien déroulé, aucun soucis de communication avec le propriétaire.
Je recommande

Just as in the description, it is a super clean and comfy Airbnb place. The room itself is definitely large enough for two people, beautifully designed, and has a very comfortable bed. The host is very communicative and responsive if you need help with anything. They know the area very well so they can provide you with suggestions and must-visits for the city too.
I would highly recommend joining them for breakfast and/or dinner, the host is an excellent cook.
Highly recommended, would certainly stay again.
This is a great home for long term stays! Johnathan is awesome.
Natalia is extremely kind and responsive to any requests or questions. This place was a great spot to stay being so close to the buses and trains!
Perfect ! Great place ! Extremely clean ! Wonderful! Marvelous!

Very convenient & clean, newly remodeled by the look… ZERO hot water (let the shower run for 20 min before giving up). Super tiny room - as pictured, which was too tight for my husband’s preference (> 6ft tall)
Amazinggg!!!
Great place near the train station and can get to the city centre pretty quick with the subway.

Staying at Meri’s home was very comfortable. Our family of four (2 children) had plenty of space. She made sure to communicate prior to the trip, on arrival, and after. Everything was very self explanatory so we didn’t need much from her during our stay. Parking, was probably the most we needed to worry about, but we followed her instructions during the week by parking in the #21 Municipal Lot overnight, which helped a lot! We managed to avoid any tickets the entire trip. 😊 The towels may have been a little small for the average person, so if you need larger, you can bring your own. Thank you Meri, we really enjoyed our stay!

Great host.  I really appreciated his welcome book and the humor in it.  The washer and dryer worked great and the coffee and snacks were a wonderful bonus!  Ask Trevor for some local recommendations.  You won't be disappointed!
Fav stay in the Boston area. Beautiful space and conveniently located close to everything.

The stay and host were exactly as advertised and expected. This is a perfectly suitable, budget friendly accommodation. I appreciate finding good deals and would stay here again if the need arose. Lynda was very responsive and professional. I left something behind by accident and Lynda was kind and accommodating regarding my return.
Loved this space! Was quiet for being in downtown Boston.
We very much enjoyed our stay in this comfortable, roomy apartment. Everything was as described. Maria clearly treasures her house and we were delighted to stay there for a few days.
I loved staying at Alicia's place! This was my first experience using Airbnb and it couldn't have gone smoother. The location was convenient and in a very safe area and the apartment is really cute!

Claire’s place was clean, tidy and comfortable. It’s right around the corner from the subway station and a couple blocks from the east bay.  Very easy access to travel within the city and a nice quiet, safe neighborhood to rest and relax in.
Bay village is located conveniently near the Back Bay, walkable to attractions. The stairs are narrow and aged.

This is a great unit at the end of a dead-end street that abuts a beautiful community park. The park was the highlight of our stay! We spent may hours there with our 4 year old riding bikes and enjoying the playground. The neighbors downstairs are wonderful and not only helped answer our questions, but the kids became good friends. The space is light and airy, the air conditioners worked well (and during a big heat wave!), and we enjoyed the yard space. Our only comments would be the smell of smoke coming through the windows in the evenings and the lower quality kitchen pots and pans (and lack of knives). We would stay here again!

The location of this apartment is perfect if you're looking to have a nice stay in Boston. I specifically scheduled our stay for Monday-Wednesday because I knew it could be noisy/busy on the weekends, but overall it was pretty quiet. I appreciated that care is obviously taken to clean the place before and after each visit. I would definitely stay with them again the next time I'm in Boston.

Kaitlyn’s place was better then advertised.  Amazing location, we walked everywhere.  Kaitlyn was very accommodating and quick to respond to any questions we had.  Our child will be attending school in Boston so we definitely plan to return
I would highly recommend it!!
good stay

We had such a wonderful time in Boston, and the apartment was perfect for our needs. It was a beautiful space in a wonderful neighborhood. Jennifer was a great host and was very responsive to our questions.
Can't wait to come back!!

We had a great time staying at Mathieu's place. He was very responsive and helpful throughout our stay. The location was excellent—convenient to bars, restaurants, and everything we needed. The house had a beautiful view and was very comfortable. We would definitely come back again : )

Alex was very prompt and flexible in working around our circumstances (traveling with a 6 month old) to facilitate an easy check in. He also offered some options for dinner. While the area is quiet after dark, my wife and I walked to and from the nearby train station until the early evening. We enjoyed our stay in Boston.

It was an excellent location! Very walkable to places such as museum of art, Fenway Park, and the Boston Public library. Lots of great places to eat close by as well. Located very close to Metro transit. Healing Home's was very proactive with getting back with us on everything. We really enjoyed our stay!
fun times

Host was super responsive and immediately sent someone over to investigate a beeping issue when we could not locate the source.  They were super communicative. Place is clean, great towels and bathroom. Comfy bed. Perfect for a night out
this was a perfect place for a bachelor party. we had a blast. thanks for hosting us
Stayed twice in one trip, nothing to complain about!

This is a steal in the heart of South Boston! Such a cute and modern space, looks exactly like the pictures.
Easy check in and check out, clean, and Shelby was very easy to communicate with. Would definitely recommend to any group looking to stay in the area for a weekend :)

Great location in downtown Boston and super close to the metro if you wanted to go elsewhere. Very walkable from south station where we got our bus. There was so much space and everything was clean and laid out for us. The washing and drying facilities was a bonus for us as we were travelling. Amazing space to share with friends I would 100% recommend.

We had a nice stay. The place was very clean and nicely decorated. The parking out back was a huge plus! Only downside is it’s very loud. The house echos and you can clearly hear the people next door. Vanessa was great and very communicative. Next time I’m in the area I will stay here again
Great location, big space.
Loved it!! Amazing place close and convenient!!
Although is may not be the most updated looking space, it is a decent size room and living area when you just need a place to stay near the city for a few nights. Also, having parking is a huge plus!
Loved our stay here, and appreciate the proactive communication and responsiveness from our hosts. Great experience and would highly recommend.

Nick's place was perfect --- even nicer than the photos since he has repainted and had new floors put in since the pictures were taken. The kitchen had everything I needed to cook, it was close to everything and public transportation was easily accessible, and the parking was a breeze. I was working from Boston for 5 weeks and never had problems with the wifi or connectivity.

I would like to start by saying the house was absolutely beautiful. When I first booked, I was looking for a whole house because of the amount of people I had and I didn’t want to have to worry about noise (talking during the night) being an issue since we were on vacation.
I had thought this was the entire home, since that is what the home page of the listing said. However it was not which was disappointing.
As imagined the talking ended up being an issue one night which I found off putting due to the fact my friends and I were trying to enjoy a few days away from work. I was also off put by the cameras in the interior of the house.
I would say this would be a good relaxing stay for someone who doesn’t plan on being out late and staying up late to enjoy time with friends.

Cosy place, easy to access, was cleanly presented and had plenty of linens and most of the basics covered. No major issues.
Beautiful view!
The studio is very clean and well organized. I only stayed one night but it was quiet and felt safe. Jonathan is great at communicating all details.

The location was excellent and the unit was very clean and quiet.  We felt safe and had everything we needed and then some.  The only negative I could say was it was we had to climb stairs and we were travelling with an infant so it was somewhat inconvenient.  However this was shown in the booking so I was aware, however the location more than made up for the inconvenience.
I enjoyed the stay. The apartment was super cute and quite . Hosts were very responsive . Great location . We will be back .
Great place to stay. In a walkable area and very clean updated.

The Pink Pearl was a great place to stay for our first trip to Boston. Deb was very communicative and helpful leading up to our stay, even letting us drop off our things when our flight arrived before check-in. Her recommendation to use a water taxi to get from Logan to the Marina was a great tip we would have never known about - it made the airport commute fast and enjoyable. Sherry met us early to orient us to the area and the boat. She was so friendly, went over every detail, and offered great recommendations for places to eat in the area. The boat was exactly as advertised and clean. We had six adults stay there, which was tight, but we had everything we needed. The master bed was also exceptionally comfortable. For people who enjoy walking, you can walk tons of places from the houseboat. It was about a half-hour walk to the North End, and we walked the entire length of the Freedom Trail, which ends near the boat. We enjoyed the harbor walk, the very nearby Naval Shipyard, and the streets of Charlestown. We also took advantage of a nearby Blue Bike station to get a little farther. The marina was lovely - the water, the view, the other boats, and the people. A great place to stay in a great location and we highly recommend a stay on the Pink Pearl!
Great location! This place is super close to lots of famous Boston areas. They need to update the place a bit but if they did that the place would be perfect for 1 or 2 people!

Pros:
-Clean
-Great location with most places within a 30-40 minute walk
-Keypad makes it very convenient to check-in/check-out of the unit
Cons:
-Inflexible check-in/check-out times that are less lenient than even a hotel so if you are arriving early or leaving late expect to lug your bags with you everywhere
-Very sparse amenities i.e. no body wash, hand soap, hair dryer, etc.
-Communication is extremely impersonal and the apartment appears to be a unit mass rented through the building landlord rather than by the homeowner
Great place to stay, plenty of restraints nearby and about 20min from Gillette stadium

The apartment was clean, very well maintained, and spacious. It can comfortably accommodate up to two people. The building also features a beautiful lobby, perfect if you want to sit and chat with a group of friends. It's located close to Chestnut Hill Reservoir, which is great for evening walks. During my stay, there was a hiccup at check-in. I had to check in during the middle of the night, but the host had accidentally misplaced the keys because another guest had taken mine by mistake. As a result, I had to book a hotel for that night and stay there. Fortunately, Airbnb refunded the amount for that night. The process for late-night check-ins could use some improvement. My key was placed in a lockbox, but when I arrived, I noticed that there were several lockboxes, many of which had the same code. This likely contributed to the mix-up with my key. Aside from this incident at check-in, the stay was amazing! I highly recommend this place as a great and affordable option for staying in

Lovely stay in Jen and Philips place. They were excellent hosts - always responsive to any questions. The accommodation was spotless and we felt very much at home - some good local shops and places to eat or get take away. Very easy to get in and out of the city using public transport. There were 6 of us staying in the accommodation (2 adults/4 children) and it didn't feel too crowded - everyone had a bed - beds were all clean and comfortable.
If you're going to Boston I'd highly recommend Jen and Philips as a place to stay.

Great place to stay near the heart of Downtown Boston. There are bikes for rent out front. The space is a perfect studio size. When we arrived the toilet was a bit leaky due to a valve issue. We reported it and by the end of the day it was fixed by maintenance and extra towels were provided. Great communication by the host. Would absolutely stay again.
Steven was responsive to all of our questions. the home is perfect and in a great location.
Nice place

Such a great place to stay. Comfortable, quiet and central. Easy walking distance to restaurants and bars. It felt like a safe place to walk around even at night. The apartment was compact but with great use of space. I would highly recommend.

Clean, comfortable,
Quiet.
Logement très propre. Informations très claires. Nous avons bien dormi. environ a 10 minutes à pied du métro.
Great place!  Lots do within walking distance!  We had a great time!  Thank you!!
Always a positive experience with Alicia and Maverick Empire's place. 3rd time staying with them.

El departamento es tal cual las fotografías, un vecindario muy ameno en una zona bonita de Boston.
Me gustó mucho la distribución del departamento, así como el estudio/oficina con juegos para niños.
Definitivamente volvería al departamento de Shira.
Such a good host, beautiful place, everything went so well!
Thank you! the place was great!

Perfect if you just need a bed and roof over your head. Just what I needed. Easy to check in and very walkable from location. There is a T-Station about a 7 min walk away that can get you anywhere in the city. Shared bathroom was never a problem for me as I could use it whenever I need without a wait.

One of the best BnB that I ever stayed in. The room is amazing, clean, with a lot of space and breakfast is available! It's located in a calm neighborhood and it's very easy to go downtown by bus. I would definitely stay there in my next trip to Boston!

Great place for a quick getaway! My husband and I escaped to Boston for a couple days and this place was just what we imagined - while small, it has the basic essentials, easy check in, good security and in a central location. Our communication with the hosts was effective and appreciated. They addressed any questions/concerns we had along the way in a timely manner. Definitely recommended!

These pictures DO NOT give the house justice whatsoever - and the pictures are great. Each room has its own smart TV and AC unit, and the beds...we found ourselves sleeping in until 9 or later every morning and felt as if we could have slept all day! The location was awesome for what we wanted to do, and Greg was a fantastic host - great communicator and very helpful and friendly. 11/10 would recommend, and really hope @thepuddingstone is available next time we make it to Boston. Thanks again, Greg!

Tina is  a wonderful host, her place has charm and the sleeping accommodations were comfortable.  Tina was very helpful in providing suggestions for places to eat and tips for getting around the area.  Definitely value for money.
Buen lugar
A comfortable apartment with a good  location. Thank you!

This is my second time staying at David’s place. It’s well-maintained, super clean and in the best location—near lots of restaurants, parks and the Charles River. David is a responsive, friendly and accommodating host.

Great room in a great location - 5-10min walk from HBS, 10min away from Trader Joe's and 7-eleven. Room was spacious, clean and bright and even had a fridge. Really incredible value for money - will come back if i'm visiting the area again.

Paul's apartment on Beacon Hill was our home away from home for 4 nights. It was very nice, very clean and in an amazing neighborhood. Safe to take a walk even at night. Close to a lot of must see in Boston.
The apartment was what you see on the pictures and much more. Jacuzzi bath tub! Lots of teas and Keurig machine for coffee with enough coffee pods for us. Basket of chips! Bottled water in the big ref.
The bathroom was immaculate, not a single mildew. Good size bedroom and a pull out sofa in the living room.
Very easy check in. Paul was very helpful in everything like where to park our car. He returned our phone calls and emails promptly. Tho we didn't see him we know that he was looking out for our safety and comfort. Thank you very much Paul. Hope that you'll share your apartment with us next time.

Great street view and very quiet and laid back area. Perfect location to walk anywhere. Alicia is great with communication.
Apartment is smaller than appears but it is not an issue and doesn't hamper the visit.
Definitely would use again without a second thought.

Wonderful host, very responsive. Great location and well appointed space. Had everything I needed. Check in time of 5 pm is remarkably late. Street bustle can be heard well from apartment. I had no problem sleeping through it and welcomed the energy (cause I live in suburbia!) but others may require ear plugs, noise machine, etc. Overall, fantastic stay.

Christal was wonderful! We were greeted with wine, chocolate, great snacks.....wonderful amenities. This is a lovely apartment in the heart of Beacon Hill. Although we weren’t there (travelled a lot) as much as I had hoped, we had a great time enjoying great food, shopping, etc. THANK YOU for a wonderful visit!

Healing Homes apartment was exactly as described. Super clean and well-stocked. Very comfy king sized bed. Building access was secure and user friendly. Traveling to/from the airport via the blue line train takes about 30 minutes door to door- easy location!
A fabulous Allston find ~
Great stay at Lixia's. She was helpful and her place was great.
Great place - spacious, clean and in a great neighborhood!
Beautiful clean space. Mylinh was friendly and helpful throughout our stay. Plan to stay again.

This is a fantastic place to stay! Great location, kind and welcoming host, and retreat of a room. It feels very private and has a much more secluded feel than you would expect for the location. Only a 10 minute walk to the train, which gets you anywhere you want to go - and also right by a bus stop. We had a great stay and would highly recommend you stay here!

Lee was a great, proactive, responsive host that made sure to answer any questions before they even arose! Great location, close to Fenway and tons of restaurants and grocery stores. Would certainly stay again!
You will find all you need to stay very confortable!! High level!!

This rental is great location to airport.  Can ride subway or uber/lyft in to downtown so had to organize the day. Rental was clean and Cynthia has tried to think of everything guests might need. Unsure about safety, but felt very safe.

This is a beautiful apartment, we'll appointed, in a fantastic location just a short walk from nearly everything! We thoroughly enjoyed Boston and loved calling this place home for a few days.
One slightly negative thing that was surprising to us was how difficult and expensive it was to park in this area. Just be aware of that.
We had numerous questions during our stay and the host was responsive within minutes every time. And very helpful.
Absolutely amazing Airbnb experience! Immaculate property, fantastic host, and perfect location. Highly recommend! 5 stars!

Great place in a fantastic location on lively Newbury Street. Lots of shops, restaurants and cafes, and it’s close to several T stations.
The apartment is as described; a small, modern studio. We had everything we needed, and what we didn’t have they had told us to bring. The keyless entry made self-checkin and out wonderfully easy. The building is secure and neighborhood the felt safe even at night as there were always lots of people out and about.
I would recommend this lovely space for two people.

Very nice apartment next, clean and well equipped.
Jurek gave us all the information we need and was very available for us.
I recommend !

My girlfriend and I stayed here for a weekend while in town for a Spartan Race in Barre. The hosts provide in-depth details regarding check in/out and are readily available regarding anything that you may need. The studio is cozy, quaint, and impeccably clean.  It was also nicely decorated and set-up to make it truly feel like a home away from home. The location is within walking distance of the local train, which can take you right into Downtown Boston to explore the city. It's also about a 20 minute car ride to Downtown Boston if you choose to drive. There are many good food options nearby as well such as cafes, diners, and restaurants. Overall, we give this place a 5/5.
Great location, amenities, very clean.

The location was very convenient and the host was responsive throughout our stay. However, the room was quite hot and noisy, which made it difficult to rest comfortably. Only a few towels were provided, so bringing extras might be helpful. I’d also recommend packing a sound machine if you’re a light sleeper. Overall, a decent stay if you’re prepared for those things.

We had an overnight stay at Izzy's between our bus and flight and it was exactly what we needed- simple and efficient. There is a small market about a block down with fresh produce, meat, Hispanic pantry staples and hygiene products that fed us for the night and following morning. The walk there was peaceful and the neighborhood was quiet and close to the airport, about a 10 min drive ($15 Lyft). The stairs up to the bedrooms are quite narrow, steep and noisy so just something to consider if you have mobility issues, heavy luggage, or are a light sleeper. Thank you Izzy

Loved it! The place was clean, super conveniently located, and easy to get to. Nothing fancy, but comfortable, practical, and affordable. Shelly the time to give us some personalized recommendations and they were great.

Customer service attitude from Francisco!
Cleanliness and order it is a high value with the room
Quick and efficient solutions to the small problems we faced
Very nice clean cute place. Very New England architecture. I really enjoyed my stay.
Nice area. Very accessible with buses / public transportation. Close to a Trade Joe. There is also a library and a park nearby. Host Todd is friendly.
Great location and great host!
Natalie is a wonderful host. Our interactions were minimum but meaningful and we fully enjoyed our stay.

Spacious and lots of natural light. We were very comfortable here for a short stay. The apartment is pretty barebones but has everything you need. Kitchen is well stocked. Space was also clean. Noise was not a problem even next to a busy street. My only issue was with the bathroom which could really use an upgrade but it was usable and fine for our needs. Would recommend and stay here again when we are in Boston!

This was a superb location, close to so many restaurants, shops and things to do! It's not ideal for doing a lot of cooking during the stay, but most people staying in the area are probably planning to be out and about most of the time! We were in town to look at colleges, and this location was perfect for getting to all of them easily and quickly! (now if we could have just had a word with Mother Nature, who dropped sleeting rain and cold temps on us for three days in April, that would have been ideal🤣)

We had a great stay at Konrad’s place. It was so spacious and perfect for me, my husband, and daughter. The location was excellent , a short walk from the greenway which we walked through multiple times. The home was very clean and Konrad always responded quickly with any questions we had. The entry way did smell of smoke but once entering the main apt space, it was fine so the smell could be from neighbors smoking.
Perfect place to stay, in a quiet building. Host is very responsive and provided parking garage recommendations. Would stay there again!
Great spot in a great location. Jay was super responsive and check in was super easy
Great place in a very convenient location. Walking distance from many places and subway is right down the block! Would recommend this place to anyone visiting.
exactly what we expected from the description. thanks!
We had a great stay! The house was well-appointed and recently updated. Plenty of room for our large group. Ten minute Uber ride into the city.

Afo was a good host. I had the chance to talk to him.
the place was nice and clean.
Widely I recommend to stay in the place.

The apartment was perfect for my husband and I and our two sons. It’s clean, close to all the restaurants in the North End, and a two minute walk to the Freedom Trail. Jason was great to give clear instructions and recommendations for restaurants and things to do in Boston. I would absolutely stay here again.
Place is clean , awesome vibe and amazing location.
Je recommande chaudement ce havre d’hospitalité et de confort à proximité du Boston historique.

The place was very clean and spacious, we were very happy with the multiple bedrooms and the nice furniture. Just a warning that it’s in a building that you do not lock the front door of the building, only the door of your apartment. Overall, it was very clean but we found dirty clothes (from previous guests) in 2/3 bedrooms. The clothes were under the bed and in the drawers which made it feel less clean. Other than these two things, we didn’t have any problems and the free parking on the driveway was a great amenity.
We had a wonderful 3-night stay at Heidi’s place. Everything was exactly as shown in the photos and the hosts were very friendly and helpful. No complaints at all. Would gladly stay there again.
Great place to stay - larger than the pictures make it look! The house is quiet (I never saw any other guests) and easy to check in and out. Would definitely stay here again.
Overall good.
Excellent location downtown Boston right near Fenway, plenty of restaurants around and overall a great neighborhood to stay at whether for work or pleasure! Would stay here again in future trips!

Polly is a wonderful host;
Everything was as expected.
Very nice breakfast in the morning and good coffee.
Just perfect.
Thanks :)

Incredible place, hosts, and location. My wife and I loved our stay. The suite was extremely clean and modern and there were so many thoughtful touches. Plus you are short walk to the orange line and bus stops. All instructions were transparent and helpful too!
Kataryzna was such an amazing host! She gave us great, clear instructions before arriving and even got medicine for my partner when she was sick. I would definitely recommend!
amazing location closed to many restaurants and beautiful surroundings!!

During my recent stay at this charming Airbnb in Boston, I was thoroughly impressed by its prime location, making it an exceptional choice for travelers seeking convenience and an authentic city experience. This Airbnb not only provides a comfortable and inviting space to unwind but also serves as a perfect launchpad for exploring Boston.
Great place
Fabulous location! Plenty of space for 2 people. An older building, as expected. Was perfect for our quick weekend getaway.

Angela was an excellent host! The room was cozy and comfortable— perfect for a short trip to Boston. She provided us with water when we arrived and was incredibly sweet throughout the duration of our stay. Both the bedroom and bathroom were clean. Grateful to have stayed here.
it was good

This is a great stay! Be aware that this is a private bedroom/bath and read the amenities prior. It has the luxury hotel feel with considerate details to make it comfortable. Would consider staying here in the future. Bonus: very easy to navigate to and from the studio
Loved it!
Hotel rates on my day of a business trip to Boston were astronomical, but thankfully I find this unit cleaner and quieter than a hotel room.  Bravo to the host!

Billy's listing is true to the way it's described & presented in the pictures; that is wonderful because it is a great place! I loved the location in Chinatown and proximity to Boston Common. The home was clean, comfortable, and quiet. Billy also provided timely and clear responses any time that I contacted him. I would stay here again on a return trip to Boston.
Nice, clean, modern apartment

couldn't be happier with our stay.
A++

Had a great stay with its Brian and Heather! The place was nice and clean, we were about a 10 minute walk to Fanieul Hall and about a 20 minute walk to North End where we had a great Italian dinner. Communication was quick and easy. Wonderful experience!

Did not get to meet host as she was out of town, but she did provide us with people to contact in Boston if needed. Instructions to house were good and got into house OK. We were not told which room we would be staying in - as there are several that she lets out - and had to contact host's friend. When we found our room the door was locked and there was someone asleep in our bed! We arrived after 1pm (which Hermina told us was the check in time) to be told by the woman in our bed that Hermina had said she could have the room until 5pm as she had just worked a night shift!! The lady kindly let us leave our massive backpacks in the room but we had to take all valuables with us. We were not informed of this by the host.
When we came back later that evening, the room had been vacated. The room was nice and spacious and the bed was comfortable, although there was a random mattress leaned up against one of the walls.
We were then woken up at 1.30am by two of the other guests washing and drying their clothes in the machine. As the bathroom - which is where the machines are located - was right next to our room, the noise was extremely loud and we had a lousy night's sleep. I spoke to the girls who apologised, but then kept going!!
Even though the house is next to a police station we did not feel 100% comfortable coming back to the house in the dark because of the neighbourhood and so came home early.
Hermina clearly uses her house as some sort of hostel. We were not expecting this. The sheets and towels were thin and there were dirty sheets on the landing and in the front room. Would not stay here again.
Daryl responds very quickly, he is very kind and thoughtful. The house is clean and comfortable. I think this is one of the best options in the area. Thank you, Daryl.
Brooke was an excellent host. Very friendly and accommodating.
The best kind of host, welcoming and care taking, and pleasant to talk with. The room was beautyful and clean.

Cute and quaint. Perfect location that is close to walk down to area with many great restaurants. Very close to public transit. Highly recommend not having a car as it’s nearly impossible to park with it being all resident permit parking only. The room is a little smaller than expected, but it was a decent place to have just to go sleep in. Neighborhood is quiet. Many things that you’re capable of walking to enjoy.
We had a great stay! William and Sophia were very clear in their communicatiin. The location is a beautiful brown stone with lots within walking distance.
Jonathan is a great host. He's super responsive, organized, clear, helpful, and considerate. My stay was smooth!

A fantastic apartment in lovely Beacon Hill- we were so glad we stayed here rather than in a downtown hotel. There are lots of nice places to eat on nearby Charles Street and Boston Common is minutes away. Breakfast at The Paramount was fab!
The kitchen in the apartment is well set up with everything you would expect though we didn't really make use of it.
Paul was a great host- quick to respond to questions. Collecting the key was straightforward and everything was set up as described. The beds were comfortable- a great sofa bed.
This was our first Air B&B and we loved it.
Everything was great, as was the neighborhood!
Clean and Great
This apartment was cozy but definitely the perfect space for a quick trip or a longer visit to Boston.  Location was key to shopping, restaurants, and walkable destinations around the city.
Great place. Great hospitality. Great location.
Super easy and clean!

Horrible stay. Worse than ever.
-tiny bed, tiny room
-moldy shower. Black mold around the shower booth
-shower sprinkles water outside the booth
-not enough towels for a week worth of stay
-the door into the property doesn't work the way it is noted in instructions. You have to enter a code and turn left to unlock. Enter the code and turn right to lock

Terry's home was very clean and the furnishing was very thought thru and well equipped. There was plenty of material such as maps and broshures.
The apartment is right near the T station Roxbury crossing and from there it is just a matter of minutes to get right into the center of Boston.
The communication with Terry worked very well. He answered our emails right away.
We certainly do recommend the apartment to other guests.
Great location! Marlene was a great host. Would definitely stay again!
Great place in a great location. Hosts were very helpful.
Location Location Location
Love this neighborhood

My parents and I enjoyed a delightful stay at Georgia's. It could not have been more perfect in every way. Georgia is the perfect host, and her home was convenient and just right for staying at while we explored Boston. The accommodations were so comfortable and inviting. 5 stars in every way.

Quiet, comfortable space in walking distance to many amenities. The place was just as described. Instructions were clear and easy to follow, and there were helpful signs throughout the apartment. It was clean and quiet. Thank you!!
Great suite I stayed in, with wonderful bed, desk, and couch. Large bathroom with hot tub and shower. Walk-in closet with fridge stocked with water.
Althea’s home was beautiful and perfect for our trip. Thank you so much for everything Althea!🩷

the host was great and communicated perfectly, we were allowed to check in earlier and the kitchen had everything we needed including salt, pepper, and Italian seasoning and all appliances worked. the couch beds were very big and comfortable, and all the ACs worked.
Great place right next to a t stop!
Everything was great! Very well located airbnb
Lovely spot in Boston's beautiful South End. Laura and Olivia are great hosts.

Apartment was as described and perfect location to be close to the airport. The hosts were responsive, flexible with my check-in time, and made the entire process easy. The rooftop area and gym were added bonuses. I felt safe the entire stay and was able to get things delivered to the apartment. I would rent again!
I stayed here for 5 months and enjoyed it very much. It had everything I needed for my stay and much more!
great location
Great airbnb! Nice, clean and modern apartment. Super convenient location right by subway station. We loved our stay! Host was great with communication. We were very pleased.

Absolutely, great place perfect if you wanna stay in Boston for a couple of days and explore the city
Very nice area easy to park the car too, and they have parking behind the apartment and parking meter on the front
We loved it thank you

JLee was a helpful host; she was waiting for me when I arrived from the airport.

As the ad points out, the apartment is unfinished but is comfortable. The apartment is wonderfully located, close to transportation links, but in fact, I walked right into the centre of the city a couple of times.

The accommodation of Frank and Delilah is spectacular. They were aware of our requirements and quickly answered our questions when we needed them. The cleanliness of the place is impeccable and since your arrival they make you feel at home, they gave us blankets to shelter us while we watched TV with the family in the living room and they even have board games available to have a good time with the family.
nice for a weekend getaway.
Lindsay's little place was perfect for our needs. We boarded our cruise ship the next day so we only stayed one night, but we would definitely stay here again!
Great location, easy to walk to multiple neighborhoods. Clean, decent furnishings.

My expectations started high thanks to photos and previous reviews and continued upward after meeting our hosts. The house is beautiful, immaculate and convenient to JP's stores and eateries as well as the Pond.  I wasn't sure about sharing house space (kitchen) with our hosts, but they made it easy.  It was a lovely visit and we are looking forward to a return.

Ken’s place is beautiful. He has exquisite taste and the place is filled with numerous creature comforts including the luxurious bed, lovely furnishings, a well-equipped kitchen, gorgeous indoor plants, a fireplace and a private backyard paradise.  Ken’s warmth and hospitality is  truly the best we’ve ever experienced. This is a 5+ star accommodation and we will definitely be returning.

I stayed for first time in Boston a few days at Denise place, the place is as in picture, a haven. The place in a side road, you don’t hear any cars noise.
The apartment is beautiful furnished, Denise left extra amenities like slippers, shower gel, shampoo, 4 water bottles as in a hotel. The apartment is 2min walk from BackBay Station and spent all the time walking around Boston,a beautiful city.

Damon's apartment is just as lovely as it sounds!  From the stocked kitchen to the great location to the special touches he leaves for you this place is a gem.   We rented a car so didn't use any of the public transportation but street parking was readily available.  I would highly recommend staying here!
Margarita is such a wonderful host! She has a great tea collection and she’s super kind! Definitely recommend
This was one of the nicest Airbnb’s I’ve ever stayed at host was very nice. Five stars. If I could give it 10 stars I would.

Von and Michael's place is awesome. The location is close to a lot of restaurant and downtown Boston, and the neighborhood looks lovely and seems super safe. As pointed out, there are quite a few steps of stairs, and they are pretty steep so be mindful of this if you are bringing heavy luggages. The room we stayed in has 4 big panels or windows, so it is well lit during the day. We only stayed for 2 nights, so it was only a short stay, but the experience was great.

Jessy and Diego were very helpful and easy to get in touch with. Great Boston apartment building, as a family of four with two elementary age children - we felt safe, at home, and relaxed. Lovely bedrooms and great to have the kitchen there. Comfortable and a great view. So easy to get around and the restaurants and shops are close.
buena ubicación comodo
parfait!
Chip was very accommodating, even in the event of a snowstorm. I would highly recommend his place to anyone visiting the Boston area.

This was such a nice place with plenty of room for my family of 6. It was conveniently located about a 10 min walk to the Blue Line of the subway so that we could get downtown quickly. The place was clean and well-furnished with all the amenities we needed.
Jessica Is a super host!!! We loved our stay. The house was very clean. Jessica was very responsive and gave great s great suggestions about the area

Fidèle au photo et à la description, facilement accessible avec les bus à proximité.

Very cute and comfortable place.  Great location with easy access to parking in Boston Common. We loved our stay here!
This room is truly a solid value in the city of Boston. Clean, comfortable, convenient, and very affordable. I was 100% satisfied with my stay and I would recommend it to any solo traveler.
It was a really nice place. Alex took care of any issues that occurred right away.
Nice and well described. Thatch was responsive if there were problems.
Had a great stay at the verb hotel! They were  super accommodating and hotel amenities were nice.
Very well stocked and so comfy. I felt like I was spending a few days visiting a friend in their home. Great location, right across from a huge park and many restaurants insights to see.
You'll love this place. Nice and cozy in the best location. The host is also very caring and friendly!
Great kitchen and bath for a studio. Location is right on Newbury with tons of shopping, restaurants, and good access to public transit.
All good

Very cozy and quaint little studio space. Makes a great home base for going out in the area or venturing further into Boston. Perfect location in Allston with an included parking spot!
Everything is clearly laid out well and the space itself is nice/clean. Would look forward to staying again!
Nice place in and out. clean space. Good accommodations. The host was very easy going. And we had a great night rest. Thank you.

The apartment was perfect for our short stay in Boston. The location was great, the space super clean and we loved having a quiet place to return to after a day of museums and sight seeing. Highly recommend!
Arrivée indépendante, images fidèles à la réalité, messages avec toutes les explications nécessaires (long mais très bien)

I have a LOT of good things to say about this unit. It is right in the city and the instructions and responsiveness of the host was top notch. The unit is a bit tired.
There was an appliance issue- but that can be expected and the host demonstrated a desire to fix it right away- I asked that he wait until we checked out. They were very accommodating with a later check-out to help with our flight plan.
I do feel compelled to discuss the neighborhood because this wasn't as clear in the description. Being right across the street from a daytime homeless refuge, there was a large population of challenged individuals sleeping in the vicinity after the shelter closed. While this is reflected in the great deal price- I think it needs to be clear. Single women, especially, should be very cautious here- especially if they plan to enter or exit the building after business hours.
As long as this is clear and prepared for- the unit was very adequate for a short stay.
great location, small but good for a long weekend. responsive host and easy check in. neighbors can be heard through thin walls. overall would recommend for short stay.
I had a great time in this Air BnB. It was clean and easily accessible. Communicating with Bennett was a breeze.
This brownstrone was beautiful on a lovely, tree-lined street. Great for visits to Fenway. We'd definitely come back, if ever in the area again. Great communication from the host too!
Highly recommend staying here! The entire place was very clean, Kenny was very responsive when I had questions. I’d love to stay here again next time we’re in Boston.

Location really stood out and was amazing. Walkable distance to many shops and restaurants and parks.
The space itself is small (especially the bathroom) but ideal for a quick weekend trip.

Jonathan’s place was wonderful! It was a clever use of space and was a great quiet place to return to at the end of a long day. I highly recommend staying here for anyone interested in exploring Boston!
Was much quieter in the morning than expected and location was ideal.
Good place to stay overall. Comfortable and clean room

A lovely place to stay! Spacious, clean, and had everything we needed. East Boston is such a great neighborhood - and you have easy access to downtown Boston just one stop away on the subway. Highly recommended!

This was our third visit to this apartment, and we’ll be back! Perfect location. Kid friendly (books/toys). Just ideal. I want to buy the place!!!
Tim and Becca are super resourceful and responsive. Ideal hosts! They live in another unit in the building.
Great location!! The space is really cozy and felt like and actual home not a cold hotel style house. So many food, coffee, shopping and sightseeing close by. Would love to come back!

Ubytování u Johna nemělo chybu! Klidná a čistá lokalita, kousek od spoje do centra. Barák byl čistý a klidný. Společná koupelna nebyla žádným problémem. John vždy reagoval rychle na doplňující otázky. Nemám jedinou výtku
The apartment was clean , modern and comfortable. The neighborhood was a little sketchy
The location is very good.
The place was exactly as described and at a great location!
Apartment exactly as described, great location and available for communication at all hours. Would recommend to anyone.

Wonderful location - North End full of history and Italian culture including restaurant, bakeries, Coffee shops and Gelateris !! Convenient to everything. Uber from Logan airport less than $10.00. Plenty to do and see within walking distance (including, Fanueil Hall Market Place, Boston Common, Boston Garden, etc.) For things a bit further afield the subway is a short walk from the apartment. Apt. is incredibly well stocked for anything you might think of. Too bedrooms are well appointed and comfortable beds. Very quite neighborhood.
I loved! Loved! Loved! Staying here. I would 100% recommend booking it.
Great neighborhood

This place was in a very ideal location on a side street in the main area in Boston commons. The only thing I would warn people about which hasn’t been mentioned here is that there’s a nightclub literally two doors down and on weekends (at least during our stay) there would be easily 300 people in the street right out front. We didn’t mind at all since we were doing things late either way but people looking for a quiet spot on the weekend should look elsewhere. However if you’re trying to have a good time and experience the city all while being able to walk home to a comfortable retreat at any moment I would recommend this place 10/10. Communication with owner/company was also very good
I enjoyed my stay here. The host was great!

Truly amazing and worth the money!!! You will not regret booking with them at all. They are such outstanding hosts. The place is absolutely adorable! Everything was so tidy and sparkling clean. Couldn’t recommend this stay enough!!!! Book it!!
Beautiful and clean apartment,fully equipped kitchen, and conveniently located close to North Station.
Very well organized, clean and great location.

I stayed at Brian + Heather’s place with family while attending a conference in Boston. It was very walkable, close to several restaurants, and nicely sized for our group. As listed, and would definitely stay again!

A pleasant stay overall. The bed was comfortable and the kitchen and bathroom were very nice. The host was extremely communicative and open and helpful. The location is not the greatest, with fast food places nearby, there were rats outside the entrance. We also heard loud noises at night and a tow truck in the parking lot that woke us up. If you’re sensitive to rodents or loud noises and light, it might not be the place for you.

Riyo’s place was such a great location with easy access to the Orange line T station. They have tons of great restaurants in the area, all within walking distance. Highly recommend Riyo’s place, just as described. Very cozy space!

Meri was a fantastic host! She was very well organized with her welcome book and always responded in a timely manner. This is one of few airbnbs where I felt like it was cleaned really well. Highly recommend to anyone!! I will for sure be coming back again
Very comfortable home, great location, easy access to enter accommodation. Would recommend.
House was ok bedrooms and kitchen were clean the only complaint I have is the sofa it’s need to be replaced other than that my staying at Evonify Corporate &Medical Housing was pleasant

Love the location with tons of restaurants within walking distance from house. Home was extremely spacious equipped with everything you’d need. Will definitely stay here again if we’re ever back in the area.

Excellent location in the heart of Boston. The host was extremely good at communicating and also providing helpful information that she thought would enhance our stay. Would definitely recommend and would definitely stay again.

We had a great stay. We had a few complications with finding the remote and the temperature. Everything was resolved immediately, the remote was in the couch lol. They changed the temp for us through their app. Very clean. The roof has a beautiful view especially at night. They respond under 20 mins obviously depending on the time you need to contact them. We were very comfortable and the furniture was up to our standards. Would stay here again 10/10 recommend!
Fantastic place, great price, great location. Little hickup getting in, was taken care of instantly. Top notch customer service. Would recommend.

This was a good place to stay and I would highly recommend it for a couple looking for a simple place to stay on a weekend away in Boston or to visiting students of the surrounding universities. The brownstones are apartments largely so there was neighbor and neighborhood noise well into the night but nothing more than city life in a bustling neighborhood. It was walkable to everywhere with great food options around.
Em and Nancy are very hospitable. Clean, organized and easy to get a hold of via phone.
Would stay again

First let me say I agree wholeheartedly with my fellow travellers who have given Gina her well deserved five star reviews. Gina’s place is so comfortable and lovely, with the nicest whimsical design touches like the “scattered clock” and the cool magnetic light in one of the bedrooms. For amenities we had everything we needed, it was super easy to find and get in, and a very short and cheap Uber ride to and from the airport. The bed linens, towels, pillows etc were comfortable and immaculate, and there were lots of toiletries. Such a great and affordable alternative for a family of 3 with a teen when a single hotel room is just not as comfy anymore as having some extra space. The location couldn’t be better. Definitely check out Theo’s down the street for a huge delicious breakfast (be prepared for a lineup on weekends) and the local bakeries. There’s a good convenience store around the corner with an ATM and a decent selection of wine (and a very nice proprietor). The pizza at Regina is delicious. We walked everywhere so easily, to a Celtics game (great tacos at the concession!), the aquarium, Faneuil Hall, and the historic sites so close by including Paul Revere House and North Church. We even walked over to Cheers in Beacon Hill (a bit cheesy but why not and a beautiful walk) and to the absolutely beautiful Omni Parker House hotel where you can see the table where JFK proposed to Jackie and try the original Boston cream pie which my son now says is his favourite ever dessert. We were only in Boston for two and a half days so as you can see the location will allow you to do so much in a relatively short time, including walking off all the great food. We loved it in the fall and hope to return again in the spring as there’s so much more we want to see. Thank you Gina!

Victoria’s place was in a wonderful location near public transportation, restaurants, and a grocery store. It was on a quiet side street. The place was clean and cozy.
She was great to allow flexible check-in which we unexpectedly needed.

Toni's place is beautifully decorated, insanely comfortable, and so inviting. I stayed for a month and had everything I needed and more. Toni is a gem of a host. She was responsive, accomodating, and went out of her way to make sure I was comfortable and had everything that I needed.

The place was exactly as described, spotless and smelled and looked squeaky clean. It was the perfect location for the price with the T stop right outside the door, Starbucks right around the corner.  It was a great value, and the communication on point. The bed was very comfortable.
Accurately advertised.
Great place and excellent support from Brian/Heather. Very convenient for large group and very well located. No doubt we will stay again in this place
Met at Griffin’s for a 50th birthday celebration. Loved the area & our place. Thank you!

Fabulous stay! We had the pleasure of staying in two of the rooms in Robin’s beautiful house. Both rooms were very comfortable and had plenty of space. Loved having our own mini fridge. Location was great with an easy walk to the train, restaurants,grocery store, and walking trails. Felt safe. Robin’s friendliness and welcoming nature made our stay extra special and we can’t wait to visit again!

Fairly comfortable and clean unit.  Pillows needed updating.  The bed linens were not cotton and there was no cotton mattress pad --just a plastic or waterproof cover on the mattress then the sheet so that was uncomfortable for me.

Xerxes' Beacon Hill apartment was exactly as described---a great, remarkably quiet one-bedroom in Boston's best neighborhood! The location was perfect, very near fabulous restaurants (we recommend No. 9 Park) and the Park Street "T" which put you in easy reach of all of Boston.  Xerxes was available by text and phone to answer any questions, and kept the place absolutely spotless.  We would highly recommend to anyone visiting Boston!

Location was great; walkable to the T, Public Gardens, restaurants and shops. Apartment was very old and shabby, although it was clean. Walking up four floors on narrow stairs in the heat was a challenge with luggage, but we were warned. Apartment door wouldn’t lock the 2nd day and we had to catch a train, so it stayed unlocked all day because the host couldn’t get anyone to lock it for us, which was disappointing. It turned out to be something we turned incorrectly from the inside, but those instructions weren’t given to us until afterwards. (The door had an electronic lock but it didn’t automatically lock when the home button was pushed or code was input nor did the host have the ability to lock it remotely.) Luckily we were in the top apartment and no one was going to huff it up all those stairs to bother us. 😆 A/C worked well but had to run loudly all night to keep us cool. Host was fairly responsive but not to the personalized level we’re used to with other Airbnb hosts.
Good communication,  excellent location,  bargain price. Great option in Boston.

James and Nancy were great hosts! They were super friendly and gave us plenty of great recommendations and even came to say hi. The neighborhood was really cute and safe and very short walk to public transportation into the city. The unit was very clean and cozy. Bed was very comfortable. Would definitely recommend and stay here again!

Location was great for the airport and had plenty of room for our family. Food and supplies close by. Street noise is only annoying if you sleep on the intersection side of the house. Would stay here again!

Excelente ubicación, el departamento es elegante y todo funciona muy bien. Es tal cual cómo está anunciado, el único detalle es que para cocinar tiene sólo algunos elementos. El baño y la ducha son fantásticos, y la cama comodisima

We really enjoyed our stay at this suite. It was just as described. The space was decorated nicely, had all of the necessary amenities and was impeccably clean! The area around the suite felt safe, was very walkable, close to the T and in an area that had plenty to do. The host was very responsive and gave clear directions for check in and assisted promptly when I had some difficulty logging into the WiFi. The host also provided several reasonable and safe locations for parking that were close to the Airbnb. Would 100% stay there again!

Tim's place is a jewel on Back Bay!!
Great location, clean and comfortable accommodations and proximity to Prudential Center and Copley train station. Plenty of restaurants, bars, shops and historical sites are walking distance and easily accessible. I highly recommend Tim's place and would definitely return.
We had a great stay! Definitely would rent from Stone again! 🤠
Great apartment in a great location

Finding street parking in the night time was hard. I had to loop around about 4-6 times to find a spot so I recommend you plan accordingly if driving. The street was really quiet and the house was clean and as described. If it was still available we probably would’ve booked again.
Nice apartment in good location. Kind hosts. Next parking garage far away and expensive.

Clean, spacious place, and the furnishings were super cute. The big screen TV was a great amenity and let us have a really fun movie night. Frank is also very hospitable and sent thoughtfully written tips on local areas to check out and details on the place.
Great location. I added a mattress topper to the bed and that made everything much better. Host was very responsive and pictures are accurate
Super clean, cozy. Definitely recommended. Despite it’s a bit far from the center, but it’s quite easy to be accessible to everywhere by public transportation.

Casimiro was a fantastic host who allows for flexible check in and check out times, and will gladly accomodate you if you ask. The location was exactly as described if not better and he was a excellent host. Would definitely recommend staying here!

Loved it, great central location and very nice, clean, quiet, and modern. Initially, we were a little nervous about the fold out murphy bed, but it turned out to be a full size very nice mattress; I slept like a rock.
We will be back, great place to stay!

First time in Boston, I loved the area this apartment was in. We had a car (only because we flew into Providence, RI), but found it was useless. For the most part you could just walk to wherever you would be going, if not it was so close to public transportation that it was no big deal. Being on the 4th floor was great, the view was good, and you could crack the window without worrying someone would bother you. The bed was comfy, and they had plenty of pillows which I really appreciate. The apartment had what you needed for a short stay. I also love history, and love how old the building is, but they did a good job on the place. The bathroom looks like it was recently remodeled. One last thing, I would defiantly recommend staying here.

Good location but multiple lights didn’t work and overall the place needs a deep cleaning. The TV stopped working and I could get not assistance in getting to working.  The staff they have managing the text number was dismissive even after I sent them videos.
Good location. As described. However the place was not particularly clean with some dust and also mould around the bath tub. We enjoyed our stay nonetheless especially due to the good location.
Cora's place looks exactly as it does in the pictures. It's very close to just about anything you could want from restaurants to liquor stores to grocery stores. I highly recommend!
This is a great place to stay in Boston. Everything about it was top notch - cleanliness, decor, food & host.

Amazing stay, even for just for one night. The house was beautiful and the location was very accessible with it being a 5 minute walk to the orange line. I got some of the best sleep of my life as well. Any difficulties we had were really our own fault so I would definitely stay again.
(5 stars)

This home is located in the “Southie” area of Boston. Less than a 10 minute ride to the airport if you are arriving by plane. Broadway is a short walk where there are a lot of restaurants, coffee shops and bars. It’s so convenient and to be able to put the car in the garage and make your way around town without it!  Highlight of our Boston trip was a 2 hour Segway ride by Boston Segway Tours!  Made our way through the city and learned a lot of history with Captain Thomson!  Highly recommend this home and the tour!

My boyfriend and I stayed here for a week and it was the perfect amount of space for us. The location was central to everything we wanted to see and do. We used Uber a few times, only after walking 10+ miles a day sightseeing. The bed was really comfortable and the apartment itself was very clean and well taken care of. We also enjoyed the huge tub. Xerxes was easily available by phone and/or text and followed up with me to make sure we made it in the apartment when we got there a little earlier than anticipated. Overall a wonderful experience that I would highly recommend. Thank you.
Ben’s place was exactly what we needed. It was clean, comfortable,  had everything we needed.  Also short drive to the colleges we needed to get to! Would definitely stay there again!
very friendly staff, super clean

What a great little fine if you’re in Boston for business or pleasure this is a great spot in the Southend , I’m here twice a month for work and I was just a delight to find you to host me and I have two more reservations coming up.
Keep it up guys also to my surprise I had a washer and dryer downstairs and eating pantry to prepare your food to make your food in the basement it was wonderful and I have fresh flowers geraniums waiting for me in my bedroom
Wonderful stay in Boston
Great place for what I needed
Well kept, affordable and easy access to  public transportation and shopping.  Definitely recommend
