Absolutely perfect location in the middle of everything.  We walked everywhere. Just wish there would have been some extra towels, and maybe some coffee stuff.

This place is awesome! It’s very modern, chic, and clean. The bed was comfy and the shower was spacious! The t station is seriously SO close, just a few minute walk.  The harbor is extremely close as well and worth the view. There is private access to a little gated space out back which was also a nice bonus, in case you wanted to go outside but were nervous about being on the street. The neighborhood felt safe and was full of Latino restaurants (the ones we tried were quite good!). Mini marts, liquor stores, and Dunkin’ Donuts very close as well. The kitchen was stocked with cooking supplies and there were plenty of towels and wash rags for our use. Cecilia is very sweet and helped us out with our questions. We would love the opportunity to come back!
Sabina & Frederick were great hosts, helpful, friendly and super responsive. The place is spacious and very clean. Recommended!
Great spot!

Nick's place was quite comfy for our weekend away in Boston. We were in town for a game at BC, so was nice + convenient to that, however, if you're looking for the full Boston experience, it's not the most convenient place - though it is close to the T and quite walkable. I highly recommend Jim's Deli up the street if you stay here - great breakfast!

All in all, a good experience!

It was great! Hermina offered us fresh fruits the moment we checked into her house and got everything prepared from the linen to the air conditioned to cool the room! Willl definitely be there again if i ever go back to boston!
Good apartments, clean and well decorated!
Great location
这是我第一次订airbnb，但是给我留下了特别好的印象！首先，预定成功后May很快就把房源的具体信息发给我了，之后向她反映问题也会及时得到回复。其次，离地铁站真的特别近，步行三四分钟吧，而且周边环境也还不错，离机场更是格外的近。除此之外，床很舒服，厨房用品也一应俱全，而且虽然一层有5个房间，但是因为有2.5个卫生间，所以洗漱基本不会冲突，隔音也还不错！总体来说非常非常满意
There can be a fair amount of street noise on the weekends, but otherwise the Location is great.  The kitchen and accessories are pretty basic, but the microwave is great.

A extremely awesome apartment, host and locale to be! The room has an exceptionally good view outside the window and room is very bright. Very very clean and feels much like home away from home. Jonathan is an amazingly nice person, been very accomodating to all the questions that I had. Will definitely be staying at his place again whenever I am back in Boston.
Great location! Perfect for a concert at Fenway
Maverick rooms are cosy but have all your necessities. It’s in a lovely neighbourhood and close to everything!
it was exactly as described.

The apartment was perfect!  We stayed there for 10 days and had everything we needed.  The sofa futon was really comfortable and easy to set up if you have an extra person.  Everything is also spotless.  What is also great if you are working remotely is that there are several common spaces in the building complex.  And location is great too, especially if you want to be in Brighton/Allston near BC!  Naveen was a great host - responded to questions in literally minutes.  We'll be back!
Great apt., killer location, we'll be back next time we're in Boston!
Good overall. Easy to access public transportation, and very easy to catch an Uber. Close to the city. Solid experience overall
hervorragende Unterkunft und supernette host
Javier's apartment in the South End was spacious, clean, comfy, and in a great location. I highly recommend!

This was our first time in Boston and we had an excellent stay. The AirBnb was clean, comfortable and not far from the train. The host gave excellent local recommendations and was very easy to work with. Very responsive communication.
bathroom not in same room as flat which was a bit odd -  but otherwise everything fine
Very nice and clean place! Would stay again. Hosts give you your privacy and made us feel welcomed.
Excelente locación y excelente anfitrión. Muy recomendable.
The condo was spacious, clean, and had all the amenities you might need.  A very peaceful and cozy place to stay in Boston.

Beautiful loft apartment in a lively section of Boston Commons. The photo and description were very exactly as listed. Plenty to do and a very lovely and quiet building. Owners were excellent with check in instructions (very easy) and we had a lovely stay! Thank you healing homes! Would definitely recommend and would stay here again!
Très bien, seul petit bémol: dans notre cas il n' y avait que deux salles de bain pour 14 personnes.

I absolutely loved my stay in the North End! The apartment was so warm and cozy you feel right at home, especially on a 15 degree night! I absolutely adore the neighborhood, so charming and the food is amazing.
Communication was great and the check in / out was super easy.
Would definitely stay again in the future!!
I ended up not needing to stay there but they were communicative.
Cute place in a good location!
Great location near Boston’s subway system that made the whole city easily accessible — even without a car.
Great stay in a super quiet and beautiful Boston neighborhood. The home was exactly as pictured and communication with Mark was great. Highly recommend!

Shelly and Lance were the best hosts. House was Soo beautiful and they were very organized and left a lot notes for the guests and beds were very comfortable. Had best sleep ever. I would recommend this host any day. 5 star service.

My daughter is a dance major at Boston Conservatory and had a recital this past weekend. This place was a perfect place to be for it. 2 bedrooms with lots of room and 3 doors down from the dance auditorium! My daughter stayed with me and loved that she didn't have to commute 20 minutes from her apartment. I also loved the convenience both to the auditorium and all the restaurants and stores that are within walking distance.
Giannoula and Tim were great and were extremely gracious and responsive. Anytime I texted them the would respond within minutes. They provided everything we needed and were very friendly.
There is a full kitchen with stove and large refrigerator, nice living room and eating area, tons of natural light and a nice patio, which we could not take advantage of, but I imagine it is great in warm months.
One thing to note: there is no TV but they do have a projector and screen. However, there is only a VGA connector. If you have a newer laptop that only has an HDMI output, you will need to bring an adaptor. I didn't have one, but it was not a problem for us. We didn't watch much TV and when we did, it was easy enough to have my laptop on the coffee table and watch from the couch.
All in all, I highly recommend this place, Giannoula and Tim and will absolutely stay here again!

A very great moment at Jurek home.
Comfortable, quiet and next to the T.
I hope to return.
See you!
Great spot

Taskin is an incredible host who goes above and beyond to ensure my stay is nothing short of amazing. His attention to detail and genuine care make every visit unforgettable. I’m truly grateful for his kindness and dedication. If you’re considering booking, look no further—Taskin is the best!

Grossartiges Haus, ideales Refugium in toller Gegend, liebevoll und persönlich eingerichtet , Flughafen zu Fuss ! erreichbar, wunderschöner Gartensitzplatz mit Eichhörnchen 🐿️ im Baum
Schnell in Nähe vom Wasser
und U-Bahnen , absolut zu empfehlen

This was the perfect place to spend a few nights in Boston. It was very clean and comfortable in addition to feeling safe. Howard was very responsive and had amazing recommendations for local restaurants. I would definitely stay here again on my next trip to Boston!

I had a wonderful stay! The place was very quiet, clean, and well-maintained, making it perfect for relaxation. I didn’t face any issues at all, everything was just perfect. My stay was truly pleasant, and I would love to come back again. Highly recommended!

Good spot for a brief weekend trip. Easy to walk to appealing attraction or hope on nearby transport. Due to my height (6’3”) I struggled a bit with the very small bathroom but otherwise the apartment was comfortable to reside in and had everything I needed.
Very cozy and clean experience! Communication with host was very available before, during and even after stay when needed. Great friendly neighborhood . Would definitely stay again!
It met my expectations and my needs
We had a very pleasant stay here. It was perfect for a weekend trip.

Frank is an absolutely great host. The house is very modern with an aesthetic touch. We were 5 of Us- ages ranging from. 77 to 9. The house has a small sitting area with a nice kitchen and a bathroom on the ground floor. The first floor has a big bedroom and then second floor has a bedroom with a bathroom. That was kinda odd coz in the night people sleeping on the first floor had to either go up or down to use the restroom. A little uncomfortable for us with an elder Person and a kid. Also the house had beautiful rugs placed everywhere adding to the beauty. However the bedroom at the second floor had a big rug running under the beds as well- the rug would keep moving and pooling together... A little scary with elders and kids.
Frank was very responsive- the machine liquid was over and he managed to get it delivered while we went out sightseeing. He was very communicative.
It's a lovely house to stay in if you are okay with the setup as described above.
We enjoyed our stay

Perfect location, easily walkable to so many parts of the city. We didn’t use our car during our entire trip. Definitely a great value for where you’re staying. Also, the staff was super helpful and hospitable. We would definitely stay here again the next time we get a chance to visit Boston.
The place was great, clean and cozy and the hosts were very prompt and concise in communicating.
It’s been such an amazing experience!
Great location, clean, safe, excellent water pressure but only reason to lose a star is it needs a new mattress.

We thoroughly enjoyed our time at Jacklyn’s place.  The apartment was spacious and comfortable.  We loved the kitchen, the coffee, and the free Netflix.  But, while the apartment was very nice, it was easily topped by the outstanding interaction we had with Jacklyn and Joel.  Our stay was marked by some special circumstances, which we disclosed before we arrived.  Jacklyn and Joel made every accommodation to us to address those circumstances.  Their generosity and concern they showed in dealing with our situation was not only greatly appreciated by us, it made our stay truly memorable.  The apartment is great...but I don’t think you’ll find better hosts than Jacklyn and Joel.
Great location, looks exactly the way it’s shown
Perfect stay, definitely walkable to Fenway! Our host was very accommodating and easy to work with and communication was great! We’d definitely stay again!

Excellent property,with tonnes of character in historic South Boston in a great neighbourhood In good walking distance of most major attractions
Wonderful, attentive host with excellent communication before and during our trip
Stayed with my wife and 3 kids and loved our stag would strongly recommend

Beautiful house!! Very new and clean! Had two cool decks but wished upper deck would have had furniture to sit on. Pull-out couch bed was uncomfortable. Overall was a wonderful house and Shelby was very responsive.
Would highly recommend!
Convenient, tidy place ...
A great place that’s close the city and a lovely neighbourhood!

Our stay here was fabulous. Great hosts who were proactive about communicating leading up to our stay. The house was very cozy and welcoming. Felt just like home. We had everything we needed for our stay in Boston. The house is in a great location and lots of things near by to walk to. We would definitely stay here again.

A perfect example of why you stay at an Airbnb instead of a hotel. A great room in a wonderful old building offering a glimpse at what it is like to live in Boston, something you wont get at a hotel. True, it is not in the center of all the touristy stuff, but you would never get that for this price. The room had everything needed, the check in was easy, street parking was also easy ( I stayed for 3 days so can say this with confidence), and communication was great. Highly recommended.
It was great. Lots of room in the condo for 5 of us. Great location.
Clean and perfect for our quick stay in Boston. Close to Target, Fenway, and Tatte- which we LOVED.

Absolutely lovely apartment- spacious and really well equipped with a great outside deck.  Spotlessly clean.  Comfortable beds and a lovely living area.  Andrea the host kept in contact to check if we needed anything.  Made our stay in Boston five star!
Lihua was a great host.  We travelled to Boston to see the Jays … fantastic location to get to Fenway Park.
Robin's home is beautiful.  You can expect a wonderful and memorable stay here.  The location, amenities and hospitality are all excellent.
Excellent location, easy access to the Charles River. Adam is an excellent host!
Excellent location right near transit system.  Handy to restaurants and points of interest!  Very clean and modern.
Very, very, very nice place to stay!!!🥰
Felt really comfy, very accommodating, clean and we had the privacy we were looking for

Mooi verblijf in veilige en familie vriendelijke buurt. Privé patio maar aansluitend een mooie groene schaduwrijke gemeenschappelijke tuin. Heel fijn op een warme zomerdag.
Wij waren zonder auto en dat was een goede beslissing. Er waren geen parkeerplaatsen in de buurt (we waren gewaarschuwd) maar de blauwe fietsen van Boston waren op de hoek. We hebben de hele week gefietst!
Het huis was prima, met een redelijk steile binnentrap. Alle kamers hadden airco dus ondanks het mooie weer hebben we goed geslapen in de ruime slaapkamers.
Drew reageerde snel en vriendelijk op onze vragen.
Een aanrader!

Great spot! Easy 10 mins walk to subway station which took us right to TD Garden for the concert. And nice to be just outside of the city hustle. No complaints,  exactly what we needed for our one night stay! And hosts were great, lots of info and recommendations! Thank you!
Great stay! Super nice area and great to visit Boston. Would definitely come back next time. Lihua was also really helpful and very friendly, great host!

I stayed at Billy's place over the summer for a total of 3 months and it lacked some of the basics that you would expect from an AirBnb:
(1) the Wifi was terrible. I took this place expecting to work from home and that was not a possibility. This is because there was one wifi channel for the entire building of probably 12 or so Airbnbs
(2) the bed was broken and was fixed by ductape
(3) half of the light bulbs were burned out
(4) there was a crack in the ceiling that leaked
(5) The kitchen was inadequately stocked with supplies to cook. There was maybe one big weird pot
(6) It is on the top of a 6 floor walkup, with no elevator and dirty, crooked stairs which became quite a hassle to carry groceries or any suitcases up
(7) Ant problem
In summary this is a place that looks great in photos but in practice clearly nobody actually lives here to give this apartment the TLC you might want for a comfortable stay. Great location though
My husband and I enjoyed our stay. It was such a cozy environment. ♥️ Aurelia was so sweet, and responsive.
Large room with a large bath - we travelled as a couple and we were very satisfied with the accomodation. The area was also beautiful. Thanks a lot to Maureen and Bill.
Booked for my colleagues and everything went smoothly

We stayed for 3 nights and we had an amazing time. The studio was so cute with everything we needed and even more. Cleanliness is very important to me and this airbnb was perfect. The hosts were very friendly, easily reachable and they suggested places to visit. I definitely recommend and would come again in the future!
Great location

Ok folks,  I hope I can adequately convey how fantastic the experience was staying at Boris and Susan's place. I needed a quick one-night stay close to the airport and the convenience with the airport shuttle to Airport Station and walkability to their place was much better than I expected. I ended up going into town for a Sox game and it was so easy taking the T. I typically don't rent places that have private bathrooms but their shared bathrooms are beautiful and super clean. The bed and sheets are super luxurious but the best part for me was the convenience of the location (airport and access to downtown) for what I needed. I'd stay there again for a longer trip even if I needed to be downtown more. So nice to walk to the airport shuttle and be at the airport in 5-10 minutes. Thanks Boris and Susan.

Great stay in Milk street with Healing Homes, the appartement was as expected all perfect for me.
In addition Healing Homes was super responsive on my questions.

This place was good place to stay
The neighbor is very quiet and I have a nice time staying at her house
Very beautiful space I highly recommend staying here

My sister in law and I stayed at Yishengs AirBnB for our girls weekend trip. The stay was perfect and exceeded all of our expectations. I came back home raving to my husband what a wonderful host and listing it was. The photos don’t do this place justice.
Here are some of the key highlights of staying at this listing:
*For the price and location, you really can’t beat it. It’s very close to the 11 line and the subway station. Only about a 5-15 minute walk to transit (depending on whether you take the bus or train).
There are several bars and restaurants close to the listing. We had Capo one night which is a quick 5 min walk and it was delicious!
*I had a red eye flight and Yisheng was sweet enough to let me use her spare bedroom to take a nap while our listing was ready to check in to. I had never heard of any other host doing this for a guest and I truly appreciated getting those extra hours of sleep. The bedroom was very clean and smelled amazing.
*The beds were by far the best I’ve ever slept on at any Airbnb or hotel. The pillows were also perfect for what I’m used to.
*The bathroom had really good water pressure. I love to take long hot showers and the shower and bath were both super nice. The bathroom had shampoo, conditioner, lotion and even toothpaste.
*There was a Britta in the refrigerator which we really appreciated since we didn’t need to buy gallons of water. I’m very picky with the taste of water and the water was good.
*Yisheng was very communicative whenever we had any questions. Ie: where to get brunch. She seemed more than happy to help us with anything we needed.
*The private terrace has great views of the neighborhood. It’s a great place to sit and unwind from your day.
*The listing was very clean and smelled like clean linen our entire stay.
*The listing has central AC and two fans which we used every night. This was very important to me as I run hot at night and like to be a little cold.
*The TV is a smart TV and I was able to log into my Netflix and Disney. But if you don’t have a streaming account there are several DVDs to choose from. And of course she had Good Will Hunting, a classic!
*Yisheng has a new puppy named Ollie and he was super sweet and friendly. I was very home sick from being away from my two dogs and it was a treat to meet such a sweet dog as Ollie.

We were initially very nervous to book an Airbnb that’s shared with someone else as two women traveling alone. This was our first time booking an Airbnb that was shared and it was perfect. The listing was on the third floor and while it was a shared home, it felt very private. Bottom line is that I would recommend this listing to anyone traveling to Boston. I enjoyed this listing so much that if I’m to return to Boston with my husband I can see myself rebooking this listing. Thanks Yisheng for being such an amazing host and sharing your beautiful home with us.

We had a fantastic stay at this property. Apartment was spacious, comfortable, and clean. Location was perfect with a gorgeous view of Boston Common and the state house. Peter provided very detailed instructions and was responsive to all communications. We were very happy with our choice to stay here for our group to attend an event in downtown Boston. Highly recommend and would rent again in the future.
Central location, small rooms but comfortable.
We really enjoyed our stay! Our unit was clean, quiet, and the location was perfect. Highly recommend for the price!
Great stay, super helpful.

Joseph's place was the perfect place for a long weekend in Boston. We loved being able to walk to the T and appreciated that it had two free onsite parking spots. We travelled with two small kids and the place was a great fit for them and offered a nice place for them to hangout and play. We appreciate how clean the place was and how well stocked it was with everything we needed!
If you aren't use to airplane noise, it is defiantly noticeable, but really didn't affect any of us.

Absolutely delightful location in South Boston. The room is a very good temperature and the bed is quite comfortable. Bathroom is kept clean and orderly. Fellow guests were admirable people. Fresh towels were provided and appreciated. Beautiful.
Javier was an excellent host and the apartment is a perfect location , very spacious and clean . I’d highly recommend staying here .
I highly recommend staying here. Host Natalie is very nice and helpful. I enjoyed my stay and would definitely go back.
Greg was a great host and I was very happy with the service he provided during my stay.
Love this space will definitely be staying here again. Ideal spot in Boston.
Thank you so much! 5/5 stars

GREAT location, extremely clean home. Very walkable area, host is very responsive, detailed instructions.
We struggled a little to find the back entrance to avoid the steps in the front. Parking was also a bit of a hassle since they charge $40 to include the (tandem) parking spot in the reservation. We parked in the Whole Foods structure overnight, no problem.
We struggled to set up the crib and ended up not using it (or any other items in the kiddie pack setup) but it was a great option to have for new parents and a rare offering from Airbnb's.
Oh, also the beds were INCREDIBLY comfortable and we slept like babies. ;) Thank you!

An amazing property!! Good location, clean, separate living space and sleeping quarters, close to public transportation. Gianni and Adriana were amazing hosts!! They're quick to respond to inquiries and concerns. They're so accommodating!! I would totally stay here again!!!
Todo estuvo muy bien, el Airbnb era agradable y la habitación increíble su privacidad y todo muy limpio. Alice super linda persona y muy atenta.

Lihua was extremely friendly and welcoming! Her home is gorgeous and perfect for a cozy stay in Boston. My friend and I stayed for a concert and a day trip in Boston, the place was perfect for walking! We will definitely be back in the future!
Great place would definitely come again! Heat stopped working but Konrad was quick to fix the problem with bringing firewood to use the fire place!
Vert great place
Jonathan is a great host. Very responsive and solved my problem efficiently. Totally Helped out business trip, wi return again!
Cozy and private place. Parking space is a plus. Very nice clean bathroom.
I had a wonderful stay in Boston at this garden apartment located right in the heart of Beacon Hill! My stay was relaxing and fun!

This was perfect for our needs while my son attended a summer program at the Longwood Medical Area.  I was able to work remotely very comfortably.  My son appreciated the gym.  The grounds were very peaceful and the complex was very quiet given its size.  Perfectly clean and exactly as pictured.  Conveniently located and safe neighborhood.  Would definitely stay again!
As Described! Wonderful Stay!

Effectively a hotel with no on-site staff. The number they give you to call routes through a call center to whichever employee happens to be manning the line at that point. If you drive, park at One Beacon Garage. They don't mention that in their instructions email. Great location. Pretty block in a pretty neighborhood. Cramped room. Ceiling slopes sharply over bed. Effectively an attic. I went during New Years, so I overpaid. I'd recommend a different room in the building.
We loved the apartment and all of the building amenities.  Great location walkable to Fenway / public transportation / bars and restaurants.  We hope to visit again!
Everything worked well for our stay. Good communication and all the specifications needed regarding the room and the house.

The apartment itself was cozy, very clean and stylish. The location is perfect as you can walk to all the great sights like the Boston Public Garden, Back Bay, Downtown as well as the Subway etc
There is a small kitchen with all the cooking utensils needed if you want to eat in.
I highly recommend this apartment and will not hesitate to book again with Maverick.
Beautiful, charming space! It was even better than the photos. Ideal location within JP! Loved the personalized, warm touches throughout the home. Would definitely recommend this place.
Fantastic location - walking distance to great food in North End!

My family enjoyed staying in Lawrence and Carrie’s space during the holiday.  We found the space to be exacly as advertised and a good size for our group of 5.  The beds were really comfortable for all of us.  The kitchen was really great for us as we enjoy making food everyday for our daughter.  We didn’t need to communicate much with our hosts as it was all pretty clear and laid out for us ahead of time via email.  We had a really nice holiday here, and we would consider doing it in this unit again.

Robin was an amazing host, and I highly recommend her to anyone considering staying in this area!
The house is in a very nice, safe, and quiet residential neighborhood with lots of authentic New England personality and charm (a quiet sort of charm), and only a 20 min or so walk northeast to UMass, or 10 minutes in the opposite direction to the nearest Red Line station.
Make sure you get on the correct Red Line (there are two versions that split off at one point)! Robin actually messaged me about this just in case, just as I happened to be literally sitting on the wrong side of the station, and just less than one minute before the wrong train came that I would've gotten on, had it not been for her immense thoughtfulness!
Robin greeted me and gave me a tour of the premises, and we had a very pleasant casual chat about the area and various other things. The house was very nice, charming and cozy (as in actually invoking feelings of coziness, not like the euphemism for tiny that a lot of other people use, because the house and guest room are very large and spacious far beyond what I am used to). She made me feel right at home, even offering some food, and some travel tips (including a travel book there you can reference for ideas).
On the morning of my checkout, as I went to the foot of the bed to turn off my phone alarm, I must have came too suddenly at the wrong angle, and heard a piece of wood snap (the bed was still fine and safe, but I still felt bad about it). I probably shouldn't be saying this because I don't want people to take advantage of her hospitality, kindness, and reasonableness, but I told her about it and she was totally fine, instead preferring that I focus on surviving the test I was taking at UMass that day, as well as, much more importantly, surviving the evil goose squatting at UMass that I almost got into fisticuffs with two days in a row that I told her about. (Thankfully, my ninja training paid off, and I managed to sneak past the goose, and no one got hurt.)
6 out of 5 stars!
Nice central location near the Boston Common. Quiet neighborhood. Good value.

Quaint home.  Very clean and comfortable.  Was not a problem for us, but should know it's 3 flights of stairs up to the rooms.  Matt and Eva were very communicative, and even stocked the fridge with fresh basics.

Luz was an incredible host! She was very quick to respond and recommended many restaurants/attractions. The place was clean and I felt very safe. Check in/out was super easy. The location was perfect-- just a 5 min walk to the train station where the airport shuttle also is. I would recommend her place!

The place is in a great location! It’s very easy and convenient to get to the heart of Boston from there. The place was also very clean and more spacious than what we were expecting. Would love to stay here again!

Great place to stay. The building is very secure and has a breakfast and lunch diner next door. Everything in town is walkable.
NOTE: Be mindful of the public parking garages as they will try to rip you off by having very unclear and misleading parking hours.

Had a great stay at Riyo's sweet upstairs apartment. I got a message that morning with a video showing me how to get in, which was so helpful since I got in very late at night. I texted ahead to say I'd be late and the inside door was left open for me and a light left on. it was such a nice and thoughtful touch.
Great location and the hosts are very communicative and helpful. The unit has a little more wear than the photos show, however, it was great for what we were looking for.
Apartamento muito bem localizado e Maverick muito atencioso... concerteza eu volto novamente.. 5🌟
Overall great experience. Room was clean and spacious, had most amenities available. Close proximity to most attractions. Highly recommend staying here.
It’s awesome!

Wir waren zu 8 in der Unterkunft und haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Von der Dachterrasse hatte man einen atemberaubenden Blick über Boston. Wann immer wir was von Terry oder Mindy brauchten, haben wir direkt eine Nachricht erhalten.
Beim nächsten Aufenthalt kommen wir gerne wieder :)

Great location & walkable to many sights, shopping, & dining. The unit was very clean, with comfortable bed & linens.  Very clean bathroom too. Well equipped kitchen and comfortable couch. Great place to stay in Boston for 2 people. We would stay again.  Thanks!
Nice place and great hosts!
Highly recommended, very pleasant stay as always.

Had a great four night stay.  No issues with heating as others had stated and quiet room 625. Very close to everything and to our surprise a Friday pop up fresh food market which was incredible.   Will stay again.

The apartment had a great location walkable to downtown or many restaurants and coffee shops. The room was located on the third floor (no elevator) which was inconvenient for carrying luggage upstairs. The instruction to the apartment and the check-in, however, was clear and easy to follow. The apartment was roughly 150sq2 and smaller than what appears in the pictures. The room was sharing a door with another room next door and overall had very low privacy (the conversations and everything in the surrounding rooms were completely audible). The apartment came with a kitchenette and some  appliances which was nice to have; however, the plates and cups were stored unwashed in the cabinet. The internet was very slow or disconnected and the sheets and the towels had stains/hairs on them.  When contacted on Airbnb about issues, never heard back and on phone usually the issues didn't resolve. Overall, don't recommend, unless for a very short stay and for this price you can find much better.
Great location. Very clean and accessible to many shops and restaurants. Hosts communicated well.

The apartment is what you would expect for location and price. I was able to book a brief stay for eight people steps away from the Commons and freedom trail for under 400 per night. There are maintenance/age issues and minimal creature comforts. We didn't have any soap for a day. There is an elevator on site, but not at the key pad entrance area which gave my older parents some issues. But overall it was clean and the staff was responsive and kind. The beds and pillows were very comfortable, which at the end of a long day is all you really need. I would recommend a larger coffee pot and power strips since the outlets aren't reachable without moving furniture.

We felt right at home in Whit & Joe’s place! It was beautiful inside and out and in a beautiful location. Super close to the train station too! They were so friendly and accommodating. 10/10 would recommend!
It's very comfortable and has a perfect location, allowing you to walk to several great art museums and Finway Park, as well as a great landing spot to explore the rest of the town.
As always - great stay

My group had a great time at the Dean! It was clean, and just like we thought it would be. Frank was very accommodating, and provided us with some items that our unit was low on. We highly recommend this Airbnb!

Boris & Susan had such a lovely
home at stay at! It was easy to check in and check out, and really appreciated that I could still keep my luggage at the Airbnb after check out so I can explore the Boston area more.
They were always so responsive and friendly, and I felt really comfortable staying at their place as a solo female traveller. Plus, they are super close to the Airport Station so travelling into the city was fast and easy.
I recommend their Airbnb if it’s your first time in Boston since you are living in a private and quiet community but also have the ability to travel into the city.
Only thing I would keep in mind is that you are near the airport, so if you are a light sleeper you will occasionally hear airplanes fly low here. But they do provide ear plugs so that does help with the noise.
Overall, I would definitely come back and stay at their Airbnb as it was clean, safe, and friendly! :)
Marie was an excellent host. Very communicative and soliciting. I enjoyed my stay.
Such a beautiful apartment! Perfect set up for us! We truly enjoyed our stay!

Location is absolutely outstanding. We were able to comfortably amble on foot all around Boston, taking in every important site (and sight) from Fenway Park to the Boston Tea Party ships. The Hop On/Off Trolley Tour was entertaining and very informative - highly recommended. Walking through the common at night with all the Christmas lights was beautiful. Every meal we ate out was delicious and we enjoyed live music from very talented musicians in pretty much every bar we visited. We also went to a great gig at House of Blues - fantastic venue!
The Library/Museum is stunning and interesting, and the Freedom Trail is definitely worth following through to many places of historic interest.
The apartment is comfortable but basic and ingenuity is needed if cooking a meal for four as the kitchen is equipped at a bare minimum level. Any issues we came across however, were dealt with quickly and efficiently by Maverick's staff.
We would certainly recommend this apartment to anyone.
I travel to Boston often for business. Jonathan's place is convenient, super clean with lots of thoughtful extras. I will definitely stay again and recommend his place highly.

Little touches and clear instructions helped us to feel at home right away. The location was an easy walk to so many fantastic destinations, the building was quiet, and bed super cozy. We got to venture out and enjoyed relaxing time indoors, too. Overall, a fantastic stay.

What a gorgeous apartment! It was beautifully decorated. There was a lot of attention to detail and everything we need could be found in the apartment. I booked Misha's apartment as a place for my parents to stay while they were in town for graduation. They like to eat-in, so we made extensive use of his full kitchen, cooking all our meals comfortably. The apartment was spotless and cheerful. It was large enough that if I wanted to stay with them overnight, I could. It was right off of the B line and walking distance to the C/D, so we never had any trouble getting to/from downtown.
Misha communicated very well and was forgiving when we made a small mistake with the check-in time. I will definitely book this place when I have family in town again.
This location was perfect right in the middle of all attractions we visited all weekend , eve home  was perfect nice clean fit the 6 of us nicely I will certain book again for future
This place is in the heart of little Italy. It was close to so many great sites, restaurants, and the wharf. I would stay here again in a heartbeat!
Apartment was clean and as described. Host was very helpful with communication before our arrival telling us everything we needed to know.

Amazing cozy spot in Boston! Close to all hot spots, and having the free parking spot was amazing! Ubering/Lyfting around will be fairly cheap and is close to the NB Flagship which was cool to check out! Will definitely book again when I come back to Boston! Thanks again Jessy and Diego :)
Very cosy, clean, comfortable bed,
Conveniently located, gorgeous neighborhood, and a gracious host. We would stay again.
It was a great little place  will definitely go again
Very clean, good communication, in a great location

The place was clean, the building quiet, and the location extremely convenient.  I was in town for a conference and it served my needs well.  I would have appreciated darker shades or curtains on the windows as I am a very light sleeper and the light shone through the shades.  In addition, there are no instructions on working the cable and air conditioning, which would have been welcome, as I experienced some frustration with getting both to work upon my arrival.  The host was responsive to my emails.  All in all, it was a good spot for a short term stay.

The apartment has an excellent location. We traveled with our 1 year old and wanted to be within walking distance of all the places we were interested in visiting. The apartment definitely fit the bill for being perfectly located for easy trips to the harbor, aquarium, parks, restaurants, and lots of the historical sites we were interested in visiting. The apartment space also worked out well for our stay with our toddler. We were able to fit a pack-n-play for sleeping in the bedroom with us pretty easily, the blinds provided good light blocking, and the air units installed for the summer kept the apartment sufficiently cool for August. The kitchen was equipped with most of the basic items needed for light cooking which was great when we did a few breakfasts or lunches in during nap times. The host team was very responsive during our stay and even made some last minute accommodations for us on our checkout time when our flight back home got delayed. Overall enjoyed our stay!
Great location and easy check in. The pictures are not very accurate and some seem to be from another unit. No stove in unit. Picture 1-4 and 11-15 are not from this unit. It is very misleading.
This unit was exactly what we needed for a little weekend getaway! The patio had a beautiful view, and the host was very responsive when needed.

This is the first Airbnb I’ve stayed at where check in is at 5 p.m. It makes it extremely difficult with early morning flights. You can pay an extra $50 to check in at 2 p.m. After an unexpected early flight change the host wasn’t willing to refund me or work with me much at all. The space itself does match the pictures and the description. The only other knock is the myriad of homeless people walking the street right outside.
Nice and easy stay at Anderson’s. Walkable from the airport and it’s train station. Everything works well and felt at home for a quick overnight. Would come back and stay again.
una casa preciosa , genial ubicada, acogedora. Muy recomendable !

This apartment is located in quite a large building but once you walk into the apartment itself it feels like you are in a nice cozy space with a very home like feel and large windows with nice views . I highly recommend staying here .  It has all the comforts you enjoy in a home.
Good location, clear directions for check-in, clean and comfortable.
Great walkable area. Comfortable bed and couch, wheelchair accessible.

This rental suited our needs and worked well for our two night stay in Boston. Not fantastic, but certainly more than adequate.
Pros: great location...walkable to everything in the Downtown area, very convenient access to the Freedom Trail, train station, T system, restaurants, shopping, etc. Very spacious with room to spread out, which is a nice distinction from cramped hotel rooms.
Cons: located down an alley, so while it has some great windows and natural light the views are somewhat limited. The apartment had a very "utilitarian" feel...very few amenities provided and limited personal touches, making it feel a little sterile and uninviting. It is also in need of some minor repairs and touch-ups.
Overall, we would consider staying here again but would temper our expectations knowing that lodging in Boston is expensive.
Great location! The beds were extremely comfortable and we heard no noise through the night. This was a great place for four couples!

Great stay! Very responsive when small issues arose. Apartment wasn’t too fancy but had everything we needed including a great view of the river. Note, there is only a window a/c unit in one bedroom and in the living room. There were fans for the other two bedrooms.

Highly recommend!
The flat was clean and had everything I needed!
Was in a really good area so I could explore Boston easily!
As a female solo traveller I felt especially safe with the lock system!
Would definitely be back if in Boston again!

The location is amazing and made for a great base to explore Boston from. Lots of food, parks, and shops around. The room is very barebones, but has everything you need. Maverick was also extremely responsive and was a great host!
The only major issue is the noise, which has been mentioned in a few reviews. Very thin walls, and you can hear the front door slam anytime someone comes in and out. Also, there are loud banging noises from pipes all night that happen consistently every 10-15 seconds that make it very difficult to sleep. I would definitely bring earplugs.
Simple great convenient

I rented a room for eight nights for two out-of-town family members. I live nearby but my apartment is too small to host them. It was great being able to have them less than a mile away, and they appreciated the convenient location and local eateries. They got to know the “57 Bus” very well which brought them to the Green Line Trolley Kenmore station and provided easy connections to all the tourist destinations.
Overall a good stay and reasonable priced for the location. Easy access to downtown Boston.

This is a great location - easily walkable to public transportation and nice places to grab breakfast and coffee nearby. Very kind and responsive host! The room was clean and spacious and the bed is very comfortable. Would definitely recommend!
Fantastic living experience in this big house
Perfect location.  Amazing communication and one of the cleanest spots I've ever stayed at!  Oh, and there is a spot for your car!  Couldn't be better!  Don't hesitate.
This apartment was in the perfect place for a weekend trip to Boston and the hosts were extremely easy to communicate with and informative!

They did a nice job updating and remodeling an apartment in a very old building building.
Coming from a small southern town, it was neat to see how old buildings are in Boston
The location was convenient. Two block walk to the subway station. Plenty of food within walking distance as well.
Helen made her Airbnb feel like home, ensured that I always felt welcomed and connected to the city of Boston.
Quaint little spot. But very clean, and WiFi works. Check in was super easy. Great spot with a great space.
We enjoyed the privacy and spaciousness of the upstairs. Everyone was very friendly and helpful. 10/10
Place was very well kept and just as advertised

Albert’s spot was perfect for our family if 4! Spacious, clean and close to sites in Boston including Quincy Market, Thaniel Hall, multiple T train lines, great restaurants, etc. We had one minor issue with a drain, which Albert responded to immediately.   The beds were comfortable and the apartment is very clean. We hope to be back!
Great spot in residential area of Chinatown! Family friendly and easy access to mass transit. Lots of yummy food within walking distance.
This is great spot if you plan on sight-seeing all day and coming home to cook. The walk from the T was easy.
Sparkling clean apartment. Such a perfect location five minutes from Back Bay station, close to fun restaurants, beautiful neighborhoods, and the center of Boston. The service was incredible.
great location. no parking
Jessy and Diego’s place is great 😊 The room is clean, and the bed is comfy. There are plenty of great restaurants nearby 😍 perfect for a short stay in Boston ✌️
The room is spacious and as described.

My trip to Boston and staying in this home was just what I needed. I was looking for a quiet, private place since it was just me traveling and Maria’s home was just that. It’s a private studio room in a beautiful older home in the most quaint neighborhood. I was in love with it the minute I walked in. Everything that I needed was provided with very detailed instructions on location, transportation options, local favorites, etc. I couldn’t have asked for a better spot. Just a short walk to the T which got me anywhere in the city that I needed or wanted to go and made it so easy to not have to rent a car. Maria was responsive and helpful and so kind, leaving small notes for me as I walked in the door and a bowl of chocolates after I finished the race I was in town to run. I loved every minute of being in this home and would absolutely stay there again!  Thank you for such a lovely stay!

The room was otherwise perfectly acceptable. You get what you pay for, and there were even some nice features like a small coffee maker, a refrigerator, and clean towels.
That said, the room was slightly decrepit. For instance, the legs of the desk were broken and it seemed like it would soon fall apart, and the chandelier was so low down that you couldn't walk under it without hitting your head - I was worried I would break a light bulb on my forehead! The window didn't shut properly with the AC unit sitting beneath it.

The place was one of the cleanest I have ever stayed in. The stairs are steep going to the third floor but definitely manageable. I had a 60 lb suitcase and was able to manage. The patio was nice as it provided some privacy while the kids slept. The walk to the airport station for the subway was about fifteen minutes with kids but it made it easy to reach all major destinations.
Lovely AB&B. Parking $ is not bad. We stayed 1 night and it was $18 from check in to check out and the lot is safe. It’s walking distance to every thing on the harbor. Very beautiful at night.

Richard is a great host with wonderful recommendations! Good location to walk everywhere in Little Italy located in North Boston with 138 restaurants!
Some noise at night from roadway nearby but otherwise a great base to tour Boston!
I had a great stay at Siena’s place, which was clean, tidy and quiet. Communicating with Siena was very  easy and helpful.
This studio is in a great location. The space was clean, with all the basic necessities provided.
The apartment is wonderful, quiet and in a great neighborhood. Very easy subway ride into the city.

I had at wonderful stay Maria Elena's place. Although I didn't meet her, I received a very warm welcome from Martine.
I loved the homey and cozy feeling of the apartment, it's well equipped and the private deck is great when the weather is warm.
The location is ideal, less than 5 mn walk to the subway in a very quiet and pleasant neighbourhood. I hope to come back if I travel to Boston again. Thank you!

Very convenient location for the activities we planned in Boston. Parking was surprisingly easy and affordable using SpotHero. Common area was large, we wish there was more seating beyond a 2 person couch. Very nice to have a private bedroom for a kid. Good value and we would likely stay again.

We absolutely loved our stay at this bnb - truly a memorable experience! The home was gorgeous, spacious, matched the listing perfectly, and very clean. We had a group of 7 adults and 1 toddler, and didn't feel crowded once. Parking was easy for us (we had 4 cars!) and it was within reasonable walking distance to the train station. The main reason of the trip was to visit Salem, but we found ourselves enjoying the evenings in at the bnb because the house was soooo comfortable! Highly recommend, would absolutely stay here next time we head to Boston with a big group!

This was a suitable place to stay in a great area. The neighborhood was very cute with lots of shops and restaurants to walk to. Close to the metro and a cheap uber trip to down town/ Boston Common. The parking description was definitely misleading...it says there is metered street parking however fails to mention the fact that 90% of parking is residential permit only. Virtually ALL of the non permit parking doesn't have a meter but has a 2 hour limit, which is much worse because you actually have to move your car (not just feed the meter). The garage suggested in the listing costs $38 per 24 hours, which is a considerable cost. I understand tht the area is impacted but this should have been listed. Honestly I would say don't stay here if you're planning to have a car with you. Otherwise thisis a solid option
This unit was quiet and the space was comfortable.  Liya was very responsive to several requests during my long term stay. I would rent this unit again.
Clean, comfortable and a great host

Perfect location for easy access to Fenway Park and the red T line.  Street was beautiful Boston street.  Breakfast provided was an extra perk too.  Would stay again if travels bring us back to Boston
Great Place on a very popular street!
Accurate advertising, great location for walking to bostons north end/seaport. Would stay here again.

One of those times when the property really lives up to the photos! This is an extremely appointed apartment in a great location with a responsive host. So spacious too! Some reviews noted street noise but we had little issue with this - and fans provided white noise. What more could you ask for on your visit to Boston?
Beautiful apartment! Very stylish and comfortable!! Great location!!!!!

Great location, attractive, very clean and quiet.
The price was great. The additional fees seemed high but it was a busy graduation weekend.
Perfect location for a solo trip!

This was a disappointing Air BnB. The place was def cleaned for us. The hand towels were dirty and we had to hunt for washcloths. The outside of the house needs a lot of work. We felt like someone walked out and let us stay for the night.  There were open boxes of cereal on the counter and food in the refrigerator.  We reserved this for the day before our cruise and the day we got back. We stayed the second time because the money was non-refundable. We spent a lot of money on Uber because we didn’t feel safe walking to the train. To get to the shop and anything historically related was 30-34 dollars . Our host was gracious and let us leave our luggage there because we got there early. What we didn’t know was it was put in the unit and someone else would still be there. Having 5 pieces of luggage  we really didn’t have a choice. The words beautiful Air BnB is a stretch. I took a lot of pictures and I don’t like giving a negative review but think it is necessary.  For 2 nights and a lot of money we feel we could have stayed at the Hilton and walked everywhere.

Easy check-in, room and place was clean, bed was comfortable and sheets smelled immaculate! I get cold easily and I visited in Dec so I really appreciated that the room was well heated - not too hot, not too cold. I only stayed mostly to sleep and shower but all the listed amenities were provided. Close to bus stop and T stop. Overall great place to stay!
I had a comfortable and enjoyable stay.

Lihua’s place was wonderful!  Loved staying in this historical brownstone with much of its original features!  Enjoyed meeting other guests at breakfast!  Last but not least, the purpose for our trip was to attend a ballgame at Fenway!  This place was so very convenient for game day, less than a 10 minute walk!  Let me mention that Lihua was a gem, we entered as strangers and left as friends!  She is a wonderful hostess!!!!
Everything was as mentioned. Great location, clean. Would recommend to anyone.

Check-in and check out process was very smooth thanks to the clear instructions provided.
Location is great… walking distance from the T station, shopping, lots of food options, Quincy Market, North End
The only issue we had was that since one of the wheels of the sofa-bed was broken, we could not use it as a bed. Apart from that, everything was great. I recommend this place.
La posizione dell’alloggio è perfetta per visitare la città. L’appartamento è spazioso e perfetto per quattro persone. Ci siamo trovati bene!
Great place to stay. We never met the host, but this was ok for us. Easy instructions how to access the place and what we have to do when we leave. No complaints!
Michelle was a great host during my week long stay! Offered me plenty of snacks and made me feel at home.
Great space conveniently located to shopping, public transportation and just a short walk to the Public Garden.  Will definitely stay here again.
Great hotel near downtown Boston.
Great location!
Alex was an excellent host who answered all our questions about the air bnb during our stay. The apartment was clean, renovated and spacious. Would happily stay again!

This was a quick weekend getaway for my husband, my daughter (22yrs), and myself. The location is good and easy to Uber or get where you need to go. The room was very clean and as described. Some things to note (and these recs were given to Lisa):
-The toilet is a bit tall and I'm 5'4" and had to tiptoe to reach the floor. Recommended a plastic folding step stool to help make experience more comfortable.
-Limited counter space in bathroom area so recommended a plastic shelving unit to help hold toiletries.
-You can see through the shower doors (although frosted not totally private) so trying to provide privacy to both my daughter and husband was a bit uncomfortable but doable. Recommended curtains that can cover doors in scenarios like ours.
-The air vent is in the bathroom area so we were a bit warm at night. Fans not available so recommended to have 1-2 fans available for warm nights or hot sleepers.
Our stay overall was great, Lisa was quick to respond. Would recommend!
Nice stay
Nice place to stay while visiting family.  I would stay there again.

It is very nice, clean place to stay in! The room is private with a queen-size bed. And the room is pretty large with a desk. Donna is also very helpful! They offer food, such as bananas, muffins, oatmeal, milk, and orange juice!

A cool place to live with lots of amenities including cooking stuff on the shelf , gives a homely feeling .
The backbay station is just 10 minutes away and there itself one can park his car overnight for 10 $ .
Overall I liked the place and recommend .

we had plenty of room to play and rest. only things I could probably recommend is to make sure the middle room (room without a window) have a fan on or keep the door open for ventilation. we didn't the first night and it got pretty stuffy in the room. other two rooms have windows and ventilates very nicely. best part of the house is definitely the living/kitchen area where we did end up spending most of our time in.
this unit is on the 3rd floor. although it's not too bad of a walk up (I have bad knees and I did fine) you have to be careful. steps are small & narrow, and can slip.
Wonderful studio apartment in very convenient location near to my work needs! Overall excellent, clean, and as-described!

Billy’s place was exactly as advertised and located in a great spot in Chinatown that was walkable to many Boston attractions. The space itself had a homey feel and all the amenities one would need for a weekend stay. Billy himself was very friendly and ready to assist in any way as needed. Definitely recommend for a weekend away to explore Boston!
The carriage house was really nice. Had everything we needed. David responded quickly to any questions we had. We enjoyed our stay. Thank you.
Higly recommended for those ones looking for tranquility and good location. The bed is awesome!

Robin's place is amazing, and I can't wait to stay again! She gave me great instructions on using the public transportation, allowed me to drop my things off early, and was very welcoming and kind to talk to! Her place was very homey on the inside, and the room was clean and comfortable!

The location was in 30  min walking distance to Boston Fine Arts Museum. We appreciated the pop of colors and patterns in the furniture, and the art posters on the walls. These details gave it a little flair above the usual sugary style in many places. It is a reasonable price for a Boston unit, the living room had plenty of space to relax in, and the owner was very responsive.

It was very clean and spacious for three people.
I wish there were one more bathroom, but other than that it was perfect! He prepared water, juice and some snacks for us. Very thoughtful. We rented a car, so it was perfect that there was a parking lot. We loved the place a lot!

Decent place. About 1-1.5 hours from the airport by public transportation (30 by car). Room and bathroom were clean. Only complaint was that you can hear anything going on throughout the house. Not a huge problem, quiet hours were enforced
We had an amazing time here! Such a cool place to stay at the marina in a prime location. Walking distance to bars and restaurants
Highly recommend, great location!
This is the best place to stay for 2-4 people for TD Garden events! Great amenities, super clean, greats hosts, walkable for restaurants, very fun!

Świetna lokalizacja jeśli chodzi dojazd do miasta, dosłownie minuta spaceru do niebieskiej linii metra, w 15 minut jesteś w centrum Bostonu lub na lotnisku. Dom posiada też miejsce parkingowe, więc możesz spokojnie przyjechać samochodem. Bardzo blisko plaży, można podjechać kolejką.
W domu wszystko doskonale urządzone, wygodne łóżka. Pełne wyposażenie domu i kuchni, możesz czuć się jak w domu.
Główne wyzwanie to brak ciszy, w ciągu dnia latają samoloty bardzo nisko. Dużym problemem jak brak izolacji akustycznej pomiędzy piętrami, słyszysz każdy krok i ruch sąsiadów z góry. Jak sąsiedzi urządzili imprezę w sobotę w nocy, nie mogliśmy spać.
Podsumowując, bardzo dobra lokalizacja o ile spędzasz dzień na mieście lub plaży, wracasz tylko na noc.

Great location. Spotless apartment.
Easy and quiet !

Sandy’s home was incredibly clean and so lovely. She responded quickly to any questions or concerns we had and her place was very conveniently located to the train! We look forward to staying with Sandy again soon!
What a great place to stay in the heart of Boston

This space is perfect if you don’t want the hustle and bustle experience of a hotel in the city.  We couldn’t believe how quiet it was in this neighborhood, and we felt very safe. The space was lovely. We also enjoyed the complimentary breakfast and extras like hot chocolate at 1:00 in the morning after a cold night.  There is a local restaurant/bar down the street that Bill recommended - the food was delicious. If we get to return to Boston, we will definitely stay here again. Excellent location and hosts!
Great location, clean and friendly host.
Super convenient and clean, good stay
Great place

We enjoyed our stay! The location is fantastic, very walkable with plenty of food, parks, groceries nearby, and easy access from the airport. The apartment was comfortable and spacious our 2-3 people, with great temperature control. The host replied within minutes and quickly addressed an issue with bugs and initial cleanliness by sending the cleaners back immediately. There’s some typical city noise at night, so earplugs may help if you’re a light sleeper.

New England charm in spades! Incredible house in a wonderful neighborhood. Very close to the best restaurants in JP and the excellent public transport.  The house is old but the interior is lovely! Any imperfection only adds to its beauty!!! Susie was very welcoming and quickly responsive to communications. I highly recommend this space!!!

It’s located within walking distance to everything. North end was just a 25 minute walk and china town is less than 5 minutes. The street it’s on has a night club which is open Thursday to Sunday, it got loud but we were still able to sleep. The street also gets messy, so be careful if you have pets. There’s a dog park really close which was great. Read the pet policy! Overall a great stay

First, Emma was extremely accommodating over the 2 weeks we stayed there. From bringing an Amazon package to my door, to being ok with us have a late checkout, she is definitely a great host.
The space was generous and well compartmented. We were both able to do work remotely in the same room. Excellent wifi, very high speed, no problem at all. This was essential for our work.
The bedroom was modern, great bed, and quiet.
The bathroom could use some updates.
If you spend extended time like us, and plan on cooking, be aware that it has a kitchenette, not a full kitchen.
The closet space was something I haven't seen in my life and I was fascinated like a kid. It was so huge that I am sure it leads to Narnia. You could easily set up an office there if you wanted.
Walking to the train stop - Orient Heights - and some grocery stores was a few minutes and it reminded me of my time in Europe.
Overall, we felt great and were treated well. Thank you!
The place was in an awesome location and very clean and comfy. Had a great stay and would recommend to anyone coming to Boston to visit.
Great location, many walkable places. Host was great and the apartment was as described and clean
Highly recommend. Great stay. The apartment was spacious, very clean, & had everything we needed. Pictures were spot on. Location was a quick drive to downtown. Jose was responsive & helpful.

Katy’s house was amazing! It was very clean and very spacious for our group of six. Even better than the house, was Katy’s hospitality. We were able to have two phone conversations about suggestions on what to visit, and different methods of transportation. We had an amazing time!! Thank you Katy!
It is a beautiful place near Boston's greater park. Great inside an also the surroundings. only problem was that the elevator did not work. communication was great too

We had a great stay in these lovely JP digs! Kelly and her husband communicated with us easily and clearly before the trip and were able to give us helpful info. for our trip planning. The unit is really lovely and comfortable (A/C units were great for the warm summer weather)...they have done a great job on it!
We wished we'd had a bit more time to get to know the neighborhood as it is REALLY great: restaurants, cute shops etc...and they left a binder of info. about it all for us! The walk to the T was really easy and we did it with two kids in tow...so not a big deal and the ride into Boston was a quick 10- 15 mins. depending on where you are going. I had been trying to get a place IN Boston but we are so happy we ended up here! We didn't get to explore the green areas in JP but as we left, we noticed the Jamaica lake and the surrounding park and wished we'd been able to. Kelly was busy the days that we stayed but her husband was available when needed and really nice when he checked in on us the first night. Maybe we'll get to come back someday! It worked out especially well for us as we also had our rental car with us as we were driving across the state to see family and could not get rid of it - it would have been a hassle to deal with it in Boston!! All around, we would totally recommend this great spot! Thanks Kelly & Phil!
Perfect location! Nice and clean.
Awesome place to stay in Boston! We will definitely be staying here again!
we loved our stay. there is no better location.
Fantastic location and very helpful hosts.

This was the perfect place for us. Ideally located with lots of great restaurants around and very walkable location. Beds were comfortable, good water pressure in the bathrooms, and well-stocked kitchen with all the items we needed. Highly recommend!

Good price for value. Location not very central, but good connections to downtown by bus (or hubway bikes). Checking in and out was smooth. Not the tidiest apartment, but no big issues to complain. Charles was very helpful and replied fast to any questions I had.
Keurig appartement in een stille, gemeleerde buurt. Niet in het centrum, maar de metro is vlakbij.

良い立地で、滞在中の移動に不便さを感じることはなかったです。
上の階や階段の足音が響くのだけが気になりました。

This place was perfect for a Boston getaway! We explored locally in Roxbury, spent a day in Boston, and a day in Salem! This location is within an hour of everything and was convenient to great restaurants. We also felt safe in the neighborhood which is big for us. We would definitely come back!
basic stay at Jamaica plain

This is my second time staying at Katy’s place and once again we had such an incredibly enjoyable stay! Katy is such a responsive and accommodating host and always makes us feel right at home. The place is cozy and comfortable and located in a great neighborhood. We will not hesitate to stay with Katy again for our next visit.

We enjoyed our stay here. The space was clean and updated. The location on Newbury street could not have been more perfect. We were right near all the shopping and just two blocks from the convention center. If we come back to Boston we will definitely be looking to rent this place again!
We are big coffee drinkers and our favorite spot was Pavement Coffee (just one block away). Another coffee spot that was pretty good was Thinking Cup (a little bit farther away).
You must go to Little Italy to enjoy some authentic Italian food. We went to Assaggio and it did not disappoint. And for some Italian treats, Mike’s Pastries was delicious.
Was a great location, nice stay.

We loved our stay. The neighborhood is peaceful. Rooms are clean and comfortable. Just a minor point about parking, which relies on SpotHero. We parked a spot that takes 8 mins to walk. Of course, the host has clearly indicated this in the check in instructions. So, we were prepared. Overall, we had great stay.
I was in Boston for a month. Enjoyed the trip and also the house. It was great.
Great place great personality and very inviting would recommend this stay to anyone
Great place to stay, a quiet area, close to the subway station. Great host!

Would absolutely stay here again. Located in Beacon Hill we were able to walk easily to different areas of Boston to explore (or could have used public transit or Ubers, we just chose to wander by foot.) We took Amtrak in from Philadelphia and getting to the AirBNB from South Station was so easy. Just hopped the subway 3 stops and walked 10 minutes a few blocks. Kaitlyn provided detailed instructions so it was super easy to plan out.
The apartment was in a great location that was super quiet at night with no crazy city noises. We felt safe walking around until late and coming back after dark.
A bunch of great shops right near the apartment. Enjoyed quick walks to grab coffee/breakfast from Tatte Bakery and Cafe and Blank Street Coffee. Beacon Hill Books and Cafe was amazing for lunch and such a lovely multi-story bookshop.
The apartment was fully stocked with tissues, paper towels, tp, laundry detergent, extra towels, blankets, and pillows, etc. Blow dryer, iron, washer/dryer.

Michelle was very quick to accommodate our group, had her place ready for us within an hour of contacting her. The house looks just like the pictures, very clean and fresh - also in a great area. Would definitely stay again if ever in the Boston area.

Overall, fairly good. Pleased with the location. The only noisy night was Saturday night as I could hear people outside talking. All the other nights were quiet. Unit appeared mostly clean but needed a thorough cleaning under the furniture as it was dusty.

Check in is all electronic and the host was good with communication. The room was as pictured,clean, and had an individualized coded lock on the door. The bed was comfortable and I had no problem getting sleep. I will say as the host mentions it is on a busy street and can be noisy at times however I ran the AC unit at night that drowned out the noise and I wore a sleep mask to help with lights. The bathroom was pretty standard although could use some simple upgrades. The lock was 50/50 due to what I’m assuming is from the building settling. I would suggest shower shoes if you can fit in your bag, given the communal nature of the restroom. (Although I didn’t have any and was fine). This building is very old and the stairwell is small, I would not recommend this stay for anyone who has trouble with stairs. Overall,the location was amazing and I could walk to many prime locations or have easy access to the subway. This is definitely a value for the price and I would stay here again!
Great location with so many fantastic restaurants in the area within walking distance. The place is very clean and surprisingly quiet too.
Place was super clean and very inviting! Felt right at home! Host was very responsive and friendly.
Nice place, we had a good stay.  Thanks.

Elisangela was a very friendly and courteous host. The way by train to Boston downtown is just a few minutes away. The neighborhood is fine. We enjoyed staying in Elisangelas flat and the roof top is really great! Regards from Germany

Sharde and Jens place was awesome. They were so incredibly accommodating and made it so much easier to travel with our 8 month old by providing tons of baby stuff for us to use! We are so grateful. I was able to meal prep and cook for our little one and had no issues. We were happy there was a dishwasher and washer dryer. Great stay overall! Being close to the train station was a plus. Super easy to get into town

Jacqui's place was lovely for our short weekend stay. She was very accommodating with an early check in due to our early flight. Easily walkable, just be prepared to climb some hills. Would recommend!
great experience

Accurately described and listed, the place is a small walk to the station (under 5 minutes), followed by 5 minute T ride in to downtown.
Hosts were friendly and able to offer advice at the drop of the hat.
The space is perfect for a couple, clean, containing all the utilities that you need.
Highly recommended!!! Will defiantly be booking this again on my return to Boston

This airbnb is in a very quiet and nice neighborhood, with some great coffee shops, breweries, concert venues, and bars nearby. We were offered flexibility on check in and check out with bags and times, which was greatly appreciated. The layout is slightly circuitous, and only one of the beds would be private. We did have some issues with the AC while we were there, which was just due to a faulty unit, but it wasn’t able to be fixed while we were in the apartment. We also had a period where the WiFi wasn’t working, but it did come back eventually. Overall, it was a good place to stay with some minor quirks.
Nice flat with easy access to public transport. Comfortable beds and nicely decorated. Plenty of room for 2 adults and 2 teens. Good home base for visiting the Boston area.
I had a wonderful stay at this apartment. The location simply could not be better for enjoying Beacon Hill and walking to MGH.
Perfect location- very cute place!

Reda’s place was fantastic. The beds were incredibly comfortable and everything felt pristinely clean and updated. The building was very quiet, and although it is located along a busy street, we did not notice any street noise once inside. The location is very convenient to the green line for quick access to the city sites, and there are also convenience shops and food options in the neighborhood. Reda was very responsive and helpful. Great stay overall!!
Sofia’ house is very clean and comfortable, it perfectly fit a family with a kid. We had a very nice sleep and it is not far to Boston . The price is quite reasonable especially during vacation.

This studio was perfect for 2 people. We were looking for a place to primarily rest our heads that was comfortable, and within walking distance to public transportation, restaurants and easy access to the majority of the popular attractions in the Boston area. If you are looking for a place to lay your head after a busy day/night around the city then this is a perfect option.

I broke my ankle ice skating during my trip and (Claire) was so kind to move us to a more accessible room downstairs, as well as offer a refund on part of our trip since I had to leave early. The bed was extremely comfortable, and the location was just minutes away from downtown boston and the airport, which made getting back home so much easier.  There is a fridge in each room for food/drink, as well as some comfy blankets in the closet, and a wheelchair accessible ramp at the entrance. Although this vacation didn’t end the way I wanted it to, I am so glad we had such an attentive and caring host!

Beutiful place and location! So much to do with our children! Walking distance to parks, stores, restaurants and a lot more! Such a great stay and my kids loved it! Communication is on point!
We will definitely be back!
Beautiful apartment in a great location to walk to all sorts of Boston attractions. Brian and Heather were super responsive. Will definitely book again for a future Boston overnight!
I had a wonderful stay! The space was clean and convenient. The location was ideal —  a 2 minute walk from Boston Commons and surrounded by a myriad of restaurants.
I highly recommend Lixia’s place.

Great location.
Quiet and safe neighborhood
Easy access to public transportation
Street parking available
The place was clean
Estuardo cares about having the place clean
We enjoyed our stay and will come back!

This house was at a perfect spot being so close to the T train station! Life changing considering Boston traffic is sitting still at ALL hours of the day!
We hopped on the T train and caught everything we wanted to!
House was as described!
The upstairs neighbors are loud. But that's not the homeowners fault. Just a minor annoyance, luckily we were up and going so it didn't affect us much!
The host is very helpful - promptly replied to my questions.
Very clean...great communication...great location.

This is by far the nicest Air BnB we have stayed at! This triplex townhouse vibe apartment looked just as awesome as it did on the website. Daryl literally responded to messages within 10 minutes! Consistently! His taste is lovely and all of the accents and touches are tastefully done, something that made every room cozy and comfortable. I absolutely give Daryl five stars for him and 5 stars from his apt. Go and experience Boston!! With Daryl’s home being your home!!
Nice place, very comfy.  I really appreciate having a great, safe central place to stay.

Great space and location. Definitely VERY bright in the bedrooms with sheer curtains so consider throwing up a couple of towels if you don’t want to be woken up with the sunrise! Served our needs well though and we loved it!

The home was very comfortable and as described in the listing.  We enjoyed how easy it was to catch the bus and get anywhere in Boston.  The shared refrigerator and microwave were a nice addition as well as the pumpkin spice bread each evening.
Great stay. Place is very clean and convenient. Hosts are very responsive and accommodating. Stay is walkable for a lot of things.

This is the first time me and my friend come to Boston. I was looking for an affordable place since we are still students and Whit’s house pop-up. The location of the house is not too far to Downtown Boston and really nead to the train too. There are some restaurant around that area; also CVS and Target. I love how they decorated the house, it’s really aesthetic and cozy. It’s really nice of them to help us carry the luggage to the room. Also for the day we checked out, our flight was around 8 at night so they let us leave the luggage inside the house and go somewhere before we’re really go to the airport. They also suggesting us places to go since it’s our first time here. I would definitely return to Whit’s house if I have chance to go to Boston again!!!
Alys is very responsive. In person she is very kind & welcoming. I felt right at home. The room is as described, and the bathroom is definitely gorgeous. Will stay again.
Great experience

The condo was just as
pictured. It was very clean and comfortable. Daryl was extremely responsive and helpful.

Beautiful place, private, clean and just like in the pictures.
Michal was really helpful every time we needed him and was an amazing host.
100% recommended.
Huggy is great host! Easy check-in and he is quick with responding to messages. The neigherhood is safe, there is easy access to the T and stores are within walking distance.

This place was great! Katia was very attentive.  The house is in a quiet neighborhood within walking distance of restaurants and the T station. The house was clean and stocked.  Katia was flexible on check out, which really helped us when our flight was delayed.  I'd recommend Katia and this house.
Beautiful place. Very comfortable bed. Great location.

The unit looks exactly as it does in the pictures; very clean and organized. The host team is very responsive and gives you all of the details you need. The location is close to 3 different train lines—helpful for a commute. Just like any city location, you can hear the street noise pretty clearly day and night. Overall it was a great stay for the price.

Great place with all the necessary amenities as described on the listing page. Good value for money.
Thanks Nancy!
Nice place and house.
Great communication by Kathy and great space in a nice area!
Yisheng made us really welcome.  We had good induction and the place is beautiful.  Sunrise on the roof was amazing.  Would highly recommend .
Clean place. Reasonable close to metro station.

Kinda can't do better than this - the room and garden are very pleasant, it's clean and well taken care of, Ann and Esther are kind and communicative, the neighborhood is both fun itself and convenient for getting to anything else interesting... I could go on. Unless you absolutely have to be in some other section of Boston, this is the place to stay for a single person or couple.
Our stay was as smooth as it can be. They were very reachable during our stay and attentive to anything we might need. Will definitely go back as I plan to visit often.
Spacious living room to relax.  Comfy bed.  Great location close to T stop, a cafe, store and restaurants.

We had a wonderful stay here.  I  fell in love with the neighborhood with all the victorian homes and changing leaves.  The subway/train connected us to everywhere we needed to go including the Aboretum (highly recommend) Salem and downtown.  Fantastic hosts.   Would definitely stay here again.

By far the best air bnb I've stayed in recently. All amenities were clearly listed in the posting. Rafael was SUPER responsive even though we checked in very late in the evening.
