Very close to a blue line subway station. Had everything we could've needed while staying there. Very comfortably fit our family of six. Would happily stay here again, should we travel back to Boston!
Susie does everything to be sure your stay is comfortable. We look forward to staying at her place again soon.

We had an absolutely perfect stay with Ben and Jane! Excellent communication, outstanding location, and a beautiful home. Very walkable/convenient area. We also really enjoyed talking with Ben and Jane. They are a delightful couple, and ideal hosts! We would most certainly stay here again, and highly recommend to anyone seeking a charming and comfortable stay.
We had a great stay as things were neat, exactly as described, and Lisa is warm, friendly, and easy to talk with. Thank you for a fabulous stay!

We went for a competition at skating club of boston, the location was great. The house was very clean and the neighborhood seemed very safe. It is an older house but again, very clean, tvs setup for Netflix. Kitchen had pans and pots and all needed to make quick meals if needed. Stop and shop very close by and also Whole Foods. Owner was very responsive and helpful every time we had questions. Overall it was a great stay. Thank you Rene!
precioso departamento en encantador barrio.Maravillosa vista. Atentos anfitriones. Altamente recomendable
Location is the best in Back Bay.  Next to convenience store and cvs.  And to super nice restaurants  in the heart of Newbury
Great place in a fun area. Joey was responsive and everything was as advertised. Will stay here again when i visit again

Bleuty was an excellent host, and I immediately felt at home in her place. The road the apartment is on is very quiet, with  not a lot of traffic. I would happily stay there again if I were to travel to the area again.

We stayed in Jans place for 3 months and enjoyed our stay. The place was very well stocked in terms of appliances and furniture as well as the smaller items like cutlery, dishes, pans, spices, tin foil, towels, sheets, etc. The backyard space is nice and we enjoyed using the grill. The front enclosed balcony and the back one were also enjoyed during the warmer days. Jan was great with communicating and responding promptly. We would recommend staying here.
Very clean, plenty room, & great location. Close to the city of Boston. The host was excellent!

great location,
quiet neighborhood, but not deserted either.
had great time here
will recommend this place to anyone visiting Boston.

Very convenient location! Host was available and very helpful. There were bugs and the walls were peeling in the bathroom, but did not affect my stay in general. Going upstairs was slightly difficult, I don’t recommend bringing a lot of luggage.
Clean, easy!
Natalie was a great host. We had a very comfortable and a wonderful stay for two weeks. Will definitely recommend for anyone visiting Boston!
Lejligheden var ren og pænt med en rigtig god belligenhed lige mit i centrum. Indtjekning let med kodelås og Billy var hurtig til at svare på beskeder og god til at hjælpe

this was a holiday weekend so everything was pricey but I don't think this was worth what I paid. it's veeeery noisy cause it's at the intersection between two medium size roads and a gas station. the room does not have real heating, just a heater that does warm and cold air and so much noise you cannot have it on at night. I had to ask for another blanket...also the bathroom is shared between what looks like 5 rooms so you have to wait for a while to use it. also the ad says breakfast is included but that it literally some Hershey and peanut butter granola bars. ok for a night is you don't know where else to stay but I wouldn't recommend it for longer that this

This AirBnB is the perfect location, right by the red line so you can just hop on and head downtown. The furry welcome committee certainly knew their role! If you don’t like dogs or the slight mess they bring, this place isn’t for you. That being said though, it was a wonderful stay and I would highly recommend!
Price was great compared to hotels. Location is excellent for walking to restaurants. Although small, very clean and friendly. Outstanding value for the price.

The apartment was perfect for the two of us in Boston to see what Boston had to offer. It is not set up for cooking, but there were ample plates and utensils for a simple breakfast and microwave heating of food. Plenty of places to eat within only blocks. Apartment neighbors and the location were quiet. Comfortable bed for sleeping. AC welcome due to humid Boston during our stay.

Isabel was an outstanding host. She was very friendly, responsive, communicate very well and even went out of her way to get something for us the next day that we were there. She was very clear with instructions about her place and check in on us to make sure we were ok and if there was anything we needed. Isabel went above and beyond the call of duty for our family. We enjoyed staying there as it was plenty of room for us to celebrate Thanksgiving as visited our daughter and mother in love. The rooms were very spacious and fit our needs.
We originally had booked a place at the Comfort Inn and my daughter recommended this place for space, cooking and supporting my family needs. She was right! I don't think I'll go back to hotels as I was very pleased with Isabel's place.
You will not be disappointed.
We would definitely booked with Isabel again.
Karolyn
Thankful

Maverick responded at 2 in the morning because I had trouble getting in. Turns out it was my own fault because I misread something. However, Maverick was understanding and responsive. He even recommended parking apps and locations so that we didn’t have to pay crazy prices for parking. I would recommend this spot to anyone. Despite being a bit small, it was comfortable and practical. It met all of our needs and exceeded expectations.
Awesome location! This place was exactly what we needed for our trip to Boston. It was clean, spacious and well-stocked with everything we needed to make the trip even better.
Bathroom could be a lot cleaner
Good location
Great place, great food and great location

Irida's apartment provided the perfect landing pad for a small group of high school friends to stay after celebrating a friend's baby shower. It was comfortable for five of us and so perfectly located. It's a lovely, charming space and we appreciated being able to stay in such a convenient location together!
Daryl was a fabulous host. Place was beautiful and nicely laid out.  We had a great stay!
It was really close to the train station.
Perfect stay!!! Thanks Matthew
Loved the location.  Place is very cute. The back patio was peaceful!

It was fine but not worth the price. Air condtioner kept tripping and not working and the electrical isn't good. The space has been given barely any effort. They were distant and didn't bother to greet us. Someone threw my and my friend's items in the garbage in the bathroom and I'm fairly sure it was the host... I just felt like if it was a lower price I'd be satisfied but it's way too overpriced for what we got from this experience. If you're looking to stay in the summer go somewhere else. I could barely sleep at night it was so hot.

We enjoyed our stay at Jonathan's place. It was very clean, modern and spacious. We had a private bathroom and large bedroom with all possible amenities. Our towels were fresh with possibility to have a daily replacement as there was a stock of fresh towels in the drawers. Jonathan is an incredibly attentive and helpful host. He provided us with necessary guidance regarding parking, city-wide internet access and home access. Jonathan even prepared a little surprise for us - something no one did before, we really appreciated his efforts. Above all, Jonathan is a great person to talk to, with positive energy and friendly attitude.

Great location within a walk of the T.
the building is under renovation and I wish I had known in advance.
comfortable studio apartment, but not great if you want to cook meals.

Polly’s place is wonderful. She works on site, and is very welcoming. Her home is large, clean, nicely decorated and quite.
The breakfast includes perked coffee, baked goods, and lots of nutritious foods.
Exceed expectation!
Nous avons été ravis de notre séjour : l’appartement, très propre et spacieux, est à deux pas du TD Garden , idéal pour assister à un match de NBA.

The space worked well for our family but there was no attention to details in preparing the space for guess use. The towels weren't properly clean, the utensils had old food on them, the bathroom door especially did not close well, the shower curtain had soap scum and no bathing soap was provided. The pillow cases were crushed and crumpled and the stove was dirty.
Checking in and out was seamless and communication was on-point. If you are not from the area I strongly recommend park your vehicle and get a taxi service it will save you the headache of driving in the city.

It was a great place to stay for 5-6  people and everyone had their own bedroom as well there was enough space to spread out! It was also very clean and the house looks exactly like the pictures. It was a super close drive to downtown! When Boston is so expensive these days it was a great value!
They are the best!!! Highly recommended stay with them!! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Sarah was a terrific host -- communicative, responsive, and very helpful with a couple small issues that came up (problem w/AC) which she resolved immediately. Recommended.
Her prop is in a charming, walk-able neighborhood in 'Eastie' or East Boston. Lots of international flavors and colors; Angela's (Pueblan) and Spinelli's (traditional Italian) were both amazing!
Although public transportation is available nearby, it is a bit of a hoof to get to it (.3 mile walking to the bus and/or .6 mile walking to the train).
Also, if you're used to public transportation in say, NYC or DC, Boston's "T" system is more difficult to use and not as intuitive. It can take a mix of train, bus, trolley, shuttle and even Uber to get where you're going.
None of this reflects on Sarah, of course, she was an amazing host, it's "just the facts" of where her prop is located.

LOVE! What a great place to stay in the South End! We visit Boston often and this has been, by far, our best Airbnb stay. The place is super cute and was very clean when we arrived.  The best part is Santo, who answered all my questions, always responded in a timely manner, and is a kind and gracious host! Can’t wait to come back!

It was comfortable enough to stay and I relaxed like I was back in my home.
The balcony was nice to place to chill out in evening and living room with big display was also nice place to relax with favourite movies.
Thanks a lot and I will be back👍
Thomas and the dog Bell are nice as can be. Easy walk from T in safe neighbourhood. Restaurants and grocery near by. A wealth of knowledge on all things Boston.

Maude and Sixto are both outstanding hosts! The apartment is even better than it appears in the lovely photos. It's almost like staying in a museum as the owners have been collecting art and beautiful objects for 40 years. The outdoor patio is absolutely gorgeous and perfect for enjoying outdoor meals during the day and evening too (it is well lit and there are heat lamps available). We got very lucky with parking and found visitor spots easily and did not have to pay since we stayed on a holiday weekend. Maude left us a really nice handwritten note and there were thoughtful touches throughout -- lots of food and snacks left for us in addition to a delicious bottle of wine, mints, fresh flowers at the entry.. Just a wonderful, wonderful stay. Thank you!

Peter’s place is truly one of a kind! Cozy, CLEAN, bright, and it feels just like home.
Instructions for self check in were clear and concise.
We had no issues at all!
We didn’t have a vehicle during our stay, and we had no issues getting around and getting into the main downtown portion of Boston, as the subway is super close to this location.
Overall, we really enjoyed our stay at Peter’s place!
I enjoyed the location as it was our first time in Boston!

Great location close to all the sites, public transport and fantastic cafes, restaurants & shopping. Felt safe in the location. Bed was super comfortable. Heating was excellent. Shower was nice & hot with strong water flow once I figured out how to use it, the tap work is a bit different to what I’ve seen & instructions weren’t the best - asked a neighbour & all was good. Super clean. Highly recommend if you’re visiting beautiful Boston! :-)

We had a wonderful stay! The location was perfect, allowing us to walk to nearly all our destinations. While there were some noisy individuals on the streets at night, that’s to be expected in this vibrant area. Despite that, we always felt safe walking around, whether it was early in the morning or late at night. Our host was also very responsive to our messages, making our experience even better.
Which a wonderful neighborhood thank you having me.
Cute place! Comfy beds! Street parking was easy and close.

While the spot itself was nice and a good place to stay for 1-2 adults, I didn’t love the process of getting in and finding the spot. It’s among like 50 apartment buildings that I don’t think are owned by the same people but I’m not sure.
I had difficulty finding the key initially, then it was hard to find the right parking pass. Even when I got one it wasn’t for the garage as promised. The person who helped me seemed confused (hence why I’m not sure all the buildings communicate).
All in all, comfortable stay, but probably won’t be back. Too much of a headache

Lovely room in a really nice house. Great location, don't have a bad word to say about it. Charles always was a text away and was very quick to respond and to sort out any issues.
5 stars
Great.
Such a cute spot in a fun neighborhood! Easy to walk/uber around. We had a very pleasant, comfortable stay.
Had a nice stay!
Such a beautiful place.  We loved every minute and wish we could stay longer.
Place was great for the events we had to attend. Thank you!
Great place for a weekend stay!
Very great location loved the apartment so much to do will definitely be back

The location is good, and we found free parking readily just across the street. The place is lovely and the kitchen is very well equipped beyond our expectations. We ate quite a few meals there at the beautiful dining room. The folder of restaurants and carryouts was very helpful since we arrived late. There was a TV in the sitting room, one TV in each bedroom. We did not miss any important World Cup updates.

Our English friend accidentally left behind his wallet with a bunch of credit cards and cash. We contacted Terry right away. He responded promptly, helped us find it and sent everything back overnight in a low cost way. We really, Really, REALLY appreciate his help and integrity.

Tj was flexible with our check in/out times and helpful with suggestions for bars and restaurants in Southie. The apartment is a great location that's right by the T. The place was very clean and tidy and he gave us a few beers too which was awesome. I would gladly stay here again.

Ehab è stato un host disponibile e reattivo. Abbiamo trovato delle lenzuola che non sembravano molto pulite e ha subito provveduto a cambiarle e ci ha rimborsato le spese di pulizia.
L’appartamento è composto da quattro stanze con un bagno e la cucina condivisi con gli altri ospiti. La struttura è un po’ datata e la pulizia è migliorabile. Vi sono comunque strumenti per pulire (salviette, detergenti) negli spazi comuni ma la casa nel complesso è piuttosto disordinata.
Abbiamo utilizzato la lavanderia che è collocata in cantina (forse non il posto più igienico per lavare le cose).
I had 10 out of 10 experience at Michelle’s  place !
Great, safe location. The room and bathroom are cozy and clean. Great place to stay for a trip to Boston!
Had a wonderful stay. Great central location. Close to all the places you would want or need to be in Boston. Unit was clean, check in a breeze, and the host was helpful and responsive.

Great to be in the North End. The apartment is perfectly located and ticked off everything we needed. Gina is a wonderful host who made sure the trip become a great experience. We will definitely come back

Great place, great location, very clean. I did notice there wasn't good noise attenuation, which I was a bit surprised/bothered by. Maybe it was just my room location on the first floor. I can see how this can be an issue for tired travelers. Aside from this, the place was nice. Minutes away from Fenway.
位置很好，我们两个大人两个孩子，整体环境很好，很安全。入住非常简单，位置好找，直接在公寓门口拿钥匙，方便入住和退房。离市中心和哈佛，麻省都很近。房东回复很及时。

The location of this apartment was excellent - very close to the public Garden/Boston Commons and easily walkable to many wonderful restaurants, sites, and different neighborhoods. The apartment itself was quite tight for two people and in need of freshening up to feel like it was worth the high cost we paid. There was also a fair amount of noise from other apartment tenants coming and going on the stairs located over the top of the apartment. Great location and works as a place to stay in a pinch.

Amazing place to stay for a visit to Boston. Beautiful neighborhood and wonderful accommodations. Short walk to the subway for sightseeing and a quick stroll to Fenway for a ballgame. Safe and charming area. Outstanding host as well. Highly recommended

Loved the space and the location. Roomy and contemporary with easy access to the Harvard Medical School area. Jonathan was the perfect host...friendly, welcoming and helpful! Hope to stay here next time I'm in Boston.

If you have a car this place is not for you. Its very very tough to find street parking. Check in process was little bit tough to find apartment 6 which is hiding behind another door. Close to Boston logan just 10 mins away. Apartment  and its single bathroom was tiny. Two bedrooms are good enough for 3 people.

Jessica was VERY responsive and was happy to help us get settled in. Her place was very unique and we loved the overall history of the place - it was a short walk from the T with plenty of food options only minutes away!
The first night the room was toasty - Jessica was happy to oblige when we asked if it could be turned down a bit the 2nd night, but if you prefer a cooler room you may want to request it (the bed was comfortable thoughperhaps it's a testament to the warmth of the comforter). The only other issue was Thursday night it was a bit loud outside (I believe the neighbors were doing some car work) and we felt we could hear everything going on outside the room (which wasn't TOO much - but admittedly there wasn't a complete feeling of privacy due to that.)
All that being said, our overall experience was good and Jessica was a great host!
stayed here overnight with some friends for my birthday and had a great time!

My recent stay at Meri's Airbnb in South Boston was absolutely impeccable! From the moment we arrived, we were pleasantly surprised by the attention to detail and the thoughtful amenities provided by our host. Meri's hospitality truly made our experience exceptional.
One of the standout aspects of our stay was the abundance of freebies that Meri left for us. From snacks and drinks to toiletries and extra linens, she went above and beyond to ensure our comfort throughout our visit. These little extras made a huge difference and added a welcoming touch to the entire stay.
It's worth noting that Meri has a house rules book, but fear not, they are easy to follow. The guidelines provided were straightforward and helped ensure a pleasant stay for everyone. One particular rule was to leave the dishwashing machine loaded and the laundry machine loaded with dirty towels before checking out. These simple requests were a small price to pay for the overall fantastic experience we had at Meri's.

I drove across the country from LA to Boston, staying at different Airbnbs along the way. The location, the guest services & all around comfort of the apartment was top tier. Thank you Albert for making that possible. Would definitely stay again!
I highly recommend this place Polly is hospitable and thoughtful Host.
Lovely apartment, spotless and nicely decorated. Conveniently located- easy to take the T or to Uber to the North End or downtown. Albena is an excellent communicator. Excellent value.

This apartment was an absolutely perfect place for us two Boston-newbies to relax, get our bearings, and come home to after exploring the city. I really fell in love with Jamaica Plain and would recommend wandering around Centre Street to  anyone who is staying in Chris and Kristina's apartment. The space itself was comfortable and had everything we needed, including coffee, movies, and an extremely helpful map of the area with points of interest clearly marked. Kris, though we never got to meet I really appreciate the small touches that made this apartment such as easy place to stay in Boston.
The house was everything as advertised and more.  The host was more than accommodating.

Beautiful and full of light with a lovely view.  Great amenities, very comfortable furniture,  charming space that bridged the gap between modern and vintage.  Very good  proximity to all the top features of Boston.  Kid friendly for our 7 and 12 year old.

Funky shared house with a cool “lived in” vibe. Very welcoming people... I’ll remember my stay here.
Nothing much within walking distance so be prepared to Uber in and out of the city.

Great location: safe and very walkable area. Lots of restaurants and close to TD Garden. Situated in an old character building, the apartment was comfortable.  Easy check-in and Tim was very communicative, helpful and provided excellent instructions.

Rachel's place was conveniently located right in the heart of Dorchester, a quick Uber ride into the city for everything that Boston has to offer. The place was spacious, clean, and quiet; and looked exactly like the pictures / descriptions in the listing.
Rachel was extremely helpful in providing clear instructions on how to get in, as well as provided a number of local recommendations. She was also quick to respond any time I reached out, both prior to and during the stay.
I would highly recommend staying here; a home away from home.
Great spot for a large group. A few restaurants and mini markets nearby as well. Great value for the money. There aren’t many places in Boston that have enough beds to accommodate larger groups.
The hosts were great and made the entire stay enjoyable and easy. The unit is clean, modern, and problem free. No noise issues. AC was great.
It was a pleasure staying at this unit. The responsiveness is extremely fast and accurate. The pictures are a perfect match of the unit. I strongly recommend booking this apartment.

We had a great stay at Steven's place - the unit is very spacious for a studio and we liked that there was a Stop & Shop a 10 minute walk away. We had an issue with the washer/dryer that was resolved the same day! Very caring and attentive team at Healing Homes of Boston, we will definitely recommend to our family and friends!
Great location and the four bedrooms worked well for our small group. Within walking distance to everything! Would stay again. Hopefully the lobby will be done and welcoming soon.
Thanks for hosting us!

This was a great value for Boston. Bigger than it looks in the pictures. Good layout with bedroom entrances on one side and the living room on the other side. I think there was a metro train nearby but a car is probably recommended for this location. There are plenty of restaurants and stores nearby but all about 1+ mile away. East navigation to downtown or out towards Harvard or Boston College. The place is a converted basement but done well. We could hear other tenants at times but not any worse than a mid-range hotel. Bathroom was sizable, with a fan and nice shower. The kitchen was well-stocked. Instruction labels everywhere made it feel a little less homey but easy to navigate. Fast wifi. Would definitely stay here again.
Thanks Adler.

We had a great stay at Jessy and Diego’s studio. It was exactly as described in the listing, with a well equipped kitchen and cozy living space. For those who are bothered by street noise it is on a busy road that can get loud during rush hour, but this didn’t bother us.
This place was amazing and close to the subway for easy access to downtown. It was a cool little spot that felt peaceful and welcoming.
Very good

Tasha’s place was great, very supportive host with a pristine house. She went above and beyond to even provide extra things such as coffee, seasonings, dry goods if needed. I would definitely recommend her to anybody on this app just an overall great house with a wonderful place. Thanks again Tasha!!

This place was so peaceful, clean and welcoming. My family and I had a great stay. Sandro made it very easy to check in and was very responsive although we didn’t have any issues that needed to be checked. Would definitely recommend!

great host
high quality service
nice place

We had the best stay at Charles’ place. Very clean and well- decorated. It is in a perfect location, walking distance from great restaurants and bars. The off-street parking space was also a plus! Hope to stay there again when we come back next year!

Jennifer is the best Airbnb host I’ve ever come across! She went over and beyond my expectations and I will definitely book again in the future. The room was very clean, comfortable, and so cute! The neighborhood was absolutely stunning with tasty restaurants within walking distance. HIGHLY recommend Jennifer’s spot 🙏🏻
I agree with all the positive reviews!
Great location, super close to the airport and metro. Loved the free parking right around the corner. Big bedroom and cute living space. Would recommend this place to anyone visiting Boston!

The place was very easy to reach from the airport and it was very easy to get to downtown from the place. Shelly welcomed us and kindly gave us some suggestions for Boston. The place was clean and had everything that was needed. It was rather loud and the probacy was limited. However earplugs were provided. We would definitely book the airbnb again for a stopover in Boston.

This place is such a gem! The apartment is spacious but has touches that make it feel very homey and cozy. It had all of the things we needed for a perfect extended stay. With easy access to public transit, the ability to walk to local businesses, and adequate street parking, it makes getting anywhere very easy.  It was the perfect home away from home! Would highly recommend!

Great location for the value of the apartment for anyone visiting Boston for the first time. The apartment was clean, the check-in instructions were accurate and the host was accessible in the case of additional questions.
Parking was available several blocks away for a fee - best to leave the car at home and travel via public transportation. The apartment is near several stops on the T (Boston's subway system).
Enjoyed staying at this lovely apartment. It’s in a wonderful area and close to lots of fun things to do and see.

We had a great stay! This listing is in a prime location and is in walking distance to many restaurants, landmarks and stores. The home itself was in great condition and exactly what we were looking for!
Good spot for a solo traveler.

Anne's Cozy place is in a great location. Kitchen down the winding staircase is extremely well furnished and very modern. The main floor rooms are quaint and comfortable. There are many amenities for a small place.
I would highly recommend this AB&B.
Alicia was a great host! All the instructions were very clear! The place was exactly as it it described. Clean, practical, and I really felt like home. I certainly would stay there int the future.
Great location and place to stay. Would recommend to book!
Great location and stay!

Had a great stay at Maverick Suites! Location is great and nearby tons of shops and restaurants. The suite was very clean and comfortable. Getting in and out of the suite was easy with the keypad. Only issues were that they were unable to accommodate early check-in. We got there a few minutes early and keypad did not unlock until exact check-in time. Small flight of stairs to get to room. Also have to pay to use public parking. Other than those minor inconveniences we would definitely stay at Maverick Suites again!
Super big room. Clean and quiet.
Susan’s place is as described in the listing! She is very kind and was prompt with communication. Thank you!
Wonderful stay. Host was very responsive and helpful, there are plenty of beds and everything you need.

El departamento es incluso más lindo que como se ve en las fotos. La cocina totalmente equipada, hay todo para cocinar. Todo estaba limpio y ordenado. Hermosos detalles y decoración; todo muy buena calidad.
La ubicación está bien, a una cuadra de la estación y el metro muy cerca. El barrio en si no es particularmente hermoso pero en 10 minutos estás en el centro de boston o en back bay.
Konrad fue siempre amable y atento. Súper recomendable!

Overall a good experience. However if you are a light sleeper, you may want to rethink this place as there are lots of noise the house makes from people walking or even moving on the wood floors and upstairs. Thats just the nature of older homes. But overall good value and stay.

We had a great stay at Reda’s place. It was beautiful and clean and perfect for our family. Easy access to the commuter rail to get all around Boston. Reda was excellent at communicating and if I had any questions would respond within 10 minutes. We enjoyed our stay and would recommend if you want a comfortable stay in the area!

Fue una muy buena estadía, tiene todo lo que necesitas y está realmente muy bien ubicado. Al estar en el 4to piso tenía que subir y bajar con equipaje pesado por escaleras y es la única desventaja que le encontré

The room in the basement, which they don't mention; bit disappointing. Before you get to the room, you have to  pass the trash room and boiler room, which makes the hallway a bit funky smelly. Once in the room it's not so bad for short stay. Cosey room for two. All furniture, cabinets are old scratched; some are bit rusted. Window ac  does the job. Extremely difficult to find street parking (which is for 2 hrs only).  Host was great with communications, hassle free check-in and check-out.
Great location and apartment! Would definitely return!
It was kinda small but perfect for just staying in town for one night

Perfect location in downtown Boston!! Rented bikes, walked and ubered while here. Maverick and staff were quick to answer any emails about the listing. Very clean studio apt. Only negative is the stairs but for us it wasn’t an issue. Try for unit on lower two levels if needed.
Great stay overall, bathroom can get pretty messy at times from other people that stay. But they do clean it daily.
Kathy is a wonderful host with this amazing apartment in the heart of the back bay!!  The apartment is beautiful and within walking distance to everything!!
Great place. Spacious, clean, well located and J Lucky is a brilliant host

It was a nice room to stay overnight.  Ricardo answered all my questions.  We enjoyed use of the living room area and television.  I would recommend offering some coffee with the coffee maker.  Also the bedroom ceiling was slightly low for tall people.

This was the BEST place to stay for our weekend trip to Boston. The space is super clean, very well priced, and had everything we needed. It’s also in an excellent location - close to the T and Jamaica pond. Hosts were friendly and responsive, but left us to ourselves to do our own thing which was nice. Would highly recommend!!!

Stephanie's place is absolutely fantastic. It's super clean, conveniently located, and equipped with everything you need. Stephanie is a great host and can help you with all your tourism needs. Will come back again!

My stay at Helen's place was great! The location was amazing, parking was easy, and there was plenty of space and supplies. Helen is extremely nice and receptive to any questions and communicates very well. The stay is close enough to Boston and all of the major Boston universities without the traffic.
good visit.  we would stay again.
Was what I needed and worked out on such short notice. J Lucky is a great host and communicator.

Can you give location 6 stars instead of 5?
This place was perfect, in walkable Back Bay in simply amazing location close to food, coffee, shopping, parks, etc. we even walked over to old Boston and took a Freedom Trail tour.
The place was setup nice and the kids loved the loft bed. Was able to park my high top conversion van in the designated spot, but didn’t drive all week.
Hope we can stay here again and go to a game at Fenway (also walking distance)

The host{s} are very open to communication. The issues in this place are apparent and could be solved by more investment in the area expected to be occupied. It is a basement with sealed windows. The house looks like it's heated by a boiler. There is no central ventilation system. Therfore the air is stagnant with no quick way to be circulated. The living room and bedroom seemed clean enough for a stay of a few nights. The bathroom needs major cleaning of floors. A shower curtain costs a dollar or 2, yet that same one you see now is from 2019 or whenever the original pictures were posted. Invest $2 and change it more often. Thats about it. It's ok for a night or 2, but until the venilation is improved it should be avoided. My concern is going to sleep and not waking up because of noxious fumes.
Well-designed small studio apartment, reasonably priced in a great neighborhood in the Boston's South End.
Everything was great at this place! I definitely recommend this Airbnb. I’m looking forward to my next visit! Thank you Boris & Susan for sharing your place.

The apartment was very clean and quiet, while still being incredibly walkable. Loved the diversity of restaurants near by. Thanks Jessy & Diego for a great stay! They were very responsive and provided clear instructions that made checking in easy. Also helped work out a solution when we needed to make changes to the reservation, which we greatly appreciated. Good and fair hosts.

Great experience at this location. Apartment is right along the green line making it super easy to get pretty much anywhere in the city. Quiet location just outside the action but not too far. Place was spotless. No issues with anything at all. Excellent experience 10/10.

We stayed here while attending a concert at Fenway. Convenient location, only a 10 minute walk. Lihua greeted us on arrival, was very friendly and gave very clear directions on keys and door locks. Rooms were clean, spacious and beds were comfortable. We had a great stay and will definitely be staying here in the future.

The room was spacious with plenty of storage space. It was clean and within a 20-ish min drive to Downtown Boston. While the bathroom is accessible from the room itself, it is shared with another room.

My stay was very short (in at night out the next morning). The space was big and clean; the windows of the unit I was in didn't have a view of anything but that didn't matter. The building itself has construction going on in the lower levels which created a little noise in the morning and may contribute to the common areas not being as nice as the apartment itself. Still, good space, right in the middle of downtown. I received instructions on time. They were clear and so I had no other reasons to communicate with the hosts which seems like a good thing. And for my stay this ended up being substantially less expensive than available nearby hotels. Solid overall.
Amazing place, amazing host, Safe location. Thank you Frank

My thoughts are the same as all the other reviews: 5 STAR place, comfortable, absolutely "spic 'n span" and run like clockwork.
Ideal for guests with a car, but as a former Boston resident, I enjoyed learning some new ins and outs of the transit system.
Great value.
Alex was super friendly and helpful. We were very close to the T and had a nice clean space to relax after walking the city all day.

Me and a few of my friends stayed at Keir’s AirBnB for an extended stay over the summer. It’s very accessible and in a peaceful neighbourhood. Would definitely recommend. Being in such a nice area with a good location made our stay even better. It’s a 10 minute walk to the train and from there you can get to anywhere in Boston. I would without a doubt come back here. Keir was also an extremely quick to respond to any queries we had during our stay.
Amazing location. Walkability was key and the space was beautiful and extremely large!

Clean, quiet as advertised, comfortable bed.
Appreciate the flexible check out.
Small things missing like body soap, coffee filters.

I was looking for a place to stay that was near the Boston Convention & Exhibition Center where I was attending a work conference. Kiki and Thom's place was a wonderful pick!
It's a 20 minute walk from the convention center and there are lots of local eateries as well as convenience stores right around the corner. The apartment is also right in front of a bus stop making it easy to access public transportation.
The apartment was very easy to access and clean, and Thom and Kiki are super responsive and flexible with any questions I had and for my check-in time. If I need to come back to Boston, I will definitely come back here!
great location. Yan was very responsive
Great location!
I loved my stay! The service was always helpful and very kind. The space is great and exactly like the photos.

The location in the North End was terrific! Lovely views of the water out the window, interesting historic area with charming cobble stone sidewalks, lots of restaurants, short walk to the Freedom Trail and the subway. Fabulous bakeries for sweet treats as well as your daily bread. The subway will get you to most locations in Boston but if you are headed to a location that requires a car there is also parking included.
The unit was clean. Towels were fluffy. Lots of hot water. The kitchen was well supplied with all of the cookware one could want.
If you are not comfortable with stairs- this unit is not for you. The two flights of stairs that are required to enter the unit are somewhat rickety.
great place to stay! EXTREMELY clean

Nice place to stay in Boston, just 5mins from Logan Airport and 10mins driving to downtown Boston. With private parkingspace on the backyard, house was big, clean & with everything i need during 10days in Boston !
Nice place to stay when in Boston
Great spot to stay to be close to the train to get into the centre of Boston quickly.

Gotta say that i loved it, i was very happy of how clean and beautiful the apartment was. The location is perfect,  very close to Fenway park, lots food locations near by, and plenty of parks for our service dog. We couldnt have picked a better place. Super spacious and nice views. 10/10 would recommend 👌

This place was amazing! I can’t think of a better place to stay in the downtown Boston area. We absolutely loved the rooftop and we loved the privacy and everything was so close. We would definitely stay again.
Great place in the South End, Drew was responsive so everything went smoothly
Great location
I’ve stayed here a couple of times and been very pleased on each occasion.
Liesl是特别负责任的房东，入住期间还发信息问房子合不合意，有没有需要。房子位置很好，离Boston Medical Center只要三分钟步行，离繁华的Back Bay也很近，可以步行或者公交到达。房子里设施齐全，非常干净。
Great place, would definitely recommend!
Great location in Boston!  Would definitely stay there again!

Great apartment in downtown Boston with easy access to everything we wanted and needed for a week. Finding and entering were super easy. The apartment is well lit and great for work and relaxation both. The kitchen with dishwasher was very convenient. Would stay here again.
Great place. Seamless check in and instructions. Perfect location for my short stay.
Nice place
Great location and beautiful unique space.

We always enjoy our stay at Lihua’s place. Remember you are staying in a historical home and that is part of its charm! The rooms are large and clean, they have an attached bathroom for privacy and a comfy couch to relax and a desk to do any work that you may have. We don’t hear any of the guests either which is a huge plus. Thank you Li and Sunflower for your hospitality and your service! We will definitely be back!

The locations is great. Very close to the city and airport. The apartment is has everything you need. The bed and the bathroom were great.
There is a convenience store across the street, but make sure to not leave your wallet. I have a friend that forgot hers and someone tried to use her credit cards.
Our stay was fine. The apartment is nicely furnished and decorated but a bit musty.
Great stay for a good price, thank you!

I loved this space. Close to South Station. I was able to wheel my suitcase easily and avoided the need for a taxi.
The apartment was perfectly described and was actually better. Bed and pillows were very comfortable. TV and Wi-Fi easy to use. I didn’t make use of the kitchen in the end but the fridge was amazing. If I ever come back to Boston (hoping I will) then I’ll definitely use this apartment or Healing Homes again without hesitation. Wonderful!
nice location

This place is managed by a company, so what it lacks in personal touch it dominates in efficiency, accuracy, and ease. The space is very tiny but has everything you need--it was great for one night for one or two people who just need a place to crash for a night. The location is great and keyless entry systems make check-in and check-out a breeze.

Our stay was very comfortable. Such a cute and cozy space. Great access to public transit. Celia was a great host; quick to respond and communicate. She graciously let us store our bags after we checked out since we had a later flight.
Highly recommend this spot.
Clean, modern apartment situated perfectly near the red line and Boston Common Park. We would recommend this place to everyone.
Talk about a great location! This place was exactly as advertised- clean, roomy, comfortable, and centrally located. The kitchen had everything we could have needed. Hope to stay again soon!
I very much enjoyed my stay it was cozy and both of the hosts were very welcoming and kind great stay for the price
Had a wonderful stay!
I like simplicity and cleanliness!  This was both in addition to being in a great location!  Will stay again!
We loved staying at Christina’s place! Very easy to walk to the metro and get into Boston. The house was very calm and clean.
Comfortable space in a beautiful location!
Quaint and stylish suites connected by a common room with some lovely ameneties. Located on a quiet street in South Boston and close to everything you need. Hosts are very responsive as well :)
Will is always available to help solve problems. He is very warm and friendly. His house is in a good location
Great stay at Natalie's! several other rooms also but everyone was quiet / respectful. snacks and tea in the kitchen. very responsive host. safe / cute neighborhood.
Perfect location!
Adorable studio in Back Bay.  Very clean and comfortable. I had everything I needed. Bed very comfy!  Be prepared for some stair climbing once through the unit door, not a problem, just surprised me.
Had a great time celebrating my mom’s birthday! The place is beautiful, looks just like the pictures and clean. Plenty of toiletries if you may have forgotten. My family and I were happy, thank you!!

Andrea was a wonderful host! We weren’t super comfortable with taking the trolley then the T so we mostly did Ubers but we had an 8 year old with us. Downtown Boston is a $20-24  Uber ride so it did add up! Andrea checked in on us multiple times and the space was absolutely adorable. The  Cheers theme song in the bathroom was so cute! If I had not had an 8 year old with me I would have made the walk to the trolley then the T and saved on the Uber expense but with her with us it was just much easier to call an Uber! Andrea was a perfect host and I would absolutely recommend! We loved it there!

We loved the location. There were many great restaurants and conveniences within walking distance. The T was close by for easy transportation into the city. When we arrived there were several issues that needed resolution.
If the issues are taken care of prior to check-in and with a little more attention to both the front/back porches and the front yard area, this property would be even more attractive. We would stay here again if these items are resolved.

This apartment was well located for airport transit as it is a short walk from The Airport T station with a free transfer to Logan airport. We used it for this purpose and it was fine, although the appointing, furnishing, and decoration was rather basic so it might not be as comfortable for a longer stay. The other facilities were ok.
The host, Baljinder, was very communicative and responsive both in the run up to our stay and throughout. He was also very flexible and allowed us to keep one lobby key in order to store our bags after check out so we could get a day of sightseeing in before our flight, which was very helpful and saved us an awkward luggage issue.
Great location! Very clean

All the essentials were provided for in our stay, plus more. The host obviously put some thought into stocking the kitchen. It had dishes, cutlery, cookware and even a spatula and a wisk! The apartment had tasteful decor. The shower had great hot water that didn't go cold like many other multi unit places. Netflix on the TV was a huge plus, (also there were 2 TVs!!). The building was safe and required a series of codes to enter, ensuring only guests had full access (a random person can't just walk in; this is a very important safety feature given the neighborhood).

A very considerate host. Checked in with us a day into our stay to make sure everything was going well, and it was. The place had everything we needed for our weekend stay. I would enthusiastically recommend this place to anyone.
Amazing hotel with all the comforts and the cleaning level  is just perfect
The place was very clean and everything was arranged with great care. It had all the household supplies we needed, which made our stay very comfortable. I would definitely recommend it!
Fantastic location in Beacon Hill.

We would definetly stay here again! The location is fantastic for touring and allowed us to hop back for a break in the middle of the day. The apartment was comfortable, clean and quiet with a seamless check in experience. Lots of food options nearby too. Highly recommend!

Our stay was wonderful, the apartment was clean and the perfect size for our stay. Conveniently located just a couple of minutes from the orange line by foot. We traveled into Boston strictly by that. The street traffic was busy, but once in the apartment, it was drowned out that you could barely hear it. Parking was a little difficult to figure out because we were new the area, but the lot that is suggested was less than a 10 minute walk away with all-day parking and all-night parking. (The lots hours switch at 6am in the morning and you will need to pay again for the amount of time you're in the lot after that.) Jurek was very communicative the entire weekend we were in town and responded quickly. I would definitely recommend and would book again with Jurek.
Lovely host, great location in Southie, clean, safe and quiet.
It was a great place for a quick trip to Boston. The location was amazing!
Great price with a comfortable room! Very quick drive to downtown Boston. Thanks!

Baljinder was super quick to respond and the place was great for the four of us! We spent the weekend exploring the city so we really only spent time in the evening and mornings, but all was great. The couch bed was very comfortable! Would stay here again and definitely recommend!
Good place, great location.

One night, Halloween (a Monday) the club next door was too loud for me to sleep before they shut down a little before 2am. Bed was literally vibrating. Luckily, they were not open the next day.
Otherwise, this place is great. If you’re not planning on being up till 2am yourself, I recommend checking the schedule of “Icon” nightclub.
Listing was as described. Great little spot to stay for a Boston vacation!
Good place.
We really loved the appartment and we had an amazing time!
We loved staying here! Ali is a great host. The instructions were easy to follow and the apartment was the perfect size for a short trip. We would definitely come back!

Great location for exploring the city. But think twice if you’re an active couple who also like to cook the odd meal at home. The photos don’t really do justice to how small the place is. It’s basically a former two-room apartment split in two. The kitchenette and the bathroom are both made very hastily and on the cheap. Don’t recommend for eating in. The kitchen is minuscule and there is no dining table (!!). The toilet clogs because it’s not meant to be in a former living room. the sleeping situation is also not the greatest. The bed is basically on the floor and the sheets were stained. A proper cleanup would suit the place all around. Wouldn’t recommend unless a last resort.
The location is perfect.

The place was clean and described well. The area is a little tough but during my prolonged stay nothing has happened to me. It is conveniently located near 2 bus stops. Pay attention to months that have 5 tuesdays as your car will get towed
Nice place，clean，easy，15 mins from airport

All I can say was the stay with Aaron and Catherine was EXCEPTIONAL in every way.
Hosts were very knowledgable and helped us to ensure our visit to Boston was everything that we wanted it to be.
Omelettes were outstanding.
Highly recommend a stay here.
Had a great stay,  thanks Nick!
very clean, location is great. Close to everything. Host is very considerate of what you need.
This place is precisely as listed- perfect for one or two people, clean, nice area, and very sweet hosts 😊

Talk about an awesome location.!! Right in the heart the North Ends Little Italy. Steps from all the best restaurants, coffee shops, bakeries and bars.
We only met Howard on our first day of five but he couldn't be more accommodating. Left us notes and texts if there was anything he could do to make our stay more comfortable.
The room is pretty basic but very comfortable.
We would definitely stay again on our next visit.!!

Such a cute spot ! The location was in a little different of a  neighborhood then I was expediting ( based on how nice the apartment is) but we took uber and Lyft every where so felt safe. Terry was very quick with responses and the apartment was stylish and clean! Would highly recommend staying here !
세탁시설이 너무 더러웠고 험악해보였다
Marie is a great host, very responsive and accommodating.
房东很热情，有问题会及时回复。
Great unit and location.  Easy check in and great communication.
Amazing place, and great location. Didn't expect to see a mini-fridge and coffee machine right inside the room.
Great location and responsive host, but noisy AC and unusable TV remote.
Cute place! Clean and very convenient to Boston-just a straight bus ride in. Lindsay and Mike were very friendly and gave great info about the area. I would definitely stay again if I was in Boston!
Beautiful romantic spot for a couple exploring Boston in an authentic way!

This location is perfect and close to everything. We were within walking distance of Boston Commons. There were so many great restaurants within 10-15 minutes walking distance. Five of us stayed here for our friend’s wedding and we were all comfortable with the sleeping and bathroom accommodations. The check-in process is a breeze. The two doors to access the first floor and second floor was great to accommodate those of us arriving later at night who didn’t want to disturb anyone already sleeping. The apartment was clean and it wasn’t noisy at night. Would definitely stay here again if I travelled with a large group!
We enjoyed our stay at this hotel - luxurious room with a comfortable bed and a view of the water! Our checkin was easy and the location was super walkable!

Melissa was quick to respond. The boat itself was great! There was plenty of room for 4 people. There was a strong diesel smell however, Melissa worked with us on this situation. Just waiting on a partial refund that Melissa said would be on its way in the mail. it really was beautiful!

Host was communicative, there was street parking right in front of the house, the place was very clean, and the back yard is nice. We only stayed one night, but it we didn’t have any complaints while we were there

Perfect location for what we were doing in Boston. Easy walk to our destinations and host was responsive to any questions. Very quiet neighborhood close to a lovely coffee shop. Bed was super comfy. Exactly as described. Would highly recommend.
Clean, comfortable and convenient.

Bernadette & Tom were so friendly & welcoming as soon as we arrived. The house is beautiful & our room was modern, immaculate & the bed was incredibly comfortable.
Bernadette was the perfect host, lots of information about the area, what to do, where to go, we are frequent users of Airbnb and Bernadette is by far the best host we have ever experienced going above & above what we expected making our stay a great experience. We highly recommend staying with Bernadette.

Cozy, clean, comfortable place to stay near Northeastern, Symphony and Mass Ave.
I loved the bed, the windows, and the location. Everything was as advertised. Also great to be on the first floor. If you’re a light sleeper you may want to pick one on another floor. But I didn’t mind at all.
Wir waren sehr zufrieden einen ruhigen Ort für den Start unseres Urlaubs gefunden zu haben.
Wonderful hosts and a beautiful spot!  A most unique stay, a quiet spot just a stone’s throw from downtown.  Loved our time away!

Super clean, convenient, comfortable beds, great place to hang out with friends. Great central location to meet. Off-street parking a huge plus. Michelle was a dream to work with. She was extremely responsive and was helpful when we were planning our arrival. We were able to park the cars early so that we could make a show we had reservations for. And then at the last minute we were even able to get into the house early and she let us know right away. We wished we could have stayed there much longer!!!

we spent a few days for the Marathon week end. Location is excellent, walking distance to back bay and harvard bridge, as well as close by the Symphony T station.
Facilities were great, all equipped. kitchen very useful for breakfast and easy meals
we had a small issue with the luggage deposit access but the was promptly solved!
we have enjoyed out stay
Loved my stay in Jamaica Plain, such a cozy spot that is convenient to the T and walkable to lots of restaurants / destinations. Would love to stay here again!

The location is very convenient, being close to tourist attractions and universities. Additionally, the host is highly responsive and provides prompt and courteous replies.
I didn't mind, but you can hear the sounds of daily life from other rooms.
Perfect location, small but has everything we needed.
Zvi’s place is perfect for exploring Boston. It is a very quiet neighborhood and feels safe. We were able to eat at a park close by and enjoyed the Irish Pub on Market Street. ( 15 min walk)
Great place to stay, great location clean and very spacious. Lots of walkable restaurants and coffee shops.
Very convenient location and super responsive host!
Very convenient to go anywhere, clean and quiet.
The room is clean and tidy. A very comfortable stay.
Great place to stay when in Boston. Just a quick train ride to downtown.

Great location next to Charles Str in Beacon Hill, close to common garden, down town, Newbury str. The flat is comfortable. The lounge has a cosy fire place. The kitchen is relatively well equipped.
The downside is that there’s little natural light, even on the first floor as the windows gives on a wall and the kitchen and second bedroom are in the basement and the heating there is loud at night.
Though Kaitlyn was very accommodating and let us do a late check out.

Great location to stay at Boston.
I will definitely stay again if I would be visiting Boston next time.
Host is very helpful and responsive for any question or issue.
Three-key-doors are a little bit work, but if feel safe to stay at same time in the downtown.
If you are able to walk 20-30min., you can go number of must-see location from this room.
We walked to Tea Party Museum with 9yr old. As well as Chinatown and Public Library.
If you don’t need a car, and just take a train or walk around, this is one of the best place to stay in Boston.

Lo mejor de este apartamento es su ubicación. Al lado de la Newbury y del Prudential Center hace que sea muy fácil y agradable la estadía. Es de lejos la mejor característica del apartamento. Otro punto muy positivo es la comunicación y respuesta de los anfitriones. Siempre atentos a responder y solucionar los requerimientos que tuvimos.
La cocina amplia y bien equipada, pudimos usarla como lo necesitamos.
El tema del ruido a las 5 a.m. debido al bar justo abajo es algo que sabíamos debido a los comentarios de los otros huéspedes. Para ni no fue tanto un problema.
Creo que el punto a mejorar sería los colchones de las camas y la ropa de cama en general. No están en el mejor estado.
Good location, alright accommodations. Convenient to bus and transportation.
Small and sweet room to stay in while I spent a few days in Boston. I was working walking distance of pretty much every place I wanted to visit (museums, restaurants, parks), which was amazing.
a microwave would be great
Had a great stay.  Location was wonderful as well as the amenities.
Excelentes instalaciones y servicios. Encantada de volver a hospedarme con ustedes

We had a great stay at Glenns appartment. He is a wonderful host and always very responsive and helpful. Even if the appartment is quite old and therfore has its flaws (which Glenn always adressed righ away when asked), we very much liked it and felt at home direclty from the beginning. We would definately recommend to stay with Glenn.
Good place for the price.
Great
Exactly as described! The home, room and restroom were all clean and nice. The neighborhood was very safe and I felt comfortable walking to and from the bus stop and running in the morning.
Melissa's place is situated in a charming brownstone at a great location.  She was very responsive and attentive to our every need.  I would definitely book with her again when in Boston!
Serene was an extremely hospitable host and was very helpful and communicative! The place was very nice and well stocked, we had a great stay!
The apartment is as described and it was very clean.  It is all you need for your next stay in Boston.  Great location.  I was very comfortable   Quiet building.

We had a lovely stay with Hilary, Hazel & Aggie the dog. Hilary and Hazel were both sweet and Hilary had a collection of travel guides and info for us to pursue, which was super helpful! Their home is situation in a lovely area of Boston, Jamaica Plains. The T-station was only a few minutes walk away and took us straight into downtown Boston in about 25-30 minutes. We were so glad to be able to spend the day in the city but then come back to this cute little neighborhood that had lovely homes and restaurants and even in the cold weather made us want to meander through the streets. If you stay here, be sure to grab coffee in the mornings at the Feed Store only a block away- adorable store! The room itself was cozy and inviting and had its own heater, which was great for a weenie southerner like myself who isn't accustomed to winter anymore! And like many other reviews have said, it is true: Aggie might be one of the most loving dogs around!
We had a wonderful stay. It was cozy and made our Thanksgiving very special.

Billy was very accommodating with our check in and out times. He was very quick to answer any questions that we had about the area and our trip.  I would highly recommend him and his place to anyone and would love to stay in Boston again at this awesome spot.

We loved our stay. The apartment was just as described. Very clean, spacious and well kept. Michael is a great host. Extremely responsive and friendly. The value for the money was great. I would book and stay with Micharl again, in fact, I will be doing that the next time I visit Boston. Thanks for the great weekend!

We have stayed at Susan’s several times and it has always been a pleasant stay.
It has a spiral staircase to get to the bathroom and bedrooms upstairs and it can be tricky carrying luggage upstairs.
Susan always has English muffins and coffee. She is very responsive if you need anything.

The place is very clean and there are very nice touches like a selection of cereals for breakfast, cold water, bananas and coffee. There are shampoos and conditioners in the bathroom. Practically, you have everything what you need for a short stay.
It may be my fault that I was under the impression that there is a private bathroom in the room. Actually, it was my main criteria for choosing a place to stay. The description should be more clear.
Also, the host quite aggressively refused my children who live in Boston and were not planning to stay with me to come up onto the second floor with to help me with my suitcase. This was really not very helpful band uncalled for.

This is a wonderful place to stay (particularly for long term rentals)!  Jurek is a great host who is incredible hospitable, kind, and friendly.  His place is welcoming and clean and has all the necessary amenities.  The location is excellent and right next to the T stop, making the city easily accessible.  I truly enjoyed my stay and recommend it to anyone!

This location is great.  The place is a great base for 1-2 people to explore some of the best Boston has to offer on foot or by transit.  Very clean, no issues with check in.  Right on the edge of Chinatown and only a few minutes from the Common and the Public Garden.  20 minute walk to the Aquarium, etc...at most.
Exactly as listed, great communication

Camille is one of the best hosts I have had in an airbnb. She is very responsive through communication and has been very accommodating.
I noticed a basketball net in the backyard and simply asked if we could shoot around casually here and there, not expecting much. Camille gladly says yes, and within the next little bit, I notice her in the backyard cleaning the "basketball court" and moving things out of the way, including their truck, kids' toys, etc. This was not part of the arrangement but she did it anyways. Awesome and accommodating host!
The space itself is spacious, clean and comfortable. Plenty of beds for a comfortable 5-6 people. Air conditioning units provided which is key for those hot summer days.
This flat was in an extremely convenient and lovely area.  It was ideal for two people, modern and cosy.

The house was beautiful and the hosts were very welcoming. They were quick in answering any questions I had.
Thanks for hosting me!

The room is perfect,  comfy, cozy, feels like a treehouse overlooking rooftops and church steeple.  Bed was extremely comfortable.  Nice touches, equipped with details that cover any need from tissues to extra power cords. Beyond expectation. I'll be back.
I love this place!
Very lovely cozy place! The service was also wonderful. Highly recommended and will be back again if there’s a chance.
Die Wohnung hat unsere Erwartungen erfüllt.

This place was a great location and easy to communicate with. The apartment itself was not good for gathering. It was a strange shape hard to gather with just four people. It needed to be stocked better. No hand towel in bathroom. The beds were very uncomfortable. It worked fine for us because the great location but I prob wouldn’t stay again because it wasn’t comfortable.

Affordable flat within walking distance to Harvard area. Host Kevin was very accommodating, welcoming and reliable. Place was sparkling clean with plenty of towels and extra pillows. Information folder invaluable during our stay. Fast internet and Netflix ideal after a day full of Boston site-seeing. We were very grateful for the complimentary coffee in the morning!

This was a wonderful stay. A great location for those wanting to be in/around Boston for a night or two without having to deal with the traffic. A short Uber ride in, and you are in the heart of Boston. Katia was a fantastic host. She was very flexible with our stay, and always quick to reply to my questions. Highly recommend.

Great apartment, clean, well appointed and well outfitted! North end location has many awesome Italian restaurants and pastry shops. Location is also very close to the Freedom trail.  Stairs are not for the faint of heart. We enjoyed the workout! We would stay here again in a minute!!!
The AirBnb was clean and cozy. The bed was incredibly comfortable. There is a pretty tight staircase to get up to the unit, which may be challenging for someone with a lot of luggage.
Extended my stay since all the experience was so good. I highly recommend.

Santo’s place is wonderful - couldn’t ask for a better location in the heart of the south end of Boston. The apartment is adorable - small and cozy but with everything you need. It’s clean and stylish. Santo was remarkably responsive to questions and is a great host. The outdoor patio and deck is large (for the city), private to the unit, and beautiful with trees and lights all around in the evening. It’s a great place to be! Highly recommend!
The host and accommodations were great. Sadly it wasn't a good fit for my daughter. Thanks so much.

My husband and I stayed in Boston for two nights to see a friend, and the value of the location (10 minute Uber ride from popular places in the city) for the money and availability of free parking was absolutely lovely! The apartment was very clean as well.

The location is absolutely perfect: walking distance to the Freedom Trail and harbor, as well minutes from a T station. The unit may lack the coziness we often look for in a place to stay, the point of Boston is to go out, explore and enjoy what the historic city has to offer.

Great location 5 minutes from orange line, close to restaurants. Lovely, clean with every amenity you could need. Very comfortable bed. Great recommendation from Elena for Tres Gatos for dinner, but get reservation. Thanks again Elena
Jessica was a great host. She was always available byphone or airbnb. Ever again . It takes 10 min to the subway station, you need only one train for ervery sightseeing
Great place to stay in Boston! The location was amazing! It was walkable, and also close to the T!
Michelle is an extremely hospital host! She even went out of her way to make me coffee every morning. Highly recommended if you wanna find a host in Boston!
Super cozy stay with great amenities! Convenient location for attending events at TD Garden- only about a 10 minute drive. Thanks Elisangela!
Clean comfortable room.

I’ve stayed in a lot of Airbnbs, but this was something else entirely. The design was absolutely stunning like walking into a boutique hotel that somehow feels like home. Every detail was thoughtful, from the curated decor to the insanely comfortable bed.
The vibe was super chic but still cozy, and the location made it easy to explore everything around Boston. I especially loved the entryway. it felt like stepping into a secret speakeasy before opening up into this calm, beautiful space.
Check in was smooth, everything was spotless, and the hosts clearly put a lot of love into creating a memorable experience. Already planning my next trip back.
Highly, highly recommend.
I had a fantastic stay at Richard's apartment. Checking in and out was a breeze. Location was great and easy to get to. Train station is across the street. Couldn't ask for anything more.

This place has a very homey feel, cozy as described. The amenities were five star and Maude's hospitality is commendable. Probably the best of any airbnb I've stayed with regard to detail and convenience.
It's location is a good walk into town and far away enough that its pretty quiet at night time.
A tip for travellers walking from Back Bay stn with prams or luggage would be to take the smoother Public Alley 701 or W Dedham st rather than the cobblestone Waltham st.
I would recommend this place.

A light filled nest in the sky! What beautiful space to call home for our weekend getaway. The apartment is impeccable ... thoughtfully and lovingly designed and furnished. So many details that did not go unnoticed ... like a small vase of violets in the bathroom, fresh milk and yogurt in the frig, fresh fruit, coffee, tea and cereal. Jennifer truly is a wonderful, kind, and attentive host. She was so helpful! Her home is located in a very attractive neighborhood walking distance to restaurants, shops, parks and public transportation (a quick and easy, commute into Boston). I highly recommend this place if your visiting the Boston area. 5 STARS! Thank you Jennifer for making our stay extra special!

Felt like a true Bostonian in this gorgeous, historical home. Decor is fabulous and eclectic. The bathroom is to die for with that amazing steam shower! Extremely close to downtown which made it convenient. We will be back.

Beautiful views of a beautiful area. Comfortable bed. Heating/temperature great. Host was very responsive and fixed a small issue the very same day we texted—went out of her way to help. Location was spectacular. Fully stocked kitchen. Good WiFi with large TV. Quiet peaceful area. Easy building access with safe Amazon package delivery. Beautiful lighting. Only negatives were minor: eg, shower may not be suitable for the elderly, hot laundry basement. Overall, excellent stay!

The apartment was as described by both Healing Homes and other guests.  It is centrally located in Boston and it is walkable to most attractions.  There is ‘city noise’ throughout the day and evening but that would be expected anywhere downtown.  The apartment is clean and offers plenty of space for 4 people.  The managers are very responsive.

This is my favorite place to stay in Boston.  It was our second stay at Maude's lovely brownstone and we loved it.  We had 6 in our party (myself, husband, and our four children). While it's two bedrooms, there really is a lot of space and it works out well for larger groups.  We used the extra inflatable mattress in the living room and my teenage girls loved watching TV late in the night and having the upstairs all to themselves! The home is so charming and has everything you need (lots of extra blankets, towels, toiletries, kitchen goodies, mattress).  Maude and her husband are the most gracious and generous hosts.  The area is darling - we loved walking all around the neighborhood - full of great little stores, bistros, coffee shops.  My daughter loved to study or read on the front stoop and watch people walk by with their dogs. You really are close to absolutely everything and the home is so comfortable and cozy. I can't say enough wonderful things about Maude or her home.  You must stay here in Boston!

Overall a good value. The unit is smaller than it appears in the photos and I would not recommend for a bigger person as the toilet space in the bathroom is very tight. Otherwise the place was in a great location, clean, and comfortable.
Nothing fancy but a very good place for the money. Two bathrooms make a huge difference for the morning.

yes, there are stairs as it's a walk up, but we're in our 70's and aced them since they Were not too long g or steep
you just can't beat the location, neighborhood, comfort. and charm
Cara was attentive, even at 1:00 AM when we forgot the door code. Thank you Cara. We hope to return next year!
Great location in the South End! Place was incredibly clean and easy to access. Got a bit cold overnight when the temps were low so I definitely appreciated having the space heater handy!
Thank you for a great stay. Other than the parking issue 😊, it was very pleasant.
Your place is modern, clean and quiet! Would love to stay again!

Comfortable and cool apartment - and the back deck is a winner.
Location is fine. Nice neighbourhood, and easy walk to Fenway (20 min) and Boylston (15 min).
All communication is easy and cool with Mike 👍
Could very well be our future stay in Boston.

Denise is a fantastic host-she is very prompt in her responses and gives wonderful recommendations around the neighborhood. The space itself is really quite nice, it felt just like home away from home. I was in Boston for a week and the kitchen is nice to be able to make lunches throughout the week. I felt the apartment was in walking distance to everything or everywhere I needed to be. I would definitely stay here again if I returned to Boston!

With my limited experience on Airbnb, the experience with this host and his house is the worst.
The shower tub faucet could not be properly turned off.
Bed sheets do not seem to be properly cleaned and disinfected for reuse. My wife woke up after one night sleep with itchy and discomforting feelings all over her body. I reported the issue to the host and got zero response or any action on that. Not good at all.
It is a 2-day stay for us there. On the second morning, water started dripping hard from the ceiling above kitchen area, which added more insult to the injury before we left the house.
The neighborhood is nice and quiet though and dynamic at the same time.
Overall, this is a pretty bad experience for me and my family. I would not recommend this host to anyone who travels with his/her family.
Alicia's place is wonderful and she was very communicative before my stay!  If you are looking for a gem on Newbury Street, stay here!

Wonderful place to stay, very clean, high quality fixtures, very comfortable bed. Is bigger than it looks in the pictures. Great neighborhood, close to bars and restaurants. Andrea was a great host and was very responsive to any questions. As others have mentioned, you do hear footsteps from the apartment above, especially when they come and go. But otherwise a really great Airbnb experience.

Michael’s place is cute and cozy.
Nice decorations. Beds are soft.
We had an issue with Towels. Family of 5 staying 4 days and only received 5 towels total. Also not any kitchen towels or hand towels. Reached out to Michael and never received any.

We really loves this place...location really good and private, communication very clear and fast response👍
Very reccomended to stay

Jessica’s place is great and exactly as advertised. Short walk to public transit as well as some nice restaurants and bars. Our host was great and was prompt to respond to our needs. The space is perfect if you’re visiting the Boston area and need a cozy spot to sleep, shower and keep your things safe. We had a great time on our first trip to Boston and Jessica’s place definitely helped with that experience.
Jonathan was a very responsible and responsive host. I enjoyed my stay, and hope to stay here again if I ever come to Boston :)

This place is in a wonderful location- near to the trolleys and a lot of great food. We were able to walk about  everywhere we needed and had a good time coming home to some HGTV. Good value. Great location. Excellent communication.
Close to many places, easy to find, owners were fast and responsive. You hear street noises but that’s to be expected while staying downtown. Loved our stay here!
This is small great and cozy place. Location is good and decent studio. The value is great honestly and private. Alan is great on communication

Alys is the best host!!she helped
me everything.The house is very comfy and beautiful.I love the bathroom so much very relaxing.but the location its kinda steep if you have to walk from a metro with luggages.Cats very friendly
Nice place. Great location.

Great host
Great location, near the subway stop
Very clean and comfortable
Host was very responsive. Perfect place for a large group!

Highly recommended. Close to everything and the place is spacious and clean.
We really enjoyed our stay and definitely I’ll come again.
Albert is really responsive and easy to reach.

Jurek’s place was great for a girls weekend! He was a great communicator, and got back in a timely manner! The apartment isn’t near much, so if you don’t drive you have to uber almost everywhere, but it is a very short trip to downtown Boston! The apartment was very cozy and Jurek was very accommodating for us and with check in!
Great place to stay, super host, great location

Place is bigger than I thought, apartment is extremely spacious which is great. Well equipped. I do wish they gave us a few amenities though like dish detergent and maybe some coffee pods in the morning. Most air bnbs I have visited have had things like that. However the home itself was clean and very spacious. Parking is available for those who have cars, we did, however it was paid. Very close to the airport and easy to find. Overally a great experience. Thanks!

This apartment was great. The design is clean, modern, and calming, with thoughtful touches. The bed was super comfortable, lighting was warm, and everything was spotless when we arrived. I also loved how close it was to downtown, super easy to get around. Communication was seamless and check-in was a breeze. You can tell the hosts really care about creating a special experience. Highly recommend if you’re looking for something nice but still cozy.

We had a lovely stay! Everything was as promised and Jay was very helpful with any inquiries. North End is a great location, although there was some nighttime noise from the street Saturday night - but that’s normal city life.
We really enjoyed our stay in South Boston. The apartment was clean, modern and just as described. Thanks for a wonderful stay
Warm and cozy place to sleep. Would definitely recommend this spot to anybody who needs a place to sleep
Great!

Un très beau logement exactement comme décrit par les explications et les photos. Nous avons adoré notre séjour et la maison de Mélissa. Le stationnement se fait très bien dans la rue. Nous avons très bien dormi. Les Uber se rendent sans problème de la maison vers le centre ville et le prix est parfaitement honnête (nous étions 3). Vraiment une place qui donne envie de revenir.
10/10, would recommend! Tom was an amazing host. He made me feel very welcome & comfortable in his home.
Great place ! Enjoyed my time here

This place is amazing! It's in a really beautiful and quiet part of Boston. There's some great local shops close by and the T station is accessible. The room is great and clean and so nice. I loved my stay!
Good location, noisy building
Great location

We had apartment 4E which didn’t show up on the keypad outside. We were surrounded by homeless people while outside the door. We had to wait till someone else used their code to get inside. There is no elevator as described as well. The bed was very uncomfortable. Not worth the money
Nice area to stay, and Roy was a very generous host!
Thank you!
Amazing
