The only downside to this unit is that you can constantly hear the road and cars outside. Personally this wasn't a big issue but if you need silence to sleep, maybe bring some earbuds. Aside from that, it was honestly a perfect place, especially for the price!!
Celia was fantastic! Super hospitable and kind - would totally recommend. Very clean, which is a must for me.

Location very good and host Sarah was great honestly, but the place needs some loving as it's old and the small room I was in for nearly 100 dollars in total was not worth it at all, very basic room and can be noisy as I was woke up 3 or 4 times during the night due to other guests going to toilet downstairs. As I said the host and updates were great but place needs some badly needed love n renovation and I will be back to Boston 4 times this year with work and unfortunately unless this place is renovated I will not stay here again, as honestly host great but place not worth the fee.
thanks

great place with easy walking to the T.  Very comfortable accommodations for the five of us.  great place to celebrate Thanksgiving. Loved the backyard area and would love to come back in warmer weather to make good use of it!

This welcoming and cozy stay, in a quintessential Boston brownstone, more than met our expectations. Michael was very accommodating as we transitioned from another Air bnb.  The bed was quite comfortable and the back deck, delightful.  Short walk to great restaurants.  A keeper on our wishlist.

Clean and spacious apartment with a great location for getting around.  Street parking was plentiful and free at night.  Less than a block to the subway and several restaurant options just downstairs.  It is an older building, with some quaint quirks (no lift, third floor walk-up, drafty windows) but everything was clean, and in good condition with plenty of heat, lighting, water pressure, fresh towels and a couple of very comfortable beds, each with master bath.

Stayed for 6 nights. The location is great. Easy walking around the Beacon Hill neighborhood. It’s pretty much next to Boston Common and Public Garden. Room is clean and host is very responsive for questions. I really like the coffee provided :)
The queen bed is very comfortable. We also used the pull out sofa bed. It’s firm enough to hold some weight. We paid additional fees to reserve a parking spot for a few days at the back of the building. Overall it’s a great stay for us.
Very much enjoyed our stay in Boston at Frank & Delilah’s apartment. Lovely apartment, well equipped with washing machine, etc.

This was our first visit to Boston and I am so glad I found Lihua’s listing. The beautiful brownstone is situated in a picturesque, peaceful neighborhood. So many things are walking distance like Fenway Park, Boston University, and the T station which will take you wherever you need to go. Lihua gave us great tips that made our Boston experience so much better. You can tell she truly loves Boston and knows the city well. The room and bathroom were extremely clean and comfortable. We hope to visit Boston again one day and we would book a room here in a heartbeat. Thank you, Lihua and Sunflower for helping make our Boston trip a great one!
Great location, very close to a bus station, Ruben was very responsive and friendly :)

The place is very clean and nice, perfect if you just need a place to sleep!
There’s no common area or parking at the house, you have to find parking on the street.
The host is kind and helpful, thank you!

Great and clean place. Facilities and kitchen tools are nicely equipped. Near community has got  lot of vietnamese supermarkets and restaurants. 15 minutes walk to take red line. Evan is really helpful and patient for any guest need！
Perfect place to stay for our weekend trip to Boston.

Beautiful and comfortable private room with newly renovated en-suite bathroom on quiet side street in cool JP neighbourhood. The view from the bedroom is just stunning! The room also has ample sockets/power outlets. Penny kindly provided tasty and healthy breakfast options as well as a printed house manual with extensive tips to make the most of the neighbourhood and Boston (including a great nearby Scottish restaurant, The Haven). She went above and beyond to help me with my arrangements. It made an enormous difference! I feel so lucky to have found Penny's place! I would love to come back and would thoroughly reccomend Penny's place to others.

Da wir mit dem Auto angereist waren, war es auch unkompliziert zur nächsten zum nächsten Zug oder Straßenbahn (Parkplatz vorhanden) zu kommen. Ansonsten wäre es schon ein kurzer  Weg zu Fuß (30 Minuten) gewesen.

Debbie’s place in Charlestown was the perfect place from which to explore Boston with our two kids, not only because it was close to central Boston but because it was so quiet and private. The apartment is incredibly neat and yet comfortable for everyone. We were only a block from the Bunker Hill Monument (which you can visit and climb for free) yet Whole Foods and many great eateries were within easy walking distance, as was the Orange Line T stop. We heartily recommend this wonderful place and would love to return!
Highly recommend!
Great experience.
This was an amazing place to stay! The apartment was very clean. The view from the rooftop was amazing. Also, the community was great!I would definitely stay here again in the future!!
Great host! Very communicative and flexible. Made us feel more than welcome!
Bon rapport qualité prix et location Vs Boston downtown.

This was my husband and I's first Airbnb experience, and it was much better than we so much more than we expected! Bill and Maureen's hospitality was beyond exceptional! Our stay at the Boston Bailey has set the expectation very high for future Airbnb stays. We will definitely be staying here again the next time we visit Boston!
Great place

My stay at Gerard and Marie's place was everything that was promised and everything I needed.  The place was comfy and inviting and Gerard and Marie were so understanding when a flight delay brought me in later than anticipated.  I will definitely return!

This place was great. Had everything we needed and is close to everything. We were able to walk to most attractions, bars, and restaurants. We also took the train to Fenway and there is a station basically across the street.
Richard was great with communicating both prior and during our stay. We’d definitely book this place again the next time we visit Boston.
Really central location in a lovely area near the beach. Tianyu was a great host.
Great location for what we needed it for!

A good base for our four night stay in Boston. We hadn't realised however that the bathroom (Ground floor)  was on a different level to the bedroom (basement) with a narrow steep circular staircase connecting them. This won't be a problem for many but was for us. Fortunately the sofa bed in the living room was easy to inflate and comfortable to sleep on. You also need to be aware that the washer and dryer are shared with other units - so may not always be available. (We managed fine though!). Good kitchen facilities and good access into Boston centre.
They did a great job helping us throughout the entire trip!
Loved Riyo’s apartment! Very beautifully decorated and clean.

The bed was very comfortable and we made good use of the kitchen. The refrigerator/freezer was huge! The  big screen tv had many channel options and we made good use of that while winding down at night.  Nick answered all our questions and provided help in a very timely manner. We enjoyed our stay and would consider booking it again!

As reported, comfy beds and a nice space if you can handle narrow spiral staircase. Our main challenge was getting the main TV working. That system could've been more user friendly/organized but Jay did respond when we texted him questions about it.

Maria was a wonderful host! Gave us a brief tour of the room upon our arrival as well as made recommendations on how to get around and things to see in the surrounding area. She even went above and beyond to turn the A/C on for us each night so our room was nice and cool every night when we arrived! Would HIGHLY recommend staying with her, and would definitely stay again! Thank you Maria!!
Great location & Walker was a great/responsive host. Would definitely stay here again!!
I had a great stay here. The apartment is really cosy and the neighborhood is incredible. Would definitely stay again.
Awesome location very close to Brigham and competitive with the nearby hotel. Completely smooth check in and check out. Nice booklet with local recs. Very clean and comfortable. Can’t ask for more!
Great value, location, & service.
We really feel comfortable living in Bernard's home. Very clean and convenient location that near supermarket and some stores. We will be back again!
The home was beautiful and modern, one of the nicest we’ve stayed at. James was awesome with his communications. Perfect stay.

This place was a mix of good and bad, but overall there were a number of big/moderate bads and only a few moderate goods...I would not stay here again. As others have said, this is a basement unit, which isn't really advertised well in the listing, but I knew it from other reviews.
Pros: host was responsive (though not especially helpful), the unit was price-competitive for a last-minute booking, and the neighborhood is decent enough. The place was clean and had decent decor.
Cons: NOISE; the AC unit inside requires an open window for venting all the time. The motorcycles outside this open window kept me up all night. Also, there was open trash in the stairwell during my entire stay. It eventually attracted flies and be made it nasty to enter/exit. I notified the host, but it never got removed. Beyond this, there's just a lot of hack fixes in the unit; missing paint, AC vent taped with cardboard, etc. Finally, the bathroom was so tiny I couldn't sit squarely on the toilet.
We had a great time!

Awesome place. Nice location to explore. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Phil & Jen. They were very helpful and gave us resources  that made our first time in Boston so much fun. Their place is so cute and very clean!
Host was perfect. From getting the keys, to the place being as advertised and clean. 5 star host and very nice place to stay!

Jodie’s place was perfect!! Located near Kenmore Square but secluded from the craziness of Commonwealth Ave, this is perfect for anyone visiting BU or Fenway. Both I wouldn’t even consider “walking distance”, they were basically right outside your door! Parking was incredible convenient in a back lot, not street parking. The place was clean, comfortable, and spacious and felt very safe. The only thing to note: there isn’t a microwave, so just be conscious of the leftovers you decide to take home.
Beautiful place

I stayed at Sherwin's place for six months and will highly recommend for anyone looking for a good furnished place on a budget in a decent area.
The place was great, it's spacious with a small living room, a bedroom and large windows for ample natural light. The space is well furnished ans has all the essentials. The kitchen and washroom are shared with other guests but are large and have most things needed for cooking.
The area itself was good, safe with lots of stores nearby. It's close to the arboretum and the Jamaica pond which are great spots to go for walks and runs.
Sherwin is very responsive and available, would highly recommend.

Lovely stay. Very cozy and great location close to the train station, making it easy to get around Boston. The private entrance with the key pad made getting in and out easy at all hours. 10/10. Would stay again.

A great clean trendy decorated place near the airport in a slightly dodgy part of town.  Walking distance to blue line means that you can get to the airport for free or downtown for a few bucks.  Used the key code and didn't see or hear anyone else the entire time.  They have thought of everything.  I would stay there again.

Had an early flight into Boston and asked Lucky if it’s ok to drop off our stuff while we wait for check in, very accommodating! So quick to respond and friendly upon check in. I wanted to explore Boston’s public transportation and the bus stop it only a 3 minute walk, lots of there’s to do in the area. I highly recommend this place for an overnight stay! Thank you lucky :)

We stayed overnight after a late flight. Balijinder was prompt with communication and helpful. It was good value and is conveniently located to the airport and metro for getting into town. Some cafes and shops are close by.

To date this is the best AirBnB I’ve ever stayed at. Impeccably clean, beautiful, easy to find and quiet. I had to stay in Boston for extra two days due to my flight being delayed and the host was super flexible with my check in and last minute booking. I couldn’t recommend this place enough. If you’re looking for a large, peaceful and clean family space this is it!

I  fully recommend Karina”s department is very confortable. It is in a quiet place and for us  close to NU.  Karina  was all the time in touch with us. Se is very warm. It was easy to arrive  to the apartment and the placed guidance is very clear.
Julian's place was great! Very clean and comfortable and I felt right at home. Would stay again.

Truly a hidden gem. 2 blocks from the T & from there so easy to get into Boston. The house itself matches the photos exactly and was more than enough for our group of 4. If we are ever in Boston again we would stay here again!

Perfect location between all points in the Boston area!
Amazing front desk staff went above and beyond to help me acquire my concert tickets with a last minute delivery.
Very cool boutique hotel if you enjoy a different experience! Would certainly stay here again.
The apartment is spacious and located in downtown Boston which is super convenient. Please be aware of construction noise near the building.

Absolutely! Here's a shorter version that keeps the charm:
---
This place? Total gem. Felt like walking into a warm hug. The hosts are amazing—always there when you need them, like mind-reading superheroes.
Security’s top-notch with smart locks that made me feel like a stylish spy. I never worried about my stuff, just focused on binge-watching and fake-cheffing.
Multiple entrances = secret passage vibes. The upstairs room? Quiet, cozy, and perfectly private.
Didn’t want to leave. Already planning my return. If you’re thinking of booking—do it. Just leave me a spot.
Great location and cool place. Just as described. Easy check-in and responsive host.
Leslie was an amazing host, very responsive. Her place was great for a family vacation. Lot of fun places nearby and close to public transportation to get to other parts of the city!
Very clean, comfortable bed. The door was a bit difficult to close/lock because it’s not lined up perfectly. Overall decent

We stayed for a couple of nights in the studio, and had a great time! The bed was comfortable and the place was very clean. It's just a couple of minutes from the metro in a quiet street.
The bathroom is very small and quirky, with the toilet in the shower space. You may need flip flops.
Holly’s air bnb was beautiful! She was very flexible in check in timing which was helpful!

This place was great to hang out with friends before going into Downtown Boston! The location is not walking distance from the downtown area but Ubers are close. Nice place for a group of people- Would recommend!
Basically a hostel - very bare bones but ok to crash for one night
Great location. Place was clean and exactly as explained. Would highly recommend.
overall pretty good, the room is tidy and comfortable. But the washroom is too small and a little bit  inconvenient
Amazing property with great amenities! Kevin was very responsive and his check in instructions were accurate  and  detailed. Definitely recommend this space! Clean, quiet and convenient

Kaitlin is the best host we have ever encountered! She was responsive, informative and had great suggestions for things to do on our Boston trip. Her place is cozy and clean and is walkable to many restaurants, bars, grocery etc. Highly recommend!
This is the second time I stayed at Clara’s place. She is a great host. I felt like home. Recommend everyone who is visiting Boston.

The apartment is small with everything you need for a comfortable stay. It is very clean, quiet, and close to transportation, restaurants and shops in JP. The house and area feel safe. I have stayed there on two visits to Boston. Communication has always been very good. Miriam’s husband greeted me at the house for both stays. They supplied breakfast foods which is very convenient.
Best place I’ve stayed in Boston. Very easy to find parking. Great communication, super clean, easy walk to many things. I hope to be a regular here on my future trips to Boston.

Lots of space, very clean, plenty of beds to host a group but just be conscious of only 2 bathrooms. The host, Fatima, is super nice and responds quickly to all inquiries. We as a group had no issues but a few of our Uber drivers did say to stay together walking around in the neighborhood. Public transportation (Red Line) is about a 10 minute walk downhill.
it was good
This is a wonderful spot in a great location.  It is bright and airy.  There is good space to relax.  The bed is comfortable.  It was the perfect place to stay while visiting my son in Jamaica Plain.

Perfekt gelegen zwischen der grünen und der orangenen U-Bahn-Linie (beide nur ca. 5 Minuten entfernt), ist man in etwa 10 Minuten in Downtown und doch in diesem Viertel etwas außerhalb des Trubels der Großstadt.
Siena hilft schnell bei allen Dingen, ist sehr kommunikativ und die Unterkunft hat alles, was man braucht.
Danke!

When done right, the private room, shared commons is great. This is done right. The bathrooms are spa-like. The bed was fantastic. The kitchen is very nice. To handle parking, I used a "pre-flight airport parking lot" nearby and got a ride share to and from the lot. That worked fine.

Angela’s home is beautifully decorated, the room itself has an amazing bed. I almost didn’t wanna get out. The bathroom is directly across the hall and was very clean and she had amenities in there in case you forgot any. The room had a tv with cable and open drawers and closet space, the WiFi was great and she even has a few brochures/maps for things to do/see in Boston! We used a lyft to go every where and they arrived within minutes each time. I enjoyed my stay and would definitely recommend anyone to stay here.
Nicest stay ever! Worth to come

La relacion precio calidad excelente. Zona tranquila, el departamento espacioso, y con lo necesario para una estadia corta (estuve 6 noches). Muy buena ubicación, se podía ir caminado a la mayoria de las zonas importantes. A considerar, el departamento es en planta baja y da a la calle. Como la zona es tranquila, no hay mucho ruido. Las percianas dejan pasar la luz. En síntesis, por el precio lo recomendaría y volveria a ir.
Bathrooms were SO clean! Amazing walkability!

I enjoyed my two night stay in this beautiful and unique apartment! The location was perfect for my work trip to Boston. It’s a quintessential Dorchester street and the apartment itself has two stained glass windows (my favorite part of Boston architecture). The space is comfortable, clean, and beautifully decorated with lots of high end touches, like heated bathroom floors, a steam shower, automatic lights, etc. I would love to stay again.
Fantastic place! I hope to stay again, thanks
Everything was nice in this staying. Firlian is a very great person.

What a unique, and spectacular property.
We were looking for a place to stay in Boston, and I wouldn’t have wanted to stay anywhere else. The property was stunning with amazing interior decor.
Large King beds, amazing showers, fully equipped kitchen, epic rooftop views and a stones throw away from Fenway!
Outstanding.
The apartment was immaculate. The loft was cozy and spartan but that was exactly what I needed. Drew is polite, friendly, and straight forward about the rules. I would use this Air B&B again.
Great location walking distance of what we wanted to see in Boston. Very comfortable and easy communication with owner.
Super duper clean place, great choice for a last-minute trip to Boston!
Mycket fräscht och trevligt rum och ett bra läge.

Great, affordable place. Very spacious.  I was especially glad the amenities included everything you would need when traveling with a toddler or baby, including pack & play, baby both, high chairs, indoor and outdoor toys, books, backyard playset, and more.
Comfortable and convenient to Dorchester and Jamaica Plain. Great value. Host is very communicative. Would return if back in Boston.

Rosy’s place was actually really nice. Even though it’s in an apartment, you feel very secluded from everyone else. Her communication is also spot on, she doesn’t leave you hanging and she has people who she can send your way if you ever need anything. Overall great experience! TV stopped working but that wasn’t to the fault of Rosy, and she did everything in her power to make sure it got taken care of!

We had an awesome stay at Meri's place. It's incredibly convenient to the Boston convention and exhibition center, lots of cool neighborhood restaurants, and an awesome Harbor walk area for running/walking.  streets are well lit, neighborhood seems very safe, and the accommodations are very very nice.

Beautiful and sparkling clean apartment! The building is easy to access with clear instructions provided by the host, who was highly responsive and easy to communicate with. I would recommend this location to anyone traveling by car, as it’s easy to get around and conveniently located. Great price point and excellent quality!
Great location. Center of Boston and everything is walkable

Dana was a great host and very courteous. Easy to communicate with. Leaving and entering the place was super easy because you have your own entryway. Location is fantastic, super close to green line (you can walk to the metro stop). Overall, Dana was very welcoming and helped make our stay a memorable one.

We absolutely loved our stay in this beautiful home in the historic Beacon Hill neighborhood. It was so spacious and comfortable for our group during our stay. We enjoyed all of the amenities available, the amazing artwork throughout the house, the lovely back patio, and the great cooling system that kept everyone cool on all floors during a very warm week. The community park adjacent to the house was an added bonus.
The apartment was clean, comfortable and roomy. Beds were comfortable. Parking for our car and a short walk to the T stop made our stay in Boston really easy. I’d stay here again!
Great location and had everything we needed. Check-in and checkout was super simple.
Very close to the common. Very walkable
Great place! Clean&quiet, great location as well (5 minute walk to NEC & Northeastern University).
很亁淨，入住快一個月，明天年還要來！
If it’s available book it!
Great location in the South End and communication from host.

I enjoyed my stay here in this super clean, comfortable apartment and found it to be in a convenient and scenic location. It was easy to walk to my appointments at the medical center and find what I needed nearby.  It's close to parks, restaurants and T stations. Newly renovated, this apartment has a beautiful kitchen and furnishings.  Hosts were friendly, fast to respond and very clear and accurate in their property listing and instructions.  I'd love to stay here again!

We had a great experience.  Came for fall break with the family ranging in ages from 12 to 70 (11 of us in total).  There was plenty of room for everyone.  It’s in a great location with lots of nearby stores and restaurants.  Five minute walk to the subway and only a few minutes from Newberry street.
Beautiful place to stay for anyone visiting  Harvard . It's perfect, walking distance to Harvard.  It is just as described. Thank you Todd.

Laurie was such a brilliant host - I stayed in her lovely apartment for a month when I first moved to Boston - it was the perfect place to base myself and Laurie was super helpful with so many of my requests! Would recommend to anyone in that situation! Thanks Laurie for all your help.

This has been an awesome place to stay and I will certainly recommend it to others. The amenities and location are perfect for extended stay around Boston! It is near food stores and the park. The place was really nice and clean and perfect for 2 people.
We love staying here! We have returned each year for a family holiday party. The front desk staff are very helpful!

Stayed at Yans to see a show at the roadrunner which is only a 13 minute walk! Would recommend. The place was as described and I felt safe and secure.
Thanks for having me!
Great location and beautiful hotel! Enjoyed our stay!

This is a great place in the middle of a nice neighbourhood with a lot of good places to eat and drink. It is a very safe and unique neighbourhood. The house is very spacious, beds are comfortable, the downstairs patio is nice and quiet to relax in.
Quite nice location to go to see Boston with a good host. The apartement was as described and Alex made it very easy to coordinate to check in.
Very accommodating, great host

Kathe’s place is an absolute hidden gem! I stayed for 6 weeks while taking summer classes at Berklee and this accommodation was perfect. Very walkable with lots of restaurants nearby, just a short walk from Prudential Center, Newbury St., and Copley Square. The space was nice and clean with great air conditioning and a nice view of the skyline. It’s an older house but that just adds to the charm. There is a soup kitchen right across the street that occasionally gets a little loud at times but was generally a non issue. Kathe herself was very kind and accommodating and was even willing to pull some strings to arrange a last minute early check in. The upstairs renters were also helpful and very quiet. I would highly recommend staying here, especially for a longer stay!
place was cozy and convenient!

Fantastic room, with a very comfortable bed, nice temperature control and little to no noise. The communication with Jurek was easy and very quick. The kitchen is equipped with all the essentials and the shower has good pressure. Very well located, close to the subway.

This location was absolutely perfect— on bottom of the hill and walking distance to a strip of restaurants. The home itself was clean and cozy, and noise was surprisingly not much of an issue either. I would love to stay here again and would recommend it to anyone.
Great experience. The home is beautiful and the beds are comfortable.

My stay in the North End on Snow Hill Street was lovely. I moved in for my fall semester and it was a seamless and easy time. The apartment was very accommodating, had great kitchen facilities and the in-unit washer and dryer was an absolute blessing. All of the appliances are very new and really straightforward. Despite the space being modest there is a lot of solid storage, and a massive closet near the entrance door.
The location of the apartment itself is a massive bonus. The north end is one of the best neighborhoods in Boston for food, drink, and just a lively experience. While you’re close enough to have easy access to all you need, the apartment does not absorb any sounds from outside. Also a five minute commute to both Haymarket and North Station.
Nick was super responsive in communications though I didn’t need much. Everything was as it was described. Overall, my four month stay on Snow Hill was still great and I was able to have a convenient stay without any hiccups.
A very nice place in the city and very clean! Me and my partner loved staying there!

I stayed in the Ivory room, and the whole place was neat and just as pictured. The living room area was very welcoming, and the bathrooms were very clean. I was very comfortable, and there were many food spots around to order from. Will definitely book again in the future

Pros: room itself was clean, safe, lots of things around, fridge, washer and dryer, lots of space for a family, host was very responsive, comfy bed and pillows
Cons: outside noise (which is to be expected),
No where to put things in shower so we had to put them on the floor, could use more towels, building was old and felt dirty, but apartment itself was clean
Great place, good location. Easy to get to and from
Norah's place was the perfect location. The place was redone to be cozy and cute. Norah communicated well and let us drop our bags off before check-in which made everything much easier.
房子位置很棒，房间不大但设施齐全，Sophia人很好，给了我很多很棒的建议！very good!
Wasn’t so bad, you are in a dorm style / grown up hostel. They cleaned well and room had all the details. I knew it was small and it met all my expectation. Just read the descriptions

The place was perfect, clean, comfortable, and with everything I needed. Being so close to Boston University and having easy access to everything made my trip so much smoother. I really appreciated how seamless the whole experience was!
Cozy third floor studio space. Both Jonathan and home owner were friendly and helpful. Very quick drive to airport or downtown!
I would re-book without hesitation. Everything was exactly as pictured and promised. Great space in a great location!

We had a wonderful stay in Kelly & Chris’s apartment in Boston. Everything was just as described. Walking distance to great restaurants, bars, shops & sightseeing. The apartment was very clean & the kitchen was well equipped. Communication was very easy as was Check-in. The beds were comfortable and the neighbourhood quite. We loved everything about staying here and would definitely recommend it.

Liesl was very attentive. We took a red-eye so she allowed us to check in when the flat was ready. Also supplied extra plates for a dinner party. The place is exactly as it reads and photographs and a real find!

Irene is a nice host who was very prompt and regularly in touch prior to the trip. For those who would like to stay in the city center her house is ideally located. Since during my stay to my utter surprise there were several other guests/tenants in other rooms (for varied durations), the place gave me a feeling more of a hostel than a house. Also, I found the kitchen and bathroom to be very untidy with the cleanliness being sub-par.

Absolutely perfect location and accommodations! It was exactly what we needed! Would definitely stay there again and highly recommend! Georgia was the perfect hostess and so helpful. Parking was off-street, the neighborhood was safe and easy to get to, easy access to the T, beautiful, clean apartment. Can’t wait to come back!
The host was very helpful and responded to my inquiries very quickly. I would stay at Maverick Suits again.
Wonderful place for a great value! Felt like a legitimate hotel for half the price. An array of wonderful and classy services provided as well. Great experience overall!

We definitely recommend Chris and Kristina studio!!!!!! The location is very convinient and the studio very pleasant and functional. I definitely recommend this place to anyone. We have had a great time to Boston and feel like home.

I stayed here for 4 days. This place was great. Literally a one minute walk to the train station which made it extremely  convenient and cheap to travel to the city. Note: parking in the city ranges from $20-30 and more.  Plus it is one train stop away from the airport. This place is perfect for 1 to 2 people. Mechaal was available if we needed anything and was very nice. He even had basic necessities for us like milk, eggs, orange juice, water, coffee, and snacks. Plus shampoo, and soaps. When I come to Boston I will most definitely stay here again.
very clean comfortable and convienient to transit.  only two station and you are in diwntown Boston.  highly recommended
Great location and clean
The place was great and so was Alicia. She was super responsive and helpful. Central location, clean, new but in historic Beacon Hill. Wonderful and highly recommended.
Chandra’s home is beautiful! It was unlike any other Airbnb I’ve stayed at. Chandra was also great to communicate with and made sure we had an incredible stay. I highly recommend!

Comfortable, neat surroundings with gracious and flexible hosts.  The family was accommodating of a last-minute change to our schedule, and very welcoming of our small and inquisitive children throughout. We enjoyed conversations over breakfast as well as later in the day.  Highly recommended as a base to see Boston!

Stayed for the weekend to see a concert. Clean, quaint, and hot water in the shower which was much appreciated. Kitchenette has everything you need to make coffee, breakfast, or some wine. Four flights of stairs to get up to the unit. Walkable location and very close to two MBTA subway entrances which was super convenient to get around the city. Pretty and safe area. Nice spots to eat around the neighborhood. Pictures are accurate, comfortable for a short stay!
Nice place and great location.
Volvería con todo el gusto 😍
Loved this place for a family trip to Boston! Great location, perfect amount of space, well equipped kitchen to eat breakfast at home. We would definitely book again!
Absolutely beautiful space! So clean and the hosts are so friendly and considerate!
Easy to get to location, with plenty of things nearby. Flexible check-in. Nice charming apartment. I had a nice stay.
Great location and well kept.

Reece and Karen's place was in a quiet, clean and safe neighborhood.  We were able to walk to the Maverick Street T-Stop and take the subway easily into the city.  We walked to a neighborhood bar, A Quiet Few.  It was welcoming by the locals and had great appetizers to share.   We would definitely stay in their East Boston apartment again!  Loved our getaway!

Lisa’s home was perfect for what we needed! 5 of us fit comfortably and the kids enjoyed the bunk beds. Home was clean and it was easy to get in and out. Lisa responds quickly to any needs. Definitely worth the money compared to the outrageous prices in Boston!

Really cool place, new complex surrounding a Boston landmark (beautiful restored church which is not the concierge). Access to elevator and handicapped parking was essential for us and not terribly easy to find at Airbnbs in this area. Everything as described. Check in instructions made me think- took me a few minutes to find the building where the lock box was with the key and then again how to open the door at the apartment - but all worked out well. Would stay again!

We had a wonderful stay at Janice’s place! It was very clean and spacious, and I appreciated all of the space to put clothes and the towels and many hangers that were provided. The bed was also very comfortable! There is a bit of a trek up a hill to get to the place, but we saw this on other reviews so we were prepared for it. We had very easy access to public transportation, so that was super convenient. Janice is very sweet and very responsive - thank you Janice for making our stay so smooth and enjoyable!

Great location if you’re trying to attend events in Boston/Cambridge. Can walk to get coffee and food. There was a heat wave, so the smart ac system came in handy. Beds are really comfortable. We had a great time celebrating a high school graduation. Thank you!!!

This place far exceeded my expectations definitely my most favorite Airbnb I have ever stayed at. When you walk up the stairs you embark with the kitchen to your left which is stunning with a deck entrance right off the kitchen. To your right of the entrance a high ceiling living room behind the living room a large bed and a good sized beautiful bathroom and glass door shower. I have to mention the bathroom door is stunning. Upstairs there is a loft with two twin beds, we were able to slide the beds together per Nells recommendation. She was so accommodating and sweet. I moved out of Massachusetts a few months ago and this place really encompasses the feeling of home. Immediately me and my friends felt welcome and comfortable. Anything I would have thought to have needed was there even Tylenol, makeup wipes, and a washer and dryer. There was breakfast foods in the fridge with homemade jam. The detail and love thought out into to this Airbnb really sticks out and I highly recommend!!
Thank you so much Jonathan!!! This place was great and very much enjoyed staying in Boston, you have a lovely home

We had an amazing trip to Boston! The property was wonderful. The location was great and there was so much to do! Easy walking to many restaurants and shopping experiences. It was a nice walk to Fenway also! The room was perfect.
The host was very professional and very prompt with any communication
We would definitely book this property again.

Un endroit parfait, très propre et accueillant à quelques encablures de l’université d’Harvard!
Ma seconde maison quand je reviens à Boston

The beautiful brownstone is lovely and located in a quiet neighbourhood close to Fenway and the subway. We were able to drop off our bags early and leave them after check out, which was very helpful (Thank you). Our room was on level 4, and we needed to walk up a lot of stairs to access it was tiring with luggage. Breakfast was okay, the coffee was strong and the host was so happy to share the history of the property with us. I would stay again.
非常好👍
Jessy and Diego were great. This is a cute little brownstone studio right on an urban green path in Back Bay. Superb location to Orange line T stops and close to Copley. Thank you guys!

Philippe’s place was exactly as the pictures portrayed, but even more spacious, crisp and clean. It was nicely decorated but free of unnecessary “accessories” which can sometimes inhibit a guest’s ability to use spaces. There were added touches such as privacy shades, little snacks and extra supplies should you need them. His careful thought is evident throughout. Would definitely recommend.

Clean and comfortable accommodations close to everything and accessible to
public transportation.
Good clean space

Kevin’s place was nothing less than perfect for our short trip to Boston. The place was spotless when we got there, and was exactly as advertised. It’s super close to Harvard Square and has easy access to downtown Boston. Would definitely stay here again and recommend it to anyone!!
Perfect location for exploring all Boston has to offer. Host was very quick to respond to inquiries and available for tips about the city. We would absolutely stay here again.

We came from out of town for a concert in Boston so booked a couple nights. Upon arrival we heard a smoke detector beeping with the batteries needing to be changed. The smoke detector was located in the back hall that we were not allowed access to but after multiple attempts to have the matter tended to with the host we had to access it ourselves, as the host didn’t fix the issue. We weren’t going to listen to a beeping detector going off for the next 2 nights. There were multiple things broken (screen in our room, ice tray in the freezer) and the tables were not cleaned and there was some trash left from the previous guests that we had to clean. Our bed was really comfy though, and the decor was nice. Overall mostly just wish the host would have done something about the smoke detector. Our second night it went off again at around midnight and after I pressed the button to reset it for another 7 hours the host messaged me about being quiet during quiet hours. Was a bit upsetting.
Great place

This is a great place to stay in the city. Great restaurants & shops within walking distance. Close to public transportation.  Apartment was clean, comfortable and spacious. Host was responsive.  A couple tips for those not familiar with the area, (like myself). First, it is a 3rd floor walkup. Not too strenuous, but a bit if a workout if you have luggage. Second, parking is non existent. Host recommended a lot, but it did not offer overnight parking. After contacting a local, we managed to find a lot nearby. (About a 5 minute walk away.)  Somerset Garage @ 425 Newbury St. Open from 8am - 11pm. $40 per day.

Had a decent stay here during my partners visit from NY. Only complaint was that the radiator and refrigerator was making a lot of noise, got very hot to sleep in. Nonetheless, thank you for having us!
Great location. Many stairs.

Angela's home is super comfy. We loved staying here. The room and the bathroom are full of small thoughtful moments that you can really tell she loves her home and wants others to really enjoy being there too. Lately all the airbnb's we have booked have turned out to be motels or super souless and very different from the photos so it was nice to stay at a place that felt like someones nice home once again. She was also super communicative and responded fast to any questions. Definitely recommend others to stay, particularly if they have a car to get to downtown Boston like we did.

needs fresh paint
beds are great, if you're a toddler - barely off the ground
minimalist decor and amenities are low budget
no shower caddy or shelf in shower
Really nice big house in a quiet neighborhood. The master king suite on the 3rd floor is huge and beautiful. We enjoyed sitting on the porch and deck. Plenty of parking too.
Très propre, très bon rapport qualité prix je recommande

💎 Lovely 3 bedroom home with so many thoughtful amenities for travelers…coffee/tea bar, well equipped kitchen with newer appliances, soaps in every place you need them, crisp linens and comfy furnishings. Updated decorating, modern lighting and tech accessible. 10 minute walk to metro and easy secure entry.
Very clean and cozy little airbnb, kind and communicative host with seamless check in

Super convenient location, incredibly responsive and understanding host. Parking was a breeze on the weekend (stayed Saturday-Monday, never an issue). Stayed with our toddler who was able to use the kids bedroom which was great. Not a ton of nightlife in the area which worked perfectly for us, streets were plenty quiet (I even fell asleep on the couch for a bit there!). Added perk - very short walk to downeast cider brewery and their lovely outdoor bar! Excellent experience overall
Great stay!  Was everything we needed and expected. Very convenient for seeing the city.
Close to city, many shops/ food spots within walking distance. Highly recommend as place to stay. Parking is great! Hard to come by  designated parking with other rentals.

The Thatch apartment was fantastic. I stay in a lot of AirBnBs and this is one of the nicest for location (adorable street in the heart of Beacon Hill,) amenities/decor (cute, well set-up,) walkability (close to shops, restaurants, sights and MGH,) and cost (appropriate). Highly recommend it. Communication was also clear and easy.

Laura and Olivia’s place was in a great location! Close to everything and I’m walking distance of so many great restaurants. The unit was clean and cute! While there were dishes in the kitchen it was lacking basic items such as standard spices and paper towels. We found the bed a little too much on the firm side and unfortunately was not able to get one good nights sleep and woke up the last two night sore and exhausted. The listing does mention that it is a unit that overlooks the street and to expect some noise. That being said the street noise was rather extreme all throughout the night…horns, sirens, people talking. There really wasn’t any noise cancellation. If you are a heavy sleeper I would recommend this unit otherwise I would choose one of their interior units.
Cleanest apartment I’ve ever seen!

Super apartment in an ideal location.  The Freedom trail is literally at the top of the road - walking distance to so many attractions, restaurants and bars.  The apartment was very clean and had everything we needed - will 100% be back.  Hosts were very responsive with any questions we had

Decided to book a last minute trip to Boston and found this place and would definitely recommend to anyone! Finding the location was super easy and check-in was super smooth. The room was nice and clean and just as described.

Just a top experience in all aspects. I needed a clean, comfortable place close to Logan for an early flight the following morning. Izzy’s place was exactly what I hoped for. My room was “cozy,” exactly as described and just what I needed. Immaculately clean and the window a/c put out cold air! I slept blissfully and it took less than an hour - on foot - the next morning from the front door of the house to my gate at the airport. Quick easy walk. Worth noting: totally safe neighborhood. I got home late the night prior after visiting friends and had no issues or concerns walking through the neighborhood at 12:40 am. Blue bike (like citi bike) stations are also close by if you want to explore by bike. A++++

Bridget’s place was excellent. It is in great location, which allows you to easily get around to key Boston sites, while still feeling a bit more private. She was extremely responsive and accommodating before the stay - allowing us great flexibility with our kid. The place is well designed for many group types - tastefully designed, clean, includes games / activities, an outdoor area and a variety of other homey amenities. Certainly a recommended stay!
The location is great and close to the T. The place was clean and extremely convenient. I would definitely stay here again if I visit Boston!

这次入住是超出我预期的，房间比图片中更新，更干净，也比想象中要大。
虽然地理位置一般，但周围都是居民区，很安静。打车到市中心在8-10分钟左右，其实也很方便。
房间内你所能想到的设备几乎都有。
一次很不错的入住体验。
Sandro was very communicative and very kind. The house was clean and comfortable. The shower was incredible.
A clean and comfortable room in a quiet neighborhood with a convenient private entrance. Nice to be in walking range from restaurants and transit! Thanks Aurelia!
Fantastic. Peaceful and clean place. The accommodation for my toddler was a first and It was awesome.
Well located spot, easy to access and a good more affordable way to be in Boston.

Bill was very accommodating and responsive to all our questions and requests.  He was such a friendly guy!  We loved the nautical theme of our room - everything was comfortable and beautiful!  We walked all the way around the lagoon, which was only one block away.  There were lots of restaurants around and it was only a $16 Lyft ride to the heart of Boston.  We would highly recommend this little gem to anyone visiting Boston!  Thank you Bill!

Terry is a great host.  The apartment was perfect for myself and my business partner, each bedroom had great beds and linen, and the bathroom had more than enough towels for our 5 day stay.  The neighborhood is quiet, convenient to both public transportation and taxis/uber to the center of town, and a short walk away are some great local eating places - one great Somalian restaurant and several coffee places.

Lance and Shelley were wonderful hosts and excellent company; I arrived just before the storm and they were so kind to invite me to join them for dinner. The room is compact but extremely cosy and quiet as it's separated from the rest of the upstairs space. The top level and communal space is shared with three students who are quiet and friendly and very much part of the family; it really felt like being at home. Checkin and out was extremely easy and they are flexible about timings which is really helpful. It's the perfect location if you want to be away from the bustle of central Boston; the nearest T station is less than a ten minute walk away, so you can get anywhere quite easily. It's also really conveniently located for the airport. Shelley also makes a mean pancake! 🤗 Would definitely stay again.

The condo was clean and in a great location. One of the bed frames cracked while we were there so we used the other room, which was no big deal. These things happen sometimes. Dennis was very understanding when I told him, which I appreciate. My only small issue is that the welcome letter with the door codes didn’t arrive at check-in time as expected. This was due to a change in the timing since the previous guests arrived later in the evening. That makes sense and is not something I fault Dennis for, but I do suggest sending the check-in info the day before or morning of, instead of trying to match everyone’s arrival time, to avoid issues like this. Overall, great stay, great responsive host.
Norah was very accommodating and her space was a great place to stay because of it's great location and cleanliness

Boston is an expensive city so this is a good accommodation option if you're willing to sacrifice some comfort and convenience. It's located in a wonderful neighbourhood in walking distance to the t-line, however the flat is the top floor of the host's home so we always felt like we were their guests rather than in our own space. The beds, bathroom etc were all good, but we must flag that the staircase is very narrow so it was a real challenge carrying heavy suitcases up to the apartment!
Clean basement, very friendly and responsive host, nicely located in East Boston and within walking distance to a train station.  I definitely plan to return to this address next time I visit Boston

It was a pleasure staying the weekend at Hermina’s house. It’s clean and comfortable with plenty of food options right nearby, but most importantly the subway is only a 5min walk! Hope to visit again.

Kevin was an outstanding host.  He was very quick to communicate and answer any questions we had.  Although we did not meet face to face, check-in was simple and easy.  The directions he left for us were spot on.  Everything was laid out and ready for us.  I wish we had more time to explore the area, but overall it was awesome!
Perfect
Nothing special, but certainly gets the job done as a homebase for a party of 2 for a weekend in Boston. Has a stove, tv, shower, and bed, all you need for a stay. Would recommend.
cozy place.
This is located in the perfect location. Building is on the older side but the apartment was comfortable and clean. Also felt safe with a required code to get in the front door.
Great location. The stairs were a bit tricky so we left our large suitcases in an alcove downstairs. Booker was very friendly and helpful.
WE SPENT FIVE DAYS IN JESSICA'S WELL EQUIPPED AND COZY APARTMENT. THE HOUSE IS LOCATED IN A QUIET NEIGHBORHOOD. THE HOSTESS IS VERY FRIENDLY AND WELCOMING. I CAN ONLY RECOMMEND THE PLACE.
Beautifully decorated and well equipped flat in an excellent, walkable location near tons of restaurants and a T stop. Lively neighborhood with lots of college students out and about.
It was lovely staying here, the host was excellent. Only downside is you can hear everything from upstairs which was a bummer. Other than that, it’s located about 20 minute walk from the subway.

Antoinette and Lewis were friendly and gracious hosts who made me feel completely at home. They also helped in a variety of other ways, like providing directions to the conference I was attending, as well as information about local transportation and restaurants.

The house itself is beautiful and the guest quarters on the third floor were spacious and cozy, with an adjacent very clean bathroom. The kitchen was also made available to me though I did not use it much.

The area is quiet but convenient to Boston (about 25 minutes by public transport to the Back Bay).

Excellent. Highly recommended. I would stay here again and would certainly recommend to friends.
Had a great time!
Nice host. Comfortable stay.
Awesome spot for me and my buddy to go see a show at Roadrunner. Very walkable to some great breweries(Widowmaker, Nocth), restaurants, and the venue.

Great little place with a nice view and within walking distance to many places to eat and enjoy. It served my husband, son, and I very well. My only real complaint is that the apartment could have been cleaner. It wasn’t terrible, but there were a couple of things, such as a bread tie on the floor by the bed and a random hair in the bathtub. Nothing super gross, but could have been better. Otherwise, it was great. Would consider coming back again.

This apartment was super clean and well located near Kneeland St for food choices.
Easy check in experience.
In a great location. Place was clean and spacious for the area. Host left clear instructions, overall a great stay.
Great location, so close to Fenway. Walking distance to Cambridge as well!

Great place! We had a lovely stay. The apartment is quite spacious, clean and stylish with everything we needed. It looks exactly as it is seen online. Location is perfect for a nice getaway. Katherine and Dan were great hosts and responded quickly to our texts.

Our first time in Boston so we weren’t sure exactly where to stay and how walkable it would be. This place is perfectly located for everything we wanted to do. There’s a fantastic grocery store just steps away and with a full kitchen, it’s what you want. Lots of restaurants and many of the historic sites are super close. It’s in downtown, so a little noisy, but honestly it never bothered us. The street frontage is pedestrian, so there’s not the typical honking noise plus being several floors above the street helps. There was no noise from any of the neighbors. The bed was super comfortable. That’s important and they’ve nailed it. Lovely place and we would happily stay there again.

Stayed at Albert's place for a couple weeks. Great location! Centrally located, within walking distance of everything, and near public transit options. The space itself was clean, comfortable, and easy to work from. Albert and the team were easy to communicate with and I was always treated with respect. Will be looking for this listing again next time I'm back in Boston!
Ótimo lugar e localização. Poucos copos
Good location, quiet neighborhood, considerate landlord and adequate supply of daily stuff. A good experience and memory!
Coordinación con el anfitrión muy fluida, sitio inmejorable y apartamento tal y como se describía en la web. Muy recomendable.

Great place in a great location!! We stayed for 6 nights while moving our son into BU.  The home was very comfortable and offered everything we needed for our stay.   Instructions were very thorough and helpful.  We loved being walking distance to great museums, shopping, and restaurants.   Some of our favorite locations nearby were Red White for vegan ramen, the Map Room Tea Lounge at the library for late lunch, the MFA and the Gardner museums, and Flour and Tatte bakeries.   We really enjoyed our stay and would love to stay here again the next time we’re in Boston.

The unit on Beacon was a perfect location, literally a 15 minute walk could get you to every corner of Boston. The space is dated (for example the bathroom faucet had separate spigots for hot and cold water) but clean and functional.  The living area was cozy with a separate bedroom (bed was firm and comfortable, but it made me wish I had brought my own pillows). The bathroom was really tiny but had great water pressure. The kitchen was well stocked with dishes and appliances, including a toaster. There’s a mini mart just outside the main entry for food and supplies.  We left a corkscrew for future renters to enjoy a bottle of wine.   This was a great value for the location.  Thank you Elyne for being so accommodating and and responsive.

je n'ai pas mis la.note excellente au global car nous avons senti très souvent une odeur de cannabis forte , il.est arrivé à notre sorti de lnimmeuble qu'un resident fumait dans l entrée de l immeuble.
pour ma conjointe et moi c est très important. nous détestons cette odeur. peut être que c est partout à Boston comme ca ...
sinon tout à vraiment bien été comme les bonnes notes que j ai donné.
Merci.
nous avons passé un excellent séjour à Boston
Christine et Daniel
Lovely place to stay on our first visit to Boston.Area felt safe and accessible to everything. Would definitely stay again !!
Great, clean little space in a nice quiet area! Close to the airport. Great communication! Thank you for being a great host!
great location, great building.

Thank you Sheila! We had a great stay and was perfect for our work trip! Walking distance to so much and quick Lyft rides for all the rest. Was a great stay in Boston. And thank you for all the great communication!
Beautiful, clean, and close to everything. Great stay!

Muito limpo , muito charmoso , bem cuidado perto do aeroporto. Informações no local bem claras,
Fácil check-in ,
queixas
, pedir pra usar a máquina de lavar e não foi autorizado .
Não tem TV,
2 banheiros pra quatro quartos .
Voltaria a me hospedar sim e também indicaria

We really enjoyed our stay here - it was extremely close to the T stop, as well as coffee shops for the breakfast run. It was only a couple stops away from a Trader Joes, or a short walk through the very walkable neighbourhood to Target. The place was great, with everything we needed for the week. We really enjoyed our stay and if we visit Boston again, will be sure to check it out again!

We had a wonderful time at Michelle's place and felt so well taken care of! Even though we did not spend a lot of time in the apartment as we wanted to explore the city, we really felt like we had a home in Boston. Michelle is a great host, she helped us to find our way around, could answer every question, filled the room with her welcoming spirit. The breakfast was very delicious and freshly baked... The apartment is bright and has a great location - not far away from the center, but in a very quiet and friendly neighborhood. Thanks for everything!
Perfect location for back bay and back bay station to get in and out of central Boston. Clean and easy, I don’t mind the stairs, but if you do it’s something to consider.
Thank you for the great accommodations!
N
Great little place!
5 star stay.

Philipp's place was perfect for what we needed. Initially we were concerned about parking, but really had no issues finding parking on the street. We were kept nice and toasty with the heating and adjustable temperature.

The apartment was perfect and the location couldn't have been better.  Brian and Heather responded within minutes if I had questions, they were great hosts!  I'll definitely book with them again next year when I return to Boston!

Great little apartment, perfect for a quick stay in the Boston area. Close to the green line and a number of restaurants and cafes around the corner. Secured parking at a nearby lot - it’s up a hill from the apartment.
Had a couple of questions for Cassandra and Michael and they replied almost immediately which was greatly appreciated.
Perfect location, hidden gem

Nice apt, super clean with a great host.  Wonderful restaurants near by.  Walk to Newbury St. 24-hr convenient store around the corner.  Beautiful park across the street.  The apt is facing the busy street, so there is some traffic noise as expected.
Grate place for a weekend

The apartment had small holes in the wall, lacked utensils and cooking ware, bath towels extremely thin and small sized, Google TV device wouldn't connect and wood floor sticky - needed heavy mop job.
My room was large, with all the facilities I needed for my trip to Boston. Had access to everything I needed, including a microwave and fridge in the kitchen. Would certainly stay here again!
Perfect location for walking around the Commons and the Freedom Trail.
My friends and I had an amazing stay at Peter’s airbnb! The place was beautiful and Peter was so helpful and responsive! We already plan on coming back again!

Evan’s place worked out well. It was easy to find parking, the neighborhood was great with restaurants and other shops within walking distance. Really enjoyed the Vietnamese shop/ restaurant Ba Le, down the street. Would definitely stay again on my return trip to Boston.

Very clean and nice location. Bleuty is very communicative and responsive. She constantly communicated during our stay to ensure we had a good stay. The lock had an issue. Even with the right password, it might not open sometimes and lock you out. But Bleuty warned about it prior hand and left a manual key for us.
We had a great experience renting this place! Perfect location, great space, and incredible hosts! We would recommend it to anyone and would rent again.

We had a great stay at Bill’s and Maureen’s place!
I highly recommend!
Daryl made everything about check in and out simple and easy! Perfect weekend getaway with everything you’ll ever need! Had the best experience would come back and stay here again!
Amazing Airbnb would stay here again 100%
The space is clean and in a great spot. As hosts, Ella and Will were easy to communicate with and very friendly. I’d stay here again.

Cozy room, great location if you have a car.
Parking and easy access to Boston, Brookline and Cambridge. Wendy are super nice and helpful. A fully equipped kitchen let's you prepare your own meals. Everything was super clean.
great stay!
Je suis restée une nuit chez Izzy, c’était très bien, conforme à la description ! Le logement est à 10 minutes de l’aéroport et de sa station de métro, c’est très pratique

Loved this stay! In a great spot where just about everything is walkable. The hosts are very responsive and accommodating. I would absolutely recommend this for 1-2 people looking for a small space while you are out and about Boston!
Logement bien situé , facile d´accès avec le métro et dans un quartier agréable et tranquille. Bon accueil d´Hilary. Dommage pour notre méconnaissance de l'anglais.

I had a very late flight and the host was super responsive and helpful. The room is larger than in the photos and very comfortable. The location is very close to both Boston Logan and Maverick station. Would highly recommend if you've got a layover in Boston!

We stayed for two nights in the beautiful victorian house of Hermina. A detailed description of how to find the house made it easy to get there and Hermina was very welcoming. We had nice chats with her during breakfast and also with the other guest who staid there at the same time.  If you want to stay at a nice place near Boston, we will recommend to choose this place!

Overall a great spot for any sports fan. Below are some pros and cons of this particular place some are personal preference but overall the host was amazing, Quick response and very helpful and the space was nice and comfortable.
PRO:
-Fast response, great recommendations
-minuets from the green line, Fenway and restaurants.
-short walk to convenient stores like target!
- Privet space
-bed was super comfortable
-Nice kitchen
-Safe area
-Clean and neat
-Fast hot water at taps/shower.
-there was shampoo and body wash provided, bring bar door if that’s is your preference.
CONS:
-If you’re not a fan of street noise DO NOT stay here. Personally it’s all White nose to me so it was fine. But you will hear everything even the cross walk beeper.
-water pressure was bad but can be fixed with a simple shower head swap.
-wash cloths where not provided and we did not see that listed on the page.
Très réactif et très sympa !!

First impressions are SO important, and this apartment was impressive!  As we opened the door, we could smell the beautiful fragrance of lavender cleaning solution (My favorite!).  As you turn on the lights, the couch had visible vacume lines, which is my tell-tell sign of a truly clean home! Hats off to the cleaning crew!!  The apartment was comfortable in everyway for my family of 4.  We walked the entire city from that apartment, its location was awesome! The North End felt safe for us visitors, and we got around with no problem is at all, even with our kids. We will be back!
We had an incredible stay here. The place was super clean and well-decorated. It looked even better than the photos! The location was also unbeatable.
We loved Dana and Andrews place, it was even roomier than expected,very clean and comfortable! Parking was off the street and great as well!
Great location in Beacon Hill.  Clean and straightforward.
Great location and great communication.

The house and room decor are very sparse and run down. Windows did not stay open. Old food was left in my mini-fridge. I had guests in the room above me and their footsteps were quite loud. Lots of noise on the stairs. This is basically just a rooming house with no one living there. Someone made coffee every morning, which was nice.
The neighborhood did not feel safe at night. During the day it was okay, but there is not much around, so needed to drive to everything.
It was inexpensive, and I see why. Hosts were responsive and instructions were clear. Stay get only if you are on a budget and need to be in the immediate area.
Great quick stay. And so close to Fenway! Luckily I knew the short cut. Maybe that could be shared with guests to cut the walk time in half.
Great affordable spot for travelers on a budget. East check in and the host is responsive. In a great location where you can walk to everything.
Lovely host and such a well-located, charming home! Just note that the room is up a LOT of stairs and the ceilings are low. It added a very cosy vibe but I can see how other travellers may struggle.
I loved staying here for one night without my family. Lihua was wonderful!

A solid budget spot to crash for a few days. My room had a huge desk which was great for remote work, and a window AC unit which was very much a necessity during the heat wave. A few things to note re: you get what you pay for: bed is not particularly comfortable, bathrooms are bare bones (no hand towels, hair dryers etc), as well as kitchen (no oil/salt/culinary extras). But otherwise common areas are nice and everything is easy and as described!
All good w my stay in Boston.
干净安静舒适

Patricia and Steen’s apartment is in an excellent location, very close to the waterfront and the Italian district. Trisha was an excellent and responsive host, keen to help us and very accommodating. Their apartment is clean and functional and was easily spacious enough for 5 adults.
The instructions to get into the property were clear. The minor issue concerned the spiral staircase up to the apartment, on the second floor. Navigating this along with luggage and an elderly relative was a challenge but not insurmountable! Highly recommend this apartment. Thank you!
Location is great. Place is clean and cozy.
Fantastic location right in the heart of the FiDi and close to the water and transit lines.  Definitely helped make our Boston vacation a success!

Besser kann man auf einer Reise in Boston nicht wohnen. Die Lage ist absolut perfekt für Menschen, die auf schöne kleine Straßen stehen. Die Baustelle gegenüber war kein Problem -> wer keine Baustellen mag, sollte die USA eh lieber meiden;)
Und wer das kalorienreiche Essen nicht mehr sehen kann, findet in der Küche sogar genug Platz sich selber was zu zaubern.
Absolute Empfehlung!
Great place to stay.
Such a great price and a central location downtown!
really good spot, clean room, nice tv and sound system, breakfast could’ve been better
Thanks for hosting…we ll stay again soon… ty

Liesl was great before and during our stay. She was very responsive when the tv stopped working and when we needed the find the breaker panel. We met she and her family and they were lovely and very helpful. Cozy spot to stay and close to what we needed in Boston!
机场附近，生活便利，离大海很近，风景优美，房东很热情，回复很快，也帮助解决了很多不足，好评，会再次入住。

Eda’s place is clean and nicely decorated, and she is an excellent, extremely responsive host. She went out of her way to give suggestions to me and my friend about what to do in Boston, and her home has so many thoughtful touches (especially the chocolate!).

Natalia is prompt answering any messages you.  I enjoyed my stay.  The apartment was clean.  There is only one television,  which is in the living room of you require that.  FYI bring your  bath towels because they are not provided for all guests. Even with the small things from above, if in Boston again I will rent Natalia's spot again.  I will definitely recommend it to anyone looking lodging.
Great place to stay! It was right in the middle of everything so all was at a walkable distance. The apartment was very homey and comfortable, would 100% stay here again.
All good. The room is as shown in the pictures
Easy to get to Fenway, where our concert was!
This was an amazing stay! Beautiful, peaceful place. Albert and his team are very responsive, and always ready to help.

Fantastic location! Really convenient and walkable to numerous restaurants, attractions, and transport options.
Just to manage expectations, we appreciated the location, but we felt the apartment was pretty basic and felt worn. The photos looked like a 10, but the place looked/felt like a 6. For the price (not cheap), we thought it could have been fitted out better (wardrobe sliding door wasn’t working well, no shelves in the bathroom to hold shower stuff, cheap hair dryer was sparking when in use etc).
However, since we didn’t spend that much time in it, the convenience more than made up for the apartment, and the hosts were extremely responsive and helpful.
Generally an enjoyable stay.

I loved staying at this place! I needed an entire week for a work trip, so I wanted a quiet location where I could decompress at night. This neighborhood and apartment were perfect! The unit is very quiet and on a tree lined street, just a block from some great restaurants. The downstairs neighbor has beautiful flowers, and a nice water fountain, so the apartment felt like a retreat. It was easy to walk to my meetings each day in Back Bay so I thoroughly enjoyed staying in the South End.
Even better, Stephanie was an amazing host! She has the fastest email replies of any host I’ve ever met. Plus, the apartment was so clean and well stocked. I didn’t need a single thing for the week other than my own groceries and suitcase. Usually by day 6 of a trip I’m so ready to get home. But in this case, I was sad to leave because I was so content. I would definitely stay at one of the properties again.

Natalie’s place is in a quiet and peaceful neighborhood. The street parking is relatively easy to find a spot. She is a quick responder to my questions. Clean, cozy and comfy place to stay while visiting Boston. I definitely will come back again next time.
Very good experience at the place.
Great location. We enjoyed many activities within walking distance; Boston Commons, Quincy Market, Opera House, shopping…. And so much more.  The unit was clean and free of clutter.

Infelizmente, tivemos problemas com sucessivos cancelamentos de vôos, que nos impediram de desfrutar da hospitalidade da senhora Jane. Ficou para uma próxima vez. De qualquer modo, registro que foram atenciosos com o problema que tivemos e, a despeito de não ter sido caracterizado o cancelamento , pelas regras do Airbnb, como força maior, conseguimos negociar um reembolso parcial.
Great place, we would definitely stay again!

The apartment was great, big and spacious for our group. It was exactly as advertised and very well maintained. If I had an issue, the only one would be that at 11pm every night the upstairs neighbors would come home and made loud noises until 6am, so much so that several party members were unable to sleep most of the night. Otherwise, it was an excellent experience! Shampoo and conditioner were provided in the showers and the beds were extremely comfortable. All the cooking utensils we needed were provided.
a simple walk from the airport, made everything easily accessible! Very grateful to have stayed here.
The listing was accurate. The house is lovely. I stayed for a month. Barrie, Teresa, and Karina are awesome people. Enjoyed my stay there.
We loved the high ceilings and the bathtub was awesome!! Location is walkable to quite a lot of places including the Boston Commins and gardens!

My boyfriend and I really enjoyed staying at Miriam's place! The location was perfect and the parking space really helped! We were able to walk to the Green Line station and travel around Boston via public transportation which really helped getting around because traffic in Boston is no joke! The place was very clean and very well stocked! Hasban greeted us upon arrival and showed us around the house. Miriam was very fast to respond to any questions I had! Theres a Whole Foods within walking distance and some great small restaurants nearby as well. I highly recommend staying here and I can't wait to explore Boston again!

The apartment was great. It was exactly as described. Centrally located and within walking distance of amazing shops and restaurants. My only feedback is that the tub got very slippery and could benefit from some sort of mat.
Estuvo todo muy bien, nos quedamos 2 noches y fue exactamente como vimos en las fotos.
We had a great time staying here - definitely recommend!

Ann and Esther's place was perfect for my quick trip to Boston. Lovely and private space with a nice yard! Had everything I needed and was thoughtfully stocked. It is a 10-15 minute walk to the orange line and there is also a bus line nearby. Recommend taking advantage of the proximity to the Arboretum and Emerald Necklace!

The noise from the road was too loud that I couldn't sleep. AC generates irritating sounds though the same complaint was written in other reviews. Many goods such as a hair dryer were not placed in the room.

This unit is in a typical renovated Victorian brownstone (think winding steps) in the South End on a lovely tree lined street. It offers everything needed for a short or long stay. The bed is incredibly comfortable and the towels provided are lush. There are many amazing restaurants steps away - as well as public transport - which made dining and getting around super easy. Communication with the team was clear and friendly (special thanks to Beth)! Had a great time!
Great place to stay in Boston. Always communicates fast!
Lovely, I would stay at Yan’s again.
Such a great location, easy walking distance to all major sites in downtown Boston. Albert was super responsive and great to work with. Would recommend this place to anyone!

Kaitlyn’s place was exactly as described. Had every amenity you can ask for. We came with an 11 month old and there was a high chair, pack and play. Great location, you can’t ask for anything better, close to street parking and a parking garage, bars, restaurants, pharmacy, coffee shops, parks, public transit.
I highly recommend this unit!
Great place to stay for the weekend. Everything was clean and check-in / out was very easy. I would recommend it.
That’s really amazing! We will came back again. nice owner! Nice house!
The place is nice and clean! Thank Jonathan for the great place~
Absolutely loved this hotel!!!! It’s stunning and the perfect location!

Bilky’s Place is wonderfully located near Tufts Medical Center and Chinatown. It is a quiet, warm and clean little apartment perfect for two. Although it doesn’t have a stove, it has a microwave, refrigerator and kitchenette area for easy use for basic meals or to warm up leftovers from Chinatown. Billy was very communicative and easy to work with. We arrived just before the big January storm surge and felt safe and warm for the 24 hours we were caught inside watching cable t.v. And surfing the internet. Thank goodness great Chinese restaurants were around the corner for take out!  We will definitely stay here again.

I wouldn't stay here again.
We waited over 30 minutes for the elevator. There was a hidden "resort fee" the place had a weird vibe.
Perfect location to restaurants and shops. The apt. was clean and had everything we needed.  Oliva and Laura answered all questions promptly.  We would stay here again.
Albert was an incredible host and this apartment is exceeded our expectations. Boston is a great city to explore! Thanks Albert!
Great tips on places to see and where to eat!
Cozy studio right by the Prudential Center and close to T stop.  Check in was easy and room was as described.  Would recommend to travelers who want to stay in the heart of Back Bay

Janet was a fantastic host! Responsive to any questions Airbnb related and had great recommendations for places to visit/eat in the Boston area. The place itself was spacious and cozy and easily accessible to get into Boston.

Nous avons passé un très bon séjour, le logement est très spacieux et fonctionnel. Excellente communication avec J Lucky qui est trés réactif.
Encore merci.

I truly loved my stay here. The place felt so warm, welcoming and comfortable from the moment I arrived. Everything was spotless, thoughtfully arranged and really pleasant to come back to at the end of the day. The location couldn’t have been better, close to everything I needed. We also absolutely loved Jessy and Diego’s stay here. I’d definitely stay again and highly recommend it.

We absolutely love our stay at Jessy & Diego’s apartment. I stayed here for 10 days with my husband. Everything was same as described in the listing.
Very easy checking in and checking out . Communication was very quick and easy with Jessy &Diego. The Apartment was Beautiful, cozy, peaceful and well decorated. We like to cook , so we found kitchen very well equipped. Very good neighborhood, few minutes walk to the grocery stores, lovely restaurants, cafes, shopping @ newbury street, t.j max . Also 3 to 5 mins walk to prudential center, coply mall and 7 Eleven . Very close to Northeastern University.
Would like to give ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ to Jessy & Diego for giving us late check out due to bad weather conditions in Boston. That was so kind .
Our stay was super comfortable. I would surely come back and highly recommend this place. 😊

We had a smooth booking and arrival. Tom even took the time to join us and make sure we were well onboarded the unique ‘home’ - the view can not be better! Top quality breakfast. The only compliant would be - more time to look at the stars.. :-)
Can only recommend Rozinante
It was a good place
Totally modern, clean, and beautiful space with super location !
Very comfortable bed and host. Lots of space. Tom was easy going and approachable. His dog Belle was also a very lovely good dog.
Good central location
This air b n b is in a great area, walkable to everything. The host is a great with instructions and communicating throughout the stay. We would definitely stay here again!
Great location. Would stay again

The apartment was very clean and cozy. Joseph was very helpful and quick to get back with any and all questions I had. I HIGHLY recommend staying. He had juice boxes in the fridge for the kids as well as water bottles and some sodas when we arrived. Myself and the family are very happy and will probably stay again in the future.

Great location for restaurants and near Fenway park- walkable to Boston Common and freedom Trail. Had an issue with the refrigerator when we first arrived that was quickly resolved. Bed was comfortable, and apartment was clean. The only other two issues was that it was very noisy at night (sirens, cars revving engines, people shouting outside), and the four narrow flights of stairs with luggage was a bit of a challenge to navigate.
Amazing and accommodating host
Recomiendo el lugar, muy bonito y limpio

The location is perfect for the Boston touristy stuff! The freedom trail is a stone’s throw from the apartment and we walked pretty much everywhere we went.
