The apartment itself is very cute. Loved the decor, the exposed brick. A view out of the bedroom window of a nearby roof and the occasional pigeon completed the city vibe.
When you go: no hand soap nor body wash was provided, so plan to bring some or buy when you arrive. Towels are small and on the scratchy side.
While the communication was thorough for the most part, we notified them that the smoke detector was covered with a plastic bag when we arrived on Friday. Was told maintenance would be notified, but it was not fixed while we were there. I read a review from 8 months ago with the same issue about a bag over smoke detector, so that was concerning. After we left owner said a previous guest must have just done that but ceilings are 12 ft so I am dubious about that story unless guest was traveling with a ladder.
no comments

Marlene is the definition of a super host!
When I was searching months ago for a place to stay- she was quick to respond and helpful! Up until we arrived she answered all questions and again; very quick to respond.
She let us know we found arrive earlier than 4pm and had our room ready. The room was as described. Clean, comfortable and everything you need! Comfortable bed, ac, flat screen tv, desk area, mini fridge, great shower and bathroom set up with essentials and a common kitchen area complete with tables, keurig, another fridge, plates, cups ect.
There was a small deck with furniture to sit outside with private parking. Check in was a breeze. Marlene greeted us and was just as lovely in person. The home was located in a quiet neighborhood and a ten minute drive to all places in Boston we needed to go.
The price was VERY reasonable for the area. We slept great, felt safe and clean! Would definitely stay again and recommend anyone else too that is looking in the area!

I loved this studio apartment!  It was spotless, so comfortable and in a great location. Everything was easy about it, the host was very responsive to any questions, and I appreciated that it was well stocked with soap, toilet paper, shampoo, conditioner and nice towels and sheets. I will definitely stay here again when I am back in Boston!
El lugar estuvo fantástico, muy bien ubicado, tranquilo y limpio.. volvería otra vez.
Nice and clean place. The host was very nice and responsive

The apartment was great for my wife and I and our infant son. The location was perfect for our week stay in Boston to see all of the sights. It is very close to the subway and we could walk to many of the places we wanted to see (Boston commons, Quincy Market, Fenway park, etc). The apartment had AC which was great and it was clean. Michelle was very responsive. It would have been nice, though, if there was some tea and coffee in the cupboards, given that there was a kettle, coffeemaker and filters. Just a nice touch for the guests. Overall, a great stay! We would highly recommend michelle’s apartment!
Was a cute place to stay in the few days we were in boston!
Great stay
The best location for eating and shopping. And the host is very nice to us!
Can’t beat the location and price of the listing. Close to Fenway and a short ride into the city of Boston. Nick is extremely friendly, accommodating, and responsive!

Ich wurde sehr herzlich und persönlich mit Post its begrüßt. In den gemeinsam genutzten Räumen ist die Zuordnung durch Aufkleber gut gekennzeichnet. Das Zimmer war super und hatte einen gesonderten Abstellraum als Kleiderschrank und als Möglichkeit den Koffer abzustellen.
Alix war stets gut erreichbar und bei persönlichen Treffen immer sehr zuvorkommend.
Insgesamt ein top Aufenthalt!
Ich komme gerne wieder!
great spot. easy peasy.
Place was great. Felt like we were right at home. Would stay again.
Apartment was clean and in a great location. Host was responsive and helpful!

We stayed in Gia’s apartment for a week. It’s an amazingly comfortable and stylish apartment! Awesome location - we walked everywhere. Host was responsive, replied quickly and answered all our questions.
I’d definitely book it again!

Howard and Gustavo are outstanding hosts! I was so impressed with the stylish space and the thoughtful touches that show that they go above and beyond. It was a very clean and nice-smelling space that had everything we could have needed- comfortable bed, awesome air conditioning in the bedroom, great pillows to sleep on, really nice shower, etc.  The neighborhood is great and the location is perfect. We were in Boston to see a concert at TD gardens and it was a simple 20 minute walk to the venue. Great pizza places nearby and a nice Italian cafe that was very close that we went to for breakfast. I appreciated the privacy while also knowing that ours hosts were responsive if we needed anything. Excellent stay- no complaints whatsoever! We are very glad we chose to stay here while in Boston.

We really enjoyed our stay at Tim’s home! The area is wonderful and the house was exactly as described. We appreciated that this felt like someone’s home, and only wish we could have stayed longer to explore the area better. We had no issues at all, but it is worth noting that the spiral staircase to the bedrooms could prove difficult for anyone with mobility issues.
Amazing location, you can walk to so many places and wonderful spots to eat near by.

The studio is really nice and very well located. The zone where the apt is located is beautiful and it has a metro station close. Melissa is really kind and always answer our messages quickly. I strongly reccomend this apt.

We stayed here with a group of 11 and had a wonderful time. The location was perfect, just the right distance from the city and close to Marina Bay where we had an event. The house was clean, spacious, and had plenty of beds, plus lots of comfortable hangout areas for the family to gather and talk.
The decor was charming, and the two kids in our group loved discovering the stuffed animals around the home. The photos were completely accurate, so we knew exactly what to expect. Having on-site parking was a huge plus since some of us flew in while others drove from outside the city.
If you are hosting a family event in the city and want a comfortable place to relax and have long conversations at night while still being close to your venue, this is an excellent choice. It is also conveniently near restaurants, coffee shops, and public transit. Highly recommend.

The apartment was small, but that was perfect for our overnight stay. The location is great, easily walkable and the street is beautiful. Easy walk to/from Fenway and a lot of great coffee shops and restaurants nearby.
Great place to stay, close to downtown Boston!

Had a great time in Boston. The location of this place is fantastic and you are a 5 minute walk to the Boston Common. It’s not fancy by any means, but everything was clean, it was easy to get in, and overall felt quite safe.
The one downside is that the restroom is shared with others on the floor, but everything was kept clean so it was not an issue.

Terry's place was exactly what we were looking for! Large enough to accommodate 8 adults, a short walk from the T, in a safe and quiet neighbourhood. Everything was clean and comfortable, check-in and check-out were easy, and Terry and Mindy were always very responsive.
All in all a great place with great hosts, couldn't have asked for much more!
Thanks Terry and Mindy!
Great location, Cozy place and Great communication!!
Amazing place to stay in Boston. Easy to get to Train and very cozy and clean. I would stay here again!!
Great location for exploring Boston over a long weekend.

5 stars ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
I had such a lovely stay! The host was incredibly sweet and welcoming—she made sure I had everything I needed and even gave me some great local recommendations. The room was super comfy, clean, and cozy—exactly what I was hoping for. I felt right at home. Would definitely stay here again if I’m back in the area!

Location was surperb in the heart of Boston. SAFE Walking distance to everything we wanted to visit.The apartment was on the 7th floor. There was a small elevator. The apartment was A LOT larger inside than we anticipated for a family of 4.
Apartment was very clean and comfortable with clean working AC units in each room. They provided soap and a shampoo/conditioner combo. There were extra linens and pillows in one of the closets. Beds were very comfortable (memory foam mattresses). The street outside of the apartment is a bit noisy even with the AC units on from vehicles echoing throughout the streets.. which is to be expected in a city.
Only thing I didn't love was the 'fee' for early checkin.. my dad is 75 and we all had to carry our backpacks all day long after the airport until 5pm. Would have appreciated no fee for early check-in if the space was available. However, that was CLEARLY communicated so although a little irritating after spending so much, it was fine!
5 STARS!
Lee’s place was great and just what we were looking for. It was only a few minutes walk to the Boston Commons. We rented a car and Lee was helpful in suggesting places to park. Great spot!

We enjoyed our very short stay. Beautiful neighborhood, easily walkable to nearby resturants and shops.
Would stay again the next time in Boston.
Great place close to Airport and subway! Highly recommend

Das Beste an der Wohnung: Zentrale Lage, schöne Einrichtung, gute Gegend, toller Ausblick aus dem Fenster, gute Kommunikation, wie becshrieben

Minuspunkte: Sehr laut, das Fenster lässt sich nicht ganz schließen und daher kommt ein kalter Luftzug in die Wohnung, sehr hell, Utensilien wie Klopapier und Putzmittel warden nicht gestellt

Amazing value, cute space, and hosts were extremely nice and accommodating! Would highly recommend, especially with how expensive hotels are in the area. The street parking felt like a luxury. I would absolutely stay there again!

Space was super clean and perfect for 4 people! Maria was super communicative and helpful during our stay. I will say that the location was iffy, extremely noisy neighborhood and very few walkable businesses nearby. Kitchen did not have a lot of necessities, including pots and pans for cooking during our stay. Overall we enjoyed our time and thank Maria for welcoming us!
Their place was extremely clean and the beds were super comfy!

This is by far the best deal on air bnb if your looking to enjoy the cool hip area of Boston. You can literally be right in the middle of the best area to see live music in Boston within a 10 minute walk. The area also has great bars and restaurants. A 20 minute walk in the other direction you’ll be in Harvard square. The neighborhood is very quite so after a night out you’ll be able to sleep in piece. Clara’s house is spotless and the bathroom is especially immaculate. Look no further, this is your spot!

Nice little studio real close to everything. Pictures were accurate and enough for my two night stay in Boston. The keypad entry was quick for in and out access. Will definitely be back for more quick trips to Boston!
Great area, cute and comfortable place
Great location
Lots of stairs so it was a bit difficult for us with our large bags.
Just as described

The location I thought was perfect.  Real simple to find.  However if you have trouble getting in you can count on Albert being passive aggressive with you. He was pretty snappy.  We went back and forth massaging each other and he wanted to cancel my stay.  I explained to him how I'd been traveling and hadn't had much sleep, he wanted to compare his traveling with mine.  He didn't have to do all that. I then told him after all that I had just loss a family member to covid he then told me if I had any questions to message his team. Maybe we were both tired from traveling so much I don't know,  but we both could have been a bit more nicer to each other. The place is great. Cute spot.

We had a great stay at Eva's apartment.  The apartment appeared to not have a current tenant living in it and was clean and uncluttered.  The location was absolutely perfect and central to everything that we wanted to do in Boston.  Check-in and out was incredibly easy.
I really enjoyed my stay! The apartment was clean and comfortable, and Antonio was extremely kind and always responded very quickly. I would definitely recommend staying here.
great location near back bay, quiet area, small but cozy room

The apartment was just as described. We particularly appreciated how quiet the apartment building was, and the choice of high-quality soft furnishings. Christian also enabled us to have a very smooth check-in and check-out.
Great place, good people, great neighbors, was able to park off street which was huge!  Was able to walk into town and go to restaurants and grocery. Highly recommend. Would stay here again.
cute close to everything walkable to mny local eateries
Close to the T with only 1-2 stops to get to freedom trail, aquarium etc. free parking was awesome and super convenient.
Great location and very clean
Sunflower room was an awesome stay. Lots of space and sunshine. Also incredibly clean and Helen was a wonderful host!

Staying with Hilary, Hazel and Aggie was wonderful! We are the best hosts you can dream of! Their place is cute and they made you feel comfortable as soon as you come in. I would definitively recommend that you stay with the 3 of them. Jamaica plain is a lovely neighborhood and you are just a few subway stops away from Downtown Boston. This is the perfect place to stay to have a pleasant stay in Boston. Would book again should we be back in Boston.
Comfortable and great location!

Bill and Maureen's Airbnb was quaint with a great deal of personal touches. The decor was very New England and made me feel right at home, as I am a NH native. The bed was very comfy and the linens smelled fresh. The area felt safe and the streets were surprisingly quiet at night — allowing me to get some rest before my early morning flight. The nearby communal room featured healthy snacks, coffee, and refrigerated items (fruit, yogurt varieties, and orange juice). A piece of tasty pumpkin bread was left for me in the morning with a handwritten note. The local beach is just a short walk away. Transportation was easy with local bus routes and Uber friendly pick-up locations. This spacious studio is a rare gem and I will definitely stay here again on my next visit. Thank you for making my stay so lovely!

When I arrived the first day at 12. Von told me I can put my bags in the living room until check in. I did so and rest there since I was too tired. Surprisingly, Von came and told me I can check in earlier. It was the greatest and the most helpful thing after my 30 hours trip! With the help of Von I made a great rest that afternoon and enjoyed Boston at night. But because of my tiredness I left my wallet in the living room. Von told me he found it and put it inside a plastic bag and tie up on the hook of my door. It was so nice of him and I really appreciate it. The two day experience was great and I will recommend this place as a good choice when visiting Boston

Stephanie's apartment is wonderful. Everything from the host herself, to the thoughtful touches throughout made for a wonderful stay. The apartment itself is sparkling clean, modern and has everything you could want and more. It's a fabulous place to come back to after a day of sightseeing. The location is great, and the bed is super comfortable. Stephanie was a delight to deal with - quick to respond, polite and incredibly helpful. I can not recommend this apartment highly enough, and we will definitely stay here again should our travels bring us back to Boston.

Jonathan's place is amazing, it looks exactly as in the photos, very clean and tidy the neighborhood is very quiet and we enjoyed walking around there, it's convenient because it is pretty close to the Roxbury Train station which makes it easy to get to other places in the city. Jonathan is always responsive and provided us with very detailed instructions to get to the place. Definitely, I'll come back as soon as I can, it was a 5-star stay
Thank you, Jonathan!
Exactly as advertised and in a great area!
Great place to stay at a very close location to downtown Boston. Host was excellent with his timely responses. The place was very well kept.

Fantastic location, super clean place! Hosts were responsive and to communicate with. If you like to end your day with some TV, it's all streaming services and may not include the channels you're looking for. Chromecast is available. Other than that, you can't ask for more, would stay here again!

If you want to be stranded on your vacation, this is the place to book. Sam never sent lock code to get in which he was supposed to send a day before. We were on the road with 2 infants. I realized there was no lock code sent to us. So I messaged him through air bnb- no response, texted him- no response. Called him 10 times between 6-8 pm- no response. Finally had to call air bnb to solve the issue. Even air bnb couldn’t get in touch with him and they told us to book a hotel. We had to stay at a hotel when we booked this place almost 3 months in advance. What a waste of time and energy. Our babies were hungry, tired, screaming and crying. Only if i can tell in words how frustrating this experience was.
Oh ya he finally sent the lock code around 11 pm. No ph call, no apologies. Just message with the lock code.

I loved Jonathan's home. The room I stayed in was beautiful, clean and spacious with lots of windows. I had a bed, couch, TV and desk. Additional treats were a jug of water, bathrobe, slippers, iron and ironing board all in the room. The only downside is the location as his home isn't in the safest neighborhood in Boston. You'll hear car alarms going off quite frequently so I wouldn't leave a rental car parked on the street nor would I walk alone at night.
Great location and amazing host…highly recommend!!!
Great stay for business in a clean apartment.  Easy access to airport via the T.

Lihua and her staff are simply great and this Airbnb was perfect for our overnight trip to Boston - I will definitely re-book here the next time I'm visiting either alone or with one other person!
The location was great - in a beautiful shaded and quiet street, yet literally right around the corner from the Kenmore Green Line stop and about a 10-15 minute walk to Fenway. Super convenient.
Our room was on the 4th floor and it had an attached private bathroom. Both were immaculate, cool (with in-room AC), and there was plenty room for two people. The beds were super comfortable and the stay was quiet, peaceful and comfortable.
Breakfast was simple continental style with plenty of basic options and was perfect for us.
Lihua was very accommodating - allowing us an early check-in to drop off our bags and she allowed us to leave our bags there after checking out while we were in the city for the afternoon before leaving Boston.
Just a head's up that if stairs are a challenge, be sure to ask Lihua for a room on a lower floor...in typical Brownstone-fashion, our 4th floor room required a pretty steep climb up stairs and the climb could be challenging for some. Not a problem for us at all and I would be happy to stay here anywhere there is a room available.

One of the best airbnb I stayed at. Polly is very friendly, accommodating and tries to make your stay as comfortable as possible. On my first morning I woke up to a note that bagels, cake and fresh coffee are waiting for me downstairs. I would most definitely return.
Amazing room and super nice people!! All we needed for a great stay!
A super cozy stay with fantastic amenities !

We were very happy with the location — just a short 7-minute walk from the Head of the Charles, which was incredibly convenient for our stay. The apartment was clean and in a great spot, but it felt a bit small for four people (two adults and two teenagers). The sofa in the kitchen area wasn’t the most comfortable sleeping option, especially in the mornings when others were getting ready for the day. We also arrived quite late, and the sofa bed hadn’t been set up yet, so we had to arrange the bedding ourselves. Overall, it’s a nice place that would work best for 2–3 people on a short visit.
Host gave us great advice for good restaurants and breakfast options.

This place is great! With in walking distance to Stony Brooke Station and the orange line which takes you everywhere you’ll want to go in Boston. It was so easy to visit Boston and then come back here.
Riyo place was clean and lots of helpful added touches. It rained a bit while we were there and she had umbrellas ready at hand. Also loved the snacks and drinks she left for us. If you’re looking for a place to lay your head in between exploring Boston this is the place.
We will be back!
Great Hospitality
Glen and Oliver were perfect hosts. Great space and super convenient location to get anywhere on the T. The basket of breakfast items and coffee left at the foot of the stairs was much appreciated.
Glenn was really friendly and welcoming! Both hosts were responsive to messages before arriving and the place was really lovely. Wish that I had been there for a longer stay!
Great place and great location. Short walk to a bunch of great restaurants,  stores, cafes on Broadway. And Peter is an absolutely fantastic host. Can't recommend this location or host enough!
Great for a solo trip or even a friend for a short stay. Walking distance ! Clean as well.

Rob was very accommodating and friendly, and his home was nice and in a quiet neighborhood. Public transit is super convenient with a bus stop righit across the street that takes you right to the subway!

The place was located in a very central place in downtown Boston with lots of restaurants and places to see. It’s a bit older  and the elevator was kind of loud but we didn’t mind at all. If you’re looking for a bit more affordable and in the heart of downtown, this is the place for you. The subway is right there too. The host was very responsive and friendly. We had a great time there!
Nice place. As described.

The place was as expected and as pictured. It was clean and the location couldn’t be better! The staff was quick to respond to messages. The only issue we had was the main door lock was not functioning properly so we had a few issues with getting into to building at times. Overall great experience!
Lori is a friendly & organized host. The house and room was just what I was looking for. The neighborhood is walkable and close to the T (public transport)
We had a wonderful stay at Sabina's place. Sabina was a very nice host and we enjoyed our time there.
We enjoyed our stay and how conveniently located it was to food and entertainment! The beautiful view of the snow was very relaxing! Highly recommend!
Wonderful host, very attentive and detail oriented and excellent hospitality. Thank you!
Host were very friendly and welcoming! Will definitely stay again when I’m the area! Highly recommend
Beautiful, clean loft in great location. Host was easy to communicate with, check in and check out process was very convenient. Definitely a great find to stay in JP.
Great staying
Yan Is a very kind person who takes care of her guests. I would recommend staying at Yan's place.
great host

Bedroom was roomy, comfortable and sunny. Both the bedroom and nearby bathroom were very clean. Bathroom had new up-to-date fixtures.  It worked out very well for me when I was visiting my daughter at her nearby apartment.

Maverick’s communication was proactive, clear and kind. Self check in and out was easy and the space was exactly what myself and my partner needed to be in walking distance to everything around Boston! Lovely classic red brick building, and nothing unnecessarily fancy to break the budget. Would stay there again!

Blueground doesn’t follow typical AirBNB hosting standards – you have to use their app or call their customer support line for help. Cleaning was not great. That being said, the apartment itself was fantastic, as was the location.
Great stay!
I really liked this place.   It was clean, comfortable and quiet.   The host was very helpful and responsive.
Beautiful home in a very central location. Will definitely stay there again if I'm back in Boston.

We were in town for the New Balance track nationals.  This location was absolutely perfect for the event.  We had a car and the parking space that was included made a world of difference.  We were able to get to the track in a few minutes.  It is also within walking distance to Harvard Square.  The apartment was exactly as described and the cleanliness of it was unbelievable.  We prepared breakfasts and dinners in the kitchen which was extremely convenient.   It is completely stocked with dishes, cookware and utensils.  The neighborhood was quiet.  The ONLY somewhat negative item was that the shower/tub combo was very tight.  That will not stop me from coming back.

Selim is very nice and friendly. Check in  and out was easy. The room was beautiful and the house was too. Close to train that will take you to the center in less than half an hour. Restaurants and shops nearby. Highly recommend it!
Great location and very clean place. Would stay here again.
Liesl’s property was perfect for the 4 of us. Nice, clean and close to everything we wanted to do in Boston. Two thumbs up! We’ll stay here again!

Alex was a great host, he was very easy to contact and all through our my stay he stayed in contact making sure everything was still ok! The apartment is only a few minute drive from the heart of the city. It was well maintained and had lots to offer!
Thank you!
Omg the vibe of the place… amazing!

Everything was as described. Great place! Quick communication and very easy check-in. I was a bit concerned before arriving because Roxbury isn’t known to be the safest area in Boston but the neighborhood Terry’s place is in appeared quite safe. I probably wouldn’t wander around at midnight but the place is pretty close to the Roxbury crossing T stop, which made it convenient to get in and out of downtown. Overall an excellent place! Would stay here again!
Hidden gem! Such a wonderful place to stay Bill and Maureen were wonderful hosts and the space was even better then I expected! Great location for public transportation.
Great location, walls of the bathroom could use some work, bed is not a true Queen, but everything was great.
The perfect spot in Boston for a solo female traveler. I will be back!
Great place to stay at.
Great spot!

I very much enjoyed my stay at Celia's. The room is lovely and well looked after. The description and photos are representative.

Really easy to deal with Jonathan, who manages the listing, during check-in and out. Nice guy, laid back.
Mine and Celia's paths never actually crossed, though I did speak to her over the phone, and she was very friendly and helpful.

Would definitely look up this room if I'm Boston again myself, and I happily recommend it to others!

Maverick’s place was absolutely wonderful. It was a small room but everything was clean and stylish. The location was great that many good restaurants are in walking distance. I enjoyed my stay there.
Charles is the most helpful host you could possibly hope to meet and associate with. I highly recommend his place and hope you enjoy it as much as I did!

Ehab is most definitely a Superhost.
Our week in one of Ehab's rooms was safe, clean, and comfortable. Ehab is polite and responds to messages very promptly.
When we were cold Ehab arrived moments later with extra blankets.
Had a fabulous stay in Boston. Paige's place was convenient, spacious and homely. She was communicative and helpful and we felt very comfortable during our stay. Would definitely return 👍

After 20 days on the road with a family of five, our last stay was with Rafael's home. One word. FANTASTIC! We were in/out of AirBNB's and this was without a doubt the best of the best. No "tricky" advertising to hide flaws. Freaking immaculately clean and tidy. Every convenience a person could want. CLEAR instructions for everything. No list of duties to perform before leaving.
Couple of blocks to the T, but we used Ubers mostly. Short walk to restaurants/shopping. (Highly recommend Kelly Square Pub, tell them "The Texans" sent you). 15 minute uber ride into about anywhere one would want to go in Downtown Boston, super close to Aquarium/Wharf.
My wife is very, very picky about cleanliness/tidyness. This was THE ONLY one that she couldn't find anything to complain about. Her comment was "this feels like home".
If you are considering an AirBNB for a family of five, one would be a fool not to strongly consider this gem. Top shelf through and through.

This house worked great for my family. We each had our own bedroom and there were plenty of bathrooms for us all to get ready at the same time. We picked up a few groceries and the kitchen was well stocked for our at home lunches and dinners. The place was very clean. The beds were comfortable. Holly was immediately responsive to a minor question I had for her. We would stay here again.

Leslie’s place is spacious and comfortable for our party of 4 adults, much more spacious than we had anticipated. The kitchen is great and stocked with everything you need. And the location is pretty central and easy to get to other parts of Boston. Parking was a bit tricky (but Leslie walks you through it in detail) and one bedroom is better appointed than the other, but overall a really good experience for us in Boston.

Excellent location. Great view of the Boston Common. Apartment is as described. I would only point out that the building is dated with an old elevator. And the heating unit in the living room is very loud if you happen to be sleeping in that room.
Overall it was worth the price.
I stayed here once before several years ago and glad I came back/plan to when I’m back in Boston! Nice and convenient.
Great location with basic accommodations.
Cute area! Even cuter apartment! Would definitely recommend

One of the best Airbnbs I've ever stayed in. Firstly, considering the market price, the cost of this room is definitely not high. Secondly, as soon as you enter the house, you feel warmth and coziness. Thirdly, everything was clean everywhere, not only in our room but also in common areas (bathroom, kitchen, etc.). Shelly is very friendly; we had a few simple questions, and she would respond immediately and give us advice.
The only concern was two windows without mini blind (first bedroom on the right and kitchen) kept away from privacy, but overall the place was beautiful and clean. A+
Absolutely perfect place for our big family to stay and visit relatives. We would 100% return!

A perfect spot if you intend to be in the city most of your time here. The ability to hop on a bus line and three different train lines within two minutes of the front door is fantastic. The place was clean, had AC,  was in a great location, and best of all was a very reasonable price.
Great location. Everything was within walking distance.

Hermina's place was in a prime location- about a 5 min walk to the T. The surrounding area was safe to walk around at night. There is a couple of fast food spots around for the late night snacks. Make sure that you note that the entire house has 1.5 bathrooms and all the other rooms in the house are also rented as Airbnb rooms so you will be sharing with those travellers as well- we had no problems with this and it all worked out fine!

Lihua has a great location in Boston. It is very close to Fenway Park and near a lot of night life. She was extremely welcoming and super sweet. We only stayed one night but she was very accommodating and friendly. I would definitely recommend staying with Lihua the next time you’re in Boston!
Beautiful apartment with a balcony on the street with lots of restaurants and coffee shops. It was great!

Tutto davvero molto bene.
L'unica cosa, è che la scala per accedere alla stanza è stretta e ripida, e se hai un bagaglio pesante puoi avere molte difficoltà a salire.
Super easy to get to, tons of food and drink options within walking distance, frictionless check in, comfortable bed...everything you'd want.
Excellent hotel to pass some quality time in Boston
Had a good stay. Baljinder was communicative and made sure to point me in the direction of finding instructions in the house on where to park since I was traveling via car.
Lovely, vintage (but modernized) apartment, right in the heart of Beacon Hill. Beautifully maintained and spotless. We’d be happy to stay here again!

Dear Charles and Carol
We enjoyed thoroughly being your guest. We felt like home away from home for over a month. The bathroom was clean and stylish. Kitchen area was great.
Carol was quick in replying.
We would certainly love to stay again in future.
Thank you so much,
Best Regards,
Rehan Ahmad

A quaint, comfortable and cosy apartment in beautiful Beacon Hill. The area is very central, we walked everywhere. The apartment had everything we needed. A welcome booklet made with a lot of effort and detail exampled the care taken in presenting a great experience in this apartment. The kitchen was well stocked with thoughtful touches. We would definitely stay again if we visit Boston another time.

Le logement de camille a été plus qu'à la hauteur de nos attentes.
Il était d'une propreté rare et tout était fourni pour être dans les meilleurs conditions.
Sa localisation était également bien située. Proche de toutes commodités et de la gare direction Boston en 10 mn (attention trains qui ne passent que toutes les horaires).
Je vous la recommande!
Merci encore Camille!

Room is nice and big!  A block from the subway station, good restaurants close by. Nemrac is so nice and accommodating for check in and check out which was super helpful for me and some last-minute changes that happened with my travel!  Definitely will stay here again if/when I come back to Boston.

Very cute place! We were unsure which apartment was ours to use, but the one we ended up in was cute. I wish we would’ve seen the other one first! I didn’t realize that our stay included 2 different apartments.
The location was nice. We were pretty close to a lot of restaurants and public transportation. Having the parking is really nice!
One thing to be cautious of is the noise on the street. We were kept up all night by people walking back from wherever and being loud.
Overall we enjoyed our stay and would definitely book again! Thank you!
Hotel staff very friendly and helpful, a lot of effort has gone into the vibe of the hotel
Very cute small apartment. it has everything you will need.
The description was accurate and the place wasn't extravagant but it had everything I needed.

nice and quiet place to visit boston.
the orange line is at 10 min walk, and parking the car on the street was easy.

Amazing stay in Boston. The hosts were very responsive via the Abnb messaging app. arranged early check in at a reasonable cost. Everything I needed was there. Clean and tidy. Outside does not represent the inside. it's off the main road near the parks and theatres. I would stay again. thanks so much.
It is a great place and well located in historical boston. It is very convenient to go around Boston or other places. I love the place and hospitality of the host.

Had a great stay. Bill & Maureen are great hosts. I appreciated the self-serve yogurt & breakfast sammies in the kitchenette next door to the room in the mornings. Bathroom was also well stocked. Neighborhood is very quiet and walkable. Would stay here again when in the area.

Karim was responsive, check in easy and location as expected. The accommodation was well kitted out. The beds, bedding and towels were very clean and comfortable, but I think the place could do with a deep clean to clean up cupboards, drawers and harder to reach places. The sofa also needs a clean. This is not the fault of the host, but we were disturbed by the neighbour upstairs arguing and shouting loudly and aggressively with someone else on one night of the three. We felt uncomfortable and my young son was frightened by the experience. It’s a shame as other than that we would have been happy with the stay.

sympathique et confortable location.
un peu excentré mais le bus 7 nous amène en 15 min au downtown et il passe très souvent .
Bill est très prompt à répondre.
nous recommandons vraiment cette adresse

Our little studio was so adorable, and the location was perfect. It was just a block and a half from the T, which we took literally everywhere. Studio was super clean, stylish, and updated. The neighborhood is safe, friendly, and beautiful. We would come back in a heartbeat.

This place is the perfect spot for a Celtics game, which was the reason for our trip to Boston. Overall experience was good, however the door is counterintuitive as you have to push the handle up instead of the down so we couldn’t get in for like 15 mins until the listing person mentioned to try pushing to door handle up. But place was otherwise fine with easy access to TD Garden and the T.
Great place and location. It has everything you need.

Perfect airport location for a stop over or to get downtown.
Restaurants of all types close by.

Great location! Right in the heart of town and a block from the Common.
For the price though, some of the basics were missing--like no tissues or coffee. Very little to work with in the kitchen if you aren't eating out. I think there were 4 glasses. And not a single shelf in the showers to hold soap or shampoo, so you had to put it on the ground.
The big issue was Bedroom #2. There are not 2 double beds in there. There are 2 very uncomfortable single beds. This is different than the listing describes.

Easy, clean place to stay for two days for a conference. The host was extremely communicative and helpful. Would recommend reading the rules before check in and check out but overall it was simple and worth the stay!

The location is superb, walkable to Chinatown, downtown and everything.
If you're an Asian, there's no better feeling than walking a few steps to great milk tea and dim sum store.
Ping is also a very attentive host

Jacob and Isabella were great and their place was perfect!
Sauna was a great bonus!

Good location, not too loud considering how central it is, good place if you just need a bed and shower, though the kitchen and fridge would allow you to cook a lot if you wanted. Some scuffs here and there but nothing that made the place feel uncomfortable.

Booking process was super easy and Adam was really easy responsive. The agent used for check in made it very easy and it only took us a couple of minutes to gain access to the apartment. Amazing area with some of the best Italian restaurants and moments away from the key freedom trail highlights. Appartment was clean and extremely comfortable - would definitely return.

This listing is a great deal and Siena’s home is so lovely! Both her and her husband were so welcoming and very nice to talk to. The available amenities of her home were exactly what I needed for my short stay. It felt like I was visiting family, which is always nice when away from home. I would definitely stay here again!

Clean, cozy and close to everything! We only stayed here for 2 nights but felt right at home. It’s conveniently close to restaurants, shops, the Pru, etc. which was perfect for our family! We ended up renting a car and requested to reserve the parking spot that comes with the unit. It’s an additional cost, but a reasonable price.
We were very happy with our stay and hope it will be available the next time we come to Boston.

Maude’s place was adorable and we wanted for nothing. Check in was a breeze, and she even left us breakfast and wine! The location also just can’t be beat—right in the heart of the south end, with all its great restaurants
We Will definitely stay again next tine we’re in town.
Beautiful home and great host!
At over $400 a night, the room was not worth the cost.

We loved our stay with Lihua very much. She was so hospitable, friendly, welcoming, and responsive. The brownstone is gorgeous, and the room was perfect. So comfortable and clean! Lihua even provided complimentary fruits and some snacks. We will definitely come back! Highly recommended!
We had a wonderful stay.  The apartment is spacious and in a great location.  Will definitely try to get it again!

Pros:
Jurek had a look that everything was correct as much as possible.
There were many amenities available (kitchen paper, toilet paper, cleaning sprays ... )
The kitchen had everything that was needed for a 1 month stay.
It is very well communicated (train, buses and blue bikes), as long as the public transport works
Cons:
The temperature isolation of the house is not good. The radiators are very weak, I had to use a manual heater all the time
It is quite noisy, you can hear the people upstairs taking showers and walking (also at midnight)
Love staying here. Close to everything. Super clean. Great host. Highly recommended.
een heel mooi appartement. Alles nieuw, boston city gemakkelijk te bereiken met de metro.

I had a wonderful stay! The place was even better than expected—super comfortable, easy to find, and had plenty of room to relax. It really felt like a home away from home. I’d definitely stay here again!
Great location in a lovely neighborhood and so close to everything!!   Mark's place was  clean and cute, unfortunately there was insufficient daylight.
房源入住方便，外出公共交通方便。厨房卫生间设备齐全。干靜，整洁。休息安靜。小区环境好，安全。房东爷爷和蔼可亲。

We had a good stay but the apartment was not quite what we expected. The washing machine did not work and parts of the apartment was not very well cleaned. We were also a bit disappointed in the location with regard to proximity to grocery stores/restaurants and also the subway was under construction during the weekends and replaced with buses which was inconvenient for us since we didn’t have a car.

Katie & Lisa are wonderful hosts! They made planning our stay super easy. The AirBnB is located within walking distance to the Back Bay train station which makes it convenient to easily get to where you want to go within the city. It’s also within walking distance to Copley Square and has several quant hipster restaurants within a 5 mile radius.
Not only is the location amazing but the beautiful brick row house makes you feel at home before you even enter. The room is cozy and has all the amenities you need when staying in a city like Boston. The kitchenette is convent for breakfast or heating up leftovers. The tall ceilings have beautiful detailing around the edges giving it some old world charm. All in all it’s a perfect room and was a wonderful first AirBnB experience.
We fully anticipate staying with Katie and Lisa in the future when we visit Boston again.

It's a lovely spot in a great location.
A couple of my favorite things included:
* Easy access to bike sharing station with great bike paths to get anywhere else in city (check out the Blue Bikes $10 adventure pass option for unlimited 2hr rides - a great way to get around)
* Charlestown Tea & Treats is just one block away for a lovely neighborhood feeling little coffee shop in the morning. Tracy who runs it is a gem & can plug you into all the neighborhood gossip.
* The kind of strange vast land of the "Cave" at Tangierino (also one block away) is a nice late night option (I wandered into it ~11:30pm on a Sunday night, perfect timing for the kitchen to still be open for a tasty snack but the crowd to be gone. The bartender Bryanna has good book recommendations for you. I feel like it might be a little less pleasant (or at least not so much my scene) when it's full and crowded.
* The apartment itself has nice light on a sunny day, which is great for a unit that is somewhat basment-ish. Low ceilings for a tall person like me, but the open floorplan makes it feel spacious. The alley/garden entrance gives a nice bit of adventure & character on your way in (but might be more challenging for access for elders or folks w/ limited mobility)
* Atef was a great communicator, very responsive, with clear information & instructions. Everything felt super clean & spotless.
Only a few reservations / drawbacks:
* This is clearly an AirBnB unit / guest suite that no one actually lives in, so it feels a bit more like a hotel room then staying in someone's home. (That's a plus for some folks, but part of the appeal of AirBnB for me is the warmth of lived-in spaces)
* Kitchen stuff is the basics, but if you want to cook a lot you might not find all the tools that you're looking for, which is par for the course for the point above. I couldn't find a serrated knife to cut into a loaf of bread for example – although I bet if I'd actually reached out to Atef he might well have brought me one from upstairs, as he's clearly an attentive host.
* I don't think this is a major concern, but the iron, stove, fire extinguisher, windows that open, and entrance door are all on one end of the unit, with the bed & shower at the other end. So if you somehow manage to leave something that starts a fire and then you go take a long shower or fall into a deep sleep, you'll find yourself stuck on the no-exit side of the building. So, well, don't start a fire. (I might still like to see a stepladder and a sledgehammer on the other side of the apartment or some other emergency exit option to the street side.)
A lovely place, we loved it !
Very clean, comfortable and pet friendly

Lovely themed apartment on the Emerald Necklace, for those who want to see a big city but might have trouble staying in the crowded and noisy city center. Was very easy to drive in and park to see the touristy stuff, and then come back to green space and quiet in the evenings. Loved it!!!
Cute & small, clean place to stay for a short travel. Building was quiet and a walkable distance to where we needed to be.
Clean and neat place to stay. Nice location. the heater was noisy.
Such a great place, I really enjoyed my stay here. Dan’s place has everything you need, highly recommended!!!

Great place. John and Kim made sure to keep the place spotless. I initially had concerns, since as a tourist I had heard quite a few bad things about the Roxbury area in general. However, my experience proved all my expectations wrong. In addition to the amazing place(which is a steal at its price), the neighborhood was friendly and safe.

This space was wonderful. Naveen, the host, was so quick to respond and helpful . The suite was in a prefect location and size for our needs. It was convenient to public transportation and very quiet. The space itself was well-appointed, extremely clean, the bed was comfortable, and had just the right amenities. I would highly recommend this suite.

Great location to get to lots of sights - New England Aquarium,  Duck tours, trolley tours, Faneuil Hall and Quincy Market - all within easy walking distance. Very clean and large enough gor 2 couples to stay together but have their own space.

Excellent place to stay! Very close to a subway stop with easy access to downtown. The area was spotless with a very comfortable bed and couch. Emmanuel was a great communicator and very responsive. Would definitely stay here again!

We had the best time! The location was perfect. You could walk downstairs in the evening for a gelato next door. An easy walk to cafes for coffee and breakfast, as well as numerous wonderful restaurants. We felt safe the entire time. The place was well stocked, and we had no issues. All appliances were new, but we did not cook, so I can't attest to their capabilities. It was hot, and there was a portable AC unit. Once we moved it to the bedroom and closed all of the doors, it was much more tolerable. But we expected it to be hot, so no complaints here.
Jay was extremely responsive from months ahead of time to the day of. He let us drop off our bags early, so we could explore the city the day of check-in.
The stairs could be a deterrent for some, but they were fine for us.
Overall, it was the perfect spot for us. And I can't wait to go back!

My family loved our stay at Jennifer’s loft! It was a cozy and quiet place to settle in after busy days exploring Boston. It was a bonus to be a block away from the Jamaica Pond walk/run trail! We will definitely stay here again on our next trip to Boston!

Lance and Shelly’s bunk room is the perfect cozy haven when you choose to visit Boston. Not only is it perfect for your budget - it’s also located less than a 5 minute way to the subway which takes you right into Boston. Everyone is respectful of one another and the hosts are exceptionally helpful. The bed is really comfortable and there is air conditioning in the room. I was delighted for the excellent restaurant and transport recommendations and overall a great Airbnb experience. Would definitely visit again and stay for longer.

only one word: GREAT
thank you!

If you’re looking for affordable, convenient lodging in Boston, this is it! Proximity to the airport and the T station made this the perfect spot for us. Shelly and Lance are so hospitable. The beds were comfortable; we weren’t disturbed by street noise; and it was a joy to meet one of the fellow travelers staying in the home. We look forward to returning!

Penny provides a wonderful private room with all the facilities you could need .  It's a short walk to the T ride into central Boston and there is a handy bus nearby too.  Jamaica Plain is an interesting area with lots of restaurants within easy walking distance .  Great place to stay .

Can’t check in until after 5 and remote parking but walkable for the most part. Clean but just a small one bdrm studio, and no coffee but filters and a coffee pot. If check out is at 10 why can’t check in be earlier than 5, so would’ve done a hotel for the price and convenience but tried to support locals. Very responsive, thorough and clean otherwise.
This studio was lovely and a fairly easy walk from the T station to easily get to and from downtown Boston. TuanAnh was very quick to respond to any communications.
Different room set up than the pictures, but similar location!
Lovely place and gracious host. We were there only for one night but would definitely consider staying again.
We live in New York and they received us during COViD 19 emergency
Everything was as described. Nice and clean. Most nights were quiet, but with thin walls when next door had people it was loud and could hear a lot.

Shelby was an awesome hostess and she was articulate on creating the right guest experience. I woul r commend this to any families or business groups. We had no complaints on anything and it was the best location for accessing the BCEC and local restaurants and eateries. Thanks Shelby! Blessings for your day.
C.H. ROBINSON Team

The house is super clean and close to everything. Katherine is super responsive and kindly allow us to use the off-street parking space after checkout time. Will recommend to anyone who is traveling to Boston.
I had a awesome 1-week stay.   Great place and close to everything!

Let me start by saying the host left me a birthday present ( which he really didn’t have to do but he did it out of generosity ). This was my first time in an Airbnb & me & my bf liked it a lot. Very clean & smelled amazing when we first opened the door. Although the heater kept going on & off In the living room it was manageable. The shower curtain kept falling down but other than that the stay was great & the bed was very comfortable!

The apatrment was way better than advertised. So clean and spacious. The bed was so comfortable after a long day of walking around town. Steven and team were very helpful and responsive with anything we needed. Highly recommend!
Great location and amazing host! If you visiting to go on Berklee College of Music / Conservatory tours, you will not find a better spot! The tours start literally around the corner.
We had a great stay. Good location, and eating options right across the street. Plenty of room.
good location and nice place

I had a great stay at this apartment! The location is fantastic and super convenient. The apartment itself was clean, comfortable, and had almost everything I needed—though the shower head was missing, which was a bit inconvenient. There is also no laundry unit in the apartment, but there’s one available in the building,. The host team was excellent—very responsive, proactive, and provided clear instructions for check-in. The building and appliances are a bit older, but everything was clean and functional. One small note: I could occasionally hear footsteps from the neighbors above, but it wasn’t a big issue. Overall, I had a great experience and would definitely stay here again!
Would definitely rent this room again . Cozy clean and comfortable ! Worth the price for sure
Superbe fin de semaine nous allons revenir et référer l’emplacement merci et bonne soirée

Our stay at the apartment was great! We love this location, walkable to Faneuil Hall and the waterfront.   Place was clean, tidy, and had the basics for a weekend.  Nothing lavish, but just what we needed for a quick getaway to a great city.
This was a great place in a great location. It was clean and the hosts were very responsive to our questions and were willing to help with finding parking.
Couldn't be more perfect for a business stay. Will book again

If we could give Scott and Katharine 8 Stars out of 5, we would!!!  From the moment we arrived until our departure, they made us feel welcome and cared for.  Their home is immaculate, warm and cozy.  We appreciated the roomy second floor and enjoyed delicious, homemade breakfasts.  We encountered unexpected weather challenges and Scott and Katharine assisted us in navigating them successfully.  Facing 26 inches of snow - we Southern Belles were in over our heads!  They shared their extensive knowledge of Boston, the trains, the traffic and the closings - allowing us to relax by the wood burning stove as we shifted our plans in short order. Their cheerful natures soothed our concerns about the weather. Basically, we felt like family. We give this airbnb our highest recommendation and will return.
We had a great time, great neighbourhood, great host.
Great location, very responsive and easy to communicate with, lovely place and would definitely recommend for future trips to Boston.

The place is perfect for 2 people. There is 5 flights of stairs you need to walk (which does get tiring) but it really is worth it for the rooftop view. We spent the majority of our time on the rooftop when we were in the house. I had a few questions and Rebecca answered them quickly. A lot of the places (stores, parks, & food) are within 15-20 min walking distance which is perfect due to parking being limited. Definitely recommend staying here. Boston is an amazing place.

The unit was not ready on time. I was only informed of this hours before my check-in time, and the reimbursement for the subsequent hotel stay was insufficient for the downtown Boston area. It took over a week for the unit to be prepared, and communication during this period was lackluster.
The unit matched the description and photos, and for the size, was a good deal for the area. The main living space and kitchen were clean, the shower curtain, vaccuum cleaner, and bedroom carpets needed more cleaning. Several contractors intruded without notice during the first week to deal with issues in the unit.
Amenities and living basics provided in the unit were appreciated. In accordance with Blueground’s leasing agreement with the unit’s owner, the unit was listed for sale during my stay, and several showings took place, which were a minor inconvenience.
Sloppy corporate handling, but a good unit with modern furnishings.
We loved Bill and Maureen’s cute place, with all their thoughtful extra touches - comfy pillows, breakfast, lotions, etc. Such a friendly host too. ❤️

Location, location, location!  This place is right in the heart of Boston, with the beautiful Boston Commons right across the street.  If you are going to a show at the Orpheum, you HAVE to stay here.  The place was very clean.  We enjoyed our stay very much.
Casa limpia y barrio tranquilo

I extended my stay with Hermina by one night because I was too sick to drive home. Extending my stay was easy and Hermina's friend even brought me orange juice and bananas! I had the whole two bedroom flat to myself. I had a car and parking was a breeze. It is a great deal for the price!
Great place! But a couple of extra steps to check in… like filling out an in take form with all of your personal data, taking a selfie and a picture of your drivers license.  Just an FYI.
Great distance to everything & clean
The place was immaculate, the host was very responsive. Clear instructions on locating the apartment. The check in was very flexible. Naveen was an outstanding host

The entrance is right next to 7/11 where a large group of homeless people hang out and clearly doing drugs
To enter the apartment you literally have to walk over them as they are setting in the entrance.
The windows provide no insulation everytime an ambulance drives by it will disrupt your sleep
Bed is also uncomfortable I was in town for a meeting and barely got any sleep the whole time I was in Boston

Susie’s place was nice , clean , quite ,  close to shops and metro.  It had everything that a person needs and more. Susie is very warm and welcoming and treated us like family she is very knowledgeable and organised for us children’s museum for half price. Thank u so much Susie

My husband checked in and met Miriam's husband who showed him around and was very helpful. The studio is cosy, very clean and well equipped. The location close to all amenities in Jamaica Plain was just what we were looking for.

I had a wonderful stay at Jonathan’s brownstone studio!  He has done an excellent job of maximizing a small space so that it feels a lot larger!  The location was great for getting back and forth to the Longwood Medical area, and I felt very safe there!

Glenn and Oliver are great hosts. They are friendly, polite, and fun to spend time with. The house is ample and clean. They have an adorably sweet dog. When you book their place, it’s an entire second floor which gives the guest a lot of privacy. The house is super close to the Ashmont train station which is on the Red Line. Will definitely come back when in Boston.

Immaculate clean, fluffy towels, great shower, nice deco, art books, coffee, lovely patio with a rocking chair. Transportation is easy, car distance to Boston manageable. All in all, a great place to stay.
This studio was in a great location! A bit small but perfect for just 2 people.
Great location! Easy check in. Spacious and clean.

Great price for location, privacy, and safety. would definitely stay again and the hosts were GREAT! At one point my friend and I needed a unique request/favor and the hosts were MORE than willing to help which was so kind. Also an amazing location since you stay right next to the T, which is the public transportation in Boston. It was clean inside and even included a couple of waters. Private access meant we were able to freely come and go as we pleased which was nice. The hosts were nice, communicative, and accessible but gave us plenty of space and clear instructions of how to check in and out which was great
Great location, well decorated place, huge bed

Good location. I felt safe around the area. Location was great. Only minus for me was how the walls are so thin. You can hear the traffic, construction noise, garbage trucks and neighbors. Otherwise, everything was great.

STAY AWAY! DO NOT RENT- This was easily the worst experience I’ve ever had at an AirBnb. I work remotely and stay in AirBnbs all over the country, so I have much to compare to.
Check in was 4 pm, we arrived at 7 pm and the code provided to enter was the wrong one. We contacted them immediately through the app and text and didn’t get a response for 52 minutes. We had to wait outside for an entire hour before they gave us the wrong code to get in.
Once we got in, there was a smoke alarm that was constantly beeping that I had to get on a chair and disconnect myself. Additionally, after a long day in the city we went to wash our hands and the entire apartment had no hand soap. Upon using the bathroom sink with just water, the sink didn’t drain and would fill up bc it was clogged.
We texted Drew through AirBnb support to work out compensation for being stuck outside the apartment for an hour. Drew refused to reimburse a single dollar and continued to lie that we got in ASAP.
Sehr freundlich u nette Gastgeberin. Die Wohnung ist gut ausgestattet. Viele Supermärkte u Restaurants in der Nähe. Ruhige u freundliche Lage. Gerne wieder
This is a great place in a great location. The Boston Common being next door is a great little setting. The room itself was clean and tidy and was perfect for our stay!

Our stay at Lihua’s brownstone was perfect! We spent one night after attending a concert at Fenway and couldn’t recommend it more. Lihua greeted us upon arrival and made sure we knew how to use the keys to get in. The room itself was pristine and quiet with cute decor. Despite a 101°F humid day on the fourth floor, the AC in the room kept us comfortable and cool, and the mini fridge was much appreciated. We felt very safe in the area and there was everything you could possibly think of (restaurants, stores, entertainment) within a 15 minute walk. Easy access to the rest of the city via the Kenmore T stop (3 minute walk). The bed is on the firmer side, so keep that in mind if you have a significant preference, but both my partner and I slept great despite being used to a cushier mattress. We can’t wait to stay here again the next time we’re in Boston!
Easy to get in, good value and good area. Close to subway and Penn station
Great place fully equipped. Convenient  location close to public transport in a quiet neighborhood. Highly recommended !

Nice flat, located well, just a nice spot for work, small furnished flat for the business visitor, basically a nice little seevice apartment - close to Hynes Convention, good dive Bar Anchovies and nice italian restaurant, for a week visit from Europe was good
Clean, comfortable, great location looking forward to staying there again when visiting Boston
Fantastic location for Logan airport & travel into Boston city centre.
I can’t recommend this strongly enough. Super clean, super cute, super rooftop deck, Super AirBnB & host. We WILL be back.

We had an excellent stay! Daryl was very responsive to all our questions. The place was clean, spacious, and well-stocked — there were even complimentary water, coffee, wine, and snacks. The location was also convenient, just a short distance from the train station. I would definitely recommend this place and hope to return soon!

We stayed here for 2 weeks before moving into our new house, it has everything we need. We felt right at home! Quiet street, great location for family. It is right next to a park, so it’s very convenient for us to take our toddler and dog for a walk. I won’t hesitate to book here again if we ever need a place to stay in the future!

Extremely responsive & welcoming host! Very accommodating as well, we appreciated the flexibility of being able to drop off bags a bit before check-in so we could wander around the city after we flew in.
Great, cozy space in a very conveniently located area too! Really enjoyed our time here :)
This place was great , very clean and comfortable!!

I have been already at Penny’s.
She is a great host. The room and house are very welcoming. Penny is friendly and flexible and I loved our interactions. Jamaica plain is a beautiful and diverse community. The house is in a super-quite area with tree everywhere, but at a few steps from an high street with shops and eateries, yoga studios etc. The pond and arboretum are very close too, and the number 39 bus takes you directly to the Back
bay…. Enjoy and thanks, Penny!
Very clean and stylish place!

I chose Antoinette & Louis’ guest suite for quick access to the arboretum, plus convenient public transportation into other parts of the city.
They were very welcoming and responsive to messages.
I enjoyed the beautiful and spacious room, sitting on the porch enjoying the breeze, and the quiet historic street.
It’s a straightforward trip from the airport if you want to use public transportation: Logan Express bus to Back Bay, 39 bus drops off right at the end of their street.
It’s about a 15 min easy walk through residential streets to the T (Green Street on the orange line).
There’s a large selection of restaurants and shops on Centre St. I opted for more casual spots like Soup Shack, Chilacates, Sweet Rice, and Monumental Bakery (I loved their GF orange ricotta cake).
You may want to bring some house slippers with decent tread; they like shoes off when you come through the door, and the stairs to the 3rd floor can be slippery.

This place is great; can't beat the location and it's perfect for folks like us who are just going to use it as a place to sleep between adventures. Exactly as described, clean, and simple; it met our needs perfectly.
Fair warning, if you're a light sleeper, it's a bit noisy; the units in the building all have locks that beep loudly as people come and go. Didn't bother us, though.

立地はとても良かったです。どこに行ってもとても便利でした。
全体的にとても良かったですが、壁が薄くて、隣の部屋の話し声まで聞こえてしまったのは残念でした。

Jay is an extremely responsive host and his place is just as pictured! Great location if you’re wanting to enjoy little Italy or take tours in downtown Boston. There’s also a small kitchen area if you’re wanting to store some food/snacks.

This place is a gem for sure, gorgeous and spacious interior in a perfect location in the north end. Loads of bad and restaurants within walking distance, not too far from the aquarium / Quincy market either. Kitchen was very nice as well, we cooked a big meal for six people with no issues. Parking only for one car but the lot wasn’t too expensive for the other car, and is right across the street.
Thanks Eda, it was a beautiful weekend. The localisation of this condo is perfect, between downtown and less than 5min  walk from the beach.
Barbara 的房子非常整洁，也很宽敞，适合家庭或朋友入住，两个浴室两个卧室，独立的客厅和餐厅，自由使用的厨房，让我们度过了美好的3天。会分享给我的朋友们。
Excelente ubicación
Thanks
Great Central and quiet location.
A cozy place in a great location, with all the amenities one could ask for.
Peter is a great host and goes above and beyond to make your stay enjoyable. So many amenities and the place is great! I enjoyed my stay!

My son recently relocated to this area to start a new job, and he stayed at Althea's for 2 1/2 weeks before his apartment was ready. He thoroughly enjoyed his stay. Althea has a great sense of humor, and she went out of her way to introduce him to the area. He especially enjoyed taking hikes along the Neponset River Greenway trail which is very close by. Thank you again, Althea.

This was a perfect experience all around. This building is so exceptionally preserved that you will feel like you walked right in to your own authentic Victorian dream. The street is very pleasant and quiet at night. You can either stroll the beautiful Back Bay,  head up Newberry Street for just about any shopping or dining you could want, take the emerald necklace via Commonwealth up to the public garden,  or walk to Fenway, in a matter of just a few blocks. On top of that, I would give it a 10 out of 10 for cleanliness and hospitality. Lihua is a wonderful host! Thank you, thank you, thank you!

El departamento está ubicado en la zona sur de Boston, no es central pero está muy cerca de la estación de metro. La habitación es espaciosa y confortable. El vecindario es tranquilo. Ehab fue muy atento y amable, es un excelente anfitrión.

The studio is compact but it has everything you need. The bed was comfortable. We used the green line to get into the city to explore. The hosts were friendly and kept us informed through the process.
Christian was very responsive and responded on a timely manner. Thank you Christian !!!

Thomas was an absolutely delightful host. He was warm and engaging from the onset, made us feel comfortable in his home, was obliging and helpful readily imparting his local knowledge which was a real bonus for us. He is to be highly recommended as an airbnb host.

Séjour parfait chez Maria Elena, un studio au dernier étage avec clim, terrasse sur les jardins, cuisine bien pourvue, on y reviendra avec plaisir. Transports à proximité, commerces, tout est facile d’accès !

The apartment was gorgeous and cozy, exactly what I needed for my trip. The hosts were responsive to my messages. They are firm about the amount of guests allowed in each unit, so keep that in mind. Access was quick and easy. Not really any convenient close by parking, but I rode in with friends so this wasn't really an issue. Loved being able to have a kitchen, and the bathroom was nice and clean. Overall a great value, especially considering the location. I would stay here again.

Thank you for allowing me to stay at your home! I was able to walk to my destination with no issues. I love that there were extra helpful items in the restroom in case i forgot to pack travel size items. Extremely comfort bed after a long day

The best decision to have chosen this apartment! Jovan and Sena are the greatest hosts, they make you feel right at home. The apartment is beautiful, comfortable, and at a great location. Jovan and Sena are super welcoming and want you to love Boston as much as they do. I would love to be back soon and stay there again because we felt so welcomed and happy to be there.

Beautiful home in a quiet, charming neighborhood of Boston. The home is very well-stocked and cutely decorated. We had a great stay and found that the home was super convenient to public transit even with the orange transit line being down. Very spacious home with comfortable accommodations.
Absolutely amazing hosts and such a great location, however, the place just felt smaller than what the pictures/description showed! Besides that, amazing amazing place!!
Good!

While I didn't get to meet Baljinder or his wife, his apartment was excellent. It was a perfect size for our family of 3, but could have easily accommodated 4 people. Baljinder also ensured that our stay was comfortable, as he had k cups and a keurig for our convenience as well as bottles of water!  The neighborhood was nice and residential and provided some pretty views of the Boston skyline. The location was also extremely ideal for traveling as it was under a 10 minute walk to the airport and the blue line t station. I would definitely recommend this air bnb!

Great place to stay to explore downtown Boston. Apartment was easy to find. Very roomy, clean and comfortable. Easy check-in and out. Hosts were very responsive to all questions and
Requests. A lot to do around the apartment and always felt safe. Would highly recommend!

I owned a business in Back Bay for almost 25 years. I chose this place because I was familiar with the area and felt it was not only convenient to restaurants, coffee shops, the T, but also because its a 'safe' neighborhood. I was in town for the BIO International 2025 conference at the Boston Convention and Exhibition Center and found it very easy to get a Lyft back and forth to the venue.
I was extremely satisfied with the check in procedure and was housed in a separate building. The staff was gracious and rolled my luggage to deliver it to my room. The staff were polite and hospitable.
Daniel is an awesome host, responsive and also responsible 😀

This place was in a great location and lovely to walk around.
Highly recommend it to anyone wanting to visit Boston
Just what we were looking for, thank you!

We spend good time in this apartment. The position is fantastic, one minute walking from the metro, on the line that take you at airport and to the city center. The house is very equipped: air condition, washing and dry machine, full kitchen.  Jef is very kind for check- in and check-out time.

Awesome host, cute little farmhouse that could sleep 10.  Pretty well stocked with all household items. An amazing location that has a very delicious Mexican cafe on the corner.  The food and drinks at Angelas far exceeded my expectations! I 10/10 recommed this airbnb!
Nice place to stay, especially if you like old, Victorian homes. Good location with parking. Good local restaurants. Lovely view of city
A truly wonderful host, great views, helpful tips, easy access to the city. The host gave us great tips and even offered us food.

This apartment was lovely. As other reviewers have said - it is much bigger than we expected and the parking was a big plus. We didn't take the T but it is very close.
The only negative is that we had no hot water on Sunday morning. We let Jurek know and I am sure it will be fixed but the three of us had to take cold showers which was disappointing.

Sweetest little house in JP  is a find. Hilary and Auggie make for the best host and host dog .You'll enjoy  comfortable accommodations and a warm cozy atmosphere. I would recommend Hilary's place to one and all.Loved it.
Clean and comfortable. The provided toiletries are limited and not fantastic, had to buy our own from CVS right opposite, but it is only a minor point. overall highly recommended
Wonderful place! Professional hosts.

Le logement était correct et propre, facile d’accès depuis le centre car à environ 10 min de métro depuis la gare qui est accessible à 10 min à pied du logement. Pour le reste le séjour n’était vraiment pas à la hauteur… quartier peu agréable, logement petit, chambre donnant directement sur la porte d’entrée avec accès direct sur le couloir commun et les bruits des allers-venus. Sans oublier les nuisances sonores !! C’est simple : impossible de dormir ! Entre les décollages et atterrissages des avions toute la nuit (aéroport tellement proche qu’on penserait être sur place), le bruit des résidants du bâtiment toute la nuit également ou encore celui du frigo car il n’y même pas de porte séparant la chambre de la cuisine ! Bref pour le prix excessif de la nuit, le logement  à fuir si vous voulez pouvoir dormir. Je ne recommande absolument pas.
Space is cozy and located well.
Billy is a really nice host. He responds very quickly each time and his house has very modern decoration.
We loved our stay with Ann & Esther! Great spot, close to public transit and the airport. Ann and Esther are wonderful and gracious hosts and we recommend their space to anyone visiting Boston!

Few things we did not know prior. Apartment is in an unsafe area of Dorchester and that the apartment is above a nursery. Spent a lot of money just for myself and my guests to go somewhere else because we felt unsafe there. I’m sure the apartment is lovely, but the only thing I could think about was the safety of the group and to make sure everyone felt comfortable with where they were staying.

We had an excellent stay at Jorge’s place. Located just outside of the hustle and bustle of the heart of Boston, but just a quick transit ride away. We really enjoyed the stay and it was very clean inside. Perfect place to relax for the 2 of us and a nice feature was the back patio area!

The unit was clean and appeared as it did in pictures. However, the location of the building was difficult to find and the building is under renovation and is extremely noisy. The walls are thin and there is no natural light that comes into the apartment. The key pad to enter the building was not working at times. The building itself was not clean, was very dusty but the unit was. Check in is also really late but we were able to drop off our bags early.
I had a wonderful stay! Incredibly convenient for traveling by the T.

Beautiful, clean, quiet apartment. The building has an astounding roofdeck. Varouj also keeps food and basic necessities stocked, which is a nice touch. Varouj met me in person, was very flexible about my schedule, and made sure I was all settled in. Great experience.

L'appartement de Greg est spacieux, très propre et très agréable. La literie est très confortable et les 3 salles de bain + la place de parking sur place sont plus qu'appréciables!
Suite à un souci avec notre voiture de location nous n'avons pu arriver que très tardivement chez Greg, qui a été très arrangeant pour nous accueillir en pleine nuit!
Je recommande ce logement sans hésiter!

買物などの用事を全て歩いて済ませることができ、気軽に入れるカフェや中華街の美味しいお店等が近く、大きな公園と地下鉄の駅が目の前にあって、素晴らしい環境でした。加えてセキュリティ面の心配が無く、清潔感があって、滞在目的に対して充分な満足感を得られましたが、純粋に宿泊経験という観点ではいくつか残念な面もありました。
・浴槽のカランが使えない　ー　バスタブがあることが選定理由のひとつだったので、がっかりしました。問題を報告するとすぐに応答がありましたが、大がかりな工事が必要で、結局滞在中に問題は解決しませんでした
・食洗器が無いのに食器を手洗いする道具が無かった　ー　連絡したらすぐに配達してくれたので助かりました
・壁の防音力が低い　ー　場所柄、外の騒音はやむを得ないと思いますが、とにかく隣の部屋の会話やテレビの内容がわかるくらい良く聞こえました
・エレベーターがよく故障する　ー　これも他のレビューにありましたが、古い建物の古いエレベーターなので、部品が外れてドアが中途半端な位置で止まってしまった時は少し焦りました
これから宿泊される方に情報を提供する目的で書きましたが、ホストとのコミュニケーション自体は丁寧で感じが良く、最初に書いた通り場所と安全と清潔感に満足しましたので、まあまあな滞在経験だったと思っています。

A great studio, clean and big enough for two people and a baby. Miriam and Hasban were great hosts, they greeted us right on time. Kitchen has good appliances, fridge was filled with basics like milk, bagels, cream cheese etc. also some bananas and coffee. You can park in the back with direct entrance to the studio.

I can’t express enough how much I love this home!! The kitchen is perfect for cooking and very well equipped!! The couch was very comfortable!! The T station was so close we barely needed the car which was great!! I will be back in the summer to book again!!  Love this house so much! If u ever want to sell it I’ll be happy to take it off your hands 😂 😂💕💕💕💕
Great host and home for our short weekend

Such a great location, in the heart of Boston!   Spacious, plenty of room for a family of 4 or 5.  Clean. Excellent prompt communication with the owner.   My family will definitely stay here again next time we’re in Boston.
Great place, really well kept, and super awesome spot. Close to everything!

We were on a flying visit to Boston for a few days, our first visit...what a great city. It was all made very special by our stay at Meri's lovely apartment. It is in a very nice, friendly neighbourhood and a perfect location to take a cab from or walk into the city. The apartment is beautifully appointed - the best shower, quality bed linen and towels. Meri was very helpfull and responsive to any questions we had. As recommended, we had a super brunch in The Paramount and the best seafood in The Legal Harbourside...so good we went there twice!!  Bostonians are the friendliest people we've experienced in all our travels. So this was a trip we'll remember and hope to repeat sometime soon. Thanks Meri
Great location, attractive and cozy apartment, with responsive and thoughtful hosts. We loved it!

This was my first time in Boston, and it was a great time. The unit we had was ok, it was as described and free of clutter- at least on the inside. When we arrived for check in, our unit was a basement apartment- same floor as trash room, which was immediately across from the elevator/stairs. There was trash ALL OVER the hallway. We had to pick up our luggage to go around. By the morning, the trash had increased and we had to step on it to get out and to our room. However, the hosts were responsive and got building management involved to clean. The floor still had food residue, so then they got them to come back and vacuum. I got $100 refund for the inconvenience.
