Pros: safe area, quiet building, enough space for 2. Very responsive and friendly sellers. Basement unit means it’s dark, so I got good sleep.
Cons: building management seems sub-par. Beware if you receive this unit, you will go by the trash room.
Overall, 4/5 stars for the stay. Pricy, but less so than hotels in the area

Impecable and nicely furnished, this place has everything you need for a good budget stay in Boston. Kim and John were great hosts, quick to answer all our messages. Location can seem a bit challenging, but relax, all is good. The neighbourhood is quiet, diverse and safe, and the residents are friendly. It's a short walk to Jackson Square station, we used Highland Street to get there, rather than walking around Marcella Playground, as the residents sometimes park on the sidewalk. The playground has baseball, tennis and basketball courts, lit at night.  Il Panino Cafe and Grill impressed Chris with their calzone pizza, if you need a quick bite in the neighbourhood. It was a perfect short stay in Boston for us!
Adam was very responsive to our questions and requests.  Our family (parents and young adults) loved the apartment, the building and the location. We would love to go back again some time.

Perfect location. Beautiful tree lined street, walking distance to many attractions, and close to the subway. The place was clean and spacious for two of us, and felt luxurious with its high ceilings and chandelier. Street traffic can be a little loud at night but we got used to it after a couple days. Bring earplugs if you're sensitive to noise. Comfy bed. We didn't cook meals, but there's a full kitchen if you want to.
It is a great unit and centrally located. If you are traveling with a pet there is a dog park nearby.

UN DEPARTAMENTO, MUY LIMPIO BONITO, Y LA ANFITRIONA MUY AMIGABLE
TODO EN SU LUGAR, PERFECTO!

Good location, very close to the Readville stop on the commuter rail, also access to the Orange line via the route 32 bus.  The place was overall quiet and comfortable. I would definitely stay here again if I need to be in the Boston area. Jonathan is very responsive before and during your stay, and he worked with us to check-out at an unusual time of day (early on a Saturday morning).  Housekeeping service was available once per week, and if you are staying for several weeks, make sure to let Jonathan know if you want the service each week.
Very glad my friends and I stayed here while in Boston, close to the t, clean apartment and safe street to walk on along with easy parking. Definitely stay there again in the future!

We loved the couple of days we spent at this place while visiting Boston. It was centrally located to all the main sites and several subway lines, clean and super smooth check-in/check out process. Would definitely stay again.
A wonderful place to stay
Elisangela is a great host. She goes out of her way to accommodate her guests. I definitely recommend this place to anyone with a big group that is thinking about visiting this area.

This place is perfect for a stopover when arriving/leaving Boston airport, or if you want to stay and see Boston. The room is cosy and the space is great. 10 mins from airport in Uber and easy few minute walk to blue line metro.
Beautiful Airbnb! The hosts were so helpful and kind!
Very convenient to HBS and Trader Joe's.  Todd was very responsive to several issues that developed because of another guest's behavior.
Great stay thanks!

Our family of five had a wonderful stay!  Killian is an exceptional host with excellent communication, recommendations and was very accommodating and responsive.  The location is excellent and walkable to great restaurants, lots of playgrounds, coffee shops and everything else our family wanted.  We will absolutely stay here again and would highly recommend!

Un apartamento antiguo modernizado con
Muchos detalles , sobre todo le iluminación equipada la cocina yagradable El
Vecindario

We loved our stay in the South End. The space was clean, quiet (at least as quiet as can be expected for a front street location) and attractive. The location was great - steps to groceries, restaurants and a few blocks to a Bluebike kiosk. The four floor walk up with suitcases made for a bit of a tough arrival with suitcases. If your knees are bad or your suitcase heavy, you might want to look at a lower floor unit.

Lage, Sauberkeit und Vermieterkontakt war sehr gut.
Die Wohnung hat jedoch eine Verbindungstür zur Nachbarwohnung die leider in der Beschreibung der Wohnung nicht erwähnt wird. Dadurch ist die Wohnung sehr hellhörig.
Besonders wenn in der Wohnung über Telefonlautsprecher (Mikrofon) telefoniert wird. Während meines Aufenthalts ist das leider sehr oft passiert, auch in der Nacht.
The place was exactly what we needed it to be. Affordable spot close to the airport and an easy Uber ride downtown. Would definitely recommend this to anyone spending a weekend in Boston.
Great stay. The location was perfect, the room was clean and the staff was very friendly.

We really expected to love our stay here and it started out great. Spacious apartment, good style, excellent location. However, two nights into the stay we saw a mouse run from the kitchen to the living room and back again a few times. We discovered a mouse trap under the sink to realized it was a known issue. I reported it to the Thatch team and was shocked to come back the next day to a new mouse trap directly inside the front door.  I had not been notified that anyone would be entering the apartment and was startled to see the mouse trap. Thankfully I didn't need to dispose of a trapped mouse on that sticky trap.  I realize mice can be a problem in old buildings like this, but I wouldn't take a chance staying here in the future.

Elena's home is a lovely renovated Victorian in the heart of Jamaica Plain. The apartment is tastefully decorated and within easy walking distance of the stores and restaurants of JP. It was very comfortable and Elena was a great host who lives in the building and is very responsive. We highly recommend her home!

This was a very welcoming place to stay.  I highly suggest booking here.  The spot is very close to the Orange T-Line, and offers a nice getaway from the fast-pacedness of the city as it is on a street with a small wooded lot across the way.  Th pet kitties are as nice as can be and Susan was very kind and engaging.

Although it was a little smaller than we thought itd be, the location was great and it was very clean. Could of used a fan or a window unit in the bedroom, but other than that it was a great stay. Would recommend.
The location, apartment, and host were awesome. Quick response and clear on responses
This apartment was perfect for my week-long stay for attending academic conferences. Easy access to downtown, very clean and welcoming apartment, lots of space. Thank you!
Our host was fantastic! We had a great stay and would love to come back.
Great spot for the price and if you are an explorer. In a great location to explore the city.

The apartment has a perfect location at back bay; close to BU; quiet and safe neighborhood; very clean. A small market right across the road; Whole Foods at 15 mins walk. Perfect for all cooking supplies.
The facilities in the apartment are more sufficient than we imagined. Washing machine and dryer are helpful. In the kitchen the facilities are even more wonderful. It fulfills all our need.
The only fault is that there is no window in the apartment. It may affect a little. However, we solve this by opening the door for ventilation a few times a day. Considering the safe and quiet nature of the neighborhood, this is totally feasible and acceptable for us.
In general, we do very recommend this apartment. It is a perfect choice for a family of three.

I thoroughly enjoyed my stay at Joshua's. It was very convenient from South Station. The house was interesting old Boston. My bedroom was very comfortable. The neighborhood was very friendly and accessible. I found a nice local bar with good food and drink within blocks walking.

We really enjoyed our stay at Shelby’s place. The house is beautiful and warm and full of useful and modern appliances... especially, the dryer played a cute tune when it finished :) the house was even better in person than in the pictures! We came for a meeting near the convention center, and it’s about 25 min walk, so the location was perfect for us. The neighborhood is quiet and safe and close to pretty good restaurants. Everything in the house was good quality and it felt like it was built for a family to live there, not a temporary place with mismatched stuff. The cleaning crew did a good job with the cleaning! We have stayed at some Airbnb and this was the best house so far.
Thanks again your recommendations and apartment were amazing!

I would stay there again
It would be helpful if the couch was a pullout just in case the sleeping arrangements didn’t workout perfectly but we made it work. Great place. Close enough to public transportation or Uber or Lyft worked too. She answered any questions I had and accommodated us and I appreciated it immensely. Thank you for making this family trip a great one!
Amazing place.  It is in the best area.  So much around that’s walkable.  Great path to run.  Very clean.  We would stay here again.
Great location! Great patio area. There was a small coffee pot with limited coffee so bring some or take the small walk to target.

Fantastic experience staying here. Central location with secure access throughout. The communications and recommendations from the host before and during our stay were accurate and thorough, which made our stay smooth and enjoyable. Excellent value for the price!
We had a great stay at Bill and Maureen’s place. Good location near the beach and walking distance into the sights of Boston!
This apartment was the perfect combination of price and location.
Great space, friendly dog, excellent location

First I'd like to say that Norah responds very quickly to messages and she is a pleasure to communicate with. The space is exactly as it is described, which is a small studio in a great location. If you're looking for a great area to stay in you won't be disappointed here. The space is very clean and if you're staying for more than a few days you'll appreciate having a washer and dryer. I would definitely recommend Norah's place.
Ken is a great host!  And gave us our privacy, although it was a room in his home. Roslindale is a lovely neighborhood and Ken’s place is easy to walk to restaurants and public transport
The place is very clean and in a great location with a fair price. Hosts are super responsive. Highly recommend.
As all other reviews have stated, this is easily one of the nicest places you will ever stay. Wonderful hospitality, beautiful apartment in a great location!
Awesome spot. Incredible location in an old brownstone. Very helpful hosts.
This was a good price for Boston’s back bay
Great stay in Boston, close to everything. Fredrick was awesome at communicating, I would definitely recommend!
Jacquelyn’s place was so beautiful & wonderfully located! We loved it!

We stayed here for a few days for some medical visits at Boston Children's and the location was perfect - a 10 minute walk to the hospital (and only 10 minutes to Fenway Park if you're there for baseball). The apartment was cozy and very clean, but best of all it had everything we needed. The kitchen is well stocked and we wanted for nothing while making all of our meals. The beds (even the pull out couch) were comfortable and the building was about as quiet as an apartment building gets. The neighborhood was very convenient in terms of stores, groceries and restaurants. Really an overall seamless experience from check in to check out. Only two tips would be to figure out parking in advance if you're driving (all the spots nearby are either resident permit only or fairly expensive overnight rates), and prepare for the 3 story walkup with all your stuff. Would book again!

I almost don't want to leave a great review just so I can be sure Jovan and Sena have room for us the next time we're in town! =)
This will certainly always be one of the first places we will look to book in Boston. The space is so well appointed: modern, but very cozy. We traveled with a very small baby, and they even had little things that accommodated her needs.
The location is a little further out from the main Boston activity, but we actually enjoy the quiet neighborhood evenings.
Excellent space and very thoughtful and attentive hosting! We couldn't be happier with our experience.
The location is perfect for exploring Boston and Beacon Hill is so charming. The unit was bright, very clean, modern and comfortable. I highly recommend it. Thank you for a great stay!

Healing Homes offers a lot and especially the location. Good unit size and clean. Overall is just a great place to stay. Our visit at the time of the elevator repair and my stay is on the fifth floor. We believe it’s because of this inconvenience that we got a discount for our stay. But it’d be better if we knew this before booking. The place is great but there’re some minor update needed, window sills are mostly in bad shape and some blinds are not working, exposed electrical outlets, but the most concerning for us was the noise from all the pipes. Water supply, sewer pipes, showers were all much more present during the nights. Unfortunately it just doesn’t end. To my wife, daughter, and I the sound of water/waste flowing thru pipes were the cause for us not able to sleep. We woke up at least 3 times each night because of the noise. I understand it’s the city and the building has its history. Perhaps someone else doesn’t mind the noise would enjoy the place more than we do.

Phil and Kelly were great hosts - the space was comfortable, check in and communication were easy, and I enjoyed the stay. Would definitely recommend and is perfect for people looking for a great space in a JP.
Perfect for a quick one night stay! Would recommend for folks wanting a better priced option still close to Boston and in a great neighborhood.
Great communication and the place was exactly what we needed for our trip!

We had a great stay here! The apartment is lovely and spacious with everything you need for the stay. Paige is very responsive and very proactive with reaching out to give all of the information you will need. The area is amazing being right off of Newbury Street and by the Prudential Center.
Thank you! So easy and nice.

Such a great location for an airport transfer. We loved that we could walk/shuttle from the airport. We enjoyed the recommendations of the hostess for places to eat within walking distance. Loved chatting with her as well.  Awesome airbnb experience!
He was very warm and friendly.
I had a great stay. The place was super clean and thoughtfully arranged in every detail. I would definitely stay here again.
Easily located to Andrews Station making exploring easy without a car. Close to the airport. Cute local coffee shop within walking.
The place is beautiful, clean and styled with great taste! The kitchen is stocked with goodies, everything was perfect!

We loved our 2 nights at Daryl’s apartment. Believe it or not, the place exceeds what you see in the pictures. So spacious, clean, comfortable. We would absolutely stay again. Thanks for a great and affordable home run!
Great stay!
Great location, great place! Would love to stay here again if I drop by Boston!
Great small studio in excellent location! Just enough space for 2 of us, and the back patio was a nice touch. Walkable to everything.
I stay at this property on a regular basis for business trips. It’s always quiet, clean, with organized checkin, and is in the best location!
Super appartement pour visiter Boston !
Very convenient location for us. Had multiple stairs. Convenient car garage.
Simple clean room in a safe neighborhood. Laundry area was important to us . 10-15 minute walk to metro train or walk along the river . Thanks Kevin 😊

This was our first time in Boston and Pauline’s apartment was perfect for my son and I. The apartment has everything we needed and was very clean. It is located walking distance from many sightseeing sights and good restaurants. Pauline was also a great host and responded right away to our messages. We really enjoyed our stay here and next time we are in Boston we will definitely stay at Pauline’s apartment again.
perfectly safe and easy! It is SO CLOSE to the airport and was the perfect place to stay the night before an early flight.

In general it's a good choice if you're traveling alone and want a good spot close to all the great places. It does the work it felt safe.
Only thing is it didn't feel very clean.
Like the linen and stuff in the room is fine !
but.
The shared bathroom were not cleaned daily. Found a lot of hair around the walls.
The wall paper are kind of pealing in the room.
The AC is very loud. I did have my earplug so that was fine, but it's more a room to go straight to bed.
I did have to clean the filter of the AC in order for it to work tho cause it was filled with dust.
Good point.
Location is very nice !!
Communication with the host was efficient and they were very nice.
We found the neighborhood and the building to be beautiful. we would definitely stay again. Clean, smaller but perfect room.
Great space! Only struggle for us was parking our rental car. There is a lot close by but no on street parking. This isn't mentioned in the AirBnB ad but would be nice to have called out. Thank you!!

Kit and Scott are incredibly kind and thoughtful, and staying with them added so much to our visit. They made us feel right at home, and went the extra mile to do so. The house itself is amazing, and the effort they put in as hosts, from the chocolates on the pillows go the breakfast in the morning, makes being there feel that much more special. We would definitely recommend them and would certainly stay again!
Very nice place to stay and nice place to be overall
Cozy home. Wish we utilized the backyard. It was super cute
Toys and baby gear included is totally awesome for toddlers and older. Stylish decor, and plenty of space.
Helen was a wonderful host that goes above an beyond. Absolutely recommended!
We had a fantastic stay. Everything was clean and host was accommodating!
Gladys was a great host and the house was just as subscribed very clean

We had a wonderful stay at this apartment! It is very spacious and has a lovely ambiance. The bedrooms were all very comfortable and the kitchen and bathroom had all the amenities we needed and more! A lot of thought has been put in to making this a very welcoming visit. The location was perfect for us as restaurants nearby and subway to everywhere else within easy reach. Highly recommend!

This was our second stay at Giannoula's place. We loved it so much the first time, we had to come back! It is in a great location, is a beautiful space, and is conveniently located on the ground floor. Tim, the co-host, is super responsive and friendly.
Overall, a really nice place for what we wanted. Was in Boston for Head of the Charles and was the best price we could find!
Great place to stay. Pretty quiet neighborhood. Close to the airport and downtown Boston.
Super clean, lovely location, awesome host.  Great neighborhood and Boston vibes :)
Drew told us exactly what to expect. He was available when we needed him and gave us fun recommendations for things to to in the area.  He was a pleasant host and we enjoyed staying with him!

We stayed here when I ran in the Boston Marathon. It was a great location, not just for that but for restaurants, public transportation, and night life (which I didn't get to participate in).
It's exactly as portrayed in the photos. Great kitchen and living area. Excellent mattress, which I really appreciated and cool neighborhood. I would definitely stay here again.
A great place to stay for a short or long trip. Wonderful, innovative apartment community
Great location close to subways and the park. Made it a great central location for our weekend.

We spent 4 nights at Rob’s home and it’s been one of the best experiences with Airbnb I’ve had. Rob was extremely helpful, responsive and proactive after I told him one of his fans wasn’t working. He sent a working fan over along with some treats within the hour. Thank you Rob for making my family feel right at home.
Philipp was very helpful and the place was exactly what we needed. Very clean
Perfect place for a quick stay in Boston!

Good location - as advertised
Bathroom had hair on the floor and the towels were dirty.

Very cute neighborhood.  If you like to walk this is a great place to stay.  Really cute touches.  Love all the IKEA a Trader  joe touches.  She left us a lot of goodies which made ya smile.  There’s a coffee shop right down the block. My only complaint is that the bed was not comfortable.  I like a soft bed.  Hubby had no issues. Thank you for making us feel comfortable.
Maverick was a great host, very easy to get in and check in. The location was great right downtown and walkable to everything! Highly recommend!
Great location in south end.
Clean and comfortable. Very peaceful and private

The bed was clean and comfortable. The shower was amazing! Beware anyone that has balance issues, the claw foot tub is quite the step in and out.
Lihua was so helpful with our ridiculously large and cumbersome bags
Place was not cleaned once we arrived after a long drive. Disappointed overall, Jay did send new sheets and towels and reduced pay to try and make it fair.

Sweet, very comfortable, and well decorated place. Super well stocked and equipped with every thing you could possibly want and need, even makeup removing wipes—I am amazed! The complimentary chocolates are very delicious. Olivia is very hospitable. My boyfriend and I thoroughly enjoyed our stay. We highly recommend!
Great spot, right off Back Bay, easy street parking. Glad we stayed. Doesn’t have AC (that’s noted in the description), so be mindful of that.
Spotless vintage spot in excellent location for walking everywhere
Répondait rapidement aux messages
No review.
This was a very clean, convenient stay in my favorite area of Boston. Communication was super friendly and clear, and it was great to have adequate privacy. Would definitely recommend!

2nd time staying at Chris & Kelly's - everything was literally perfect. The apartment is beautiful and spacious, great location (right next to the park!), they were so kind and generous with leaving some fridge items and helping immediately via phone when we needed help with the tv. A+!
The location was great.  The room reminded me of a dorm room, I just needed a bed for 2 nights.  Close t transit.  Thank you.

Jim and his girlfriend are great hosts. The apartment is centrally located, close to everything. Jim responded to messages quickly and was very accommodating. Would stay again and recommend to others.

Warm hospitality & conscientious attention to your needs. This is a charming, bohemian space in a neighbourhood with a few gems of its own and easy access to downtown Boston via the T, with Forest Hills station only a 5 minute walk away.
House was great we loved our stay.
This place is absolutely stunning and the hosts were amazing. The stay was one of the best I’ve had through air b n b.  Looks just like the photos. We can’t wait to stay here again!

This was a great place to stay! It was close to public transit and there were several food options, including a grocery store nearby. The room was great, although the floor was super uneven so all the items were slanted downwards precariously. Even so, the space was great for my needs and was generally quiet.

Esther is a great hostess! She is so kind and such a pleasure to talk to. The room was comfortable and we felt the whole house was cozy. The common spaces were impecably clean everyday. Sheets and towels were changed during our 1 week stay, which was a detail we really appreciated. The kitchen is well equipped and great if you are planning to cook as we did! I absolutely recommend Esther's room, I wish we could have stayed longer. As for the surrounding area, we had no complaints and felt safe at all times. The location is not central but there are good transport connections (including 10min walk or few min bus trip to Mattapan trolley going to red subway line, and 10min bus trip to orange subway line), which suited us well!
Great little homebase while in Boston for a weekend of fun!  Not too far from all that we had on our agenda, clean and comfortable too!
Loic  was great to communicate with  and his place was great, and we would highly recommend it.  Super super host
Nice studio in a great location! Communication with host was excellent

Lihua’s B&B is very centrally located, close to Boston U, Fenway Park and many more activities. We were in town for my daughter to visit the campuses of Northeastern and Boston universities, literally 20 and 5 minutes walk from the premises, respectively. Lihua is a very attentive host, met us at the door on the first night and explained personally the details of our stay, logistics etc. Our room was gorgeous, bed really comfy, all the basics provided in the room. Breakfast is served on the first floor with good options : a variety of bagels, muffins, bread, yogurt etc, definitely satisfactory…
All in all, I’d strongly recommend this B&B to anyone visiting Boston, it’s a great value, great location, with a nice touch from Lihua in many details
Great place right in the heart of Boston, very comfortable and well kept.

Yisheng was a fabulous host!  She was fun, a great communicator, interesting, and we enjoyed her buddy Olly!  The house was in a great location and I loved having my car parked in a garage for our stay. Ubers were quick to deliver us to all our tourist destinations!  The drive into the garage was a little tricky, but not really a problem. Our room was spacious and had tons of amenities.  The beds were comfy and the bathroom was wonderful!  I loved the fluffy soft towels!  The stairs were a bit challenging after eating too many vacation goodies, but again not a problem. We were able to do laundry, which was a huge benefit.  We had a lot going on, so we're not able to take advantage of the rooftop space but the little time I spent up there was incredible.  We would definitely stay again and very much recommend this Airbnb.
Very clean and well kept, high quality place

Lu’s apartment is perfect. My husband, daughter and I comfortably fit in the apartment. Perfect location, impeccable, it’s got all you need. Walking distance from everything and metro station (downtown crossing)  literally next to the apartment. Lu was kind enough to to leave a welcome card, fresh flowers, and snacks. We would definitely come back.
Very nice accommodations, close to rail station.  We loved McKenna’s Cafe.

Maria made us feel welcome from the start and throughout our stay.  She was gracious and warm and the perfect combination of available and helpful and respectful of our privacy and independence.  Communication was clear and easy.  The Haven is exactly as described.  Bedroom, living area, kitchen, bath, deck - all there.  The house and apartment are charming.  The neighborhood is fun to walk around in and feels quite safe.  As described, the Haven is close to the T and to neighborhood stores and restaurants.  We loved our stay and can't imagine a more perfect setting.
Great! Would recommend for work travel.

My husband and I and our two children spent spent the month of September in this spacious 1 bedroom apartment. The apartment was very comfortable, quiet, and in a perfect location. We did have our car with and found parking near the water to be the easiest non-resident parking. We also took the buses quite often -- they are very easy to use and convenient to downtown. Kids ride the buses for free (I believe under age 11) and adults are $2 -- so it was very economical and we were able to avoid paying parking garage fees downtown. I would definitely recommend this apartment and location to anyone visiting the Boston area.
Nice spot! Close to the subway system.
Great location and price. It is great for a solo trip when you are on a budget like I was when I stayed.

My colleague and I stayed at Albena’s flat on a work trip to Boston. It is stylish and clean in a charming neighborhood near the water. Not far from downtown. Parking is terrible and from what I understand from locals we didn’t need a car to get downtown as it’s only a couple of stops away by train! I highly recommend staying here on your next trip to Boston.
Clean and central location. Easy to get to Fenway and the MFA.

A great gem and wonderful host!
I had a quick stay, but it was literally everything we needed in a place to stay with welcoming hosts and a clean location! The location was walkable in a peaceful part of the city accessible to everything! Definitely will stay again!!
Small place for 170 dollars
This was my first experience using Airbnb and Hermina made it simple.  She was also very helpful and extremely kind. She even allowed me to use her washer/dryer.  Thanks Hermina!!

Cole and Stacy were excellent hosts. They were very helpful and responsive, which I really appreciate. The extremely clean and comfortable apartment looks even better in person than it does in the pictures and the location is absolutely perfect. It's located in the heart of South End with great cafes and restaurants within a very short walking distance. It was close to everything, which really enhanced our stay. I would book again without hesitation!
Very clean place

This place is a gem.  Awesome location—right next to Fenway and all the action, but one block away which means it actually quiet.  Lihua was super nice and easy to work with.  Thanks for a pleasant stay!
Very spacious place and the parking spot was a big deal for us. Easy walk to the train. Host was great.

We stayed on the 3rd floor; was very clean and the hosts were very hospitable.  Definitely a plus that it was close to the T station.   I'm a light sleeper, so some of the street noise from loud vehicles and stereos was a bit disruptive but when the air conditioners were running that wasn't as much of a problem.

Logement correspondant à la description.
Très agréable et très facile d’accéder à la ville

Sandra was a wonderful host. She communicated promptly and gave us helpful suggestions when we needed them. The location was close by everything and was easy to find. It is street parking, but we had no issues finding a spot close to the apartment and the neighborhood was vibrant and safe. We’d definitely stay there again when we come back to Boston.
Clean and convenient and stylish but what stood out most was the exceptional service. Thank you Boris and Susan. I will be returning...and thanks for the candy.
Affordable room in a peaceful,  safe and walkable neighborhood. The host, Lucky, was responsive when I had questions and needed help.
Really helpful and understanding hosts. I would highly recommend booking this place, as it has accessible grocery stores and other places nearby and good commute as well.

Suzie was very welcoming and made herself available to us. We arrived earlier than planned and she was great about letting us go in early and drop off our bags. This place is great for young adults and very fit people. It is in a great neighborhood.

This place is in a great area and within walking distance to great Italian restaurants and the parts of the Freedom Trail.  Richards place was clean and had great amenities, he was also a spectacular host.  I would definitely recommend it.
clean and comfy, perfect to crash between flights! the airbnb is walkable to the nearby T where you can catch a $2 train + shuttle to the airport, so it's really great for early morning flights!

This Airbnb has a great location. It’s super close to the T, public transportation, along the orange line so you can get in and out of the city. Also it’s on a busy street so you can get Ubers fairly quickly. It has lots of space and is very clean.  We were able to accommodate four adults at one time easily. The beds are very comfortable and it has a full kitchen with a full fridge. Also there’s laundry in the basement. We stayed in February and we’re grateful for how warm it was. The heating turned on quickly when we turned up the thermostat. Zurek was very accommodating and responded quickly when we messaged him for help or restaurant suggestions. If you have trouble with steps this might not be the place for you. There are steps to get into the airbnb and steps in the airbnb to get around. It’s everything that is promised in the listing.

We really enjoyed our stay at Delightful, our room was clean organized and easy to find. I like their attention to detail and pineapple brand. They made it look fun and inviting. Downstairs they have a great restaurant and chill spot.

A great spot to land near the airport. Very clean and charming. Everyone was quiet and respectful. Didn’t even know anyone else was there until we bumped in to couple of folks on the way out. Everyone very friendly.
We were a family of six visiting the Boston area for the first time the Fourth of July.  We were able to get around using public transportation.  We had a great stay.

The Urban Guest Suite is the perfect accomondation if you are planing to stay in Boston for a couple of days. It's perfectly located in a quiet neighborhood and close to the "T". The parking lot is a big bonus.
We would definitely recommend to stay here!

Jef's place was great! Amazingly close to the blue line - AND the airport, which made our last day a breeze. Perfect size and good amenities (including an awesome speaker set), super comfy bed, and a bonus private rooftop patio we weren't expecting! Would definitely recommend a stay at Jef's.
Norah's apartment is a perfect base to explore Boston. It is close to major sites and is well-decorated and comfortable. Overall, we had a lovely stay and highly recommend Norah's apartment!
Very clean place. Lots of complementary items provided (coffee, soap, plates, silverware, etc.). I would highly recommended staying here.
This place was great for one, the location is amazing.
Great location, older building but decent clean room. Some of appliances didn’t work, but maintenance fixed them the next day after calling

Andrew is an amazing host.  He is attentive and full of helpful hints.  His place is immaculate! It is also very conveniently located in a quiet neighborhood.  The Green Line is steps away. This line will take you downtown in no time.  A Whole Foods and a wonderful breakfast place are both just steps away.  You can walk to the Charles River by Boston University in under ten minutes. We thoroughly enjoyed our three-night stay at Andrew's beautiful brownstone; I cannot recommend his place highly enough.  In addition, he is a season ticket holder for Red Sox games!  If you are coming to Boston and want to catch a baseball game, he is a wonderful resource.
Niceeee!!!
Nice spot that mirrors the photos in the listing. Responsive host. Recommend if you’re ever in the Boston area

Quiet and gorgeous location in Charlestown historic district. Had gorgeous days to ride the ferry from Navy Yard into downtown Boston for sightseeing. Also walkable distance to the science museum, so worked really great for us and the kids. If it is your first time in Boston you might enjoy a more central location as it’s not as easy to pop in and out during the day if you are sightseeing, but perfectly connected via the Orange line, if you don’t mind a short walk. Katherine was great and we had tons of privacy in the apartment and felt at home. Internet was a little wonky when it came to speed, but I didn’t come to Boston to be online.
We had a great stay the only issue was washer not working but the host dropped off extra towels right away. We love the place very walkable to everything.
Beautiful place! Lots of rooms. Great location. And the owners reached out several times to check on our stay. Lovely people and place. Would recommend and stay there again.
Todd was very accommodating and friendly. The listing was superb, great bedroom and I particularly admire the bathroom, brightly lit and very clean. Would definitely stay here again when I'm in town.

Great location and within walking distance of so many things that you would want to do.  Clean and attractively decorated apartment.  Exactly like the pictures!  Parking spot was a life saver.  Parked and walked the rest of the weekend!

The place was clean, centrally located, and designed nicely. We really appreciated having access to a fridge while we were in Boston. The team had really great communication and proactive updates about parking as our booking neared. We would definitely stay here again :)

The location and price were the leading reasons I chose this apartment to stay in. We loved being able to walk to so many places in and around downtown Boston. We were aware that the elevator may not work for our whole stay, so we used the stairs for many of the times we left our apartment. We were blessed to have a functioning elevator for all the times we needed it.
The apartment has the bare minimum supplies needed for a longer stay. We made do with local market supplies. There is both a coin operated washer and dryer available. The apartment is older (baseboard heaters are in rough shape), and the furniture meets your needs, but is not necessarily comfortable.
The GREAT parts…! There are many bars, restaurants and historic sites within walking distance. We loved the rooftop, and the apartment was spacious. The views were awesome, and we loved having a lot of pillows. We would HIGHLY recommend staying here. Great space in downtown Boston!
Robin was a great host! The room was as expected. The garden was beautiful!
Good place. I recommend it

Steven’s place was in a great location. The room we stayed in was on the 4th floor which I didn’t realize until I got there with all of my luggage and no elevator. The space was quaint and had most items as described. It was pretty warm/stuffy in the room and there was not a fan or AC unit this time of year. The light in the bedroom did not turn on and there were only one set of towels (2 people staying) with no hangers in the closet either. Overall, enjoyed the location but for the price, it felt a little underwhelming.

If you want a place which is right next to Northeastern University and also close to Berklee College of Music this is he place. Immaculately clean and comfortably accommodate 3 guests (1 in living on sofa bed). Full kitchen and bathroom amenities, cable TV, fast WiFi internet.  Air conditioner came in really useful as In the hottest days in Boston. Response to queries were fast and even gave tips on using Amazon locker to ship things. Could not find any fault. Definitely would stay there again on future visits.
We all had a great time, and the place was lovely! We we would all absolutely stay again in the future.

Sienna's home is a wonderful place to stay, I've booked several times and never disappointed.   Accurately described and very clean,  close to the T - green or orange lines, making it easy to commute to Boston city center.   Neighborhood has good restaurants and nice to walk around.

What a great, hidden gem! The place itself was very nice and then there was the benefit of so many things close by, from Boston Commons to Chinatown to TD Garden and all of the historic sites--every time we walked, it seemed, we were on the Freedom Trail! And to be able to come back and relax with a nice kitchen, good seating, and a TV that included Youtube TV was fantastic!
Small but very clean and good located place.
Loved My stay, very cosy perfect area plenty of restaurants to choose from right at the doorstep.

We enjoyed our stay in Boston thanks to Hermina's friendly and helpful hospitality, as well as the convenient location. The nearby T train transit station made it very easy to get where we were going, all the major spots most visitors would want to see. Recommended!
Wonderful location! Very nice setting to kick back and have access to to every need from food to travel and landmarks.
Beautiful space, great for 2 people. A little far from downtown Boston, but not too difficult to get into the city. Worth the price and a great stay.
great stay!

A lovely place to stay while my friend and I explored Boston for the first time. The bed was comfortable and a great place to rest after our adventures. Easy access to public transit made it easy to get around, and the surrounding neighborhood was beautiful and well-set for a nice walk.

Very nice place, great view, very good neighborhood. Both the private room and the shared ones were very clean and nicely decorated. Great convenience the possibility of dropping off luggage before check-in time.
Nice place close to campus

Yisheng was incredible from when we arrived. We all took Ollie (Yisheng’s dog) for a walk so we could get to know our surroundings.
Ollie became my instant best friend.
Yisheng is lovely. Helping us with directions, train tips, luggage down the stairs today. We all took Ollie for a walk to the Harbour this morning as hadn’t been there yet.
Was a really special stay & one I won’t forget.
Beds comfy, room was great size, roof deck was wonderful addition, bathroom beautiful.
Bien situado, limpio y cama comoda. Hay q subir 3 pisos andando, la nevera hacia mucho ruido y no funcionaba la tv

Super cute place! The only issue I had was it’s decorated so beautifully I was on my small kids like white on rice w all the decor! About a 20 minute drive to Boston which isn’t bad. The host was very kind. Would 10/10 recommend!
Great host.  Located well for access to highways, universities, major hospitals, Beacon Hill and the Boston Commons.

Notre séjour de deux nuitées s’est très bien déroulé. J Lucky était sur place à notre arrivée et prêt à répondre à tout questionnement de façon conviviale et efficace. La quiétude des lieux est aussi à souligner.
Very good place to stay

I loved the location. It is an older hotel so if you go into it with that expectation then you’ll be fine. The doorman is phenomenal. My only issue was that the water was warm. I wanted a nice hot shower but didn’t get that. I assumed it was the age of the hotel. Overall a nice location to most things so I’d stay again.

Great location, very kind hosts. Close to the train station. Just be aware if you are tall that you need to lean down a lot to not hit your head....but I'm also not from the East Coast so others are probably more used to the slanted ceilings...lol....All in all, good place to stay for Pax East.

This is such an amazing place. We arrived very late but the instructions to get in were great and there was stuff in the fridge to keep us going until the morning. Maude had left detailed instructions and tips to work the lights etc.  We felt really comfortable and probably the most relaxed on our US trip. It is also a very walkable and safe area. Don't hesitate to stay here!
Was a great place to stay while visiting Boston. Really good location, and everything was as described. Our compact SUV fit in the parking space just fine.
Nice clean place. About a 5 minute walk to the T. You can take the orange line right into the city. Everything was exactly what Alex had said.

It is difficult to write a bad review but for the next guests it is important.  It started at the arrival.  The door had to have someone pretty much body slam it to get it to open as it was so stuck.  The stairs down to the lower level were very small steps so anyone with large feet would have a problem.  The bathroom was dirty, the towel rack was hanging by one very loose screw, no soap in dispenser, electrical outlet didn’t have a cover and could easily shock a person, furniture was for a very small person, kitchen was not stocked with anything - not even salt/pepper or sugar, gate for parking was very difficult to open.  It will be a nice place for small statured people when these issues are resolved.

Great location and value. Check-in being at 5pm was a little difficult to work around. The standard check-in time seems to be 2-3pm so that would’ve been nice to have without an extra cost. Otherwise, the apartment was great and I would definitely stay here again. Note: the elevator is still broken in the building.
Place and the Host were fantastic. Definitely would stay there again.

Recommended!! Very nice and cozy place to stay, feel like home and very friendly host.

Our group of 13 stayed at Alexander’s place in South Boston for three nights and thoroughly enjoyed our stay. The house was spacious, clean and easily accommodated 13 girls for sleeping/eating/getting ready. The area was close to transport links and grocery stores and as a group of girls we felt comfortable walking to and from these. We would highly recommend Alexander’s place to anyone planning a trip to Boston soon!
Very clean and comfortable.  Good location.
Great location if you plan to walk most of the time. Only complaint is that is was a little loud at night but other than that, we enjoyed our stay.
Good apartment at a convenient location. The area is walkable and close to the red line metro station.

The apartment is in a wonderful  location.  It's a short walk to the train station, Boston Common, and many of the freedom trail stops. Check in was simple and the apartment was clean. I recommend this place to anyone looking for a great spot from which to tour downtown Boston, especially if you value walkability.

Christian’s flat was spotless, quiet and quite spacious. The master bedroom did get hot from the radiators but we cracked the window and then it was just right. The bedrooms are on opposite sides of the flat so our teenager felt like she had some privacy, which she appreciated

Perfect Downtown Pad
This apartment was an absolute gem! Perfectly located in the heart of Boston, we were just steps away from all the action. The space itself was spotless and incredibly comfortable. The apartment had everything we needed for a relaxing stay. We loved being able to explore the city on foot and come back to a quiet room. The hosts were also fantastic, providing clear instructions and quick responses. Highly recommend!
Would definitely stay here again!
It was exactly how we expected it

Great place.  Perfect Beacon Hill location.  Easy walk to Back Bay, Financial District, West End and North End.  Jason was very very responsive to one question we had - responded immediately to a text.  Highly recommend and we will be back.  Thanks Jason.

This was perfect for our family of 4 (including 2 teenagers that need space!)  Very clean and accommodating. Amenities were perfect. It is hard to get large suitcases up the stairs since they are narrow (we went to the beach after), but we expected that.  We mostly took Ubers or the T to get around, but we found parking easily a street over for our rental car the last night we were there.  Highly recommend!!

This apartment was located close to the Boston Common and mass transportation so it was a good place to stay for a girls weekend trip.  The management team was quick to respond to all our questions. The only thing we didn’t like was the people upstairs were a bit noisy so I would recommend earplugs for light sleepers.
Un bon compromis, malgré le quartier qui devrait changer et un colocataire pas très agréable!
Lovely house and close to all!
Good stay, no complaints
Clean, warm apartment. Great location, easy to get anywhere on the T.
Very easy to find and comfortable condo with plenty of space to spread out!
Great location and lovely place. Had a wonderful time!
I appreciate all that the owners and the cleaning staff did to make sure all the tenants remained safe and healthy. Thank you!
Nice apartment with all amenities in Theatre District in Boston
muy buen lugar para llegar a Boston y buena ubicación, gracias por recibirnos fue excelente, gracias por tener la plancha, siempre hace falta 😉.

The place is very nice and clean, and the staff is reachable late in the night. Had a little bit of trouble with getting in and the delivery of a pack n play that we rented due to some mishaps and communication-gaps among the staff. But overall, we did enjoy the place and were very comfortable. It’s a hotel-like experience with a more homey feel.

Great little airbnb.! Close to newberry street,
Very clean space. Would come back again!
Cara's place is in a great location and very cozy!

chambre très cosy et spacieuse.
l'environnement était calme et non loin d'une station de bus
de plus J Lucky répond très rapidement aux questions posées lors du séjour.
je recommande fortement ce logement.

My second stay with Lori and just as nice as the first.  Peaceful, quiet surroundings, comfortable bed, and conveniently located to the Orange Line to take me downtown.  Lori is a thoughtful host who is experienced at making guests feel at home.  I'd happily stay with her again anytime I'm in Boston.

We had an amazing stay here!! Taylor and Christian are amazing hosts. They were super responsive and helpful with all of our needs, questions, and concerns! The place was absolutely beautiful with lots to offer. I just want to emphasize how helpful they were with everything we needed and we’re always checking in on how they could make our stay more accommodating. Would DEFINITELY recommend to anyone in the surrounding area. We had an amazing trip and there was so much to do!
Easy check in, and clean and comfortable place!
I really recommend! Cozy , peaceful and very clean !
I did a last minute booking and Tianyu was really accomodating, helped me with the stay and has a really good place
Nice place away from the hustle of the city.

DO NOT BOOK HERE. I had an emergency come up during my stay here and the service team was so unhelpful. Not only were they difficult to deal with, but they didn't even care. Management and the entire property team only care about money, as it goes when dealing with people in property these days. They were extremely unaccommodating, and they wouldn't even let me change everything like finding a different time to book because of their "policy"
We were in the room for maybe five minutes and it was not as the pictures described. The floors were much more dirty than the images and the bed was not as described. Avoid at all costs and I am not one person to do this i.e. leaving a bad review.

Tutto super perfetto. Gli Host sono stati gentilissimi e super disponibili nel rispondere subito ai messaggi su AirBnb e credetemi, non è scontato… l’ho apprezzato molto.
Capsule del caffè e del thè offerte, è stato un super plus!
Bagni sempre puliti…
Insomma, lo stra consiglio.
La zona altrettanto, è molto bella e ben collegata.

We had a great stay. The home is a good combination of historic charm and modern comforts. Hosts were communicative but not intrusive. Had some kitchen basics there for our use including fresh milk and eggs. Very clean and secure. We’ll be sure to book on our next visit!

Ben’s place in Jamaica Plain is spacious, clean and well-appointed with easy check in and check out. The surroundings are beautiful, especially in the fall —  and walking distance to the Pond. I would definitely stay there again.

Listen up, ya'll. This place is in a perfect location for a couple visiting Boston. The space is meant for only two people, cozy and clean. The bed is a comfy double, memory foam mattress, and the bathroom is clean with a good hot shower and a good showerhead. I'm pretty judgy about bathrooms, and it passed my test. We weren't looking for anything fancy...just clean and comfortable.
Richard was so responsive and helpful via phone call and text. Very easy going and welcoming.
When you stay here, you're in the heart of the North End and steps away from some of the best Italian food you will ever have. Uber is never more than 5 minutes away, but you can literally walk to any major sight seeing spots within minutes.
Richard was always genuinely concerned and interested in our trip and our concerns or needs. We will definitely stay here again for our next Boston trip.
The place was really clean and check in was super easy. Plus the kitchen, bathroom, etc are equipped really well.
Volvería excelente

A fantastic bnb nestled in nature and private. The hosts are a lovely warm and friendly family. I hit a tough day and Mark was beyond a gentleman and his family went out of their way to support me and make sure I was taken care of like a member of the family. What brilliant hosts and what a beautiful stay. Thanks  for making my trip so special
Clean, comfy, and beautiful!

This apartment is an excellent choice when visiting Boston. The location is convenient and the building is easy to find. Kelly made the check-in process super easy, and communicating with her before, during, and after was a pleasure. She gave me all the must-do's of Boston and her suggestions were spot on. I highly recommend this place (just note that very sensitive people may need earplugs at night, which the hosts provide)!

Very much enjoyed staying at Maverick. Rooms were clean, spacious and well equipped. Best part is the location – right in the heart of Newbury, in a bustling and historic retail zone, steps away from other sights such as the Pru.
The studio is in a great location in Back Bay! David was an excellent host and was very helpful and responsive when we needed him!

Definitely will be back. Loved the neighborhood + proximity of the airport.
Really responsive + helpful guest. Don’t hesitate to book their services.
Thanks once again.
Ping's place was perfect for our trip - location, amenities, comfort. Couldn't have been better.
Nice place to stay! Very clean and organized. Had trouble getting in with the lock but we got it to work.
Comfortable accommodations, great location, good value.
Great communication from both of them. Easy check in, apartment just like in the description.
Beautiful location with a modern and elegant decor. Management was very responsive and helpful, would recommend to anyone looking to stay in Boston.

The location was perfect for us with easy access to the T. The space was small but had everything we needed during our stay. Johnathan’s instructions covered everything we could have needed during our trip and we would recommend this place to anyone!

Highly recommend.  This is the best Airbnb we’ve ever stayed in.  The location was great.  Having a parking space in Boston was super convenient. We left the car there and walked everywhere. Boston is a very walkable city. The space was inside a charming brownstone and was so beautiful!  Lots of high end touches.   We loved it!
Great location and clean room with nice staff, the plumbing was just a major issue as well as the heating. Still worth a stay!
Very clean, exactly as advertised. Owner gave quick responses to questions.... Very good living conditions
Don’t think twice about Denise’s place. Quiet unit in a three unit brownstone. Denise is a phenomenal host and very responsive. Extremely convenient.

Highly recommend staying here. The check-in was smooth and Eda was very responsive and accommodating! The house is in a very nice neighborhood with lots of great restaurants just a couple of blocks away.
Very convenient
Very clean apartment, good service, and great area.
Great Stay!

Small space. Clean and nice if you're just looking for a place to sleep and get ready in the mornings, but not much room for anything else. Nice hospitality, good communication with owner. All in all, very easy to stay here. Would do it again. Location is really nice, easy to get around.
Okay for value taking into consideration that  Brighton is super expensive

We were in town for a graduation. The apartment was perfect for our group, one couple and a single. The beds were very comfortable.  We were traveling during an unusual hot spell and the AC, bottled water, and snacks provided were greatly appreciated. The Orange line is a 10 minute walk. We did have a car and street parking on the weekend was easy to come by.
This is a top notch airbnb and we were welcomed with open arms. Our room was top notch even with a view of the citgo sign!  Lihua is a gracious host and goes out of her way for guests.

Nice stay, conveniently located near the T, so it was easy to get around lots of places! Very cozy and kind of odd that the bathroom is across the hall, but it was clean and had soap/shampoo & towels. Good for a place to crash while spending most time out exploring. Also the window AC works well & kept the place very cool.
Mark is an excellent and caring host. He is genuinely interested in his guests but gives you complete privacy as well.  The house and the environment are perfect for relaxing.

Lance's place was amazing! The view was incredible and very close to South Boston. We started their with 6 people and it wasn't cramped at all! It is so spacious! I couldn't believe how affordable it was! We had a great time!
We had a terrific stay at Nicholas’s place, very quiet and safe neighborhood with easy access to the city. Will definitely be back!
Booker was always very nice and helpful whenever needed. His place is very convenient to move around Boston as it is close to the metro station.

The place was as presented. The location was good and it was clean and nice.
The air conditioning was a little quirky, it was either warm or cold and difficult to regulate.
The downside was the noise factor. You could hear people outside the window like they were just inside the apartment and my husband was awakened at 2am by music playing outside our window.
We had a wonderful stay! Such a great location-very helpful and welcoming staff/host, and affordable for the location. We would definitely return.
exelente ubicación, todo está cerca y accesible al salir, es un lugar muy cómodo y con las amenidades suficientes, gran estadía
Amazing place!!! Super close to everything, pricing was great, and felt right at home.
Kai's place was great. Very close to the T. You can get anywhere really fast. Parking was good.  A major piece of history is just across the street! Great stay overall!

Absolutely unbeatable location - just around the corner from Boston Common, and a few minutes walk from 3 different T lines. Plus, incredibly fast response from the hosts. Hard to find a better place to stay than this if you have a big group and want to be in the middle of the action.

We are so glad we chose this ABB! Robin's spirit of kindness and hospitality made the stay a delight! My husband loved her homemade granola, and I was truly ecstatic to stay in a home with so much history, as well as amenities and spaciousness!! We would definitely stay here again!

Herminas place is less then a five minute walk to the closest subway station, which was incredibly convienient! I am so thankful I did not attempt to drive in Boston! The subway is definitely the way to go! The cost of the seven day pass was less then one day of parking near some of the sights. All the stops are convieniently located near the sights we were going to and from the sights we could see how driving in this city would be incredibly undesirable!
There is a restaurants and stores all within walking distance which worked out perfectly! We felt completely safe walking to the store or back from the subway station late into the night.
The house was clean, quiet, and perfectly described by the host!
The beds were comfortable and the room we stayed in was spacious.
We parked across the road in the "alley" beside the Buddhist centre without issue.
Communication with the host was seamless! No issues at all!!
I would definitely recommend staying at Herminas place to anyone visiting Boston!

Overall the location is great for visiting Boston.  A few concerns were addressed and resolved.  Only thing to improve is having an after hour contact for situations that need immediate attention.  Well aware the hours were noted 10:00AM-10:00PM but certain instances cause for quicker response.
Responsive host! Room was consistent with listing
Great place and location. A nice studio apartment, super clean, and comfortable, in a very cute and walkable neighborhood. Would highly recommend!

Great little place, right on Newbury.  I was in town for a convention at the Hynes convention center and this was the perfect location.  Place was immaculate and just as described.  Excellent communication, with response time measured in a few minutes.  Place is like 3 min walk from convention center and there are probably 20 restaurants within 100 yards, not to mention all the shopping on Newbury.  I feel like a few reviewers felt the bed wasn't comfortable; I thought it was totally fine.  Perhaps not a Tempur-Pedic but totally no issue sleeping.  No complaints but just "nice to know": there's a fair bit of street noise on Newbury.  Not a big bother to me, but consider if you're noise-sensitive.  Also, I recommend you watch the Youtube on the doorlock.  It's not complicated, but worth 90 seconds of your time to avoid any confusion.  Great place and no reason to look further if you're looking on Newbury!

Jason was very helpful. The central air was not working when we arrived, and Jason quickly had window units installed. The location of the apartment is great! It's close to downtown, the beach, Castle Island, and the airport. It's also perfect for exploring South Boston on foot.
Had a lovely time in Boston at Kaitlyn's apartment.  The location is amazing- so close to the city and the small boutiques and restaurants of Beacon Hill on the doorstep.
Great place for the marathon
Fosters place was just as expected and was great for my group of 4!
Great place!

Terry has sent me all the information to guide me with my next stop before I arrive Boston. When I ‌ch‌e‌c‌k‌ ‌i‌n‌ that I find out Terry has prepared some travel guide on the table, which is very nice to me.
The room is clean and well kept with the nice odor free shower. Also, there are microwave, mini refrigerator, and coffee machine which is very sweet to prepare those in the room.
Terry's room is my first experience on Airbnb, it is very nice and make me have a feeling of home.
I had a very pleasant stay at J Lucky’s. Apartment was super clean and house was quiet…slept great!
Très chouette studio, bien situé. Je recommande
Been before with other. Came this time. Would try again for sure
Would recommend

Overall okay. There was a bowl of chipotle left behind in the mini fridge when we arrived. The wifi wasn’t working for two days. Although the communication was good, it wasn’t the best airbnb that we stayed at.
Awesome location!!! Nice large area and the kitchen is a bonus.
Decent option for short term stay in south Boston

The place was pristine and you can’t beat the location! The only downside of such a central location is that there are quite a few homeless people in front of the building at all times, but that is no fault of the host. Everything else was absolutely perfect!

Had a lovely stay at this apartment.
The place was clean, the linens and towels were clean. Everything was great. Thank you.

Eder was a great host, happy to answer all questions that I had. The apartment is located next to bus stops that take you to either the Red or Orange T Line. The house is a large size, with great facilities. I shared the apartment with 2 different groups of people, both of whom were friendly and courteous. If you are looking for a place to stay, and don't mind a quick commute into Downtown Boston, I would highly recommend staying here.
Great experience.   Great people
First time on Newbury street but not my first time with Maverick.  Awesome space with all the Mavrick features.  Great location,  Ill have to use it again.

The apartment made a great launching point for our exploration of Boston and vicinity.  The nearby T station provided a great and inexpensive way to get around town and to and from the airport.  Kristina's recommendations for concert venues and dining were spot on.  We might add that having your landlord next door is also good to take care of the small glitches that may arise.
Excellent location in the middle of Boston! Place was beautiful and host was very responsive! I would highly recommend and I would definitely stay here again when I return to Boston!
Nice stay! Worked great for us for one night before starting our road trip!
I loved staying on Deborah’s house boat. All the beauty and calm of being on the water but within steps of everything Boston has to offer.

Logement très agréable fidèle à la description.
Hôte très accueillant.

Honestly, I can’t recommend them enough. Had a bit of a situation at the beginning of the stay and Our House was unbelievably accommodating getting us through everything. Painless is how I can sum up my experience. Will go out of my way to stay with them again
Great location, clean, comfortable, and warm. I highly recommend.
great
Nice and clean
The perfect place!

I needed a place for a few weeks near NEU-- this filled the bill as clean and affordable, near 2 subway lines and plenty of shopping and restaurants.
The managers were very responsive (10~15min) to my questions (like garbage pick up, etc).
Amazing Place to Stay

Will definitely come back to stay in the Boston North End at Bostons place. Easy to get to the great restaurants and shops. Easy parking options. Public transit is around the corner. Perfect spot. The unit itself was as described , clean and organized. Plenty of space and nicely appointed
See you again soon!!!

My group had an excellent stay at this home. It is clean, comfortable, and in a quiet neighborhood that is a quick walk to great amenities in Boston. On top of the location and home being a great spot, the hosts were pleasant and responsive to our needs. We greatly appreciated their hospitality and had a wonderful trip.
Great location. Downside: the bed was really uncomfortable, and you could hear everything from the neighbors and outside.
Loved our stay and will be back!

Susie's place is top-notch. You're only a 5-minute walk from all the bars and restaurants and shops on Centre Street in Jamaica Plain, but you feel a million miles away from that. The neighborhood is very quiet and has tons of trees and bushes and wildlife to make you feel like you're out in the suburbs somewhere. The large house's architecture is common to the area and the AirBnb occupies the top-two floors. Susie was an incredibly warm host and made us feel incredibly at-home. Highly recommended.

We had such a lovely stay at Philip & Ann’s gorgeous condominium. This is perfectly located for exploring the local area by foot and is close to so many great eateries, shopping etc. Gorgeous linens and super comfortable beds. Lots of space too, which we really appreciated after having stayed in other cramped places. We can’t recommend this highly enough.

Drew's place was perfect for my family of four, including two ten-year-olds. The location is excellent, and the apartment was just as pictured, and if anything, the fish-eye lens fails to do it justice..
It's a stylish apartment in a great location, and I can recommend it without hesitation.

While we didn't get to spend much time talking to our hosts (our fault - we were so busy) they were very welcoming, accommodating and pleasant. I really enjoyed the location - Jamaica Hills was beautiful and a little off the beaten path, but we were very close to both the metro station (short ~10 min ride to downtown) and some Hubway bike stations, as well as parks and restaurants. The residence was great too - private entrance, two-person bed and a couch you can fold out into a bed. It worked well for our group (me, my brother and my father).

Great time and very nice hosts!
Excellent location and great value!
Karen and Jon were wonderful hosts with great attention to making our stay very relaxing.  They went above and beyond to share recommendations for the area and make sure we were comfortable.

My family and I stayed at this apartment in Boston and had a nice experience. The space was clean, comfortable, and just right for the four of us. Check-in was easy and everything matched the listing.

I had a wonderful stay at this place. The house itself was beautifully decorated and had a warm, cozy ambiance that perfectly complemented the autumn vibes. The rooms were clean and comfortable, and we had everything we needed for a relaxing stay.
One of the highlights was the stunning fall foliage in the area, which we could enjoy from the house's porch. Barbara provided helpful recommendations for local attractions and dining options, making our trip even more enjoyable.
Overall, our stay at Barbara's Victorian-style house was a delightful experience, and we can't wait to return for another fall getaway.

A very cute place to stay for a couples getaway. Is on the smaller side, but was perfect for us as we would just find ourselves back there at the end of the night! About 20-25 minutes from downtown Boston by uber ride.

Great stay! We loved everything in this apartment and immediately felt like home. It was very clean and tidy with new equipment and furniture. Kitchen had whatever needed, oil, salt, pepper and sugar were available, plus coffee machine with pods.
Bathroom was big and very clean, big shower with soap, shampoo and conditioner. In a separate closet washing and drying machine with available pods to use for laundry. Both seemed new and worked seamlessly! A vacuum cleaner is also there and easy to use.
The building was quiet, no noise from other apartments. Nice and safe sourrounding and close to public transport, both buses and T line. Whole Foods 10 min walk.
The host was very reactive and answered almost immediately whenever I had a question. Price was high but in line with prices in the area, plus I actually felt I got more than expected! So I can only highly reccomend staying here, I am sure you won’t be disappointed! I started missing this place the exact moment I checked out!

Definitely a studio apartment, but love the old historical look and feel to it. Beautiful quaint bathroom! Stairs are steep, narrow & winding, could be an issue for this with mobility issues. We enjoyed our stay.

It was a great stay at Jonathan's place! Very clean. well maintained and lot of interesting books to read! Jonathan was always available on Airbnb. When my debit cards were not working, Jonathan helped me in a timely manner by providing cash. This was a unusual friendly gesture. I highly recommend his place.

Jane and Ben are warm and helpful hosts who immediately made us feel at home and cared for in their place.  They are very familiar with their neighborhood and Boston.  We had no need to communicate with Marie. The residence is comfortable and nicely appointed and furnished (not cluttered) with some interesting antiques.  Our room was private and up 3 flights of stairs, which was fine for us.  The mattress was comfortable.  Breakfast was healthy and delicious.  The location suited us perfectly.  Many venues, including  the Calderwood theater, the Boston Gardens, the MFA, Copley Square,  and various eateries, are within a 5 to 25 minute walk.  We parked in a garage about a 10 minute walk from the house, and very convenient to the Mass Pike, so getting in and out of the city was about as easy as it could be.  We would look forward to staying there again when we return to Boston.

Albert was great, easy to get around, beautiful buildings all around.  We ate at Lily’s patio pizza, great food, and Paulie’s for coffee and muffins the next morning.  We also got cereal and milk at a 7-11 a 10 minute walk away.  Parking on street is crowded but very doable.  Wonderful stay!
Super responsive hosts, excellent space, centrally located, clean and communicative. No complaints!

Kathleen was responsive and checked in regularly to ensure we were enjoying our stay. She was flexible and offered to hold onto our bags after check-out, as our flights were later that evening. The place was also very comfortable and convenient, making it easy to explore the city and enjoy the visit to Boston!
Perfect for our week long stay.  Close enough to everything that we needed and was exactly as listed.  We loved it!
What an amazing location. Beautiful neighborhood. Walkable to everything!

Taskin was an extremely responsive and proactive host who was also very flexible.
His place was perfect for my situation and it was well located.

The condo is efficient, very well located and Daniel is great at communication.
Every thing went great and we had a great time
Three cheers for Daniel

Excellent location - people live here! So its good to be amongst the locals at the bars, cafes and restaurants.  Bus service was great and friendly bus drivers helped me with ticket issues.  Easy walk from Boston South station.  Don't miss the JFK Presidential Museum - 40 odd minute walk from the house but easy and by the water so  quite relaxing at the same time.  I never met my hosts but lots of quickly responded communication made everything easy.  Thanks Lindsay

The place is opposite a bar, so it’s really noisy, especially at night. The duvet is not clean properly (you can see some hair and stain). The location is pretty close to the center (accessible to train and bus), has a kitchen.
Great place, convenient location.

Great place to stay to explore Jamaica Plain and Boston. A nice quiet loft to retire to after days filled w/ sightseeing and tons of great restaurants and bars nearby to get some local flavor. Can't recommend enough!
It's a great place. Downtown with quick access to all the hot spots.
astonishingly beautiful gardens,  amazing neighborhood,  great breakfast.... we are definitely coming back! Loved it.

As with all places in the financial district parking is very very limited. There’s virtually no street parking on Arch so be prepared. Instructions to get into building are inaccurate albeit it being lengthy so have the Airbnb app handy. Otherwise it’s a good place for exploring Boston.

It is a true attic apartment with sloping ceilings that are really only an issue in the bathroom for a tall person. In the summer you are right under the roof so it heats up
a lot in warm weather so that you need constant AC. The kitchen is very rudimentary, so I would not recommend planning on doing much cooking. The neighborhood is quiet and the house is a stone’s throw from a nice park/playground, and yet only a few blocks to stores and restaurants (recommend Brighton Bodega!). The parking spot is well off the street. The two flights up to the apartment are steep and narrow. There is no laundry or dishwasher, and for some reason the water pressure in the kitchen faucet is feeble despite in being very strong in the shower and bathroom sink right next door. Overall I would recommend it, especially if you don’t have anything large or heavy to take up and down the stairs.

There are several issues with the 401 unit. The overall cleanliness is very subpar. The sheets were stained, the bathroom was dingy, and the building as a whole had a pretty bad odor. On top of that, the mattress and/or bed frame has to be one of the worst I’ve slept on. It sinks in the middle and will guarantee your neck ends up in a knot. There also was only one small trash can. It seems like a small problem, but with no clean source of the water in the apartment, a case of water that we went through felt like a mountain of trash building up in the bathroom (where the trash can was located). The TV also didn’t have a remote, so it was completely unusable. The electric plugs produce about a fourth of the voltage necessary and also won’t even physically hold your electronics in place. This was a remarkably miserable 4 night stay on what ended up being a fantastic trip to Boston. Our lodging was the only pitfall. I know what you’re thinking, it’s a cheap stay. The issue is that half of the things I’ve mentioned are straightforward and easy fixes. It just goes to show that the property management doesn’t care about this place and just cares about your money.

We loved our stay here!  The unit is exactly as described and we felt right at home while we were there. The location is fantastic and walking distance to so many places - restaurants, shops etc. However, we also needed a car so the included parking g spot is a real bonus.  Jessy and Diego were very responsive, and I’m going to recommend their place to all my friends who travel to Boston.
This was the perfect location for a trip to the Boston area. The house was super clean and very stunning. Would recommend to all!
Super good place. Great location, next to the subway, two short stations to downtown. Clean and spacious place. Private bathroom with everything you need. 5/5.
Small but clean and modern basement apartment in a wonderful neighborhood. No space is wasted and no furniture is unnecessary. Host was awesome to communicate with
Great location and very clean place. Would stay again anytime.

This was my first Airbnb experience and it exceeded my expectations.  Jonathan was gracious and welcoming and very helpful.  The check-in process was better than most hotels I"ve stayed in.  Studio was amazing-the use of space incredible.  Perfectly clean, cozy and comfortable.  I've already booked my next stay!  Thank you Jonathan-Sofia and I loved it!
Great spot on the milton / mattapan line. Beautiful river walk close by and mattapan trolley. Safe quiet neighborhood. Also great home theater! Would recommend and stay again.

Great communication and accomodating a late check in after our flight was delayed. Spotlessly clean apartment and some nice extras like toiletries and juice and bagels in the fridge. A little far out from Boston but close to subway. Thanks!

I stayed at the "Boston Charm room 3" with Ahn. The train is a nice <10 minute walk through a quiet neighboorhood.
I received an email the day before I arrived with all the information to enter the home and room, and the wifi code. I was especially impressed that the entry & room doors have a smart lock , which has a code.
The room was nice & clean, and I found the desk useful for writing. It was a little warm, so I kept the window open at night to keep it comfortable. There is handy shelf for laying and hanging clothes.
The shared bathroom was clean, and the shower is large. There were others in the home, but they were quiet and I didn't have any conflict with the restroom.
I didn't use the shared living room or kitchen, but they are large enough to host a few friends and appear as advertised. One minor thing to mention: I couldn't find any glassware for drinking water, so be sure to bring your own.
I would definitely recommend staying at the home.
Great place! Beds are hard, but otherwise the space is clean and as described/shown in the photos. I do wish there were coffee grounds provided. Amenities are modern and all appliances worked well!
Beautiful house, spacious bedroom, Lihua is very kind. Great stay.

We had a great stay at Eileen's place! The apartment is comfortable and very well located for exploring Jamaica Plain and taking the T to Downtown Boston. Eileen was a very welcoming and communicative host. We'd like to come back the next time we are in JP!
Incredible experience booking with Cara. She made sure that convenience was at the top of the list for us. Would highly recommend!
Cute place!

We arrived to the apartment fairly late as we were driving in from Manhattan after work, and Paul's son was kind enough to wait for us to give us the key.
