The apartment was exactly as pictured, very clean, and had a great location. Paul even left a few bottled waters and bags of chips for us, which was a nice, welcoming touch. I would definitely stay here again and would recommend this apartment to anyone visiting Boston.

Exactly as described, beautiful home in a beautiful neighborhood. Jamaica Plain is a quiet, peaceful neighborhood with very friendly people. Green Street subway station is about a block away, very easy to walk to. From here you can easily get to any part of Boston you want to go.
There's a few restaurants within .5 miles. I do wished there was a grocery store closer. There is a couple neighborhood markets but not what I'm use to. (probably just me...)
The home was spotless and very clean with everything we needed.
Lynel is a great host and answered all our question and was very helpful. We would definitely book again without hesitation.
房子里面非常干净整洁，设施齐全；房东夫妇非常友善，沟通顺畅；在这里我和朋友们生活四周，大家很快乐，希望以后有机会还能来波士顿！
The management was responsive and we appreciate their help.
Great host and wonderful stay.

Cynthia was very helpful and friendly! I had an issue with my bags and she was very open to help me. The place is really clean and is really close to the airport (Logan). Would definitely come back! Thanks again, Cynthia!

Super efficient, clean, and convenient. Host communicated clearly and promptly, and I will definitely come back as I routinely need to visit the city for work. Great location on lively Newbury Street!

We had a lovely stay at Andrea and Paul’s! We were in town looking for our new apartment and this place allowed us to imagine what living in Southie would be like! Andrea was incredibly communicative and flexible. Would definitely stay again!

The location was great! It was a bit smaller than expected but we spent most of our time exploring the city so it ended up being a wonderful place to stay each night. The space was sparkly clean too. Thank you, Alicia!
Would stay here again! Super cute spot and very clean.

Thank you Shelley for your warm reception, your clear instructions and your great tips for how to spend our day! Shelley is eager to help out in any way she can to make sure you are comfortable and having fun. The other guests were respectful and made sharing the sweet 2nd floor apartment easy. Traveling everywhere by the T is a piece of cake. This is what Airbnb is meant to be: a friendly, personal alternative to the costly hotel scene. Highly recommended!
Great deal for a clean hotel in walking distance of all tourist attractions!
Super Lage und sehr zu empfehlen. Danke für den schönen Aufenthalt!
Shelby’s place was perfect! Very clean and the photos were very accurate. We enjoyed the two outdoor spaces and how close it was to multiple bars, parks and restaurants. Highly recommend this stay!

Steven was incredibly communicative and kind—quick responses and flexible. I loved the apartment, it was large and full of natural light and amenities. The apartment is completely worth the money and it makes me glad the booking goes to a good cause.
The streets can get quite noisy weekend evenings due to the close proximity to the bars so I would plan for that if you’re a light sleeper. Otherwise 10/10 all around!

Hi everything was great! Easy to get in and find, just couldn’t find towels and wash clothes for the bathroom. Joshua’s place was really clean and the bathroom as well. Very comfy bed and had access to Netflix and other apps on the TV.

This place was perfect for a long weekend. Lihua was a great host and her family clearly care a ton about making the B&B incredibly welcoming and comfortable. The house is a historic, well-maintained brownstone with pretty spacious rooms. The location made it easy to get just about anywhere by mass transit. Would definitely recommend to others and keep in my list of options for future trips to Boston.
Great location!  Everything was as advertised.

When it comes to hospitality, Riyo goes above and beyond. Though the studio is small, it is clean, well organized, and plenty comfortable for a solo traveler. Riyo has provided great snacks, shampoo/conditioner, a detailed guide to local restaurants and sites, umbrellas and raincoats!, and a number of other awesome amenities. She is clearly a natural hostess. Riyo also allowed me to check in a few hours early and to store my luggage after checkout (my flight out of Boston was not until the late afternoon), and she is very pleasant and responsive. Additionally, the studio is only a few minutes walk from the T, which makes it very easy to navigate the city. This is a great home base for exploring Boston. Thanks, Riyo!
Whit was a great host and even made us coffee in the morning. He also invited us to the neighborhood yard sale and his neighbors were also very kind and welcoming
I’ve stayed at several Boston Airbnbs and this is by far my favorite so far....A great value, safe neighborhood, quiet house,  courteous host, easy street parking.

Paul's apartment was clean and well appointed. The kitchen was very convienient. We used it for breakfast and one dinner. It was an easy walk to various sites and close to the Commons and Public Garden. The queen size bed was comfortable with high quality linens. TV and wifi worked well.

Paul was very good at communicating everything I needed prior to arriving.

This apartment will easily accommodate five adults, which means it is a very affordable place to stay. It is well equipped for the people who want to cook and spend quality time in their hired abode.
The bus -No 10 from Back Bay Shopping Centre - gives you easy access to the city, whenever you wish. The Uber taxis, provided by FlitWays, were inexpensive for the evening rides we needed [when too dressed up for the bus!]. There is a great hair salon -Impulse Salon -just around the corner on Dorchester Ave.
Great neighborhood, price, and apartment! I lived in boston 10 years before moving away and i would definitely stay again.
入住很便利，地理位置很好，干净整洁

We were very pleased with our stay.
We booked this well in advance for graduation weekend. It was very convenient with a car and using public transportation.
The neighborhood is a bit transitional, however we never felt unsafe, day or night.
Greg is a super host, and keeps his property well maintained and clean.
Awesome 👏
Everything was as described.  Very helpful and accommodating.
muy buen lugar!
Very clean, nice quality unit inside of a multi-unit building.  Great city view.

Lori’s place is AMAZING!!! I stayed with her for 3 nights - and I couldn’t have asked for a better host. I’m moving to Boston- and wanted to visit the city before making the move - and Lori was able to answer all my questions and make great recommendations of places to see and eat while there.
Her home is very comfortable and in very close proximity to the train station and also different kinds of restaurants. The shower had amazing water flow and the room was nice, clean and cool. She provides breakfast! Which was awesome and I had an opportunity to sit with her on her porch and have coffee over conversation. I highly recommend her home and will definitely stay with her again when I visit.

it was great spot for me I come from Maine every now and then and my mom live right up the road so great location as well.
I will be back nice lil spot to rest your head when visiting
Suite muy bien ubicada si van al centro de convenciones, es fácil llegar a los principales sitios turísticos, excelente.

It is a good place for short stay. Clean and quiet. BUT just a reminder to anyone like me may have a uncertain schedule. This is NON-REFUNDABLE if you change your dates or leave early.  I know this is written in the "strict" refund policy but just in case anyone else may not understand what it means. Overall, it is good value but make 100% sure about your stay before you book.

Great place to stay! Eda was awesome - great communication - extremely responsive. The place was great and exactly where we wanted to stay in Southie. She is close to the beach and close to downtown - perfect location. She was so kind that when I asked if she had decaf coffee - she ordered it and had it available when we arrived. Great stay and I plan to stay again for a next visit! Thank you Eda!
Great space, easy communications, well located, would definitely stay again.

Unfortunately we did not stay long at this listing. Upon arrival to the room we noticed multiple issues. First, and foremost, the smoke detector was not installed in the mount on the ceiling. Second, was the shower in the attached bathroom. The rain shower head leaked all over the bathroom when turned on as if the pressure was too much. Then, the handheld shower head hose kept detaching due to the water pressure. Lastly, the overall cleanliness of the furnishings was uncomfortable. Specifically, extremely old and crusty pillows and marks on the walls.
The hosts were very nice and responsive. When the issues above were reported to them Mort immediately responded and sent a Plummer to address the shower. As we did not stay at the location we requested a full refund and Mort was very accommodating.
All this being said, given the fast response from the host to our report, I have no doubt all of the issues here will be fixed following our reservation.

Nice small place in Boston, right across from Simons University. I went to a red sox game and it's only a 10 minute walk from the stadium. Parking was the worst part it, but everything about the house was great!
We had a great weekend in Boston. House fit all of our needs. Thank you, Holly!

I spent three days in Boston with my daughter and we felt right at home at Maverick's place. It was positioned on a quaint street within close walking distance to coffee shops, restaurants, Whole Foods, etc. We walked all over Boston so the central location of the apartment was perfect. Would definitely stay there again next time I'm in Boston.

10/10 stars! Glenn and Oliver were great hosts and went above and beyond to make our stay special! They explained the subway, gave us restaurant recommendations, and even provided us with breakfast each morning! (Glenn’s scones are very yummy!!) In addition, the location was perfect! The subway was a minute away and local restaurants were nearby and easy to walk to! Highly recommend booking this Airbnb!!!
This is a great location to stay right on Charles Street!
This location is awesome for solo travelers. I spent 4 nights here and it was perfectly located for walking and transportation around the city. The area is very quite and peaceful. Great place!

This is a great stay for a person traveling alone. The location is in the center of everything and is in an convenient area to access public transportation. A lot of great restaurants within walking distance and great tourist areas as well. Because it’s located near a main and busy street there will be noise. Also, the walls are very thin so be prepared to hear the neighbors. However, the noise should be expected because of its location and because it’s an apartment building. Overall, it wasn’t a problem for me but something to consider if this is a concern for you. The hosts were quick to respond and were very helpful.
Location was good, allowable check-in time was rather late (5pm). Pantry doesn't provide basic tea/coffee, sugar, creamer etc. Not enough hooks and no towel rail in the bathroom.

Loved the location of this rental. Beautiful historic part of Boston, easy walk to Boston Common park and the rest of the Back Bay.
Very comfortable sheets and bed. Easy check in. Kitchen was stocked with all appropriate utensils and wares.
Only complaint was old pipes sometimes made some noise but that is to be expected in a historic home.
Even though didn’t use the balcony due to weather but great feature! And if your car is small enough it can fit in the spot right below which is a great bonus!
Lovely stay!
Great place and perfect location
we loved staying in this beautiful home. It was everything as advertised. The view from the rooftop deck is wonderful and the beds are super comfortable.  Highly recommend!!

We found this place to be convenient for walking to most of what we wanted to visit. The host was friendly and responsive. It snowed one evening into the next morning while we were there and the host shoveled a path from the front steps to the sidewalk. That was much appreciated.
very nice, great location.

Great experience! Three of us were there for a conference. This place was exactly what we needed. The location was very close to the train station so the commute was easy. There are also plenty street parking around the area. The apartment itself was clean, spacious, and well decorated; so we all got to relax well.

I loved staying at Lynne’s place - super comfortable, a beautiful space and next to the wonderful Jamaica Pond which I walked around multiple times. Lynne has a wonderful Dog and cats that I also loved to see circling around. Her partner let me in, answered any questions I had and gave me some great recommendations. Would definitely stay here again!
Great spot, great town.

Thank you for a great stay. We were a family of 4 with a toddler. Space was exactly as listed and enough room for all of us. Having 2 bathrooms was exceptionally helpful. Walking distance to so much and many great restaurants near by. Building was quiet and other guests were very friendly. There was some street noise at night but nothing a sound machine couldn’t handle. We ended up bringing 2, enough for each bedroom, after reading past reviews and it helped perfectly. I would caution families with young babies/toddlers as there are a few small steps after entering the apartment. Luckily our older toddler was good with steps. Not sure if this was something I may have missed in the detailed listing. My only suggestion would be to have a few kid friendly cups/plates/utensils for families staying. Overall, great stay. We will be back for sure.

This was the second time of staying here and everything was more than up to expectations.  There is a great place to eat (diner) across the street.  Especially appreciated that the host helped us to retrieve our phone charger which we'd forgotten when we checked out.

We had a wonderful experience at Carol's place. It's immaculate, well ordered, and in a great location for us. The hosts were very helpful and communicating with them was very easy. We felt very much at home there. We'll be back!

Great place to stay. Our House was really responsive to messages and was able to get me into the place a little early when my flight landed early. Good location close to a lot of restaurants or a quick uber to the downtown area. Definitely would stay here again.
Great apartment! We’ll definitely come back!
Absolutely gorgeous location!
We came for a ball game and a concert and this was a great hub for that and more! Walkable to cool places and to the subway then a good place to rest after all that.
Cozy stay for one. Extremely minimal, but that’s my preference. Great location! Super close to everything in the heart of Boston!
Amy put out some greenery so I had seasonal Christmas aromas.  She left me extra coffee pods because I ran out of them on my last stay.  She’s great and I will come again.
Pamela was the best host and her listing was perfect. Great and affordable place to stay for the weekend
The place is so nice and clean. This is a great chioce to stay there.
This is a great location but the space needs a lot of maintenance and something to help with the noise
Chris was a welcoming host, very generous with her home. I hope to stay there again soon! The house is very convenient to Curry College.

This accommodation was lovely. The host checked the arrival time to greet me and was waiting for me. Everything was clear.. Breakfast prepared every morning touched me. There was a wide variety of drinks, bread and cereal, and fresh fruit. They even prepared the meal an hour early for me, who had to check out early the next day. The accommodation was very cozy and there was no inconvenience in staying. If I come to Boston again, I would like to stay here again. I highly recommend this beautiful, comfortable, host friendly place.
We stayed for one night after a Bruin’s game. It was very close to the Garden (3 stops away on the T). The place was immaculately clean and spacious. Comfortable bed too. Wish we stayed longer!

Norah’s place is an absolute gem!  We felt right at home and loved the neighborhood. This place is extremely convenient to many great spots. About a 20 min walk to the amazing Newbury St. Super clean, very comfortable beds, and peaceful.

Of the 60+ Airbnbs we’ve stayed at, this lands in our top 5 easily, maybe even closer to #1. It is immaculate; I’ve never seen a cleaner Airbnb. We had a fantastic stay all around, and he was super responsive whenever I had any questions. An absolute pleasure to have been here, will stay here again the next time we come back to sing Sweet Caroline at Fenway :-)

This brownstone condo was the perfect place for us. It was an easy walk to Fenway Park, museums, parks, and great restaurants. The T was just a few blocks away, and Boston University, where our daughter graduated, was only a few stops up the line. We paid for an in-and-out parking spot at the Christian Science Plaza through Spot Hero, and it was a convenient and very safe place for our car. Really attractively-appointed and well stocked apartment. Tim was quite attentive to answer any questions. You’ll love the place. It’s worth the price, given the excellent location.

Mylinh is a very good communicator. Her home was spotless and beddings and towels Very clean. Not far from the airport which we very much appreciated. Worth the money. I would definitely recommend and rebook.

It's a nice home, especially for family travel. Big public area for family activities, fully equipped kitchen and laundry room, and enough bedrooms.

Catlin is enthusiastic. Provided quick response to our requests.
Good location, ease of instructions to get in, clean.  Could you a little bit better mattress and there's lots of noise outside at night.
Great place to stay!
I loved this place!
Close to Back Bay station, 20 minute walk to the convention center.  Comfortable and quiet.  Recommended.

This place is a gem! The location really cannot be better. You will be in walking distance to so many great destinations or to the T. The place is charming and is exactly as shown in the photos. The communication was great and we had a fantastic stay. The outdoor space is so great to have - and that added significantly to the stay. We had one issue and that was with the internet connection. This was a bummer for us because we needed it for work purposes. The connection was spotty and unreliable. I ended up paying for extra data on my own cell phone. We did email about the problem and they tried to reset the router and help - but it actually didn't help at all. This place would otherwise be perfect!
Don’t miss the roof!

Jonathan’s place was perfect for a few days of Boston exploring- close to the Orange line on the T which can easily take you right into the heart of Boston or up to Jamaica Plain for a little neighborhood exploring.
Jonathan thought about all the tiny details of items one might need for traveling- from ample books in the bathroom to well placed charger plug and a fan!
I will definitely be back!
good place in all.
Everthing was great!
Had a great stay in the Apartment was a great location close to all trains and downtown Boston
Very clean, good amenities, great location for me and very close to the airport
It was nice, clean and in a great location!

Host's representative met us on arrival and provided a very informative and nice welcome. While drive to property , we viewed some "questionable" neighborhoods, the area around the home was fine and felt safe. Nearby Jamaica Plains business area was within walking distance...which several members of our party took advantage of.
Older home, but in good condition. Third floor master suite updated and well done. Off street parking was helpful. Enjoyed deck area and green space surrounding home. Kitchen well equipped. Although we did not use, the T is within aa 10 minute walk. Nice selection of resturants nearby.
While our trip was planned for exploring Boston, the home also provided an opportunity to enjoy the Jamaica Plains neighborhood.
Great, clean place to stay that has plenty to do in the area. It is close to piblic transit, the boston common, and many historical sites. Great place to stay
Marlene's property made a wonderful base of operations for our Boston visit.  She was very welcoming and helpful to us!

Stone was quick and responsive. The location is a great value for this room. But there was construction near the building so it was pretty noisy since early morning. Other than that, it's good place to stay in Boston.
Really clean and nice room, great location, would definitely book again
Very spacious located in a convenient location.

La Gemma is just so well located, all the tourist activities we found to be in walking distance. The accommodation was absolutely ideal for my family's first visit to Boston, and it was just so easy to relax after busy days exploring.
Gina has been an amazing host, with some great suggestions on where to go and what to do.
In my opinion, just so much better than staying in a hotel.
Great place. Great hosts. Great welcome to Boston.

Bill and Kristy and Sal were great host! We were so well supported from planning to arrival and throughout our stay.  Everything was as described.  The place was well appointed and clean. The beds were comfy and the air conditioning was a big relief as we were there in summer.  The location is stellar as it's truly the center of universe (as the co-host Sal who lives in the building said one morning to me) and we ate like kings both in the apt (great store around the corner to get fresh fish and meats)  and also on Hanover ST. for many great meals out.  Highly recommend. We'll definitely return.

Everything is modern, neat and clean in the apartment. The transportation is convenient and the location is great. However, there’s some wind leaking through the window when it’s windy and it would be better if a boiling kettle and more bathroom supplies are provided.

Enjoyed my long term stay here and the space was very adequate for a studio. Everything was as described and Nicole responded to any of my questions in a timely manner. Street parking on the side wasn’t an issue as well! Quick access to the city and surrounding areas! Thanks Nicole for the accommodations!
Great location, right outside of the city, pictures are exactly what it looks like.

Great location and staff was very attentive and flexible. Our flight arrived early and they allowed us an earlier check in than was scheduled, which we appreciated. Walking distance to lots of shops and restaurants.
clean and quiet. excellent location to commute downtown officeby foot.  highly recommended.

This is a nice room set up for 1 or 2 people that’s in a good location for enjoying some of the more common things people do when in Boston.
Emma has made it as simple as possible.

Lori’s place is comfortable and in a good spot. It’s a short walk from the subway, a neat grocery shop, and all the places along Centre St, Jamaica Plain. The breakfast is great, and Lori was always keen to help and give tips. Would definitely stay here again!

Wow!
Our group had been traveling from DC (originally) to NYC -> Rhode Island -> and finally, to Boston :)
You can’t imagine the cleanliness and warmth of Boston.
We are so thankful to have booked with Joseph ! Wow, what a great guy!
Thanks go much for extending your hospitality to us Joe! What a beautiful home you have, we could truly see the love that you’ve invested into this place.
We can’t wait to come back and stay again; your parking advisement and trip suggestions were thoughtful and we really appreciate you !
The boys really want to come again ASAP and ride scooters around your town with you.
Thanks again !
We will be back :)
-Renee, Samir, Crystal, & Taha

CLEAN!  So clean, so convenient to everywhere we wanted to go, so quick to respond.Never had a problem with the host or with check in. Luxury feel for a deal. If I had to say anything negative about this place, it would be the street noise(unavoidable), but the host was nice enough to provide earplugs. Would definitely stay again.

The space was as described.  Unfortunately, we were met by a local maintenance man when we arrived that basically scared us from leaving at night due to the alleged rough area... but it wasn't that bad. Just be mindful at night. No issues with the room itself. Super convenient.
We had a great stay! Everything was simple and everyone was nice. This is in such a beautiful and great area with lots to do.
charged a $100 fee at check in. not stated anywhere on airbnb
People really nice and a reasonable price !
An excellent place to stay in Boston. Great location and comfortable amenities. Hopefully we can return to Holly's place in the future.

Beautiful, comfortable home  perfectly located for visiting Boston.   It was well maintained while still retaining colonial charm.  We slept super good on the comfy bed and pillows.  What wonderful hosts and a wonderful stay!

We had a comfortable stay at Natalia’s place. Communication was easy and prompt. We didn’t have to deal with any sudden rules etc. Location is easily accessible because the red line shuttle is about 5-10 mins walk. The neighborhood is quiet. We preferred to Uber for late nights as it felt deserted.
The house is much older than we expected. The place is clean and everything was as explained. There were other guests in the house and we shared common spaces with them. Not a trouble for us as we only came to crash in the night.
We had the pleasure to meet with Natalia and she is a lovely person.
The private bedroom was clean. The shared bathroom was clean. Street parking was convenient.
Great apartment, fantastic location! Great communication from host.

It is a shared house. Four rooms and one small bathroom. The kitchen is big and well equipped. Everything is very well organized. Keith was really nice. The problem for me was that the walls are very thin. You can hear absolutely everything that is happening in the contiguous room and the kitchen. I had trouble sleeping because of that.
The place is close to everything!
Great communication and a clean home.
Overall very accurate description. Clean and nice! A bit of a walk up but doable. Overall great experience

The apartment had all the usual positives—very clean, comfortable, well located, well stocked, and a great shower in the master bedroom— but what made it exceptional was the responsiveness of the host. Every question we had was literally answered in minutes, and we truly felt she was invested in our having a carefree and comfortable stay.

We were so pleased with our stay. It was a beautiful apartment. Very spacious and comfortable and up to date. View was amazing. It offered everything we needed. We had a very short stop in Boston, our only regret is we didn't have more time to spend in the apartment. Peter was a great host. Extremely helpful and quick to respond to questions. Highly recommend!
Perfect location. Beautiful area. Our place was lovey and very clean. Would definitely stay there again in the future.
Location was peaceful and only a short walk to T station. Beautiful home and really enjoyed our time spent at Maria’s place.

Albert & Brian were very helpful & easy to communicate with! This is a great find in the heat of the city - 100% would recommend staying here if you are looking for a fair price with the excitement of a normal city environment.

We stayed here in a group of 4 and it was perfect! Everything was within walking distance and it was so easy to get around. The building felt very safe and secure. The apartment was very clean and had everything we needed! Would definitely stay here again!!

Logement parfait et spacieux sans vis-à-vis, proche commerces et relativement calme. Un peu éloigné du centre de Boston mais facilement accessible par le T (métro local). Aucun sentiment d'insécurité concernant le quartier.
We enjoyed our stay and the host communicated very well and was great to work with.
This was a great place to stay clean central and beautiful.

This was a great spot for us to stay. It was centrally located to what we had planned and we were able to walk to a lot of our destinations. The condo looked just like the photos so there were no surprises and the listed amenities were accurate.
Very attractive. Not quiet, but that’s because of the freeway link right outside the unit. Helpfully they provide ear plugs

Beautiful area and home! We really did love our stay. Hosts were incredibly communicative and accommodating. The only disappointments were being further away from the neighborhood’s restaurants, cafes, etc. than anticipated (about 25-30 min. walk/ longer trek than to T station) as well as recommendations listed in manual being outdated. Several establishments have closed over the last few years. We would add to the list dinner and/or cocktails at Haven, JPizle for brunch/lunch, and the Third Cliff Bakery!
All went well
The apartment is clean and uncluttered and so beautiful!
Very nice Airbnb. Space was clean and was a great space for our group.
Great play to stay in a convenient location - thank you!
Great location, great place and great host!

We had a lovely stay and would absolutely recommend it to others. The location was perfect for us to explore all of Boston. Additionally, it was clean & quiet, perfect for resting after a long day of touring the city!! Would definitely stay again😊

Wonderful hosts, Near train and stores.
Perfect for graduation weekend, w easy parking arrangements!
For a short stay, we really liked this space!  Very cute and cozy!

The location was perfect for access to the financial district and comfortable in terms of temperature and arrangement.  I did find that the pictures on the website must have been taken some time ago as the place is showing some signs of significant wear since the pictures were taken.  While the building itself was very quiet, we did experience a fair amount of late night street noise, apparently there are a number of bars in the immediate area frequented by the college age crowd.   The three steps in the foyer of the building leading to the elevator can be tricky as there is no handrail and the steps can be slick when the floor is wet or when moving heavy luggage.  Overall though we enjoyed our stay and found the place met our needs well.
Jessy and Diego’s place was the perfect place for my quick stay in Boston! Convenient, clean, etc. 👏

The host Maria was really professional and supportive. The location of the apartment was very good and short walk to metro station. Free car parking. I highly recommend to spend your long holiday in Nova.
Great stay no complaints!

This apartment is small (enough for 1-2 people) but it’s in the prime location and very safe. It’s very clean and comfortable. The window in the apt is facing walls but for me it didn’t matter because I really enjoy staying in the apt. It’s quiet, the bed is very comfortable and most importantly you can enjoy the hot water for a long time when you shower. Most certainly I will be back.
Perfect location and very responsive host. Highly recommended for singles or couples that want a central downtown Boston experience.

Great! The apartment is on an amazing street that felt safe and was close to everything you need. I was surprised that the apartment was actually more spacious than I expected, it might be the first time in my life that the photos looked worse than reality. The only downside is that the street noise is extremely loud inside the apartment, sometimes it feels like you’re standing right in the middle of the street. It’s basically impossible to sleep past 7 a.m., though I’m not sure if that’s an issue with the apartment or Boston in general. Either way, I’d definitely recommend it and would love to stay again.

If you are looking for a great host, and a fabulous place to stay, look no further!  This home was perfect for our annual Girls Trip! 6 Ladies gathered in this home for a five night stay and never felt crowded! The home was a perfect size to accommodate us. It is conveniently located to the main street in Brighton which had everything you could want or need within walking distance.  We found Brighton easy to get around. We had no problem finding transportation to either Boston or Salem.  We did  not get to take advantage of the covered outdoor area as it was cooler weather. But it is nice to know the accommodations are there if needed.  There is also a Washer and Dryer on the premises if needed.  The home is decorated nicely with a cool piano in the living room.  Matt was a great host and was quick to responded to any questions we had!

Melissa was and her condo are perfect!
We had our small family of 4 and it was just right. Location was perfect, clean and full of history.
Instructions were clear and easy to understand.
Melissa answered all my questions with in minutes of us sending messages.
Would absolutely stay there again. Her recommendations to local restaurants were perfect!

Great place to stay
Very comfortable and it was amazing!

My wife and I have been to Boston at least 20 times and we have always stayed in large chain hotels and mostly around Fenway.  This time around we went Airbnb to try something different.  Alicia's place was located next to many bar and grills but neighborhood bar and grills vs chain restaurants. The neighborhoods in the area were really nice to walk through during the morning hours and very scenic.  You are 15 minute walk from Prudential area and that was not bad to walk.  If you are going to across town you are going to spend $15 dollars on a cab or Uber each way but where don't you do this this when coming to a major city.  No issues at all and everything ran smoothly.

This airbnb is beautiful and in a great area near the fenway area. It has great access to museums as well. It has a beautiful kitchen and great windows. It is a little noisy due to street traffic but nothing too bad. Thank you for a great stay
Everything here was great! Linda was a kind and clear communicator and included many extra amenities around the house. The house was nice and comfy and in a great location. Highly recommend!
I loved my stay. It was in a walkable area and the room itself was clean and spaciest. I would definitely stay again if available.

I stayed in this unit for 10 days. I’m actually a local and have lived in Boston for the past 3 years so was quite familiar with the neighborhood. It was a great location and very close to both the orange and green lines. There is a Whole Foods within a 5 minute walk. Newbury St is a 10-15 minute walk and a straight shot. The bed was very comfortable and the living space was tidy/clean. I had some issues with the toilet while I was there but after two prompt visits from the plumber it was resolved. Overall a great stay, but you get what you pay for. There are definitely some minor things the hosts could do to enhance the stay.

We had a great stay!! The space is comfy and cozy, exactly as described, the most comfortable beds and very nice linens to match.  The location was perfect for us we used a combination of the T and Uber as needed to get around the city.  Also a close walk to the T station to get downtown to see all the sights. Terry was proactive and responsive in making sure we enjoyed our stay!  Would definitely stay here again if in the Boston area.

Fairly nice place in a very desirable neighborhood! It’s super cute. Bed was comfy, although the bottom bed frame is kinda broken, but it doesn’t affect the functionality of the bed. Getting into the airbnb is confusing at first, but got the hang of it eventually. The place was well kept and served its purpose! Would stay here again.

Peters place is an excellent choice while visiting Boston! Well equipped with everything you need to make your stay comfortable. A 5-7 min walk to public transit which is very easy to navigate. Would highly recommend and stay at again in the future.

The place was described accurately, the location was very convenient.
The communication was super efficient and the owner was helpful.
Love the simple and clean room. Great location. Quiet and comfortable.

Amazing view. High ceiling apartment. Lovely and central neighborhood. The host team are very responsive.
Please remember to coordinate your check in and check out time, cuz it’s 5pm check in.
The only hiccup is the hot water wasnt enough for showers. So you have to manage a timeline and take turns for taking showers.

I was very busy at the conference and didn't even manage to meet Brook, but her house is so cozy and welcoming that I always like home coming there. The room is spacious and nice, bathroom is clean, the mattress is comfortable! Also, the house seems to have better sound and heat isolation than many other houses. Very happy! Would totally stay again!
The airbnb was clean and nicely furnished. Evonify responses promptly to any questions or concerns.

It has it all. Friendly hosts, home feel, great neighborhood,  convenient restaurants, and lovely space. On top of that, the back yard is a dream space for remote work or a cocktail. Amazing-experience with these hosts!
Very nice setup; comfortable bed; attractive price. Great value
Great location for Fenway walking distance and so close to train to get to the north end.

It was exactly what I was expecting. Clean and fresh, I really enjoyed the style of the home. It was very close to the T station, so I could easily take the train to the main part of the city and other areas. I had a great time and would definitely go back to Boston again- and probably even stay at this place again :-)
Colbys place is not suitable for two guests, max two people. Also, walls are very thin and since her family lives there they will complain if you are too loud.
me ayudo por su cercanía a mis lugares de viaje.
We had a very nice stay. Catlin and Ryan were accommodating and communicative.

Gorgeous apartment in a distinct area of Boston. 10-15 min walk from
T stop.

Norah’s home in Beacon Hill was absolutely perfect! My husband and I walked everywhere or rode a city bike. Close to everything and this part of Boston is super dreamy. She also gave us great food recommendations- you must eat at Ma Maison! Only a few blocks away! I would most definitely stay here again.

Debbie was an amazing host and was very fast to reply to help in any way she could! We were short and asked for some additional towels, Debbie quickly was able to provide them as soon as she could!
The home is exactly as described, very clean and stocked with everything you'll need to do some cooking as well! Would 100% recommend to stay here with a group of friends without hesitation!
The beds were also very comfortable!
I had a great stay at Jessy and Diego’s apartment. It was bright and clean. The hosts responded very quickly to my communication. Would stay here again.
Had a wonderful stay. Good location and great hosts

I stayed at Terry's for 3 nights. The guest room was great! Very clean, and everything as promised was there. Terry's attention to detail and small details were much appreciated. Much better value compared to a hotel! Would definitely stay there again :-)

My dad and I were visiting in order to run the Boston half marathon. Terry and Mindy's place was perfect for what we needed. It was really close to the T, which took us easily to all the places we needed to go while visiting. The kitchen and bathrooms were clean, new appliances, supplied with anything you might need. There were even coffee filters, coffee (caff and decaf), and creamers in the fridge. That was a treat for me each morning. For sleeping, one of us took the bed, the other the sofa bed, and both mattresses were quite comfortable and it was a quiet neighborhood for our stay. I would stay here again. Thanks again!
This is my first airb＆b trip,even with heavy snow ，I still think it is nice ，the location is convenient to the Metro，the host is friendly，and the hostess is hardworking ，thanks Kristina !
Very communicative and kind! Comfortable and clean. We had a great time in Boston!

This is a great, well equipped apartment in a pretty street. Charlestown is charming and super convenient for the city. Gerard and Marie were so helpful and gave us tips on where to watch the 4 July fireworks and places to go with our two small children in the neighbourhood.
Absolutely great place in a central location. The keypad entries were a bit tricky, but otherwise everything was perfect.

Claire was a responsive host, and the check-in instructions were clear. The location felt very safe and quiet, a bit further from downtown, but well-connected by public transport. The room was very basic, but I was spending my whole days out and just sleeping there, so I didn't mind that. There was some other guest(s) in the house in the other room(s) but I didn't really meet them as it seemed like everyone was minding their own business (I could only hear someone walking to the kitchen or bathroom, etc.), there were no problems with the shared areas.
Great location. It’s downtown so it can get a little loud even at night.
great location, lots of room when traveling with your whole family! highly recommend!
Quaint apartment in prime Beacon Hill location! I would highly recommend.
The house is super clean and cute the room was spacious and cool enough to chill out in this hot weather
It was an amazing stay! I totally recommend it for everyone who wants to have a trip in Boston!
Good location and stay!

Jonathan's house is beautiful and airy, it is in a nice area where we could walk easily to the T or to the range of restaurants and bars nearby. We felt comfortable walking everywhere and Jonathan as a host couldn't have been nicer!
We had a great time and thought the room was stunning. Many thanks!
Beautiful place. Great location. Responsive hosts. Beds were comfortable, place was clean.
Reece and Karen were very honest and responsive with all our questions. Their space provided us a great place to stay at an affordable price. Would highly recommend!

We are not experienced Airbnb travelers, but we're pleasantly surprised at how accommodating Kristen was in making us feel at home!  The home is wonderful for trips with large or extended families, especially with young children.  We will be back!

This apartment is fine if you’re planning on only sleeping there. The location is okay. It’s about a 20-30 minute walk from most popular spots. The kitchen was outside of the apartment so we never used it, but there’s not much to use anyways. A few things were broken, and the bed was smaller than expected. We woke up a lot during the night from noises upstairs, and just from the building.
The apartment was immaculate. Beds and linens were amazing. Great location- will use for any future TD garden events!
If you're a bit adventurous, not a snob, this was a comfortable place to sleep and really convenient to public transit.

I was in town For Red Sox baseball and the Typical tourist stuff .. The house was located in a quiet neighborhood, was extremely clean and comfortable. We walked to nearby Restaurants, Uber to the airport and the game. We used the Subway to get to the Freedom trail area.
Kind and sincere hosting.

ホストのDemetriosさんは、しっかり夜中でも対応してくれましたが、滞在中に3Fに宿泊してきたゲストが夜中にパーティーや大騒ぎしたり、家具の移動や木製の床を歩き回る足音がうるさくて、まったく眠れませんでした。
上下階の音が気になる方や、お子様が小さくて早めの就寝を希望される方は、宿泊階数に注意が必要だと思います。
気になる様な事は、ホストのDemetriosさんに細かく問合せされることをおすすめします！
今回はありがとうございました。

I loved this place so much, the location was perfect and the hosts were so nice. This was my first time booking an AriBnB and the hosts really set the standard on how hosts should be for me. I will definitely be booking this place for the summer time

We had a great time at Bernard's place. It is only a short walk to the local trolley so you can easily transfer to a subway into downtown. The neighborhood is quiet and it is easily walkable ro a number of restaurants and coffee shops. There is even a grocery store within walking distance. Bernard was very communicative and helpful. Would definitely recommend.

Great communication and location. Perfect for a landing place after a long day of exploring Boston. Fit all our needs and helped us when we needed a place last minute! Could have been a bit cleaner/more updated, but it definitely did the trick and the beds were amazing.
Great location and hospitality was wonderful

Un accueil et une propreté irréprochable, je recommande fortement Aaron & Catherine!
Merci à vous pour votre hospitalité et votre gentillesse.
Great experience.... beautiful home.  Host very attentive and helpful.
Clean and comfortable!
Steven的地方非常好！与他们的沟通回复的也非常及时！非常非常宽敞的客厅！
Great place very spacious for 6-7 people
非常好的民宿体验，位置优越，生活方便，房东非常热心和贴心，是波士顿家庭出游的首选！
muy satisfecho lo recomendaría
Lindsay was very responsive and had a great place to stay! Close to everything by the Seaport and easy to find.

Fantastic place right by Boston Common!  Great location to bike, T, Ubers, etc! Condo was very clean inside and the kitchen was brand new!  The air condition worked fantastic and the bed was extremely comfortable. The bathroom was spotless and the living room was comfortable.  It’s difficult to find places in Boston to rent in this location. I highly recommend Anne‘s place! Thank you so much for sharing your home with us! :)
Great stay and great experience! Hope to come back again in future.

I think Michael is an excellent host. Very communicative and kind! I was traveling with an infant so he let me check in early and helped bring in my oversized luggage. (There are about 6-8 steps to get into first floor apartment.) The apartment is exactly as pictured but there is a third bedroom with a twin bed and desk not currently in listing. More space than I needed but others  would definitely appreciate. Parking was ample which was amazing! Beds kind of uncomfortable, low, and bedding pretty light but for a night or two is adequate. Unfortunately, it doesnt appear the cleaners had prepared for my stay. It was dirty when I arrived, especially the bathroom. I texted Michael and I believe he personally tried to clean. I have no doubt he will ensure a clean space in the future.
Clean, quirky, historic place to stay in Boston! Very quiet area and super responsive hosts.

The apt was very nicely decorated, the linens & towels were very nice and the Wifi worked great. Easy in/out and good bath amenities. It served our needs pretty well. It's a residential neighborhood and off the beaten path a bit so no coffee shops real close but a 20 min walk or so got us to the Dudley Cafe which was awesome or over to Mission Hill or Northeastern campus. Had no issues getting uber or over to Orange line trains. There is also a Hubway bike share nearby. Easy access to South End restaurants too. There are two queen beds that are very good. The
pull out couch mattress has nice linens and is pre-made but needs new springs for support. Overall worked well for our family as we moved one into college and spent a few days in town.
Great hosts and clean room. Check the commuter rail schedules in advance. And don’t miss out on the great breakfast!

Really enjoyed the airbnb and the location. Kitchen was not as fully equipped as we had hoped, and the TV wasn’t functioning properly. If we hadn’t brought our own laptop, we most likely wouldn’t have been able to enjoy the TV at all. Please fix the streaming device for the next customer as it was frustrating. Overall 9/10.
Great place! It was very comfortable and the hosts were very helpful and communicative. The place is in a great location. I would stay again.
good room to stay in. apartment close to the subway

The value of this location was great. the host was very helpful with suggestion for ears & drinks! With the ability to utilize driver apps such as LYFT & UBER, it made getting around town easy (depending on traffic / time of day of course).
If my travels consist of Boston anytime soon, I WOULD DEFINITELY book at this location again

We could not have asked for better accommodations for our group while visiting Boston. Our host was warm, friendly, responsive, and helpful in getting us situated. The home is absolutely gorgeous and well-maintained. We highly recommend this lovely home if you are visiting Boston.

We are thrilled about our stay here and would absolutely book again. The owners were very accommodating and receptive, we got immediate responses when we reached out.   The house itself had everything we needed for our family with two kids. All new appliances in the kitchen.  It’s in a terrific neighborhood with a short walk to a playground, coffee shops, and restaurants.  Also a short walk to the Arboretum.  The bedrooms were spacious.  This is a great spot for families with kids or if you just need a comfortable place to stay

Peter’s home was fantastic! The home was completely updated (and gorgeous), but still maintained the older touches, like original hardware and flooring (which is something I’ve always thought was beautiful). Peter stocked his home with everything a guest would need for a trip, including fantastic towels and all kinds of toiletries. Peter’s home is about a half hour transit ride from downtown Boston and Fenway Park, but much shorter if you have your own transportation. There was a minor hiccup at check in, but Peter resolved it in literally probably 3 minutes and was extremely easy to communicate with and responsive on all matters. He even provided us with recommendations for local breakfast, which did not disappoint. The bed was also extremely comfortable. I would love staying here again!
Well maintained & wonderful place to relax. Great food, fun & entertainment within walking distance
Perfect place for our bachelor party!
Nice studio appointment, very walkable to places in the city, would stay there for a weekend trip again.
Posizione
Great spot with great hosts! 10 min walk to the orange line to get you into the city. Will definitely visit again!
Overall a great place to stay! Everything was perfect!
A home feel place to live! Very good surrounding environment
Curtis was very helpful for my team.

Teeny-tiny, but clean, comfortable, and great for our purposes.  The listing was exactly as described.  We were only in town a couple nights and it was fun to be right on Newbury where there are tons of places to get something to eat or have a drink.  It was perfect for a weekend trip.
Great price and good location,  nothing to complain about honestly.
Taskin was a great host, extremely responsive and helpful.
What a lovely stay. Everything was exactly as advertised and the clear instructions made for an easy time. I would definitely stay there again. 10/10 Highly recommend.

Located in a quiet neighborhood within walking distance of Broadway and the Seaport. Brooke's home has lots of Boston charm. Unfortunately I missed her while I was there but she was very accommodating for my early check-in request. The room is on the second floor, and was surprisingly spacious and had plenty of storage (even a fridge!). The bathroom is essentially private, which was a pleasant surprise. But the best part was the bed. Oh my...it's heavenly! I would definitely stay here again.
Wonderful location and home and Robin was so friendly and helpful.
Was a lovely property, but not the safest area
Booked this place for my father and he enjoyed it very much! Lixia is a great host and always quick to respond.
This host was incredibly helpful when I couldn’t access my check in details! I truly appreciated his willingness to immediately help solve my issue to get into the beautiful and spotless unit!
Keith's place is beautiful, serene, and filled with mindfulness. I felt right at home and truly enjoyed my stay. Thank you, Keith, for welcoming me into your space.
Very nice spot & great host 10/10 I recommend
Big place, second floor, street parking, back porch without anywhere to sit.  It was a great price and location for our 5 member family for one night.
This is a lovely space with a large kitchen and lovely deck. It worked well for my partner and me and a friend who met us in Boston.

My husband and I had a great stay. The place is clean, comfortable and full of amenities.  I was attending a conference next to the Convention center and was able to get there in around 15 mins on a weekend and ~30 min on a Monday morning. Uber price around $10-20 depending on time. There is public transport close by too. Hosts are very nice.
A great spot to stay! Super neat and tidy, fantastic location, clear instructions for check-in, and the parking spot was a huge plus!
A hidden gem! Hope to be back soon. 10/10

We have stayed at Airbnb places for many years and Mechaal's place was one of our favorites. His space was comfortable and clean. There were many thoughtful amenities such as juice, coffee, and breakfast fixings in the kitchen, extra blankets, and nice toiletries.  Mechaal is a fabulous host - fast response, kind, helpful, and flexible. I hope we can return to Boston and stay at Mechaal's again someday!

Neat apartment, central location, good amenities to make you feel comfortable. Only complaint was the street and construction noise. Walls and windows are very thin which makes all the street noises very apparent.
What a perfect place to be able to enjoy the hubbub of the city and then relax in peace on the water!

This cozy space provided us with easy access to dining, the T, the Freedom Trail. We walked everywhere! We were able to do laundry on site. With windows open, there was considerable street noise, but mostly pleasant. Norah answered questions promptly. Great location.
Great location! Apartment is just like the pictures. Will stay again!
It is in the perfect location! Beacon Hill is a beautiful place. It is a great place to stay for couples. My husband and I loved it!

The listing was accurate.  The room was nice, and Thomas was a very thoughtful host who was very easy to contact and very responsive to questions.  The home was a convenient distance from downtown Boston, being an easy drive or train ride away.
Katarzyna was super accommodating! The apartment was very new and clean, and the location was a 2 minute walk to a train stop.
This place was comfy, quiet and close to everything!  A really great deal given the location and price.

Amazing location for Boston! The space was pretty clean. The bed was extremely comfortable. The only real issue I had was with the construction directly outside the window....it woke me up at 7 am. Check in was really easy just wish there was an earlier check in time since your paying almost 200 dollars for check in at 4 pm to check out 11 am (so, the value is a little questionable). Thank you again so much!
Xerxes's apartment was absolutely beautiful! We really enjoyed our stay and would highly recommend.
Great location. Comfortable apartment.

This was a convenient and clean apartment in the Financial District. It was nice to have two full baths and laundry. It's a quiet neighborhood on the weekends. Late check out ($50) was also a plus. Would stay again!
Great family, comfortable stay.
Great location, easy to get to, tons of communication and support!

I loved the dagny, as a matter of fact i originally had a flight last year I had to cancel and the dagny was my go to. It matched the pictures, the front reception was nice including the people. I definitely need another trip to Boston but for a much longer stay, as this was a short birthday trip. On my way out this morning “ 530 am” we were rushing to the airport and I forgot my 300$ beats  headphones on the bed . Completely my fault ! 🤦‍♀️ however I still haven’t heard back from the host . They were very responsive upon check in as I let them know my flight was delayed, but have yet to hear back after check out. I do hope to hear back from them soon. I was hoping my headphones could be mailed back home to me and I’ll cover the cost if host reaches out and if they were found. I can track them so I know they stayed at the dagny. If not I understand as it is my fault for rushing out this morning. Other than that the dagny is a great place to stay and I highly recommend it! Felt like ho
Awesome experience once again, thanks Thatch!
Lovely place, amazing location. Had a terrific stay.
A nice home, close to beach. We had two spacous rooms fo us. Very nice landlady.
Amazing place. Cleaner than clean!! You will 100% enjoy it!

This place was everything my wife and I needed for a week in Boston.
Location in back bay was amazing and Deluca’s market right outside the building is spectacular. It had a great wine cellar and an even better sandwich shop in it. We had a great time in Boston and this was a great home base for the week.

My stay was wonderful. The room was comfy and clean, bathroom clean and modern. The airport is close, but the plane noise was NOT distracting or too loud. I was there to go to Salem for Halloween so the drive North was about 40 mins. with no problems. The T train is about a 3 min walk that took me straight into central Boston and back. The ocean is very close so access to tons of beaches and lighthouses. It was so nice and I would stay there another time if I come back for another long trip to Boston. It was great!

The unit was a great location to explore Boston . Easy access to airport but airplane noise was not noticeable. Underground close 5 min walk takes you into town centre and access to Freedom Trail etc . Quick ferry crossing also in easy access. And a great restaurant just across the road. Second bedroom is quite tight for a couple but we managed fine. Rest of unit very spacious.

This has to be the best Air BNB I’ve ever stayed in the place is beyond clean and absolutely gorgeous inside all new appliances great snack selection and it’s all complimentary the bed was amazingly comfy over all great experience highly recommend the only note is parking is not readily available and very difficult to find so be very very mindful of that
Beautiful cute place in the middle of all the action of Backbay. We I’ll be back and refer my friend to this property. Very satisfied
Great host!
Very cute, clean, convenient location. Would recommend 10/10

Kristina was very accommodating and she let us leave our bags in the apartment before check in time so we can wander around the city.  The neighborhood is quiet and it made us feel like we were Boston residents rather than tourists. Its an upstairs unit and I'm glad we packed light because it would have been difficult to carry a heavy luggage up to the apartment.  The place is clean and has cable TV which enabled us to watch the Warriors game. We were there during the hottest day of the year and needed AC but had issues that was later resolved which we are grateful for.  The place is comfortable and spacious and we liked the sofa bed. We would stay here again and would recommend Kristina to future guests.
Jurek was awesome!  The space was beautiful!
Great location! Just what we needed!
Maverick’s was great as usual! This was my second time staying here and everything was great. The location is perfect and the area is super safe. Check in and check out was super easy
we found a great place to decompress and fully enjoy the beautiful neighborhood. everything is within walking distance and definitely helped us enjoy the city even better

I absolutely recommend this place to anyone who is staying in Boston. The house was very clean, well-marked, and had all of the amenities we could even think of. Boris and Susan were GREAT hosts. They were very communicative and were very clear with the instructions for check-in and check-out, as well as the stay itself. The entire process was very smooth and the house was exactly as advertised. I would absolutely come back any time!
Beautiful stay - nice porch in the back!

A lovely stay in the top floor apartment in the heart of Jamaica Plains. The space is really nicely decorated and very comfortable. Plenty of space, a lovely separate sitting room and very comfortable bed in the bedroom with a nice view of the tree tops. A very restful stay in a great neighborhood. Thanks Marianne.

The location is great in the heart of South Boston. This is a 3rd floor unit requiring a 4 flight walk up narrow stairs - not easy with heavy luggage.  Unit was clean and cozy.   I had several problems (no hangers, non-working bathroom light, TV, etc); the owner was quick to respond and remedy.

The place is exactly same as described. 5 mins walk to T station, very convenient. I think It’s an old building but inside looks recently renovated. Clean, comfortable and has all the amenities. The only complaint I would have is the wall is too thin and you can easily hear conversations and TV from the next door.
I enjoyed my stay at the Envoy Hotel. Lots of local activities within walking distance.

Nice, spacious, comfortable and clean apartment.  We were attending my daughter's graduation from NEU and thought Adriana and Gianni's place was in a perfect location.  My mom doesn't like to walk being almost 80 years of age, so we called upon Lyft much, thus cannot comment on walk-ability, however,  very close to Jackson Square subway entrance,  but also super easy access for taxis,  Lyft, etc.  Also really nice park across the street and a mini-market:  Marcella's!  We encountered nice people who worked at the market and patrons!  Hosts were very attentive to our inquiries!

A great place for a solo traveler to spend a few days in the city, with easy access to everything!
Excellent location with perfect walkability - a couple short blocks to the Park St station; plus, all the city tourist highlights are a short, easy walk away. The street is a quiet residential block which is peaceful overall with the exception of sirens passing on the main thoroughfares. The a/c unit kept the room cool in the summer heat wave and provided nice white noise at night. Although a small room, the "kitchen" area and supplies are sufficient for basic cooking.
As others mentioned, it's a climb to get to the unit, but that shouldn't be a deterrent unless you have physical disabilities. Be advised it's a very small space with several overhead hazards that may be an issue for taller people.
Great location!! First time in Boston and it was perfect for the couple nights we were there. Walking distance to a lot of things. Exactly what we were looking for.
great location
Chris and Samantha were amazing hosts. The place was beautiful and right in the amazing north end. We had a beautiful stay at their Airbnb. We absolutely will be back!
This was a great place to stay and you can find parking there which is difficult in Boston. Elisangela’s place was comfortable and welcoming. Thank you!

The location was perfect! Brian and Heather were very accommodating and understanding. We went as a group of 6 six girls and they were very patient and responsive. The apartment was beautiful and spacious!

Do yourself a favor and book here. Get some take out and watch a movie with incredible sound. Or maybe have a game night and listen to music on the full size dining room table.  Bonus perk, unwind in the jacuzzi tub or steam shower.  All in the heart of Boston. 10 out of 10 would recommend.
Very comfortable place and very clean. The room's size is great and really comfortable. The bathroom is shared but very clean and modern. Really recommend!
Overall was happy about the space. very clean & a good location. would have been nice to know there is no parking close by, 4 flights of stairs to walk up and no AC.

Great stay! Super convenient to BU and sites downtown. Really quiet and clean, comfy bed, cold a/c, and helpful hosts who resolved a minor issue with electrical outlets within minutes. We will return!

Great budget-friendly place to stay for a couple or small family
Location is a few mins walk to Northeastern and a short walk to Boston Medical. Good small playground for kids at the nearby park at NE. Easy walk to MFA. You can get to Back Bay in about 25 mins walking.
Location is convenient but it's the border between the south end and a rougher patch. Coming from a major city its nothing really, but as a young family we weren't hanging around outside at night. Never felt unsafe during the day/evening and we walked most everywhere
Boston is beautiful. Flour bakery and cafe is great and about a mile walk. Whole foods is the nearest grocery and it's about a half mile. There is a cvs right across from the whole foods

Daryl was a great host.  Responded quickly to all inquiries prior to our stay.  Gave us suggestions in the area!  His place was clean, well stocked and comfortable. Easy walk, about .3 miles, to bus which connected us to T to easily get downtown!! We would definitely stay again!

Everything was great!  We did send a message asking a question when we were about to check in and never got a response; however, we figured it out on our own and there was lots of information once we arrived so not a big deal.  Just thought the day of check-in some response should have been sent.

Great room in a beautiful historic location. Very cozy and comfortable with everything you need. Perfect for resting up after exploring the city all day, or just staying in and braving the weather and watching movies if need be.
All around great
Nice comfortable accommodations with well done new modern renovations all at a great price.
Great stay, super convenient location for airport. Big and clean space with great ammenities. We met Shelley briefly at check in and she was lovely - recommend  :)

Hi,
This place was safe and central to everything. The others that posted about druggies hanging outside are way over exaggerating the situation. There is a 7-11 on the corner and they are all homies. No one really hangs out there long term. There are a few that come there to buy smokes but at no point did I feel unsafe. Host was amazing and the location makes the place amazing

I loved staying at 94 Charles.  The location is absolute perfection.  The building is older but the unit was great.  Very clean and it was nice to have a kitchen.  They have bare minimum items in the kitchen but it was everything we needed.  There was even a little coffee to make a pot before getting your own.  In addition there is a great market with a deli and also a hardware store right up the street if you wanted to pick up some things.  The street is filled with great places to eat and is so close to the Commons. I had a little trouble getting Thatch to respond to a request for additional towels (we ended up doing fine) and the thermostat was hard to control so it got a little hot in the apartment.  When I did hear from them they were very apologetic and like everyone a bit short staffed.  I would go back in a heartbeat.
3b apt with everything you need. Free parking is a big plus.

Polly ist definitiv ein sehr guter Gastgeber.
Polly ist definitiv eine sehr gute Gastgeberin.
Die Kommunikation verlief reibungslos und wir konnten sogar unser Gepäck vor der vereinbarten Zeit unterbringen.
Das Haus und die Zimmer sind genau wie beschrieben und auf den Bildern abgebildet. Alles sauber und aufgeräumt. Die Küche und der Fitnessraum können benutzt werden. Alle alltäglichen Dinge (Zucker etc.) sind vorhanden.
Das Haus im Viktorianischen Stil wurde liebevoll mit allen Details hergerichtet. Es liegt idyllisch auf einem kleinen Hügel von dem man die T train Haltestelle innerhalb von 15 Minuten zu Fuß oder 5 Minuten mit dem Auto erreichen kann.
Und tatsächlich der Kaffee steht morgens frisch zubereitet und griffbereit in der Küche...
Sobald wir wieder nach Bosten kommen sollten ist Polly unsere erste Adresse.
Eileen is very nice and accommodating. The apartment is clean, location is great for people coming for the city. We truly enjoyed our stay.Thank you Eileen!
Good comfy bed close to BU!

Very nice and clean room conveniently located about  a 10min walk from the Park st, Govt Center T stops. The kitchenette was handy and our stay was comfortable. Very easy contactless entry to the building and room. Highly recommend!
Very good communication, very nice place. Exceeded our expectations!

We stayed for just one night while my daughter was visiting a college in the Boston area, and we both wish we could have stayed longer!!! Anh was very hospitable, replied quickly when we struggled with the code despite it being 1am, and the complimentary snacks, coffee, and tea were lovely. The bathroom was pristine and the room was well kept, and we were provided with every amenity we could have possibly needed. 10/10 recommend for anyone visiting Boston.
This apartment is exactly as nice as described. And thats right next to some of the finest and historical nabourhood you'll get in the US.
This Airbnb is in the perfect location with a lot of must-see Boston spots within walking distance. It was cute, clean, and affordable. I would definitely stay here again!
Merveilleux logement que je conseillerais à mes amis, endroit tranquille
Everything was as promised, very responsive and prompt
As long as you can park in the parking garage, the place is perfect!!

Overall, a good stay and a nice host. AC was weak, and so was the WiFi. We asked in advance if we could leave the bags and received a positive response, but when we got there and asked where to put them, we were told they would be kept in an open space where anyone can reach them.

Lihua was an amazing host, and her place was spotless and so well-furbished just as described. Even with flight delays and a severely late check-in time, Lihua was super understanding and communicative. It was truly a pleasure to be able to stay here -- especially for my first time visiting Boston!

This is a great place to stay
I was in this apartment for almost two weeks and enjoyed it very much.
They wifi works fine , the air conditioning is good and the kitchen is well equipped.
The only thing I had problem with was the noise in the street because they were fixing the street right outside and was very loud

Soggiorno perfetto! Padroni di casa piacevoli e discreti! Sono stati premurosi con noi e ci hanno lasciato usare il porch a nostro piacimento. Casa deliziosa, arredata con gusto, in un quartiere da film!
Very nice house
Great updated space within walking distance of Fenway.

Jonathan is a very responsive and friendly host. his attention to details when he sent the instructions about the airbnb (e.g. check-in, check-out, house rules and house amenities) is such that I felt right home from the first second I stepped foot in the airbnb. I had a great stay - I recommend this place to anyone looking for a cozy place in a quiet neighbourhood
Had a monthly stay there. Perfect location, clean and comfortable room.
As described. Clean house, easy parking on premises. Close to Harvard.

We opted for the early check-in and late check-out, and arranging this with the hosts was easy and pleasant! They are so friendly and responsive when I had questions.
The location couldn’t have been better - walking out the door and seeing the Common was magical and convenient to everything, being steps from the T.
It rained a little but didn’t matter, as the place was a comfortable, fun place for our group to hang out to wait it out (love all the exposed brick). The beds were all comfortable and everything was so clean, it felt like new. I would highly recommend!

My husband and I stayed for 4 nights. We had a lovely time in Boston. The apartment was comfortable and everything was provided, including some breakfast bits left in the fridge for us.
There were towels, toothbrushes and a hairdryer available and wifi was quick :-).
The apartment is in a lovely, trendy part of Boston. Nice restaurants close by bu no cheap eats locally. Local supermarket 5 mins walk away.
Center of town was a good 15 minutes walk but not a problem. Nice and close to Back Bay station.
Thanks!

Shelly was very sweet and helpful. She gave me great recommendations for dinner and responded pretty much instantly to my messages. I even overheard her making plans to walk with another guest to the airport to get her to an early morning flight on time - truly above and beyond. :) The common space is set up in a very intelligent, organized way and had amenities I wouldn’t have expected for the price. Great value and location.
Word of advice to light sleepers - it is close to the freeway, and I slept with the window open as an extra COVID-19 precaution, so bring earplugs if noise makes you have trouble sleeping.
That said - it’s literally 5 minutes to the terminal, so my mom texted me to wake me up as her plane touched down at 5:45am, and actually I had time for a shower before leaving to pick her up without making her wait at all. Awesomesauce!
Thanks for allowing me to stay.

Perfect location for a long weekend touring Boston!  Directly across from the Boylston T which made it easy to travel all over the City.  Adjacent to Boston Common and right near where the Freedom Trail starts.  Was great for our family of 4 (mom/dad/20F/18M), where a regular hotel would be way too cramped.  Only complaint was the a/c in the main area didn't cool too well, luckily our last 2 days allowed us to open windows but being in a busy area it was very loud beginning at 4am.  Otherwise was perfect!

The positives: the apartment is in a great location and super walkable to a lot of really great restaurants, coffee shops and tourist attractions. The hosts were very communicative. The negatives: the apartment is really old and needs a refresh and deep clean. Many electrical sockets were not working, bathrooms are very old and mildewy (and some horrible gunk came out of the jacuzzi tub when we filled it) and the air con units and fans were caked in dust. There is a very old elevator in the building which others have complained is often not working. It was working when we arrived and up until the point it stopped with my husband still in it! He was trapped for 30 mins until it suddenly started moving. To add on to that there was some sort of demonstration from 7am to 9pm every day (banging drums and shouting/singing on megaphones) so it was really unpleasant stay in the apartment during these hours. Appreciate not under hosts control but a heads up would have been appreciated.

Great place to stay, very homey.  Close to the T stop, we were able to walk to two different stops (both on the orange line) and travel around the city easily.  There are some great restaurants close by.  The stop n shop and Whole Foods are both a reasonable walking distance.  Would definitely stay there again.

We were visiting our daughter who lives in Boston and could not have chosen a better place to stay. Blocks away from tons of cute coffee shops, restaurants, and a nice walk to Newbury street shopping! Laura made sure we had everything we needed. Thank you Laura and Myrna!
Well, the place was cleaned. Feels like you’re home. Walking distance from the restaurant and store as well to my son’s place. ‘Hoping next time we can stay more longer. Thank you again.
Lovely place to stay. Very close to the train. Very clean and helpful host.
Really nice and cute place. Jean Luc was extremely helpful and made sure our stay was comfortable. Affordable, good location and super cleanliness.

This is the perfect location and home for exploring Boston. It is near good public transportation stops and walking distance to many parks and the beach. Bill and Maureen stock their rooms and shared pantry with lovely snacks, treats and amenities. Our room was comfortable, very clean and a joy to return to after a day of exploring.
great view quiet large space

Very nice place in smack in the middle of Boston's North end. Excellent food opportunities nearby. The apartment is tucked away in a small quiet street. The apartment is very accommodating and we felt immediately at home.  The description is very accurate and place we very clean. We enjoyed our stay very much.

The location is what makes this Airbnb. It’s super centrally located, within walking distance of so much. Bed was comfy and the apartment had everything we needed, but one window AC unit in the living room was definitely not enough for the summer heat. Check in and out were super easy and overall we really enjoyed our stay.
My friend and I were staying in Boston for a concert and Ali's place was perfect! Very close to Maverick station and in a safe neighborhood. Both host always replied fast and were very helpful.
Our stay was just what we had expected! The room was really nice and the snacks were super nice, since we didn't have time to go grociery shopping! Hope to be back someday.
Lovely place to stay, will definitely keep in mind when in the city again!
Beautiful place! Much better than described!
Great location! Walkable to Fenway, tons of great restaurants and shops, and public transportation. Perfect for our short stay in Back Bay. Responsive and helpful host. Would definitely come back!

Pamela’s place was very comfortable and well-equipped. We really appreciated the convenience of having two parking spaces. The rooms were cozy, spotless, and thoughtfully arranged. Pamela provided everything we needed for a seamless stay.
The apartment is about a 20-minute drive to downtown Boston, making it easy for us to explore top attractions like the Freedom Trail, Harvard, MIT, various museums, and a wide array of great restaurants.
Pamela was a very attentive host and always responded promptly to our messages. One of the standout features of our stay was the stress-free check-out process. Unlike some Airbnb hosts who charge a high cleaning fee and still require guests to strip beds, take out the trash, etc., Pamela had no check-out demands—the cleaning crew handled everything. This was a huge relief as we had to catch a flight.
Pamela made our stay in Boston truly enjoyable, and we will book her place again the next time we visit Boston.

All in all everything was great. I didn’t realize the train was next to the house but it wasn’t too loud and it didn’t run between midnight and 5am. House was great but didn’t get to spend much time on roof deck. Would book again and recommend to family and friends (as a matter of fact I already have)

At first Zipporah communications were very slow. The instructions are not very clear on where to locate the keys. Thank goodness there was someone there to help us. Once we finally were able to check in this place was great. The street parking is very iffy if you can find a spot. The unit was very clean and you are able to lock the units main door. There were zero check out instructions only a time to be out.
I would visit again
Great stay! The place is cute and in a great location!

We really enjoyed our stay! Their place was so cute and very nice inside. Clean, great amenities and little extras like guidebooks, shampoo, toothpaste, etc. Katherine was very helpful with lots of local tips and suggestions. Would definitely recommend!

Joseph was very helpful as we needed a place ASAP for an unexpected trip.  He responded quickly to my questions.  The place was clean and had lots of space.  Great stay. Thanks!

Very home-like and was complete with all the necessities. Stayed one night for a quick trip and is write in front of the train station. Modestly but creatively furnished and has all the comforts of a modern apartment.
