Fantastic location for exploring Boston and Cambridge. Tim and Giannoula were very helpful and quick with their communications. The apartment is so charming and homey with great personal touches. Very cute space, awesome location and great communication with the host!

I admire both the husband and wife hosts of the apartment. They are wonderful and responsive persons. Whenever I sent any issue, they tried to solve at once. Ehab treats his guest as would treat friends and family visiting his home. His kitchen was stocked with coffee, cookies, milk, fruits and several other goodies. All for the guests. When I asked him why he is so generous? He said he wants his guests to feel they are staying in their own house.

The location was nice, close to a cafe and some parks within walking distance. The space was a little bit smaller than I expected based on the pictures, but it was cozy and comfortable! We only stayed for a night and it was perfect for that! Love the aesthetic and coziness!

Leslie’s place is in the perfect location to walk to most everywhere in Boston with transportation being nearby.
Leslie is a super host with outstanding communication. Check in instructions made arrival go smoothly. Leslie was flexible with our check out making our last day enjoyable instead of hurried.

Very well located.  Everyone will be extremely satisfied with this spot.  There is a bit of homelessness about, but no more than any big city.  Place was clean and we felt safe.

Great neighborhood and convenient access to Boston Commons.  We will stay here again if we are back in Boston.  Host was very accommodating to leave luggage before and after checkout - which was a big valuable bonus.

Great location. Very quiet place and has privacy. Also easy to check in and get inside. The host responded immediately when I needed anything. The building and room inside are very clean I recommend everyone and I’ll come back for a stay again!!

Location, location, location! This place was wonderful! It had everything we were looking for in a stay. As stated previously, the location was great. Only about three-ish blocks away from the Tufts Medical Center Orange line stop, so getting home each night was super easy (and very safe, even late at night). And the Boston Common park is also very easy to get to.
The house itself is very old and you can feel that when you walk in. Everything Paul states in the description is true. Stairs are steep and narrow, and you can see the exposed floor joists when you look up at night. It really gives this place character. I loved staring up at the ceiling at night and imagining the history behind this place.
Now, this isn't for the bougie tourist. It's an old house, and you know that going in, so don't expect to be in the Ritz-Carlton. Door knobs are old, some doors don't quite close correctly, and the floors creak like they are almost original. AND THAT'S THE COOL PART! I loved every minute of it!
As for the functionality of the house, everything worked as it was supposed to. There is a gas stove for cooking and we had all the pots and pans we needed. The AC only had to be run a few days and it was able to keep up just fine (we never used the heat, but it uses radiators).
The downstairs room was perfect for our oldest teenager. He was able to choose which bed to sleep in and loved the privacy (you can't hear anything from the main floor, if you are in the basement). And, since there wasn't a door, we just announced ourselves when we came down. Our youngest slept in the back bedroom on the second floor and we slept in the front. The beds were fine and we had no issues sleeping. It's also a very quiet neighborhood, so most people are in by the time it gets dark.
For food, that was a little tough for us (eating out in Boston is crazy expensive). Yes, Whole Foods is nearby, but they don't carry the kind of food that we typically buy. I'm not an 'organic, free range' buyer. I shop at Publix and Target. So Whole Foods was a bit of sticker shock when we got the bill for the same things we buy at those other stores. We ended up taking the Red line to the JFK/UMass stop and went to Star Market. That was closer to our kind of grocery store. Also, make sure you take your own bags, which Paul provides plenty of in the kitchen cabinet! Massachusetts charges you for each bag you use, if you don't take your own.
Mike and Patty's is an excellent breakfast place on the next block. I recommend the grilled crack. You won't be disappointed!
Overall, we are totally satisfied with Paul's house and would definitely stay again if we ever came back to Boston.
Thanks again, Paul! This was an excellent stay!
The room is very clean and tidy. Everything here is so nice. I enjoy my stay with Lori. She is super nice.

The little side street was a little tough to navigate (we came right before Boston's big moving weekend so a few neighbors were packing up) but there was off street parking which was great!
Very cozy
Awesome home in a great location! We have stayed here many times in a couple of different rooms.  Robin is a amazing host and is extremely helpful! We will be back again!

Fantastic home. Comfortable and clean.  Great neighborhood and surrounding area.  Food, Drinks, and Shopping.  All this falls short though compared to the amazing service from the host.  Let us check in early due to our flight being there early.  Had complimentary food and drinks.  Easy instructions on local cuisine.  Even help us with transportation for the next morning.  HIGHLY RECOMMEND.

Great stay. 9 of us shared the house to visit our son who is at northeastern and go to NY ranger game
House was beautiful and spacious

Great stay while I worked in Boston for a short term stay! Close to public transportation, grocery stores, and restaurants.  Todd is a very responsive host and addressed the very few issues I had. Would highly recommend!

Very nice room with climate control, use of kitchen, on street parking.
Nicely redone rooms, great hosts when you meet them
Robin was a great host! Super informative about the location and travel systems. The house/room was clean and she even provided us coffee and a light breakfast. Plus her house is really cool :)

Bill’s place was perfect for our large family. We loved having the whole house to ourselves with plenty of parking and great places to hang out.   Very clean with everything we needed.  Bill was very responsive anytime we contacted him.
Alex’s home is exactly as advertised: close to public transport, very welcoming and cozy. We loved our stay in Roxbury and would definitely stay again.
Exactly like the pictures! Absolutely will stay again
Beautifully decorated and pristine space in a quiet neighborhood! Kenneth is a very generous host and we are grateful to have stayed in his upstairs apartment.

Historic townhouse located in a wonderful neighborhood.  Quiet and garden like with two large bedrooms on the ground floor along with a backyard patio retreat.  The second floor is a large livingroom with a dining and kitchen area.  Beautifully decorated and has every amenity at hand.  Our hosts were gracious and responded to our calls.  We travel all over the country with our dog and this location was the best I have found with a nearby dog park and many streets to walk about.  If you are looking to explore the this wonderful city, this a great location.

Loved staying here. It was easy to find, easy parking, close grocery store, nice location. The air bnb was cozy and clean and had everything we needed. Peter was super easy to get a hold of and him and his wife were super friendly. Highly recommend.

This is an absolutely gorgeous space. We vacationed with our 3 daughters (ages 20, 17, and 14). They were able to have their own floor in the house which was convenient. The top floor was our space and it was spectacular. The only issue we had was it was HOT!  We happened to be vacationing during a heat wave and the AC was struggling. We really loved the location. The close T stop allowed us to get everywhere. We also walked to the grocery store, Walgreens, and liquor store. The neighborhood felt very safe to us. We’ve stayed in a number of AirBnBs and this was one of the best. If the 3rd floor could have been a little cooler it would have been perfect.
The house was very clean and the location near the T was extremely beneficial

My son and I enjoyed our stay here. We felt safe and it was a quiet neighborhood. The place was clean and the beds were comfortable. I would stay here again and would recommend for anyone who wants to stay close to the main roads but in a quiet area. If you have a car it’s a great place. Includes parking.

great place to stay for our boston trip. very walkable area and plenty of great stuff nearby. the apartment was bigger than i expected and had plenty of space for four of us - two separate bedrooms and two futons in the living room.
Great location, friendly service
Super easy to find, very clean and cute apartment, and it was in a good central part of Allston!
Great location, very clean and check in was super easy.
Great spot in the middle of everything!
The place was amazing. The location could not be better, restaurants and cafe’s everywhere. Loved it.
Great value
Aangenaam verblijf met super aardige host!

Emily was a warm, friendly, and responsive host during my stay. Emily provided good directions to the suite and checked in on me to make sure that I was comfortable.
The suite was very clean, cozy, close to the T stop, and perfect for myself during my stay. Self check-in was easy as well.
I would definitely recommend Emily as a host and this suite to anyone who would like to explore Boston or the JP area. I thoroughly enjoyed my stay. Thank you so much again, Emily!

Overall this place worked well for my brother and I.
Pros: Location (a block from Boston common and many T lines), internet, air conditioning, and hot water worked well.
Cons: 5 flights up was not ideal, the place is very small (efficiency), the second bed is a cot, the host was not responsive with my questions until the day before.

Paul made check in very easy and the place was very clean with everything we needed for our stay. You cannot beat the location, it was close to a playground on the commons and a grocery store, as well as central to everything in Boston. Our only problem was that if you want to use the sofa bed in the summer, it is right next to an internal air conditioner and made it too loud to sleep. Without it on, the bedroom in the back was too hot. But this would only be a problem if you planned to have more than two people staying there on a hot day in the summer.
I have stayed with Healing Homes on several occasions. They all have been and this unit is no exception. Great location, clean, well stocked, easy check in, and safe.
Maverick was very responsive and professional. My questions were answered quickly and the space looked exactly like the pictures. Thank you

We had a fantastic time at your place. It was in a great location, with great service, and even better people. I would definitely recommend this for any one who is going to be traveling to Boston and we plan on coming back on our visit!

Daniel’s 3 bedroom home was impeccable.
Every detail considered. I had 2 special requests come up during our stay (snagged my pants on the plane, and Daniel brought me a sewing kit! And My disabled son needed a lightweight pitcher to pour ice tea we made each day and Daniel found the perfect pitcher! ). I can’t say enough about how great this host has been to help make our stay perfect! Thank-you.

Gyönyörű környezet, nyugodt, tiszta szállás. A szállástól könnyen besétálható, vagy a közeli megtrómegállóból egyszerűen tovább a távolabbi helyekhez. Arra érdemes számítani, hogy a falak nem jó hangszigetelők, de ezzel együtt is ajánlom. Néhány napos Bostoni tartózkodásra számunkra kiváló szállás volt.
This was a great location and sty for the Boston Marathon weekend. The hosts were accommodating and the place was beautiful and perfect for our party of 5!
Warm stay in a warm neighborhood!

Even though Andre and I didn’t get to meet face-to-face because of my intense school schedule, he was very communicative  and all the essentials were on hand. He was very respectful of my space and privacy and barely noticed his presence. Great experience overall, and I will definitely be staying again next time I’m in town!
There is very nice places that make Mỹ weekend perfect.

It was a pleasant experience. Evonify is a great host.
Clear instructions, realllly fast wifi (350+ mbps), homely, great kitchen stuff, easy check out.
Beds were a little too soft for us. We couldn’t find the chopping board.
Despite the minor issues, would definitely stay here again.
GREAT PLACE AND A WONDERFUL HOST

This place was very conveniently located. Easy to get around Boston either by bus or train. Walking distance to Copley Square. Only complaint would be how much of  the street noise you can hear, but with a busy city and old buildings you have to expect it. Overall, great stay and would recommend.

This home met all of our expectations! Location was perfect and we were close to every place we wanted.
We would love to come back next year!
Great location and very clean! Would stay here again.

Pros:
- close to things to doc (back bay, walking the bridge over charles etc)
- host is responsive and catered to our needs
- spacious and bright living room
Cons:
- no a/c in bedroom so if you close the door to sleep it might get stuffy with just the small fan in there
- shower pressure is on the low side, and no bath mat nor shampoo/body wash etc
- housekeeping crew did not clean the coffee grinds from the last guest
Overall a decent stay, some home improvements and nice touches from the host would have made the stay more homey.
Great location, walkable to everything.

Everything was great! The only thing I would say is the Wi-Fi was a little spotty and the door didn’t lock properly which I let the host know and they were on it! Great stay. Close to everything and felt like home.
Please check ahead with the host to be sure the elevator is working. It’s a seventh floor walk-up with semi-circular stairs.
It was all right for one night. The house was  rather dirty and needing renovation and maintenance.

This Airbnb is a great deal, comfortable - stays warm enough without a heater too, has a microwave and good amenities, nice bathroom, it’s a perfect location for where to stay in Boston, esp. if you love Italian food.  Wonderful spot with a good host, great communication, and we would highly recommend it!!

This Airbnb is located perfectly near everything you need when visiting Boston for the first time. We were very pleased not only with the unit but also with the communication from the hosts. Thank you so much and definitely will consider starting here again!
Cute little room; just what we needed for a quick visit to Boston!

Andres was extremely helpful, from making up the couch (second bed) to advice on parking and local eateries.  Beds were comfy, kitchen clean, shower with plenty of very hot water and above all great location.  We were pretty much Boston first timers and so we spent a lot of time wondering Beacon Hill in all directions.  Wonderful visit!
We loved our stay and had an awesome time. Its a beautiful place. We were also really close to the downtown Quincy Market area. We would definitely stay here again.
Fantastic location

When my flight was canceled for weather-related reasons, I was responsible for finding a place to stay overnight. I am beyond happy to have found Boris and Susan’s home. It actually exceeded its stellar reviews, which hardly seems possible.
Everything about this Airbnb experience was perfect. They responded within minutes of my making the booking with clear and detailed instructions. I was in my room within an hour. The location is SO convenient to the airport, but also to other parts of Boston, which I had a chance to visit.
Most important to me always is cleanliness, and this place was spotless. And, it is truly beautiful. I couldn’t have asked for a better experience. I already have an interested friend, and I will definitely stay here my next time in Boston. Thank you!

Had an excellent experience in Foster’s beautiful sunny apartment! The location is great and walkable to nearby restaurants and shops. There is also easy access to running/walking paths and public transit. Perfect for two couples or a family of four!
Great host, friendly and fast communication, nice apartment, would love to come back.

This apartment is nice enough and is well located in downtown Boston.
While the host company is fairly prompt with communication, they are happy to blame the lack of cleanliness of the apartment on their outsourced cleaning staff (who it should be noted do not wear masks). I arrived to a unit that had not been adequately cleaned — the bathroom (sink, tub) were dirty (hair in the drains), there was no soap (hand soap, bath soap, etc.) anywhere in the apartment, and it was clear that the main area had not been mopped or swept since the last folks stayed.
I don't believe this unit meets the basic cleanliness standards of an AirBnB — regardless of the COVID-19 pandemic. It took two days into my five-day stay for the owners to have the place adequately cleaned, and their passive-aggressive messages along the way were particularly unappreciated.
Very clean place and the hosts were extremely responsive!
This is a beautiful home. The hosts were great ! So flexible and responsive. Train was 12-15 minute walk which wasn’t so bad. Overall great experience.
We had a great stay at Stone’s place. Excellent, central location close to everything. The staff downstairs at The Little Whale were very accommodating as well.
This place was even more beautiful in person! My friends and I had a wonderful girls weekend here shopping and enjoying all the restaurants the location as to offer
Super central to everything in the back bay! Fenway, newbury street, the Pru… all right in the heart of it all! Would stay here again bc of the location!
My friend and I stayed here for a concert. I was close the the MGM Music Hall and restaurants. Nice and quiet area. Clear instructions to check in
Such a great place. Unbeatable location and beautiful energy. 10/10, would recommend.

I had a lovely stay at Booker's house. The room was very spacious and cozy.
I shared a lovely and interesting conversation with Booker that I really cherished.
nothing to complain -- everything was clean and communication was smooth.

Clean and centrally located! Great restaurants and shopping nearby.
Quick entrance to public transportation!
Super comfy and clean with labeled cabinets which were very helpful.

Apartment fits the photos. Host provided instructions, and key retrieval was easy. Walked about 20 minutes to building through the Boston Common, which was nice as I packed lightly. Easy walk to multiple T lines from the listing (Arlington stop and Chinatown stop). Many food options and CVS nearby
Great location near the historic district. Walking distance to everything you need.

Good location, central and close to everything: shops, restaurants and walking distances to public transit. Friendly and lively neighborhood, enjoyed the city noise, but might be inconvenient for people who like to sleep in the morning.
Really nice place, te area a little noisy at night but the place is worth the price.
Clean, spacious, and a good location- we had a great trip.

We stayed at Heidi’s place for a weekend - there were 5 of us and we had plenty of space. We enjoyed the backyard/patio and were able to walk to restaurants/coffee shops. We enjoyed our stay and would stay again if we ever travel back to Boston.

Great little place in a cute area of Boston!  Apartment is spacious and surprisingly quiet considering how convenient a lot of great local restaurants are nearby.  Andrea was a wonderful host, even giving me tips on where to find live music which was a fun addition to our trip!

Bon emplacement et maison avec tout ce qu'il faut pour une famille avec 2 enfants. Cependant la literie,matelas de la chambre familiale à changer, trop mou,pas confortable.
Merci pour ce séjour
Great place!
Last minute and was great place will book again

Great apartment! Quiet area & the bed so comfortable. good communication with the host.
The Apartment was very clean & it was nice to be out of the downtown area. Parking & the patio was plus. Thanks again!
I’ve stayed with Lihua twice now and I will continue whenever I come to Boston. She is so nice and her brownstone is beautiful. Perfect place to stay

The Fenway location is super convenient.
Space is compact, new and super clean. Stunning staircase.
Didn’t see the elevator until I took my suitcase up the stairs.
The worst part of the visit was an extremely loud guest next door. Talking very loudly till 3:30 am!!! Thin walls.
No one to fix this and was only able to complain via Airbnb text!!
Still, for the price, I’d come again.
Perfect place for an extended trip.
Very clean, lovely view. Great location, right near many shops and restaurants. Smaller than I expected but overall very nice.

Good place for an overnight stay close to the airport.
Really easy to get to and comfortable after a long flight.

Had a, very enjoyable stay in Boston
We really only washed & slept here
Beds are very comfy and all the linen/towels were spotlessly clean
You could easily rustle up your own food as the kitchen had every utensil known to man!
My wife said I must mention the toiletries which were good quality
We wouldn't hesitate to recommend this apartment
It's old / quirky but very comfortable
Thanks, Mary
Everything was excellent!

I have stayed here multiple time and it is consistently EXCELLENT! Everything you could look for (Safe, quiet and clean) and more! Close to everything in the area and Robin’s hospitality is unmatched. STRONGLY RECOMMENDED!!!!
Perfect for a short stay, super clean and a very comfortable bed.

The apartment was conveniently located close to the train which was a short ride to the Museum of Fine Arts and downtown. It was small, but was fine for me to stay a few days and had everything I needed. It was cozy and I felt safe. I would stay here again for my next trip to Boston.
Great place with awesome location. stayed >10 days and everything was perfect.

Celia was so helpful when we needed her. other times we came and went which was really great!
Thanks
Great for a couple. A little tight with four adults
Your apartment is great and the location fantastic.

Steven and Healing Homes was extremely responsive and had clear communication. The place was as described. It was indeed noisy at night, but it tapered off after 12am and only on one night (we stayed Monday to Friday). Overall had a great time!
Charming quiet spot close to Boston attractions
Enjoyed my stay
Helen is very responsive, polite and caring. I had a good stay at her place.
Gospodarz cały czas odpowiadał na nasze pytania, bardzo pomocny.
Jim was great

Amazing location. Cute apartment. Perfect for a couple.
As other reviews state, if you're not in shape or OK with climbing several stairs every trip; this one will be tough.
Newbury street is lively, so it was a bit loud even through the night (weekdays and weekends).
Jonathan's home is very clean! Perfect for two people! Very close to the heart of Boston.

They put us in a different room than the one listed here, which is fine as it's a hotel, but it definitely wasn't quite as nice (the window faced a brick wall), the rooms didn't have any microwave or refrigerator, which may be declared in this listing, but I didn't realize it. Also, it wasn't quite as stylish as I expected from these photos, not that style really matters. Check-in was easy and great, the staff were very nice, the bed was comfortable, but there were hairs all over the cover so that was a bit disturbing. I didn't use it – I only hope the hairs just stuck to the bed cover due to that type of fabric and static in the dryer, and not because they weren't clean. Besides the hairs, the bedding and the room and bathroom did seem very clean. Overall it was a fine stay.

Central location in Boston near the Orange and Red lines which is very convenient.  The place has nice high ceilings and very quiet (despite being in the heart of Boston).  The place was very clean, the beds were comfortable, and overall more living space than you would get at a hotel.
Endroit idéal près des services et du transport en commun. Logement qui correspond bien à la description. Idéal pour une personne seule ou un couple.
Charles was a great host. Everything was perfect.  Thanks for the stay!

Everything was accurately described in her posting. I knew exactly what to expect and when I had questions  her response rate was within the 24 hour period. The entire place was clean, organized, and the bathroom was stocked with personal care supplies. I had no issues with adjusting the water temperature when showering. The microwave was clean and worked. The mini fridge in my room kept my drinks cold. The size of the room was not any issue for me at all. There was no TV in the living room or my room but I had some issues using the Wifi. Manuela was attentive about this matter. The AC was used but it seemed only the Power button worked. I didn’t feel like it blasted cold air especially after returning from a hot day of walking around. I am not sure if the entire apartment had a specific setting. You can expect other guests to be respectful and quiet. I slept well every night and the bed was firm and comfortable. The pillows were plushy and soft.The place was only a couple of minutes away from bus stop 44 which takes you to Nubian Station. The neighborhood was inactive and quiet. It seemed fine to walk around by foot. There are lots of stairs. They are all pretty steep especially the outside  stairs. This may not be kid friendly so just be careful. Overall, I am pleased to have been hosted with my little one. If you’re looking for an affordable spot this is your place.
Wonderful stay, and amazing host
Great spot!
Excellent location for my needs. Super clean, and comfortable furniture. Would rebook!
Wonderful.

I stayed at this location for 5 nights and it completely met my expectations. The place matched the photos posted and was extremely clean and well organised.
I absolutely recommend Evans’ place to others who are visiting the area. He was also very responsive during our stay and made check-in as seamless as possible.
Highly recommend overall.

This place is fantastic! I loved being in the center of Beacon Hill and walking everywhere. The location itself is an oasis of quiet in the city, but it's just a few blocks from so much in each direction: the Red Line, the hospital, historic storefronts, fine and fast casual restaurants, and the Boston Common. Besides proximity to various places, it's an incredible neighborhood to just go on walks and observe the architecture.
The condo itself feels cohesive, with an abundance of thoughtful design and furnishing touches. The instructions provided after booking, as well as in a binder, made for an easy experience. Boston was experiencing a heat wave during my stay, but window air conditioners kept the condo cool. Worthy of all the 5-star reviews!
Very courteous host.  thank you.
it was clean overall & the beds were SUPER comfortable. The spot is a good location to Uber into the city and out of.
Great place for a short stay!
Thank you, we had a great stay in Boston!
Very nice stay

If you need a long term stay in Boston, need to be very close to public transportation (T) and great restaurants, activities and all Boston has to offer, this is the spot for you! I needed to be in Boston for 2 months for family / business issues. I needed to walk to the North End and then assist family for daily appointments at MGH/Brigham Hospital. This apartment was a 3 min walk to MGH, 10 min walk to North End and so close to restaurants, grocery stores and the T - I could roll out of bed and be there.
The apartment building is located in Beacon Hill - which is part of the old "Bullfinch Triangle" area of Boston- the original settlement of the city dating back to 1630 when the Boston Common was founded. It is living in history and as such - old, as is the apt. The apt. is well appointed, has everything you need to make yourself at home. The hosts were super responsive, fixed anything that needed and always availble to help! I am thankful I found this place for a long stay
Incredible place to stay. Great restaurants too. Harp and Bard was an easy walk.
We had such a great time, we only stayed for one night but Bill and Maureen’s hospitality was amazing and their house was in the perfect location- REALLY close to both the airport and downtown.

Mary’s place was a perfect landing place while we enjoyed the city. It was cozy, beautifully decorated, and well located. It had all the amenities that we needed, the bed was super comfy, and Mary was very responsive/great communication on check in, during our stay and check out. Would highly recommend for a couples get away.

Ehab’s place was okay for a quick weekend stay. There were a few stains on the wall and the aircon, although nice during summer, was extremely loud. I didn’t really have a good nights sleep while I was there as I had to pick between being able to sleep or being cool. But Ehab was nice and attentive, and the water bottles were a nice touch. The room is quite far out of the city but really close to a metro station that takes you all the way in.
Great location, really nice place!

Common space with 3 occupants who mainly kept to their selves. Kitchen had essentials. Washer and dryer worked well. My room was spacious and the furniture was tasteful and likely antique. I needed a place to land when I was working in the city and this fit the bill. 10~12 minute walk to the JFK Red Line or a bus ride to Andrew. On street parking exists but would be a problem if you depended on having it.

Konrad's place is in a great location, and he is truly a super host! The place was clean, the communication was excellent and timely, and check in/out was COVID conscious. I highly recommend this condo for anyone looking for a spacious gem in Downtown Boston.

We stayed at Brian and Heather's apartment for Valentine's Day weekend. The apartment is gorgeous and has everything you'll need for a short trip. We didn't cook during our stay so I can't speak to the kitchen amenities, but it was a very clean and modern apartment. I loved the decor and pieces throughout the apartment as well. And the shower was amazing! Best of all was the location. The Airbnb was right beside Boston Common and everything seemed to be within a 15-20 minute walk. For anything further than that, luckily there was a T station around the corner that goes throughout the city!
The cons: While the location was convenient, the building is in a dead-end and we occasionally had some sketchier people loitering around the building. The walls also seem to be very thin; the apartment is right next to the elevator and I was frequently woken up in the middle of the night by loud/drunk people getting off the elevator. The bed in the bedroom closest to the door was also not the most comfortable, but I did manage to get used to it. However, none of these ruined our experience and we still enjoyed the experience.
All in all, I would stay here again. If you're looking for a centrally located and modern apartment, this was perfect!

Sam's apartment is very comfortable and well-located, just 5 minutes from the train station to reach any destination within Boston. Sam is extremely attentive throughout the stay and very mindful of the details.
Great location!  Clean place with comfortable beds and AC!  Look forward to returning!
Very pleasant stay and enjoyed our time, thank you
Second stay, equally great.  I'd recommend without pause...
Very friendly and responsive host. The place is new and clean. My family had a great time staying here. Thank you!
Great hosts, very friendly and help you feel right at home. Very caring and approachable people with cool stories and recommendations. Highly recommended to everyone!
The apartment was great — clean and well stocked, and Dawn was a good host and easy to communicate with. Thanks!
Die Unterkunft war sehr gepflegt und die Gegend ruhig. U Bahn und Bus zu Fuß erreichbar. Eda hat sofort auf Fragen geantwortet und sich um unser Wohlergehen bemüht.

Perfect spot on the top of Beacon Hill. Beautiful walk down to Charles St. or Boston Common. Norah is a friendly and communicative host and the place offered a quiet and clean stay for my extra day in Boston due to the storms cancelling flights along the east coast.

A truly wonderfully unique house with a lot of antique furniture - in the city but one will find a very pleasant and private back yard which borders on a public park and ocean beach. Robin is very helpful and welcoming. She provides breakfast vitals including a very delicious homemade granola. It's a short walk to the T and minutes from downtown Boston. We stayed in the basement apartment - very spacious and comfortable - and we want to return to this truly wonderful Air BnB.
Steve and Karen Lalor

We came in for the long weekend. The space was clean and well lit. It sits in a more quiet section of the city which was great. The amenities were there as reported and there was a basket of coffee, drinks and snacks left. This space is above a French bistro and is very close to a local grocery store which made it convenient. The rooftop area gave a gorgeous evening/night view and was very comfortable.
Fenway is about a mile away and many other city attractions were walkable. We definitely plan on coming back and staying longer.

Ella & Will were wonderful, gracious hosts.  We had some spots of bad weather during my stay, and they checked in regularly to make sure everything was well.  I highly recommend a stay with Ella & Will if you are looking in the Rozie area.
What a wonderful place to stay. Excellent location and wonderful hosts. Will definitely stay at again next time in Boston.

Melisa was very nice with a quick response which I appreciate in a host. The listing seems to be newer but has a lot of potential.
At the time of my booking the apartment was listed as a 2 bed / 2 bath so we were extremely disappointed to find that it was only a 1.5 bath (we were 4 guests, 2 couples).

The location of the apartment is a street away from “night life” and it was very noisy in the evening into the early morning (we stayed Th-M for context). The listing states the apartment is “near the lively restaurant scene” but I believe this should be elaborated on more in the event someone is looking for something quieter.
The level three bedroom stairs are a steep climb (beware if that would be an issue for you or your guests) and the window shades did little to block the sunlight - it also has a large skylight so bring a sleeping mask or book elsewhere if you are looking to sleep in.
Overall the stay simply what it needed to do.
We stayed at this charming little studio for a couple of days and the neighborhood is absolutely lovely! Perfect for a short stay, would definitely go back!

The location is for sure, the best thing about this apartment.
The space was exactly as it was in the photos, but I missed some item in the kitchen and good pans. Also there is no smoke sucker and the apartments in the first floor are almost in the street so it is not possible to open windows if you want privacy. It is not the best place if you pretend to cook.
When we arrived there was a basket with some basic items that helped a lot and it was very clean. The warm floor in the bathroom is a nice thing to be noted. Could have better towels.
The late checkout was charged but is good to know that there is the possibility.
Minutes after I checked out I received a message suggesting me to pay USD 85 for blood in a towel, with pictures. My nose bled a little one day and I had to wipe it off with a towel nothing crazy… That make me fell really uncomfortable… not talking about the USD 85 for a face towel of that quality. But it doesn’t disqualify the space.

The place itself was beautiful, but the building was very noisy and there were people running through the building all night.  Getting to the space is challenging because of the construction going on, and it created a challenge. All in all, I recommend the HOSTS, but not the location.  With only a short stay, sleep was off the utmost importance and we honored the “building quiet time”, but the rest of the building wasn’t so courteous.
The space was nice as well as conveniently located minutes from the subway. Everything was easy to get to as it was only a couple of miles from Boston.

Catherine's place was perfect for my stay in Jamaica Plain. She had everything I needed. The location was safe and the room was very comfortable. Catherine was very quick to respond and is a great host. I would definitely stay here again.

We enjoyed our stay and quickly found our way around Boston accessing the buses and walking. We appreciated the basic breakfast supplies to start our day, - especially the fresh milk and yoghurts!
Super close to the beach. Didn’t appreciate that until our last night!
Our bed was super comfortable and big. Room was spacious and private. Thank you 😊

Our stay went well. Host was very responsive and instructions were clear. Location is excellent - near many good restaurants in South End Boston. Place has good heating,  TV with access to streaming services, good furniture, etc. Natural light is minimal as it is in the lowest level of the building (below ground level on one side), but there are many lamps to help with lighting.

Dawn’s place was great. It was perfect for my two teenagers and I. We had a great time in Boston.
This place is several miles from downtown, so a car is helpful. We didn’t try the T, but a stop is close by. There are also several local places to eat that were great and close by.

Great location, super equipped, hosts always available.
Great stay overall.
Definitely recommend to friends and family going to Boston in the future.

Liesl's place was perfect!  Extremely clean, modern and perfectly located. Right around the corner from restaurants, stores, and bus/subway.  The apartment and linens were fresh. The foam mattress was the icing on the cake!  You couldn't ask for a better host!!
Nice place with easy access to public transportation
Great location. Space was very nice for my family. Highly recommend
Great location and very clean and comfortable
Peaceful place to stay for a day. Walkable from public transport. Nearby.
We have stayed here many times and still book repeatedly

Absolutely best location, we saw SO much of Boston just on foot! It is a super comfy place with lots of nice touches, my fiancé was able to “work from home” very comfortably here. Pleasant, quiet neighbors. Parking spot is a wonderful bonus. Loved having Mike & Patty’s a few steps away (great breakfast sandwiches)!
Tim let us check in a bit early since our flight was changed and we were arriving much sooner than expected- so appreciated!
The one disappointment was that the jetted tub was unusable due to a sandy sediment coming from the faucet- so if you are an avid bath taker like me, I would check with Tim first to make it’s been fixed. He was super responsive to that issue and all questions - like, within seconds.
Book this place! You absolutely won’t regret it!

Do not hesitate to book!  This place was wonderful!  Easy walking to everything!  It was perfect for us and 2 of our adult granddaughters.  We were in town to see a Red Sox game and see the city.  Everything was close by.  The “T” was right across the street.  There are 2 entrances to the building.  The elevator was quick and always available.  A grocery store and coffee shop within 2 blocks!  So much history!  If you are considering this unit for leisure, you are assisting Healing Homes to provide free housing for people in need of medical procedures in the city!  We can’t say enough about this unit in a great city and Healing Homes!  We’d give 10 stars if we could!
amazing 😍
Beau séjour à Boston! L’appartement répondait à nos besoins!!

Our stay at Lee's was wonderful! Their place was in such a great area, in a quiet and luxurious building. The instructions were very clear so we had no issues finding the place, or entering the building/suite. Everything was perfect, and we would most definitely stay here again. Highly recommend!

Katy was amazing. She was very helpful and went over and beyond to make our stay the best. I appreciated the touches to the house she made to celebrate my husband’s birthday. Definitely if we’re back in Boston, we will reach out to her. Thank you again, Katy!

Wirklich schönes Airbnb, die Badezimmer sind der Wahnsinn, die Küche hatte alles was wir brauchten und sehr gut angebunden, durch die 10 Minuten Fußweg entfernte Blue Line :) trotz weiterer Zimmer mit Besucher*Innen immer ruhig und privat und unsere Hosts waren bei jeder Frage da, haben sogar noch für 4 Stunden unsere Sachen unterstellen dürfen. Alles in Allem 10 von 10!
Great price and clean
Enjoyed the stay, no surprises on what was mentioned in the description. On the pricy scale, but the nothing beats the location.

Loved our stay at the dean! Originally we arrived and realized we only had 1 window AC in the living room, so all the bedrooms were pretty hot, and temperatures were rising for the weekend. We messaged frank and he was able to get us 2 more ac units and offered to reimburse us for fans if we wanted to picked up fans ourselves as well. He communicated well and was great about replying in a timely manner. He also said we could drop our bags off around noon before check in at 4pm, and even though we didn't do that, him being flexible and letting us, shows a lot! would stay here again! 10/10
Was very clean. Decent location to get places. No complaints

Great place! As noted in other reviews, the only annoying part is the late check in at 5 PM. The place is exactly as described by the pictures and communication was clear.
Excellent location right at the heart of downtown, close to the subway stations. Great price that was half the cost of hotels in the area. We would definitely stay again!
Boa estadia e excelente localização.

Lisa & Ben's home is wonderful - spacious, very clean and updated.  A wonderful place for a larger family/friends to gather as they explore Boston.  This is a thriving neighborhood, with plenty of restaurants, easy to access bus stops and a commuter rail that's within easy walking distance.  We had a great time and truly enjoyed having a comfortable home where we could relax after a long day!

Staying in Tanya & Simon’s place was simply amazing. The place was clean and beautifully renovated. I stayed there for a month. It's a perfect place near Castle Island for morning and evening walks. The kitchen was well equipped, my Mom loved it.

Desde la recepción el host está al pendiente de ti, todo muy limpio y ordenado... Caminando llegas a la estación del subway (línea roja JFK), al súper mercado...
El barrio lucía seguro, al menos no tuve ningún issue durante mi instancia... Recomendado.
Great place to stay, very clean. So comfortable. The comfort of my own home. It will be my go to place to stay when visiting Boston.

Fantastic and cozy place to stay. Very clean. Jon was very warm and friendly and down to
Earth. The area is really safe. Lots of restaurants and local eateries and bakeries everywhere.

We had a wonderful stay at this beautiful Airbnb! It was the perfect place for our family of 5 ,plus my parents, as we visited Boston to see family. We loved exploring the city and coming home every day to the trees and peace of this home . It was a breathe of fresh air at the end of the day. The home had a lovely location - we enjoyed walking in the Arboretum nearby and exploring the cool neighborhood and nearby Jamaica Pond. It was a convenient trip into central Boston with a short drive to the train station and a quick trip on the train (like 10-15 minutes) to the city. Christina was an excellent host and made us feel so welcomed. I highly recommend staying here!
去波士顿机场和地铁站都很方便。房东回复及时，两人都很热情。房间在二楼，女孩子扛大件行李上去可能稍稍有点困难。房间小但很整洁也很暖和。
This was the most beautiful Airbnb property I have ever stayed in. The touches and amenities were amazing - all of the comforts of home. Would recommend to anyone!
Reasonable price and convenient location
Great location, comfortable bed and excellent value
Cute  place, includes a kitchenette!   Super convenient to the airport, and lots of interesting small restaurants within a few blocks.
Great place for our team to stay!

Anne, the host, is managing this place together with her husband. They stop by quite often for maintenance are very helpful!
Anne is very responsive and has been a great help both before check-in and during my stay!

Great spot in the heart of Beacon Hill near most everything and right near the state house. Easy walk to the river, shopping and the Freedom trail.
Place was clean and very quaint. Good amenities including plenty of coffee and kitchen supplies. Bed was large and comfortable with plenty of room to lounge about. 3 floor walk up but short flight of stairs. The neighborhood was quiet and easy to get around.
Host was very responsive and flexible!!

What a great apartment and neighbourhood, loved Charlestown. Everything you needed including a washer and dryer which was very handy for our 3 week trip. Our only negative was the Wifi was slow but not really an issue.
Some lovely restaurants around the corner and it was an easy walk into the city. Comfy bed, the highest we’ve ever slept in.
We’ll definitely be back when next in Boston.
AWESOME HOST, lovely pond within a few feet away of stay. Nice neighborhood, lots to do.
Very easy and comfortable! Great location, clean space.
Really amazing accomodation. Thanks Joseph
The airbnb hosts were responsive to anything we had questions about. The house was clean and we really enjoyed our stay. We would stay here again if we are ever in the area!

We were happy to learn we could drop off our luggage early, about 10 a.m., having arrived on a cruise ship.  We were told cleaners had not arrived to clean from previous night's guests.  The host said he would contact us as soon as the cleaners arrived so that we could get in before the 3 pm check-in time.  We killed four hours getting familiar with the area and arrived back at 2 pm, hoping the cleaners were gone.  I even messaged the host we were headed that way, but got no response.  We waited out on the street for an hour, and the cleaners were clearly gone, and then got the automated text at 3 pm that the unit was ready and the door code.  Host did not message us when the cleaners left, as he'd promised.  Other than that, the unit was spacious and clean.  The reviews about the low ceiling were true but tolerable and I'm 6'2".  The sounds from upstairs started early in the morning, so don't plan on sleeping in, but that was fully disclosed in their ad.  The unit is in a great area.

This was our first Airbnb experience and it was way more than we expected. Robin is amazing and her home is beautiful. Great neighborhood too. We stayed two nights in the upper level, which has two rooms, a full bath and fridge... lots of space and great view. There is a walking/running/biking path  along the water that is very close to the house. I took my morning jog there and it was wonderful. Robin made us feel very comfortable and we definitely recommend staying here.  Thank you Robin!!

Great location to explore Boston from. South End itself is a lovely neighbourhood with lots of restaurants and bars. The accommodation itself has a good communal area and is filled with lots of interesting memorabilia- thanks for a great stay!

Very clean, great location within a block to convenient store, Burger King, & Dunkin Donuts. It was so nice and Claire was great, very responsive and respectful. We will definitely be back. Great 3 night stay to see the Celtics/Fenway and beautiful Boston.
安娜是非常好的房东，友好沟通，家里非常干净，每天早上还有免费的咖啡，周围社区安全宁静。下次来还会入住。
Great stay

We had a great stay! The location was perfect and we had an easy time walking everywhere. The apartment was nice, and clean for the most part. The sheets did seem a little old.
Listen to what people say about the thin walls because they are THIN. We clearly could here the person next to us talk about how she's positive for Covid on the phone along with her coughing. Neighbor if you're reading this... we hope you're feeling better.
Definitely a great stay and would totally book again next time we are in Boston. It definitely feels more like a hotel in away then and Airbnb. Don't expect a homie feel it's more of a hotel with out a front desk feel.

We had a great stay.  We  had two adults and two little kids (4 year old, 1 year old). The bedrooms were big enough to set up our travel cot and to have luggage etc. The kitchen was well set up. The location was great for the metro. There is a great playground in walking distance that was good for both kids.

Great location and nice place to stay in the city for a few days! There were enough linens, cleaning supplies were provided, and the kitchen was perfect for cooking breakfast each day. Very central location and within walking distance of most Boston tourist attractions.
Very nice, and convenient to hospital!
Very clean and comfortable. Perfect for our group of 6. Great location. Short walk to the red line.
Great location.  Cute, bright, cheery, and well-equipped.

Definitely a nice place, and in a really great location. For a building from 1894 things are in good condition, but the unit could definitely use some TLC. Still very happy with my stay and would recommend!

Beautiful  Air bnb in the heart of Southie. Walk to everything! Beaches, cafes, shops and bars. Easy Uber/Lyft further into town only 6-10 minutes. Suite was well appointed, stylish and clean. Loved the shower! Boston Tea Party room just outside the door had everything you could could want for a quick bite before heading out in the morning. We really enjoyed our stay and highly recommend Bill & Maureen’s place. Great communication from hosts as well. Hopefully we’ll meet them next time.

Kristina was an excellent hostess. She was always quick to answer questions, made sure we were comfortable and provided a vast array of local maps and information about things to do in the area. The house was clean and well maintained. We were close enough to walk to local shops and restaurants. We enjoyed our stay and would stay there again.
Great stay! Recommended.
It was a serviceable spot for me . I mainly used it to sleep at night.  the only concern was that it was a bit noisy at night sometimes but that's given where the area is so not there fault.

We really enjoyed our stay at Marverick's. The place was very clean and welcoming. As for its location, everything was perfect: close to a grocery store, cafes, and near Boston's attractions. We highly recommend it.

Jurek's place was very clean, organized, and as pictured. Most conveniently, it was a very short walk from the public transportation system and had street parking very close.  The apartment is a short train ride/drive from downtown Boston. As a host, Jurek was available and quickly responded to any questions we had throughout our stay.  I would certainly consider staying at his place again!
Loved our stay. Great apartment!

This place is FANTASTIC! The downtown location is close to the T, and offers all kinds of restaurants, bars, etc. The place itself is set up great and my wife and I enjoyed it thoroughly. Everything is clean and well thought-out. Breakfast and lunch right around the corner, felt safe all the time, and a great jumping off spot to see everything possible in Boston!  Highly recommend and the host(s) are great!

attentive friendly and responsive host.
the bathtub needs attention. the parking situation is just too complex, not recommended for car owners/renters. The host took care of our request very promptly. The main bedroom is great and awesome, but the second room is tight, good for children only.
Staying her is like staying with a friend! Nemrac is extremely responsive and accommodating. I would definitely stay here again!

Great host(s).  Great apartment; Quaint, cozy, and clean.  Nice neighborhood, however, guessing pretty full of college students - definitely lots of fun being had by all Saturday night.  Very convenient location.  Surrounding area much like any other neighborhood with lots of college students.

Great place to stay for visiting Boston.  3 minute walk to subway. Couple of restaurants nearby.  Very clean apartment with plenty of space.  Beds super comfy.  Nice powerful shower.  Jurek was extremely helpful with local information and quick to respond.  Very steep narrow spiral staircase but there is a double bedroom and bathroom downstairs for anyone with mobility issues.  Would highly recommend if you want quick easy access into Boston.

Great location, actually across the street from our daughters apartment. Because of the high temps the window air conditioner ran constantly and was loud. Great for needed cooling after walking to and from trains and buses, but not ideal for sitting and talking. We will plan to stay here again when we return. Thank you Susan and Roy.
Super responsive and friendly host. The community is safe and has a luxurious feeling. The rental unit is very cute and clean—super nice experience.
Na

This Airbnb was in a great location, and just perfect for 2 people visiting Boston. The apartment was clean and bright. Our hosts were very helpful with check-in, self-check-in codes were sent ahead of time, and nothing was missing from the apartment.
The reason we are giving a low er score was that the building itself, in particular the corridor leading to the apartment, had a very foul odour, so much so, that it took away the pleasure of staying in this apartment.
We will gladly stay in any other Airbnb which is hosted by Cassandra and Michael, but not again in this one.

The Maverick is conveniently located in a great spot. The unit was quite clean, but the smell of cleaning product was almost overwhelming when I walked in. I was VERY glad to discover that I could open the window.
The room is extremely basic; it has a small kitchen area, but no chair to sit in or table, just a bed. For the price paid, a place to sit with a cup of coffee would be enjoyed!
The light by the bed was broken (lightbulb out, likely) but in the two days I was there, no one responded to my request to fix this.
Stayed for a week while at a confrence. Perfect if traveling for work. Great location!

Die Unterkunft war dank der Bilder gut zu finden. Ausstattung wie auf den Bildern, vielleicht etwas veralteter, trotzdem total süß. Leider ein paar Flecken auf der Bettwäsche und Handtücher (nicht schlimm genug für Reklamation). Wir haben uns trotzdem wohl gefühlt. Das Viertel wurde von den Einheimischen als problematisch beschrieben, wir haben uns dennoch sicher gefühlt. Die Metro ist 5 Gehminuten entfernt. Ruhiges Viertel ohne Möglichkeit zum einkaufen oder essen gehen. Mit der Metro aber alles schnell zu erreichen. Wir kommen gern wieder, danke Terry!

perfectly clean and pleasant. uneventful... country folk, be warned, if you have a car and aren't used to the city... you will either have to pay $$$$$ or learn musical chairs of street parking... it can be done with determination.

Shelly and Lance’s place was perfect for our one night stay in Boston. The place was convenient and affordable. Shelly was awesome and went above and beyond helping us with parking and local recommendations. Would absolutely stay here again!

Communicative host, great location.
Do know that this is beacon hill, the structures are pretty old and squeaky so you can easily hear noises from outside/neighbors

Place was very nice and very clean. Host was very accessible and responded to the few questions I had very quickly. My flight landed early and the host was very accommodating letting me check in a bit early.
Neighborhood is as advertised. Very close to Fenway Park if that’s your thing. There is street noise at times but nothing that was bothersome. However it does exist.
Amazing location in the heart of Boston. We had a great time staying here and would highly recommend it to anyone.

We had a great stay! The apartment was a perfect size for 4 people, very comfortable and just what we needed. The location was awesome—close to everything and very convenient. Would definitely recommend!
Op een perfecte locatie in Boston, veel is te belopen, en openbaar vervoer zit dichtbij!

Great place, as described. New and clean.
It’s about a 30 minute drive from Boston so having personal transportation is essential.
Loved this location, we walked everywhere from Fenway park to the North End.  Very spacious apartment.
Great spot
très bonne personne Gentille et prête à vous aider a bientot je l'espère

We hit if off from the time I arrived until departure.  Bed, facilities and tone in the house were excellent. Other guests were delightful, considerate.  Location was ideal for airport and the 'T'. I'll be back.
Great apartment! Even better than  the pictures. Excellent location.
Had a great stay!
Marlene is using her heart working to make the stay of her guest the most comfortable and enjoyable.

Had a great time, the place was comfortable and easy access to downtown. The host was very responsive and also recommended places to go since it was our first time in Boston. Definitely would stay again!
Close walk to the train, found a great brunch spot called JPizzle with Colombian food nearby. Staid for a RedSox game and was easy to travel to the game for cheap without Ubers or parking.
Great location  and pricing
We had a wonderful time on the Avatar! Great cozy boat for a family of four. Privacy and common space. Loved the views from the decks! Awesome little adventure!

Jessica and her partner were very friendly and helpful. The house was built in 1880 and has a lot of character and traditional details. The Sunny Suite has views of the bay in the distance and is in fact, very sunny. We would definitely come back again.

Tim’s wonderful, clean home is in a really cute neighborhood with convenient access to the major Back Bay landmarks and easy access to/from the highways.  Our car was not small enough to fit in the parking space included so we parked at the garage attached to the Revere hotel just around the corner - could not have been easier!  Overall a wonderful stay, with a host who provided lots of tips and recommendations to try - just wish we had time to try them all!

This place was perfect! The bed was so comfy. And it had little perks too- lights by the night stands that made the place even more cozy. Definitely recommend staying here! The host was very quick to answer.
Only down fall would be the parking situation but we found a spot 5 mins away and the comfort of the home made up for it :)

Listing is completely accurate.  We loved it. Has ac in all rooms!  Darling, tidy, perfect location. Would stay here again.  Our rental nissan ultima fit easily in parking space.  It is tight- just follow Tim’s directons.  Stayed in May with our two teens.

We couldn’t have asked for a better place to stay at while exploring the city. The off street parking was fantastic and made traveling here stress free! The place itself was perfect. Had everything we could have needed or wanted. Highly recommend to anyone traveling to Boston!
Very good!
Mrs. Susie is a very friendly person. The house is beautiful and clean. We had a good time there.
Roman was very communicative, friendly, and helpful. He was especially accommodating when it came to parking.
Nice comfortable sleeping quarters, kitchen and bathroom also perfect for an stay overnight. Highly recommend!
Incredible location! Would definitely stay here again.
Great, comfortable and easy. Good deal. Highly recommend.
Very nice location, beautiful building.

Very nice place in a great location—walkable to many restaurants, stores, Trader Joe’s around the corner, Fenway 10 minutes away.
Be aware, there are 48 stair steps up to your room. Good exercise, but a little challenging to haul suitcases up and down.
We found the A/C very good, as it was warm during our stay, but a bit difficult to change settings (maybe preprogrammed.) Kitchen is minimally but adequately furnished. The only closet is very small and mostly occupied by equipment (water heater?)
The sofa bed was actually comfortable the one night I slept on it.
Overall, the location is superb, and the unit is quiet, comfortable and well-maintained. It was very comfortable for two, but would be a bit crowded for three or four people, in my opinion.

This place is simply wonderful and the location is perfect. It’s equipped with everything you need and the overall space makes you feel at home. Michael was also a great host, accommodating an early check in and late check out. Highly recommend staying here.
Very accommodating and helpful! Lovely place with literally everything!

Quiet neighborhood with some great restaurants that we walked to. Really easy to get to public transportation to get around town. 2nd floor unit but access was simple with easy to follow instructions. Perfect for what we needed.
Thank You Maverick. Everything was perfect.
Had a wonderful stay at this property. Cute condo! Loved the garden patio!! Only stayed a few nights but beds were comfortable and home was clean.
Great place! Plenty of space, all the necessities, close to grocery stores and public transportation, parking available!
Yan was very responsive and accommodating. Unit was clean. Nevertheless not as close as MIT/ Hardvard as expected and location was on a backyard basement

Great place to stay! We stayed here for our first trip to Boston and it was perfect! We walked almost everywhere.  We only used Uber to get to some breweries in south Boston and the seaport. I loved waking up in the morning and walking out on the busy street for a cup of coffee. I would stay here again! We actually booked an extra night at another one of stones properties because we loved the city so much! They were nice enough to let us take our luggage to the new unit before check in so we could still get out and explore the city.  We also used their parking.  Loved it! We did have someone park us in as their parking is tandem.  We knew this was possible when we booked. The owners had great communication and got us in contact with the other guests who parked us in so we could coordinate a time to leave the city at check out. It was easy and efficient!  Lastly, as someone who drove to the city, Newbury street is right off the highway so there is little city driving if you’re worried about that.  Highly recommend!
nice cute and clean place. catherine was very responsive.

the house is much bigger than in the photo, it was very clean and spacious. we didn't stay long, just spent the night, arrived late and didn't find towels and we didn't have enough dishes and some things in the kitchen. but overall the house is great and I would recommend it for a group of up to 6 people.
I really enjoyed my stay. It was clean and in a good area, when I return to BOS I will definitely be staying here again!
Communicated well and the room was spacious very nice big bed.
Lovely place to stay - exactly like the photos and incredibly clean inside. We had a very comfortable 5 nights here. Eddie was a great host, very helpful and always responsive to our messages.
I booked this place last minute and really appreciated Althea’s ability to accommodate me with little notice. Room is decent size with shared bathroom at the end of the corridor. Pleasant stay.

Very accommodating host, always answered questions promptly. The apartment is small but had everything we needed, and it was clean and nicely decorated. The first nights it was a bit chilly and the heater worked great. The shower was a bit tricky for us Scandinavians (I’ve never seen that kind of faucet before) so found it a bit hard to get the temperature right, but otherwise everything was perfect. Wi-Fi worked great. The location was super. All in all, we had a fantastic stay!

I really enjoyed my stay. Victor was kind and responsive. Check in was easy. The house was clean and cozy. My family and I were comfortable and we even played some board games that He had in the living room. The neighborhood was peaceful and quite. I like that there was a personal driveway.  I would recommend this to anyone visiting Boston or surrounding areas.
Very nice apartment and perfectly well located ! Tons of restaurants and bars just downstairs. Good and professional communication too.
Great location
Wonderful place, but having to go up 7 flights of stairs takes its toll. Once the elevator is fixed it should go to 5 stars.
Lihua is a wonderful host. The location was the perfect place to stay for a night to catch a game at Fenway Park.
Excellent spot and the rooftop deck is amazing. Loved the quick access to public transit.

This place was beyond perfect. It was so gorgeous. There is a beautiful, solid marble fireplace in the bedroom, with beautiful artwork throughout. The house was absolutely spotless. There were tons of windows, so the place was flooded with light (when wanted, there were great blinds that we used to keep the rooms dark during early morning hours). The house had cereal, coffee, milk, and since we were there on Halloween, there was candy. There were wonderful local tips. We loved the neighborhood and had one of the best breakfasts at a local cafe, the Grasshopper. There are restaurants, corner stores, a while foods, liquor stores etc. all within two blocks. We couldn’t have been happier and couldn’t recommend the place more highly.

Ehab est un hôte très sérieux, qui répond rapidement à toute question, et est prêt à aider en toute circonstances.
Les instructions fournies sont très claires et permettent une arrivée facile et flexible.
L'appartement est situé en périphérie de Boston (South Boston -Dorchester), et permet un accès facile et rapide à Boston downtown, tout comme vers le sud (Plymouth, Cape Cod).
La chambre était très propre et bien rangée. Literie très bonne. Mobilier sommaire mais pratique.
La cuisine et la salle de bains partagées sont un peu vieillottes, ce qui ne ne permet pas un rangement et une propreté impeccables...
Un peu étrange de prévoir un accès apparemment très sécurisé, avec l'utilisation de 2 codes d'accès, alors que l'issue de secours dans la cuisine (restant ouverte) donne sur la cage d'escalier d'un autre bâtiment qui lui ne semble pas aussi sécurisé.
Peut-être un peu cher au final, mais le prix est le résultat de la loi de l'offre et la demande dans les environs de Boston...

The only thing I wash was different about my stay at Aaron & Catherine’s would be that it was longer!
My husband and I were only in Boston for one night on a long layover from Iceland, and I could not have picked a better place.
Our room was beautiful, clean and so comfy!
And dinner with Aaron and Catherine provided an opportunity for the best conversation. We literally sat with them for a few hours and talked and ate about so many things.
It was truly one of those moments you’ll always cherish and hold close. We would absolutely book again and recommend anyone considering it to do so. All the stars for this amazing place and these beautiful people.

Emily & Jake’s place was the perfect place for us to visit family in the neighborhood. It’s comfortable, super clean and covered all of our needs. The garden is beautiful and very unique, and the hosts were amazing and kind. Highly recommended !
Terrific location close to Fenway. We walked or used Uber to all locations. Super easy! Helen provided us With great ideas for restaurants and what to do in Boston. Overall a nice place to stay.
Really wonderful space that was perfect for my stay with my parents. Great location and is just like the pictures. Also, the beds are incredibly comfortable!!

Loved it! Everything was great. Just make sure you’re capable of walking up a few short flights of stairs (no elevator), but not a problem if you’re mobile. Adds to the historic experience versus staying in a hotel.

Loved our stay with Healing Homes! They were very accommodating with a last minute booking after our original accommodations fell through. Also loved knowing that we were supporting such a wonderful organization!

Great place, quiet at night.
Good base for your daily excursions into Boston.
Great location, easy communication and access

Boston is a wonderful city! Thanks Kit and Scott for hosting us. Their house is very beautiful and comfortable. We had the whole upstairs, and the room is very clean and private. We also had amazing breakfast. Kit and Scott are very nice people. They helped us a lot. Talking to them was very good experience.

Besides the distance and parking for the T being a bit of a challenge, Jovan and Sena have a lovely apartment! We recommend staying at their place. They were fantastic at responding to any queries, provided lots of children’s toys and suggesting a multitude of options for toddler outings.
Thank you!

Fantastic experience on all accounts.  Peaceful/quiet street (easy Uber pick-up point), fast WiFi, bathroom directly next to the room (big/clean), two parks within less than two blocks if you're a runner.  Highly recommended.

This was our first time in Boston and we hit the jackpot with Jay's place. We were not quite sure what area to stay when researching our trip but very happy we ended up on the North end especially on Hanover street. Jay's place is just down the street from everything on Hanover but also just past the business of everything so not to loud in the apartment especially in the bedroom. As others mentioned, the master bed is squeaky. Everything else was amazing and better than the pictures showed. We loved the area and will stay at Jay's place again when we come back.
My stay was great, the home was beautiful. Just like the pictures but even better in person. It was real cute.
Would visit again. The place was very clean and felt all new. The host was very active and kind. We had a minor issue due to our own mistake and the host actively tried to help our situation.
Very clean and Cozy! Definitely recommend this place when in Boston!
Very neat place! Had a very great time :) the free parking was a plus! I will be back here again for sure

The hosts couldn’t have been nicer or more helpful. We would definitely stay here again. Clean, secure and accessible
.

What a fantastic find!  Gorgeous little spot tucked away from Jamaica Plain - but still easily walkable to amenities. Beautiful patio / garden we enjoyed in the evening- complete with fresh herbs! Jon was an excellent host - very accommodating and super responsive to all requests.  Can’t recommend this place enough - looks just like the pictures - I look forward to staying here again!
Really nice apartment in quiet Boston suburb. 10 minute walk from commuter train station. Communication and support is very goid as the owner’s parents live downstairs.

I lived in Boston for years had heard that East Boston had a lot of new development, nice greenway, and great places to eat. This was my first trip out there and it did not disappoint!
I grabbed a BlueBike from Day Square and went on a ride to Constitution Beach. I would’ve done more exploring but the sun was going down so I left the bike and went out to Santarpio’s for its world famous pizza/ Holy cow was it good.
It was easy to navigate the neighborhood on foot. I did notice too that there’s a restaurant/ice cream place open til 3am only 5 min walk from the house.
Great location- easy to get downtown (less than 30 min walk/T to Fanueil Hall) and you couldn’t be closer to the airport. I hope to stay here again.
It was an excellent location and very nice.
Everything they say it was.
Perfect location! Very clean place and super clear instructions. Honestly didn’t have to contact Kevin at all everything was great !

Ryan was very responsive and accommodating. Everything in the apartment was as it said it would be. Parking is tricky in Boston no matter where you are, so I was surprised to find a parking spot easily both nights.
Great location, neat, nicely decorated. Pleasant.
It was great

Jessica was very nice to us the couple of times she visited us at the basement door. I think she tries to have a nice Airbnb, however there are some flaws.  The basement apartment is extremely damp, making it very uncomfortable.  It’s sad when your kitchen paper towels, toilet paper and bath towels are already wet before you get to use them. There is an infestation of silverfish, which we are praying we did not bring home with us. She needs to warn elderly/disabled people that the walk from the train station to her place is doable, but it includes two extremely steep hills.  We felt safe in the neighborhood, despite a drunk banging on the door/window and yelling a couple of nights.  Lastly, prospective lodgers need to be aware that this is a “basement” with only one window to look out of and the patio furniture is so filthy it’s not like the picture where you would feel comfortable lounging.  I’m sorry my review isn’t very positive, but if I was a prospective lodger I would want to know the truth before wasting my hard earned money.

Sono stata in questo alloggio dopo un viaggio di lavoro, ho trascorso quindi solo l’ultima notte prima della partenza, essendo che si trova comodamente a 5 minuti di macchina dal South Bus Terminal.  Le note più rilevanti che trovo siano importante da scrivere sono diverse: al nostro ingresso in casa, ci siamo ritrovati in un soggiorno molto incasinato e pieno di oggetti personali della proprietaria, sembrava di entrare in una casa abitata e sembrava di essere un estraneo. Successivamente, solo dopo qualche messaggio con l’host in cui le comunicavo che ero riuscita a entrare senza problemi, ho scoperto che non avremmo dormito da soli in appartamento. Durante la serata abbiamo sentito entrare più persone, probabilmente esistono più stanze affittate, e credo sia un dettaglio importante da precisare nel momento della prenotazione; in un secondo momento abbiamo incontrato anche la proprietaria, che dormiva nella stanza affianco alla nostra. Dopo tutto è stata gentile, ci ha consentito di utilizzare la cucina per poterci scaldare la cena, però non so se ci tornerei. Forse dovrebbe essere precisata la situazione generica dell’alloggio.
