Beautiful apartment, very comfortable and clean. Nice place to relax and enjoy family time. Had a wonderful experience! Definitely recommend.
We had an enjoyable stay. Everything you need, clean and comfortable. Close to the orange line. I would recommend!

Everything is within walking distance, there’s a grocery store and Starbucks within a couple hundred feet of the building, and Chris and Kelly are fantastic hosts. They’re really quick to respond and were super helpful when our flight got cancelled and rescheduled for later. It’s a great unit by even better people!
Great place to stay while in Boston. Centralized location to majority of tourist attractions. You can walk to everything!

The location was perfect and that alone would convince me to stay again. Host were great and very responsive. Only a few gripes like the sheets having some stains on them, and not having shelves in the shower for soap and shampoo. Great location close to Park St station and would stay again
The appartment is really nice and located in a great neighborhood! The communication with the host was also perfect. Any time again!

Very clean and quiet place not too far from other places and public transportation. Communication with host was very quick and easy no problem with that. Very convenient and relaxing. I would definitely book again worth every penny!!!
Great place
Great place! Clean, convenient, and very responsive host. Super cute friendly dog Vinnie was a bonus!

Rare gem in the middle of Beacon Hill! For the location, it’s actually insane to have had room for 6 people at such a reasonable price. My only suggestion would be to add more mirrors! We had six girls getting ready with one bathroom mirror and one full-length mirror. Would have loved to have one on the wall in each bedroom.
Otherwise, the stay was absolutely perfect. The host was extremely responsive and helpful with anything we asked about.
Karen and Jon are great. Such a cool boat on such an historic harbor! Our family of 6 fit just fine for a memorable time!
It was cool. The only thing is  that they had not heaten the  room before we arrived so it was a bit cold.

Our stay was amazing! The host very responsive and helpful! The location is amazing! Very close to entertainment and walking distance to some of the. Eat Boston restaurants!
The location was still quiet when needed to be!

This Airbnb is a great place to stay.  It is near the airport and close to hop on public transportation.  The Airbnb was very clean and the neighbors were quiet.  Ella provided great communication and was helpful with questions regarding the area.   I would definitely love to stay here again if I was to return to Boston.
This is a great location and beautiful neighborhood. If you need quiet to sleep, be aware there is a lot of street noise.
Perfect location, convenient to everything you would need during your stay.

This was a good find for a three week stay. The kitchen/living space is quite small and the bathroom needs a refresh.
The hosts are extremely responsive and super easy to work with. We felt safe & secure staying here…plus a free parking space has great value!
The location is everything and the apartment is really ideal. Highly recommend!

The apartment was everything we needed and the location is fabulous: quiet, beautiful, low-traffic street in an incredibly convenient location. We could walk to Boston Common, Back Bay, South and North Ends, Chinatown, Seaport, and Charlestown. Highly recommend!
We have been to quiet a few Airbnb places but never felt as good as here!
The accommodation was super clean and comfortable, and the location was perfect.
Would 100% stay here again!
Great location, able to catch the T and make it to many different locations in Boston. Clean apartment and Albert was very responsive when needed! Would stay again if back in Boston!
Great location,couldn’t possibly be any better. Host responded quick and very helpful with any questions we had would recommend every time

We were coming in a couple of nights before we left on our cruise. What a great location and home! Elisangela gave perfect instructions, the home is right across the street from a wonderful little cafe and down the road from a little market. it was easy to get to the blue line metro to get into the city. The apartment itself was full of beds and worked great for the four couples that stayed there. This would be a fantastic place for a large family!
Loved staying at this location. It was beautiful and fun for the city. I felt very safe traveling by myself to the T and back for transportation.
Feeling good！
We're really glad we stayed at Shelly's place - it was just as described and Shelly is a nice and flexible host. Absolutely recommend!
Place was clean, had what we needed for our 3 night stay. Neighborhood can be noisy
Great location. Large unit. Well stocked kitchen. Simple and easy check in instructions.
Perfect location with a lot of attractions and restaurants around

A group of athletes from our women's team stayed at Michael's place for Head of the Charles weekend.  I cannot say enough about how good the location is relative to the course. Not only was it extremely walkable, none of us had any trouble finding street parking and there were many restaurants available to us within walking distance.  It was a safe neighborhood and I would feel comfortable walking there at just about any hour. The space comfortably slept our group.  I will say the loft area up above the second bedroom is more suitable for smaller folks or children, simply because the ceiling is low. The kitchen and living room area were especially nice.  The unit was spotless.  The convenience alone made this unit well worth the price.  It is also worth mentioning that if you are a  boisterous group this would not be the appropriate place to stay as there are families nearby. It wasn't a problem for us!

Im an actor that was traveling to Boston for 3 weeks... I was performing at the WANG theater and it was a close walk everyday... LOVED the south end neighborhood... and the space that laura has created is practically perfect... great building... lots of light... everything you need... and she is very helpful if you need anything at all. My experience staying here was amazing and I definitely will book her again the next time Im in Boston :)

Simply the best place where I have ever been so far with Airbnb (and I have seen a lot of them). Nancy and her family are incredibly welcoming and open. Never seen someone taking care of the guests are Nancy and her family did. Simply unique.
Good location and space. We just had an issue with the hot water but Steven reported it and quickly resolved the issue.
The apartment is very charming and Maude is a terrific, thoughtful host.  The place is located in a gorgeous neighborhood, great for walking to anywhere in the city.

James was incredibly helpful for all my needs--they even let me park my rental car in the driveway to avoid the hassle of street parking.  So friendly and super convenient for my needs.  I would love to return!
We very much enjoyed our stay at Jessy and Diegos apartment. We highly recommend it for being in a great location and dog friendly.
Nice.
Really worth the stay for sure ! Great hosts , very friendly and willing to take care of whatever you need quick and easy.

I was in town for 2 nights to drop off my daughter for her summer internship. Hotels were outrageously priced because of the Celtics opening game of the NBA Finals so I went on to Airbnb and found this gem at a bargain rate. The room was charming and clean. The stairs to the second floor were not an issue at all. The house is conveniently located on a tree lined street in South End. The co-host Mike was extremely responsive and flexible. I highly recommend this place.

Jennifer's place is very close to Roslindale Center, which was wherewe needed to be for this trip, so it was the perfect location. We found parking every night, no problem. The bed was comfy and the room was clean and large enough for us and all our stuff. Jennifer was out of town, but her communication was great and her long-term renters were there. The bathroom is shared with 3 others at present so I wasn't sure if there would be any issues getting access -- but it worked out great. We were always about to shower, etc. when we needed to. The other renters are longer term so they have their stuff in the bathroom, so in that way, it's kind of like staying with a family member. The back porch was great - enjoyed that a lot! And there's a cool cat named Louie that we really enjoyed as well. In our experience, it's good to like cats if you want to stay here. He likes to hang with you. : ) We would definitely stay again!

A fun experience to be had! The boat was just as described and made for a fun “girls trip” with my daughter and sister. Place was very clean and Bill, her counter-partner, went above and beyond for us.  Very helpful with everything from maintenence , to dining options and even road closures. He was even willing to mail back my daughter’s sweatshirt that she lost on the docks! The whole experience was top notch and I would tell anyone that it’s well worth the money!

We had a great time at Brian and Heather‘s apartment, the place definitely exceeded our expectations.  We did hear the upstairs neighbors at times, but with sound machines to help the kids sleep it was not an issue at all.  Definitely a charming place in a great neighborhood.

5/5 Stars. What a fantastic experience and unique way to visit Boston!
The yacht was extremely clean and spacious for our group of 4. I had the best night sleep on the water!
The hosts were so helpful and made the check in/ check out process easy!
We’ll definitely be staying here again!
Thanks, Chad and Holly!
Great location. Very walkable to the ferry, airport, bikes and tall ship!
It’s a pretty apartment with easy access to city. Checkin was easy,  communication with host was also very fast, the host was helpful and friendly.

I really loved the place! It’s so close to a shopping mall, restaurants, and the subway station. The host is very helpful and had detailed instructions on how to check-in and check-out. The place is close to what the pictures are, it’s cozy, and perfect for a one day stay. I definitely recommend staying here!

HONEST REVIEW: we stayed an entire week so experienced each day of the week here.
Night club nextdoor will ruin your sleep on the weekends. If you’re a light sleeper don’t stay here Fri-Sun. The line for the night club blocks the entrance to the apt. I left and got a hotel room on our last night (Friday) because of the noise. During the week Mon-Thurs it was no issue.
Furniture is kinda junky. The little coffee tables were wobbly and could be replaced.
The bed is equivalent to a 5inch memory foam mattress topper. No support and not very comfortable. Definitely could be replaced.
If you take a steamy shower with the door close, you may set off fire alarm after opening door. Happened twice.
Everything else was great. All other amenities worked and it was clean when we got there. And then, of course, the location is perfect. And the hosts were responsive and helpful. I personally wouldn’t stay here again but would stay at other locations from the same host.

Linda was a very gracious host. She never stopped smiling and made us feel very welcomed. The listing description was very accurate. The location is fantastic. It is located within the Boston city limits and a short drive from the downtown. There are some amazing restaurants just a short walk away. This is our number one location if we ever come back to Boston.

Daryl’s place was absolutely perfect, exactly as described, and the perfect spot for our stay! The house was easy to find, spacious, and immaculately clean. We only stayed the one night for a concert at the Roadrunner (it was about a 25 min uber ride but I knew that when I booked) but I would definitely choose this spot again for a longer stay…it had everything you’d need and the extra touches like snacks, extra blankets, etc. was greatly appreciated!
Great value for what you are getting!
Liya and her staff were extremely helpful, the location is great walk to Mass General Hospital, Boston Gardens, great restaurants.

Very comfortable,  safe and clean place. a full kitchen was very convenient and the bed sheets were very soft. after a long day spent in Boston having a tv that could easily move and cast from my phone was very relaxing. would definitely go back there if I'm in downtown Boston
If I had known how marvelous these two hosts are, I would have extended my trip ahead of time ☺️ fresh squeezed Valencia orange juice every morning. I’ll be back!
Small butt that’s to be expected for the location - middle of Newbury, easy access to all of Back Bay / Copley area.

Frank was very communicative and the checkout process was very easy. Perhaps too easy, because I did feel slightly unsafe in the apartment. There was no deadbolt to lock the apartment, and the only lock to ensure your safety was a pinpad in the front. In fact, the cleaning person busted in 30 minutes before the check out time, shocking us all that an unexpected intruder was so easily able to open the door and enter the apartment (she did not knock).
The place was beautifully decorated but it was also evident that no one lives there permanently. There were no blinds in the huge window in one of the bedrooms, ensuring zero privacy. The coffee machine did not work. The Roku also only connected to Hulu and nothing else, despite communication that there would be Netflix and other programming available. The cot was uncomfortable and the place comfortably accommodates up to 4 people in reality.
These were small things that would've been okay (besides the safety issue), but for the price and location, it was bothersome. As for the broken things and I would've communicated had I not stayed in the Airbnb for one night.
Jurek's place was great! we spent the night for a Bruins game, and the T is right there for easy on and off! great communication, helpful, and easy check-in. will be back

Fantastic ! Fantastic is the word I will use If I had to describe my stay at Michelle's House. But I need more than 1 word to describe the place I lived for a month.
The appartment is really beautiful, I had a big room, quiet, with a fan and a desk, just perfect for the summer ! I slept really good !
But the most important : Michelle !
It's impossible to describe the goodness and kindness that Michelle has. She is the nicest person by far I have ever seen ! She's thoughtful, nice, always smiling, cooking really good meals, always here for you if you need her ... and the list go on !
I'm so glad to meet her, she was essential for me ! And she will probably be essential for you if you didn't know Boston !

I think that my description and my words can't describe Michelle as perfectly as she is, the best thing to do is to try and discover by yourself what kind of person she is and I promess ... you won't regret it !

If you have to go in Boston, Michelle is definitevely the host you need :) !!!
Enjoyed our stay
Great start with my family. Great location and beds are nice and comfortable.
Good location with easy access to MBTA and other public transport
Everything was as promised. Nicely furnished/outfitted. Location is walking distance to Roslindale Square. Short walk to commuter rail station if you are heading into Boston.
Very clean place with nice bathrooms. Hosts are very communicative and polite, awesome location right next to the park.
Yusef's place was absolutely lovely! He was very hospitable and always responded to my messages which was very reassuring! I highly recommend!(:
Great stay. The location is a block from PO Square, and a short walk to subway, dining, and Seaport.

We felt ourselves welcome and good in this house. A very quiet neighbourhood, from where you can reach downtown Boston in 30 minutes by the Red Line: very easy.
The house is nice, very clean, spacy and comfortable. It was a pleasure staying here! Jeffery and Cynthia are very kind persons who hosted us great! I surely recommand staying here if you visit Boston!
This was our second time staying here and it was great!
Great clean beautiful space with a welcoming host.
Peter’s place was perfectly located and comfortable. The kitchen and bathroom were well stocked and clean. Would recommend!

Wow! What a great place to stay while visiting Boston. The location is ideal for travelers; located right next to the airport T station which brings you into the city in just 2 stops. The apartment itself was furnished well and had everything you need to enjoy your stay. We were lucky to be able to find this spot after our original Airbnb reservation fell through last minute and we are thankful we ended up in such a great spot. The amenities of the building were also wonderful. The gym and community lounge/roof terrace are just steps from the unit. We were extremely happy and comfortable in this apartment and plan on booking here whenever we’re in Boston!

Amazing location, perfect size for 3 people. If you really want to experience the city life in Boston, I strongly recommend this unit! Very close to both red and green line stations, plenty of shops and eateries around, you can take a morning stroll by Charles River.. Apartment was clean and all your basic needs provided for your stay. Andres was easy to communicate. Highly recommend this place.

The Red Door Carriage House is a beautiful property and is exceptionally clean and very comfortable.  David was a great host and gave us helpful information on the local area.  We enjoyed our stay very much and would love to stay there on future trips to the Boston area.
Great location! Perfect place to stay
Great place, perfect size.
Great location right in the heart of south end. Loft space was wonderful with tons of great design touches. Great, knowledgeable host as well!
Great to stay at Todd’s place! Clean, affordable, near to what I wanted to do. Would stay again.
We had a really great time in Boston. The appartment is near to a lot of services. The hosts were availables when needed and responded really fast.
Great stay, love the retro vibe of the hotel, will stay again 10/10

Nice duplex in Roxbury. Great linens, comfy beds. Very cozy.
The host was responsive. Overall a great experience.
Super responsive host and flexible check in time. The place is very clean as well!
Excellent location. Responsive host. Would stay again while in Boston
Lori was a great host! Very friendly and gracious
Great deal if you don’t need much space. The host was very responsive, and it felt safe.
Loved it!

We have had a great time staying here. The apartment is clean and spacious. Jessica provided us with all the information we could need. We especially liked all the information about the nice neighbourhood. Thank you Jessica!
Zvi’s place was very clean and comfortable. He was a responsive & friendly host. We enjoyed our stay.
Very clean, great place to stay that was centrally located.

Excelente ubicacion en una zona tranquila. Espacio pequeno pero confortable.
Todo impecable. Lo recomiendo!
This place was incredible. The hosts were the best I have ever communicated. The area was perfect and I loved getting to wake up and drink coffee on the roof while watching the sunrise.

Lovely space in a very walkable location! Very well maintained, beautiful historic property with updated amenities. Michael's place is thoughtfully stocked with everything we needed for a comfortable stay, and Michael was very quick to respond to any questions. He was also proactive in making sure we arrived okay and had everything we needed. Great stay!
The place was just as described and clean for the most part, no complaints. J Lucky was responsive and answered all questions.
Amazing stay will recommend to family and friends
The location is nice, walkable to restaurants and transportation.  But the steep narrow stairs three flights up to the apartment post challenge especially with large luggage.

Thank you so much for a lovely stay! My first time using air bnb and I had no idea what to expect, but you have exceeded all expectations of my stay! You have a lovely welcoming home & all of the small amenities were such a lovely touch! The coffee and cake were beyond what I ever expected & I cannot express my gratitude enough for letting us stay! I cannot wait to come back to this beautiful city! Again thank you so much! :)
Clean and tidy and cozy! Easy check-in and check-out process. A no-nonsense, nice little spot for my parents to stay while they were visiting us in Brighton for Thanksgiving!
Lovely apartment in historic neighborhood, very clean and convenient to walk everywhere. We had a wonderful stay at Loic’s place and will certainly be back next time we are in Boston!

We loved our stay here!
Basic shops were in walking distance and so was the station for the underground so it was easy to get into the city.
The room and house in general were very clean and beautifully decorated with an ac that was absolutely needed in the 36° Celsius weather and the bed was super comfortable as well.
Zipporah and her parents were always happy to answer all questions we had and nice to talk to in general and their dog was adorable.

Five star place all up! Highly recommend
Only item to consider is the squeaky floors from the apartment above. Get ear plugs if that bothers you

Definitely a great house. Moon is extremely nice and friendly. The room is as clean as it can be. The area is really nice as well. Pretty much it has everything you need. Definitely a good choice for everyone who want to stay in Boston for a few days.
Great rooms, spacious and clean. Good breakfast items. Stairs were a bit much for us out of shape folks but we made it each night so wasn’t as bad as we thought. :)

I was visiting for one night for a conference in Boston. This unit was perfect for my needs, and I'll definitely book it again in the future. The area is very nice and calm, with local shops amidst well-maintained brownstones. There is easy access to food and groceries, and it's far enough from the noisy downtown, which has unfortunately been plagued with homelessness recently. My host, Amber, was great and communicative. 5 stars!

Definitely one of the best places I’ve stayed at. Very spacious and clean and great location
Tan is also a very good host. You won’t be disappointed!
I can really recommend staying at Reina‘s house. She is very kind and was always available. The room is beautiful and very clean.
Excellent location - steps away from everything! Large place and very comfortable bed. I recommend to anyone staying in Boston.

Karim's Home was just as pictured! Very spacious and clean - and Karim is one of the most responsive hosts I've ever worked with. The area around the AirBnb seems a bit more up and coming, with some parts seeming a bit run down and others with new builds. However we never felt unsafe, it was quiet, and very easy to travel into and out of the city from! Would stay there again

Elisangela's place was just as described- an amazing stay within 15 minute walk from the waterfront in east boston. The outdoor space was a great addition, and she was very responsive with any questions I had. Would definitely stay again!

We enjoyed this airbnb. The house is decorated and appointed very nicely. The self check in was easy and convenient. The amenities are top notch and we really appreciated the snacks and drinks provided. The bed was very comfortable. The bathrooms were very nice, and everything you could need was provided. The only complaint we had was of the noise. We stayed downstairs in the Chestnut room and were woken up before 6am every day with people cooking and using the common areas. Also the noise from people going up and down the stairs was slightly annoying. My main complaint was the beeping smoke alarm right outside our room all night long the second night. I notified the hosts but no one was sent to fix while we were there. He suggested taking the alarm down but with the 10 ft ceilings, even after climbing up on a bar stool, we couldn't reach it. It made for a long, sleepless night. I suppose if you were a very heavy sleeper, or no one staying with you was an early riser, it would be OK. I don't consider myself a light sleeper, but after 2 nights here, I was sleep deprived.
Very caring host and great place to stay!

Great location and spacious place.  Comfortable beds.  Ir was a little loud street/bar noise Saturday night.  But super convenient, with great coffee & restaurants within a block.  We’d stay again, even with the minor issues, it was a great place if needing 2 bedrooms and 2 bath’s downtown.

Rachel was super friendly and provided a lot of local recommendations for visitors. The place is exactly as described. The transportation isn’t the most convenient as the closest subway stop is about 15 mins walk away but the distance isn’t too bad.
When my family and I checked in, we ran into a cleaning issue of the house, however, Rachel was fast to respond to the situation and everything was sorted out quickly before the end of the night.
I’d definitely recommend this place!

I usually book an entire place and staying in a shared space is not my norm, which means my review may not be useful to those who regularly share. I heard people (old, creaky building) but never met anyone else staying there. I don’t know how many people I was sharing a bathroom with! But, everyone kept it clean enough. Host was responsive and, in the end, it was a fine option for me given that I literally booked it the morning I flew up after other arrangements fell through.

Apartment as advertised and in a nice part of town well suited to heading out for good food in the Back Bay area or into the center of town. Well equipped kitchen and set up for self sufficient visits.
Comms all good and apartment manager was helpful even allowing to store our baggage for a few hours before our flights.
Great experience! Will stay again when back in Boston.

Yan was helpful from the start. Extremely responsive and more than accommodating. The apartment was as described. It was rented so my daughter and her friends had a place to stay after a concert at the Roadrunner. She wanted something walkable so they didn’t have to look for parking and Yan’s place was exactly that. It was about a 13 minute walk from the venue and the area was well lit and safe! Yan’s place had everything they needed and they allowed them to keep the car parked after checkout so they could explore Boston for a majority of the day. I would 100% recommend this stay!
Excellent stay

This is the third year we stayed at a healing homes listing in Boston. The home was clean and as pictures/described in the heart of downtown Boston. Host was responsive and check in instructions were clear. Can’t wait to stay here again next year.

Great location. Within minutes of 100's of restaurants and local spots. As well as some cool sites. You could easily walk to the main sites as well without being too close to them...ie less foot traffic.
The space was cool as well, good use of a small area with it's spiral staircase. Good wifi.
No designated parking, but there is public parking within a few minute walk.

Peter was very accommodating and knowledgable!  My parents were in town helping me move from the West Coast, and Peter went above and beyond to ensure that our stay benefited our moving efforts and that we enjoyed out time in Boston overall. My family members and I love public transportation, and the Ashmont stop was a huge plus for us, especially when we wanted to get into the city. The bathroom was beautiful and spacious.

Norah and the space were great. She was very responsive and everything went super smoothly. The studio is located in a great central location with easy access to most of the city. We had a great time.
Great place to stay...clean, close to subway and delicious homemade muffins in the morning.  Would definitely stay here again!

Great place to stay! Very cozy! Me and my friend stayed for a week and we had a great time! This place is pretty close to the train and other public transportation places so I highly recommend if you are relying on public transportation :)

Amazing flat.  Had everything we needed.  Very friendly layout for family.  Great neighborhood, super convenient, easy walk to redline metro for Boston adventures.  Safe feeling neighborhood with cute restaurants and a fantastic little grocery store with lots of prepared foods and fresh fruits/veggies.  Parking off street on site.  Fantastic hosts, responsive and helpful.  Highly recommend and would absolutely return in the future.
Enjoyed my stay very much, the room was exactly as described and they were very quick to respond to anything I needed

Beautiful 2Br, 1Ba apartment in East Boston. Nicely furnished, squeaky clean, comfortable, private and quiet on a nice street, walkable to various grocery stores, restaurants and bars, and conveniently located close to the airport and to downtown. Lots of light in the apartment. Well-equipped with everything you could need in the kitchen, dining, living and bedrooms. It isn't cheap, but it is a good value for Boston.

The studio is very well located, just a short walk away from a lot of attractions in the city of Boston. It is also very accessible by public transport to and from Boston Logan Airport. The host was very responsive, friendly and gave clear instructions about checking in to the apartment. We also experienced an unfortunate power outage on one of the night's of our stay, but the host was quick to resolve any issues we had because of it, which we really appreciated! We would recommend this studio for your stay in Boston :)
Great location and everything you may need is at your fingertips or less then a short drive away!
Eelam was very responsive. We had an early arrival and he was very accommodating. His home is well equipped and very clean. We really enjoyed our stay!

1. 위치가 좋습니다 - 지하철역 바로 앞, 버스 정거장 바로 앞
2. 엘레베이터가 없습니다 - 계단이 높아 캐리어가 무겁다면 힘이 많이 들겁니다.
3. 방이 깨끗하고 침대도 좋습니다.
4. 숙박하는 도중에 관리인과 연락이 어려웠습니다 (메일 전화 모두 응답받지 못함ㅠㅠ) - 수건 교체가 되지 않아 2박3일 동안 같은 수건을 사용하였습니다.
The room was perfect and exactly as advertised. The host was very nice and helped me with the lock and showed me around. The mini fridge and microwave was a very good touch.

We loved this sweet attic Airbnb! It was cute, cozy, and well-stocked. Jamaica Plain is a fantastic neighborhood, with easy access via the Orange Line to other parts of Boston. Jennifer was a friendly, responsive host and provided lots of great suggestions for food and exploration. We had a wonderful stay!
Wonderful place in Boston!! Welcoming, clean, and in a great location!
Great spot. Lovely unit. Easy access. In the middle of everything. Definitely a place to be.

Wonderful and comfortable stay with very communicative hosts.  The parking in the area was a challenge but THATCH made a great recommendation.   Very easy to navigate Boston from the apartment.  Very happy!  Highly recommend.
Convenient for a one-night stay with an early flight the next morning. Other guests were up cooking at 2am which made it difficult to sleep. Would not stay again.
Cozy studio, accurate to its description. Good quiet location, lots of parking spaces around. Great communication, fast response. Will rent again

Islam’s place was very nice comfortable quiet we felt like home! The place was very peaceful near everything! Islam was very generous and let us stayed a little bit longer than our check out time! We really appreciated the hospitality and the gesture!
Awesome location in the city, very convenient.  Hosts are very helpful and responsive.

We really enjoyed our trip to Boston, and this apartment was part of the reason. It is located about a 10-minute walk to the Prudential (green line) and Back Bay (orange line) T stations. If you buy a Charlie Pass for the T, you can ride anywhere for one week on the T for a low up-front price, an unbeatable deal that we took full advantage of.  The Freedom Trail locations, MIT/Harvard/Cambridge, Fenway Park, Boston Public Library, Boston Common and more are only several stops away from those two stations. The apartment was exactly as described, a double bed in the one bedroom and a sofabed in the living area.  It is on the top floor of a brownstone (if the entry door is 1st floor, then it's on the 3rd floor), so there are stairs to climb. Few TV channels, but we had no need for them. Plenty of fresh towels. Kevin was there to meet us when we arrived from the airport. Recommended.
Beautiful apartment in the heart of Boston. Comfy location!

The place is located in a great location. Close to almost every popular attractions, like 10 min to HBS, 5 min to HMS. If you want to go some shopping, 10 mins to a great shopping location. Besides, this is a clean apartment with a quiet neighborhood. You can have a really good sleep.
Just a nice, clean, convenient place for a quick night stay.

Stayed 3 nights in the Ottoman Cot and I must say it far exceeded my expectations. The bed was comfortable and I had enough room space to place my belongings including a big check luggage at the corner. Peter was responsive and extremely thoughtful, providing abundance of supplies to guests including snacks, breakfast and amenities. Best host ever!
Excellent place to stay

GOOD POINT
・どこへ行くにも便利な場所にある
・キッチンが使いやすい
・質問にすぐ対応してくれる

・アパート前にホームレスや薬物中毒者がうろついているため、夜間の外出はやめた方がいい(特に子供や女性だけの場合)
Very beautiful place located in a great neighborhood. Maude is very efficient with replying!
Sin dudas volvería alojarme, todo perfecto! Muchas gracias!
very clean and cozy

Le séjour chez Alex a été très agréable. Ce studio correspondait exactement à l'annonce. Il était idéalement situé, à proximité des transports. L'appartement en lui même était spacieux et bien équipé, propre et récent. Alex a été un hôte parfait, présent pour rendre service tout en respectant notre intimité. Je le recommande et y retournerai avec plaisir lors d'un prochain séjour à Boston.

Small, yet clean room with all the facilities that are needed for short-term accommodation. Great location. Alicia, the host was very available to each of our questions. It is not cheap and the terms of Airbnb led to charge us upon order, which was few months before arrival.
Excellent location - very walkable to everything and close by some great food. Felt like we were living out of a movie set!

This apartment is definitely a great place to stay in such crowded Boston, with stunning views out of the windows. It is a quiet, modern style, clean and cozy home with all the convenient kitchen and bath essentials as well as in site laundry. It is easy to get to colleges and shopping, restaurants. I do recommend this place for living!
Good space for the price you pay

Marvelous, responsive hosts. Couldn’t beat the location for convenience. Felt like staying with a good friend I hadn’t met yet; I loved the personality of the space. Efficient, eclectic, homey. Love the plants and turtles! :):):) Felt like I was back in university with roommates, but they were quiet and respectful.
Great place to not have a car; walk to everything.
FYI BYO breakfast. But they kindly let us have some of their coffee. :):):)

This is a gorgeous place!  Caroline has made sure that everything you need is there.  It is beautifully decorated, quiet and extremely comfortable.  You can't beat the location!  I would definitely stay there again.  Thanks for a wonderful stay, Caroline!
Cheap for downtown. Small room but it was clean and centrally located.
Great space in a very convenient location.  We look forward to staying with you again in the future.
Me and my boyfriend had a amazing time, they provided a cute little booklet with places nearby to try like food and activities. Honestly one of the best stays I’ve had yet

Really fantastic place for my family of three.  It fits way more.  Actually liked the two flloors.   The place is perfect for sightseeing in Boston: the freedom trail, the Boston Commons, near the duck boats.  All highly recommended.  Thank you Victoria for a memorable stay in Boston.
Beautiful 3 bedroom apartment, with great central location next to the park. Very happy with our stay.

The apartment was in such an amazing and perfect location for doing ANYTHING in Boston.  We walked absolutely everywhere but it was still close enough to the T stops that we could have taken the subway to any other part of town easily. I literally cannot say enough about the location - it was fantastic.  As noted in the listing, the apartment is small and has minimal spots to eat - but honestly, we barely noticed, we moved the end table to in front of the couch to sit and have a place to put snacks/drinks.  Dr. Robert gives extensive instructions for how to find the place and get the key, which was super helpful. And he was always quick to respond to my messages. I would DEFINITELY stay here again!!!

Beautiful place architecturally
Spartan but clean and somewhat stylish but maybe a little worn
Nice big rooms, good feeling
Upper floor would be best
I would stay here again

Very comfortable apartment in charming historic neighborhood.  Quiet.  30 minute walk to Fenway Park area...was very pleasant.  Clean and spacious.  Know you need to walk up to the third floor on narrow stairs which was fine for us but might not be for others.
Enjoyed staying at Shawn's! Snacks were a very nice amenity, especially after a long day out.
Perfect for our first trip to Boston!

Very clean place, nice room with A/C. Huge walk in closet w/ microwave and fridge.
During Saturday, there was a block party across the street that played music until 3am, just as an FYI.
Cleaning fee was high, FYI but they do a great job cleaning.
We had a great experience. Everything was exactly as it was described. Great location, and close to public transportation.
Perfect location for Fenway and the T. The  communication from Stone was amazing.
Very responsive hosts, and space was just as pictured! Felt much nicer than most hotels to me.

I cannot say enough about Jennifer and her place. I was able to stay for an extended period and am lucky I did! Jennifer was kind, attentive, hospitable, and accommodating. Multiple times she went out of her way to leave me homemade goodies and treats. She was always so thoughtful. Her place is clean, quiet, and within walking distance to whatever you may need during your stay. I highly recommend this place if you're in the area. Thanks again for everything, Jennifer!

Very clean place and comfortable bed. Middle of busy street and walking distance to Prudential Building where shopping can be done. But lot of noise can be heard until late at night and early mornings.

My wife and I had a late arrival into Logan and a morning departure to our next destination, and Shelly's place was the perfect to rest up in between! Everything was exactly as described and Shelly was a great communicator and made the whole experience easy and pleasant.
Excellent location, very clean apartment, quiet walkable neighborhood.
Excelente ubicación, impecable y Brian + Heather siempre respondían rápido a cualquier inquietud o ayuda!!
Very homey

Great cozy apartment, was very easy to get there with a car, park and get in thanks to Jurek's detailed directions and communication. The place is close to a busy road so there's some noise, but that didn't bother us too much as there is an AC in every room.
Easy check in. Quiet place with a fast walk to the trains. Clean. Just a super chill place. I will stay again next time I pass through alone.
Modern and sleek room, Beautiful bathroom, comfortable bed and pillows. 10/10 great experience 👍🏿.
Loved staying here.  Great location and host
Nice place to stay for the weekend. Close to subway, which was very convenient.
Cute clean and comfortable.
Daryl’s place was extremely clean and had everything we needed.  He was super accommodating and got us into another one of his units when we decided to extend our stay. Great property, great host!

The room is pretty bare bones but is overall, as described. The room and linens appeared to be clean. Our main complaint was the cleanliness of the shared bathroom. The tub and grout were very dirty; there was a lot of dust; and there was a huge crack in the sink counter. We really wanted to shower after being out in the humidity but opted to wait until we got to our next accommodations for these reasons. It worked in a pinch but I’m glad we didn’t stay more than one night. Checking in and out was a breeze and we enjoyed the convenient location near the airport.
Perfecta para nosotros 4 a 15 min de la ciudad (muy céntrica) y la anfitriona de 10, siempre al pendiente de lo que pudiéramos necesitar, sin duda volvería a regresar a su lugar, gracias!

The bed was very clean and comfortable, with extra pillows and blankets! David’s room came with great amenities, the TV was great with steaming services available. We had coffee and water provided. It was a cute little space and parking was relatively painless across the street.
My only issue was there was a smell in the room that we couldn’t figure out where it was coming from. We had the fans on which was helpful but unsure if it was coming from inside or outside.
This is a great place in a quiet and extremely walkable neighborhood. We especially appreciated the private, off-street parking. I’d definitely stay here again!

Elevator was out of service and accomodations were on the seventh floor. Not very fun when it's 100°F and humid. The listing said elevator could be taken to the sixth floor and then I would have to walk up one flight of stairs. Was not expecting to have to climb seven.

Kathy's place was perfect for our family of four, including two teenage boys. We LOVED the location--a block from the T, convenient grocery store, restaurants, pretty parks, etc--plus within walking distance of some great streets with fun vibes. It sits right in the middle of Back Bay and the South End, and you are up for some walking, you can walk to Fenway, MIT, Boston Commons, and other great Boston areas. The apartment is on a quiet, pretty street but close to everything! We had everything we needed plus some nice added amenities from Kathy.  We HIGHLY recommend this great place!
Thanks for the stay Boston is one of our favorite cities. Staying so close to Boston Commons was great. Thanks!

This was our third air BnB in a two week tour of NYC, Toronto and finally Boston and a great choice of location and neighborhood. A beautiful traditional Boston home, loads of space, everything we needed and books galore. An easy steady tram ride in to downtown and the T stop a short walk away. Lots to see and do all around and great to catch a Red Sox game even though we don't know the rules of Baseball.
Plenty of great bars and food choices within a short walk in the Allston neighborhood and not much further to stroll in to Brookline for more options. So no need to go back in to downtown after you've done all the tourist things.
Fabulous stay and made more than welcome by Peter, Silvia and family. Look forward to returning in the future.

Andrews place is in a great location for a reasonable price. During a busy weekend in the area (music festival and Harvard graduation), we were able to stay 4 nights for what other stays were charging for 1.
The hosts were kind and proactive with instructions and information, and the place was clean and comfortable. I would stay here again.

The hosts were very responsive. The stay was great! The place was clean, clutter-free, and exactly as described. It was a comfortable stay and an excellent value for the money. Would definitely recommend and stay again!
A perfect place to visit Boston. A very cosy and well equipped flat. I would like to come back with my wife to show her this beautiful city
Perfect spot for two people who wanted to crash after sightseeing and a ballgame in Boston. Walked to two good restaurants and a coffee shop. Street was quiet and leafy. Would stay there again.
Natalie’s house was a great deal being in a quiet neighborhood and only  a 20min walk from the train/subway. We enjoyed our stay!

We had an amazing stay at Michelle's house. The house is perfect for a group of 8 people with a spacious living room to spend time all together. Despite not being located in the center of Boston, it is easily accessible by metro or uber (~15 min). Michelle has been a great host, always very reactive and accomodating which we really appreciated.

We stayed at this Airbnb listing in Boston 10-17 June 2018 and are extremely disappointed in the misrepresentation of this offer. The pictures on the website must be old because what we found would not pass a city inspection. The bathroom shower had all of the access to the exposed, rusty, piping covered with a plastic sheet duck taped to cover the lack of an appropriate shower cover. The dilapidated wooden sink cabinet was falling apart with a door that did not cover the entire opening. In the kitchen, the very small counter/workspace was filled completely by the contents of a tableware drawer that did not fit in the cabinets. There were no drawers. The kitchen sink had no stopper and things fell directly into an open incinerator. There were not enough furnished kitchen pots/pans/dishes/glassware to cook. The paper towel roll was on top of the tableware. Under the sink storage was filled with housekeeping items thrown in randomly leaving no space for any other items like the paper towel roll. There was no coffee pot or tea kettle. There was no microwave oven and no place for one. Given the owner's reason for not providing a coffee pot, it is likely the electrical wiring would not permit a microwave oven. The over the stove fan worked intermittently. The refrigerator could not be accessed from within the kitchen because of the lack of room. The door opened into the doorway to the sitting room. We did not see any functioning smoke detectors. In the living space, there were only two stools and a short plank against the wall that served as a dining area. The couch was dirty and we did not open it further. Throughout the apartment, electrical outlets popped when plugs were inserted. They were not fixed completely to the wall. The only light in the second bedroom could only be turned on by plugging it in and out of the floor socket. There were no night tables anywhere in the apartment. Overhead lightbulbs and two cheap floor lamps were all that was available for lighting. Windows did not shut. The air conditioners did not fit in the windows and the plastic filler plates did not cover the opening. The mattresses on the beds in the double room were worn out. The floors were dirty and under the dresser and beds had not been cleaned. The exposed areas around the molding on the floor were filled with dirt. The apartment door did not close to the bottom of the doorway and therefore the hallway was visible within the last two inches of the door. The entrance to the building was propped open the entire time of our stay with a large stone. People sitting on the front stoop smoking kept putting the stone back to keep the doors open. The outside door did not shut at all. We asked for at least a coffee pot (we did not request any brand just a way to make coffee) and...
My mom and I stayed here for 4 nights.  The perfect location to everything!   The apartment was clean and looked like the photos.  If I come back to Boston I would book again.
Amazing stay!

We had a couple issues when checking in. I couldn’t figure out how to enter the door code but the host was very responsive and it was resolved right away and the place wasn’t ready on time but with a slight change in plans it all worked out. Mylinh’s place is spotless and super clean. We walk around shoeless and our bare feet could tell how clean it was. It was a great space for 4 adults and 4 kids and a welcome spot with our little 4 lb dog.
Location is great for walking to the T to get to the attractions. Just heads up that we found the public transit options were limited on a Sunday evening but it was a quick and affordable uber back to the house. There’s plenty of food options within walking distance that we did try one of the days we were there. I’d stay here again for sure.
Gary’s place is great. Good location, we felt safe - also at night. Close to public transport and restaurants. All instructions were very clear and Gary was super responsive.

My wife and I really enjoyed our trip to Boston. Huanan’s place is in a perfect spot in the Beacon Hill neighborhood and is comfortable and private. Definitely felt like we got an authentic Boston experience from our trip.

Peter's AirBnB did the job for my relatively short visit to Boston. As I lived in Boston before, I enjoy the comfort of an apartment rather than a hotel. This makes me feel I'm part of Boston, even within a brief stay. Peter was communicative and easygoing. He prepared my room as described. Despite an 11-hour time difference, I didn't experience jet lag as the bed allows me to sleep like a baby. Peter prepared many things for you to be creative with your breakfast. All in all, a great stay!

Our host came down to the suite to meet us when we arrived. She showed us around and explained how the place "worked". Because this was our first trip to Boston, she reviewed a host of things to see and do as well as providing many good suggestions of places to eat, both nearby and farther afield. She also provided specific instructions of how to access the "T".
Awesome location, more than expected

Ryan's loft was beautiful and centrally located! Near everything I could imagine. Perfect for a simple two day stay in Boston.
We learned a trick with the door issue: lift up and slightly left to push it open. Worked like a charm!
The studio apartment was clean and equipped with all we needed for a short stay! Location was great for seeing family who live nearby.

My sister and I really enjoyed our stay! The air bnb was just as described. The building is a little old, as is the inside hall, but the bnb itself was clean and had everything we needed. There was a really good pizza restaurant just next door. Mike and Cassandra are very responsive and great host!

Meri's home was a wonderful fit for my family and I while visiting Boston!
The open living space, large patio and shower were some of my favorite features.
For anyone thinking about renting a car, here is a little FYI: We had to park our rental car at a car garage 1.5 miles away. (about a 7 minute drive) so if you don't plan on traveling out of the city much, I highly recommend using Uber, Lyft or public transportation. Meri's house is conveniently located and we didn't need our car once.
If and when we're back in Boston, we'll be sure to stay here again.
Thanks for being such a wonderful host, Meri!

Very cool apartment.  Rooftop was awesome.  Very clean.  Nice location.  My only complaint were the stairs leading to the apartment.  Very steep.  Might be difficult for some people.   Wouldn't stop me from staying here again.  We really enjoyed the space.
Everything as described in a super central location.
Very comfortable
The convenience of this Airbnb is very hard to beat! Perfect location, perfect neighborhood and perfect place to spend our anniversary!

Couldn’t have been better. Apartment was beautiful and equipped with everything we needed .Maverick was very helpful and the location was great.We mistakenly left gifts in the location and he is still taking care of our belongings till we get them back, so kind! Whenever you travel to Boston, Maverick Suites Team is the host to reach!

Awesome. The space is larger than the photos and feels like a home. Leslie was a great host - super helpful with all of my questions ahead of my stay and made sure we were taken care of with amenities, check in and check out. Honestly couldn’t have asked for a better location. Very private and quiet and just a short walk to Copley and back bay. And the fireplace with the music and the prudential lit up from the living room window makes for a killer ambiance at night. Could not go wrong with this booking.
Great stay. Thank you!

We had a lovely time as a family in Boston for our sons graduation.
The place was perfect for what we needed it for

Absolutely loved our stay at this Airbnb rental! The space was immaculate, stylishly decorated, and had everything we needed for a comfortable stay. The host was incredibly accommodating and responsive to any questions we had. The location was perfect, close to amenities and attractions. Would highly recommend to anyone looking for a fantastic getaway!
Very clean, extremely comfortable for families since we got to hang out in the living room. I love the whole apartment
Excellent location, excellent host, nice rooms, clean property - well worth staying. Only downside was the upstairs shower lacked pressure, otherwise all positive
Elisangela is very easy to work with. Also, the place was exactly what I had expected and was super clean. We were all able to grab on-street parking which was a plus. Fantastic experience overall!

This apartment was ideally located so close to all the places we wanted to see on our trip to Boston. It was clean and tidy with good kitchen facilities and a really comfy bed. The sofa bed was sagging a little but my mum still had a good night sleep on it. It was very quiet and also close to stores and restaurants. Thanks
入住舒适
We were very happy with all aspects of our short stay. Thank you, Stone, for working with our schedule, requests, and your flexibility.

The apt was very nice and clean, very comfortable even for long stayings! I've been there for one month and the kitchen/bathroom had averything I needed, better than my own apt in Rome. I'm working at MGH and it takes only 10-15 mins to get there, very conveniently located. Jurek was available at any time, I really appreciated that, helping me with supermarkets, copy centers etc. The neighborhood is very safe.
If I could give more than five stars to the place I would . This was one of the best air B&Bs I have stayed in. Everything was just absolutely perfect, right from the host to the place.
We visit Boston for 4 days, Bernard is a great host with great communication and he even turn on the AC for us before we arrive late. Recommended for Bernard’s place while you visit Boston.
Fantastic location and great communication with Richard. He answered questions quickly. The apartment is just as advertised!

We had a lovely stay in this rental! It's in a great central location and had everything we needed. The team overseeing the rental was very communicative and responded to my messages throughout the stay in a timely manner. I would definitely rent this unit again for a getaway in Boston!

This is my second time staying in this listing! I had such a good experience when staying here back in 2023 that I decided to rebook when returning to Boston for a concert. The listing matches the photos and is a clean, open space. There is plenty of room for 4 people, though I only stayed there in a group of 3. Check-in is a breeze and there is nothing to do for checking out, so the whole process is quite easy. Ali and Yuliya are extremely attentive hosts and always responded quickly to any of my questions. There is a T stop less than 5 minutes away, so it is also very easy to access the downtown area. I cannot recommend this listing enough and will definitely use it again if I return to Boston!

We had a great stay in Boston and in Jacklyn's  apartment which was spacious and bright with lovely bedrooms which were big enough for all the family .The apartment is a little way out from downtown, but we found our way around the T and the buses to get everywhere we wanted easily.
Such a gorgeous place!
Great attention to detail from the host. Overall very good value for the price.
The place is nice and cozy, a little old but well decorated. Appreciate the kitchen is equipped with all essentials.
Great place for what we needed.  Really central and lovely hosts.  Would definitely stay again.  Thanks Team :)
An amazing and cozy spot to wind down from hectic city life that is Boston. Will love to use this accommodation again on my next trip to Boston!
Great location pristine apt

Stephanie’s is a lovely, updated period apartment with every guest need anticipated and addressed. The apartment’s location is in a traditional residential area of Boston’s South Side, close to good restaurants, services and public transportation options. We are two fit people in our 70’s and we were able to walk to North Boston and Fenway Park, as well as everywhere in between.  There are also several subway stops within a half mile. This was a great home-away-from-home for us while we explored beautiful historic Boston.
Wonderful stay. Right in the heart of Boston. The place was perfect and so quiet. Can’t wait to visit again!
Great place and very responsive hosts
Great space and location. Short walk to the bus to get downtown. Fulfilled our needs as a party of 10

Tina's place is as shown.  The room is clean and neat. It is a well lived in home.  I too am allergic to cats and had no reaction. So great also that Tina drives for Uber/Lyft...she did me the HUGE favor of driving over my laptop when I forgot it in the room.

Very friendly hosts. I asked if they had any recommendation for rainy day outdoor restaurants, and provide me with several! Very helpful. Place was super clean and location was so convenient. I can go on and on!
Very clean, nice and comfortable. Also it’s located in a great area, a lot of food options in the area as well.
I had a great stay at Anh and Tuan’s place. Their place was very clean and quiet, and it was a quick ride into downtown Boston on the T. I would definitely stay here again.
很好，很干净。性价比高
Catherine's Airbnb was just what we needed!  it was clean and comfortable!
Great location and helpful host who lent us a charger and let us pick up our bags after checking out. Highly recommended for a local Boston townhouse experience.
Great location, fun and walkable neighborhood. Very welcoming host!
Nice
Thank you for the great stay. Super quiet house to relax from touring around Boston. Host was very proactive and caring. Would be happy to stay at my next visit.
I was in Boston for a conference and very much enjoyed the comfort and privacy of Peter's place. His attention to details is exceptional and I had everything I needed.
It was a nice stay. If you consider the cost-effectiveness, this is the best place.
Great stay

This Air B&B is located in the heart of Dorchester. Within walking distance you have: public transportation, local boutiques & shops, multiple parks (including one next door).
My husband and I are staying here while our house is being renovated and honestly it has been the best decision thus far. Greg & Alicia respond immediately to any questions and resolve any concerns within minutes. I’ve had to extend my stay a few times (renovations are always unpredictable) and they continue to be accommodating! I am definitely recommend this Air B&B to all my friends when they fly into Boston.

The main selling point of this studio is its location. It is close to Back Bay, Fenway, and South End, and it's quick to reach downtown Boston and Cambridge. A 10 min walk in any direction will get you to many good food spots, attractions, shopping centers, etc. The other main selling point is that the studio is very well-equipped. It has a full-sized kitchen, washer/dryer access, and anything else you might need for a long-term stay. The AC noise outside of the window can be a little loud if you want to keep the windows open, so if you're a light sleeper, you may want to bring some earplugs. Overall, we had a great stay here!
Georgia is a very responsive host and paid attention to our needs. We felt very comfortable staying at her place.
The Thatch team was very accommodating and communicated often. The Airbnb is in a great area, would stay again!

Ewa’s place is beautiful! Kept very clean, easy to find, driveway parking, simple instructions for everything. It made for a very simple and easy experience. The space is also decorated so beautifully, with a comfortable bed, pull out couch, tv and a clean and modern kitchen. A perfect place for 2 or 3 people to stay! Thank you again!
Great location. Met the needs for the trip, which was to explore the city of Boston.
Clean well-appointed unit in a great location. Loved it.

We are grateful to Michael for his responsiveness to our last minute request for a reservation. The condo was spotless and ready for us to move in within hours of the request. It is a beautiful space with off-street parking in a convenient location. Michael was also very responsive to our questions and feedback.
We would encourage Michael to upgrade some of the amenities and provide a few of those nice extras (i.e. shampoo, body wash, extra towels) that make the stay even nicer.
Beautifully kept home in charming neighborhood gracious host
great space in great neighborhood, but very small
We loved this place, as well as the location! It was our first time in South Boston and Bill and Maureen made it great! We also loved the homemade muffins each morning ☺️

We had a great stay while visiting Boston. The property is well located close to bars and restaurants, and close to Back Bay T station. The place is comfortable and well equipped. Santo is a great host, very helpful and assisted us in dealing with a tricky issue involving our airline, many thanks.
Neat stay. I didn’t use it, but I appreciated the stove and kitchen cookware.
Perfect!

The location was ideal for us first timer in Boston. It is in a charming area of Beacon Hill and was able to walk everywhere. The neighborhood is cute and quiet at night. We look forward to staying here the next time we are in Boston. Thanks for hosting us!

Peter’s place was easy to find and very beautiful and peaceful neighborhood. His instructions were thorough and he adjusted with the check in time promptly and accommodated with kind responses. The place itself was very clean, beautiful and very well organized. Well established furniture, nice collection of books, snacks and food ingredients.
Plenty of restaurants and things to do around. Peter also was extremely HELPFUL with any questions and concerns. Had a good time with other guests.

Overall we loved this place! Great location with only a 10 minute walk to South Station and Boston Common. The apartment was very clean and had all the things we needed like plenty of towels, some toiletries, dishes and extra bedding for couch. Beds were firm but we like it that way. Couch might not be a comfortable option for a bigger adult. The only thing to keep in mind is there are 2 flights of narrow, winding stairs to climb. Billy was very responsive and allowed us to drop off our luggage early so we could head out to explore the town.
Top Lage!

We loved the location of Alan's Airbnb. It was a perfect size for two people and we felt very safe and cozy in our location! It was an easy six minute walk from the closest train station which was very helpful.
位置非常好，在一个非常安全的街区，有非常好的邻居，窗外的风景也非常漂亮非常好，交通便利，公寓非常干净。我们一家三人在这度过了一周的时间。房东非常好给我推荐了很多好的餐厅。不过开门非常不容易，我们开始几天开门都需要使用FBI开门法进出。餐具厨房浴巾用品都非常充足，但纸巾和佐料不是很充足（虽然这不是必须配备的）
Ehab est réactif et ses instructions ont été très claires. L’appartement est facile d’accès par métro. Je recommande !
Great location, tidy and clean apartment.
Great space for our family's stay in Boston!

This place is ideal. Tastefully decorated, great location not far from the T, walking distance from lots of restaurants and shops as well as grocery stores. I love it. Charles &his team are excellent hosts, anticipating needs and are proactive with communication. I’ll be extending my stay here!

Our stay in North Boston was great.  We felt like we were still in Italy.  We were a short walk away from the water and from the subway.  We were literally on the Freedom Trail.  You can't get better than that if you are visiting Boston.    Howard was a fantastic host.  He went above and beyond for us - lending us a blanket, printing our boarding passes, and giving us great suggestions as to where the locals eat.  The room itself was neat and clean with our own bathroom and many of the amenities you usually have to pack were right there at our fingertips.  THANKS Howard.

The apartment complex is beautiful and the gym and common facilities are great. Walkable to Whole Foods and lots of restaurants in Brighton and Brookline. The apartment is super comfortable and having a balcony is great in the nice weather. We will certainly be back.
Great place in the Chinatown near everything
It is perfect for a short stay in Boston. And it was walkable to everywhere. It was a comfortable and clean. Bonus points for having instant coffee and to-go cups :)
The location was ideal! It was a small basement studio, so light was minimal. It really encouraged exploring the neighborhood 😀
Great place to stay in Boston. The room is comfortable, clean and quiet, exactly as described. Susan and Boris are responsive and friendly.
Great all around!
Great stay
Great place to stay, near several MBTA stations and restaurants.

Clean house and room. Close to city and airport!
I would stay in here in my next Boston visit.

Great experience for this family of 4 from PA.  Place was as pictured, homey and stylish. Easy access but also felt safe. Adler is an amazing host. Helpful and available whenever we needed him.  Beds were comfortable, temperature was just right and we enjoyed watching a Netflix movie each night. 10/10 would recommend.

I really liked this place. Terry and Mike do a great job of taking care of the place, and making your stay like staying in a charming home. It's got everything you could want, is clean and well decorated. Really good place, I'd come back for sure.
Cute and clean place, made us feel at home for a few days. Just what my family needed to celebrate the Christmas holidays. Host lives on the property and is very helpful.
Great location! We walked everywhere! Very clean and well appointed!

Leisl's townhouse in Boston was perfect for our short family/work visit. The place was exactly as described and Leisl was very prompt to reply to questions and to provide useful information for the stay. We were very comfortable and had everything we needed.

We loved our stay at Sharde and Jens’s! It had everything we needed to make us feel at home. Communication was excellent, check-in was very easy with simple directions, and everything provided was high quality! Could not have been a cleaner, more comfortable place to stay!!
This was a great location for a one-night stay, which is what I needed in Boston. It was easy to get to on the train from the South Station and the host was very receptive!
Had a great night sleep, comfy bed. Everything clean. With what you pay so close to the airport I would stay here again. Secure also and a great shower!

Anda and Ryan’s place was clean, quiet, and conveniently located near the conference center and public transit. Both check in and check out were very easy. The perfect place for anyone wanting to check out Boston or in town for a conference.
This was a great place to stay!
Great place overall .

Great location and a great space.  Communication was 100%.  Numerous restaurants/bars/shopping all within walking distance.  We were even able to catch the Red Sox first home game of the season.  Would definitely stay here again while in Boston!

Kathy and her husband Joe were great hosts! Their home was beautiful and clean. I didn’t have any questions but they were very responsive and communicative if needed. Would definitely stay here again!!

Le logement était parfait pour notre famille de 4 . Meri a pensé à tout pour que notre séjour soit agréable. La cuisine est bien équipée, la salle de bain est moderne et la salon est grand. Meri a laissé beaucoup de cartes de la ville et d'informations utiles pour découvrir les environs.
Le stationnement est difficile et cela nous a causé bien des soucis. C'est la dernière fois que je réserve une maison ou un logement sans stationnement dan une ville.
Le balcon est grand et le BBQ fonctionnait bien mais il manque d'intimité lorsque les voisins sortent sur leurs balcons. Par chance nous n'avons vu que 2 voisins lors de notre séjour de 3 jours
Great experience. Just as described. Very friendly host.
Great place in a very nice, quiet area!

what can I say other than this was the perfect place to stay for a lil vacation to Boston! Place was clean and close to the city. Will definitely be recommending to friends and family who need accommodations in Boston!

Great location, perfect for a close stay to the airport. You could even walk if you want! (Almost 2 miles I think) I did it... plus there is some good authentic Mexican food about .3 miles from the bnb. Great stay, friendly folks, and a clean bedroom and bathroom. Will definitely stay again!

Frank çok ilgili bir ev sahibiydi. Hızlı geri dönüşleri ve destekleri için minnettarız. Ev ihtiyaçlarımız için uygundu ve açıklamalarda yazıldığı gibiydi. Evin yakın çevresinde sokakta araç park yeri sürekli bulmak mümkündü.
Rahatlıkla tavsiye ederim.
Loved it.  Will stay again
Muy cerca del metro, fácil de llegar, instrucciones claras para entrar. Comodidades básicas como toallas y secador de pelo. Muy bueno para estancias cortas

Susi offers a nice tidy room with a very comfortable bed. Susi´s hospitality, the delicious coffee and breakfast, as well as 3 cats make you feel like staying in a home away from home. I also enjoyed the local shops, restaurants and neighbourhood (including yoga schools). I stayed for almost 8 weeks in Susi´s place and I am grateful for the nice memories and friendship we developed.

Bo is a great host, very available and helpful. The room is nice, the neighbourhood is very quiet, and there's a bus stop in front of the house, with a bus line that brings you straight to Harvard Square. Would recommend.
A great spot in Boston! Very close to the T and comfortably slept 8. Would stay again
Everything great
Awesome quiet house clean convenient parking

El alojamiento coincidía con la descripción , perfecto para 4 personas. La zona es tranquila y a pocos minutos está la línea de metro que te lleva al centro. Y el anfitrión atento a todo y lo resolvía todo muy rápido.

This is a well appointed home, comfortably furnished and tastefully decorated. We were there with 4 adults and 2 children (ages 3 and 1) with plenty of living space to spare! The kitchen is very open, outfitted with high-end appliances and chef-worthy utensils. Good to know if you plan to cook as we did. The location was convenient to restaurants and night-life that Jamaica Plain itself offered, as well as Boston proper. A really quick walk to the T's Orange Line got you anywhere you wanted to be, yet it was far enough away that the sound of the train lulled the travel weary to a peaceful sleep. Do know that there is only parking space for a single car... we did know in advance, and street space was available a few blocks over. Communication was superb, generosity abounded.

What can I say! This place was amazing. Completely brand new, beautifully appointed and decorated. So comfortable and inviting. I wanted to move in and never leave. Easy to get to transportation and great restaurants.
We rented Simon’s place for a college reunion nearby and our friends were so impressed with the location and the beautiful accommodations. Simon was easy to communicate with and he really thought of everything. This is how it’s supposed to be done! Would highly recommend, and will stay here again in the future.
We thought the house was nice and loved J.P.
Wonderful stay! The apartment was spotless, cozy, and perfect for our family. Great location and very responsive host. We would happily stay here again!

Long's place is spotless and has a great layout for privacy and space when traveling with others. The location is on a busy town road nearby a lot of useful stores and options for takeout and delivery. Pet friendly was a huge plus and our dog was very comfortable!

Great room to stay in for a few nights in Boston. Coffee shops and restaurants nearby and same with the subway. We walked everywhere. The room had everything we needed! Great view of the Prudential Center from the bedroom windows. Beautiful details on the fireplace and the hardwood floors were amazing. Kitchen was perfect, even though we never used it. Would stay again for sure! The hosts were gracious enough for us to drop our bags off early so we could go enjoy the city!
Unbelievable experience, enjoyed every moment. Excellent host. I honestly feel, this is how an Airbnb should be managed.
Not many words to say. Just perfect as I expected. Great Location, and everything better than pictures. Would come back easily.
Thank you for a comfortable stay for our family.
Excellent hosts and exactly as advertised. Perfect representation. Very quick response. Highly recommend

We had a great stay during our time in Boston. The place was very clean and well maintained. Very quiet neighborhood during our time there and having parking available off the street was GREAT. We would love to stay here again next time we’re in town!
The location is great and the place is really good! I recommend!!
Alicia's place was perfect for a quick work trip into Boston.  The place was just enough space and in a perfect location.  I will definitely consider this location again!

We enjoyed our stay in Billy’s place! It was easy to walk to South Station and the Convention Center for our conference. There was plenty of room for three people, the home was clean and had all the amenities we needed.
Great host and Airbnb in the city! Would book with them again! 🙂
Great stay, highly recommend!

Natalie was always responsive and helpful. even though there was a hiccup she was proactive and rectified the situation.
walkable to the train station and then youre one ride away from the city center.
Well-located, very nice appartment!

This place was perfect! So much bigger and better than we thought it would be
We were 11 people in this house and didn’t feel crowded at all
The house was really aesthetically pleasing and came ready with anything we would need (laundry,kitchen utensils you name it)
The apartment is also a 3 walk to the T (subway system) and a 10/15 min ride into the heart of Boston.
Was a perfect stay and exactly what we were looking for a big group of friends exploring Boston!!

Everything but the sound in the room was great, it was clean, a great location with a lot of nice places within walking distance and was just a few blocks from the "T", but the sound from the other rooms was horrific.
There was no sound proofing between the rooms, at first I thought the neighbors were just being loud. This was not the case, they were just carrying on a normal conversation and it sounded like they were sitting right next to me. I knew it was bad when I could hear the microwave open and the button beep. Was not able to sleep at all. This may be isolated to the room I stayed in but unless you are a heavy sleeper I can't recommend this place.

We loved our time at Rebecca’s. Perfect location in the middle of it all. We could do the Freedom Trail one day and hit a concert at Fenway on another evening. The legs start to burn about the fourth floor but you feel real accomplished after climbing the stairs! Loved the building and felt very safe.

Construction started at 7am on 2 mornings if our stay. Right outside our bedroom windows. 4 feet away from our beds. All 4 bedrooms were feet away from it. Screwing into bricks- cutting lumber hammering - for a few hours.
When I did speak to management they claimed they have a disclaimer in the listing about their construction. It’s a deceptively written disclaimer. Definitely ask via email if there is construction going on outside your unit because they will not be telling you. We were in 306, 3rd floor. If I’m give. The ability to share my photos of the construction I will

The place was great! The beds and pillows were a dream!
Definitely would stay here again!
Only issue was that the elevator was not working and the stairs to the 5th floor were a bit much but everything else was amazing

This condo is perfectly located within the SE. When I come to Boston, I tend to work half days and enjoy the city the rest of the time. The desk/workspace is great. Most importantly, we have two small dogs and one is afraid of unusual noises. Being a basement unit limits any unusual noises. We also balance spending time here and being out in the city. The kitchen is amazingly well stocked, which helps with having some meals in the unit.
This is the fourth time that we've rented this unit and we'll be back.
Lovely, clean spot, nice location

Hermina's house is easy to find, clean and comfortable.  We stayed in the downstairs room which is huge, great bed, private bathroom.  Hermina let us help ourselves to food, tea etc and we enjoyed chatting to her and the other guests.  A great way to experience real Boston and see an area you probably wouldn't  visit. Def recommend it.
Had a great stay at  Kaitlyn’s place. She had thought of all the little things you could need and was always quick to answer any queries. Would happily recommend staying here

Great central spot close to Boston Common and the theatre district. Great restaurants and bars a short walk away.
Perfect for our holiday get away

Dawn’s place is amazing. The touches she adds make it feel like a home. After a long day walking around Boston, it’s nice to come home to a comfy place.  The beds were all comfy and the place was very clean. Dawn is very quick at communicating!  Great place to stay!

Lita was a lovely host and made our check in very easy. The apartment was exceptionally equipped for cooking family meals, the rooms and storage space were clean and spacious.
The area was safe for walking and public transportation was within very good reach.
We highly recommend Lita's apartment for its comfort in a central location and for her warm welcome and attention.
N

The Verb gives boutique vibes for sure! Cool featured artwork that were all things music! It’s in a great location and it was nice to have front desk staff to make our stay better!  My ONLY negatives would be the carpet in the room was dark and some parts almost felt sticky. More importantly  - there is a $45 fee per day as well you’ll pay upon check out! I don’t think that was advertised well at all and was a bummer.

Glenn and Oliver were amazing hosts, making our first trip to Boston a memorable one! We were beyond overjoyed at the cozy, welcoming private space. The breakfast was delicious, we even got some of their homemade honey and fresh pastries. The neighbourhood is conveniently near the trains and local restaurants, so everything we wished to see was easily at hand.

Room was spacious and comfortable. No desk or writing table, but I was able to work with the available furniture. You can also work downstairs. Street parking was plentiful, and the MTB station is 2 1/2  blocks away. The police station is a few steps away if that is a concern.   Hermina is a very thoughtful and generous person, and I am happy that I was able to stay at her house.
I stayed at Ehab's peaceful airbnb twice during my summer vacation and heatwave and enjoyed it! Everything listed is accurate and Ehab communicates well. He's an excellent host!
