The room was really spacious and comfortable, the bathroom really clean. The neighborhood is very quiet, there are stores and everything you need. You can take the bus to get very quickly to Harvard Square or walk ( a 15/20 minutes walk. It's very pleasant when the weather is nice.) Reina is a very nice and helpful guest. I  really enjoyed staying at her house and I highly recommend this place!
L'appartamento è semicentrale, in un quartiere bello e tranquillo. È spazioso, ben arredato e con tutti i comfort. Il bagno è ottimale. Il valore aggiunto è dato dal patio con Barbecue!

Great place to stay and visit Boston. Close from subway (10min walking) and Boston city centre. Very good restaurants in the neighborhood. The flat is very clean, calm and well equipped in a beautiful building. Laura is very helpful. The third bed (inflatable mattress) is perfect. We recommend!
Rooms were as advertised!

Nick was a wonderful host, he actually put in an AC for us due to the unexpected heat wave in Boston - we greatly appreciated that!! It was very nice to have free street parking as well (super rare to find!). The only thing I would note is that there was shampoo and conditioner but no body wash - every other Airbnb I have been in had all necessary items for the shower. Overall the apartment was wonderful and I would definitely recommend staying here! Thanks Nick!

I had a great stay at Irene's place. The room was as expected, and the bed was very comfortable. The location was the best part - it was so close to the Hynes Convention Center where my conference was, so convenient! Even though there were issues with the wi-fi, Irene was extremely responsive and called the technician to come and deal with it right away. Thanks for being an excellent host!
Great spot. Close to Fenway Park and everything Boston has to offer. Check in was easy, nice sized living room, comfortable bed. Quiet. Would recommend as well as stay here again.

숙소는 제일 윗층으로 층간 소음 없이 조용하고 편안하게 지낼 수 있었습니다. 화장실이 2개여서 사용이 편리했으며, 청소 상태도 매우 좋았습니다. 수건 등도 넉넉하게 제공되어 편리하게 사용할 수 있었으며 도보로 이동 가능한 버스 정류장에서 하버드, MIT 및 주요 관광지로 바로 연결되는 버스를 탑승할 수 있어 여행 계획을 세우기에도 적절하였습니다. 다만 숙소 근처에 슈퍼마켓이나 식당 등이 많지 않아 숙소로 들어가기 전에 먹을거리와 물을 충분히 구매해서 가는 것을 추천합니다.

We loved our stay here! Perfect for my wife and I. Loved the location! Walkable to a bunch of places and around the corner from Fenway Park.
The rooftop was awesome! Would definitely recommend staying here!
Great hosts as well!
A great place to stay during our trip to Boston - both sushi and bakery within walking distance.

This was a large place with plenty of lounging area near the kitchen. The two bedrooms are at either end of the apartment so each area was private. When we first got there we noticed a light was out in a shower area. We reported it to Albert and he offered to have someone replace at some point. It didn’t seem like a big deal however the next morning we realized there were two other bulbs out. Anyway we weren’t at the apartment that much. My biggest disappointment was in the lower bedroom, when the blower for the heat turned on. It was very loud, and I am a light sleeper. My husband got up in the middle of the night to turn it off. It was fine after that.
So, a nice place but attention to details (even old screws in the wall) could be improved.
Nice place to stay in the North End. Close to everything.
A lovely spot in Boston and a short walk to Fenway. Lihua was very welcoming.

Mary was an excellent host. She's super responsive and answered any questions I had. The place was very clean, comfortable, and easy to get into. Apartment was stocked with the essentials and bigger than I expected. Location is great as it's very walkable; tons of stores around in case you need to run out and get things. Would definitely book again!!

This apartment was a great stay! Definitely 5 stars all around. Great communication by the host, clean and neat place (matched photos and descriptions), had a list of restaurants and wonderful things to do in the area, and more. Thank you Jorge!
The room is very nice and clean! It's like staying in a fine hotel with all the amenities you need. Andre provided clean towels and the room is just lovely.

Cozy 1-bedroom apartment as described, conveniently located minutes from airport. Neighborhood is walkable - there’s a variety of restaurants you can walk to in 10 mins or less. Other parts of Boston are just a short Uber ride away. This location & East Boston in general are great for a quick weekend getaway when you don’t want to rent a car.
Due to its proximity to the airport & the fact that it’s a 1st floor apartment, the location is a bit loud. Aside from the expected city sounds of airplanes, traffic & sirens, you will hear the comings and goings of the neighbors to either side & upstairs, as well as near constant foot traffic outside.
I appreciated the updated bathroom, 2 desks & the 2 streaming tvs. Luz provided easy self check-in instructions & recommendations for restaurants. She also allowed me to check in early. Be mindful that the shared front door might be dead-bolted after 9 pm (the upstairs neighbor let me in).
Check out Ebo Grocery on Meridian St - great find!

Todo en este lugar es para recomendar. Antoinette y Louis son unos anfitriones amables, respetuosos, serviciales y afectuosos.
Su casa es preciosa, perfecta. Muy cuidada, cálida y limpia.
La zona exclusiva de los huépedes es una planta espaciosa, con dos camas muy cómodas, luminosa y hermosa como el resto de la casa. El cuarto de baño es muy amplio, con dos lavabos, ducha y una bañera de jacuzzi.
Y esta increíble casa está en un barrio encantador y muy seguro que es Jamaica Plain, algo alejado del centro de Boston, pero muy bien comunicado por la línea 39 de bus y la línea Orange de T.
Solo puedo recomendar y recomendar este alojamiento.

Had everything to suit my needs.
Beautiful character home.
Literally 5 minutes from airport.
2 minutes from railway station.
Into town in 10 minutes.
Would definitely stay again.

It was a wonderful 4-day stay in this lovely place - clean, spacious and quiet. Kitchen was the highlight as it’s fully equipped with all types of cooking utensils and ingredients.
Strongly recommended for whoever coming to Boston - big group or small. :)

This was first experience with Air B&B, and I really enjoyed my l stay, Bv is an excellent host, the location and room were fantastic and it was always kept very clean.
the description was very accurate
I found it to be a very professionally run Air B&B.
This is location is 10/15 minutes walk from Boston Commons Park.
I hope all of my future Air B&B stays will be this good!
Beautiful place easy to find and get in. Wonderful area with no problems, clean and perfect for our stay
Great, spacious apartment near many stores!
Great location and apartment! It was very easy to get around Boston while staying here. Check in was easy and communication from the host was very clear. I would definitely stay here again.

CM & JC are very kind, welcoming, and great hosts. Checkin & checkout was easy. The apartment is close to Jackson Square station and 10 mins to Boston Medical Center. The place was very clean and comfortable. Stocked with snacks. They were very attentive and responsive. I greatly enjoyed conversation and coffee with JC & CM. Would stay here again and highly recommend Jc & Cm’s place.
Althea is a great host! She was very welcoming, helpful and quick to response. The bedroom, bathroom were very clean and spacious! I highly recommend this place!

The location is spectacular. Tonnes of cafes, bakeries, restaurants and pubs just steps from the front door.
The sofa couch is the only drawback and I wouldnt consider it a bed unless absolutely necessary. The place is perfect for 4 people.
Jay is a great host and is recommend staying with him to anyone.
Well maintained place not far from a lot of cool things to see and do.

Anne was attentive and quick to respond whenever we had a request or question. She and her husband care about their guests, and they expect all guests to respect each other! With 5 bedrooms full of guests, it got a bit crowded, but not bad. The space is clean, simple and pretty good for the price. Decent option for long-term stay up to a couple months.
Incredible home. Walking distance to the nearest pub and we loved the area. It was a quick uber ride to north Boston too! Beautiful room and super clean. Will definitely look into staying again.

We had a fantastic stay at this Airbnb in Boston! The place was clean, comfortable, and had everything we needed. The view was beautiful! The location was absolutely perfect—close to everything, which made exploring the city so easy and enjoyable. Check-in was seamless, and the host was responsive and friendly. We couldn’t have asked for a better experience. Highly recommend to anyone visiting Boston!
Amazing host, responsive to requests
Outstanding in every way -- comfortable, clean, convenient.  A beautifully furnished, prime location. Our hosts made us so comfortable!

I had a wonderful stay at Ehab's place. Location is good. The kitchen was well-equipped, along with some breakfast bites. Ehab was extremely responsive and made sure I had everything I needed throughout my stay. Highly recommend!
Really nice space! Great parking situation (at a cost). Just be prepared to share the space and you’re golden!

The door got automatically locked one time, and I could not get in for hours. It got darker at night and I was scared. The fire alarm also went on during my stay. I was really terrified during my stay.

Do NOT stay at this location, I got 3 tickets $60.00 each because there is absolutely nowhere to park your vehicle. And his excuse to me was well most people that visit don't drive. Another thing I don't know who owns this property a lady came banging on my door at 11 at night woke me up out of my sleep. Asking me why was I in the room and the guy is Dan is not supposed to be renting out the place it was a mess. STAY far away from this one do not rent this place you've been warned.

Maria’s place was so great for a weekend Boston getaway!! The proximity to Forrest Hills T was fantastic, great restaurants and walkable to beautiful Arnold Arboretum. 30 mins T ride to downtown Boston, super accessible and Maria’s place was perfect home away from home at the end of the day. Highly recommend!
Central, convenient, cozy and clean. This simple studio was spot-on for our stay for the Fourth of July. Thank you, Alicia!

Older house with partial renovation. Portable AC units in bedrooms very noisy and made sleep difficult. No AC in kitchen. No coffee table in LR.
Curtains all sheer, too much light at night. Just a difficult stay for a country girl.
A gem !

The decor and design of this small space was very well done, comfortable and very modern and clean. Very comforable bed, very good lighting and everything was well-marked (such as the Hot and Cold water in the shower to the listing off what goes in the garbage and what goes in the compost and what goes in the trash).
The apartment is at ground level, with the window opening right onto the sidewalk. So there is some street noise, so be sure to use the earplugs that the host provides.
The walk from and to Logan Airport is actually 30 to 40 minutes. Which is good exercise if you're going to be sitting on an airplane for several hours.

My girlfriend and I stayed for approximately two-and-a-half months while we had summer jobs in the financial district. We were happy with our stay and the unit is very conveniently located in the city. The location feels safe. We had occasion to reach out to Billy a few times during our stay and he was always responsive and accommodating.

This was our first time using airbnb, and it was a great experience. We went to a conference at Northeastern University, which is about a 20-25 minute walk away. It took us 10-12 minutes to walk to and from the Ruggles T stop, so it was a good location for us. The house is really nice, and Michelle was kind enough to make sure we had stuff to eat for breakfast (we're vegan).

A few of the best things about staying here is the proximity to the T (short walk) that allowed us to be almost anywhere in Boston in 15-20 minutes and yet when we wanted quiet, privacy and space at end of busy day, this was our retreat every evening. And great restaurants and little stores and markets we could walk to! Best of both worlds.

Jessy and Diego'a house was such a beautiful place to stay - is close enough to many things but still tucked away enough to feel private. Parking was super easy as was the entire check in process. Jessy and Diego were very responsive and helpful. the space itself is beautiful, everything was very clean and with much attention to detail. Would highly recommend staying here!

This is a great place to stay in Boston!  Easy access to the city and tasty local restaurant (Ashur Restaurant).  Host is very responsive, welcoming and has easy, efficient systems for check in, check out and keeping guests' personal belongings safe in a shared apartment.  Highly recommend!

Fabulous apartment in a good location! The decor was very quirky and fun. The hosts left a great folder with lots of very useful information and tips in it which really helped us find our way around and pointed us to some great food locations! Would definitely recommend and would definitely stay again if we visit Boston again! Thank you very much!
Moe was an awesome host. The room and the bathrooms are very clean. He was very friendly and helpful. Would definitely recommend it to others.

Naveen was an incredible host and the stay couldn’t have been better. Naveen was incredibly accommodating and he communicated very well. I couldn’t have had a better host. Would 100% be hosted by Naveen again.

Tiny but clean and attractive space, recently redone. The bed was extremely comfortable. Thoughtful touches like a full set of toiletries--much appreciated! Excellent communication. Interesting, diverse neighborhood, not touristy, cool restaurants within walking distance. This was a great value.

Boris and Susan’s place is impeccable!!  Sparkling clean, comfortable, and with such good taste in decoration!  They are kind and thoughtful and went the extra mile having snacks for their guests and communication was perfect!   Close to the airport and 12 mins away from shopping centers...  It is definitely a great place to stay if you are lucky to find it available!

Loved our stay.  Perfect for our extended family and way more reasonable than Boston hotels during graduation season.  Spot on descriptions.  Shelby was very responsive.  Kind enough to offer access to pantry (e.g. sugar, honey, tea etc) and the garage parking is a HUGE bonus for Southie.

Only thing I have to say is the Parking, (being sarcastic) I wasn't familiar with the parking situation in Boston Ubering next time, I will definitely stay at this location again as it is a great location and just a real nice apartment, and will spend more time in the City area.   Thank you

Truly can’t beat the location and price combo. This specific airbnb feels a bit more hotel adjacent in set up than other I’ve stayed in, so really a great place for someone who’s gonna be out most the day and just needs a good place to turn down or get a little work done at night.
She is a great host deserves to be a super host

Hosts are friendly and helpful. The place is interesting, cozy, and clean. We would definitely stay there again. The neighborhood is full of lovely Victorian houses and is located just a few blocks away from a commercial street with fun things to do.

We loved our stay at Katarzyna’s! She has a back patio that is very quiet and a great place to wind down after a day in the city. It’s super close to a train stop, so once we parked the car we didn’t need it again. And we arrived a little before check-in and she was super flexible with us. We would definitely stay again!
Alan is a great host. The place has everything we needed in a great location.
Amazing place to stay when downtown

Super easy and secure check in located in the middle of everything on Newbury. A great value for the location, space, and an impeccably clean room. Will definitely use the Maverick team on my next few trips to Boston!
Everything was good as expected from the description. I'd recommend this apartment for the case when the longer distance from the city center is not a problem to get a lower price.
Great little spot in Boston, very walkable to all activities. Very good price point, would stay again!
Location is the best part of this stay.
Exactly as advertised perfect location and value
Communication from Brian and Heather was great. No concerns at all.
Had a quick but lovely stay!

We had a great 2 nights in Boston. The accommodation was basic but roomy and clean. The kitchen just about covered the basics if you don’t mind drinking your breakfast juice from a margarita glass! It was close to the train and $15 in an uber to the city centre. Also a gentle 15 min walk from a greet shopping centre with lots of places to eat. Would definitely recommend you  bring what you need in terms of cooking basics (oil, tea/coffee, sugar etc.)
Beautiful flat.  It is in a bustling young neighborhood with lots of great restaurants.  We appreciated our stay there.  The outdoor space is great.  We were very happy there.
Comfortable unit, well equipped kitchen, quiet location but steps to all the action.
Really clean and comfortable accommodations. Bed was comfy.
A place to lie down at least!

We wanted the Boston city vibe and definitely got it here. From the brownstone neighborhood to the period furnishings we got what we were looking for. Ms Lee was the perfect hostess. She attended to our every need, including tips and suggestions for our sightseeing days. Our room was so clean and comfortable. To our surprise, it was cleaned everyday when we returned, with the bed made and fresh towels.
Breakfast was delicious. As if the place wasn’t nice enough on its own, the location was PERFECT. We walked to the Fenway Park area several times - for drinks, food, shopping, and a Red Sox game. So close and convention to the subway too. Highly recommend!!

We had a great time stay at stephans house it was in a great location and a very nice house. The cats were very friendly our boys loved them the house had everything we needed also it’s right near the T so it was easy to travel around the city
Great place!!

Really enjoyed our 2 night stay in Gary's nice apartment. Car park space and roof terrace a nice bonus but Boston a very expensive place for us in the UK! Easy to walk to centre, walk the Freedom Trail and take subway back to nearby Broadway station.

Great place! All the other 5 star reviews about this place were correct! The house is beautiful and if you like Victorian houses this is the place for you. I was able to walk about 10 minutes to the train station and take it right into Downtown Boston, and an Uber was only a 15 minute ride.
I met Joseph at the house a couple of times and he was great to talk with. He's a local guy with great recommendations of places to visit and some local bars.
I'm already planning my next trip back to stay at this house!
This was a repeat visit and we look forward to coming back again and again.

Perfect apartment and location! Great spot to work remotely - with a great working desk/spot. Best neighborhood in Boston!
Amenities and appliances in excellent conditions, and plenty of toiletries, towels, etc available. Highly recommended!

Unfortunately there were some unexpected mishaps that could have been avoided to make our stay more enjoyable.
We had no lighting in the main room and had to message several times and allow maintenance to enter. They showed up at an inconvenient time unannounced. They told us the unit had issues. Maintenance and management should have had communication and taken care of the issue prior to our arrival.
We suggested a lamp at the very least and were told that was not an option. When arriving back to the Airbnb after maintenance had been there we saw we did receive a lamp for some lighting.
Lastly, it appeared the unit was in the middle of being repaired/painted.
Patching of drywall and not painted in a big section of the ceiling. While this didn’t affect how we used the unit it was unsightly.
When I suggested a discount because the unit didn’t appear as it was shown in the photos I was told they would not do that. When asking for a free late check out, management agreed.
good host. appartment was the same as on photos. enjoyed our stay.
Nice place, nice location, and the nicest host
A lovely apartment with excellent hosts. I would thoroughly recommend it.

My partner and I enjoyed our time at Boris & Susan’s in the Bronze room. It was very clean, as was the rest of the house. The instructions were all very clear, and any questions we had either about our stay or about the local area were answered promptly and efficiently. The location is great, being so close to the airport and easy to get to everywhere. It was also a very quiet place, which we certainly appreciated. Great hosts!

Todd's room was gorgeous, very clean, and convenient. The bed was very comfy! More importantly, the check in and out process was very easy.
Thank you Todd :)
Great location, clean and easy.
Nous avons beaucoup aimé l’appartement. Accès facile eu centre-ville via le métro à environ 10 minutes de marche. Bien équipé (lave-vaisselle, laveuse, air climatisé). Joliment décoré. A recommander.
Very nice house and nice host
A great space. Right in the middle of everything! Roomy. Comfy beds too!
We had a wonderful stay here, highly recommend! The home theater was awesome and the beds were super comfy.
Very happy with this apartment, it's on Newbury street and in a really nice part of Boston so walking distance to all shops, restaurants and fancy streets. Would definitely stay here again!
Great location. Perfect little place on Newbury
Check in isn't until 5pm or you have to pay $50 for an "early" check in of 2pm. Location was great and the apartment was comfortable and clean.
This was a very accurate and reasonably priced stay and I appreciate your quick communication and want for us to give honest reviews. I hope to stay in the air bnb in the future!
Very accommodating and helpful!  Outstanding customer service!

This spot in Charlestown was perfect for my daughter and me for our girls trip. The apartment was spotless, comfy, cozy, well-appointed  and in such a great location! There are cute cafes within walking distance. The North End is a $9 Uber ride or 20 minute walk away . Charlestown is safe, walkable with historic sites to check out. Getting to downtown Boston on foot or using the water taxi is so easy. Would definitely stay here the next time we visit Boston! Thank you.

Very pleasant stay at a reasonable price. Room was as described. Extremely comfortable bed. Room had a fridge if needed. House was quiet at night time. Bathroom was clean and tidy. Local train station not far away. Neighbourhood was quiet.  Host was helpful and responded quickly. Welcome basket in room with water and snacks was a lovely treat.

I loved the location and the place was nice  especially for the price. My only complaint is that there was no bath towels. I was not able to shower the first day that I arrived which was a huge problem for me. Brian the person who I spoke to wanted me to use the bath rug on the floor as my towel. No way was that happening and it was appalling to hear him say that. Needless to say things got a bit heated because I don’t think that is proper solution or even a thing to say to a guest . I eventually received towels the next next day.
My colleagues spent some more days at Terry´s house and I can´t say anything else as that they´ve really enjoyed it. Always again! :-)
Nice clean place

Beautiful apartment!  I thought it was going to be a great location, but it was even better than my expectation.  We stayed a week, parked our car and were able to get everywhere we wanted easily via public transport. All of Kaityln's recs were so helpful and appreciated. The apartment was so comfortable and a welcome respite after a long day of sightseeing.  We really loved our stay!

Whit was an amazing host and the house was so beautiful we would have loved to have stayed longer. We will definitely try to book the same Airbnb when traveling to Boston the location is safe and centrally located
Thanks Maverick and Team so much! Had a blast in Boston and the place was great!

We had a fun vacation staying at this establishment. It is small but cozy. Although we had a great time, I would like to leave with some suggestions for the future.
Since there was no common-area air conditioning, our bathroom stayed at a whopping 80 degrees. This made doing hair/makeup/shower routine uncomfortable. No AC is not stated on the listing.
Just for confirmation purposes, what is stated on the listing word for word is: “Please note: Due to an extensive HVAC issues, our studios are being heater by space heaters until Spring 2022” - That entails heating, not AC.
The curtains in the bedroom are quite see through. The sun was my alarm clock at 6am every morning which was not ideal. A thicker/darker curtain would have made my overnights more enjoyable.
The freezer did not work. We had bought ice cream to store in there and it had completely melted.
The listing does not state the absence of an elevator. It states that this room particularly is on the fourth floor, but it in fact doesn't explain the four flights of stairs one will have to walk up with luggage and whatnot. My issue with this was the 80 degree common-area temperature. Walking up and down those stairs every time we left the apartment had us sweating without AC.
Listing wording: “Located on the 4th floor, the studio has a private (not shared) bathroom located across the hall.” - Therefore, lacking the words “walk up.”
My late checkout inquiry was denied although I could see on the Airbnb listing that no one else had booked that day that we were leaving.
The pictures on the Airbnb listing are not exact to what was in the room. The artwork in the listing is different from what was there on the wall. On our wall, there was artwork of a woman’s butt. There was also no full size mirror on the closet like the photos. And not that this was a big deal, but the bedside table and lamp were different from the photos as well, with no flower decor. I think this listing should be updated more accurately.
I asked the host if we could drop off our luggage at the apartment the first day we arrived because we had an early morning flight. That was not allowed. I was told there are no luggage storage areas on site where luggage drop off could be accommodated. But, with our own research, we found that the UPS Store that is connected to this building, in fact allows you to store your luggage. I know that this is considered separate from the property, but, I feel as though the host and staff could be knowledgeable regarding this to help their guests; considering that the buildings are connected, in addition to how common this problem is with travelers.
Therefore, if some of these tweaks were not present, our stay would have been fantastic.
Definitely a great stay for the value!

Small but has everything you need. Handy to public transport.
I will look to book again when I visit next year.
Très bonne expérience qui nous a permis de profiter de Boston.
Loved having a door to separate spaces! I wake up early so I could hang out in the kitchen and not disturb my travel partner.
Good!
I was very happy with the place. Everything was exactly as described and in the pictures. Rebecca, was a great host always friendly and helpful, I can highly recommend her Airbnb.
Cute and cozy! We had a wonderful experience!

My first visit to Boston was fantastic, thanks to the Airbnb’s  great location near many attractions and the cozy, comfortable room. I highly recommend staying here if you want to enjoy a beautiful sunrise in the city.
Super close place to the airport which is really nice.
francisco was on point with everything! the house was amazing and he communicated really well. couldnt have asked for a better host!

Alex is a great host, who responds very promptly and is really helpful.  I made a casual remark about not enough light in the bedroom, and he showed up with a lamp in minutes.  The apartment has a great location even for tourists, not just those going to Mass General, and it is a relatively easy walk to back bay, beacon hill, west cabmridge, and harbour walk.  The furnishings are a bit worn and they need new linens for the bedrooms.  Also, they have roku TV only, which was annoying because wifi kept cutting out.
Exactly as described. Great neighborhood (south end). Great restaurants and cafes. Prudential a quick 5 min walk. I would definitely stay here again.
This Airbnb is clean and equipped with all the comforts of home. Catherine is a wonderful host. It was the perfect fit for us while visiting our Boston family. Definitely would recommend it.
Great place to stay! We walked to a game at Fenway Park and enjoyed strolling down Newbury St. Also, the bed is super comfortable!
Great location, brand new space, stylish and homely.
Excelente alojamiento , Gladys fue super atenta y amable , estuvo disponible en todo momento para que mi estadía fuera de lo mejor. Lugar tranquilo y muchas cosas cerca.
Thank you!

location was great , just 1 stop on the blue line to aquarium, and north end, the place is spotless and cozy, Cecelia was always fast to respond and went above and beyond to ensure we had everything we needed. we were able to drop our luggage off before check in and after a long day in the city we realized there was no ice and she had a bag delivered in minutes!
wonderful place to stay!
The place was good.  Just what I needed.  Very close to the place I was visiting.

Jonathan's Suite is fantastic for a single or couple looking for a well-appointed suite within a charming brownstone nestled in a revitalizing community just a few minutes from downtown.  The noted appointments include robes, slippers, coffee, custom location maps, full shower amenities, and a wonderfully comfortable bed and pillows. In addition to the Suite, access to a shared full kitchen is an additional bonus. Dealing with Jonathan couldn't be any easier and he is highly responsive.
Clean and homely facility in a quiet and peaceful neighbourhood. Easy to get in and out of the neighbourhood through public transport systems.
Great space in the perfect location! Parking is very close. The apartment is comfortable and has all the amenities for an enjoyable stay. We will definitely be back in the future.
great places  with a good proximity from restaurant,bar and downtown!
Excellent place to stay. Miriam was very accommodating and even left bagels and fruit for us! Would definitely stay here again.
Simple and clean room. Easy check-in and check-out and a great location.

*Very* spacious home in convenient location. Great for young families. We loved dining in the cute backyard and visiting the community garden across the street. Owner-occupied, with personal items in bathroom etc. and opened food in fridge/cupboards. Bedroom closets cleared for guest use though. Kitchen eccentrically stocked but newly remodeled and workable. (No microwave.) Usual city neighborhood noises.
非常完美的住宿体验，房主非常友善，是懂得审美的艺术家和音乐家，法式早餐也值得推荐。
Great location in Back Bay with comfortable beds & full kitchen

Cozy little apartment, walkable to many places in Boston. If we didn’t feel like walking, public transport was very close and Ubers always readily available. Instructions very clear which made it easy to find. Would recommend for anybody looking for a long weekend stay in Boston!
Wonderful stay!

A great place to stay while visiting Boston.  The house was close to the airport as well as the Historic District of Boston.  The house was very clean and Gianni was extremely easy to contact.  I would recommend this home to anyone wanting a nice, comfortable place to stay in Boston.

Everything was great EXCEPT we were charged an additional $40 per room ($120 additional charge on top of the $800 we had paid to airb&b..) There was nothing about this charge mentioned when we booked the rooms.  Total bullshit.

Overall, the place was good for a quick stay. Interesting location to find, but Jonathan detailed how to find it well. Check in was smooth except for a slow response (1 day delay) when we requested to drop off bags early.
The place was really clean with the exception of a couple spring bugs: centipede, etc. A couple things to note was that there was a landline phone that would ring each night with an alarm and when it would be called. The phone had to be manually turned off which was annoying during the night. The biggest downside were the noisy upstairs neighbors. Jonathan was upfront about there being “normal family noise” but the noise was not “normal”. The neighbors were stomping, singing, yelling, and playing piano early to late evening (10pm, etc.). The noise made it difficult to sleep. Besides the neighbors, which should be taken into account, the overall place itself was nice and there were some amenities like soap, shampoo, towels, and a Keurig.

This place is everything a solo traveller in Boston can hope for. Todd is a responsive, friendly host, and the space offers a quiet, comfortable home base for exploration, either at Harvard or in Boston proper. Can’t recommend it enough!
Отличное расположение, отзывчивый персонал, вернулась бы ещё раз

The location of the home is perfect. We were able to easily see all of our destinations while in Boston.The place was very neat and we felt comfortable during our stay. The neighborhood has a lot of great and diverse restaurants around for you to explore. Jessy and Diego were also very responsive when it came to texting via the app.
A great place in a wonderful location!

This is a wonderful place to stay when visiting Boston.  Nick’s place is clean, spacious and has everything you could possibly need.  It is an easy walk to public transport and the provided parking was convenient as well.  We will definitely return in the future!

Francisco’s place was a great location for our visit to Boston. Walking distance to the train to venture downtown and a short car ride to various college campuses.  The house was very clean and Francisco did a great job of communication with us during our stay.

It was a beautiful place. Near plenty of shops and restaurants. Definitely worth the price. Stone was very responsive whenever i had an issue (which wasn’t at the fault of Stone or the property) or a question. It was a pleasure staying here and will certainly stay here again when i visit Boston again!
This is a beautiful home. Our room was spacious, clean, and comfortable.  The hosts were very welcoming and our only regret is that we only stayed one night.  We plan to come back for a longer stay.
Great stay! Will be back for sure.
Detta boende passade oss perfekt.
Jonathan is a very good host. I look forward to staying in his home again.
Nice location , easy to go everywhere

This apartment is in such a convenient location; we could get to subway stations and walk where we wanted with ease. Everything was comfortable and clean. The club nearby gets a little loud on weekends, but that’s not unusual in the city, and it didn’t keep us up. I would absolutely stay here again!
Great spot and beautifully decorated. Just a note that the bed is very soft and the pillows are super thin. It made sleep a bit difficult.
Beautiful, clean, and comfortable place in a good location! Meri was also super helpful!
Great location! Exactly as described. Easy to get to Fenway Park.
Very nice place
Ali's place was very cute and peaceful!  We loved the Eagle Hill Cafe for breakfast, which was nearby and that it was a quick walk to the T (subway).
Was nice and clean

This house was such a beautiful and cozy stay for us after our long days of exploring Boston! The neighborhood was very peaceful, and there is easy access to public transportation. Ewa’s house certainly felt like a home away from home! The bed was super comfortable, and there were amenities that helped us feel very welcomed. We would definitely stay here again if we ever visit Boston again!

Perfect size for a place to lay your head in the heart of Boston!  Used the metro and this place was perfect between two different lines and stops. Building was quiet and listing was as described. Jay was super quick to respond to any questions and would recommend to anyone staying in the city.

Sharde and Jens are excellent hosts and the studio is incredible — incredibly clean, tastefully decorated, and stocked up with snacks and coffee! They go above and beyond in terms of making sure you are comfortable and I would highly recommend this place to anyone.
This is a lovely updated apartment in a beautiful home.  Easy walk to public transportation and an inexpensive Uber ride from downtown Boston.
Great location, spotless and stylish place!
Lori was very sweet. The house is beyond gorgeous. I had to commute to Brigham and the house is right off the orange line.

Wonderful stay at this perfectly located property! You can walk anywhere you want or take the T. The hosts were absolutely incredible, so responsive and helped us solve a WiFi issue so I could attend a really important meeting. Very clean and decorations are adorable. They had the basic kitchen amenities that allowed us to make a few meals. It’s definitely a cozy space, but it was perfect for the two of us. Comfortable beds, plenty of water pressure. My only complaint was noisy college students in the building coming in at late hours, but that is definitely not on the host! Bring a white noise machine/app for your phone and you’ll be fine. We would totally stay again!

The apartment was very nice—clean, comfortable, and in a great, convenient location. Carlo was always attentive and made sure I had everything I needed. I’d definitely choose this place again on a future trip.
Beautiful home with some views of the ocean. Walk to the beach. Very close to public  transportation to get to the city.

We had a lovely short stay in this spot. The location could not have been any better - Beacon Hill is gorgeous, the apartment is steps from the Red Line, which makes it so convenient to get around. It's also just a block over from Charles Street with wonderful shopping and tons of great food options!!! Considering how close it is to the train I found the apartment very quiet. You will hear some street noise, but not enough to be disturbing.
Although the apartment overall is on the small side, it has two bedrooms with big comfy beds, which makes it a really great value. I would absolutely consider staying again. My friend and I had a wonderful time!
A bit outside of the popular areas, but a close enough walk/drive. Ubers are cheaper than in other cities. The place was very clean & quiet. I’d recommend!
walkable distance to TD Garden

At the last minute, I decided to extend my stay in Boston by a night. Thankfully, Ehab’s place was available and exactly what I needed. It has a bit of a “college apartment” feel to it, with shared kitchen area and bathroom, but this was not an issue. Instructions were easy and simple. I was only in and out and wasn’t there for more than 7 hours. The room was clean, and he had set out a little welcome tray of items with a clean towel. The only suggestion I had for him was to improve the quality of the pillows, as they were a little lacking and not very comfortable. All in all a fine stay. Thanks!!

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour en famille. Yisheng (avec Ollie) nous a très bien accueillis.
Le logement se situe edans le quartier résidentiel de Broadway à une station de de downtown par la redline et 15mn de marche. Nous avons profité de la terrasse avec se vue sur tout Boston. Belle adresse pour passer quelques jours à Boston !
It was a great experience! The apartment was lovely, there were ample parking spaces and the location was excellent. Simon was readily available when we had questions or needed help adjusting the AC.
100% recommend to stay here! Good location, downtown and T just around the corner, clean flat and a beautiful view. Very uncomplicated and comfortable!
Quiet, great mattress, helpful at check-in when I had trouble with my logistics.
It’s a very good location to stay if you’re visiting the city.

Our three night stay for Boston Calling was great. We had everything we needed. The beds were very comfortable and there was excellent coffee in the neighborhood! We would definitely stay here again. Thank you!

This place was unexpected and beautiful. Both host are very involved, and interact with you from the start. They give great advice and explain to you in detail the instructions of whatever thing you may deal with during your stay. Try to be as quiet as possible during the night, given that it’s a Victorian house (if I’m not mistaken) the wooden floors creak a bit, but it’s nothing that you can’t manage.
Everything was amazing!

We booked this apartment for the weekend of the Boston Marathon, and our experience could not have been more perfect. The unit itself was gorgeous - the beds insanely comfortable, the kitchen great for cooking, and the roof deck amazing for basking in post-race beers (which Susan so-thoughtfully left at our door!). The location was crucial - easy train to the commons for the start, walk able to expo, close enough to hobble home after the finish. We also found plenty of great places to dine and get groceries nearby. It was the absolute perfect place to feel at home and like we could create a perfect environment for racing (comfy beds, home cooking) but still such a lovely environment that it felt like vacation!
We had a wonderful visit! Thank you for being such a great host. Highly recommend!
It was okay
I loved my stay here, it was bright clean, perfect location. Would love to stay again!
Had an amazing trip & would definitely stay again.
Awesome location! Close to everything you need for a trip to Boston.

Our stay was perfect. This is in a great location and walkable to so much. It was nice having hosts who responded so quickly to all questions. We will definitely be staying here again on future trips to Boston!

This was a beautiful little studio apartment that was just as described. The bed was really comfortable, there was everything I needed in the kitchen, and the water was hot in the bathroom! The neighbors was nice and was close to the convention center.
A nice place to stay!

A very nice studio in a beautiful neighborhood. The kitchen had everything I needed and the neighborhood was quiet. I was also able to store my luggage till my evening flight. The building is on a small hill so you might want to keep that in mind for your arrival if you have a lot of luggage.

Our family of 3 LOVED-LOVED-LOVED our 9 day stay here. The listing and photos describe the home to a tee. Phil and Ann were quick to respond to questions.
Beds were very comfortable; water pressure in both bathrooms was great, bath towels to die for!
Both bathrooms had extra-large bottles of TRESemme shampoo and conditioner, full-size Dove body wash, liquid hand soap, Q-tips, Kleenex, and plenty of toilet paper. WOW! There were other nice touches like welcome snacks, plenty of tour books, maps and magazines, and a couple umbrellas in the front closet. You have full control of the thermostat.
Great location! At an easy pace, it took us 10 minutes to walk to the Orange or Green line, 20 minutes to the Boston Public Garden.
We enjoyed exploring the neighborhood, and felt very safe walking day and night. Lots of young families, we discovered two nearby parks for kids to play.
Only negative I found was the proximity to the Wine Riot and Picco for ice cream – both across Tremont, and Blackbird Doughnuts a little over a block northeast on Tremont. Oh well, we were on vacation.
Boston is a wonderful city, and we found the perfect place to call our home base, we'll recommend this rental to anyone traveling to Boston. Thanks Phil and Ann!!!

The apartment had a lot going for it, but it was much more like a hotel than expected. From the pics and description, I had a feeling this was not someone's apartment that they were renting out, but I was still startled at just how much of a hotel room it was. The whole building appears to have been bought out by a company, near as I can tell, and from what I saw and heard while staying, I think the whole building is run as a hotel, not the typical Airbnb listing I'm used to, which was a bummer. A big part of why I love staying in Airbnbs is that you feel like you actually live there--like you're stepping into someone else's life, in their home, on their street, for a few days. This felt much more like staying in a standard hotel room where no one lives. That said, if that's something you're fine with, it had a lot of good things going for it. Here are the plusses and minuses of this listing: PLUSSES: The location is fantastic. I didn't even bother with the the T as I could walk to just about everything I wanted in 10-20 mins. It's a very safe area and I didn't bat an eye at walking home from the theatre alone late at night. The street is quaint and quiet and the building is old and has character. The rooms, however, have been modified into hotel rooms, as mentioned above. Which, there are some plusses to hotel rooms, if you're not too picky about having a true Airbnb experience. The apartment was very clean and outfitted as a nice hotel room would be. Having the bathroom across the hall wasn't a big deal at all. It was a bit annoying having to enter the code to the bathroom, then the code to your room each time, but not a huge imposition. I never saw anyone in the hallway, so it wasn't awkward at all. The bathroom was very nice, clean, and had basic amenities. The room AC worked very well and had a remote, so that was lovely as it was hot and muggy the whole time I was there. The bed was comfortable and the kitchenette got the job done. The host was very prompt and quick to reply to any questions. The instructions for getting into the building were clear and simple and made for each check-in and check-out. The keyless entry was wonderfully handy. MINUSES: The kitchenette is not a full kitchen, which for someone with dietary restrictions, was a bit tough, but i knew that going in. I do prefer to have a full kitchen, which again, is more in line with a true Airbnb experience. The room was tiny, but for Boston, I can't say I was surprised. It was smaller than I expected though. If I had been staying with someone, we'd have been crowding each other immediately (I was going to go with...
Great location.  It's not the Ritz but it does the job.

easy to locate and check in. Alix responded to any issue in a timely manner within his control and even offered his driveway to prevent my vehicle from being towed by street cleaners if parking was mot available
Jonathan was a great host and his Brownstone was a beautiful stay.

A great place to base in Boston. Walkable to Boston Commons, theaters and restaurants and a walkway to Charles River, where you can have a fantastic morning walk or run. Hosts were welcoming and informative, especially about local parking options. Lots of spaces and garages nearby. Park your car and leave it, you won't need it!!

Place was super clean and in a perfect location to many pubs, shops and parks.
A bit of a tight squeeze for two people , the slant of the ceiling is very low a little challenging if tall. The street is perfect and area is very safe. Overall a lovely place would be best for just one person.
This was a beautiful place - lots of space, very clean and had great amenities. Would highly recommend!
Perfect location and apartment was in perfect shape 👌🏽

We came to Boston for a hockey tournament and decided to come a few days early to check out the city. We wanted to stay in a safe, walkable location, close to transit and Cynthia’s place offered all of this! Super cute home in a vibrant neighbourhood. Cynthia recommended a great Italian restaurant (Rino’s Place) right up the street from the Airbnb and it was delicious with exceptionally large portions. As well, we took in a Red Sox game and felt safe walking home late from the subway.
Cynthia provided a safe, clean and comfortable place to stay with our 3 young children. I would highly recommend and would definitely stay here again when in Boston next.

This is the perfect place to use as a home base for visiting Boston. It's very close to everything, and still far enough from downtown that it was very quiet, private, and peaceful. The apartment itself has everything you need and kept very clean. We spent a lot of time on the garden patio, which was really nice. Would definitely stay here again.

I chose this location because it was a 5 minute walk from where my friends live. It was clean and spacious. Francesco was very responsive and kind. The bed was a little firm for my liking but the linens and entire place was very clean. I would stay here again :)
So charming!
Very Nice Stay!  The location was perfect!  We would stay there again!

Great Back Bay location across from Prudential Center with easy access to transit. Walkable to Fenway and the Commons with plenty of dining, shopping, and grocery options nearby. The building itself appeared to be largely student housing, so we caught a bit of late-night music, but overall, a pretty calm, clean space. The space itself offered plenty of room for a 3-BR although it lacked any semblance of a dining space for more than 2 people. There was not great lighting in the bedrooms (only small lamps). Adam was very communicative and made it easy for us to check in and out.

Emily was very proactive and responsive to any questions we had! The property was very clean and had everything we needed for our short stay. The location was great as well; close to restaurants, grocery stores, and local transport. I would highly recommend and stay again!
The only thing of note is that there isn’t great space to easily access items in large luggages. There is room to store them though! If you don’t mind having to take them out and put them away after you get your clothes, etc., or only have carry-on type of bag, it shouldn’t be an issue.
Awesome stay, would love to come back again!
Great little spot! Cute extra touches. Great stay overall!
it was nice staying in this appt, clean and comfortable. The street is quiet however sometimes at night there were people yelling loudly, probably from the property nearby.
Everything was perfect. The house was very clean and new.
Great place just wish they had some extra towels, sheets , blankets. And cleaning supplies because of COVID
Place was really nice. Me and my girlfriend would gladly stay again in the future.
It's a nice place and close to subway, which helped. One bathroom made it tough for a party of five, but we made it work!
Great to stay in a place so full of history! I applaud how clean everything was, especially because we had a last minute rental. Thank you!!
Great stay! Quiet, convenient and affordable
I wanted to explore Boston. This location allowed me to do exactly that. The place was comfortable and accomodating. Communication was great, which created a stress-free environment.

Excellent location, the place was spotless, the hosts were responding very quickly to any questions. The room is very minimalistic, the only furniture is a queen bed and a table and a single chair – but you can see this from the photos. The WiFi was a bit finicky, at least for me, but it wasn't a problem as there was also an Xfinity hotspot. Having dishes and some basic kitchen equipment was a plus. Overall, my stay was very pleasant.

Alicia’s place was fabulous. A very neat and clean apartment near Boston common. The space was comfortable and the location was really convenient to get to different places. Alicia was also great at responding to my messages. 10/10 would recommend!
My stay was so great! Check in was easy, the apartment is beautiful, and walkable to so many restaurants and different areas of Boston.
The place is close to the subway and affordable! Very good communication with Cusaj. I enjoyed spending the time with my friends here in the condo and it felt like home.

Awesome place! Everything was brand new, very clean and had a variety of different appliances. We were very thankful that there was water bottles and snacks because our flight came in late. No complaints here!

This apartment is absolutely perfect and looks just like the pictures. Our hosts were very helpful and accommodating, and we would definitely stay here again! The location is fantastic and this is a great value for the neighborhood. Thanks Kathe and Lisa!

I felt very comfortable during my stay here. Public transportation is easily accessible and the area is not too far from anywhere you need to get essentials. Anne and her co-hosts are responsive and accommodating. They make sure everything is stocked and clean. Any thing you need is usually addressed within 24 hours, if not immediately. They are friendly and really adamant on making sure you are satisfied with your stay.
Great place to stay - very comfortable, walking distance to good restaurants, and helpful hosts!

It was not planned to stay here in the first place since our Hotel did not let us check in for, to us, unknown reasons. Which made this a stay the same day we booked it. And I cannot really describe how happy we are looking back at it now. The location is just so great because it is very central to a lot of attractions, restaurants, you name it. But it was also in a very beautiful, cozy and relatively quiet neighborhood. The room itself and the bathroom were also very great, clean and equipped with everything you would need during a weekend or week stay there!
Loved it and if we’re going back to Boston we will definitely stay there again :)
Wonderful apartment, great location , had everything we needed. Kelly was responsive to any questions we had.

I stayed here for about 5 days with my daughter and husband while visiting colleges and friends. It was a very comfortable place and easily accessible to everything in the Boston area. Everything is as described pictured and we were pleasantly surprised by the back balcony. I'll definitely reserve again when visiting Boston.
Private entry and walkable to several restaurants and bars. Also close to the T. Good location, expect street parking, but we didn’t have an issue with that.
Lovely appt, very helpful host
Very practical for us and reception and welcoming staff is friendly. No parking available so know overnight parking is another $45.

Aurelia was a welcoming, friendly host. Her property is charming, peaceful, well appointed and spotless. We found an easy parking spot right out front for most of our stay. We enjoyed the ambient lighting, comfy bedding, excellent bathroom set up and pour over coffee every a.m. We enjoyed an evening in the garden with a bottle of wine. Her property is a very short walk to the bus stop which quickly brings you to the train station (orange line) for trips into the city proper. Her cats were a subtle bonus!
Eine tolle Unterkunft. Haben die Zeit sehr genossen 😊
Great stay! Very easy to Uber around for transportation

I am so thankful that Hermina was kind enough to let me check in early. She was also very good about communication. That being said, as a whole, this is the first Airbnb I have been disappointed in. All the amenities were less than expected. Only half of the lights worked, some of the outlets didn't work, the wifi connection was poor and continually dropped, the A/C's were not installed until the evening of the first day. The temperature inside the house was 87 at that point and it took a long time to cool down, and the TV only had two basic channels. The house was a little run down and everything was the bare minimum to the point where the handsoap in the bathrooms was watered down. I feel that there could have been changes to make the house more accommodating without costing the owner an unreasonable amount.
Great spot for a solo traveler. exactly as advertised.
Fatima was a great hostess! I’d highly recommend staying at her place

The apartment was excellent. Great location, clean, very comfortable. The only thing to note was the thermostat was set so you couldn't cool the room to less than 71 degrees or heat it to more than 68. Neither of those settings were ideal for us.
I enjoyed my stay at Dans. I had my puppy with me since I’m relocating to Boston and Dan was very accommodating. He was responsive and easy to communicate with. I would stay again.
It had a great location in North Boston.  It was easy to get to many restaurants and it was easy to get around the city.  The unit was clean and well maintained.

Absolutely perfect location if you’re visiting Boston proper. Everything is very walkable and T stops are less than a block away.  Check in couldn’t have been easier and communication is top notch. Highly recommend!
Lori is a wonderful host. If you are a solo female traveler, I highly recommend staying with Lori! She makes you feel welcome and comfortable, and her home is so beautiful and clean.
It was easy and Jonathan was very accommodating. Super close to the “T” so very convenient. It is a sweet cozy spot that i highly recommend.

Foster's Airbnb was a great find! It was cozy and in a great location near a couple T stations and the Berklee School of Music.  Lots of restaurants within walking distance,  and a short T ride to the North End.    Foster was also very responsive to all our questions and was very accommodating. We would love to stay again if we're in the area.

Comfortable stay and good location close to Boston. Bed was great. Felt safe with multiple locks. While the space was clean, some improvements like having a desk or more furniture could make a big difference.
Appartement très bien placé et spacieux.

Good location, easy to walk to many destinations and the subway. Two story apartment with 3 bedrooms in the lower/basement level and one bedroom on the first floor along with kitchen and living room. Spacious and had what we needed for a 2 day stay.
Great location and price. Would definitely stay there again.

It is a great studio, perfectly located in a wonderful part of Boston. The subway can be reached perfectly, but to park a car was easy too.

Kristina & Chris had prepared some perfect recommendations for restaurants, super markets and other facilities in the near area. But there were also tips for the stay in Boston.

The studio is very quiet, clean and pleasantly furnished. Due to its separation from the rest of the house, you do not get in the way with the hosts.

It's an absolutely wonderful place in Boston (which is by the way one of most beautiful spots on the east coast), which I will recommend to all of my friends.

Great little one bedroom apartment in a quiet neighborhood in Boston. Perfect little getaway spot for the wife and I. Quiet, safe neighborhood within walking distance to the T as well as tons of shops and restaurants.

We loved our stay in Beacon Hill! We were hoping to find an area that was walkable to many attractions and this couldn’t have been more convenient. If you are interested in spending time at parks, seeing historical sites on the Freedom Trail, and being close to Little Italy, this is the perfect spot for it! It was also very convenient for public transportation to explore other parts of the city. The place was clean & well kept as well.
Excelent option close to Harvard University! Todd was great and was always prompt to immediatelty answer any questions!
A wonderful apartment and location. Highly recommended

such an incredible air bnb experience. the amenities are great (bfast items, coffee/tea, fresh baked bread each morning) and the space is so cozy and clean. travel with public transport is easy as long as you are okay with the buses--they're pretty quick and usually not too crowded. will definitely be coming back!!
Nick made checking in a breeze and was always available if I needed anything. The place is as described and met my needs. The AC worked great and I slept well on the bed. Great value for the area.

The location was great and very central to shops, restaurants, and other amenities. Check in was easy. However, the apartment is very loud due to road traffic, and the building entrance had an odd smell. The unit also got quite hot, and the plumbing was noticeably sluggish as mentioned in the listing.

400 Hanover 3B is adorable!  The North End is the area to stay. Tons of action, amazing restaurants and classic Boston sites right out your door. Jay went above & beyond and delivered fresh towels to our doorstep halfway thru our stay. Many thanks! We will be back!

Had a great stay at Jonatas’s and would not hesitate to rent again.  We found the rental to be comfortable, updated and clean.  He was quick to respond to questions.  The location, just a short walk to the Maverick BlueLine station, is super convenient.  And the East Boston waterfront is very close by.  Street parking can be tricky—we ended up renting a private space through Spot Hero a few blocks away, which worked out great.
Amazing stay! Beautiful place… would definitely stay again!

Awesome place! Super clean, and easy check-in/out. Comfy bed and amenities. A/C window unit is in the back of the apartment, opposite the bed.  Neighbors were a bit noisy since you're on the 1st floor, and they seemed to run the vacuum twice a day, but were quiet during sleeping hours. About 10 minutes to the nearest T stops (uphill on the way back) and about a 10-15 minute walk to some nice restaurants, which is ideal for a couple that likes to walk! Alex communicated quickly and checked in with us during the stay. 10/10 would stay again!
The apartment is lovely! The hosts are great, very communicative and responsive. Only negative is that the neighborhood is very noisy! If you are a heavy sleeper it shouldn’t be a problem ;)
what a beautiful home .... This Boston Brownstone is a perfect place to experience Boston.

It was a short stay for us, but it was very convenient to everywhere we were going and just a hop across the street when we needed to take a quick train ride to Fenway. Richard was helpful and friendly for the short time we interacted with him and was available if we needed anything. His place was very comfortable. Although close to a busier road with some traffic noise, we were so tired from the day that we slept like rocks!

This is a perfect airbnb! Yisheng's hospitality exceeded my expectations.  The room is fantastic, spacious, and low-key luxurious.  There are so many amenities, Yisheng though of absolutely everything.

This is a great place to stay when one hotel room isn’t enough. My wife and three daughters had a ton of space to spread out.  Everything we wanted to do in Boston was pretty much within walking distance or a short subway ride away. Would absolutely stay here again.

Beautiful place with excellent decorating that immediately made us feel comfortable and relaxed as our home away from home.  Kitchen, bedrooms and living areas were well stocked with the things you want and need.  Centrally located to downtown Boston and other venues / towns and sights; we were able to get all the places we wanted to be within 30 minutes.  Restaurants were close; a couple were within walking distance (1/2 mile).   We had to rent a car, so I was concerned about parking; but I had no problems finding parking within a block.   Overall, I would highly recommend this location and the owners and rate our experience as “A+”.      Thank you for letting us stay there.  Mike and Robin.
it was in a great location, it was a cute little studio!

Beautiful apartment in a great location! Laura and Olivia were quick to answer any questions we had, and even came up to the apartment to help us with the radiators.
Only complaints are that the door routinely got stuck, and was very difficult to open and even close the door. The locks probably should be replaced as well, as our key would also get stuck in the key hole.
To note: there are a lot of steep steps, and two flights of narrow steps inside the building, to enter the apartment. The bathroom door also doesn’t have a lock, so make sure you are very comfortable with the person you’re traveling with!

Hilary and Hazel were brilliant hosts. We have used Airbnb many times over the past year and both agree that this was by far the best experience. The reviews are true, the room is pretty small. However Hilary and Hazel are so welcoming that it doesn't matter. You are free to use the rest of the house and make yourself at home. Which we did, and even enjoyed an evening with them both watching the presidential debate.
The area is great to explore, and really close to the T to get into downtown Boston, with some great eateries and (real) pubs! The area is beautiful and feels very safe. We would highly recommend this sweet little house in JP!!
Super cute and comfortable.  Very clean and hosts very responsive. Would def stay here again.

Pamela was extremely responsive and flexible.  Before I arrived she contacted me and advised that she was able to be flexible with an earlier check in if needed.  I did not need it but it was very kind of her to offer it.  There are a few guest units and this was pretty easy to find as the basement unit downstairs.   The space is very clean and looks like the pictures.   It is in the city so there is some moderate city noise of cars etc but nothing out of the ordinary.   I had a car and parking was easy.  Would definitely stay again.

Great place to stay in Boston, close to the metro station and in a very walkable and quiet neighborhood. The apartment is clean and comfortable, with lots of space to rest or work. Great communication with Terry, highly recommendable!
Good location, great host
Perfect location in South End / Back Bay. Quiet and calm apartment for a quick weekend stay.
Great location!!!! Highly recommend
Great location, beautiful place

Had a wonderful stay overnight for a concert in the area. Being able to park right at the property was so convenient. The apartment was adorable and very clean, and the rain shower was amazing! Would definitely recommend and book again in the future.

The location of this studio was perfect — So close to great shopping and food. I was traveling for work and it was nice to stay in such a cool neighborhood. There was an issue with the apartment not being cleaned when I arrived but Alicia was quick to remedy the situation. I was traveling by myself and felt very safe. Would definitely stay here again and recommend to anyone looking for an authentic Boston experience.
We stayed here with our two small children because we wanted more than what a hotel room would offer. It was lovely and fun for our family and we enjoyed our home for the week. 😊

My stay at their beautiful home in JP is definitely in the top of my Airbnb experiences.  Great hosts, easy access to Boston, and a cozy home to relax during a trip are all reasons to choose this spot.  Thanks again!

Our family had a wonderful time at Jacklyn and Joel's apartment.  They are warm and hospitable. They greeted us when we arrived, answered our many questions and made wonderful recommendations of places to visit and eat in the Boston area.  The apartment was lovely; clean, well-stocked and comfortable. We would highly recommend Jacklyn and Joel's apartment to anyone vacationing or doing business in the Boston area.  The Larsen Family  Bristol, VT
Great place
La Gemma was a perfect place to stay in Boston!  Location, cleanliness, comfort and host were all excellent.  Adorable. We definitely will book With Gina again.

Had a wonderful time and would definitly stay again.  Beautiful home, outstanding amentities and check in process was easy.  I apprecte their attention to details and extras in the room.  There are stairs however overall great experience.
Clean, convenient, and great location! We would stay again if in the area

This place is very nice and clean. The only thing is that hot water is not really hot. It's just warm enough, I talked with Charls about it and he said that he will check that. Everything else was good.
Gracias por la estancia, es buena opción por el precio. Si llegan tarde sólo váyanse en uber, no caminen por ahí tan noche
Great experience and very cozy atmosphere. I will choose here again!
Celia's really friendly and welcoming, and the place is great. You have a whole floor to yourself, the wifi is great, and very cozy.
Location is great. Get the 7 day $20 T card.   You can most everywhere all week.  Make sure to hit Wally’s, Beehive, Ilona and Mikes recommendation Anchovies.

The location of this Airbnb is PERFECT! Located in a safe and quaint neighborhood of back bay. Would recommend for ONLY solo and travelers of two. As Sophia is very clear in her description-this is a very small Airbnb but you get the charming vibe of the neighborhood that one wouldn’t get if staying at a hotel. We didn’t rent a car as everything is walkable and you are very close to the Amtrak. We had a great trip discovering Boston and the location of this Airbnb was key in that.
excited!

Pamela is the ultimate hostess. It is easy to tell that she has her guests in mind when she rents out her space. It is the details of the rental that put it over the top - charging cords, welcome snacks, extra towels, fans for bedrooms, noise machines in each bedroom, waters in the fridge, well-stocked kitchen utensils, and stocked coffee bar to name a few. She is also an amazing communicator, proactive and responsive. I had the good fortune to meet her in person as well. She is a delight and so kind. We felt right at home. She is top-notch!
The space is only about 5 miles from the city and 5-6 miles from Fenway. It is also some nice hiking spots.
The only mark against this property is the car noise at night. It seems like the corner the property sits on is a popular cut through. People driving by really like their music and want you to know it! :) That is a minor thing, however, compared to the overall rental experience. It is worth the price.

Esther est une hôte qui se démarque par son accueil, sa bienveillance et son hospitalité hors du commun.
Elle met à notre disposition plein d’extras qui facilitent notre séjour et qui surtout l’agrémente.
Le logement est identique aux photos ainsi qu’à la description en tous points.
Merci Esther, notre séjour a été formidable.

So cute!! Even though the space is shared, I always felt very safe and everything was super clean. It was the perfect stay before catching my flight super early the next morning. Will definitely be staying here again!
A little gem! You cannot get a better location to the TD Garden :)

I can highly recommend staying with Lihua. Her place is in a great location near the subway and the river, and Lihua is a fantastic host.
Thank you!
We had a good time!!
A wonderful place to stay in. I was very pleased with the location and comfort. Thank you!
very nice place and location, simple
Great location and a spotless, private rental.  We felt like locals on the first day.  Almost everything is walkable and the T is close if you want to get far across town.  Can't wait to return!

Billy is a great host.   His communications is precise and clear, to make sure you have a nice stay at his place.   His place is as clean as a hotel, but with a warm touch like a home.   Highly recommended! Thanks!
Traumhafte Unterkunft mit guter öffentlicher Anbindung und netten Gastgebern. Sehr zu empfehlen.

This is my second stay at his place. It was much more than I expected. While I had time, I looked around the house, and seen an assortment of high quality musical instruments. Apparently, Brunir the Host, is an accomplished musician, who also runs a musical studio on the location. I wasn’t bothered by it. The AC helped a lot during those hot days. The shampoo/body wash/conditioner dispenser is a plus. This  home is the Jewel of Hyde Park that you must experience.
Nice place and as described. Communicated throughout. Thank you.

Eliott’s home was incredible! We showed up relatively late—about 8pm—from out of town and had a question about parking. Eliott responded within a matter of minutes. We’re already talking about coming back to Boston! Eliott’s home stood as the proverbial cornerstone that reinforces our great vacation.
We had a great stay at Jay’s place! It was the perfect location for what we needed and great access to lots of restaurants. We would definitely book this spot again!
Great stay and peaceful environment

Mario's home was comfortable, spacious and clean. The location was central for what we needed and everything went easily and smoothly. He also had a case of water waiting for us, which was a great touch! Thank you.
Loved everything about the place, the host was super accommodating, everything was clean, quiet neighborhood close to the city, would stay again!
Great stay, fantastic location, clean, and very reactive and effective hosts!

No parking , people caring guns at gas station next to Airbnb was told by one individual white people not welcome when asking where I could park so left and went to a place where my family felt safe the one individual wasn’t the problem that was only one bad person it was the gun
Great little place in Southie. We enjoyed the neighborhood and found it to be clean and cute. The place is just as advertised and was very clean, with little snacks, which was a nice touch.

This is a great unit in one of the coolest old buildings you'll ever experience! Easy walk to all locations of interest, felt very safe, and the unit is quite a bit larger seeming than the photos represent. Also, great views of the city (its a corner unit with tons of windows)!

Great location, walking distance to Fenway Park where we had tickets for the game. It was in the middle of a ton of small food restaurants and the mall is located just on the other street. Overall great experience and space for two people for the weekend.
Very nice and compact apartment. Fully met our needs. Thanks to Pamela for being a great and flexible host!!
Great place to stay! The locations was great and the hosts were very communicative!

This is a classy, arty place with immaculate facilities.
A kitchen with all bells and whistles - great if you want to cook - which we didn't
We made coffee though, with a perfect percolator coffee machine - which has filters available.
The bed is comfy, bathroom is efficient - additional toiletries available.
All very homely.
The roof terrace was not used by us, as it was cold when we were there.
Chandra is communicates well and has created a very welcoming apartment to chill out in.
It's a short walk from Roxbury Crossing T station, the area is very quiet.

If you are looking for a place to stay in Boston that is right in the middle of the hustle and bustle of Downtown, this is your place! It’s in safe walking distance to practically everything, even the Harbor! We barely needed our car for anything. Aaron and Lu had great communication with us, and their place is modern, spotless & spacious. I wished there was a TV in the bedroom, but that’s being nitpicky. It was overall a perfect experience.

This studio hosted by Together We is really well located - near Boston Commons - and at a reasonable walkable distance from downtown Boston. We used our rental car to have a late dinner at the North End, but we were able to explore a lot of the area by just walking. The studio was also very reasonably priced and exactly what we needed for our short stay in Boston. Together We was great at communicating instructions prior to check-in and checkout, and also responsive when we reached out. Overall a great experience and I would stay again if visiting Boston.
Bill was awesome, he went out of his way to help us and made our stay in Boston awesome! Definitely recommend staying!
Close walk to the orange line and many an entertaining kitty!

Tianyu is a super chill guy! He's very kind and respects your boundary, so I felt very safe staying in his place. He's also good with communication. The location is super ideal if you don't have a car like me as it is very close to the station (3 min walk) and it's a really nice neighborhood. Nothing beats this price either. I'd definitely return to this place if ever I revisit Boston.

Rob, my girls and I felt your place was a “home away from home”. We liked how you gave recommendations of things to do and places to eat in your guidebook in the living room. My girls loved staying together in bedroom with dual beds and I enjoyed the fan in the master bedroom… it always felt cold which is a good thing! Thank you for making our trip to Boston enjoyable and memorable. My youngest was the first to write on the index card and hang it up in the kitchen. So many people from all over the world have stayed there. Truly awesome. We hope to come back to Boston again! Thank you!

Our family of three found this place to be a perfect spot for us visiting Boston. Clean, modern with antique touches, everything worked properly, and Devorah was a gracious host. We would stay here again.

This Airbnb was in a great location and walkable to all spots we wanted to visit in Boston. There were also plenty of good restaurants around. The actual Airbnb was quiet and we had no issues with check in/check out

La habitación es muy linda, y está bien equipada. El baño se comparte con dos pisos, es muy pequeño y la puerta estaba rota por lo cual hacia mucho ruido al abrirse y cerrarse. La ubicación es muy linda pero la calle de abajo es ruidosa, bastante transitada.
Jason war sehr hilfsbereit. Die Wohnung liegt in Little Italy mit vielen italienischen Restaurants. Kleines Frühstück kann man zubereiten. Das Sofabett ist sehr unbequem zum Schlafen, Bett super.
The location is good but any requests sent to the property they decline e.g early check in or late check out, luggage storage etc though they ask if they can do for you anything, feels so automated.

Todd sent me several welcoming messages in advance of my stay, including clear instructions for how to access the space. I felt very at home and knew that I could reach out in case of any issues (though there were none!). The room was very clean and exceeded my expectations from the photos - I shared a bathroom with one other guest but the amenities were spotless and I felt I had ample privacy in the King room. Overall, it was quite a pleasant experience and exactly what I was looking for.

Great location & nice little apartment. Had some issues with the toilet, WiFi didn’t work, only had 2 towels for us to use all weekend long. Overall, it’s a nice apartment but this property seems to get by with the bare minimums.
We really enjoyed our stay at this cute apartment! It was easily accessible and had a great proximity to the T station. If you are coming to explore Boston this is a great place to stay.

Will book this place next time, the room was beautiful as well as the home outside to inside. Bernadette was so friendly and helpful. The place was very close to the public street and transportation which was a good location to stay for a few days. Loved her and the environment.
Great location and exactly what I needed while staying in Boston! I never felt unsafe and enjoyed feeling like a local as I was situated right up the street from Fenway.
