Great location and vey clean room! The communication was good as well. Definitely will stay here next time I visit Boston.
good

Had a nice stay here while in Boston. The room is very simple, nothing extra in terms of decor but it was comfortable and I had what I needed. I thought it was a good deal for the location, size and kitchen. It was visibly clean, though the accommodation is older so it didn't feel sparkling fresh...this will be a familiar feeling for those who have lived in older city apartments. In terms of noise, I did not have any real issues though I heard occasional light noises from my neighbors...no different than in other hotels. To note, you will check in in one building but your room may be nearby (within a couple of blocks). This was not an issue for me but it's something to be aware of depending on how much luggage you have in tow.

We had a wonderful stay in Albert’s apartment. The location is perfect to visit the city and there are shops, markets and pharmacies nearby. The apartment is just as in the photos and very very clean. We appreciated the communication with Albert and Healing Homes team. We will come back for sure.
Great location, comfortable, host promptly replied to all messages. Recommended
Très bon séjour passé, l'endroit est calme et pas très loin en voiture du Boston Conference Centre. L'appartement dispose de tout ce qu'il faut. L'internet est aussi très rapide!
Tres bon séjour, quartier calme et bon accès aux transports en commun.
Y
Second time staying here for a work trip, and it was great again. Convenient location, safe, and communication was great. I’ll continue to book this for work trips if it’s available!
My family and I had a great trip to Boston while staying here. The space is as described.  It is relatively close to the red line and the private rooftop has nice views of the city.
comfortable place. convenient location. would definitely stay again. 😊

Ashley's place was really great, exactly like described. Located in the beautiful Beacon Hill district, apartment has everything you need for your stay in Boston.
Ashley was really responsive and answered all our questions very quickly. Would recommend!
Small but cute space in a great location. Very clean and great for a few days stay.
amazing spot!!

Awesome location and nice, cosy tiny apartment. Everything was as described, the location couldn't be better in a very centric area of the beautiful Boston, close to shops, restaurants, bars, museums...pretty much everything. Check-in was smooth and assistance during the stay was also good. I would have enjoyed a slightly more efficient communication before the trip - I was travelling with a baby and needed some assurances on what I would find, the reply was kind of slow and things for the baby were not ready on arrival, as we had agreed. Overall a good staying and a place I would recommend, we even enjoyed the terrace despite the cold.
Todo muy limpio, céntrico, están remodelando pero todo está en orden, solo que en las noches en el callejón hay personas fumando, pero todo muy bien!

It's okay, nothing fancy. If you don't plan on spending all your time in the room, it's in a good location. The window blind isn't a dark room blind, so unless you like getting up when the sun rises, bring an eye mask. Kitchen area is nice. Bed was decent. Had bug cover on mattress so I felt good about not bringing home any buggy guests.
We enjoyed our stay and would definitely come back. The house was comfortable, clean and in a great Boston location. It worked out great for us. Thank you !

We loved staying here! The place was close enough to the T to be a short 10-13min walk, but far enough away to be in a quieter part of the neighborhood. And don’t forget to take the ferry at least once to the city!! The apartment was very clean and well organized. They had labels on everything! Not to mention great instructions on how to use small appliances and tech. The room with the twin beds is pretty tight, but other than that there was plenty of room. Really enjoyed having a dinning table instead of crowding around an island or eating in a living room. We didn’t get to use the outside space but if the weather is nice that would be a huge plus! Rob is an excellent communicator and had a very responsive co-host to help us get anything we needed. We will be Eastie’s for life!

Lori’s space was quaint and comfortable, and this room in particular is a great value for a great location. Although I didn’t get to go, it’s walking distance from Sam Adams but sits on a quiet, relaxed street with other homes. The T stop is about 5 minutes walking and made it so easy to get into downtown and around town other places. I was staying while there were other guests in the house as well, but I never ran into them, and I never felt like I didn’t have privacy or my own space. Check-in was so simple and easy, and Lori was very communicative. I definitely recommend for a solo traveler who likes using public transport to explore a city and like to have a place to retire in some solitude away from the hustle and bustle.

This truly is a great place and especially at the value. Cute, the staff is VERY attentive and personable, cute decor and details. The bed was comfy, everything was clean, we got the corner room which had a nice view, the streaming service is a nice touch (we watched Netflix after the 10pm curfew). Overall this was a really great stay and we would absolutely stay here again. The only thing that kept me from giving a 5 star rating is that the room is cold. It was mentioned in other reviews so we were prepared. I would advise bringing some cozy sweats, socks and a long sleeve. There is heat in the room but it takes a solid 3-4 hours for you to feel like it kicks in and even then it’s still on the cooler side. The bed comforter is cozy and warm so we had no issues sleeping at all, but while you’re awake and moving around you definitely feel it. Again for the price, amenities (free bottles of water and other snacks) and overall experience and location I would HIGHLY recommend

We stayed here during our children's Spring Break. The apartment was only about a 10 minute easy walk to the subway, which made getting into Boston super easy! The neighborhood was quiet and safe, and the dedicated parking spot was an added bonus. The apartment had plenty of room for the four of us to spread out, plus the couch was super comfy :) The bathroom was clean, the laundry was super convenient, and the kitchen had everything we needed for meals. Joseph even left us bottled water and snacks! Joseph was a wonderful host- we had no problems, and he checked in to make sure everything was going smoothly. He even recommended a running trail for us to use, which we took full advantage of! We will definitely stay here again if we come back to Boston!

Phyllis’s accommodations were homey, bright, super clean and comfortable. The kitchen was great and stocked with more amenities than my own kitchen! The living room area was bright and sunny and overlooked a quaint garden area. It felt very spacious and was nicely decorated. The main bedroom was large with lots of drawer space, a sitting area and TV.
The location was close enough to downtown Boston to easily Uber in without breaking the bank, although we could have walked to a T station if we chose. It is also located a short walk to Centre St where there were many stores and restaurants.
Phyllis was a very responsive and helpful as a host. She even added a special touch of leaving us Brie and crackers upon our arrival.
My friend and I had a great time and would definitely stay here again.

Beautiful location! We could walk everywhere we were interested in visiting around Boston. Huanan is a very understanding host; we initially had to cancel due to a family emergency and she was great about helping us reschedule.

Communication was great and entry as easy as could be. Great neighborhood with plenty of parking. We did need to air out the apartment a bit but other than that it was easy to settle in.
I felt a little like Goldie Locks. One bed was very firm, one very squishy and one was just right for me.
Fortunately our little group of travelers was mostly just looking for a place to rest as we had family that lives around the corner because it was made clear before we arrived, and in fact during our stay, that this was a quiet space.
I would stay again and recommend to friends seeking a similar experience.
I really enjoyed my stay at this Airbnb. Very easy to get to the downtown area. The area is nice and is located next to the park. Boris was a very good host and was very responsive.
Spacious, clean unit in a neat old building in the financial district. Walking distance to the aquarium and the waterfront. Great place, we would definitely stay again!

Misha was very easy to communicate with. He let us leave our bags at the place a few hours early while it was being cleaned, and let us cancel a few days towards the end of the trip that we didn't need.
The house is extremely clean and very stylish. The T is is pretty much across the street.

Appartement bien situé mais à améliorer sur certains points
Cet appartement bénéficie d’un emplacement idéal, très central, ce qui est un atout majeur pour explorer la ville et profiter des attractions à proximité. Cependant, plusieurs aspects méritent d’être pris en compte avant de réserver.
Tout d’abord, l’ambiance de l’appartement laisse à désirer. Bien que le logement soit propre, on note des murs abîmés avec des trous visibles, ce qui peut nuire à l’esthétique et à l’accueil de l’endroit. De plus, l’appartement manque de luminosité, ce qui le rend un peu sombre, surtout en journée. Si vous aimez les espaces bien éclairés, ce détail pourrait être un inconvénient.
Le bruit est également un problème : l’environnement peut être assez bruyant, ce qui pourrait déranger ceux qui recherchent un endroit calme pour se détendre après une journée d’exploration.
Cependant, les échanges avec les propriétaires sont agréables et fluides, ce qui reste un point positif. L’appartement est situé
Great place to say! Would recommend

Abbiamo soggiornato qui per tre notti. Ci siamo sentiti come a casa! L’alloggio è pulito e ordinato e c’è tutto il necessario.
Comoda anche la posizione, in 30 min circa si arriva in centro, tramite metro o bus.
Davanti all’alloggio c’è spazio per l’auto.
Assolutamente consigliato!

I had a fantastic stay at Ken’s place! It was lovely, comfortable and Ken made me and my dog Levi feel right at home. The home and yard are beautiful with lots of amenities that I didn’t have a chance to enjoy on this visit. The bedroom and attached bathroom were really nicely furnished and decorated with everything needed and more, provided. It was a pleasure staying there and I will definitely stay there again next time I’m  in the area!
would go ahead.
Great location - team is highly responsive and the space was perfect for our visit.
This unit was clean and just the right size for us. We used Uber to get around so we didn’t use the garage which was a nice feature. The area was very quiet and we felt safe there.
This is a serviceable AirBnB in a great location: close to Boston Common and the T, and walkable to South Station. As described, it is a noisy location. The hosts thoughtfully provided ear plugs :)
Good for a short stay to visit Boston!

The stay with David was superb. Excellent communications, easy check in, and the space was immaculate, well appointed, spacious and quiet. The kitchen seems brand new and the living room and bedrooms are spectacular. It really is beautiful and restful.
Great place to stay! Plenty of restaurants and things to do close by, but within reasonable walking distance of much more. Would definitely stay here again!

This place was a great find!  Much cheaper than any hotel accommodations in or around the city.  Great location, easily accessible by car or public transportation.  The place was spotless.  I will definitely look to stay here again and would highly recommend.

This unit was in a perfect location for the Paul McCartney concert at Fenway! Everything was walkable and convenient. Check in instructions were superb and easy. The unit was clean, cosy and quiet. The bonus parking spot made it so easy to come into Boston. We would definitely recommend any of Jesse and Diego's units. They were easy to deal with and quick to respond!

Arrived to the property an hour early.  After a few messages with the host, was able to get in to our room.  The room was exactly as shown in the photos, clean, and welcoming.  The lobby and inside of the building was beautiful.  The surrounding area has a lot to offer.  There are several restaurants and bars near Fenway Park that are easy to walk to.  This would be a great location to stay to enjoy a ball game at Fenway, to explore the city, or any of the many things Boston has to offer.  We stayed in room 302 which looks down on the back alley.  There was some noise from the back alley at night, but was for short periods; garbage trucks, other vehicles.  Over all a great place to stay and would recommend to anyone.  We did not drive, but there seemed to be no parking for guests at the property.
Samuel was great, made everything easy. We very much enjoyed our stay. Would recommend a stay here. Samuel was informative & very helpful.
Perfect for a short stay for my family of 5. Tan was very responsive to any question I had!

Chris is a very hospitality host and we really enjoy the journey during Boston travel. The house contains deck chair, a yard with green gross and a very cute cat called MockJ will play with you and very friendly. It's almost like live in the dreams!! If any opportunity back to Boston again, I will have no hesitate booking Chris's house anymore.  Sincere;y recommendation :)

Anne responds to calls or text quickly, she's always willing to help and shows concern. Her listing is just as she said, the listing is so clean not far from downtown Boston and close to all transportation services too. I really enjoyed my stay. Thanks Anne!
Nice, new place with a great kitchen and bathroom. Walkable to a bunch of restaurants and bars.
Great, responsive host. Clean, well kept space with nice touches like nite lights and tissues in each room. Has all amenities you should need. Enjoyed our stay and will visit again.

First let me say that they really should mention there are 15 indoor narrow stairs to get to the basement apartment . Not mentioned in description or I would have passed as I travel for work with heavy display suitcases.
Window blind was broken and window led to a creepy little alley . Apartment was ridiculously hot and there was no way I was going to open a ground level alley window to cool off the apartment.
Needless to say I booked a hotel and left the next morning .
Also ladies if traveling with dresses no place to hang them as the closet is filled with maintenance stuff
Probably would not recommend to a single traveling female for safety reasons
Great location.  Super comfortable unit.  The neighborhood felt very safe with an easy walk to the Copley area and Prudential Mall.  Would be happy to stay here again.

I had such a wonderful stay at Hilary's home. The house is beautiful and the location is ideal if you want somewhere quiet to retreat to that's still really accessible and well connected. Hilary is a wonderful host and I would absolutely stay again if I'm ever in Boston again :)
A wonderful stay l, right around the epicenter of Downtown Boston. Great area and great hosts. Thank you !!
Great location. Great space and responsive host.

This AirBNB was spotless, which I haven't been able to say about many others, and the location was great. There are lots of instructions on the walls throughout the apartment so lookout for those. Richard and Vicki were prompt in returning any questions I had, and check-in was super easy. I highly recommend it.

Once again the treetop haven came to our rescue in an emergency hospital trip to Boston with our son. This house has become a second home for us and appreciate it and Julie as much as if they belonged to our family ❤️.
Na

Convenient location close to the park and Newbury street. Easy to use smart lock. Nice decor. Cold A/C. Yes the apartment is in the city so of course there is city noise but it wasn’t a big deal to us. Able to use a noise machine to sleep.
Very close to Chinatown and downtown. Great location

It has been an awesome stay in this home. The inside is the cleanest airbnb ive ever slept in. The house itself is super brand new and comfortable with separate heating in every room. I can stay here for several months! The location is pretty convenient as its very close to the subway station
It was brilliant!

Daryl’s place was great. It was comfortable and Daryl was quick to respond if we had a problem or question….even sent us directions on shopping and restaurants.
On arriving there was a problem with the heat and he was quick to get a repair person to fix it. He allowed parking for our 2 vehicles.
Not knowing Boston, we would probably choose a different location, closer to downtown, if we were to come again.
Thanks again Daryl for your hospitality.
We would recommend your place to anyone.

We stayed overnight and it was the Perfect size/ location!
Thank you
Great central location from which to explore the city!

Excellent location walkable to many things and close to T. We felt safe as 2 single women. Very clean. Comfortable beds. Great, fast communication with host- like immediately for any issues. We did not have coffee mugs and they delivered them right to our door in no time! Will rent from this host again.

This studio apartment was perfect for my wife and I while we stayed in Boston. We loved the baseball theme of the space, the easy access to the orange line (about a 5 minute walk), the quiet neighborhood of Jamaica Plain, and the responsiveness of the host. Any time I had questions,  they answered the emails right away and accommodated any special requests we had.  The studio is walking distance to Sam Adams brewery as well. We would definitely stay here again!

I don’t even know where to start but I’ll tell you this is by far the BEST Airbnb I have ever stayed in!!! Ehab is very friendly,kind and very very helpful.he always messaged me to make sure my stay was going good I was here for a week in a room downstairs and I extended my stay for another 3 nights until Tuesday in a room upstairs.everything is perfect! Nice and clean and spotless.there’s free snacks and breakfast provided which is super nice.I was also able to check in early (check in is usually at 4) but I came into Boston form NYC around 2ish and he had the room ready and let me check in early which I greatly appreciated!! I’m so happy I found Ehab’s place!! I come to Boston often and if his place is available when I visit again it will be my TOP number 1 choice!! Thank you Ehab!!!☺️☺️
Great host and room!
We stayed for a night. parking was easy. The living room is a bit small but it didn’t matter for us because we basically just slept and left. Overall it’s good.

I am not unaccustomed to using these reservation sites and know what should be expected on the part of landlord and renter. (My family has a rental in fact) I've never had an exchange similar to the one I experienced while trying to rent this unit.  The priced jumped after I shared the unit with my fellow travelers and while I was asking about extending the hrs. I got mad after realizing what was happening and got the worst snarkiest response from the agent. If the location had not been perfect for our 4 dr. Appts I indeed would have gone elsewhere as the agent suggested.
The owner I believe tried to intervene but damage done.  We went with the increased pricing because of the location to Dana Farber. The beds , linens,, LG towels are nice.  The pillows flat and not so great.  Mirror on the floor in master though I hung it back up. We were 4 sisters trying to cook a meal together during days of covid....safely. 1 fry pan in terrible condition 2 dinner forks. 4 juice glasses. We rallied using paper towels for placemats, tiny forks for dinner, bowls for covers, coffee cups for water....Basically kitchen was sadly lacking. But what can go wrong when 4 sisters get together...right. we still had fun and left early notifying owner that we had left as he asked so he could be ready for the next guy. Disappointing overall for the price.

Loved the comfort of the unit. Great location within 2 blocks of Green Line station.
Comfortable bed. Good cooling system.
Neighborhood feel, lots of good places to walk including to parks and restaurants.
We loved the place. Would stay again if it was just the two of us like this time. With the bathroom off the bedroom not comfortable for 2 couples.
Great place for a weekend trip. However expect the place to have much more wear and tear than the pictures showed

Jonathan's home was beautiful - comfy, spacious, super clean, and oh so organized. Jonathan anticipated so many needs/niceties, e.g. having water pictures and glasses in the room, color coding cabinets by guest room to simplify dish and cabinet usage. Really impressive. And he helped me move in!!

And the neighborhood was great. Super close to the train and stores. Also, Beta Burger is AMAZING. Anyone staying must try. It's not just beef burgers.

Our group of 10 was in town for a family wedding. Ryan was extremely responsive, helpful, and friendly from the moment we booked the place. The space was homey and clean. It was more than enough for our group! The location was convenient: walking distance to the T, a delicious taqueria and cafe (Brassica!).
We would all stay again & highly recommend this home to others!
Ryan, thank you for your warm hospitality!!
Great place to stay

Great neighborhood location. Private & quiet street while easy to walk to restaurants, pubs, & waterfront.
Stairs are narrow & steep which was not a problem for us but could be for older people or young children. We’re a tall family so we did have to watch our heads on the stairway and ceiling in bedroom since the home is angled. Definitely adds to the charm of the building though!
The check in/check out was easy and the home is kept very nicely.
We would recommend this home to anyone visiting Boston!

The condo is spacious and comfortable, well furnished too. 6 adults were all very happy with our stay. That says a lot!
The best part was Ryan, the on-site host who was friendly, kind and always responded quickly and supportively.
We hope to return to this property when visiting family in the area. You should try it!
Had a excellent time.
Nice place
I really enjoyed my stay at Frank's house. The room was so spacious and amazing, and we were able to sleep and rest very well! Would highly recommend it!
If you like being able to walk and explore then this is the perfect location. Plenty of space in the  well kept apartment with a decent view.
Great communication. Accommodations were as advertised. Neat and clean and central location to food and  nearby Boston attractions.
Thank you so much
Très propre et nous n'avons manquer de rien, je vous le recommande

It was great staying here, it’s a super walkable area of Boston with fun little coffee, shops, and restaurants around and close to the park and public transit. The place is spotless and very functional. You can watch TV and cook in the kitchen. It’s small, but Totally great. They were very responsive about some minor issues, and I really appreciated that so you can expect to be well taken care of. The instructions were not super clear on how to operate things as they didn’t have the welcome instructions out but they were super responsive by text and email whenever needed.
Great location and experience.

Beautiful apartment with great host. The place is super clean and very well equipped.
We managed the find parking right outside the building everyday.
Would love to stay there again next time in Boston
Great place! Thanks for all the suggestions and great communication!
Great location for getting around Boston, room was really nice, very clean. Was quite loud as I was close to the front door and the WiFi was intermittent, other than that was a good stay
We loved staying in this charming home.  Great location, beautifully kept, with lots of amenities.  If want a true Boston experience, this is it!

We loved our stay! The host was extremely helpful and always responded quickly with detailed information. The location was PERFECT. We were able to walk to 95% of all the activities we had planned. We would absolutely stay here again and look forward to a future visit!!!
This the second time we’ve stayed with Todd, since the place is clean, quiet, and convenient to where we need to be. (Plus screamingly fast WiFi!) We’ll be back!
Jonathan was extremely accommodating and responsive to any requests and queries that I had. The space is clean and private, and I had a lovely stay.
Cozy and quiet, private, definitely will stay at their place
Host was extremely communicative and helpful. The neighborhood is quiet but close to many points of interest.

It was a decent place for our group. It looked like bathrooms were recently done. Bidets were great. Living room furniture was comfortable. Location was good with a baseball field right in the front (we briefly saw a game being played) and some good restaurants and coffee shops with in walking distance.
We found dust on the floor and on the furniture in living room and in one of the bedrooms. Beds and linens were very basic and underwhelming for the price paid.
Outside of one of the bedrooms, there was nail sticking out of the floor board that could have been really dangerous had we had not noticed and we made sure to walk around it.

I must say before I start that, I checkout every detail of a description before I decide on actually choosing to stay somewhere. Before I chose this place the description (or pictures) showed an actual bed (no air mattress) and it stated that it was a 5 minute walk from the train station. When I got there I was surprised to see that their was only an air mattress available and that the walk to the train station was actually a 20 minute walk instead of 5 minutes. It made the situation worse when I saw the neighborhood, which it seems to be going downhill with abandoned/vacated houses that are in disrepair. The final issue was that i rented the place in summer which I found to be very hot at times, even at night. Myself and other tenants, e-mail Marie and asked for an A/C unit which she refused to provide stating that she would only offer an additional fan for the rooms if we wanted. Because of this their were nights were I couldn't sleep because of how hot it was in the room, even with a fan blowing directly in my face. The only reason I didn't change my reservations a few days after i got there was because I would not get a refund because I booked over 30 days. This airbnb place is exactly what it is which is a cheap value room, you literally get what you pay for when you book this establishment.
A couple more tidbits of information:
1.) The air mattress always looses air so you'll have to re-inflate it everyday
2.) Their aren't any cooking supplies except for 3 pots, (no pans or trays)
3.) If you don't want to walk the 20mins to the station you can get a bus/train pass for $84 a month or pay $5.50 round trip to wherever your going
4.) If you go in the summer, make sure you at least get 2 fans in your room, because, yea it gets that hot.
5.) Each apartment is set-up with 3 other roommates

Celia is an outstanding host! I stayed for a month in Boston and had a great time at her place where she made me feel like home. Prince, her dog, is an adorable member of the family and very well behaved. Jonathan has been very accessible and easy to reach anytime I had a question. I had the chance to meet him and thank him at the end of my stay. I am lucky to say we’ve become friends with Celia and I will definitely come back when in the area. Thank you Celia and Jonathan!

We are a family of four and felt the apartment was a good size for us.  It is located walking distance in between 2 metro stations for the T.  Since we are four people, taking the Uber made more sense and was super easy into downtown Boston.  There is a window a/c unit in the main room which is great but too weak for the bedroom with the bunk beds.  We asked Alex for a fan for the bedroom and he brought us one that very evening.  Alex, was a great communicator and was receptive with feedback which is a plus for an Airbnb rental.
Can’t say enough about our hosts!!! So responsive and helpful! They were so accommodating to all of our requests!
Wow! What a great trip to Boston. The host, Katie, went above and beyond to make sure that I had the best stay possible. Please make sure to rent this place you won't regret it!
Tim was very responsive whenever I had a question.  His place was delightful and he provided more than I expected!!!  I’ll definitely stay here again if I’m in the area.
had a great stay for a local conference. would stay there again.

I stayed 2 nights solo on Oct 12-14. Did ALOT of pre trip research for the best deal with pricing. I hit a great price via AirBnb for Seaport Hotel with the location AND having a gym. Wanted to stay longer but unfortunately the price tripled a night after that. I really enjoyed the cleanliness, amenities, and location. I walked to many areas of Boston with a few trips via Uber due to pouring down rain. There is a Budget car rental next door. I got a rental car to see Cape Cod and other areas after checking out. My favorite part was the gym. Much better than a standard hotel gym. Restaurants were available. I ate and drank at both. Felt very safe at all times. Staff was great. I wish I could post photos for others to see what the room and amenities really looked like. I had no issues staying here. I will come back as long as the price is affordable to what I paid.
Comfortable room in a good location

The description of the apartment was accurate and about a 10-15 minute walk to a T station. The neighborhood was interesting with lots of shops and restaurants within walking distance. Miriam was a friendly host and easy to communicate with.
I had a great time staying at Lori’s place. The accommodations were nice, the neighbourhood was quiet, and Lori was a very gracious host. I would definitely stay with Lori again in the future.
Maverick is the most consistent host in Boston. Always as advertised, responsive, 5-star host

This is in a great location in Jamaica Plain, close to the T and easily accessible to lots of wonderful places to see in Boston!
Chris and Kristina were fantastic hosts and their Airbnb had everything you could need!

We had a lovely stay in Rafael’s property in Boston’s East End. It’s a very convenient location from Logan and from key sites in Boston. We rented a car and really appreciated the reserved parking spot to which Rafael kindly directed us to personally. He was a lovely and friendly host. The property was clean, well equipped (although we did not cook when there was such great eating to be had put in Boston), and larger than it looked in the photos or from the front. Checking in and out was very easy. Rather quiet location considering its urban setting and proximity to the airport—we didn’t hear any of the external noise when inside. I just wish we could have had time to sample some of the great-looking El Salvadoran and other Central American cuisine at the neighborhood eateries. We did get some yummy empanadas for a snack at the coffee shop around the corner.
impossible to beat this location, great unit, easy to access.  would stay again!
Everything was as described. Communicative, helpful host and great location. Easy to find and get in. Great spot to stay in a quiet neighborhood.
Location was great. I would stay there again.
A wonderful stay. The location was stellar, host was clear and responsive, and the place was immaculate and well styled.
A super fun southie experience.  Meri was super helpful.  Great food close by on Broadway.  Great shower and washer dryer in the suite.  Close to the beach and friendly neighbors.
A good place to be
Great stay in a fantastic neighborhood with warm and responsive hosts.  They provided clear instructions and the the apartment was impeccable.  Will certainly try to stay here moving forward.
Loved staying here! It was very clean and centrally located to where we needed to be. Lots of clear instructions from Marlene - a lovely stay!

Overall, 4.5/5. Some of the staff at the front desk are friendly and courteous. The service is great, and the room is kept clean every day. You can always ask for extra bottles of water and ice. The food at the restaurant is good but a bit pricey. Be aware that they charge $30/day separately, which must be spent at their restaurant. This amount is non-cumulative, so if you don’t use it each day, it doesn’t carry over.
I will stay here again if given the chance.
Great stay, responsive host. Highly recommend
Very clean and comfortable place to live. Great location to nearby attractions. Janice is very nice and communicative regarding the requests. Highly recommend!

Loved the location and really great space.  They were extremely responsive to my emails (this was my first AirBnB rental as I am a heavy hotel user in Boston) but I now converted, especially if you need more space for a few days.  I loved the little touches like having a few items in the fridge for us.  Be sure to try the Barcelona Wine Bar right across the street.   Thank you!

My studio was on the top floor so if you have heavy suitcases you might want to see whether you can arrange to be on a lower floor. I didn't cook but it was well equipped if I had wanted to. Lovely location, funky part of town whilst a relatively easy walk into the CBD. Would recommend for sure.
This is a nice & convenient apartment. It was clean and my questions were answered immediately. If you plan to stay there on a weekend night, take the warning about the noise from the club seriously.
Nice triple decker.Conveniente to Dunkin Doughnuts.🍩Great stay.😄

Every year we take a trip to Boston for a Red Sox game and this is on the list of Great place to stay! Easy to walk to stores for whatever you need. The private parking is a plus if you need your car. Would definitely stay here again!
Very clean and well kept. Close to all. Would definitely use again.
The place is great and Boston is great! Thank you for the room!
Second time staying with Glenn, Oliver and dear Mason. I love this home away from home and will be back for sure! Gracious hosts, quiet street and great location! This place is a gem.

Our plane arrived late in the night and Hilary woke up for the check-in regardless of that, we really appreciated it. She gave us tips and recommendations. The bedroom has enough space for two people and the bed is very comfortable. It is very quiet at night so it’s good for light sleepers. She let us use the kitchen and cook during our stay there. The location is very nice, you can get downtown very easily with the metro, but is is a very peaceful and safe neighborhood.
Thanks for everything, Jonathon! You’re an awesome host!

Andrea’s space is delightful! There are thoughtful & creative touches in this comfortable & convenient apartment. I was excited to find a book of knitting patterns & Massachusetts spooky tales to entertain! Husband liked coffee in the comfy chair in little sitting area near the kitchen. We were visiting Boston for a family birthday and the apartment was well located with the T and bus stops nearby.
We definitely recommend it for a visit to Boston. Nice neighborhood, too. Lots of beautiful painted ladies & cottage gardens!
Good room, good price, good location. The elevator was broken or turned off though.
Great place, with great location
Beautiful room and bathroom in a private setting in a quiet street. Jone is super friendly and considerate - I couldn’t think of a better place to stay in Boston.

Close to a grocery store (walking distance)
Close to the subway (downtown Boston in 15 min)
Beautiful neighborhood, very safe and quiet
Owners live upstairs and were wonderful
Home is very clean
Highly recommend

We were in Boston for our daughter's college graduation and the home was exactly what we needed.  Fabulous space with an unbelievable location.  Our host was very responsive and helpful.  Highly recommend this home!!
Thank you for the hospitality we had a wonderful time!

This is such a great little place for a stay in Boston. The location is perfect. It is across the street from Boston College, a couple of blocks from Fenway Park, on a quiet street, 1 block from the T station. We never needed our car the whole time we were there.  Highly recommend this unit and owner.

This place was just what we needed! It was nice and clean. They do live in the property so you will hear them occasionally but didn’t bother us at all. Would definitely stay again when I go back to Boston!

This place was very nice and so, so clean! It was close enough to downtown Boston and easy to access via commuter rail. Daryl gave great instructions how to enter the home and how to use the various modes of transportation as well. Would love to stay there again if we visit the area again!
I had a great time, I really enjoyed it. The place was really nice and cozy. I would definitely stay here again.

Emma was an AWESOME host! She was VERY helpful, friendly and I got quick replies. The house was clean, and had everything we needed for our stay. Emma gave a lot of suggestions for things to do, where to get groceries etc. I would stay here again!

We had a great stay here! It was within a 10 minute walk of the green and orange T lines and about a 10 minute walk to Whole Foods.  Because I am always looking for this information myself, there is a 4 cup drip coffee pot.  We were here with a family of 5 (kids ages 16y, 13y, and 7y), and it worked okay for us, but it would be more comfortable for a family of 3 or 4.  plenty of toilet paper and towels for 5 for the week which isn't always the place at other places we have stayed.

Lihua was an absolutely wonderful host! My mother had an injury while in Boston and Lihua picked us up from the hospital and brought us ice multiple times. She could not have been kinder and more helpful. The house is beautiful and in a great location.  Breakfast was provided in the morning and it was nice to chat with with others travellers. Highly recommend staying here!

Jessy and Diego's place was very clean and organized. It's a great place to rest your head while exploring the city. The bed was comfortable, the bathroom spacious (we loved the vintage bathroom sink), and the kitchen was well equipped. Very walkable to anything that you may want. We stayed two nights to attend the Fletcher concert at Roadrunner, which is about a 10 minute walk one way. Free parking in Boston is truly priceless and we lucked out finding this place.

Jonathan was extremely gracious and, because of a recent death in the family, he allowed us to leave a day early and refunded the 3rd day of our stay two weeks could high-tail it back for funeral on time. Grazie Jonathan

Idéalement placé et confortable, nous avons passé un très bon week end sur Boston ! Le logement est quand même assez bruyant (bruits de la rue, des canalisations et mauvaise isolation avec les autres logements).
Je recommande tout de même ce logement !
Comfortable and large room.
Great spot - thanks!

AC in each room helped in the heat and made for a comfortable stay. Very close to transit and easy to access down town Boston. Liquor store and coffee shop next door were convenient. Sleeps 6 people comfortably. Has everything needed including lots of pillows and earplugs as an extra touch. Would stay here again and recommend to others as well!

Stayed for 4ish days, slept well. There is a lot of noise but it also is a public road and people walk up and down that road constantly, the noise didn't bother me the slightest. As other reviewers said, the shower is small and the type of shower it is, it gets water everywhere. I just wiped down the floor with a towel afterwards. I would stay in one of their Airbnbs again.
Place was great, clean, and excellent communication.
Great spot for going to the game. Li was so hospitable and welcoming. Very good experience.
spacious place in a great location. Great communication, warm welcome, and great accommodation all over. Would recommend 100%
一切和描述一致，基本达到预期
Awesome place to stay! Roomie,clean, everything you could need and more! Loved it!
Wonderful AirBnb! Ehab is a terrific host- as good as they come. The place is clean and well-maintained. I liked being near the train station as it was easy to get anywhere. Highly recommended!
Nice spot! Great host! Would definitely stay again!
It was a good place to stay, very close to lots of sights

Overall, my stay at this Airbnb was pleasant. The location was generally quiet, offering a serene atmosphere, and the view was picturesque. The space itself is small, perfect for one person, but could accommodate two if minimal movement is required. Unfortunately, a couple of streaming services didn't work well, possibly due to the internet connection. Additionally, some appliances were a bit hard to reach, and the showerhead was positioned too high, requiring extra support. The steep stairs leading to the building might pose accessibility challenges for some guests. Nonetheless, it's a suitable option for a short stay, especially if you plan to spend more time exploring than staying in.

This Airbnb was visually stunning - the decorating was very chic with really cool fixtures throughout. The space included 2 bedrooms, which gave us plenty of space, and a small dinette/kitchen. The beds were quite comfortable, and the linens smelled amazing! The space was clean, nicely done, and felt good overall. The bathroom was pretty, though we found the shower caused the bathroom floor to get wet, so we timed our showers accordingly. Worth noting for those planning to cook: we didn't check the kitchen amenities before arriving and found it had a microwave and toaster oven. This worked fine for us as we mostly planned to eat out anyway (which seemed to be the host's preference). Check-in and check-out were extremely easy. Overall, a lovely space that prioritizes style and comfort!
This place was very convenient to great parts of Boston. The unit is clean and comfortable. We really enjoyed the neighborhood and walked to many great destinations.

Place is comfortable and in a great location. Very close to all sections of Boston as it’s a close walk from two train stations. Accessible location and very clean space. The hosts were very responsive and helpful with any issues that come up.
Great stay, very comfortable and spacious. Location is fantastic.
Perfect location.. walkable to lots of good places to eat and to Boston Common, Freedom Trail and other worthy places to visit!

Excellent location walkable to all that Boston has to offer- or a short Uber away. The apartment was clean and welcoming. It provided the perfect place to rest and relax after long days of sightseeing. There was some city noise but nothing unusual for the location downtown. In terms of amenities we had everything we needed to be comfortable. The host was easy to contact and provided all the information we needed in a timely manner.

Great place.  Voctoria was wonderful to work with, the house exceeds expectations.  Everything is new and beautiful.  Super comfortable.  Great beds.  Has all the amenities.  The gift basket was a great bonus.  Would stay here again for sure.

Philip and Ann's place was a home away from home.  It was the perfect spot for my husband, our daughter, her BF, and I.  The location was great (quiet street and very quaint);  we were able to walk thru out Boston as the weather was not terribly hot.  The bedrooms are on separate floors so plenty of privacy.  We hung out in the living room/dining room/kitchen area a great deal. Great restaurants in the area.  The hosts were very accommodating and responses quickly.  I highly recommend this Airbnb.
My stay was great.  It was a great location.  If I had any questions Maverick was very quick to respond.  I would 100% recommend.
Cozy and comfortable space for us on a busy marathon weekend! Albert and his team were extremely responsive and made sure we were set up for everything we needed for our stay!
Great host - very responsive! Really enjoyed our stay.

Linda was a wonderful host. She was kind, communicative, and always available for any questions. She made me feel very welcome in her home and was incredibly accommodating throughout my stay. The space was clean, spacious, and as described. I highly recommend staying with her!
Excellent place to stay, with super clean rooms, a kitchen, and two bathrooms!  Basically a perfect place to explore Boston in, really enjoyed my stay here.
Location is amazing!
这是一次难忘的住宿体验。码头晚上能够欣赏到美丽的晚霞，地理位置优越，交通便利。

Lovely space - cute, sparkling clean, filled with light.  Exactly as advertised, maybe a little better even. Hosts were easy to communicate with and responsive. A bit light on amenities, but would stay here again.
Perfect host, great apt in a perfect location. Strongly recommend.
Fabulous location for Boston and Salem!
Clean place in a good location. Short walk to south station, great eats in Chinatown and Whole Foods. Would recommend Billy's place to anyone considering a trip to Boston.

A beautiful and historic space with all aspects of the guest experience thought of and immaculately executed. The house is very secure and the check in process is an absolute breeze with great contact from Laura and Olivia in reach whenever you need them. The space has a thoughtful European and efficient layout with all the amenities you would need for a single day or single month stay.  The neighborhood and surrounding restaurants/bars are absolutely fantastic with numerous price points and varying cuisines. The location in proximity to public transportation is great too.

Justin's place was truly excellent. Exactly as described and he was a fantastic host: communicative, knowledgable and anticipatory of any of our needs. He spelled everything out incredibly accurately and easily and provided my friends and I a great place to stay while we were in the area. I would definitely look into using his accommodations again if I choose to come back to the Boston area! Can't recommend enough.
Excellent location, close to subway, clean, well kept space. Katarzyna was very responsive and helpful at every step.

Its a good place to live.. peac and calm.
Host is very nice and responsible one.
Overall recommended place.
Friendly people, great room, very accommodating. What more could you ask for?
Great for the budget, place was tidy and clean, neighborhood was nice

The house was clean, central and offered us enough space to not feel like we were living on top of each other. This was a concern as we were traveling as a group of 7. The kitchen was well stocked with appliances etc. to allow us to cook and prepare several meals.

The bus line, fantastic restaurants and WholeFoods were within walking distance. These were all a plus, plus, plus.

We had several questions during our stay and Lita answered each one quickly. Overall, I would stay here again if I found myself in Boston.
Great location. Very small apartment but has all the essentials. Very clean, safe and convenient at a very reasonable price.

The place was very nice and clean, even better in person! We found the location very accessible as it takes only about 15 minutes from the place to downtown by metro. Even though it was pretty close to the airport, we did not have any issue with the noise (my partner didn't even notice it!). Also, Boris and Susan was very responsive and took care of us well when we had any question or request before and during the stay. We definitely recommend their listing and would love to come back! :)))

This place was wonderful. It was a fabulous location for walking to see all the sights in Boston. The neighborhood was really cute. It had shops and restaurants close by. Maude was a great host. She left us some snacks and a welcome bottle of wine! She was very responsive and helpful with all of my questions. The place was clean and comfortable. It was perfect for 2 couples. I would stay there again the next time.
Stephanie and Alex are amazing hosts the apartment was just as pictured very clean and welcoming.   The location was ideal for our stay in Boston.  We highly recommended staying there

Jonathan's master bedroom at his Roxbury townhouse is phenomenal. It was extremely clean and comfortable. During my stay I slept very well there and enjoyed the amenities of the townhouse as well as the location which is just a ten minute walk to the Roxbury crossing mbta stop. When I come back to Boston I will definitely stay in the same unit if available and I recommend it highly to other travelers. Jonathan is also extremely responsive and solicitous to his guests. Big up!
The location couldn’t be better! Check in was easy and the apartment looks just like the photos.
Location is perfect - walking distance to everything we wanted. Questions answered very quickly. Really enjoyed our stay.
We had a great stay at Endless Summer.  The sunrise views were beautiful.  The space was very clean and well kept.  So many things within walking distance.  Great local restaurants!
Great location. Comfortable bed. Smooth arrival and departure process. Presents as advertised.
Lovely home! Very comfortable and spacious. Hostess was very attentive and quick to respond and take care of our requests. Very pleased!

This Airbnb was not as advertised unfortunately. I booked it because it said there were two beds when in fact there was just one full bed. The “couch” that was supposed to be a bed was just no more than a dog couch, the size of a single person chair. In the pictures it was a completely different layout with different furniture, so the host was very deceiving. When I brought it up to him, he said that since I didn’t bring it up during my stay he could not refund me. The reason we didn’t bring it up during the stay was for fear of getting removed/refunded immediately and not having another place to stay. I brought up my concern the day we left and he said there was nothing he could do. I brought this up to Airbnb and they said they would get back to me but never did after I reached out multiple times. Still looking for a partial refund. The location was great, but this Airbnb is not at all as advertised and I would suggest not staying here if you do not want to share a small bed.
Beautiful spot in a great location!

I had a wonderful stay in this Airbnb in West Roxbury, Boston. The house was cleaned and very well maintained, making it feel comfortable and welcoming from the moment I arrived. The location was easy to find and in a pleasant neighborhood, which made coming and going simple. The host was incredibly nice and accommodating, which made the whole experience even better. I’d definitely recommend this place to anyone looking for a clean, convenient, and friendly stay in the Boston area.
The house was pristine and exactly what our family expected! We were a group of 9, and the house accommodated the entire group! Thank you, Emma, for your rapid responses and accommodations,!!
Brilliant stay, perfect for getting into the city when needed, but a great escape after a busy day!

The Dorset was great! We were four that stayed in the apartment - two couples and we had a great time. The location was very good and we had everything we needed in the apartment. I recommend the Dorset - especially if you plan on having a rental car, then you can´t go wrong with the Dorset.

Lance was very helpful and a great host!

We look forward to coming back :-)
Nice place. Good for a one night stay. Steep cleaning fee.
Antonio place is the place you want to be everything from checking in all the way to check out are wonderful

Great stylish apartment in a quaint and peaceful Boston Street. Great location to base yourself from and Alicia is a fantastic host. Very responsive and great to deal with.
I'd definitely stay here again.

great, clean apartment. close to the Boston Commons parking garage which was very convenient. beautiful surrounding area. walkable to many restaurants and other iconic spots. we loved this place and would stay again!

We were in Boston as a group of friends and this place was great. Check-in was easy and Amy was very communicative. The location is great and we were able to walk or take the subway pretty much everywhere. I would definitely recommend staying here.

This apartment was just how it was described. The checkin was super easy due to their being a code to get in. Saved the trouble of having to keep track of a key the entire time. There was no clutter. It was also cheaper then the hotels in the area.
All great!
We only stayed for one evening, a stop over to a destination, but everything was perfectly accurate.  Thank you for a restful evening!
Awesome spot and great location! Convenient to everything! Do yourself a favor and stay here next time you’re in the city!

My family enjoyed their stay in Mark's cottage! They enjoyed the distance from the busy Boston streets, as well as the quaintness of the cottage. The cottage is also close to Dedham's Legacy Place, which is close to Costco and a variety of other stores. Mark was very receptive and attentive to issues that arose, such as a persistent ant problem. Thank you Mark for this stay!
Alles wie beschrieben.
Great location. Would definitely stay here again next time we’re in Boston.
Great space and responsive host.
Great location with wonderful restraunts in walking distance. Try Zaku, we went three times. The space was clean and comfortable. The host is very helpful with check in and out. Overall great stay.

It was a pleasure staying at this place, it was spacious and had plenty of room to relax.
Everything was super close-by and very explorable by foot, the subway stops are really close as well.
It is a bit loud in the evenings sometimes since you can hear the cars honking since the apartment is in the city center.
Other than that I would recommend and come stay here again in the future.

Stop searching if you’re looking for a great location and nice accommodations.  Loic was super responsive and helpful prior to arrival and we had everything we needed while we were there.  Will definitely return when we visit Boston again.
Nos encantó la casa. Rob estuvo todo el tiempo pendiente de lo que necesitábamos. La casa perfecta para las dos familias
The apartment was very clean and was in a good location. It’s a quiet residential neighborhood but easy to access other places. The host was great and gave a whole list of recommendations.
Nice!
Zvi and Julia's place is exactly as described.  Exceptionally clean.  Very cute.  Very comfortable stay, would stay again and recommend to others.
Excellent apartment. Super location, spacious, comfy beds. Would definitely recommend.

Very nice and quiet place with very good transport links to the city via subway, bus or even bike.
Close by Center Street is great for sports and dinner - overall a fantastic neighborhood!
It was a good Place to Stay in for Boston
So close to Boston action you may get hit with a wicked sense of humor

My stay was excellent. The location is great, and most importantly, for me at least, it was very quiet, calm, and comfortable. Very clean, easy check-in, and I enjoyed speaking with Reina very much! Highly recommend.

My room was clean and comfortable. The house is older but clean. The stairs to get to the room are a bit steep - keep this in mind if you have limitations. I was expecting this, having visited the area before - guest rooms are often upstairs, and houses here are built tall and steep; that's just the way it is. The neighborhood was pretty quiet, but did get busy quite early, and the walls were a bit thin, so sleeping in could be an issue if desired. The bed was also quite soft, and might be an issue for those needing a firmer mattress for their back. This neighborhood was also a bit inconvenient for visiting touristy areas, especially for my limited time, but the place would be perfect if tourism is not the goal. I had some questions for Frederick before and during, and he generally responded almost immediately. I was a little disappointed at the lack of any cups or glasses (coffee machine, but no mugs), given that no access to the kitchen was offered. Would recommend, though!
Great location.  Very comfy , and safe parking .

I stayed here while attending a 3 day training at Northeastern University. It was a perfect location with being a quick walk and  one stop on the train to the University. The block is small and quiet. The apartment itself was clean and I appreciate the fact they left the AC and lights on for me.
nice place to stay for vacation trip to see historic sites in Boston and fenway park
Very good stay here . Everything as described - no surprises. Looks and feels like a 4-star hotel with the added bonus of having access to a kitchenette. Will do it again.
Fantastic spot, great experience. Would definitely stay here again. Highly recommended for those looking to stay in a nice area, with a comfortable lodging.

Gran host, ninguna queja.
Buena opción para hospedarte si vienes a correr el Boston marathon.

Great location in the North End on a quiet street, yet close to great restaurants. Easy walk to Freedom Trail and short walk to the T. Very clean apartment. Bathroom is upstairs and both bedrooms are down, so a nightlight or two would be a good thing to pack. We had a great time!

Such a nice appartment in a great location to explore Boston!
Jane & Ben are just lovely <3
Worked out well! Always found a close On street parking spot!
Great location for food and bars. Highly recommend staying here as it is very cosy and easy to access the tourist spots via train close by
Can’t say enough good things about awesome spot, well maintained, and Michael was really easy to communicate with and proactive. Would highly recommend!
Lovely host, responsive, helpful and friendly as ever. Perfect location for an array of activities, restaurants, sightseeing, and more. Couldn’t have asked for better

Margaret was an ideal host! Very communicative and kind. I was staying in JP as my dog needed treatment at the nearby Angell animal hospital for the week. This location was perfect for that.
Street parking was never an issue, apt was spotless and has everything you need.
Taskin was a awesome host. Place was a good place to stay while we visited the area.
Great folks, awesome neighborhood, well set up for work or leisure and easily walkable to the convention center and a bunch of other stuff in the Seaport. Would stay here again
Great spot in Back Bay.  Close to Fenway/MGM music hall at Fenway.  Great location makes things walkable.  Would consider if I were in town again.

We had such a nice stay! Everything was as describe in the listing, the host was responsive when we had questions. It was clean and easy to access. it was also easy to park in the streets, and the walk to the nearest bus station was pretty short!

Jason's apartment was clean, light, and airy, with minimal but nice furnishings. The kitchen is small but stocked with basic tools and cutlery/plates/glassware for simple cooking/prep. Be aware that it's up three flights of stairs, though!
Jason was extremely thorough with the entry instructions, general instructions, and he provided quite a bit of information about local restaurants and activities. The apartment is right in the center of things on Broadway, and we were there during St. Patrick's Day weekend which is the craziest possible time to be in South Boston, but with the exception of the trucks that delivered the crowd control equipment for the parade early Sunday morning, it was surprisingly quiet up there even when things were quite busy on the street below.
5 stars for this Beacon Hill studio.  Great location, sparkling clean, and the electronic lock system made check in a breeze.  Highly recommend.
had a good at the gig venue near by and enjoyed be able to walk to Bars Restaurunts and near by locations

This apartment is in a great location with easy access to the T & short walk to Boston Commons. Check- in was easy, host  responded quickly to questions and the apt was clean & had everything we needed for our 5 night stay. Would definitely stay here again.
We had a great stay in this beautiful house! The house was amazing with everything present, nice and clean, on a good location with Andrea responding very fast!

Outstanding location and outstanding host.  Xerxes's place is very well located and within easy walking distance of almost everything. Smartly furnished and well equipped.  Xerxes's quick responses were refreshing and when my flights out of Boston were cancelled he was quick to accommodate me for an additional night at the last minute. This will be my first choice to stay when visiting Boston or recommending a place in Boston. Thank you so much Xerxes.
Great space, incredible location, and the fastest responses from an owner I ever encountered. I hope it’s available for my next trip to Boston. 5-15 minute walk to literally everything I’m Boston.
Will definitely recommend, and will book again if we go back to Boston
Comfortable place, I had a short but nice stay there.
Great location!
This place was fantastic! It was super easy to check in and the place was very nice. The location was amazing, everywhere I wanted to go was within walking distance!

Terry responded quickly to all questions and made us feel very welcome. The apartment was beautiful, comfortable, and quiet. It served as a perfect home base for our travels around Boston. We did not have a car, it was easy to get everywhere we needed to go by using the T. We would definitely stay here again!!
We really our enjoyed our stayed at Lucy’s. Plenty of space for my wife and I are our 6 year old son.
Hands down a beautiful location and full of space. I felt safe and at home... next time in Boston, this is my first choice.

Great WiFi, comfortable bed, lots of bathrooms and personal touches. Host is very thoughtful in a quiet nice neighborhood right by the Arsenal Mall I walked to many times. Just an FYI this is a large house and all the rooms are being rented out by other people so lots of other guests staying as well but all in all quiet and good value.

The place is nice. As far as I can tell, there is no Albert, just a group taking turns covering the hosting duties. It's five flights up. The fine print said the elevator was out and I missed that. My bad. There's no room in the bathroom to hang a towel and no shelf. The shower is lukewarm. Bed is comfortable, as is the couch. Nice location.

My stay here was a little difficult due to the first night not having light nor ac. I got it fixed 18 hours later. Well the light, thankfully the AC was fixed sooner than 18hours. Due to the inconvenience I was reimbursed money for a night of my stay. Which was truly the only great thing in my eyes. The room was smaller than expected, thankfully it was just two of us. It was extremely comfortable and very nice staff( DARWIN). Darwin was really nice and very helpful ! He was the best part of my stay. I would definitely recommend to others it was a nice stay besides the inconvenience that happened the first night but thankfully they will be reimbursing me some money.
Great stay and location
Nice place to stay at really comfortable
Everything great !
Very clean apartment that had all I needed. I would stay there again. Easy check in and check out. Great appliances though I did not use them except the coffee maker.

The view from the balcony is incredible! The complex as a whole is so fun, too! The leasing office has pool tables and a gym and an art gallery! Brighton was lovely to walk around and the whole foods is so close, which was very convenient. Overall, I loved staying in this apartment and I'd definitely book again!
A wonderful, sparkling clean place in a very enjoyable neighborhood!! John was a very responsive and helpful host. We would definitely stay here again.
It was perfect for a stay in Downtown Boston! Was able to find parking right down the block and it was great walking distance to Boston attractions and Amenities!

Thank you for an amazing stay. Everything was better than expected. Great communication, extremely clean and comfortable accommodations. Access to transportation was very close and easy. It felt like home away from home. I would definitely recommend this place and host for any trip to Boston.
Great place

We came back to a persistent and loud beeping noise in our bedroom. When we reported the issue to the host, he did not respond until the morning after. He did nothing to help address the problem - only said that he didn’t know what was causing the noise. Extremely poor communication from this host.
The house was clean and comfortable. With easy street parking
She is responsive and helpful. Our stay was pleasant though we found some messy kitchen and bathroom area
We enjoyed our stay at this comfortable property. The location is incredibly convenient for touring all the historic sights.  The owner was very organized and helpful.   Thank you Paul!

This Airbnb is a 10/10!  Beautiful home and hosts are wonderful.   Location is in a lovely area.   Everything was pristine clean and beds were super comfortable. We felt right at home.  We have already booked a return visit for this fall.

Adriana & Gianni waren sehr nett und hilfsbereit. Gianni begrüßte uns trotz der späten Stunde persönlich.
Die Wohnung ist gut ausgestattet und sauber. Die Küche ist komplett ausgerüstet. Alle Zimmer haben Klimaanlage. WiFi ist auch vorhanden.
Viel wichtiger ist die Lage. Die Gegend ist ruhig und gut mit der Metro angebunden. Für $2 pro Strecke kommt man nach Boston Downtown. In der Nähe der Metro-Station ist auch ein Supermarkt, so dass man sich auf dem Rückweg aus der Stadt versorgen kann.
Wir können Boston und speziell diese Unterkunft wärmstens empfehlen.
I had another great stay here, it's a fantastic spot with an extremely accommodating host!

I stayed at Florencia’s place for a work trip and had a good experience. The location of this apartment is AMAZING. Trillium Brewery is across the street, there’s plenty of food options nearby, Trader Joe’s is opening soon right across the street, and the city view is great. The apartment building is well kept and very secure. The place itself was a bit small, but I had everything I needed.

Great location and comfortable cozy space. You can tell it’s definitely made to be a rental but does the job. Safe neighborhood and centrally located. Host Michael was super kind and responsive. However we did not have enough towels (only 3) or blankets which was not ideal.

The place looks much better in real life than in the pictures. It has also a beautiful view to the city, and the street has even an iron cast water fountain. It is super quiet, even with the windows open. The mattress is firm and supportive, which is important if you have back problems. The host is very patient and attentive, and answered all my questions in detail. The location is great, within a walking distance to some of the best restaurants and bars of Boston: Meyers and Chang, Wally’s Caffe Jazz Club, Beehive, Giacomo’s etc. It easier to get to the historical area, to the museums, ball game, Charles River Esplanade etc. The only con is that being a top floor/attic with two sky windows, it gets warm during the day in the summer, but the air-conditioning fixes it quickly. You also should be willing to walk up three floors with your luggage (I was). I could not recommend less, and I am planning to come back.
Billy has been an excellent host. The appartement meet the expectation, perfectly centered , traveling with the family, we had excellent times.
房间很干净，

Stayed over for my brother’s graduation weekend. The best part of this Airbnb is the location at the heart of the North End.
Our host was super responsive and helpful. We had an elder dog with us and we’re trying to make arrangements for pet sitting during the graduation festivities and she connected us with an outstanding pet sitter. Def made our weekend so much more relaxed.
Would stay there again!
Great place to stay!
Super great location that allows for easy travel to the trains or the airport! The space was clean and check-in/out process was very simple. Loved our stay in Boston!

I’ve had 2 nights in bedroom #1 in the apartment. Generally, the experience is extremely good.
Pros:
- Location: Walkable to Boston downtown, peaceful neighbour
- Guidebook: Accurate and detailed describes everything; useful suggestions for food and activities
- Cleaness: My private room is clean enough + a shared bathroom is well cleaned
Cons:
- Walking on the wooden floor (especially in the living room) sometimes cause uncomfortable noises - worrying about silentness for guests on couch/ottoman.
- Soundproof is not really good - I can hear footstep from the upper room
Super easy check in and Lihua was a great communicator. Walking distance to everything that you need. Highly recommend!
Worked perfectly for a week working in Boston.
One of the nicest AirBnB places I've had the pleasure of staying in.
Stellar customer service, prompt response time, great location, my wife and I both loved it and would definitely stay here again.  And they have blinds that actually keep light out, game changer! :)

Boris + Susan’s place was such a great find! I had to find my husband and I a new place to stay last minute, and this worked out so well! This was our first time staying in an Airbnb that wasn’t an “entire place” and we actually really enjoyed our stay! I was super nervous about staying in a hostel/shared space type of place, but it was very clean and pretty quiet! We stayed in the chestnut room which is the only bedroom downstairs and it was spacious with a comfy bed! Downstairs also included a half bath, the kitchen and living space. Upstairs there were three more bedrooms along with two full bathrooms. The Airbnb is super close to the airport, and super easy access to the subway and Downtown Boston! The neighborhood felt safe and was quiet. We didn’t have a car to worry about parking, but I imagine it would be pretty hard to find a spot as the streets are packed with cars! Other than that everything was great and it really changed my mind on what I thought a shared Airbnb would be like!
Also, Susan + Boris as hosts were so accommodating and communicated so well! They even give you the option to drop off your luggage and leave it in the Airbnb if needed! You can tell that they really take pride in what they do and their space! :)
Gracias por todo! Excelente habitación; todo súper cómodo! Vuelvo pronto. Saludos!
Minor and his family are very friendly. The room space is large and the neighborhood is good.
Great place. Nick was very quick to respond to questions and very helpful.

Great place! Cool property, very nice area, lots of options nearby for food/drinks/etc. Susie was awesome, checked in on us proactively and made sure we had everything we needed. Check-in and all that was a breeze, all instructions were very clear and accurate and we had no issues to speak of while we were there. Would definitely stay again!

This apartment was ideal for us in every respect. The location is fantastic in a very safe location with plenty of places to eat within easy walking distance. You could walk to most places if you wanted, including down town which was about 45 minutes. If you don’t fancy walking then there’s a T stop just round the corner. The apartment itself is great, spotlessly clean with nice modern decor and all the amenities you would want. Laurie also left us some breakfast provisions which was a nice touch and was much appreciated. We’d definitely stay here again next time we’re in Boston.

Drew has a lovely apartment in a great, safe neighbourhood.
He is charming and happy to chat and make recommendations as to where to go.
The apartment is on the third floor with fairly steep stairs so if you have lots of baggage it is worth bearing in mind.
Incredibly beautiful place and very nice owners. Will definitely be staying again next time we’re in Boston!
Great central location, great space to hop back to for a break in between activities, great food choices near by. This place is a great place to stay in Boston. Almost everything is walkable.
Close to subway and airport. Easy to find.

Very friendly host! Place was easy to find. Wish the room code was different from the main door code for there are other tenants in the house. Maybe update this for future renters so they’ll have that peace of mind. Thank you so much for everything! Lisa is super nice!

The location was brilliant for Airport subway station, being less than 10 minutes walk (free shuttle to airport from there) so access to Boston was very convenient.
Alan was very accommodating, easy check-in, and allowed late check-out so we could leave our bags until we needed to go the airport in the afternoon.
The apartment is a little small, but as described so no complaints.
It was ideal for our trip and would recommend as good value.

This a really beautiful apartment. It's quiet and the little touches were very nice. With a car it's easy to reach from South End Boston. Not too far to walk either. Probably a bus too but we never needed it. Parking is free.
Location is PERFECT!! We absolutely fell in love with Boston and head a great time!!! The apartment is super cute!!
Exatamente como anunciado. A comunicação com o host foi rápida sempre. Ótimo espaço!

Alicia’s space is super hip, and in a PRIME location. Close to everything I wanted to see and go to in Boston. A great host who made the checking in & out super easy, while providing an incredibly clean space. Would stay here again if I ever come back to Boston!

This is the place to stay if you are coming to Boston. We were unlucky that the T orange line was shut down for the weekend we were there, but if it was running, the walk to the station would have been so convenient. Great place, very comfortable, and super easy. We’ll stay here again when we come back to Boston.
very accommodating, and helpful!

Location, location, location! Steps to BSO and T stop, 5 min walk to the Prudential, and 15 min walk to Fenway.  Easy walk to literally everything. The home was exactly as described: beautiful neighborhood/tree lined street,  quiet, clean, fully stocked kitchen, great size for family gathering but with 4 stories everyone had their private space, and the outdoor space and parking space huge bonus. Host was fantastic. Responded within minutes, gave great local recommendations (Whole Foods and Trader Joe’s right around corner), and check-in and out were flawless.  We were coming from the west coast and host was so kind in accommodating a last minute early check-in due to unforeseen flight changes.  Will definitely reserve for all of our upcoming college family events.
Location was great if you are getting around by foot with a quick walk to the T. Margaret was very nice. Seamless from check in, to check out. Quiet location. Easy parking.
Great place to stay at - very near a subway station. The host was very communicative and always responded to any messages very quickly.

Great place close to Fenway park. Beautiful and safe neighborhood with easy access to lots of bars and restaurants, even going for a run along Charles River.
Very nice location, steps away from Berklee, public transport and food options
Very convenient. Comfortable. Clean.
Sophia's place is just as described - simple but super clean, great location and fantastic communication. Very much recommended!

This place is perfect for short, intermediate or long term stay. The place is clean, quiet and has everything you need. Rosalia is a wonderful person who provides helpful tips and helps out wherever she can. I'd absolutely recommend staying here!

What a delightful trip back to where i grew up. Everything has changed so much but this apartment made me feel right at home with my daughter and allowed us easy access to the entire city to visit with my father. Very attentive and available host. I stayed there because of the close distance to UMass. Close to subway. One hour walk to downtown. Good food and grocery nearby. Shared bathroom and kitchen with others. Coffee, milk, bread and eggs provided. Easy to wash and dry clothes:)
This place was perfect. My wife and I came with our three young boys (8, 5, and 5 mos)... we had plenty of space and everything we needed. Great location and spotless pad. Loved it.

Thanks for a great stay!
Nice and clean. Description is very accurate.

Reece and Karen were great hosts. I appreciated the little snacks and breakfast items they provided, and they were very helpful and quick to accommodate my needs for a late check out. They were very responsive and answered questions ahead of check in. Appreciated having this much space during my stay, and the area was fairly walkable and close to restaurants, a lovely park, and convenience stores. Glad I found this place!

Catherine, Aaron, and Caroline were wonderful hosts who gave me excellent local recommendations that really made my Boston experience special. Their place was perfectly located - convenient for getting around the city, yet quiet when I needed to unwind after busy days of exploring. The space was lovely and the breakfast and dinner options were such a delight. Thank you for a great stay!
Ehab is very nice. And the living environment is wonderful. The room is very clean and comfortable.

The facilities especially the bathroom and the kitchen are of high quality. The illumination in the room is not bright enough so I could hardly read books at night. The location is not very convenient because you need to walk a lot or take subways to the major supermarket or restaurant chains. But anyway it is great to enjoy this studio at a reasonable price.
The guest room had everything we needed. Angela pays attention to small details.
Beautiful place with great decorations! The unit is very well equipped with anything you might need. Thanks Elena for the great stay.
Clean, great location and affordable. Perfect combination 👍🏽
Great room, the whole apartment is very new and clean. The neighborhood is very residential and quiet. Overall definetely recommended!

Very convenient to the airport and within walking distance (~1 mile) of public transit. If you’re a light sleeper you may struggle with the street noise and neighbors above/below the unit. The host, Sandra, is very responsive and kind throughout the stay!
Cute place and it is close to everything Boston has to offer. Thanks for having me.

Jim is an excellent host and made everything to let our stay more comfortable. The apartment is very well located, with a T station right in front of the street and an amazing view of the Charles River.  Definitely I would stay there again.
Logement conforme a la description mais un peu bruyant. José est un hôte sympathique et aime la discution
This apartment was in a great location. It was very clean and comfortable. The parking space in the rear of the building is a plus.
Great location, easy access. Host was super responsive and friendly. Everything is well organized and clear!
