Whenever I travel to Boston I always look for maverick properties. I have stayed with them three times and every time the experience has been the same absolutely excellent. They communicate extremely well their places are immaculate and great locations and they are very easy to deal with

very nice place.  Walked to Fenway which was great.  Parking was a huge hassle.  no spots for the apt and permit only on the street overnight.  we had 5 people and was charged for for an extra person which I thought was cheap of the owners.  Allowed for an early check in which was nice but charged $50 fee for quicker cleaners.  Appreciated the willingness.
Worth every dollar! Host was easy to communicate with and provided great instructions. Super cute suite. We will definitely return
We had a wonderful time! Perfect location, gracious hosts, good art, Keurig!, JP, what more can you ask for?
Place is clean and convenient.  Ok for one person but bed is not a queen so cramped for 2.
We had a wonderful stay in Boston! Jonathan’s Airbnb was clean and quaint. We were lucky to find parking close to where we were staying. Thank you Jonathan for your hospitality and warm welcome!

This is a great spot and located perfectly close to the airport for easy access. Jay was great and helpful with suggestions and questions. Easy access to downtown was a must, and this neighborhood was quiet enough to be able to enjoy peace but also get to downtown fairly fast. Really cool stairs and the big room downstairs was a great spot to watch games or movies. Thanks again Jay!
Host was helpful, responsive, and kind. The place was clean, beautiful, and in a really nice and walkable location. We really enjoyed our stay and cannot recommend enough!

Awesome return visit to the Boston Garden.
Everything met my very high expectations.
I very much look forward to my next visit!

Katarzyna was incredibly responsive and accommodating throughout our stay there. The place was just as described and spotlessly clean. Very convenient location right off the red line made it easy to get around. We loved our stay and would come back!!

The location is very good. The public library, Trinity Church and newbury street are within walking distance. It is also close to the bus stops, easy to go to MIT. With heat, the room is warm in winter

The bed was comfortable. Everything is as described. Not a fancy stay but the room was clean. Convenient pizza place a few steps away. This is perfect if you have something to do in Boston and just need a place to spend the night.

I have stayed with Healing Homes when visiting Boston many times and have always been impressed with their spaces, professionalism, and customer service. This apartment in particular was less pleasant to stay in. The elevator was unfortunately out of order for most of the stay and the hike up 7 floors is not easy for anyone. The unit could use a LOT of updating as things are broken here and there, but overall a fine place to stay for a quick few days.
Great location, good restaurants shops and bars within a 5 min walk. Apartment was really clean and cosy, liked the ease of check in and the communication was great
Would stay again.

A must-stay place when in Boston! From day one of booking, Jonathan was a pleasure to talk to and work with. I was traveling from out of state and I didn’t have any hesitation to reach out with questions. When I did, he always responded in a timely manner and was helpful. The place was clean, spacious, and looked exactly like the photos and matched the description. Amazing host to an amazing home. Thanks Jonathan!

Place was beautiful. Perfect location near our daughter. Will definitely stay there again next time we visit.
Greg Gaudet

We stay on boats a lot, as we can have our older parents stay with us. Chad and Holly's boat Carpe Diem 2, was the most lovely (and cleanest!) boat we've ever stayed on. Every possible appointment, and just beautiful inside and out.
The marina is terrific, with views, amenities like facility showers, and fun harbor birds and boats.
If we are up in Charlestown again, we will certainly be in touch. It's a growing neighborhood, with a wonderful restaurant just a pier walk away.
For someone attending events in Boston, Charlestown is a bit tricky to find, so check a map in case Siri gets complicated on you. It's worth it once you get there.
Thank you Chad and Holly for a lovely weekend for us and my parents, as our son ran in the Marathon.

I had a great stay at this place which ilooks exactly like in the pictures. Very clean and nicely decorated in a calm and beautiful neighbourhood. The bed and pillows are very comfortable.. The owners are very kind and helped me have a great stay. Carrying up/down my big suitcase by the narrow staircase was a bit challenging, but I knew about it beforehand so it didn't surprise or bother me. I definitely recommend this place where I had a great experience!
Everything was ok, great host, thanks
Excellente location, proche du métro.  Le logement est propre et agréable à vivre. Seul petit point négatif la puissance du wifi trop faible. Je recommande.
Très bon séjour à l’hôtel. Accueil satisfaisant, check in à 7h du matin car la chambre était libre. Chambre propre, petit déjeuner inclu très bon, vraiment rien à redire !

Our stay was great, super convenient and comfortable. Check in and out was super easy and the hosts were very responsive and kind!
Thanks again for having us! :)

Bright and airy in a super location! The space is very cheerful with floor to ceiling windows, a very comfy bed, and a great little kitchen area. Cute kitchen nook area and Heated bathroom floors added to the amenities. Building is very clean and secure. Would highly recommend.
Clear directions on how to checkin to the lodging. The lodging was clean and organized, just like the pictures. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay.

Awesome central spot in Boston. Very walkable area with a lot of restaurants and attractions nearby! The unit itself was very clean and aesthetic. The only cons are that a few things were a little old and may have trouble using (e.g. shower rack, dryer handle), but it was not enough to impact our experience negatively!

Mechaal met us at the apartment for check in. He was extremely helpful. He walked us through the apartment, helped us park, gave us helpful suggestions for Boston travel and sightseeing and was very friendly as well!  The apartment was very nice and includes a kitchen, WiFi and cable tv. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay.

This is a great value for a home base and bed to visit the Boston area near Logan International Airport and points beyond by train. The Blue line train station is less than a 5 minute walk away, and trains run to city center about every 10 minutes or less. The neighbood is older and is in transition with a noticeable number of homes in some stage of remodeling, but we enjoyed seeing the renewal in progress and none of the construction hampered our stay. The street is a narrow one way, and it appeared difficult to find a parking place when we first drove in but parking quickly became plentiful in front of the unit and along the remaining stretch. We didn't find neighborhood shopping or restaurants in close walking distance, so we drove a short ways along Bennington to find stores and restaurants for our needs.
Great location and clean. I enjoyed the stay. Very good responsiveness and communication when there was an issue. The issue was resolved promptly

Shelly and Lance were very nice and helpful. They helped us to accommodate our luggage before checking time, and gave great directions and tips to go around the city. The room was clean and their location is very convenient.

Five-Star-AirBnB, great host and place. You share the awesome house with always nice people. Ideal for Observership 2-4 weeks, hospitals very close. Supermarkets a bit far. Experienced bikers: Take one of the BlueBikes (bring your helmet). Thank you Jonathan for hosting me!
Always a pleasure to stay in this lovely place !
My friend and I stayed here for one night after a concert, and it was the perfect place for a quick trip! The room was cozy and well air conditioned, and the house itself was comfortable to stay in.
The location made it worth the price we paid. Central location in the financial district made it easy to walk to any location we wanted to get to within Boston. Highly recommend!
Great location

This was a seamless and wonderful experience.  The place is gorgeous, extremely clean, lots of small touches, and in a great location for me (close enough to Northeastern University to walk or a $3 Uber ride).  Jonathan is an amazing host - very organized and clear in his instructions, etc.  I loved how he made everything very personal to make you feel at home, all the way done to a handwritten note welcoming me.  I will definitely be back next time I’m in Boston, and will recommend it to all my friends and family as well.  Thanks Jonathan!

Christal is an amazing host. This was my first ever Airbnb experience.  I travel A LOT and have only stayed in hotels. I’m so glad i had a positive experience with Christal. She was very easy to communicate with. The check in process was seamless. The apartment is so cozy and located in PRIME area! We walked EVERYWHERE! The bed is beyond comfortable! Thank you Christal!
Really nice. Can’t say enough about Daniel as a host. Great experience

The host was very nice, understanding, and responsive! However, the stay was horrible. I stayed here for one month and least to say I was not impressed. The room was extremely small, with very loud noise from the room next door. There is a door shared (but locked) between the room next to you and your room, could hear everything. The stairs are right outside the door, and could hear everyone going up and down the stairs. The neighborhood was not as quiet, as there are cars that roll by often with loud music, along with construction going on right outside the window. It is also not very safe, with many drugged people going around. The kitchen was fairly clean, but the bathroom was not. The shower knob is broken and it keeps falling down to hot water, and you get burnt every 30 seconds. There was a period where the paper towel was out for three days and I had to provide my own. The shampoo ran out the second week I was there and still no replacement. Overall, I was not satisfied.
Beautiful and cozy place. It was perfect to spend one night for a short business trip! Lindsay was great, very helpful and professional.

Great location for MGH visitors. Close to everything as well as Chinatown and North End.
Will be even better if a vacuum cleaner and a broom are provided so we can help them clean the place for long stay. Still more utensils eg cutters are needed.

Great place! So clean! Easy check in, great area, theres a dunkin donuts around the corner for breakfast and many convenience stores. would stay here again for sure, very private and quiet. i would only say if you are big or tall it kinda feels like everything was made for a short person. that being said it doesnt affect the enjoyment of the place. great hosts!
Great stay!

Great apartment with a very nice location! We were 5 friends that stayed at Trisha´s for 3 nights - The apartment is equipped with everything you need for your stay, and is located in the middle of "little italy". A great atmosphere with lots of good restaurants in walking distance. Close to the tube. Close to a nice walk around the waterfront to downtown.
A very comfortable and clean place to stay, they were very helpful with instructions and also provided coffee which was super nice!
Great place to stay and absolutely hassle free!

The place was nice. Parking was rough but that’s to be expected in Boston. Close proximity to Fenway. My major complaint is the 5:00PM check in and the 10:00AM checkout. They even sent a message asking me to message them if we leave early so they could get a jump on clean up? 7 hours for a clean? Seriously? So to sum it up. If you’re looking for something close  to Fenway but don’t mind the late check in and early check out this is your spot! If you’re like myself and like more flexibility with the check ins/outs, look elsewhere as 3:00PM is pretty standard.
We had a great time at Paul’s place. Very cozy and the apartment was spotless!
Great location! One of the city’s best pizza places is around the corner.
Would stay at this place again!
Location - location - location!  Clean.  And, the management is extraordinary!
finding parking wasn't the greatest but other then that great place to stay in the downtown area

If you’re looking for a luxury apartment, this won’t work for you. However if you are a traveler looking for a super convenient and economical place to stay with lots of amenities, then this is absolutely for you. The place is definitely well worn, but totally clean and has everything you need. There’s a bunch of things to cook, dishes, ice cubes, a mini fridge, blender, toaster, coffee pot, fan, AC, and an ironing board. The hosts are very responsive and check-in was easy. If you need an oven or laundry there is a common space to do that.  I like to travel on a budget while still having things be convenient for me, and this was perfect for my travel goals.

Perfect accommodation for two. This is a bright and sunny place which is very clean and tidy. So close to the back bay train station, and a walk to most places you want to see. You will appreciate the bathroom supplies and help yourself to breakfast. A very comfy bed. The hosts were friendly and lovely to chat to.
Great location in Boston away from the noise but close to everything
Kai was very helpful during the check in process, and we had every necessary amenity available to us in the flat. I would definitely recommend Kai’s place.

For a night or two this would’ve been an okay stay - but I was here for 5 nights and would not stay again.
Pros - great location with good restaurants close, easy check in and clear instructions.
Cons - Super super noisy. Can hear everything in the apartment above… and I mean everything 😅 on our final night there was a group partying until 6am.
- WiFi stopped randomly on the last night
- No hairdryer and not replaced when I flagged this
- The main areas of the house are clear, but it’s quite dusty in certain areas for example on the windows.
It wasn’t a terrible stay, but I wouldn’t stay again. The small extra for a hotel would’ve been worth its.

Lihua was so kind and very accommodating.  Location is AMAZING if you are going to Fenway.  She went above and beyond.   She was very informative and personable.  We are some hot natured southern people and it was a little hot but the location and hospitality made it worth it.  We will definitely be back!  Thank you so much for your kindness Lihua!
Хорошее место для тех, кто хочет почувствовать атмосферу американского дома. И для тех, кто любит животных.

Spent Labor Day weekend at Chandra’s place for our first time in Boston and we couldn’t be happier with the experience. Everything was as described or better. The space is bright, clean, and full of great art, books, and thoughtful touches. Chandra was super responsive, clear, and easy to work with. We left wishing we had more time to fully experience and enjoy all the apartment had to offer. If you are looking for a peaceful, cozy spot in a quiet area a little outside of the hustle and bustle of the city, we highly recommend staying here.

We loved how clean the place is, the amenities (like coffee machine, coffee pods, kettle, teas bags, microwave, fridge, toiletries - for anyone who forgot them etc., all those little touches makes this room feel like home away from home). Looks exactly like the photos, and description. Host was very nice and communicative.
Beautiful home located next to the Boston Commons plaza. Would absolutely stay again!
Great location, walking distance to shopping, Restaurants, Subway … the apt is very nice, comfortable and stylish… we really enjoy our stay here …
The space is very pretty and comfortable. Very quiet surroundings allowing for pleasant evenings and nighttime. Well located close to the Longwood Medical area. Very clean and well kept.
This was a nice place to stay at in Boston. Had a great time and lots to do around the area. Jaclyn was very helpful and I highly recommend staying here. I would definitely book again in the future.

The unit is in a great location with lots to do and lots of restaurants. While the instructions for the locks was unclear and the code given didn’t work for the first two doors, I was able to call them and get proper instructions and a working code right away. Unit was small but clean and had all the amenities listed.
Good stay in a fantastic location. Would recommend for anyone looking to explore Boston!

A great studio flat in a nice location. Close to everything and the T and surprisingly quiet for a city centre location. Some great shopping and restaurants in the local area if a bit expensive but cheaper eats and shopping around if you are willing to travel a bit. Easy walking distance for the Freedom Trail, Boston Common and Fenway.
Driving is horrible: Boston’s drivers are the some of the worst, rudest and most impatient people I have ever met and I have driven in some fairly undeveloped countries.

Es un apartamento con todo lo necesario para pasar unos días, en mi caso más de una semana. Tiene sábanas y toallas de sobra. La cocina es completa con muchos utensilios para poder cocinar y un gran frigorífico.
La cama es cómoda y caben dos personas perfectamente.
En cuanto a la comunicación con la anfitriona ha sido muy rápida y precisa.
Está cerca del transporte urbano, tanto del metro como del autobús (a unos 5-7minutos andando), a unos 20 minutos del centro. Tienes un gran supermercado cerca, algunas tiendas y bares.
El barrio es seguro y muy tranquilo por la noche para poder descansar después de un día largo de turismo en la ciudad.
Sin duda volvería a este alojamiento.

The host(respondent) was responsive in a timely manner, but the house is very old and need a lot maintainese( feel like about to collapse at any second.. broken walls in one of the bathrooms).
Heavy suitcase traveler be aware! They DO NOT have an elevator on the building and they got 4 floors, I was assigned for 3rd floor when I checked in. I had a big suitcase, I had to drag it all the way up. Also when I was there, my floor shared(share with at least 5 people..) was bathroom’s shower was not working…

I spent 3 nights in this room in early August 2022, with my 9 year-old daughter.  In summary it was an excellent stay, but like many other guests, I'm forced to cite parking as an issue.

Of course the hosts aren't responsible for the parking circumstances in their neighborhood. But I do think that they could readily do a bit more to help their guests about it.

I'm the kind of guest who really appreciates having a lot of precise information upfront, and who will take the time to pore over that information, because then it allows me to be the efficient, low-maintenance guest that I want to be for the hosts.  I value the effort and care that hosts put into preparing that kind of info; and I respond in kind with my own effort digesting that info and making sure I've looked it over carefully before "bugging" the hosts with any questions.   

Boris and Susan are hosts who seem to subscribe to this view as well, and I had no problem receiving mostly or even only robotic / generic messages from them - on the contrary, all the best to them if, over time, they have become able to host this well while minimizing their need to spend time composing tailored messages to each guest.  It's a win-win.  They have "baked" plenty of warmth into the various ways that they convey information to their guests, and that's plenty for me, really I don't even need a single personalized message to feel warmly and adequately welcomed.  If I were an airbnb host, I would strive to do the exact same thing, and to do it as well as they do it. 

Which is why I find it hard to understand how come, after receiving so many guest comments citing parking as an issue, they have still not felt prompted to compile and provide some more detailed information than the below excerpts from their listing / FAQ.  They already have near-perfect ratings for their property, so maybe they don't truly feel the need, or are concerned about managing info that might fall out of date, etc.  But for me it's enough of an issue to dock one star from an otherwise overall excellent stay.  Mind you, I gave 4 / 5 stars only because there aren't half-stars; otherwise I would have given 4.5 / 5.0. 

"We do have free street parking around, but you have to look at the signs. A couple of blocks away, you’ll find signs that offer free unlimited non-resident parking after 8pm and on weekends, as well as 2-hour free parking during regular hours."
"there are paid parking lots available within walking distance"
"If you're looking for a guaranteed dedicated spot, there are inexpensive paid parking options available as well."

These are too vague. I rolled into Boston having driven overnight from Montreal, my daughter and I were both tired, it was a very hot morning, the air conditioning in my car barely keeping up, car full to the brim - we were excited to get there, but the last thing we wanted to do was circle the block 20 times trying to read small parking signs.  Or trying to locate those paid lots, only to end up feeling annoyed at how much more expensive they likely are versus what I might have expected.  Then, I was fairly sure I had found a spot that wouldn't get me a ticket or a tow over my multi-day stay (a mix of weekdays and weekend days): nabbed one of the very few spots along the very short Eagle Square, at the east extremity of Princeton Street - there didn't seem to be any parking signs there.  But I wasn't completely sure, and that worry was on my mind during my entire stay. 

Of course there's always the internet; but as an infrequent traveler, coming from outside the city / state / country, you always wonder whether you've set up your data / roaming plan correctly, whether you will end up with a bad surprise on your phone bill from even limited browsing on the first day, etc.  And this kind of parking info is not always available or easy to find online to begin with. 

If I were these hosts, I would list at least 3 nearby paid lots with address and breakdown of price; and I would list a few specific stretches among the very most favorable for parking (e.g. around school X or around park Y, or on such and such street).  They do it for many other aspects of the stay (specific restaurants, specific attractions, specific public transit itineraries, etc), so why not for parking as well. I would also mention how much a parking violation costs.  Not as advice to simply eat the fine, but just factually; because it remains that, as a guest, you might make different decisions depending on whether a violation costs $40 or $90.  All with the necessary disclaimers of course ("don't cite us on this, info subject to change", that kind of thing). 

I would also provide a bit of info about a few public transit pass options that are the most relevant to travelers (e.g. a 7-day pass) as well as 2-3 nearby locations where you can buy them.  "You can get a 7-day pass for $22.50 from place X at corner of Y / Z, they carry other transit titles as well, please see MBTA website for more info".  Boom, short and sweet, that's all you need to say and I'm sure it would make a big difference for many travelers.  Of course, from a guest's perspective, these aren't the hardest things in the world to look up.  But it's so nice to at least be nudged in the right direction.  It would improve the experience. 

As I've mentioned, the stay was otherwise excellent, I can't think of a single thing that wasn't as described in the listing or in subsequent messages from the hosts.  This is an honest listing and you can trust it. Congratulations

We loved staying here! It was easy to get in, and Norah was very quick to answer any questions that we had. It was a great location too, everything that we wanted to do was within reasonable walking distance. I would definitely recommend staying here!
Everything was perfect!
Thanks.
Michelle was a great host. The house is a clean, cozy, beautiful home with modern amenities. Definitely worth it!
地理位置优越，开车出行很方便。屋内环境很好，生活用品一应俱全。
Nice apartment
Nike is a great host

Brunir is a very amazing man and his home is a fantastic place for anyone traveling to Boston and plan on using the bus. There is a bus stop within 400ft of the door that connects to the rail. We absolutely got more than we paid for. Clean, well maintained room and shared bath. No issues with other guest.
It's always great to have a host that also travels and shares their stories!

Great stay, easy check in, convenient location to get to everything. Use spot hero for parking in the lots. Street parking is non existent. Has elevator for easy access. Steven was great at communicating quickly.
A good location close to the Metro. We were at the top of the house so you needed to be able to climb stairs. A welcoming host .
Great stay!

Neat place right in the middle of downtown, good for a short stay. Not the nicest building, but they keep the apartment nice & clean and was actually pretty quiet for being in the middle of downtown crossing.
nothing to complain ，perfect
The best spot I ever stayed at in Boston

Great place. Was clean and liked the bathroom floor which had stones that were good. Note the bathroom is opposite to the room of stay with a code. Nice they had the supplies required for the stay such as towels, soap, toothpaste.  Good for a few days of night stay. Bit pricey though for a single room.

Dawn's place is well worth it .nice place lots of extras.have your own driveway an that's rare in boston.....comfy place TV in all rms even kitchen.drank my coffee at kitchen table while watching news.also nice back porch for anyone that smokes.if ever back in area will stay again.
Traveling alone. Very safe neighborhood that is a great location. House and room was very very clean! Travel to Boston on Amtrak. It was very easy to take the T and arrive at Lihua’s place.

Really nice place. We had a family reunion from people all over the country and planned on spending some time cooking,doing puzzles, and just enjoying each other's company.  The place was perfect!  We threw in a few museum trips and our trip to Boston was a success.  I hope to be back there someday!  What an airbnb should be!
Great place and very nice host! Very clean and happy with my stay.
Clean room with AC. Excess to kitchen, washing machine and dryer. Very good for the money.

We stayed at Jay’s place for our first trip to Boston and it couldn’t have been a better experience! Jay was timely in answering any questions we had during our stay. Location was perfect, walkable to other areas of the city as well as close to amazing restaurants in the North End.
Selim was very nice.  The room and space are very clean.  Would stay there again. Thanks Selim.

We had a great stay at the Treetop Haven!  Maria and her family were all very welcoming and helpful.  The apartment felt very separate from the rest of the house, and had everything we needed for a comfortable stay.  It was really beneficial to have our own kitchen during our stay, and we were easily able to cook.  The location is excellent - easy walk to the "T" to get downtown, or to Centre Street, which is the main street of Jamaica Plain.  We used the apartment while house-hunting in the area, and would definitely recommend it to others!
The place was clean, in a great location and exactly as advertised.

Overall, great place to stay and good value for my money. Everything was as described in the listing.
Some notes:
From what I could gather speaking to the locals, the area the house is located in (Mattapan) has a bit of a reputation as a high crime area for Boston. That may be true, but I can say I personally didn't encounter anything alarming or that made me uncomfortable in my two-week stay there, and I walked home late at night every night. Overall very peaceful neighborhood. I'm a big guy though so use your own judgement.
The main house (common areas) is quite warm, however there's an AC unit in the bedroom that can keep it pretty cool.
Some cons:
It's a bit of walk (at least half a mile) to get to anything from the house (restaurants, transportation, etc.).
They drug their heels a little on keeping the toilet paper stocked. They seemed to think that as long as there was some left on the roll in use, there was no need to have the next roll already in the bathroom.

My family and I stayed here for the weekend and the apartment was beautiful, in a great location, and had everything we needed! Leslie was always quick to respond to any questions we had and made our experience here amazing!
Jim is a very friendly host and quick to respond. The space is clean, has a great view, and is in a perfect spot to walk around and explore Boston.

Sherwin was an amazing host. He kept the house clean and made sure that we have everything in need. Also the use of laundry machine is free and it’s located on the first floor so we had no problem with washing and drying our clothes.
The location was also convenient. The house was only 10-15 min to the train by walk, which could easily get us to Boston downtown (it’s 20-30 min to downtown by train ride). It’s in a safe neighborhood and only a few minutes away from supermarkets and gyms.
Overall, I highly recommend this place.
Great apartment in a fantastic location. Had everything we needed.

Siena is a lovely host and the room was very clean. She was also very accomodating in allowing me to keep my car parked past checkout while I dealt with a flight delay. The bedding is "European style" so does not include a top sheet, but one was provided when I asked. One note is that the microwave and coffee maker in the description are not in the room but in the main kitchen. All in all a clean room in a great location, and a kind, hospitable host - safe and comfortable for single woman travelers.

Location is 20 to 30 minutes away from the centre by car.  However it is pleasant , having been recently rejuvenated, location although taxi drivers get a little lost.  Concierge cannot really help with much and apparently had never arranged a taxi before when I had problems with the Uber location not being accurate. Pool was effectively empty, a little cold, but nice.  Other areas, computer room, poole table, fitness were up-market with electric candles boosting the atmosphere. Apartment was smallish with bedroom area in enclosed section away from the living room and windows which opened half-way.  Basically equipped kitchen but fine. Iterim was 5 minute walk away, a kind of internet cafe with some food,  wraps etc. Main issue is Global are unresponsive so if any problems will not respond within 5? days.  Maybe if you phone, rather than email, they would be better. You will probably deal with a  "billing Assistant' . 'Damage waiver' I had to activate. Maybe not bother prior to check-

My family and I loved staying at Brian and Heather’s. The best part about the unit was its location directly in front of Boston Common and many of the sites on the freedom trail and great coffee shops nearby. Beyond the touristy things, it was well appointed and having a washer/dryer was useful with kids. Brian and Heather’s communication was great, and it was a great stay overall.
Another great stay at a Healing Homes AirBnB in Boston! Thanks so much, as always!
The place definitely lived up to its name! It was cozy, comfortable and peaceful! Spent my july 4th weekend in this place and would definitely go back when I get the chance! Thumbs up!
Loved this property!  Super convenient and awesome for group travel.  Communication from the hosts were very timely and detailed.  Highly recommend.

This little spot is a hidden gem of a neighborhood. The entrances of every home were decorated for the holidays. It is terrifically walkable to the Garden, China Town, shopping and more. The house was spotless and we lacked nothing. Griffin was accommodating and super communicative. We’d stay again, albeit longer!

The location and space of our room was amazing! You are walking distance from TD Garden, Faneuil, New England Aquarium and some local Boston Tours.
We need something close to Salem for our Halloween trip and this delivered. There was a sushi place around the block that we ate at 4 times - super friendly neighborhood and great food literally walking distance.
We had some issues with the hot water, but they responded quickly and provided maintenance.
All the amenities were well thought out- there’s an iron available, kitchen with dishware, microwave (that came in very handy), and we ended up using all of it.
We would definitely stay again, as the location made us plan our next trip to Boston. It’s close to the Commons and al out of amazing places to eat that we left undiscovered.
Would definitely recommend to anyone visiting for a long stay or a quick night in the city or an impromptu getaway.

Maya and Daniel probably own the most creative and imaginative house we’ve ever stayed in! There’s color everywhere, a banjo and even a small indoor swing. We had tons of space, too.
It’s also a 10-minute walk from the T and an even closer walk to the Sam Adams Brewery, which was very convenient, as we always make a visit there before the Boston Marathon.
One tip is to make sure there’s always an extra key in the lockbox outside. I goofed and turned the doorknob lock and accidentally locked myself out of the house with no key; fortunately, I found a very responsive locksmith at 1:30am, and AirBnb reimbursed me. Maya was great and responded as soon as she saw that I was locked out. Other than that snafu, everything else was super smooth!

We had a wonderful stay. It was perfect for the quick trip we had planned. They were super responsive and accommodating when we asked to stay one extra day. I was worried about the detached bathroom but it actually was private and easy to access.
Very accommodating host in Jean-Luc. I look forward to staying there again next time I visit my daughter in Boston. The place was great, clean and perfect for my needs.
The house is so beautiful, and the host is very nice, we really enjoy living there

I enjoyed staying with Jessica during my Boston vacation. The subway stop was a 10-minute walk away and the neighborhood felt safe. Jessica communicated well and check-in/check-out was super easy. She didn't require any extra nonsense that some Air BnB hosts have started to do. I recommend her space for single travelers.
Das Studio entsprach exakt den Bildern und war sehr sauber. Die Lage ist perfekt um Boston zu Fuß zu erkunden. Jederzeit würde ich wiederkommen.
Super clean, comfortable and convenient for our stay (2 adults) while visiting family in East Boston.  Street parking not an issue at all.

Glenn is the ultimate AirBNB host! His apartment is within walking distance of everything you need to explore Boston,  well equipped for an extended stay, and there are also plenty of parks nearby. Glenn was extremely responsive, with local suggestions and even dropped of some chalk for the kids to draw on the side walk with.

Great Place，Close to both Downtown and Uni. Kevin is very response on all enquires. Gave us lots of suggestions on local restaurants. kitchen has well equipped  with cutely and Spiecs，One thing may be more helpful , house doesn’t not offer washer and dryer.

Truly a bonus to my trip to Boston! The attention given to each aspect of accommodations - from timely responses to messages and changes to requests, to the respect shown for the exterior and interior of the home, and lastly to personal respect shown to guests - made this stay feel like home away from home. Delicious breakfast and great conversation! For those who appreciate what really matters, tranquility found from focusing on five senses, this stay is for you. Thank you, Aaron, Caroline, and Catherine, for a wonderful stay.

Overall place is as described as is and very clean  however light fixture needed bulbs to be changed and bedsheet needs to be updated. What I did not appreciate is the host without doing any research or even an inquisitive call, immediately calls me and leaves a threatening voicemail about not checking out on time and leaving items behind when I checked out well in advance and even made the bed for them. They even mention they had cameras in the hall but didn’t even bother to check the footage prior to contacting me. Also, prior to me even responding they decided to issue a complaint in Airbnb and try and charge me $400. Thankfully, I had some documentation to prove my time of departure. But next time I will always document the stay prior and after my time and record when I come in and out.  I was thinking of booking recurring stays for work but after this experience will definitely not!
I stayed with Charles for a full two months and it was ideal! He was consistently responsive and kind. Would definitely recommend!
Amazing place to stay accurately described and had everything we could have hoped for will definitely use this location and host again!!!

superbe logement , proche boston par le metro ligne rouge. Ewa a toujours été très disponible. On était une famille de 4 avec 2 ados et c était parfait.
Merci pour tout Ewa

The location of the place was great, I really liked having accessible parking and quiet hours. This was my first time booking an Airbnb, and I think this place was a great choice for my stay. I’m glad I found this place to stay during my trip. Thank you J

This airbnb is at a great location. Walkable to markets and restaurants and their historic Chinatown. Main amenity that was greatly appreciated is the parking as it’s only residential permit parking nearby. Also it’s great to leave the car in the garage throughout the whole stay since Boston is a walkable city.
PS Three out of the four bedrooms as well as the bathroom are downstairs in the case some guests are not comfortable with stairs. The entrance to the apartment also has steep stairs. Just something to be mindful of.

Perfect place, clean, quiet and very convenient!
we feel like home, thank you for everything.
I recommend your apartment at 100% !

Hermina excels at giving that true Mediterranean warmth and hospitality. Upon entering her home you immediately feel welcome and I just had to take my shoes off at the door because its like coming home to Mamma! The kitchen is filled with delicacies and me and my two sons felt like princes our whole entire stay. Keep up the good work, Hermina!!!
Thank you!
Great place, hope to return.

The place and host were great. Lance was super responsive and very helpful. The location was amazing - close the T, grocery stores, gyms, bars, restaurants, etc. The pictures didn’t do justice to how the place is in real life which is rare . The layout was a little different but I got used to it fairly quickly even for dogs. The only very minor annoyance was that the WiFi was very spotty in the first floor, especially the second bedroom in back. But overall great place for a great value and I would definitely stay again.
Lihua’s place is adorable! Great location, clean, comfortable and historic which I love! 10/10, would definitely recommend and we will be staying again if ever back in Boston!!!

This is a gorgeous house in a beautiful location. We did not get to meet the hosts, they were out of town, so we had the house to ourselves. We were very careful because everything was so pristine. The guest room is the whole 3rd floor, a huge room with 2 twin beds & a luxurious bathroom (I would add towel racks and hooks, but otherwise great.) We sat on the front porch and on the patio. Very amazing house.
安静，价格合理，房间小，房东很友善，距离机场比较远但是交通便利，一个人住还不错。👍

Very clean and comfortable! A few suggestions to the owner, a trash can in the bedroom and a place to hang your wet towels, and especially a window covering on the door that leads to the atrium. There ARE high walls around the atrium, but we could see the apartment windows around the place so we knew they could see in if they wanted so we covered the windows with a towel!
We do highly recommend staying here but FYI, there's a beautiful kitchen but no condiments whatsoever, (no salt, pepper, sweetener etc, cooking oil or spray. We like airbnbs because of the kitchens (esp. for breakfast) and this one was mostly unusable other than a place to store leftovers or reheat them. (Tatte's had such amazing breakfast and coffee that we didn't mind not making our own breakfast.)
There's a coffee shop across the street, and many great restaurants and shops really close. Matthew was very kind, And let us keep our bags there since it was raining and our flight was late afternoon. Great stay!

this place is quaint, comfortable and quiet.  Brittany and Booker are good hosts and very helpful. If we ever come back to Boston, I am sure we would try to book reservationswith them again. the apartment is bigger than I expected and the bed is comfortable. thank you for having us.

The location of the apartment/studio is excellent, easy walking distance to just about everything. The communication from the hosts (there seems to be several) was also great and generally the studio was clean, my only disappointment was the standard of the linen, what were once white sheets and duvet cover is now stained and yellow. Also there were no mattress or pillow protectors which made it feel a bit grubby and unhygienic.

Great space in Dorchester, 10 minutes or so from downtown. Glenn and James have the space nicely set up with plenty of space for more than two people. They were very accommodating and will be happy staying with them again.
Great space to stay

I really enjoyed my stay in Albert's apartment! It was great
It is the same as seen in the photos, but even more beautiful.
Angelika always responded quickly to my queries.
I totally recommend it. I will go again in my next stay in Boston without hesitation
Thank you Albert!
German
Amazing location.  Nice unit just as described.  2nd time I have stayed in this building

Shira’s place was great for a Boston getaway.  We loved how close it was to restaurants/grocery stores, and a short drive into the main parts of the city.  The space was well kept, clean, and comfortable.  We would stay here again in the future.

Easy stay as others describe. Stayed here to test potential apartments in the area and commute/transportation into the city/Boston proper via bus to Orange line. Clean, easy check in, reliable wifi, would recommend.

ABSOLUTELY would stay again. Space could not have been in a better location for all we came to do. Everything was within walking distance!
Host was very helpful and provided local recommends. Very nice treats were left for us to have upon our arrival. Just nice touches.
Great location. Walkable to downtown, Chinatown  etc. Lots if food options. Laura was very helpful. Make sure you can climb stairs to get up to the cute units..large luggage was hard to manage ..

This is a 5 star location hands down. The apartment is charming and has all you need. We contacted Jay about a few minor things during our stay and never received a response. But honestly it’s still worth 5 stars!
This was our 3rd time to stay at the Boston Bailey and it's will be our go to when we visit Boston!

Location makes the destination, this cute little spot is right in the heart of Back Bay and allows you access to some wonderful eateries and restaurants. Pricey for space but worth it as I made a last minute booking!
Clean, as described, good location. Great value as long as all 4 bedrooms will be used.
We had a great quick visit to Boston and Brian & Heather’s place was awesome! It’s in a great location, very clean, and is beautifully furnished. Communication was great as well!

My two children and I very much enjoyed our stay in this attic apartment. It's sunny, beautifully decorated, and and thoughtfully prepared with everything that we needed -- plus many wonderful extras, like great books, kids' toys, and homemade yogurt and granola for breakfast. Jennifer is a hands-on host, even hauling our heavy suitcase up all those stairs for us. Location-wise, the apartment is very close to Jamaica Pond, and an easy walk to JP's fun business district. Note that this is a shoes-off space, so you might want to bring a pair of slippers.

Fantastic located property in the heart of the shopping area in Boston. Perfect for weekend or longer visitors. Good kitchen for coffee and tea making and plenty of excellent breakfast eatery's within a 5 minute walk
The host was extremely kind and answered every question I had in a timely manner. The house is beautiful and it’s in a nice neighborhood. Would definitely recommend for long stays.
Beautiful place and location. Great neighborhood. There is no parking close by but public transportation is right outside and easy. Very clean and modern.
This is a great spot in Boston Close to pretty much anything you would like to do downtown!!

The room and apartment were a great place for us to chill in the evenings, and it felt like a home from home. Everything was clean, tidy and comfortable. The apartment is set in a great location - although a couple of minutes away from the road, it’s quiet and easy to navigate the neighbourhood. It was really useful having the subway and bus links close by - this is what we used while we stayed and it was so easy to get to. Up the road are lots of lovely little eateries such as Lilly’s Gourmet Pasta and Chilacate’s Mexican Street Food. Stop and Shop, Wallgreen’s and 7-11 are also close by, so it’s a perfect area to get all that you need. I would definitely recommend staying here - it’s a great little place in a good area, not too close to the hustle and bustle of the city, but still easy to get to.
This place is simple and clean. It’s like an Airbnb hostel but efficient and peaceful.
Daryl has a great place and was easy to communicate with

Alicia's room was fantastic, and even better than anticipated! The pictures were spot-on, the room was clean and very easy to get to from the metro, and the location was about as central as it gets. Checking in and out was straightforward, with a coded keypad. One set of sheets and towels were provided, along with some basic amenities such as toilet paper and hand soap. The floor to ceiling windows let in tons of natural light, and my boyfriend and I loved sitting in the sunny breakfast nook and sipping on morning lattes while we planned each day. The Freedom Trail begins about two blocks away, and we either walked or easily took the metro everywhere we wanted to go. The Boston Commons is also just a five minute walk, and we enjoying strolling through the park on our way home after dinner each night, and going for a runs in the park. The bed was also nice and firm, and there was almost no street noise. All-in-all we could not have asked for a better AirBnB experience, and have already discussed a return trip. Thank you, Alicia!

This was exactly what we needed for our stay. It was near our friend’s apartment, easy to get to, comfortable, and reasonably priced. It is not a luxury place, but that’s not what I was looking for. The evening we arrived there were lots of people in the back of the apartment listening to music and talking, but that’s ended around 10 PM. It was a weekend, so we weren’t too bothered by that!
Perfect quick stay, really pay attention to the address the host sends. Right near a few great food places and the host was very helpful.
Literally just what I needed. Quiet place to stay in a location close to the airport. Check-In instructions were simple and clear. I’d stay here again if I came back to Boston.

I stood here with my two friends for a mini get away. The place was cozy and pretty spacious for an apartment. Parking is a little tricky on the actual block when you come back to the Airbnb after a certain time but it’s not difficult to find on the neighboring blocks if you don’t mind walking. The neighborhood was quiet. Not much action on the block. And only a 20 min drive to downtown Boston. The beds were cozy and so was the living room. We spent our down time watching movies and trying to solve the puzzle she has for guest lol. All in all we enjoyed our stay.
Nice place for a short-term stay. Would visit again. Thanks, Antonio!
The place is great, easy to come to the downtown. The house and garden are beautiful and clean. The area is quite and full of green. Recommend others to stay.

"Hidden Gem" This place is well maintained and the host is absolutely amazing, very professional and helpful.  Im really grateful for my peaceful time here.  The bed was so soft and the property was equipped with everything needed.  Definitely will be staying here again.
Clean, comfortable space in a great location. Happy to recommend to others.
Good location & nice place

La chambre était vraiment petite et n’était pas vraiment celle que nous avions réservée… Le lieu semble prendre de l’âge, tout n’est pas aussi propre et beau que sur les photos malheureusement, un rafraîchissement ferait beaucoup de bien et justifierait du prix.
L’emplacement est vraiment bien, c’est vraiment facile pour le stationnement dans les rues adjacentes, le quartier de South Boston est très agréable et il est très facile de ce rendre dans le centre de la ville à pied! Le quartier est bien vivant le soir, il y a un bar sympa en bas et en face de la résidence, c’est un point à prendre en considération aussi pour le bruit ;) .
Nous avons pu discuter avec Tatch à la fin de notre séjour afin leur exprimer notre petite déception et nous avons su être écouté.
Overall, Boston est vraiment une belle ville où il semble faire bon vivre, on s’y sent rapidement bien :)

We had such a delightful time at Meri’s place! It’s just as luxurious as it looks and there are all sorts of enchanting touches that make the historic home feel just right. The sectional was big enough for all three of us to stretch out and watch the big TV. The shower definitely deserves a special mention since it is absolutely the best shower I’ve ever experienced! The neighborhood is lovely and it’s very easy to walk to several bus stops. Thank you for a wonderful time!
Perfect spot for my trip, close to everything! Thank you.
Walkable neighborhood with a lot to do. Easy access to public transportation
We really enjoyed staying here. I can't image staying anywhere else in Boston. Walkable and close to Universities and the T.

We loved this place! My family and I stayed here for our first time in Boston and we seriously loved everything. Everything was made so easy for us too and no problems AT ALLLLL. So clean and beautiful inside the home. The area around was very calm and beautiful as well. Will definitely recommend or stay here again if we ever visit Boston. Thanks for everything!
Maverick is very helpful
We had a wonderful 2 night stay . We felt very much at home and the location Was perfect for our needs . Thanks for having us. We will definately book again for future trips.
The house was new and clean, a comfortable place to stay.
I had an amazing stay at this historic house! It was incredibly beautifully decorated, and comfortable. I loved the blend of historical charm and modern amenities. Highly recommend!
Nice big space right next to the T. Beds were super comfy and the whole place was spotless. I’d happily stay here when I come back to Boston

Loved the way this place was decorated!  Lots of warm, inviting color, very comfortable bed.  Easy walk up to second floor.  Residential neighborhood, quiet, easy parking on street nearby.  Would stay again.

I have stayed at a lot of Airbnb’s all of the US and overseas. Kevin was the best host I’ve ever worked with. He is responsive and kind and helpful. The Boston Room is very clean and fresh, with lots of little extras and a comfy bed! I rated the location as 4 stars (and not 5) because of the construction going on next door, but that’s temporary and wasn’t a real issue. It is truly close to everything in Boston, with lots of great food really close by. I highly recommend!
The house was big and spacious but there is only street parking and that is very limited.   Suggest you Uber or get a taxi to this location.
excelente ubicación, muy cerca del metro y a muy poco tiempo del centro de boston
A lovely stay! Would come back!
Great space and conveniently located!

Location is great but that’s about it - cigarette smell, loud noises through the night, and the door lock is a real hassle. Additionally the pre check in business and extra deposit are a pain. But if you need to stay downtown for (relatively) cheap, it’s an option.

This place was very small, too hot, the streets were noisy, very old, uncomfortable bed, no space between the coffee table and couch, and the hosts were not accommodating. Sad too have paid that much to stay there.

One of my favorite Airbnb’s to date! AMAZING location, just as described and Laura and Olivia were so kind and readily available. If we ever make it back to Boston, definitely would plan to stay there again.

First time in Boston, and this place was prime. The location is phenomenal, and Von made me feel right at home. Super easy check-in, as if it were your own home. Von greeted me and we chatted - he later gave me great recommendations on things to do around the city based on our conversation. The location is the greatest draw here, close to everything and in a super safe-feeling neighborhood. 100% would recommend!
Very great spot. Thanh was a great host. Would recommend.
el baño compartido no me gustó realmente todo estaba excelente solo eso
Nice location between airport and center. Bedding is clean and comfortable. Hosts are very friendly.
Nice and clean place. Very convenient for Boston U activities. Parking in Alston is tricky, but we were prepared by hosts. Would stay again.

Welcoming on arrival. All the amenities that you need for a stay over in Boston. The accommodation is dated but everything is very clean and welcoming. Very much an old school Airbnb experience and a good nights sleep before our flight.

This is a beautiful apartment that is well cared for and had everything we needed.  Kelly and Chris went above and beyond most rentals and thought about all the little details to make our stay comfortable - including providing snacks, umbrellas and even Q-tips/tissue in the bathroom.  The unit is very walkable to the T, shopping, historical locations and restaurants.  We would definitely recommend for anyone traveling to Boston who would like to have a downtown experience.
Clean and cozy, perfect location for all the things we wanted to do.
Friendly, warm, affordable, clean place, very convenient to train line

Host was absolutely fantastic! We had a previous air bnb issue at a different location and needed to book something day of, and Curtis was great and had the place ready for us that evening. He was very responsive and very helpful throughout our stay, would certainly recommend!

Amazing apartment. One of the most thought after we stayed in at Airbnb.
Newly renovated. Amnesties are top notch and plentiful. Bedding & towels are highest quality and as many as one can use. Furniture is designer level (at a point was almost too much for a vacation rental, but that’s not a complain). Communication with Franklin was easy and we got all information on time.
One thing to note is the location is a bit away from center of city (about 25 min train ride + walk and same time driving a car with traffic). The neighborhood is not the best on city and no easy walking distance coffee places or restaurants.
But if you are looking for an amazing place within the city at reasonable prices, couldn’t recommend more.

Absolutely perfect location. The room was very clean and have everything you need and in a very safe part of town. Additionally, the host was very thoughtful and accommodating. I recommend her for your future vacation plans.

Muy buen anfitrión. Buen lugar para quedarse. Un poco caro, en si por la zona y los alrededores era lo más económico. Lo bueno que está a 2 cuadras del Tren “T”. Línea roja que te deja en el downtown en 20min. Recomiendo si vas a estar una semana o varios días como nosotros sacar el pase de semana con la tarjeta prepaga. Te vas a ahorrar mucho si eso en bikes y te vas a movilizar rápidamente por todas las líneas!
Great spot, highly recommended

We had a great stay at Katherine's! She was an incredibly responsive & helpful host. The place is very spacious with plenty of room for a big group (we slept 8 very comfortably.) Everything was as described & I can't stress how great it was to have parking as well. Thank you for everything!

Eda has a beautifully decorated condo, with extra touches like fresh flowers, snacks and a detailed information sheet on what to see and do in the neighbourhood and around Boston. The private bedroom was very comfortable with plenty of fresh towels available. Eda responded to all our questions within minutes. I would highly recommend a stay at Eda’s :)
Clean and friendly!!
nice place for short stay
excellent

Amazing & spacious apartment a minute away from the airport T stop! It was very easy to get to after a long flight and made our commute into the city very quick. The apartment is well furnished and has everything one might need whether staying for a longer period of time or just there for a couple of days on a business or leisure trip.

Very clean, fantastic location, quiet, but close to coffee shops, restaurants and shopping right across from a beautiful park.  The train is steps away and I never heard it.  The host was extremely responsive,  easily accommodating 'early drop off of luggage' and a late check-out.  Would definitely stay again!
Great location for weekend getaway or short stays.
Great communication between us and the hosts. They were very quick to address any questions
Lovely place to stay, really good value for so central in Boston.

This space, was so absolutely stunning and beautiful.  I felt immediately at home. Everything was ridiculously clean and I felt welcomed to make the space "my own." Susan and Boris responded quickly and thoughtfully and I felt truly cared for. Best Air BnB experience I've ever had.

Michael was a wonderful host. He was just a message away from any help. The place was perfect for a couple. Being close to the T was of huge help. Weekly cleaning service provided to us without any extra cost was great. Weekly goodies provided by Mechaal was really appreciative. He went out of his way to show us the neighbourhood in his car on our first day. He was extremely helpful in providing us with all the amenities that we required. Will highly recommend his place and would definitely come back

Location comoda a due passi da una fermata della green line in un quartiere tranquillo. L’appartamento è piccolo ma con tutto il necessario e Cassandra e Mike sono stati sempre molto gentili e disponibili nel rispondere alle mie domande. Dalla descrizione non avevo capito che si trovasse in un seminterrato quindi un po’ cupo e praticamente senza una finestra, ma mi ci sono abituata in fretta!
Good and Practical apartment at an unbeatable location!!
Excellent location in a nice neighborhood. Very clean and can walk to Fenway.
Enjoyable stay! In the heart of old Boston .
Our stay at Maverick's place was great. Everything was new and super clean. Beacon Hill is the perfect location for a short trip to Boston.

Enjoyed staying here with my husband and our 8 month old baby. Enough space to spread out and make some meals. Close to transit and walking distance to attractions (15-30 minute walks). Our flights were delayed and we had to stay another day and were able to easily extend our stay for a night for a decent price. A little loud with cars sometimes, but nothing crazy enough to keep us up. Felt safe in the neighborhood. Definitely recommend staying here!
Great stay, would recommend to anyone.
We loved the apartment , great location and the host was great to deal with.

Amazing location in the heart of Boston’s North End, steps from Little Italy and North Point Church. The garden-level unit is tucked away on a quiet side alley and generally matches the photos, with cozy lighting, a comfortable bed, and a usable kitchen. Walkability is excellent.
Entry was tricky due to an overstuffed lockbox, and the main unit door was broken and off its hinges—I had to lift it into place each time to close it securely. The bathroom was the biggest drawback: poor ventilation, moldy toilet paper, a barely-hanging shower curtain, and a shower that fluctuated between scalding hot or ice cold with little usable pressure. Bathroom walls near the toilet showed visible staining. Amenities were very minimal, and there is no laundry.
Overall, the location and historic charm are great, but maintenance and cleanliness issues leave clear room for improvement.
Elena was great very helpful! The place was perfect especially the kitchen! Everything we were looking for!

The place was exactly as described! Clean, well outfitted and great location. The beds were comfortable! Our AC was broken the first night and they were super responsive and sent a technician out first thing the following morning.

Polly is an amazing host, i loved my stay here. The living area was nice, everything was very clean and she provides everything you need.
There are always great cookies around and the fridge is stocked with yogurts, eggs, juices and much more. She also makes great breakfast muffins in the morning. It is 15 minutes walkfrom the T which would take you downtown in an additional 20 minutes, and usually there are close uber drivers in the area, its a quite and lovely neighborhood. I recommend staying at Polly's house whenever you're in Boston.

Great experience! Robert is very welcoming, helpful and friendly, and so we felt at home during our stay. As for his house, it is both beautiful and neat, as shown in the pictures. I would recommand it to anyone who's planning a trip to Boston.

Overall great place to stay. It is close to Fenway park, the metro, Trader Joe’s, and the prudential center.
It is close to very good restaurants such as Lolita’s BackBay (quesadillas are awesome- make sure to make a reservation).
Gave it a four star because the mini split was leaking for a couple days which we informed the hosts about (this is something out of their control- things happen with wear and tear) but it was annoying because we kept hearing the drips and had to dodge water every time we wanted to use the kitchen, bathroom, front door. But they were responsive and stated they informed maintenance.
The hosts are super responsive and what is great is that they have a parking spot for an affordable price that is a 3 minute walk to the Airbnb ( if you are driving your car - this spot is recommended as you will not find parking on the streets and you will pay more for a parking garage).
Great location.
Excellent place! So clean and comfortable. Feels like home. Liesl is a great host with good communication.
What a fantastic host and place! Thank you so much! Highly recommended!
Ken’s place was perfect for our quick trip to the city.  There was a new mattress that was very comfortable.  We asked for a fan and he dropped it off for us.  We would definitely stay again!
Great space! Great hosts!
The picture is not 100% accurate. Could be updated. Conveniently located. Check in/out easy.

Robin was a great host! She was incredibly kind and helpful throughout the entirety of our stay. The house is a wonderful quiet location with super easy access to the T! I would absolutely come back and stay here whenever I’m in Boston.
Très bien

Great location and a great spot - very nicely appointed and efficient and quite architecturally updated to a high standard.
My only problem was being my age 77 and hauling my luggage up 3 flights of stairs - there is no one to help.
I’ll definitely stay again if I can be on 1st floor ❤️

The apartment was convenient, spacious, and comfortable.  Unfortunately, there was construction going on in the lower level, and some construction noise outside throughout the night. Otherwise, a great location that is close to a lot of great landmarks and restaurants.

I had rented a place in the north end and it was canceled a few months before my trip.  How fortunate for me because I came upon this incredible rental.  The location cannot be beat.  It’s steps from the T (Orange), a CVS is nearby, and Mike and Patty’s is on the corner.  Wonderful breakfast sandwiches and strong coffee- I highly recommend placing an online order and picking up breakfast there.  The neighborhood is safe, quiet, and charming. It’s an easy  walk to the Public Gardens, Boston Common, and the theatre district.  I felt safe walking alone.  The rental itself is large, comfortable, and offers an outdoor space and parking space (unheard of at this price). The owner responded to me within minutes with any questions that I had.  There was plenty of paper products- another nicety as many rentals are sparse.  A good bottle of wine was a nice touch and enjoyed after a long day of sightseeing.  Check in was simple and the rental was more than I expected. A five star property!
It was an Ok place.

This AirBNB is extremely convenient and in a safe neighborhood. We had no problems with the location and the hosts were clear and responsive. However, it should be noted that this is an old building and everyday after we came back from an outing there was a noticeable wet smell emanating from the bathroom, even after leaving the bathroom vent on all day. Luckily we are able to ventilate the air with the air conditioner. Other considerations - small space, some bathroom tiles were falling off, and the shower itself is in a weird shape.
Not sure if it was worth the price but we appreciate its location and the hosts' clear instructions for check-in and check-out.
Very convenient and nice place to stay.
Loved the place, was very clean, peaceful and spacious. Would love to stay here the next time as well.

My husband and I stayed here while we were in town for a wedding and it was the perfect place to cozy up! The location is fabulous, tons of cute places to eat and shop within walking distance. Stone was very helpful and communicative. If you are looking to spend a fun weekend in the heart of South End, look no further!

My son and I really enjoyed our stay at the apartment. We enjoy walking around so the location was perfect. The sofa bed in front of the TV was perfect after a full day of walking around downtown Boston, it was nice to come back to the apartment and rest and recover in front of the TV before heading out again 😂

Great location and easy to get into the city of Boston by bus.
A beautiful area to visit and nice place to stay.
Great place and location. Parking was available through the spot hero app but was a little far. Overall was a great place with tons of amenities.

The place was clean and very modern. Easily accessible, great off-street parking, easy Check-in.
The water battles and snacks were a nice touch as well. The beds were very comfortable and it was nice to be able to control the temperature in each bedroom. Plenty of chargers dor electronics as well.
An overall good place to stay in the city.

First off, Janet was an awesome host! She was friendly and communicated well from the time we booked until we left. Her place is pretty, organized and roomy for 4 people. She left snacks for us when we arrived and communicated with us throughout out stay to see if there was anything else should could do to make our time their more enjoyable. The neighborhood itself can get a little noisy at night, but not enough that it should keep you from staying there. The location is a short drive from touristy locations. Would recommend!

The room was exactly what my friend and I needed for a one night stay in Boston: somewhere safe, clean, and comfortable to crash after a concert. Lindsay was a very accommodating and responsive host and we definitely recommend her place to other travelers.
Super location.  We had such a good time and all worked out perfectly

Awesome room at an unbeatable price! The only downfall was that we weren’t able to figure out the heat in the room. Regardless of what we did, at night it would get super hot. The a/c unit was still in so we turned on the fan and all was well. The description is very accurate. The free parking was so simple and SO worth the easy commute downtown. Riding the T was easy and safe. I had a conference at the Hynes Convention Center and it took about 20 minutes to get door-to-door. Super cost effective and super adorable. We would definitely stay again!

Ricardo's Airbnb was peaceful and private, complete with a living area and kitchenette. Just a note that if you're particular about your bedding, the mattress and pillow are quite firm. Everything was as described and Ricardo was a friendly and responsive host.

The hosts were really responsive and friendly, going out of their way to support our check in to meet our toddlers needs. The location was great and the beds were super comfy. However, there were a few issues with the apartment that were very frustrating; an unsafe lamp without a plug socket attached, a broken chair that collapsed when sat on, very dusty blinds, faulty washing machine and none of the extras listed including oil, salt etc and no washing up liquid or sponges to do basic cleaning with with. I trust that these guys can easily fix these issues as they seem like good people, and these issues are important and make such a huge difference to a persons stay, especially if they are travelling with children, or using the property then visiting children in hospital. I'd take my own toiletries as well.

This is a great place to stay in Boston! The apartment is cozy and in a great location. You are walking distance to Fenway park and a T stop, making it easy to get anywhere you’d like within a short walk or subway ride. The hosts are helpful and very responsive. I’d recommend this spot for any Boston visit!

Brooke’s place is great. Was in town for a conference at the convention center. So, it’s rather close and convenient. The neighborhood is a nice walking neighborhood, as well, with plenty of cafes and bars nearby. I’d stay here again!

Great value, best host ever! This place is magnificently clean all the time. Even the blanket, pillows, and towels are high quality. Lixia was helpful in many different ways, I felt safe and had plenty of room and plenty of storage.
Great place with a cute fireplace. Spacious, clean and comfortable. Would definitely visit again.

Great place to stay in Boston!  The room was so charming!  It was very clean with great amenities and the walk was only a couple minutes to the subway, which was a really convenient way to get downtown and much cheaper than an Uber. I’d definitely stay here again in the future.

If youre looking to stay in Boston this place is great. Especially if you’re taking your own car, as street parking is accessible. Less quiet than being in the center of the busy city but only a short walk to the orange line T train. Stayed here over 2 months and the place had everything you will need to feel like home. Pantry was well stocked with basic cooking needs as well as plenty of kitchenware. The place was very comfy for 1-2 people. Highly recommend staying here! Would definitely stay again :)
Great host, nice room

Apt was perfect size for what I needed for a long weekend! I completely enjoyed the stay. Beds were comfy, and linens clean. Kitchen was a great size and had basic amenities.
Frank was great at communication with me and I really appreciated that.
Very nice place to stay
Really enjoyed our stay. Couldn’t ask gor better location.
all of the hosts were so nice and so accommodating. the area is very walkable as well! highly recommend. : )

Hermina's comfortable house is just a few minutes walk from the "T" Red Line that takes less than 20 minutes to city center and only a bit longer to the attractions in Cambridge without train changing trains.
房间很好也很舒适
Great place
Perfect location and easy access to everything.  Very walkable.  The apartment was super clean and easy to locate.  I would totally stay here again.

Shawn's apartment is a bargain for what you are paying for. The relative closeness to downtown and major attractions like Fenway make it well worth the cost. No way you will find a hotel with similar accommodations nor the space at this price point. Great parking available and all necessities well within walking distance in a decent neighborhood. Good choice for any small family trip into Boston!

Great host - great apartment - great location and a quick walk from the Warren Tavern where Paul Revere had a pint at the bar.  It was exactly as described, the owners were very responsive, super clean - I recommend without hesitation.

While some people have complained about noise, we did not notice anything extreme. There was normal city noises (sirens, cars honking) but we were definitely able to fall asleep and didn’t wake up throughout the night. Over all, the place is great, and close to nearly everything! Would absolutely re-book!
Great little place to stay while in town for a concert, would recommend!

Kaitlin was very helpful before and during our stay. She provided a favorite things document that was helpful with good recommendations.
The location was very good for our activities, train station was a few blocks away. The bed was comfortable and there was a couch that was a good place to relax after a busy day.
great stay with great location. fantastic communication  with the host. walls are a bit thin.
Great location and the view from the rooftop of the city was amazing! Couldn’t have picked a better place to stay :)

Francisco's place is located conveniently near the subway station to downtown. It's very clean and modern. Francisco is very responsive to any question and gave good suggestions for restaurants near by. I would stay there again if I came to Boston.
Very clean. Close to train. The couch was very comfortable. Lots of interesting restaurants close by.
Lihua was so kind and helpful. The parking price was pretty crazy but convenient
Fantastic building and great views, good value vs a hotel. Furnishings could be nicer but everything you need is there.
Great Airbnb. Great Communication with the host. Easy Check In/out. Easy and reliable transportation near by. Stores and food restaurants within 2 minutes. Great Place To Stay In Boston.

Michal and Dutch’s place was fantastic! It’s only 5 minutes from the airport and about a 10 minute walk from the train station, as well as places to eat and a market. The inside was great, and so clean and modern. The rooftop was AMAZING! Michal was so communicative and made sure we were comfortable and felt welcome to the city. I can’t recommend this place enough!
The place was well maintained and looked exactly like the pictures. The hosts were also great and very responsive.

We had a great stay. The apartment is bright, peaceful, convenient and LARGE! Even more than it seemed in the pictures. The manager was very responsive and we really appreciated the tea and coffee that was laid out for us.
Great apartment in a great location
Great place! Walkable to basically any major location in Boston you’d want to visit - Chinatown, prudential center/newbury street as well as seaport (20-30ish mins walk).

Melissa made me feel right at home in a very relaxed way. She was friendly, helpful, full of information and tips without being intrusive.  I was  out and about a fair amount, and yet, both Melissa and Acacia made me feel welcome at every turn.  I would stay here again in an instant!

Location, location, LOCATION! It just can’t be beat for the price and proximity to nearly everything.
We had a fabulous stay. It’s comfortable very clean, and the hosts have added many thoughtful touches. What a memorable trip to Boston!

Adriana and Gianni’s place is very clean, comfortable and in a convenient location, around 5 mins walk from the T
I had good communication from the hosts, and it was especially great to be greeted on arrival and shown into the house. Thank you Gianni!

Reina was a great host - very kind and helpful. Everything was as on the listing, the place was nice, tidy and clean. Location is also convenient - groceries shop within two minutes’ walk, right next to a bus stop that can take you to Harvard Square or Southwest of Boston. Harvard Square is also within a walkable distance (about 15 mins). It was a great stay and I would only recommend!

We loved the location. We enjoy slow mornings and places close to eat for coffee in the morning and dinner or drinks in the evening and this was the perfect spot for that. Removed just slightly from the city we loved the location!
I had an interesting and joyful holiday
It was an old hotel with a pretty old and uncomfortable mattress, but the location more than made up for it. The staff was great as well

Esther is an absolutely amazing host! the home is equipped with all basic neccessities, and well kept. Esther responded promptly to all my questions and her home is so cozy with much charm. I felt right at home and in a nice neighborhood! Thank You
Great location especially if you’re there for a Harvard event. Right next to Trader Joe’s and Starbucks. Place was clean and comfortable.
The hosts were very responsive and we didn’t have any inconvenience. It was worth staying for a month. Will definitely think about this place if I ever comeback here
It's a good and sweet small house. The decoration is very thoughtful. I enjoy the days in Boston. The surroundings are convenient and lots of things to do.

Our group of 3 had a nice stay. The beds are comfortable and the unit was clean. The location is awesome if noisy - we purchased some earplugs and slept fine. I would recommend other guests do the same.
Jay is a very responsive and accommodating host, we were impressed with his quick responses and he helped us navigate a couple of hiccups with check-in (which were not his fault).
Very nice room. Just like a hotel room.

I would totally recommend this listing!
Great space!
I had a very clean and relaxing room for two nights while working in the city.
Thank you for your hospitality!

This is my first time to come to US. Jonathan is a nice host. When I met a foreigner, I felt nervous. Sometimes I just hid in my dormitory to avoid talking with a foreigner.With the warmth, friendship, hospitality and help that I have received from here my transition into the Chinese way of life has been as smooth as I could have wished.
Had a great visit. Place clean and had everything g available

Great place to stay right by BU campus. Clean, easy check in and mostly as expected (couch is very tiny!). The furniture and amenities are minimalist, but comfortable.. It was just what I needed to move my kiddo into her first year at BU. Thank you, Jessy and Diego.
Lovely place. Lihua was a great host. Thanks again!
Alicia's place was perfect for my business trip.
great spot. terrible bed.

The place was clean and looked just like the pictures. AC worked well because we slept with the windows closed since there is some city noise but nothing unexpected or too loud. Bed was comfy. Shower worked well and had llamas on it which made me smile.
