All good, toilet was broken but they fixed it quickly.
Great option.
We came to see back to back games at Fenway and it was a quick walk over to Fenway!

This is our second long-term stay at this Beacon Hill Airbnb - both two-weeks long. I cannot say enough about how great the location is. It’s only a few blocks from Newbury Street in on direction and a couple of blocks to Harvard bridge in the other direction. We went on walks by the Charles and ate at the fabulous local restaurants. There are a lot of choices in Boston but, as they say - location, location, location! Checking in and out is easy and the apartment is stocked with all the essentials. Would highly recommend!
nice apartment close to the orange line
We had a great stay!

Adam was very helpful and responsive. The place was just like the pictures. I was visiting boston on a business trip and found this place perfect. Adam was kind enough to have some snack, water and coffee for our first day. I also asked for an air mattress which were ready for us upon arrival. Overall a very enjoyable stay would recommend!
The only thing was that i was informed that the place was on the 4th floor, but it was actually on the 2nd floor. We were sorry to have disturbed the neighbors upstairs by trying to open their doors with our keys, but they were very kind in understanding. One last tip, dont leave your luggage unattended infront of the doorsteps. (Which is very obvious but still). We left our luggage infront of the main entrance, and while we went upstairs to bring down our other stuff (which took like 2 minutes), our suitcases were gone. We caught a random man living just around the corner right as he was taking our luggage inside his house, and found them back. This is solely our fault but be careful though! :)
Aurelia’s place was perfect, exactly what I was looking for. Aurelia was a great host; I’d definitely recommend staying here!

Nice neighborhood - small unit with minimal spaces - comfortable mattress - tidy but had all that was needed -
Friendly hosts with very good communication
We loved it here.  We stayed in 5 Airbnb's during our trip and this was the best one.  Clean, comfortable, everything you would need.  Quiet, peaceful.  100% the best for us.

Natalie has a great place! it was conveniently located close to the metro and easy trip to mid town  Boston and Boston College. Harvard is only a bus ride away as well. Great location with great amenities. thank you, Natalie, for a pleasant stay!

Frank and Delilah are great hosts! We felt safe in the neighborhood and were in walking distance to public transportation. We reached out before our trip about information for the area and they graciously answered all of our questions.
The first night the AC went out, of course during a Boston heatwave. They answered as soon as we messaged. They couldn’t get a tech to service the equipment during our stay but they went right into action & provided portable units.
We had a great stay and appreciate their responsiveness!!
10/10  AWESOME STAY!
Enjoyed a great stay. Thank you.

Lovely and charming place! I felt very comfortable and right at home. Easy to check in & cozy furniture. Clean and it was accurate to the photos shared. Really appreciated the responsiveness of the hosts!
A great place to stay in the north end, very convenient to restaurants and historic sites.

The place is just as described.  Great location, restaurants on the same block, the green and orange T lines are really close by.  The roof top is great, got to see the New Years Eve fire works from the roof top.  Great views of the city.  We are originally from the Boston area and this was a unique experience.  The host is very responsive and went out of her way to accommodate our requests.

This Airbnb is located in a cute little neighborhood that’s easily accessible from nearly all points of the city. It’s small, but cozy! I definitely enjoyed my stay and would highly recommend. Jonathan is a great, responsive host!

Andrea’s place is great! It’s easy to get to the T and also an easy walk to the downtown JP area. Everything is as advertised and Andrea is quick to respond. I really appreciated that she allowed me to check in early, which made exploring Boston much easier on my first day. Will definitely be recommending this place to friends!

The kind of place you know you will go back to. Super nice host. Very helpful. Really comfortable beds. Cute and functional apartment in nice neighborhood. 5 minute walk to train.  Back porch a nice place for coffee in morning. Even saw a wild turkey back there. Toiletries to choose from. Spices and oils for cooking. Elena thought of everything.
Central location, walkable area. Home was clean and comfortable. Easy check in and very good communication from Aaron.
Lihua’s place is beautiful and she makes you feel right at home. Such a stunning brownstone in an idyllic area, and the room was just as described. Would love to stay again sometime.
I really enjoyed my stay. Lihua was charming and her place was lovely. I will be sure to stay here again next time I'm in Boston.
Todo perfecto, muy buena comunicación y Alex muy amable. Muy recomendable
This is the best place in town

Riyo was great to work with, fast responses and clear instructions.  Her place is the perfect location if you are wanting to stay in JP.  Riyo’s place was clean and extremely well stocked, would definitely stay again.

The place was great and exactly as advertised. Really clean , private studio with all the amenities you need for a short or long stay. She had some great snacks and breakfast bars stocked that was more than enough for the duration of our stay (2 days).  One thing that I was not expecting was a TV with full cable lineup with DVR facility and while this may not be important for most, it helped me not miss my college football game  that weekend because I could record it 🙂. The train station was only a 5 min walk from the place with direct trains to Downtown Boston so that was great too. Overall a great weekend stay and had everything you could ask for to make it a great value deal. She was great with communication too and responded immediately to all questions and concerns.
We slept here upon arriving in Boston at 1am and checked out by 9am the next morning. Everything was sufficient for our needs.

The main problem was the lack of necessary items in the kitchen. There was no fry pan, kettle, or knifes that were remotely sharp. Very hard to make anything.  If these simple things were added, it would have contributed to a much better stay. If you are planning on eating out all the time this place would be ideal for you.

The accommodations were great. Very clean and as pictured. Directions were easy to follow & communication was excellent. Overnight parking was a challenge & used Spot Hero to help locate a garage a few blocks away. Lots of construction in lower levels of building which felt odd to be walking through saw dust & workers but once inside it was nice. Location was not the best area after dark but all in all it was a good stay!

I liked the studio apartment set-up! It was perfect for a short weekend stay. It had all the required kitchen items to cook simple meals and coffee. The bathroom was clean and the beds/linens were clean too. The location is excellent. It's a 15 min drive from downtown so we were in a peaceful neighborhood free from the hustle of the city, but accessible to the airport and to all amenities in Cambridge. I can recommend this place for a short stay at Boston!
very clean and organized

Cute apartment, 1 bedroom downstairs (the bed with bunks room) and a bathroom, with 2 more bedrooms (one with a single bed and one with 2 in the main room and a third bed in the closet) with a bathroom upstairs.  The cleaning ladies were still there upon arrival, wrapped up about 10 minutes after check-in time so we waited in the front entry area until they were done. We were within walking distance to so much.  Short Uber ride too, but the fares in Boston on Uber are ridiculous and everywhere we wanted to be was within 2-2.5 miles so we walked a lot instead and enjoyed the nice summer weather. Just a head's up, if you do take an Uber it was about 10-15 minute wait every time so plan accordingly.  Also, at this time 95% of them were still super strict on masks, and they were also very firm on the number of passengers in their vehicles. The neighborhood is just ok. Plenty of parking on the street outside the apartment, and there were plenty of places to sleep! 7 beds and 4 cots. Not a lot of place to unpack clothes, but we were a group of 9 girls and just lived out of our suitcases for the weekend with no challenge. The beds weren't very comfortable, but the bedding was super cozy!  Tons of extra blankets and plenty of towels.  Also the sound from downstairs cut off very well when upstairs with the door closed, which worked out for the people that slept in a little more than others. Fully equipped kitchen, we brought paper plates and plastic forks etc to cut down on the dishes, but the dishes and pots and pans were a nicer quality.  Also, for 9 girls and two bathrooms, there was still plenty of space to get ready (LOL) and we showered at scattered times during the day so we had plenty of room.

Beautiful place, super clean and comfortable and spacious. Alicia was really easy to communicate with and we had no problems at all. Most importantly, what an amazing location!! We would definitely stay there again.
Very easy to get in touch with agency and they worked very hard to help fix issues that we had with location. Newbury location is ideally located.

This is a great place to stay in the Boston area. It’s the third floor of a house on a quiet street.  Very comfortable bed. Air conditioning was nice! Full kitchen and great shower. The host was especially friendly and accommodating — good communication about our arrival and how to find the place. We hope to stay there again on a future visit!

The unit is very spacious but is not easy to climb the narrow stairs to get there. The furniture is tired but the beds are comfortable and the window units work which is critical during the warmer months
Absolutely terrific place, and very helpful hosts. I will return next time I'm in town.
This apartment is in the best location on an amazing historical street! Was cozy and made us feel we were part of the city, not just visitors.  Would definitely stay again!
The room was lovely and comfortable! We enjoyed our stay

Katarzyna’s place is the perfect place to stay in Boston. The neighborhood is so cute and a walk away from the beach. The place has everything you could possibly need and the back yard is so cute to dine al fresco for a nice morning breakfast. The parking spot was also the biggest plus because we were traveling from NJ and it was so nice to have our car right there knowing it was safe and easy access if we needed it during the trip. The house is super updated and just perfect. No complaints.
Great spot located close to the airport! Very clean and has everything you need!
It was great!

Great location! There’s a nightclub next door so you can hear the music — I didn’t have issues sleeping, but you can feel the bass through the walls. Overall the place was perfect for a weekend trip with friends.
The suites are perfect. The hosts had everything you needed, plus complimentary breakfast. We would definitely stay there again.
Wonderful, thoughtful and accommodating. Bill and Maureen are lovely and the Paul revere suite was perfect!
Great location
Katarzyna's place is exactly as described; I thoroughly enjoyed my visit. Clean and beautiful house in a great location, and outdoor space is a nice bonus. I definitely recommend it.
Carlin’s home was beautiful. It was the perfect place for our family’s weekend getaway. Ryan always checked up on us & was very accommodating. I would definitely book again

Extremely walkable location, lots to see and do within a couple mile radius. Easy to get to via public transit or walking. Place was smaller than expected but very cosy and it suited our needs. Be aware you are on ground level facing the street so some traffic noise will come through. The bed was extremely comfortable and the linens were very clean. Owner was very responsive and accommodating with our check-in and check-out times and when we reached out with any questions or requests they answered within hours.

5 stars!! This place was great, SO close to the T which makes it easy to get anywhere in Boston. It's a cozy little ground level apartment with plenty of charm. If we ever come back to Boston we'll be looking here first!
I recommend staying at this apartment. Fast responses when I had questions and the place felt like home. I’ll be staying here again on my next business trip.
Great value stay. Convenient access to T. Endang is a very responsive host!

I enjoyed my stay here. Ehab gave us clear instructions, was very responsive and helpful. Kitchen has everything described. Room is clean. As an Asian i can use the bathroom well as it has bidet. Not much bathroom provided that.
After all i enjoy my stay here

Josh made my first trip to Boston very comfortable. He provided reassurance on street parking, and gave us a flexible check in time. This was the perfect location for a concert at Leader bank Pavilion and ubering and walking around the area was very easy. The room was very clean and even had my name written on it. This was the perfect place for a weekend trip to Boston!
Perfect spot! Nice appartment!
The location for this apartment is fantastic!  Just a block away from Boston Common, which was so nice.  The place worked well for what we needed.
We enjoyed our stay. It’s a comfortable apartment in a great location.
Great home base for a weekend exploring Boston! Zero trouble with parking and loved that it was free. Easy walk to Fenway Park and the T station was very convenient.

I really enjoyed my stay and was very impressed with the neighborhood and the great little downtown with shops and bakeries. I felt very safe walking around the area at night. There is a cool little park with a pond down the street that is perfect for an afternoon walk. Susie was a great host.

Fabulous stay - the north end is lovely and this apartment has the best of both worlds - easy walk to restaurants, bakeries, bars and shops yet on a quiet street with bedrooms in the back (super quiet) and an important feature if you are staying in the north end. Absolutely loved Jason’s place and he was a wonderful host - quick to communicate and flexible with check in. Thank you Jason!
See my comments above.

Honestly it’s a nice little studio for one or two guests. Small kitchen and bathroom but nice side common area and bed. Great location if your looking to stay in the nicer part of Boston. But honestly  loud stairwell / common area. You can hear your neighbors and street activity outside window pretty clearly.  Overall good stay.

Great stay, easy to find. Everything we needed for our family of 5! Kitchen had basic appliances and dishes! Able to walk to the T, but may be too far for younger children! No problem for us! Thanks for hosting us!

Wow! What an apartment! We took a last minute trip to Lubec, Maine, Canada, and Boston. Boston was our last stop and Richard's place couldn't have been more perfect. It was the perfect size, sparkling clean, super comfortable, in one of the best locations in Boston, and very accessible to the Freedom Trail, subway, the airport, and more. Richard was great to work with and gave the quickest responses. We are already hoping to visit again and stay here! Don't miss out on this place if it's available!

We loved our stay at Bill and Maureen’s place. While we spent two of our three days in the city, South Boston gave us a great feel for neighborhood life in the area and we enjoyed a lot of walking…to nearby beaches and the harbor, restaurants and streets/neighborhoods beyond.
Bill met us at check in, helped us up to our room and spent time sharing tips for MTBA transportation, exploring Boston and places to eat. They also had a really cute butlers pantry with a few snacks and drinks. Thanks so much for great hospitality during our visit!

Second time staying at Michael’s. It’s a perfect location for Boston. The layout and furnishings make you feel at home when you walk through the door. The kitchen is well equipped.
Michael was very responsive and checked in a few times to make sure everything was good.

The only good thing about the Maverick on Columbus St. is the location. Otherwise, we had a TERRIBLE EXPERIENCE! The rug was dirty and the pillows were in bad shape and not clean. The windows are bolted shut so we spent a week without having fresh air in the room. The Maverick team was unresponsive when I emailed them about the windows and lied about responding to me when they had not (I have proof). The tenants atop our room were so noisy and inconsiderate, banging on the ceiling at 2 am. There was nothing we could do and no one we could contact at that time. I regret not staying in a hotel this time.
great
Needed a place really last minute that was decently located and well priced. Jonathan’s place was comfortable and had everything I needed for my short trip.
Perfect Location, friendly host and cosy apartment!
Excellent place to stay. They have everything you need! It's in a perfect location as well! We would absolutely stay here again if we visit Boston in the future.
Great stay

If you're looking at this review, quick, BOOK NOW! Before it's too late!! Michelle and her husband were absolutely fantastic, and the house, amenities, location, price, etc. are more than anything you could want from a Air BnB. Just do it. You can thank me later. ;-)
If you need a place to stay and don't mind sharing living space you can't go wrong here. This place is exceptionally clean.
Excellent! Highly recommended!

I stayed at Copley House with a few of my friends, and it was a great choice! CH is a short walk from the Prudential and several grocery stores. The Boston Common is not far either. The place itself was quite nice—cozy, clean, and well-decorated. The staff even helped us carry our luggage to the rooms. I’d definitely recommend staying here!

Lovely Studio apartment on a charming street. Easy to get to the downtown area, and super close to one of the Ducks pickup spots, which is next to a grocery store and Starbucks.  i would recommend this spot to anyone,  only wish we could have stayed longer.
Very clean and nice room

Place was easy and clean and in a good location. Parking can be a little tricky and my only complaint was that it was very hot inside the house. The temperature being in the 90s during my stay definitely contributed to that but nonetheless.
This is a great little place and I felt very welcome
1.	The host was warm and easy to communicate with. The place was clean and tidy, and they even prepared coffee the next morning.
Great condo In southie! Will hopefully visit again sometime soon ☘️

We really enjoyed our stay at Susan’s place. It is very clean and she made sure it had the right amenities. Susan went above and beyond to make sure our stay was special. The location is in a busy section of the city but it is very convenient to transportation and a lot of attractions.
Clean, comfortable townhome in a great location to downtown and the airport.

I enjoyed my stay, and would highly recommend Blanca's listing to any future guests! The bedroom and shared spaces were clean and well-kept. The location was convenient and within easy walking distance of public transportation. Blanca was friendly and very communicative. When I return to Boston, I would happily stay here again!
Great stay. Convenient and comfortable place for our trip to Boston.
Julie was easy to work with.  Her place is peaceful, cute and clean.  Well located in Jamaica Plain.
Huge space for Boston. The apartment was clean and beds were comfortable. Kitchen was great for cooking.

For a private room in a shared space this apartment was fantastic and Andrew is an extremely friendly and welcoming host to share that space with.
The balcony was beautiful and a lovely place to sit quietly in the sunshine! An amazing location and so easy to get into town on the T (local subway) from saint marys.
Private bathroom with good amenities and a hairdryer! Very clean.

This is a great place to stay in Boston. The apartment is spacious, very clean & well-equipped. It is in a safe, quiet area of South End, with Mike’s diner just round the corner for breakfast. You can walk in to downtown in 20 minutes or get the Silver line bus. We went to a ball game & Fenway Park is a 30 minute walk away. Liesl was a great host, she provided lots of really useful information about the neighbourhood & always responded very quickly to messages. I would definitely recommend this apartment.
building and apartment was very clean and comfortable. I would rent again when visiting  Boston.

Considering its wonderful location, and Lori's proactive hospitality, I'd say it's well worth the price.
My flight got canceled, so I was delayed a day. AirBnB didn't cover me, but Lori offered to give me an extra day to make up for it, which was extremely kind.
It's clear she loves her home very much, which made we want to care for it too. Her instructions are more than reasonable to take care of such a wonderful space.
My only inconvenience was that it was next to the wrong train for my commute--entirely my fault! I'm still learning Boston. But I was still able to reach Needham via the trains anyway.
The neighborhood itself is eclectic and friendly. The neighbors are quite lively at night! Noise doesn't bother me at all, so it's fine for me. Just something to note.
I'll be happy to return to Lori's place in the future, if the Orange Line is my preferred mode of transport, or if work will pay for my Lyfts! haha

Excellent location close to rail. A truly beautiful home and a very gracious and accomodating host. I would certainly stay here again and will recommend it to anybody who is travelling through Boston. Pity I could stay longer!
Camera ordinata in zona tranquilla. Soggiorno positivo.

Such a great experience! Kit and Scott are great people with a great home. Our only regret is that we didn't get to take advantage of eating breakfast with them :(
10/10 would recommend :)

Brian and Heather, Thanks for a great stay. Your location was perfect, the flat was clean and beds comfortable—entry was convenient and we appreciate your quick response to all our questions! Thank you.
I really enjoyed my stay at Riyo's place! It is located in a great area with easy access to the T. I felt very safe in the neighborhood. Riyo has thought of everything a traveler might need.
Great location.  Friendly, responsive hosts.

First off, our stay here was outstanding. If you have a car, the location is unbeatable as it's a few minutes drive from several supermarkets and points of interest, and a few minutes more from downtown and some beaches. We stayed there with kids and the amenities are excellent to have a comfortable time with the whole family.  Lance's and the team's responses were always quick, polite and helpful at all times. If we ever needed to visit Boston again, we would definitely consider staying here again.
We loved our stay! Plenty of space, neat notes written all around the house providing unique insights to the area. Clean, comfortable, and walkable. No complaints!
It was lovely and clean, close to the airport and the park! My family and I had a really great stay.
I had a pleasant experience staying at Jonathan's home. He was very helpful and responsive throughout my stay, giving detailed replies to every question. Overall, I highly recommend this place!
Very cozy place and it was perfect for our stay! Albert was very communicative and clear with check in and check out and the place was so lovely!
The location and size was perfect for a couple’s get away. We walked to most everything but the subway was also very close. Would recommend staying here if visiting Boston to see the sights.

I booked Jonathan's room as a day-room to rest between an early red-eye and a meeting I had later in the day. The house was in a quiet residential neighborhood and all the other guests were very considerate and quiet too. I had the perfect rest. The place was very clean and tidy and matched the description well. Jonathan provides excellent  information for check-in and is otherwise easy to reach. I never meet him in person but he was so flexible and kind to welcome me as early as 5am.
Everything is OK. Elena supported us everything
房屋设施很新，房源和描述一致，房东反馈及时。不足之处是卫生打扫的不够彻底干净，地板上有灰尘。

My parents and I spent three nights at Eva's place, and we just loved it. It was stocked with all the amenities we needed and was in great condition - clean, tidy, and spacious. We definitely would not hesitate to consider her place next time we visit Boston!

Perfect place to stay! I recommend 100 percent. And it is actually a little apartment with your own room, kitchen and bathroom with a private entrance. We had a last minute issue with the lights and they accommodated us right away. I will continue staying here if available every-time I go to Boston
Great space, incredibly clean and easy to get into. Rich was responsive and provided all info in a timely manner. The space was as advertised and had everything we needed.
Antoinette and Louis are kind, and welcoming hosts.  Their home is lovely and the third-floor room is quiet, bright, clean and spacious.  This is a great airbnb!
I loved my stay here, I’m definitely staying here next time I’m in Boston.
Great stay. The place is clean and organized, and Irida is a great host.

숙소에서 편안하게 잘 지내다 갑니다! 동네가 엄청 조용함 모든 사람들이 거의 차를 타고 다님 밤에 돌아다니면 좀 무섭 근데 뭐 딱히 거리가 위험하거나 더럽지 않아사 ㄱㅊ음 근처에 무료 버스 다녀서 교통비 절감쌉가능 메인스트릿이랑 거리가 함2-30분 되는데 무료버스도 있고 보스턴 교통이 ㄱㅊ음 깨끗하고 시설이 잘되어있듬
위치상 가격대비 조흠 주인장분이 소통도 잘해주시고 그래서 아주 편하게 지냄 친절쓰 하심
구비해둔 용품 생각나는것만 적으면 샤워용품(샴푸.린스.바디워시)칫솔 치약 의료용밴드 면봉 가글 일딴 요렇게만 기억나서 적음 좀 더 있었던거 가틈
침대 푹신해서 잠 잘옴 1층이여서 가끔 길거리 차에서 노래 트는 소리가 잘 들리긴 하는데 신경거슬릴 정도는 아닌듯? 여자 혼자서는 밤 길거리 좀 무서울수도 그치만 난 머 쌉테토라 신경 안쓴다 하면 굿

Great little apartment right in the heart of Allston! Walking distance to basically all the charm that Allston has to offer.
Jessy and Diego's apartment is perfect if you need a well kept room with a kitchen AND a parking space in the area. Everything was super clean and the communication from Jessy and Diego was A+. Very easy process to check in and check out and literally everything is explained extremely clearly with notes and maps.
Would definitely recommend this to anyone looking to stay in the Allston/Brighton area!
NOTE: A brand new (as of 2022) concert venue named Roadrunner is right down the street from this apartment, so if you're going to Boston for a show there this is a great spot!

Nina is the best host that I have ever met on Airbnb! She was very friendly and helpful with local recommendations. I had a missing package and Nina went above and beyond to help me locate it, it was not her fault at all and I really appreciate it. The accomodation is very clean, and everything is just perfect. Location wise, it is also very close to Logan airport. The only downside is the steep stairs leading up to the unit but you can always lock your bulky luggage in the storeroom on the ground floor and take what you need for the stay. Nina's accomodation is a great place to stay in Boston, highly recommended! :)

We really appreciated the amenities in the bathroom and kitchen! Wonderful to have tea and not just coffee available.
Being able to park in the driveway was appreciated.
Really nicely renovated spaces. And beautiful backyard looking at the park.

Alys was great- awesome communication. It was like staying with an old friend; available if you needed her and friendly and comfortable to be around and gave you space as well. She has two lovely, VERY friendly cats. Room was small but perfect for my needs with AC to keep it cool to the arctic temps I like when I sleep. The bathroom was AMAZING. She gave me access to her kitchen/fridge as well, no microwave available though. Ample street parking. I would love to stay with Alys again :)
The house is great — the bathroom is new and clean, the kitchen is fully equipped, and the host is very welcoming. There’s a subway and bus stop right at the corner.

Definitely as described. It’s a basic place to stay. It suited my needs on the trip. The neighbors are a restaurant and it had a great variety of food. Ehab was very helpful. He answered any questions I had. He was very fast with responding to questions. Overall. The would stay again.
The apartment was in a lovely old building and had all we needed for our stay. Charlestown is in a beautiful part of Boston.
Rosalia was very kind and hospitable. Everything was exactly as she described. Neighborhood is pretty nice. Would stay there again without any doubt.
fantastic location!! very clean. Host very communicative.
super nice and quiet place. the room does also make a great place for working "from home"

Philip is an exceptional host and his place is exactly as advertised, if not better. He's very responsive and the apartment is full of thoughtful touches such as nightlights and extras such as snacks, plenty of water and milk etc.
The lack of a kitchen sink is taken care of by having a cleaner come in to switch out dirty dishes with clean ones. The only downside is the walk down to the bathroom, but this is clearly advertised and did not bother us at all but it might someone who is older or has mobility issues.
Overall, this is an excellent option in Boston in an interesting neighborhood, close to downtown and public transit with a terrific host.

Steve was a great host. He was proactive and checked in on us several times. The area the house is in is somewhat mixed. A huge storage facility across the street dominates the view from the house, and there are many sirens and noise during the night.
Floors in the house are uneven; it seems like the house is sinking in one part.

Location was excellent, really close to the subway and the amenities in Back Bay. Apartment was clean and comfortable. Communication from the hosts was excellent, they kept us informed with all the information we needed ahead of time and were on hand for any questions. Little shampoos and soaps and condiments were a nice touch!
Very easy place to travel from! About 25-30 minutes to main areas. Exactly what I needed wanting to stay outside of the city. Quiet space and a good place to stay with small amenities.

Gracious! We loved this place! Stephanie’s home was perfect for me and my 13 year old son on our visit to Boston. We are walkers, and loved how central the home was to walk to nearly anything (and two close T stops for locations further away). I can’t say enough about Stephanie’s communication and help. She helped us know where to park our car, and gave excellent restaurant and activity recommendations. This is the ideal Airbnb that makes you feel like you live in the cutest Boston neighborhood! We will definitely return and highly recommend Stephanie’s place!

Sophia的房子位置方便，就在波士顿市中心，离波士顿公共公园很近，边上也有很多便利店跟小餐馆，这让游客的生活起居也非常方便。
下次来波士顿还会选这，也将此房间推荐各位初来波士顿的朋友。

Didn’t get to spend much time in this beautiful place, but I wish I could have! Easy for the Uber to navigate to, and I was able to check in easily. The place was pristinely cleaned, and I don’t have enough words for how gorgeous it was. I hope to be able to stay here again down the line!

Great place and an even better location! I recommend this place to everyone! Make sure you read that it’s a studio just in case that is an issue for you. My mother and I stayed here with no problems though. The pull out couch is comfortable and the actual bed is tucked away from the rest of the apartment. Amazing stay!

Killer location in the heart of Back Bay! If you're looking for the perfect city get awayWalkable to the best shops and restaurants that Boston has to offer, as well as the Public Garden and Beacon Hill.. This Pied a Terre is perfect for a couple--it's cozy and recently renovated with modern design elements.
Only caution is that the bed is extremely uncomfortable. It's basically a futon. The mattress is showing significant signs of wear and tear (we pointed out to the owner), and sags in the middle, making it hard to get a good night's rest. I would stay there again if this issue is addressed.

Kaitlyn's place is nestled in a quiet street, on Boston's Beacon Hill, steps from the Public Gardens, the State House, the Common and Massachussets General Hospital. Still on foot, you can reach the North End, the Waterfront, and more. Kaithlyn's apartment has the comforts of a 5 star hotel: plush queen bed, good pillows, usb chargers, great size closet, extra linen, extra blankets, hotel grade towels, great shower space and a very efficient/quiet washer/dryer. All the restaurants around the apartment, and there are many, were enjoying warm autumn days, so eating out was easy, and after a day-long walk along the Charles River or the Freedom Trail, we gladly came home to Kaithlyn's place, and prepared simple meals for which we found everything we needed. There is great Internet/TV connection, a quiet street where you could work from home and then stroll to Boston's greatest attractions.
We only needed to contact Kaitlyn once, and she risponded rapidly and effectively.

This room is a little bigger than a closet. My son and I stayed there and there wasn't even enough space for our luggage let alone living space. Also the room is located on 4th floor and there is no elevator. So if you are carrying heavy luggage that can become very challenging. Another misdescription is that the bathroom is not part of the room. You need to access it from the public hallway. And a funny note, the host provides a sauce pan, etc.  for cooking. There is no cooking appliance in the room!
I've stayed at Todd's place a few times now and it's consistently one of the best AirBnB experiences I've had.
It was the perfect place to stay whilst adventuring the city!
Good host, pain free stay
Great place with good amenities and awesome common area! Convenient transport into the city as well - Airport Station is only a ten minute walk away. Highly recommend!

Amazing location, very walkable to everything we wanted to do. The apartment was clean and was easy to access. The pullout couch bed was broken but the host left an inflatable mattress which was appreciated.
We had a really great stay, everything was as described, very spacious and comfortable for our family and the location can’t be beat! We will definitely be back.
We really enjoyed staying at Sheila's place. Suited our needs well. Thanks!
Very good place to explore Boston, there is a lot of great restaurants around and walkable to a lot of other places!

Maude's place is a gem! Clean, located in a beautiful neighborhood, and the decor of the place is charming as well. Maude left a handwritten note, a bottle of wine and even some snacks along with local tips. Highly recommend, would stay here again.

This apartment looked just like the pictures. The location was ideal to walk around the city and explore various neighborhoods. The bed was comfortable. The apartment could use some TLC but is great for a few nights.

My brother and I booked a stay in Boston through Expedia and we ended up having issues and needed another place to stay. Thankfully, I was able to find this Airbnb and it made a world of a difference for our trip. As soon as I booked, I received an email that we could check in in less than an hour. So thankful for the preparedness of our host and the easy check in. I would 100% book again and recommend this place. Thank you for the stay!
Emmanuel’s place was very clean and exactly as described. We had a small issue at check in , and Emmanuel came to resolve it within 5 minutes. Great host and great stay — would definitely book again!

Great Location, easy to take red line from south station to broadway 1 stop.  Clean apartment space with kitchen if you choose to cook.  Starbucks across the street,  Olga Cafe (breakfast & coffee) and Bar Volpe (Dinner) in walking distance.

My husband and I really loved this place. It was stunning. We were very comfortable there. The bathroom was luxurious and the bed was extremely comfortable. The fully stocked mini bar was a great surprise. Highly recommend - very cool place.
Greg's place is fantastic!  It's a really great space.  Amazing kitchen and bathroom.  Comfortable furnishings.  Great location. Highly recommended.  I'll stay here again without hesitation.

We had a seamless stay at this rental. Communication with the host was excellent. Evan's was always reachable and responsive, which made everything very easy.
The apartment itself is in a peaceful location and just a short rideshare away from central Boston, making it a convenient base for exploring the city. Everything in the unit worked well, and we had no issues with any of the amenities.
A couple of small things to note:
- It’s a bit too far to walk to the nearest subway station, so plan on rideshares if you’re relying on public transit, especially at night.
- The coffee machine took a little effort to figure out.
- The back porch appears to be a common space for the whole building rather than private to the unit, although in our case, it did not matter as we did not use it.
Overall, a very smooth and comfortable stay. We’d be happy to return.

Our family of 5 had plenty of space and found the location very convenient to restaurants, shopping and the T. One small issue upon check-in was promptly and professionally resolved. All bedrooms are alley-facing so some nighttime noise with trash pick up and traffic should be expected, but did not impact our overall happiness with the property.
gracias por el alojamiento , para una próxima ocasión seria agradable que la cama no sonará tanto al intentar moverse, de resto muy bien, gracias

Location was excellent!  Easy walk to the Aquarium and Duck Tours, Boston Common, Boston Gardens, Freedom Trail, and lots of great restaurants close by! Breakfast was convenient at Max’s right across the street.  Couldn’t have been more centrally located for exploring Boston!

We stayed at the place for couple days, the overall experience was excellent. The place was clean and the kitchen included all the supplies that we needed. The only downside was due to the location of the place, we were having difficulties with parking.
The public garages near by was convenient and cheap during the weekend, but not during weekdays. I would recommend guesses use public transportation or Uber etc.
We enjoyed our stay and loved the location. This is our second time staying at the property. It was very easy for a quick trip
Awesome cozy apartment!  Keeping it on my list for future visits.

Anybody looking for a great property in a great area, with a very gracious host, I’d recommend Richard’s spot in the North End in a heartbeat. The spot was big enough to work from home for 2 of us for a month, while our nights were spent exploring the restaurants in the North or the excitement of down town - only a short walk away.
Richard was very accommodating and super helpful with check in and recos.
Amazing experience!

This is a fabulous location, it does look like the photos but a little run down in places e.g. large paint chips, smoke alarm covered. Pretty clean, found the odd hair about but nothing to complain about. Great amenities e.g. coffee machine with pods etc. There’s 2 things to note:
- Weed is legal in MA and most days there was a very strong smell of weed in the apartment from others in the building - nothing the host can do but if you don’t like the smell etc it’s worth noting.
- We had an issue with communication and maintenance. On the 2nd day maintenance turned up to fix the kitchen tap - we were not informed of this & we should not have been placed in a place with something broken. This scared us as we weren’t expecting anyone, told the host, he apologised & was quick to communicate. We asked if maintenance could come after our stay to fix it because we didn’t want someone we didn’t know in the place. Host agreed but maintenance turned up anyway despite our wishes.
Great place and location!
It was great staying at Haydee's place!! She's extremely helpful and friendly!!
Great place to stay for a cozy night!
Great accommodations!
Clean, quiet, and safe in a great location. Would definitely book again!

The location worked so well for us. It’s two flights of stairs up but once up there, it was a very nice place. Amenities identified were there. Was a little shy on cooking utensils… But we made it work.
We were happy to stay at Ella’s !

Nice sized rooms, single bathroom, good kitchen ... clean and easy to stay. The only downside is that it is on a busy main street and noisy - did not bother us but something to be aware of. Overall a good experience, would stay again
Thanks for the grrat communication and responsiveness . Great location in roslindale!

Zen house was super clean and quite. It was spacious and there was alot of closet space. However, from reading the reviews I thought it was really close to the city but my husband and I felt like it was quite far. If you are there for conferences or seminar in Harvard it is a perfect location but if you are visiting Boston for the first time and want to do more touristy things just know that you have to walk about 15-20minutes to get to the train station. Also, there are no stores or shops near by so you would have to go to the gas station.

Our apartment within the Copley house was lovely. It was clean, comfortable, and incredibly close to the train station. I would recommend this destination to anyone who is looking for a weekend is Boston.

Great stay, clean and plenty of room and a good location.  Plenty of street parking if you rent a car and want to try your hand at driving in Boston, what fun!  We recommend breakfast, a bit of a drive, at the Breakfast Club.  Thanks Terry.
Highly recommend! Great location and clean room and common areas!

The stay was great, the location is very close and covient to Boston. The room was spacious, bed comfortable and they have A/C. I do strongly recommend guaranteeing basic amenities such soap and shampoo(I ended up buying my own). Also it was explain to me that I could park infront of the house, that is not the case. (The parking should be more clear in description) I ended up with $60 parking ticket bc the parking is for residents only. Keep that in mind if you are going to have your own vehicle.

My baseline for rating a place is, will I stay here again and in this case, I will definitely do so. I've stayed in other apartments in the Southend and this place was by far nicer, cleaner and in a great location. Very clean, comfortable bed, nice light indoor/outdoor, great neighborhood. It's an older building and with that comes less noise insulation, but I knew to expect that, I wanted a Boston neighborhood experience where I could walk daily to the event I was attending. Drew was very responsive and friendly in his communication.
Excellent place to stay. Great location and Howard was very helpful (the extra umbrellas were useful). I would highly recommend.
Nice place. Central location
this is a great spot! super close to mgh. sophia was a wonderful host. highly rec!!!

In real estate parlance, “Location, location, location” is the mantra. MIchael’s lovely place meets that criterion and then some! It’s only a few stops from Logan, for starters, and then a few stops here and there on the Orange line north and south for sightseeing Boston, including Symphony Hall, where the subway exit is. So convenience is a given. Add to that the pleasure of the apartment—well furnished, quiet (surprisingly), and a very practical L-shaped table between the kitchen and the living room. The quiet bedroom is not large but it certainly is not cluttered or cramped. A deck on the back of the house is ample-sized, with a table and chairs for lounging. Ceiling fans and AC throughout.
We do have one caution. As seniors, entry and exit was a bit of a challenge; the period staircase leads from the street up to the heavy front door. We managed, however, and this would likely be no obstacle at all for travelers younger than we. Indeed, we would come back.
Will come back! Great hosts too!

Phenomenal place to stay when visiting Boston! Its a quaint and quiet space. They let us check in way eariler than we expected which was such a nice gesture. The neighborhood is quiet and the beautiful outdoors/water is easily accessible.  The homemade pumpkin bread every morning will forever be engraved in my mind.

This is a terrific apartment in a superb location -- a wonderful place from which to explore Boston. The three bedrooms were simple but attractive, and the beds and linens were very comfortable. The extra bathroom (two side-by-side full baths) was suprisingly valuable even for my party of just three people (a parent and two kids). Nice common areas as well, though we didn't use them as much because we were out and around Boston. The late check-in time of 5 p.m. was a turn off, but it was easy enough to kill time in the area. We parked at the Boston Common Garage (relatively convenient and less expensive than the on-premises parking) and though we didn't have in-and-out privileges, we were able to access the car as needed to store our bags. The hosts were incredibly quick in their responsiveness at all times, from planning through our stay. A lovely spot from which to explore a lovely city!
Nice place if going to Fenway for a game.
Beautiful artsy hotel. The receptionist was very friendly. There was a grocery store alittle behind the hotel, walkable and convenient. Loved it!

Une très belle Location très bien placée dans une rue plutôt calme. Les deux chambres sont très appréciables et tout est bien organisé pour l’arrivée. Nous n’avons vraiment utilisé la cuisine mais l’appartement est bien équipé avec lave linge et sèche linge.
On peut se garer quelques minutes pour décharger les bagages sans gêner la circulation .
Tout à proximité station de vélos et métro.

The unit was competitively priced, clean, quiet, with user-friendly pin pad access. It's conveniently located, although the actual address slightly deviates from what's shown on Airbnb. The photos didn't fully align with the interior either, which wasn't an issue for me but might be for some.
My biggest concern was the health impact during my stay. I came to Boston for a work-related trip, intending to conduct photoshoots and work on a book. Unfortunately, I developed a severe chronic headache that made both tasks unmanageable. Medical consultation indicated that toxic fumes from a recent paint job and/or adhesive from peeling wallpaper were likely responsible.
Despite the host's general helpfulness, they were not very accommodating on this issue, leading me to find alternate accommodations.
In summary, this apartment has pros but also significant cons, particularly if you're sensitive to environmental factors. Consider other options if this is a concern for you.
would recommend this place to others! easy to find, hosts were responsive, & place was clean. on a quiet street but walkable from many other boston attractions!
My stay at this place was nice I love it ❤️
nice room nice host
would recommend to any out of towner for a weekend stay!

The location is great and the apartment was light, clean and comfortable. Late check in (no earlier than 4pm) was a real pain and there was no flexibility here. The apartment is poorly equipped so be prepared to spend up on food and drinks. No kettle (although two tea bags provided which was curious), no wine glasses, two knives, two forks.
Absolutely cannot fault the location though!
Minor's family took care us friendly.

This apartment is immaculate, charming, and the hosts have made it very comfortable and inviting. The amenities were thoughtfully chosen and made the apartment feel very much like home. It's super close to the T and right by a coffee shop. We recommend it highly.
Excellent location and very responsive management team! We had a great time enjoying all back bay has to offer. Very close to the CommAve Mall, which was a huge plus!
Warm and bright space in a nice quiet neighborhood.
Great location and the host was very responsive!

The place was easy to find and exactly as pictured. The location was perfect right on the Green Line, walkable, and close to several universities, so the area felt lively and safe with lots of students around. The house was spotless when we arrived no clutter or mess. The hosts were incredibly responsive, always replying almost immediately and providing clear instructions throughout our stay. The price was very reasonable for such a great spot. Overall, we had an amazing stay and would definitely recommend it!

We were so happy at Lu’s place in Boston… everything was perfect and very clean. Great location and we walked all over Boston. The bed and sheets were so comfortable, we slept the best we have in awhile. I can’t recommend enough. Everything was perfect and Lu communicates very quickly and frequently. 5 stars !!!!
Very nice place and welcoming hosts! You can arrange with Shelly to be picked up from the airport and she surely will. Very close to Wood Island station! they're awesome.

Mario est un hôte agréable qui nous a accueilli à notre arrivée. Il est chaleureux et toujours prêt à nous indiquer un restaurant ou une activité. La maison est grande et agréable avec une ambiance très chaude et cosy. Elle dispose de la climatisation et du chauffage. A notre arrivée , il faisait déjà chaud à Boston et Mario nous a mis l'air conditionné. Notre séjour était magnifique grâce à notre hôte qui nous a permis de nous sentir chez nous.
Merci

We stayed at Catlin's place during our recent trip to Boston for the Boston Marathon. The BNB was super convenient being so close to the Orange Line. Only took about 12-15 minutes to get into Boston. The street is nice and quiet, and there are nice places to eat near by.
The BNB was exactly as described with big rooms, lots of space, and a SUPER nice bathroom. There is also a back porch, which is nice if you want to step outside for a coffee or a drink. We will definitely be back!!

This was the perfect place for our Head of the Charles weekend. The location is right in the heart of Newbury Street with   walkable access to restaurants and shops. The apartment boasts fabulous views from the balcony, and all the amenities you will need. Our host was proactive and gave clear instructions for our arrival and check out. Highly recommend this lovely place.
Very nice location and apartment
Great location and parking.
Christina was a gracious host from start to finish. We were easily able to use the subway system or Uber to everywhere we wanted to go. Her home was comfortable and relaxing.
Very clean and well kept, will keep as a favorite!

I came for a conference at the Hynes Convention Center and this place was less expensive than any of the hotel offerings and even more convenient re: location. The studio is basic but comfortable - nice kitchenette for easy meal preparation, and a tiny but perfect bathroom. Newbury street is charming and lined with little shops and restaurants, try Wired Puppy coffee right across the street (of course there are Starbucks every couple blocks as well). It's a short walk to the Public Garden, too. I'd stay here again for sure.

Can’t recommend Taskin. His stay was fine if you just need a no frills place to stay, but bathroom was dirty, house dirty and unkept.
Worst of all was his communication. Taskin was rude, inconsiderate and unhelpful. Yelling at me over text, saying ‘I’m so done with you’ are all part of our lovely airbnb chat. I’m not looking for Four Seasons customer service on a cheap Airbnb, but the way Taskin conducts is just plain unprofessional and rude.
He hid behind his no cancellation policy and refused to work with our changing plans. I would recommend staying away unless you have concrete plans and do a thorough read of his 20 something rules before booking.
Cozy place
Clean and convenient with easy access and commute to Harvard Business School, Taskin will do well with providing a fan for the hot and humid days. It is great value for the location.

At the end of the day is a house where you have roommates, and cleaning issues are always present. BEWARE - if you’re drawn to this location because it’s pet friendly, be ready for them to ask for an additional $200 non-refundable pet fee via Ven-mo. Which it’s not, I have had to cancel airbnbs in the past it’s 100% up to the host how much money you get back. It just overall felt really scammy. The place was fine, it smelled really bad in the kitchen the first night (maybe bc of the rain idk) but it was fine the next morning. There were stains on the towels. It did the job for sure but idk I wish I got a hotel instead.
Good location in the Back Bay area, lovely street, clean comfortable room, quiet and Lihua is a great host.  Would stay there again.

This was exactly what I was looking for: a well located, affordable place within walking distance of the convention center and some sites. So I had a very good stay. Though the photos may be a bit dated, the place met all those criteria: it looks good, it is clean, and it is functional. The bed is comfortable; there is plenty of space to put your clothes away, a neat little desk to work at, and a reliable and decently fast internet connection. You can walk to the convention center in less than 20 minutes, the Paul Revere House in less than 40, the Boston Common in 20 minutes. The bathrooms are clean and since all the other tenants were considerate, there was no waiting time (there is also 1 bathroom for every 2 bedrooms). I thought the place would be noisier but it was very quiet. The check-in process is fast and easy. You get plenty of information and if you need to communicate, they are super responsive via text or on the phone. I recommend.

The Albert's place is very well located, near of a lot of restaurants and walk distance for the Quincy's Market.. Albert is very available host, answer fast all call and helped me in all that we need.
We were traveling with a whole family and the environment as the apartment as the neighborhood worked perfect!!!! I strong recommend it.

The setting is gorgeous and felt like a fairy tale. I didn’t realize that the only privacy in the home was the bathroom (tho the loft area does have a window my kids discovered to look down into the bathroom). Overall, the place was gorgeous and a novelty to stay there!
Très bon séjour
Great place!

We had a lovely stay at Jovan’s  place which was as described with comfy beds, attractive decor and everything you needed in the kitchen. Great location for exploring the area and free parking on the street.
Very good location for the price. Great and timely communication with owner.  Furniture & TV is a little dated but just fine and comfortable for a place to stay for a night or two.

Honestly can't speak highly enough on our stay!! Riyo communicated well at all times and gave a nice step by step guide on how to check in which was so helpful. Once we arrived the place was not as advertised it was better the pictures do not even do the place justice it was a lovely sized room for the two of us and a nice big en-suite bathroom, the place was spanking clean with lovely little touches such as nibbles, a guide on JA Plain, right down to a reusable bag, umbrellas and ponchos if needed. Location wise perfect was a short distance from the orange T line which takes you right into the hustle and bustle of Boston. I could go on and on as the stay was pleasantly surprising and I would highly recommend/stay again!! Thank you Riyo for your hospitality:)

Loved Sandra’s place! Perfect spot to get around town and the airport. We had amazing food and good times at Kelley’s pub. Also had plenty of the little things like spices, coffee, creamer.. Would 100% recommend!
Super sleek studio.  Great location. Expensive but everything in that area is.  Comfy bed. Good for one or a couple.
Very convenient stay for our trip to Boston. Super close to the T and Fenway. Highly recommend!

The apartment house is spacious for our family of 5 adults and 2 kids. One adult and kids slept in living room on air mattress and couch. It’s in a quiet neighborhood with convenient access to restaurants and other stores. We felt right at home and Barbara was quick to answer questions we had.
It was fairly nice.

We spent the week in Boston.  My husband attended a convention.  Location was ideal, 10 minutes walk from the centre. In a very nice neighborhood close to restaurents and most of the city attractions. The condo was very nice, clean and comfortable.  Surpassed our expectations.  Phillip and Ann were very helpfull in answering  our questions and made sure we enjoyed our stay.  They paid attention to the little details, nice bedsheets and towels and all the amenities.  We highly recommend this condo and would stay there again if ever in Boston.  Many thanks to Philip and Ann.
A perfect accommodation. You feel welcome and at home from the moment you enter the door.

Had a very pleasant stay at the aMetropolitan. Quiet, clean, cozy and welcoming. Photos describing the place were spot-on and what gracious hosts, Jovan and Sena are. Very responsive and communicated well to us on all levels.
The homemade chocolate chip cookies were a special treat. Thank you!
Love the “Welcome” guests binder found in the kitchen. It’s filled with lots of info about places to visit while in the Boston area. Hoping we can stay in the future at the Metropolitan.

Nice, safe location with uber accommodating host—checks in regularly through texts and kept us well stocked with coffee. Home was immaculately clean, replete with chic decor, and  wonderfully cozy. Overall an ideal experience, thank you Dung!
it's a good spot for visiting Boston. the detached bathroom is a bit of a hassle and the price compared to actual full apartments isn't there. all in all it's ok.

It was a very nice space. Super cozy, the cleaniest airbnb I have been to yet, the beds are very comfortable, and it has alot of amenities you can accomodate. The host is very fast at responding and is kind.
Would i book with him again? Absolutely, but next time for a longer stay.
Super friendly hosts, super helpful and quick to respond.  Great location and awesome private living space.  Would highly recommend

Booked The Moxy for a weekend getaway and wouldn’t have wanted to stay anywhere else! We had such a fun time exploring the city and the surrounding area near the hotel. There was a great mix of day/night life. The hotel was clean, had great people, and was very comfortable. The view from the room was amazing!
Es un lugar muy cómodo y accesible, la verdad la pase muy bien

I will start off by saying that the location was great. My husband and I booked this air bnb for the location which is close to restaurants and cafes. The downside was that the bed had someone else’s hair in it when we arrived, the towels were supposed to be white but were yellowed and stained. It appeared that the cleanliness of the bathroom had been neglected prior to our arrival, as well.
Nice clean place

The apartment was exactly as described! Walkable to many restaurants and to the T. The only thing was it was hot (like they closed the schools for 2 days hot). There was an air unit in the bedroom which kept the bedroom pretty cool, but we ended up buying a box fan to try and cool off the living room and kitchen area (which we had to leave because we flew).   But overall the trip was great, just maybe watch for cooler weather 😂.

A fantastic place in an ideal downtown Boston location a stone’s throw from Boston Common. So rare to find someplace downtown with four bedrooms that can accommodate eight people. Everything as described, and excellent hosts. Clean and lovely.
Great location.

We were 4 couples travelling to Busy Boston for a long week end. This apartment was a true highlight- situated in a dead end street- easy to unload our luggage before parking, close to everything, and very quiet- we did not hear any city noises.
Kitchen well equipped for a group of 8, comfortable beds and clean bathrooms. If we had to spend a night in due to weather, it is possible to create a nice space where everyone would be comfortable.
Highly recommend!
Howard is a great host and lives in the perfect location. I would highly recommend staying with Howard.
Immediate response. The instruction is very helpful.
Super sweet host, super sweet pad. Great location and just down right easy experience through and through. Thanks!
Very neat and clean apartment with a full kitchen and laundry made my stay very convenient and enjoyable. Building is quiet and neighbors are friendly
Very convenient, clean and well equipped. Good value to stay, especially if you have a long trip and need kitchen and laundry. Ehab is very responsive and reasonable. Definitely recommend it.

Très bon séjour, appartement très bien situé en plein centre de Boston.
La communication était très fluide et rapide
everything was exactly what  we wanted & excepted.

This is by far the best AirBnb I have been in Boston. Lovely room, sparkling clean bathroom and kitchen, beautiful neighbourhood (Trader Joe’s) at walking distance, bus 66 direct to Harvard, and a lovely host!
Amazing place, host was super friendly and helpful. Will definitely recommend!

Lihua is a WONDERFUL hostess, with a beautiful, homey space LITERAL STEPS to Fenway Park and the new MGM Music Hall at Fenway. I was in town for the James Taylor concert which opened the new Music Hall venue, and Lihua's space could not have been more perfect for my purposes! (5 MINUTE WALK!!!)
The room I stayed in was smaller, but very comfortable and more than adequate for a solo traveler's needs, with great streaming TV options, fast wi-fi, a comfortable single bed, and a great, private bathroom/hot shower. The private bath for this unit is across the hall, so guests may wish to bring a bathrobe with them, to get back and forth to their room late night, or after a shower. And one could never beat the price for this room, which also includes an AWESOME breakfast!
Speaking of the breakfast, Lihua also has perpetuated the dying art of a beautiful--and generous--spread for her guests...VERY RARE at AirBnB's anymore! LOTS of options, including toast, bagels, English muffins, mini-muffins, cereal, cheese and meat platter, yogurt, etc. etc. Plus hot tea, coffee, orange juice, and spreads like jam and Nutella! A real treat the morning after the concert, and I met two of her other charming guests at the breakfast table, who had also been at the concert, so we bonded over that!
To top it all off, the T station was literally right around the corner, so I saved myself the cost of an Uber, and got to the airport in record time on the T!
I wish I could give Lihua TEN STARS for this fantastic AirBnB stay. If it's available (good luck, she's almost always booked!), grab it...you won't find a better deal--or a kinder host--for your money!

Rosalia was an awesome host! The first night she took me for a fantastic concert - could not have better first day in the States :). She was very friendly and I felt welcomed at her place. The latter was clean, convenient, and located in a good neighborhood. If you like walking you can easily get to the downtown on foot. The Freedom Trail starts (or rather ends ;)) 5 minutes walk away.
Location was great easy access to all amenities

Gerald's Airbnb was a dream for my family! It had everything we needed and more, making our stay comfortable and memorable. The location was ideal, offering easy access to public transportation, stores, and some restaurants. Gerald's attention to detail and hospitality truly made our experience exceptional. Highly recommend for families looking for a perfect getaway!
It was a pleasure!  Jonathan was very thoughtful and helpful. I love the space and hope to return. I highly recommend this Airbnb!

Jorge's place is great. It's a quick 2 minute walk from Airport T Station where you can get anywhere in Boston; no need to rent a car. The place was very clean and is exactly how it looks in the photos. Jorge was very responsive during check in and throughout the stay. I would definitely stay here again and would recommend Jorge's place to my friends. Hope to come back soon.
Great location, walkable to Fenway Park. Included parking spot is a huge bonus. Overall wonderful!
Great location, great stay.
Ms. Yang and her husmand were very nice，she drove us from subway station. And the house is nice too, all thing are prepared.

Lynel's place was so wonderful! I was in the area with my daughter to help her find housing for her move to Boston. We loved Jamaica Plain so much that we wound up finding a place for her to live nearby. Lynel's place was a clean and comfortable home away from home for us. The kitchen was a perfect space for us to cook and share meals together just like we do at home. I will definitely come back when I return to visit my daughter.
great neighborhood and great host.
Great place to stay! very clean! Hosts very responsive and easy to communicate with.  AirBNB exactly as stated! Thank you for a wonderful stay in Boston!

Room C was a good stay! My sister and I were not at the house very often but it was perfect for what we needed. It was clean, very quaint, and close to the train station. My only critique is that the stairs to the room were a bit steep and the ceilings a bit low (the are sloped because its an attic room), which can get annoying if you are planning to stay for a long time.
Great location and good communication! We ran into a problem and they were prompt to solve it.Would stay in their properties again!

Great location and price. Walking distance to pretty much anything you need. The view was lovely yet quaint. Close to downtown but a pretty quiet location, which is great to escape the hustle and bustle.
Robin’s place was great in every way. Thank you!
Very nice space! About 10 minutes away from Fenway music hall which was great! Hosts were friendly and I recommend staying here if you’re ever in the city!
Place was in a great neighborhood. The building hallway was dirty but this is not in the owners purview. Karina was responsive and place was is great shape. Thank you for hosting !
Great clean stay
Friendly host but I canceled the reservation because of some cleaning problems. Thank to the host and Airbnb, I got full refund back.
Good place.

A very nice flat in South End Boston. Quiet, nicely decorated and well equiped. Nothing remarquable in the neighbourhood but the location is very convenient to go to dowtown or to Boston Symphony and Fine Arts Museum (by bus). Chip is a very nice host, caring, paying attention, available and respecting privacy. A very nice place to stay and visit Boston.
We were on a girls trip and the location was perfect close to all our destinations. The place was exactly as described and host was excellent.
Awesome communication with the host! Clean and perfect for a couple days stay. Would recommend to anyone traveling to Boston!
We had a great time at Qi’s place. The apartment is very clean and very convenient

Wonderful location and very walkable to Boston Commons, restaurants, stores and attractions!  Very nice accommodations.  Nice kitchen.  Construction next door starts early and they even worked on Saturday.  We found it annoying but tolerable.  We were warned ahead of time.  Construction is supposed to be done in fall 2025 according to sign on site.  Communication with host was excellent.
Le logement était très accueillant. Nous avons beaucoup aimé notre expérience
Great place right next to the airport!
Great neighborhood great apartment great host

Jonathan is a hospitable and generous host. His room is in a pleasant neighborhood and very close to the subway, so it is in a convenient location. The room is clean, comfortable,, stylish, and has an in-suite bathroom. I highly recommend it!

The unit was beautiful and in a great location. Wish we had known that they elevator was broken until March, going up five flights of stairs will knock the breath out of you for sure and isn’t very accessible. Overall clean, there were a few things however on the floor like a crumpled up contact lens (which none of us use) and a q-tip next to the bed (no one brought q-tips). The hosts were always prompt and helpful in their communications for us!

All aspects of the stay were outstanding.  Bruce and Tim's communication was prompt and accurate.  The loft is beautifully designed and decorated.  It is quite spacious (more spacious than the pictures suggest).  The location is quiet but near the lively parts of Jamaica Plain.  On street parking was easy.

I can't speak highly enough about this host and the apartment we stayed in. We had such a lovely stay. The hosts were kind and friendly, and the check-in and check-out process was easy. In addition to the beautiful, clean apartment, we appreciated the gorgeous view of the tower in Highland Park and the surrounding willow trees. On the coffee table was a binder with historical information about the fort and tower just outside, and plenty of local tips for our visit. We were also impressed by the many lovely, thoughtful touches that made the apartment feel homey and welcoming. We were greeted with a fresh bouquet of flowers and plenty of breakfast foods in the fridge! The hosts provided a variety of coffees and teas, eggs, English muffins, butter, jam, milk, and half-and-half. It was such a pleasant stay. We have never had a better AirBnB experience. Thank you again for everything!
Nice location on a quiet street. Very clean and comfortable in a good Boston neighborhood. Lelia was very easy to communicate with and made me feel right at home. I would definitely stay again.
Enjoyed our stay in Boston @ this lovely AirBNB! Would recommend and would stay again! Safe, clean space!

This was the perfect place to stay for our trip to Boston! Great location next to tons of restaurants, cafes, and things to do. Close to the back bay T station- only about a 5 minute walk which makes getting around the city really easy! The room was clean and cozy and had everything we needed! We would definitely stay here again if we're ever in the Boston area.
Is tiny but very comfortable, grate for couple , view is nice , host was super helpful, thank you

Loved our stay! Beautiful home. Comfortable and clean. One of my favorite AirBnBs so far. Close to the airport. The bathroom and shower exceeded expectations! We had some of the best coffee ever and I’ve already ordered the same espresso machine and pods on Amazon. If I could give more than 5 stars I would!

This spot is absolutly wonderful, walking distance to all sorts of great food and at least 3 concert venues. The space is perfect for 2 people and really easy to locate and check in/out of. Jessy and Deigo were wonderful to communicate with and met our every need. Stay here next time you're in Boston you won't regret it.
I enjoyed my stay

We had a great stay. The location was amazing and was in the center of so many places we wanted to visit, making it all walkable. Most necessities are provided and for the price, this is a great option.
Appartement close to downtown.
We had a great stay!!!
This was a great place, central location and very clean. Kitchen was fully stocked to cook which is always appreciate. Overall a wonderful place to stay!

This is the best and most unique AirBNB I have ever stayed at, and I travel a lot. The Boiler Room has all of the perfect finishes and more for your stay. The backyard is also really cool. Definitely recommend.

Good for a quick weekend but very small space. Pretty much just a room. Parking can be tough mostly resident parking only in the area. You can park at the meters only certain times but we made it work. Other alternative is expensive parking lots.
Super clean and overall great place to stay! Perfect location and apartment, will be coming back!

Great location! Super close to everything. The staff was so kind here and everyone was always in good spirits when being helped.
The room was a bit smaller than I expected but for its location it served its purpose. The gentleman at the front desk when we first checked in let us know it is the second oldest hotel in Boston. All and all it was a great place to stay just for our night out in Boston. :)
Great Clean Place

We had a really good experience staying at Susie's place, it was a perfect place for us to land in Boston in every way.  Susie was a really good host, friendly, interesting and very helpful.  The unit is beautiful, clean and comfortable and the neighbourhood is lovely.  We wished we could have stayed there much longer, thanks so much :)

Mostly central location, many restaurants and bakeries nearby, Freedom Trail right down the street, subway less than 10 minute walk.
Host is extremely responsive and proud of his space and city so will do their best to give you a chance to love it too.
Suggest work on stair master before visiting as it is, basically, 5th floor.
Use the roof deck, you won't be sorry.
The house was beautiful, Dan is awesome and I love the bed very comfortable.
10mins drive from the airport. The room is cozy, well prepared and with good privacy.

The location was amazing. We could walk to everything. We felt very safe. We loved the key code to get into the building and our apartment. We had a group of 6. We  enjoyed the space to relax at night and enjoy breakfast together.

Great apartment! Had everything we needed and Jonathan followed up to make sure we got in okay. Would be great to have a hair dryer but everything else was there, very clean and organized and as expected. The building is very nice and in a prime location!

We have stayed at Robin's many times.  It is a wonderful house in a great location.  Easy access by foot to the 'T', and local restaurants.  It is also walking distance to UMass Boston.  Robin is an amazing host and is always extremely helpful!  We will be back again!
Very clear instructions at arrival. Clean apartment with all the necessary for a short stay.

This Airbnb was the perfect place for our team to stay while attending a business conference at Hynes Convention Center.  Many stores and restaurants in walking distance.  Veronica accommodated us by receiving packages that we mailed prior to arrival.  It was helpful not to lug everything on the plane!

Rogger was a great host. He was very responsive and accommodating. The place looked exactly like the photos posted. The place was easy to find and I had no issues with gaining access, very easy process.
The space was very clean. The beds were comfortable. The location is great for commuting and accessing public transportation.
I would highly recommend and definitely stay again
Solid basic spot with good access to public transit.

Whit and Joe are super charming hosts with a super charming home. We felt lucky to stay in such a vibrant place with a porch we spent every night on! Whit helped us do laundry and gave lots of great recommendations for the area. We received a warm welcome and especially appreciated the convenience of the nearby Red line T station. Would definitely come back!

Katherine and Dan's place was very clean and had all the needed amenities and more! The area was very walkable and had great restaurants around. We really enjoyed our stay! They were also very responsive hosts.
Bookers place is located in the perfect Boston neighborhood!
Very clean house, short commute to the city and attractions. We were only there for 2 days but Karim made everything easy and for a comfortable stay.
It was an okay place to stay near Boston

Tom is very easy to communicate with. We exchanged texts, emails, and phone calls before we got there. Tom was there to greet us and helped bring in our luggage. We met his dog Wonder who was a real sweetheart.

We went to dinner both nights we were there, staying in the "'hood" to get the flavor of the area. Both suggestions were #5 on a scale of 1 - 5. Tom also provided great insight into transportation options in Boston, and we were able to get downtown with no problems.

Very convient location. Would stay there again.
Bring a sleep mask. Sky rise is nice but sun rises early and brightens room before we were ready to rise:)
Great location. Easy to find. Clean. Perfect for 2 couples or a small family

Wir hatten eine wirklich tolle Zeit in Todds Unterkunft (6 Nächte). Die Unterkunft liegt fußläufig zu einigen Bus-/T-Linien (Boston Subway), somit ist die Stadt immer gut zu erreichen. Die Kommunikation mit Todd war ebenfalls sehr gut. Todd hat immer schnell geantwortet. Außerdem war die Unterkunft sehr gepflegt und liegt in einer ruhigen Umgebung.
Wir würden die Unterkunft das nächste Mal definitiv wieder wählen.
This was a great place to stay for a conference at the convention center.

I was a little stressed at first because I was told the previous renters had a late checkout at 1:30, and our check-in time was at 3:00. I mentioned that we’d be landing around 11:00 and was concerned the apartment might not be ready in time. The host offered us a different unit and allowed us to check in early there.
At first, I was worried it might be a scam since it was a last-minute change, but she never asked for additional payment, and everything checked out fine. The new place was in a great location, but unfortunately, the master bathroom had significant mold, the master bedroom TV was broken, and there was dog or cat hair throughout the apartment.
great space for an affordable price. very homey!

We were so happy to stay for the second time at Janet 's appartment. Her appartement is very nice and very well-located.
Janet is very welcoming.
Everything contribute to a great moment in Boston.
Thank you again Janet!
Place was right in the heart of Boston and a 10 minute walk from Cheers. It was our first time in Boston and loved the location!
Nice location! Lovely apartment with a nice attention to detail. Could use softer beds though. Was a little crowded with our family of 6, some being teenagers. :) Still a nice space.

Ehab is very responsive and friendly. Located near the red line train, which takes you directly to downtown. Easy breakfast options nearby. Very walkable. The nearby highway can be somewhat noisy at night but with earplugs is is fine.
Cozy space, responsive host, terrific location!
Location was fantastic. Walking distance to so much! Bright and clean!
Conveniently located near the airport.
Great spot!

The only “complaint” I would say is that the neighborhood can be noisy and thin walls around the house. The WiFi is spotty too. Other than that, it was a great stay, clean and super convenient. Would stay again

Richard’s place was great for our quick trip to Boston, and Richard is a great guy. The location was perfect for walking everywhere and Richard was super communicative. 10/10 would recommend staying here!

Great location easy to get everywhere
Walked twice down to union park piZza

My friend and I enjoyed staying here for the two weeks in between classes ending and our college graduation! The space was perfect for what we needed and the hosts were very communicative and made us feel at home. Would definitely stay here again!
