Nice place, just for singles or couples, well located, some noise from the disco but it's bearable, only the works of the building next door make noise early but I hope they finish soon, despite this, I recommend the place, most of the tourist places to visit are nearby...

Hilary is a very nice a friendly host. In addition to the privacy of the small room, we were able to use her kitchen and living room. When I broke my leg during my stay, she was very helpful and helped us with everything that was needed: a doctor's recommendation, getting crutches from a neighbor, her help was quick and invaluable for us as foreigners. Thank you.

Excellente adresse pour arriver à Boston. Le Boston historique et le quartier italien accessible à pied
Extra
Attention : +35e / jour de taxes.

We had a nice time at Lindsay’s. The unit is small with basic amenities but does the job for a short stay. Location is walking distance to restaurants and cafes and also a 5 min walk to a great dog friendly park.
Excellent host.

The cozy private room was clean, described accurately, and affordable. I will visit Boston again! I would love to book one of the larger accommodations at the Inn for the next trip. Close enough to the city to Uber or use the T. If using the T, note that there is a hill to make it back to the Inn. Consider wearing walkable shoes. Had a great time in Boston!
Always a great stay!!

Excelente airbnb. Cuenta con lo necesario y la estancia es muy agradable.
Recomiendo el lugar.
We really enjoyed staying here. Street parking was easy to find and the location was nice. Ewa was very responsive and a great host!

Our stay at Lihua’s place was perfect for what we needed. 10 min walk to Fenway park, lovely neighborhood. Lihua was super responsive and helpful. Would stay again for our next redsox game! Thanks Lihua!
Thanks for your flexibility!

Amazing experience in JP. The unit was beautifully decorated and perfect for 8 family members to hang out. Easy check in and we never had an issue with street parking. The unit was spotless, had lots of towels, and good toiletries. The kitchen and living room we're perfect for our family to hang out and eat breakfast (visiting family so we never cooked a bigger meal). Would highly recommend and will likely stay here again the next time we are all in town for Christmas.
Natalia and misha were great hosts! The location of this Airbnb is unmatched and we had access to many of the Boston neighborhoods !

We spend 10 days in Allston (Boston) at Marlene's place for some working activities and we really enjoyed it!
As soon as we got in the house we felt right at home: it was a clean, spacious room with a super comfortable queen bed.
Marlene was very helpful suggesting us what to do during the weekend, and telling us the best ways to move in Boston. She is a super responsive host: whenever we needed something she was a step ahead and already gave it to us ;)
The kitchen is shared with the other guests, but you still have enough privacy to enjoy your breakfast.
Allston has a quite and nice neighborhood, with rabbits and squirrels jumping around, we loved it.
You can easily get access to the BlueBikes bike sharing close to the Honan-Allston public library.
Super recommended if you need a relatively cheap palace to spend a couple of weeks in Boston.
We couldn’t have picked a more ideal setting or set of hosts. We look forward to coming back and would recommend for anyone wanting to experience Boston.
Great place awesome host, highly recommend to anyone looking in the Boston area

Good location w places all around for ease to get too after the long days of adventuring around the city.  Not very large but definitely had everything you need for sleeping because we weren’t in the place often.

The location can’t be beat! You’re literally STEPS away from everything. The place was clean and spacious enough. The price and value is great for 4 bedrooms.
Pros: 10 stars for location!
Communication is fast. Clean and a great value.
Some things to keep in mind: if you have young babies… travel with a black out slumberpod” this place gets a lot of light into the room from both the tall windows and livingroom light. Also issues with hot water and elevator. But for the location,value, and extra bedrooms the quirks weren’t too bad.

We enjoyed our stay here. Ryan, the house manager, was extremely responsive and helpful. The place is as depicted in the photos.
However, I would not stay here again during the hot and humid summer of Boston. Not all the bedrooms are air-conditioned. The downstairs was able to stay cool with the two bedroom air conditioners and the dining room air conditioner. But not the living room. And, upstairs, two of the AC didn't work because we were told that the electricity didn't support them. In fact, with the downstairs air conditioners on, the lights and fans would continually dim, a reflection that the drain on electricity was too great. Seems like not a big deal but the lights flashing every few minutes was much less than desirable.
The place is old and historic. But it definitely needs an electricity upgrade and an AC upgrade as well. Hard to give this criticism in an otherwise nice place, but I wish I knew about the AC and electricity before booking.
A wonderful Charlestown stay. Hosts were very accommodating and responsive!

I recently had the pleasure of staying at this Airbnb for an entire month, and I can confidently say that it was an absolutely incredible experience from start to finish. This enchanting home-away-from-home left an indelible mark on my heart, providing me with a truly memorable and remarkable stay.
The hosts were simply outstanding. They were always available to assist me with any questions or concerns, ensuring that my stay was smooth and enjoyable.
Overall, my month-long stay at this Airbnb was nothing short of extraordinary. The impeccable attention to detail, the genuine hospitality of the hosts and the convenient location all contributed to an unforgettable experience. I would highly recommend this Airbnb to anyone seeking a truly exceptional and memorable stay. Thank you to the hosts for creating such a remarkable haven. I can’t wait to return in the future!

The hosts provided clear instructions for access & were immediately accessible when I had a question. The apartment was spacious, immaculately clean, well appointed, with convenient parking. I Did not meet Jacklyn but Joel is a great guy & superior host.
The apartment and the neighborhood are very peaceful, the metro is at 10 minutes in walking. You can access to the gym and a great break room.
The location and size of the place was great! Will definitely need to book again in the future!
We are appreciative for the last minute book!
Frencesco is a great host, if not the best definitely one of the best I’ve had. The guy is cool as hell. For sure will be renting from him again in the future

Great apartment for a short or long stay. There’s a lot in the area and lots todo! Stella was so responsive especially when we needed something or had questions before we even checked in! We will miss this  Beacon Hill apartment!

Great place to stay!
Apartment was as described in a walkable area with plenty of restaurants and shopping nearby.
Very nice place to stay. The room was clean and comfortable. Would definitely recommend!
la casa di Jurek è molto confortevole, pulita e dotata di quanto necessita.Vicino alla metro che permette di visitare la città muovendosi rapidamente. consiglio vivamente

Great Stay in Fenway!
This was my first trip to Boston and found this place to be just what I needed. Being in close proximity to Fenway Park and public transit made it ideal to get around town for the few days I was there. I didn’t see an elevator in the building so be ready to have to bring your luggage up a flight of stairs (unit was on the second floor) but was easy to access after that. Place is great for solo travelers or for couples.
Thanks for the great stay!
very homey it has a full kitchen nice bathroom and it was clean definitely I'm going to return
Close to train station…traveled with my two kids and they loved it.

My wife and I stayed at Bill and Maureen's for two nights while passing through Boston. We loved the neighborhood and the suite. You are just a couple of blocks from the "Southie" beaches, a wonderful park, and a variety of restaurants. it was a quiet neighborhood that we felt very safe. If you are adventurous, and enjoy walking it is possible to walk to downtown(2.5 miles), but if not there is a bus stop 1 block away. overall it was a very nice experience and the room was as advertised.  Everything was very clean and updated. Would definitely stay here again.

This was a fantastic place to stay right in the heart of the North End! My husband and I came for a long weekend and were very comfortable here. The apartment was clean and warm when we arrived and had all the basic necessities we needed. It is very walkable to all of the north end, and we enjoyed walking all over Boston, even walking over the Charles River to Cambridge to visit MIT. We can definitely recommend this as a great place to stay in Boston!

This apartment is in a great location! We walked our way all over the city. It is super safe, clean and beautiful in the area. The apartment is very nicely decorated and the hosts were super flexible with last minute check in requirements. There is a washer and dryer in the building which was very handy & the towels in the bathroom were so thick and soft - love that! The only downside is the window blind does not do much to block out light - by 5.15am the apartment is super bright and the balcony door has no blind at all. Apart from that, we had a wonderful stay.
The place was exactly as advertised: clean, comfortable, and well-located. Our stay was smooth and uneventful, just the way we like it. Would recommend!

I had the most pleasant stay in 508 Beacon Street. Perfect location. Communication with the host was quick and very helpful. I would definitely recommend this place and would definitely want to com back if I am in Boston. again.
Outstanding place to stay and visit Boston!

Aaron, Catherine, and Caroline were amazing. Incredibly helpful, kind, funny, and fantastic hosts. While staying here, I had breakfast twice snd dinner once with them and each meal was delightful and unlike anything I’ve found with previous b&bs. The home is full of art and vintage pieces. It’s quiet, peaceful, and I felt like I was staying in France, and not in Boston! I would recommend their home to anyone traveling and looking for a sense of adventure, looking to hear great stories and connect with others, and feel at home, away from
home.
Accommodation was great, lovely space and clean. Great location as well at a reasonable price for Boston. Definitely recommend to stay here.

We enjoyed our stay at Jessica's place during our visit to Boston. The accommodation is cozy and comfortable. It is close to the subway station and in a nice neighbourhood. Jessica was also a welcoming and helpful host.

This apartment location is fantastic and the studio is small and cute. The apartment itself is a bit beat up and not exactly quiet. The biggest issue is that on the Friday of my stay there was someone vacuuming the stairs/hallway at 8am. Loudly and unapologetically. Three different apartments came out and asked him to stop but he just laughed straight in our faces and kept going. Total disregard, you should find a less disturbing time to clean, honestly.
Room was clean and private. Perfect location for walking where I needed to be. Easy check in and out. I would definitely book again if going back to Boston.

This is a lovely apartment with lots of natural light, very clean and well-kept. It's in a great location, just a one-minute walk from the T.  If you park in the driveway, you can take the T and not have to worry about parking in Boston, which can be very pricey.

Penny is super host and provide sufficient service and information around the place. Very nice decoration at her home like master pieces. You could not imagine how beautiful when you lay down for reading in the afternoon with sunlight illuminating into the room. And location is fabulous and easy to take train to head to downtown less than half an hour.

Excellent hosts, answer questions in a timely fashion and are super friendly. the entire house is clean and super nice, the only caveat is that the room is quite small ; however, if you're only going to use it for sleeping it's perfect. Bathroom was always clean, no problems, and the common areas (kitchen, living room, garden, etc.) are big.
Great location. Comfy. If you have mobility issues beware spiral staircase is not for the heavy or non athletic. Shower is tough to enter/exit with out good exertional and balance capabilities.
Great place, right across for a 7 eleven. Parking was easy to find.
Ideal location! Super clean and comfy studio!
Nice and clean apartment. Very close to the Logon airport which helps me a lot to plan my tour.
Such a lovely home! Aaron and Catherine are very gracious hosts and we felt comfortable immediately. Would absolutely stay here again. Thank you for everything!

I had a great stay at Jonathan's place. It is conveniently located a little walk from the subway station. The best part, however, is the place itself. Jonathan has clearly spent a lot of effort making the apartment very nice. The kitchen is large and modern, the living room stylish. There were many thoughtful touches to my room (drinking water, a plan of the surrounding, a hand-written note). It was overall a wonderful stay and one of the best airbnb experiences that I have had.

We really enjoyed our stay here. The apartment is very well located, within easy walking distance of tons of great restaurants (including a fantastic Thai restaurant just downstairs!). The space is definitely small, but very well appointed to make efficient use of what's available. After spending an entire month here with my wife, I would absolute recommend it to anyone traveling to Boston alone or as a couple.
Very comfortable place. Great for visiting Boston if plan to use the subway.

Bill was an incredibly friendly and welcoming host! He went out of his way to be helpful throughout our stay. The location was perfect—close to everything we needed. The space was clean, cozy, and the bed was super comfortable. We had a great experience and will definitely be back. Highly recommend!
Such a great and beautiful stay! A beautiful home in the heart of Back Bay that is in flexible walking distance of all you may need. I look forward to coming back on my next Boston trip!
Great location, easy parking. Excellent communication with host. Enjoyed our trip!
Convenait parfaitement à nos besoins!

What a gem of a find - easy 5 stars! This location was so perfect for all the places I wanted to visit in Boston and everything about my stay was simple and easy. I reached out to Peter about checking in a little later than usual and with some other random questions over the weekend. He was always quick to reply and very accommodating. The apartment was clean and looked exactly like the pictures, plus had everything we needed. I would absolutely recommend staying here, particularly if you are interested in the South End or South Boston and if you’re visiting anywhere else it’s minutes from the train station and very easy to find parking or other public transportation near this spot! Thank you so much Peter!

Wow, this place is so nice. All we needed in a nice package. Private room and beautiful private bathroom. Closet too! A little kitchenette we could use (shared), but just perfect. We got to meet the owner and see the other units available. Just perfect.
The location couldn't be better.......and yet the neighborhood, residential, was so quiet and nice. There is parking in Marlene's driveway for up to 3 cars (for the 3 units). We felt very safe. There was even a Dunkin within walking distance. We will certainly come back when we're looking for a Boston weekend getaway!
Nice and clean

Our time in Boston was fantastic. The home was very clean and it is right next door to a restaurant. The location in South Boston was pretty convenient too, about a 20 minute drive to Boston Common. The host Lance was great and he communicated well through the Swank application as well as email. If we go back to Boston (which I do believe we will) we will be staying in a Swank Property. If you are not from Boston, parking can be a bit tricky so park and then Uber or Lyft elsewhere. Such a great city and property.

No A/C in the bedroom, no elevator in the building,  unreachable microwave placed on top of a large fridge is an accident waiting to happen and lack of cleanliness. Too much overpriced for what it offers, definitely not a place to be recommended.
Riyo was very nice and super accommodating. we thought her space was super cute and would like to stay again.

William’s place is a blast! There was tons of free parking available. The pool table and ping pong table was a fun touch. Being above the bar was awesome. The bartenders knew exactly who we were and made sure we had a blast! And it was nice knowing there were people downstairs that were willing to help us if we needed anything. We came here for my bachelorette party and it was the perfect atmosphere and very spacious. Will definitely stay again next time I’m in Boston!

This is a wonderful Airbnb for a long-term stay in Boston! We stayed for a month while working remotely and really enjoyed it. There is reliable wifi and we had no trouble finding street parking. The kitchen was well stocked and I appreciated that it had a dishwasher and laundry. It was an easy walk to the train station. I would stay again!
V comfortable, clean, cosy, secure, well equipped studio apartment in swanky location.
Clean and tidy.
Amazing place to stay. They have a beautiful Catholic Shrine and cemetery next to the building, and a very clean apartment.
Convenient location, I’d consider staying again

Staying in Ewa‘s apartment was great. It was super clean and Ewa is an amazing host - very responsive and helpful. The sofa may be a little bit small for two adults but we used the air bed as well, which was great. We would come back!
the apartment was in a great location couple minutes walk from the harbor walk..Jacob was great and got problem with the lock on the door resolved quickly.

Had meetings in downtown Boston & didn't feel like paying $300+ for a tiny room & another $50 for parking.  Jessy & Diego's spot was barely over 10 minutes to get to the waterfront downtown & close to everything.  Yeah, the street can be noisy, but honestly I had the a/c on & didn't hear a thing @ night.

I enjoyed my stay at Steven's place. The place is in a perfect location. Lots of restaurants and tourists spots in walking distance. The area also felt safe to walk around at night. The apartment itself makes you feel like you're comfortable at home, and it was cute! Steven's instructions on checking in/out were also very clear. I would stay here again!
This location was perfect for our trip. 5 minute walk from the commuter rail line. Interior is spotless and exactly as the pictures portray.

We would stay here again! Great location in the North End of town. Minutes to Freedom Trail. If you’re going to stay in Boston near everything with a group of family and friends this is the place. Although I would caution those with limited mobility because it is a boat. Otherwise excellent!
Great place to stay if visiting Boston from out of town!

This is the second time I have stayed at Sienna's place. As before, it was a great experience. I particularly love her very large bathroom and bedroom, difficult to find in Boston. The neighborhood is also really great with lots of restaurants and students all over the place.
A great spot if you want to be near the airport. We caught an Uber for $7 and it took under 8 minutes. It’s clean and comfortable, too.

Albena's place was perfect!  We were only there for a layover, flew in that night and out the next morning.  Such a convenient location for the airport, with still plenty to do with a neighborhood feel.  The place is exactly like the pictures and had everything we needed.  We would love to stay there again.
The house is located next to the subway rail, making it a bit noisy. The stay was okay, and a nearby grocery store is a 17-minute walk away.

Excellent place to stay with hospitable host! The location is quiet and very close to boston. The studio has one of the comfiest beds I’ve ever stayed at and the bathroom was squeaky clean. Highly recommend!
Great location , easy check-in , made for a good weekend

The apartment was just as described. Bathrooms were updated and clean along with all the kitchen equipment needed (including salt, pepper, cook spray). thoughtfully simplistic design making for a great stay.
This apartment is on a main intersection and has plenty of city noises you will hear most of the evening (it did not bother us as we are use to city living).
Conveniently located across from Orient Heights Blue Line T and above the delicious Angela's breakfast staple to East Boston, along with a stop away from the airport.
We would gladly stay in the location again. Thanks you!
Host was very nice and responded very quickly. Great location, close to everything. Room was clean and cozy. Recommend staying here!!!!

The hosts are charming, warm, and gracious. I enjoyed after dinner tea and morning mochas where we chatted about travel, languages, and the like. They provided excellent local tips on where to dine, explained how to maneuver the public transit,  and reviewed house rules to lay out expectations. Could not have been happier with my choice to stay here. It was a  welcome retreat from the bustle of exploring the city. Thank you for a lovely stay and I look forward to returning!

I'd say that this is a much better experience than I expected. The house has plenty space with a classic living room and a balcony for breakfast. The neighborhood is convenient but peaceful at night. Definitely will consider this place if visit again!
our stay was awesome! Isabel’s home provided us with everything we needed in order to enjoy our weekend long stay! She was very easy to follow with instructions.
Our stay was great! Hosts were very responsive and had easy check-in/ check-out directions. The unit is spotless and stocked with all the essentials. We’ll be staying again.
Centrally located. Heart of downtown.  Quiet

Glenn and Kevin (who we met at the apartment) were very responsive to communication and were flexible with our request to check out late.  The apartment was great- spacious, clean, good location with lots of restaurants around.  Would not hesitate to stay here again if back in the area.

Everything was as described, comfy bed, good shower and well equipped kitchen, plus some extra supplies eg butter and coffee. 10/15 min walk to the Savin Hill station into downtown.
Stayed 4 nights and would recommend.

Tan was very kind and respectful and responsive. Unfortunately his cleaning crew and maintenance crew left much to be desired. Firstly we arrived late at night and my in laws were in the master bedroom when I realized we completely ran out of toilet paper. We had to bang on their door in the middle of the night only to find they had left 2 rolls and one almost gone roll of toilet paper for 9 people. I also noticed the hand soap that was almost empty looked as if it was watered down dish soap. After finding out there was no toilet paper and being asked to go down 5 flights (or more of stairs) to try to find the dishwasher detergent from a closet in the basement (they were also out of) I said forget it and just got the extra body wash to use as hand soap.
He had the cleaning crew deliver more toilet paper and coffee the next day which we appreciated.
The air conditioner did not work we are on the 3rd floor and the fridge ruined over $100 of groceries. It was hot and miserable.

Indeed better rates when compared to other places it is indeed on a walk up but doable house is on a hill for which allows the nice view but overall manageable and near to the subway ...rooms very spacious a temperamental thermostat and 1 bathroom but sufficient toiletries and overall dinner ware. Just had issue upon check in with designated code and due to the rental being part of a company no direct person on call so had to resort to leaving voicemail and awaiting their call back but all in all enjoyable stay thank you

This location was perfect for my extended stay in Boston. It was within walking distance of MGH,  Laundry services, Whole Foods, and public transportation.  Sophia was an amazing host and extremely prompt with answering emails.

Spotless apartment with incredibly accommodating hosts!
This place exceeded our expectations in every way. The apartment was absolutely immaculate - you could tell the hosts take real pride in maintaining their space. Everything was sparkling clean from the moment we walked in.
What really made our stay special was how flexible and responsive the team was. They worked with us on check-in timing and were quick to answer any questions we had. It's rare to find hosts who are both professional and genuinely caring about their guests' experience.
Would definitely stay here again and recommend to anyone looking for a hassle-free, comfortable place to stay!

Excellent location, convenient to the T and bus stops
Walkable area with a grocery store and restaurants nearby
Excellent location, beautiful flower lined street, tastefully decorated studio. Only issues were AC very loud and street noise most of the night.  I would stay again.

Wow! This was such a rare find to be able to stay so close to the center of downtown near so much to do shopping, the zoo, the stadium etc. and yet also have the space for the family that we needed during our time relocating to Boston. It was sad to leave after just a few months and if we ever need temporary housing again this will be our go to here in Boston!
Really nice place especially for the price. Charles is very helpful and easy to contact. Close to a lot of restaurants.

What a charmer! Terrifically maintained and well-appointed old home that gives you a real feel for a true Boston neighborhood, just outside the city proper.
Felt like a local walking to some great local restaurants in Jamaica Plain neighborhood. Easy access to the heart of Boston too, via a beautiful walk through the Harvard Arboretum that takes you to the train station.

Absolutely awesome! I loved this location. The room is pretty small but it's still very comfortable - bed is fantastic. The kitchen is very handy. There are two in the area where the dorms are, so make sure you check both if you think it's missing dishes.
Edmund is respectful and amazingly responsive!

Overall, it was fantastic! The room was a perfect size for two people, and the place is also easy to find! The lobby area and room were super clean and everything you could ever want was provided for... We forgot our own shampoo, but we didn't have to worry as it was also provided for us as well! We are definitely going to stay here again if we ever come back to Boston!

Wir hatten eine wunderbare Zeit in Boston. Die Unterkunft ist hervorragend, sehr zentral gelegen. Vieles ist zu Fuß erreichbar und die U- Bahnstation Downtown Crossing ist direkt bei Aaron's Loft. Ich würde es wieder für einen Aufenthalt in Boston buchen.
Convenient to the T. Short walk, but you can hear the T slightly at night while sleeping. Comfortable and clean house.

The home is just like the photos. Clean and in a great area.
Made a few suggestions that would make it even better!
Biggest frustration is that one bed was only a “Full” at best. Not a Queen as listed. Too small for us and would have deterred us from booking this home had we known.

Terry's place was exactly what we needed to end our two week trip along the East Coast. The place was larger than expected, quiet, well-appointed. No complaints whatsoever! We chose to use Lyft and Uber out the front door so had minimal interaction with the neighborhood (which in some areas seemed a bit sketchy, yet we always felt safe). We felt secure and at home our whole visit and really appreciated the A/C! Terry was always easy to reach and very accommodating. Only wish it was more centrally located to the sites downtown. On the other hand, for the price, it was a terrific value and I'm glad our family got to experience a true Boston row house!
This was a great space and location for our stay in Boston.   We would definitely come back.
Easy access to the T and walkable to Centre Street shops and restaurants
The pool was one of the only reasons we picked this place and when we arrived we found out the pool was closed for repair. But other than that it was an enjoyable experience
Great place!
We had a lovely stay. Thank you.
We were able to get to all the Boston sites easily from their place, and the T was a bargain for a one week Charlie card.
A wonderful place ... very clean... extra special touches... great help where to go and what to see and how to get there...  we will definitely use this place again when visiting Boston !!
Great host. Was very responsive. We enjoyed the private room with a private washroom as well as the spacious kitchen.
great location. some nice small restaurants nearby! very easy walk to the train to get downtown. not far from a lot of other attractions either.
The house is clean, and the location is great. My friends and I had a great time in Boston!
I loved the place everything was clean and the host is so friendly and responsive, will definitely comeback in the future.
Great location and perfect spot for yourself or with a +1!
Perfect location & everything about the apartment was excellent. Would highly recommend.

hermoso cuarto, tal cual la foto, cama muy confortable, la gente muy respetuosa, baño
muy limpio y ordenado.
Place was spotless and easy to access!
Great, comfortable, spacious option close to lots of great restaurants in Allston. Very easy to check in and out on our own, and Sheila was proactive about reaching out to send us the info we needed.
That was a great staying. Very responsive and nice host. I would love to stay in her place if I come back to this area!

We did not meet Lance or anyone from the company, however, the service was excellent. Wonderful apartment, great views, space, clean & well stocked. Nice neighbourhood & easy to get around on the T line. Traffic noise was the only negative.
We had the best time!! Such a perfect location and great spot for a weekend visit! Thank you!

We had a fantastic stay at Roberts place while in Boston! Very clean & located in a great spot in the North End (bonus: very close to the famous Regina’s Pizzeria!)
Great value, would definitely stay here again!

Unkomplizierte Wohnung mit unkomplizierter Gastgeberin. Besonders gut fanden wir die nahe gelegene Shopping Mall mit Supermärkten, Shops, Restaurants. Sehr genossen haben wir auch den kleinen Garten. Vielen Dank
Very beautiful apartment. Loved that there were games for us play and a usuable kitchen.

Excellent value. Gets the rating based mostly on that. Steep stairs, tight street for parking though I always found a spot in the same block. Good bedding and towels included! Master was a comfortable bed. Could use better shades and planes start about 6am every morning.
Closest train is a commuter rail - check schedule before setting out! It runs about every 45 minutes. About a 10 minute walk for brisk walkers. No kiosk for Charlie card there.
Pictures are a bit of an up sell but not far off. Door was not set right when we came but it was fixed without asking. Owner was quick to respond to request to add channels to Roku.
Owner appears to have 3 units in one building. Top floor means no one walking above you!
Looks like the pictures, everything as described, no worries. Will need to use the host's rental portal, but it's easy to use.

Nice and tidy.
Considerable host

We enjoyed the clean studio, nice touches like breakfast in the frig (bagels, cream cheese, orange juice, milk, tea,  coffee, bananas).  The kitchen was well stocked, free parking in the back, hints about the area and restaurant menus.  The bed was only a double but we slept well.

CHECK IN IS AT 5PM! CHECK OUT At 10 am, so plan accordingly . The apartment is n a good location, check in was a lit bit confusing but that’s on us. The bed is the MOST UNCOMFORTABLE thing ever, not for light sleepers! the towels look cheap  and you only have  2. This aside, The host team are nice and the place is pretty.

If you are looking for a place that feels like home and hosts that make you feel like their place is your 2nd home then You’ve come to the right place. I’ve stayed several times and each time it feels like I’ve come home and felt very welcome. The neighbor hood is also a great location, everything from a super market place to a subway / metro / underground is right there.
Aaron and Lu will quickly answer any questions and provide suggestions if you need them, as well as to make sure you have everything that you need.
I will be back up to Boston and will definitely stay again and again and again.

Nicely located in quiet, well maintained neighborhood w lots of shade trees and plenty of on street parking. Jonathan was a great host, the place was squeaky clean, and the layout inside was very well thought out.
Excellent house, clean. Straightforward check in.

Very clean and spacious for two people. The parking was convenient and secluded behind the apartment which we really liked. Attention to detail was noticeable throughout. Busses were available, as well as a short 10-15min Uber ride to the areas we wanted to see.
Excelentes
Everything is well organized. 10mins walk distance to red line, 15mins to downtown. Thomas is an awesome guy, highly recommend!

We loved our stay, the apartment was even more spacious in person than it looked in the photos! The rooms were clean and the layout was great for the 4 of us to have our own space and come together for meals and conversation. The location is a quick walk to the Park St.  station and we were able to walk almost everywhere we wanted to go in Boston. Highly recommend this listing.
Stayed here for a quick weekend trip. Didn’t need anything fancy and wanted to go a cheaper route. I was very happy with my stay and would definitely stay again
Great location to stay in Boston & very helpful/responsive host

What a great location to explore Boston on foot!  Easy check in, load-in, lower floor unit a plus.  Clean, comfy and dog-friendly!  I had a car and there was easy, secure paid parking nearby.  Gas fireplace a plus for a cozy winter getaway.  Highly recommended!

it is great! the responses are fast! Excellent location. one thing you mind need to pay attention to is the stairs:) I lived in the top floors, it made me exhausted to carry my big luggage to the top floor.
Siena’s place was very clean and the perfect location for my visit. I will definitely be back.

We had a great stay at Jason’s apartment. Located in the north end nearby lots of great cafes and restaurants. Very walkable and centrally located. Would highly recommend both this apartment and Jason as a host.
Amazing stay

My fiancé and I had a wonderful time, the room looked exactly how it is in the picture. This was my first time surprising him with roses and candles. Gunel was so helpful and sweet, I didn’t see that the kitchen wasn’t included in the stay, but Gunel was so understanding and let him cook which was a very sweet and romantic dinner. Her home felt like another home, I would definitely recommend her to anyone. I can not express how much we enjoyed ourselves. Thank you so much Gunel for a wonderful experience in your home. Also the balcony was amazing to relax at night with a glass of wine.

OMG!!!
Let me start by thanking Viktoria and her husband for being such great host very responsible and they make sure I had a great experience while staying there. The house is beautiful and well equipped with everything. It is simply a luxury and a welcoming house. I truly think the pictures didn’t make this cozy and beautiful house justice. I will definitely come back and recommend anyone who wants to have a luxurious experience at an Airbnb in Boston area and surrounding.
Thank you guys for everything!
Excellent
Great location, easy check-in/out, clean and comfortable space.  Would definitely book again!
Everything was exactly as described, received clear check in/out instructions days in advance which allowed for easier planning.

You will love this place, great location, beautiful apartment, nicely organized,
Very well stocked with with everything you may need.
Great Value
The location is very good and the room was very clean, with the AC and the fridge it was perfect ! Thanks

The location is great access to the city of Boston.  Many places were within walking distance.  The accommodations were excellent and would recommend to anyone coming into the Boston area.  There is no detail left out at this location.

Nous avons passé une très bonne semaine en famille dans ce logement très propre et bien aménagé. La station de la red Line n’est qu’à 10 min à pieds et le petit supermarché au coin de la rue est vraiment très pratique. Nous recommandons chaleureusement
Great location near the airport
Exactly what we needed for a quick weekend getaway! Nice and friendly host. And a quick walk to most anything you need. Thanks for having us!

The unit was very clean and easily accessible.  Close to my daughter's place and within walking distance to the T which we used almost every day to get into the city.  Evans was very communicative and helpful.  We didn't have a car but could have parked on the street if we needed to.

The place is really nice and the location is great. The only problem was that the room and bathroom were very dirty.  For example, there was dust under the bed as if no one had ever cleaned it. We also found a dirty sock. I think it is too expensive for the condition of the room that is offered.

Amazing Airbnb, super clean, spacious, good amenities (snacks, drinks, etc), seamless self check in so I didn’t have to worry about being there at a certain time to check in, really can’t complain about anything. Superb
Great convenient location. Be prepared for some night time noise. The space was very clean feeling and the host communication was excellent.
Great location for walking around Boston.

Robert is an excellent host. He responds to messages within a minute or two. He is friendly and was always responsive to questions/concerns.
The place is very clean, with very new and clean amenities. It truly felt like home away from home. I was very comfortable and happy, and felt like everything I'd need around the apartment was provided.
It is in a great location surrounded by Italian restaurants and pastry shops, and a 10 minute walk to the metro station.
I would recommend this place to anyone visiting Boston and would certainly stay here again!
Thank you Andrew for being so responsive and helping with any issues!
we hadden een echt goede tijd bij Anna.
As always, Carol gave us a home away from home - and so grateful for the cold bottled water after a long hot day !

Fantastic spot. Very comfortable and quiet, and we slept well.
Super convenient location, a real find! Would happily stay here again.

Listing description was very accurate and the room looks exactly how its pictured. Nice neighborhood, very close to HBS! I didn't get to meet Todd (He did come by, but I was out all day) but we adequately kept in touch through email. No complaints.
Super nice, clean and quiet, and all the wonderful personal touches. Strongly recommend.
Lovely place that has everything you need.  Cool neighborhood too.  Also close to two nearby stations to catch the train!!

It's right in the center of Boston making it convenient to walk to all majors spots in the city. There is small grocery store nearthe house for getting emergy food and scacks. The place is perfect for a couple looking to spend a weekend in Boston city.
Great location and a comfortable stay. While I didn’t use it, the included parking adds to the value of this place
We had an amazing time and we can’t wait to visit again!
Really nice place
Beautiful location. Very private. Very quiet and relaxing. We had a great time.
The only drawback is the vary late check-in (not before 5 pm!) and the impossibility to leave luggage there... Otherwise great place!
Alles wie beschrieben, ruhige Gegend. Mit dem Auto gut erreichbar.

The Southie house was a perfect place for my husband and my preschool aged children and I. It's proximity to everything made it easy to get around the city, and the parking spot was an amazing bonus, especially in the city.
My children loved the swing set in the back, the toys and books in the house and the bunk beds. The wifi was fast making it easy to either play games on tablets or watch their favorite show in the AM.
Jack and Heather really thought of everything in this house. The kitchen is well stocked with every pan, plate, or utensil you need to cook, every night stand has power strips with both USB ports and plugs, plenty of towels, and supplies to clean dishes.
Overall, this was an excellent place for our short family vacation and I would definitely stay here again!

It’s a very well designed and well appointed apartment, far nicer in terms of quality of furnishing and amenities than most places we have stayed, and we are well traveled. After a long day of museums, walking from one end of Boston to the next, it’s a great place to relax,  be comfortable and enjoy the elegant features of a safe and peaceful retreat.
Was the perfect space to work remotely while visiting the area. Thanks again.
Nice stay at Rich’s place for a couple of nights. We had some issues with the WiFi not working, which Rich managed to fix for us. All in all a good stay - recommend.
This apartment is simple, clean, recently renovated, quiet, all in all a lovely bargain that doesn’t feel like a compromise in any way. Highly recommended.

Hermina is a wonderful individual! She was very kind and willing to help with whatever was needed. We stayed when there was a heat wave though, and there was no mention of a lack of A/C on the listing. All windows were opened and the fan was turned all the way up, but it was still a sweaty few nights. Otherwise, the stay was fine. Right near a grocery store, liquor store, and the T station, which made it easy to budget if necessary. The area is not upscale by any means, but there are some fairly authentic, decent Vietnamese restaurants around. The house was best to stay in for nights rather than exploring around the immediate area during the day.

Wir wurden von der Gastgeberin Anna sehr herzlich empfangen. Das Zimmer war sauber, auch das Bad war sehr ordentlich. Wir haben viele Empfehlungen von Anna für die Gegend und den Nahverkehr bekommen, sie war immer sehr hilfreich und konnte uns bei allen Nachfragen behilflich sein. Ein sehr guter Aufenthalt.

Un très joli appartement dans une petite maison.
Un peu à l écart de Boston downtown (10/15mns) mais très bien entretenu et très propre.
Le parking est dans la rue ... gratuit ce qui est remarquable à Boston
3 chambres dont une avec un double lit double
Par contre, un lit pliant est disponible pour la 9 éme personne mais ne peut qu être ouvert dans le salon, dommage
En équipement, il faut rajouter une machine à laver et un sèche linge, très pratique!
Seul reproche, on entend facilement les voisins dans ces maisons en bois
Bonne adresse

The location is perfect in beacon hill with lot of restaurant and transport , the host was really kind and réactif however it's very cold inside because the door even close let the wind pass but I recommend this apartment for the summer and the spring without problem

Staying at Maude’s place was like staying at an eclectic museum. The house is comfortable and extremely well- stocked. We were thankful for the snacks and the wine she left for us. The location was great and we walked all over Boston. We enjoyed the little store, Formagio , that was right across the street. It’s the perfect place for wine, charcuterie, baked goods and prepared food.  We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and it made our first time in Boston extra special.

We had a great stay at this cute apartment practically on top of Boston Commons! The location was great - so walkable, grocery store nearby, lots of restaurants. We had a few issues with some power outlets that were resolved very quickly. The response time was so quick - thank you! Would definitely stay here again. It was perfect for traveling with little kids. They loved the proximity to the playground and the start of the freedom trail.
Curtis apartment was a beautiful and comfortable place to stay ! Curtis was a amazing host.
Everything was great and comfortable.
Great place and close to everything.  Close to the T, close to grocery stores and other things that make stay easy. Highly recommend.

This was my first Airbnb experience and it was a great one! Brooke was accommodating in making check-in and check-out so simple. The room was perfectly clean, spacious, and comfortable.  All the details were covered from clean towels and washcloths to soap and shampoo being available.  I was pleased that the room and bathroom were private.  The location was great in that it only took about 10-15 minutes to walk to the convention center.
Excellent place! Highly recommend. Description is accurate.
Great stay! Easy check in and house was really beautiful and clean. Would definitely recommend

A great value apartment in all aspects. Location is great and good for people with a rental car, if not you're just a 5 min walk from the nearest T. I visited during a winter storm, and the driveway was cleared out and clean, making it easy for us to get our car out. Superb!

This airbnb was excellent! The hosts were responsive and the apartment appeared just as shown in the photos. We had a great time visiting Boston, knowing we had a safe and well kept apartment to return to. Very thankful.
Easy access to T station and lots of nice restaurants around! We thoroughly enjoyed our stay!
Amazing location in Hyde Park. This place has everything you need for a small group like ours. Highly recommended location and its hosts are amazing people. One of my favorite airbnb in Boston.
Elena anticipated our needs with helpful directions and supplies. We slept well in her quiet and comfortable home.

Beautiful home, welcoming hosts. Gorgeous surroundings, it was hard to believe I was in the city. There were woods surrounding the house, yet you are very close to Centre street and all of the restaurants, etc. I was a little nervous about the non-attached bathroom but they made me feel so right at home it really wasn't a big deal to walk through the kitchen to the bathroom when needed.
Howard was so welcoming! Always available if we needed him. Wonderful location! The food in the area was amazing and the views were so lovely 😊
Very clean place, host was available for anything I needed. Great location! Would definitely stay here again!
Nice stay in a very convenient location in Boston! Thanks!
We had a good stay. Thanks!

Clara has a beautiful home that is kept very clean and in a great location with a lot of ammenities in the proximity. Breakfast items were provided and we had good conversations with her. We would caution guests to ensure that they are clear with details regarding their stay as we experienced a surprising amount of miscommunication which added a unnecessary level of distress to our stay. But overall, everything sufficient.
Location, location, location!

New everything, very tasteful, with care and thought to the design, along with extra touches. Such as the little cubbies in the wall at either side of the 3rd floor bed, complete with light and plugs.
Thank you so much for a lovely stay

My wife and I were in Boston for a few days wrapping up a Fall roadtrip and enjoyed our two-night stay at this place. It was clean and matched the pictures/description posted online. There were 3 different access points with codes to get into our room, but we didn’t mind that at all. It made us feel very safe and secure when we got settled in the room. It was within walking distance to several great restaurants and entertainment. The host was very kind and responsive. We’ll definitely be looking to stay here again next time we’re in downtown Boston.
Great location, great host and communication, clean and very cute space.
Very comfortable with classic Boston feel.  walking distance to several pubs and restaurants. Really enjoyed the deck in the evening!

Perfect location to explore the South End. Walkable to everything. I left a rather expensive suit behind hanging in the closet and Drew went out of his way to make arrangements for it to be returned. Would stay again!
We really enjoyed our stay in Boston. The place was clean and very accessible to everything.
The host was perfect with everything! The room was very nice and homey, and the bathroom and kitchen were very clean.
Super nice place with all of the things you’d need! Plenty of space, very clean, and easy check in. Loved our stay!
Convenient location

We really appreciated the flexibility with the self check in since we didn’t get in until very late. The location was quiet and a quick walk to the subway so we could easily get into downtown each day. Thanks for letting us stay!
It was perfect.
Great location. Always found a parking on street. Kitchen fully equipped. Wonderful host.

I had a comfortable stay at this apartment, it is in a great area close to a lot of restaurants and parks! The apartment was clean, bed was cozy, shower was hot, and I appreciated the water kettle - everything I needed (which was not much) was provided. Heating is centrally controlled, so just be aware if the weather is unusually chilly during a non-Winter month.
This Airbnb is awesome, great location, great house and really just great everything. Would stay here again for sure in the future if I’m back in Boston.

Eder’s house was great for our group of 9 as there were enough beds for us all and a well- stocked kitchen. He was able to quickly accommodate us at the last minute and public transportation was easily accessible.
Great location and nice apartment. Washer and dryer works great. Highly recommended!
Wonderful space and extremely responsive and kind host! Will stay again when we return to Boston!

Great stay.  Super clean, super nice place.  Really great location, only a few minutes walk from places like Faneuil Hall, the Public Market, Boston Commons, and the waterfront.  Instructions from host were super clear, and communication was fast and easy.  Definitely recommend.
Perfect airport location in a house with a very friendly host! We had a great stay. The communication was very good! I definitely recommend staying here!

I feel like the place we stayed was a gem among Back Bay. It was very reasonably priced to be right in the center of that neighborhood! It was very peaceful and quiet despite being popular. The unit itself was great, super clean, the ac was amazing to have. Would recommend and come back!
Great place! Will rebook when I visit Boston
Great location and convenient check in and use of the public spaces.
This was our second time staying at Andy's place. It is in a great location and very comfortable.

Shira's place was perfect for us. We enjoyed the family-centric neighborhood nestled in Brighton. Clean, quiet, we loved the sunny apartment and the fact it had plenty of room for us to stretch out and make ourselves at home. This place is ideal if you enjoy off-the-beaten-path traveling like us-with a nice, short walk to the T stop.

Not only is this a great location, it is a nice place. The kitchen and baths were updated. We could have had twice as many people in the space than we had. Beds were comfortable and linens were good quality and ample. We did not get to use the outdoor space but it was so inviting! All in all, a great place.
깔끔하고 아기자기합니다. 구비된 물품이 많아 편리했어요. 어려움 없이 잘 지냈습니다.
Great host!

Mary was such a sweet host, and the place was so cozy!
The location was also close to the Franklin Park Zoo so it was good to enjoy their Light Show and come back to the suite at night.

Great place in a great location! We had zero problems during our stay, everything was smooth and checkin/checkout were super simple and straightforward. Place was spacious and clean. The surrounding area was quiet and walkable, and right on top of the T station. Would definitely stay again!
The location is great. His place is very clean and comfortable. I really enjoy the stay

Great location if you're arriving from Logan airport and plan to spend some time in Boston. Local train right around the corner, very easy and convenient to get to most corners of Boston by public transport. Great recommendations for local spots by the host!
Great host

Beautiful, cozy, and private little studio apartment... Perfect for the week I was in town for work. You also can't beat the location: historic feeling neighborhood on Beacon Hill, right behind the State House, and could basically walk anywhere I needed. If walking wasn't feasible, there were enough T stations nearby. Loved my stay at this place, felt right at home. Will be back a few more times for work later this year and hope to be able to find vacancy to stay here again!
Super clean, great location and very helpful and clear instructions.

Timothy is an organized and responsive host who leaves detailed information and thoughtful recommendations.  Classic and immaculate, his flat is on a residential street close to cafes, shops, and walking paths.  He offers a rare parking space, and that, combined with the proximity to the highway, made driving there easy.
A beautiful apartment in walking distance to all of the shops and restaurants on Newbury street!
Cool place, very cozy. Perfect for couples to get away for the night!

Catherine was a very communicative host! She gave us all the info we needed and had a phenomenal list of local recommendations :) incredibly close to public transport, this was an overall great place to stay
Great little place in the North End of Boston. Easy walking distance from restaurants and attractions. It was very clean and quiet.
Professionals ! Everything was amazing
Very nice location!

Excelente experiencia. Muy buen trato, comunicación  fluida. Ubicación inmejorable, el lugar muy cómodo, limpio y de acuerdo a la descripción. Una cortesía que nos pusieran  café y azúcar :). Sin duda me volvería a quedar aquí. Totalmente recomendable.
Great place to stay. Can’t beat the location. Elevator “haunted?” 5 story building but elevator occasionally passed the 6th and 7th floor.

Yisheng’s place was nothing short of AMAZING. In a cool area of Southie and also very close to public transport. We were able to easily explore all of Boston from this location. Yisheng was at least a 10 star host though! That’s were the value really comes in - space was clean, luxurious shower, she provided recommendations (and wine glasses ;)) when needed! She was super friendly and even gave us airplane snacks for our trip home! The rooftop was also nothing short of amazing. Overall a great experience in this space. We are hoping to make it back to Boston soon and if this space is available we will definitely be booking. Thanks, Yi!
Great location.
Fantastic place to stay! Recommend it
