I love this apartment so much and would definitely love to come back!😍🫶🏼Felt like home and check-in time also flexible if the room is ready they are so helpful! Thank you so much!
Great Spot!! Perfect for shorter trips to Boston!

I had too high of expectations for this space based on the photos, price, and overall rating. Host is responsive, but in my opinion the room is overpriced vs the value & experience it provided.
The apartment is on the first floor and slightly below ground level. Quiet hours were not respected by the other residents. I woke up to a bathroom centipede that I’d prefer not to share my space with. The apartment is in need of a renovation (stained bathtub, overly used mattress, peeling and cracking paint) which is hard to tell from the photos.

Great little place in Boston's best neighborhood...parks, riverside, shops and restaurants all in easy reach by foot and T stops a few blocks away.
Also, Kaitlyn is. generous in providing household staples, so start w/ food items only.
I replaced most of what I used. Apt is up a couple of flights, but easy.
Great place, clean, easy to find, was perfect for my stay
Place was super clean and smelled great. Communication was clear and concise. Great place to stay for my short overnight trip.

My cousin and I along with our girlfriends had a 2 nights stay at Sandro’s place and this place is a gem indeed. Super clean, spacious, great shower, living room with tv and Sandro left us bottles of water, snacks and a well stocked coffee station. It’s in a centralized area that is safe and a short drive away from many attractions.
Un agradable y comodo lugar.

Can’t beat the location. Quiet and walkable yet close to all back bay and south end attractions. Basic amenities, great for short stay.  Would not recommend if you have trouble with stairs, even though unit is ground level there are three short flights of stairs to get downstairs to the studio. There was a strong smell in the studio from cleaning products.

Very convenient to the airport if needed. Easy access to the Blue line of the subway to get into city proper. Parking is difficult but available around the neighborhood. Only downside depending on the wind, flights from Logan take off over the neighborhood.
Overall an excellent experience. Hosts are very responsive.
A lovely, cozy place to stay when visiting Boston. Easy to access public transportation.
Wonderful spot! Maja and her family are kind and gracious hosts. The unit is spotless and peaceful. The location is amazing. Highly recommended!

We had a wonderful few nights staying in Boston, the apartment was super easy to find and had everything we could need! The location is great and we could walk to most places, for the places further out we found the local T station very handy!
Very comfortable and clean.
Good place to stay
Glenn’s house was clean and spacious. Location was perfect. Glen was helpful and responsive. We had a wonderful weekend.

This apartment is in a great location for everything we needed to be doing and was very clean. I’m giving it 4 stars because of a few reasons. First, and not the owners fault, as others have mentioned the upstairs neighbors are very very loud. They are up early during the week (assuming for work) and on the weekend were having a party until after 2am. We could hear everything. Earplugs are highly recommended. The other reasons are that the amenities were very minimal -It would have been nice to have more kitchen supplies and the beds were not very comfortable. Also the outlet in the bathroom was not working. We will probably look for a different location the next time we are in Boston.

Marlene’s place is immaculately clean and the place is very nice, the bathrooms are gorgeous. It’s a great place when travelling with friends or family where we can all have our own bedrooms and private bathrooms yet able to congregate together in the shared kitchenette for coffee. Great for a weekend getaway where you can Uber into town for under $30. Would stay here again!

Clean and well appointed. Heather was easy to communicate with.
The location can not be beat for access to all of the downtown, Freedom Trail district.

Perfectly wonderful and welcoming is the best way to describe Nicholas’s beautiful home. This flat is also in an incredible location...a stone’s throw away from Newbury and Boylston Streets along with amazing restaurants and shops. Additionally, it is so close to all of the awesome sites and attractions that beautiful Boston has to offer. This home is so charming, spotlessly clean and unbelievably roomy. There are three very large bedrooms which are all cozy and very comfortable and the main bedroom is adorned with a beautiful fireplace. There is an amazing and very large kitchen, a centrally located full bathroom which had a very nice, hot shower, and a cozy and relaxing parlor with Apple TV. It is  just gorgeous, really! Nicholas’s place had all of the conveniences needed to make our stay perfect~and I do mean ALL of the amenities needed. There is a washer and dryer on the lower level and a charming outdoor patio with a wonderful sitting area which looks like something out of Tuscany. The full kitchen is very modern and the delicious coffee, bagels and cream cheese, water, and snacks were so graciously left for us to enjoy. The dining area is roomy and inviting. This flat is truly special! And Nicholas and John are the best!!! They are courteous, informative, professional, and were very easy to reach for any questions that we had. Honestly, they are extremely considerate and thoughtful. The communication before, during, and after our stay was stellar. We came into Boston for our daughter’s parent’s weekend at Boston College, which again, was very readily accessible as are all of the universities in Boston. That said, Back Bay is a happening place, with Newbury and Boylston Streets just around the corner allowing access to all of the delightful restaurants and marvelous shops that your heart should desire. We also walked The Freedom Trail, across to the Charles River and also made our way to Fenway Park for Thursday’s Red-Sox game, which was oh so fun! We ventured to the North End for delicious Italian and of course, to Modern Pastry, which is absolutely our favorite for cannoli. We also made our way to Faneuil Hall and Quincy Market, Copley and the Prudential. Parking is available along with a parking pass. However, there is easy access to everywhere in this very special and historic city and though we did not have a need for the use of the" T"~ it is merely steps away! We will ABSOLUTELY be contacting Nicholas and John for our future visits to Boston College and to this this most spectacular and amazing city! This place is excellent and made our stay most enjoyable and perfect!
Great location and good recommendations.
Great location! Lots of things to do nearby.  Lots of amenities. Close to hospitals (for those travelers). Ottoman is comfortable and can get a good night sleep if guests respect quiet hours.

Jon was such a great and responsive host! I stayed here for 3 months during a work contract that took me to Boston from out of town. I felt so safe and taken care of living here. If anything didn’t work, Jon would fix it within 24 hrs or sooner. If I was in need of a supply or help with anything, Jon was quick to respond and help! I had everything I needed in this spacious, cozy apartment and I am grateful for my time there!
Great location! Very walkable! Awesome stay
Great value, exactly what we needed for the weekend. Parking space is a bit tight, but very doable.

The location was great — it was easy to walk to shops, parks, and other amenities. That said, the building and interior felt a bit more dated than they looked in the photos, and the air conditioner was louder than I expected.
I loved  the central location!

房子的地理位置非常好，距离地铁大概10分钟，公交车站也很近，出行非常方便。
penny 人十分好，非常细心和热心，给我们出行很多建议和帮助，对我们问题的回复也非常快，我们和她的聊天也非常愉快

We had an absolutely wonderful stay.  Thank you so much for hosting us!  Jacklyn and Joel were fabulous hosts and offered help and tips whenever requested.  The space is great for a group stay and very convenient via public transportation!
Nice and cozy place to stay for a few days
great place to stay.  conveniently located. a lot of great restaurants and things to do within walking distance.   would definitely book again.

Clean, comfortable, quiet neighborhood, and free parking - everything you need for an easy overnight stay. Lots of thoughtful touches and clear instructions. I will definitely stay again when I travel solo to Boston.
Overpriced!
Great spot in Back Bay, Boston. Apartment comes as advertised with quick response times and easy access for check-in/check-out
Jeff's place is located in a great area. Lots of restaurants and shops. Great place.

I had an emergent change of plans so could not complete my stay.  However, we chose Lee's Airbnb because of the amazing location, well appointed space, and impeccable reviews.  If his communication and organization is any indication, I'm sure the rest of the stay would be top notch.  Next time I'm there for the ballet, I will book again.
Good experience. Marie is an amazing host.
Great stay! The place was exactly as described—clean, comfortable, and close to everything. Check-in was super easy, and I’d definitely stay here again.

The hosts were so kind and accommodating! We accidentally overlooked our check out date and thought we had one more night with them and they were so kind and understanding throughout the whole process. Definitely recommend working with these hosts for that alone, but the convenience and proximity of the apartment to the airport and downtown Boston are worth the booking as well.

We had a fantastic stay at Kayleigh's place. Perfect location, quiet and family friendly but an easy scenic walk into town. It was really cool using the Bunker Hill monument as a waypoint when coming back in the evenings.
The unit itself is spacious and thoughtfully equipped. We particularly appreciated all the baby stuff available for use, some of the dining set our baby liked better than our own. Pack n play being available saved a bag to travel with too.
Finally Kayleigh was a kind and gracious host, especially reaching out to offer us to stay an extra 2 hours on our last day without being asked. If and when we return to Boston it will be on the top of our list to stay here again. Thank you!!
Great location.
Lovely place to stay for a weekend getaway. Two popular nightclubs are on the same street but we did not experience any noises or commotion. We had everything we needed to cook a homemade meal!

This was a great stay. The AC was not on when we showed up so it was super warm on the top floor (in the summer) but we left the AC on for a bit and it cooled down! A clean spot with just the right amount of space for 1-2 people.
My staying was really comfortable. No problem with chk in chk out. Hosts are really cooperative

We had fun staying at Andrea's for our son's graduation from Tufts; we stayed upstairs and the kids were downstairs.  The house was clean and nicely decorated, and we enjoyed the kitchen and family room space (it was kind of a rainy weekend so we didn't get to take advantage of the deck as much as we wanted!). Overall, we would stay here again if we return to Boston!

What an amazing place to stay in Boston’s South End. This neighborhood is a gem, and Santo’s place is located in the heart of it, close to many restaurants & shops. Check in was seamless and Santo was hands on responsive to an internet problem we experienced. I highly recommend this quaint space and can’t wait to return!!!

Wir hatten das Pech, das wir aufgrund Flugabsagen erst zwei Tage später anreisen konnten. Boris und Susan habe ich daraufhin kontaktiert und wir haben eine Lösung gefunden, die für beide Seiten akzeptabel war. Die Kommunikation funktionierte sehr gut. Das Haus liegt circa 10 Minuten von der Airport Metro Station entfernt mit der man in die Innenstadt fahren kann.

Sami is a very friendly host and we felt very comfortable at his place. Arriving in the late afternoon he even picked us up from the subway station. The location is close to public transit and you can reach downtown by bus and subway in something between 30 and 60 minutes depending on traffic. Make sure you also check out his blog about street art in the US.
good location, good  comunication, poor sound insulation, room lighting could be brighter
Good stay if youre looking to be away from the city but not too far either! Good value
Place was great! Convenient to lots of sights and very clean. Host was communicative and we had all we needed! Would stay again.

Great location and the place seems well kept on the outside and lobby. However, the issues started when the code for my unit wouldn’t work.
Immediately going inside, there were ants everywhere. It may have been an issue with the ground floor unit, but it was absolutely disgusting. The ants got into my personal belongings, such as my toothbrush. The team at Maverick contacted me about being able to address the issue, but only the next day. I could see dead ants for my entire stay, but whatever they did wasn’t completely effective.
Noise was also a big issue, the neighbors coming in and using their keypad was extremely loud, and there was a constant crackling sound from the unit that made it difficult to sleep. Other small things were the shower floor, which looks nice but is made of stone and freezing when you go in.
I would be careful and inquire which floor you are looking at. The higher ups may not have the same issues, but it made our stay absolutely miserable
It was perfect !

Mark and Susan were very friendly and accomodating. The property was private, secluded, in a nicely landscaped wooded area. The koi pond with water fountain was a peaceful attraction, nice peaceful  sound when you enter the property.  Very central to shopping restaurants and our son's house.  Nice pool and a group of five extra-large turkeys that visited regularly.

If you’re looking for a peaceful, quiet, well maintained place to stay in West Roxbury, I recommend. I can see why this is almost always rented out. Right on the bus line, near a lot of amenities. And the owner seems to have thought about every small detail.
We had a great time at Billy’s lovely flat. Great location and Billy’s a good host.

We really enjoyed our week-long stay here. We were visiting family who live in Newton, so it was an ideal location for us, about halfway between the city and our relatives. The neighborhood is very walkable with dozens of great restaurants within a few blocks; we didn't rent a car and had no trouble getting around. As others have written, the apartment is right next to a loud and busy street, and as a light sleeper I was a little worried how disruptive it would be, but I got used to it quickly and didn't have any trouble sleeping. (I've lived in big cities before though, so that may have helped.) The only downside for me was the price; this is one of the most expensive places I have ever stayed, but I guess that's Boston for you.

Wonderful apartment! Perfect location and comfortable stay. Kathe is a phenomenal landlord - always fast to respond to any questions. Feel very fortunate I was able to book this gem, I'd highly recommend staying here :)
We would return!   Great host and prime location.  We really appreciated the clear and quick communication.

The was very cozy and relaxing while we stayed in Boston. The location of the airbnb itself was very convenient and plenty to do within the surrounding areas. The home was decorated very cute and simple while still maintaining the cleanliness. Will definitely return when I come back to Boston.
Place was clean, new, and accurately represented in the listing.
We're really enjoyed staying here! It's in a great location, with lots of fun stuff to do in the area.
Really nice place in a good location!

We stayed at Chris and Kristina's studio for 2 nights with my family (3 adults + one baby)  and we found the place wonderful: very convenient, very clean, cozy and welcoming. The kitchen was very well equipped. Our hosts were very nice and flexible for arrival time and departure. The subway station is very close by and convenient. We loved the neighborhood. We would certainly go back next time we go to Boston.
The apartment was perfect for our family of 4.Clean and comfortable, with basic amenities. Fantastic location to explore and enjoy Boston.

First off, I'll say all of us, (three adults, one infant), agreed - our five days in Boston were significantly improved by staying at this apartment. Our hosts were gracious, and welcoming; we enjoyed our contact with them and appreciated their sincere efforts to share information and their help with negotiating details with our stay.
The apartment was exactly as described and was outfitted with everything we might need to make us feel "at home."
The neighborhood was wonderful. We did a good bit of walking. The homes were fascinating in their colors, style, elaboration and settings. We felt completely at ease walking to the T or for breakfast, walking to the pond or making a run to the drug store.
This was the nicest stay of all my visits, (which are many), to Boston.
Very nice place and near of many public transport train and bus
Great place, clean and great location.

Lori's home is an absolutely beautiful place steeped in style with a gorgeous, well-maintained garden. The atmosphere was intrinsically relaxing and calming, I'm sure it is even cozier in the colder months! Lori herself is a helpful and kind individual who was always there if I needed anything. I wish I had spent more time getting to know her! The neighborhood feels safe (this is coming from a young, feminine person who was travelling alone) and you are a short walk to the subway to get to downtown. I have no complaints at all, even the other people staying there were very respectful and thoughtful. If you are a fan of historical houses and are looking for a very sweet, attentive host, this is the place for you!
Very smooth experience. Cozy and clean. Keyanna was very helpful and friendly.

Kitchen had most things we needed (didn’t have any condiments like salt, pepper, sugar, etc). Common area is very spacious and bedrooms were nice. Showers were a little uncomfortable bc there’s no curtain to keep the draft out. Overall, we enjoyed our stay.
Good location

This apartment is in a great location if you intend to walk to the north end, beacon hill, aquarium, Quincy market, etc. we found a parking garage 1 block away which was reasonably priced for the weekend. All in all, this apt served as a great home-base! We would certainly stay here again.
Great location for the price with two separate comfortable beds. Couldn’t ask for anything better downtown, Steven was an awesome communicator and we had zero problems during our stay.
The apartment is in a quiet neighborhood and very close to Boston by car. About 10-15 minutes drive to all the major sightseeing spots.
Very nice place. Very clean. Was easy to walk to just about everywhere we wanted to go.
Stay was great, thanks Brian!
We had a great stay. Beds were very comfortable. House was clean. Location was good (we had a conference 3 miles away).
Very clean and she is very communicative!

Absolutely beautiful location and home. There was a great welcome letter with instructions and suggestions for the area. Very clean and tidy. Very attentive with any questions that I had responded quickly. I, truly, hope to come back again. Wonderful experience!
My brother and I had an excellent stay at Maverick Suites!

The place was picturesque Boston! So close to all the shops and restaurants. Located on a small quaint street with the most charming deck! Communication with the hosts was timely and they were so kind. The place was very clean, modern and homey. Great little kitchen, with coffee and creamers! The perfect stay! Would love to stay here every time I’m in Boston now!
This was a great spot for a short trip to Boston for a Red Sox game. Five to minute walk to Fenway and lots of restaurants and bars nearby.
great place, perfectly clean, near train station, great hospitality and lots of personalized details. very fast responses to questions. place very well taken care off. some complementary beers too!!

We really enjoyed our stay at Hilary's lovely house in Jamaica Plains. We were made to feel very welcome and Hilary went out of her way to help us out by giving some great reccomendations and allowing us to leave our bags to collect later in the evening.
Jamaica Plains is a fantastic base to explore Boston and there's also an array of great bars and restaurants on  your doorstep, as well as the beautiful Jamaica Pond. The room is small and cosy as advertised and is bright and cheerful in keeping with the rest of the house.
Highly recommended. Thanks for a lovely stay!
place is very close to airport great location to comute to airport , just that one bath is tought to use for 6 adults rest all great

We never met Izzy or anyone else associated with this place. I don't think anyone lives here full time, it appears to be a 4 bedroom apartment with only 1 shared bathroom down a very steep, narrow set of old stairs.
I admire their spirit of entrepreneurship however, we were very disappointed. We came in after dark and the neighborhood did not feel safe. There was absolutely no parking and nowhere to double park on the narrow street. We had to walk almost a block with our luggage, carry it up a very steep set of outdoor stairs to the door and then leave our luggage in the common living space because the stairs to the bedrooms is very steep and narrow with a sharp corner at the top.
This is not a good choice for older people or people with any kind of disabilities.
Great place to stay, working A/C for the hot days.

Perfect bolt hole in the city. Excellent communication and helpfulness, clean, well enough equipped. 5 min walk from broadway t, which Is well connected to other lines incl silver line to airport - we made it door to airport in less than 50 min for $2.50 at 7am. Felt safe and secure. Only comment is the house backs onto a busy carriageway so maybe not for light sleepers (4/6 of us didn’t notice and slept great!).
Great location. The bathroom across the hall is a bit inconvenient, but is clearly stated in the listing, so it is not a surprise.

This place was in a charming old town in Boston. It was delightful. We were mostly inside to shower and sleep. It was just as great as the pictures show.
She was super responsive to messages and allowed us to drop off our luggage when we arrived before check in time.
Make sure you have your good walking shoes. There are lots of hills and uneven brick/stones. Lyft drivers are so helpful. There are lots of one way streets and traffic. Plan to walk at least a few blocks a day. Plus stairs to the room. There are buses in trolleys, but you’ll have to walk several blocks to get to them.
The city park is just down the hill. Take the swan boat for a peaceful moment. The splurge on a sunset sailboat cruise!! (Best part of the trip)
*note* if you are coming to Boston in July/August, it’s pretty humid. Make sure you bring at least a couple extra pairs of clothing cause you might need to shower more than once a day.

Alice kept a very good and honest communication with us at all times.
The apartment is very nice, clean and is in a good location, near the subway. It is a little small, but for us it was enough.
There are several parkings in the zone, but they are expensive.
Maybe, the only things that could be improved are to have black outs in the windows, more lights in the bathroom and a wider bed.
Anyway, we recommend it and we will try to be here the next time.
Thanks Alice!!
This is a wonderful little apartment in an amazing location. We stayed here for 5 nights in October and really enjoyed it. Jason is an amazing host.

Clean and nice place,
Thank you
Easy to check in, good location, responsive host

It is very decent place overall. The house rules are bit strict but they are reasonable; Lynda is a great host herself as she is very patient about your questions and needs. As this is my very first stay at airbnb, there were lots of questions I had regarding to my stay. Lynda went out of her way to make sure I knew what is expected and worked with me for my needs and concerns. The place is of great commuter for the most part, but there aren't a lot of eateries near by.The refrigerator is a bit small so it is not very continent for people who would like to cook a lot.  If you are thinking about coming in town to travel and just crash at night, then this is a great place for you

James’ place was fantastic. Perfect description, looks as good as the pictures, quiet and comfortable.
I come to Boston often for work, I’ll definitely be staying here again!
Thank you James for a wonderful stay.

The place was beautiful, clean, and very spacious. It was located pretty centrally, so we were able to walk to all of our desired destinations. It was perfect for our get away. Rheemus was friendly and nice to hang out with as well. Larry was very friendly and responsive. We'd definitely recommend this place to anyone.
Amaro was very helpful and quick to respond to messages. Very clean and relaxing space.
Wonderful stay! We were able to walk to a music venue right around the corner!
great stay! definitely will be back

a great stay. This was the second leg of my Boston trip and I need a small space to gather my thoughts. Celia and Johnathan were excellent hosts. Celia had a vast book selection in the room that I absolutely adored diving into and she even let me borrow (to return) a few. I have made my first friends in Boston and am excited to get to know them both.
If you plan on coming to Boston, make this your first stop or just stay here the entire time. Oh! And the music selection was amazing. Can't forget about the pup, he's adorable. Okay, I'm done, just book. lols.
Had a really great stay! Centrally located and close to the best of South End. Apartment was extremely clean and comfortable.
Great location off Boston Common. Super close to the T.
Great place for the money! Definitely accessible to downtown via the t!

Polly’s place is very peaceful and quiet and respectful and clean ... Everything has been supportive and gave us a very welcoming feeling and the breakfast offering in the morning has been an extra treat. Homemade muffins, coffee, tea, fruits ... drinks, yoghurt ... a rather rare find in my experience so far. Such a good way to start the day. I very much recommend this place and would stay again for sure.

Thanks Maverick for doing a great job with this space! Perfect location with easy access to everything you'd ever need (groceries, restaurant/bars, transportation, and sights)! I had a lovely stay and would gladly book again.

The unit was clean and looked like the photographs.  I agree with the other reviewers - the shower was wonderful.   The issue we had was the floors and doors creaked so bad, not just a few boards, but every step you took.  The floors were the same for the unit above us.   Also, we could hear conversations in the unit above us; there is little insulation between the units.  We were also awaken each day in the early hours by what we thought was a garbage truck backing up, but later noticed a large van parked in the driveway.  The beeping of the truck or van was so loud!  The neighborhood felt safe, but we were surprised to be only two streets away from the airport runway.  The ten minutes or so it took to get to the airport was because you have to drive around the water that surrounds the runway.
unique and accurately described. Melissa helpful.  let us store bags
Excellent location steps from Park St. and Downtown Crossing T stops. Clean and tidy, and when there was a small maintenance issue, they responded very quickly.
Perfect place, perfect spot. What else to say...

As expected, in any city location, the area was bit nosy but nonetheless the stay was comfortable, effortless, and safe. They did an amazing job of responding to my questions regarding my reservations and I would highly recommend it to everyone!

Awesome stay here- great location!! Everything was less than .5 mi away for the most part and walkable. Very safe neighborhood. Place was smaller than it looked in the pictures- tight for 2 girls getting ready, another long mirror on the other side of the apt would be helpful but we managed for the wknd. A thicker duvet would be nice- AC was tricky to manage and it got cold. Comfy bed, with TV w/Netflix & great appliances. Hosts were kind and responsive. Place was clean, just scuffed up floors. Good for a quick weekend in Boston :) thank you!
Newly renovated and beautiful! Host was great and responded very quickly! Even had an assigned parking spot! Very comfortable with three nice rooms!
highly recommended.. definitely will choose it again.
Great spot right near the Common!
Great location close to everything. Old building but clean. Quiet neighbors but noisy from street traffic due to location.

This was a pretty nice place to stay. Everything was clean, and all furniture, utilities and etc is like at home! The place is near the airport but we couldn’t hear anything, it’s calm and peaceful. I loved that it was very warm and cozy inside.
We took a car for rent and reserve a parking spot in spot hero app to be calm, there is a nice spot in 7 min walk we paid just 50 dollars for 5 days. It’s my tip for other travelers!
We would definitely stay there again.
Alles perfekt
Large apartment and easy access to the Commons
Superb location 1 block from Newbury Street shopping and easy walk to the Commons.

Thanks for a great stay in a clean room. Location was great and as described. A little clarification in the check-in could be helpful in the future as it’s not clear what the room number is (TH1A) and how to engage the door lock (waving at your hand over it), however we communicated quickly and easily and someone helped us right away. Overall, great stay and we will come stay here again next time in Boston!
nice
We had a great stay. Place is very clean and comfortable. Plenty of space for a couple.

I cannot say enough about Gina and Matty and their condo!  The place was so comfortable and convenient and they were both so responsive and flexible.  The beds were comfortable, the kitchen was well stocked and the location cannot be beat!  I will recommend this to anyone coming to Boston.  We had a small hiccup with the place which they could not control and they bent over backward to make sure we were taken care of.  We loved it here and would return again in a heart beat!

Great central location and a very comfortable stay. Everything was made easy, with Jonathan being so responsive; from arrival details, to making use of the facilities at the accommodation.  We had a thoroughly relaxing & enjoyable stay. The Beacon Hill location is perfect for a city break, combined with the feeling of being at home made possible by Jonathan covering off the necessities within the accommodation.

We really enjoyed our stay in this South Boston home. The location is great, the Andrew T stop is 0.5 miles away, making getting to the airport and downtown very easy. The beach is within walking distance as well.  The private guest suite has a incredible bathroom (7 jet shower!). They even provided robes! We explored Boston and didn’t have a chance to enjoy the outdoor space but it looked very nice. I would definitely recommend this suite, don’t let the pull out bed scare you away, it’s pretty luxurious.  The memory foam mattress and high quality pillows made it quite comfortable. We will definitely stay here again.
Great place

The apartment was perfect to host 8 people and it matches the description provided by Steven. Check-in and check-out were easy to follow thanks to the host instructions. A bit noisy due to the busses in the night but overall nothing to complain about.

Jurek’s home is awesome. It was so clean, provided lots of space for our family of 5, and its proximity to the T can’t be beat. Jurek is also a great communicator… we’ve never been to Boston before and his travel directions and neighborhood recommendations were really helpful. We will definitely be back.
A great location close to the airport and public transportation.  Very good communication from the hosts as to how to access the house, etc.
Very clean and the room is so cute. My first time in Boston and it’s very closed to the train station (8 mins walk) so it’s very convenient. Thanks so much for having me.

Great stay in Boston! Georgia met us personally at the train station when we arrived and gave us great directions on which buses and trains to catch. She gave us great advice on places to go and how to get there. Her home is in a nice neighborhood, is spotless, comfy beds, great hot showers, coffee, within walking distance to shops, bars, restaurants, public trans, will definitely stay there the next time in I’m in the Boston area
Great location and easy check in and out. Would recommend!

Stayed here for a quick trip to Boston. Location is very walkable, left my car in a valeted garage the whole time and was able to walk whenever we needed to go. Place was clean and looked like the pictures. Had a nice time!
This shared home is as descirbed, close to the train station, and has 2 hour/overnight street parking available. It's a convenient place to stay if you are checking out the Boston area.

Spacious place with easy check in and check out. Some noise from the street but it is city life. If you want to make coffee, you need to bring it. A few more basic amenities in the kitchen like salt, pepper, oil… would be appreciated.
Thank you for the clear communication, ease of getting back to us when we had questions and hospitality!

Everything was great! Had a great night and location was fantastic. Very comfortable and clean. Only comment would be maybe to have a throw blanket available since it was quite cold until the heating kicked in.

One of the best airbnb we have stayed in. Exactly (even better) like the pictures. Clean, tastefully furnished. Location was perfect for us to help settle our daughter into BC. James was highly responsive to our questions. Would stay again.

Awesome place and we will be back! Made traveling on the trains for the first time a less scary event. We got to and from the airport easily with her help! Had lots of helpful recommendations and just friendly. 100% recommend!

Awesome stay and super helpful and responsive host! Very private, quiet, and clean. Perfect location for walking everywhere! We walked to the river and then all the way to the north end through beacon hill and back through a different part of town. Newbury St is the perfect spot to be to visit Boston. Felt very safe (two women - first time in Boston)
Jonathan is a really nice and responsive host. The room is really clean and with a great shared living room space. It is also close to the metro station. Highly recommended!
We enjoyed our stay!

This was a great spot, a small place but had everything you’d need. It’s near a lot of great amenities — I stayed two nights as I was attending a conference at the nearby Hynes Convention Center. I would recommend!

Amazing stay! Perfect location, close to the T.  Beautiful shower and kitchen appliances. The walls are thin and you can clearly hear the neighbors on the other side of the wall. Also, if using the free street parking take note of parking signage and times as we got ticketed because of street cleaning. Otherwise perfect visit and would come back.

Great location and proximity to restaurants, shopping, and convention center. The place was furnished and equipped just fine and on the basic side, just slightly less new and shiny than the photos depict. Communication was great and they followed through on the travel cribs and high chair we requested. The building is nice and is largely outfitted for college students in the area but we felt fine as a family renting the spot. Would recommend!

The best airbnb experience I have had when staying in a private room in someone's home. Her house is warm and inviting with a lovely fireplace. The room is on the 3rd floor and is really a suite with a large bedroom/sitting area with a private bath. It is very easy to get to with public transportation. Penny is a pleasure to talk to and I would would recommend staying with her without hesitation.
Estuvo muy bien el lugar muy agradable
Jessica's house is a treasure. We loved the tree top deck to sit on and listen to the neighborhood birds.
Great stay; great value.

Great location, safe, quiet neighborhood, cozy apartment, close to everything with easy access to public transportation, free parking in front of the house, friendly hosts... we could not have asked for more.
We would definitely stay again next time we're in Boston.

Very nice house and rooms! I could not figure out how to lock the door from outside and a friendly lady living on the first floor helped me. One thing to notice is that the sound can be very easily heard next door, but luckily my neighboring house mates that night were very quite in the sleeping hours.
Lynel's place was very unique and a great place to stay!

We had a great stay with our 1 year old and dog! Easy check in and out. The space is gorgeous and very clean. The beds were comfortable as well. Rebecca is responsive. We explored a few restaurants in the Charlestown area and loved them all! We would stay here again when in Boston.
Beautiful attic flat, and Glenn & Oliver were absolutely lovely hosts. What a delightful way to stay in Boston.
The Newbury Boston was amazing! Great location, the staff went above and beyond. We will definitely be back.
Great space to rent if your new to town . Owners are very kind and helpful !
Great location!
A quaint alternative to a hotel stay in a popular area of Boston. Walkable to several bars, restaurants, and shopping. Everything needed and included for a short stay in the city. Would recommend!
Location is unreal and Jodie was great. Not super lux, but the unit was super clean and the shower was hot! Definitely recommend if you need a quick stay so close to everything!!
The location is fantastic and feels safe. The flat is very helpful and has everything you need. Thank you again!

We had an amazing time in Boston at this property for few days around New Year.
Uptown/Little Italy is the best place to stay in all of the areas we visited throughout trip! Lovely restaurants, bakeries, shops, historical buildings… you can just spend a whole day in this 1 area there’s so much to do!
The apartment was absolutely perfect - so cosy after a busy day sightseeing in cold (though not too cold when we went - so we were over prepared!).
Lovely kitchen with everything you need. Bed and shower were amazing. Really nicely decorated and felt very homely. The hot tub on the roof was amazing!! And do use in winter - it’s still nice and warm!
We had the extra special trip here as we got engaged on New Year’s Eve right outside the apartment next to the harbour :-)
Hosts were absolutely amazing for their quick contact and they let us check out late for our flight.
I would say definitely book this place if you want the perfect stay exploring Boston!
Xx

Nice place, pretty clean and with a designated parking spot which is a huge bonus! Had all the necessary things as well. However, only one window unit in one bedroom and nothing in another. So in summer heat the place got stuffy. Also basement level with windows that are ok high and not easily open. Ceilings are little low which for a tall person can be uncomfortable. Finally, when you start the air condition in the bathroom there was a faint smell of cigarette smoke.

We loved this apartment- it was spotless, bed was comfortable, kitchen had everything needed to cook if you want to. The location is perfect- about 7 min walk to Chinatown, and about 15 min walk to beacon hill. Very close to the t.  I will come back here without a second thought. Highly recommended.

Michelle and Stephen’s place was a great stay for a long weekend and a Red Sox game. They were very accommodating about check in and the space was clean and comfortable for our group. Highly recommended.
Very clean, cozy, well furnitured, quiet and safe neighbourhood. One of the best airbnb experience.

Fatima was an excellent host and the house was perfect for our large family. She left very clear instructions for entry to the house and each room. Fatima was very responsive when we had questions and she checked in to see if we needed anything. The house is very charming and there is a ton of space and privacy for a large group of people traveling together. The house was only 15-20 minutes away from all of the places that we visited downtown. The parking was ok. We sometimes had to park up the block and around the corner, but that’s just the nature of this part of the city. We would definitely stay here again 😊

My stay with Maria Elena was nothing less than perfect!  She was the perfect host - she'd even put the air con on in time for my arrival... the room is exactly as pictured and perfect for someone looking for a taste of local life outside of the city centre.  The veranda with table & chairs is perfect for sitting outsite for breakfast in the mornings & the room is bigger than it appears on the photos.  The kitchen is well equipped with all that you could need, as is the bathroom... overall a fantastic stay - thank you!!

I felt safe in the neighborhood -- Boston as well as the neighborhood is very clean, no liter.  Everything worked, I was just there for 2 days, very nice to have coffee and cereal available for breakfast!

My stay at Jessica’s was great, the place was very clean and had everything I needed. Plus the location was perfect, very walkable and quiet even though it was so nearby to great restaurants and shopping.
Great location in beautiful JP! Very cute, clean apartment with everything you need for a great stay and the hosts are so kind and welcoming!

Robin ist eine sehr freundliche und hilfsbereite Gastgeberin.  Ihr Haus ist wunderschön, sehr schön eingerichtet, man fühlt sich gleich wie zuhause! und die Gegend ist sehr schön und ruhig. Mit der subway ist man schnell in der Stadt. wenn ich nach Boston wieder komme werde ich auf jeden Fall eine Bleibe bei ihr buchen! Vielen lieben Dank Robin!
Great location! Super quick responses and overall just a great experience

Great hosts, charming apartment, and wonderful location! What more could one want? The area was so peaceful. I always check safety ratings of neighborhoods before I travel- and this one is excellent! I am very appreciative of this team. They are friendly, honest, and excellent communicators. Coincidentally, the coworker I was traveling with got an air bnb by the same host, and that place was also awesome!
The location is very practical, close to the transport. The neighbour is very charming. Susan was welcoming and her house is very cute.

Jessica’s apartment is so sweet with artistic and homey touches. Jessica herself was a wonderful host - friendly, considerate, ready to help if needed but not intrusive. We used both the bed and the fold out sofa and both were comfortable. The neighborhood was quiet and the walk to the T was an easy walk (though coming back, it is uphill which wasn’t a problem for us but might be for the less mobile.). There was also a great diner nearby which opens early for breakfast. All in all, this was a wonderful place to stay.
Great position, clean and well organized, but much smaller than I tought. It is a commercial business, no contact with the owner.
The host is highly responsive to all needs . Place is close to everything down town !
舒适的房子无敌的景观 唯一不足就是公寓电梯坏了，我们费得很大的努力去搬行李
Nicely decorated. Great location.
thank you for being a great host!
Nice clean home for a night stay in Boston. Check in was easy and flexible. 10-15 minutes drive to Harvard business school. Exactly what I needed.

The apartment was clean and well set-up.  I stayed with my husband and toddler for a long weekend and had a great time.  There's a wonderful playground on the block and several other parks within walking distance.  Also several family friendly restaurants and great coffee shops.
If you’re staying in the North End, this is a great spot! A little dated but we didn’t spend too much time in our room. Staff was friendly and hotel offers nice amenities

I had a great stay at this Airbnb! The room was comfortable and had everything I needed. It’s in a perfect location—surrounded by tons of places to eat, explore, and easy to get around. Taskin is an amazing host, super quick to respond and very helpful throughout the stay. For the price, you really can’t beat it. Highly recommend if you’re looking for a convenient and budget-friendly spot in Boston!
cheap, clean and easy

Great place!
Wonderful host ☘️
Great stay!
Very pleasant place to stay in the heart of Boston! Highly recommend
Esther es muy atenta, le agradezco por la estadía, sin duda volvería.
Nice place, awesome location, perfect for longer stays

Small but ample space. There were three of us and we stayed three nights. The space was a little tight with the pull out bed open when the three of us were up so that had to be folded up each day which wasn't too big of an effort. We had to be super aware of what appliances we were using and do a bit of musical outlets so as not to blow a fuse which we did once. The location couldn't have been more central which was fantastic. It was a nicely decorated and very clean space.

Wonderful little dorm-style room perfect for a solo traveller into Boston. Caught a show at the MGM Music Hall by Fenway and this place was about an 8 minute walk, super convenient, Lihua was very kind and clear on the instructions of how to get in. The fact that this room gets an assigned bathroom with full tile shower is amazing, will definitely stay again the next time I need to be in Kenmore!

We greatly enjoyed our stay. The apartment was beautiful and well-maintained. It was situated around a convenient location where we had easily walked to the many great attractions of Boston while leaving our car in a garage right in front of it.
The room was great and comfort , the location is great, Thank you!
Great stay. Tim communicated throughout the reservation and provided all of our needs.
Had a wonderful at this gorgeous airbnb location while we also enjoyed Boston and the surrounding area!

Private and lovely spot, good for a couple or a single, may be ok for 3. Lovely hosts, they made me feel very welcome, at home and also I had my privacy. I love having my own space and such is the case here. Close to transport, the red line, was also a plus. Thank you!
It’s clean and cozy … very responsive host… will stay again for sure!
Great place.  Very clean and convenient. Excellent location.  Walk/bike anywhere downtown from here.
The place was clean, accessible, in a great location and Steven and his team were incredibly responsive at all hours. Highly recommend!

This was our first experience with airbnb. Very nice studio, just as described. Very quiet area with supermakets around and very good public transport to the centre of Boston.  Kristina was very helpful. we would go tthere again.

Roy and Susan were great! They were super friendly, helpful, and stayed up later than needed to welcome us in when we had a delayed flight. Would definitely stay at this nice and super convenient place again.
Beautiful, spacious and clean rooms. Located close to many restaurants and parks. Courteous and professional staff.

Location is fantastic surrounded by good italian restaurants in the neighborhood.  10min convenient walk from Haymarket T station which is an interchange station. The unit itself is as described by Howard. We loved the massage chair provided :) Great host and always reachable! Thanks Howard
As advertised - good location.

I stayed here for Christmas. The hotel is close to everything within walking distance to Amtrak station-Back Bay, downtown Boston, Chinatown. The parking garage, $26/day, is across the street. If you get here earlier than their check-in time, there is a small sitting area with many electric plugs to charge your phone in their basement. You can make self-service coffee in front of the front desk and spend some time relaxing while charging your phones before starting your trip in Boston. Spacious room for the price, very clean and comfortable bed. The front desk staff was very friendly and helpful.

Great location! Easy walk to my work event. Unit is clean and bright with lots of natural light. Worked very well for my trip. Super convenient check in process. Maverick messaged me to make sure I got in ok and had everything I needed. Thank you!

Great mini  apartment in a lovely neighbourhood, clean, comfortable, central to many places, restaurants and transport in Boston. Great coffee and food at Capitol Coffee Hose, within a couple of minutes walk. We really liked having keypad entry instead of keys. Great laundry facility in basement. Would stay there again.
Super clean and spacious.

Secure and efficient check-in and solid, courteous, and prompt responsiveness from this team. Charming and fantastic location, and we slept great on a super comfy bed in a modern and relaxing apartment—
Cozy space with a sweet balcony, nestled between the Arboretum and Jamaica Pond — what’s not to love?

Jenny was a phenomenal host who was always responsive and very flexible. She is very friendly and accommodating and her place is beautiful. We had an amazing trip to Boston thanks to her! Cannot recommend staying with Jenny enough!

Had a fantastic stay. We were there during a festival on a neighboring road that we didn’t know about which started at 5:30 am. The place was great, but would have loved a heads up on that! Other than that, would recommend.
Staying at Todd's was great! Quiet, clean, modern, and easy to get to. Host was super friendly and responsive. We loved our room and would definitely stay there again.
It was a lovely apartment.  Cozy, clean and convenient location.  I would definitely stay here again.

The location is a few blocks from the public transportation to the city.  It was the first time I had to do a self check in but between the images and directions it was extremely easy.  We left early in the morning and came back late exploring Boston so we didn't get a chance to eat at any of the local restaurants .   It was nice to be able to park in front of the house because parking is at a premium.  There isn't a TV in the room but we didn't miss it that much.

One of the best air bnb in Boston! Don't miss it!
Helen is really caring and considerate host. She makes sure everything is set and comfortable for her guests. Very clean and quiet place.

Christina's place was ideal for 3 adults and provided ample space for all of us.  There was a very minor issue that Christina dealt with immediately... she was very responsive and helpful.  We would stay here again.
perfect place, every time im in boston i always book at Daryl's place, the best apart if you are visiting boston definitely
This place is in a great location! You can walk to everything. The people in the town where very friendly.  Definitely a great value.

Devora and her co-host Mary made our stay exceptional. The apartment is stunning, perfect for adults and kids, and had all the finishing touches that come from being experienced hosts anticipating the amenities guests may need during a stay. We felt at home, completely safe, and centrally located to all the activities we enjoyed during our stay in Boston. We would stay here again without hesitation!

Super clean and cozy apartment. Frank and Delilah were always very responsive, coming right downstairs when we needed toilet paper. Beds are very comfortable, plenty of bath towels. Short walk to the train. Would stay again!
The place was clean and easy to find. Cass and Michael were clear with their instructions, greatly appreciate the clear communication!

As described and worked for what we needed perfectly.
Walkable to so many attractions we kept busy the entire stay.
Minimal shelving in one of the bedrooms but we used the ironing board as an extra shelf and it worked fine.
Had a question during our stay and received a quick response from host.
Would totally recommend to someone visiting the Boston area and wants a GREAT location.
Wonderful host and location in Beacon Hill. Walking distance to everything. Mark had great suggestions for dining options. Great place, great host, great location!
Great spot. Amazing price for the location. Perfect for a weekend.

There was an amazing place. The location is beyond compared, incredibly close to nice restaurants and stores. It is very close to from public transportation so it’s very easy to get here from and two main train stations and airports. The place itself was spotless. Literally, he’s very hard to find words to describe how well it was.
The apartment was very clean, easy to enter, good location in Southie.

We stayed for three nights at Andrew's place. The block has two apartments that share a common hall and we booked the one on the ground floor.
The description matched the apartment well. It's very spacious and ideal for a family of four ( preferably with younger kids, as the sofa bed didn't quite accommodate our 6-foot-plus offspring)
Given that we are the first Airbnb guest, let me detail some things. The kitchen is well-equipped and the furniture selection is nice. We loved the firm bed and the white spotless sheets and towels. The apartment has both heating and cooling.
What we loved- the location. You are right in front of Boston University and a 7-10 min walk away from Back Bay's restaurants. At the same time, getting on the expressway was very easy as well.
What we wish Andrew can improve upon: the blinds. he doesn't have blackout curtains yet and the morning light can wake you up very early in the morning.
Overall, a good stay.
Both wore great with communication and fast respond to our inquiry
Great price, great location, best of all is  quick responding host.
very comfortable room with clean bath, very personable host, we enjoyed sharing stories of travel and places we have been.. nice convenient locations with restaurants nearby.
Convenient location. Nice neighborhood. All good.
Perfect place for a short visit to Boston. Small but tidy and very cozy. Not much going on in Roxbury but the Orange Line is close, which felt like the best starting point to experience Boston.

The bedding is excellent and the lounge area welcoming. The shower works very well, but the same cannot be said for the toilet, a problem already noted by another guest.
The kitchen is completely unsuitable for cooking.
What shocks me the most is that there is plenty of space and it would be easy to put a cabinet and plates, glasses, knives, etc. in it.
4 large plates (my slice of cake was lost in the middle) 4 bowls, 4 cups and 3 glasses (for drinking your soda) is not acceptable.
It's even sad and doesn't show a real desire to welcome guests.
Bed not made up on arrival despite late arrival (sheets are drying in the machine). One roll of toilet paper for two people (3 nights).
I'm sorry but this is the least good service I've experienced when booking Airbnb.

Jay’s place was great for our NYE stay in Boston. We were there with another couple and spent the night out walking around town for the evenings festivities. It’s centrally located and matched the description well! Jay had great communication and was accommodating.
Great stay!

The apartment was perfect. Easy to check in, and super clean and cozy. We are allowed to check out late with a $50 fee which was extremely worth it. Overall amazing experience. Would definitely come back. Thank you!!!
Great location and perfect for my two-night stay. Would rebook when traveling here again
Had a wonderful stay at Stacey’s home. Easy check-in and out, great communication, and the location can not be beat! So nice to leave a bottle of wine for us! Will definitely stay here again!!
Great unit close to blue line subway and within feet of freedom trail but in private quiet street.   Many options for dining within few minute walk.
The place is as described in the description. Very good stay and great connections to downtown!
Good stay overall. The place was clean and nice and has all the basics you might need. Peter is a very responsive host. I would stay here again if I go back to Dorchester.
Great stay, rooms were very cold and wasn’t aware that the bathroom was separate from the room. All in all a great experience, might return during the summer months! 🥰🥰

The historic brown stone was very nice, immaculate and spacious. There is a parking spot close to entrance. There is a modern bathroom on same floor as bedroom. The bedroom is on one floor and spacious kitchen on upper floor. With the t directly behind the building you can hear the train except for a brief period of time in the middle of the night. Despite the noise we would stay here again. A lovely place .

Beautiful home that is very close to Fenway Park and Kenmore Station. Lihua was an amazing host. She went above and beyond for me with recommendations and attentiveness for my first trip to Boston. I can’t wait to stay here again.
Good location, walkable. Very responsive. Best for two people sharing the main bed
Perfect experience,  my first time on a houseboat I would stat with them again.
Neat, clean,  thoughtful touches....  We enjoyed our stay...
Susan was an excellent host! So warm and welcoming. Her home is adorable and very conveniently located in JP. We would love to stay here again!

First time in Boston. Wanted something close to the Fenway and this was perfect. Slept great, the coffee and the breakfast was well appreciated after a good night sleep. Lihua was welcoming. Couldnt ask for a better first time in Boston.
Wonderful stay great host!
Great spot in walking distance to the best parts of back bay. Our two kids of 7 and 9 loved the loft!
This place is great!! The location is a great perk as it is close to everything within walking distance. It was super clean and cozy for 2 people, would stay again!
Ewa's place is beautiful and a very comfortable and clean space. Check in was very easy. We would stay there again if ever in the area.
Great place! Close to everything with the metro and very clean and beautiful

I had a very comfortable stay at their apartment and the area was very accesible to public transportation and  good and diverse restaurants. The host was communicative and friendly. Would recommend and stay again if needed.
Great spot
Quiet and convenient location

Perfect location in BackBay Fenway. Very nice building , seems to have been recently renovated.
Front rooms are a bit noisy due to traffic and college students. Otherwise very nice and a very good rate!

The host and this place are great! The host is so friendly, kind, and Respectful. The room is very clean, organized, and comfortable. Definitely I will come there again if I come to Boston again.
Thanks!
Our stay at Peters  place is exactly what we expected. Perfect location. We were attending a concert and were able to walk to everything.

This condo is right in the city so close to lots of things to do.  Also, 1/2 mile from South Station, if you’re going elsewhere .  The place was extremely clean and straightforward.  The only disappointment is the furniture is the cheapest I’ve sat on in many years, they could use two new couches.  Otherwise, great place in great location.
Great stay, thanks!

Location, location, location!!
This area was amazing, you can walk to any location or jump on the train (orange line was two blocks away).
The apartment it's self was clean with great nature light due to corner position. My only comment is the amenities were limited, bare bones... we ran out of paper towels and trash bags.

The location of the apartment is perfect, everything is in walking distance and a metro station is close-by. The apartment was very clean and check-out/ check-in was super easy! We had a great stay and would definitely stay there again!
Very clean, location is very close to bars and restaurants.

This was the perfect place for my first week in Boston! I am a travel nurse here so the house really had all I needed including a full kitchen and washer/dryer. The room was clean and had its own AC unit to stay cool during the hot summer nights. The porch is a nice bonus to sit on an enjoy a nice dinner outside. Minter is a great host and very responsive! Really could not have asked for more, would absolutely recommend!
The apartment is spacious, nicely furnished, and located to tons of great restaurants and activities! The beds are comfortable and the host is awesome!
AMAZING!! 10/10
Marie was a great host and she took car of my son very well. She communicated promptly and with integrity. I would not blink a second to deal with her again. Thank you for your help!
First time using Airbnb, I was kinda hesitate at the beginning before booking this place. But after this trip, I highly recommended cause it's nice ,cozy and very clean.

El dto número 8 está muy bueno y limpio. No le sobra nada. La ubicación es excelente. Como está enfrente de una obra muy grande en construcción, a partir de las 7 de la mañana no se puede dormir. Lo recomiendo
It was a great place to stay. Everything was well stocked (besides missing some hand soap). Everything was comfy and the host was super responsive! Would recommend.
thank you Lihua, appreciate you being so kind and helpful. very clean & close to Fenway Park.
Prefer location ......

Very glad to have stayed here. Ideal location in the very walkable North End. Within proximity to parking lots to leave the car, the blue bikes are available just on commercial street and downtown is just a short walk away. The unit was clean, the bed was comfy, would stay again.
Great place, matched description, well recommended. Good overall experience.

It was a great place to crash for a couple of nights: very comfortable location and clean room and bathroom. The host was very helpful in accommodating my laundry and luggage storage needs. Nice vibes, the place is full of beautiful plants.
only suggestion would be to leave an extra blanket around for winter nights, as the windows were not super well insulated and I got cold in the middle of the night.

The place was nice and beautiful. Mihaela was very responsive host and provided us clear instructions making our stay easy and comfortable. Having a private parking definitely is a plus. Would highly recommend this place!
Enjoyed the place very much.  Small but perfect for what we needed!
Close to everywhere, very convenient
Very nice place. good location, but noisy kids like to run around downstairs. Felt very safe. Short Uber to anywhere in the city.

Just as described, good neighborhood, close to the city. Also good restaurants in the area. Convenient washer and dryer, kitchen full equipped. Clean! Everything new!!Outstanding! We love the stay! 100% recommended. Thank you Naveen.

Fantastic suite in one of the most desirable locations in Boston- seriously, the neighborhood is gorgeous. People are friendly, fantastic food all around, two T stations within a 12-minute walk and a wine store next door. The only thing holding me back from a 5th star is the bed and the street noise. The bed was very uncomfortable and, being on a busy street with the window facing the street, it was quite loud at night. However- again- would sacrifice some street noise for this location. With that being said, these two things are absolutely not deterrents and I would 100% come again.
Definitely would recommend. Perfect location. Lots of resturaunt sand shops. In walking distance of Fenway Park and Boston Common. Very clean and stylish apartment. Perfect for a couple.
Great location! Historic Charm. Exceptional Host!
This space is adorable and within walking distance to many things. Loved the cleanliness and the modern vibe. Would definitely stay here again!
nice

Sadly, this was one of the worst experiences I have ever had with Airbnb.
1. Poor communication from host, delayed responses, bad communicator, got instructions how to check in late in the day of check in.
2. Host says that this unit is on the 5th floor - it is actually on the 6th floor (even the door and key have labels that says "6B"). When I asked him about it he said that this is how the owner of the building defines floors (eh?).
3. The bed frame was broken and super squeaky - when I mentioned it to him he just said that it's not possible as it was recently replaced. The bedframe was so unusable that we had to remove it and put the mattress on the floor. If you search in previous comments other people complain about squeaky bed too, so clearly he was giving me just some alternative facts.
4. Yet another issue is a super loud fan in the hallway running 24/7 that cannot be turned off apparently - so it feels like sleeping in a factory.
I requested partial refund (which now he keeps denying).
The location was perfect!  We walked everywhere.   The apartment was bare bones.  The furniture was worn, there was not enough seating.  There were outlets hanging out of the walls.
Excellent service and very easy to access! Amazing location close to everything and slightly secluded so as to avoid any large noisy areas! Highly recommend!

Todd's place was very clean and exactly as described. It is right around the corner from Harvard Business School and a quick Uber drive away from Harvard Square. Excellent location. I recommend this space and would definitely stay here again!

Great stay! Very clean, close to stores and the subway system. On the outskirts of the city so very accessible. Easy to get to and get in. We had no issues with our week long stay here. Would stay again.
Our stay was great, close to everything we need and great space in the apartment! Definitely would love to stay again!!
No frills but very clean room with character in a beautiful neighborhood. Walking distance to downtown and easy to find. If you need a place with a comfy bed and quick shower this is a great option!

Drew's place is the perfect New England charm we were looking for! The space was beautiful and was perfect for me and my fiance. The house was clean and organized. Drew had great communication and was helpful with our check in process and nearby parking.  We definitely enjoyed our stay!

Excelente lugar para hospedarse, la casa contaba con espacios amplios y todo estaba en perfectas condiciones, todo estaba limpio y Selim fue muy amable en  todo momento. El lugar esta en un lugar muy céntrico por lo que puedes llegar a los lugares turísticos de una manera muy fácil.

The location of the apartment is amazing! Walking distance to all of the tourist attractions, steps away from the Boston Common, and there is also a Whole Foods and a CVS nearby.
The place is sparkling clean and well styled.
We enjoyed our stay a lot and will definitely recommend it to anyone who is traveling to Boston.
Great location and clean, walk out the door to park, trails and bay or take a quick trip on the T to downtown.
Excellent location in downtown Boston for a real Boston experience! Very clean and true to the pictures. We loved our stay and would gladly visit again!

Awesome trip with a great location. Thank goodness for the airconditioning! The only thing that would have made this a better trip is if the Red Sox won and it wasn't so humid. I'll go back to Colorado and just enjoy the heat with no humidity! Thanks again for a great stay!

Overall a good experience. The room and house overall were very clean and chic in terms of the style. Boris and Susan were very communicative about everything we’d need to know about accessibility, lock codes and use of the household items. We were greeted with a basket of a few snacks and a clean room with towels and linens. The most unpleasant part of the stay was that there was no private bathroom as it was shared amongst the other guests of the house, and the house guests were very noisy playing loud music, even late at night, and coming home very noisily (and drunk) late at night (everyone we stayed with was pretty much groups of college girls who loved to party, which was not so pleasant for the romantic weekend getaway we were hoping for). I also think that for a shared house, the price is a little steep for just one room and the unpleasant noisy neighbors upstairs. Overall it was a clean experience but I probably won’t ever do a shared Airbnb ever again after this experience, unless it was with my own family or friends.

This is truly a hidden gem in the area. The apartment offers parking and many amenities, such as a gym, open study rooms for students, and spaces to hang out with friends and family. It’s just a 10-minute drive from the city center, making it very convenient to come and go. I have to say, the host was amazing, friendly, attentive, and very communicative whenever I had questions (though I barely needed to ask, since the check-in instructions were clear and detailed). The apartment itself was spotless and had everything I needed.
Side note: if you enjoy cooking, the pots and pans were great!
I truly loved my experience here and hope to be back soon. My compliments to the management team!
Nice place to stay! Good stores near by.
Great area and Great place 100% would come back again!
Such a cute and lovely place to stay! Had such fun! Couldn’t possibly ask for more ^^
Great stay! Very clean and had just what I needed for a short stay. Cassandra and Michael are very attentive!

Excellent find. The owners were very professional and responsive. Apartment was clean and the instructions were clear. Door Codes make it easy to arrive/depart at odd hours.
The location was very convenient for me. The place is about a 5 min walk to the 15 Francis Street entrance to Brigham and Women's Hospital.
A nice place to stay. A nice area too with a few good pubs etc on Broadway

Fantastic location, can't beat being on Newbury.  And incredibly responsive communication.  One of the other guests in the building was being excessively loud and the host send a broadcast message to the all the guests in the building, reinforcing quiet hours restrictions - which was immediately effective in quieting the noisy neighbors.  Couldn't ask for a host that's more on top of it.  5 stars all around!

28 Fenway was a perfect place to stay while my daughter was at a Berklee summer program. The location couldn't have been better. The apartment is tiny, but the entire apartment is designed to be efficient and functional. With the well-planned design, high ceilings and full height window, it didn't feel as small as it was. The bathroom was very spacious. In the middle of very hot days, the apartment was still cool.
There are a number of grocery stores and restaurants close by, along with gyms and day/shared workspace locations.
The other apartments got a bit loud with students practicing their signing, but the noise curfew in the building was adhered to and the street was fairly quiet.
All in all, a great place to stay with a fantastic host!
