Thanks a lot
The place was cozy, spacious and clean. Feels like a safe neighborhood too. Highly recommend this place!
Their home was absolutely beautiful. The bed was very comfortable, the bathtub was large and clean,  and I enjoyed being visited by their two cats!

Cassandra and Michaels place was a quick walk to our daughters apartment. It was very close to the green line so was easy to get around.  It was also close to many restaurants and a block from the grocery store.  It was also very clean and accurately represented the listing. Our unit faced the street so there was quite a bit of street noise on the weekend before halloween as this is a vibrant college neighborhood, but I had anticipated this and had ear plugs!
Great bedroom, bathroom and small office. Note that living room and kitchen are shared spaces. We were out pretty much all day at our son’s house, so we didn’t use those spaces. We slept great.
Great location and responsive hosts!
perfect location. nice and clean room. very nice host
Great location and beautiful space, would definitely stay again

I had a wonderful stay at Ehab’s place! The location was perfect – close to local attractions, restaurants, and public transport. The property was clean, well-maintained, and had all the amenities I needed for a comfortable stay. Ehab was an excellent host, always responsive and quick to help with any questions I had. I highly recommend this Airbnb to anyone looking for a cozy and convenient place to stay!
Nice place that was very quiet and perfect for my visit!  I will definitely contact Alex next time I come to Boston!

My boyfriend and I had a wonderful stay at Bill and Maureen’s! It was quite clean and conveniently located. Bill was there when I checked in (the room was ready early which was great!) and helped us out with directing us to the free parking. The locks/doors were very easy to use and secure. They provided lots of snacks and refreshments, including pumpkin bread both mornings we were there! And you can’t beat the price. Would stay here again.
Todd was a fabulous host! Thanks for the overall experience.
We had a great time! The location was perfect TD Garden along with great night life are all in the area. This will me my go to spot every time I’m in Boston! Amazing Decor, wonderful place.

This is a superb apartment  in  a 19th century house that is very well maintained. The location is great, in a quiet and very friendly neighborhood. The apartment has everything one needs and some details, like the beautiful hard wood floors create an atmosphere of exquisiteness. The communication with Gerard is easy with prompt and precise replies.
Close to almost all the sites we want to visit. Very good location.
Great location for exploring Boston with ease.

Gorgeous area & super convenient to access main attractions in Boston
Host was very accommodating when I forgot my checkout time, so I appreciate that!
Highly recommend for those wanting to explore the city in a central location

Enjoy Tom’s exceptional hospitality and thoughtfulness while staying in his unique 100 year old flat in South Boston within easy reach of a neighborhood commercial district that is bustling with activity

We have stayed at several places in Boston, and Alexandra's place is thus far our favorite! It is strategically located to many fun restaurants right on Columbus Avenue. It is also walkable to Northeastern University, Fenway, the museums, the Prudential and Newberry Street. The place is simply stunning- with high ceilings, incredible sound surround system, a fireplace, spacious bedrooms and bathrooms. As other guests have reviewed- the place is as pictured, but yet feels like so much more in person. Alexandra was very thorough- great in communicating with us. We especially appreciated her suggestions on local eats. We ate two meals from her long list of favorite neighborhood eateries, and they did not disappoint! It was truly a five-star stay for our family- warm and fun - and we would love to revisit in the future.
Worth to recommend! Good location, traditional building, clean and soft bed,  easy to communicate,everything is GOOD!

We had a fantastic stay at this Boston Airbnb! The location was unbeatable - right in the heart of downtown, within walking distance to many popular attractions, restaurants, and shops.
The air bnb itself was spacious and comfortable, with plenty of room for our group to relax and unwind. The hosts were also very responsive and helpful, providing us with all the information we needed for a smooth check-in and stay.
The only downside was the construction nearby, which could be a bit noisy at times. However, it didn't detract too much from our overall experience.
Overall, we would highly recommend this Airbnb to anyone looking for a convenient, comfortable, and spacious place to stay in downtown Boston. Just be aware of the construction nearby, and you'll be all set for a great stay!
Perfect Boston stay.. Awesome for adventuring and tons of great food!
Wonderful room and great location! Lori was awesome and friendly. I will stay with her again!
Everything was great. Thank you :)
Beautiful home

It was clean and easy to get to. I was only about a 5-10 min walk from a transit stop. It was quiet and the bed was comfortable. You do have to climb 3 flights of stairs, which was easy for me to do. If you are in poor health though it would be something for you to consider.
Cozy and cute stay
Nice!

Great place right near the T line on Broadway. Walkable to shops, restaurants,  bars. Apt is spacious, comfortable, well-appointed, super clean. There are 2 flights of stairs at entrance, and street noise, but I didn't mind either. Would definitely stay again.

The place was really nice, and perfect for our group. The price was great, especially compared with what you would pay downtown. You do need to factor in transportation, but that would be the case no matter where you stay. The place was really clean and organized, and I really like the furnishings and finishes.

Damon could not have been a better host. He was great with everything including providing additional items that we needed and he was really responsive via phone and email when we had any questions.
Great place to stay. Close to the airport. Welcoming residents

This home is located in a great building in any easy to navigate area of Boston. We had no problems at all in our stay....it was perfect!
Michael made sure check-in was a breeze. The home has a great kitchen, a happy sunny living area, perfectly clean bath(with washer and dryer!), comfy bedroom and a fantastic back balcony. Everything we needed was provided and we never had to message our hosts for anything.
There is a great coffee shop around the corner and an even closer Dunkin Donuts. The T is just a short walk and there’s a Whole Foods that’s also within walking distance.
We recommend Michaels home and give it the highest rating. We hope to be able to stay here again.
If this place is available...book it...you will not be sorry!

The house is really cozy and clean！！！杨老师特别特别细心！！当知道我们一男一女需要分房住的时候，给我们安排好了一切，避免了尴尬。在我们行前，杨老师就给我们交代了很多东西，也给我们提供了一些非常有用的建议！！！真的觉得特别特别得温暖，在异国他乡一点也没有觉得不习惯！！！！By the way，Jim is really a helpful man，many thanks for his suggestions and help.

Stayed here for a month - amazing location, 5min walk from Charles/MGH T stop, 6-7min walk to the river/Esplanade, <5min to Whole Foods. Beacon Hill is such a lovely neighborhood. Very safe. Airbnb has tons of storage and plenty of space for 2 people - love that this was truly a 1-bed and not a studio. Bigger than looks in pictures. Plenty of cooking utensils/pans and a nice kettle. Mark arranged to have the place cleaned halfway through my stay. Would stay again.
Convenient location to stay for the Boston Marathon! Quick T-ride from downtown and plenty of great local restaurants. Place was clean and quiet 👍
Well remodeled and easily accessible by bus. Good restaurants walking distance overall good location
Great location and the place was clean and comfortable. Would definitely rent again.

This was overall an okay stay. Great location but the bathroom situation was difficult to deal with. The bathroom on our floor was out of order so we had to go upstairs to use the bathroom. The bathroom had no soap and had the dispensers were broken on the floor.
I messaged the host about this and they fixed it the next day. They also started work on fixing the bathroom on our floor the next day which was nice. However, the bathroom had a leak which is why it was out of order. The out of order sign was removed and there was still a leak— on top of the leak there was mold on the walls and the smell was really bad. The mold could cause health problems if we breathed it in longer. It was really bad.
Bed was comfortable, and I liked that I had a sink in the room.
Great host and a fantastic place. Highly recommended!!

We had an amazing stay on Marlborough Street! The apartment was spacious, charming, and spotless — exactly as described. Having our own private entrance in the alley felt both convenient and unique. The space was very comfortable, with everything we needed for a relaxing stay. The location couldn’t be better: surrounded by beautiful brownstones, just a short walk to the park, and close to tons of great restaurants, cafés, and nightlife. It was the perfect mix of quiet neighborhood charm and easy access to everything Boston has to offer. We would definitely stay here again and highly recommend it!
Our stay was amazing - This was the perfect spot for a quick trip to the city in a comfortable small home!
Clean and comfortable, but there was no coffee and the fold out couch was missing a fitted sheet

The Airbnb was very clean, and had all the listed amenities. The host was very responsive and kind. Someone previous had swiped the extra blankets and she came to deliver more. A couple downsides to this Airbnb was the location wasn’t in the best of neighborhood for the price point. A bit sketchy to walk around with our 2 toddlers. Also could really just use an oscillating fan.
It was a very lovely and easy stay!!
Great space and awesome location! Highly recommended.
The location was great and the place itself was very cute and comfortable. I would highly recommend this place to anyone considering a visit to Boston!

This was the perfect location for our stay in Boston. Everything that we wanted to do was close and walkable.
Amy was so friendly and helpful with all our questions, regardless of whether they were regarding the condo or anything else in town.
I would definitely recommend it to my friends and family when they visit Boston!

Very good location! You can walk everywhere downtown from the apartment. All stores you might need for a stay are nearby.
There were three of us and only two seats at the counter. Was surprised with how minimal kitchen equipment was. No wine glasses.
Soundproofing was not the best; we could hear the neighbours cough through the walls. They must have heard us snore, though...
Overall very clean.
Would stay at again on a next trip to Boston.

Yan was a great communicator and the apartment is as described and accurate. The access in/out of the apartment was challenging because the keypad door lock stopped working before my arrival,, so Yan had me use a lock box hanging from the knob, with 4 little spinning number dials that were difficult to see at night. There is a motion sensor light over the door, which I really appreciated! but it seemed to shut off after 5 seconds. It would take a few attempts spinning the dials to get the numbers set & the lock box open. I'm sure it's temporary situation, Yan is all around a great host and when the keypad broke, he quickly adapted and saved the reservation with the lockbox. I think if he adjusted the motion sensor to stay on longer for future guests, that would be a great
muy buen alojamiento. buena ubicacion

Great location, clean, easy to check in, and felt safe. Great stay.
Note: Elevator was broken.

The space is very private and quiet despite being attached to a residence.  It was the perfect size for my small family of 3.  We loved the neighborhood and proximity to the T station.  Check-in was easy and Kristina communicated consistently throughout our stay.  We would stay again!

We had a great stay here - I’d highly recommended it. Really great location, quite but characterful neighbourhood that is close to great attractions and restaurants.
The flat was larger than expected, and was clean, homely and very nicely presented. We also felt really welcomed, but great communication from Jason & James.
This place is nice and close to all sorts of things.  Well kept and clean.  I will be staying here again in the near future.
Excellent!!  Everything was exactly as we expected, would absolutely stay again!
Mavericks place is a great ideal studio and I really enjoyed my stay. If you’re looking for a great place in downtown Boston I highly recommend maverick’s suite.

The building is noisy, but Healing Homes does everything they can to mitigate this with providing white noise machines and ear plugs. We had a great stay, have stayed with them before, and will stay with them again.
Clean, well furnished, great neighborhood and very helpful host.
The place is as described and the co-tenants are polite and nice as well.
great stay, perfect location, cozy & comfortable
Great places to stay

Nice clean place. Everything was as stated on website. Plenty of space. Single bathroom may be tight for a bigger group. We were just three of us and everything worked fine. Large bags may be a struggle on the small spiral staircase. Instructions were clear.host was very prompt with email and text responses. Designated parking spot at the back is a bonus.
The apartment was well appointed and very conveniently located to Northeastern University, Whole Foods and Fenway Park!
Nice place , clean and great location!
Beautiful, cozy, charming house. Jil and her daughter are very hospitable, they have provided us with all we needed including advises about restaurants and tips about the city.

Elena is a great Host. I would always  go back and stay at her place when I visit Boston again. The check in experience was quite smooth. The apartment was clean and tastefully done. Lot of things were available in the apartment which showed her thoughtfulness towards her guests. The kitchen was stacked to a great extent. There is a small washing machine and dryer in the bathroom, which really helped, as we had fairly long stay. I would highly recommend her apartment.

This is a delightful property, an older immaculate home in a tree-lined residential neighborhood. It is not terribly convenient to most of Boston's historic sites but public transit is nearby and we had no problem finding parking in the neighborhood (and we were not there as tourists but visiting family who live just a few blocks away). Jamaica Plain has much going for it -- the pond, parks, arboretum and a little bit of a hipster vibe along Centre Street. The cosmopolitan hosts are welcoming and gracious, though not intrusive in the least, and strive to maintain an accessible and comfortable relationship with their guests.  The 3rd floor suite is mostly as advertised and quite lovely, especially the airy sky-light filled bathroom. All in all, a beautifully maintained house and guest quarters with accommodating and flexible hosts (one main rule: remove outdoor shoes while in the house).

Jessy and Diego were great. Responsive and clear with directions. The WiFi was fast. The studio was stocked with what I needed. Location was convenient. The only thing was there was a lot of hair (that wasn’t mine) throughout the apartment. Mostly on the bathroom floors and in the actual bed.

Enjoyed our two day stay at R-House. For the prices in the area this place definitely would be among the best of the brunch. Great space in a good area super close to the T to train into Boston. Would highly recommend
Great place to stay. Raja is very proactive and is super responsive to any issues you may have

Taylor’s house is very cozy and was the perfect stay for us. We were just in town for one night and it was everything we needed. Clean and comfy room, modern amenities and the host was very friendly and communicative!

Lovely place, clean, quiet, and convenient (very close to T station). There's a garden and outdoor sitting place, although it was too cold fo rme to use it. I imagine the garden will be really lovely in the summer.
I enjoyed the stay
The host was very responsive and friendly !
Great home base for our quick conference trip. Good communication. Would definitely stay here again.
Great location. Felt safe and warm.
Great responses. Affordable and kind.

Very clean space in the heart of Boston, just a short walk from the Boston Common & Public Garden. Check-in was smooth and coming & going from the unit was very easy. Pictures made the unit appear a bit larger than it actually is but size isn’t normally a concern when consciously renting a studio.
I had a very pleasant experience. Only complaints I have are for the lack of a bigger garbage can as well as no hand soap in the bathroom, I had to wash my hands in the kitchen sink which thankfully wasn’t much of a hassle since it was only steps away.
Overall, great stay. I would not hesitate to book with Maverick again.

The place provided what we needed for our visit in Boston. Because we were visiting friends, we were out for most meals. The location was very accessible and central to many amenities. The place itself is small so cooking in was less attractive.
A short drive from downtown Boston and a very nice, clean place to stay during our visit!
I’m a repeat guest and can’t say enough about the great hospitality, space, and location that Kit and Scott offer!
Place worked great for the 6 of us.  Good location near 2 T stations.  Only a couple stations away from a Target.  Felt safe to us.  El Barrio near by had great tacos!
Very cute spot, clean everything you need and location is great for travel
Jill is a terrific host. Her place is very nice and clean. Highly recommend!

We never did get to meet Johnathan as our plane was delayed by an hour and he had plans that evening. Instead we were greeted by Celia, the owner, who is very hospitable and knowledgeable about both the neighborhood and Boston sights and gave us some excellent recommendations.
We stayed in what was described as the penthouse suite. The room was well maintained, spotless clean and well decorated. It has its own modern shower and toilet.
The suite has one room with a sitting area and an alcove where the bed is.
We feel describing this as a converted attic better describes the space. The ceiling height goes from about 2 feet on one side to maybe 8 on the other, consequently about 2/3 of the room is barely accessible to someone 6" tall. Also, 170 square feet is a VERY small room, about half of a kid's bedroom. We felt uncomfortable there and would not book again. Getting out of bed with 4 feet ceiling height in the middle of the night will test your ability for contortion if you are the one sleeping on the far side.
Nice experience, we enjoyed our stay!

This studio is a cozy, beautiful looking room in an amazing neighborhood. The check in was very easy, and the room was sparkling when I arrived. The studio feels like a modern apartment, and made me feel right at home. There are a lot of nice restaurants within a 5 minute walk, and the neighborhood looks like it was straight out of "Goodwill Hunting".
Very nice and welcoming people!

Stayed at Dana and Andrew's for one night with my wife as we were seeing a show at Roadrunner (which is 1 mile away from their place and totally walkable). It was perfect for our needs. Being able to park in their driveway was incredibly helpful and we a great nights stay. Would definitely book again when going to future shows in the area.
Lance and Shelly are extremely kind hosts. They have a great place that's easily accessible to the airport. Perfect for a long layover.

Good location. Everything you reasonably need for a stay in Boston.
Only frustration was the fact that there is only a single bathroom servicing four bedrooms. Can be frustrating in mornings and at night.

This is place is no frills, but it gets the job done. It gives you a place to sleep and shower and that’s about it. The location pays for itself since it is so walkable and central to everything. The host is extremely responsive and helpful. Overall, would stay again.

Great place to stay. Right in the center of Boston, very walkable, close to public transportation, easy to reach from the airport by bus. There's also a nice big grocery store in the area. Communication with Albert and the team was very smooth. I stayed at the place for a week for work, and did some of my own cooking. The kitchen was well-equipped and spacious, bed was comfortable, and bathroom was clean. The only minor issue was the street noise, but it wasn't too bad: the apartment was on the fourth floor and the street had only light traffic. I was aware of the issue from previous reviews and brought ear plugs. Also you may want to bring an eye cover sleeping mask since the window shades aren't thick and light comes through at night. I did feel that the place was a bit expensive for the size, but I guess Boston is expensive ... Overall I enjoyed my stay and would book this place again!

The apartment is clean and equipped with everything to have meals. It is in a nice and quite residential area in Charlestown. Atef is very friendly and precise. I strongly recommend choosing its apartment.

Loved our stay in Boston, this unit was located in the perfect place to do anything downtown or in Chinatown and had great access to public transportation. The space was great, and helped make our stay comfortable and enjoyable.

Awesome stay once again! This is our 2nd year in a row staying with Denise and Bernie (he’s such a sweetheart) and it was just as great as last year! Scroll through the other reviews and you will see consistent high marks for everything. It is all correct. Honestly, I don’t usually leave reviews, it’s just not my thing. But when something is this special and host is so gracious, I just can’t help it.
One thing I believe deserves mentioning that is left out of other reviews is the close proximity to a rental car return option. In our case, we rented a car at Logan for the first part of our visit(Salem and Connecticut). Since you don’t need a car in the city, there’s a very easy return in Back Bay(Avis or Budget )literally just around the corner. Two turns of the steering wheel and I was at the rental car return parking garage. I’m not a city driver so this was a relief.
If this is your final destination before Logan, consider the Logan express. It’s a shuttle bus with pick up a block and a half away that takes you directly to the airport for only $3. Denise told us about it and it saved us $100 vs a car service. On-time pick up and drop off. Perfect!
Believe all the positive reviews then check it out for yourself. You will be disappointed. Thank you Denise! Hope to see you again. Aloha
(I know, for someone who doesn’t leave reviews, this is a long one! Sorry!)
The space was perfect. Thank you
Great place! Close to everything! The check in and check out time are a little extreme (17:00, 10:00) but besides of that - great experience

Andrew’s place was very clean and well kept. Awesome decorating and adorable cats :) It was in such a good location. A walk away from Fenway and many options to eat and drink. I would definitely return and recommend staying here!
I had a great experience staying at Riyo’s place. Everything was spotless, and it’s in a fantastic location. I would definitely recommend it to anyone looking to stay in Jamaica Plain/Boston!

Nice, quiet and clean spot. Did not have issues with it. It’s not really downtown and due to the Boston subway being very slow it does take a bit to go around, just as FYI. The host is friendly and he also provided water and snacks.
Quiet neighborhood , responsive and friendly hosts .

The stay was everything we expected it to be and more. The description and photos are accurate. The beds are comfortable. The A/C works fantastically when needed. A few nice and unexpected things like coffee pods and sugar provided. Everything you could want is within walking distance or a short Uber away. Philip and Ann are perfect hosts. We will definitely be back next year and will try to book this place if it's available.

Stayed at this place on a quick turnaround trip and it was exactly as described.  The place is small and doesn't have much in terms of luxury but it is located in a great spot and easily accessible (although as written on the page it does require climbing stairs).  Checking in was easy and overall it worked out great for my trip.

katy and home hospitality were beyond amazing!!! Her home felt like being home. cozy, comfortable, beautiful, peaceful, roomy and enjoyable all the way around.
Fully detailed instructions for everything and all the personal touches she made for our stay made the whole experience wonderful.
Bedrooms were beautiful and comfortable , the porch was very relaxing and pretty.
victorian styled home and every detail was beautiful. ♡
Great size for the price a steal if you can get it!

Really responsive host. Our schedule changed unexpectedly but Lucky was fine with it. Allowed a later check out which was helpful. Minor maintenance issue which was taken care of immediately and satisfactorily. Great price, easy parking and check in. A+++ stay
Clean, cozy, and convenient! We had a great stay and absolutely enjoyed the proximity to the Boston Public Gardens, the metro line, and cute shops / restaurants! Would recommend!

We, three of us, stayed in this cozy two rooms with three bed house with great satisfaction. Lynda was very helpful during our 5-night stay. Roslindale, the township where this house was located, was very convenient to reach major attractions of Boston area, including Boston Sea Port, down town Boston, and even Providence, Rhode Island, where we took one day trip to Brown University. I would not hesitate going back to Lynda's residence to stay again in the future. One very minor point for improvement might be the lack of window blind in the kitchen side. Again, we thank Lynda for providing us a comfortable home staying experience in Boston.😊

The apartment is very clean, spacious and comfortable with a large, comfortable bed and a pretty good shower.  The location is both great and not so great.  It's steps from a subway stop, a pedestrian street a very good grocery store, and a five minute walk to a great bakery (Bakey).  The Freedom Trail and Boston Common are 5 minutes walk. The only downside is that the neighborhood is noisy and gritty (though it didn't seem unsafe).  Things mostly quiet down at night, but during the day there is a lot of screaming and sirens.  I found earplugs  the hosts left for us to be very helpful at night.
Great stay - as advertised ! Perfect location!

Clean, clean clean!! Great location, super quick responses from Brian, Heather and the team. Highly suggest asking if the construction project in the building is done prior to booking. Unless you like to hear such noises at 0655 or are blessed to be a sound sleeper. Great space, did I mention clean??!!
Claire’s apartment was very nice.  Close to public transportation. Did not notice the other guests in the apartment, it was very quiet and clean.
A great place in an awesome location! Very clean! Friendly hosts. Everything you need for a comfortable stay. I will book again when I am back in Boston!

Yusuf’s place was fantastic! Very clean and very easy to get to. Yusuf was very responsive which I really appreciated. I forgot the code to the door and was able to call him one night for help and he immediately and graciously helped. Highly recommend if staying in Boston. Everywhere we went to was no more than a ten minute lyft/ Uber ride.
Good location. Would stay here again.

The place was as described. Victorian. Furniture, living room kitchen with amenities and our room look like it did in the pictures. This place is fully automated! All the doors are on locks with codes. WiFi cameras and Google!
It was quiet and peaceful. Thanks Charles.
Was great in such a beautiful neighborhood! A lot of amenities and responsive host

This is really a great location. The street is quiet and the room is really great. The bed is confortable. Terry is really helpfull.

Enjoy.

Miriam's studio was everything expected; clean, comfortable, quiet and easy to access. The convenience of a full kitchen was most appreciated.

We were made to feel most welcome, and Miriam was very helpful with flexible arrangements for arrival and departure. Good advice was given regarding transport and the area. We particularly enjoyed experiencing the cultural mix of Jamaica Plain as well as the historical parts of Boston.

Thanks for making our brief stay in Boston pleasurable.

Peter & Keir
Good location with easy access clean apartment.

Quartier moyen, sans charme. Maison sans charme, chambre ultra basique, pas de clim, bruyante. A coté de la police locale, certes sécurisant, mais gyrophares et bruits de radio toutes les nuits sous la fenêtre. dommage, les photos donnaient l'impression d'une maison traditionnelle Bostonienne, on en est loin.

Came down for a weekend for a friend’s birthday and the location was perfect and it was the perfect size for what we needed! The host was very accommodating and very responsive! Will definitely be booking with them again!
Great location easy to get around on foot, by Uber, or subway.  Would definitely stay there again.
Amazing place close to HBS - can only recommend!

My wife and I recently spent four nights at Maria's place. It's very comfortable; we needed both the A/C and heat during our stay, and both performed well. Very good appliances in the kitchen and a bright, comfortable living room. We slept well in the beautiful sleigh bed in the master bedroom. Note that the bathroom is on the first floor and the bedrooms are on the second, just something to be aware of.
The apartment is in a great location, just a few minutes from either the Forest Hills or Green Street stops on the Orange Line, which provided very convenient access to most of Boston's top destinations. Jamaica Plain is a delightful neighborhood, very walkable with great local shops and restaurants. Maria's place is an excellent home base for your trip to Boston!
Great location in Boston, easy to access to many amazing places , downtown,  Cambridge.
Great place where you can find everything you need. Hermina is a nice person. I would recommend her rooms to anyone visiting Boston.

We had a great time at Jonathan and Alta's. Everything was comfortable and well maintained. We were mainly able to find parking and the location was not too far away from spending time with our daughter at BU (granted, we had a car).  It fit our group (5) quite comfortably and had what we needed. Thank you!

Loved my stay here! For some reason, I hadn't realized that this was an in-unit kitchen, rather than a shared kitchen, so I was very pleasantly surprised when I arrived.... A great find in a great location. :)
Lovely home fully equipped and utilised. Perfect for staying with family for friends for long stay. Just flawless.
Great studio for long weekend near Back Bay. Extremely responsive hosts; very quiet neighborhood.

Great place to stay - pretty much perfect other than the elevator was out of service. Listing at the time of booking stated they had an elevator, but we were messaged a few weeks following booking that it wasn't in service (at which point we could not cancel our booking with a refund). Otherwise excellent accommodation.

Elisangela’s home was a nice place to stay for a few days. Checking in was easy. Location is close to the airport and subway which is a short ride to downtown. The place was very clean and I would be happy to stay again.

We had a wonderful relaxing three days in Boston at Richard and Vicki’s brownstone. The location was perfect - walkable to BSO, MFA and Gardner museum. The apartment was very quiet, comfortable (blackout curtains in the bedroom!), and contained everything we needed. The interior was even nicer than the photos (15’ ish ceilings). We will be staying again the next time we attend a BSO concert.

Good location to navigate Boston.
Not as clean as expected.
Clean, walking distance to attractions and subway. Good choice for your stay in the city.
This location was perfect for visiting my boys at Berklee! Very clean and comfy. Felt very safe in this area. Will definitely try to stay here next time I’m in Boston.
Great location for the history, food and fun!! We stayed 3 nights with no issues just good times!!

Awesome place for us to stay while in Boston. We were able to get everywhere we needed to go easily, have a well equipped, quiet place to recover, and ended up extending our stay twice. Roof deck in the Spring weather was especially awesome. Will definitely stay again.
Lovely home!
Nice Stay at a beautiful traditional house in Boston!

we had a good night here. the place was clean and easy to find. we personally didn't find the bed or sofa super comfortable but good for the one night we spent there. I'd definitely go back. having the parking spot was great for us.
Just as described, clean safe place to sleep while visiting Boston for my wife and I first time. Parking garage for the rental and the T train were both just about 2 blocks away.

Glenn and Oliver are incredibly nice and great hosts to stay at. Their authentic old and charming house is an amazing home away from home. The lovely breakfast basket in the morning and doggy cuddles from Mason among others just make it a great recommended place to stay for your Boston trip!
Excellent!

the host lady is very kind and she knows what she is doing, puts high attention to the details and she is very communicative and always happy to provide help and tips for you to manage your stay in Boston if you are new to the area
The place is clean and in a good location close to the airport and the biggest universities in Boston
I would definitely recommend and reuse if needed

We had a fabulous stay at the apartment. Despite the rain over the weekend, staying over in the unit felt like a vacation in itself. The small touches like the sweet treats, the make up remover sheets added the extra touches that separate Laura and Olivia’s unit from the rest of the bed and breakfast units that I have stayed at :)
Location is fabulous!
Our stay was so great, we had a really good time. The Place was so cute and cozy, the decor and interieur so well chosen and thoughtful. We would love to come back one day!
Great stay. Would consider a later check out times
Good place to stay in Boston, close to the city.
I am happy to say that this studio apartment met all of my needs and exceeded my expectations. I highly recommend this place.

Wonderful apartment, extremely clean, nicely stocked with kitchen ware and utensils.  Very comfortable bed.  This is a fantastic location - 5 minute walk to water and Commons.  No noise during our stay.  I know other guests were in the building, but we didn’t hear them at all.  A huge amount of storage in the apartment, if that is important to you.  Clearly a studio - any more than two closely related people would be too tight, but perfect for one or two.  Communication was clear with quick responses.  Tip:  if you want to park in the closest garage 1/2 a block away on Charles Street, reserve well in advance (try SpotHero for reservations).  Otherwise, the garage at Boston Commons is about two blocks away - very convenient.  I look forward to staying here again!

Great location. Lots of stairs, so pack light.
Perfect for a few nights to see Boston if you’ll be out and about most days.

Strong apartment offering in the heart of the FIDI.  The place was clean and tidy, with all the advertised features (washer dryer combo came in very handy).  Convenient location for business trips or leisure.  Whilst on the seventh floor it can be noisy (or I was unlucky with roadworks very early in the morning) so maybe pack some earplugs if you are a light sleeper.  Would use again if back in Boston.
Great place.

Great location.  Close by parking garage and plenty of amenities within walking distance.  Some of the finishes could use some attention, but it was a good value for two couples compared to hotel options.

Good clean space! Kind of out of the way but in a safe location. Was about to walk to the train station very quickly and get off at the aquarium store to get on the hop on off bus.
Good roomy space definitely recommend if you are visiting Boston and don’t want to stay downtown! It’s a really quick train ride downtown and a quick drive to the airport or take the train to the airport stop.
Super accommodation, when I had questions or problems Jonathan was always on hand and made my stay very pleasant
Spacious and comfortable apartment with excellent access to downtown Boston. Very quiet neighborhood.
4 stars
Drew is a great host.  Very responsive and we loved his place.  Would def come back.
Incredible place, awesome host, right in the heart of Boston!
Great stay
Great apartment for a family of four! We had a great time in Boston and recommend Kevin’s apartment without any hesitations.

Great place to stay. Very clean and good size for 2-4 people. Good location with 2 T stations within 10 minute walk of the place. Easy to park on the street near the house. Lastly, Ewa always communicated very quickly and answered all our questions promptly!

Great location; very clean basement apartment in BU's neighborhood. Easy walk to Fenway, Northeastern U., Newberry Street... Surprisingly quiet for being on Storrow Dr.
Healing Homes was very nice, responsive and very accommodating by offering a refund for the pre-paid parking when we found someone parked illegally in our parking spot. Thankfully we were able to park in one of the Spot Hero spots by downloading the app. Great place for a quick visit to Boston.

The space is tiny but perfect for a short stay, especially if you don’t intend on staying inside. The location is awesome and walkable to so many areas, including Fenway. Having a door code was very convenient.
Great place, thank you!
It was an enjoyable visit, close to downtown Boston and it was very clean.  Would recommend for a weekend getaway.

Agradable apartamento situado en la zona inferior de una casa individual. Muy limpio y bien equipado, a 5 minutos de una parada de metro que te lleva al centro de Boston en 10 minutos. Muy buena comunicación! El único pero es que en la zona no hay comercios cercanos y sin vehículo debes caminar unos 15 minutos para poder comprar alimentos. Una muy buena opción para visitar Boston!!!
Would definitely recommend this place for the value. It is very clean, had everything I needed and checking in was seamless. Very comfortable and not too far from the city!

Very close walk to to the subway, beautiful home, with all the amenities. Amazing host, who gave us so many tips about Boston and had some snacks for us when we arrived. He thought of everything. He was such a joy to visit with. The local shops and eateries in Jamaica Plains was also great to visit. I would highly recommend this AirBNB!

The location of this flat is great! A note to future guests though- it is on the top floor with no lift. If you cannot carry your bag up the stairs, this might not be the flat for you. It is in a very safe neighborhood and checkin/checkout was really easy. The bed was comfortable and the surroundings were quiet, but not so quiet that you couldn't get food/drink in the evenings. A note to make your stay more pleasant: Bring coffee and filters with you and a bar of soap. Otherwise this flat is what you need if you plan on staying out all day and need a place to rest your head.  A note though- like other people have noted in their reviews there was a smell of cigarette smoke, likely from a rule breaker in the past. If you have asthma, COPD or a lung disorder, I would be cautious.
Great stay! The place is as described
Great, spacious place in an even more amazing location, will be staying again.

This was a perfect location for sightseeing and going to a Red Sox game. We felt comfortable walking home from Fenway at night especially with plenty of other fans heading in the same direction. We were able to walk or take the T to other destinations.
As other guests mentioned, parking can be tricky but there is a garage very close by. Whole Foods and CVS very convenient.
Cozy and clean apartment on a beautiful street. I love seeing all of the Berkeley students walking around with their instruments.
Great stay! Would highly recommend for a weekend stay in Boston!!
Our host, the property, and the location contributed to making our first trip to Boston wonderful. Thanks Jone!!

We walked in well after check-in time, and the husband was still inside, trying to dry the bedding. He was intoxicated, and the place wasn't clean. The trash was still in the trash can, and I didn't have cleaning supplies to clean myself. The dishwasher was jammed, so I couldn't use it. But overall, I really enjoyed staying there. It was nice and cozy,  and the neighborhood was beautiful to me. I'm so glad we chose to stay far from downtown Boston.

Marlene's room in Allston has everything you need at a value much greater than you will get in Boston. The bed was extremely comfortable, the bathroom was renovated and large, the kitchenette had all the necessary amenities. We loved the quiet after a long day of touring the city.  Allston itself is suburban, safe and pleasant though there is not much to do if you don't have transportation. Boston is about 10-15 minutes away by car, about 40 minutes by bus and train.  Uber and Lyft easy to come by, though their cost to the city is 17 dollars.

We would highly recommend staying at this quaint studio in Jamaica Plain. We were there for the marathon and had a fantastic experience! Chris and Kristina were great hosts, with plenty of suggestions upon our arrival. They are answered all of our questions about the neighborhood quickly and efficiently. The location is terrific, just a short ride outside the city and easily accessible by the T.  It was extra helpful to have a kitchen to use while we were staying there as well. It was very private, clean and quite a convenient place to stay. We would love to visit again!
Excellent location, comfortable, and clean. Exactly as advertised. Host communicated well and entry on arrival was easy. Thanks so much, we enjoyed our stay.

I loved my stay here :) Jonathan is an excellent host: friendly but respects your privacy. Same for the communication: fast and accurate. The studio is well-decorated with attention to details, very clean and welcoming. Also, the location is very convenient as it is close to the subway. I would highly recommend this studio.

We had a great weekend at Holly’s place. Our group of six had the perfect amount of space with all of the thoughtful amenities we could expect and then some. Holly replied to me immediately when I had a question.  She has clearly thought through every detail to make guests feel right at home. The location is super convenient and it really made our weekend a special time. I highly recommend her place for anyone visiting Boston!
Beautiful home in very nice neighborhood. House was very spacious enough for a big group to stay comfortably. Highly recommended!
The room was big and airy, very comfortable. Host was very responsive.
Very nice stay with Anne, who was very communicative. The place was cleaned regularly.

This was our first AirBnb and our first time at Jurek's. His place was in a wonderful location, and he definitely did a good job in making it feel like a home. I recommend this to anyone, he's very understanding and accommodating.
Roomy. Clean. Accessible to town. Fully stocked kitchen. Good beds. Good linens.

Elliott and Layla’s space was extremely comfortable and also larger than expected! Modern, clean, and well worth the money.
The bed area next to the dining/kitchen offers a partition in the closet - huge plus if you have a full party of 5.
The largest bedroom does get hot at night (our stay was in mid April) but this is easily remedied by placing the fan near an open window.
Great location and a stone’s throw away from the transit system if you need to go further! No problems feeling unsafe in downtown.
Overall an awesome place - highly recommend!

the condo was perfect for 2 people.  It had everything we needed and more!   Bed was comfortable.  The streets were beautiful with trees and flowers and the people were friendly and helpful with the rail system.  If you are a coffee drinker, the coffee maker is a Nespresso machine, we could not find any store that carried them.  You might want to bring your own.  Overall, I would stay here again.

Ehab was an awesome host! The space was clean, there were breakfast snacks and bottled water available, and he was quick to respond to messages. Additionally, Ehab would reach out daily to check-in and ensure I was having a great stay. His instructions for check-in and check-out were clear and reasonable.
Everything was fantastic!

great location, great facility and not at all surrounded by any issues like what other people described. I have lived in Boston for a few years, what you get in that area is what any downtown area in the world has. A mix of people, hustle bustle, some homeless (but to be expected, and nothing that made me feel uncomfortable). The place was clean, functional, and as pictured. Would definitely stay here for the location, price, amenities, and more. Wish the parking situation was better as well, but that is not in the hands of the host.
Muny was a great host, very responsive and accommodating. Would love to stay again.
Super nice place, very clean and spacious. Easy to get to & hosts were really responsive and nice.
We had a great stay at the apartment and enjoyed our weekend in Boston! The house was comfortable for our party of six!
Great house！
As always, a great experience with Maverick. Had a small issue with the keypad lock on my door, but they called me within 5 minutes of me sending a message and helped to quickly resolve the issue.

If what you want is a respite from the city, plus a chance to experience the  atmosphere and tempo of a place outside the centre, then Ann + Esther's cosy little garden flat is the perfect accommodation. Close to the suburb's amenities and also to the bus and subway network, it is the perfect place to retire to after a busy day of sightseeing in Central Boston.  It offers charm and privacy, and you'll soon feel at home among the friendly and helpful inhabitants of this neighbourhood.

Stephanie is an amazing host with a wonderful apartment. She provides everything so guests feel welcome and most comfortable. The location is perfect for everything the South End and Boston has to offer! Will definetly stay again!
amazing place, 30seconds (literally) from train station (Needham Line) 25min to Downtown Bostvery clean, 7-11 local restaurants walking distance.
Great place to stay. No complaints. Great location.

Came to Boston for a mom/son trip. The location of our condo was great to use as our hub as we explored Boston and traveled to other cities. Enjoyable walk to get anywhere, and a short walk to the T and South Bay train station when we didn't want to walk or when we went to the other cities.
It was super hot, and the air conditioning units in the unit kept us nice and cool. My son slept on the futon, and it was comfortable. My bed was very comfortable as well. Plenty of towels and linens, and everything we needed.
Thanks so much! Would definitely come back. Meg
Great location! Stayed with a group of colleagues for a work conference.
This place was wonderful! It was stylish, clean, and a close walk to subway.

I loved staying in Laura’s beautiful condo. Laura was great at communicating the entire rental process. She was there when I needed her via messaging and that’s usually how I prefer to communicate with Airbnb hosts.
I was torn between this location and another condo a block from Boston Common, and I am so glad I picked this one.
🗺 Location: The location is central to all of Boston. Super safe to walk to different neighborhoods in the area, and if you love charming tree-lined neighborhoods (like Brooklyn) you will adore South End. Close to coffee shops and some of the highly rated up and coming restaurants and bars.
👩🏻‍💻👨🏼‍💼👨🏽‍🎨👨🏻‍⚕️ Crowd: Based off the five nights I stayed here, id say the neighborhood is very safe. There are always families playing (lots of playgrounds in the area and parks), Mother’s pushing strollers, people jogging or walking their dogs and very fashionable/hip folks going out for a night out on the town. It was great people watching without it being too busy like it would in the heart of the City.
🛋 Condo: Great natural light. Love the bathtub for a good soaking after the end of a long day. Comfy bed. I appreciated the details such as the sparkling water in the fridge and the Netflix/Hulu TV. The condo is very modern but also has some historic character (wooden floors, beautiful windows). Beware that there are a couple flights of narrow stairs you’ll have to take to get to the top floor...but the views are worth it. Also, thanks to Laura for helping me take the luggage down when she spotted me leaving and struggling with my heavy luggage!
🔐 Check-in: super easy, just read the instructions. Laura was kind enough to offer me a place to store my luggage since I was going to arrive before standard check-in time. I lucked out and she had the room ready for as early as 11am!
I would recommend this place again. One of my favorite stays using Airbnb!
Thank you Laura!!! ❤️
The family that owns the place lives upstairs and were  very friendly and accommodating.
A

The apartment was a perfect location for a short weekend getaway to see the ballet. The host was most accommodating and went out of the way to address my needs. Thank you for helping to make our stay in Boston pleasantly memorable.

Our week long stay in Boston was great. We had a very nice and cozy place to come back to each day. This apartment is in such a great location. It’s close to transit, parks, dining and grocery.  It’s also close to historic sites. We walked all around the city. The neighborhood is in a college area and music school. Lots of young people. We were very comfortable and we felt safe here. Thank you for sharing your home with us.
Nice and cozy place in Back Bay, very clean and definitely worth the price
The hosts made us fell very welcomed,the neighborhood is an urban area,as we had expected.The home is comfortable,needs some work on the outside but that did not deter us.

The Perthshire House is my home away from home- that's how much I love it! Charles is highly responsive and accomodating- an incredible host. I hope to come back year after year, and I love the neighbourhood and rooms! The showers are delightful, and the entire house is a beautiful, historic place to stay.

host was very responsive.  my phone died and had problems getting I. and we called and we were immediately helped.  So happy we stayed here.  place was clean and beautiful.  only issue was parking but all worked out.   thank you for a wonderful stay!

Thanks so much for hosting us for the tail end of our New England trip. We enjoyed the region and Boston. Loved Jonathan’s little space. It ended up being pretty close to most of want we wanted to see in Boston for our short time there. The place is pretty small, like a college dorm rooom, but worked great for the two of us. Good amenities. Would stay here again.

Absolutely loved the home and location! We will definitely be back! The home was stocked with all of the essentials. It was clean and in an awesome location! We walked everywhere including Fenway Park for a Red Sox game!
Street parking was available when we needed it. Close to public transportation but we didn’t need it. Very close to shopping and restaurants!
Michael was very responsive and helpful with everything. Very easy check in and check out. I highly recommend his home for your trip!!

Julie's place is an amazing oasis in Jamaica Plain! The apartment is beautiful, well equipped, clean and very comfortable. The area is very calm and silent, yet with easy access to central JP with lots of restaurants and shops, and the bus running to downtown Boston. We stayed for a month with our 8-year old daughter, and the place was perfect for us!
Julie is a wonderful host! Very considering and helpful, and truly makes sure you have what you need for a great stay. She reply fast to any requests or questions. We can absolutely recommend staying at Julie's place, and would definitely stay there again if visiting Boston.
Great place to stay!
Brian and Heather were very responsive and the place was clean and centrally located.
great updated Airbnb, quiet and clean. nice location

This property worked out great for my son’s semester at BU. The room was very large, comfortable and clean. Location was within a short walk of public transportation, Trader Joe’s and a few restaurants.
Todd was a fantastic host. Very quick to repond and resolve issues I highly recommend this property.
The outermost front door was difficult to open. It required a lot of physical effort.
Great place!

Nice apartment in a very convenient location to all the sightseeing in Boston. There is a homeless population that does hang out in the alley near the apartment and if you're a light sleeper, the subway is disruptive, but overall a very nice and clean apartment.

L'appartement de Peter était fidèle à la description. Gros plus pour l'emplacement idyllique dans la ville de Boston, à proximité de nombreuses activités, restaurants et bars. Nous n'avons pas utilisé la cuisine toute équipée mais le café disponible à tous était très appréciable. Peter donne énormément d'informations sur ce qui est autorisé et interdit de faire dans l'appartement.
Nous avons été un peu déçus du ménage (beaucoup de poussières et de cheveux partout) et la salle de bain méritait un bon nettoyage également. C'était un des logements les moins chers à Boston, mais ça reste très cher pour partager un appartement, une salle de bains et une toilette avec 4 personnes dont 2 dormant dans le salon. Nous étions également surpris de l'absence de double vitrage dans la chambre ce qui faisait qu'on entendait beaucoup la rue depuis le lit. Globalement, nous conseillons l'appartement de Peter pour un court séjour durant lequel vous ne comptez pas rester dans le logement outre mesure.
Our stay with Jessy and Diego was great. The space was perfect for our needs. There were many restaurants close by and the parking spot was priceless!

Location: Easy access to Logan airport and to downtown Boston from the nearby T station. Grocery store in walkable distance. Plenty of restaurants, a bakery, and ice cream. The neighborhood is surprisingly quiet, especially at night.
Parking: Don't expect to be able to park near the apartment. We used SpotHero to secure a spot in a nearby lot (10-minute walk). Driving in the area isn't bad compared to some Boston area neighborhoods (Somerville, for example).
Comfort and amenities: The apartment is easily accessible (no stairs). Kitchen is modern. Bathroom clean and big enough. The queen size bed is super comfy.
Overall: Excellent location for access to the city center. Comfortable lodging with good access to restaurants and groceries.
Excellent hosts! The space was perfect for us. We really enjoyed our stay and got to explore many different places in Boston. Would recommend!
Lovely spot. All as described. Really enjoyed our stay!

We loved our stay here! The place was just as it was described and so close to the T. Frank and his wife were very responsive and helped us with recommendations for Boston eateries. Would definitely return!
Definitely a good place to stay in Boston

Johnny’s place was great! The location was perfect for us. The neighborhood is super nice and peaceful with a lot of families. We enjoyed walking to Tatte’s bakery for coffee and breakfast in the morning and we walked to Brewer’s fork and the historical Warren tavern for dinner. The USS constitution and museum is also within walking distance and great to visit with the whole family.
Overall, we would really recommend Johnny’s place.
Very nice, good location, we would stay again and good service.

The apartment was perfect for my family and the location worked well. It was within walking distance to mall, restaurants, grocery stores and subway. We requested a pac ‘n play for my daughter and it was there upon arrival as promised. We did need one additional item during our stay, reached out and it was there within a couple hours. Great hosts. Thank you.
Very convenient to all the shops and daughter's house.

Perfect location for seeing all the sites, walk able Freedom Trail is just up the street, close to the T for Fenway park, China town, JFK Library, Harvard and MIT. Down the street from Bovas and Mikes Pastry and the best Italian at Monica's. Pauli's had the best Italian Subs or Ernestos for a quick slice before heading out. The walk up had the best coffee. T-Shirt guy back of the Boston Massacre site was the nicest and most affordable t-shirts and sweatshirts. Everyone in the North End is friendly and welcoming.
great place and location.....train station 1/2 mile away....go to Boston and Salem with ease

This was a great place. Clean and comfortable. Beds were great. High end appliances. Plenty of pots, pans. glasses, plates, silverware. etc. Lots of restaurants and shops in the area. Veronica was very helpful and responded quickly to all of my questions. Walked to the "T" and could get pretty much anywhere in the City from there. I'd definitely stay there again.
Had a nice stay.

Terrys place was great. It was nice and clean with a comfy bed. The AC is in the kitchen so the room got a bit warm but bearable. They provided a pack and play for our little one which was great. The only downside is the walk up the hill if you’re coming from the metro. We would definitely stay again though.
I had a beautiful and relaxing time.

My family was in town for vacation and the location was easy for walking around South Boston, and trains were nearby.  The home had exactly what we needed!   I thought I would hate the app for the door but ended up loving it.   I have no complaints but some notes so people are aware - typical for the area, the stairs to the upstairs (where bedrooms are) is ‘steep’ and narrow; same for going to the bathroom if need to use the washer/dryer. There was a musty smell in the basement but keeping door closed made it fine; only noticed it as we went down to get to the outdoor space. This space is incredible! We didn’t use it as the grass was too long but I know that there were back to back bookings making it difficult. Kitchen has your necessities for meals at home (except for toaster) but truly, it’s Boston, go eat out!    We found parking to be easiest, and affordable for it being a city, at an outdoor lot on A street which was about a mile away.  Albert was extremely responsive and helpful!
The beds were very comfortable and linens were clean, plenty of space. The home needs a very deep cleaning. The bathroom needs renovation. It is small and dirty.
Wonderful stay, comfortable, & conveniently located to public transportation. Gracious Hosts. Beautiful delicious breakfast basket filled with homemade goods. We look forward to a returned visit. 👍😊

Gary was prompt in his responses and he was direct and caring for us. The Airbnb was clean and had a cozy feel to it. The place was in a very nice neighborhood and had a convenience store, bakery and several restaurants nearby. Overall, this was a fantastic stay.
Very nice apartment, close to commuter rail into South Station.  Plenty of stores and restaurants in the area.

Ms Lihua was a Wonderful host.  She was friendly, always helpful if I had questions about places nearby to dine.  Her home was neat and clean, the room was immaculate, comfortable and quiet.  I would recommend and do intend to visit Boston again and will be staying at her Air B&B

This place is very nice and cozy..easily accessible from your car to the front door, nice sturdy steps.. beautiful home well furnished.. loved that we were able to use the washer and dryer... owners answer your messages quite quickly....

Great location in Downtown Boston. We were able to walk almost everywhere we wanted to go within 15-20 minutes. Each unit has a personal keypad with a code that only you know so it felt incredibly safe. The air conditioning worked great which was wonderful since we were on the fourth floor. The room was small, but we expected that with a studio. What we did not expect was that the bed was actually a futon. The slanted ceiling you can see in the photos made the studio feel even smaller and it was easy to bump your head if you weren't careful. The bathroom was clean, however the design of the bathroom is awkward. The sink is behind the door so in order to use the sink you have to open the door and sneak behind it without stubbing your toes on the door or the toilet. Would not recommend to someone larger than average size. There is a counter with one bar stool, but nowhere to sit for two people if you want to eat a meal together. The last thing that was mildly irritating was the location of the TV. Because there was two of us, both of us could not fit comfortably on the singular cushioned chair where the TV is most visible from. When we watched TV from the bed, a portion of the TV was covered by the cupboard and not visible from the bed. Small issue, but sort of annoying.  We came to the conclusion this would be a great place to stay for a single person who doesn't plan on being in the unit very much, but it wasn't ideal for two people.

Great location right by the green line! The private room, bathroom, and kitchen were all I used during my short stay, and all of them were sufficient and met the description. The decor was fun, and I enjoyed the view. Jim and Aida provided very detailed instructions regarding how to get inside, and I had no issues. Thank you!

we had such a great time here! I spent every morning in the backyard drinking coffee and looking at the plants and birds. we easily caught the red line about 7 mins walking through a cute neighborhood. the room was warm enough on a rainy day, and felt nice and cool during the heat wave. overall this was a great stay!

The good: it was clean enough and the beds were comfortable. The bad: there were no extra touches, just bare bones. The windows wouldn’t open, the air unit was very loud but if it was turned off the place was muggy and sour smelling. The broken elevator was ridiculous, and not fixed throughout our stay. 5 floors. Temple Place refunded a tiny fraction of the cost because I complained about it. No place to cook, because no oil, salt and pepper, nothing but a couple of pans and a stove down the hall. We had to ask for more towels, because there was one washcloth and one hand towel, for two people. It’s a cheap place for Boston, but gives Airbnb a bad name. Pay the extra and get something nice!

LOCATION LOCATION LOCATION! We were situated in the middle of everything. Restaraunts, bars, Cafe, convenience stores, ALL within walking distance. The room was perfect two people and the beds were super comfortable. The rooms had towels and bathrooms had shampoo and soap dispensers which were a nice touch. However, there some major issues that kept this from being a higher rating. First the address we were given was incorrect so the parking garage we reserved was much further than planned and we had to walk another 15 min after a long drive, not the best first impression. Then the rooms were unbelievably hot. The unit in the room was not cooling the room at all. Lastly the one toilet was not working properly. All in all it was an acceptable experience  considering the price but I would probably try to look for other options in the future before staying here again.

This was a rough stay. I had cockroaches. They were going to have me wait until the next day to do anything but ended up sending me to a different one of their buildings just for the night. I came back the next day to roach traps but still felt gross. The bathroom also was disgusting. The ceiling is literally falling apart. It looks like it will fall through at any moment, assuming this could be a source of cockroaches too. It was leaking excessively from the floor above into the bathroom right on top of the toilet. The walls are also so paper thin that you can hear every bit of noise. I had stayed here two weeks prior in a different floor and was fine but after this I will not be back unfortunately. I got no sleep and was in town for work so it was exhausting.
