great place to stay easy to commute to and from
Stay here
It has been a wonderful stay. Jim and Aida took such great care of me. If I have the chance, I’d love to come back again.
Herman was a great hostess  The room was exactly as posted.  Easy access to the red line train, 20 min. to downtown.  I would stay there again
Great place!  Very comfortable and so nice to have coffee pods and a few snacks provided. We enjoyed the space while visiting our daughter at BU.

We really enjoyed staying at Chris’ place. Easy to get around and close to the transit station. Our son lives about a half a mile away so this place was perfect for us. It’s warmly decorated and very comfortable. Plenty of fresh towels and linen. Zero complaints on anything.
Neighborhood is safe and quiet, full of friendly people. Good restaurants close by and more closer to the transit station. Also several little markets for whatever you may need.
We loved our time there and will look to rebook when we revisit Boston.
Great place. Very clean. Walking distance to a lot of the places we planned on going to. Good place for a person traveling alone or a couple.

We spent three nights at Penny’s place. When we opt for a room (with private bathroom) in somebody’s home, we stay a bit skeptical. You never know what you really find. At Penny’s we found what was offered and more. A clean, cozy, quiet, sufficiently spacious and well organized room. A helpful and discreet host. The JP neighborhood is also worth to explore. And it’s well connected (bus, subways) with the downtown attractions and historical sites. It was nice to return to this quiet and green spot,  after a day of sightseeing in the obviously crowded and noisy downtown area.

We had a great stay at the 670 Tremont property!  We were in unit 8 which is two steep floors up but it was well worth the climb. Great location and we walked or took the T everywhere. Quiet unit and well appointed. We would definitely stay here again.

We had a wonderful 5 day stay. The train station was only a 5-10 minute walk. Parking is provided if needed which was important to me because we drove in. We are a family of 5 and it worked well for us and our 3 kids. Elena is super friendly and responds quickly. The place was clean, beautiful, and comfortable.
Excelente lugar, ubicación y espacios de la casa.
Great location. Exactly as described. We had a great long weekend.
Philipp's place was well-appointed and very comfortable. He was very responsive, answered our questions, and took care of any issues. The off-street parking was greatly appreciated.

We had an amazing stay! Literally 10 min walk down the hill to the T station on the orange line and you can get everywhere in the city! We had the best time exploring the city and the home was a fabulous base. It was so hot the week we were visiting, we often came home in the afternoon and took a break before heading back out for the evening.
The home was exactly as pictured. 2 great bedrooms and a couch and air mattresss if needed. The kitchen and house amenities were stocked with what we needed and the Stop & Shop nearby has everything you need, along with different CVS/Walgreens/Target along different T lines. There were even reusable grocery bags available to use since Boston charges for disposables.
Frank and Delilah were delightful to talk with, so helpful in explaining free parking in the neighborhood (which I was concerned about but had no reason to be). We will absolutley be back on our next trip to Boston and recommend it to family and friends.
Excellent location for a pretty great price. Perfect for a weekend in Boston.

This place is great. Clean, spacious, interestingly designed, and well located - close to everything. But the best was actually Maude the host herself. So responsive, helpful, and attentive. Have done many airbnb stays in the past and thus far this was my best interaction. Thank you!! Would love to come back and recommend to others.
Great location.  Comfortable beds.  Responsive host.
Great apartment stay in Boston!

Es un excelente apartamento. Ubicación céntrica y de rápido acceso a transporte, avenidas, fenway park etc etc.
siempre estuvieron pendientes de los mensajes, cálidos amables
El departamento es muy muy cómodo, agradable poco ruido y con las amenidades que necesitas para una estancia sin contratiempos.
Definitivamente volvería ahí. Sumamente recomendado el lugar. No duden en reservar
everything was fantastic. great hosts
Great experience! Good location, nice people and great city!

We recently spent five nights at Laura and Olivia's place.
It was clean, had everything we needed and the location was perfect!
Everything is within walking distance. Grocery stores, restaurants, coffee shops, and shopping.
If you don't want to walk, Ubers were super easy to get too.
We mostly walked, but we did take an Uber a few times
The communication from Olivia was great.
She always responded very quickly and answered all my questions .
I highly recommend this Airbnb
Wow. The location was incredible. Everything walkable and in such a nice area. The room itself was perfect and comfortable. Don’t even bother renting a car if you’re staying here.
Lihua was a fantastic host and the place itself was beautiful! My boyfriend and I had a seamless experience and would love to stay here again!
so nice!
Perfect little spot. Very clean. Walking distance to many great bars and restaurants. Highly recommend
Apartment is conveniently located in Boston and within walking distance to popular areas. It’s a good airbnb for a weekend. Elevator is tricky to find but otherwise not bad for a quick trip.
Robin was excellent and the room was clean and comfortable!!

Andrea was the perfect host, and the space was a steal. Felt super cozy, and had lots of little nice touches including white noise machine, space heater, hanging space for clothes, etc. Really happy with the overall experience!

A nice place in the best neighborhood in the city. Good amenities. All issues (predominantly cleaning) were promptly resolved by the host and eventually we had a very pleasant stay. Overall, recommended. Plus, they donate a portion of the proceeds towards helping people in need to afford staying in Boston while receiving medical care.
No elevators, would not recommend upper floors for people with disabilities or heavy luggage.

Loved, loved Mary Ella's place! The design and furnishings were beautiful and very comfortable. The weather was not great in Boston the first couple days we were there, so we were so happy to have a nice place to relax in! Would highly recommend it. The South side is a great area to explore with lots of cute shops, restaurants and cafes.  We really enjoyed our stay!
The house was amazing and all of us definitely enjoyed our stay, could not ask for a better host. Thank you Eder for everything and will keep this place in mind for future trips.
Diana is a great host!  Responsive  and accommodating to my family. Clean, spacious and comfortable place for my family.

Robin is an excellent, kind host, and this is a very good place to stay. The basement, which is mostly finished, is comfortable and spacious.  The basement is warm, too, with heat-radiating tiles in the bathroom. Robin provided coffee, English muffins, granola, cereal, half and half, orange juice, and eggs, fuel for a good start each morning and nice for an evening snack.  The kitchen area has a small table that looks out a nice window with a view of the bay. The location is on the Red Line, just a short walk to the Savin Hill stop.  There is a wide desk area in the bedroom with lots of electrical outlets to do work.  The neighborhood is safe, and the on-site parking is good.
Beautiful place. Lovely old building with a very modern studio. Super clean and beautiful and convenient.
Enjoyed our stay and appreciated the host's flexibility in check out time due to timing of flights.
We loved our stay in Boston!! The location is super convenient and  we felt the apartment was very safe! A few times when I texted with a question the response was quick and very helpful!! Thank you!

The apartment was gorgeous, with beautiful antiques and beautiful artifacts from all over the world. The apartment has clearly been updated with a great shower/jacuzzi tub (how many of those can you find in an apartment in Boston?) with all the utilities our hearts desired. We were also in a great place in town, walking distance from beacon hill and the T stops as well as Whole Foods and the Commons. It was such an enjoyable apartment that we found ourselves taking pictures of each other in it, as a great remembrance of our time in the city. The host was communicative, gracious and we couldn't have asked for a better experience. We wi definitely stay here again when in Boston.
Great stay here

We had a lovely stay here- comfy bed, quiet room, easy walk to train into Boston. The communal area downstairs was great although we were a bit confused on what all was communal, but overall had a great stay. Beautiful backyard garden too!

Staying at Justin and Mandy's  was great! Quiet, beautiful neighborhood. the place was easy to get to and the hosts were more than accommodating. Always quick to respond to all messages and any hiccups were quickly delta with. Would stay there again next time I ever get back to Boston.
A few short blocks from the Emerson campus and not far from Newberry St.  Except for how cold it was, we had a great time!
Bob and Yvonne are really nice hosts! The big room had everything I needed during my stay. Public transportation and bike sharing to get around are each about a 5-10 minute walk away.
We had a wonderful stay and would definitely go back. The location was terrific and the property was clean and had everything you could need.
Nice clean place, nothing to complain. Had very nice stay

The accommodations here were even better than the photos show, beautiful huge windows and wonderful clean bathroom and bedroom. The hosts were so friendly, and we felt very much at home. The building is very safe, and easy Lyft rides into Boston for under $10 whenever we needed.
Great location.  Walkable to many sites.  Only wish the check in was a couple hours earlier.  Otherwise, everything was great.

This apartment was great! The beds and furniture were very comfortable and the bedrooms were all a great size with plenty of space for suitcases. Having a washer and dryer was also a great benefit and the host even provided laundry detergent. We read in previous reviews that the apartment was a little noisy and would definitely agree that it's not soundproof (you could hear people walking upstairs and hallway doors closing) but would expect that from apartment living. We loved the apartment and would stay again!
Good place, value for your money but so tiny room

Anh was really communicative, really nice and welcoming. The room was large, comfortable and spotless. The bathroom was really cool and clean as well. I would recommend, totally worth the price I paid. Would return.
great place, clean, walkable, comfortable and spacious. will stay again.
Great place

My wife and I had a great stay at this property with our family.
It was clean, modern, well maintained and nicely decorated.
It was a pleasure staying at
27 Ledge Hill Road.
Sean was an excellent and helpful host.
With our thanks,
Mr. & Mrs. Hall

Quick and fast communication with the host. Super easy check in!
Location was perfect. We parked the car and didn’t move it once. everything is centrally located. We walked everywhere we wanted to go.
The unit was very clean and very cute.
Cons -large stain on the couch and the drawers for the dresser were broken. The bathroom is absolutely beautiful, but not exactly functional.. the shower does not drain, and when I mean not drain, I was standing in what seemed like 2 inches of water. Why only to wash cloths in the unit? Also, no full wall mirror…..
All in all we enjoyed our stay, but for the price was slightly disappointed in the cons mentioned.

This was by far the best Air BNB- Kaitlin was so responsive- and allowed for us to check in a bit earlier.  Any questions we had- she was there to answer immediately.  We left her a little something from Texas to help her create a collection of memorabilia from guests.  We loved this stay and would absolutely recommend it to anyone staying in Boston.  She lives close to the T and has a beautiful view of Boston Harbor.  Neighbors are friendly! Thank you Kaitlin!

Selim and his family were wonderful! We had a great stay at their house, which was in a location that was very convenient to the metro, grocery stores, and some great local restaurants. Would definitely stay here again!
Amazing location and such a great little gem. Would definitely stay there again!

This location was in a great spot for walking Boston and or getting on the train. There was always something to go see. Near a lot of great spots to eat, drink, get a quick coffee or go explore some historic sights. Construction is happening right now for a new museum in the corner so it can get a bit loud. We are not light sleepers so we didn't mind it much, but something to note. The walls are a bit thin and the first days we didn't hear much, towards the end of the week our new neighbors were louder. Loved our walks in Boston Commons and Beacon St. the location is really great but I would say depending on the night and time I would recommend stay in well lit areas as the park attracts a variety of people.

Nice location and a quaint space with all the basic furnishings. However, there were two major drawbacks: unclear communication about dog breed restrictions and an additional $100 pet fee, which delayed check-in information and made for a frustrating start. The biggest issue was the bed—it felt like sleeping on springs with little cushioning, making it uncomfortable for both side and back sleepers. While the neighborhood was charming, the bed and poor communication would keep me from returning.

Es un lugar maravilloso, muy agradable y tranquilo, una ubicación excelente, en minutos puedes llegar al downtown y al aeropuerto. La limpieza es un aspecto que se destaca porque siempre todo está muy limpio, se dispone de dos baños completos, la cocina es hermosa. Nos encantó muchísimo y definitivamente cuando volvamos a Boston nos hospedaremos aquí. También Susan y Boris son muy amables y son claros con las instrucciones y siempre nos ayudaron para que disfrutemos al máximo nuestra estancia. Excelente :)

The place was clean, well-located, and exactly as described. It had everything we needed for a comfortable stay. Nothing fancy, but it did the job perfectly. Great value for the location—would definitely stay again! Great host and even greater cause!
The host was really kind and welcomed me!
Amazing home in the perfect location! Roche bros grocery is right down the street along with any amazing shopping! Will stay here again!
Adler was an amazing host. So communicative- and kept us up to date - providing useful info - highly recommend !

Great stay! The space was very clean, had all the essentials, and the hosts were kind, responsive, and super helpful. Check-in and check-out were both a breeze thanks to super clear instructions.
A few notes that may be helpful for others: the shower is open/curbless with lighter water pressure, some towels had a “left in the wash too long” smell (but plenty of fresh extras provided), the AC takes a bit of time to adjust, and the fridge doesn’t make ice but keeps items cool (Brita filter is provided for drinking water!). The unit itself is right by the elevator, which is very convenient, though on the first floor you do have to walk to the end of the hall to reach the elevator bank. Not a big deal, but something to keep in mind if you’re traveling with tired feet or mobility issues.
Overall, very comfortable and convenient — I’d definitely stay here again and recommend it!

This was the perfect location for marathon weekend. The hosts left a nice welcome package that was much appreciated.  The location is by far the best in all of the marathon weekend stays we've experienced.  We look forward to another stay in the future!!!

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We had such a wonderful stay at this beautiful brownstone in Back Bay! The space was perfect for our whole family — spacious, comfortable, and full of charm. The location couldn’t have been better — we loved being able to walk to shops, restaurants, and the nearby parks. Everything was clean, well-maintained, and just as described, and the rooftop was truly the cherry on top! We felt right at home from the moment we arrived and would absolutely stay here again on our next trip to Boston! Claire thought about all the little details which really made a difference and made us feel right at home. Highly recommend this place!
Yes, it was ok.
I enjoyed my stay at Yans place very spacious private and peaceful. Would definitely stay here again
Lovely apartment in the South End. I loved the space and the neighborhood. Thank you!

Been working remotely  for 15 months due to Covid  finally had a need to go back to the office and decided to stay at Maverick for a few days . location and price were great and its only a 1 min walk to my office will make it part of my routine as I start to spend more time in the Boston office.

We had a fantastic stay with Christiane! She was very welcoming, attentive and responsive whenever we had any questions about our stay as well as the surrounding area. The room looks exactly as it does in the pictures, and is clean and spacious.

The house is steps away from the Bunker Hill Monument and Freedom Trail, and within walking distance from downtown Boston.
muy lindo hospedaje, muy bien ubicado
Unusual entrance and dated home but CLEAN, spacious, and comfortable.

The apartment is very conveniently located in the Back Bay area, with entry access from both the front and rear sides. The back entrance turned out to be especially convenient because it leads directly to the apartment without any stairs or transitional spaces. The washer and dryer work excellently. The kitchen is fully equipped, though you’ll need to bring your own coffee to use the coffee maker. Personally, I found it challenging to locate parking, even though detailed instructions were provided on how to do so.
One of the building’s drawbacks is the lack of soundproofing. The upstairs neighbor, who was described as having "elephant steps," stomped around until 2 a.m., and others played loud music. As a result, my daughter, who is a college student, felt stressed and couldn’t sleep well before an important interview. On the positive side, there’s an iron available to prepare your wardrobe and a huge TV for entertainment.

Cute and comfortable studio apartment in charming residential neighborhood. Easy walk to the t, many restaurants and shops in walking distance . Easy check in and check out. The home owners were around but completely gave us our privacy.

The unit was spacious and beautiful, and the location was amazing. We ran into a couple of issues while we were there, but the host was immediately responsive and resolved our issues as quickly as possible. We were very satisfied with our stay here.

Booked Daryl’s place for a teaching conference I was in town for.  It was half the price I would’ve paid to stay at the hotels near the convention center.  The place looks just like the photos, and it allowed me to stay together with my mom and my uncle, who accompanied me on my trip.

Nice warm and clean place for my quick stay. There is no kitchen but there is a microwave and fridge in the hallway for your convenience! The keypad door entry was very easy and the host was responsive. Would stay again!

We visited our oldest son in Boston and this was a great place for us to stay; he goes to BC law and it was close and well situated to many great restaurants and shops. The apartment is super cute and four of us were there for three nights. Lots to do in this area and really think back Bay is a great place to stay. Would for sure come again and thanks for the great place.

Great location with plenty of delicious food options just around the corner. The area feels safe and is easily walkable. The place itself is clean, well-equipped, and spacious, with a comfortable bed. I stayed here long term and found it quite comfortable, although the central heating can be a bit excessive at times during winter. The host may be a bit difficult to gauge; there could be room for improvement in problem-solving approaches, which could enhance the overall experience.
Wir haben uns sofort wohl gefühlt und würden definitiv wieder bei Rich für einen kurzen Aufenthalt in Boston übernachten.

My trouble accessing the unit on the first day was due to the fact that unknowingly had 2 Airbnb accounts. The support team tried very hard to help me but they were looking at one thing and I was looking at another.
The unit was marvelous. Very clean and well appointed. It was very helpful for us to be so near public transportation as we did not have a car. Napole's bakery right across the street was handy for excellent morning coffee and pastries. It would have helped, though, if I spoke any Spanish. The neighborhood was very nice. The noise from the airport really could not be heard inside. Beds were comfortable.
The weekend was wonderful and I would stay here again. The unit was very spacious. I will say I was unable to turn on the water for the tub but we only stayed two nights so I wasn't bothered too much.
The place was great!!! Very clean and comfortable!!

the host was nice and kind.
even before the check-in I could drop off my baggage.

Very nice stay! Clean and well equipped. Beautifully furnished and comfortable. The extra little touches like the home made jam made it feel like home. The bus stops are within walking distance but if weather is bad own transport is preferred.

Departamento increíble, amplio, muy cómodo y bellísimo. Lleno de detalles de confort, decoración y comodidad. Muy recomendado por cercanía con transporte y buena ubicación. Excelente trato y amabilidad de Terry!!, nos hizo sentir como en casa. Muchas gracias !!
Just as advertised. Cozy and clean. In great neighborhood- close to T. Had a lovely time.

The room was great! Would suggest for anyone staying in the area looking for an awesome location within walking distance to anything downtown Boston. A very quant and relaxing space to unwind after spending the day in the hustle and bustle and excitement of the city. Great communication and privacy from the hosts. Would and will definitely stay again!
i had a very great time staying at this residence it completed my vacation
A very comfortable apartment at a good price within a quick walk to the Boston childrens hospital.

Great space in an awesome location. Riyo and her family are very welcoming and accommodating with awesome recommendations. The apartment space is nicely decorated and inviting. Definitely recommend staying here!

We had such a wonderful stay at Bridget's home! The apartment is lovely and spacious, and it had lots of very thoughtful touches that made our stay more comfortable (games, art supplies for kids, Tupperware, Ziplock bags). Everything was neatly arranged and clearly labeled, and it was a breeze to locate things! The location was ideal -- it was less than 10 minutes to downtown Boston, and the neighborhood itself is lovely, with a huge park and a walking trail by the bay. Bridget was an outstanding host -- so responsive and friendly, and she helped us find a babysitter. Would absolutely stay here again and would recommend her place to anyone!

A casa é muito organizada. Ainda que o espaço seja compartilhado entre 4 quartos, as regras estabelecidas pelo anfitrião favorecem uma estadia tranquila e segura. Há gentilezas (como itens disponíveis para lanche e café da manhã) que fazem a diferença. A decoração moderna e a limpeza contínua também contribuem para o bem-estar geral.
Great place! Loved it!

Super host but unsafety place..
갱싱발 방음일동안됭공 윗집졸랑 싱끙렁웡용 팡팅열공 술췽행성 남읭집 문열랑긍렁공ㅋㅋ 슝펑홍승틍면 뭥행용 존낭 윗집잉 뭉성웡성 환불항공 싶었습닝당..ㅎㅎ 상진보당 좁고 윙칭동 창잉낭타운 안엥 있엉성 뭉섭습닝당 잉돈응롱 안전항겡 홍텔엥성 장셍용
역대 최악의 숙소 였습니다 시발

Joseph was great! My husband and I were in Boston with another couple and our accommodations fell through. I lucked out and found Joseph's listing. I explained we were in a jam and he got the apartment ready for us right away. The place was perfect, comfortable beds, and free off street parking. Joseph was quick to respond to all of our questions and was a wonderful host.
A huge thank you not only for the apartment but for finding, and mailing a forgotten purse. I would highly recommend Joseph's property for anyone looking for a place in Boston.
Penny was a great hostess!! She was very insightful and we were very comfortable! Boston is a great place to visit! Highly recommend Penny's  home for your stay 😊

Just as advertised! In a very unique new development in Brighton, the amenities were great, t and buss accessible within short walks. The apartment was pristine and had everything we needed, the Pool was great over the summer as well!
Great location
Great location and very practical layout. Quiet at night. Heating works smooth and well. Also quick communication.

The boiler room was very cute on the inside. However, you could hear everything going on with the people upstairs. My husband and I had to buy earplugs to be able to sleep at night. Also, the location was kinda sketchy.
Good small, single room for the price. Bathroom being across the hall and having the press the passcode each time is a bit inconvenient. But over all clean.
Used Meri's home for a scene in a film, everything was perfect.  5/5, would rent again!

Great, spacious place, close to everything. I was able to walk to the museums easily and Bostons Commons, plus the T was only one block away that made easy transport to Little Italy.  Very comfortable accommodations and the balcony was a great addition for an evening glass of wine in the perfect weather. Would highly recommend.
Awesome stay. Nice and local to everything. You can walk to anywhere. The place was clean and perfect for a shortstay.

Finding the place was difficult. Driving in Boston always challenging. But, once we arrived, we found convenient on-street parking. Some amenities listed were misleading some missing, but Michael was very responsive to our questions. The place was clean and well furnished. Upstairs neighbors were noisy, but Michael contacted them as soon as we complained. Location is very convenient for accessing the T for Boston sightseeing.
We enjoyed our stay.
Wonderful stay. Lovely neighborhood. Clean place with great window looking over Charles Street. Very responsive and professional host.
good place to stay

The unit is perfectly located in Beacon Hill, walkable to many restaurants and attractions. The unit was clean and sunlit - accurately portrayed in the photos. The one downside, however, is that the unit is in an old building so walls are extremely thin. It is easy to hear neighbors, even when they are talking at a somewhat normal decibel. Typically we would not mind this too much, but the guests staying in the unit next to us were very loud and lewd until 4am, making for a bit of an unpleasant night. Could have done with a bit more quiet and privacy. The thin walls aside, I'd highly recommend this unit! The owner was very responsive and easy to get in touch with. We felt well attended to during our stay.
Good host took care what we requested as our stay was long we requested heater they provided her portable heater as well as - we requested daylight bulb they installed complete new light.

Nicks place was well appointed with dishes, cleaner and bath products.  The bed was very comfortable.  It was close to subway lines, buses as well as universities. Parking was available on the back of the house. Nick was very responsive to our questions about Boston transit.  Overall a perfect stay
Na

Nice cozy 1 bedroom with a comfortable pull out couch.
Also a great little outdoor seating area.
Only strange thing was blinds in living room and bedroom had cords removed so you could not pull up the shades.

We had a great stay at Kristina’s studio. We immediately loved it! The space is perfect for a couple or single person and the apartment is SO thoughtfully and tastefully furnished and decorated. Great use of space. Location is terrific, close to the T and easy walking distance to all that JP has to offer. Kristina communicated really well. I’d definitely stay there again and recommend it to others!

Susan and David helped make our trip to Boston easy and enjoyable with their communication about logistics and restaurant recommendations. The place is just as pictured- stylish, comfortable, and clean. We stayed 3 nights in a city we know and love, enjoying a really comfortable bed in a beautifully renovated brownstone. We loved the location and exploring the South End as well as easy access to Newbury Street and Copley.  As another reviewer mentioned there is noise in the city - however the bedroom is in the back facing a park. We closed the bedroom door and didn’t hear a thing. They also had waters, coffee and English muffins in the kitchen. The stay was such a treat!
Norah was an excellent host, the Airbnb was clean and prepared upon our arrival, the location and value of this Airbnb is unmatched, would recommend to anyone looking for a place to stay in Boston.
Howard was a wonderful host. My husband and I had a great time!

While the location is perfect and apt is new and clean, these are the only pluses I found so far.
First if all, it has a VERY loud AC system, which you just have to turn on in winter for heating. Half of the sockets and lights weren't working, cause some breakers were off and we had to find them first. The washing machine wasn't working cause of the fault of the water saving system. Everything that is possible was made cheap – very cheap synthetic bed sheets, no shower gel or anything. This is the first AirBnB in my life that doesn't have soap! Buying soap for 2 days is very strange.
It also felt that each step in this apt needed contacting support, which works really well, but this is not what you want to have for almost $700.

Jennifer’s place was in the perfect location! We loved having our family vacation in Boston, and even had a full kitchen and back patio for the kids to enjoy. We were 10-20 min from most everything. VERY clean home, and easy access. Would stay again!

Wir sind eine 3 köpfige Familie, daher war die Größe und Lage super. Wir waren 6 Nächte vor Ort und konnten vieles fußläufig oder mit der - ein paar Geh-Minuten entfernten - Metro erreichen.
Länger hätte der Aufenthalt aber nicht sein dürfen, da es keinen Besen oder Sauger in der Wohnung gab und es dann gegen Ende doch krümelig wurde (um den Essenstisch am Boden) - daher nur 4/5 Sternen.
Super waren die Waschmaschine, Trockner, Geschirrspüler, der Fön und die weiteren Küchengeräte.
Es gibt Rollos aber durch die Wölbung der Fensterrahmen, war es trotzdem recht hell Nachts/ und vorallem Morgens, uns hat es nicht gestört, aber gut zu wissen alle mal.
Wir haben unsern Aufenthalt genossen, und würden uns wieder für diese Unterkunft entscheiden.
This was exactly as described, good value for Boston, and close to the convention centre/Prudential. The instructions were clear, and access easy. I would stay here again and recommend to others.
Location was great. A block away from coffee places, train stop and convenience stores for late snack runs. Super easy to communicate with and easy check in and check out instructions.
The space was beautiful! Very stylish and clean which is just what we were looking for! Definitely recommend this place. Thank you for a lovely stay!
Awesome experience & felt like home
Fantastic stay altogether! Enjoyed simplicity of check-in, location is excellent, the place is sparkling clean and has almost all you'd ever need.

Lynda's place was exactly what we needed. Easy on street parking and quick access to where we needed to be. The place was clean and Lynda was very easy to communicate with at all hours of the day. The only clarification I would make (and only applies to staying in the summer) is that they AC provided in the form of two window units in the bedrooms. So if there is a heat wave, it can get pretty toasty in there. Hopefully less heat waves in the future!

Nice place. Not close to the middle of "town" as i had thought but a short walk to the T and a quick ride to all the places there is to see. A seemingly sketchy neighborhood but I never had any issues and over all quiet. Everyone in Boston is very friendly and if you don't want to take the T an uber is only around $15 or less to the center of stuff.

O apartamento é muito bem arrumado com espaços amplos. os anfitriões foram muito atenciosos na comunicação. Apenas não recomendo ir de carro próprio ao local, pois é quase impossível localizar uma vaga.
Great stay overall!
It was great location and awesome place.

Foster’s place was the perfect location for our weekend get away. Located on a beautiful, tree lined street, in a quiet neighborhood, but close to public transport and downtown Boston. The apartment had everything we needed for our stay. Foster and his team were always quick to respond to my questions and were accommodating of my need to store my luggage, prior to check in. I would definitely return and stay in this apartment.
Enjoyed staying
Rental unit was clean and tidy.  Within walking distance of several restaurants and stores.  Instructions for parking and entering unit were very detailed.

Our stay at Adam and Liza’s home was the best we’ve had. They were very prompt in answering any questions we had and went above and beyond in their hospitality. Their home had everything we needed during our stay. The neighborhood is walkable and on-street parking nearby was plentiful. The orange line is very close as is Southwest Corridor park. Highly recommend staying here! We’d love to be back in the future.

Thanks, Chris, for sharing your place with us! Loved the apartment and neighborhood, appreciated the terrific kitchen setup and supplies, and were grateful for your good instructions and communication. We hope to come back!
I had arrival time then expected and he allowed me to drop off my bags which was a major help!

Great location, and very clean space.  Everything was exactly as described. The host was accommodating and had great communication.  We had a snag at check-in with access to the unit but they were good about communication and helping get it resolved.  Parking in the area is almost non-existent but apparently all of east Boston is that way. Overall it was a great place to stay and it was well appointed and had everything we needed for our stay.

This was the perfect place for us - we had a very early flight out of Boston and needed somewhere to stay that simplified life for us. We could easily park the car there and the drive the next morning took less than 10 minutes. Shelley was a great host, communicated clearly and made my first ever Airbnb experience super easy, welcoming and straightforward. The room was clean and exactly what we needed. Thank you also for your recommendation of a good place to eat nearby. If I am ever coming into Boston late or needing to leave early I wouldn't hesitate to use it again.
This condo is beautiful, sparkling clean, and features lots of personal touches to make your stay comfortable. Very close to the Seaport as well. I highly recommend it!
As expected. Thank you
Great place

This is a BEAUTIFUL unit. It's not smack in the center of Downtown Boston, but it's not terribly far either. It was perfect for our work trip (quick taxi to the convention center) and the place was clean, updated, and easy to access.
The stairs were a little difficult up to the third floor with all of our bags, but we probably had more than the average person.
There aren't a ton of places that are walkable for restaurants and some are through some areas that we didn't feel safe walking to after dark as two women.
Communication and set up were clear and efficient.
Great location! Nice quaint place. Felt safe in the building. Good communication. Stay here!
Other than the parking garage being multiple blocks away, everything was good. Small but clean and a good location.
房间很整洁，有加热的水壶，浴室有充足的卫生纸，也有浴巾。就是在地下室，如果不在意没有阳光的话，也是一个不错的选择，因为毕竟还是比较干净的。

My travel companions and I truly enjoyed our trip to Boston. Brian and Heather's apartment location was fantastic. The location being at the Park Street was ideal. We were able to walk and navigate throughout the city.

Communication with them was timely and thorough. I had a couple of small issues and Brian promptly responded and addressed the concern.
Having security was an important piece of our decision to rent the apartment. The entry door security functioned. Initially the inner security door security door was not operational until Brian immediately addressed the issue.
The beds were very comfortable. The linens were clean and nice. I would have preferred the bottom sheets to be fitted. There is a compressor on the roof outside the second bedroom which kicked off and on throughout the night.
It was helpful to have a full size washer and dryer and nice size kitchen. The lighting was excellent and the furniture was modern.
This third floor apartment help make my Boston visit quite nice.
Catherine

Great place! I love how convenient everything was. I was able to get food closeby, get laundry done in the basement, get groceries, and everything I need in the surrounding areas. Comfy bed, nice kitchen and living space. I would definitely return when I’m in Boston!

Quaint and homey airbnb with lots of plants (and a cool aquarium!) in the family room and a set of stairs up to a nice and secure room. The bed was SO comfortable and I had no trouble with the amenities or with sharing the bathroom with my neighbor. It's a very short walk to the T subway and very safe area. Will definitely put this on my saved Boston list for future trips.
Very good location. The room was exactly how it looked like in the pictures.

The apartment was the perfect place to stay for our first visit to Boston. The location is perfect. On a street of beautiful brownstones. Plenty of places to eat within walking distance and plenty of grocery stores close by if you want to cook your own food (it has a full kitchen). We walked to most of the must see sights like the Boston Common  and Isabella Gardner museum and took short Uber rides to many others. Only 15 minutes from the airport.  I highly recommend it.

Very nice short stay. Taskin is very helpful and answers very quickly. The room was clean and comfortable. The kitchen is not fully equipped but has a microwave and cutlery. I recommend it for short stays.

This home worked out really well for our group of four.  We each had our own bedroom.  We made last-minute plans to visit Boston, but the hotels were practically full and prices were through the roof.  We were able to rent this home for half the price of a hotel.
Thank you!

Exactly as described, close to tram line and Whole Foods supermarket.
Naveen’s place was comfortable, with many modern amenities, great internet connectivity and extra thoughtful touches.
Naveen was very responsive and extremely helpful in ensuring we were able to get access to secure parking (which was a reasonable extra cost, communicated clearly by Naveen before we confirmed).
The location was easy to find and we felt very safe, even when returning late in the evening.
Highly recommend Naveen’s place.
Bleuty was very responsive and helpful

The place was easy to find. Nick gave clear instructions for parking. The space had everything I needed and Nick supplied coffee and some water. The kitchen was stocked with items needed to cook meals for the week. The bed was very comfortable. I had a car and a parking spot. Nick checked in to make sure I was happy. Overall it was a great place to stay.
Amazing ! I will stay in this place every time I go there…
Beautiful, private, outdoor area. There were thunderstorms while we visited and we enjoyed sitting outside with a cup of tea and listening to the rain and thunder.
very responsive!
Amazing place

Great location, amenities, and local tips. Sandra was very attentive and communicated with us during our stay. The neighborhood is nice and quite with local stores and restaurants near by. The train station is a few blocks away which is extremely convenient.

Aaron and Lu’s place was perfect and a nice, spacious, and open space to work and mix in a a little downtown relaxation. Several wonderful restaurants, grocery and drug stores within walking distance.
Highly recommend for an urban location in an amazing city!
Great location if you are going to Boston for HOCR. 15 min walk to my boat.
Great stay! Very speedy communication with any questions I had.
The host was very helpful with our questions. Nice place to stay, very good location.
excelente ubicación , muy limpio y ordenado
An excellent place for our Boston spring break trip. Great restaurants within 10 minute walk. Easily accessible to North End with 15 minutes.

Norah made checking-in very easy, as she was there to meet me when I arrived. She, and her partner Riley were both very friendly, and also respectful of privacy, and were quick to respond to any queries I had. The apartment itself is quite nice, was very clean, and actually a little larger than I expected. It's a great space to have, in a perfect spot, only a short walk to the Boston common, and to Charles st where you'll find a few Cafes for breakfast. Can absolutely recommend this place to a couple or a solo traveller. Many thanks to Norah and Riley for making my stay in Boston a nice one.
I had a wonderful time staying in Boston. Exceptional great host!
It’s a good place and value for money. Bed needs change, it’s an uneven one side is sunk in. Other than that it’s a very good value for money.
good place.
Absolutely perfect
Great location and super clean! I had a really good time!

Steve's place is great! Awesome value, all the things you need for a short stay, and right next to the T, which made getting around super easy. Also being in Fenway's backyard was a big plus. Highly recommend!!
Good location.  Very clean and easy check-in.
Host is very well organized and communicates very proactively. The bedroom is very well located and an excellent value for money in this area.
Once again everything was just great.

A quiet and comfortable apartment with everything I needed located in a convenient location. The bed was super comfortable and the kitchen was well supplied. The perfect launching pad for Boston adventures!

The location of this accommodation is unbeatable—close to restaurants, coffee shops, parklands, and all major tourist attractions, all within walking distance.
However, a few improvements are needed. After a long flight, it would have been great to find a cold bottle of water in the fridge. The shower was too small to move around comfortably and lacked a proper showerhead; a handheld one would be a better fit. The air conditioner made a loud noise every five minutes, which affected my sleep, and although Janet, tried to help, it wasn’t resolved.
For longer stays, access to a washing machine would be ideal, as local laundromats have poor reviews, and the available wash-and-fold service is very expensive. Despite these issues, Janet was very responsive and helpful.
Awesome Boston aesthetic! Cute old building that is very nicely redone on the inside. Close to everything we wanted, so we walked everywhere which was nice. Clean and quiet.
让Airbnb社区的其他人知道您的入住情况。这将出现在列表页面。

Lynel’s place is wonderful - spacious and welcoming.  Bed is very comfortable and kitchen well equipped.  Lynel is really friendly and accommodating!  Would love to stay here again on our next trip to Boston.
Great value overall.  The place is very clean and renovated.  Access and parking are easy.  I will look to stay there again on my next visit to Boston.
房间在后院的地下室。性价比很好的地方，可以免费停车。可坐10分钟铁路到波士顿市中心，步行15分钟到boston landing铁路站。房间温度不是很暖和，没能开启暖气。

Nicest Airbnb we've stayed at in a long time - and a bargain at that price. There are BC, BU and Harvard themed rooms with comfy beds. Sparking newly remodled bathroom. Kitchen was clean, coffee ready, well equipped (all of the tools you'd need to cook anything). Easy walk to Allston and Brighton are shops and food, even walkable to Harvard Square. Off street parking for a modest fee (they'll even dig you out if there's a bombogenesis). Convenient train stop takes you to the Back Bay in minutes. Highly recommended. No better deal at this price.
It was a very good experience. I will choose it again next time.

What a great team to work with!!! Quick responses, helped with area tips, and the space was clean and stylish for two of us to stay! I felt secure, safe and relaxed with ease in our studio after a long day of Boston fun! Exploring more Maverick locations!!!

El apartamento está en una muy buena ubicación, la mejor !
Fuimos 6 adultos y las camas estaban impecables, súper cómodas ! El sofá cama es tan cómoda como una cama!
Muy limpio y buena atención de Kathy con todo los detalles
Lo mejor es la ubicación, cerca de un centro comercial, a dos cuadras de un alquiler de bici donde se alquilan y se puede recorrer todo en bici..
Fantástico todo !

This house is great for families! Very comfortable with plenty of space to relax. Our family of 5 came for a long weekend as first timers to Boston. The bus + subway are convenient to the house, easy to navigate & run often enough to be very convenient for heading downtown to explore. Fun local restaurants within quick walking distance.

Kevin was an outstanding host. He was incredibly helpful and quick to respond when we needed him. The location of this room was perfect for us as we didn’t want to be in the center of a busy city but the commute to downtown was fairly easy. It was perfect for us!

Kevin's place was great. 3 spacious bedrooms and a roomy living room and kitchen to hang out in. There were a/c's which was nice because it was a super hot night. There was plenty of street parking, and an off-street parking spot! It was just a quick ride to downtown. Excellent communication and easy check in/check out.
Really nice place, love it
Great house in a great location.  The host was very accommodating and thoughtful.
Everything was sparkling clean
Great place!
A comfortable house with lots of atmosphere and a well stocked kitchen.
Great stay
Una casa in tipico stile locale ristrutturata ad alloggio. Comodo avere frigorifero e microonde in camera.

This was my husband and I’s very first time in Boston and we’re very happy with our choice to stay here! We would definitely recommend staying here. The location was great and it was very clean with an insanely comfortable bed. Everything was near perfect. For the price of this stay, we would have loved a better quality tv though- that would have made our winding down at night more enjoyable. Other than that, we would stay again if we decide to come back to Newbury Street! The shops and restaurants are literally at your doorstep!
The house is really well-cared and the instructions are clear. It was generally a really enjoyable stay
Difficult to locate initially

Lovely top floor one bedroom apartment with all the comforts of home for your stay. Clean and spacious. Very comfortable bed!! Well equipped kitchen. All in a Beautiful neighborhood that has lots of wonderful restaurants and shopping, all walkable. Highly recommend this flat.

What a gem! Beautiful brownstone in the heart of the south end. Well appointed with everything you need, including comfortable furniture & beds + strong ac units in the bedrooms. The outdoor space is even better in person - fantastic view & enough space to relax & enjoy! Jennifer checked in & was very responsive. We would definitely stay here again!
Thanks so much!

Room itself was exactly like the listing. The overall place smelled really terrible and bathroom didn’t have a light.
If you need a cheap place to stay this place will be fine. Think Id rather pay more next time and grab a hotel

Stayed at this place for around a month. Albert was always incredibly helpful and proactive. Any issues / questions I had were always resolved as quickly as possible. Definitely one of the best hosts I’ve ever had on Airbnb.
While the house is old, the space is great, the rooms are very big so it’s definitely great value for what you pay. And the beds were also super comfy. Overall great stay.

Meri gives the most thorough instructions + information! Love it and appreciate it so much. The floors were so clean (something I really value) and everything was fresh + ready. Thank you, Meri + Jeff!

The apartment was in an amazing location. Easy to get all around the city by bus, train or walking. The beds were so comfortable and the decor was very chic. I will definitely try and book again the next time we’re in the city!!
Nice unit, the host is very thoughtful and very responsive. Great experience overall!
We enjoyed our stay and found Brian and Heather very responsive to our queries.
great room for a fair price. it's a good location near the station and city center. would recommend :)
Overall great experience. Thank you!
Overall my brief stay was great, the compact apartment is just the right size. Everything was so clean and all amenities were there ready for use. Would consider staying again next time I’m in Boston
Great stay! Very comfortable ! A+++++
Daryl was very responsive and the place looked just like the pictures. Reasonably priced, it allowed space in our budget to Uber to/from downtown when needed.

I was happy with the exception of the lost nights sleep. I asked for a refund for the night but was denied. I seriously doubt this will be posted. The toilet paper holder in the elephant bathroom was broken and when reported was not addressed as promised.
I still feel I should’ve been refunded the one night. I was awaken at midnight and didn’t get back to sleep.
Will not stay there again
Very helpful and responsive host. Comfortable bed and a quite neighborhood. Wall AC was a little bit noisy but not a problem for me.
The place came as advertised and more. Clean as whistle, great communication and nice people. I would stay again if available.
Everything is awesome

This place is exactly as described, no surprises. I needed a place for the night for a quick in and out trip. Jonathan was responsive, made sure I knew how to get in and that I understood the rules. The place is small and very clean. Would recommend highly for a short stay.

Kathleen made my stay feel outstanding!
From the moment I stepped in, I was struck by the impeccable cleanliness of the place.
It was evident that the hosts pay special attention to cleanliness and order.
It wasn't just the basics like cleanliness that were well taken care of, but attention to the smallest details really made the experience stand out.
Being in a safe neighborhood added an extra layer of peace of mind to my trip. I felt secure at all times, day and night, which is a crucial factor for me when traveling to new cities.
Furthermore, the ease of access to public transportation was a significant benefit.
I could navigate the city effortlessly, allowing me to make the most of my time exploring and enjoying local attractions.
In summary, this Airbnb exceeded my expectations in all the important aspects.
I highly recommend this place to any traveler looking for a hassle-free, safe, and comfortable experience. I will definitely consider returning on my next trip.

Place was very clean, and the beds very comfortable.
We spent all of an our time in Boston.
We have stayed with Jessy and Diego before and will again. They are a delight to interact with and their apartment is a perfect location for us. Couldn’t ask for more.
Great stay. You will be staying with other strangers, but I didn’t feel uncomfortable at all. Cozy little place up top. Stairs were kind of annoying but definitely worth the price and location.
Terrific location on quiet street. Very comfortable bed and nice furnishings. I’d come back for sure.

This is a fabulous apartment -- extremely spacious and in a great location. We stayed for 2 weeks with our 4 year old daughter and there was tons of space for us, her, and the toys she had brought! We cooked in the kitchen several nights, (as well as doing breakfast and many lunches in), and made use of the washer and dryer. The facilities were great for an extended stay. There is even a patio with table and chairs which we didn't use but could have.
The area is great -- very convenient to Back Bay and yet with its own South End character. We know Boston well (I'm from the area) but we enjoyed discovering some new restaurants -- there are several great ones within a block or two of the apartment -- and the local playground at the end of Dwight St (crucial if you have small children!)
Phil and Ann were away when we checked in, but Phil was available by phone to help with the check in (crucial since I had mis-recorded the entry code). When we had trouble with the wifi, he gave us an alternate network and password to join.
All in all this is a great place for an extended (or shorter) stay, with or without children. Thanks Phil and Ann.
Back bay 역은 물론 Hynes convention center 등도 모두 10분 내로 갈 수 있고, 안전한 거리 분위기부터 내부 시설까지, 다방면에서 매우 만족스럽습니다

Boris and Susan’s place was a nice place to stay. The place was really clean. Even when the bathrooms are shared, we felt like we had the place for ourselves. We never had to wait to use the bathroom! Boris and Susan let me keep my luggage at the place before checking in and checking out, this made my trip 100% easier. Thank you guys for your exceptional communication!

This place was almost perfect. The location is a bit odd but it’s close enough to the city and the places I came to Boston for. It was described exactly how it is except I wouldn’t say there was easy off street parking. The road is extremely narrow and was closed for half of my stay so I had to park elsewhere. Other than that it’s perfect, it was clean, available pretty last minute, had everything we needed and the host communicated clearly.

Great place to stay - very clean & comfortable. And Tina is the coolest airbnb host I've had! Super helpful, communicative, and friendly.
Cannot recommend this spot enough, I'll be back!

Meri has a very beautiful place.  A great place to relax after a day of fun. The beds are comfortable.  Having a bus stop right across the street makes getting around Boston easy.  It is best to coordinate the bus and train routes,  a little walking is ok, but it was easier to get off the train at Broadway and catch the 11 bus.  Check in was very easy.  The complimentary waters were very much appreciated!
it was great, she was really nice and our room was amazing. it’s in a great location with lots of things to do nearby.
I stayed here for two nights，It's quiet and super convenient. Linda was also very friendly. I would consider staying here again next time I visit Boston.
Everything was great! John was very helpful at the front desk. Great location with lots of good restaurants around.
Our stay at Riyo’s was enjoyable, clean and relaxed. I hope to come back to Boston and stay here again!

We had a super stay in Boston at Li’s family brownstone . The parking spot in the city was handy as we were traveling with our bikes . The neighborhood is safe and we were able to walk to all that Boston has to offer. Public transport is close if you need it. A few blocks walk to Fenway was a bonus . The bedroom with en-suite was spacious with plenty of room to spread out and relax . It is always nice to start your day with fresh coffee and breakfast- a nice touch as well as fresh linens and a daily clean- this was a 5 star accommodation.
Kaitlyn’s place was wonderful :) The location was ideal...it was beautifully remodeled & the bed was so comfortable :)

The space was clean and the beds were comfortable. The bathroom was a little small and we were not used to staying in a space that solely relies on a window ac unit. We adjusted and all was well. We did not spend our days in the house.
Very nice room with private bathroom. Loved the shower and comfy bed.

I really enjoyed my stay here! The place was super cozy and we felt right at home. We took advantage of the beautiful kitchen, the balcony, and just about every room! The home has all the supplies you need to clean up, and to feel right at home. Thank you!
Overall stay was good, the host was very responsive
Great place! Very clean! Minter was very friendly
The stay was great for what we needed. Parking on premises was well communicated.
Ruim schoon appartement dichtbij Metro naar downtown Toronto. De auto kun je gratis op straat parkeren.

Great place at a reasonable price. Host was very friendly and communicated very well. If you don’t have a car and willing to walk a bit you can travel by train. We enjoyed Dorset Hall restaurant which is about a 7 min walk from the Airbnb. Overall we had a wonderful experience and got much needed rest!
Simple, clean, one-bedroom accommodation in a classic Victorian brownstone rowhouse on the north slope of Beacon Hill. The location was ideal for what I needed.

Perfect place for my stay.  I appreciated the secure entry and safe neighborhood.  The studio apartment was clean well suited for my combined goals of getting some work done and having a great visit with friends and family in Boston.  The location in Back Bay was very convenient, easily accessible to the transit system, restaurants,  grocery stores and green spaces.  Private and quiet for when I had work to do.    Air conditioning and ceiling fan were welcome amenities over the 4th of July holiday period.

Super cute place. We enjoyed staying here. Muny was very accommodating. The location was a little outside of our frequented destinations like southie, and downtown. But getting to the T wasn’t difficult. Pipes were frozen so we were unable to use the washer/Dryer but overall it was a very nice stay.

Great place if you’re looking for a cool Boston stay. The interior is pretty simple but cozy. The balcony (still open in winter) was an amazing feature. It snowed in the morning so we got up to watch it from there. Overall, a great stay. Would recommend arriving a few minutes prior to check in if you are using their parking garage in order to find your way. The common areas (outside seating and inside lobbies) were also so cozy.
Great location, close to public transit. Cozy space, nicely done up. Jonathan was a wonderful host who made sure I had everything I needed. Had a very good stay.

We had a great stay!  Space is on the 3rd floor of a classic Boston home built in the 1800's.  Stairs are a little steep and narrow so be prepared for that when carrying luggage - but not an issue.  There's a lot of Christiane's character throughout the house as it's chocked thru with photos, bric a brac and remembrances.   The space was clean and included a comfortable bed and large private bathroom.  Located 2 blocks from Bunker Hill Monument and walking distance to many Boston activities, including the Science Museum and TD Garden.
Great place to stay. Very clean and cute. Kind of loud at night due to location but otherwise was very comfortable
Great place.  Comfortable, clean, cute outdoor courtyard, and easy access in and out of the apartment.  I highly recommend Jurek as a host and his place

This house is gorgeous, inside and out. And everything you need for a great vacation is here or within walking distance.  Peter was very helpful with nearby and further city travel suggestions for a great experience in Boston. I would definitely look into staying here again for another trip to that area.

Erin was a great host. She greeted us on arrival and kept in touch by email but left us in privacy. The apartment is  very clean and air conditioned ( which we needed). The house is in a great residential area. You couldn’t ask for anything more.
The place was great location was great ....

Very nice location and very clean apartment. We were on the top floor of the building so the water pressure in the shower was non-existent, and sound travels pretty well from other guests staying on the same floor. But otherwise it was a very lovely place to stay for a night!

A lovely apartment within walking distance of almost everything Boston has to offer.  Beacon Hill is a great location - full of interesting shops and great restaurants, and right next to Boston Common.  Kaitlyn’s apartment is perfectly located, and just as described.  A beautiful living space and bedroom, immaculately clean - perfect for a long weekend.  An added plus was that everything is provided - so no last minute dash to the shops to buy shampoo!!  As a host, Kaitlyn could not be more responsive, with lots of tips of places to visit and restaurants to try.  We will certainly be back.  Thank you for a wonderful stay!
Great place for us to stay in Boston for a few days. Only complaints were the lack of lights in the main space, and that the shower did not have a place to put soap.

This apartment was just PERFECT.  The location is right on green line and the apartment was so comfortable and well appointed.    Everything was so clean, comfortable, and all the extra little touches made it feel like a home away from home.    The coffee making options are always a bonus for me!   The ease of communication, check in and check out were all so appreciated as well.  Misha was a wonderful host and I highly recommend this space for your stay in Boston!

Timothy’s apt is at a fairly good location in Boston Allston area. It’s clean and tidy with enough amenities for either a short stay or weeks-long trip to Boston. It’s also close to the Green Line the core subway/metro system of Boston

Stayed for a few day and Ehab's place was in a nice location, he was a friendly and responsive host to make your stay welcoming and enjoyable. I had an early flight in/late flight out and appreciated that Ehab was able to accommodate me by letting me leave my luggage there in the meantime instead of hauling it around. 5min walk to the red line, local coffee shops and a good pizza spot. Went for some runs and enjoyed that the harbor walkway was only 1.5mi away from this place. Next time I visit Boston, I will be sure to look up Ehabs Place! No complaints here, just a great experience!
Great experience in the heart of Boston. Strongly recommend!
Warm and welcoming and made me feel right at home.

This apartment was very clean, comfortable, and well kitted out. It's located in a very quiet street, only a short walk to the T (but it's worth noting that the apartment is up a fairly steep hill from the T-stop).
Ziyad was a very helpful and thorough host. I would definitely recommend this apartment.

L’appartement est très propre et très bien équipé! Vous y trouverez tout ce que vous avez besoin. Un dépanneur, un liquor store ainsi qu’un marché sont à quelques minutes de marche.
Nous avons adoré. L’emplacement est assez éloigné de la ville mais une station de train est à quelques minutes à pied ce qui rend le transport très facile. Pour le prix c’était parfait!
Great place will definitely stay again
Marlene is a wonderful hostess. Her place is super clean, quiet and a short Uber ride into town. Enjoyed our time in Boston!

Great location (a little noise due to the proximity to schools). Host was super responsive. Furniture is cheap, broke a blind and chair in the first hour of staying there but they were quick to come and fix it. 10/10 would stay again

This place was great! The location was perfect, we never had to pay for the T or uber, we walked everywhere. The place was cute and had heated floors in the bathroom. Abbi was so fast to answer us and was always available. The house was beautiful, clean and decorated well. The only thing was the walls are thin but that was it. We never were in the place for more then just sleeping or getting ready, so this place was perfect for us.
Hermina's place was fine and the room comfy! There was even breakfast & coffee available. :)

I truly enjoyed my time at Lihua's place. Lihua is friendly and responsive, and her house is welcoming, warm, and beautifully decorated. The breakfasts were also wonderful. Overall, staying at Lihua's place was a delightful experience that I would highly recommend to others.
Great place to stay! Nick was very friendly and responsive. The space was clean, comfortable, and conveniently within walking distance to the T station.
Thank you for the wine, water, and the snacks. Safe area with a lot of restaurants. We enjoyed our stay in Boston. Lovely place
Out of a handful of stays that I've gotten a chance to experience in boston. The location could not be any better . The walls aren't thick just a heads up but you'll enjoy your stay.

This apartment is optimized for comfortable sleeping. There are four large rooms and three of them function as bedrooms. The kitchen is a galley that is relatively small, and there is a living room area off the kitchen. So you won’t want to have any dinner parties here but for the most part that’s not what travelers are looking to do anyways.
The location is excellent, close to several T stations, and the neighborhood felt safe and quiet except for a brief stretch when the bars closed on Saturday night. We would definitely stay here again.
Central and practical place. Walkable and close to everything.

Great place, location was perfect and off street parking was a major plus. Georgia was super nice and responsive, the place was clean and just as pictured and had everything we needed for the week. Hope to be back here again!
Location , amenities ,modern and details . This place was pure heaven . Would definitely book and stay again . Close to great restaurants , bakeries and freedom trail and short ride to Fenway !

We enjoyed use of the common space to work and play a family game at the kitchen table, and use of the refrigerator/ freezer. There is one shared bathroom for up to 7 people, but it was not an issue- we all alternated. The close proximity to the airport was very convenient- less than 5 minutes- this made an early morning flight less stressful. Shelly and Lance are personable and encouraging, it was a blessing to meet them and correspond with them.

Really beautiful, sophisticated but cozy spot. Big dining room was really helpful for 3 of us who needed to get some work done. Big couch was super cozy. An awesome price for being so close to the Wharf with tons of restaurants and surprisingly not terrible street parking and several garage options nearby. We were only here one night passing through town, but I wish we could have stayed longer!
Very comfy and a pleasant place to spend time.
Nice place. Stairs are pretty steep to get up to second level so be mindful of that. Cool location, easily walkable to some nice spots.
This was a solid airbnb in a convenient central location. It's a small 4 bedroom without a ton of visiting space but makes a great crash place for sleep between adventures in urban Boston.
One of the best places to stay in Boston.

Jessy and Diego were phenomenal hosts and provided me with a wonderful stay in Boston! The location is perfect if you’re going to a game at Fenway Park. Public transportation is also just a short walk through the park. Highly recommend this Airbnb if you want accommodating and responsive hosts, a good location, and a clean and comfy place to stay!
We had a wonderful stay. Beautiful apartment and very convenient.

This is a lovely place. Lovely neighborhood, just a short can ride from everywhere and an even shorter walk to WholeFoods😊 We thoroughly enjoyed it and would certainly  consider booking it again - ( spring or summer) Xerxes is a gracious host and very responsive.

Bill and Maureen’s place was amazing. It was by far the nicest Airbnb we’ve stayed at. You can tell the pride they take in their space and in the amenities they provide. Only minor downside was lack of parking, but Bill and Maureen were quick to offer ideas, and there was a parking lot less than 5 mins away. Would definitely stay again. 10/10

Bernard’s place is wonderful. Check-in and out directions were clear and easy, the space was clean and and had a very ‘homey’ feel. The space is private, quiet and within easy walking distance to Dorchester/Milton. It is the best place I’ve stayed at in this area and will definitely plan to stay here again the next time!

This was my first time using Airbnb app, and it was a good experience with Lori's house. I spent more than a day to look for a good house to stay in for for days.
Lori's house was a good choice for me to select for several reasons. The first reason is because I like to stay and live in a clean house, which I found that in Lori's house. The second reason is the positive reviews that I read in Lori's profile, which made me excited to chose her house. The last reason is because the price. When comparing between hotels located downtown Boston and homestay houses, I think choosing to stay with homestay would be a good choice if you want to save some money. These are the reasons why I chose to stay in Lori's house. However, the house is classic and you will hear your steps while walking, but I don't think this note could be a big issue for most guests. In sum, I recommend staying in Lori's house.
Notes:
1. The room where I lived in is the green one.
2. You have to be quiet after midnight.
3. It's not allowed to talk loudly in your phone after midnight, and you have to pay attention to phone's alters in order to not bother other guests.
4. You will see other guests in Lori's house.

Great locaties, nice appartement.
The only thing that was bothering us was the lack of curtains in the rooms. Light comes in while sleepwagen.

You can expect a cozy stay, with many helpful tips on how to travel around the beautiful city of Boston. I loved the framed pictures of sights to visit, and how to get around. That was personally my favorite.
Great stay, would definitely stay again !
Great place in a great location.  Beautiful space, with great amenities and wonderful touches (fresh flowers)

My girlfriend and I stayed at Kama's place for two weeks in the summer. The spot is in a great location: two blocks from the T, right next to the Lime scooter zone, and a ten minute walk from the bike share. There is also a stretch of restaurants and shops a quick walk away. Downtown Boston is easily accessible via the T or scooter/bike rentals.
The place itself really felt like home. We were able to cook a few meals and the A/C kept us cool even when it was 90º+ outside. We had a small issue with the bedding and Kama had them replaced within the hour. We definitely recommend staying here!
Friendly host. Easy check in. Perfect location!
I’d like more places like this and more people like Robin.
