Robin's place was so clean and charming. The neighborhood itself seemed very safe and was conveniently located. We loved also loved the delicious breakfast options too (toast, various local canned preserves, fruit, and eggs, and coffee).Thanks for the great stay!
Super clean and modern apartment. I stayed here for a week last minute and the hosts were so quick to communicate!

Very convenient location to downtown Boston. Near the water with a nice walking path. Ehab was very responsive and helpful. Our room was clean, he had breakfast foods available in the kitchen, and the other guests were tidy and respectful.
We really didn't know anything about Boston, but the location was not too far from all of the sights, so it was more convenient than I had expected.
Super nice townhouse. Vanessa and Karl were amazing hosts and super responsive. Was here for 5 days, will definitely stay again when I’m in Boston!

Firstly, I have never written a review on an Airbnb as I’ve always had a great experience. However this one did not live up to the same.
The apartment was dirty and rundown. It looked like the walls had not been painted or cleaned in well over a year. There was tile missing in the bathroom, all the doors were damaged, random holes/cords hanging out of the wall in the bedroom. The trash cans were dented and broken, as was the coffee table and TV stand. The unit in the pictures is not what you will get in reality.
We also walked outside multiple times to people peeing on the entrance and the ammonia/urine smell was present constantly.
The bed was very comfortable and the location other than the urine was good. The host replied promptly.
It is a good place if you want a place only for sleep, it is near to the subway.
This place was gorgeous!! They were kind and helpful the entire time! The room was clean and the bed was comfy. This was a cool neighborhood and super close to the Train. I would recommend.

The location could not be more perfect! Within walking distance or short Uber ride from all areas of the city. A lot of cute bars and restaurants in the area as well.
The room was really HOT, and the fan and fridge were extremely noisy. In addition, almost all of our lightbulbs were burnt out.
As many stated not the cleanest of places it looks like it could use an update in furniture/carpets etc.
The check-in process was easy. However, we had extended our checkout time and they changed the codes on the door without telling us and it was EXTREMELY hard to get ahold of the front desk let alone get back in.
Very clean apartment. Walkable to restaurants.  Perfect for a small group of people. Hard to find near by parking .

Our stay at Meri's place was just wonderful! The apartment has a very nice decoration with all the confort needed (wifi, TV,...).
The two rooms are large and one has a king size bed, the other one a queen size.
Among that, Meri is a great host who helped us finding a solution for an early baggage drop at her place.
The location of the apartment is also quite convenient as it is not too far from the center (with a taxi, count 5min and $10.- the ride) but it's very quiet (exactly what we where looking for).
She also gives the hosts great information about the neighborhood, such as take-out and restaurants, shops nearby and activities to do.
We loved our stay in Boston and this is mostly because of Meri's place.
Thanks again!
I almost forgot: we loved the Sam Adams beers left in the fridge for our first "apero" in Boston. Best way to begin your stay!
房子位于安静的住宅区，乘坐红线地铁出行交通很便利，房主还很热情提供早餐。波士顿是一个很宜居的城市

Maria and Martine are lovely hosts who will help you out when you need it but also let you be self sufficient. Their communication was great and the space was so cozy! Loved eating breakfast on the patio (the one day it wasn’t raining)! I would definitely stay here again if the opportunity arose!

Jenny was wonderful. She was friendly, responsive, and so accommodating to our toddler-aged son. She asked in advance what gear he needed and even left treats for the adults too- wine and iced coffee in the fridge! Her home is lovely, it is a perfect set-up for a family traveling with a young child and the location is ideal. Within minutes you can walk to the South End, Back Bay, Boston Common, T stops, etc. I would absolutely stay here again and definitely recommend this home.

The place is very clean and organized with helpful notes on the walls. It was convenient for us to walk 10 minutes to Airport Station to take the Blue Line to downtown Boston, and to take the bus to Chelsea Station for the commuter rail towards Salem.
So attentive and so very helpful! :)
Excellent, reasonably priced, in walkable neighborhood - would gladly stay here again.
Worked out well for me. Thank you.
Exactly as it says. Expect a great host.

This basement space was great for the money. The kitchen and bath were very clean and the full sized range made food prep easy. My sister, who is highly allergic to animals, appreciated that it is an allergy free space! The 2 dehumidifiers kept the space comfortable and we did not miss air conditioning at all.
We were able to walk to many places (including the farmers' market on Saturday morning) which was great since we didn't have a car. It was a fraction of the cost of other spaces in the area which made it affordable for us. Bleuty was very responsive and happy to help out.
Linda is an awesome host. Communication is clear, home is beautiful and in a good location and the beds are very comfortable. I highly recommend Linda and her home.

Very pleasant living experiences. Cozy and warm . 20 minutes drive to Boston city center. Chinese style breakfast. We come in two and we've had two dedrooms, one on the first floor and one on the second. We've had everything we needed here. Thanks for our kind host.
Wonderful host! Cozy place and comfortable.
Great Host and perfect location. Convenient to Downtown Boston and Waterfront. Check-in and out process was seamless and Atef our Host was very helpful.

The place is exactly as described. It was super clean and had everything you need on vacation. Diana was also a great host, very responsive! Lots of street parking always. The  house was pristine! Photos are accurate, that’s all I can say! If you’re interested, then book it! My stay at Boston was fantastic.

Was looking for a convenient place to stay for the Marathon. The location was close to Boston Commons but quiet. Nice play to stay for 1 or 2 people. The staff was very quick to respond to questions and offer suggestions. That was much appreciated.
Great location and really spacious bathroom.
The host was responsive the place was spotless
Very authentic Boston apartment. In a nice and quiet area. Host was very helpful and all directions were perfect! Would definitely recommend to others. We had an amazing time here!
숙소의 위치, 편리함, 안전, 시설 등은 모두 만족스러웠습니다.  다만 청소기/건조기가 있는 곳 바로 앞이 배정이 되었는데, 방의 구체적인 위치에 대해서 미리 알려주시지는 않았었습니다. 방의 위치와 상관없이 예약을 했었겠지만, 약간 아쉽습니다. 여행일정이 늦게 결정되어 숙소 구하기가 어려웠는네 좋은 숙소에서묵을수 있어서 감사합니다.

Nice stay. Well located near restaurants, cafes, bookstores and easy walk to sites and museums. Just be aware of some extras fees you will be charged on top of the airbnb charges ( read the fine print) for the « free services » (bike use, water bottles refills, snacks…) which you cannot opt out of.
Enjoyed my stay. Easy to find. Great communication and good location. Won’t hesitate to stay again.
Definitely recommend
We had a nice stay here. It's an older building without individual air/heating, so be sure to read the instructions! Maverick was always super quick to respond to questions.
Beautiful apartment. Conveniently located.

My family and I came in for the marathon and chose Kathe and Lisa's place because of its proximity to the finish line and related events. The apartment and its location exceeded our expectations in every way, and we had a lovely stay in Boston. Our only regret was not having more time to relax and enjoy all that the immediate neighborhood had to offer. Lisa was our host/contact person, and she was so helpful and more than accommodating. I would definitely stay again and recommend this Back Bay apartment to anyone looking to visit Boston and/or run the marathon.
Sami & meg were very accommodating

I travel often for work and highly recommend both the listing and the hosts. When I needed flexibility with my reservation, Foster and the crew were able to grant it generously which was greatly appreciated. Wonderful location.
Perfect spot in Bostonn

Alys was a great host and met me in person, even though I arrived late in the night (there was a convenient lockbox with the key as well). The upstairs room was cozy with a window fan, and it was beautifully decorated with pictures, and real plants! The shared bathroom was clean and had a fantastic shower. It was a short 10 min walk to the Red line, which made it a breeze to get to downtown. Overall, highly recommend the place!
Minor nitpick: the mattress could have been a bit firmer, but it might boil down to personal preference.
Great condo in heart of the city. Comfortable with everything you need. On a quiet block but walkable to many sites, activities, and restaurants.
Cute studio in the heart of Boston. Location is perfect! Parking space is a bit small. Very walkable to public transportation. Highly recommend!

The place is amazing!
Extremely cozy! Very nice flat!
The owner was very responsive. There were few bulbs not working when we arrived and next morning the handyman came and fix all. Very quickly after our report!!
The building is located very close to center.
There are few but’s though:
The elevator in the building is a disaster. Do not rely on it. The flat is a penthouse on the 8th floor. Most probably the elevator will not work during your stay-we got message from the host when we were heading to the flat that the elevator was broken. We were lucky enough to manage to use it this time but later in 2 days it has left the chat and most of our visit we were using stairs.
Washing and drying machines are in the common area for 2 flats on the 8th floor. Washing and drying cost 3.25 each. The machines take only quarters.
The washing machine can only wash with cold water.
The dryer does not dry for one cycle. So you have to dry(and pay) twice

Great communication! Anytime we had questions our hosts were quick to respond. TVs in the room and living room had steaming options so perfect for the kids and keeping them occupied when we needed. The space was super clean and spacious for us all and we loved the location. Basically across the street from the train station, a bakery, and a bar so it has a little something for everyone. Everything else we did was a quick drive away!
Very friendly and accommodating hosts. Convenient location.

We had a wonderful stay at Jodie’s place. It was very clean and offered enough space for 5 people. The location is close to many Italian restaurants and close to the north station where you can get on the green and orange lines. We would definitely come back and stay here again!

This is a hidden gem and is perfect for travelers on a tight budget. It’s close to the airport, close to city center, and very affordable. Shelly and Lance are very hospitable and greeted us upon our arrival to show us around their home. There were a couple other travelers staying at the same that we were, which made for a fun, hostel-like atmosphere in the shared kitchen and bathroom. Overall great experience, would return for sure!

Overall, what I expected after reading reviews, etc. It is a company managed rental. Pros: it looked just like it did in the pictures. I used it for a business trip and had everything I needed and was a big enough space. The view to gardens was pretty. Check in and out was very easy and electronic. Location was perfect! I felt safe in the area and it was walking distance to everything I needed Cons: the building and my room was definitely a little slanted and like other reviews mention it is not soundproof so you can hear your neighbors and people coming up and down the stairs ( I sleep soundly so this wasn't a huge issue for me, but you can definitely hear everything). Not a home-y feel, it is company owned but that was okay for my use. Overall, it was nice and if you are trying to save money (compared to the hotels in that area) I would recommend it.
Comfortable, clean space. Great for remote workers. Friendly host, quiet neighborhood.
Great unit, wonderful location in vibrant South End

El lugar es tal cual se ve en las fotos, es muy aseado, Anne y su esposo estuvieron siempre muy atentos y solucionaron cualquier inconveniente, muy recomendado, el único contra es que puede ser un poco complicada la ubicación en cuanto a que se debe tomar un bus antes de llegar a la linea de trenes, pero ellos mismos lo advierten. Volvería a quedarme allí sin dudarlo!
Keith's place is quiet and comfortable and the kitchen is spacious and well equipped.  I would highly recommend this accommodation to anyone

We had a wonderful stay in Catherine's Skylit Suite, it was clean, comfortable and had everything we needed.  It was a convenient location for us while visiting our son at Northeastern and we enjoyed exploring Jamaica Plain.  Catherine was super easy to communicate with and was very responsive.  Thank you Catherine!

Check-in: Unfortunately we provided the hosts an hour notice prior to check in time that the unit was still dirty from the prior guests. Despite asking for assurances that the unit would be ready by check-in time, the unit was not cleaned by check in time. Furthermore, the hosts only communicate indefinite statements that the cleaning crew would tend to it as soon as they could. After a 90 minute delayed check in, there was no offer to reduce the rate due to the inconvenience. Additionally, once the belated cleaning was performed, we again had to reach back out to the hosts as the cleaning crew didn't even leave pillows nor a duvet in one of the bedrooms. There was also a large stain in the corner of the couch from the previous occupants which the cleaning crew never addressed prior to us taking occupancy.
Noise: During our stay, one night we woke up to a unit beneath us--loud music, stomping, singing, etc. It was clear the hosts were off site and unable to manage the situation personally in a timely manner. Also, its evident from looking at the wifi passwords/units in the building that the hosts manage multiple airbnbs in the same building. Accordingly, figuring out which unit was the cause was problematic for the hosts to manage. At first we received a message from the hosts speculating/insinuating our unit may be responsible for the noise at 12:30 am. We have an 11 month old infant so this was comical to be accused of this at best. Again, unfortunately the hosts made no commitments as to timeliness as to when the noise would be resolved--communication was merely that a security team would be sent at some time. The noise continued for three hours rendering sleep impossible until 3:30 am.
Sparsely supplied: Despite paying for 6x guests over a 5 day stay, we were provided only one towel per person. Likewise there were only 8x tiny shampoo/conditioner toiletries provided for showering. The unit lacked any board games or even a deck of cards to amuse ourselves inside given it rained 5/5 days of our stay. The unit was not provided with any extra trash bags. Upon notifying the hosts of this on the second-to-last day of our stay and requesting them, no additional trash bags were ever delivered to our unit as represented. Additionally out of desperation, we bought our own toilet paper as the unit's only three rolls ran out on the same day. Given the lack of the trash bags ever showing up, we had no confidence some would ever arrive. Instead of action/an apology for the inconvenience, the insult to the injury was asking us for our toilet paper receipts to 'prove up' the expense.
All in all, we booked it for the location. When it was all said and done, that's the only flattering thing I can report about the booking and experience.
Nice place to stay, very clean, all facilities, good price quality rating
Great stay. Convenient location
Angela was a great host! Excellent value for the price and the location was pretty convenient for seeing Boston.

As the parent of a Boston College student involved in the performing arts we come to Boston for more than just move in and move out and have stayed at many places over the last 3 years. Benjamin’s place was perfect!! Location, amenities, cleanliness, comfort. We will definitely stay here again if it is available when we need to come up to BC again!! Thank you!!
Cómodo

Tim was such a great host and the place is as beautiful as it looks! Check-in was easier than at a hotel. The beds were comfortable and everything was very clean. We will be staying here again when we visit!
Anne was very nice and informative. Vinnie was the cutest dog. great location to easily get to Boston by car, train, Uber.
Great location with easy access to groceries, restaurants and the subway.  Night life in this area can be rowdy, in case you are a light sleeper.

Um lindo apartamento, muito confortável e bem localizado. À apenas alguns minutos da estação Back Bay e do Boston Common. A anfitriã é muito atenciosa e está sempre à disposição para ajudar. Uma estadia gostosa e aconchegante com facilidade de acesso à tudo em Boston é o que você poderá esperar em 54 Montgomery Street.
Located on one of the most beautiful streets in urban America. Books, beer and beauty - I’ll be back!
Parfait pied à terre pour visiter Boston et les environs. Le Condo est très propre et fonctionnel ! La place de stationnement est un vrai plus! Merci pour tout!
Great location
Basic clean place to sleep. Not an AirBnB where you want to hangout but the owner was very responsive and the place was tidy.
Daryl is a very attentive host, met our need and awesome house he provided for us. If ever back in town we will be back to his house. I will also recommend to friends and family.
Great place with wonderful hosts
Perfect place to spend a couple days.  Close to everything and well equipped.  Thanks so much.

We had an amazing stay at the Airbnb.  The accommodations were exactly as described. Wish the weather would have permitted the use of the balcony.  An additional blanket would have been helpful given the cold weather out.   Absolutely everything was provided that we needed. Thank you for a beautiful weekend in Boston to see Hamilton.

Lovely space, and Bruce was exceptional on the communication front and helped me on several occasions. Appreciated the Nest system - super efficient at heating the place. I did find nighttime noise from nearby train audible so if you’re a light sleeper like me, you may wanna bring some ear plugs.

We've stayed here a few times and enjoyed ourselves like always. It's a great spot, walkable to the North End, the Wharf, Chinatown, Quincy Market, The Commons and lots of historical spots.
The apartment was clean and the instructions were easy. There are some great long-term garages around the corner to park at if you bring a car into Boston.
Great stay. Easy, quick access to Green Line, train and busses. Restaurants and shops very close by. Perfect place. I would definitely return.
Booked by accident, contact them right away but not answer messages at all, now still quiet. Be carefull they not refund if u cancel reservations.
lovely place, would definitely come back!

Peaceful and beautiful space in Jamaica Plain! My boyfriend and I stayed here while visiting Boston and it was a super convenient location outside of the city. Easy and walkable access to the train, 20-25 minute Uber to Logan Airport, and a little less expensive than staying in Boston proper. Thanks for the great stay!
Nice place to stay when you're in Boston
Great location, very walkable to everything in downtown Boston. Bathroom is shared and shower ran out of hot water.

Rebecca is a wonderful host! Polite, nice to talk to and very supportive. Once you need something, just ask, and you will get it almost immediately. The place itself is clean and tidy. A cleaning lady comes once a week. There are a few bus stations nearby and a Subway station not too far away. The neighborhood is calm and quiet. Beyond doubt I enjoyed my staying at Rebecca's and want to say many thanks to her for the hospitality, which was one of the main reasons why I loved Boston so much!
The location is perfect for easily seeing many areas of Boston. The bnb is charming and a nice place to come back to after a busy day. Kaitlyn offers abundant helpful information.
Great stay! Hosts extremely helpful and responsive, home was very clean. About a 10 minute walk to the subway so it was easy to get around.

In a wonderful quiet spot of JP with off street parking. The studio is very comfortable for two people overlooking a lovely garden.  We really appreciate the coffee, tea and granola.  Will definitely stay here again when we’re in town visiting family.
Great stay! Really nice and quiet neighborhood. Booker and Brittany were excellent hosts.

The place was amazing, the living is always clean, many restaurants around,
Will absolutely stay there again
Great visit!
Very easy and perfectly situated. This was a work trip - shared the space with colleagues. Spacious and well appointed.

This is an outstanding airbnb. My wife and I recently spent three nights at Laurie's place and it was in a wonderful location near Fenway with easy access to two different trains (D and C). The place was recently remodeled with lots of thoughtful touches to make the stay as comfortable as possible with extra blankets, umbrellas, quality coffee, and a very comfortable bed. Laurie was a great host and very responsive to all needs. My only complaint is that now future airbnbs will disappoint in comparison to Laurie's place.
A great little place in the heart of the neighborhood. Plenty of restaurants, bars and other amenities within a two block walk. Near commuter rail and bus lines as well.
This was the perfect spot for a 1 night stay in Boston with a group of 4. We loved the flexible sleeping arrangements and felt at home during our stay.
Jessy and Diago’s place was perfect!! It was in a prime location. We felt safe walking around. The apartment was clean and looked like the pictures.

This was such an incredible stay for my wife and I while visiting Boston. The apartment was clean with great views, and the beacon hill neighborhood was such a fun place to explore during the day. We would definitely stay here again!

This is not a welcoming place. The location is very nice. The neighborhood is lovely, but parking was a nightmare. We circled every time for a long time to find anything and the public parking “2 blocks away” means that every time you move your car means that you have to pay again ($41 per day or $23 for a few hours). Yes, there are antiques in the Airbnb, but the kitchen had dirty drawers, the dishes in the dishwasher had something fuzzy on the silverware that I did not want to discover further. After taking stock we decided to eat all meals elsewhere other than coffee in the morning. We have stayed in many Airbnb in this price category ($1,032 for 3 nights) and we have never found absolutely nothing there to make us feel welcome: a coffee maker and no coffee, a tea kettle and no tea, no paper towels, no rag to clean a table, no shampoo or sugar for your coffee or salt and pepper for eggs or any other welcoming touch such as bottled water or a note with local restaurants. Yet the rule to NOT turn the heat up because “heating bill is very expensive” and to turn down the heat when leaving for a few hours. This was not a comfortable stay. Oh and we ran out of toilet paper as well. We used napkins that were provided. There is a very charming garden that would be nice during warmer weather when it is cleaned up and useable. I sat outside with my coffee.
We will not be back.

I had a very nice stay at Siena's place. The location was safe and easily walkable to the Museum of Fine Arts, the Back Bay Fens, and the train.  Lots of neighborhood places to eat on Tremont St.  The photos are a bit deceiving. The room is actually nicer than it shows!  Larger with a nice workspace against the far wall. The beautiful garden and patio area shown, though, is out the front door and not accessible to guests who enter/exit through a kitchen door with steps. Aside from that, I was pleased with the stay.  Quiet and private, even with a shared bathroom. Siena and her husband were lovely!

Enormous apartment, exactly as pictured and had everything we needed. Of note, this unit is managed by a company, and they are accordingly less flexible on arrangements (length of stay, early check-in, etc.) than some hosts. On the other hand, this also means they're professional and prompt with all communication! Very easy check-in. Would stay again.
Stylish and clean space that can accommodate any larger than average group!
Safe and clean. Excellent place

Jonathan's place was well kept and in a charming location. It shows that Jonathan cares about his visitors.
Definitely would recommend to anyone!
Very clean appartement. We had a great stay. Parking was available right in front of the premices.
In the heart of Boston. Walking distance from Fenway to harbour front. Very quiet location for being in the heart of the city.
Great place for short stay in Boston. Quick Uber to airport. Tuan/Anh we’re quick/efficient communicators.
Great apartment in the heart of North End. Everything is in walking distance, which made the stay so much better!

Perfect host
Very helpful and friendly
Location is great
I will come back
Perfect location for exploring the city. Check in/check out were super easy and the hosts were incredibly responsive. Amazing stay, highly recommend

This place was very neat and extremely clean. The layout of the building was interesting but a very nice place to stay. Lots of amenities for us to use which was nice, speakers, ironing boards and much more. We’re very happy with our stay.

The best part about this place was its proximity to Fenway and Back Bay. The apartment was okay, but didn’t feel worth the price point. The couch had stains and hair on it when we arrived, as well as the dining room table. The shower turned off multiple times while we were showering, and the water would change from hot to cold without us making any adjustments to the knob. If we come back to Boston, will probably stay somewhere else.

Great things:
-AMAZING location. If you want to walk around and see the sights, this is a great place to be - central to everything and you never have to step foot on public transit if you don't want to. There's also a breakfast/lunch place just around the corner (Bean & Leaf) which is fantastic, and an incredibly cozy Irish pub about 2 minutes walk from the front door. There's also a little park just around the corner. Regarding location, we didn't find it exceedingly noisy, but we were visiting during a low season and were on the 7th floor, so that could contribute.
I cannot stress enough how perfect the location is. We took the train from DC and from South Station it was just a 10 minute walk, and a leisurely and safe walk at that. The furthest we had to walk was 20 minutes to a different train station to catch the train to Salem. Additionally, this felt like a very safe area to us. Whether you're coming home at 3am from the Irish pub next door, or leaving super early in the morning for a walking tour, you're safe. It was also a very clean area.
-The view from the apartment is great. The bedroom we had came with 6 windows (roughly) in a sort of half-circular room. You can open the window and get a great view from multiple angles.
-Communication: Basically anything you need at any time, these folks will help you with. We had an issue with our heating needing to be reset, and they were communicative even until past 11pm to help us solve the issue. They gave us some troubleshooting tips until they were able to get the repairs finished (which were the very next day by the time we got back), and communicated every step of the way.
-The entertainment on the TV was pretty good, it was nice to chill out there at the end of the day after walking around.
-The apartment is really spacious for two people, which is great if you have a lot of luggage or are going to be staying for a bit longer. Alongside the spaciousness, the kitchen is really nice to have. All the stuff you need to cook is there, including a microwave and a fridge (for you to store your Cannolis in).
-We didn't make use of the early check-in/late check-out, but we arrived late because our train was delayed and had no problems getting in with the instructions.
-The bed was quite comfortable and massive with two huge reading lights next to it, complete with nice soft sheets.
Could be better:
-The apartment felt a little bit ramshackle: some of the heating vent covers were on the floor, some of the drawers were missing, a door had come off the closet and was laying in the closet, some lightbulbs didn't work (incl. the fridge light), the bathtub squeaked and felt a little unstable, the shower had a very loud high-pitched whine when on, and the hot water didn't last long, and some of the blinds looked a little worse for wear.
-Our heating wasn't working for the first day or two, but this is where the A+ communication rating comes in. I was slow to let them know, as it wasn't super cold at first. When I did let them know, we were helped in the quickest and most professional way possible. Not only that, we were offered extra blankets for the night it was (obviously) too late for a repair person to come by, so that was very kind as well.
-We had a random extra microwave in our kitchen that didn't work, which isn't really a big deal, but of course I tried the one that didn't work first 🤦🏼‍♀️
Keep note of:
-The elevator is old school and tiny, so we only used it to bring our luggage up/down and every other time we came to the apartment, we walked the stairs (great for the glutes, we were on the 7th floor 💪🏻). I noticed some folks in their reviews said it wasn't working when they were there -- we didn't experience that, the elevator worked just fine for us, but I can definitely say that if the elevator isn't working, bringing your luggage up/down would be awful.
-This is probably on me, but I read the listing and thought there was a washer/dryer in the apartment, but there's not :) I didn't need it, so I never found out if there is one in the building, but just keep in mind there is not one in your room so it must be somewhere in the building and you'll have to ask where that is.
-We didn't experience any crazy noise, which could be due to low-season & being on the 7th floor, but this is definitely a busy area and your bedroom has windows all around it, so if you're a light sleeper do bring earplugs. In any case, no noise would shoo me away from this place -- I would just buy the earplugs because it's worth it for the other pros.
-Be mindful of the hot water -- it goes VERY quickly. If there are 2 of you, you'll probably be fine and get 25-35 minutes of hot water showering consecutively, but if there's more of you or if someone is a super long shower person, just know that you'll want to give it some time to heat up again.
Overall: We definitely recommend this place if you're in Boston to see the sights!

We did a two night stay visiting Boston for our Anniversary and decided to do something different by staying on a houseboat. It was so very cool! Yes, at first it was a little bit of an adjustment getting used to being on the water, but our legs got used to it quick enough. We got to the boat late afternoon Friday and by the next morning we didn't even notice that we were on a boat anymore. The boat was super clean and had everything anyone would need- from pots and pans, to a hair dryer to coffeemaker to even Dramamine in case of emergency!
We are a family of 3 and our two small pups and we had ample room. My daughter slept on the pullout bed and said it was very comfortable. My hubby and I were in the bedroom and I have to say- I've travelled much and stayed in hotels, Airbnb's, etc., and this was THE MOST COMFORTABLE bed I've slept on ever! (We were amused at how high it was but I mean it is a houseboat and you need to maximize storage so we completely understood why it was so high off the ground. But we were laughing trying to climb on LOL!)
If you bring your pup, there is a walking trail by the main gate that seems to be the happening place for pooches in the area. My two girls loved walking there and sniffing the local action LOL.
There are carts for you to bring your belongings to the boat and the boat is not far from the parking area. The general area of the marina is very safe, but the marina itself was super secure with needing a special key fob to get in and out. Everyone we encountered there was nice and it was interesting seeing all the different yachts and sailboats and how people decorated their "water homes". The views were AMAZING! Walking the different piers at night was nice. I love cityscapes and there was no shortage here!
The location was perfect. We never moved our car (even though there was ample parking). We walked everywhere! The Freedom Trail was close by, getting into main part of the city was close. Restaurants were close by too. (A side note, we had takeout from Pier 6 Restaurant but weren't impressed- maybe we caught them on a bad night. But we did enjoy sitting on the tables by the restaurant to have our meal outdoors.)
Deb was fantastic with communication and whenever she asked if I had any questions- I really had none because she covered all the bases.
Thank you Deb for sharing your houseboat with us and giving us these memories!

This location has everything you need if you are looking to visit Boston/Cambridge/Allston. A very welcoming and helping host along with a safe neighborhood, it is an affordable location that has everything you need. If you are worried about the shared space, no worries! You will still enjoy privacy  with your own space being very well maintained! Marlenes location was perfect for the weekend getaway, would highly recommend!

We stayed in September 2024 for eight nights. It was a leisurely trip to visit our children in Boston. Everything in the apartment was as described.
Jason had sent detailed instructions on check in, check out, how to do what, places nearby, Parking, etc. He was extremely swift in responding to any query. Helped us with early check out and check in. Very accommodating.
We would visit again.
Attention was great. Quick responses, we even had someone come in to help us out. The location is ideal and the unit was very clean.

Heather and Jack were wonderful hosts. Very responsive to questions. The house is beautiful and compfy.
A heads up if using Uber/Lyft and the "street" is narrow, some of the Driver's would not drive into the "alley".

If you are traveling to Boston and are looking for a truly lovely neighborhood to stay, look no further. Liesl is a super responsive and accommodating host. The 2 bedroom apartment was beautiful, super clean, had all the amenities and the beds were soooo comfortable. I have no clue why anyone would stay in a hotel when you can enjoy such a beautiful place and a safe neighborhood at a fraction of the cost of staying at hotel. Highly recommend!!

Elizabeth's place is amazing!!!! You won't find any 5 star hotel better than Maroccan Suite!

She is a wonderful host, and will give you all the information about the city, and places to go!

I strongly recommend and will be back for sure!

Room was not available at check-in, not just mine. Hotel building is not handicap accessible. Lobby was small & overwhelmed with 3 staff & 4 guests. It was rainy & lobby smelled of mildew. Elevator was tiny (3 person max nevermind luggage).
Hair on sink - the ultimate cliche.
Room was poorly laid out. Desk came out of someone's yard sale.
Staff entered my room with their key at around 9:30pm.
Manager promised investigation & follow-up but never heard from him again.
I booked through AirBnB, so the matter was properly handled with them.
Location was good.
Loved this cute studio for our Boston trip. Was in a great location & the place was cozy. Would definitely come back!

My stay truly exceeded expectations. The location was perfectly set in the heart of the south end bordering the Back Bay and within a 5 minute walk of two orange line stops. The space was stylish, very clean and had a great view of some of Boston’s most well known skyscrapers like the Prudential Center! I would go out of my way to stay here again anytime I’m looking to stay in the city and recommend to anyone looking for the Boston experience!
Our family of 4 had a great stay! Super close to everything, would stay again.
Great little place in a central location at a fantastic price. Hosts were very responsive with excellent communications.

My mom and I visited Boston for the weekend - it was rather rainy so we spent a lot of our time in the apartment. The pictures reflect accurately how the space looks. The bed was extremely comfortable. The apartment was tastefully decorated and very clean. Location is great for walking to the Boston Commons or walking along the harbor. Also central to a lot of restaurants. The only thing I can see being an issue is if you are hot natured and go during the summer - there is no central AC or window unit. We had one warm day and it did get pretty warm in the apartment even with the windows open. So just be mindful of that if you plan to visit during the summer season. Other than that - Drew was a great host. He responded to my messages within the hour and stayed on top of any issues or questions we had during our stay.

Place was clean and well stocked. Outdoor deck space was a nice place to sit. Check in staff was friendly and helpful. When I messaged the host with questions, the response was slow. Basically had to figure some things out on our own. Overall a nice unique experience

Siena es muy buena anfitriona. Se comunica claramente y rápido. Las instrucciones para llegar fueron precisas. Estuvo siempre pendiente de lo que se ofreciera. El lugar estaba muy limpio y agradable. La zona está muy bien, en particular si vas a visitar la zona de hospitales y las escuelas de medicina y de salud pública de Harvard. Es un lugar recomendable.

This apartment is a great place to stay in Boston! We were right in the downtown area with public transit being less than a 2 minute walk away. Also very close to the freedom trail, and plenty of good coffee shops and bars. Would recommend.
great place, close to the city!
Very nice place to stay. Clean, cozy, comfortable. Host left us some snacks and water which was very nice. Subway 9 min walking.

I enjoyed my visit in the Nantucket room. It was clean and spacious and in a desirable location. The bed was so comfy! Everything is within walking distance. Free parking was available which is great thing in Boston since parking comes at a premium in the city.

Peter un excelente anfitrión! te provee de alimentos y recomendaciones.
lugar agradable para alojarse.
la zona es hermosa y super tranquila, cerca de lugares de interés

This airbnb was clean, close to the airport, and the host was very responsive/ helpful with suggestions. I would recommend this airbnb. It does have on street parking which can be a bit challenging finding longer term parking. I would recommend using uber or a taxi to get to the location.
Good 3rd flood location. Somewhate close to public transportation

Great location!! Literally at the start of the Freedom Trail and tons of restaurants and shopping. The place is really cute, very open and plenty of room for couples traveling together. Beds were comfy and living room furniture was too. I would recommend staying here and would stay here again! A few things to mention: the insulation is very thin, so you can hear everything above you. We had some very noisy people above us and heard everything. Seems to be a few electrical issues. The outlet in the bathroom closest to the kitchen was not working, nor was the microwave due to a breaker box issue. I let the host know and they were willing to send someone out. There are no condiments whatsoever so come prepared if you plan to cook. It was easy to find free street parking at night beside Boston commons park. There was still construction on going, but we never heard any noise from it during our stay. The elevators were also working for us. One was a bit slow, but it did work. Thanks!!

The house is a great place to stay to see Boston.  The T line is just a couple of minutes walk away.  There is a Dunkin Donuts just down the block for morning coffee.  The place was spacious and the check-in process was a breeze. While the place was on a main street it seemed quiet and we didn't have any problems with noise. Overall, if you are planning a trip to see Boston, I would recommend staying here.
True to description with no elevator in the building. Would agree with other reviews that the bedding and apartment smells like cleaning chemicals at times.  Convenient location.

Host was super responsive, providing clear instructions. Great location if you are hoping to be outside city center, nearer to Boston Medical Center Brighton. Very walkable to public transportation. Felt very safe. Apartment made great use of space and was clean and modern.
Very clean! Cute neighborhood. We really enjoyed our stay. :)
Check-in was very easy with clear instructions. The building/room was very clean and accurately described.

Solid stay. Pictures as described. Plenty of space/ bedrooms and cozy linens. Definitely a noisy area. Noticeable smell when you first walk in and upstairs master bed had a cracked mirror that went unaddressed. Bathrooms could use updating and charges $50 every 30 minutes if you want an early check in. Fire alarms are sensitive. Felt safe in the area so overall solid price for the amount of space.

Everything was really clean and spacious. Neighbourhood was nice and convenient. Only issue is that on several occasions, there was no hot water in the shower which is an issue for me as it is very cold in winter. I had to take icy cold showers on two of the nights.

Our party of three stayed for three nights. A handwritten note and a small gift of Salt Water Taffy was waiting for us upon our arrival. The location could not be better. The space was comfortable and very quiet.
The smoke detector needs to be replaced.
Wonderful, responsive hosts. A well-appointed and comfortable space. Great location in Back Bay!
Great location and a comfortable space!
An incredibly clean and beautiful apartment! Quick, clear communication as he responded to all our questions incredibly promptly. Would definitely recommend. Thank you!
Comfy bed, clean room, great location!
Clean and as advertised! It's a great location to stay for attending anything at Northeastern. Communication was on time with clear instructions.

A great stay. Was exactly as described.
Great communication, clear check in instructions.
Would definitely recommend.
Thank You
I keep coming back because Ehab has got the right idea on how to treat guests.

We really enjoyed our stay here! The neighborhood is really lovely and you'll find anything you need (supermarket, etc.) in close proximity. If you want to get to the centre of Boston or the universities, the red line which takes you there is also only a few minutes away.
Robin is an amazing host! She showed us where to find everything we needed on a map and also made us instantly feel at home. Also she didn't hesitate to help us fix a little problem in the kitchen even if it was I bit late.
The house itself is beautiful and so is the garden!

Great location!  It’s very walkable to so many attractions.  A bit noisy due to the hospital across the street.  Communication was great!  The only note I would make is that there is no heat control in the apartment, it is controlled centrally for the whole building.  It was an unseasonably cold week and we were wishing the heat was more consistent, it was only on at night.
Marie Elena and Martine's little spot on JP was just the spot we needed —it has everything and is compact, private, and cosy. Can't wait to go back!

The app was super easy to use and provided me with all the necessary details. The beds were comfortable, lovely light filled space, cute clean kitchen with everything you need. It is a 4th floor walk up and the building is old so stairs are steep, but if that is ok with you, there's nothing like the fresh air, privacy and views that come with being on the top floor. The shower was having some issues with pressure/ temp when we were there, but when I emailed Lance about it, he responded right away and offered to have a plumber come right over. I declined because we were only staying for 2 days, but it was great they were so responsive and I'm sure they had the plumber come when we left. Overall, a great space and I would absolutely stay there again.

Nice and well-equipped apartment, not noisy. Also, good communication from the host side, easy to get in and out. However, the surroundings are not what I would love to have: no cafes, shops or anything similar to enjoy the place outside.

Very pretty house in a great area. Close to center Jamaica Plains. Very comfortable place to stay with a nice outdoor sitting area. We were able to prepare meals when we wanted to. We were between 4-6 people and were very comfortable in the space.
Carol was helpful with local tips about where to shop and get coffee.
Definitely recommend the house.
Exactly like the photos, place was clean and well equipped, only missed having more thank one hand towel and kitchen towel,  rest all was good. A very basic apartment, with basic amenities.

We had a three night layover in Boston and staying here was the perfect decision. The room and the apartment are spotless, it’s easy to check-in and out and Shelly made us feel like we’re at home from the second we got there. The beds are very comfy and the place is in walking distance to the airport. We’ll definitely return when we come back to Boston. Thank you!
Host was welcoming and accommodating for our large group. Checked up on us but did not disturb us.

Jonathan’s place was great!!! The check in process was really easy .
Jonathan was easy to get in touch with , the apartment was exactly as described,
nicely appointed and in a central location.
Easy and frequent communication as well as a super clean apartment.
We had a wonderful stay in Jonathan Apartment . It was comfortable and equipped with everything we needed. It’s on an adorable and quiet street with walk able access to anything you could possibly need. We would definitely stay here again.

We weren’t aware there was no common room/living room.  The set up in the bedrooms worked great! Just was surprised with the layout. Peaceful area and surprisingly quiet. Very close to Fenway and target for needed items. Would definitely stay again.
ボストンに泊まるならここって言うくらいのベストな立地。同じブロック内に素敵なアイリッシュパブもあっておススメです！

Lihua was very accommodating for luggage drop early in the morning as well as an early check in. Response times were very prompt. The location itself was quiet for it being on a campus. It’s a bit further away from shops and restaurants but the walk to and from were short and very beautiful along the way. It’s also close to public transit so getting anywhere in the city was a breeze. I will definitely consider staying again if I’m back in Boston!
We had a wonderful stay. The space was super clean and modern. The location could not have been better.
Very clear communication and clean space for a very fair price. Would stay here again!

We enjoyed our stay immensely! The room was cute, the hosts were great, and it was the perfect time of year to visit Boston! With a quick 5-10 min walk to the orange line, the location was perfect for exploring the city. In addition, the neighborhood had some lovely greenspace/community gardens that me and my partner enjoyed walking through.
非常干净整洁，舒适
Philip was very responsive and has a great home!! We loved visiting the city and the neighborhood was very quiet!

Very happy with our stay with Ehab! The place was exactly as described, easy to access and quiet. Ehab set out drinks, treats and snacks for us and was very kind when we briefly crossed paths.
We took the train into Boston and saw a show at Royale, and getting to / from each location and his place via Uber took 10-15 minutes and was very adorable ($12ish).
Highly recommend for a low key and very affordable bnb stay!
Great place
Owner is very attentive and great communication. We Uber’d to downtown and found it quick and easy. There was a market nearby, that had grocery delivery.
Great place and easy access to mass transit

Kristina was very kind, making arrangements and staying in touch to make sure I had access to the apartment when I arrived. She dropped by to say hi, which was nice. The apartment was clean, cute, well stocked with all supplies, and everything worked great. I was there for work, so it was nice to have a real kitchen where I could prep food so that I didn't have to eat out all week. The cable, internet, plumbing, a/c, and everything worked great! And, most important, the apartment was very clean and in a great location. I would stay again.

The room is sparse, perfect for a single traveler as it only has the essentials.  Bathroom was slightly messy when I went to use it, most likely in between cleanings by the cleaning crew.   Drain in the shower is stopped up.
A very comfortable and perfect stay for proximity to the airport and downtown Boston!
Maverick was a great stay. The room was extremely chic and clean. A perfect stay for visiting professional or a couple looking for a getaway in downtown Boston.
Great place to stay for the night! .2 miles from good bar- loco taquilleria.
We had a great stay!
Beautiful house, super clean! Great location
The place is very clean and very cozy.  Will stay there anytime I am in that area.  Charles is a very communicative and hospitable host.   Highly recommend this place.
I really enjoyed my stay. Great neighborhood and very dog friendly. Teresa was a sweetheart.

Great location and easy self check in. Small space but comfortable for an individual or a couple. The shower didn't drain well, taking about 5-10 minutes after it was turned off for the water to go down. When the host reached out for feedback during our stay, I mentioned this (noting it was not a major issue), but did not receive a response. There was a smell of cigarette smoke in the apartment that was likely coming from a neighbor, so not the host's fault, but definitely decreased the quality of our stay.

Logement parfait pour un couple, très bien situé, dans un quartier plein de charme, au calme, près de la ligne de métro orange. On est rapidement dans le centre ville de Boston. Très bon contact avec Maria Elena à notre arrivée.
Nous recommandons vivement le logement de Maria Elena.

Great house with cool vibes! The neighborhood was so alive & stunning to just look at. Found the location so central to restaurants,  cafes, bars, corner stores & the train. Very user friendly neighborhood.

This place is in a great location, convenient to the blue line and airport. We made several trips throughout parts of Boston and were able to easily get there via public transit.
The second bedroom is very small with very little space for luggage. You have to crawl into bed, so not good for those with mobility issues. There is also just a curtain closing off the bedrooms with very little privacy. Laundry is in the basement that is shared space. There are steep steps to get in the building, which could make it hard for some to enter.
Overall, a great place for Boston and the location!
Wonderful place and host! Clean and tidy. Location was good and place was roomy.
Maverick provided a wonderful apartment in an excellent location. Cannot recommend enough!

Hôte très réactif
Location correspondante aux photos et description
Nice

reviewer_name: Kim And Ben Homes With Hospitality
comments: Great stay! Clean, AC worked great, and comfy beds. Fabulous location, near Boston Commons, Chinatown, lots of best restaurants, etc. We will be back. Thanks for the stay!
A very comfortable and cozy place

Jonathan is an amazing host. This apartment offered all we needed - and more!
We came with kids aged 3,6,9 years. The three bedrooms were great, the bed sizes perfect (the 3 and 6 year olds shared a bed) and there was more than enough closet and cabinet space available.
The Marcella playground (with tot lot and splash pad) is perfect for play sessions, and is perfectly visible from the master bedroom bay window.
The apartment boasts a lifesaving washer and dryer , an ironing board and iron, hair dryer and straightener, a toaster oven, gas stove, sizeable fridge, three TV screens and a bathtub. Travelling with three kids meant copious use of pretty much everything except for the iron.
The Jackson Square orange line is just 3 shortcut-through-the-baseball-field minutes away. No car, so no idea what on-street parking is like.
The bed sheets and towels were impeccably clean. Toilet paper, hand soap, dish soap and laundry detergent were present and made arrival just that much easier :)
Our trip was amazing. The place is super cozy and loved the neighborhood and arboretum!

Thank you Bill and Maureen for the comfortable, clean and welcoming stay! What a warm space you have created for guests. The personal touches of freshly made pumpkin bread upon awakening, coffee ready to go and all the other thoughtful touches made our stay so wonderful. Thank you, we will be back!

Jacklyn’s house is so cozy and wonderful, location is fantastic, it should be in the center of Boston, so no matter where you go, it won’t take too long time. Supermarkets are surrounded Jacklyn’s house. Private Parking ,Great!  Everything great.
Great host, check in was very fast and don't seamlessly, check out as well. Also a very responsive host and usually responds to questions I've had in less than an hour.
A great place. I recomend it. I enjoyed my stay.

Very nice stay at J. Miller Flats. Old world building with new interiors that are clean and comfortable. The kitchen had some coffee and tea but there is a nice market close for essentials. The best part is the neighborhood. Walk out of the building onto the shops and stores of Charles St with close walks to Beacon Hill, the Commons, and the River. A great home base for touring downtown Boston.
The location of this Airbnb was amazing!! The area was so nice and the Airbnb was exactly as advertised. The host was so nice and responsive and we really enjoyed our stay!

This location worked out perfectly for us for our short stay before our early a.m. flight out of Boston airport. Has everything you need in a cute small space. Very walkable area, and also easy access to public transportation. We would recommend staying here.

Highly recommended! I had an absolutely wonderful stay! Lynne and Eric were incredibly welcoming and helpful hosts. They provided excellent communication and guidance. The property itself was stunning. It was clean, and the bed was really comfortable, ensuring a good night’s sleep. The location was perfect, with easy access to the lake and local transportation. There are lots of convenience stores, restaurants, and bars nearby. I would recommend Lynne’s place to anyone looking for a comfortable and memorable stay
Great choice. Look forward to the opportunity to visit again.
Paul was easy to coordinate with and a great communicator.  The apartment was perfect for my needs met all expectations as advertised.  Recommended.
Love Jen s apartment very much. New, cozy, clean and so spacious!
Everything was great! Would recommend

This property is in a perfect location if you are looking for something in a more residential neighborhood. It is down the street from Thomas Park which is great if you have a pet. It is also within walking distance from bars and restaurants and a 12 minute uber ride from the heart of Boston. The space is exactly as the pictures show and is very clean. Eliott is responsive within minutes of an email should you need anything. All of the essentials were included in the unit. Would definitely recommend.
Great, place, great location, great area. Would totally stay there again!
Thanks for staying at your place. Everything was fine, wonderful garden!
Really comfortable stay and walking distance to bus/ metro. Quick responses and friendly host. Highly recommended!
All as described

Though it’s not near to downtown, it is around 6-min walk from the subway station and I can go to touristic places easily. The neighborhood is quiet and safe.
Ehab is always responsive to my needs - he quickly adjusted the room heating as I requested, and provided clear guidance about check-in. The room is spacious and the apartment has everything I need for two nights.

Kristina gave us a warm welcome and lots of good local tips. She was extremely helpful sorting out our on line boarding cards. Although the studio was small it had everything we needed and was very clean. Jamaica plain is a quiet residential area but excellent links to Boston

Only one thing i did magenta the steps so high. And my mom over 80 years old.
No elevator.

All the comforts of home with a positive host.
The stay was great.  I found out that the maps that Jonathan provided me for recommendations on restaurants, and these things were awesome!

This was my first time to Boston and couldn't have stayed at a better place. Absolute ideal location. Bed was comfy, mattress was firm, AC worked great. Bv was really helpful and responsive. Will stay again...highly recommend!
thx,bit chilly in room 1st night.after that ok
A wonderful stay. So convenient and clean, great communication with hosts- we’ll be back!
Good place for a family of 4

Excellent place to stay close to Boston. Free off street parking was a huge draw and worked out great. There is no living room area, but the kitchen is comfortable for gathering with your housemates. Would stay here again

En general bastante bien para una estadía corta, el sistema de calefacción o enfriamiento estaba un poco loco. Hubieron 3 noches que desperté sudando por que era un calor excesivo y cuando me dormía había demasiado frío. La cama estaba bien y los baños en general estaban limpios la mayor parte del tiempo. Si quieres descansar bien talvez no sea el lugar ideal. Tiene una gran ventaja y es que está cerca de una estación de tren. Porfavor solo mejoren el sistema de calefacción y enfriamiento
Great host and place. Would stay again!
I highly recommend this place because it's 7min walk to a blue line station . The room was clean and the space is enough for 2per. Carolina replies fast if you need a help or have some issues.

We had a great stay at Griffin's place.  The location was perfect and the condo was very comfortable for our family of four.  It was clean and modern with all the amenities we could want.  Like a previous review mentioned, the heat in the back bedroom was very loud as it clicked on and off throughout the night.  Otherwise, it was a great vacation spot!
Fantastic host! Lovely place as well... quite and cozy. Perfect for family vacations

it was a nice place, and the host was communicative. the only thing preventing me from giving this a full 5 in every category was that when it started raining, a huge leak opened up in the living room ceiling, like as if a hose had been turned on. it was a mess and the host contacted me pretty quickly; overall it wasn't a huge deal but im dissapointed i wasn't even offered a discount or anything. I feel lik3 the morally sound thing here wouldve been at least for the host to offer to knock something off the cost for the inconvenience of having to deal with a waterfall from the ceiling. (which started right as I was leaving for the event that required me to travel and book the room.)
Small, stylish, perfectly located directly on Newbury Street. Compact new kitchen and bath. Perfect for a couple.
This apartment was the perfect place to stay after a day out in downtown Boston!

Nice apartment well located; close to lots of restaurants and shop. Apt was clean, well appointed. I didn't see the hidden info that the apartment was on the 3rd floor with no elevator. I had lots of heavy bags. They assisted me with my bags up the stairs when asked. Overall, highly recommend.
a historical place, hoster is nice
Endang was a very communicative and gracious host. If you're looking for a place to stay close to the airport, I  highly recommend staying with her.
好住不贵，你的宝贝。
Great location and room. Lots of thoughtful touches. Would highly recommend.
Wonderful !  Charming, rustic cottage with a pool, fishpond, and waterfall. Mark’s cottage has many thoughtful touches, making it a perfect place to stay!
Good

Absolutely would recommend 1000 times! We did not do dinner but I wouldn’t dare miss it if I were you. Incredible people and hands down the best company to have conversation with. Felt right at home. Thank you isn’t even enough for welcoming us. Caroline was amazing as well. When we come back to Boston definitely this will be our first pick! Thank you again! Breakfast was out of this world!

They were very congenial about us leaving luggage for early check in! The house was very nice and clean. The decor was elegant and comfortable. We enjoyed the SIRI for music. The kitchen was fully stocked with coffee and condiments. The backyard was really cute with seating and a grill. We were visiting Boston for the first time and it was great 👍 One issue was the stairs. Very steep and a little slanted going down. The couch bed was okay. All in all we were happy!
Will definitely be back! Such a great stay ♥️
Really enjoyed my stay. Quiet area with good transport to downtown. Ehab was a great host - very friendly and responsive. Would definitely recommend.
Nice aesthetic and easily accessible area.
Great place!
Very nice place to stay!
Great place. Ideal location. Clean and comfortable. Was initially thrown off by the $50 a day cost for parking, but we probably should have expected that.

Lori's house is extremely well kept, obviously windows, bathroom and general feeling are those to be expected from an historical house, but if that is what you're looking for, then acconidation is great.
Communication with Lori was very easy and so was checking in during her absence.

Andrea was friendly and flexible. We really enjoyed our stay at her place. Especially it was hard hard to find pet friendly accommodation in Boston. We appreciate Andrea provides this nice and cozy place.
The hosting team is very responsive! Absolutely loved the stay!
Best air bnb i have stayed at. It was very comfortable. The host was awesome very accomadting. He also responded quickly to any questions or problems
Nice place to stay and the hosts were great.
Elizabeth was an excellent host and we loved staying in the Moroccan suite!  It was so nice after a long day of walking around to have a "home" to go to.  MUCH better than any hotel and much cheaper!

Evon goes above and beyond… so many extras in her place.
Cleanest place EVER… AC and TV in each room. Super comfortable beds.
Definitely recommend!!!
Awesome place to stay host was exceptional

We loved staying at Koen and Ruta’s! It’s a treat.
Spacious, filled with fun and varied artwork, comfortable furniture, and nice set up for remote work.
The location is on beautiful Commonwealth Ave and right near all the shops and restaurants on Newbury St and Boylston. Can’t beat the location.
Koen and Ruta are very responsive hosts, with a good sense of humor. We’ll be back!
Beds were comfortable and room clean and tasteful.  Parking a little tight on streets as the only negative
Jay’s place was close to all that makes Boston’s North End such a great place to visit. Great value!
Jonathan's place is well appointed, clean, and a great value, and Jonathan was extremely communicative and intentional about creating a great guest experience.  I would happily stay there again.
matthew kept the place immaculate.  lots of interesting travel books.  very comfortable stay, would recommend it to anyone.
This was a great place to stay. Convenient to the public transportation. The beds were really comfortable.
Nice place, love the location, safe and clean.

Easy check-in, exactly as described. Room was simple, austere (a good thing IMO), and clean. Lovely hot shower in the morning, and I was on my way. Will book again if I’m working late in Boston and it’s available.

Amazing location!  I’ve always loved the look of Boston Brownstones, so it was fun to get to stay in one… it even had an original gas brass chandelier and claw foot tub with the old hefty brass faucet!  Lihua was so friendly and helpful and let me store my luggage so I could leave it after check out time.
Everything was great!
Got the job done. No major issues during stay.
Karim was very kind and accommodating with my change of plans to my travel schedule. It was very much appreciated!!
Good food nearby, an extra bonus!

El Desayuno fue muy desorganizado.
Coincidió con el evento de la Maratón y algunos días No tenían café disponible.
Tampoco respondieron una consulta que realice unos 15 días antes de mi llegada.
Nunca respondieron.
El resto Impecable.
We had a great stay at Barbara‘s house. Thank you!!!
Excelent. The place is great, modern, clean, full equiped. The location is amazing. Right in the seaport, near the convention center. Love it

This house is nice and had quite environment. Thinh was nice and responsive. I do recommend this place if you are looking for a place close to public transport which is just 5 mins walk from the house.

Bill and Maureen were perfect hosts, their airbnb was spotless and comfortable. Every evening we were left home baking and Easter Sunday a lovely Easter treat, very thoughtful.
We would highly recommend their accommodation
It sounded like whoever was in the unit above this one was constantly moving and shifting around furniture all night.
Todd's place is professionally managed, clean, comfortable, and simple to come and go from. It's a great place for both short and long stays. I'll be back soon!
Great stay

A nice , clean, small apartment, and Albert was quick and easy to communicate with!
The studio is right inside building entrance so coming and going was a breeze.
You will, however, find better value in the area if you do a little shopping.

Such an amazing place in a beautiful section of Boston.  Building is gorgeous and the place is spotless. From the amazing views from the rooftop to the coziness of the place itself, it was one of the nicest places I’ve stayed. Would definitely recommend and would without a doubt stay again.
Great house in a nice neighborhood.  Would definitely stay here again.

Catherine and Caroline were super welcoming and friendly. Even though my stay was short they made an effort to give me recommendations and made sure I was comfortable. Would definitely recommend if passing through Boston!
Room was clean and comfortable. Area is quite quiet and peaceful, and host is friendly. Great place overall, would recommend.
Andrea's place is exactly as described.  They were kind enough to allow us access to the entire driveway.  Andrea responded very quickly to questions.

We loved staying here! It is a clean and spacious apartment. Tim's instructions were detailed and clear. He was always responsive during the entirety of our stay. The area also has great restaurants and lots to do. It was peaceful and calm as well. We would definitely stay again!

My stay was great. Very responsive and pleasant host. Good location and comfortable, and peaceful place to stay. Also extremely walkable and easy to get around downtown Boston. I’d definitely stay here again.
Great location. Apartment is a little shabby, but overall my stay was good.

Roy is perhaps the most hospitable and gracious host I've had the pleasure of staying with. His warmth and generosity is unmatched, and the local insight he provided ensured a sense of confidence and certainty when exploring an all-new city. His home is a gem--the location is ideal, and the value factor is high. Can't wait to come back.
The location of the building is excellent, the room itself was perfect for my needs (solo traveller, on business). Lihua was a great host. When I am back I would be happy to stay here again.
Great place to stay at to experience Boston!
Loved the location and the spacious accommodations. Everything was as described.
verynice place!
Herminia è una persona accogliente stupenda e disponibile la sua casa è pulita grande e lei mette ha disposizione tutto ciò che ha in cucina. La colazione buona.

The place was okay overall. I stayed there for two nights. The location was decent, but my main issue was that the bathroom wasn’t stocked with basic essentials like body wash, soap, or shampoo. It would have been better if these were provided, as they’re generally expected.
The area was very convenient and easy to travel to/from other areas of Boston. The stay was wonderful, the home was clean and well-maintained!

This accommodation is great for a large group of people, we fit 8 comfortably.  The subway is very close and the airport is close as well.  We enjoyed the space and would reccomend it.  Elisangela is great host and promptly responds to messages and is helpful.

This place is in the perfect location if you’re up for walking. We were able to walk everywhere we wanted to visit within 15 minutes.  The apartment was spacious, bright, and located in a cute older building.  It was very clean and appeared just like the picture. We would definitely stay here again if we travel back to Boston!

Clean and comfortable with responsive hosts. Was sceptical about noise after reading some other reviews but had no disrupted sleep from noise of planes. Located walking distance from a train station which will take you direct to the city centre. Would definitely book again.
This is the kind of place that you don’t want to tell people about because it’s so good. We will be back!
Janice was a very responsive and accommodating host. Her Airbnb is very clean and well-kept. We were there for school purposes and it is very close to several universities.

Loved this place in the middle of it all that still allowed privacy after walking through the door.  Stylish little apartment with all the amenities. Will definitely be back to the Back Bay and Stone's place.

If you are looking for a genuine bed and breakfast experience, look no further. Aaron, Catherine and Caroline go above and beyond with their hospitality making you feel right at home in their beautiful house.
They are extremely friendly and had excellent recommendations of things to do in town. Breakfast is made by hand accompanied by excellent conversation with the hosts.
Would absolutely recommend this spot to anyone visiting town and looking for a genuine experience.

This apartment was everything we were looking for in a trip to Boston. This apartment is tucked away on a beautiful street near the south end. The hosts were very helpful in providing a pack and play for our daughter and for providing a parking spot. The apartment itself was very clean, had a great patio, very updated bathroom, and even had K Cups of coffee available for us. I would recommend this location to anyone that wants to be located in a central part of Boston with easy access to all of Bostons neighborhoods!
Our stay was wonderful! They were very responsive with any issues that arose and made sure everything was working. Beds were very comfy. Everything was super clean.
Beautiful place! The design of the boiler room is beautiful and it is immaculately clean. Best shower ever too! Would happily stay again!

I had a wonderful stay in Endang's place! The room is so cozy and Endang included every amenity you could think of. Everything was very clean and the surrounding area is walkable with nearby restaurants. I would recommend her airbnb and would stay again.

Had a great stay. The house was cozy and very well kept. Spacious and a great place for 5-6 people. The windows kept it super bright and light during the day which was awesome. There were chargers all over the house which helped a lot. We wanted for nothing. Excellent stay.
I'd recommend this place it's well located, clean and near the city centre
Great! Just as described; would recommend and will stay again.
Great price and location

Great location. Overall pleased with the accomodations. Listing states 3 bedroom with 3 queen beds. One of the bedrooms is a double bed, not queen. Created a briefly awkward situation for our 3 couples to decide who got the smaller bed. Not a big deal but worth mentioning. I would recommend this place as long as future guests are aware of this.

The space and area are very nice. The problems were manifold. We had a toddler with us, and I would not have booked a place that had no baby bed. The listing said there were two. None were there, and the host had to talk us through finding a key to another unit, with awkward key, and finding it, after a long day travelling. Then, on Sunday morning at 8:30, a man appeared in the apartment, through a door we had been told not to open. Finally, the night before checkout, the door to the room I had been sleeping in locked from the inside, with me on the other side of it, and all my tickets, passports, credit cards, etc inside. My son-in-law had to scale a high window from outside and, essentially, break in.
I have we to say that Margaret answered her phone right away during each of these crises, but needless to say this was not ideal. In fact it was increasingly hair-raising. To be fair, Margaret gave us a 50% refund.
This apartment is a great base for exploring Boston. It's in the middle of everything but quiet and private.   I would stay here again.
Lori is very nice and helpful. Highly recommend!

Highlights: Location, location, location! Quiet. Easy access. Fantastic shower. Dishwasher. Place to stop outside for loading and unloading.
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay! Gina was extremely responsive and welcoming. The wine hit the spot after a long day of walking. The spiral staircase added excitement and drama! The beds were comfortable and we slept well. We look forward to staying again!

This “quirky“ place lived up to its name! It is quiet, peaceful, and well worth the price. If you are visiting Jamaica Plain or Boston, consider staying here.
Susie is a great host, responsive, and friendly. I will stay there again.
R House was exactly what we needed for a weekend in Boston. Close to our venue, great views, clean.
Selina home was more than I expected. At a great price I was given a warm welcome, even though I had changed what time I would arrive more than once. The home is lovely and very clean!
Loved it, very safe, quaint area
Good location that is easy to find. The check in process is simple and stress-free. The room was clean and the bed was very comfortable. I have no complaints at all.
Perfect little place for our stay in Boston

We did not have a chance to meet Glenn, but we net Oliver. He was very nice, friedly and funny. He have us everything we needed. Also the booking process was smooth, guidance great. The aparment veru nice. We also had great joghurt in the fridge, fruits on the table and fresh water every day. The apartment už close to subway. just 2-3 mins walk. Hosts were also so mind to let our daughter to overnight one night per lady minute request. We fully recommend.

We spent a wonderful long weekend in Boston in the North End. It’s all about location and the apartment was in the heart of the Italian section of the city with wonderful cafes, restaurants, and bakeries. Boston is a walkable city and we had access to everything. We felt at home in Jodie’s place with comfortable beds and simple conveniences. She was responsive and helped us to navigate our stay. The extra beds made it easy to expand the space for family in town for graduation.

The location of this apartment is fantastic -- an easy walk to local shops and restaurants and just a short ride on the T to downtown Boston. We found the apartment to be spacious, clean and well stocked with everything we needed to feel very much at home. Jacklyn was a thoughtful, communicative and welcoming host. We would highly recommend this apartment to anyone looking for a larger space in the Boston area.
easy to access. spacious, simple and clean space. recommend!

Our stay at Chandra’s place was everything we wanted and more. We really enjoyed ourselves. The local recommendations were wonderful and very helpful. Checking in and out was easy and communication with Chandra was very convenient. The rooftop is AMAZING! We also enjoyed play Sequence. We would definitely stay here again.
The apartment was very clean, it smelled so good when we walked in! The location was great. We walked to restaurants, bars, the park, shopping….. it was great!

Overall our stay was pretty decent! Entry into the building and room was super easy and the bed was very comfortable. The downside was that we didn’t realize how shared the bathroom was and that the space couldve been more throroughly cleaned. Great location for sure! Everywhere we went was no more than a 15minute walk and there was SO much around.
Great apartment, great location, great value! If you’re a light sleeper, bring ear plugs (street noise) and eye mask (sky light). We really enjoyed our stay and would highly recommend this place!

We’ve stayed here before and it was all five stars. It seems to be under different management or some
Newer employees that do not have as much pride in their work. The rooms are fantastic, the location is great. The breakfast had a lot to be desired, High traffic of guests with an employee that was not present either time we ate and not keeping up with the demand. Only option is to valet your car. Half of the staff were great a couple weren’t very attentive. Would stay here again, just have to write a letter to management.
Nice easy stay

This home is very conveniently located to the Airport T station as well as groceries, coffee, and restaurants. The neighborhood is older but we felt perfectly safe. Elisangela was quick to answer all my questions.
The space itself has been “updated” but is still an old house with all the issues that involves. I failed to realize it was such a climb (with heavy suitcases), and the stairs are extremely squeaky. I didn’t think the master bed was very comfortable, but there were plenty of beds for our large family.
We had a medical emergency during our stay, and the EMS was very quick to respond. Well done!
Althea was fantastic,the place was everything I wanted clean quiet.there is some sweet little cafes a 5 minute walk away.

Eileen was a fantastic host. The location and the host far exceeded our expectations. Eileen was so helpful in answering any questions I had and was helpful in getting a sitter so my husband and I could attend a concert while in Boston. The location was prime for my family and close to public transportation. The shops and restaurants in JP were really fun and we really enjoyed the location. Eileen was such a wonderful host and had so many great tips for us. We cannot wait until we come back to Boston!
Tom and Wonder were great hosts! Very kind, courteous and extremely accommodating! Would highly recommend staying here!
