Great location and great place to stay! Shelby is great at communicating if you have any questions before, or have any thing come up during your stay. Highly recommend if you are looking for a place to stay
Such a clean, comfortable apartment.  Was perfect for a quick stay.  If back in Boston would definitely stay here again.
Really enjoyed staying here! Great location near post office square, close to downtown crossing. Easy, contactless check in. Had a very pleasant stay!

As city dwellers, we really appreciated the peaceful balcony view overlooking green hills and sunsets, it was a calming escape. However, a few things affected the overall comfort of our stay. The mattress and pillows weren’t very comfortable, making restful sleep a challenge. The bedroom also stayed quite warm, even with the A/C on, while the living area felt noticeably cooler. The shower had low water pressure, and the shower head didn’t distribute water evenly. The couch in the living space was small, not very comfortable, and tended to come apart when sitting on it. Lastly, the check-in and check-out process involved multiple stops to pick up and return both the key and the parking pass, which made the experience more complicated than it needed to be. With a few updates, this could be a much more comfortable stay.
The room was quiet and comfortable and perfect for my visit.
Apartment was clean, it felt like home!    Great location, close to everything.    10 minutes walking distances to convention center.   Would definitely stay here again!

This place was awesome!! I come back and forth to Boston pretty regularly to take care of my sister and bring her to her doctors there. Coming from Maine it's hard to make that trip all in one day. This is the 3rd time my sister and I have booked. we've seen 3 different apartments, all of them are so great

Definitely this place is a gem within the Boston area. Location is perfectly close to Boston Common, Esplanade, Charles St and MGH. Stayed here for 6 weeks and enjoyed every moment. Kaitlyn has gone above and beyond with the amenities, decor and making sure you are comfortable within the unit. Would definitely stay again.
Todo genial, siempre muy atento

Got very lucky with the Airbnb pricing for this hotel - ideal location and lovely view from the room. Only stayed for one night but bed was very comfortable and the room was nice and clean, no noise from neighbours etc. Great find!

Super convenient location with lots of great restaurants nearby. Not far from a few different stations if you’re riding the T. Host was super quick to respond and very helpful. The place was beautiful and very clean.

Kayleigh and her husband were exceptional. Both super friendly. They responded within minutes to any question or concern I had. The apartment is fully equipped, clean and quiet at night. The entire stay was a very pleasant experience.  I highly recommend renting their apartment.

My stay at Matt’s place was quite smooth and easy. The room was as accurate as shown in the listing. Private bathroom made it the best. The kitchen had all the necessary equipments.
15 minutes walk to the T station and bus connections. Quiet and peaceful neighborhood made it the best place. Will definitely book this place in future.
great place!

This place is a Massachusetts gem. So accommodating and responsive. He even got me a brand new iron when I told him I needed use for one. He works with your schedule and the house is spotless and well kept. He truly exemplifies great hospitality. I enjoy that the house is quiet, sweet table of candies to pick up anytime of the day, and you feel safe. Gas stations and food eateries are walking distance. CVS is a 20 minute walk and you can really tell this is a family safe neighborhood and no one is afraid to walk around - day or night! 5 stars!

Jonathan was friendly and communicative. We appreciated the easy check-in and the fact that there was a market right across the street to buy any minor necessities. The place was largely described as is but we had a few hiccups. Unfortunately, many of the cups in the kitchen were dirty and couldn't be used. It was a decent stay for the value, but still has some areas to improve on.
Nice place and location but fairly expensive but hey I guess that’s Boston for you

Overall, we enjoyed our stay, but there were a few disappointments along the way.
Steven was very responsive and even helped us find a place where we could leave our bags while we explored before check-in. It's located in a nice, quiet area of town and a short walk to cool areas like the North End. The apartment looks as described but many things are rickety or falling apart. Nothing that totally impedes your stay but just an overall sense of things needing an upgrade. For instance, to get the door to lock you have to use your body weight to pull the door closed so that the deadbolt lines up.
Another thing to note is that the building is very old, which is charming, but also means that the elevator is very old as well. It is really small and moves slowly. I say that because the apartment is on the top floor so taking the elevator is a must. If you are claustrophobic or generally have a fear of elevators, you'd need to depend on eight flights of stairs or look elsewhere.
Finally, at the top of the stairs just outside the apartment, there was a leak that slowly grew to a massive area of sopping wet carpet that you had to cross over to get to the elevator. Again, not the kind of thing that ruins the experience but it's not enjoyable either. It had started on day one, we alerted Steven, but saw no one come to address It over the 3 nights we were there. Neighbors even put a bowl out to try to help the situation.
Again, overall the experience was good, just not great. We enjoyed our stay despite the issues but I don't think we'd stay there again.
Fine space. Sizable and secure. Fair for what you pay.
Perfect location for spending some time in Boston. Everything was as described. Easy to find, easy to handle. Couple of very good breakfast places in the neighborhood.

ken and Jim were a delight! They were incredibly hospitable, making us feel at right at home and clearly desirous of  of us having an enjoyable experience. They were very helpful in answering questions we had about exploring the area and how to get around. Their home is lovely, colorful, very comfortable and we would absolutely return for another stay when in the area.

Beautiful building exactly where we wanted to be. Staff was mostly friendly, except for the morning gentleman ego went above and beyond to find my son’s favorite pillow. He was excellent.
We did have a few issues left unresolved. There was only very lukewarm water in the shower, the flattest pillows of all, and the office didn’t work. I had to call the front desk from my cell for several items. When I let the front desk know, the evening gentleman and morning woman both replied with “Hm.” Slightly annoying but would absolutely return. The balcony room was stunning.

We recently stayed in both units and had an amazing time! It was perfect having the two units basically on top of each other, yet separate and connected by a staircase, for our large family gathering. The apartments are gorgeous, the roof deck in the penthouse is incredible and the location is walkable to almost anywhere in the city. Also next to the T and coffee shops and great restaurants just a block away. Sue was so friendly and responsive leading up to and during our stay. We didn't have a single issue while there. Highly recommend one or both units to rent when you're in Boston!

Great location !  The home was lovely and extremely well kept.  Located in a quaint neighborhood with easy access to subway and a quick Uber ride from airport.  Rob is  very quick to respond  with any questions we had.  Highly recommend!!!!
Confortable and clean place

Nice quiet studio space with plenty of free street parking. Hosts were very responsive & accommodating. This is a family home with children so there was some upstairs noise, but it was not bothersome & hosts were sure to check in to make sure it was not an issue. Work station & Wi-Fi were great for working remotely, having a washer & dryer in unit was quite useful. Convenient & quiet location less than a 10 minute walk from multiple bus stops & the B line. Hosts & family were kind & respectful, an overall excellent stay/value!
My friend and I stayed here for our weekend and Boston and It couldn’t have been a better fit for us.  This place is smack dab in the middle of anywhere you could want to go for a weekend trip!
Great place loved the stay
Great location. Everything we wanted to do was within walking distance or a short subway ride away. Would stay again!

My boyfriend & I enjoyed our stay at Hermina's beautiful home. Thank you very much. Donna was very helpful, and was very quick to respond to any questions or concerns. We stayed in room D and it was was nice roomy and clean.
It is very close to the train station.
If you need a place to stay in BOSTON stay here. You will love it.

I stayed for 3 days and this was an amazing place to stay. Everything was clean, it was a quiet place, easy to find and easy instructions. Definitely going to be booking anytime I go to Boston!  My girlfriend and I chose the smallest studio but we didn’t look at all the other rooms they had available so before you book make sure you look at all of the options available!
가격대비 매우 좋습니다
Lindsay was a wonderful hostess with great communication skills and a peaceful atmosphere. Would recommend this stay to friends and family.
Incredibly nice place in a great Boston neighborhood! Very well appointed, clean, and modern. Standing adjustable workstation!!
Very attentive and a great location. There is a futon that can be used as a bed and a few blow up beds already there. Wonderful space!
The place provides a secured and clean place for a good deal. And the deal gets even better if you share the airbnb with others. It being close to Harvard was a plus for me definitely.

Jenny's apartment was perfect and just as described! Phenomenal location, easygoing and communicative host, impeccably decorated apartment, and plenty of sleeping space.

Myself and five friends (six of us total) stayed in the apartment for three nights and it was the perfect place for us! Best of all, the place is so centrally located (and in a great area) -- we were able to walk all over the city from there. All six of us slept comfortably and Jenny was kind enough to have a large and comfortable air bed setup in the nursery for us upon our arrival. The outdoor patio was also a nice feature. We were lucky enough to snag visitor parking spots right outside the apartment (and therefore not pay for parking over the weekend), but even if we had not been able to do so there is relatively cheap parking right across the street.

Jenny prepared a very helpful document detailing locations of key items/how to work appliances/etc. and was available by cell if we had any questions. She was also very thoughtful in providing some essentials, leaving us coffee, having towels out for us on each bed, etc.

I would definitely stay at Jenny's apartment again! Overall it was a great experience.
Awesome airbnb and location! Would definitely stay here again

La stanza era accogliente e pulita, la casa dotata di tutti il confort e il necessario. Il check in e le indicazioni estremamente semplici e dettagliate, i proprietari gentili e disponibili, veloci nelle risposte anche non avendoci incontrati. Bel soggiorno, Molto soddisfatti!

If you’re looking for a place to stay in the Boston area, look no further. We had two couples staying in this cosy space. We both had enough privacy, but were able to enjoy the common areas together. It is clean, luxurious, and private!  I can’t say enough on how enjoyable our stay was.
Andrea’s place is perfect! It is clean, homey, and in a great location! Andrea was extremely helpful and available. This is our second time staying here and we hope to be back again!
You’ll feel apart of Boston. It’ll feel like less of a place your just visiting and more of a place you can home.

The room was so comfortable and the refrigerator worked very well. The site of the house was good to go sightseeing downtown. In the room, there were some maps and information about Boston and it was really helpful for me.
Lori is very thoughtful and clean! Very close to the T ++

This place is in a great location, offered plenty of room for our needs, and was very close to the train station, Boston common, and many restaurants. The main drawbacks that we identified were:
1. The lack of control to the AC. We would set it through the day, but the set temperature would automatically increase during the nighttime, leaving us all sweating by the time we woke up.
2. When the apartment did get warm, there was a noticeable pet urine smell in the smallest bedroom. Most of the time it was unnoticeable, but it really stood out as the days got warmer.
With that being said, we were very happy with our stay. They offered an early check-in for a small fee and were very communicative with instructions, making getting in and out very easy.
Great Place, Great location, responsive hosts

We enjoyed staying in Jovan's place. They have everything you need including toys, movies. The only thing is the noise from the basement. It may be because they were holding a party to celebrate the new year.
Nice, clean place near the Boston Commons and T line. Host was responsive and instructions were detailed & accurately described.

We had a quick stay at Boris and Susan's place in East Boston. Great location for an early flight! Super easy to check in and the space was perfect. It's very organized and there are snacks/drinks available too! Boris and Susan have a great story, so loved staying here and getting to know about their history with AirBnB!

Richard was a great host- the place was in a great spot, he offered helpful suggestions, and was very responsive. We didn't spend much time in the apt, because we were out and about, but the apt was perfect for visiting in the city and having a clean and well appointed place to stay. Would recommend!

Kathy's place is a top-notch spot for travelers going to Boston on business or for fun. A three minute walk to the Prudential Center and quick walk to plenty of bars and restaurants in the area. Having a lock box was ideal for multiple people on different schedules such that we didn't have to coordinate keys. The location was tucked away from busy roads, so evenings were very quiet. Amenities were great -- the snack basket was especially convenient when I needed an afternoon pick-me-up. Would highly recommend! Thanks again for everything.
Nice stay, as expected!

Johnathan keeps his house neat and inviting. The room looks exactly the same, if not bigger, than what it looks like on his profile. He provided me with multiple home made maps featuring cultural significants, food options and shops in the neighborhood. He even welcomed me with the info of a jazz event happening on that weekend. We had time for a pleasant conversation and I am very glad I chose his place to stay.
This place was perfect for our large group. I would highly recommend!
Good location, easy to check in and easy check out.  Neighborhood a little scary, but nice.

Lisa was a great host and was very responsive. This house has good proximity to the city and was a quick drive. Street parking was not a problem even with our larger vehicle. Overall a great spacious home with easy access to the city!

Good location although very loud at night due to noise coming from the busy road outside and tenants above. There was a white noise machine which helped. Bed was not comfortable. Other than that no issues.
Denise’s place was the perfect place to stay on my trip to Boston. It’s on a quiet street that’s in the heart of the South End. Denise was also a great host. I hope to stay here again!

Our hosts were there in person to meet us and welcome us to the home. They were very accommodating about our arrival and departure times and Susan communicated with us at our every request. The place is beautiful (exactly as advertised), and the view from the roof deck is spectacular. All linens, cookware and decor were new and perfect. The location is superb, we walked to most of the places we wanted to go, and there is a "T-station" right next door to go downtown or waterfront. Never needed a car throughout our entire visit.

The room was exactly as shown in the picture. It is well decorated with clean sheets and towels for me to use. All the furniture are wiped by the cleaning staff prior to my checkin time. Jonathan was easy to reach for any questions and concerns that I had. Overall, I enjoyed my stay and would recommend his house to anyone who is looking for a place to stay in Boston.

Great place! I can see why it’s usually booked. Super clean, close to public trans, safe and cozy. Had everything you would need. Plenty of linens, towels, etc. Super easy check-in (code) and very responsive host. Would def stay again.

This is a really good place. Especially if you wants to cook or spend time in the apartment. It’s clean and comfy. Sandro even provides all kinds of seasoning. The shower is really good too, the water is strong enough and hot. And I really love the bathroom dryer will automatically dry the bathroom.
This apartments is so comfortable. Thank you so much!

Foi uma excelente estadia, a localização é excelente, bem próxima ao Hynes Convention Center e Prudential. O apartamento estava limpo, tudo funcionando corretamente. A cama era bem pequena para nós (somos altos e estamos acostumados com espaços maiores). Mas está dentro do que foi descrito, nada que comprometa a estadia.
It was a lovely place in a great location. It was within walking distance of most of the places we wanted to see. It was in a nice neighborhood. Quiet neighbors. Made our stay very pleasant.

First, we want to thank Heather and Brian and their team for being SO helpful to us. They are amazing hosts and very responsive. We had our original Airbnb cancelled on us just days before we were due to fly into Boston. I saw their listing and reached out to them in a panic. Although they didn’t have all four nights I needed available, they worked with me to find a place for the one night they didn’t have available. They went above and beyond. Their apartment is great! The location can’t be beat… right across from Boston Common, the Boston visitor center and multiple restaurants and historic sites. You can walk all around the city from here. We also felt safe staying in this area. The apartment was clean, quiet and the beds were comfy!  We had everything we needed here and had a great stay. A++
Perfect
Had a great mini-stay here while attending a conference at the Hynes. Fantastic location right in the heart of everything. Easy to get into the building, very clean building and unit.

The first thing I want to mention is, they are super responsive .they will fix the problem immediately .I especially wants to Thank Eddie , he is very professional and the best human being . initially we have some issues in the apartment but he has provided a bigger apartment for the same cost. I would definitely recommend The apartment and will come back in future

We really enjoyed our stay. Everything was as described. We would come again!
Thank you for having us at your place.

Excellent clean 2 bedroom apt, close access to Huntington Ave Boston for Back Bay, South End, Copley attractions, shopping, and schools. Very close access to 128/95/90 for visiting historical locations and beaches north, south, and west.  Close access to Boston area hospitals, Longwood Medical Area, walking and nature parks like Arnold Arboretum. Immediate location is quiet with shopping, eating, within walking or 1 mile of apartment, quiet neighborhood of West Roxbury, charm walking, running the sidewalks. Easy on street free parking. Excellent bakery, Restaurants: Sugar, Rox Diner, West on Centre, Maria's to mention a few. Renovations, appliances, water pressure excellent. New and lovely eating areas should you wish to cook a meal. Excellent washer dryer should need to clean arise. Great hosts and communication.  Excellent stay location for us as we were moving our daughter in and out of her Boston dorm, as well as visiting family and friends in metro west as well as Gloucester, Maine, and NH.  West on Centre has GF and V options. And if you are looking for VGFDF ice cream, look no further than JP Licks located in Boston on Newbury, Newton on Center St., or Legacy Place Mall in Dedham...other locations across Massachusetts.  Have fun and enjoy your stay at this wonderfully central great place!
Great area!
Everything easy, clean lovely place and neighborhood.
Great place to stay, very close to BU

Loved this little casita! Good location to the orange and green line, great historic landmarks close by, and good restaurants too. The breakfast place you get a voucher to is close by and yummy! We really enjoyed our stay here and Melissa was a great host! We stayed here for one night and then moved to her Blue Waters boat in the same marina, and they were kind enough to move our bags over for us while we had things planned that day. I would definitely stay at either place again!

Perfect spot for a couple trying to enjoy some time in Boston! Price and location were amazing - we were able to quickly access the T to travel all over the city. Safe and beautiful neighborhood/street. It's very small, but if you are really just planning to sleep there and spend your time exploring then it's perfect!!

Excellent stay! Robin is a perfect host—always answered all my questions and was very polite.
The room is very spacious, with a private bathroom. Everything was spotless and just like the photos.
The neighborhood is very peaceful, with great restaurant options nearby.
You can get to downtown in just a few minutes.
Lori is a terrific host.  Her home is welcoming, warm and inviting.  Lori is committed in making her home a pleasant experience to her guests.  I hope to stay with her again.
A wonderful space managed by wonderful people! 10/10

Lihua was a fabulous host. She texted me the day before to see what time I would be arriving so she could make sure she was there to greet us. Our room was large and very clean with beautiful furnishings. It was also fun meeting and chatting with the other guests and Lihua at breakfast. We will definitely stay here again when we are in Boston.

We had another great stay at Richard and Vicki's. It's a great apartment for a visit to Boston. The apartment is very welcoming and comfortable, and it is easy to feel right at home. We look forward to returning again soon.
Cute little apartment in a great location! Comfortably slept 3 people and could have easily fit a 4th!
Great place!

Clean and comfortable place easy access instructions very clear just keep in mind that if you’re coming from the airport at a late hour some parts of the park noted in the instructions to get to the place  are locked not sure if it was a one time thing but I had to go around the area couple of times and took the longer way to it but nothing to do with the place.
Nice clean place. Accurate to photos and description. Good location, walkable, restaurants and services nearby.
Great host and place.
Great location. Very easy to navigate the city from the AirBnB, which is centrally located. The check-in process was also very smooth and easy.

Honestly, this room exceeded my expectations. It looked exactly like the image and is better than how they describe it. There's a mini kitchen and large TV with premium subscriptions. The location was perfectly situated adjacent to major inter-city rail lines and the T. The finishes and style are modern, clean and chic.
After a long day, it was nice to come home to this nest. I have noticed that people are commenting on the noise--if you're not from a city you should understand that there will be city sounds and not have unrealistic expectations. This room also provided earplugs and a mask just in case. Will be returning.
Super friendly staff. Great location to walk to dinner. Would stay there again for sure.
Nice and Clean area!
Wonderful stay. Peter is a very accommodating and kind host and the place is just a ten. The best Airbnb we have been in and one of the best hosts for sure.  💯 per cent recommended

Great loft for a 2 day trip to Boston. All the furnitures and interior design are antique and artistic. The view is also amazing, and you could never find such quiet and beautiful place near city center.
Great location!

We enjoyed a great stay in the appartment of Jovan and Sena.
Very complete appartment, much space, many nice details. Good beds. Quiet neighbourhood, enough parking place. Not many restaurants or shops around, but the appartment itself is superb.
Solid choice for exploring Boston! Beautiful home with a good amount of space.

Aaron, Catherine and Caroline's place had so much character and was very clean. They were also very kind and welcoming. Caroline was very nice about opening the door despite our late night arrivals home.
only wishes were for curtains that blocked out more sunlight (light woke me up at 7:30/8am daily) and better towels (they were a bit thin and small).
Note: if you rely on public transportation, I suggest staying in walking distance to the subway. the bus we waited for did not come for 1 hour and this happens frequently according to locals. not related to this beautiful house though!
thank you very much for having us!

The locations is why you book this spot. I was able to actually walk to the Airport which was amazing. There are many restaurants in the area and all of them are walkable.
However, I'm a light sleeper and heard my nextdoor neighbor come home and then proceed to do a bunch of stuff.
The window in room A is broken and needs to be fixed. The water pressure for the bathroom sink on the first floor is bad. I checked the kitchen sink and that's fine. The bed in room A squeeks quite a bit which was pretty annoying.
Since the window is broken in room A, I got to hear everyone participate in garbage night, cars coming and going and too much more. If you're not a light sleeper, this place is more than likely worth it. I don't know what's up with the sink water pressure though.
Nice place! Comfortable and clean. Would stay here again.
The AirBnB is perfectly placed near a ton of shops restaurants and is conveniently located near major transit stations. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay- the laundry was a plus too!
great stay was close to everythinghost was very responsive and got back right away. place was clean and looked like the pictures!!! will stay again!

It was great staying at Alex's apartment. He was very prompt in answering questions before and during our stay. He messaged us a couple times to ask if we needed anything. He was very available.
The apartment is in a very nice red brick building (just like I think of when I think of Boston) on the second floor. I would not recommend it if you have mobility issues, it is not accessible but it was good for us.
It looked just like the photos. Spotless, very nice high ceilings and architectural details. I said a couple times when I was there that I could live there. We didn't use the kitchen much but there were all the basic cooking things you would need including coffee! That was a nice touch.
We went looking or a grocery store one night and found there was only one mini mart nearby. It was super expensive! I would recommend bringing food from home or stopping at a different store while you have a car if you intend to park your car while you are there like we did.
The T was super close and was the orange line which the line for downtown. Very convenient.
Parking was very easy. It was one block away. If you don't like turning on narrow roads on hill, you could probably unload on the main road or if you don't have a lot of luggage, just carry from the car.
This was our first time using AirBNB but not the last!

This is a great spot if you want to visit Boston but also don't want to live in the hustle and bustle of the big city. 20 mins walk to the commuter train, and the area has a lot of cute shops. The space itself was very nice, spacious closet, desk, TV, and good sized bed.
This is very convenient for the T and local restaurants.  We were well looked after and our hosts were always available if we needed them.
Very excellent place nearby MGH
Was a very pleasant stay, very clean, well set up and plenty of help from hosts if needed.

Great place. Very clean. Loved the heated bathroom floor!! Close to public transportation.  Our flight into Boston was earlier that the normal check in and we were able to drop off our luggage.  Jon was very responsive to all questions. A wonderful host!!

Travelled to Boston for work and found this appt right around the corner. It’s a nice place with everything I needed for my stay. Restaurants all around (and all kinds of cuisines) make it easy to grab a bite after work. Will definitely try to stay here again.
Looks exactly like the pictures! I booked a stay at Newbury Street in Boston for a much better price than any hotel in the area. I put my faith in Maverick Suites and they did not disappoint!

The house is very nice, the room is very large and the bed comfortable. Yvonne and her husband Bob were very nice. Bob offered me the breakfast the first day. I also arrived later than expected the first evening (after 10 pm) and it was not a problem. The location is quite good. It is possible to be in downtown within 30 minutes by walking until Saving Hill (15') and taking the red line.

10/10!! I would absolutely stay here again. I stayed at this location while on a business trip. My office is on the green line so it was a very easy commute. The space is very clean and in a quiet neighborhood and the hosts are extremely responsive. I would absolutely stay here again.

This place is great! Very secure and clean. Has everything you need for a comfy stay, Roku TV was quite nice. Has a nice big fridge for food and snacks, Not very far from a wholefoods and very close to some pretty great night life. I also like the street seems and building is a bit hidden because of the buses but not sure if they are there often.. It was perfect for what we were doing photograph at a newby club. I would definitely but anytime i needa stay here for anything~

This home was exactly what we needed. The hosts description of the home was definitely spot on. It was relaxing, welcoming and comfortable. They left little personal touches around the home that made you feel like a respected guest from the first moment you stepped into the house. I will admit that parking and maneuvering your vehicle on the street was difficult, but once we were settled, public transit was only a few blocks away. If you are looking to get away to Boston, explore the sites then retreat to a nice, relaxing home… this house is a great find.

Our travel plan and itinerary was very much impacted by recent Boston area closures and restrictions. Susie was both gracious with her time and extremely helpful in finding alternative options and activities. She single-handedly helped to salvage our trip and enabled us to  truly discover and enjoy the rich history and local flavor of Jamaica Plains! Susie is a super host!

Great place to stay with full privacy. Public transit, groceries and lots of good restaurants within walking distance. Everything is exactly the same as in the description.
The door and walls are a bit thin, and you can hear others sometimes. But they are nice neighbors so it wasn’t a problem. Another thing to note is that there is a fire station nearby, earplugs are recommended if you are a light sleeper.
Nice clean place, easy walk to train to get to downtown

Jonathan has been a wonderful host. His place was just perfect for the period of time spent in Boston (2 months). even though some people told me not to go to Roxbury, I found the neighborhood quiet, safe and walkable, not too far from the hospital (where I was doing my observership) and also well connected to the city center also by bus and train. Although I thought it was a bit overpriced at the beginning (since other apartments in better areas ask for the same money) as a last minute option and for the conditions I needed I think it was perfectly fine and worth it. My room and the kitchen were lovely and fully equipped. I love cooking and Jonathan’s kitchen is full of utensils to use. Luis, who lives permanently there, was lovely and welcoming. In summary I highly recommend Jonathan’s place!!!!
Really good
Great place
We had an amazing stay and enjoyed a weekend exploring Boston. The room is spacious and comfortable. We would definitely stay again! Thanks!

We really enjoyed our stay. It was a charming studio and the location was amazing. The T was close and the start of the Freedom Trail is right down the hill. We loved the neighborhood! Norah was a lovely hostess and very responsive.
Great location in Boston. The apartment is nice and cozy!
We had a nice stay in this room in Boston!

As Soon as I walked in the door I was very impressed.
All the appliances were brand new, the bed was Tempur-Pedic memory foam and the pillows were the same the bed was the most comfortable thing
I've slept in and to Top it all off the Place Spotless.
with renting a room I was a lil nervous about having Roommates and noise but it was quite and peaceful that I felt I was by myself.
over all a Great experience and a Great Price.
if your in the Boston area DO NOT MISS OUT
Although a little old, overall cute place. Convenient location
Jureks place was a great place to crash when working nearby.

This Airbnb was super close to the Liberty hotel where our friends were staying, so it was a really good option for us. It’s very walkable and close to a bunch of cute shops on Charles St. It’s a cozy garden apartment and has everything two people would need. Loved our stay and Ashley was quick to respond and very accommodating with our check-in time. Loved it!!
The place was great. It was clean and cozy. Check in was a breeze. You're centrally located with restaurants and public spaces (Boston Common, Charles River). The bed is super comfortable.
Place is nice and clean. Located in a great location walking distance to Chinatown and a short drive to Downtown.

Riyo's place was our first stop on our 2 week trip through New England.  We stayed here for 2 nights. We arrived late our first night, but with all the clear directions via email we didn't have a problem finding the studio.  When we came in we felt very welcome. There was a personal note, drinks and snacks.  Also towels and toiletries were provided. It was a great stay and we would definitly stay here again on a next trip to Boston! Thanks again to Riyo and the whole family to make our first airbnb experience a good one!

Accurate description, clean space, clear instructions. Despite being a dark windowless basement apartment, had some cute decorations to liven up the space. I had trouble getting through the gate and had to climb over the wall to get to the back door entrance. The basement is accessible from the top floor but you don’t see anyone else while there. As a single woman, I felt scared sleeping there, though nothing in particular happened. Probably a good deal based on the cost of lodging in the area but still pricey for the space.
Great location in south boston not far from Iron Works, with cafes, restaurants, a dumpling factory and brewery all within walking distance.
Mario was great. Place was great. Loud parties/music happening nearby.
Lihua is an excellent host and has tremendous hospitality! We enjoyed our stay and will be coming back!!

Mary is an excellent host and her listing is as described. All amenities were in tip top shape. The only negative is the location faces a busier road that you heard all the time. It is kind of like white noise.  It went along with our overall impression of how crazy traffic is in Boston. Driving there is not for the faint of heart. Our host Mary did give us pointers on the 'best' time to drive in the area. Highly recommend Mary's place.
Amazing location exactly what we needed

What can I say the pictures don’t do this place justice the place is amazing had an amazing stay location was great.. everything was close by to what we were trying to do and Greg was great responsive to any questions I had will recommend to anyone visiting to stay here will not be disappointed

The apartment was clean and exactly how it appears in the listing.  Only a short walk from the nearest T station giving easy access to get downtown. Terry was extremely responsive to any questions and answered almost immediately. We would definitely book again for our next trip to Boston.

Victoria’s place was perfect for our stay. The bedrooms are very spacious and comfortable. The living room and kitchen are a little small but functional, with everything you need for your stay.
Location is very convenient and you have restaurants just a walking distance from the apartment. We will definitely stay here again when in the area. Thank you for hosting us!!
This apartment was PERFECT! Looked exactly like the pictures and was super clean. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay here and the location was absolutely perfect!

I would give a 5 star for this place except it is advertised as having 2 beds and able to sleep 4. Reality is 1 bed and 1 couch so could only sleep 3 as far as I can see. I.e., the description did not match reality. Messaged about the beds and got no reply. I got the place for 2 beds as advertised as we were 2 male scholars in town for meetings. We found a sheet and douvet so were able to improvise bed 2 on the couch (which is quite comfortable!).
On the positive side the host had given me an emergency phone number but I did not see the bed issue as an emergency, assuming the host would message back.
Otherwise, this is a clean place, very handy [2 blocks walk] to the Roxbury stop on the Orange line of the MTA. Kitchenette is only microwave for cooking so is mainly a reheating only, not a meal prep kitchen, which worked for my friend and me. Great place for a couple who can share the bed. 1 block from a Great pizza place (takeout). Has steps so need mobile tenants.
This Airbnb is in a great spot in Boston, only a short .5 mile walk to Faneuil Hall and a mile to the Garden. Many restaurants around. The beds are super comfortable and the space was very clean.
Très jolie condo propre et très bien situé à Boston, tout était parfait
Nice and clean room. Booker is a very nice host.
Great place in a great location. Would stay again.
This location was perfect. Great space, price, and convenient location,  just a short walk to Boston Common.

This apartment is in a perfect location one block from the Common and the Park Street T station. Accommodations were great for our family of four, and be sure to check out the views from the rooftop deck. Jonathan is a great host who provides clear, consistent communication leading up to and during your stay. This can make all the difference when you're visiting a new place, so Jonathan's approach definitely made us feel more comfortable. I'd absolutely recommend staying at this property when in Boston and Jonathan as a host.

Great property right by Boston Commons. Traveling with 1 and 3 year old for vacation and a wedding
Cons:
- no real cons…listing a few thoughts that by no means were deal breakers
- gave 3 stars for value but I did come during Celtic playoffs and apartment was almost $1000 a night which I thought to be overpriced. Upon looking, it appears it’s not usually so much
- loud(ish)…could hear neighbors stomping above and noises from street…but it’s an apartment and is downtown so we expected it and wasn’t particularly bothersome
- parking additional which adds up in cost. Recommend against renting…walking and T was easy. We rented last 2 of 7 days and used SpotHero for parking one night and onsite for second
- need everything if you’re going to cook anything (including salt/spices and oil)…don’t cook ;) and eat a lobster roll every day
Pros:
- extremely clean
- rapid communication with hosts (a property management company I believe)
- easy check in and out
- great location walkable to everything
- spacious and well laid out rooms
- easy to use TV with streaming
- comfy beds with tons of pillows that all felt really clean
Overall would 100% stay again and
Highly recommend but probably wait till price went down a bit. Six nights at that rate plus the air bnb fees made it a rather expensive (but awesome) vacation. Thank y’all so much.

This is what I would call “old school” Airbnb, amenities of a hotel with the luxuries of home.
Everything is well thought out, with special touches such as snacks and drinks ready for arrival.
Everything is brand new and we didn’t need anything in terms of kitchen utensils, linens, towels or toiletries.
Simon was super helpful and mailed me a dress I accidentally left in the closet.
The fact there was parking in the driveway was a bonus!

My stay at 90 Kilsyth was just perfect.  Kama was able to accommodate my last minute request to check in the very day that I booked the apartment with very little notice (my other accommodation fell through at the last minute).  When I arrived, the apartment was exactly as depicted in the pictures.  It is comfy, updated (even thought its in an older building), and furnished perfectly with everything I needed.  The apartment is conveniently located within easy walking distance of 2 Green Line Ts.  Kama was responsive to my questions, answering them quickly and thoroughly.  She couldn't have been a nicer host.  I would definitely recommend staying here.
非常適合假日出遊的居住地方,而且房間非常寬敞舒適又整潔🥂

Devora’s place is beautiful and I communicated with a house manager who was responsive and flexible with some minor requests. The house is atop a private driveway with plenty of secure parking and adjoining a cute park where locals walked their dogs. The kitchen was very well stocked, along with linens, towels, etc. The house guide includes information about the neighborhood’s history, and local restaurants. It was very quiet. Some things to keep in mind are the steep, narrow steps from the outside and another set to get to the loft area, which has low ceilings, and there isn’t a coffee shop or restaurant to walk to. It was a lovely stay with a lovely host and I would stay there again 😊

Ken is thoughtful, considerate and takes great care to welcome you in his beautiful home.
We only stayed one night, but it was cozy and we slept very well! The room and bathroom have thoughtful touches and have every comfort.
We had a car so parking was a consideration for us and street parking there was no problem.
Highly recommended!
Worth every penny
The Copley House is a good stay in Boston. It’s a five to ten minute walk from the subway but is in a quiet area in town. We enjoyed our stay there.

Great place! The neighborhood was nice and close to everything. I was incredibly pleased with how clean the place was! I felt so comfortable and Jean-Luc was easy to get in touch with and was kind to us. I will stay here every time I visit Boston! Thank you for making our stay wonderful!
The bedroom was very open & comfortable. The host was very attentive & friendly. I recommend checking it out while visiting Boston.
This is a great place for two people to stay. The location is great and the roof deck view is phenomenal. I would definitely recommend a stay here and would personally come back again.

Foster's Airbnb was excellent! Great little efficiency studio in the South End neighborhood with lots of restaurants, groceries, etc within blocks. Very clean, comfortable bed, basic kitchen amenities, good climate control, safe and quiet neighborhood. The apartment is on the back side of the building facing a quiet road/alley, so there was minimal noise from outside. The building is old and the walls are thin so there was some noise from other apartments, but it was nothing problematic during our stay. The bathroom is very basic with a small shower stall.
We love walking and did not have a car. It was a great location for walkers and felt very safe. About 45 mins walking to the North station (MBTA) where we caught the train to Salem for the day. About 20 mins walking to Boston Common, and about 45 minutes walking to the North End neighborhood. It was a 15 minute Uber ride to the airport. Check in/check out was a breeze and communication was clear and responsive. A great stay!
Greg was such a great host! This is a gem of a spot, both in terms of location and layout. Lovely space!
Great stay, very close to BU and the Kenmore stop on green line, nice location.

Wanted to love this place! There was a quite a bit of noise inside and outside the building, got stuck in the buildings elevator, several windows were not in the best shape letting in cold air, and not the cleanest overall. The apartments location is great and the city was easy to navigate using the subway and walking!
Good value convenient base to explore Boston. Comfortable bed and good shower. Kitchen is well equipped. Appreciate the essential foodstuffs and toiletries. Would recommend to our friends.
Very clean house, everything is neat , host is friendly and outgoing. Plan on booking agin 😃
Very convenient location

Walkable from the Blue line train station and conveniently close to local shops and restaurants, it was the perfect position to get to/from the airport and a fantastic base to visit Boston. Nothing but praise for the accommodation and hosts. Thank you for making the experience of visiting Boston a memorable and happy one!
Awesome stay!

A great central location, especially if visiting Boston Children’s Hospital. No issues with parking on the street during our stay. We had several friendly interactions with locals in the neighborhood and on our walks to Fort Hill. Great value for Boston.

SUPER FANTASTIC!!

This is a beautiful, yet comfortable home right in the heart of Boston. You can walk to many areas and hop on the Tor subway right next door to venture out farther.
Chris and Kelly were great to work with through the whole process.
The beds are very comfortable, and there is so much space for everyone, and a kitchen you can make breakfast or a full course dinner. The amenities just go on and on.
If you are fortunate enough and are able to snag this one, you will enjoy your trip to Boston even more.
Absolutely great place!!
Great home, great location. Lihua was a fantastic host. Very friendly and helpful.
They are amazing hosts!
Such a great stay! Jay was very communicative and super helpful. Thank you!
Check-in is very late at 5pm, check-out is 10am. Great location but not good value.
My parents enjoyed their first time visit to Boston. They enjoyed how close everything was and how easy it was getting around. The house felt nice coming to after along day being out.
Perfect place to enjoy a few days in Boston!!! Quiet neighborhood with only short walk to shops, Charles River and Fenway!!!!!
Cute house with private parking and a short walk to both dining and public transportation.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Philip and Ann’s place. It was a beautiful and roomy space. Loved the neighborhood and all of the great restaurants nearby. Enjoyed the easy walk to many locations and proximity to the T-line. Would definitely stay here again if we come back to Boston.
Wifi was a tad spotty but otherwise this place was great.

We had a great stay. Jonathan was very flexible, letting us to drop off our luggage early and to leave it a little bit late. The place is in a garden level basement, very comfortable and stylish. It is close to Boston College and the T. Lots of nice touches, including an iron, a luggage rack, water, a Keurig, and overall cleanliness. We could hear the family upstairs, but didn’t mind at all. Strong internet and easy check in. Room to park a car, if need be.
Great host and location!

We had a pleasant stay at the loft. Roy and Susan are really warm and friendly. In terms of transportation, if you don’t bring a car like me, it’s quite convenient to explore Boston with Bus 39 and the orange line. Thanks for having us and would love to come back!
Perfect stay if you’re going to Fenway park!

Great Location
Great Price
Cozy and Clean
Joshua left some snacks for us, much appreciate
Adorable space, easy parking and great location!

Riyos studio is the ideal location for exploring Boston: Beautiful neighborhood (Jamaica Plain), close to the T-station (Orange Line) and equipped with everything you need for a short stay (incl. a fridge and a microwave oven).
Communication and check in were very efficient: Ryio communicated all necessary details well in advance. Also Ryio keeps a reliable and up to date folder with information on Boston in her studio.
The interior furnishings seemed almost brand new and the studio is very clean and equipped with nice details such as small snacks and bottles of water in the fridge.
We stayed for two nights and enjoyed our stay very much.
Probably not entirely recommendable for longer stays or for people traveling with a lot of luggage, as the studio is quiet small and doesn't offer much shelf space for unpacking.
Really great👌👌👌

We stayed at Kaitlyn’s place for our honeymoon in Boston and it was awesome! Very good location for walking or ubering around the city and so many great shops and restaurants right down the road. The host was great as well and very helpful with local recommendations and tips! We would for sure book again!

Glenn is Awesome and his apartment is great, very clean and really has anything you can wish for when staying in Airbnb place. Location was also great, one thing that was outstanding was Glenn’s availability which was really fast (and kind). Thanks for everything Glenn.
Definitely coming back, the place was extremely nice and safe

Peter’s place is just as described in the listing. So charming and comfortable. Area is very walkable and there are great suggestions of places to check out. T is accessible for travel to other areas of Boston

Loved our time in Boston. The place was perfect. Great location, very comfortable, clean, quiet and had everything we needed. Philip was very responsive.
We loved the area! Very walkable with lots of amazing restaurants, shops and coffee options.
Great location, safe and clean, responsive host.

Jennifer has created a welcoming home open to travellers. Having a few maps and bus pamphlets on hand to help navigate the city. We took advantage of our time with her and shared a lovely meal with her and her other guests. Our visit was only made better with her company.

I had a great stay here. Jonathan was friendly and accommodating, and I appreciated suggestions for places to check out while in the area. Felt safe as a female solo-traveler, and this was a great first experience at an AirBnB. Would definitely recommend to others.
Perfect location for walking distance to Harvard campus. Parking spot was a huge benefit.  Can be a bad experience is you're unlucky and end up with neighbors who are noisy late at night.

This place was perfect for a ladies weekend getaway! Close enough to Uber or take train to just about everywhere! House was very clean (and I own my own cleaning business)!  Very pleased. Definitely will stay again next trip to Boston! My favorite stay so far.
Clean and cosy

Adler’s place is wonderful, and the other great reviews truly do not lie. It’s clean, cute, comfortable for four people. We felt safe walking home late at night, and it is within short walking distance to the T. Adler is very kind and responded to any questions we had very quickly and thoroughly.  Definitely will be looking to stay here again when we come back to the area!
Maverick’s place is clean and stylish. The room is very comfortable to stay except the very terrible noise insulation.....
Great place to stay, right downtown and central to a lot of attractions.

Great location!
Apartment was nicely appointed, clean, and had nearly anything we could want.
Would stay here again without a hesitation.
Great location everything is in walking distance. Room has 2 good size bedrooms both with bathrooms ideal for a few days
Best
Ewa was a wonderful host, she was quick to respond to any questions and kept us updated on when we could check in early
Beautiful spot in Jamaica Plain! Ellena is a gracious and responsive host.

Von was great, accommodating and able to offer early check in. He made sure that I was able to access the room and that I had everything I needed for my brief one night stay. Excellent host, I would highly recommend Von and his property to others.
Really nice place, clean and tidy, within walking distance to the city centre. Would recommend.
Clean & beautiful space. Would highly recommend.

Our recent visit at Pauline’s Airbnb was excellent! She was very easy to reach and was a very helpful host for any and all questions we had regarding our peaceful stay in the city. I would highly recommend her place as it was very easy to get to, had safe parking right down the street, and was in a great location. Would definitely consider staying here again as our entire experience was wonderful and very seamless!
Great location!
The location was great, surrounded by great restaurants in the North End.

Decent unit in a beautiful building and great location. Terrible customer service experience is reason for poor review. Also, towels are very small and cheap (think dorm room towels), subpar pillows, and limited storage.
My bad customer service experience: I left behind two items, and despite emailing Maverick a prepaid shipping label, I’m not sure if they will ever be returned. Not the end of the world, but Maverick has been so unhelpful. Their front line customer support team is very friendly and easy to get in touch with. But they do not follow up and despite numerous requests to escalate to management, I never heard back from them. So, be warned if you stay there: make sure you don’t leave anything behind. And if you encounter a more serious issue, you likely will not get any support from Maverick.
We had a wonderful time staying here! It was easy to get too and lots to do around the area! Would highly recommend if you want a stress free place to stay!
Lovely space that’s a very manageable distance from everything. Easy access to public transport, stylish room with private entry, and Kevin was very responsive to all of our messages.

This place is perfect for the price. We scheduled last minute, and Kevin was super quick with accepting our booking and responding. Check in was super easy and contact-free. The location is awesome, and its a 5 minute drive to anything you need. Plus free parking! The only thing to mention (and I'm sure this is in the listing, but it might be easy to miss) is that theres no microwave. Not an issue for us since we were only staying a few days and got take out though. Overall it was great! More private and personal than a hotel room, for cheaper!

Felt right at home and the place was very spacious. Beautiful upgrades and love that there are chargers everywhere! Plenty of parking and we Had no issues in the house whatsoever. Location seems pretty central as it took about 20 minutes to get everywhere. We would definitely stay here again.
This is a beautiful and spacious loft in a great location with very accommodating hosts.

The Airbnb was even better in person. It was very easy to find and get in. A perfect location to be in given that everything we wanted to do or go to was within walking distance: the T, local cafes, little boutiques, restaurants, and the grocery/convenience stores. All in all if/when I come back to Boston, this would be the first place I'll look for a great and comfortable stay!

I am a college student who is looking at listings to move to Boston and thought I could make a vacation out of it with my girlfriend so I booked this place because it was relatively affordable and in a nice location (near Newbury st and the prudential center). I get in the bathroom has not been cleaned well there is dried up soap and hair in the shower. I go to my room they say they have a 2 plate stove top… they did not. The WiFi cut out within 4 hours of staying here and didn’t come back on until the end of the next day. There was a rain storm one of the nights and it leaked through the ceiling, ruining some of my electronics. I asked if they could reimburse me for ruined electronics and they said they needed “proof”. I do not live near Boston so by the time I could give proof I had to be home. I do no recommend this place at all, unsanitary, lacks amenities, poor customer service I was absolutely appalled by the trip and this ruined vacation.

The pictures really don’t do the house justice its so cozy & the kitchen area is bigger than it appears. Katia is so sweet she answered all my questions almost instantly every time. Such a great host! It’s very easy to get in the house. 10/10 i’d definitely recommend it and stay there again.

Lovely house in lovely neighborhood with street parking. Frank was there to greet us and show us around. We bicycled and drove so not sure about public transportation but Cambridge and North end not far.
The home was very clean and comfortable with everything we needed.
Great location in east Boston, the place is just as described. We had a great time!

This is a great place in a great location in Boston. Charles Street is a great neighborhood with lots of shops and some good unique restaurants and walking distance to great tourist attractions. The condo is well appointed, updates, clean and quiet. I highly recommend it.
This is our 2nd stay with Thatch and we will continue to stay in their properties when we visit Boston.
Well equipped. Helpful host. Clean. Good accurate description of property.

Anderson's place Is in an older area in East Boston. The accommodations inside are very good and clean and safe and Wi-Fi works well. we enjoyed the dedicated and very clean bathroom and full size tub. The room includes the entire downstairs area which is very private and helpful.
Anderson communicated extremely well, and the instructions he provided to get into the unit was very clear and included photos. photos were definitely very helpful. I appreciated that he was very prompt with his communication on Airbnb.
The advantage of the location of the room is Uber ride was about 10 minutes and $12 to the airport.
The disadvantage of the area is that it's not as nice as a more expensive area such as beacon Hill or the North end.... those areas seem safer and more enjoyable to walk around during the day and night. however those nicer areas are probably going to be another $100 or more per night.
I enjoyed staying at his place and I would definitely do it again. Thx Anderson!

This Airbnb was the perfect introduction to Boston in the Spring. The unit is perfectly situated in one of the city's most beautiful and active neighborhoods, but tucked in at the garden level with a cozy, quiet feel. The place was well equipped and enjoyable to live in, with essentials provided. The patio is a tremendous amenity as well.

Susie is a very sweet, attentive host and her home is very cozy. It's in the perfect location next to many restaurants and shots, along with a train stop. I would highly recommend her as a host, along with her home.
Thanks.

Wonderful. This was a business trip so we could not enjoy the house as much as we wanted. I hope to come back with my family at some point.
Convenient, clean, spacious, good communication, felt right at home.
best airbnb
Excellent communication easy to locate. Great place for a girls trip in Boston. Pictures are just like the condo.

Sophia’s home is clean and in an excellent location. It is on the ground level of a somewhat busy area though, so it might not be best if you’re a very light sleeper. But otherwise, I highly recommend it!
Keith responded to any questions I had in a timely manner and regularly had the kitchen and bathroom cleaned. It's great that there's also a laundry machine in the basement!

The stay is in a quiet area, very walkable and historically scenic. The condo is very clean and tastefully appointed, with a spacious main room and kitchen. Really appreciated the standing workstation.

As first time visitors to Boston this was the perfect place to stay. Quiet, very comfortable, spotless, well thought out use of space and a lovely place to come back to. Great neighbourhood within easy walking distance of local amenities and T station. We had all the privacy we needed but Bruce and Tim were quick to respond to questions and easily contacted. All in all a great stay - thank you.

As a first time Airbnb user I was a little hesitant about the overall process, but Adriana & Gianni Di Marco were able to alleviate any worry. The initial contact was a bit delayed, although after we met there was immediate communication. As far as the listing itself goes I think that it was, in fact, charming. It truly felt like a little home that was ideal for a relaxing weekend. It also helped to be a little subway savvy, which was (for me) a necessary part of the stay.  If you are looking for a warm and friendly place to stay that is a bit out of the way from Boston, but only a train ride away, this is your place.
Glenn and his team were very helpful through out our stay. The apartment is an excellent place to base yourself for a visit to Boston. I recommend it highly.
Nice place in a great location for sightseeing in Boston.

Karina’s place was just perfect. We did two nights for a concert at Fenway and it was conveniently located. Her home was clean and as advertised. We spent a lot of time on the rooftop especially at night. Great restaurants nearby. Karina was very responsive and kind. You will love it here.

We absolutely loved our stay! It was the perfect area to stay in Boston! We loved going to all of the cannoli spots to decide the best. Mike’s won! We loved the North End and all it has to offer. The apartment was spacious, clean, roomy, and beautiful! We are so happy we chose to stay here. The listing includes information about the stairs. It was a little difficult to get luggage down, but it was fine for us. Just be aware! Great location within walking distance of everything. Thank you so much, Gina!
Great place to stay. Location was perfect. Home was nice and clean.

a Localidade é ótima e o anfitrião super acolhedor. Porém, existem duas boates próximas o que dificulta um pouco o silêncio noturno (nos fins de semana).
No mais, tudo perfeito

Very clean apartment
Great communication from host
Right next to the train which was a plus. Left towels and a very clean house for me and my friends to enjoy our weekend. Easy simple check in and communicated very wel!
Lovely residential apartment off the beaten track with a great host.

We enjoyed our stay at this place! We purchased the 7-day train pass (it ended up saving a lot of money because you need to take the train downtown every time unless you are going to uber/lyft). The walk is a full 10 min to the train station and then another 10+ mins depending on where you are going in Boston. It was a lovely place to come back to and relax/unwind from the time in the City.
The bathrooms were spacious, the shower was great, it was equipped with body wash, shampoo/conditioner, and fresh towels. There is a Keurig to make coffee and some drinks/snacks in the fridge. The place was plenty spacious; although there are fellow Airbnb-ers around. I'd recommend staying at the place!

Great location for access to the city. For over $300 a night though, it would have been nice to have a mini fridge in the room. Also, be sure and grab earplugs from the front desk. You might need them as I did. My experience wasn't bad overall staying at the Bostonian, but for the price I was hoping for a little more.
Good location and great communication from host. House was just as described.
We love this Airbnb! Would recommend to anyone. It is clean, cute, and perfectly located!
נהנינו מאוד להתארח! המקום היה נעים, נקי ומתאים לנו. רק נציין שהדירה ממוקמת בקומה 3 בלי מעלית, ושיש מעט רעש  מהרחוב ומדירות סמוכות. אם אתם בסדר עם זה, הדירה ממש מקסימה ומומלצת!
supper hosts. supper place to stay and supper pets friendly. we enjoyed our stay.
A very good place to stay in Boston. Great location and good amenities.
Great location and great value for the neighborhood!

This place was perfect - exactly what I needed for one night. Nicely appointed studio; easy in and out; accurate directions and centrally located to downtown Boston. The pizza place on the corner was great, too.

Robin was an excellent host.  She treated us like we were family.  She gave us lots of useful information to save us money and fast travel around the city.  She treated us like family.  She has a beautiful backyard with lots of shade and chairs.  Easy walk to see the harber or to a walking path.  Her residence is in an easy to find place with easy access to the tram system that Boston has available.   Places to eat within walking distance as well.   I would recommend staying with her.
El alojamiento está muy bien ubicado, es muy confortable y el anfitrión es amable y responde muy rápido, lo recomiendo a cualquiera que visite Boston.

In a word, Stunning! Ideal location, equivalent to a 5-Star property, immaculately clean and well kept.
Will be back again in 2023. Blessings!
Great stay!

This was a very clean and comfortable unit on Newbury Street. It is a studio so the kitchen and bathroom were both appropriately smallish, but I was pleasantly surprised to find that the bedroom area was much larger than I thought it would be. Everything was in good condition and we made use of the TV, board games, and the oven and cooktop in the kitchen. There is also a coffee maker and a toaster as well as a microwave. This room has lots of amenities and was absolutely perfect for a week-long stay! I would highly recommend it to anyone visiting Boston- amazing location and very comfortable and cute. Check in and check out were super easy!
Great location! Had such a fun time in the city and enjoyed coming back to a clean and comfortable place to stay!

Staying in the lovely accommodation was a truly enjoyable experience. The space was impeccably clean and well-maintained, creating a welcoming atmosphere. We especially appreciated the comfortable furnishings and thoughtful amenities provided. Furthermore, the host's excellent communication and attentiveness made our stay even more pleasant. Overall, it was a fantastic place to stay, and we would happily return in the future.
The host was super nice and gives very detailed instructions to are very helpful. Place was spacious, clean and comfy. Would love to stay again next concert! Thanks!!!!

very cute place in what i felt safe neighborhood. around 7mins to the orange t. super fast communication (catherine saved my butt from being homeless in boston), easy access, and good privacy. and if you like cello or piano playing, you may be treated to some of that sometimes too :)

Nous avons loué une chambre à 3 (un couple et une amie), le lit était correct mais le sofa un peu petit pour un adulte. L’appartement est très fonctionnel et propre. Nous avons fait la visite de la ville à pied, l’emplacement est très pratique. Nous avons même trouvé une place de stationnement dans la rue car c’est gratuit les fins de semaine. Le quartier est sympathique et proche d’une bonne microbrasserie Castle Island. Le logement a répondu à nos besoins.
Excellent value and great location. Able to take the T or a blue bike each day to visit my mom in the hospital. Able to do laundry and shared bath was never a problem. I would stay again!!
Ali was a great host! Very responsive, and the place was adorable. I would stay there again in a heartbeat.
Very pretty house with everything ready! You can just come and enjoy your stay!
We had a wonderful stay…terrific location.  Thank you Erin!
Amy was a wonderful host.  She provided a 5-star experience by going above and beyond to meet our needs and requests.  Thank you.

Karen was great, location was great, food recommendations were great, helping with camping trailer parking was great, finding our left cell phone and wallet was great.  Did I say Karen was great?  She was.

Esta ha sido nuestra primer experiencia en Airbnb, y gracias a Kama lo hemos pasado muy bien.
Hemos esperado hasta el arribo de Kama al departamento aproximadamente 40 minutos.
El departamento es amplio, muy luminoso, ya que posee ventanas en el living y el cuarto ademas del baño.
Estuvo bien equipado, con heladera, MWO, horno eléctrico, cafetera y todos los elementos necesarios para cocinar, preparar el desayuno etc.
El vecindario es muy bonito, rodeado de bonitas casas y muchos arboles.
La ubicacion es muy buena ya que esta a aprox 200 mts del T train, lo que nos resulto muy comodo para nuestro objetivo de ir a la BU.
En resumen lo hemos pasado muy bien.

Tomas & Zulema

I just want to say Thank you. This trip was quick but staying here was the best! If I am ever in Boston I would love to be able to stay here again!
The place is spotless and stylish. It was more that I imagined it would be!

Jurek's place is great for travelers who what to explore the city of Boston. The apartment is right next to the T train that can take you to all the major attractions. The place is very clean and the pictures are accurate.
Great

Host was prompt and very thoughtful with leaving detailed, easy to understand instructions for getting the key and checking out. The place was super clean and looked as pictured.  Would def come back and use this host again

Great location and a super easy stay for Boston. 25 minute walk to the conference centre. 15 minutes to amazing restaurants in the North End. Max’s cafe across the road is a great local for breakfast.

Lihua’s place is a gem in beautiful Boston. The care she puts into the morning breakfast as well as the cleanliness of the space made me feel right at home. The communication upon arrival was easy and I will definitely stay again. Her place is charming, has a ton of character and is walking distance to all that Fenway has to offer.

The home was beautifully decorated, can accommodate a big party (our party was 6) and perfect location (includes parking.) Ryan hospitality was superior to all other Airbnb’s we have stayed in. The small touches from congratulations flowers, champagne and late check out was more than appreciated. I would highly recommend this home to anyone in the area.
Great location, great place, and a great host! Highly recommend this place.
Great stay! Everything as described. Very comfortable, and host was communicative and friendly. Would definitely stay again.

We immediately felt at home in this warm and enchanting house in Boston, also because reception was well organised and we were welcomed woth a bottle of wine and more. Allthough we didnt meet barbara and martin, we were very well satisfied with our stay here.
Allthough it is not evry close to Boston city, we can well recommend. The house has everything you need, is clean and cosy.
Thank you Barbara and Martin
Place was great and had everything we needed for a comfortable stay.
Wonderful host with a clean and updated place to stay. Would recommend to friends and family.
Great and clean place would definitely stay again

Andres' place was very nice! He even accommodated a red eye flight and when we got to the apartment all the beds were ready and the lights were on! It was a very welcoming environment.  The apartment is right next to a train station so getting around was very easy. It was my first time using AirBnb and I will never use a hotel again. Andres was a great host! He was out of town while we were there and he still had someone help us out. 10/10 I would stay there again!
very hospitable, quiet, clean. the location was one block away from the railway which made it easy to reach multiple locations within the city. Would definitely recommend this stay to others.

Nos encantó el hospedaje, siempre estaba todo muy limpio y  organizado, tienen una ubicación privilegiada, queda a 5 minutos del aeropuerto y a 10 minutos del centro de Boston. Lance y Shelly son maravillosos, nos dieron indicaciones de todo las actividades para hacer en Boston.

Traveling for work and wanted a place more homey and a way to disconnect from work. Only one night, but the place and location was perfect. Very comfortable, clean, walkable to great restaurants, shopping, and things to do. Host was also super helpful, responsive, and patient when I had trouble finding the message with some instructions. Would stay there again in a hot minute.
Jessy and Diego were very responsive and instructions were easy. The place was clean and exactly like the photos.

it was a great place to stay. The inside was beautiful and clean. For the price we paid it was gold.  I will say the check in instructions confused us because there was no indication what unit was the 2nd unit. There is no service within the unit so you need to connect to the WiFi and even with the WiFi sometimes calls failed etc. something they can’t control but We heard tons of pounding throughout the upper and lower level, making it difficult for one of the guest to sleep.

Foster's place is perfect for a work trip to Boston! The apartment is very clean, private, and located in a super convenient, walkable area. I was able to walk between client sites, the office, and the apartment on 4 out of 5 days thanks to great weather. Situated in the South End, it offers easy access to a fantastic restaurant scene with plenty to explore. I highly recommend it for anyone looking for a comfortable and well-located stay in the city.

Cute house with amazing amenities. Great great great bang for your bucks! Bill and Maureen are really welcoming and accommodating. We definitely felt like being at home. Will be staying here again if we’re in town.

Great space in a great location.  As other reviews have said, the walls are very thin.  Access was easy.  Communication was great.  Would stay there again if I have another meeting in the same part of Boston.

I needed to be in downtown Boston for several days and this was a perfect stay. It's an easy walk from the airport, which I did every day to take the bus to and from the convention center. The place itself is great - clean and bright and exactly as pictured. Access is straightforward and easy with the codes. The kitchen has everything I would have wanted, had my plans allowed. The room was nice, the bathroom was nice, and it worked out really well.
When my flight was cancelled, I didn't hesitate to come back for another night. They were quick to respond and it worked out great. Super helpful.

Truly such a great location and we had a blast! I had read reviews complaining about noise because it’s above a restaurant but we had zero issues. It was so quiet at night for us. The bed sags in the middle but was still comfortable.
Great place to stay. The occupants in the building were respectful. The parking waas not an issue and communication with the host was great.
Great place to stay, especially because of how close it is to everything!
The apartment was in a great location! Super convenient and was right near the subway station for any destinations that weren't walkable. It was easy to get in, clean, and felt safe. Thanks so much!
lovely apartment and easy stay.
Perfect little space and walking distance to everything - had a blast!

Rosalia is a very friendly and great host! The room was clean and very cozy. Since I was arriving when she was not there, she gave me detailed instructions on how to let myself in. Rosalia was also very responsive to me text when the cab took me to the wrong location. Tip for anyone who is taking a Boston cab, make sure you say its in Charlestown or better yet just use uber! I came to Boston for an interview at MGH and once Rosalia found out, she gave me several tips on renting in Boston (if I were ever to move).

As for the room, there were maps and a book showing the history of Charlestown through photographs laid out on the bed. The twin bed was really soft and comfortable.

Finally Charlestown was beautiful! It is such an amazing neighbourhood that is full of history. I wandered into a 200 year old tavern which was minutes way from the place.

Overall, it has been a great stay especially as a first time airbnb guest.

PS The pet bunny is super cute!
Great host and nice, clean place with warm, cozy vibes! We loved the roof deck!
Was in Boston for a few days and this place fit the bill perfectly.

Pros: great location! A few steps from the T and so many great coffee shops, restaurants, and shopping! We were skeptical about the beds at first because they were so low to the ground but all three feds were extremely comfortable.
Cons: for what we paid we would expect at least a bag of coffee for the coffee maker. There are definitely no little extras at this Airbnb. Neither of the showers have shower caddies so all of your shower supplies have to be on the floor while you’re showering. Toilet paper dispenser was loose and hanging off the wall. Blinds and one of the bedrooms was bent and didn’t close all the way. I was pretty disappointed in all of these details that mean a lot to us when we are looking for the perfect Airbnb. When we pulled out the extra blanket for the bed, there was a huge brown stain on it so we had to do without. Gross.
The walls are extremely thin, so make sure you invest in a sound machine. It doesn’t drown the sound out all the way, but helps.
It was fine.

great place to stay, very cozy, clean, and beautiful. the host was very responsive and helpful. great location, near public transit and a quiet neighborhood
10/10, would recommend

Great experience w/def come back!  Local close to eats and shops.  Great communication with mgmnt they were helpful and quick to respond to my every need.  Highly recommend you stay here when in Boston!

We were staying because of the convenient location to Dana Farber Cancer Institute, where my son, and receiving a weeklong treatment. Jennifer was so accommodating to some of our unique needs going on with his current health situation. I cannot thank her enough. We will definitely be back!

I cannot say enough good things about both Gates and his beautiful home. He went out of his way to make me feel at home from Day 1 - I didn't feel like I was simply staying in his flat, but also cared for and looked after as a friend. The place is sparkling clean (I've never had a tidier rommate), cozy, and I enjoyed lots of Boston evenings reading on the balcony. If you're thinking about it, definitely stay! Can't recommend enough.
It’s pretty convenient and free street parking. You got TV, heater, and simple breakfast for free.

Excellent stay
Place was clean. Comfortable. Felt like home
All essentials arr provided
Kasia was available and very helpful

Room was spacious and clean. Apartment near the metro station with food places accessible nearby. Ehab was very kind and friendly and checked on me throughout my stay to ensure everything was alright.

Thank you for the nice stay! I slept well….in the order at which my trip was reserved this was such a convenience!
Thanks again!
