The check-in process was quick and easy, check-out procedures were reasonable and concise. The place was very clean and comfortable for the weekend with plenty of space for our group. The foosball table actually has a mini pool table inside as well, which we loved! Quiet hours are at reasonable times, our host reached out to see if we needed anything after checking in, and anytime we had a question our host was very quick to respond.
Great location, basic accommodation and just what you need. Would stay here again.

Nous avons adoré la localisation du logement qui nous a permis de visiter la ville à pied. Le lit était très confortable et la grosseur du logement idéale pour notre séjour. Le seul bémol est notre rencontre avec des personnes en situation d'itinérance qui semblaient vouloir entrer dans le bâtiment. Il fallait donc bien fermer les portes arrière et avant. Jessy et Diego ont été présents pour nous accompagner face a cet enjeu malgré la distance.
The apartment was in a great location and easy to check in.
Veronica’s place was a great place to stay! Easily accessible, clean and Veronica was a communicative host.
Lovely studio in the Back Bay. Amazing location - you will love it!
Great place, nice people, love Boston!
Expect relaxation and cleanliness while staying in the Chestnut

My family and I really enjoyed Rafael’s house. It’s in a convenient location, a 10 minute walk from the blue line of the subway and then just three or four stops to the Boston Common. The neighborhood has lots of charm and good restaurants. The hosts were very responsive. The house itself was spacious, very clean, comfortably furnished, and well-stocked. Lots of popcorn, coffee, dishes, utensils, towels, blankets, etc. etc. etc. The hosts are super thoughtful.
The apartment was in a great location. The elevator did not work, but other than that the apartment was clean and spacious.
nice house and clean is perfect thank you
Nice place to travel solo or with one other person. Thin walls so you will get a lot of noise from others.
Super clean and so close to transportation. Our host was friendly and responsive. Great value. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay.
Very close to subway, very clean and cosy, perfect host!

My girlfriend and I stayed here for a week for Christmas. Looked great because it was in close proximity to Downtown/Commons area. Location was great walking distance to places/restaurants. Some good things within the place we enjoyed were the comfortable firm bed, great tv, ac/heat and the space was bigger than expected. The downfall: the location even though it was close to everything, handful of homeless outside apartment building, which was fairly uncomfortable. Small problems were not enough towels/dish rags, sheets were small stained. One of the reasons we got this place for the full kitchen because my girlfriend loves to cook. She was going to cook every so often so we can save some money for other things. This was the rough part. We started going through the kitchen looking and noticed there was no skillet for cooking. They had about everything else but no skillet so we had to buy one. Dishwasher/garbage disposal needs maintained sooner rather than later. Overall, happy but sad

The photos don't do this place justice, it was beautiful, cosy, very clean and had everything you could ever need. The quality of everything was outstanding. The location was great, tucked into a quiet little street, it was a short walk to the subway and into the city.
If you're going to stay in Boston, stay here.
It is perfect.
Really clean place! Lots of room and perfect location.

departamento , acogedor, limpio y ordenado , de fácil acceso.
Quedamos muy contentos…ideal para que vayan 4 personas muy cómodas , sobretodo para 2 parejas.
Carolyn took two days to reply to my initial message about rescheduling or a refund. No cancellation. Unable to change or cancel the booking.

Such a perfect location for Boston! It was my first time here, and I wanted a space that was central to all the things that I wanted to do. It is a vibrant and safe neighborhood as well. Would definitely stay here again.

It was my birthday weekend in Boston. Had a great time with my girlfriend! the apartment is in a great location and in a very quiet neighbourhood! we were so close to the train that it wasnt a problem to go downtown, come back for a couple hours then go back for more fun! considering prices of hotels in downtown boston, staying at Jessica's place was a no brainer! the place was very clean and had some maps and site-seeing books to help us get started!
Thanks Jessica

Location and price were exactly what we were looking for, the space is clean and as described. Close to the airport, a plus for our early flight out.
It’s in a very nice and quiet neighborhood.
Would recommend 😊

Michael’s place is super chic and clean. Loved the decor/style of it as well as his quaint neighborhood. So close to many great restaurants - try Lobstah on a Roll! Really enjoyed my stay here because I felt comfortable and safe. Such a great choice!
Excellent condo. Incredible location. The kitchen is a little bare of some basic items  but very functional.  Host responded to questions almost immediately.
We had a wonderful time.

Richards place was perfect for me, a ten minute walk to my office and steps from a true tast of the north End. Great spot for a weekend getaway or a few days on business during the week. A great value compared to the hotels in the area.

A lovely little 2 level apartment in a fantastic location. The rooms are wonderfully decorated and it all worked well.
Thank you Kaitlyn!

I had a great stay in Boston at Paige’s place! The studio had everything you need to have a comfortable stay. The location is also great, downtown Boston is within walking distance. Would definitely come back!
Great house and big rooms.

Charming Place! It was fun staying in this shared open style home.  I was very impressed with the respect that all the other renters/ tenants had for the space.  Everyone was very quiet and aware of their neighbors privacy.

Great and affordable place to stay near Boston. The kitchen and bathroom and both big and stay relatively clean most of the time!
Parking in the neighborhood is a bit tough so please give yourself time to walk or find parking by driving around a bit.
It's an older home but extremely well kept!
Great stay in Boston. Went with two friends who have never done an Air BnB before and they loved it. It was perfect because we all had our own private room to sleep in. No complaints.
Everything was perfect! Thank you for a very comfortable stay.

This was just what we needed. We were able to spend the day in comfort as we got some work done in the downstairs space.  It was such a clean and inviting environment.  I would definitely recommend this place to anyone looking to stay in the area.
Amazing place! We were there scouting out different neighborhoods in Boston for our move and chose this neighborhood!! Great place!!
Great host, very responsive
Such a cute space in a great location! It was perfect for a quick little getaway.
Very well put place for such a low price

Mary’s place is very clean, organized and accurate as pictures shown. We were able to park near the house without any issue and it’s a short drive to downtown Boston. The bed was comfy and place was clean which is what we all are looking for while staying at an Airbnb. Thanks for the stay!

Excellent communication, best location and very quiet. Would have stayed in a hotel instead given the price though and the sheets didn’t fit the bed properly and kept coming off in the night, which made it difficult to sleep.

The studio apartment was ideally located for a conference at the Copley place. It is comfortable and in a cute neighborhood but note that it has a feeling more of a hotel with limited “extras” that one would find in a lived in home. This of course can be a plus for many. The checkin checkout process is very set and well- established, limited flexibility that you might find with other Airbnb’s. Overall a good value and fine place to stay.

We really enjoyed the stay! Mary was very thoughtful and kind.
Very cozy place, ideal for a short-term trip in Boston.
I enjoyed my stay very much. Great location to explore Boston from, Downtown is very easy to reach via train or bus. Grocery stores and everything else that you need is in walking distance.
The apartment has everything  you need. Convenient to all areas of Boston and easy to find street parking.

The best way to describe this unit is “okay.” It’s in a great location, and for the price, you really can’t go wrong. That said, the unit itself feels a bit cheap, from the furniture to the cooking supplies and especially the renovations, but it served its purpose as a place to sleep. Unfortunately, sleeping was a challenge since the temperature in the Airbnb was permanently set too hot without being able to change it, forcing us to keep the windows open for most of our stay. the view out of the windows is nothing exciting, just a rooftop smoke spot littered with joints and cigs
they also use a 3rd party booking system which is extremely annoying

We had a great stay at Evon's place. Very comfortable and roomy for 4 of us. Evon was very communicative. We didn't cook at all but the kitchen looked to be well equipped.
It was easy parking with the driveway.
Anfritião responde com rapidez e com gentileza. O apartamento estava bastante limpo e corresponde à descrição.

The house was perfect for our quick visit to Boston! Parking during the day wasn’t an issue, but it was a bit tougher to find a spot on the weekend nights. Mateo was super helpful and directed us to an area about 3/4 of a mile away with available parking — it was an easy and safe walk back to the house.

Appartamento molto bello.
Consiglierei di attrezzare la cucina meglio.

Alys was a great host - clear instructions and communication. The rain shower was heavenly and just what I needed after traveling and a long day. The home has a lot of character and I can’t forget the sweet cats! Great stay in a lovely neighborhood.
Victor was an excellent host, great communication and the place was perfect. Will definitely book again!
amazing place. very clean and organized. immaculate condition.  good communication with host.
It was a great place to stay at
If you’re going to a concert at MGM or a Red Sox game, it’s the perfect walking distance! No Uber needed!

This houseboat was perfect for my short stay.  Its at the end of a private dock and quiet.  While near the airport, I only heard planes for a couple hours as flight paths depend on the wind.  Great big windows for plenty of cross breeze, the house boat was clean and well laid out and easy to use.  Great little sundeck on top.  Steps from fleet street and all the north end has to offer.  I stay in Boston once a year for 2-3 days and will not hesitate to rent this houseboat again.  There was no check in to speak of.  They sent the code for the dock gate and the code for the house so I checked in when it suited me.  I asked for a late checkout of 1 pm, they accommodated me to 12 pm which was appreciated.  You are steps from the north end, but it feels like its a world away when you hear the ocean lapping at the boat and sit looking at the glassy harbor.  Excellent stay.  Highly recommended.

What an amazing place to stay in Boston! The neighborhood is quiet, beautiful and public transit is just a few steps away. From your first step onto the property you’ll see how clean and well looked after this building is. Frank and Delilah have put so much care into laying out anything you will need in this space from pamphlets, recommendations to the various amenities listed. There was even a surprisingly substantial library of puzzles and games for families. The owners are incredibly kind, responsive and gave great recommendations on places for food. If you’re looking a quiet and gorgeous location to stay in Boston you’d be silly to ignore this listing.
Everything is great about this place. Price and worth are the highlights.
Alicia’s hospitality is bar none, quick communication, local tips, transportation help, could not ask for a better experience! Very cute cozy central location, comfortable and sparkling clean 👍🏼

Location is great. The unit was clean, nicely finished, and Blueground even provided some household items when we arrived which was nice. Communication was also generally good through their AP.
The unit/building itself does need some work as the cheap construction led to leaks and water damage while we were there. Blueground did what they could and were generally on top of any issues I had but since they don’t manage the apartment complex they are limited in what they can do. They were professional but just keep in mind they act as a middleman for maintenance issues.
Room was really nice and clean! You do share a kitchen and bathroom with 3 other private rooms.
Bernard's house is a great place to stay with great value in a great location.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at the Boiler Room. It was a perfect place to stay and in a great location. We loved everything about it. Eddie and Nayeli were great hosts and thought of everything to ensure that our stay was wonderful. We additionally appreciated the extra precautions they took to ensure our safety. We hope to return one day and will definitely stay here again if it's available!
Nice place to stay, the bathrooms is shared.
Well situated in Boston, well equipped, four people can easily stay there. Good communication with Ping
Immaculate, stylish and very comfortable place. Looking forward to going back.
Right in front of Fenway. Not too big but perfect for a night.

Had a great stay. I was in that part of town because I needed to be near to a friend’s house. I wouldn’t say it is near any destinations from a tourism perspective. Anna was especially friendly and helpful during my stay. Very kind and very attentive. The place itself is truly a home stay. You are sharing their home, not any souped up lodging purchased as an Airbnb income generator: simple, clean, and regular. I believe they let two or three rooms, with a shared bathroom. I was in a room with two twin beds. I would note that they are regulars not XL. Only noting this because I am 6 feet tall.  Shout out to Anna who made me feel quite welcome even though I was only there for one night. I would come back for sure if I needed a stay in the area.
Loved staying here for the night. Very clean place and host was communicative.
The area is really nice, and I loved the atmosphere!
great
host is very nice & informative would stay here again
Uno de los mejores lugares donde me e quedado todo igual como en la foto agua caliente todo limpio buena zona créanme Daryl no me está pagando por esta publicidad jajaj
Easy to check in and very comfortable bed. Quiet and a nice stay.

I loved my stay here! The hosts are easy to communicate with, readily available to answer questions,  and leave very clear instructions and helpful notes for your stay. As a group of 9 girls we felt safe and comfortable the whole time. The home was clean and a perfect layout for a weekend away with friends. I’d definitely stay here again!
Great location and the parking spot was clutch! Would stay again!
Great place for an affordable weekend in Boston.

Kathy's place is in a great location. Walking distance to all the major attractions. This is a basement apartment with two large bedrooms and a small bathroom. The kitchen is fully stocked including great and huge washer and dryer. Kathy was a great communicator and responded immediately to all our questions.
Exactly as expected; responsive host; great stay!

We had a fantastic stay at Kara’s Airbnb! The space was perfect—clean, comfortable, and had everything we needed for a relaxing visit. The location couldn’t be better, with easy access to great restaurants and shopping. It truly felt like a home away from home. We would absolutely recommend this place to anyone looking for a spot in the South End!
We had a great stay with our 6 and 11 year old! The place has a great location and was clean and comfortable. The hosts were super responsive. We’d stay here again!
Spacious and clean!
Home was nice. Location was accessible to local activities and across from Boston Common. Few steps to T if needed.
Convenient location. Very clean. More like a hotel than a traditional Airbnb, minus the concierge service.

The concept of the Airbnb is super cool! It’s almost like your own hotel room, but it’s little deceiving, because the place is not entirely to yourself. Another AirBNB guest was staying in the room next to us, and there was another AirBNB guest upstairs. The upstairs guests were so loud, walking around constantly at 3:00AM in the morning. The room was immaculate though, with a gorgeous restroom. The power went out one night, but Kevin was a quick to resolve the issue. All in all, I’d recommend staying in this Airbnb if you’re on a budget.
An excellent fit for our short trip to Boston for work.
Excellent location! Very walkable and conveniently close to lots of restaurants and shops. This was perfect for our short stay in Boston
Great place.  Excellent location.  Spacious enough for family of 6.  We would return again.

Sehr netter AirBnB`ler. Hat hat uns immer mit Rat und Tat beiseite gestanden und gute Tips für Unternehmungen gehabt. Wir konnten seine Küche mitbenutzen. Das Zimmer ist geräumig und im Bett haben wir sehr gut geschlafen. Das Badezimmer bietet ebenfalls gut Platz. Wir würden sofort wieder bei Booker buchen.

The place was very clean and was in a good location, only a short Uber ride into the heart of Boston or the airport. The check in process was fully self-check in and was easy to follow thanks to Sandra’s detailed instructions.

The apartment was awesome. It was clean, neat, and the location was just great!
Rebecca and Johnson were wonderful to work with and very accommodating. I would highly recommend it!

Leslie was a great host, had great communication with quick responses, offered good food recommendations that were close by. The location was within walking distance of many great food places, as well as the train station. The place itself was cozy and comfortable, a perfect spot to land and relax after a day of sightseeing.
Great location

Great location.  All concerns were handled quickly and efficiently.  Great location.  Clean and well equipped, very reasonable priced. Did I mention the great location?  After checking into your room look for the elevator (if you’re like me and don’t like stairs). Would return and highly recommend. Once again, can’t beat the great location.

The location was very walkable and public transportation was very accessible. We liked having access to Boston Common. So many restaurants within walking distance. The location was also noisy - people on the street at night and construction started early. The walls are very thin and we could constantly hear the neighbor on one side.
I had a very short stay but it was clean and quiet.

Lance and Shelly are very nice hosts in a nice house near Boston metro, which make it easier to discover the city and to go to the airport. They accepted to check-in us in the early morning, we got rid of our heavy luggage and we really appreciate it. We have also liked all the advices and recommandations.

This was an amazing stay. The hosts were incredible and accommodating from being flexible with our arrival to providing fresh baked muffins with honey they make themselves in the morning! The actual unit is quite nice as well. You get your own private floor with a bathroom multiple beds and even a kitchenette. We genuinely did not want to leave! The train is physically four houses down so traveling into the city is a breeze. You truly get more than your money's worth staying here!

Sehr schöne Unterkunft! Die Kommunikation mit Steven war wunderbar und der Check-in sehr einfach. Die Lage hat uns besonders gut gefallen, da man viele Orte in Boston zu Fuß erreichen konnte. Wir würden nochmal buchen

Great host and amenities! Excellent experience overall. Instructions at the room covers pretty much everything you will need to know during your stay. Only have a few minor notes:
- Although both the room and the bathroom are private, the small area between the room and bathroom is still a shared place. As in, other people might be present in this area. You should keep this in mind as you go to and from the bathroom.
- This second point is more of a piece of advice for guests than it is a comment about the room, but make sure to bring your own water to the room. There will be a few water bottles out, but it might not be enough for the night if you’re thirsty, especially with two guests. Mentioning this because we forgot to take this into account before we checked in to the room.
We needed a bed to sleep in. We arrived at 1:30AM. It was perfect and economical. It’s a hostel style setup but we didn’t mind because as a couple we were able to sleep in same room.

Provided exactly what was advertised- nothing less and nothing more.
This is not a cozy home share. It was a very clean apartment built to be a place to crash. Not much space to hang out in the kitchen/living area - but that’s not probably what most people staying near downtown and the hospital plan to do. I will warn that you can hear your neighbors (city apartment).
The 5 pm check-in was awkward if arriving during the day but manageable. Note that the front door is at the end of a dead end street.
There were no amenities except hotel bath soap/shampoo. However, you are steps from many chain restaurants and cafes out the back door and just blocks from other restaurants and groceries. There is souvenir shop out the back that will hold bags for a small fee. Look them up on Bounce or Storeme or Stasher.
Great Place! Great Host!
Loved this Airbnb!   The location is great, the beds are extremely comfortable and the decor is charming!  We will be back!
Great location
Great place to stay in Boston. Walkable to a lot of fun places.
This stay was an absolute bargain for what it offers! Super convenient location, beautiful view and clean. Host was responsive and helpful too!

Description was very to the point and accurate. Easy check in and check out. Great location! We were able to walk everywhere with amazing restaurants nearby. There was no street parking however there is a parking service right next door. We enjoyed our stay:)
I LOVED the location!!  So easy to travel through out the city!

We very much enjoyed our stay! The neighborhood was great, walked to several restaurants nearby. The green line stop was nearby so easy to get anywhere you may want to go. Lihua was such a wonderful host! Breakfast was a bonus and she even let us store our luggage after we checked out. A great place to stay when visiting Boston!
Great location!  If you're looking to stay in a beautiful, and convenient location in Boston this is it.  Great space, communication, and overall stay.  Would recommend.

The apartment was nice and clean, and the instructions to the place was very clear. In addition, I liked the fact that I could check in/get a key as late as 11 pm since my flight was coming in late. With family of 4, It was super useful to have a washer and dryer in the apartment as well. Thank you! I would definitely recommend the place to anyone.
It is very nice house to stay and look around the city.
The house has good location and is near the orange line. And the room is so comfortable also have all necessary facilities.

We loved our stay at this beautiful brownstone! Great location with lots of local shops and restaurants to walk to. The place was clean and provided everything we needed, and our cat enjoyed perching on the window sills to enjoy the views!
Our 2nd stay in a week.  We can't say enough how much we love this place! It is the perfect setting to tour Boston!
Nice Studio with expansive ceilings, right in the center of everything.  Check in was easy.  Perfect for a couple’s stay.

Very clean and spacious unit. Good walkability to train, 15 min train ride to downtown, easy to navigate. Only con was street noise but it did quiet down at night and noise is to be expected in a city.
Great memories made! Eder’s place was great. Very clean, cozy and comfy. Also the location  was perfect and close to everything. Anytime  we had a question Eder was quick to respond.
Great place - great location!
Great space

Property is exactly as described. Location is good, especially if you are there to see baseball games. Communication with the hosts was exceptional. I would say 2 things to keep in mind: there is not elevator in the building and this particular unit faces the rear alley which seems quite noisy on many occasions. It was quite expensive to stay here during my visit (understanding that it is Boston after all) but it did fare very comparable to getting a hotel near Cambridge. In any case, I would not hesitate to stay here again.

This is a nice apartment right in the city! That being said, it is in the city so expect city sounds like dogs and cars and honking. This isn’t a bad thing, just know you’re in the city if you’re from the country like us! It’s honestly nice being in the city to be near the subway station, commuter rail, and Uber. The host was also very responsive and they have an earlier check in time than most Airbnbs!
Decent spot for a night or two!
Great location but super noisy at 5 am due to deliveries to the oyster bar below

The hosts Oliver and Glenn were welcoming and warm. The house and neighborhood was beautiful. The 3rd floor was cozy and nicely decorated. The location is close to everything. We would definitely stay here again.

Wow! What wonderful time we had in Boston.  Jason was a perfectly host This apartment is located North End ( Italian) section of Boston. The place was so cozy,  clean and relaxing.  And only a 2 block walk to all the amazing Italian restaurants! We ate at a different one each night. Also  close the freedom Trail and many historical sights. We loved this place and will be back.
An adorable space. And the hostess was lovely.  I thoroughly enjoyed my stay and the location is wonderful... walking distance to one of may favorite Zen places in Boston... Jamaica Pond!
Amazing space in Back Bay. Very walkable and clean. Room was private and tidy.

We enjoyed our stay with Jack and Jill. The neighborhood was nice, quiet and peaceful. The accommodations were comfortable, clean and private. Jillian was a great host and went above and beyond to make us feel at home. Jack was always happy to see us too. Would recommend.
Great all a round
Ms. Siena is incredibly friendly, and the place we stayed at exudes a delightful blend of comfort and homeliness.

Nos sentimos muy cómodas, como en casa, las camas nos parecieron muy suaves, estaba muy limpio, todo organizado, la cocina estaba completa para preparar destino, comida, zona muy tranquila, nos sentimos seguras al andar, si regreso a Boston definitivamente me volvería alojar con ella
Great stay.  Everything was as described.  Pretty close to the T station.  Would stay again.

Super clean and organized, my partner felt very comfortable and safe. Amazing location, close enough to walk to all the best places and in a safe neighborhoods to get away from the noise and traffic. With off street parking!!

We stayed in this apartment with two small kids. The place is really nice - well equipped kitchen, apartment is easy to enter with a stroller, very comfortable beds.  Surroundings are great as well - easily accessible public transportation, couple of nice playgrounds nearby. Liesl is very helpful and provides a lot of useful information about the area - for that we are especially grateful, since we were new in this city.
Everything was very clean and well-prepared, room is nice, all amenities provided, Tobias is a very nice, helpful person, Roxbury isn't the greatest area but I didn't have any problems
Neat, clean, and quiet. If all you need is a place to crash at night, this is a good choice
The location is great.

I needed a place to stay to reduce my costs of exhibiting for a nonprofit at the BCEC.
This worked for me, one middle aged person.
The stairs are a minor challenge with luggage.
The room was warm enough in fall weather.
Taxis were $17, Ubers $12-22.
It was basic but very clean and comfortable.
Bathroom was large and very clean.
Kitchen, was large and modern.
I managed to make hot ramen soup I brought with me, hot tea and coffee. I was able to easily get an Uber and I got a package delivered there, though I had to retrieve it myself off the side porch.
鄰近車站及許多經典步行可到許多地方很方便，房東也都迅速回覆。

We had a wonderful time staying at their home while visiting Boston this July.  It was 15 minutes to everywhere we needed to be, and the home was well stocked and had everything we needed.  The hosts were great with ocmmunication and check in/out was a breeze.  Thanks for having us!

Penny was an exceptionally thoughtful host who provided us with a detailed overview of the area, what to do, and where to eat. The neighborhood is nestled between Jamaica Pond and the Arnold arboretum. Both within short walking distance. There's easy access to the downtown area and museums with buses and trains. The house is lovely and the room has everything you need to enjoy your stay. The nearby street is full of restaurants, bakeries, cafes, ice cream, and there are even grocery stores nearby. Lovely experience all around.
The place was clean, host was responsive and provided clear instructions. The amenities provided were complete and clean
Clean
Beautiful spot. Very clean. Great amenities.
Better than what we were expecting, and very clean! Thank you
Definitely enjoyed my stay at Max's listing. I would stay there again. It was a very comfy cozy home, great location as well. Thank you for allowing us to stay!

Place was perfect for access to the MGH hospital - only a 6mins walk! Housing had everything you’d need for a lengthy stay (clean bathroom, AC unit in room, full kitchen, etc.). Perfect for students or short term lease!

Superb!  Jonathan's AKBrownstone raises the bar for stays in Boston.  Everything from start to finish was excellent. The space is exactly as described in the listing.  The location was great for walking or public transit. The neighborhood is beautiful and peaceful.  With an awareness that there are other guests in the house sharing the kitchen and bathroom, I highly recommend this to anyone traveling to Boston.
Great house! Definitely recommend!
Great location! Very close to Cambridge and Boston

A cute basement studio in a beautiful and historic area. It’s a small space with the necessary amenities, but works great as a home base if you don’t plan on spending too much time in the room. We definitely enjoyed our stay!
This is a great location! The space is clean and welcoming and it is in the heart of Newbury street. I highly recommend staying here.
Good spot, would highly recommend.
Super cute and clean! And snacks :)

We celebrated a family reunion over the 4th of July weekend. My kids and I loved staying here in Michael’s home. It was perfect for our time together and had every amenity you could think of. We cooked delicious meals in the fabulous kitchen that was well stocked; seasonings, condiments, pots and pans, cutting boards, dishes and flatware. Enjoying our meals on the porch was a hi lite of the weekend together. We loved the location as it was convenient to public transportation and walkable to many area restaurants and coffee shops, as well as grocery stores.
Michael is a wonderful host and communicator . We appreciate his attention to details to make his home so warm and inviting, thank you. We look forward to returning again when we visit Boston!
Great place to stay in the city, not too far from metro stations, comfy bed clean all round, Jay was very responsive and helpful with any questions
It’s my second time staying at Marlene’s place. It never disappoints. She’s fantastic and every time I’m around the area, I will surely stay at her place
The room and common area is great.
Muny's  place is a ver comfy and cozy second home. The location was great. She's gave us so much info about what we can do in the city. Definitely I'll book again at Muny's place

What a lovely space, just a shot drive from all that Boston has to offer.  James and Pierre’s place is gorgeous and perfect for a sweet little escape.  We loved that there was parking...and Nespesso!...even chocolates on the pillow.  The furnishing were modern and comfy.  And James and Pierre were available in moments when we ran into a little snag operating the tv.  Highly recommended!

We had a great stay at The Overlook! Away from the busyness of the rest of the city. Only reason for docking one star would be cell reception from our apartment. We had no cell reception from our room so any calls had to be made from outside the building. Hopefully, this can be fixed easily. Otherwise, a recommended spot to stay in Boston!

A few items to mention:
A) The noise from the surrounding rooms (people walking on the floor) was louder than one would normally expect
B) There was no dresser for guests to place their clothes in one of the bedrooms
C) There was no dish washer soap
D) There is no soap dish/place for shampoo in the shower.
E) The coffee filters for the coffee pot were not the correct size
F) The entrance way is under construction and there were several trip hazards there.
This place was fantastic. Clean. comfortable, big enough for several people. The location was fantastic and you had everything you could need from a travel stand point. Would return again.

Place is exactly like the pictures and a comfortable walking distance to downtown Boston and Chinatown. Billy responded quickly to any questions, making our stay even more pleasant. Would definitely recommend staying here!
Robin's place was eaxactly as it was mentioned. She offers a delicious brekfast, which makes you feel at home.
Well organized, good location.
I enjoyed my stay and hope to come back in February.
Albert was a great host. Great location and very clean place. Would recommend!

Great large apartment in an amazing location. Check-in was easy, the apartment was super clean, beds were very comfortable, and Brian + Heather were great communicators.  We will absolutely check to see if the place is available the next time we come.
La chambre était parfaite pour dormir
Perfect! Thank you :)
A clean, open, peaceful space & a quick Uber to the Red Sox game — we loved our stay!

Nice place. Great location. Grateful for the off street parking. Nick was very accommodating and communicative throughout. Only thing to keep in mind is that you are staying in a basement with people right above you so you will often hear the other residents talking and moving about. But overall great deal.
Acomodação excelente! Tudo certo!
I'll definitely stay at Zack's place next time! Clean and convenient apart with nice view.

awesome location, we went on a self-made bar crawl around the area, right in the city center and so so so much to do. the shower at Lee's is SO nice, the bed was comfortable, and the whole place was very clean.

Love this, great location!
Will definitely be back.

The place was clean and spacious. A cute shared backyard space made for nice evenings outside. Walking distance to the T and small neighborhood shops and restaurants. Not much in the way of kitchen items, be prepared to bring spices and anything to cook with.

Overall, our stay was terrific. We did have some issues (air wasn’t working properly) with the initial property that we booked. However, the management company was very responsive and actually upgraded our stay by giving us another property to stay at within the same building so at the end of the day we were very happy with our second location over our first.
The location is perfect and close to everything.
Stayed here several times - always pleasant and enjoyable!
Would stay here again!

This apartment is an ample 2 bedroom with 2 baths. Nice hot water in the shower and very preety. The bed and pillows are good and the kitchen has the utensils you need if you were to cook.  It is also in the center of the action: restaurants, cafes, bars and shops.   This is fabulous if, like us, you are staying only for a short time and want to enjoy Boston.  However, for this very advantage, there is the disadvantage that, at times, it can be very loud during the night. We heard cleaning trucks, drunks, college kids partying (it is a college town), until 2 or 3 am.  We slept with ear plugs and this helped.  Everything considered, we still enjoyed stay here and would recommend it.
Super great location, hotel staff was friendly. Recommend for anyone who won’t be in the room much because the street noise is loud but it was perfect for us
Stylish, clean and cozy apartment located in downtown.  Easy access to shops and restaurants. The hosts were great — quick to respond, clear instructions, and accommodating.

This was an amazing stay for my wife and I! The home is clean, safe, and well-decorated/furnished. Everything is as advertised (perhaps even better?!). We felt so comfortable and right at home, and it is a perfect location to walk to anything in the city.
The hosts are amazing and perfectly communicative as well. We had an easy check-in and out, and they provided us with great suggestions for our visit in the city.
We highly recommend this stay!
Very clean and neat.  Very safe feeling.  Great nearby neighborhood to wander and relax. Coffee, bakeries, etc. Owner very responsive and helpful when needed.  Thumbs up.
Apartment was great, it has lots of restaurants near it & a walking distance to other places. It’s just we didn’t like how the check-in time is too late.

Clean, comfortable, bright and light. Well stocked and in a wonderful location. Greatly enjoyed the neighborhood, the central location and the close proximity to the Commons. Convenient to have a larger grocery store across the street, and excellent coffee shops nearby.

Peter and Carol are the best, they made us feel welcome in their suite. The place was very quiet, spotless, well equipped, beautifuly decorated and the beds were so comfortable. They provide local informations which are very helpful. If you have a car, it is easy to park in the street. We will definitely stay there again!

I had pretty high expectations after reading the numerous rave reviews. All I can say is, they are all correct! Perfect, beautiful accommodations full of thoughtful touches. The room was clean and very comfortable. Bill and Maureen are expert hosts that go above and beyond to ensure their guests have a wonderful stay. We really appreciate the hospitality!!

Terry’s place was beautiful and perfect for my colleagues and I while in town. We each had our own space and the communal areas had everything we needed to feel at home. Bonus- the beds were incredibly comfortable!!!

Indy saved the day when my family was switching last minute from another Airbnb she worked with me as I waited for Airbnb to send me a credit to book due to our experience at another location. Indy was kind and had fast communication!
Indy’s space feels like home. From the moment you walk into the space it is clean and inviting! She thought of everything to make our stay as comfortable as possible. The space is perfect for a large family such as ours with 4 bed rooms and 4 super prestine bathrooms.
There are two private outdoor spaces which is great to enjoy coffee. The kitchen was fully stocked with all cooking essentials, snacks and even a bottle of wine!
The laundry area was great and we were able to wash clothes before returning home.
We left a few items and Indy immediately contacted us and offered to ship them to our home! Indy is an amazing host and we will definitely be booking here again when we come back to the Boston area!
Friendly hosts, clean and comfortable stay!
Cute apartment in a brownstone on a real Boston street, South End is well located for everything. Warm and friendly welcome

The place was pretty solid. Got checked in without any troubles and it's location was incredible. Just a short walk from BackBay and most of downtown Boston. The room is on the smaller side so I wouldn't recommend it if you're going there with more than 2 people but otherwise a pretty decent place.
We had a wonderful stay at Fatima‘s! The place is spacious, clean and comfortable. The neighborhood is centrally located, and there was plenty of parking. I would absolutely stay again in the future!

Enrique’s place was immaculate, clean, and comfortable! It smelled brand new and was the perfect stay for my partner and I! The host communicated well and helped with anything I needed. Highly recommend and will be staying again!

Very warm and friendly people and place. Unique setting- a touch of France as they say. We shared interesting conversation as we were served a delicious (optional) breakfast with wonderful coffee choices.  I would stay there again.

Paul was there when we arrived and showed us around the loft, making us feel right at home! The loft was exactly as described and very spacious. It was excellently-located, right next to a SL4/5 stop, and in a quiet area. This location felt like an incredible value and I would wholeheartedly recommend the loft to others.
I really enjoyed my stay at Billy’s place. He was incredibly responsive and helpful whenever I ran into WiFi questions. The location is nice and central, and the place had everything I needed.
The spacious accommodations at Kelly's home were clean and comfortable.  It was a great place for us to stay while visiting family in the area.
Great place

The Inn is well located and the rooms are clean and comfortable. After checking in, leaving my luggage, and heading into town I was informed via telephone that due to a double-booking I would be required to move into another suite as the other booking was longer than mine. I was also informed that my belongings had been already packed and removed from the suite. We received a room upgrade to compensate for the inconvenience. The staff member we dealt with was professional and considerate. While thankful for the upgrade, the removal of my belongings without my knowledge or consent was not the correct course of action. That incident excepting, we enjoyed our stay at the Inn.

This was an A+ experience and stay.  The home was as- advertised and more.  It was pristinely clean and had all the comforts of home.  Our family of 8 was made to feel comfortable and taken care of.  The host, Alex, was extremely personable and helpful.  He went above and beyond to ensure we all had everything we needed for our stay.  On behalf of Make A Wish Massachusetts and Rhode Island, thank you for your amazing accomodations and responsiveness!!!

We felt that the pictures don’t remotely represent what the place looked like when we got there. Getting to the room was not easy and when we walked in we walked right into a bathroom that I would not feel comfortable taking a shower in. The room was dingy and drab and needed a lot of work. The electricity was not wired safely and there was no smoke detector in the room. We stayed. Would not recommend this room.
Great location with instant access to the T.
Such a nice host and great location next to the subway station. Thank you for the warmest host😭
I’ve liked each time I’ve stayed here

Eileen’s has made a home away from home.  Comfortable, inviting, relaxing and close to all of the best stuff!  Great for a long term stay as well as a shorter stay.  You will not lack for anything and if you think you do, just ask Eileen.  Plus, the added benefit of fresh garden vegetables.  When we come to Boston again, we will hope to stay at Eileen’s Airbnb.
Nice place and location.

Very clean and spotless. We stayed in the Chestnut room which is the only room on the first floor so we got some privacy. The shared common spaces were beautiful. We enjoyed our stay at Boris and Susan’s place and will be coming back for sure.
wow, the location is great,  2 to 3 blocks to the old state building and Quincy market.  The place is clean and well equipped,  check in and out were super easy!

From the check-in instructions to questions we had during the stay, the host’s communication was sharp and very punctual. The room was very clean and the bathroom facilities were impeccable. At no point during the stay did we feel anything but safe and at home.

Very cozy + artsy spot in JP. Loved the neighborhood and highly recommend checking out the Jamaica Pond during sunset.
Chris + Kristina were quick with responses and reached out to see if we needed help with anything. Actually enjoyed their neighborhood the most out of all the places we ventured off to in Boston. Highly recommend for a couple or a single for their space.

My second stay! Clean and clutter free. Simply yet stylishly furnished. Great king bed, fluffy towels and nice linens. Good kitchen and cooking supplies. Key coded private entry. Personable and responsive hosts.
Lihua’s place was clean and exactly as described. Sunflower is a lovely housekeeper! Good value for the location.

This is a cute little guest apartment in the back of the house.  Nice decor, clean, and the family could not have been more welcoming. Riyo went out of her way to provide snacks and information on the area! Great place to stay and a short Uber/Lyft/Public Transportation ride away from many of Boston’s main attractions.
The apartment was clean and convenient.
Great experience staying there!

Emily and Jake were the wonderful hosts! Their place is immaculate, well designed, and modern on the inside with an incredible garden on the outside. My parents stayed here for a weekend visit to Boston and they could not stop raving about the garden. Thank you so much Emily and Jake for a wonderful experience!
Good location and very close to Boston Common
Great simple room in the South End.
Perfect place to stay on a business trip to Boston.  I would highly recommend this place!

If you’re looking for a place close to a lot of great eateries and wants to stay in historical Beacon place. This is the place! We chose this because it’s only 7 minutes away (walking) to MGH. We didn’t want a hassle of rental car and parking.
The place was exactly as described, we really enjoyed our stay there! Wonderful and responsive host, and location was amazing!

The space was absolutely immaculate. Great host, always responsive. Room is stylish and has everything you need for a weekend exploring Boston. We even walked to Fenway from the room, so the location is a great jumping off point. You'll be happy you picked this place.

Visiting daughter for graduation in Boston. Found this Airbnb in nice neighborhood and better pricing than hotels. 20 to 30 minutes from south and north end in Uber.
Place is well maintained. We used mainly to shower and sleep as we were in activities every day since early.
To many rugs and protective covers for floors and furniture. For some maybe very restrictive since you can’t wear shoes inside house, furnitures are covered up. 1/2 bathroom is very small. Main bathroom had body soap and shampoo, towels and double sink.
The stay served us well in nice friendly neighborhood. Ubers can take long for pickup. For Airport we reserved from night before and driver was 10 minutes early.
It is a nice area and home if it fits your travel plans it is a good option.

We couldn't find a better host for our trip to Boston. Robert and Rocco are so welcoming that it's hardly describable. You have to meet them! He gave us helpful tips for dining and sightseeing.    His house is nice and neat. And I can only repeat: the bed is very comfy. Thanks again Robert!
The host communicated well, getting in and out was easy. Everything was is walking distance so the stay was really worth the value. Thanks! We’ll be back!
Excellent stay. The place is perfect in a great location.  Liya was a great host, and made everything easy with great communication and response. Highly recommend.

My family stayed here for four days. Jonathan’s place was very cozy and warm. The bathroom was clean. It was nice to have good coffee every morning . It was nice to have convenient transportation and easy parking.
A great little loft in a great location.

It was just like the pictures. Close to the airport, there is a Dunkin donuts 2 min walking. The place was clean and cozy.
I’m definitely come back!
Great place. Dog friendly. Great backyard. Spotless. Great house!
Fantastic all around.  The location can't be beat.  Modern decor, clean and very comfortable.  Can't recommend it enough!
It was good and easy

Came from California, first time in Boston. This unit was clean, spacious, comfortable and since it was freezing outside the heater was left on upon our arrival. Beds comfy, beautiful layout, and most importantly a wonderful location. I attended both a concert and Celtics game at TD garden and this Airbnb was within 10 minutes. Found good restaurants on yelp all within 10 minutes. Did not need a rental. Host replied promptly and check in was very smooth. I would definitely stay here again.

This apartment is beautiful--new construction and spotlessly clean.  The kitchenette ( small refrigerator with freezer, sink, microwave and coffee maker) was so convenient and well-designed, and the washer/dryer was an amazing amenity.  Something that meant a lot to me as a woman travelling alone was that this apartment, although totally separate from the family's living space, was still connected enough to make me feel completely secure, unlike a hotel, where I sometimes feel rather vulnerable.
Perfect location. The place was spotless. Beds very comfortable. We will definitely stay again.
Cozy little spot

Casimiro has created an amazing space to share and I highly recommend this Airbnb!  The amount of instruction & labeling within the space was so helpful and informative.  The bathroom is stunning.  Street parking was easy and accessible.  Location wise, it’s a short drive to get into downtown Boston and there’s many walkable restaurants nearby.
Perfect for a stay in Boston, especially if you have business or want to do something in the city center!

Jolie maison dans un beau quartier
Bien située
Très bonne literie
Je recommande

My fiancé & I went for a night to stay in Boston. Went downtown during the day beside check in, enjoyed our day in the parks/surrounding areas shopping as well as dining. Then once we checked in to the Airbnb, we walked the path to some bars for dinner & drinks. Reminded me Goodwill Hunting with Leonardo DiCaprio, & Robert Williams. The & scenery were incredible.
We had a great stay & had no complaints. If we weren’t staying with family the rest of the week, I would’ve loved to stay & enjoy more of the Airbnb!
Kelly was an amazing host and their place is amazing — great location, we walked everywhere and the place itself is gorgeous and the amenities are amazing!

It was wonderful staying at Konrads! We absolutely fell in love with the place and appreciate Konrad’s kindness, especially when we accidentally locked the airbnb keys in the rental car place when returning.
Terrific, spacious apartment in central location - just right across from a T stop. Healing Homes was very responsive and helpful….highly recommend!

Probably the best Airbnb stay I’ve had!! Tim’s place was extremely clean, well stocked with just about anything you’d need, comfortable bedding and couch, great work space, and the bus runs just outside the front door. This place served as a great home base during our week long visit to Boston. Definitely staying here next time I come to Boston!!

it's an older hotel nestled into a neighborhood with lots of more expensive  hotels. skip the more expensive hotels and stay here, especially  if you are there to sightsee. it's a great value with easy public parking across the street.
Příjemné ubytování blízko centra Bostonu. Pro 4 lidí v pohodě, pro 5 už ne.

Die Unterkunft liegt in einer schönen,ruhigen und grünen Lage .Es war schon bei der Ankunft ein wohliges Gefühl durch den
bezaubernden Gartenweg zum Gästehaus zu gehen .Es sieht genauso aus wie auf den Fotos und eigentlich noch schöner.Der morgendliche direkte Blick und Ebene Weg in den Garten,war so wohltuend und schön.Das Gästehaus ist zwar direkt angekoppelt an das Haupthaus aber wir hatten absolut unsere Privatsphäre.
Ann und Esther hatten für uns Müsli,Kaffee und Milch bereit gestellt.Das Müsli war köstlich.Bis zur U-Bahn sind es gemütliche 10 Minuten und man kommt überall gut hin. Vom Flughafen haben wir uns ein Uber genommen, die Fahrt hat ca 30 Minuten gedauert und 30 $ gekostet.
Leider hatten wir nur 3 Tage Zeit,für einen Aufenthalt in Boston ist die Unterkunft von Ann &Esther eine wirkliche Perle. Vielen Dank nochmal für den schönen Aufenthalt

Marie was a great Airbnb host who always looked out for my interests and constantly dropped by the apartment to refill cooking and cleaning equipment. She was very kind about my early leave from the Airbnb and made sure to give friendly reminders about updated roomates and times to take out the trash
Wonderful little space to stay! It is noisy, but we were able to sleep no problem. Shower and water pressure are amazing!

Great place to stay in Boston. Location good - Getting into town is easy via the T line or by cab. The place itself was a clean, good size basement with a good shower. Very friendly hosts who left us lots of drinks and food in the fridge for our arrival!
Everything was great! A very kind host, really thought of everything.
Clean apartment and nice location.
Great hospitality and very clean. I would recommend this to someone going to the Boston area.
Amazing location. Nicely furnished apartment with everything we needed. Would definitely stay here again.

This house was the absolute best location in beacon hill. We were able to walk to everything and the surrounding houses were so beautiful. Norah’s place was very clean and cozy, and the beds were also very comfortable. This place is in the basement so if you have large suitcases it might be hard to get down the narrow stairs, and there isn’t any closet space to hang things up, but overall it had everything we needed and would absolutely stay again!

The location was super convenient - near the T, a grocery store, and downtown. However, note that the unit is in downtown crossing, not the financial district as advertised. It's a 2 min walk from the DTX station.
Boston's a major city and so it's unfortunate but expected that there are many struggling people experiencing homelessness, but there tended to be more near the unit than in more touristy areas like the Waterfront, downtown, or Back Bay.
The area also gets really quiet and a little sketchy late at night so be wary if you are traveling alone.
Keyless entry is seamless. The unit itself was pretty clean. Nice, glass shower, and the unit has great AC!
There is laundry in the building for $2.50 each cycle.
Overall, the place is solid and has all the basics, but don't expect anything extra - you'll have to go out and buy all cooking supplies (including salt/pepper and oil) and even hand soap.
Great location and a great host!
Convenience due to closeness to the train station. Good, clean place to stay.

Great location, we enjoyed our stay in Boston immensely and the location and hospitality made it a very special and enjoyable trip. Damon was very proactive and helpful in advance of the trip and checked in to see all was ok while we were there, so we felt very well looked after throughout our stay. I would strongly recommend to anyone. Thanks again Damon!

Comfortable. Good location. But misleading amenities and less than responsive host. Washing machine took my quarters but would not start. Host contacted but reported that machine would not be fixed until later in the week after I checked out. Half-hearted attempt to return the money that the machine ate. Wifi was spotty - I had to use my cell service for my phone to get connected to internet. Listing did not mention it was a fourth floor walkup on narrow stairs which was a challenge for carrying luggage. So I would have rated it higher if I didn't need WiFi or laundry or assistance from the host.
Fabulous environment and great views. The hospitality and customer service were great. Close to many restaurants and we loved the Warren Tavern and the Sorrell bakery. We will be back

It was nice stay for us and it was perfect size for our 6 adults.  The only negative comment we had was the two guest bedrooms (not the master) had beds that are somewhat short and our male friends who are not overly tall (6 ft) felt the beds were too short.  Otherwise the home was modern, nicely remodeled. Very comfortable beds.  And Daryl is always so responsive !!
Great place for a group of friends! Not ideal if you're planning on getting any significant amount of sleep - the bar below is very active regardless of the day of the week.

It was very clean and easy to get to downtown. They also had a variety of different types of amenities for the number of people. They were quick to reply and tried to resolve issues quickly. I would stay at this location again when visiting Boston! Thank you!

Very cozy room- warms up really quickly w/ the heater on. Narrow stairs to walk up, but Sophia provides you w/ toiletries, towels, and iron/ironing board/steamer to help anybody who wants an affordable stay when interviewing at MGH nearby. Very close walk to the hospital along w/ several nice restaurants. Easy to get to downtown or Chinatown for all the food options. Sophia offered sites of interest to check out during my stay. For the price would recommend to any interviewee (it's expensive to go for residency interviews!).

Joseph’s home is very comfortable for large groups! Beds are comfy! Check in and Check out process is a breeze! Joseph was very attentive and responded very quickly to any questions or requests! His Home is in a great quiet and safe location! Would definitely rent here again if I am ever in Boston again! Thanks Joseph for everything!

Beautiful accommodations with many luxuries. I had the room downstairs with the shared bathroom (with great shower) right next door. Quiet in general and you’re sharing with only one other room (1-2 others) though the shower or washing machine is heard if used late at night. Bed super comfortable and after exploring all day there was a nice selection of steaming shows on tv. I would like to visit in warmer weather to take advantage of the patio. But it’s only a few minutes to the Commons. I loved the neighborhood with its charm and great eateries. Thanks to Carolyn & Nicolas for letting me leave my bags as my flight was late afternoon. About 6 minute walk to red line then shuttle bus if flying out of Boston Logan
Great location, easy access to the rest of Boston, beautiful unit.
Great location within walking distance of so many great neighborhoods and attractions. Shirt drive from the airport. Was perfect for dropping our son off at college.
Jef was great about everything.  He was very good about sending messages, the air bnb was just as described and it was perfect for me.

Elena is truly a super host. She is very kind and responsive. We didn’t have any issues while staying at her residence. The insides of the house, the patio and the neighborhood is great. It is just 10 mins walk from the beautiful Jamaica Pond. Lora’s of places to eat and everything is at walking distance. However, since the apartment has lot of beautiful artifacts and glasswork, be careful with a toddler or a child.
Thanks Elena for the great stay.

Photos accurately reflect the space. Great walkable neighborhood with lots of nearby restaurants and grocery options. Quiet building with access to bus/train just steps away. Private outdoor space was a nice bonus for a city space. Michael was a clear and responsive communicator.
Enjoyed our stay. Bed was comfortable and room had just the right amount of space. Parking was difficult at times but manageable.

our stay was wonderful! this is a huge space with  little clutter. clean and perfect location. the only thing was in the middle bedroom the windowsill on both windows were a little broken. but it didn't have any effect on our good time!! thanks so much for having us.

Bonne communication de l'hôte avant et pendant le séjour. Appartement plutôt étroit pour 8 personnes. Nous n'avons pas apprécié dormir au sous-sol à cause de l'humidité de l'endroit et de l'escalier étroit en colimaçon pour s'y rendre. Situé à 10 minutes de marche du métro donc intéressant. Présence de 2 parcs à proximité pour les enfants. Pas de télévision et de câble, donc prévoyez apporter des DVDs pour les enfants afin d'utiliser le projecteur au besoin!

Amazing loft!!  Really well done. I’ve stayed at more than a few airbnbs and this company does it right. They are quick to respond and the apartment was perfect. I asked about a prior review and they fixed the issues which made me have confidence in booking. Best part of the stay was the fact that they donate a chunk of the profits to families getting surgery at hospitals nearby. Pretty cool concept !
Peter’s place was perfect for our stay in Boston. Walkable, close to the T and street parking a bonus!   We hope to be back soon!

This was a great place to stay! Bv was communicative, the location was right in the middle of everything, and the room was comfortable and clean. Even the inconvenience of a shared bathroom was largely compensated for by having a kitchenette with a sink in the room. I would definitely stay here again!
Très bon séjour, hôte réactif. Un peu bruyant un matin mais le centre ville est facilement accessible (à pieds et en transport) et l’airbnb est propre.
Exactly as described, and spotless. Comfy bed and very accommodating host. Happy to chat and hang, but also happy to give you privacy.

Hotel was in a prime location next to the event venue we were in town for. Loved being able to explore the Arts District and not having to Uber. Room was comfortable and the hotel itself has a really cool vibe.
Spacious, quiet, well appointed and exceptionally clean - a perfect base for a weekend in Boston. The off-street parking was a big plus. Short walk to several good restaurants.

We have stayed in many excellent Airbnbs over the past 10 years with great hosts.  Teej and Marilyn are without any doubt top of our list.   Their apartment is extremely comfortable, very well equipped, close to transports to many areas of Boston.  They are kind, thoughtful and very responsive.  We arrived in a heatwave and they brought provisions to ensure that we didn’t become dehydrated.   When it looked like a couple of Ubers had let us down,  Teej jumped into his car and was ready to drive us.  We cannot praise them highly enough.  If you’re going to Boston,  stay here.

This was a really unusual and fun stay in Boston and I would recommend it. It is very well set-up in a safe and not too large boat yard. The views are great and the USS Constitution is only a few minutes walk. Breakfast is provided by vouchers at a local restaurant just a short walk away. To walk into Boston from Constitution Wharf takes around 20 minutes.
Nice place within walking distance to everything.
Great location if you have a short time in Boston and want to walk the Freedom trail and see the famous sites.

Die Wohnung ist nicht nur gemütlich und geschmackvoll eingerichtet, sie ist auch praktisch und hat alles was sie braucht, von genügend Haken im Bad über Bügel und Küchenutensilien. Sheila war stets freundlich und hilfsbereit. Wir haben uns sehr über bereitgestelltes Wasser, Obst, Milch und Kekse gefreut. Mit der Straßenbahn kamen wir gut in die Stadt, die Regionalbahn und die Busse waren nah. Ein toller Supermarkt ist nur 5 Minuten entfernt. Viele Restaurants sind fußnah zu erreichen. Wir hatten eine schöne Zeit.
This place was large and clean --  excellent value for money in a prime location in downtown Boston next to the Commons and Chinatown. We enjoyed staying there very much.
Great service.  We had a couple issues that were out of everyone's control and the team was quick to respond and offer solutions.  Location and views were great as well.
Our second stay, and a wonderful experience once again! Marlene is a wonderful host who always goes above and beyond. The place is clean and conveniently located, complete privacy!
Love it!  Walking distance to Chinatown and Newbury. It's a really quiet area so we really love it here!

Jessica’s space is just gorgeous, in a lovely older neighborhood in walking distance to great coffee shops and a historical cemetery (Dorchester North Burying Ground). I also love that she keeps a wide assortment of teas that guests may enjoy. The shared spaces she’s curated are beautiful, eclectic, and very homey, and my one regret is that I was too busy at my conference to full take advantage of the house’s many amenities. Jessica herself is very sweet, knowledgeable, and willing to answer questions and help her guests make the most of their stay in Boston.
Thank you so very much!❤️
Location location location. This is the place to stay in Boston. Jogged to the commons, walked to T stops.

금액은 호텔등과 대비할때 약간 높은 감은 있으나 모든 면에서 만족스러운 집이었습니다.
교통편의 숙박의 안락함 시설의 편이성등 추천합니다
Great location in the north end  , very clean ! Spacious rooms , bathroom is on a different level and down stairs has a smell of fresh paint .
A nice small apartment that has everything that one needs. Central and very clean. Nick was always very responsive and helpful.
Great space for a easy commute to Harvard

El piso estaba en una ubicación inmejorable, en pleno centro de Boston Downton.. Las estancias eran amplias, con armarios y almacenaje, y la decoración bonita. En general es un buen piso.
Como aspectos negativos: Cocina muy pequeña, la nevera no abria., el menaje muy limitado. Los baños muy viejos y pequeños. Las cortinas del salon no eran opacas.
La calle hacia mucho ruido y nos despertaron todos los días, probablemente siendo verano es más normal.
Con respecto a la ubicación, el supermercado más cercano se encontraba a más de 10 min andado que es bastante inconveniente.

A great place from which to explore the city. Great restaurants and coffee shops close by. Parking garage walkable from the apartment. Best of all the hosts were immediately responsive if we had a concern.
Amazing place to stay, the location is perfect. So much to do nearby and it’s a very walkable spot. The hosts were great and very responsive to any questions.
Second time staying here loooooove it! great location and close to transportation! one of my fav places to stay in boston!
Great neighborhood, nice but small apartment, perfectly suited to a single or a couple primarily out most of the time.
Riyo never disappoints.  High expectations created after my first stay are always met
Jurek did provide easy check-in to his spacious appartment which is very well equiped and located close to a train station. I would love to come back here...
Clean and good location
This place was absolutely amazing; it did not disappoint. Tim was an amazing host!!
Great apartment in fantastic location!

nice room in a nice area. close to public transport which made it easy to get around and back.
instructions for arrival and entry were clear.
Great area!  No issues with the shared bathroom. 10 minutes from everything in Boston
Just what I needed. Clear and convenient.
A *beautiful* find in a quiet neighborhood-within walking distance of everything; we very much enjoyed our stay!
A very nice and warm hearted couple!They do have a wonderful house and a convenient transportation!We do have a nice trip there!
Great place to stay in Boston.  Easy access to the T and great restaurants coffee shops in the area.
Place was clean and offered everything we needed and more. Excellent communication and great amenities. Recommend and will use again.

Yes, the apartment is clean, in a convenient location,and the hosts are responsive. However, there is certainly not “lots of light” in the apartment nor is the kitchen “fully stocked”. It is depressingly dark and the kitchen has at a minimum basic appliances. The refrigerator is super noisy as is the apartment - can hear neighbors. The location is convenient, but please be aware that it is on a dead-end street and during our stay we encountered many shady characters hanging around - including someone who tried to enter the building with us. The 5pm check-in is totally inconvenient versus the more common 3pm check-in which makes the $50 early check-in fee a bit much. There is also a 10 am check-out which is about an hour earlier than most Air B&b’s we’ve stayed in. We will not stay here again.
Overall it was a great place to stay and the hosts always responded in a timely manner! It was beautiful and spacious!
Great place with close proximity to most tourist destinations and restaurants.

We really enjoyed our stay at Jason's apartment! We would definitely recommend a stay for your next trip to Boston. The area was perfect to explore the city.  Check in logistics were really easy to navigate and the communications prior to our arrival were very helpful and appreciated! A terrific property and host!
Very nice and clean place, great location and prompt communication.

It is in a fantastic location that allows people to visit Boston without renting a car. We were able to walk everywhere, and the apartment is located on a beautiful street that transports you to a different time and period.
The apartment is very basic. Bring coffee grounds and toiletries. Or you can do what we did and eat every meal out, which was not bad at all, given the options that were within walking distance.

As stated a perfect location for exploring Boston. Great apartment for our 4 day stay. All previous comments fully endorsed. Did not get to meet Trisha but Steen was very helpful resolving a minor issue instantly. had a little difficulty with contact on initial arrival perhaps an alternative telephone number could be supplied. Would not hesitate to recommend or return on our next visit to Boston.  Thanks.

Estuvo muy bueno alojarse en el departamento de Foster. Llegamos en tren desde la estación Back bay y está muy cerca. El barrio es muy lindo y cerca de todo. El departamento está impecable y es muy funcional; lo único que marcaría, es que pusieron un “aire acondicionado” en la única ventana del departamento, el cual es muy ruidoso y anula la ventana (no figura en las fotos), pero no representa un problema.

Location, location, location! If you love to see a city by foot and enjoy all the yummy food to offer then this is your spot! The beautiful apartment is located in the heart of the North End... Hello Pasta & cannoli’s! Just a short walk you’ll hit the wharf... ferry to Provincetown! Around the corner check out Quincey market... lobster rollsssss. And just a short stroll to the famous Union Oyster house.... mmm chow-dah! Oh and Regina’s pizza! Seriously the perfect spot for a weekend getaway or a week long vaca! Place was sparkling clean, host was very responsive and accommodating (bag storage/ extended checkin & checkout) easy checkin and safe neighborhood. If this place is available don’t think twice and stay!

My friends and I had a great stay at Charlesgate Suites. The location is excellent—just a short walk to fantastic restaurants and notable landmarks. Despite being a studio, the space was more than enough to comfortably accommodate four adults. Both the kitchen and bathroom were spotless upon arrival.
Ken was an outstanding host. It was pleasure staying here.
Host was very responsive and helpful.

We absolutely loved our stay with Jessy and Diego! They were incredibly accommodating and helpful throughout our visit, making everything easy and comfortable. The space was spotless, cozy, and perfectly located with convenient access to the city. You can tell they put a lot of care into making guests feel welcome. Highly recommend both the home and Jessy and Diego as exceptional hosts!

Jesse’s place was fantastic as a crash pad for a weekend in Boston. Very walkable. Outlets accessible near the bed for charging, good neighborhood.
The bathroom is very tight, but extremely clean studio in a
quiet building.
This flat has an AC unit and cools off fairly quickly in the summer.
I would totally stay here again!

Great Airbnb in Beacon Hill; walkable and charming area close to all the action in downtown Boston. Huanan have incredibly clear check-I’m instructions that helped my trip go smoothly. I’d come back here next time I’m in Boston!

Cannot say enough good things about Dawn and her hospitality.
She is an excellent host and included menus to local area restaurants, a PPE station and Public Transportation maps which were all extremely useful and thoughtful. Very well stocked kitchen which exemplifies her thoughtfulness. Her place is very comfortable. Good location 5 minutes from public transportation. Looking forward to our next trip in the area!
干净、舒适的居所，杨老师人很好！早餐有八宝粥，配自家咸菜！温暖！
Terrific accommodations.  Beautiful sunsets a top of the boat and walking distance to so many restaurants and shops.  It’s as good as sleeping in a house boat gets. Will definitely do it again.

Pictures of the room don’t do it justice, the whole place is really cosy, the bathroom is beautiful and the house is located in a lovely neighborhood next to the beautiful arboretum.
Jone is a lovely host, would 100% go back.
Great location and bigger room than expected. The process was smooth and the host was very accommodating and responsive.
还不错。
Cute little studio and very clean. Loved the area it was in!
Exactly what we were expecting. Our son decided to stay with us last minute and our host quickly accommodated our needs.
If I come back to Boston, I won't stay anywhere but here👍🏻❤️ Thank you Kelly& Chris!
Super lovely place to stay with great and easy access to local transit. Jef is a kind host and checked in during the stay to make sure things were going well. Would definitely stay here again.

We enjoyed our stay at Terry and Mindy’s place. It had all the amenities needed and well appointed kitchen and bedrooms. We were there over the weekend and were able to find plenty of parking on the cross street at all times. The hosts are super responsive and flexible.
good place to stay
Very convenient location to “T”. Beautiful walking neighborhood. Would stay in area again

A brilliant location for walking around Boston. Very clean and comfortable space. A little bit business-like for Airbnb- no personal touches but that is being critical. An excellent place to stay in Boston for our two nights. Please note that the washing machine/tumble dryer facilities are not in the apartment but shared in the building. They cost $2.50 a load and it has to be paid in quarters only. Lovely to have the facilities there- just would be good to have the information. I would recommend a stay here.
The hotel was a normal hotel. It’s in a great, walkable area with lots to do. Price is definitely high, but somewhat in line with other Boston hotels.
Great place and great host!
Excellent location!

This was my first AirBnB experience. I would say that everything was accurate as far as the description of the property. Bill provides a clean room with a TV and a private bathroom. There are very few places that offer a private bathroom in Boston. There is a small area for snacks, tea, and coffee. Bill also offers suggestions where to eat around South Boston and the surrounding areas. The property is easily accessible by bus or ride sharing. This should not be an issue because Boston is a walking city. I would stay here again. The
Comfortable space.

There are so many positive things that I can say, but the # 1 is that you definitely get more than what you pay for. It is a VERY lovely place. A lot of room. $15-20 uber ride to city (which is about a 20 min ride). It was very clean, very neat and just perfect for our mother daughter weekend (total of 4). Briefly saw the host, very nice. Place was great...have not one negative thing to say.

Clean, bright space right on Newbury Street. Host was communicative and gave helpful
Instructions along the way.

My son stayed there, not myself, but I booked so must review for him. He asked me to say that it was a really nice property, good location and kind host. Clean and well maintained. He's texting this to me jetlagged, but the bottom line is: All good!
Really nice place, very close to the orange line and very clean and comfortable.

The cottage is attractive and the location is both quiet and central.  Hosts were very helpful and provided lots of information about Boston-area attractions, Dedham restaurants, etc.  We were afraid the unpaved private road leading up to the cottage might be a bit challenging for our low-clearance car, but we made it just fine.
Very clean apartment, super helpful and communicative. Great in a pinch. Thanks again!

Mary’s place is extremely cozy and very well decorated. We really appreciated the Nespresso machine and the inviting scents around the home.
In terms of occupancy, the beds were closer in size to Full than they were to Queen (during our stay at least), so the couple in our party had a tight fit to contend with.
There are two stools around the kitchen table and two chairs around the table in the living room, so the place is more suited to a smaller party.
Free street parking is available, but guests should be advised that parking near the property can be hard to find after 5:00pm.

There are some very nice restaurants in the area, and several bodega convenience stores within walking distance, but finding a larger grocery store may require a drive.
The local T station is conveniently located only a few minutes’ walk away.

Overall, we had a pleasant stay.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay! There are some issues that others have pointed out (toilet roll holder completely falling out of the wall) that the host has seemingly ignored and not fixed. The wall beside the bed is filthy dirty and needs a clean and paint.
Pros:
Great location- right downtown. Although there are homeless around we were not bothered or kept awake
Cute decor
Functional space
Clean
Great communication
Overall would 100% definitely stay again!
Perfect location- Easy walk to all the sights. We were a group of four adults and the space was very comfortable. Would definitely stay here again!
All good
Just what we were looking for! Clean appartement in downtown Boston, would stay again.
Small, quiet room close to the city. Very kind host!

Susie was so accommodating and friendly! We will definitely keep this place in mind if we ever travel back to the Jamaica Plains area.
Thank you Susie for a safe,cute place to stay and for being extremely helpful if we had questions!
We had an excellent stay! The apartment was clean, well decorated, comfortable, and located in a prime area of Boston.  We will definitely stay again!

Loved our stay at Susan’s place in JP! Friendly and helpful host and we walked to all our favorite restaurants. T stop and park super convenient. Kitchen was so thoughtfully stocked, it was great not to have to immediately deal with breakfast as there was coffee and English muffins. Thanks for a nice stay!
The bed is so comfortable! Great stay and real close to the T!
What a nice way to start our vacation! The apartment was walking distance to downtown adventures. We would stay here again!!!
Great place to stay! Quiet and spacious
