Alex has been a great host and was always there when required . He was very helpful and we are very happy with our stay .

Central location and easy to find place. I had an event at the School of Public Health which was a. 5 min walking distance - this place was more convenient than any of the hotels. The hosts’ instructions were super clear! The place was clean and just as described.
One item that I’m not sure the hosts can control was a neighbor that smoked cannabis in the evening and in the morning when I was there. You could smell it in the studio and it was difficult to get away from it.
This is a cute, clean, convenient space. The hosts are clear and communicative.

Robin is an excellent hostess, and her house is homey and right on the water. Location is excellent-- it's just a short walk to the train that takes you right into the city. It was nice to have breakfast, and the bed was comfortable. We'd stay again!
Very responsive and a nice place as described.  Quiet neighborhood with some essential amenities across the street and downstairs.
Great location in Beacon Hill. Walkable to lots of great restaurants and pretty much any where in the city- if you like walking the city and we did. Thanks!

I had a fantastic stay at this home! The location couldn’t be better—just a short walk to great restaurants, coffee shops, and the waterfront. I loved being able to run along the ocean in the mornings and then head right into the heart of the Seaport area for dinner.
The home itself was spotless and very comfortable. Everything was exactly as described, and it felt welcoming from the moment I arrived. The hosts were responsive and friendly, making check-in and check-out seamless.
If you’re looking for a spot that combines comfort and proximity to great views and amazing dining, this is the place. Highly recommend!
Outstanding place with amazing view! Would definitely come back if traveling through the area! Very close to transit!
I highly recommend. we spent 3 nights and loved it, everything was perfect. I unfortunately did not see Katy but all the communication I had with her was very good.

This place was spotless. Very clean and easy to find and access. The apt was close to many places in the back bay. Super close to the Prudential center etc.
We did have an issue with the hot water, we didn’t have any after the first day. The team was super responsive and really helpful.
We enjoyed our stay.

Wow... Polly truly does go above and beyond. She supplied towels, a beautiful space. Check in was simple.  In the morning you wake up to a warm aroma of Polly baking a treat. We had the most delicious blueberry muffins she baked. Thank you so much Polly. We can’t wait to come back.
Second stay. Great location, can walk to southend restaurants, shopping, symphony T and fenway. Clean.  jessy is attentive.   On small side for 2, but well appointed and comfy

We were delighted with our accommodation for the week. Host was available for any questions but we had none as house was so well organised and labelled.

It was spotlessly clean, with a fantastic well equipped kitchen. I'm so jealous of your appliances. Extremely comfortable beds!! Excellent location with so much in walking distance. We used Uber to get about quickly, thanks for the tip Meri.

We will definitely stay here again on our next trip to Boston.
Very clean cute and welcoming ❤️❤️ loved sitting outside on the rooftop deck :)
We were pleased with our stay. Bernard has great accommodations. His efforts to make our stay enjoyable was apparent.
Not a bad price , quite walkable area, i had no problems with anything really

My husband and I stayed here over Memorial Day weekend to attend Boston Calling. The house was the perfect location (10 min walk away from venue). This is  probably the cleanest rooms I've ever stayed in. Marlene couldn't be any nicer and was very helpful with any questions we had. Would definitely stay again!
Extremely convenient and very nice place to stay!
We had a great stay! The place was just as it was pictured and the host was extremely responsive and flexible on our last minute booking! It was a great experience.

This home is perfect for a family. There are two basement bedrooms with their own bathrooms and a comfortable living space. My kids loved hanging out here after a long day of touring Boston. The main level bedroom was perfect for my husband and I after the kids had gone to bed. There is a park and splash pad a short walk from the house - perfect for letting the smaller members of our family get out some extra energy.
The kitchen in gorgeous and well stocked, there were plenty of towels and linens. The fixtures and appliances are high end, and the whole place had a lovely feel. It was about a 15 minute walk to any restaurants or grocery stores - a little longer than expected. But thankfully we could Door Dash groceries! As mentioned by other guests, you can hear little feet running around early in the morning. Not horrible, but worth noting if you plan to sleep in.
Easy communication, fast check-in, perfect location. Everything you could ask for, for a short stay!
Definitely not worth the money! Was not clean, was incredibly noisy with walls made of paper, nothing worked (tv, ac unit, lights out). Not as described and you can find a much better value elsewhere

Stayed at this place a few days. It was good overall. Looked liked the photos, easy check in. Even let me check in and out a little bit early/late.
However, I felt the place could have been a little cleaner...I saw coffee mug stains on a cup. It also could be updated/renovated.
All in all, it was good for the price

Entire living room was flooded from the air conditioning unit. We used the only two towels we had to mop up the water. Bathroom was dirty. Shower was disgusting and the sheets were dirty.
Pillows smelled like old men body sweat, and pretty sure they haven’t been changed in multiple years
Definitely not a good experience

The hosts embody genuine warmth and hospitality. They're welcoming, attentive, and quick to respond. They graciously offered us a swift tour of the stunning 1885 house and provided clear guidance on the best commute to the city, accompanied by fantastic restaurant suggestions.

It was a large apartment, even bigger than the pictures made it seem like. Adam was quick to respond and great to deal with. I’d recommend this place to any group looking for a stay in the Back Bay Area.
Great place for what we need do recommend and hope to book again when i revisit Boston.
in general good. Best to mention it’s on the 3rd floor without elevator for the sake of guests with large luggage.

The room is very clean and warm! The hosts prepared a lot of good things for us to travel, such as a map of Boston, toiletries, earplugs and so on. My friend and I had a wonderful stay in this room! Btw, this is probably the best Airbnb I've ever booked :)
Small space in a great location. A good spot for a quick overnight stay.
What a great find! Short walk from the airport, short walk to the subway, and near a ton of restaurant! The apartment is very clean and cozy making it the perfect Boston Oasis.

Penny and her house are amazing! It's so convenient for us to go everywhere around Boston. It's also very quiet and nice for a good sleep! Penny is so friendly and sweet. Her recommendations for restaurant and bakery are awesome! Definitely recommend!!

Nice space with a beautiful bedroom and comfortable bed. Booker helped us check in smoothly. Location is very convenient to the orange line and quick to downtown. Coffee and water bottles were greatly appreciated!

It was a great stay! It is a very quiet street but still very close to everything we wanted to do. The room was perfect for our needs. I wouldn’t recommend it if you have mobility issues as it has steep stairs, but if that’s not an issue for you, it was an absolutely lovely place to stay. Easy check in! Easy to find!

The hosts are so welcoming and helpful. They sent us a list of things to do in Boston during our stay and had so many little touches that made us feel like we were at home, such as homemade banana bread, snacks, coffee, water and beach supplies. The bedroom and bathroom are very well lit, clean and up-to-date. Highly recommend!

As everyone else has pointed out, the location can’t be beat. We stayed one night. If it was a longer stay, we might have wanted a little more natural light, but for a short stay when you want to be close to everything in one of Boston’s most beautiful neighborhoods, this is a great spot!
Just what we needed for graduation weekend. We rented it because of proximity. Was just what we needed. Thank you!
Very friendly. Quick responses.
We absolutely loved our stay. The apartment was very clean and quiet. The location was absolutely perfect. Very safe and beautiful neighborhood.  We fell in love with Boston!!
We had a great stay at Maverick's! Perfect location in Back Bay off of Newbury Street. Easy check in and quick communication through e-mail.
This place was exactly what we needed and Karolina was very helpful. I would definitely stay here again.
Muy buena estancia!

My stay was excellent. The property was exceptionally clean and matched the photos perfectly. The location is convenient, safe, and easily walkable to nearby amenities. Check-in was straightforward and well-organized. The space offered a good level of privacy and included thoughtful touches such as a Roku for entertainment. Overall, a well-maintained and comfortable accommodation that I would gladly recommend.

Estancia moderna y con estilo. Detalles únicos que hacen súper agradable la estancia! Está un poco alejado de la zona céntrica así que es importante saber los trenes y distancia de los puntos de visita a la ciudad.
Recomiendo plenamente los servidos. Anfitriones de lujo!

House was beautiful! Very clean and spacious
The best part was the little touches throughout that make guests feel special.

This unit is well located in Boston. Everything is as in the pictures. We had access to a small terrace, which was nice. But the shower was less than ideal (not much water pressure), and we couldn't lower the blinds completely.
Nice and quiet, like it very much
Great place to stay
Very clean apartment in a very cute neighborhood.  Stayed in walking distance of a conference and felt comfortable and safe.

I was only in Boston for the night as I had an overnight layover and this was the perfect Airbnb for that. I just needed a place to relax and get some work done. Boris and Susan have a lovely clean and organized home. Very close to the airport!
Michelle
Excellent location close to Fenway & City
Nice place

We had a great stay! The location is perfect. We were visiting family who live nearby, and it was the perfect home base. Elissa was very helpful and responded immediately when we had an issue with WiFi.
I highly recommend, especially if you need a comfortable and convenient place to stay in South Boston.
Kevin’s place was great for a weekend getaway !! 😊
Great place. Great host. Will be back!

Logement propre et bien situé, rien à redire, accueille parfait, je recommande le logement à Julian, si vous voulez faire une étape sur Boston. Communication parfaite, Julian est au petit soin pour savoir si tout se passe bien, je recommande son logement sans hésiter :)
The bnb was great. A quick commute to the city and lots of restaurants around the area
Excellent AirBnB in a market that is extremely expensive. This place is comfortable, surprisingly quiet and great value.
Frederick's place was great for the price,  lovely building, clean.
Apartment was exactly as advertised. Very clean and a great value for the price. Location is excellent and the neighborhood felt very safe. People/neighbors out walking their dogs late at night, etc.
Amenities, and room were clean and fully stocked.  Surrounding areas are near transients, but everything you want to see and eat at are near driving wise!

My friend and I stayed here during a concert trip. It was easy to find street parking and there are cool places to check out near by! Taking rideshares into downtown Boston was fairly cheap but it was also easy to take public transportation! You can tell the house has a lot of history, so this is such a unique place to stay. I would definitely recommend this place and would come back in a heartbeat!
Clean and quiet! Very cute space. Right off Newbury Street. Windows face an alley. Third floor.
Exactly what we were looking for! Clean, private, close to city and attractions. Only thing to mention is that the fireplace is a facade and actually only a mantle.

Jennifer was very helpful and a great host. Her rental is beautiful and exactly as pictured. Its walking distance to many of the local shops and eateries.
Our stay was comfortable and enjoyable.

We had a great stay at Charlesgate Suites for 5 nights as a family of four, including two small kids. It was very clean and comfy. Nice location - we walked along the Charles River and to the Pru and of course all around Back Bay. Taking the T was easy too! We loved our stay there.
Great spot! would definitely stay here again

I am a repeat customer - so that should say something about how wonderful this place is.  A true sense of "home" - distinguished, eclectic, inviting, comfortable, very well appointed, tasteful, and with a dash of whimsy!  All contained in a wonderful flat in the heart of Back Bay, within walking distance to all and everything.  And the host communication, thoughtfulness, and willingness to accommodate is like no other.  It is a very personal and personalized approach (the flat owner is truly lovely, as is the host). I have opportunity and reason to visit Boston semi-frequently, and this hands down is always my first choice (lucky if you can find an opening!).  Beautiful, and the best of which Boston has to offer - a wonderful, wonderful place.

Paul was very responsive to issues that we had with parking and when the wifi went down. The apartment is very centrally located, and the furnishings are modern and attractive. The bed and the sofa bed are not terribly comfortable, though.
Wish there were more kitchen supplies, tv was difficult to get going! Beware no cable. Elevator was a little creepy it’s extremely tiny. Bathroom had some long black hairs.
Great place, location is incomparable. Easy to communicate with host, she checked on us throughout the stay. Would recommend!

Lynda was very welcoming and accommodating, she had alphabet crackers for our girls and was always very timely in responses to questions. In addition she always made sure we had an adequate supply of fresh towels and ensured our stay was comfortable.
Great location and well furnished. Very responsive hosts. Easy place to crash for the night! Right in the heart of back bay, close to esplanade, back bay station, etc.

Location was great. Apartment was very clean. Host was accommodating and really nice. Only issues were the air B and B states you have a parking spot. You do but technically your on the schedule of the host and have to move when he needs to get out of the spot. The apartment was not ready for check in as I booked last minute and I was woken up every morning by the resident upstairs. They were taking a  peloton class at 6:45 am. You could hear every world. Using headphones could have been nice. Other than that great place to stay.

Booked this for a work trip and felt very lucky to be in this location. Read some reviews that noted the loud area, but I did not experience any problems with noise. The only challenge I encountered in this stay was that a few of the outlets and lamps in the apartment don't work. Otherwise I felt very comfortable and safe. Also grateful to be able to support this organization.
Everything was great, the apartment has all you need and a great location

We had a lovely stay in a great appartment. The public transportation is just a few minutes away so you can reach Boston fast.    We felt save in the neighbourhood but as we visited on the weekend it was rather loud at night.

Spent two nights and three days. The place was clean, spacious, and quiet. It's located about 20 minutes from downtown, which is very convenient. I appreciate the host being attentive and responsive. Overall, it was a great experience.

This place is so charming and convenient. I stayed for three nights and I feel really lucky to have scored this space for my Boston trip. The hosts put a lot of thought into providing a great experience. It’s very private and safe, the subway is a very short walk away and in minutes you are in downtown Boston. The shower pressure is great, and the coffee station was nice to have in the mornings. The bed is also super comfortable. I can go on about all the great details. If you’re coming to Boston, this place is great quality for the price.
Was overall great.
Great location near public transit and greenspaces. The host is super responsive and was available to assist. We would stay again in a heartbeat
A very clean space, which is always reassuring. Wifi worked great. Walkable for Starbucks/Dunkin.
This was a cute place to stay and location was ideal. Only downside was that parking was not street side. Other than that, would definitely book again!!
Bon rapport qualité/prix. Stationnement sur place un plus. 5 minutes à pied de la station de métro. Tres propre.

I stayed in the Bunk room and had a nice experience! It was my first time in Boston and both hosts were very welcoming and quick to answer any questions and give local recommendations. They were very flexible with early checkin/ late checkout which I really appreciated. The room is in a shared space so keep that in mind when booking. It is also located next to busy roads so traffic is a little loud. The place is very close to public transit (subway) and only takes about 10 minutes to get to downtown which is nice. Overall, it is a cute little spot for a weekend trip and I would definitely book here again. (:

Drew is friendly and easy to talk to. His apartment is super neat and clean! The bed was comfortable and breakfast was great. The place was decorated with taste and we are going to stay one more night at his place!
The unit is small, but in a good location and had free parking. The area seems to be for student housing, so expect there to be many college-aged people around the premise.

El lugar es muy céntrico, es muy cómodo y cuenta con los servicios en muy buenas condiciones; los anfitriones son muy amables y siempre atentos. Fue muy agradable nuestra estadía.
Saludos
Super comfortable bed in a well appointed garden apartment. Kitchen was great, design was stylish and everything felt orderly, which is exactly what I need when I'm traveling for work!

The host is awesome and super chill. Parking isn’t too bad we easily found parking on the same street as the house. If you want to a quiet spot outside of the busy city but close enough to be near it this is the place.
Great location, clean and easy! Would recommend

Great location close to the metro (2min walk)and great quality/price ratio. Simple but very clean, practical and comfortable. Communication with Jurek was very fast and easy. Maybe it is not for a romantic weekend in two as you share bathroom and kitchen but I can strongly recommend whenever you come to Boston for business/education or travelling on your own.
Had a great stay! The apartment was perfect for what we were looking for and our host was a great communicator.
Great space and location.
Great apartment and great location. It was perfect for the stay and would definitely stay again in the future.
Fantastic location.  Lots of space.  Loved the decor.  Worked very well for me and I always felt safe there.  Host is very responsive and helpful.
Very smooth self check in process, it was very convenient for us. Free parking on the backyard and safe area to walk around even at night close to everything.
Great house, lots of room, 5 min drive from the airport. Host is very friendly. Definetly recommend it !
Cleanest airbnb I’ve stayed in so far. Clean bathroom and very accommodating host. Nice smell and organized
Sehr schönes, neues und sauberes Appartment in guter und sicherer Lage. Mit Auto und öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln gut erreichbar.
Great location and cozy space to stay. Just had an issue with the wifi not working but otherwise a great stay.

Rafael’s place worked out perfectly for family gathering of 5. Easy access to both Logan airport and downtown. Dedicated space made a huge difference since one of us had a car and street parking was difficult.
Vibrant working class neighborhood with local restaurants and market on corner.
Place was sparkling clean and comfortable. Back porch perfect for morning coffee!
Couldn’t ask for more from our host.

This was the best Airbnb experience I've ever had! The easiest check in. The space was gorgeous and HUGE for two people. Everything was really clean and up to date. Loved the fully stocked kitchen and was able to cook breakfast in the mornings. The balcony was really nice to sit and relax after a long day. The bed was so comfy. The neighborhood isn't very central and not inconvenient either. We were able to get the subway or a $10 uber to most places. I would stay here again in a heartbeat!
Great location and clean apartment

Great weekend trip in Boston! Listing was walkable to all the main attractions and restaurants. Short walk to the subway station and parks. Would highly recommend and host was very responsive and friendly.

Boris and Susan host a lovely place; effortless check in and out; clean and neat bedrooms and bathrooms; an easy trip ($15-20 Uber) into downtown and the seaport districts; they were proactive and friendly. Recommended for a solo traveler as an affordable place to make your home base while you explore the city!
Lovely space! Lovely host! Great neighborhood!

We had a great stay! We only stayed one night, but we felt welcomed and comfortable. The house is beautiful and all original. The host was welcoming and helpful! Our room was homey and cozy. It’s close to the subway and other fun things to do. If we ever return to Boston, we would definitely stay here again. Tip: the subway is not too hard to navigate and much easier than driving in Boston.

The apartment was a fantastic find, cozy, clean, functional and in an excellent location (close to green line, bus, supermarket, etc), just like the pictures. It has everything you need to feel at home, and the host was attentive to our needs. I highly recommend it; we would definitely return.

Main room very clean, bathroom/shower did not feel clean. Location is fine and check in was easy but I did not have any other communication to judge it by (issues, etc). TV barely had a couple channels in which was annoying because we wanted to watch a movie and resorted to our phones. Overall I much overpaid and would not stay again unfortunately
The place was very nice and was a pleasant stay over.
My friends and I had a great trip and much of it was thanks to Mary! The location is perfect, the house was very historic and we had everything we needed.

I had a great stay in Bill and Maureen’s “B&B style” Airbnb. It was quiet and really great for working from home during the day. Although the weather and my schedule didn’t cooperate, there is a quiet beach nearby with some good areas to walk along the water.
I’d recommend this place particularly for groups who may need a couple separate rooms (the place has three altogether) or if you plan on using rideshares to get around the city.
Staying with Jill was amazing! Her home is great, close to many restaurants and parks but still very quiet. Jill is awesome, very helpfull and gives great tips what to do in Boston!

This was our second stay at Benjamin's rental.  He is a great host, always checking in to see how things are going and if anything is needed. Quick to respond to any messages we send him. His welcome guide is very helpful. Great, walkable location to the Boston College campus, Cleveland Circle area, the reservoir, and Brighton area restaurants. A quick Uber ride to Boston Logan Airport, too. Thank you, Benjamin!
We stayed here for three nights and it was the perfect spot to explore the city and have a cozy place to come home to. Communication with the Riverside team was quick and friendly.
A wonderful place to stay. The home is very pretty and in a very convenient and quiet area. Alex is very helpful and communicates very well with you.

Amazing location, amazing historic building. So much, so close. Weren’t in the room very much except for sleeping at night. Only issue was it was like 40 degrees outside and 80 in the room with the window WIDE OPEN. It was a little hot and there were explicit instructions not to turn on the AC.  Other than that, GREAT!
Great stay and location
Great place!
Highly recommend!
Amazing stay
Gianni is a great guy. House is really cool. Great location. Easy access to bus and trains.
Great location and plenty of space for our family of 5!
thanks it's in a very nice location!
I only stayed for a night but was comfortable. Alys accommodated me ordering delivery for dinner and allowed me to keep my breakfast in her fridge. A couple of sweet cats as well!

The loft was a beautiful open space with a great location- super close to the seaport where there is plenty to do for kids and furry friends. The space was clean and exactly as pictured. The 5pm check in was a little tough but I was also happy I could secure a later checkout and knowing we would have extra time before we left. Would recommend!

Overall good. The communication was great, very responsive and clear check-in and out instructions. Easy self-lock, safe building, fantastic location. The only major issue we had was that the elevator was broken (very old building and small elevator, which is expected in this area of Boston). However, we had to walk up and down a very narrow and windy 7 flights of stairs with our suitcases all weekend. This was difficult for us, fairly fit ~30 year olds. The stairs would have been nearly impossible for anyone with minor mobility issues, making the Airbnb completely inaccessible. We also found a few very large centipedes and some holes in the towels. Lastly, I would have liked an earlier check in time (5pm seemed very late) given the price of the place, but we paid extra to check in a few hours early which was a nice option.

The place was very clean & tidy.  She was very proactive with instructions about arriving & entering and very responsive to our questions.  The neighbor was was very quiet with a cvs, dunkin & liquor store in walking distance, maybe 1/4 mile away.
Claire is a great host, the house is clean and modern, very comfortable. East Boston is also a cool location with access to really anything you want to do.

There's not a more convenient location or more responsive host in Boston.  The location just off the Commons meant that everything was at my doorstep, while the apartment remains quiet and comfortable.  Elyne was very communicative and responsive to my enquiries.  A great place to call home for my visit to Boston!

Stayed here for a few days with my dad on a father-son trip. GREAT location  - near a grocery store, target, lots of local restaurants, a food hall, the stadium, and a Trillium brewing branch if you're into good beer. Rooms were clean and comfy, check in and communication was easy. It is a bit noisy outside on account of the nearby bars and college nightlife, but that's not a fault of the apartment (it is in a big city after all),  just would recommend earplugs if you're a light sleeper like me. Would recommend and stay here again!

Excellent experience in Hermina's house, such a great person and really clean a comfortable house. The only thing I'd add would be an air conditioner in the bedroom but other that that, awesome house.
Great location next to a T stop. Large amount of space and extremely clean! Very accommodating.

Great place! Would book again. It was just like the photos and had a very convenient self check-in and check-out. It’s close to everything you’ll be right in the middle of Boston not too far from everything. It wasn’t loud either.
Eileen was a lovely host and the unit is in a cute little neighborhood with everything you need nearby!

算是比较舒服的住宿。地理位置方便，离东北大学近。中介在线回复速度很快。
唯一的一些缺点是：冷气机对着床头，对着人的脑袋吹，就算调到最小档，也一直被风吹脑袋。建议房东把床换一个位置。
另外，刚住进来的时候发现床单并不是很干净，有一些细细碎碎的黑色灰屑，还发现了一只小蜘蛛。幸好我们带了自己的一次性床品。
Cozy place enjoyed our stay for the weekend
Great place for a couple days in Boston. Our group of five was very comfortable and enjoyed the easy access to the T and the nearby restaurants for takeout.

I was in town for business. This apartment met all of my needs (easy access, reliable Wi-Fi, kitchen essentials, cozy furnishings). It’s very centrally located, walkable to everything. The building is older and has a ton of charm, which I loved. The mattress was VERY firm, which didn’t bother me because I like a firm matters but if I didn’t it would’ve been uncomfortable. Would recommend this spot to a friend.
Perfect home base for exploring the city.  Cozy but definitely comfortable for 2.
Close to transportation, big kitchen, and close to the airport !
My second stay at Riyo’s. So comfortable and accommodating. I felt well-cared for!
Good place! Love the location to Fenway.

It’s a two bedroom advertised as housing up to four people but you only get one elevator fob and stairways are locked and not an option. Also, the elevator broke down three times trapping me. A resident informed us that this happens all the time. Very high price to live somewhere with dangerous elevator and one key.
This is a wonderful place in a fantastic location. The host was very professional. No problems , will be back.

Highly recommend! Hosts are friendly, helpful and make amazing food!
Would definitely return- thank you!

Lovely home and thoughtful touches. I was so impressed by the room and by the kindness of my hosts. I walked to the water every day to bike ride or read on a bench overlooking the beach. Quiet, quaint, perfect spot. You’ll love it!

Great place in the centre of Downtown Boston next to china town. Great starting location to explore Boston. Brilliant instructions from the host and always on call to help. Cosy area to chill and has everything you need for a stay.
Such a great space! Super clean and in a great area! Parking on the street wasn’t too bad. Overall, I had a great stay in Boston and would definitely stay here again!
Cool vibe, easy check in/out, advertisement is accurate, great location. I would recommend to friends.
Lovely stay close to the airport.

Amazing place. Cara was such a great host always communicated with us  quickly if we had questions.  Her place  was so close to downtown where we walked 90% of the time.  We felt at home  go to see a lot of Boston.

Stayed for 2 nights, Wednesday night - Friday morning and the club was loud Thursday night but with the AC and TV on it wasn’t so bad. No elevator and no parking but convenient location and lots of garages nearby.
It was a beautiful place and very nicely designed. Beddings, towers and soaps were all very nice. We will definitely visit again if coming to Boston.
Perfect location in Beacon Hill! We loved our stay and Kaitlyn was super responsive! We hope to come back soon!

My niece and I had a great stay at Shira’s place. Just the right amount of room, very comfortable bed and bedding, lots of thoughtful details like toiletries, and hooks on the bathroom and bedroom doors (SO helpful!). Very convenient to the Green Line, too, which was a big help. For any fellow runners, the Chesnut Hill Reservoir is close by, which is a lovely place to run, plus you can stop in one of the cafes you’ll pass to get breakfast on the way home!
Close proximity to all the great sites on Boston. Very clean! Just the right amount of space for two people touring the city for several days.
The place was clean and big. Had tons of bedrooms and beds, and the place was really central to everything you needed, especially Fenway and all it’s glory. Would totally stay here again.

I highly recommend staying at Violet’s place. It’s a very cozy apartment with a convenient location near the metro station. I really appreciated how much attention Violet puts into all the little details and thoughtful touches throughout the apartment. She is also very friendly and helpful, which made my stay even more pleasant.

Jonathan's place is very well designed, it's both aesthetically pleasing and comfortable to stay at. The space is spotless and cute, with many essential supplies sorted neatly. The location is convenient as well, within walkable distance to the train station and some great restaurants. Highly recommend this place to anyone who's visiting Boston!
Beautifull place love the design and colors.
I enjoyed our stay, easy to find + close to the T. The place was clean, the bed was comfortable. I’d come back here again.
Perfect little place to stay. Newly renovated, parking spot, clean and easy.
Had a great time here! Perfect location close to the Red line to easily get into Boston or Cambridge.
Fun location. I felt like I was in Italy. The best thing about this place is the location for the price. Comfy bed. Richard was great!

Dawn is probably one of the most thoughtful hosts in the AirBnB network.  We stayed at her place two years ago and this time we found that nothing had changed: it was clean, and every imaginable convenience is offered. There were snacks and a fridge full of beverages; board games and exercise equipment, TVs in each bedroom, shampoo and lots of toiletries. The keyless entry works well. The kitchen is well stocked and there is a good sized dining room for having meals. We appreciate the care Dawn takes with her guests and highly recommend her place.

Bleuty place was perfect!! everything was aa describe and VERY clean !!  parking was easy to find ! Next time im in the area i will for sure be going back there !! Thank you very much for making our stay great
This place was almost perfect. I highly recommend!!
Great place close to the theater district.  Everything was in walking distance

Zack’s place is great, the location cannot be beaten in beautiful Back Bay. Quick responses were appreciated and Zack and Michelle were great hosts. I highly recommend staying here if you’re visiting Boston.
we had a great time

My wife and I loved our stay here. There was ample work space for us as we both were working full time, lots of natural light, and so many parks / green spaces nearby to relax in when not on the clock. We were provided a fantastic guestbook with great neighborhood tips and check in couldn’t have been smoother. Next time in Boston, we will certainly be back.

This place was great - clean, comfy, easy walking to some restaurants and shops and the red line. The window in the shower was a little strange, but not really a problem if you're short like me. No issues with communication or check-in.

Great place ! I needed a last minute alternative to hotel I had booked. Mavericks spot is a restored building and is beautiful. Loved the stairway and the entrance. Room is a studio, comfortable, and in walking distance of downtown Boston area. I enjoyed it.

Location was great- close to esplanade on one side and Trader Joe's on the other. Walked the Freedom Trail from the condo and rented bikes to return. Spacious and spotless- kitchen well-stocked with all utensils. Communication was quick and reliable. Wonderful trip!

I stayed at Nemrac's place for two nights and can only recommend it. Very responsive host, walkable neighborhood and many options to buy groceries and food. Within less than ten minutes walking, you will reach Bowen Park - amazing view on the Boston skyline. Within less than 5 minutes walking, there's the Maverick station (blue line) which brings you to the city center. Nemrac is very friendly and made helpful recommendations.
You get what you pay for
Nice and comfortable place

The location near Boston Common is great, but we did not have a great experience at Brian + Heather's AirBnB.  Having paid careful attention to this location's noise ordinance policies, and understanding that Healing Homes of Boston has use of the entire building, we had anticipated a restful stay in Boston.  Unfortunately, on the first night of our stay, we were kept awake by a very loud party in the adjacent room until 2:00 AM -- at which point, local police arrived to disrupt the event.  The party itself, of course, wasn't Brian + Heather's fault.  But we had hoped their response would have been more helpful.  In hopes that they could "better manage the situation in the future," Brian + Heather offered to "send a note over tomorrow and slip it under the door to explain the situation to the guests. Maybe they're understanding enough to pipe down past 10pm. Worth a shot."  They informed us that they'd speak to the building manager in three days, and provide a credit to our next stay at their AirBnB in compensation for our bad experience.  Between that, unexpected interruptions from Brian + Heather's maintenance staff, and not receiving any help when we couldn't control the thermostat for the unit -- this all amounted to a less-than-favorable stay.  I'd recommend searching elsewhere for your stay in Boston.
Clean, simple, and plenty of room, in an excellent walkable location. Local parking options per the host’s suggestions worked well. Felt safe and was pretty quiet for a city apartment.

Huggy was very welcoming and curious during my stay. The room was small but more than enough for my stay I Boston for the summer. The place was very clean and i felt safe in the neighborhood it was located in.
it's a great experience to stay at Jonathan's house
Smallish, very clean room with an excellent shower and a super friendly staff. Location is the best for restaurants, bars and shopping.
amazing location, amazing place to live in. will definitely live here if i visit boston again, its so convenient that theres a subway station literally next to the apartment
This was a perfect place for our family to gather. We enjoyed the accommodations very much. The process was easy and the communication was superb.
Beautiful Home. Exactly as described.

Nice place to stay if you’re travelling in a group, the rooms were spacious and beds were comfy. Easy to find place, only downside was fighting for parking on the street but the host provided alternative parking solutions which was very nice. Very clean house and matches the photos.
Had a great stay!
We had a wonderful stay!  The house is clean and beautiful.  Great location!

The location is convenient and the price is reasonable, making it a good value overall. However, the place is in need of maintenance and a thorough cleaning. If cleanliness — especially in the bathroom — is a priority for you, this might not be the best option.
Beautiful home with amazing decor for a cozy. Peaceful feeling. Great amenities and good location.
Good

This cute apartment was a perfect for the night. It was easy to get to, clean and very close to public transportation. We were in Boston for a medical appointment and this was less than a mile away from where we needed to be.

Very convenient and comfortable place to stay in Boston. The house was well kept and the room was nice. Some of Peter’s guests occupy the living room, which was somewhat unexpected to me but the other guests were all really nice so it worked out well. Would stay there again if I return to Boston
Very nice and clean room great host would recommend
Incredible stay and in a great area! Had a great time and highly recommend
That place “the tower room” seams like a movie room it’s so charming and have an excellent view!
Siena is a great host and in a location that is accessible to food, activities and public transportation.
Easy stay for 1 night. Would def book again!
Overall it is a great place to stay when in boston
Very convenient location
Great stay. We appreciated the host’s information booklet that provided recommendations for restaurants and other things to do in the area. The property looked just like the photos!

What a wonderful place to stay if your visiting the Boston area.  The host was extremely kind and understanding.  The cottage was wonderful!  So cute, clean.  We loved it.  We also loved the wild turkeys in the morning.  What a great stay!  We will return!  Thanks again Mark!
Great location and very comfortable apartment. Nice living room open and connected to the kitchen.
a única melhoria seria uma cortina maus escura.

Prompt communication from the host. Great place. Spacious. Comfy beds. Clean. Awesome location on Boston Commons which allowed us to walk the city. Parking is available for extra fee directly in front of entrance which was well worth the price. As other reviews mention, there is a homeless  population on the front (non entrance side) of the  building which was a bit noisy in the mornings. We will definitely stay here again on our next trip to Boston.

Howard es un anfitrión excelente, atento y amable. Muy discreto, solo aparece cuando se lo necesita. La habitación es perfecta para lo que se espera de una breve visita a Boston. Si hubiese tenido que pasar una semana completa, seguramente me habría resultado chica, pero para dos noches fue más que adecuada. El lugar es limpio, bonito y tiene una ubicación excelente ya que la calle está a media cuadra la avenida principal de Little Italy y aún así, es un sitio muy tranquilo y seguro. Las comodidades incluyen una Netbook con WiFi, algo que es sumamente cómodo y realmente nos ayudó mucho. El sillón masajeador es una verdadera "atracción turística". No se lo pierdan. Resumen: si  viajas sola/o o en pareja (con mucha armonía porque el sitio es pequeño), seguramente la pasarás muy bien

We stayed in Catlin's place for Boston marathon weekend. It was a perfect setup for two families, with plenty of space. The apartment was clean and had everything we needed. Beds were comfortable and showers were wonderful!
The 3 minute walk to the orange line made it possible for us to not have a car. It was a 20 minute train ride into the city as well as the start of the race. Ryan was super responsive and helpful before we arrived and then with suggestions for food once we were there. We would definitely stay here again.
The room is tidy and clean, great location. Steven and the team are communicative and instructive.
Great location and price

This listing was all we could’ve hoped for! We traveled with our 3 med/large dogs and it isn’t always easy finding a place for us all. They took us right in when we requested booking, they were so kind to us and our fur babies. Place was spotless and clean. Location, location, location! Easy walk to multiple grass spots for our dogs and restaurants and major landmarks were close and easy to walk to! Multiple parking garage options close by also!
I like that Claire gives clear and detailed information.

This is an absolute gem of an apartment- we are a family of four and loved the location. Close to ymca gym, Wholefoods, Newbury street with awesome restaurants, coffee and bikes. The hosts were great and easy laundry too- great find!

Great place and location to explore Boston off Red line, and access Plymouth and JFK library locally. A very fun house with lots to check out on the walls from Whit's collecting. In the morning you may also see a flock of turkeys in the park.

Second time staying here. No issues with parking. Room was clean, AC was on upon arrival which was a nice touch. Nice and quiet, restroom conveniently just a couple doors down. King bed was comfortable. Mini fridge and microwave were perfect in the room. Will stay again.
Def recommend this lovely master bedroom in a great location! The house was very clean and warm,much needed in cold Boston!
Nice place to stay in Boston. It's very close to the airport and subway station. Definitely recommend it.

Daryl’s place was exactly what we needed. Perfect place to crash while we were attending an event in Boston. Super clean and comfortable. Daryl was very easy to communicate with and even helped me retrieve my phone charger when I left it behind by accident.
It’s a good location. Easy check in. Had fun in Boston.
It was great staying at Jonathan’s place!
Great location, great price, need to improve communication with individuals arriving late.  If driving, be sure to find out from Hermina where to park.

Todd’s place was nice and clean. I like the place that has a back years parking lot for free. It is a plus to his place. The room is heated and provided with basic items for brief traveling. Thanks for having us!
for a traveler, the stairs are so bad if I have two big bags ...anyway , thank you
Terrific location, just minutes from Symphony Hall, and from both the Green and Orange Lines of the T (subway system).
This is a lovely spot!
Great apartment in Fenway. Perfect location for going to games. Parking can be tough, but lots of great restaurants and stores within walking distance made it easy to navigate.

This lovely brownstone is spacious, well-equipped, and charming, with a superb location in JP.  A beautiful magnolia was just beginning to bloom outside the front window and the architecture of the residential buildings in this area is phenomenal.
pretty cute place for a short stay

Fantastic location, easy walk to the subway.
Lots of restaurants nearby , even a food court just a 2 min walk from apartment.
Easy walking distance to Faneuil Hall & Boston Commons & Boston Harbour.
Only complaint was the toilet flush handle was a bit faulty but the hosts were very responsive in solving it.
Rooms were big and the kitchen , dining area & living area were very spacious for 6 persons. The only suggestion is for hosts to provide some basic seasoning spices, and maybe some tea leaves and coffee satchets to provide a more enjoyable experience for guests. Otherwise, a very enjoyable stay!

If I could leave more than five stars I would. I was here for a work trip and the entire time I felt as if it were a vacation. I felt right at home and so comfortable. The unit was spotless upon arrival and stock with everything you could need. The team managing the unit responded to EVERY message no later than a minute. They are very good with communicating and work hard to ensure your stay is perfect, which it was! The location itself is lovely. There are grocery stores, convenience stores and shopping stores in walking distance. I recommend Avenue De Lafyette Parking Garage for parking (They are right down the block). I will definitely be returning next time I am in Boston. I HIGHLY recommend.

Joseph's place is quiet and clean, the room is his son sam's room, so it's cute little boy's style as showed on picture, the bed is cozy. There is a plus to stay in Joseph's house: you will experience live with lovely animals-Ralph, a smart 8 year old Bichon, and a goldfish-right in your room, which I feel really interest .
Merci Moon pour votre accueil. La chambre et la salle de bain sont propres. La chambre peut se fermer grâce à un code. Vous serez à 5min d’un arrêt de bus.

Awesome apartment! The place was so cute and charming. Lots of unique touches, which we really appreciated. The view was lovely, and I liked that there were two mirrors (much needed with three women).
We appreciate you having us again. Thank you!
We really have appreciate our time there. Thank you!
Place was as expected!
Great unit and hostess.  Home away from home!
很开心的入住，每晚都可以休息的很好，在波士顿也玩的很开心。

Really cozy apartment, and a fun place to be! Incredibly close to Boston’s public transportation, and I found it to be a really great spot of Boston to stay in. In between Boston College, and the city, which was great to commute either way. Would definitely stay here again!

Gina's place is perfect. It is close to everything, restaurants, sites, public transportation but without the noise and hustle of the city. When you stay at Gina's you can feel the history of this great city. When you leave, your only regret is not having more time to spend here. My family and I will definitely stay here the next time we visit Boston.
This place was amazing. Was definitely recently renovated and it showed. Neighborhood was nice too.

Firlian is a great host that is always reachable, helpful and does everything he can to make your stay comfortable. Would stay with him again.
Thanks for everything!

The home is incredible, the pictures truly don’t do the size of it justice! The kitchen is great, includes Landry facilities and iron etc.
Despite being close to the train tracks we slept incredibly well and the bed is real comfortable.
Would absolutely stay again if we are ever back in Boston, couldn’t recommend highly enough!

Yan est très réactif et accommodant. Le logement était disponible à partir de 16h. Nous sommes arrivés plus tôt, Yan nous a permis de stationner la voiture bien avant 16h. Nous sommes aller marcher à Harvard en attendant c’était super. Nous allions voir Pearl Jam au Fenway. Ça se fait très bien à pied.
Devora's home was truly lovely, and as a host was very kind and welcoming!

I was in Boston to drop my son off at his apartment in Allston and needed a quiet place to sleep for the night.  So I rented a room from Clara and it was perfect: quiet, very reasonable price-wise,clean, minutes from Allston and the Mass Turnpike, and nice and cool as the room had its own window air conditioner I could adjust.  Clara was kind enough to put some beer in the fridge for her guests.  At the end of the evening, I sat on her porch extending from the upper level apartments to relax and wind down.   Clara was very responsive and I would stay there again.

Matthew was incredibly accommodating during my stay!  He is a wealth of knowledge and very helpful regarding tips of the area, etc.  Little touches (i.e. the in room bottle of water upon arrival) were incredibly thoughtful, as well as his communication being impeccable.  I would gladly stay at his home again.  Thank you for the pleasant experience!

Shannon's place is the perfect spot for a small group. It is stylish and spacious. Just far enough from all the hub-bub, but close enough to be an inexpensive cab ride. There's a cute little strip a few blocks away with quality restaurants and bars. It's in a picturesque neighborhood that seems steeped in history. Shannon is an easy communicator who's glad to help. The photos really don't do this place justice. Loved our stay.

A lovingly restored/renovated home with amenities like a boutique hotel, you’ll be in a quiet neighborhood but close enough to lively restaurants, bars, events, etc., that public transit  or walking/biking is a real option. Super close to two beautiful parks including one right on the harbor with a beach and enclosed swimming lagoon. A real jem!
Very responsive and went above and beyond to ship an item that was left on accident! Would recommend.

Wonderful and attentive hosts! And a great shared space. Hosts made it very comfortable, as they left small toiletries and snacks for guests. Apartment is in a great location and hosts made it easier to figure out parking with all the info on the check in sheet provided. Would definitely recommend a stay here and would 100% return.
The room was very clean and tidy. Always found street parking. Would stay again!

The location and free parking space were perfect for our stay. The neighborhood is very pretty and convenient to excellent restaurants and shopping. Jessy and Diego were very responsive and reached out to check on us regularly. I definitely recommend this location for a Boston stay!
Súper nice place

Stephanie went above and beyond for making my stay so comfortable. Every detail of the apartment is lovely; from the floor to the ceiling!  She was soooo  helpful with all of my questions and even gave plenty of references for places to see and foods to eat! You will never be bored! I hope to come back and stay here again :)! Thank you for being the best host ever and making my first time experience in Boston a memorable one!

Definitely not a long walk from this apartment to the Boston childrens hospital (10 mins) which was super convenient to me. They have really good cleaners and had a lot of amenities. Overall great stay and would come back!
Amazing property in a perfect location. Highly recommend!
Absolutely great place and really nice host. Definitely a great choice if u wanna stay in Boston for a while. Really nice experience.

This space is a great value. I was in town to move my middle child back to Boston and needed an inexpensive place to stay in or near Jamaica Plain. Fredrick’s place fit the bill. It was clean and the most inexpensive place that I could find in the area. There is no off s street parking, but on street parking is plentiful and free.  Check-in was a breeze. Fredrick was very prompt with answering questions too. I would definitely utilize the space again.

A lovely apartment down a lovely street. Parking was easy on Linwood. Loved the back porch. Next time I am cooking. Alex has the dream kitchen! The bedroom is downstairs so, I actually slept through the night! Alex is very easy to communicate with. His house rules explained everything so read them. Park your car and get Uber if you’re going out for dinner. So easy. We ate at B & G’s for dinner. Breakfast at Milkwood. Both were friendly and very good. Orange line is minutes away. Affordable place to stay minutes away from the city.
Good location near a subway station. The room was clean and well supplied. The bathroom was very nice with a heated floor that is definitely nice if you end up in town during cold weather.
Perfect location and nice place. Only complaint is the fitted sheets were too small and the shower drain was slightly clogged.

Irida’s home was very welcoming! Location is quiet and not crowded finding parking was no problem. My group and I appreciated that Irida took the time to leave out the bus/train schedule. We enjoyed that the bedrooms were spaced apart, but we were still able to come together in a group in the living/dining area.
absolutely perfect
Beautiful place a lot of little accommodations. And very close to the train station
Nice place to stay if in Boston, but place was kind of warm when we were there and beds are very firm.
Beautiful stay in an amazing location! Responsive host. We had a great trip here.
Awesome little getaway while exploring Boston !  All you need plus coffee!!! We did all the exploring by foot!
Wonderful hosts, a great space and neighborhood.  We felt so welcomed.

This home is as advertised, beautiful and spacious. It is a short ride to the airport or other attractions you may want to check out in Boston. Meri was  easy to get a hold of if I had questions or concerns.   We had a great stay.
anne真的太好了！无敌的热情友好！五星真的不足以赞美她～～从我们还没有到达她就一直主动给我们提供帮助，顺利到达以后还告诉我们哪里可以坐车哪里的餐厅好吃，真的非常感动啊！！房源方面也性价比很高，住宅区非常安静，床铺也很舒适，托anne的福我们度过了非常开心的三天～
Awesome place! Would highly recommend if you’re looking for quality, great sanitation, this place is perfect.
Easy check-in! Great home!!
Jonathan’s place was a perfect, beautiful escape after a long day of sightseeing. It’s full of light, comfy bed, Netflix & private bathroom!
Great location, near a Savin Hill redline station so you can get into downtown Boston easy. There’s a few bars and nice places to eat.
Daryl’s place was very comfortable and suited our needs.  One of the most comfortable beds I have slept in.  Daryl was always quickly responsive to any questions we had!

This is a good option for visiting Boston. It’s very close to the train station and right next to a UPS with a luggage storage service. The hosts were very responsive and all instructions were very clear. The neighborhood around this Airbnb is very safe and cute.
bathroom is across the hall with the same passcode!!!!!!!!!!!
Benjamin's place was neat and clean. It was close to downtown. We had nice experience. Thanks Benjamin

We had a very pleasant stay here. The room is comfortable, much space, well equiped and the bed is soft. The bathroom is al you need, but a bit small. The location of the house is very good if you are in Boston to discover the city. Everyone was quiet in the house, as well as the neighbourhood. The stairs are very steep, so you need to be fit enough to get them to the third floor. Overall a nice place to stay in Boston!

Jenny was an extremely courteous host.  She was always ready to help if i had questions. Location was great with walking distance to stop and shop + a beautiful view of the city from the balcony. Would recommend and stay here again.
We had a great stay, the host is always responsive and the unit has many amenities. Nice and peaceful surroundings. Amazing location.
The apartment is in a very central location and ideal for a city trip for two people.
Great location, lovely apartment, great host - thank you
Great location.  A real gem!

Susan and Boris are very communicative. The place is clean and I enjoyed my stay there!
I recommend this Airbnb!

Lance and Shelly were exceptional hosts! So friendly and inviting and Shelly even took the time to give us great tips on things to do in Boston. The room was cozier than I expected and everything we needed was there. The house is also so conveniently located near the airport. Overall, they made our trip worthwhile and I would definitely stay here again!
Great place to stay and very walkable from Newbury street and back bay activities! Thank you for the great stay
Alles top, vor allem die gute Musik beim Frühstück und der Pool

Kaitlin’s place is great! There’s a beautiful park right across the street with a gorgeous view of the city. Kaitlin is a wonderful host, so helpful and accommodating, very responsive. Highly recommend this stay!
Great spot for getting to Fenway!

Appartement très propre, très bien situé, près du métro. Petit problème de bruit vers 5h du matin, ramassage des conteneurs de poubelles en dessous des fenêtres.  Suite à un dégat des eaux, le plafond de la chambre s'effrite et aurait bien besoin d'une réparation. Steven et son équipe ont été très réactifs pour nous donner toutes les instructions nécessaires, mais nous avons passé un bon séjour

we had a great time at Jessica's place, she's really fun to talk to and very easy-going and helpful.
the apartment is not big, but quite functional, plus the location is great (close to the subway station, great neighborhood) and the patio is really perfect for evenings.
thank you for everything Jessica!
This spot is a great time, I would strongly recommend coming here for your next trip into Boston. Super easy Uber ride away from just about everything you could want to do in the city.

Our stay at Maverick’s suite was perfect and amazing. The place is cozy, perfectly cleaned and is impeccable! We simply loved the suite and the place!
Maverick has an excellent service, he answers immediately any question you have, the check-in is perfect and relaxed! the information and indications provided were precise and clear, we found perfect the place and we didn’t have any inconvenient, everything went perfect, excellent and premium service!
They are always checking if you need everything; Maverick’s service and hospitality are simply unique and perfect!
We loved the details and the suite has everything you need; it was nice arriving and enjoying this cozy place! You can also use the washing machine of the building to wash your clothes if you need which was perfect!)
Just outside in the same building you find a perfect and little boutique market with fresh fruits, food, and everything you need! the location is amazing simply perfect to walk everywhere. It’s so nice to walk around Newbury Street and find excellent coffee shops and cozy places to enjoy Boston, it’s perfectly located around excellent restaurants, we went twice to Atlantic Fish for the “Clam Chowda” which we loved! We went also for amazing espresso to Cafe Susu ( Suit Supply boutique), Caffe Nero, loved the cozy “Trident” coffee &
Booksellers! And also Maverick sent us excellent recommendations near the suite in the same street, and also some excellent recommendations to visit in the city, thanks for that too!
Maverick for us is a Superhost! Our stay in Boston was perfect and we definitely highly recommend Maverick’s suite, and of course we want to come back again to Boston and stay again in the suite!
Thanks so much for the amazing hospitality Maverick, we loved your place!!
Great place and walkable to everything.
great place

Fantastic place in a great location!!
The apartment is just a short walk from the Public Park, Boston Commons, the Charles River and all the shops/restaurants Newbury Street has to offer.

Pros:
• Bigger than expected
• Safe neighborhood (but area surrounding not great)
• Games & movies to watch
• Full kitchen to use
Cons:
• No AC (big problem during the summer, fans were not strong specially for two people)
• Spiders (& other insects, as well as spider webs) within the entire basement
• Multiple stains on the bed sheet
• Location surrounding wasn't great (not the host's fault, but lots of homeless people & it looked sketchy)
• Wifi wasn't working at the beginning. We messaged the host, she reset it, it worked for a bit then it stopped working

We were thrilled to stay in the heart of Boston in a beautiful luxurious apartment but was suddenly surprised after checking in and getting settled to learn there was no heat throughout the unit. Our initial response was to reach out to the owners of the apartment and try to resolve the heating situation which I was greeted pretty quickly that they would remotely program the heat within the unit. Soon after I received the response stating that unfortunately this unit did not have the heat set up ans that they would have somebody come by to get that rectified as soon as possible the following day. That wasn’t the response we were expecting but we looked forward to a nice and cosy night following. While we were out during the day and eventually returned back to the apartment we realise that nothing was fixed and we had to spend our last night in the freezing cold with no follow-up response from the owners Brian and Heather. That was just one of the issues that caused the vacation to not go so well. The other was communication about parking which was not very fun because I could not get a straight response in regards to if parking in front of the unit was allowed and it took about 24 hours to get a response on how much it would cost if we did require parking in front of the unit. Overall I wouldn’t use this apartment again only because the communication was not up to par and the parking situation is a little iffy. Granted the unit is beautiful and if those problems that I mentioned were resolved in some way and communication was better then I would have immediately given this five stars but I couldn’t see myself doing that now based off our stay there last week.

We were very happy with our stay, the location, walkability to the T, and the home overall. The room was larger than expected. Glad to have the AC after walking that hill, and the stairs, each day! Thank you!
Great place and great location! Easy instructions for check in and out. Clean, quiet. Great find!

Le logement de Charles est très chaleureux, nous y avons passés de bons moments, nous recherchions pour notre voyage un appartement de caractère est c'est le cas, l'environnement est calme et une place de parking est prévue a l'arrière de la maison. Un petit bémol néanmoins, la maison possède bien un lave linge et sèche linge mais à pièces, ce qui n'est pas très pratique

Great place to stay! Only a 10 minute walk to the T, so it was easy to get around. The place itself is perfect for a solo traveler. I didn’t spend a ton of time at the Airbnb, but it had everything I needed for my trip!

Perfect location near mass pike, points west, and easy to get into downtown. Driveway parking came in so clutch. The unit itself has amazing natural lighting and super comfy beds. Will hopefully be able to stay again on next trip if it isn’t booked!

The loft was beautiful, and it was exactly as described. The beds were comfortable, and the kitchen was amazing. Aaron and Lu were extremely fast to respond to any questions, and they were very helpful and friendly. The loft is a very close walk to the Boston Commons, which was very convenient for getting to the buses for the Boston marathon. We had a great stay, and I would highly recommend this spot to anyone wanting to enjoy Boston or running the Boston marathon!
I was only there for a night but the check in/out process was smooth.

We had a wonderful stay. Lucio and Carolina were extremely helpful with an early check-in and recommendations for restaurants and coffee shops within walking distance! We enjoyed meeting and talking to Lucio!
Very friendly and accommodating!!

Our first trip to Boston and I am so happy we stayed at Chris and Samantha apartment. It was very clean and comfortable. We were somewhat worried about the stairs but didn’t find them too difficult (we are age 69 and 74).
The location is in the heart of the North End with many fantastic Italian restaurants within easy walking distance.
We felt really safe in the neighborhood.
There are grocery stores , several bakeries and a fantastic butcher shop in easy walking distance.
Chris and Samantha were extremely helpful and communication was easy.
We would happily recommend this property and plan on returning in the future.
Great Location and a very reachable host.
Maverick’s place is modern and clean, we had a pleasant and hassle free experience.

We enjoyed our stay! This is definitely a micro studio so space was tight, but it was clean and had the basics and was in a GREAT and accessible location. Check in and out also very easy. Close to everything we needed. Also a thoughtful and responsive host.

Location, location, location!!! Jessy and Diego’s studio is in the perfect location within the Back Bay area!! Very quick walk to Newbury Street, Boston Common, and the Prudential Center. I even walked to a game at Fenway, as well as the North End and Chinatown. I could not recommend a better and more safe / peaceful location. Special shout-out on the available parking space (although I didn’t use it). Lastly, Jessy and Diego are phenomenal communicators and check-in was incredibly clear! If you’re up for a small studio (that could use a little bit of a furniture update 😊) in the perfect location, this is the place to stay! Highly recommend to single travelers or couples who’ll spend their trip walking to the sights!
Amazing location and very helpful and responsive hosts.  Very comfortable mattress.  Exposed brick walls had a lot of character.
Great place if you like Chinese food 😆😆😆

Sophia was extremely responsive and so kind! We were there for the Boston Marathon weekend and this made for the perfect stay, especially because of the location. We had two people and it was the perfect size for us!
As advertised, great spot for the value . Pizza shop next the the room was good.  Perfect for quick stay in the city .
Great location if you want to be in the energy of the Theatre District. A short walk to Boston Common which is beautiful. Steven set us up perfectly and made our stay very easy.
Penny’s place is great. Clean, well-located, and Penny’s an accommodating host. Would stay there again!
Clean house and very attentive host. Would definitely come back!
